# Resonance Dream Sandbox вҖ” prototype index

This is the single page Karel opens each morning. It mirrors the live
index at `/dream/` (the Vercel preview URL). Click a route to play
with the prototype; click the design notes link to read the agent's
thinking.

Status legend: `skeleton` (route exists, not yet interactive) В·
`wip` (partial) В· `demoable` (works, rough) В· `polished` (refined).

---

### [2064-room-cairn](/dream/2064-room-cairn) В· **the ROOM plays the instrument вҖ” you build (and un-build) a phasing cairn of collisions hands-free, just by clapping, snapping and tapping into the air, then falling silent** В· **what if you performed music with your body and your room's acoustics вҖ” no screen taps at all вҖ” and could un-build it by going quiet?** DEEP-mode winner (cycle 845), 1 of 3 parallel embodied re-inputs of the jury's #1 named standout **[`1990-impact-cairn`](/dream/1990-impact-cairn)** ("Extend this one"). **Cycle 2 of Impact Cairn**, re-inputted off the jury-banned pointer onto the room. **The engine is 1990 verbatim** (modal-impact synthesis вҖ” no scale, no pitch, deliberately inharmonic, **not the banned Chladni bell**; the consequential editable-memory "un-build" grammar) вҖ” the only change is the input layer. **The new subsystem is a real onset detector (`onset.ts`):** ambient mic вҶ’ `AnalyserNode` (fftSize 1024) on the engine's own `AudioContext`; per frame it computes **spectral flux** (sum of positive bin-to-bin energy increases), fires a strike on an **adaptive threshold** (rolling mean + marginВ·std + floor, sensitivity-scaled) with a ~100 ms **refractory** so one clap = one strike; the onset frame's **spectral centroid** picks the MATERIAL (bright snap >3400 Hz вҶ’ droplet В· >2200 вҶ’ ceramic В· >1200 вҶ’ wood В· dark thud вҶ’ stone) and peak amplitude вҶ’ velocity. **The un-build grammar is intact but now hands-free:** after a вүҘ2-onset burst falls silent ~1.4 s the figure **auto-lays** into a looping layer, so you build a phasing cairn (Reich) without touching the screen; knock-off (audible loss + tumble), material-transform, mute, clear stay reachable as chrome buttons (the ban is on pointer/touch as the *play* gesture, not on control chrome). Per-strike `navigator.vibrate` haptics. **Output:** dark field, DOM pebbles/stones, no strobe, `prefers-reduced-motion` aware вҖ” near-non-visual, audio-first (the embodied/audio-only lane jury 2026-07-20 #4 asked the lab to *hold*). **Degrades:** no mic/denied вҶ’ the deterministic seeded ghost keeps performing + on-brand `text-destructive` notice; audio blocked вҶ’ visuals + ghost timing still run. **Self-demo:** a `mulberry32` constant-seed ghost (all timing off the `AudioContext` clock вҖ” no `Math.random`/`Date.now`/`performance.now` in any audio/state path) builds and un-builds forever with zero input, so it renders + demos headless; real onset takes over instantly, re-arms after ~15 s silence. Named refs: **J. P. Bello et al., "A Tutorial on Onset Detection in Music Signals" (2005)** (spectral flux) В· **Steve Reich, _Clapping Music_** (phasing) В· **Pauline Oliveros, _Deep Listening_** (eyes-closed listening); 1990's own anchor is Kato & Baba's SIGGRAPH 2026 droplet-impact interface (live this week). `state: embodied percussion / eyes-closed room-play В· input: mic-onset (non-pointer) В· output: audio-primary + minimal DOM В· technique: spectral-flux onset вҶ’ centroid material-classify вҶ’ modal-impact + editable-memory un-build grammar В· harmony: none (collisions, non-Chladni) В· pole: embodied/audio-first`. **Ambition honest 3/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems: onset detector + modal-impact engine + un-build memory + haptics = 4 В· #3 named refs Bello/Reich/Oliveros В· #4 multi-cycle вҖ” an explicit cycle-2 of 1990, cashing the jury's 0Г— depth gap). **NOT ear/mic-verified headless** (no room sound in CI) вҖ” the mic path (flux threshold, centroid bands, haptics) is validated by reading `onset.ts` + reasoning; only the ghost + synth + grammar are build-exercised, so real-room tuning needs a live device. Cycle-3 deepening (folded from the 2 non-winners): add **device-motion** (flickвҶ’strike, shake-to-shed) and **MIDI+keyboard + pulse-lock** as alternate input modes вҖ” see IDEAS В§845. **demoable**

### [2058-aura-fortress](/dream/2058-aura-fortress) В· **the migraine visual aura as a drug-free altered-perception journey вҖ” a shimmering zigzag "fortification" arc creeps across the field, scintillating, dragging a blind scotoma behind it, while a migrating spectral notch carves that blindness into the sound** В· **what if a screen + sound could induce a real, drug-free altered-perception state вҖ” the scintillating scotoma of a migraine aura вҖ” with no drug and no input?** WIDE-mode winner (cycle 844), 1 of 3 divergent psychedelic explorers. **Autonomous вҖ” no pointer/touch/mic;** "Begin" only unlocks audio, then a ~5.5-min journey plays itself. **The visual is a CSD (cortical spreading depression) traveling reaction-front:** a wavefront radius `R(t)` expands from a fixation origin; at the front sits a bright **scintillating band** with procedurally-generated **fortification herringbone zigzags** (band-local `u`/`v` coords, diagonal flips per cell вҖ” the classic Vauban-rampart look, tangent to the arc); just behind it a desaturated **scotoma** band with faint static, then the field recovers, so the blind region *travels* rather than accumulating; the C-shape's angular half-width grows so the arc opens from a near-central spot into a wide peripheral sweep. Rendered in a **WebGL2 fragment shader** in retinal/screen space вҖ” **no log-polar/exp() warp (banned), no SVG-DOM (banned)**; degrades to audio-only + on-brand notice if WebGL2 is absent. **Audio is coupled by the SAME per-frame wave-state, not a soundtrack:** the scintillating edge вҶ’ a bandpass-tracked shimmer of drifting inharmonic partials (irrational ratios `1, 1.487, 2.113, вҖҰ`), the scotoma вҶ’ two cascaded `notch` biquads that sweep a soft drone so the "blind" region is an **audible traveling hole**; non-JI, non-pentatonic, **not the banned Chladni bell `1/2.76/5.40/8.93`**. Everything migrates over the journey so minute 5 вү  minute 1. **SAFETY:** luminance is a **sinusoidal 2.6 Hz drift (вүӨ3 Hz), floored so it never hits black вҖ” no hard strobe anywhere;** the audio tremolo shares that same 2.6 Hz LFO; `text-xs` photosensitivity note + instant Stop. Named refs: **Karl Lashley (1941)** self-mapped his own aura, **Aristides LeГЈo (1944)** discovered CSD, **McLeod et al. (2025, _Headache_)** вҖ” the first-ever direct intracranial recording of CSD in a human aura patient (this cycle's В§844 research anchor). `state: migraine aura / scintillating scotoma (drug-free altered perception) В· input: none/autonomous В· output: WebGL2 shader В· technique: CSD traveling reaction-front + fortification zigzags (grep-0Г—) В· harmony: inharmonic shimmer + migrating notch (non-JI) В· pole: intense-slow`. **Ambition honest 3/5** (#1 grep-0Г— CSD/scintillating-scotoma technique + #3 named refs Lashley/LeГЈo/McLeod-2025 + #5 В§844 dive). **NOT eye/ear-verified headless** (no display/speakers) вҖ” the CSD wave + notch coupling validated by reading the shader + audio graph; the felt experience is unconfirmed. 2 more explored this fire (вӯҗ `2062-flame-genome` fractal-flame CEV, вӯҗ `2060-spin-dome` ambisonic spin) вҖ” see IDEAS В§844. **demoable**

### [2052-slow-radiance](/dream/2052-slow-radiance) В· **an autonomous harmonic engine drifts a cluster of spectral voices across a non-octave lattice for 6+ minutes, and a real diffusion-curve light-field re-voices to follow вҖ” you see the chord you hear** В· **what if a screen + sound, with no interaction at all, carried you into a boundless meditative state purely by evolving themselves?** DEEP-mode winner (cycle 843), 1 of 3 parallel approaches to one concept (autonomous cosmic-ambient diffusion-curve nebula). **Rescues the lab's вӯҗвӯҗ banked `diffusion-field` after the jury 2026-07-20 banned pointer/touch input** by making the field autonomous. **Audio LEADS visual (the inversion):** a generative **BohlenвҖ“Pierce** engine (tritave 3:1 split into 13 equal steps, note = 55В·3^(k/13); consonance clusters near the 3:5:7 chord) drives 6 sustained sine+detuned-partial voices that glide (portamento), fade in/out, and slowly reharmonise root+voicing so minute 6 вү  minute 1 вҖ” genuinely non-octave, **not the banned JI partial-stack, not 12-TET/pentatonic, not the Chladni bell**. Each sounding voice is handed to the field as a **fixed Dirichlet colour cell** (pitch-class вҶ’ angle, register вҶ’ radius, role вҶ’ warm bone/gold/amber + one teal accent). **The field is a real Poisson/Laplace relaxation, not a blur:** WebGL2 ping-pong Jacobi, ~200Г—200 RGBA8, ~24 passes/frame on a persistent (trailing) buffer, painterly display (glow + Reinhard tone-map + vignette + grain); degrades to the same rule on a 100Г—100 Canvas2D CPU grid, then to audio-only with an on-brand notice. Autonomous вҖ” one "Begin" click only unlocks Web Audio; no pointer/mic input. Named ref: Diffusion Curves (Orzan, Bousseau, WinnemГ¶ller, Barla, Thollot, Salesin вҖ” SIGGRAPH 2008; live-2026 thread arXiv:2408.09211); cosmic-ambient lineage Radigue/Eno/Basinski. `state: hypnagogic / meditative boundlessness В· pole: cosmic-ambient`. Multi-cycle #4: cycle-2 = weave in Karel's real Path piano (Paulstretch spectral-freeze) as the audio seed + a mic room-tone deepener. Full teardown. **Not verified on a real display/speakers headless** вҖ” the felt experience is unconfirmed. **demoable**

### [2046-orbit-transit](/dream/2046-orbit-transit) В· **the satellites and the ISS passing overhead right now, sung as an evolving Doppler-swept chord вҖ” music about real traffic in the sky** В· **what if the sky's orbital traffic became a chord that re-voices as passes rise and set?** WIDE-mode winner (cycle 842), 1 of 3 divergent explorers. A seeded constellation of 14 satellites is propagated as circular orbits in a simplified ECI frame; a co-rotating 42В°N observer converts each to topocentric **range, range-rate, elevation, azimuth** every frame (deterministic вҖ” mulberry32 seed `0x2046` вҖ” so the sky is identical on every load and self-drives with zero input). **Each visible pass is one sustained voice:** altitude вҶ’ base register (low orbit brighter/tenser, high orbit lower, log-continuous), **range-rate вҶ’ a continuous Doppler pitch-bend** (approaching rises, departing falls вҖ” portamento, never a stepped scale), elevation вҶ’ loudness/brightness (peak at zenith), azimuth вҶ’ a real `StereoPannerNode` pan; the current sky IS the current chord, re-voicing as passes begin and end. Voice pool capped 10 with elevation voice-stealing, 2 detuned osc вҶ’ lowpass вҶ’ gain-env вҶ’ panner, synth convolution reverb, glue compressor + limiter, master 0.14. **Non-JI вҖ” no fixed scale, no ratio lattice, no pentatonic**, only continuous glide between physically-derived frequencies. Output is **audio-forward + minimal SVG-DOM** (a hemispherical sky dome built once and attribute-mutated via refs вҖ” off-GPU; no canvas/WebGL/WebGPU/three). The seeded sim ALWAYS plays offline; on mount one abortable best-effort fetch of a public ISS-position endpoint (3.5 s timeout, try/catch вҶ’ sim) folds one live altitude into the ISS voice and flips the chip to "live". **Opens the never-used orbital-data lane** вҖ” the strongest anti-"too similar" diversity move in the fan. Named refs: Andrea Polli (*Quiet Skies* / *Sky Score*), Voyager *Symphonies of the Planets*, parameter-mapping sonification, Doppler. `input: real orbital data В· output: audio-forward + SVG-DOM В· technique: Doppler sonification В· harmony: continuous glissando (non-JI) В· palette: graphite/starlight on near-black В· pole: cosmic-ambient-data`. Ambition honest 3/5 (#1 never-used data source + #2 вүҘ3 subsystems + #3 named refs). `status: demoable` В· [design notes](/dream/2046-orbit-transit) В· NOT ear/eye-verified headless (no display/speakers) вҖ” the sky animates on mount, the Doppler chord evolves on Begin. 2 more explored this fire (вӯҗвӯҗ diffusion-field, вӯҗ tide-glass) вҖ” see IDEAS В§842.

### [2036-eternal-groove](/dream/2036-eternal-groove) В· **a Shepard tone for TEMPO вҖ” a percussion groove that accelerates (or decelerates) forever without ever actually getting faster, while the underlying pattern is static and loops seamlessly** В· **what if a groove could accelerate forever without ever actually getting faster вҖ” the rhythmic transposition of the Shepard/Risset endless-pitch illusion, which the lab has never built?** WIDE-mode winner (cycle 841), 1 of 3 divergent explorers. Five percussive layers are stacked one **octave apart in tempo**; in log-tempo space layer *k* sits at `o_k = (phase + k) mod N` and fires at `tempo_k = baseBPM В· 2^(o_k вҲ’ N/2)`. A **fixed raised-cosine (Hann) window** over the log-tempo axis, `w(o)=0.5вҲ’0.5В·cos(2ПҖВ·o/N)`, sets each layer's loudness вҖ” the window doesn't move, the **layers glide through it**; advancing `phase` slides every layer up (accelerando) or down (ritardando) the octave ladder at once. A layer that reaches the top **wraps to the bottom where the weight is ~0**, so the reset is inaudible and the loop is seamless; because the layers are spaced exactly one octave apart over exactly *N* octaves, the **Hann sum is constant (= N/2) for all phase**, so overall loudness never pulses as layers cross the band. Strike timing comes from `AudioContext.currentTime` via a **~25 ms-poll / ~100 ms-horizon look-ahead scheduler** (the "Tale of Two Clocks"); the `phase` control is integrated in rAF (60 fps) and read by the scheduler (timing off the audio clock, control off rAF). Each strike is a purely **percussive** voice вҖ” a pitch-swept sine "tom" + a bandpassed-noise transient, higher layers brighter/shorter, lower woodier/longer вҖ” **NO scale, melody, chord, or pitched drone** (the cleanest possible dodge of the jury-banned JI partial-stack). Opens a **grep-0Г— Risset-rhythm / tempo-illusion lane the lab lacked.** Anchored by the fresh **В§841 dive** (three foundational-but-grep-0Г—-in-lab, no-model-budget techniques вҖ” Risset rhythm, diffusion curves, recurrence plots). В· **INPUT = tap-tempo** (space / tap anywhere / button sets base BPM) + sweep drag/slider for direction вҖ” NOT mic (jury 7Г—), NOT tilt, NOT camera. В· **SUBSTRATE = CSS-compositor** (one DOM ring per tempo layer; rAF writes `transform`/`opacity`/`filter` only вҖ” **zero canvas / WebGL / WebGPU / SVG-drawn animation**; the coldest, still-flagged substrate lane, off the jury-banned WebGPU/Canvas2D). Full teardown on stop/unmount (cancel rAF, clear scheduler interval, fade + `ctx.close`, remove listeners). В· **HARMONIC MODEL = pure percussion, NO pitch lattice** (NOT the banned `[1,9/8,вҖҰ,2]` JI stack вҖ” there is no scale at all). В· **AUDIO** вҖ” a plain (non-hook) `RissetRhythmEngine` class owns the graph; AudioContext resumed inside "Begin"; master-gain ramps. В· **SELF-DEMO / readout** вҖ” ~2 s scripted auto-demo sweeps accelerandoвҶ’ritardandoвҶ’hold on a loop the instant you press Begin, before any input; any manual change hands control to the user. В· **SAFETY / a11y** вҖ” no strobe (ring flashes are per-strike brightness bumps decayed in rAF, gated by tempo not a flicker engine); chrome on semantic tokens (warm ink-brass palette confined to the art layer). В· cycle 841 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-20) В· demoable В· `theme: a Shepard tone for tempo вҖ” a groove that accelerates forever without ever getting faster В· palette: warm ink-on-paper / aged-brass on dark (NOT violet-cosmic) В· input: tap-tempo + sweep drag (self-demos with a 2s auto-drive) В· output: CSS-compositor (concentric DOM rings, transform/opacity only; off the jury-banned WebGPU/Canvas2D) В· harmony: pure percussion, NO pitch lattice (the cleanest anti-JI-stack dodge) В· technique: Risset RHYTHM / rhythmic Shepard illusion (grep-0Г— in the tempo domain) В· pole: perceptual-illusion / rhythmic-instrument (an auditory "altered perception without the drug") В· needs-a-human: tap the pulse + drag the sweep (auto-demos otherwise)` В· notes: `README.md` В· refs **Jean-Claude Risset вҖ” the "endless accelerando" / rhythmic Shepard-tone illusion** В· Roger Shepard (endless-pitch original) / Kenneth Knowlton lineage. **Ambition вҖ” honest 3/5:** #1 (novel technique вҖ” Risset RHYTHM is grep-0Г— in the tempo domain across ~800 protos; the `risset`/`shepard` hits are all *pitch* endless-ascent, `polytempo` hits [514/375] are canons not the metric barber-pole) В· #2 (вүҘ3 subsystems: octave-tempo scheduler + Risset log-window engine + percussion synth + CSS-ring renderer + tap-tempo input = 4) В· #3 (named refs above). **mode:** WIDE. **candidates:** 2036-eternal-groove(win) В· 2038-diffusion-field(banked вӯҗ TOP resurrect вҖ” WebGL2 Poisson-relaxation diffusion-curves [Orzan et al. SIGGRAPH 2008] you draw вҶ’ 5-formant synth; the most substantial + beautiful, a cosmic-ambient rebalance) В· 2040-recurrence-loom(banked вҖ” Canvas2D Takens/Eckmann recurrence MATRIX of live audio вҶ’ comb-echo; grep-0Г— but more analytical than immersive). **Diversity:** `banned=[WebGPU-primary (jury 5Г—) В· JI `[1,9/8,вҖҰ,2]` stack (jury ~7Г—) В· KlГјver/log-polar (jury 4Г—) В· violet-on-near-black cosmic (jury)] В· picked=[tap-tempo В· CSS-compositor В· Risset-rhythm В· pure-percussion/no-pitch-lattice В· ink-brass В· perceptual-illusion]` вҖ” all off every ban; the 3 explorers were disjoint on input/output/technique/harmony/palette. **Validate:** normalizer 0 rewrites; banned-pattern + chrome scan clean; plain client route (no generateStaticParams/metadata/API). Authoritative `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` (the compile phase Vercel fails on) **EXIT 0**, `.next/.../2036-eternal-groove/page.js` emitted; losers `2038`/`2040` absent + seeded to IDEAS В§841 pre-build. **Build-infra note:** the full `npm run build` static-collection phase cannot run in this container (hard 4096 fd cap vs ~800 routes вҶ’ `EMFILE`; HEAD reproduces it with the winner removed) вҖ” the lab's compile-mode gate is the authoritative check, same as cycle 840. **NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless вҖ” no display/speakers): whether the tempo illusion actually convinces on Karel's speakers (builder flagged: strongest on headphones over ~15вҖ“20 s; the visual direction cue is the rings' slow radial drift + spin-rate, subtler than the audio because the bright band sits at a fixed radius). Two more explored & banked this fire (IDEAS В§841).

### [2028-frost-lattice](/dream/2028-frost-lattice) В· **grow frost вҖ” nucleate a seed and watch a dendritic crystal branch outward by diffusion-limited aggregation, where every particle that freezes rings a glassy inharmonic tone, so the fern is literally its own evolving score** В· **what if a generative-design staple the lab has NEVER used вҖ” DLA / Brownian-tree growth, almost always shipped as a silent picture вҖ” were coupled to sound, so the crystal both draws itself and plays itself?** WIDE-mode winner (cycle 840), 1 of 3 divergent explorers. Random walkers launch from a circle just outside the current frost, wander with a light inward bias, and **freeze the instant they touch the aggregate** (Witten & Sander 1981); each frozen particle records its parent, so its branch segment is appended to a **single accumulating SVG `<path>`** вҖ” one DOM node no matter how large the fern grows (a cell-keyed occupancy `Map` gives O(1) neighbour lookups; ~18 live walker `<circle>`s move imperatively). **Every freeze both draws a branch and rings a bell:** a glass-plate **inharmonic** additive tone (partials 1 / 2.76 / 5.40 / 8.93 вҖ” Chladni-style, NOT integer harmonics, NOT JI, NOT 12-TET/pentatonic) whose fundamental is set continuously by the frozen particle's **radius from the seed**, so outward growth is an ascending shimmer over a low ice-drone; a voice pool + minimum onset spacing make dense growth wash rather than machine-gun. **Tap the field to drop competing nucleation seeds** and watch rival dendrites race. Opens a **grep-0Г— DLA / grow-your-own-score lane the lab lacked.** Anchored by the fresh **В§840 dive** (DLA is a beloved generative-design technique the lab has literally never used, almost always shipped silent вҖ” coupling each freeze to sound makes the fractal its own score). В· **INPUT = pointer/touch** (tap to seed; self-grows from a centre seed with zero input) вҖ” NOT mic (jury 7Г—), NOT tilt, NOT camera. В· **SUBSTRATE = SVG-DOM** (single growing `<path>` + `feGaussianBlur` under-glow; NOT Canvas2D [jury-banned], NOT WebGPU [jury-banned], NOT raw-WebGL2-fragment, NOT three.js). Full teardown on unmount (cancel rAF, dispose audio, close ctx). В· **HARMONIC MODEL = glass-plate inharmonic partials (NOT the banned `[1,9/8,вҖҰ,2]` JI stack):** radiusвҶ’continuous fundamental, inharmonic ratios, fast glassy decay. В· **AUDIO** вҖ” a plain (non-hook) `FrostAudio` class owns the graph; AudioContext resumed inside "Begin"; master 0.16 вҶ’ compressor. В· **SELF-DEMO / readout** вҖ” grows on its own the instant you press Begin (deterministic PRNG seeded `0x2028`, off the animation clock); a live "N frozen В· tap to seed" HUD. В· **SAFETY / a11y** вҖ” no strobe (steady growth, blurred glow only); chrome on semantic tokens (ice-blue art hex confined to the SVG). В· **DETERMINISM** вҖ” mulberry32 seeded `0x2028` + integer frame counter; no `Math.random`/`Date.now` in any sim/audio/render path. В· cycle 840 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-20) В· demoable В· `theme: a frost crystal that grows itself and plays itself вҖ” diffusion-limited aggregation as a generative score В· palette: pale ice-blue / frost-white on deep charcoal (NOT violet-cosmic) В· input: pointer/touch (tap to seed; self-grows) В· output: SVG-DOM (single accumulating <path>; off the jury-banned Canvas2D/WebGPU) В· harmony: glass-plate inharmonic bells, radiusвҶ’register (NOT the JI stack) В· technique: diffusion-limited aggregation (WittenвҖ“Sander 1981; grep-0Г— in-lab) В· pole: crystalline / meditative (NOT altered-states вҖ” a calm growth-and-stillness piece) В· needs-a-human: tap to seed competing dendrites (auto-grows otherwise)` В· notes: `README.md` В· refs **T.A. Witten & L.M. Sander, "Diffusion-Limited Aggregation" (1981)** В· Chladni figures / glass-plate inharmonic partials В· Wilson Bentley snowflake morphology. **Ambition вҖ” honest 3/5:** #1 (novel technique вҖ” DLA is grep-0Г— across ~800 protos) В· #2 (вүҘ3 subsystems: DLA random-walk engine + SVG single-path renderer + inharmonic glass-bell synth + pointer nucleation = 4) В· #3 (named refs above). **mode:** WIDE. **candidates:** 2028-frost-lattice(win) В· 2026-tide-glass(banked вӯҗвӯҗ TOP resurrect вҖ” CSS-compositor tilt-luminous-liquid you HEAR, the coldest starving substrate; cashes jury #1) В· 2024-tritave-veil(banked вӯҗ вҖ” audio-forward BohlenвҖ“Pierce non-octave drone, cashes jury #2 by name). **Diversity:** `banned=[WebGPU-primary (jury 5Г—) В· Canvas2D (jury 4Г—) В· WebGL2-fragment-as-sole (В§785) В· JI `[1,9/8,вҖҰ,2]` stack (jury ~7Г—) В· KlГјver/log-polar (jury 4Г—) В· violet-on-near-black cosmic (jury)] В· picked=[pointer В· SVG-DOM В· DLA В· inharmonic-glass В· ice-on-charcoal В· crystalline]` вҖ” all off every ban; the 3 explorers were disjoint on input/output/technique/harmony/palette. **Validate:** normalizer 0 rewrites; banned-pattern scan clean; authoritative `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` (winner-only) EXIT 0, `.next/.../2028-frost-lattice/page.js` emitted, losers `2024`/`2026` absent + seeded to IDEAS В§840 pre-build. **NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless вҖ” no display/speakers): whether the fern reads as vividly on Karel's monitor and whether stacked freezes sound like an evolving shimmer vs busy (the builder flagged the on-lattice walk gives a mildly grid-biased shape, and only the frame's outermost freeze rings during dense bursts). Two more explored & banked this fire (IDEAS В§840). Substrate note: SVG-DOM is warm (3Г— counting this) вҖ” accepted in exchange for the grep-0Г— technique + strongest ambition floor + best headless legibility; the CSS-compositor cold lane is banked as the TOP resurrect (tide-glass).

### [2020-magnet-basin](/dream/2020-magnet-basin) В· **play deterministic chaos: release a pendulum into a field of magnets, watch which one captures it trace out an infinitely-detailed fractal boundary, and hear each capture ring as an inharmonic bell** В· **what if the SAME mature GPU stack everyone points at audio-reactive shader-wallpaper were pointed instead at a real physics toy you can PLAY вҖ” where a dynamical system, not a fragment shader, generates both the image and the sound?** WIDE-mode winner (cycle 839), 1 of 3 divergent explorers. A damped **magnetic pendulum** swings over 3 fixed magnets (copper / brass / verdigris); which magnet finally captures a given release point is a **fractal basin of attraction** вҖ” nearby starts land on different magnets and the boundary between basins is fractal filigree. The basin field is computed progressively (96ВІ grid, 3 rows/frame, early-exit settle detection) into a `DataTexture` on a three.js plane, darkened by settle-time so the fractal boundaries glow. **You compose on it:** click/drag to release bobs (each spirals in real time as a bright trajectory `Line`), and every **capture rings the captor magnet's tone**; releasing near a basin boundary produces long wandering uncertain flights (the musically interesting zone). **Drag a magnet** and the whole basin recomputes and RE-TUNES live. Opens a **deterministic-chaos / playable-physics lane the lab lacked** and inverts the "audio-reactive GPU wallpaper" default those July-2026 showcase pieces exemplify (a played instrument, not autonomous wallpaper). Anchored by the fresh **В§839 dive** (three.js-2026 / ASTRODITHER = the saturated GPU-shader-wallpaper feed; basins-of-attraction = the grep-0Г— under-explored move). В· **INPUT = pointer** (click/drag release + magnet-drag reshape; a seeded auto-demo releases 6 bobs on mount so it self-demos; touch not jury-banned) вҖ” NOT mic (jury 7Г—), NOT keyboard, NOT camera/tilt. В· **SUBSTRATE = three.js** (`WebGLRenderer` + orthographic camera; textured basin plane + trajectory `Line`s; three.js was 0Г— in the last-10 = the coldest GPU family вҖ” NOT Canvas2D, NOT raw-WebGL2-fragment-as-sole, NOT WebGPU, NOT SVG-DOM). ### [2012-enigma-drift](/dream/2012-enigma-drift) В· **a completely STILL op-art figure that streams with motion generated by your own visual cortex вҖ” and you can HEAR the illusory rotation** В· **what if the "altered state without the drug" came not from a featureless field (837) but from its opposite вҖ” a precisely STRUCTURED still image the cortex sets in motion вҖ” and that phantom motion drove the sound?** WIDE-mode winner (cycle 838), 1 of 3 divergent explorers. A **Leviant *Enigma*** figure (concentric indigo/bone rings crossed by a dense field of ~360 fine radial spokes) sits nearly static in the SVG DOM, yet the rings appear to stream/rotate вҖ” that motion lives in your visual cortex (microsaccade Г— luminance-edge interactions), not the pixels. Fixating the centre dot **deepens** it (a stillness state machine raises ring contrast + spoke opacity + a sub-0.2 Hz phase drift that re-triggers the illusion as adaptation would otherwise fade it); a flick of the pointer **snaps** it, like a saccade. Opens a **psychedelic-INTENSE lane the lab lacked** while cleanly DODGING the jury-banned log-polar/KlГјver engine вҖ” it's a structured figure, not an `exp()`-warp. Anchored by the fresh **В§838 dive** (illusory-motion illusions вҖ” Leviant *Enigma* / Kitaoka drift / MacKay rays вҖ” are cortex-generated; the 2026 simulations4all two-tone tool re-frames beating/difference-tones as the honest way to make interference audible). В· **INPUT = gaze/stillness** (pointer as gaze proxy: fixation deepens, saccade-flick snaps; pointer radius steers the active annulus + audio register) вҖ” no mic/camera; self-demos on mount. В· **SUBSTRATE = SVG-DOM** (jury #1 вҖ” NOT WebGPU/WebGL/Canvas2D/three.js): concentric `<circle>` rings + one `<path>` spoke field + CSS `filter`/`transform`, all animated via a single rAF loop writing attributes imperatively (never React state per frame). В· **HARMONIC MODEL = beating / difference-tones (jury #2 вҖ” NOT the banned `[1,9/8,вҖҰ,2]` JI stack):** two detuned sine banks a few Hz apart whose interference beats at ~1вҶ’6 Hz, the beat rate driven by the perceived-streaming `depth`, through a lowpass + feedback delay for shimmer вҖ” an interference model, no fixed scale. В· **AUDIO** вҖ” a plain (non-hook) `EnigmaDrone` class owns the graph; AudioContext created inside the "Begin" gesture (visual already runs before it); graceful `text-destructive` degrade if Web Audio is absent (illusion still works silently); full teardown on unmount. В· **SELF-DEMO / readout** вҖ” the figure streams the moment the page mounts; a live "perceived streaming" meter shows the depth value climbing as you hold still. В· **SAFETY / a11y** вҖ” the whole point is a STILL image, so ALL luminance change is slow drift (sub-0.2 Hz, contrast clamped), never flicker/strobe; `prefers-reduced-motion` softens the drift further (via `_shared/psych/safeFlicker`); comfortable master gain; chrome on semantic tokens (indigo/bone art hex confined to the SVG). В· cycle 838 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-20) В· demoable В· `theme: a drug-free hallucination from a STILL op-art figure вҖ” illusory motion you can hear В· palette: indigo/bone duotone on near-black (NOT violet-cosmic) В· input: gaze/stillness (pointer proxy) В· output: SVG-DOM (off the GPU render family вҖ” jury #1) В· harmony: beating/difference-tones tracking perceived motion (jury #2, NOT the JI stack) В· technique: Leviant-Enigma illusory-motion as instrument (structured figure, dodges the banned log-polar engine) В· state: illusory-motion / op-art perceptual hallucination В· pole: intense В· needs-a-human: stare at the centre dot & hold still (self-demos otherwise)` В· notes: `README.md` В· refs **Isia Leviant *Enigma* (1981)** В· **Akiyoshi Kitaoka** peripheral-drift ("Rotating Snakes") В· **Donald MacKay** rays (1957) В· beat/difference-tone perception. **Ambition вҖ” honest 2/5:** #2 (вүҘ3 subsystems: SVG op-art renderer + stillness/saccade illusion-driver engine + beating/difference-tone audio + gaze input) В· #3 (named refs above). NOT #1 (moirГ© exists 2Г— in-lab вҖ” 1316/899 вҖ” though illusory-motion-from-a-still-figure is itself grep-fresh; claimed honestly at 2). **mode:** WIDE. **candidates:** 2012-enigma-drift(win) В· 2016-orbit-transit(banked вӯҗвӯҗ TOP resurrect вҖ” audio-forward orbital-traffic Doppler sonification, a real-world-data lane the lab has never used) В· 2014-chroma-loom(banked вӯҗ вҖ” CSS-compositor chromagram stained-glass of piano harmony). **Validate:** normalizer 0 rewrites; banned-pattern scan clean (no canvas/WebGL/three/WebGPU; no JI stack; no log-polar/spiral/lattice; no font-serif/raw-white chrome; SVG-only figure present); authoritative `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` (winner-only) вҖ” losers `rm -rf`'d + seeded to IDEAS В§838 pre-build. **NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless вҖ” no display/speakers): whether the Enigma streaming reads as vividly on Karel's monitor as intended (illusion strength is display- and viewer-dependent), and whether the beat rate audibly tracks the *perceived* motion вҖ” the visual self-demos on mount, the drone on Begin. ### [2010-boundless-void](/dream/2010-boundless-void) В· **a drug-free Ganzfeld delivered almost entirely through spatialized SOUND вҖ” the screen near-black, the dissolution happening in your ears** В· **what if the oceanic-boundlessness / ego-dissolution of a Ganzfeld were carried by the EARS, not the eyes вҖ” an immersive void you float in on headphones while the screen is nearly dark?** DEEP-mode winner (cycle 837), 1 of 3 approaches to ONE concept вҖ” *a drug-free Ganzfeld chamber that dissolves the figure/ground boundary over 5+ min and lets the viewer's OWN cortex fill the void*, attacked via 3 cold non-GPU substrates; shipped the boldest. **Re-centers Karel's PRIMARY psychedelic/cosmic-ambient direction** after ~6 cycles of data/AI/memory instruments, and cashes the jury 2026-07-19 **#1 in its most radical form** ("go genuinely audio-only / haptic and test the screen bias directly") while expanding the lab's single **thinnest category вҖ” non-screen / audio-first** (used once, ~5 cycles ago, 1990). Anchored by the fresh **В§837 dive**: **arXiv:2507.09011 (July 2026)** "From dots to faces" (imagery capacity predicts what the empty field paints вҖ” the imagery is generated by the *viewer's* cortex, so a featureless field imposes ZERO geometry and cleanly dodges the jury-banned log-polar/KlГјver form-constant lattice). В· **INPUT = presence** вҖ” opt-in mic RMS gently modulates drone density/motion, with a clean autonomous ~5.5/min breath fallback (no mic вҶ’ self-drives); no camera/tilt. В· **SUBSTRATE = audio-forward, minimal-DOM** (jury #1 вҖ” NOT WebGPU/WebGL/Canvas2D/three.js): ~90% of the piece is sound; the only image is a single warm radial glow (near-black `bg-[#050302]`, warm amber/bone/red CSS `radial-gradient`) that breathes вҖ” plain CSS on a DOM element, no canvas anywhere. В· **TECHNIQUE = HRTF spatialization as the whole instrument**: four drone voices as `PannerNode`s with `panningModel:"HRTF"` feeding the default `AudioListener`, each at a distinct radius/azimuth/elevation, orbiting on slow alternating clocks with a breathing radius (`applyPannerPosition` prefers the AudioParam API, falls back to `setPosition`) вҖ” **distance + azimuth become the "space,"** enveloping and out-of-head on headphones вҖ” over a homogeneous brown-noise Ganzfeld bed. В· **HARMONIC MODEL = a scale that GLIDES (jury #2 вҖ” NOT the banned `[1,9/8,5/4,4/3,3/2,5/3,15/8,2]` JI stack):** a small consonant modal set expressed as SEMITONE degrees that each voice *rotates* through over tens of seconds, plus a continuous multi-sine global transpose + a wandering low root drifting the whole scale over minutes; every oscillator chases its target through a 7вҖ“13 s portamento, so minute 5 differs from minute 1 in pitch, density (per-voice fade LFOs) and spatial layout. В· **AUDIO** вҖ” a plain (non-hook) engine class owns the graph (voices + noise вҶ’ master); AudioContext created inside the "Enter the void" gesture; 6 s gentle master ramp-in (never a sudden blast); rigorous teardown on unmount (stop oscillators, disconnect every panner, cancel rAF, `ctx.close()`). В· **SELF-DEMO / readout** вҖ” plays itself the moment you Enter; a live mono readout ("N voices В· motion В· X.X min") lets a silent reviewer see it's alive. В· **SAFETY / a11y** вҖ” no strobe/flicker; opt-in вүӨ3 Hz glow drift routed through `_shared/psych/safeFlicker` (off by default, honors `prefers-reduced-motion`); comfortable master gain; chrome on semantic tokens. В· cycle 837 В· DEEP-winner (2026-07-20) В· demoable В· `theme: a boundless void carried by the ears вҖ” drug-free Ganzfeld / oceanic-boundlessness В· palette: near-black + warm red/amber/bone glow (NOT violet-on-near-black cosmic) В· input: presence (opt-in mic, autonomous fallback) В· output: audio-forward + minimal CSS glow (off the GPU render family вҖ” jury #1) В· harmony: gliding rotating modal set + drifting transpose, portamento (jury #2 changing-scale, NOT the JI stack) В· technique: HRTF spatialization as the whole instrument (screen-bias test) В· state: Ganzfeld / oceanic-boundlessness В· pole: cosmic-ambient В· needs-a-human: put on headphones (self-demos otherwise)` В· notes: `README.md` В· refs **Wackermann/PГјtz/Allefeld *Cortex* 2002** В· thalamo-cortical **decoupling** fMRI (Nature Sci Rep 2020, s41598-020-75019-3) В· **"Oceanic states of consciousness"** (Frontiers 2026) В· anchor **arXiv:2507.09011** (Jul 2026). **Ambition вҖ” honest 3/5:** #2 (вүҘ3 subsystems: HRTF panner graph + brown-noise Ganzfeld bed + gliding-modal drone + presence input + safeFlicker) В· #3 (named refs above) В· #5 (В§837 dive вҖ” arXiv:2507.09011, genuinely <14 days). NOT #1 (HRTF has prior lab use вҖ” 677/1082/1590/1944/744; the fresh axis is HRTF carrying the WHOLE piece as a screen-bias test + the gliding-modal weld). **mode:** DEEP. **candidates:** 2010-boundless-void(win) В· 2006-boundless-veil(banked вӯҗвӯҗ, the pure-CSS-compositor Ganzfeld field = the `ganzfeld-well` the В§836 MORNING flagged "ship next," now fully built вҖ” TOP resurrect, most demoable-at-a-glance) В· 2008-boundless-mist(banked вӯҗ, SVG-`feTurbulence` Ganzfeld fog вҖ” fresh SVG-filter-as-whole-field technique). **Validate:** normalizer 0 rewrites; banned-pattern scan clean (no canvas/WebGL/three; no JI stack; no log-polar/spiral/lattice; no font-serif/raw-white chrome; real HRTF PannerNode graph present); authoritative `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` (winner-only) вҖ” losers `rm -rf`'d + seeded to IDEAS В§837 pre-build. **NOT ear-verified** (headless вҖ” no speakers/headphones): whether the four HRTF voices read as genuinely *outside the head* and enveloping vs merely panned, whether the gliding modal drift lands as calm-evolving vs aimless, and the real out-of-head effect on Karel's headphones вҖ” the audio-forward path IS the headless path and the piece self-demos on Enter. Two more explored & banked this fire (IDEAS В§837).

### [2004-oracle-echo](/dream/2004-oracle-echo) В· **the room speaks and Resonance answers in light + tone вҖ” TWO real ML models chained live in your browser, $0** В· **what if Resonance could HEAR the room speak and answer in an evolving field of light and tone, running two chained machine-learning models entirely client-side for $0?** WIDE-mode winner (cycle 836), 1 of 3 UNRELATED divergent explorers. **Cashes the loudest standing jury provocation вҖ” the AI-pipeline chain (вүҘ2 ML models in series) that sat 0Г— across ~20 verdicts** (jury 2026-07-19 #5: "STILL 0Г— вҖҰ the last excuse just died вҖҰ scope ONE cycle on it"). 1992-semantic-choir did audioвҶ’embeddingвҶ’visual (2 models) but never a *speech/semantic* chain; this is the first that LISTENS to the room and answers. Cashes the **В§836 dive** (Transformers.js **v4**, 2026 вҖ” real-time multi-model ML in the browser; the webml-community shipped live Voxtral/LFM2.5/Nemotron demos, all $0, no `package.json` change). В· **INPUT = mic speech** вҖ” a ~4 s rolling PCM window, resampled to 16 kHz, transcribed every ~3.5 s. В· **THE CHAIN (two ML models in series, both Transformers.js v4, dynamic-imported from a CDN at runtime with `webpackIgnore`+`turbopackIgnore` + a variable specifier so nothing is bundled and `package.json` is untouched):** **Model 1 = ASR** (`Xenova/whisper-tiny.en`, вҶ’ `onnx-community/whisper-tiny.en` fallback) вҶ’ text; **Model 2 = sentiment** (`Xenova/distilbert-base-uncased-finetuned-sst-2-english`) вҶ’ POSITIVE/NEGATIVE + confidence вҶ’ a musical **valence** (`0.5 Вұ score/2`); word-rate + live loudness вҶ’ **arousal**. A single WASM/WebGPU backend behind a `busy` guard so windows never overlap; Whisper silence-hallucinations ("thank you", "you", вҖҰ) filtered so the oracle stays quiet in a quiet room. В· **OUTPUT = WebGL2** (jury #1 вҖ” NOT WebGPU as the visual substrate; WebGPU only under the hood for inference): a CPU-advected 4000-mote particle/flow field, additive point-cloud with feedback trails (per-frame fade veil); **Canvas2D fallback** with the identical sim if WebGL2 is absent. В· **CROSS-MODAL MAPPING** вҖ” **valence вҶ’ colour + harmony** (field warms to amber / cools to slate; a plain tempered chord crossfades a **minor third against a major third** by valence вҖ” a smooth in-tune majorвҶ”dark morph, deliberately NOT the banned `[1,9/8,5/4,4/3,3/2,5/3,15/8,2]` JI stack); **arousal вҶ’ motion/tempo/register** (quickens the flow, enlarges motes, opens the pad filter, lifts an octave shimmer, speeds a soft arpeggio вҖ” silent when calm); **level вҶ’ brightness pulse + gain swell**; each transcribed **word appears as luminous text** that drifts, fades, and dissolves into a burst of sentiment-coloured motes. В· **ROBUST FALLBACK (always sound + light, even headless / no mic / no net):** full path (mic + models) вҶ’ `listening В· whisper-tiny + distilbert loaded`; **spectral fallback** (mic, no models) вҶ’ Web-Audio FFT: spectral centroid вҶ’ brightness/valence, RMS вҶ’ arousal/tempo (`fallback: spectral features`); **demo mode** (no mic) вҶ’ gentle self-playing ambient drive (`demo mode`) вҖ” the field renders from mount, audio begins on the Start gesture. An honest on-brand status chip names the active path. В· **AUDIO** вҖ” `OracleAudio` (valence-morphing tempered pad + arousal arpeggio/filter/register + level swell), `MicInput` (AnalyserNode centroid+RMS, lossless PCM ring buffer, 16 kHz resample); full teardown on unmount (rAF, timers, mic tracks, renderer dispose, `ctx.close()`). В· **SAFETY / a11y** вҖ” no strobe/flicker; sentiment-driven luminance only; graceful across every permission/capability denial. В· cycle 836 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-20) В· demoable В· `theme: the room's speech becomes a living score of light + tone В· palette: sentiment-driven (warm=positive, cool-slate=negative вҖ” NOT violet-on-near-black cosmic) В· input: mic speech В· output: WebGL2 particle/flow field (NOT WebGPU-visual вҖ” jury #1) В· harmony: tempered minorвҶ”major-third valence morph (NOT the JI stack вҖ” jury #2) В· technique: FIRST real 2-model in-browser AI chain (ASRвҶ’sentiment)вҶ’cross-modal AV В· pole: n/a (responsive instrument) В· needs-a-human: speak into the room (self-demos in demo mode)` В· notes: `README.md` В· refs **Memo Akten *Learning to See*** В· **Transformers.js v4** (2026, in-browser multi-model ML). **Ambition вҖ” 3/5:** #1 (FIRST real 2-model in-browser audio-visual AI chain вҖ” grep-0Г— / jury-flagged 0Г— across ~20 verdicts) В· #2 (вүҘ3 subsystems: mic PCM ring + Whisper ASR + DistilBERT sentiment + WebGL2 field + Web-Audio harmony) В· #5 (В§836 dive вҖ” Transformers.js v4, 2026-current). **mode:** WIDE. **candidates:** 2004-oracle-echo(win) В· 2006-ganzfeld-well(banked вӯҗвӯҗ, drug-free Ganzfeld on a CSS-compositor field вҖ” TOP resurrect on the overdue cosmic-ambient/psychedelic re-center cycle) В· 2008-palimpsest(banked вӯҗ, editable/erasable SVG-DOM looping score вҖ” jury #3 consequential memory). **Validate:** normalizer 0 rewrites; authoritative `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` **EXIT 0** with all 3 candidates present (so the winner's runtime CDN import compiles cleanly under Turbopack), 0 warnings/errors for any candidate, `/dream/2004-oracle-echo` `page.js` + `page_client-reference-manifest.js` emitted; losers `rm -rf`'d post-build (banked IDEAS В§836). **NOT verified live** (headless вҖ” no mic/GPU/network): the real whisperвҶ’distilbert latency & quality, the exact Transformers.js v4 pipeline API surface, and Turbopack's handling of the ignored dynamic import are validated by types + reasoning only вҖ” all wrapped in try/catch that degrades to the spectral path, so the piece still sounds & shows regardless. Wants Karel's mic + a real browser. Two more explored & banked this fire (IDEAS В§836).

### [1998-terra-tremor](/dream/1998-terra-tremor) В· **the living planet plays Resonance вҖ” every earthquake on Earth in the last day, pulled LIVE from USGS, struck as a low resonance inside a slow tectonic drone** В· **what if the Earth itself were the instrument вҖ” real, live seismic data as a rhythmic stream of struck tones over a drone that rises as the planet gets busier?** WIDE-mode winner (cycle 835), 1 of 3 UNRELATED divergent explorers. Opens the **real-world-data sonification lane the ~1000-prototype lab had never opened** вҖ” every prior "seismic/tremor" piece (712-seismic-room, 898-tremor-score, 1070-deep-tremor) is SYNTHETIC; the only live-external-API piece is 699-world-forge (GitHub firehose). This is the first prototype driven by **live geophysical data**, and it satisfies exactly the В§833 bank's condition ("resurrect seismic ONLY with a fresh data source"). Cashes the **В§835 dive** (live-planetary-data sonification is a real 2026 practice вҖ” Helioradar AV's live NOAA WebSocket вҖ” and the honest inversion of the worn synthetic-aurora lane). В· **INPUT = real-world data (USGS live)** вҖ” polls `earthquake.usgs.gov/.../all_day.geojson` (CORS-open, no key) every 60 s; on ANY fetch/parse error falls back to a **seeded synthetic Poisson generator** (GutenbergвҖ“Richter magnitudes, exponential depth tail) so it ALWAYS sounds; a LIVE-vs-SIMULATED badge shows which. No mic/camera/tilt. В· **OUTPUT = Canvas2D** (jury #1 вҖ” OFF the GPU render family; NOT WebGPU/WebGL/three.js): a dark equirectangular world (graticule + abstract soft-blob continents), each quake blooming as an expanding ring at its true lat/long (radius вҲқ magnitude), plus a scrolling **seismogram strip**. Palette **graphite/ash with EMBER** warmth for the biggest events вҖ” NOT the jury-banned cosmic-violet, NOT aurora (all raw hex confined to canvas art; chrome on semantic tokens). В· **TECHNIQUE = geophysical sonification**: each quake = a struck low resonance (modal bell + noise transient) with **magnitude вҶ’ energy/register/loudness/decay**, **depth вҶ’ timbre brightness (low-pass)**, **longitude вҶ’ stereo pan**; the day's hundreds of events are **metered out in time-order** (WINDOW/queue-length pacing, 90 msвҖ“2.2 s) as a rhythmic stream, not fired at once. В· **HARMONIC MODEL = a MODAL SCALE THAT DRIFTS (jury #2 вҖ” NOT the banned `[1,9/8,5/4,4/3,3/2,5/3,15/8,2]` JI stack):** 6 plain-semitone modes rotate every ~40 s; every struck tone snaps to the current mode; under it a 3-voice tectonic **drone** whose fundamental/thickness track the running **seismic-energy rate** (log-scaled, ~18 s half-life) вҖ” the planet getting busier literally raises the drone. В· **AUDIO** вҖ” struck voices + drone вҶ’ master gain вҶ’ destination; AudioContext created inside the "Feel the Earth" gesture; full teardown on unmount (rAF, poll interval, dispatch timeout, oscillators, `ctx.close()`). В· **SELF-DEMO** вҖ” plays itself the instant you press Begin: live feed if reachable, synthetic Poisson Earth otherwise; pre-Begin overlay never blank. В· **SAFETY / a11y** вҖ” no strobe/flicker; canvas has `role=img` + aria-label; mute + gain controls; rounded-full only on the status chips. В· cycle 835 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-19) В· demoable В· `theme: the living planet as instrument вҖ” live seismic data В· palette: graphite/ash + ember (NOT cosmic-violet, NOT aurora) В· input: real-world data (live USGS, Poisson fallback) В· output: Canvas2D (off the GPU render family вҖ” jury #1) В· harmony: drifting semitone modes + energy-tracked drone (jury #2 changing-scale, NOT the JI stack) В· technique: geophysical real-world-data sonification (a lane the lab had never opened) В· pole: n/a (data instrument) В· needs-a-human: none (the Earth plays it; you set gain)` В· notes: `README.md` В· refs **Florian Dombois *Auditory Seismology*** В· **USGS/IRIS earthquake audification** В· **Andrea Polli** geophysical sonification В· anchor **Helioradar AV** (2026, live-NOAA sonification). **Ambition вҖ” honest 3/5:** #2 (вүҘ3 subsystems: live USGS poll + Poisson fallback + quakeвҶ’struck-resonance mapping + drifting-mode energy-tracked drone + world-map/seismogram render) В· #3 (named refs above) В· #5 (В§835 dive вҖ” live-data sonification is 2026-current). NOT #1 outright (seismic timbre & audification exist in-lab and in the field; the fresh axis is the never-opened LIVE real-world-data lane + drifting-mode-over-live-energy weld). **mode:** WIDE. **candidates:** 1998-terra-tremor(win) В· 2000-sand-reset(banked вӯҗвӯҗ, impermanence/reset Gray-Scott universe вҖ” TOP resurrect on a cosmic-ambient cycle) В· 2002-chroma-key(banked вӯҗ, webcam colourвҶ’harmony cross-modal). **Validate:** normalizer 0 rewrites; tsc 0; folder-eslint 0; authoritative `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` **EXIT 0**, `/dream/1998-terra-tremor` `page.js` + `page_client-reference-manifest.js` emitted, losers `rm -rf`'d pre-build (absent). **NOT ear-verified** (headless вҖ” no speakers): whether the sub-40 Hz drone reproduces on laptop speakers, whether an M6 event reads as a distinct low toll vs mud against the drone, and whether the initial ~300-event live batch streams as pleasing rhythm вҖ” all want Karel's headphones. Two more explored & banked this fire (IDEAS В§835).

### [1996-splice-cassette](/dream/1996-splice-cassette) В· **composing IS editing вҖ” a live looper you OVERWRITE / cut / FRACTURE, whose recorded past re-voices itself as a modal scale drifts underneath** В· **what if composing WAS editing вҖ” a looper where you overwrite, cut, re-time and fracture what you already played, and the past keeps re-voicing itself as the mode slowly drifts?** WIDE-mode winner (cycle 834), 1 of 3 divergent explorers вҖ” each pairing a DISTINCT non-JI harmonic model with a DISTINCT cold non-GPU substrate, cashing the jury 2026-07-19 live provocations **#1 (off the GPU render family)** + **#2 (ban the JI partial-stack, force a different harmonic model)** at once; the winner ALSO cashes **#3 (make memory CONSEQUENTIAL вҖ” the true destructive OVERWRITE that 1990 lacked; В§832 flagged #3 "not closed")**. Realizes the **В§832 вӯҗвӯҗ TOP-resurrect** `1986-splice-cassette` (renumbered up). The other two banked: an HRTF-spatial "invisible bells" room found by ear on the CSS compositor (`1994-invisible-bells`, вӯҗвӯҗ, SIGGRAPH 2026 "Light Architecture" вҖ” TOP resurrect, un-shipped across В§833+В§834) and a live-NOAA solar-wind aurora sonification (`1998-solar-choir`, вӯҗ вҖ” fresh space-weather source, worn data lane), both IDEAS В§834. В· **INPUT = MIDI (Web MIDI API) + computer-keyboard fallback** вҖ” `a s d f g h j k` play scale degrees, edit gestures on buttons + keys (space=Record, `o`=Overwrite, `x`=Cut, `3`=Shift, `z`=Fracture, в—Җ/в–¶ move the edit region or click the tape); connected MIDI notes quantise to the current mode. No mic/camera/tilt. В· **OUTPUT = SVG-DOM only** (jury #1 вҖ” off the GPU render family): the looper is drawn as magnetic **tape** вҖ” note events as SVG elements on a 6 s strip, a moving playhead (`requestAnimationFrame` reading the audio clock), splice marks where the tape was cut; **NO `<canvas>`, NO WebGL/WebGPU, NO three.js.** В· **TECHNIQUE = destructive/editable live-looper** (jury #3 вҖ” memory made CONSEQUENTIAL, not additive): all edit ops are **pure functions over immutable event arrays** (`looper.ts`) вҖ” **record**, **destructive overwrite** (arm Overwrite + play over a region вҶ’ existing events are *replaced*, not layered; live user-overwrite uses a punch that deletes neighbours as you play; audibly the same loop positions play different pitches next lap), **cut** (delete a slice, the loop loses it), **shift** (re-time a slice, wrapping), **fracture** (chop into N chunks and re-order вҖ” a phrase you know comes back tumbled). A **look-ahead scheduler** (~100 ms horizon polled every 25 ms off `AudioContext.currentTime`, NOT rAF) plays it sample-accurately. В· **HARMONIC MODEL = a MODAL SCALE THAT DRIFTS (jury #2 вҖ” NOT the banned `[1,9/8,5/4,4/3,3/2,5/3,15/8,2]` JI stack, NOT pentatonic):** notes are stored as scale **DEGREES (0вҖ“6)+octave, not frozen frequencies**; a modal scale rotates continuously (DorianвҶ’PhrygianвҶ’LydianвҶ’MixolydianвҶ’AeolianвҶ’LocrianвҶ’Ionian, one lap вүҲ119 s, ~new mode every 17 s); `degreeвҶ’frequency` is resolved *at schedule time* against the live mode, so a phrase recorded a minute ago **re-voices itself** вҖ” same fingering, different colour вҖ” and the SVG shows it (each note's y-position AND hue recomputed through the current mode, notes slide & re-colour as the mode steps). Deliberately **equal-tempered diatonic modes** вҖ” the point is the mapping *changes over time*. В· **AUDIO** вҖ” warm FM pluck (sine carrier + decaying sine modulator, a hair of glide) вҶ’ master **0.14** вҶ’ tape-"wow" chorus вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` вҶ’ destination; AudioContext created inside the Begin gesture; full teardown on unmount (stop oscillators, disconnect, cancel rAF, clear timers, `ctx.close()`). В· **SELF-DEMO** вҖ” deterministic seeded **ghost performer** (mulberry32 const seed; all timing off the AudioContext clock вҖ” no `Math.random`/`Date.now`) records a phrase, loops it, **overwrites** part (~8.6 s: replaces the `[1.2,3.0)` slice), **cuts** a slice, **fractures**, then lets the mode drift so the phrase re-voices вҖ” the whole editable-memory grammar self-demonstrates headless; real MIDI/key input takes over instantly, re-arms ~15 s idle. Pre-Begin hero (never blank). В· **SAFETY / a11y** вҖ” no strobe/flicker; no Web MIDI вҶ’ keyboard still works with a `text-destructive` notice; chrome on semantic tokens. В· cycle 834 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-19 jury) В· demoable В· `theme: composing IS editing вҖ” overwrite/cut/fracture your past, and it re-voices itself as the mode drifts В· palette: magnetic-tape / ferric-amber / bone (warm-craft, art) В· input: MIDI + QWERTY (NON-mic/camera/tilt) В· output: SVG-DOM (off the GPU render family вҖ” jury #1) В· harmony: drifting diatonic modes, degrees-not-freqs (jury #2 changing-scale, NOT the JI stack) В· technique: destructive/editable live-looper вҖ” record/overwrite/cut/shift/fracture (jury #3 CONSEQUENTIAL memory, the OVERWRITE 1990 lacked) В· pole: non-psychedelic (compositional instrument) В· needs-a-human: total (ghost only self-demos)` В· notes: `README.md` В· ref **NIME 2026 "Loop Fracture Loop"** (Chris Kiefer & Betty Accorsi, Jun 23вҖ“26 2026) В· **Living Looper** (Shafer/Magnusson). **Ambition вҖ” honest 3/5:** #2 (вүҘ3 subsystems: look-ahead scheduler + FM voice + drifting-mode harmony + immutable-looper edit-ops + MIDI/keyboard + SVG render + ghost) В· #3 (named refs above) В· #5 (NIME 2026 <30 days + the В§834 modal/spectral dive, same date). NOT #1 (loopers exist in-lab; the fresh axis is the drifting-mode-re-voices-the-past weld + true destructive overwrite). **mode:** WIDE. **candidates:** 1996-splice-cassette(win) В· 1994-invisible-bells(banked вӯҗвӯҗ, HRTF spatial-audio room found by ear, CSS compositor, SIGGRAPH "Light Architecture" вҖ” TOP resurrect) В· 1998-solar-choir(banked вӯҗ, live-NOAA solar-wind aurora sonification, Canvas2D вҖ” fresh source, worn lane). **Validate:** normalizer 0 rewrites; SVG-only (no canvas/WebGL); no banned patterns (no log-polar/font-serif/raw-white chrome; rounded-full only on status chips); authoritative `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` EXIT 0, `/dream/1996-splice-cassette` in both manifests, losers absent. **NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless вҖ” no display/MIDI/speakers): whether destructive OVERWRITE reads as un-making vs a stacked layer, whether the drifting mode re-voicing the recorded past lands as musical, and whether the SVG splice/cut is legible вҖ” all want Karel's Chrome + headphones (keyboard + ghost self-drive headless; MIDI optional). Two more explored & banked this fire (IDEAS В§834).

### [1992-semantic-choir](/dream/1992-semantic-choir) В· **sing a phrase and the MEANING of your words paints the room вҖ” the lab's first вүҘ2-model in-browser AI chain** В· **what if singing WORDS painted the room with their MEANING вҖ” a real two-model AI pipeline, running $0 in the browser, turning what you sing into light and sound?** WIDE-mode winner (cycle 833), 1 of 3 divergent explorers. Cashes the **AI-pipeline-chain (вүҘ2 models in series) criterion that has sat 0Г— across ~27 juries** (jury 2026-07-19 #5) AND answers Karel's own В§832 MORNING question ("scope a cycle on the AI-pipeline chain?"). The other two banked: an HRTF-spatial-audio "invisible bells" room on the CSS compositor (`1994-invisible-bells`, вӯҗвӯҗ, SIGGRAPH 2026 "Light Architecture") and a live-USGS earthquake sonification (`1996-seismic-choir`, вӯҗ вҖ” banked with a warning: seismic is a worn lab theme, resurrect only with a fresh data source), both IDEAS В§833. В· **INPUT = voice** (sing/speak a short phrase, ~3.8 s mic capture) with a full **typed-text fallback** (mic-denied or impatient вҶ’ type a phrase, runs the embedder only; the whole semanticвҶ’light/sound mapping still works with no microphone). No mic/camera/tilt beyond the voice capture. В· **THE CHAIN (the whole point) = two real models in series, $0, entirely client-side, no `package.json` change:** (1) **`Xenova/whisper-tiny.en`** (automatic-speech-recognition) turns voice вҶ’ text; (2) **`Xenova/all-MiniLM-L6-v2`** (feature-extraction, mean-pooled + normalized) turns text вҶ’ a **384-dim sentence embedding**. Both are dynamically imported from a CDN at runtime (`@huggingface/transformers@3.0.0`, `import(/* webpackIgnore: true */ вҖҰ)` вҖ” the exact $0 pattern proven by `1960-depth-well`; Transformers.js auto-selects WebGPU/wasm). The embedding is reduced by **fixed random projections** into shared control params вҶ’ so the mapping is deterministic (same phrase вҶ’ same room) and **semantically similar phrases land near each other** in colour & timbre. В· **OUTPUT = raw WebGL2 fragment shader** (self-corrected substrate вҖ” NOT three.js, NOT WebGPU, NOT Canvas2D, all jury-hot/banned): a full-screen **domain-warped travelling-wave interference field** with a **cartesian mirror-fold** symmetry вҖ” **deliberately NOT a log-polar / concentric form-constant warp** (jury-banned 4Г—). Hue comes straight from the embedding, so the palette **spans the wheel** ("brass" вҶ’ gold, "snow" вҶ’ pale cyan, "red forest" вҶ’ deep red) rather than defaulting to the banned violet-on-near-black cosmic look. В· **HARMONIC MODEL = derived from the meaning, NOT a JI lattice** вҖ” six FM voices on an embedding-chosen fundamental + a **word-derived non-lattice partial set**; brightness tilts the gains/filter, semantic "inharmonicity" opens the FM depth. Explicitly avoids the banned `[1,9/8,5/4,4/3,3/2,5/3,15/8,2]`-over-a-low-root additive stack (jury #2). В· **AUDIO** вҖ” FM voices вҶ’ master gain вҶ’ destination; AudioContext started inside the first user gesture; full teardown on unmount (nodes stopped, rAF cancelled, ctx closed, mic tracks stopped). В· **SELF-DEMO** вҖ” at first paint a **ghost cycle** of four hand-authored, deliberately-distinct fields ("ocean at midnight" / "a bright brass fanfare" / "quiet snow" / "deep red forest") auto-advances every 7 s (never blank/silent once audio unlocks), and **silently upgrades to the REAL reduced embeddings** of those same phrases once model 2 loads вҖ” so the semantic mapping demonstrates itself before the visitor acts. No-WebGL2 shows an on-brand notice; models load lazily AFTER first paint with a progress dock (never blocks first render on the ~40вҖ“80 MB download). В· **SAFETY / a11y** вҖ” no strobe/flicker (slow luminance drift); chrome on semantic tokens; errors in `text-destructive`. В· cycle 833 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-19 jury) В· demoable В· `theme: sing words and their MEANING paints the room В· palette: embedding-chosen, spans the wheel (NOT violet-cosmic) В· input: voice + typed-text fallback В· output: WebGL2 interference field (cartesian fold, NOT log-polar) В· harmony: embedding-derived FM partials (NOT the JI stack) В· technique: first вүҘ2-model in-browser AI pipeline chain (Whisper-tiny ASR вҶ’ MiniLM sentence-embedding) as the compositional driver В· pole: n/a (semantic instrument) В· needs-a-human: partial (ghost self-demos; voice/typing is the player's act)` В· notes: `README.md` В· ref **Memo Akten *Learning to See*** (latent-space perceptual mapping) В· **Refik Anadol** data-as-pigment; the fresh move is that the semantic embedding of *sung language* is the brush. **Ambition вҖ” honest 3/5:** #1 (novel technique вҖ” first вүҘ2-model AI pipeline chain in the lab; prior Transformers.js use is all depth-estimation) В· #2 (вүҘ3 subsystems: ASR model + embedding model + FM audio engine + WebGL2 field) В· #5 (recent research вҖ” the $0 in-browser Transformers.js/WebGPU path, current). The two *discriminating* criteria (#1 novel + #5 recent) both real. **mode:** WIDE. **candidates:** 1992-semantic-choir(win) В· 1994-invisible-bells(banked вӯҗвӯҗ, HRTF spatial-audio room on CSS compositor, SIGGRAPH 2026 "Light Architecture") В· 1996-seismic-choir(banked вӯҗ, live-USGS earthquake sonification вҖ” worn theme, resurrect only with a fresh data source). **Validate:** normalizer 0 rewrites; no banned patterns (no log-polar/font-serif/raw-white chrome); authoritative `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` **EXIT 0**, `/dream/1992-semantic-choir` `page.js` + `page_client-reference-manifest.js` emitted + route in BOTH manifests, losers absent. **NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless вҖ” no display/mic/WebGL here): whether Whisper-tiny reliably hears *sung* (vs spoken) fragments, whether the embeddingвҶ’hue/timbre mapping reads as *meaningful* rather than arbitrary, and first-load time on the ~40вҖ“80 MB model download вҖ” all want Karel's desktop Chrome + a mic (typed-text path is the fast, mic-free demo). Two more explored & banked this fire (IDEAS В§833).

### [1990-impact-cairn](/dream/1990-impact-cairn) В· **music from timed IMPACTS you play eyes-closed, felt in your hand вҖ” and can UN-build by knocking a stone off** В· **what if you built music by stacking timed physical impacts you can play eyes-closed, feel every hit in your hand, and un-make by knocking a stone off?** DEEP-mode winner (cycle 832), 1 of 3 realizations of ONE concept вҖ” *composing IS editing: every past gesture is editable/overwritable/un-makeable, and un-making is a musical event* (jury 2026-07-19 provocation #3, the under-served one). The others a destructive/editable SVG-DOM live-looper whose past re-voices itself under a drifting scale (`1986-splice-cassette`, banked вӯҗвӯҗ) and a BohlenвҖ“Pierce SVG-DOM melody you weave and **un-weave** (`1988-tritave-loom`, banked вӯҗ), both IDEAS В§832. Realizes the В§831 вӯҗвӯҗ `1982-droplet-cairn` bank AND Karel's own В§831 MORNING ask ("Ship droplet-cairn next?"). Deliberately expands the lab's **thinnest, most-starving category вҖ” non-screen / audio-first / HAPTIC (0Г— recent)** вҖ” dodging the most jury axes at once. В· **INPUT = tap / click / spacebar in RHYTHM** (timing, not pitch); each tap drops a stone that falls and **collides вҶ’ the collision IS the sound**; `PointerEvent.pressure` supplies real strike velocity where available (fixed fallback). **The Vibration API (`navigator.vibrate`) is a load-bearing second feedback channel** вҖ” a velocity/material-scaled haptic pulse on every strike + tactile confirmations on knock-off / material-change (feature-detected, silent no-op where absent). No mic/camera/tilt. В· **OUTPUT = audio-first, MINIMAL DOM/CSS** вҖ” a dark field of plain `<div>` stones (CSS-transform fall/settle); each laid layer is one settled stone that **pulses on every hit it sounds**; knocking one off scatters falling debris. **NO `<canvas>`, NO WebGL/WebGPU, NO three.js, NO SVG art scene** вҖ” deliberately spare (the piece is meant for eyes closed; the screen is a quiet index, testing the lab's screen-first bias). Near-monochrome graphite/bone (art hex in the DOM only; chrome on semantic tokens). В· **HARMONIC MODEL = NONE, on purpose** вҖ” no scale, no tuning, no pitch lattice anywhere. Every sound is a struck object via **modal impact synthesis**: a broadband noise excitation low-passed to the material's colour вҶ’ a bank of 3вҖ“6 **inharmonic** band-pass modes with exponential decay + **Вұ4% per-hit freq jitter so no stable pitch can ever crystallise**; four **materials** (droplet/ceramic/wood/stone) differ only in modal ratios, decay, excitation colour, resonator-Q cap. **Timbre + rhythm are the ENTIRE compositional material** вҖ” the literal cash of jury provocation #2 ("pure rhythm/timbre with no pitch lattice at all"), the furthest possible departure from the banned JI-partial-stack groove. В· **TECHNIQUE = editable/consequential rhythmic memory** (NOT simвҶ’scalarвҶ’pitch, NOT a CA, NOT additive-deposit): (1) **lay** a tapped figure as a looping layer (look-ahead scheduler ~120 ms off the AudioContext clock, never rAF); (2) layers loop at slightly independent rates and **phase** against each other (Reich); (3) **knock a stone off** вҖ” delete a layer and the loop *audibly loses* it (+ a "tumble" so un-making is a sound, not a gap); (4) **change a laid stone's material** вҖ” a *transform* of existing memory (timbre swaps on the layer's next pass), not a new layer; (5) mute / clear. Layer count bound to 5 so the cairn stays legible. В· **AUDIO** вҖ” modal-synth per hit вҶ’ master **0.16** (вүӨ0.18) вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` вҶ’ destination; per-material Q cap so a hard strike can't blow up; AudioContext created inside the Begin/first-tap gesture; full teardown on unmount (nodes disconnected, timers cleared, `ctx.close()`). В· **SELF-DEMO** вҖ” deterministic seeded **ghost drummer** (mulberry32 from a constant seed; all timing from the audio clock вҖ” no `Math.random`/`Date.now`): taps a figure, loops it, adds a phasing layer, **knocks a stone off**, changes a material, cycling so the whole un-making grammar self-demonstrates headless with zero input; real tap takes over instantly, re-arms ~15 s. Pre-Begin hero (never blank). В· **SAFETY / a11y** вҖ” no strobe/flicker; `prefers-reduced-motion` honoured; audio-blocked shows an on-brand `text-destructive` note and the visual keeps running; haptics degrade to a no-op. В· cycle 832 В· DEEP-winner (2026-07-19 jury) В· demoable В· `theme: build music from timed impacts you play eyes-closed and un-build by knocking a stone off В· palette: near-monochrome graphite/bone (art) В· input: tap/click/spacebar rhythm + PointerEvent.pressure + Vibration-API haptics (NON-touch-tap-as-pitch, NON-mic/camera/tilt) В· output: audio-first + minimal DOM/CSS (coldest substrate, 0Г—; tests screen bias) В· harmony: NONE вҖ” modal impact synth, inharmonic, no pitch lattice (jury #2's most radical answer) В· technique: editable/consequential rhythmic memory вҖ” lay/phase/knock-off/material-transform (NOT simвҶ’scalar, NOT additive-deposit) В· pole: conceptual/tactile instrument (non-psychedelic) В· needs-a-human: total (ghost only self-demos; haptics are the player's channel)` В· notes: `README.md` В· ref Kato & Baba (Tokyo Metropolitan U.) *A MIDI-Controlled Water-Droplet Interface for Generating Droplet Impact Sounds* вҖ” **SIGGRAPH 2026 Emerging Technologies, live July 19вҖ“23 2026** В· Steve Reich *Clapping Music* (phasing) В· Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening*. **Ambition вҖ” honest 3/5:** #2 (вүҘ3 subsystems: modal-impact synth + 4 materials + look-ahead phasing scheduler + Vibration-API haptics + minimal reactive DOM + ghost) В· #3 (named refs above) В· #5 (SIGGRAPH ET, live *today*, <7 days). NOT #1 (haptics/`navigator.vibrate` has prior lab use вҖ” 400-soundwalk-room, kids toys; the fresh axis is the no-pitch-lattice + editable-rhythmic-memory fusion, not the channel). **mode:** DEEP. **candidates:** 1990-impact-cairn(win) В· 1986-splice-cassette(banked вӯҗвӯҗ, SVG-DOM destructive looper, drifting-scale re-voices the past, overwrite/cut/re-time/fracture, NIME 2026 "Loop Fracture Loop") В· 1988-tritave-loom(banked вӯҗ, SVG-DOM BohlenвҖ“Pierce un-weave). **Validate:** normalizer 0 rewrites; scoped `eslint --max-warnings 0` = 0; authoritative `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` **EXIT 0**, `/dream/1990-impact-cairn` `page.js` + `page_client-reference-manifest.js` emitted + route in BOTH manifests, losers absent. **NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless вҖ” no display/speakers/haptics/touch): whether modal-impact synth reads as struck objects (not pitches), whether the knock-off "tumble" reads as *un-making*, whether the phasing evolves musically, and whether the haptic pulse lands on a real phone вҖ” all want Karel's browser + **headphones** (the visual is deliberately spare). Two more explored & banked this fire (IDEAS В§832).

### [1974-threshold-loom](/dream/1974-threshold-loom) В· **typing as falling asleep** вҖ” the *rhythm* of your keystrokes (not the letters) paces a hypnagogic Ganzfeld field + phosphene blooms + a ShepardвҖ“Risset glissando descending forever В· **what if falling asleep were an instrument вҖ” where the CADENCE of your typing dissolves you toward the threshold of sleep?** WIDE-mode winner (cycle 830), 1 of 3 OFF-GPU cosmic-ambient explorers on the coldest non-GPU substrates (Canvas2D / SVG-DOM / CSS-compositor); the others an NDE tunnel-to-light in SVG-DOM (`1978-descent-choir`) and a jhДҒna clear-light dissolve in the CSS-compositor (`1980-boundless-field`), both banked (IDEAS В§830). Realizes the В§829 вӯҗвӯҗ `1974-threshold-loom` bank (the flagged TOP resurrect). Deliberately rebalances an **INTENSE-heavy** window (825/828/1972) back to the under-served **COSMIC-AMBIENT** pole, and rotates the OUTPUT off the GPU-render family (6/10 of the last 10 ships were WebGPU/three.js). В· **INPUT = keyboard-CADENCE** вҖ” inter-keystroke *timing/rhythm*, NOT letters (a poem and a password drive it identically): every keystroke's interval feeds a slow `depth` integrator (0 awake вҶ’ 1 threshold); long even intervals read drowsy and push depth up, short jittery bursts read frantic and pull it down; steadiness sinks faster than raggedness. **Grep-thin as a rhythm input** вҖ” non-touch, non-mic, non-tilt (off every recent/banned input; mic just used at 1972). Plus a **deterministic seeded phantom typist** (mulberry32) that types at a drowsy cadence after Begin вҖ” drives the whole field + sound for the headless 06:30 review, yields to a real key instantly, re-arms after ~16 s idle. В· **OUTPUT = Canvas2D and nothing else** вҖ” a full-viewport **Ganzfeld ground** (dim warm-dusk violet + soft vignette while awake вҶ’ brightening, de-vignetting toward boundless soft-white near the threshold) with **phosphene form-constant blooms** per keystroke (frantic вҶ’ tight speckle; drowsy вҶ’ soft drifting spots + organized hex lattices), swelling/fading on a gentle `sin()` envelope; near the threshold imagery loses contrast and dissolves into the uniform field (structure and language let go). **NO WebGL/WebGPU/three.js/SVG** вҖ” Canvas2D is a cold non-GPU substrate (~1вҖ“2Г—) and OFF the GPU-render over-camp (6/10). В· **TECHNIQUE = keystroke-rhythm state integrator вҶ’ Ganzfeld luminance field + phosphene blooms + descending ShepardвҖ“Risset.** NOT simвҶ’scalarвҶ’pitch, NOT a memory-instrument, NOT a CA. В· **AUDIO** вҖ” a **ShepardвҖ“Risset glissando descending forever** (octave-spaced sine partials under a fixed Gaussian envelope glide down with no audible bottom вҖ” the auditory barber-pole carrying the ear toward sleep; deeper state вҶ’ faster/brighter descent) + a soft detuned cosmic pad that opens as you deepen + a quiet per-keystroke phosphene chime (drops an octave in the deep state); **master вүӨ0.16 вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` вҶ’ destination**, gesture-gated, full teardown (cancel rAF, remove keydown/resize listeners, stop every oscillator, close AudioContext). В· **SAFETY / a11y** вҖ” no strobe/flicker (every luminance change is slow sub-Hz drift; any theta feeling lives in *audio amplitude*, never light; blooms fade over seconds); `prefers-reduced-motion` (via shared `_shared/psych/safeFlicker`) freezes the field to a calm still state; audio quiet + gated. В· cycle 830 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-18 jury) В· demoable В· `theme: typing rhythm as falling asleep вҖ” cadence dissolves you toward the threshold of sleep В· palette: dim warm-dusk violet вҶ’ boundless soft-white Ganzfeld (art) В· input: keyboard-CADENCE (rhythm not letters; grep-thin, NON-touch/NON-mic/NON-tilt) + seeded phantom typist В· output: PURE Canvas2D (cold non-GPU substrate; off the 6/10 GPU-render over-camp) В· technique: keystroke-rhythm integrator вҶ’ Ganzfeld + phosphene form-constants + ShepardвҖ“Risset descent (NOT simвҶ’scalar, NOT memory-instrument) В· pole: cosmic-ambient / hypnagogia (rebalances the INTENSE-heavy window) В· needs-a-human: total (phantom typist only self-demos)` В· notes: `README.md` В· ref Wackermann/PГјtz/Allefeld *Cortex* 2002 (PMID 12433389 вҖ” phosphenes/form-constants вүҲ86% of hypnagogic imagery) В· Ganzfeld thalamo-cortical decoupling (PMC7596232) В· Roger Shepard (1964) / Jean-Claude Risset В· the "Tetris effect." **Ambition вҖ” honest 2/5:** #2 (вүҘ3 subsystems: keystroke-cadence integrator + Canvas2D Ganzfeld/phosphene field + ShepardвҖ“Risset descent engine + cosmic pad + phantom typist) В· #3 (named refs above). NOT #1 (Ganzfeld/phosphenes/Shepard all exist in the lab individually; the fresh axis is keyboard-*cadence*-as-input welded to a hypnagogic descent). **mode:** WIDE. **candidates:** 1974-threshold-loom(win) В· 1978-descent-choir(banked вӯҗвӯҗ, SVG-DOM NDE tunnel-to-light, device-tilt, JI-resolves-to-consonance-on-approach) В· 1980-boundless-field(banked вӯҗ, CSS-compositor jhДҒna clear-light, camera-stillness dissolve-to-white). **Validate:** normalizer 0 rewrites; project-wide `tsc --noEmit` 0 errors in-folder; `next lint --dir` 0 warnings; authoritative `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` **EXIT 0**, route in both manifests, losers absent. **NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless вҖ” no display/speakers/keyboard): whether the cadenceвҶ’depth mapping reads as "typing rhythm is falling asleep," whether the Ganzfeld dissolve + phosphene blooms land vs read subtle, and whether the ShepardвҖ“Risset descent feels like sinking вҖ” all want Karel's browser.
