### [1960-depth-well](/dream/1960-depth-well) В· a depth-camera room that **REMEMBERS where your body was** вҖ” dwell to deposit a durable, revisitable sounding presence В· **what if a room could remember where your body was, and every place you dwelled kept sounding a tuned tone you can walk back to?** DEEP-mode winner (cycle 827), 1 of 3 realizations of ONE concept ("a room that remembers"); the others a no-ML Canvas2D pseudo-depth floor (`1962-dwell-room`) and a WebGPU-compute diffusing memory-*field* (`1964-presence-tide`), both banked (IDEAS В§827). **The depth lineage's missing chapter:** `927-depth-room` (depthвҶ’proximity, pitch frozen) and `942-depth-harmonic-room` (depthвҶ’Tonnetz voice-leading) already read webcam monocular depth but are purely **reactive** вҖ” neither remembers; this adds compositional **MEMORY** (JURY 2026-07-18 #4). Deliberately **non-warm-paper** after that vibe hit ~4Г— in the last 10 (1932/1934/1938/1958). В· **INPUT = webcam monocular depth** (Depth-Anything-V2-small `onnx-community/depth-anything-v2-small` run in-browser via **Transformers.js/WebGPU**, loaded at runtime from a CDN `@huggingface/transformers@3` with the `/* webpackIgnore: true */` dynamic-`import()` pattern proven in `1297-hand-loom` вҖ” nothing added to package.json; wasm fallback). NOT a lab-first input (927/942 exist) вҖ” floor cleared via subsystems + refs, not novelty. Off the jury-banned pointer/touch (6Г—). **Graceful ladder:** model+camera вҶ’ real depth cloud; camera only / model slow вҶ’ crude brightness+frame-diff pseudo-depth; no camera / no WebGPU вҶ’ Canvas2D projection. Plus a **mandatory seeded ghost** (a soft Gaussian "wandering presence" that drifts, dwells, deposits nodes on a loop) that drives the WHOLE pipeline from frame 1 with no camera/model вҖ” the phone-review self-demo. В· **OUTPUT = WebGPU instanced point cloud** (52Г—38 depth grid lifted to world space, slow auto-orbit reads as genuinely 3-D) with a **Canvas2D fallback** running the same projection. WebGPU is a jury *ask* (keep it warm), OFF the banned WebGL2 (7Г—). В· **TECHNIQUE = depth presence вҶ’ durable spatial memory-nodes (NOT simвҶ’scalarвҶ’pitch, NOT a CA).** Near-region depth centroid = the live **present** (one warm amber accent + tracking voice); dwell ~1.25 s inside a small sphere вҶ’ deposit a durable node there; each node's proximity to the live locus is smoothed into a `swell` driving glow + gain (walk back вҶ’ it blooms); re-dwelling re-sounds an existing node (no dup); a 13-node cap recycles the dimmest/oldest to keep the chord legible. В· **AUDIO = just intonation** (55 Hz root Г— {1, 9/8, 5/4, 4/3, 3/2, 5/3, 15/8, 2}, two octaves, **NON-pentatonic**); depthвҶ’partial/register, horizontal positionвҶ’real `StereoPannerNode` pan (memories sit LвҶ”R where you left them); warm triangle+sine вҶ’ gentle lowpass, everything glides (no clicks); **master вүӨ0.16 вҶ’ tanh soft-clip вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` limiter вҶ’ destination**; AudioContext created inside the Start gesture; full teardown on unmount (stop MediaStream tracks, close model, disconnect audio, cancel rAF, close ctx). В· **SAFETY / a11y** вҖ” no flicker (slow orbit + glow only); sensor-denied shows a `text-destructive` note while the ghost keeps composing; never throws, never blanks. В· cycle 827 В· DEEP-winner В· demoable В· `theme: a room that remembers where your body was В· palette: cold deep-space (blue-black volume, cool white/pale-blue points, one warm amber present-locus) вҖ” NON-warm-paper, NON-violet В· input: webcam monocular depth (Depth-Anything-V2/Transformers.js/WebGPU) + seeded ghost вҖ” NON-touch В· output: WebGPU point cloud (Canvas2D fallback) В· technique: depth вҶ’ durable spatial memory-nodes (NOT simвҶ’scalar, NOT CA) В· harmony: just intonation (NON-pentatonic) В· pole: cosmic-ambient/presence (non-psychedelic) В· needs-a-human: total (ghost only self-demos)` В· notes: `README.md` В· ref Myron Krueger *Videoplace* В· Daniel Rozin mechanical mirrors В· Rafael Lozano-Hemmer presence installations В· Depth-Anything-V2 В· Transformers.js/WebGPU В· extends in-lab 927/942. **Ambition вҖ” honest 2/5 (floor cleared):** #2 (вүҘ3 subsystems: camera В· depth-ML В· spatial-memory model В· WebGPU renderer+Canvas2D fallback В· spatial JI audio) В· #3 (named refs above). NOT #1 (depth input exists: 927/942) вҖ” fresh contribution is the memory stance. **mode:** DEEP. **candidates:** 1960-depth-well(win) В· 1962-dwell-room(banked, no-ML Canvas2D floor) В· 1964-presence-tide(banked, WebGPU-compute diffusing memory-field). **BUILD NOTE:** tsc 0 project-wide + eslint clean in-folder + route compiles + first full build passed end-to-end; but full `npm run build` fails nondeterministically on **`EMFILE`** during 878-page static generation (sandbox 4096-fd hard cap, un-raisable even as root вҖ” absent on Vercel). Shipped on that evidence. **NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless вҖ” no display/camera/speakers): whether the depth model loads on Karel's machine, whether the cloud reads as 3-D, and whether dwell-to-deposit + walk-back-to-swell land as musical вҖ” all want Karel's browser.

### [1958-treatise-scroll](/dream/1958-treatise-scroll) В· scroll-performed self-writing **Cardew *Treatise* graphic score** in **SVG-DOM** вҖ” reading IS performing В· **what if reading a graphic score WAS performing it вҖ” where your scroll velocity is the tempo and expression, and the music exists only while you read?** DEEP-mode winner (cycle 826), 1 of 3 parallel realizations of ONE concept ("reading a graphic score IS performing it") вҖ” the others a typographic sleep-onset dissolution and a spiral mensuration canon. Realizes the В§825 вӯҗвӯҗ `1954-treatise-scroll` bank AND cashes tonight's В§826 dive (the 9-day-old "Arrows & Operators" *Treatise* exhibition, opened 2026-07-10). Inverts the lab's graphic-score *visualizers* (319-hub-score, 1236-neume вҖ” machine plays, score illustrates): here the reader's own gesture is the performance. Deliberate NON-psychedelic alternation after a psychedelic-heavy window (825 intense / 824 cosmic / 823 intense). В· **INPUT = SCROLL VELOCITY** (wheel / trackpad / touch-drag, non-passive `preventDefault`) as a primary performance instrument вҖ” **grep-0Г— in the lab** (scroll had only ever been scrub/nav); scroll up rewinds; there is no play button driving the sound. Off every recent/banned input (MIDI 1952 В· webcam 1946 В· tilt 1930/1944 В· gamepad 1938 В· breath 1934 В· keyboard 1932 В· pointer/touch-tap 6Г—). Plus a **seeded deterministic ghost auto-reader** (mulberry32; after ~1.5 s idle it breathes the reading tempo вҖ” accelerating into dense passages, easing to near-stop to let sustains ring вҖ” so it self-demos on a phone; any scroll takes over instantly). В· **OUTPUT = SVG-DOM and nothing else** вҖ” `<line>/<circle>/<path>/<rect>/<text>` marks in one `<g>` translated via `translateY` past a fixed cinnabar playhead; the visible mark set is band-recycled around the playhead and active marks are highlighted imperatively (no per-frame React re-render). **NO canvas / WebGL / WebGPU / three.js.** SVG-DOM is COLD in the recent 6-ship window (last SVG ship ~1928; recent = Canvas2D/WebGPU/three.js/CSS) and OFF the jury-banned WebGL2 7Г— / Canvas2D-hot / WebGPU-hot / CSS-just-used. В· **TECHNIQUE = graphic-score вҶ’ JI reading, reading-is-performing** вҖ” each seeded Cardew-like mark (line / circle / dot / cluster / arc / box / number-field) carries a real vertical *extent*; a mark sounds while the playhead sits inside it, so **stopping the scroll on a thick line or box SUSTAINS it as a held drone** and scrolling off releases it. Horizontal position вҶ’ pitch; thickness вҶ’ dynamics/gain; circles/boxes вҶ’ stacked-JI chords; dots/clusters вҶ’ plucks; arcs вҶ’ glides; number-fields вҶ’ soft bells; scroll speed вҶ’ tempo + brightness. NOT simвҶ’scalarвҶ’pitch, NOT a memory-instrument, NOT CA. В· **AUDIO = just intonation** (C3 130.81 Hz tonic, three octaves of 1/1 9/8 5/4 4/3 3/2 5/3 15/8 вҖ” NON-pentatonic), overlap-voiced triangle/sine вҶ’ lowpass вҶ’ lowpassed feedback delay вҶ’ **master 0.15** вҶ’ tanh `WaveShaper` soft-clip limiter вҶ’ destination; bounded polyphony (вүӨ10) + a soft tonic spine drone; AudioContext created inside a gesture (iOS-safe, resumes on first scroll / "Begin reading"), full teardown (cancel rAF, disconnect, `close()`, remove listeners) on unmount. В· **SAFETY / a11y** вҖ” no flicker (only translate + a soft glow); `prefers-reduced-motion` slows the ghost; audio-blocked shows a `text-destructive` note and the score still scrolls silently. В· cycle 826 В· DEEP-winner (2026-07-18 jury) В· demoable В· `theme: reading is performing вҖ” scroll a graphic score to play it В· palette: warm paper-and-ink (graphite marks, cinnabar playhead, warm page) вҖ” a rare warm register (art), NON-violet В· input: scroll-velocity (grep-0Г— as instrument, NON-touch-tap) + seeded ghost В· output: PURE SVG-DOM (cold in recent window) В· technique: graphic-scoreвҶ’JI reading, stop-to-sustain (NOT simвҶ’scalar, NOT memory-instrument) В· harmony: just intonation (NON-pentatonic) В· pole: conceptual/non-psychedelic (deliberate alternation) В· needs-a-human: total (ghost only self-demos)` В· notes: `README.md` В· ref Cornelius Cardew *Treatise* (1963вҖ“67) В· "Arrows & Operators: Visual Debates in Music" exhibition (opened 2026-07-10, live *Treatise* performances) В· "Interpreting Graphic Notation with MusicLDM" (arXiv:2412.08944). **Ambition вҖ” honest 4/5:** #1 *arguably* (scroll-velocity-as-instrument grep-0Г—; graphic-score-as-instrument vs the lab's score-visualizers) В· #2 (вүҘ3 subsystems: scroll-velocity engine В· seeded mark generator w/ extents В· graphicвҶ’JI reading engine В· Web Audio synth+drone+limiter В· ghost) В· #3 (named refs above) В· #5 (В§826 exhibition dive). **mode:** DEEP. **candidates:** 1958-treatise-scroll(win) В· 1962-spiral-cantus(banked вӯҗвӯҗ, SVG spiral mensuration canon 1:2:3, Baude Cordier) В· 1960-hypnagogic-margin(banked вӯҗ, typographic sleep-onset word-dissolution, Gysin/Burroughs). **NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless вҖ” no display/speakers/scroll device): whether scroll-velocity reads legibly as tempo and stop-as-sustain lands as a musical hold, whether the endless Cardew marks resolve into a legible score, and whether the graphicвҶ’JI reading sounds intentional вҖ” all want Karel's browser. Two more explored & banked this fire (IDEAS В§826).

### [1952-comma-veil](/dream/1952-comma-veil) В· Web MIDI / QWERTY-played DMT form-constant mandala rendered in **pure CSS compositor (zero canvas)** В· **what if a DMT-breakthrough form-constant mandala were rendered with ZERO canvas вҖ” purely in the CSS compositor вҖ” and PLAYED like an instrument, so the harmony you play warps the impossible geometry in real time?** WIDE-mode winner (cycle 825), 1 of 3 parallel explorations across the three coldest substrates (CSS-compositor / SVG-DOM / three.js). Returns the lab to its PRIMARY psychedelic direction on the under-served **INTENSE** pole (recent ships skewed cosmic/memory/data). В· **INPUT = Web MIDI API** note-on/off (primary instrument) + **QWERTY fallback** (`a s d f g h j k l` = ascending JI degrees, `w e t y u o p` = in-between) + a **seeded deterministic ghost player** (mulberry32; after ~6 s idle it improvises a tension buildвҶ’peakвҶ’resolveвҶ’breathe arc so it's never a dead screen and self-demos on a phone with no MIDI). NON-touch, NON-tilt, NON-camera, NON-self-playing-as-sole; rotates off every jury-banned input. В· **OUTPUT = the CSS COMPOSITOR and nothing else** вҖ” six stacked `<div>`s of `repeating-conic-gradient` / `repeating-radial-gradient` / `radial-gradient` fused with `mix-blend-mode` (screen/overlay/soft-light), feathered by `mask-image`, kaleidoscope-mirrored via CSS `transform: scaleX(-1)`/`rotate`, every layer driven by CSS custom properties (`--hue`/`--warp`/`--axes`/`--spin`/`--tension`/`--scale`/`--bloom`) rewritten each frame. **NO `<canvas>`, NO WebGL, NO WebGPU, NO three.js, NO SVG** вҖ” the freshest render substrate in the lab (CSS-compositor 1Г—, only 1778-gradient-lotus; and OFF the jury-banned WebGL2 7Г— / Canvas2D-hot 3Г— / WebGPU-hot 3Г— / three.js-just-used). В· **TECHNIQUE = harmonyвҶ’geometry via one source of truth** вҖ” the sounding chord drives BOTH the synth and the mandala. A **PlompвҖ“Levelt / Sethares sensory-roughness** model over every sounding partial-pair yields a 0..1 tension scalar: consonance (octave/fifth/third) LOCKS a still, symmetric, warm-gold form-constant; dissonance (tritone/M7) SHEARS it, multiplies kaleidoscope axes ("more axes than physical space allows"), quickens the spin, slides the palette to cold oil-slick thin-film. NOT simвҶ’scalarвҶ’pitch, NOT a memory-instrument, NOT Flow-Lenia/CA. В· **AUDIO = just intonation** (~58 Hz drone; each note a JI ratio 1, 9/8, 5/4, 4/3, 3/2, 5/3, 15/8, 2 + octaves вҖ” NON-pentatonic), per-note triangle+sine through a lowpass + shared drone bed + tanh `WaveShaperNode` limiter, master вүӨ0.17, AudioContext closed + MIDI/key listeners removed on unmount. В· **SAFETY** вҖ” flicker-adjacent but never strobes: spin вүӨ~0.13 Hz, the one tension-linked opacity eased over ~1 s (no sub-3 Hz alpha flashing), `prefers-reduced-motion` freezes spin+warp to a still mandala. В· cycle 825 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-18 jury) В· demoable В· `theme: play a chord, warp an impossible geometry В· palette: iridescent DMT вҖ” indigo/violet вҶ’ oil-slick teal/magenta/gold, warm-gold at rest (art) В· input: Web MIDI + QWERTY + seeded ghost (NON-touch) В· output: PURE CSS compositor (freshest substrate, 1Г—) В· technique: JI-harmonyвҶ’form-constant geometry, one source of truth (NOT simвҶ’scalar) В· harmony: just intonation (NON-pentatonic) В· pole: psychedelic INTENSE В· needs-a-human: total (ghost only self-demos)` В· notes: `README.md` В· ref Heinrich KlГјver **form constants** В· QRI/AndrГ©s GГіmez Emilsson *The Hyperbolic Geometry of DMT Experiences* В· PlompвҖ“Levelt / Sethares sensory-dissonance В· CSS-compositor-as-render-substrate. **Ambition вҖ” honest 3/5:** #2 (вүҘ3 subsystems: MIDI+QWERTY+ghost input В· JI roughness/tension engine В· Web Audio synth+drone+limiter В· CSS-compositor renderer) В· #3 (named refs above) В· near-#1 (CSS-compositor as a *psychedelic* substrate is grep-thin). **mode:** WIDE. **candidates:** 1952-comma-veil(win) В· 1954-treatise-scroll(banked вӯҗвӯҗ, scroll-as-tempo self-writing SVG graphic score, Cardew *Treatise*) В· 1956-grain-tide(banked вӯҗ, scroll-to-travel three.js granular time-suspension of a real piano recording). **NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless вҖ” no display/speakers/MIDI): whether the blend/mask layer balance reads as a coherent mandala at runtime, whether consonance-locks vs dissonance-shears is legible, and whether the ghost's tension arc lands musically вҖ” all want Karel's browser. Two more explored & banked this fire (IDEAS В§825).

### [1946-somatic-echo](/dream/1946-somatic-echo) В· webcam optical-flow вҶ’ three.js body-aura mandala / somatic-meditation where STILLNESS is the reward В· **what if your MOVEMENT were the music and STILLNESS were the reward вҖ” a drug-free instrument that trains you, gently, toward bodily presence?** DEEP-mode winner (cycle 824), 1 of 3 parallel realizations of ONE concept ("the self-aware body as a somatic-meditation transport") raced across three substrates (three.js / WebGPU-compute fluid / Canvas2D ink). Resurrects the queued вӯҗвӯҗ `1940-somatic-echo` concept (cycle 823's #1 resurrect) and cashes the 2026-07-18 jury's **#1** (a NON-touch input on a NON-WebGL2 substrate) on the thin/precious CAMERA input the jury ("get a body in the room") and Karel's loves both point to (`217-dance-avatar`вқӨпёҸ / `101-camera-song`вқӨпёҸ / `234-kids-hand-creature`вқӨпёҸ). В· **INPUT = webcam optical flow, NO ML / NO MediaPipe / NO CDN** (`getUserMedia` вҶ’ hidden 96Г—72 canvas вҶ’ 8Г—6 frame-difference вҶ’ `energy`, `centroidX/Y`, per-cell energy, and **`smoothness`** = an inverse-jerk measure that is the spine: slow/continuous/present motion вҶ’ 1, jerky/fast вҶ’ 0). NON-touch, NON-pointer; camera is thin (1Г— in the jury window) and rotates hard off the tilt input just used twice (1930/1944). В· **OUTPUT = three.js `THREE.Points`** вҖ” ~3,300 additive points forming a body-aura mandala; the FRESHEST substrate vs the last 6 ships (three.js 0Г—, while Canvas2D is 3Г— [1930/1932/1938] and WebGPU 2Г— [1934/1944]), and a reliable WebGL2 render Karel actually sees on his phone (no WebGPU gamble). Deep indigoвҶ’violetвҶ’warm gold on near-black. В· **TECHNIQUE = movement-sonification biofeedback, STILLNESS-rewarded** (inverts the usual "more motion = more sound": agitation scatters the field + detunes the drone; stillness gathers the mandala + resolves the harmony вҖ” the piece trains presence, a somatic/interoceptive pole). В· **AUDIO = additive just-intonation drone** (~58 Hz + partials [1, 9/8, 5/4, 3/2, 5/3, 15/8, 2], NON-pentatonic): `smoothness` high вҶ’ partials lock to pure ratios (warm, consonant); low вҶ’ detune/beating + noise edge (anxious); `energy` вҶ’ density/brightness; `centroidY` вҶ’ filter/register; `centroidX` вҶ’ pan; sustained-calm вҶ’ a reward bloom (gain lifts, filter opens, partials brighten). Master вүӨ0.18, gesture-gated, AudioContext closed + camera tracks stopped on unmount. В· **SELF-DEMO** вҖ” no camera / denied вҶ’ a seeded Lissajous **ghost mover** agitates ~14 s then decelerates ~8 s to near-stillness, so the full agitationвҶ’calmвҶ’reward arc self-demos with zero camera; a real webcam takes over instantly (`text-destructive` fallback note). В· cycle 824 В· DEEP-winner (2026-07-18 jury) В· demoable В· `theme: move slowly and the world clarifies; go still and it rewards you В· palette: indigoвҶ’violetвҶ’warm gold on near-black (art) В· input: webcam optical-flow (NO ML), NON-touch/thin В· output: three.js Points (freshest substrate vs recent ships) В· technique: movement-sonification biofeedback, stillness-rewarded (inverts motion=sound) В· harmony: additive JI drone (NON-pentatonic) В· pole: cosmic-ambient/meditative/somatic В· needs-a-human: total (ghost only self-demos)` В· notes: `README.md` В· ref Kantan/Dahl/Spaich *The Self-Aware Body* (arXiv:2606.14664) В· *Gesture2Music* (arXiv:2511.00793) В· Anna Halprin В· Гүliane Radigue. **Ambition вҖ” honest 3/5:** #2 (вүҘ3 subsystems: optical-flow analyzer + JI additive audio + three.js aura field + ghost) В· #3 (named refs above) В· #5 (В§824 dive: Gesture2Music / Sounding Bodies / conducting-gesture, chained to the В§823 self-aware-body anchor). **mode:** DEEP. **candidates:** 1946-somatic-echo(win) В· 1948-somatic-veil(banked вӯҗвӯҗ, WebGPU-compute Stable-Fluids veil + Canvas2D fallback) В· 1950-somatic-ink(banked вӯҗ, Canvas2D suminagashi ink-in-water). **NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless вҖ” no camera/display/speakers): whether the scatterвҶ’gather mandala reads as "stillness = reward," whether the smoothness heuristic tracks a real body vs webcam noise, and whether the reward bloom lands musically вҖ” all want Karel's camera. ### [1944-vestibular-dissolve](/dream/1944-vestibular-dissolve) В· device-tilt вҶ’ WebGPU raymarch / vestibular-proprioceptive DISSOLUTION of the gravity vector В· **what if tilting your device dissolved your sense of "down" вҖ” a weightless, boundless drift like the ketamine/NDE loss of the body?** WIDE-mode winner (cycle 823), 1 of 3 parallel altered-states transports built on the "self-aware body" research anchor (arXiv:2606.14664). Returns the lab to its PRIMARY psychedelic/altered-states direction (neglected for 4 cycles of memory-instruments: 1930/1932/1934/1938) and cashes the 2026-07-18 jury's **#1** (a NON-touch input on a NON-WebGL2 substrate вҖ” here on the jury's single MOST-wanted substrate, WebGPU, 1Г—). В· **INPUT = DeviceOrientationEvent** (beta/gamma вҶ’ a 3D gravity vector; first reading calibrates a resting baseline so any comfortable hold becomes "level"); **fallbacks: arrow keys + a seeded auto-drift ghost** that always slowly wanders the vector so the dissolve self-demos with zero sensor; iOS `requestPermission()` on Begin, denial вҶ’ keys+ghost + on-brand `text-destructive` note. **NO pointer/mouse-drag** (pointer banned this cycle, 6Г—); tilt last used 1930 (out of window). В· **OUTPUT = WebGPU raymarch** (a volumetric nebula / infinite membrane whose "up" IS the live gravity vector; tilting reorients the whole cosmos and the horizon dissolves into uniform boundless fog) with an **honest WebGPU вҶ’ WebGL2 вҶ’ Canvas2D fallback chain**, feature-detected, never blank вҖ” WebGPU-render is the substrate the jury explicitly asked for more of. TealвҶ’magentaвҶ’gold gradient along the up-axis (NON-violet). В· **TECHNIQUE = vestibular/proprioceptive gravity-dissolution** (grep-fresh вҖ” the felt "down" made meltable; K-hole depersonalisation / NDE weightlessness / ego-dissolution, PSYCHEDELIC.md Cluster 2). В· **AUDIO = spatial dissolution drone** вҖ” a centre-panned low anchor tone (fundamental + just fifth) LOUD when down is settled, THINNING as orientation is lost; high just-intonation spectral partials (3,4,5,6,7,9,11 Г— f0, NON-pentatonic) bloom + stereo-spread as down melts; master StereoPanner follows L/R tilt; all glided; AudioContext closed + listeners removed on unmount. В· **SELF-DEMO** вҖ” the seeded ghost auto-drift makes the vector wander so the reorientation is visible AND audible with no sensor/input; a real tilt/key takes over instantly. В· cycle 823 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-18) В· demoable В· `theme: tilt your phone and lose which way is down В· palette: cosmic tealвҶ’magentaвҶ’gold (NON-violet) В· input: device-tilt + keys/ghost (NON-touch, NON-pointer) В· output: WebGPU raymarch + WebGL2/Canvas2D fallback (jury's most-wanted substrate) В· technique: vestibular gravity-vector dissolution (grep-fresh) В· pole: intenseвҶ’cosmic В· needs-a-human: tilt (ghost self-demos)` В· notes: `README.md` В· ref ketamine K-hole/NDE ego-dissolution (PSYCHEDELIC.md) В· James Turrell Ganzfeld В· vestibular/otolith gravity perception. **Ambition вҖ” honest 3/5:** #1 (WebGPU-render vestibular gravity-dissolution, both grep-fresh) В· #2 (вүҘ3 subsystems: orientation engine + spatial-audio + 3-backend renderer) В· #3 (Turrell + K-hole/NDE) В· #5 (В§823 dive: arXiv:2606.14664, 6 days old). **mode:** WIDE. **candidates:** 1944-vestibular-dissolve(win) В· 1940-somatic-echo(banked вӯҗвӯҗ, camera-optical-flow/three.js/movement-sonification-meditation) В· 1942-void-descent(banked вӯҗ, audio-only/near-black binaural NDE descent). **NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless вҖ” no GPU/motion-sensor/speakers): the WebGPU raymarch path is verified by compile/type only (no GPU in the container), so runtime rests on the WebGL2/Canvas2D fallbacks + Karel's browser; whether the reorientation reads as "down dissolving" vs a rotating fog, and whether the anchor-thinning is audible, want a real tilt. Two more explored & banked this fire (IDEAS В§823).

### [1938-forking-garden](/dream/1938-forking-garden) В· gamepad вҶ’ Canvas2D branching composition-tree / non-linear compositional MODEL where ALL alternate futures sound at once В· **what if a composition were a garden where every branch you ever grew plays together вҖ” and you could always walk back into your past and grow a DIFFERENT future?** DEEP-mode winner (cycle 822), 1 of 3 parallel realizations of one concept ("Forking Paths"). The lab's **first non-linear / branching compositional model** вҖ” the deepest cash yet of the 2026-07-18 jury's **#4** ("push compositional MEMORY, not reactivity; move the model OFF simвҶ’scalarвҶ’pitch вҖ” 11/15 of the lab is a sim deciding while you watch") and **#1** (a NON-touch input on a NON-WebGL2 substrate). В· **INPUT = Gamepad API** (`navigator.getGamepads()` polled per frame + `gamepadconnected`): left stick navigates the tree (parent/sibling/child), face buttons = D-Dorian scale degrees you tap to build a phrase, a trigger COMMITS (forks if the cursor isn't at a leaf); **full keyboard fallback** so it's usable without a pad. NON-touch, NON-pointer вҖ” gamepad-as-adult-instrument is grep-fresh (used only in 3 paused kids toys), rotating hard off the pointer-on-glass groove (jury 6Г—). В· **OUTPUT = Canvas2D** вҖ” the least-used renderer (the sharpest answer to the WebGL2 monoculture, 7Г—), a river-delta of branches spreading across the canvas, each sounding leaf glowing in time with its loop, the active channel bright. В· **TECHNIQUE = a navigable/forkable version-TREE of musical decisions** (grep-0Г— in the lab вҖ” every prior "branch/tree" is a botanical/physics sim, never a git-for-melody): each node holds a short phrase; commit extends the current branch; navigate back to any ancestor and commit вҶ’ a FORK (new sibling future); **nothing is ever deleted**, so your whole decision-history is durable AND re-enterable. В· **PLAYBACK (the surprise) = ALL LEAVES sound simultaneously** вҖ” every leaf's rootвҶ’leaf path is a looping voice, so the whole garden of alternate histories rings together (Borges: all outcomes happen at once); the rootвҶ’**cursor** path is foregrounded (louder/brighter/wider filter) while the others sit quiet in a shared bed over a soft D drone. Bounded to the nearest ~7 leaves + the foreground path (вүӨ8 melodic voices + 1 drone) so it stays consonant and never turns to mud. В· **HARMONY = D Dorian** (7-note modal, D E F G A B C вҖ” deliberately NON-pentatonic; all voices share the mode + a common D root to stay consonant when sounding together). В· **AUDIO** вҖ” per-leaf triangle+sine вҶ’ envelope вҶ’ per-voice lowpass вҶ’ per-voice gain вҶ’ master вүӨ **0.18** (gesture-ramped, `ctx.resume()` on gesture), phase-preserving voice reconciliation, Dynamicses bounded; `AudioContext.close()` + all listeners removed + `cancelAnimationFrame` on unmount. В· **SELF-DEMO** вҖ” no gamepad + ~5 s idle вҶ’ a seeded deterministic **ghost gardener** builds phrases, extends branches, and ~42% of the time hops back and FORKS a new branch, so the delta visibly widens and the all-futures texture audibly thickens with zero input; any real pad/key hands control back. В· cycle 822 В· DEEP-winner (2026-07-18) В· demoable В· `theme: grow a branching tree of music and hear all your alternate futures at once В· palette: botanical вҖ” linen ground, sage/moss ink, gold active channel (NON-violet) В· input: gamepad + keyboard fallback (NON-touch, grep-fresh) В· output: Canvas2D (least-used renderer) В· technique: non-linear branching-tree compositional MODEL (NOT simвҶ’scalarвҶ’pitch) В· harmony: D Dorian (NON-pentatonic) В· needs-a-human: total (ghost only self-demos)` В· notes: `README.md` В· ref Jorge Luis Borges *The Garden of Forking Paths* (1941) + NIME 2026 "non-linear music" (parts authored once, order chosen at performance time). **Ambition вҖ” honest 4/5:** #1 (branching-tree compositional model + gamepad-instrument, both grep-fresh) В· #2 (вүҘ3 subsystems) В· #3 (Borges + NIME) В· #5 (В§822 dive). **mode:** DEEP. **candidates:** 1938-forking-garden(win) В· 1936-forking-paths(banked вӯҗвӯҗ, keyboard/single-path) В· 1940-forking-flight(banked вӯҗ, tilt/three.js/3D). **NOT ear/eye-verified** (headless вҖ” no gamepad/display/speakers): whether the all-futures texture reads as a legible garden vs mud, whether the foreground path is audibly distinct from the bed, and whether the ghost's grow-then-fork reads as a self-demo вҖ” want Karel's browser (+ a pad for the headline gesture). Two more explored & banked this fire (IDEAS В§822).

### [1934-breath-fresco](/dream/1934-breath-fresco) В· breath-envelope вҶ’ WebGPU-compute spectral fresco / compositional MEMORY as spatial autobiography В· **what if your BREATH painted a permanent spatial timeline of a whole listening session вҖ” a fresco of your breathing you can read back like an autobiography?** WIDE-mode winner (cycle 821), 1 of 3. Cashes the 2026-07-18 jury's TWO live provocations at once вҖ” **#1** (break the fresh pointer-input 6Г— / WebGL2 7Г— monocultures вҶ’ a NON-touch input on a NON-WebGL2 substrate) and **#4** (push compositional MEMORY, not reactivity) вҖ” with the single thinnest input Г— thinnest substrate available. В· **INPUT = breath ENVELOPE via mic** (`getUserMedia` вҶ’ `AnalyserNode` вҶ’ smoothed RMS вҶ’ a rise/hold/fall breath-stroke state machine). Loudness only, NEVER pitch вҖ” NON-touch, NON-pointer, and distinct from `1928-choralis`'s YIN pitch. В· **OUTPUT = WebGPU compute** (ping-ponged `rgba16float` storage textures, advect/fuse/deposit compute pass + tone-mapped render pass) with a **full Canvas2D fallback of identical logic** вҖ” the ONLY candidate on WebGPU-compute (jury flagged it 1Г—, the substrate escape the lab kept promising), and the fallback means it degrades rather than blanks on iOS Safari (the r171-fallback / 1834-livingwall lesson). В· **TECHNIQUE = additive JI partial-bank drone + GPU compute field.** В· **MEMORY (the point) = spatial autobiography:** the wall's horizontal axis IS session time; a trowel head advances LвҶ’R (~5-min span), and each completed exhale deposits a PERMANENT glowing stratum (vertical position = a just-intonation partial from the breath's peak intensity) at the current time-column. Deposits are cumulative and never fade вҖ” passed columns freeze and oxidize toward sienna with age but never vanish (buon fresco: pigment fused into wet plaster is permanent). After minutes the wall is a readable record of the whole session вҖ” where you breathed hard, where you rested, the rhythm of it. **Explicitly NOT a "hold-a-tone-it-fades-in-30s" mechanic** вҖ” deliberately diverging from `1930`'s decaying crystallized chord (the В§819 bank flagged that "too similar" risk and prescribed exactly this spatial-timeline fix). В· **AUDIO** вҖ” each exhale opens one sustained additive JI partial over ~60 Hz (Radigue-style evolving drone, вүӨ24 bounded voices, shimmer LFO) вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor вҶ’ master вүӨ0.18, gesture-ramped, AudioContext closed + mic tracks stopped on unmount. В· **SELF-DEMO** вҖ” mic denied/silent вҶ’ a seeded deterministic **ghost-breath** generator drives the exact same state machine so the wall fills and the drone thickens on its own (mic-denied labeled `text-destructive`); a real breath takes back over instantly. В· cycle 821 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-18) В· demoable В· `theme: breathe near the mic, watch a whole session paint itself into permanent plaster В· palette: warm plaster/fresco вҖ” umber ground, sienna, ochre, chalk (NON-violet) В· input: breath-envelope mic (NON-touch, NON-pitch) В· output: WebGPU-compute + Canvas2D fallback (the 1Г— substrate) В· technique: spatial-timeline compositional memory (cumulative, never decays) В· needs-a-human: total (ghost only self-demos)` В· notes: `README.md` В· ref Гүliane Radigue (long-form drone) В· Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening* В· buon fresco

### [1932-canon-loom](/dream/1932-canon-loom) В· MIDI/keyboard self-canon loom / compositional MEMORY on Canvas2D В· **what if the notes you play NEVER disappear вҖ” what if every note wove a permanent thread into a scrolling loom that plays your own past back as a canon beneath your live playing?** WIDE-mode winner (cycle 819), 1 of 3. A head-on cash of the 2026-07-18 jury's TWO live provocations at once: **#1** (break the pointer+WebGL2 monoculture вҶ’ a NON-touch input on a NON-WebGL2 substrate) and **#4** (push compositional MEMORY, not reactivity вҖ” "11/15 are passive simвҶ’scalarвҶ’pitch where the sim decides and you watch"). В· **INPUT = Web MIDI (`navigator.requestMIDIAccess()`) with a computer-keyboard fallback** (QWERTY home row = a 2-octave C-major scale, upper row = accidentals; active input shown; no MIDI вҶ’ silent degrade to keyboard, never an error). NON-touch, NON-pointer, NON-mic вҖ” rotates the input axis off the pointer-on-glass groove the jury flagged (6Г—). В· **OUTPUT = Canvas2D** вҖ” the single LEAST-used substrate in the window (1Г—), the sharpest answer to the WebGL2 monoculture (7Г—). A Nancarrow punched-roll seen as a loom: time = warp (horizontal, scrolls past a fixed gold read-head), pitch = weft (vertical); each played note is a durable indigo thread at its loop-phase; over-dyeing the same spot deepens/thickens the weft so the fabric visibly densifies. **The thread IS both the woven mark and the scheduled note** вҖ” one object, the soundвҶ”image identity the jury has repeatedly praised (1836/1922). В· **TECHNIQUE = compositional-memory self-canon** (grep-clean as a mechanic вҖ” NOT a physics-sim-scalar-to-pitch mapping): the roll is cyclic, so every recorded thread re-sounds each time it scrolls back under the read-head вҶ’ the accumulated phrase loops as counterpoint under the live performance. "The sound now is a function of everything you've already played" вҖ” memory made structural. Agency: loop-length (4/8/16 beats, re-scales the weave) + "Clear the loom". В· **AUDIO** вҖ” pure Web Audio, warm plucked/struck voice (triangle + soft octave, closing lowpass, fast attack/gentle decay) вҶ’ compressor, master 0.16, gesture-ramped, AudioContext fully closed on unmount. В· **SELF-DEMO** вҖ” after ~6 s idle a **seeded deterministic ghost weaver** threads a fixed canon subject so the piece demonstrates itself headless (visuals run from mount, no MIDI/gesture needed); the instant a real note arrives the ghost yields and its threads remain as accompaniment. В· cycle 819 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-18) В· demoable В· `theme: play a keyboard, watch/hear your notes weave into a permanent self-canon В· palette: indigo-dyed textile on natural linen (WARM, NON-violet) В· input: MIDI/keyboard (NON-touch) В· output: Canvas2D (the 1Г— substrate) В· technique: durable compositional memory (NOT reactive mapping) В· needs-a-human: total (ghost only self-demos; the loom is YOUR performance)` В· notes: `README.md` В· ref Conlon Nancarrow *Studies for Player Piano* (a performance punched permanently into a scrolling roll) + the Jacquard loom (punch-card weave) + Bach's canons (a voice chasing itself)
**Play; watch your notes weave a canon that plays itself back.** WIDE-winner of a 3-brief fan, each a different non-touch input Г— non-WebGL2 substrate, all cashing memory. **Ambition вҖ” honest 2/5 (a valid new build clears вүҘ2):** **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (MIDI + keyboard input engine В· cyclic loop-transport/scheduler В· persistent thread-memory model with over-dye В· Canvas2D loom renderer В· warm-pluck Web-Audio voice) + **#3** named refs (Nancarrow *Studies for Player Piano* В· Jacquard loom В· Bach canons). **diversity:** `banned=[pointer/touch-input(jury 6Г—) В· WebGL2(jury 7Г—) В· simвҶ’scalarвҶ’pitch(jury ~11Г—) В· continuous-CA/Lenia(jury 3Г—, one-from-ban) В· pentatonic(jury 6Г—) В· autonomous-self-playing(jury 6Г—)]`; `picked=[MIDI/keyboard input В· Canvas2D output(1Г—) В· compositional-memory self-canon В· C-major-diatonic-counterpoint(NON-pentatonic) В· indigo-textile palette(NON-violet) В· needs-a-human]` вҖ” clears every live ban on every axis. **mode:** WIDE. **candidates:** 1932-canon-loom(win) В· 1934-gait-loop(banked вӯҗ, IDEAS В§819) В· 1936-breath-fresco(banked вӯҗвӯҗ, IDEAS В§819). **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + Canvas2D; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** `npx eslint src/app/dream/1932-canon-loom --max-warnings 0` = **0**; project-wide `npx tsc --noEmit` = **0**; authoritative `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0** with `/dream/1932-canon-loom` emitted (plain `npm run build` still EMFILEs at page-data collection on the container's 4096-fd ceiling across ~770 routes вҖ” infra, not code; Vercel has fd headroom). **NOT ear/eye-verified for feel** (headless вҖ” no MIDI/display/speakers): whether the canon reads as YOUR past accompanying you (vs. mush as it densifies), whether the ~1-frame scheduler jitter is audible on the warm pluck, and whether the ghost weaver reads as a demo that then hands you the loom вҖ” all want Karel's keyboard. Two more explored this fire вҖ” banked **вӯҗвӯҗ `1936-breath-fresco`** (breath-envelope вҶ’ WebGPU-compute spectral fresco + Canvas2D fallback вҖ” lost on conceptual overlap with last cycle's 1930 fading-JI mechanic) + **вӯҗ `1934-gait-loop`** (camera optical-flow вҶ’ three.js danced-loop sequencer вҖ” lost on a jury-banned pentatonic map + worst headless-demo) вҖ” to IDEAS В§819 (both demoable this session, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1932-canon-loom/README.md`

### [1930-harmonices](/dream/1930-harmonices) В· tilt-played orrery / orbital-resonance = just-intonation В· **what if orbital resonance were an instrument you play by TILTING your phone вҖ” and the music were the REAL just intonation the orbits give you, never a pentatonic fake? DEEP-mode winner (cycle 817), and the lab's FIRST declared 2вҖ“3 cycle commitment вҖ” a head-on answer to the 2026-07-17 jury's criterion #4 (multi-cycle extension = 0/15; "nobody extends anything"). Three substrates of ONE concept were built in parallel (this Canvas2D real N-body, a WebGL2 gravity-well membrane `1932-spheres`, a three.js 3D armillary `1934-armillary`); shipped the strongest, most phone-reviewable implementation.** В· **INPUT = DEVICE TILT вҖ” breaks the newest invisible monoculture MORNING flagged (pointer-on-glass, ~6/10 of the last 10): `DeviceOrientationEvent` beta/gamma become a uniform acceleration bias on the whole gravity field; iOS `requestPermission()` wired inside the "Tilt to play" gesture; no sensor within ~1s вҶ’ `pointer=tilt` desktop fallback with a live active-mode readout, so it is fully playable on a laptop AND on Karel's phone. Love-signal backing: `83-kids-tilt-rain` (tilt) is loved. NOT pointer-as-instrument, NOT self-playing вҖ” hold still and the orrery circularizes toward a lone drone (DEAD without a human tilting).** / **OUTPUT = Canvas2D brass-on-parchment orrery (engraved plate, ticks, glowing period-trails, deep-red LOCK ARCS with ratio labels, tilt compass, live lock chips). WARM palette вҖ” the freshest color break in the fan (both runners-up were cool-astronomical, nearer the lab's near-black; breaking the violet/near-black monoculture is a live jury ban). No WebGL/three.js/CDN = the one candidate guaranteed to run at a 06:30 phone glance.** В· **PHYSICS: a real symplectic velocity-Verlet (leapfrog) N-body integrator, softened gravity `1/(rВІ+ОөВІ)`, a semi-major-axis cage + eccentricity clamp for bounded on-plate motion; osculating Keplerian period per planet from vis-viva (`a=-Ој/2Оө`, `T=2ПҖвҲҡ(aВі/Ој)`); a resonance-capture detector over small-integer ratios (2:1, 3:2, 4:3, 5:3, 5:4, 3:1, 5:2) with enter/exit hysteresis and a stylised restoring "capture nudge" that snaps + holds a locked pair at its exact ratio (honest in README: helped, not emergent вҖ” true mean-motion libration is too slow to feel in seconds); a `calm`-driven circularizer drains eccentricity toward the drone when the device is still. Builder de-risked with a standalone node harness (stable/bounded under adversarial tilt, resonances reachable ~87% of frames, calm reliably circularizes).** В· **HARMONY = JUST INTONATION from the actual period ratios вҖ” orbital resonance IS just intonation (a 3:2 period lock = a pure fifth, 2:1 = octave, 5:4 = pure major third): the star drones the root (C2), each planet is a voice gliding with its period, a captured pair snaps its two voices to the EXACT integer frequency ratio (deeper planet snapped to a just degree of the star lattice, the other set precisely p/q above). Nothing rounded to a scale. The whole thesis (research В§817): the celebrated ESO sonifications of resonant systems вҖ” TOI-178 & TRAPPIST-1 вҖ” both de-risk the mapping down to a PENTATONIC (the exact crutch the jury banned), discarding the very physics being celebrated; here the resonance and the interval are the same number.** В· cycle 817 В· DEEP-winner (2026-07-18) В· demoable В· `theme: tilt an orrery, capture orbital resonances, hear their true just intonation В· palette: antique brass-on-parchment (WARM, NON-violet) В· harmony: just intonation from live period ratios (NOT pentatonic вҖ” the ESO-sonification crutch, refused) В· needs-a-human: total (still device вҶ’ lone drone) В· commitment: cycle 1 of a declared 2вҖ“3 cycle multi-cycle build (jury #4)` В· notes: `README.md` В· ref Johannes Kepler *Harmonices Mundi* (1619) + the Antikythera / orrery tradition + ESO TOI-178 & TRAPPIST-1 sonifications (the pentatonic foil)
**Tilt to play; hear the spheres lock.** DEEP-winner of a 3-substrate fan on ONE massively-bigger concept, and the lab's first real multi-cycle commitment. **Ambition вҖ” honest 4/5:** **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (symplectic N-body integrator + osculating-period/vis-viva analyzer + resonance-capture detector w/ hysteresis + JI voice engine + device-tilt input) + **#3** named refs (Kepler *Harmonices Mundi* В· Antikythera В· ESO TOI-178/TRAPPIST-1) + **#4** declared 2вҖ“3 cycle commitment (the FIRST вҖ” jury flagged this 0/15) + **#5** same-day В§817 dive. #1 not claimed outright (tilt input & JI both exist somewhere in the 770-piece lab) вҖ” the win is orbital-resonance-capture вҶ’ true JI, aimed at the jury's live bans. **diversity:** `banned=[pointer/touch-input(MORNING ~6Г—) В· pentatonic-sonification(jury 6Г—) В· violet-on-near-black(jury ~12Г—) В· Canvas2D-as-crutchвҖҰ allowed 2Г— В· autonomous-self-playing(jury ~11Г—)]`; `picked=[DEVICE-TILT input В· just-intonation-from-period-ratios В· brass-on-parchment WARM palette В· dead-without-a-tilt]` вҖ” clears every live ban, and rotates the INPUT axis off the pointer-groove. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + Canvas2D; zero new npm deps). **Safety:** no strobe вҖ” slow trail-glow + lock-arc snaps, master вүӨ0.17 вҶ’ lowpass вҶ’ compressor, 11-voice budget. **Validation:** normalizer = **0 rewrites** (on-brand); project-wide `npx tsc --noEmit` = **0 errors**; `next lint вҖҰ 1930-harmonices --max-warnings 0` = **0**; authoritative `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0** with `/dream/1930-harmonices` `page.js` + client-reference-manifest emitted (plain `npm run build` still `EMFILE`s at page-data collection on the container's 4096-fd ceiling across ~770 routes вҖ” infra, not code; Vercel has fd headroom). **NOT ear/eye-verified for feel** (headless вҖ” no tilt sensor / display / speakers): whether the capture snap reads as a musical *arrival*, whether phone tilt-scaling feels right without per-device tuning, and whether the JI dyads sit in tune against the drone вҖ” all want Karel's phone. Two more explored this fire вҖ” banked **вӯҗвӯҗ `1932-spheres`** (WebGL2 gravity-well membrane, the prettiest render, real Canvas2D fallback вҖ” lost on WebGL2 review-risk; ship on a WebGL cycle or graft as a cycle-2 skin) + **вӯҗ `1934-armillary`** (three.js 3D hand-turned orrery + conjunction transients, grows the thin three.js substrate вҖ” lost on parametric-not-N-body physics + phone-review weight) вҖ” to IDEAS В§817 (both built demoable this session, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule; rebuild from spec). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1930-harmonices/README.md`

**вҶі CYCLE 2 вҖ” extended IN PLACE (cycle 818, 2026-07-18), the lab's FIRST genuine multi-cycle follow-through (jury #4, 0/15 вҶ’ now 1).** Now retitled **"Harmonices II."** Same URL, same physics/JI/tilt/palette вҖ” three new subsystems layered on: **(1) CHORD MEMORY / CRYSTALLIZATION (the headline)** вҖ” hold a resonance lock вүҘ3.5 s and its exact just interval CRYSTALLIZES into a growing chord stack of persistent sustained sine dyads (вүӨ3 dyads/вүӨ6 tones, drop-oldest) that keep sounding after the two planets drift apart, so across a session you *compose a chord of pure ratios*; each crystal fades over ~32 s unless re-captured, so the composed chord honestly decays to the lone drone with no human (the piece stays dead-without-a-driver вҖ” jury #3); visualized as engraved brass ratio-rings that bloom as they "set" onto the plate + a HUD harmonic ledger with draining life-bars. **(2) CONJUNCTION BELLS** вҖ” a real inharmonic bell (fundamental + a 2.76Г— stretched partial) rings when two planets align on the star's sight-line (per-pair hysteresis, вүӨ3 at once, sight-line flash), gated off once calm so it never self-plays a dead orrery. **(3) WARPED GRAVITY-WELL FIELD** вҖ” faint TRUE equipotential contours of the biased potential `ОҰ=вҲ’Ој/вҲҡ(rВІ+ОөВІ)+tiltВ·r` (Newton-solved per ray), so the whole field visibly leans when you tilt вҖ” the same biased potential the integrator uses, deepening the "one physics drives both sound and image" thesis вҖ” plus a **Seed-a-chain** button (pre-locked TRAPPIST-1-style Laplace chain) for an instant consonant payoff at a 06:30 phone glance that still decays without a tilt. Built via ORCHESTRATED DEEP-continue: 2 parallel builders each extended a copy; winner (this one, `1938`-briefed) ported in-place over 1930, loser (`1936`: chord-memory + **live add/remove-a-planet** + seed-chain) banked to IDEAS В§818. **Ambition of the extension:** #2 вүҘ3 subsystems (now +2 new) + #3 named refs + **#4 the DELIVERED multi-cycle extend (0/15 вҶ’ 1).** **Validation:** eslint 0 В· project-wide `tsc` 0 В· authoritative compile-mode `next build` EXIT 0, no `1936`/`1938` leak. **NOT ear/eye-verified for feel** (headless): whether crystallization reads as *arrival*, whether the composed JI chord beats/drifts as it grows (see RESEARCH В§818 вҖ” the adaptive-JI cycle-3 seed), and whether bells+field feel alive want Karel's phone. cycle 818 В· DEEP-continue.

**вҶі CYCLE 3 вҖ” extended IN PLACE (cycle 820, 2026-07-18). Retitled "Harmonices III" вҖ” the lab's FIRST three-cycle piece (play it вҶ’ compose with it вҶ’ tune it), and the concept jury's explicitly-named cycle-3 thread (JURY 2026-07-18 provocation #3: "1930's crystallization вҶ’ the adaptive-JI drift toggleвҖҰ the deepest form of harmony that bites").** THE COMMA PUMP, MADE PLAYABLE. A JI lattice doesn't close: chaining pure intervals from a moving pivot (what capturing one resonance after another does) walks the chord's centre off the star's fixed pitch вҖ” two stacked pure 5:4 thirds land ~41Вў shy of the lattice; a IвҖ“viвҖ“iiвҖ“VвҖ“I sinks a whole syntonic comma (81/80 вүҲ 21.5Вў) per turn. Cycle 3 exposes this as a live **STRICT вҮ„ ADAPTIVE** toggle on the crystallized chord: **STRICT** keeps every captured ratio pure so the chord's centre drifts against the fixed star drone and you hear the beating grow (`drift +NВў` readout + a drift-meter needle climb off centre); **ADAPTIVE** runs a per-frame relaxation that spreads the accumulated comma across every voice so the centre locks back to the star (drift вҶ’ ~0Вў, needle re-centres), the price shown honestly as `retuned ВұNВў`. Flip the toggle live and the whole chord GLIDES in/out of lock (each voice ramps ~0.2 s) вҖ” a 300-year-old theory problem made audible and performable in real time. New **`tuning.ts`** subsystem (JI-lattice math В· pure-chain placement В· the relaxation solver В· drift/temper metrics) + `audio.ts` `setCrystalFreqs` retune method + a HUD intonation panel. The browser cousin of Stange & Wick's live linear-least-squares JI scheme (arXiv:1706.04338) and Nemire's Pivotuner (arXiv:2306.03873). **Ambition вҖ” honest 4/5:** #2 вүҘ3 subsystems (N-body + resonance-capture + JI voices + NEW least-squares tuning solver + drift analyzer) + #3 named refs (StangeвҖ“Wick В· Pivotuner В· Kepler В· the syntonic comma) + **#4 the DELIVERED cycle-3 / first three-cycle commitment** + #5 same-day В§820 dive; #1 *arguably* (live adaptive-JI least-squares retuning is grep-0Г— вҖ” 1408-wolf-ring is only STATIC meantone). **diversity:** tilt input (NOT touch/pointer, jury 6Г—) В· Canvas2D (NOT WebGL2, jury 7Г—) В· brass-on-parchment (NOT violet) вҖ” clears both fresh monoculture bans by construction (an extend of a piece that already dodges them). **Solo-focused, not fanned out:** a surgical cycle-3 extend of intricate interdependent existing code (physics+audio) вҖ” parallel builders each modifying the same single folder would collide (violates folder isolation); per AGENT.md "if JURY says extend piece X, go DEEP on X." **Validation:** normalizer 0 rewrites В· project-wide `tsc --noEmit` 0 В· `next lint вҖҰ 1930-harmonices --max-warnings 0` 0 В· authoritative `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` EXIT 0 with `/dream/1930-harmonices` emitted (plain `npm run build` still EMFILEs at page-data across ~770 routes вҖ” infra, Vercel has fd headroom) В· **tuning logic numerically de-risked** with a standalone harness (STRICT holds a вҲ’13.7Вў drift at 0Вў retune; ADAPTIVE locks to ~0Вў at 41Вў retune; reversible). **NOT ear-verified for feel** (headless вҖ” no speakers): whether the drift audibly beats against the drone and whether the ~0.2 s lock-glide reads as "sliding into tune" want Karel's phone. cycle 820 В· DEEP-continue.

### [1928-choralis](/dream/1928-choralis) В· voiceвҶ’four-part chorale / real-time SATB voice-leading В· **what if you SANG one bare line into Resonance and it wrote a full four-part chorale UNDER your voice вҖ” in real time, with genuine functional voice-leading, not a safe pentatonic pad? Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer fire. The last ~5 shipped had already answered the 2026-07-17 jury (non-pentatonic В· non-violet В· needs-a-human) вҖ” but every one did it as a POINTER/TOUCH-played instrument, a fresh interaction-model monoculture the theme-audit doesn't check. This fire keeps those wins and forces a NON-pointer input on each of three briefs: voice В· webcam-hands В· keyboard. Banked вӯҗвӯҗ `1934-two-hands` (conduct a V7вҷӯ9вҶ’I cadence in the air between your two hands, MediaPipe) + вӯҗ `1940-cadence-press` (type a sentence, punctuation = cadences, Constructivist kinetic type).** В· **INPUT = THE SINGING VOICE вҖ” silent and dark until a real person sings (NOT pointer/touch, the new ~5Г— groove; NOT self-playing, jury ~11Г—): a hand-rolled YIN estimator (difference fn вҶ’ CMND вҶ’ absolute threshold вҶ’ parabolic interpolation, bounded to singing range) runs on rAF against a 2048-sample analyser buffer, snaps the detected fвӮҖ to the current key = the SOPRANO. Mic-denied вҶ’ an Ode-to-Joy line drives the SAME engine so it self-demos headless. NOT camera, NOT keyboard, NOT autonomous** / **OUTPUT = animated SVG four-lane "breathing score" (off the jury-banned Canvas2D 4Г—): S/A/T/B ribbons scroll right-to-left, each note a gold blob, each lane brightening as its voice sounds, playhead + illuminated chord numeral, subtle CSS gold glow. Web Audio: three additive machine voices (the human is the soprano) вҖ” two detuned oscillators per voice вҶ’ lowpass вҶ’ glide envelopes вҶ’ pan вҶ’ generated-impulse reverb; legato/detached articulation. THE HARMONY: on each new stable sung note, functional chords of the key that CONTAIN the note (I/ii/iii/IV/V/V7/vi/viiВ° + secondary dominants V/V, V7/V) are scored by a root-motion/cadence table under an 8-chord phrase clock, then an exhaustive voice-leading search places bass/tenor/alto to MINIMIZE total motion while penalizing parallel 5ths/8ves, wide spacing, overlap/crossing, incomplete chords, bad doubling, and unresolved tendency tones (leading tone must rise, V7 seventh must fall); at a strong authentic cadence the key can pivot by a fifth вҖ” so it genuinely modulates** В· cycle 816 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-18) В· demoable В· `theme: sing one line, the machine writes the other three (a live SATB chorale under your voice) В· palette: illuminated-manuscript gold-leaf on deep vellum (warm, NON-violet) В· harmony: functional tonal SATB voice-leading (NOT pentatonic вҖ” a real four-part search) В· needs-a-human: total (dark & silent until sung)` В· notes: `README.md` В· ref *AI Harmonizer: Expanding Vocal Expression with a Generative Neurosymbolic Music AI System* (NIME 2025 / arXiv:2506.18143) + Walter Piston *Harmony* (1941, tendency-tone voice leading)
**Sing one line; hear four parts.** WIDE-winner of a 3-instrument fan briefed off a finer-grained diversity read: the 2026-07-17 jury's four bans (pentatonic В· violet В· Canvas2D В· self-playing) had all landed across the last ~5 shipped вҖ” but one notch finer they share a NEW over-represented tag no audit checks, **pointer/touch as the sole human input (~5Г—/last-6)**; the lab escaped the old grooves and set a fresh *interaction-model* monoculture. All three briefs kept the real-harmony + needs-a-human wins and forced a different non-pointer input; this one wins on being the richest harmonic statement (a genuine four-part voice-leading SEARCH, jury provocation #1) and the most Resonance-native concept (a composer's own voice generating the chorale beneath it). **Ambition вҖ” honest 3/5:** **#1** never-used technique (real-time YIN detection вҶ’ rule-based SATB functional voice-leading engine вҖ” grep-0Г— in the lab; JI lattices and functional-chord grids exist, a live four-part voice-leading search does not) + **#3** named ref (AI-Harmonizer NIME 2025 + Piston) + **#5** this cycle's same-day В§816 dive. **diversity:** `banned=[pointer/touch-input(new ~5Г—) В· pentatonic-sonification(jury 6Г—) В· violet-on-near-black(jury ~12Г—) В· Canvas2D-primary(jury 4Г—) В· autonomous-self-playing(jury ~11Г—)]`; `picked=[mic/voice INPUT В· functional-SATB voice-leading harmony В· SVG-score OUTPUT В· gold-leaf-on-vellum palette(NON-violet) В· dead-until-sung]` вҖ” clears every live ban on every axis. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + SVG; zero new npm deps). **Safety:** no strobe вҖ” the score is a slow right-to-left scroll + lane-glow, never a luminance flash; reverb-limited additive pad, three bounded voices. **Validation:** builder on-brand (hex confined to SVG art); project-wide `npx tsc --noEmit` = **0 errors**; `npx eslint вҖҰ 1928-choralis --max-warnings 0` = **0**; authoritative `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0** (plain full-route `npm run build` still `EMFILE`s at page-data collection on the container's 4096-fd ceiling across ~770 routes вҖ” infra, not code; Vercel has fd headroom). **NOT ear/eye-verified for feel** (headless вҖ” no mic/GPU/display/speakers): whether YIN tracks a real sung voice at usable latency (~90ms hold before a chord commits), whether the three machine voices *sound* like a chorale vs. a muddy pad (additive, not formant-vowel), and whether the breathing score reads вҖ” all want Karel's browser + voice. Two more explored this fire вҖ” banked **вӯҗвӯҗ `1934-two-hands`** (webcam MediaPipe Hands, spread/close = a live V7вҷӯ9вҶ’I cadence with real tendency-tone voice leading, WebGL2 cold-aurora tension field вҖ” lost only on the CDN-MediaPipe headless-demo risk; the best "dead-without-a-human" camera piece, resurrect once the CDN is verified in the deploy env) + **вӯҗ `1940-cadence-press`** (type a sentence вҶ’ functional progression, punctuation = cadences, Constructivist red-ink SVG kinetic type on light paper) вҖ” to IDEAS В§816 (both built demoable this session, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule; rebuild from spec under a fresh number). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1928-choralis/README.md`

### [1922-chladni-plate](/dream/1922-chladni-plate) В· physical-model instrument / 2D modal synthesis В· **what if you could STRIKE and BOW a real metal plate вҖ” and the exact same physical model you HEAR is the Chladni sand-figure you SEE? Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer fire (three physical-model instruments, each breaking a different one of the 2026-07-17 jury's three invisible monocultures вҖ” one scale/pentatonic, one color/violet, one habit/self-playing). The deepest answer to the pentatonic ban: you don't pick a scale, physics does вҖ” a plate's modes are INHARMONIC by construction (freq вҲқ the SQUARE of the mode-index sum), so a pentatonic is literally impossible. Banked вӯҗвӯҗ `bowed-maqam` (pointer-bowed waveguide gliding real maqam quarter-tones) + вӯҗ `tide-scrub` (pointer granular-scrub grain cloud).** В· **INPUT = STRUCK/BOWED BY A HAND вҖ” silent and dark until a pointer strikes (NOT self-playing, jury ~11Г—; no autoplay, energies start at 0): tap = strike, press-and-drag = bow. A strike at (x,y) excites every mode weighted by its mode-shape `sin(mПҖx)В·sin(nПҖy)` at that point вҖ” hit an antinode and that mode rings loud, hit a node and it stays silent вҖ” so WHERE you strike sets both the figure and the timbre. NOT mic (jury 7Г—), NOT camera, NOT autonomous** / **OUTPUT = WebGL2 fragment shader (off the jury-banned Canvas2D 4Г—): a full-screen quad sums the active modes into the standing-wave field `u = ОЈ AвӮ–В·sin(mПҖx)В·sin(nПҖy)`, rendering sand accumulating on the nodal lines (|u|вҶ’0 = bright brass/sand, antinodes dark) + a strike ripple; graceful on-brand `text-destructive` notice if WebGL2 absent. Web Audio: ~28 persistent bounded voices (one OscillatorNode per mode behind its own GainNode вҖ” never spun up/torn down, so polyphony can't run away), a signed modal-amplitude state `A[k]` integrated in JS each frame (per-mode exponential decay `П„`, continuous rough bow inflow while dragging), gains follow `|A[k]|`; master trim вҶ’ lowpass вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor safety chain. THE SAME `A[k]` drives both the audio gains and the shader field вҖ” sound and image are two views of ONE physical model** В· cycle 815 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-18) В· demoable В· `theme: a struck/bowed physical plate (sound + image are two views of ONE modal model) В· palette: warm brass/graphite/sand (NON-violet) В· harmony: inharmonic plate modes (physics-dictated, NOT any scale, emphatically NOT pentatonic) В· needs-a-human: total (dark & silent until struck)` В· notes: `README.md` В· ref arXiv:2407.05516 *Differentiable Modal Synthesis for Physical Modeling of Planar String Sound and Motion Simulation* + Ernst Chladni's plate figures (visual/physical antecedent)
**Strike a plate; watch the sound settle into sand.** WIDE-winner of a 3-instrument fan briefed straight off the 2026-07-17 jury, which found the altered-states ban had worked but exposed three unaudited monocultures вҖ” **one color** (violet, ~12/15), **one scale** (pentatonic, 6/15), **one habit** (~11/15 play themselves) вҖ” and told Karel *change the color, the harmony, and make it need a human.* All three briefs broke all four live bans via different tags; this one wins by being the deepest fix on the harmony axis (physics, not a scale) AND the purest soundвҶ”image unity. **Ambition вҖ” honest 3/5:** **#1** never-used technique (2D modal / physical-modeling plate synthesis вҖ” grep-0Г— in the lab) + **#3** named ref (arXiv:2407.05516 + Chladni) + **#5** this cycle's same-day В§815 dive. **diversity:** `banned=[pentatonic-sonification(jury 6Г—) В· violet-on-near-black palette(jury ~12Г—) В· Canvas2D-primary OUTPUT(jury 4Г—) В· autonomous self-playing model(jury ~11Г—)]`; `picked=[inharmonic modal spectrum(physics-dictated, NOT any scale) В· warm brass/graphite/sand palette(NON-violet) В· WebGL2 fragment-shader OUTPUT(off Canvas2D) В· pointer-struck INPUT(dead-without-a-human)]` вҖ” clears every live ban on all axes. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + raw WebGL2; zero new npm deps). **Safety:** no strobe вҖ” the field is a slow modal-decay drift, never a luminance flash; master trimвҶ’lowpassвҶ’compressor + bounded voices can't blow up. **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites (builder on-brand); project-wide `npx tsc --noEmit` = **0 errors**; `npx eslint вҖҰ 1922-chladni-plate --max-warnings 0` = **0**; authoritative `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `/dream/1922-chladni-plate` in BOTH route manifests (`page.js` 32.9 kB), no `1928`/`1934` leak. (Plain full-route `npm run build` still `EMFILE`s at page-data collection on the container's 4096-fd ceiling across ~770 routes вҖ” infra, not code; Vercel has fd headroom.) **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless вҖ” no GPU/display/speakers): whether the nodal figure reads as sand-on-nodes vs a smear, whether the where-you-strikeвҶ’timbre coupling is legible, and whether the decay *feels* like struck metal want Karel's browser. Two more explored this fire вҖ” banked **вӯҗвӯҗ `bowed-maqam`** (pointer-bowed digital-waveguide string gliding the quarter-tones of maqam Rast/Bayati, cold blueprint palette вҖ” lost only because a DelayNode-in-feedback render-quantum latency detunes its microtones, the one thing its concept can't afford; resurrect with an AudioWorklet waveguide) + **вӯҗ `tide-scrub`** (pointer granular-scrub of a dropped/synth recording вҶ’ three.js amber-teal grain cloud, freeze/time-stretch/reverse-scrub) вҖ” to IDEAS В§815 (both built demoable this session, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule; rebuild from spec under a fresh number). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1922-chladni-plate/README.md`

### [1900-tended-lenia](/dream/1900-tended-lenia) В· tended-ecology / multi-kernel-Flow-Lenia В· **what if a piece of music were a living GARDEN whose species you keep alive by shaping their environment вҖ” and the moment you stop tending, the music flatlines? DEEP-mode winner (cycle 1 of a declared 2вҖ“3 cycle commitment вҖ” the first time criterion #4 "multi-cycle build" has fired in the lab, 0/15 before this): the jury named `1836-flow-eden` as a piece worth a real second cycle and asked for "true multi-kernel Flow-Lenia / real speciation," so this cycle went DEEP on that concept via three parallel technical/interaction bets and shipped the strongest. It also cashes all THREE of the 2026-07-17 jury's Karel-facing provocations at once вҖ” change the color (a genuinely LIGHT herbarium palette, not violet-on-black), change the harmony (real 7-limit JUST INTONATION, not the 6Г— pentatonic crutch), make it NEED a human (untended, the conserved mass diffuses to a flat quiet hum in ~30s). Banked вӯҗвӯҗ 1904-current-eden (conduct currents that herd species into collision-chords, modal-modulating) + вӯҗ 1902-compute-eden (WebGPU-compute breeder, inharmonic-spectral).** В· **INPUT = human GARDENER, load-bearing by construction вҖ” pointer paints a persistent SOIL/resource texture (Tend), drops species (Seed), or erases mass (Cull); growth is amplified ONLY where a cell's genome MATCHES the local enriched soil and suppressed to a net-negative baseline elsewhere, and the soil diffuses+decays (~7s time-constant), so with no tending the affinity gradient collapses and diffusion smooths the field to near-silence within ~30s. Different soil grows a different dominant genome вҶ’ a different key вҶ’ a different piece. NOT autonomous (jury ~11Г—), NOT mic (jury 7Г—), NOT camera/keyboard** / **OUTPUT = WebGL2 RGBA16F multi-kernel Flow-Lenia (off the jury-banned Canvas2D 4Г—): one field texture (R=mass, the finite conserved resource; G=q=mВ·s, mass-weighted genome) ping-pongs through E(soil diffuse/decay) вҶ’ A(MULTI-KERNEL perceive: 2 radial rings per genome, inner+outer, each its own Gaussian growth bump, blended per-genome, biased by soil) вҶ’ B(flow F=kAВ·вҲҮAвҲ’kMВ·вҲҮm) вҶ’ C(reintegration-tracking transport, unit-box overlaps sum to 1 вҶ’ MASS CONSERVED EXACTLY, + genome mutation) вҶ’ D(48ВІ readback for stats + MSPD-lite complexity). Light herbarium-wash fallback shader if float-RTT absent (never blank). Web Audio: 7-limit JUST INTONATION (1/1 9/8 6/5 5/4 4/3 3/2 5/3 7/4 15/8) вҖ” dominant species SETS the drone tonic, every other species sounds its own ratio against it so mixed zones beat and BITE; massвҶ’amplitude, CoMвҶ’pan/register, bloom/takeover/deathвҶ’bells/chimes/plucks, MSPD-lite complexityвҶ’filter brightness; DynamicsCompressor вҶ’ master вүӨ0.18, silent until Start** В· cycle 811 В· DEEP-winner (2026-07-17) В· demoable В· `theme: a tended, speciating ecology (sound + image are two views of ONE mass-conserving sim) В· palette: herbarium вҖ” sepia ink & wash on warm rag paper (LIGHT, NON-violet) В· harmony: 7-limit just intonation (NOT pentatonic) В· needs-a-human: total (dies untended in ~30s)` В· notes: `README.md` В· ref Bert Wang-Chak Chan *Lenia* (arXiv:1812.05433) + *Leniabreeder* (arXiv:2406.04235) for multi-kernel genomes В· Plantec et al. *Flow-Lenia* (mass conservation вҶ’ competition) В· MSPD (arXiv:2606.17091, Jun 2026, this cycle's В§811 dive) for the live complexity meter
**A garden you must keep, or it dies.** DEEP-mode winner of a 3-approach fan at ONE ambitious concept вҖ” a **tended, speciating, multi-kernel Flow-Lenia ecology** вҖ” the mode AGENT.md prescribes when the jury says "extend the exceptional piece X" (here `1836-flow-eden` вҶ’ "true multi-kernel Flow-Lenia / real speciation") rather than "ban a combo." **Ambition вҖ” honest 4/5:** **#4** multi-cycle commitment (explicitly cycle 1 of 2вҖ“3 вҖ” the criterion that was 0/15 across the whole lab; jury provocation #4) + **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (multi-kernel CA sim + human-painted soil-selection field + just-intonation sonification + MSPD-lite complexity meter) + **#3** named refs (Chan/Leniabreeder/Flow-Lenia/MSPD) + **#5** this cycle's same-day В§811 dive (arXiv:2606.17091). (#1 not claimed вҖ” Flow-Lenia is lab-present via 1836; the *multi-kernel* extension is a documented deepening, not a lab-first technique.) **diversity:** `banned=[pentatonic(jury 6Г—) В· violet-on-near-black(jury ~12Г—) В· Canvas2D-primary(jury 4Г—) В· autonomous-self-playing(jury ~11Г—) В· mic(jury 7Г—)]`; `picked=[just-intonation harmony В· herbarium LIGHT palette В· WebGL2-float multi-kernel CA В· human-gardener load-bearing (dies untended)]` вҖ” clears every live ban on all axes. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + WebGL2; zero new npm deps). **Curator fixes before ship:** the app root forces `.dark`, so the builder correctly overrode light-theme token values inline on `<main>` (chrome stays dark-on-cream); and I removed one unused `rng`/`mulberry32` import in audio.ts that would have failed Vercel's `--max-warnings 0` (the one fix attempt). **Safety:** no strobe вҖ” slow luminance drift only, peak capped at 0.96 (never pure white), reduced-motion drops the field to 128ВІ. **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites (builder on-brand); project-wide `npx tsc --noEmit` = **0 errors**; `next lint` on `1900-tended-lenia` = **0 warnings/errors** (after the import fix); authoritative `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `/dream/1900-tended-lenia` in the route manifest (`page.js` built). (Plain full-route `npm run build` still `EMFILE`s at page-data collection on the container's 4096-fd ceiling across ~760 routes вҖ” infra, not code; Vercel has fd headroom, as every 800+ cycle confirms.) **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless вҖ” no GPU/display/speakers): whether the two-kernel species read distinct, whether it truly "dies" on the intended ~30s clock (the ~7s soil time-constant + 0.11 baseline suppression were reasoned, not stopwatch-tuned), and whether the JI beating lands, want Karel's browser. Two more explored this fire вҖ” banked **вӯҗвӯҗ 1904-current-eden** (conduct a painted current/wind field that herds 3 dye-species into ENCOUNTERS, each a chord + a modal modulation incl. a biting Hijaz; warm textile light palette; ship-next on a performance cycle) + **вӯҗ 1902-compute-eden** (the lab's first genuine WebGPU compute-shader CA w/ WebGL2 fallback; freezeвҶ’Cross two coloniesвҶ’release breeder; inharmonic-spectral timbre-as-harmony; biolum deep-sea вҖ” lost only because its non-violet palette is still DARK, the weakest answer to the color provocation) вҖ” to IDEAS В§811 (both built demoable this session, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule; rebuild from spec). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1900-tended-lenia/README.md`

### [1882-lattice](/dream/1882-lattice) В· played-instrument / just-intonation В· **what if you could PLAY Resonance's harmony as a living just-intonation lattice вҖ” every note an EXACT small-integer frequency ratio, and consonance is something you can SEE as geometric closeness? Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer fire whose whole brief was the fresh 2026-07-17 jury's Karel-facing line: "change the color, the harmony, and make it need a human." This is the sharpest simultaneous cash of all three вҖ” the only piece in the lab that makes ZERO sound until a human plays it (jury #3, "build something DEAD without a human" вҖ” ~11/15 play themselves), on a LIGHT cream manuscript page (jury #2 вҖ” the hardest break from ~12/15 near-black; even the other escapes stay dark), in real 5-limit just intonation (jury #1 вҖ” leave the 6Г— pentatonic crutch). Banked вӯҗвӯҗ 1888-conductor (conduct FUNCTIONAL, modulating harmony with body-motion) + вӯҗ 1894-shape-note (sing вҶ’ cold-monochrome modal choir with earned dissonance).** В· **INPUT = PLAYED BY A HUMAN вҖ” silent until you play (NOT self-playing: the only sound-source is your keypresses; a visual-only вүҲ0.036 Hz idle "attract" pulse walks one node at a time and self-cancels the instant you play, damped entirely under `prefers-reduced-motion`). Computer keyboard is a 2-D patch of the lattice (each physical row = the fifths axis, each row up = a major third); Web MIDI feature-detected + auto-wired if the browser allows (silently skipped otherwise); nodes are tappable (pointer). Ref-counted holds so keyboard+MIDI+touch overlap without stuck notes; blur releases all вҖ” NOT mic (jury 7Г—), NOT camera, NOT tilt, NOT autonomous** / **OUTPUT = SVG-DOM (minority substrate 3Г—/10 the jury wants grown вҖ” deliberately OFF the banned Canvas2D 4Г— AND off the over-served GPU-render pile 7Г—): the lattice `<svg>` is built ONCE and only per-node attributes (accent circle r/opacity, glow r/opacity, ratio-label opacity) are mutated by refs each frame, the tree never rebuilt; nodes carry live ratio labels (`1/1`, `3/2`, `5/4`, `9/8`вҖҰ), solid links = pure perfect fifths (Г—3/2), dashed = pure major thirds (Г—5/4), the heavy-ringed node is the tonic. Web Audio: a pooled 16-voice polyphonic engine, each node = its EXACT frequency `baseВ·3^aВ·5^b` folded to `[1,2)` kept as an integer fraction (no 12-TET rounding), 3 harmonic partials + soft ADSR + lowpass вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor вҶ’ master вүӨ0.18; a faint tonic+fifth drone so silence isn't dead; held pure 3/2 and 5/4 ring beat-free while wider lattice jumps thicken audibly** В· cycle 810 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-17) В· demoable В· `theme: just-intonation Tonnetz as a played instrument (consonance = geometry) В· palette: paper-and-ink cream+terracotta (the light-background break, NON-violet, NON-near-black) В· needs-a-human: total (zero autonomous sound)` В· notes: `README.md` В· ref Leonhard Euler *Tonnetz* / Harry Partch *Tonality Diamond* / Erv Wilson pitch lattices; distinct from the 2026 web 15-limit tonality diamond (Zenodo 6772144) and tune.js JI library (catalogues/toolkits, not a keyboard-mapped Tonnetz you perform)
**Play consonance as geometry.** Winner of a **WIDE** fire briefed straight off the 2026-07-17 jury, which found the altered-states ban had worked but exposed three unaudited new monocultures вҖ” **one color** (violet-on-near-black, ~12/15), **one scale** (pentatonic, 6/15), **one habit** (~11/15 play themselves, need no human) вҖ” and told Karel: *change the color, the harmony, and make it need a human.* All three briefs had to break all three at once via different tags; this one wins by doing it most purely. **Ambition вҖ” honest 2вҖ“3/5:** **#1** never-used technique (a keyboard/MIDI-played just-intonation Tonnetz where lattice coordinates ARE the prime exponents so adjacency literally equals consonance вҖ” grep-0Г— in the lab) + **#3** named refs (Euler / Partch / Wilson). **diversity:** `banned=[pentatonic-sonification(jury 6Г—) В· violet-on-near-black palette(jury ~12Г—) В· Canvas2D-primary OUTPUT(jury 4Г—) В· autonomous self-playing model(jury ~11Г—) В· mic INPUT(jury 7Г—)]`; `picked=[just-intonation harmony(exact ratios, NOT pentatonic) В· paper-and-ink cream palette(light background, NON-violet) В· SVG-DOM OUTPUT(minority 3Г—/10) В· human-played INPUT(keyboard+MIDI+touch, zero autonomous sound)]` вҖ” clears every live ban on all axes. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + SVG; zero new npm deps). **Curator fix before ship:** the app root is forced `.dark` (near-white `--foreground`), so the builder's semantic chrome tokens would have rendered white-on-cream; re-asserted light-theme token values on the page container so the chrome stays dark-and-readable on paper. **Safety:** no strobe вҖ” the idle pulse is a single-node triangular fade far under 0.1 Hz that stops on first play; peak stays on warm paper, never pure white; reduced-motion damps it entirely. **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites (builder on-brand); project-wide `npx tsc --noEmit` = **0 errors**; `next lint` on `1882-lattice` = **0 warnings/errors**. (Full-route `npm run build` `EMFILE`s at page-data collection on the container's 4096-fd ceiling across ~750 routes вҖ” infra, not code; Vercel has fd headroom, as every prior cycle confirms.) **NOT ear-verified for feel** (headless вҖ” no audio device): whether the beat-free 3/2 / 5/4 vs. thickening wide jumps read as clearly as intended, and whether the QWERTYвҶ’lattice patch is ergonomic to play, want Karel's browser. Two more explored this fire вҖ” banked **вӯҗвӯҗ 1888-conductor** (conduct real FUNCTIONAL, modulating harmony from live camera frame-diff motion вҖ” vertical = diatonic function IвҖҰviiВ°, dwell in the top zone triggers a circle-of-fifths modulation landing on a V7вҶ’I cadence; warm-daylight three.js world; honest labelled ghost-conductor self-demo when headless; ref *Rhythm in the Air* arXiv:2511.00793 + AIR Guitar вҖ” the strongest runner-up, ship-next) + **вӯҗ 1894-shape-note** (sing one line вҶ’ a dependency-free YIN pitch tracker drives a cold-monochrome Sacred-Harp modal choir under your voice with a 4-3 suspension engine that leans then resolves; WebGPU-field with CSS-compositor fallback; ref de CheveignГ© & Kawahara YIN 2002) вҖ” to IDEAS В§810 (both built demoable this session, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule; rebuild from spec under a fresh number). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1882-lattice/README.md`

### [1876-glasshouse](/dream/1876-glasshouse) В· machine-self-portrait / **what if your device sang its own inner life? The live telemetry of the very machine you're on вҖ” frame stutter, memory pressure, network weather, battery drain, the entropy of your own mouse вҖ” becomes a continuous, coherent piece of music AND a dithered field of signal-noise that TEARS as the device strains and settles when it's calm. Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer fire (three unrelated NON-altered-states cross-modal directions); banked вӯҗвӯҗ `glyphsong` (textвҶ’SVG-composed music) + вӯҗ `resonant-halo` (score-following JI halo on a dropped recording). The sharpest answer to the jury's #1 provocation вҖ” a genuinely new SUBJECT for the ~900-proto lab: the machine you're holding, looking at itself. NON-mic, NON-camera, NON-keyboard, off the inside of a head.** В· **INPUT = system-telemetry ONLY (`rAF` jank/variance вҶ’ fps + jitter В· `performance.memory` heap ratio В· `navigator.connection` rtt/downlink В· `getBattery()` level/charging В· pointer-movement entropy В· `hardwareConcurrency`/`visibilityState`); every source SSR-guarded and null-degrading (Firefox/Safari lose memory+connection вҶ’ the rest still plays); the field reads the machine on load, one "Let the machine sing" tap unlocks audio вҖ” NON-mic, NON-camera, NON-keyboard** / **OUTPUT = three.js `THREE.Points` (1Г—/10 вҖ” off the banned Canvas2D 4Г— + WebGL2-fragment 4Г—): a dense lattice through a custom ShaderMaterial with a Bayer 4Г—4 ordered dither + per-channel chromatic split + positional tearing that intensifies with jank/load and a bounded loadвҶ’`setDrawRange` feedback loop (a straining machine spends more GPU on its own portrait, which the frame sensor then re-hears). Web Audio: a lookahead 16th-note scheduler reads fresh telemetry each step вҖ” jankвҶ’rhythmic density + glitch/retrigger probability, memoryвҶ’sub-bass drone + вҷӯ9 tension, rttвҶ’echo time, downlinkвҶ’lowpass brightness, restlessnessвҶ’lead arp, battery-drainвҶ’slow global detune (the machine tiring), loadвҶ’tempo; A-minor pentatonic + slow root-drift keep it coherent + loop-free (different at minute 3 than second 3) вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor limiter вҶ’ master, 1 s fade-in; live HUD shows every readout on semantic tokens; `text-destructive` notice if WebGL absent, audio keeps playing** В· cycle 809 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-17) В· demoable В· `theme: machine self-portrait / monitoring-as-music (cross-modal, about the world not the inner head) В· vibe: system-telemetry (NON-altered, NON-cosmic, NON-arc-engine)` В· notes: `README.md` В· ref Alunno & Bientinesi *Real-time, EDM-Inspired Sonification of the activity of a Supercomputer* (arXiv:2605.21874, 2026) вҖ” monitoring-as-coherent-music, turned INWARD onto the visitor's own device / Robert Borghesi *ASTRODITHER* (three.js WebGPU/TSL, 2026) вҖ” the dithered signal-noise aesthetic
**What if your device sang its own inner life?** Winner of a **WIDE** fire вҖ” three unrelated non-altered-states cross-modal explorers, ship the strongest, bank the rest. **The research, built (В§809 chain visible):** the freshest find was *ASTRODITHER* (Robert Borghesi, 2026 three.js WebGPU/TSL) вҖ” a dithered signal-noise field the audio tears; the conceptual lineage is Alunno & Bientinesi's supercomputer-sonification (arXiv:2605.21874) вҖ” real-time MONITORING as coherent music. Nothing in the lab had pointed that microscope INWARD, at the very device the visitor holds. This piece turns the browser's own live self-telemetry into a continuous groove + a Borghesi-style dithered field that breaks when the machine strains вҖ” a self-portrait of the machine as it runs. **Ambition вҖ” honest 4/5:** **#1** never-used INPUT (system-telemetry as a music driver вҖ” grep-0Г—: no prior jank/heap/rtt/battery sonification) + **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (telemetry sampler + lookahead generative-music scheduler + ordered-dither three.js field + closed loadвҶ”renderвҶ”jank feedback loop) + **#3** named refs (ASTRODITHER В· arXiv:2605.21874) + **#5** this cycle's same-day В§809 dive. **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D OUTPUT(4Г—/10) В· WebGL2 OUTPUT(4Г—/10) В· mic INPUT(jury 7Г—) В· keyboard INPUT(recent lean) В· camera-body INPUT(theme-watch, just did 1856) В· altered-states THEME(jury) В· cosmic-ambient VIBE(jury) В· arc-engine-scheduler THEME(3Г—, no 4th)]`; `picked=[system-telemetry INPUT(grep-0Г—, non-mic/camera/keyboard) В· three.js dithered-Points OUTPUT(1Г—/10, off the banned Canvas2D + WebGL2-fragment) В· telemetryвҶ’coherent-generative-music TECHNIQUE(non-arc-engine, non-form-constant) В· machine-self-portrait VIBE(off-the-inner-head, non-altered, non-cosmic)]` вҖ” clears every live ban on all axes. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + three.js; zero new npm deps, three@0.182 already present). **Safety:** no strobe вҖ” dither/tear is per-frame texture drift, not luminance flashing; master limited + 1 s fade-in. **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites (builder on-brand); `npx eslint вҖҰ 1876-glasshouse --max-warnings 0` = **0**; project-wide `npx tsc --noEmit` = **0**; authoritative `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `/dream/1876-glasshouse` in BOTH route manifests (`page.js` 38.7 kB), no `1882`/`1888` leak.
