(Plain full-route `npm run build` still `EMFILE`s at page-data collection on the container's 4096-fd ceiling across ~860 routes вҖ” infra, not code; Vercel has fd headroom.) **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless вҖ” no GPU/display/speakers): whether the dither field reads as "signal-noise" vs mush, whether the telemetryвҶ’music mapping stays musical (not a theremin) as load swings, and whether the feedback loop is legible want Karel's browser; and on Firefox/Safari two of the richest signals (`performance.memory`, `navigator.connection`) are absent, so those machines get a jank+pointer+battery-driven portrait. Two more explored вҖ” banked **вӯҗвӯҗ `glyphsong`** (drop/paste text вҶ’ its linguistic prosody вҖ” sentence cadence, vowel/consonant flow, punctuation as rests/bends/accents вҖ” becomes a generative score while the SVG-DOM typography illuminates word-by-word; the concrete-poetry / text-sonification lineage, SVG-only) + **вӯҗ `resonant-halo`** (drop any recording вҶ’ real-time score-following (spectral-flux onsets + Krumhansl chroma/key + IOI tempo) grows a live just-intonation harmonic HALO tuned to the music's own key over a WebGPU-compute particle field; the `130-tsl-particle-compute`-loved lineage вҖ” builder flagged the WebGPU path as higher runtime risk) вҖ” to IDEAS В§809 (both built demoable this session, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule; rebuild from spec under a fresh number). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1876-glasshouse/README.md`

### [1870-metastaseis](/dream/1870-metastaseis) В· architecture-as-score / **what if a Xenakis ruled-surface BUILDING is the musical score вҖ” you fly through the architecture and hear its geometry? Winner of a DEEP 3-approach fire on ONE massively-bigger concept ("the building is the score: a performable Xenakis ruled surface"), banked вӯҗвӯҗ WebGPU-compute sculptable surface + вӯҗ long-form glissando field. A fresh SUBJECT the ~900-proto lab has never touched (architecture-as-score / ruled-surface sonification, grep-0Г—) вҖ” off the inside of a head (jury #1), NON-mic, NON-altered, a clean pivot after 807's psychedelic return.** В· **AUTONOMOUS seeded self-demo (`mulberry32(0x1870)` deterministic camera flight + playhead; one "Begin" tap unlocks audio, then self-runs вҖ” never blank/silent at 06:30; NON-mic, NON-keyboard-played, NON-camera; pointer-drag orbits the camera, 2 labelled sliders sweep-speed + surface-warp)** / **three.js `LineSegments` (0Г—/10 output вҖ” off the banned Canvas2D 4Г— + WebGL2 4Г—): 3 reconstructed hyperbolic-paraboloid shells drawn as both families of straight RULING LINES (bilinear skew-quad), a seeded playhead sweeping each shell's `u` axis вҖ” every ruling line it crosses lights up (comet-trail luminance, no strobe) and SOUNDS its glissando (one osc gliding between the pitches mapped from the line's two endpoint heights, quantized pentatonic), steep/dense lines additionally firing pizzicato energy blocks. Web Audio: lowpassed sawtooth glissando voices (14-voice cap) + pizzicato вҶ’ bus вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor вҶ’ master вүӨ0.18, 1 s fade-in; `prefers-reduced-motion` slows sweep + thins voicing; `text-destructive` notice if WebGL absent, audio keeps playing** В· cycle 808 В· DEEP-winner (2026-07-17) В· demoable В· `theme: architecture-as-performable-score (the building IS the score) В· vibe: Xenakis / Philips-Pavilion (NON-altered, NON-cosmic, NON-arc-engine, off-the-inner-head)` В· notes: `README.md` В· ref Iannis Xenakis *Metastaseis* (1953вҖ“54) / Philips Pavilion & *PoГЁme Г©lectronique* (Expo 1958, w/ Le Corbusier) / *Extending Xenakis: From Architectural Geometry to Sonification of the Philips Pavilion* (arXiv:2607.06589, 2026-07-06)
**What if you could fly through a Xenakis building and hear its geometry as the score?** Winner of a **DEEP** fire on ONE concept вҖ” *"the building is the score: a performable Xenakis ruled surface"* вҖ” attacked via three technical approaches; shipped the literal fly-through architecture, banked the other two. **The research, built (В§808 chain visible):** *"Extending Xenakis"* (arXiv:2607.06589, **6 July 2026**, 11 days old) inverts Xenakis's musicвҶ’architecture workflow: he composed *Metastaseis* as string **glissandi** then built that ruled geometry into the **Philips Pavilion** (nine hyperbolic-paraboloid shells); the paper runs it backwards вҖ” a ruled surface's straight **ruling lines ARE glissandi**, and point-density вҶ’ instrumental energy blocks. This piece reconstructs 3 hypar shells as their visible ruling lines and lets a seeded playhead sweep them, sounding each lit line's glissando (heightвҶ’pitch) with densityвҶ’pizzicato вҖ” the paper's inversion coded literally onto architecture you inhabit. **Ambition вҖ” honest 3/5:** **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (ruled-surface + ruling-line generator + glissando-synthesis + densityвҶ’pizzicato scheduler + three.js render + seeded flight) + **#3** named refs (Xenakis / Philips Pavilion / arXiv:2607.06589) + **#5** same-day В§808 dive. **#1 NOT claimed** вҖ” glissandi/three.js/pentatonic all pre-exist (grep-checked); the honest novelty is *architecture-as-performable-score* (a fresh subject + the inversion mechanic), not a virgin API. **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D OUTPUT(4Г—/10) В· WebGL2 OUTPUT(4Г—/10) В· arc-engine-scheduler THEME(3Г—) В· keyboard/camera/mic INPUT]`; `picked=[autonomous+pointer-orbit INPUT В· three.js LineSegments OUTPUT(0Г—/10) В· inverse-Xenakis ruled-surface-sonification TECHNIQUE(grep-0Г—) В· architecture-as-score VIBE(off-the-inner-head, non-altered)]` вҖ” clears every live ban on all axes. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + three.js; zero new npm deps, three@0.182 already present). **Safety:** no strobe вҖ” comet-trail luminance drift only; master вүӨ0.18 + compressor + 1 s fade-in; reduced-motion honored; audio-trigger loop runs even with no WebGL. **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites (builder on-brand); `npx eslint вҖҰ 1870-metastaseis --max-warnings 0` = **0**; scoped `tsc --noEmit` = **0**; authoritative `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `/dream/1870-metastaseis` in BOTH route manifests (`page.js` 30 kB), no `1876`/`1882` leak. (Plain full-route `npm run build` still `EMFILE`s at prerender on the container's 4096-fd ceiling across ~860 routes вҖ” infra, not code; Vercel has fd headroom.) **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless вҖ” no GPU/display/speakers): whether the 3 shells read as *architecture* vs a fainter net at low warp (default morph 1.0 looks best on load), whether the many-glissandi texture stays clean under fast sweep (mitigated by 14-voice cap + compressor), and whether the fly-through *feels* like inhabiting a building want Karel's browser; the seeded flight guarantees never-blank/silent. Two more explored вҖ” banked **вӯҗвӯҗ `1876-ruled-loom`** (a WebGPU-**compute** point cloud of a 4-corner hyperbolic paraboloid you SCULPT live вҖ” bend a corner, the glissandi retune instantly, CPU audio mirroring the GPU geometry with zero readback; WebGL2-points fallback; the freshest interaction + the lab's cleanest WebGPU-compute-as-surface-generator, still 0Г—/10 вҖ” top resurrect for a confirmable-WebGPU cycle) + **вӯҗ `1882-glissando-field`** (72 glissando lines morphing between saddle/conoid/hyperboloid over an ~11-movement seeded arc with migrating harmonic centre + incommensurate density waves вҖ” a real long-form generative piece, different at min 5 than min 1) вҖ” to IDEAS В§808 (both built demoable this session, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule; rebuild from spec). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1870-metastaseis/README.md`

### [1862-strobe-atlas](/dream/1862-strobe-atlas) В· psychedelic / **the four "form constants" of hallucination (tunnels, spokes, spirals, honeycombs) are only PART of the map вҖ” a safe photic field morphs through the classic four AND the Cartesian/hyperbolic motifs a 2026 study found the classic taxonomy misses, with each form NAMED on-screen as `log-polar` (classic) or `newly-mapped`. A RETURN to the psychedelic PRIMARY DIRECTION after 8 non-altered cycles (altered-states was down to 2Г—/10; love-signal-backed), and the visible В§807 researchвҶ’build chain. The piece literally argues with the lab's own `_shared/psych/logpolar.ts`: families 4вҖ“6 are the three forms the exp() warp provably CANNOT render.** В· **AUTONOMOUS seeded self-running arc (zero permissions; a `mulberry32(0x1862)` playlist across 7 families, every quantity a pure function of an integer frame вҶ’ identical headless output) + an OPT-IN Photic-pulse mode gated through `_shared/psych/safeFlicker.ts` (вүӨ3 flashes/sec, epilepsy warning, instant Stop, `prefers-reduced-motion` honored, soft floor-limited sine вҖ” NOT a hard strobe); default is slow luminance drift, no flicker on load вҖ” NON-mic, NON-keyboard, NON-camera** / **raw WebGL2 fullscreen FRAGMENT shader (single quad, iOS-robust вҖ” off the recent Canvas2D 3Г— and WebGL2-RTT/points 3Г— lanes): all 7 planform families in one shader вҖ” 0вҖ“3 tunnels/spokes/spirals/honeycomb via `LOGPOLAR_GLSL`+`formConstant`+`honeycomb` imported verbatim (the retinaвҶ’V1 complex-log warp), 4 concentric squares (Chebyshev `max(|x|,|y|)` rings), 5 crosses (`sin(kx)+sin(ky)` Cartesian grid), 6 hyperbolic (saddle level-sets of `xВІвҲ’yВІ`, `xВ·y`); violetвҶ’indigoвҶ’magenta ramp (`_shared/palette` `PALETTE_GLSL`) + chromatic aberration + traveling-wave phase sweep + breathing zoom; `text-destructive` notice if WebGL2 absent. Web Audio: detuned JI drone via `_shared/psych/droneBank` + opt-in isochronic pulse LFO-locked to the safe photic rate (sound & flicker breathe together) вҶ’ master вүӨ0.2 вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor вҶ’ destination, 1 s fade-in** В· cycle 807 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-17) В· demoable В· `state: flicker-induced form constants / Ganzflicker В· pole: intense-geometric` В· notes: `README.md` В· ref KlГјver 1926 form constants / BressloffвҖ“Cowan log-polar cortical map / *Large-Scale Computer-Vision Mapping of Stroboscopically-Induced Visual Hallucinations* (bioRxiv 2026.02.18.705710, 10,598 drawings) / Gysin *Dreamachine* 1959
**What if the classic four form constants are only part of the hallucination map вҖ” and a piece could SHOW you the forms the standard cortical-warp model can't produce?** Winner of a **WIDE** 3-brief fire (three unrelated altered states Г— substrates Г— techniques) that **returns to the psychedelic PRIMARY DIRECTION** after eight straight non-altered cycles (1810вҶ’1856): the 2026-07-16 jury's one-cycle altered-states ban is long served, altered-states had fallen to 2Г—/10, Karel's love signal leans altered/mandala/particle (1396/1482/1450/1392/1326), and there was a fresh same-day research anchor. **The research, built (В§807 chain visible):** *"A Large-Scale Computer-Vision Mapping of the Geometric Structures of Stroboscopically-Induced Visual Hallucinations"* (bioRxiv 2026.02.18.705710) analyzed **10,598 participant drawings** of flicker hallucinations and found, beyond KlГјver's classic four (lattice/cobweb/tunnel/spiral), recurrent **concentric squares, crosses, and hyperbolic planforms**. Those classic four are all products of the retinaвҶ’V1 complex-log (`exp()`) warp (BressloffвҖ“Cowan) вҖ” which is purely radial and **cannot** make Cartesian or hyperbolic motifs вҖ” so this piece renders all seven in one shader and tags each `log-polar` vs `newly-mapped`, making the label carry the thesis. **Ambition вҖ” honest 3/5:** **#3** named refs (bioRxiv 2026.02.18.705710 В· KlГјver 1926 В· BressloffвҖ“Cowan В· Gysin Dreamachine) + **#5** this cycle's same-day В§807 dive + **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (safe-photic engine + 7-family planform GLSL atlas + drone/isochronic-pulse audio). **#1 NOT claimed** вҖ” log-polar/flicker/form-constants all pre-exist in the lab (grep-0Г— conceded exhausted); the honest novelty is *the atlas-beyond-the-four that argues with the shared engine*, not a virgin technique. **diversity:** last-10 had nothing вүҘ4Г— (no auto-ban), but the fan dodged the on-watch hot lanes anyway вҖ” `AVOID=[Canvas2D-primary(3Г—) В· keyboard-arc-engine-scheduler(3Г—) В· mic-breath]`; `picked=[autonomous+opt-in-photic INPUT В· WebGL2 fullscreen-FRAGMENT OUTPUT (distinct from the recent RTT/points WebGL2 3Г—) В· planform-atlas-beyond-KlГјver TECHNIQUE В· intense-geometric psychedelic pole (fresh; altered-states only 2Г—/10)]`. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + WebGL2; zero new npm deps). **Safety (non-negotiable, correct):** default is slow luminance drift with `uFlicker`=1.0 (no flicker) on load; the Photic pulse is opt-in behind a visible photosensitive-epilepsy warning, capped вүӨ3 Hz via `createSafeFlicker({maxHz:3})` with an instant Stop and `prefersReducedMotion()` honored (opt-in hidden, drift forced); never a full-screen hard strobe. **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites (builder on-brand); `npx eslint src/app/dream/1862-strobe-atlas --max-warnings 0` = **0**; authoritative `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `/dream/1862-strobe-atlas` in BOTH route manifests. (The plain full-route `npm run build` still `EMFILE`s at prerender on the container's standing 4096-fd ceiling across ~860 routes вҖ” infra, not code; reproduces with the winner removed; Vercel has fd headroom and deployed the identical-size tree 2 h ago.) **NOT eye-verified for feel** (headless вҖ” no GPU/display): whether the seven families read as distinct on real hardware and whether the crossfade transitions land want Karel's browser; the honest execution gap is that the morph is a field cross-dissolve, not a true metric homotopy, and families 4вҖ“6 are faithful renderings of the study's motif *descriptions* rather than validated reproductions of the drawings. Two more explored вҖ” banked **вӯҗвӯҗ `1864-khole`** (a ketamine k-hole **audio-visual DESYNC engine** вҖ” sound and motion ride two decoupled random-walking clocks so swells never coincide, the NMDA sensory-gating breakdown made felt; three.js receding void + convolution-void/Shepard-descent audio; the freshest *technique* of the fan, top resurrect for a dissociative cycle) + **вӯҗ `1866-clearlight`** (jhДҒna "clear light" **boundless-white dissolution** вҖ” a WebGPU-compute particle cloud melting figure/ground into light, ShepardвҖ“Risset endless ascent; the most device-robust build via a WebGPUвҶ’Canvas2DвҶ’audio-only three-level degrade) вҖ” to IDEAS В§807 (both built demoable this session, backed up to scratchpad `banked-807/`, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1862-strobe-atlas/README.md`

### [1856-murmuration](/dream/1856-murmuration) В· embodied-conducting / **a living murmuration of sound where every bird is a voice вҖ” you conduct it with your whole body via the camera, no mic, no keyboard, no downloaded model. A flock of ~260 boids (Reynolds separation/alignment/cohesion) is herded by your motion; the flock's emergent structure IS the orchestra. The DEEP fire's winner of a 3-way "conduct a generative ensemble with your body" fan (banked вӯҗвӯҗ Karplus-Strong string loom + вӯҗ sectioned spatial orchestra). Explicitly OFF the recent lanes: NON-mic (jury-banned 7Г—), NON-keyboard (recent 3Г—), NON-Canvas2D (banned 4Г—/10), NON-altered-states вҖ” a piece that is about the moving body, not the inside of a head.** В· **CAMERA optical-flow (model-free 64Г—48 mirrored frame-difference вҶ’ total motion energy + motion centroid + dominant direction; pure Canvas pixel ops, no MediaPipe/no download) drives a moving attractor the flock is herded toward; zero-permission deterministic Lissajous "ghost conductor" self-demo already alive + sounding on load; "Tap to begin" autoplay gate; on-brand `text-destructive` notice if camera denied вҖ” self-demo keeps running** / **WebGL2 additive round points on a violet ramp with per-frame fade trails (flowing murmuration ribbons). Web Audio: flock split into 4 x-position clusters = 4 voices вҖ” cluster heightвҶ’major-pentatonic pitch (always consonant), coherenceвҶ’lowpass cutoff, xвҶ’stereo pan; HEADLINE mapping (the KTH research anchor) total motion energyвҶ’tempo & density (still body = sparse/slow/quiet, big gestures = dense/bright/loud swell) вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor вҶ’ master вүӨ0.16, 1 s fade-in** В· cycle 806 В· DEEP-winner (2026-07-17) В· demoable В· `theme: conduct a living ensemble with your body (embodied, about the world) В· vibe: murmuration/emergent-orchestra (NOT altered, NOT cosmic, NOT an arc-engine)` В· notes: `README.md` В· ref Craig Reynolds *Boids* 1987 / starling murmurations / Mermerci et al. *Real-Time Control of a Virtual Orchestra by Recognition of Conducting Gestures* (arXiv 2604.27957, 2026-04-30, KTH dome)

### [1848-butterfly](/dream/1848-butterfly) В· deterministic-chaos / **a music box driven by a chaotic double pendulum вҖ” nudge the start by a hair and the whole song changes, yet it is fully deterministic and never repeats. A real two-rod pendulum (RK4) drops its tip across vertical pitch-bands to fire pentatonic notes; a faint TWIN launched 0.001 rad away overlaps for seconds then visibly peels apart (the butterfly effect, made audible + visible). Explicitly NOT altered-states, NOT mic, NOT a generative-music-arc-engine (the flagged 1812/1818/1824 cluster) вҖ” a piece that is *about* physics, not the inside of a head.** В· **POINTER/DRAG to set the initial angles + release (sensitive dependence is the headline gesture) + deterministic seeded self-demo on load вҖ” NON-mic (jury-banned 7Г—), NON-keyboard-played, NON-camera** / **raw WebGL2 long-exposure GLOW (ping-pong feedback texture: additive-blended tip-path line/point trails with a slow ~0.965/frame fade + soft-knee present pass = a glowing Lissajous orbit вҖ” line/point GEOMETRY with additive blend, NOT a fullscreen psychedelic fragment field, NOT three.js; Canvas2D `lighter`-composite fallback if WebGL2 absent). Web Audio: RK4 double-pendulum integrator (12 substeps/frame) вҶ’ tip crosses 1 of N vertical bands вҶ’ major-pentatonic marimba pluck (angular velocityвҶ’gain, 2nd-bob xвҶ’pan, yвҶ’brightness), 45 ms rate-limit + 10-voice cap so dense chaos reads as fast runs not mush вҶ’ compressor + reverb/delay вҶ’ master 0.28** В· cycle 805 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-17) В· demoable В· `theme: deterministic chaos as a never-repeating composition В· vibe: scientific/physical (NOT altered, NOT cosmic, NOT an arc-engine)` В· notes: `README.md` В· ref double pendulum / Lorenz butterfly effect / PoincarГ© on deterministic chaos
**What if a piece of music were the trajectory of a chaotic physical system вҖ” so a hair-thin change in the start yields a completely different song, yet it is fully deterministic and never repeats?** Winner of a **WIDE** 3-brief fire (three unrelated non-altered-states subjects/substrates/inputs), chosen to cash the 2026-07-16 jury's deepest ask вҖ” *leave the inside of the head; be about literally any other subject* вҖ” with the biggest **surprise** (Karel care #2): deterministic chaos you can hear diverge. **The concept, built:** a genuine **double pendulum** (two coupled rods under gravity) integrated with 4th-order **RungeвҖ“Kutta**; the chaotic tip crossing vertical pitch-band gridlines fires a pentatonic sequence (so the song is genuinely different at minute 5 than second 5 вҖ” long-form with no script, no loop, no arc), while a faint **twin** launched 0.001 rad away overlaps for several seconds then peels apart within ~10вҖ“20 s (a live tip-distance readout that explodes from near-zero) вҖ” **sensitive dependence on initial conditions** made audible and visible. Named refs: the double pendulum as a canonical chaotic system, **Edward Lorenz's butterfly effect**, **Henri PoincarГ©** on practically-unpredictable deterministic systems. **Ambition вҖ” honest 2вҖ“3/5:** **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (RK4 physics integrator + band-crossing note sequencer + raw-WebGL2 additive trail renderer + Web-Audio synth = 4) + **#3** named refs (double pendulum В· Lorenz В· PoincarГ©); **#1 NOT claimed** вҖ” pendulums (164), strange-attractors (10) and chaos exist in the 1800-deep lab, so the honest novelty is *deterministic-chaos-as-a-never-repeating-piece with an audible/visible divergence twin*, not a virgin technique. **diversity:** `banned=[altered-states THEME(jury 15/15) В· cosmic-ambient(5Г—) В· mic INPUT(7Г—) В· WebGPU-compute + three.js/WebGL2-fragment OUTPUT(4Г— ea) В· psychedelic-geometry TECHNIQUE(4Г—)]`; `picked=[pointer/drag+seeded-self-demo INPUT В· raw-WebGL2 additive-geometry-trail OUTPUT (off the banned fullscreen-fragment lane) В· RK4-chaosвҶ’sequencer TECHNIQUE В· scientific/physical VIBE]` вҖ” clears every live ban. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + WebGL2; zero new npm deps). **Safety:** the additive glow does NOT strobe вҖ” smooth per-frame accumulation/fade, no full-frame flashing; `prefers-reduced-motion` shortens/dims the trail (audio keeps running); master 0.28 behind a compressor. **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites (builder on-brand); `npx eslint src/app/dream/1848-butterfly --max-warnings 0` = **0**; authoritative `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `/dream/1848-butterfly` in BOTH route manifests + `page.js` (39.6 kB) emitted (the plain full-route `npm run build` still `EMFILE`s at prerender on the container's standing 4096-fd ceiling across ~857 routes вҖ” infra, not code, reproduces with the winner removed; Vercel has fd headroom). **NOT ear/eye-verified for feel** (headless, no GPU/display/speakers вҖ” only the Canvas2D fallback path could execute here): whether the chaos reads *musically* (not as random pings), whether the twin's divergence lands as a genuine "huh" moment, and the WebGL2 trail glow want Karel's browser; the seeded self-demo + deterministic integrator guarantee it's never blank/silent. Two more explored вҖ” banked **вӯҗвӯҗ `1842-cantus`** (a Web-MIDI-driven **no-lookahead counterpoint partner** вҖ” Fux species rules that answer you a note at a time with strict causality, cited to *LiveBand* arXiv 2606.03803 June 2026; a near-ship that directly cashes the jury's "Force MIDI" provocation вҖ” resurrect next cycle) + **вӯҗ `1854-typescore`** (typed **prose performed as a live melody** вҖ” letterвҶ’scale-degree, punctuationвҶ’cadence, typing-speedвҶ’tempo, on a Canvas2D scrolling staff; realizes the long-banked В§802 `1826-keys` typing-as-instrument idea) вҖ” to IDEAS В§805 (both built demoable this session, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1848-butterfly/README.md`

### [1836-flow-eden](/dream/1836-flow-eden) В· emergent-ecology / **an evolving SONIC ECOLOGY вҖ” a long-form, stateful, EMERGENT piece where sound and image are two views of ONE simulation, and the music is genuinely different at minute 5 than at second 5 because the POPULATION has evolved, not because a script said so. A finite budget of "matter" lives on a WebGL2 grid under a mass-conserving Flow-Lenia rule; three species compete for that matter, spread, collide, and drift/speciate вҖ” no loop, no arc, no timeline. Explicitly NOT altered-states, NOT a generative-music-ARC engine (the flagged 1812/1818/1824 cluster), NOT Canvas2D (the banned 5Г—-in-10 output).** В· **AUTONOMOUS self-evolving (Start gesture for audio, then zero further input / zero permissions) + optional pointer-to-seed a species вҖ” NON-mic, NON-keyboard-played** / **WebGL2 render-to-texture ping-pong (RGBA16F, `EXT_color_buffer_float`): one field texture carries R=mass + G=mass-weighted genome embedded in the matter; one tick = 3 fragment passes (perceive: radial growth-kernel convolution вҶ’ potential+Gaussian growth per-cell-genome В· flow: `F=kAВ·вҲҮUвҲ’kMВ·вҲҮm` clamped В· transport: reintegration tracking вҶ’ mass conserved EXACTLY вҶ’ finite resource вҶ’ competition); 48ВІ downsample + `readPixels` вҶ’ per-species stats; plasma fallback if float-RTT absent. Web Audio: 3 species voices (low triangle / mid saw / high sine) pitch-quantized to D major-pentatonic вҖ” massвҶ’presence, center-of-massвҶ’pan/pitch drift, motionвҶ’noise shimmer, bloom/takeover/near-extinctionвҶ’bell onsets; all вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor вҶ’ master 0.18** В· cycle 804 В· DEEP-winner (2026-07-17) В· demoable В· `theme: evolving sonic ecology / mass-conservative emergent life В· vibe: living-ecology (NOT altered, NOT cosmic, NOT an arc-engine)` В· notes: `README.md` В· ref Flow-Lenia arXiv:2506.08569
**What if a piece of music were a living thing you tend rather than a track you play вҖ” evolving because its population, not a script, is changing?** Winner of a **DEEP** 3-approach fire (ONE concept вҖ” *an evolving sonic ecology, sound & image as two views of one long-form emergent simulation* вҖ” attacked via mass-conservative Flow-Lenia / evolvable agents / drifting Gray-Scott biomes), chosen because DEEP was overdue (вҖҰ802 W В· 803 W) and to cash Karel's *"massively bigger concepts"* mandate on the menu's thinnest lane: **long-form generative with real state/memory/evolution** (not a loop, not a scripted arc). **The research, built:** it implements **Flow-Lenia вҖ” "Emergent evolutionary dynamics in mass conservative continuous cellular automata"** (Plantec/Hamon/Etcheverry/Chan/Oudeyer/Moulin-Frier, arXiv:2506.08569, *Artificial Life* 2025), the mass-conservative extension of Bert Wang-Chak Chan's **Lenia** вҖ” whose load-bearing insight is that CONSERVATION OF A FINITE MASS (organisms advect existing matter instead of spawning it) plus rule-parameters embedded IN the moving matter turns a pretty pattern generator into an **ecology with scarcity, competition, and open-ended evolution/speciation**. Here that's literal: the genome is embedded in the conserved matter (`G = massВ·species`), mass is conserved exactly by **reintegration tracking**, so the three species genuinely compete for a finite resource and the population balance drifts over minutes вҖ” and the multi-voice pentatonic sonification tracks that turnover (a species blooming, taking over, or going near-extinct rings a bell), so the composition itself evolves. Also nods to the **Simulacra Naturae** generative-ecosystem installation (arXiv:2509.02924, 2025). **Ambition вҖ” honest 3/5:** **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (mass-conserving CA solver + embedded-genome channel + emergent-statsвҶ’sonification + WebGL2 render = 4) + **#3** named refs (Chan Lenia В· Plantec Flow-Lenia В· Simulacra Naturae) + **#5** this cycle's В§804 research. **#1 NOT claimed** вҖ” Lenia (1086), particle-life (16/236), physarum (327), reaction-diffusion (many) all pre-exist (grepped per jury #5); the honest novelty is *mass-conservation вҶ’ competition вҶ’ evolution вҶ’ the composition evolves over minutes*, an ecology-as-long-form-piece, NOT a virgin API. **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D OUTPUT(5Г—/10) В· altered-states THEME(4Г—) В· generative-music-arc-engine CLUSTER(3Г—) В· mic INPUT(jury) В· WebGPU-compute/three.js-fragment(jury)]`; `picked=[autonomous+pointer-seed INPUT(non-mic/keyboard/external) В· WebGL2 RTT PDE OUTPUT(off the banned Canvas2D) В· mass-conservative continuous-CA + emergentвҶ’generative-audio TECHNIQUE(non-arc-engine) В· living-ecology VIBE(non-altered/cosmic/arc)]` вҖ” clears every live ban. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + WebGL2; zero new npm deps). **Safety:** no strobe вҖ” the field drifts by slow luminance only, peak below white; `prefers-reduced-motion` shrinks the grid/motion (audio keeps running); master 0.18 behind a compressor. **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites; project-wide `npx tsc --noEmit` = **exit 0** (fixed ~40 `TS18047 'gl' possibly null` across two WebGL2 factory closures вҖ” re-bound a non-null `gl` after each `getContext` guard so nested closures capture a present context) + `npx eslint src/app/dream/1836-flow-eden --max-warnings 0` = **exit 0**; authoritative `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `/dream/1836-flow-eden` in BOTH route manifests + `page.js` (32 kB) emitted, no `1838`/`1840` leaked. **NOT ear/eye-verified for feel** (headless, no GPU/audio device): whether the ecology stays alive (neither melts to white nor dies to black) over minutes on real hardware, and whether the pentatonic sonification tracks the population turnover musically, want Karel's device; the seeded self-demo exercises the identical simвҶ’statsвҶ’synthвҶ’render path and the plasma fallback guarantees it's never blank if `EXT_color_buffer_float` is absent. Two more explored вҖ” banked **вӯҗвӯҗ `1838-genome-drift`** (thousands of agents with evolvable 6-gene genomes competing for a finite diffusing food field вҖ” real mutation+selection; the MOST iOS-robust of the fan: CPU typed-array sim + WebGL2 points + R8 food texture, no float-RTT dependency; resurrect as a dedicated evolvable-agents ecology) + **вӯҗ `1840-biome-bloom`** (Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion with a drifting feed/kill map вҶ’ biomes born/collide/transform; the "evolution" is honestly parameter-drift, the weakest ecology claim, but visually lovely) вҖ” to IDEAS В§804 (both built demoable this session, backed up to scratchpad `banked-804/`, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1836-flow-eden/README.md`

### [1832-choir-of-strangers](/dream/1832-choir-of-strangers) В· multi-user / **a pure just-intonation chord that no one can build alone вҖ” each open browser TAB holds one voice, and the beatless five-limit harmony physically cannot exist until several people join. The lab has repeatedly BANKED this multi-user Dream-House idea (1814-in-c cy800 В· 1828-dreamhouse cy802) as "resurrect for a multi-user cycle" but never shipped it; cycle 803 finally ships it вҖ” now anchored on FRESH В§803 research and fixed with a phantom-voice self-demo so it's no longer demo-gated on multiple tabs. Explicitly NOT altered-states, NOT mic, NOT an arc-engine вҖ” it directly cashes the 2026-07-16 jury's #1 provocation ("build about something OTHER than the inside of a head") which named multi-user/WebRTC the glaring 0Г—-built lane.** В· **MULTI-TAB PRESENCE вҖ” each tab claims one scale degree over BroadcastChannel (non-mic; "Open another voice" button `window.open`s a new tab)** / **SVG-DOM harmonic lattice (6 voice nodes on a 5-limit fifthsГ—thirds lattice: present voices glow + breathe, absent voices show as dashed ghost outlines, interval edges brighten + are labelled with the ratio only when BOTH endpoints are present); Web Audio: each tab synthesizes ONLY its own JI voice (`ratio Г— 146.83 Hz` tonic) вҖ” sine stack вҶ’ soft lowpass вҶ’ shared convolver reverb вҶ’ compressor вҶ’ master 0.19; a shared-wall-clock breath LFO (~13 s) so all tabs pulse in lockstep** В· cycle 803 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-17) В· demoable В· `theme: multi-user collaborative just-intonation choir В· vibe: communal / La-Monte-Young Dream House В· NOT altered-states` В· notes: `README.md` В· ref IEEE-2026 WAM collaborative-music (control-events-not-audio)
**What if a pure chord could only be completed by many people at once?** Winner of a **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (three unrelated non-altered, non-arc-engine, non-mic directions вҖ” this multi-tab choir / a webcam-colorвҶ’drone `1830-roomtone` / a Houdini-Paint texture `1834-livingwall`), taking the standing **2026-07-16 jury's #1** provocation ("leave altered-states; build about something OTHER than the inside of a head" вҖ” which named **multi-user/WebRTC** the glaring 0Г—-built lane) and **#2** (break the mic monoculture) head-on. **The research, built:** it implements the mechanic from **"Real-Time Collaborative Music Creation on the Web: exploiting Web Audio Modules" (IEEE, 2026)** + **Sequencer.party**'s CRDT model вҖ” browser-collaborative music in 2026 does NOT stream audio; it transmits **only control/timing events (which voice, the shared tonic, an LFO phase) and each client synthesizes locally**. Here that's literal: tabs exchange only control state over a BroadcastChannel, every tab voices its own tone, and the whole choir breathes together because the amplitude LFO reads the shared wall clock вҖ” so the harmony *only exists in the aggregate*. **How it works:** six voices form a 5-limit JI lattice around tonic D (1/1, 3/2, 5/4, 15/8, 5/3, 9/8); the first lonely tab is the root and the chord fills outward; a tab claims the lowest free degree (ties broken by peerId вҖ” a small CRDT-style convergence). **Self-demo (the fix over the banked 1828):** alone, a deterministic seeded **phantom choir** fades in over ~15 s so a single reviewer hears the chord assemble and watches the lattice + interval edges brighten; open a real second tab and its live voice *replaces* a phantom in that slot (its node flips phantomвҶ’live and that tab produces the sound). **Ambition вҖ” honest 3/5:** **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (BroadcastChannel presence/CRDT-claim sync + per-tab JI oscillator-bank synth + shared-clock breath LFO + SVG-DOM lattice viz = 4) + **#3** named refs (La Monte Young & Marian Zazeela *Dream House* В· IEEE-2026 WAM paper В· Sequencer.party CRDT) + **#5** this cycle's В§803 research (IEEE 11325761, current-year, on-concept). **#1 NOT claimed** вҖ” BroadcastChannel multi-tab (grep-6Г—) and JI Dream-House drones (552/992) both pre-exist; the novelty is the *research-anchored control-events-not-audio mechanic made the point*, not a virgin API (grepped before claiming, per jury #5). **Honest limitation:** BroadcastChannel is **cross-tab/same-origin only** вҖ” real remote strangers still need a WebRTC/relay layer (the banked 1814/1828 note stands); what 1832 adds over those banks is the shipped commit + the research anchor + the phantom self-demo. **diversity:** `picked=[multi-user-tab-presence INPUT(jury's #1-named 0Г—-networked lane, non-mic) В· SVG-DOM OUTPUT(off the banned GPU family) В· control-events-not-audio + CRDT-voice-claim TECHNIQUE В· communal-JI VIBE(non-altered/cosmic)]` вҖ” clears every live ban; and it is NOT a 4th generative-music-arc engine (the new over-served cluster: 1812/1818/1824). **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + BroadcastChannel + SVG; zero new npm deps). **Safety:** no strobe вҖ” nodes/edges glow + breathe on a ~13 s LFO, peak below white; `prefers-reduced-motion` shrinks the breath depth. **Validation:** normalizer = **0 rewrites**; project-wide `npx tsc --noEmit` = **exit 0** + `npx eslint src/app/dream/1832-choir-of-strangers --max-warnings 0` = **exit 0**; authoritative `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **exit 0**, `/dream/1832-choir-of-strangers` in BOTH route manifests + `page.js` (34.7 kB) emitted, no `1830`/`1834` leaked. (Plain `npm run build` still dies on the documented **EMFILE 4096-fd** container cap the ~760-route baseline shares вҖ” Vercel has the fd headroom вҶ’ deploys fine.) **NOT ear/multi-tab-verified for feel** (headless, single review process): whether the beatless JI chord and the phantomвҶ’live handoff land wants Karel's device + a second tab; the seeded phantom path guarantees it's never blank/silent solo. Two more explored вҖ” banked **вӯҗвӯҗ `1834-livingwall`** (audio-reactive texture on the **CSS Houdini Paint API** вҖ” `registerPaint` worklet from an inline Blob painting `background: paint(livingwall)`, Canvas2D fallback; a near-virgin render substrate extending the 1778-CSS / 1792-SVG substrate-courage lineage; resurrect by making the Canvas2D fallback primary so the wow shows on iOS) + **вӯҗ `1830-roomtone`** (webcam COLOR not motion вҶ’ a JI drone that re-tunes minorвҶ’major as the room warms, inverting Scriabin's *clavier Г  lumiГЁres*; the most robust of the three, ship-ready) вҖ” to IDEAS В§803 (both built demoable this session, backed up to scratchpad `banked-803/`, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1832-choir-of-strangers/README.md`

### [1824-reverie](/dream/1824-reverie) В· cinematic-narrative / **a generative "score to an unseen film" вҖ” a CINEMATIC-NARRATIVE journey engine that runs the classic dramatic arc (Freytag's pyramid: establishing вҶ’ inciting вҶ’ rising action вҶ’ climax вҶ’ falling action вҶ’ resolution), where the headline is the *transitions between acts*: a rule-based "director" renders a real generative musical BRIDGE at every act boundary (swell / suspended-sus-chord / ritardando / chromatic-pivot) instead of hard-cutting, and the bottom letterbox bar draws the Freytag structure + tension envelope + labelled bridge SEAMS + playhead live. One "Roll the reel" press вҶ’ a full ~2m40s arc plays itself. A third alternate-journey ARC (after psychedelic 6-phase + EDM build-drop 1818) вҖ” organised by NARRATIVE tension, not energy; explicitly NOT altered-states, NOT mic, NOT a drop.** В· **KEYBOARD/click вҖ” a mood seed (noir/wonder/dread/elegy shifts scale+orchestration+palette); NO mic** / **CANVAS2D letterboxed cinematic frame (abstract drifting field over a tension-lifting horizon + chapter title cards + slow non-strobe climax bloom) + structure/tension ribbon; Web Audio: synthesized orchestra вҖ” string-pad bed (tensionвҶ’cutoff), leitmotif melody voice (stated Act 1, returns transformed at climax + resolution), tension-subdividing low ostinato, climax timpani/cymbal; look-ahead scheduler over a 6-act timeline; `chooseBridge()` director renders 4 bridge types from the tension delta; bus вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor вҶ’ master 0.16** В· cycle 802 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-16) В· demoable В· `theme: cinematic-narrative journey arc В· vibe: cinematic В· NOT altered-states` В· notes: `README.md` В· ref JenBridge arXiv:2606.01703
**What if Resonance had a film-score journey engine whose hard problem was the seams?** Winner of a **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (three unrelated non-altered-states directions вҖ” this cinematic engine / a keystrokeвҶ’music instrument / a multi-user just-intonation drone) chosen to keep breaking the 2026-07-16 jury's flagged altered-states monoculture (still 6Г— in the last 10) WITHOUT a 5th straight external-data cycle (all three are a fresh third category: music-structure / cross-modal / collaborative). **The research, built:** it cashes **JenBridge вҖ” "Adaptive Long-Form Video Soundtracking across Scene Transitions", arXiv:2606.01703 (Yu/Yao/Chen/Wang, 1 June 2026)**, whose core is a *"novel adaptive transition mechanism"* + a "director" agent that intelligently selects how to bridge each narrative shift вҖ” reframing long-form generative scoring as a *transition* problem, not a note problem. Here the director is rule-based (tension-delta-driven, no LLM/API) and its bridges are audible AND rendered as labelled seams on the structure ribbon, so the researchвҶ’build chain is literally on screen (the move that won 1818). Also grounded in **Freytag's pyramid** and the film-scoring **leitmotif** (fixed intervals, changing register/orchestration across the peaks). **Cashes Karel care #4** вҖ” "cinematic narrative" was on his explicit list of wanted alternate journey arcs. **Ambition вҖ” honest 3/5:** **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (tension-curve state machine + generative orchestra + director/bridge generator + leitmotif memory + Canvas2D ribbon viz = 5) + **#3** named refs (JenBridge + Freytag + leitmotif) + **#5** this cycle's В§802 research (arXiv:2606.01703, ~6 weeks old, on-concept). **diversity:** `banned=[altered-states THEME(6Г—/10) В· cosmic-ambient VIBE В· mic INPUT В· GPU-render family В· form-constant TECHNIQUE]`; `picked=[cinematic-narrative-journey-arc THEME(non-altered, distinct from 1818's build-drop axis) В· keyboard/mood-seed INPUT(non-mic) В· Canvas2D OUTPUT(off the GPU family) В· dramatic-arc-state-machine + generative-act-bridges TECHNIQUE В· cinematic VIBE]`. **Distinct from 1818-bigroom:** both are stateful multi-minute engines with a structure ribbon, but 1818's axis is *energyвҶ’drop* and its signature is the drop; this one's axis is *narrative tension* and its signature is the inter-act BRIDGE (a transition problem, per JenBridge). **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + Canvas2D; zero new npm deps). **Safety:** no strobe вҖ” slow luminance only, climax bloom is a smooth rise; `prefers-reduced-motion` honored (fewer particles, arc stays fully audible); master 0.16 behind a compressor. **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites; project-wide `npx tsc --noEmit` = **0 errors** + `npx eslint src/app/dream/1824-reverie --max-warnings 0` = **exit 0** (fixed one unused-var); authoritative `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` вҶ’ `/dream/1824-reverie` in BOTH route manifests + `page.js` + `page_client-reference-manifest.js` emitted, no `1826-keys`/`1828-dreamhouse` leaked. (Plain `npm run build` still dies on the documented **EMFILE 4096-fd** container cap the pristine baseline shares вҖ” Vercel has the fd headroom вҶ’ deploy fine.) **NOT ear-verified** (headless, no audio device): whether the orchestra + the four bridges land emotionally wants Karel's ears; the code path self-demos the full arc on one press. Two more explored вҖ” banked **вӯҗвӯҗ `1826-keys`** (your TYPING as an instrument вҖ” keystroke inter-key timing вҶ’ rhythm/dynamics, QWERTY geography вҶ’ pentatonic pitch/harmony, a musical-rhetoric mapping so it's music not beeps; instantly demoable solo + a hands-free sample-sentence player; the fresher INPUT, cross-modal lane) + **вӯҗ `1828-dreamhouse`** (a multi-user La-Monte-Young *Dream House* вҖ” each browser tab holds ONE sustained just-intonation voice over BroadcastChannel, the pure chord assembles only when several tabs are open; SVG-DOM rose-window; jury's 0Г—-networked multi-user lane, but demo-gated on multiple tabs) вҖ” to IDEAS В§802 (both built demoable this session, backed up to scratchpad `banked-802/`, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1824-reverie/README.md`

### [1818-bigroom](/dream/1818-bigroom) В· EDM-journey / **a generative, long-form, STATEFUL EDM build-and-drop JOURNEY ENGINE вҖ” the alternate to Resonance's slow 6-phase psychedelic arc that Karel explicitly asked for (care #4). One Start press runs a full ~3m14s festival big-room arrangement `intro вҶ’ buildup вҶ’ drop вҶ’ breakdown вҶ’ build2 вҶ’ drop2 вҶ’ outro`; genuinely different at minute 4 than second 4. The headline: a live STRUCTURE RIBBON renders the EDMFormer section map (colored section blocks + moving playhead) with the energy-envelope curve plotted above it вҖ” the research is on screen, and you watch the classic buildвҶ’drop coming (snare-roll accelerando + rising bandpass-noise sweep + pitch riser вҶ’ silent gap вҶ’ impact вҶ’ sidechain-pumping drop). Explicitly NOT altered-states (breaks the jury's 15/15 вҶ’ 7Г—-in-10 theme monoculture), NOT mic.** В· **KEYBOARD/computed вҖ” Start + optional live Intensity slider & "Drop now" (a taste of stage control, care #3); NO mic** / **CANVAS2D violet skyline that pumps with the sidechain + particle field that BLOOMS on the drop (smooth вүӨ3 Hz luminance rise, no strobe) + live structure-ribbon; Web Audio: 6-osc supersaw lead (cutoff `260 + energyВІВ·7200 Hz`), pluck hook, four-on-floor kick/sub/hats/clap, snare-roll + noise/pitch risers; single continuous energy curve drives cutoff + pump depth (`0.18+energyВ·0.62`) + layer add/drop; 25 ms look-ahead scheduler @126 BPM; punchBus (kick/crash/riser, never ducked) + sidechained pumpBus вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor вҶ’ master вүӨ0.18** В· cycle 801 В· DEEP-winner (2026-07-16) В· demoable В· `theme: EDM build-and-drop journey engine В· pole: intense/euphoric В· NOT altered-states` В· notes: `README.md` В· ref EDMFormer arXiv:2603.08759

### [1812-sideman](/dream/1812-sideman) В· jazz / **a live-performance reactive jazz TRIO that reads you a beat ahead вҖ” you play a melody at the QWERTY keys (or a Web-MIDI keyboard) and a walking bass + rootless-comping piano + brush drums follow your inferred tempo & key, and вҖ” the headline вҖ” the canvas SHOWS you the chord it's about to play a beat before it lands (`Dm7 вҶ’ G7 in 1.0 beats`), so you play INTO the change instead of chasing it (live-performance / jazz-responsive вҖ” the alternate-journey-arc Karel asked for; explicitly NOT altered-states, NOT mic, NOT a GPU shader)** В· **KEYBOARD-PLAYED (QWERTY 2-octave, key-quantized) + optional Web MIDI вҖ” NO mic (breaks the jury's 7Г— mic monoculture)** / **CANVAS2D warm amber-on-black club palette + Web Audio: synthesized walking bass (chord-tonesвҶ’chromatic approach into the *next* root), rootless 3rd/7th+9/13 comping on swung off-beats, swing-ride/brush-swish/feathered-kick drums; 25 ms/120 ms look-ahead scheduler ("Two Clocks"); tempo = median inter-onset interval (70вҖ“160 BPM, glided), key = decaying pitch-class histogram vs scale templates; busвҶ’DynamicsCompressor limiterвҶ’master вүӨ~0.2** В· cycle 800 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-16) В· demoable В· `state: live-performance reactive accompaniment В· vibe: jazz`
**What if your rhythm section could read your playing a beat ahead?** Winner of a **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (three unrelated directions to break the 2026-07-16 jury's flagged **15/15 altered-states monoculture** вҖ” this jazz trio / a multi-user *In C* room / a textвҶ’music sound-poem), taking the jury's provocation **#1** ("build about something other than the inside of a head") and **#2** ("break the mic monoculture вҖ” force MIDI/keyboard/external input") head-on, and cashing **two explicit Karel directives**: care **#3** live-performance fitness (mic-free, low-latency, playable) + care **#4** a **jazz-responsive** alternate journey arc. **The research, built:** it implements the anticipation mechanic from **ReaLJam вҖ” "Real-Time Human-AI Music Jamming with RL-Tuned Transformers", arXiv:2502.21267 (Feb 2025)** (+ the Feb-2026 survey *A Design Space for Live Music Agents*, arXiv:2602.05064): the agent commits to and **displays its upcoming chords ahead of the beat** so the human plays *into* the change and the humanвҶ”machine latency mismatch disappears вҖ” here made visible as a scrolling chord-lane drifting toward a NOW line + a `current вҶ’ next` header with a "next change in N.N beats" progress bar. **How it works:** two QWERTY rows are a ~2-octave melody instrument quantized to the current inferred key (every note fits); Web MIDI is used if present, else silent QWERTY fallback. A look-ahead scheduler (`AudioContext.currentTime`, the "Tale of Two Clocks" pattern) runs an 8-bar iiвҖ“VвҖ“I turnaround family transposed into the inferred key; **tempo** is inferred from the median inter-onset interval (clamped, glided) and **key** from a decaying pitch-class histogram scored against major/minor templates (both **lockable** if inference feels jumpy). The trio is fully synthesized (no samples): walking bass steps chord-tonesвҶ’chromatic approach into the *next* chord's root; rootless (Bill Evans / Bud Powell) left-hand voicings comp on swung off-beats; brush drums swing the ride with a noise-swish and feathered kick. **Self-demo:** on Start it grooves immediately in C @116 BPM and, if you stay idle, plays short melodic phrases over the changes вҖ” so a reviewer who just clicks Start hears *and* sees a jazz trio. **Ambition вҖ” honest 3/5:** **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (input detect + tempo/key inference + 3-voice generative trio + anticipation viz) + **#3** named refs (ReaLJam anticipation В· Evans/Powell rootless voicings) + **#5** this cycle's В§800 research chain. **diversity:** `banned=[altered-states THEME(15/15) В· cosmic-ambient VIBE(5Г—) В· mic INPUT(7Г—) В· WebGPU-compute + three.js/WebGL2-fragment OUTPUT(4Г— ea) В· form-constant TECHNIQUE(4Г—)]`; `picked=[jazz-live-performance THEME(0Г— in 15) В· keyboard-played+MIDI INPUT(non-mic) В· Canvas2D OUTPUT(off the banned GPU family) В· anticipatory-accompaniment TECHNIQUE(non-form-constant) В· warm-jazz-club VIBE(non-cosmic/altered)]` вҖ” clears every hard ban on all five axes. **Honest note:** ReaLJam is RL-tuned transformers; this engine is **rule-based, not ML** вҖ” hand-written theory for progression/bass/voicings/groove + statistical tempo/key inference. What's faithfully borrowed is the *anticipation display*. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + Canvas2D; zero new npm deps). **Safety:** no strobe (chord-lane drifts, note marks bloom/decay). **Validation:** project-wide `npx tsc --noEmit` = **0 errors** + `npx eslint src/app/dream/1812-sideman --max-warnings 0` = **exit 0**; authoritative `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **exit 0**, route emitted, no `1814`/`1816` leaked. **NOT ear-verified** (headless, no audio device): musical feel + inference tuning want Karel's ears; the idle self-demo exercises the full schedulerвҶ’synthвҶ’viz path. Two more explored вҖ” banked **вӯҗвӯҗ `1814-in-c`** (multi-user Terry-Riley *In C* over BroadcastChannel вҖ” every tab a musician; boldest jury-untouched lane, resurrect as a networked/WebRTC room) + **вӯҗ `1816-ursonate`** (typed text вҶ’ Schwitters-*Ursonate* sound-poetry with kinetic type) вҖ” to IDEAS В§800 (both built demoable this session, backed up to scratchpad `banked-800/`, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1812-sideman/README.md`

### [1810-bourse](/dream/1810-bourse) В· real-world-data / **the live crypto market as a Ryoji Ikeda *datamatics* COLD-DATA tape вҖ” every trade a precise sine/click on a scrolling monochrome Canvas2D data-matrix, the whole flow at once a legible monitor and a hypnotic minimal-techno piece (finance sonification, 0Г— EVER in the lab; explicitly NOT altered-states, NOT cosmic-ambient, NOT warm вҖ” cold signal, gridded, precise)** В· **LIVE MARKET WebSocket (best-effort Binance combined trade stream, folds in + swaps seamlessly) / deterministic seeded-GBM synthetic market (mulberry32 `0x1810`, regime shifts + Poisson arrivals, self-demos with ZERO network) вҖ” NO mic** / **CANVAS2D data-matrix + Web Audio: priceвҶ’sparse-scale pure tone (sine/triangle per asset), buy/sellвҶ’timbre+pan, sizeвҶ’click+sub, volatilityвҶ’minimal-techno kick grid (~108вҶ’~142 bpm) + high "tape tone"; bus вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor вҶ’ master 0.16** В· cycle 799 В· DEEP-winner (2026-07-16) В· demoable В· `theme: real-world-data sonification (finance/market) В· NOT altered-states`
**What if the live market were a piece of music you could monitor by ear?** Winner of a **DEEP** 3-language race (ONE concept вҖ” the live market as an instrument вҖ” attacked via Ikeda cold-tape / warm chamber-ensemble / order-book resonator), the lab's **first finance sonification** (0Г— ever вҖ” the 2026-07-16 jury's boldest named-empty lane) and a deliberate **2nd consecutive outer/world-facing cycle** to break that jury's flagged **15/15 altered-states monoculture** (one outer cycle barely dents it). **The research, built:** it cashes **arXiv 2605.21874 (May 2026), "Real-time, EDM-inspired sonification of the activity of a supercomputer"** вҖ” whose thesis is that continuous real-time data becomes a good *monitor + long-listen* only when the musical language's temporal structure fits the data process; the bursty trade firehose gets Ikeda's pure-sine/click grammar over a minimal-techno pulse, the closest analog of the three legs. **How it works:** a fully deterministic **seeded-GBM market** (`mulberry32 0x1810` вҖ” geometric Brownian motion price paths for BTC/ETH/SOL/XRP + a weighted INDEX, a mean-reverting calmвҶ”turbulent regime scalar for volatility clustering, Poisson-ish exponential trade arrivals, heavy-tailed sizes) advances off a fixed 1/60 per-frame step (no wall clock, no `Math.random`/`Date.now` on the loop), so the 06:30 box shows a living tape with a real regime-arc and zero permissions. A best-effort **Binance combined trade WebSocket** folds real prices in and replaces synthetic trades seamlessly (try/catch throughout, closes on unmount, SIM/LIVE badge); events are rate-limited to вүӨ~10/s (prioritising large prints) so audio never machine-guns. **Sound:** each trade's price is log-mapped into the asset's rolling [lo,hi] and snapped to a sparse 2-octave scale вҶ’ a pure tone (sine BTC/ETH/INDEX, triangle SOL/XRP, distinct registers); buy pans right+bright, sell left+dark; size adds a 1 ms click "print" + a sub thud on large prints; volatility drives a quiet high "tape tone" and the tempo of a minimal-techno kick grid; bus вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` вҶ’ master 0.16, fade-in on the Start gesture, clean `ctx.close()` teardown. **Visual:** a Canvas2D data-matrix вҖ” scrolling trade tape (assetВ·priceВ·sizeВ·side, mono numerals, buys violet / sells grey), per-asset price ladders with live markers + Пғ readouts, a hairline registration grid + crosshairs, a volatility-regime meter, decaying trade flashes; single rAF, DOM built once, refs for state. **Ambition вҖ” honest 3/5:** **#1** finance sonification as a primary AV piece = **lab-first, 0Г— ever** (grep-confirmed; claimed honestly per jury #5) + **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (6: seeded-GBM engine + live/sim WS failover + rate-limiter + Ikeda tone synth + volatility tape-tone/kick grid + Canvas2D matrix) + **#3** named refs (Ikeda *datamatics/data.tron/test-pattern* В· MARKETBUZZ (Janata & Childs, ICAD 2004)/PriceSquawk В· GBM) + this cycle's В§799 arXiv research chain. **diversity:** `banned=[altered-states THEME(jury 15/15) В· cosmic-ambient VIBE(5Г—) В· mic INPUT(7Г—) В· WebGPU-compute + three.js/WebGL2-fragment OUTPUT(4Г— each) В· psych-geometry TECHNIQUE(4Г—)]`; `picked=[finance-sonification THEME(0Г— ever) В· live-market-WS / seeded-GBM-sim INPUT(non-mic) В· Canvas2D OUTPUT(off the whole banned GPU family, well-rested) В· Ikeda trade-tape TECHNIQUE(non-psych-geometry) В· cold-data VIBE(NON-cosmic-ambient, NON-altered-states)]` вҖ” clears every live-jury hard ban on all five axes. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + Canvas2D; the Binance WS is client-side direct; zero new npm deps). **Safety:** no strobe/flicker вҖ” flashes bloom/decay over ~26 frames, sub-white peak, all luminance/motion data-paced; `prefers-reduced-motion` freezes the tape scroll (legible) + softens flashes. **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites; project-wide `npx tsc --noEmit` = **0 errors** + `npx eslint src/app/dream/1810-bourse --max-warnings 0` = **exit 0**; authoritative `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **exit 0**, `/dream/1810-bourse` in BOTH route manifests + `page.js` emitted, no `open-outcry`/`order-book` leaked. (Plain `npm run build` still dies at "Collecting page data" on the documented **EMFILE 4096-fd hard cap** the pristine baseline shares вҖ” Vercel has the headroom вҶ’ deploy unaffected.) **NOT ear/feel-verified** (headless container, no audio device, offline): live Binance handover cadence + whether the trade-tape genuinely reads as a monitor want Karel's ears; the sim path exercises the identical GBMвҶ’synthвҶ’viz chain, and the kick grid uses a `setTimeout` scheduler (a sample-accurate lookahead is the obvious next polish). Two more languages explored вҖ” banked **вӯҗвӯҗ `1812-open-outcry`** (the market as a warm voice-led chamber ENSEMBLE, mode-by-trend вҖ” the CLEANEST build of the race, ship-ready; ideal as a Karel-Path-piano-vs-market duet) + **вӯҗ `1814-order-book`** (liquidity as a **KarplusвҖ“Strong** resonator, bid-ask spread вҶ’ string tension вҖ” resurrect after a 1-line `Float32Array` cast fix at `audio.ts:111`) вҖ” to IDEAS В§799 (both built to demoable this session, backed up to scratchpad `banked-799/`, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1810-bourse/README.md`

### [1798-vection-tide](/dream/1798-vection-tide) В· psychedelic / **headphones on, eyes closed, screen deliberately near-dark вҖ” a field of warm HRTF-spatialized tones ORBITS your head in true 3-D until the coherent sweep of the whole sound-world (not any beat) reads as YOUR OWN motion: auditory VECTION, a drug-free cosmic sound-bath (COSMIC-AMBIENT pole; NOT a screen-forward viz, NOT Canvas2D, NOT WebGPU, NOT SVG-as-render вҖ” the SCREEN-BIAS-empty AUDIO-FORWARD lane the jury named empty for months)** В· **BREATH via mic (best-effort AnalyserNode RMS вҶ’ opens the tide wider/higher/faster) + deterministic self-driving ~0.05 Hz breath curve when no mic (zero permissions, self-demos headless); the visual is only a dim breathing SVG horizon** / **AUDIO-FORWARD вҖ” Web Audio `PannerNode` (`panningModel:"HRTF"`) is the PRIMARY medium: 4 warm pad partials + 1 filtered-noise wind each ride their own slow (0.035вҖ“0.13 Hz) elliptical/figure-8 3-D orbit around an `AudioListener`; TWO sources also carry a real 6 Hz / 40 Hz oscillator patched straight into `panner.positionY` (spatial position wobble, NOT amplitude вҖ” no strobe), the exact variable the research isolates; bus вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor вҶ’ master вүӨ0.16 вҶ’ destination; StereoPanner azimuth fallback** В· cycle 797 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-16) В· demoable В· `state: audio-forward spatial-vection sound-bath В· pole: cosmic-ambient`
**What if sound alone could carry you bodily through space?** Winner of a **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (three unrelated directions вҖ” this audio-forward HRTF vection bath / a three.js Indra&apos;s-Net jewel lattice / a WebGL2 chromesthesia field), taking jury-2026-07-15 provocation **#3** on its emptiest reading: *"go the opposite way and finally test the screen-bias вҖ” an **audio-only / embedded** experiment; the menu has named it empty for months."* Audio-forward is the single most-empty substrate in the lab вҖ” off the banned Canvas2D (7Г—), off the rested WebGPU-compute, off the whole GPU-shader pile, off the just-used SVG. **The mechanism:** several warm pad partials plus a soft filtered-noise wind each ride their own slow 3-D orbit around your head via an HRTF `PannerNode`; the brain reads the coherent spatial sweep of the *whole* field as **self**-motion вҖ” auditory **vection** вҖ” with no beat frequency doing the work. **The research lever, built literally:** a real 6 Hz and 40 Hz oscillator is patched into two sources&apos; `positionY`, so the source POSITION oscillates at those rates (audio-rate, additive with the base height) вҖ” **not** its amplitude, so there is no strobe. That is the exact variable **PLOS One 2024, "A new perspective on binaural beats: Investigating the effects of spatially moving sounds on human mental states" (PMC11290623)** isolates: the EEG/relaxation effect comes from the SPATIAL MOTION of the sound, not the beating, and improves at both 6 Hz and 40 Hz spatial motion. **Input:** best-effort mic RMS reads your breath and opens the tide (deeper breath вҶ’ wider, higher, faster orbits); with no mic it self-drives from a deterministic ~0.05 Hz breathing curve, so the 06:30 box plays the whole arc (&quot;drifting вҶ’ lifting вҶ’ carried&quot;) with zero permission grants. The screen is intentionally a dim breathing SVG horizon (not a busy visualizer) вҖ” the point is to prove the screen-bias lane. **Audio chain:** every voice вҶ’ bus вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` вҶ’ modest master gain (вүӨ0.16) вҶ’ destination so layered orbits can never clip; `StereoPannerNode` azimuth fallback if `createPanner` is somehow absent; reduced-motion damps the orbits + softens the positional wobble. **Ambition вҖ” honest 3/5:** **#1** never-used technique via **HRTF-spatialized orbiting sources as the PRIMARY medium to induce vection with the screen dark** (grep-fresh: `1752-dissolve` owns the audio-only substrate but is Shepard/pitch-based ego-dissolution; `1762-nde-void` uses HRTF but is screen-FORWARD вҖ” an audio-forward *spatial-motion* piece is a genuinely different axis, honestly scoped) + **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (HRTF orbit engine + spatial-trajectory sequencer + best-effort breath detector + minimal breathing-horizon viz = 4) + **#3** the named PLOS One 2024 reference + auditory-vection review + **#5-amended** research-cited to the В§797 dive (today&apos;s spatial-moving-sound read вҶ’ tonight&apos;s build). **#5 strict <14-day NOT claimed** вҖ” the PLOS study is 2024, on-concept and current-standard (jury-retired <14-day bar; amended &quot;fresh, current-year/recent, on-concept&quot;). **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D OUTPUT(jury 7Г—) В· WebGPU-compute OUTPUT(used 1786, rested) В· SVG-as-render OUTPUT(just used 1792) В· physical-model-instrument + self-writing-score TECHNIQUE(jury) В· touch/keyboard INPUT(jury) В· camera INPUT(1784)]`; `picked=[AUDIO-FORWARD HRTF OUTPUT (the maximally-empty substrate вҖ” off Canvas2D/WebGPU/SVG/GPU-shader) В· orbiting-source auditory-vection + 6/40 Hz positional-wobble TECHNIQUE (first-in-lab) В· breath / autonomous INPUT (non-touch/keyboard/camera) В· cosmic-ambient VIBE (not over-represented; only 1786 recently)]` вҖ” clears every live jury hard-ban on all four axes and serves the jury&apos;s named-empty screen-bias lane. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + SVG; zero new npm deps). **Safety:** no amplitude strobe/flicker; the horizon changes by slow drift only (<0.3 Hz); `prefersReducedMotion` honored; modest gain through a compressor. **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites; project-wide `npx tsc --noEmit` = **0 errors** + `npx eslint src/app/dream/1798-vection-tide --max-warnings 0` = **exit 0**; authoritative `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **exit 0**, `/dream/1798-vection-tide` in BOTH route manifests + `page.js` emitted, no `1800`/`1802` leaked. (Plain `npm run build` still dies at "Collecting page data" on the documented **EMFILE 4096-fd hard cap** the pristine baseline shares вҖ” Vercel has the headroom вҶ’ deploy unaffected.) **NOT ear-verified for feel** (headless container, no audio device): whether the orbiting field genuinely induces vection on headphones + the exact breath-RMS scaling want Karel&apos;s ears; the autonomous path exercises the identical orbitвҶ’HRTFвҶ’compressor path. Two more explorers built вҖ” banked **вӯҗвӯҗ `1800-indra-net`** (three.js live-CubeCamera mutual-reflection **Indra&apos;s-Net** jewel lattice вҖ” ship-ready, resurrect on a GPU/three.js cycle after a live CubeCamera perf check) + **вӯҗ `1802-chromesthesia`** (WebGL2 **chromesthesia** color-field on Scriabin&apos;s pitch-classвҶ’hue table вҖ” resurrect after a 1-line `Float32Array` generic-cast fix at `audio.ts:217`) вҖ” to IDEAS В§797 (both built to demoable this session, backed up to scratchpad `banked-797/`, then `rm -rf`&apos;d per the non-winner rule). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1798-vection-tide/README.md`

### [1792-replay-svg](/dream/1792-replay-svg) В· psychedelic / **press Begin and a sharp "day" of seven warm luminous glyphs (plus a short melody) holds for ~14 s вҖ” then, with NO further input, the sensory gate closes over ~52 s: the veridical scene fades and a top-down pathway replays those EXACT forms, fragmented, drifting and condensing two-into-one, until the dream is made entirely out of its own memory, then gently wakes and loops (DREAM/hypnagogic pole; NOT an instrument, NOT touch, NOT mic, NOT Canvas2D, NOT WebGL)** В· **NO INPUT вҖ” a deterministic self-running Оұ 0вҶ’1 WakeвҶ’Sleep auto-arc (optional soft modulators omitted; zero permissions, self-demos headless)** / **100% SVG-DOM VECTOR ART вҖ” the jury-endorsed empty substrate as the PRIMARY render (grep-near-0Г—): the 7 source glyphs are real `<g>/<path>/<polygon>/<circle>` elements; the dream is those SAME elements via `<use href="#gN">` duplication + transforms, recombined through an SVG filter graph (`feTurbulenceвҶ’feDisplacementMap` melt whose `scale` rides Оұ, `feColorMatrix` hue drift ~0.06 Hz, `feGaussianBlur` top-down softening); a SINGLE rAF loop MUTATES attributes/filter params off an integer frame counter, DOM built once вҖ” NO `<canvas>`, NO WebGL, NO three.js anywhere** В· cycle 796 В· DEEP-winner (2026-07-16) В· demoable В· `state: Wake-Sleep sleep-phase memory replay В· pole: dream`

**A dream isn&rsquo;t noise turned into geometry вҖ” it&rsquo;s your cortex closing the sensory gate and replaying the day&rsquo;s own forms, recombined.** Winner of a **DEEP** 3-substrate race (ONE concept вҖ” the Оұ WakeвҶ’Sleep replay dial вҖ” attacked via SVG-native vs three.js-feedback vs WebGL2-ring-buffer), executing jury-2026-07-15 provocation **#2** (return to the PRIMARY DIRECTION at scale on the OTHER pole вҖ” this is the lab&rsquo;s cleanest **DREAM/hypnagogic** anchor: sleep-phase replay *is* dreaming, the thinnest pole) + **#3** (off the banned Canvas2D, onto the one substrate the jury explicitly named empty вҖ” **SVG**) + **#1** (leave the instrument/theory workshop вҖ” no played instrument, no self-writing score). **The model:** a single ОұвҲҲ[0,1] is the control parameter of **Bredenberg et al., "Modeling the hallucinatory effects of classical psychedelics in terms of replay-dependent plasticity mechanisms," eLife 2026;14:RP105968** вҖ” it maps the **Wake-Sleep algorithm** (Hinton, Dayan, Frey & Neal, 1995) onto cortex: Оұ=0 is WAKE (basal dendrites, bottom-up sensory inference), Оұ=1 is SLEEP (apical dendrites, top-down generative **replay**); as the gate closes what you perceive is internally generated to match *learned memory*, not pure noise. Contrasted in the notes with **REBUS** (Carhart-Harris & Friston) вҖ” a prior-relaxation account rather than an active-replay one. **How it works:** `scene.ts` (fixed-seed mulberry32 `0x1792`) lays out 7 distinct warm glyphs (the veridical "day"), and builds `DREAM_INSTANCES` = 4 recombination fragments per glyph, each a slow drift + wrong rotation/scale + convergence toward a shared attractor (so two glyphs melt into one at the peak), fading in progressively as Оұ passes per-fragment thresholds (recombination DENSITY rises, never a flash). The dream layer is literally `<use href="#gN">` of the day&rsquo;s glyph ids, so it is **provably made of the day scene** вҖ” the clearest of the three race entries. `audio.ts` mirrors it cross-modally: a warm JI pad + a faithful 8-step WAKE motif that fades as Оұ rises while the SAME motif returns recombined (wrong-order, transposed Вұoctave/fifth, time-stretched, overlapping loops) through the shared `_shared/psych/convolutionVoid` reverb, whose wet opens with Оұ. Always-on **WAKEвҶ”SLEEP Оұ meter** + phase caption (basalвҶ’driftingвҶ’apical) makes causeвҶ’effect explicit. **Ambition вҖ” honest 2вҖ“3/5:** **#1** never-used technique via **SVG-DOM as the PRIMARY render substrate** (grep-near-0Г—; a different axis than the pre-existing `1078-dream-replay`, which owns the memory-replay *concept* but on Canvas2D + touch + as a played instrument) + **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (procedural day-scene generator + `<use>` memory store + Оұ-driven SVG-filter dream-recombination engine + cross-modal audio granular-replay = 4) + **#3** the named refs + **#5-amended** research-cited to the В§796 dive (today&rsquo;s Bredenberg eLife 2026 read вҶ’ tonight&rsquo;s build). **#1 concept-novelty NOT claimed** вҖ” 1078 pre-owns memory-replay; the honest advance is the off-Canvas2D, input-free, self-demoing, DREAM-pole re-approach on the empty SVG lane. **diversity:** `picked=[SVG-native OUTPUT (off Canvas2D & off the recent WebGPU-compute/three.js/WebGL2/CSS run; jury-endorsed empty lane) В· memory-captureвҶ’top-down-replay-recombination TECHNIQUE В· no-input self-running-arc INPUT (non-touch/keyboard/camera/mic) В· Wake-Sleep dream-replay VIBE (the thin DREAM pole, not a 3rd cosmic-ambient)]` вҖ” clears every live jury hard-ban on all four axes, rests the just-used WebGPU-compute substrate, and re-injects the thin DREAM pole. **Safety:** all luminance change is slow drift (breathing < 0.15 Hz, hue ~0.06 Hz), no strobe / no alpha-band flicker; dream intensity via recombination density + blur, never flashing; `prefersReducedMotion` slows motion + damps the melt; peak brightness sub-white. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` SVG + Web Audio; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites; project-wide `npx tsc --noEmit` = **0 errors** + `npx eslint src/app/dream/1792-replay-svg --max-warnings 0` = **exit 0**; authoritative `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **exit 0**, `/dream/1792-replay-svg` in BOTH route manifests + `page.js` emitted, no `1794`/`1796` leaked. (Plain `npm run build` still dies at "Collecting page data" on the documented **EMFILE 4096-fd hard cap** the pristine baseline shares вҖ” Vercel has the headroom вҶ’ deploy unaffected.) **NOT eye-verified for feel** (headless container): live SVG-filter render performance (a full-viewport `feDisplacementMap` can be GPU-heavy on some browsers) + whether the wakeвҶ’dreamвҶ’wake reads as intended want Karel&rsquo;s browser; a `DynamicsCompressor` on the audio master is a trivial next-cycle polish. Two more substrates explored вҖ” banked **вӯҗвӯҗ `1794-replay-feedback`** (three.js feedback + frozen memory-texture replay вҖ” the lush GPU render, ship-ready, resurrect on a GPU cycle) + **вӯҗ `1796-replay-ringbuffer`** (WebGL2 6-frame episodic memory ring-buffer, check `uRing[6]` on picky drivers) вҖ” to IDEAS В§796 (both built to demoable + eslint-clean this session, backed up to scratchpad `banked-796/`, then `rm -rf`&apos;d per the non-winner rule). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1792-replay-svg/README.md`

### [1786-dissolve-boundless](/dream/1786-dissolve-boundless) В· psychedelic / **slow your breath and a tight luminous sphere of ~524,000 GPU particles вҖ” "the ego" вҖ” unravels into a boundless, all-filling violet glow (drug-free ego-dissolution / meditative boundlessness); movement or loud sound snaps the boundary back and it re-coheres (COSMIC-AMBIENT pole; NOT an instrument, NOT a JI drone, NOT Canvas2D, NOT raw-WebGL2, NOT a raymarched SDF)** В· **MIC-BREATH / STILLNESS (RMS low-band вҶ’ cohesion driver 1вҶ’0 on held stillness, snaps back fast on movement; analyser ONLY, never to output) + deterministic ~46 s ghost-breath fallback when no mic** / **WebGPU COMPUTE вҖ” a WGSL `@compute` step over a ping-ponged pair of 524,288-particle f32 storage buffers (position+velocity vec4 each): a `cohesion`-scaled spring toward a shared sphere shell r0 vs a `(1вҲ’cohesion)`-scaled curl-flow diffusion + outward drift with a toroidal box-wrap, drawn as instanced additive soft-disc billboards; shared Shepard drift + JI drone bank widen/detune as cohesion falls** В· cycle 795 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-16) В· demoable В· `state: ego-dissolution / meditative boundlessness В· pole: cosmic-ambient`
**The boundary of "you" is a slider, and your breath moves it.** Winner of a **WIDE** 3-substrate fire (three unrelated off-Canvas2D directions on the thin cosmic-ambient pole вҖ” WebGPU-compute ego-dissolution / SVG-filter aurora / audio-forward HRTF sound-bath), executing jury-2026-07-15 provocation **#3** (force a **WebGPU-compute** piece, off the banned Canvas2D 7Г— monoculture вҖ” the substrate is still near-0Г— as the *primary* renderer) + **#2** (return to the psychedelic PRIMARY DIRECTION at scale on the OTHER pole вҖ” cosmic-ambient / meditative is thin, and the lab has visualized dissolution states only via raymarched SDF/void [1762-nde-void, 1041-nde-tunnel], **never as a live particle field**). **How it works вҖ” substrate:** a WGSL compute shader steps ~524k particles each frame, reading one pos/vel storage-buffer pair and writing the other (real ping-pong, not a texture animation). The one field each particle feels is a **cohesionвҶ”diffusion blend**: `cohesion` (0..1) scales an elastic spring toward a shared sphere-shell radius r0 (at cohesion=1 the swarm is a tight, additive-bloomed, white-hot sphere вҖ” "the ego"), while `(1вҲ’cohesion)` scales a cheap divergence-free **curl flow** plus a gentle outward drift (at cohesion=0 a toroidal box-wrap distributes the swarm into a vast, even, dim violet luminescence filling the frame вҖ” "boundless awareness"). Integration is in real per-second units with frame-rate-independent `v *= exp(вҲ’dragВ·dt)` damping and a clamped dt, so it's stable across framerates. **Input:** a smoothed low-band mic RMS drives a single `cohesion` scalar вҖ” held stillness/quiet slowly lowers it (you dissolve), any movement/loud sound snaps it back fast (you re-form); the mic feeds an `AnalyserNode` **only** (never `.connect()`-ed onward вҶ’ feedback impossible by construction). **Render:** each particle is a 6-vert instanced billboard with a soft `smoothstep` disc; **additive** blending does the aesthetic work for free вҖ” dense overlap in the coherent sphere whitens toward the core, the dispersed field reads as even glow вҖ” points grow softer/larger as cohesion drops for a smoother boundless wash. Cool violetвҶ’warm-white emission (palette lives inside the WGSL fragment string). **Audio:** the shared **Shepard** endless-drift + **just-intonation drone bank** summed to a master bus; `update(cohesion, dt)` couples sound to state вҖ” as cohesion falls the drone's drive rises (filter opens, detune widens) and the Shepard drift brightens (the felt "widening" of the boundary), pulling back on re-coherence. **Auto-demo:** no mic вҶ’ a deterministic ~46 s **ghost breath** (`0.5+0.5В·cos`) drives the same cohesion cycle so the headless 06:30 box dissolves + sounds on its own, never blank/silent; a `text-destructive` note surfaces the mic denial but never stops the piece. **Degrade:** no-WebGPU (`navigator.gpu` absent / no adapter / device lost) throws a typed `WebGPUUnsupportedError` the page catches вҶ’ an on-brand notice + a lightweight CSS/DOM glow-bloom fallback breathing on the same cohesion signal, audio still running. **Safety:** meditative by slow luminance drift only вҖ” **no alpha-band flicker**; `prefers-reduced-motion` honored; brightness/emission kept sub-white by the additive falloff. **Named refs (README):** **Nour, Evans, Nutt & Carhart-Harris, "Ego-Dissolution Inventory (EDI)"** (*Frontiers in Human Neuroscience*, 2016) вҖ” the dissolution of the felt selfвҶ”world boundary this literally stages В· **MilliГЁre / Letheby** on drug-free ego-dissolution phenomenology. **Ambition вҖ” honest 3/5:** **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (mic-breath/stillness detector + WebGPU-compute cohesionвҶ”diffusion sim + instanced additive render + Shepard/drone audio bed coupled to state = 4) + **#3** the named refs + rare-technique (WebGPU-compute as the *primary* substrate, the jury's forced lane) + **#5-amended** research-cited to the В§795 dive (the mature WebGPU-compute-agent-sim substrate aimed *inward* at ego-dissolution вҶ’ today's research вҶ’ tonight's build). **#1 NOT claimed** вҖ” WebGPU compute + particle fields are individually owned; the fresh axis is the never-built **combination** (ego-dissolution as a cohesionвҶ”diffusion phase transition on a live 524k-particle GPU field вҖ” grep-fresh; the lab only did dissolution via raymarched SDF/void), per the ~1786-folder saturation posture. **#5 strict <14-day NOT claimed** вҖ” 31st straight dry (jury-retired-in-practice; amended "fresh, current-year, on-concept" standard followed). **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D OUTPUT(jury 7Г—) В· raw-WebGL2-as-sole OUTPUT(В§785) В· WebGPU-compute 3Г— back-to-back(1740/1758/1766, now rested since 1766) В· physical-model-instrument + self-writing-score TECHNIQUE(jury) В· touch/pointer-drag + keyboard-as-instrument INPUT(jury) В· camera INPUT(just used 1784) В· DMT-intense-ONLY VIBE(on-watch)]`; `picked=[WebGPU-compute OUTPUT (off-Canvas2D & off-raw-WebGL2, the jury's forced lane, rested 3 cycles) В· cohesionвҶ”diffusion-particle-phase-transition TECHNIQUE (not instrument/theory/SDF, first-in-lab combination) В· mic-breath/stillness INPUT (not touch/keyboard/camera) В· ego-dissolution/meditative-boundless VIBE (the thin cosmic-ambient pole, not DMT-intense)]` вҖ” clears every live jury hard-ban on all four axes and fills the thin cosmic-ambient pole. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` WebGPU + Web Audio; zero new npm deps вҖ” WebGPU is native). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites (already on-brand вҖ” semantic-token chrome, violet sole accent, no `font-serif`/raw `text-white`/`rounded-2xl`; art colors live inside WGSL strings only); project-wide `npx tsc --noEmit` = **0 errors** + `npx eslint src/app/dream/1786-dissolve-boundless --max-warnings 0` = **exit 0**; authoritative `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **completed**, `/dream/1786-dissolve-boundless` in BOTH route manifests + `page.js` emitted, no `1788`/`1790` leaked. (The plain `npm run build` still dies at "Collecting page data" on the documented **EMFILE 4096-fd hard cap** вҖ” un-raisable, the pristine baseline shares it, Vercel has the headroom вҶ’ deploy unaffected.) **NOT eye/mic-verified for feel** (headless container вҖ” no display/GPU/mic): live WGSL compilation + whether the sphereвҶ’boundless dissolution reads as genuinely *breath-coupled* and awe-inducing (emission brightness + RMS thresholds were tuned by eye) wants Karel's Chrome + a real mic; the ghost breath guarantees never-blank/silent and exercises the identical stillnessвҶ’cohesionвҶ’simвҶ’renderвҶ’audio path. Two more substrates explored вҖ” banked **вӯҗвӯҗ `1788-aurora-veil`** (animated **SVG-filter** aurora вҖ” feTurbulenceвҶ’feDisplacementMapвҶ’feColorMatrix, the "try SVG instead of Canvas2D" the jury named, near-absent substrate) + **вӯҗ `1790-inner-bath`** (audio-forward HRTF eyes-closed **sound bath** testing the empty screen-bias lane) to IDEAS В§795 (both built to demoable + eslint-clean this session, backed up to scratchpad `banked-795/`, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule; resurrect вүҘ1792). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1786-dissolve-boundless/README.md`

### [1758-boundless-wave](/dream/1758-boundless-wave) В· psychedelic / **breathe toward your mic and a real GPU 2D wave-equation solver вҖ” the one every WebGPU water/cloth demo uses for REALISM вҖ” is pointed at its opposite: a boundless, edge-dissolving Chladni standing-wave field with no object, no center, no scale (formless-jhДҒna ДҒkДҒsДҒnaГұcДҒyatana, drug-free) (COSMIC-AMBIENT/meditative pole; NOT an instrument, NOT a harmony engine, NOT a JI drone, NOT Canvas2D, NOT raw-WebGL2)** В· **MIC-BREATH (RMS low-band вҶ’ smoothed drive amplitude; analyser ONLY, never to output) + deterministic ~0.08 Hz ghost-breath fallback** / **WebGPU COMPUTE вҖ” a WGSL finite-difference PDE solver `u_next = 2u вҲ’ u_prev + cВІвҲҮВІu` over a 512ВІ ping-ponged f32 storage-buffer grid (reflective Neumann edges, damping 0.9985, cВІ=0.24), rendered `|u|`вҶ’dim-violet ramp clamped вүӨ0.7; inharmonic breath-swelled pad вҶ’ void reverb** В· cycle 789 В· DEEP-winner (2026-07-15) В· demoable В· `state: formless-boundless / ДҒkДҒsДҒnaГұcДҒyatana В· pole: cosmic-ambient/meditative`
