**The GPU wave-solver, made anti-realist: not water, but boundless space.** Winner of a **DEEP** 3-substrate fire (ONE concept вҖ” *ДҖKДҖSA / boundless space: every edge, center and scale dissolved into one continuous standing-wave medium* вҖ” attacked via WebGPU-compute wave-equation PDE / three.js volumetric raymarch / three.js analytic Chladni plate), cashing the вӯҗвӯҗ top-banked `1756-boundless` (В§788) on the **cosmic-ambient/meditative pole the jury named thin**, and executing jury-2026-07-15 provocation **#2** (return to psychedelic at scale on the OTHER pole, cash a banked altered-states piece) + **#3** (force a WebGPU-compute piece, off the banned Canvas2D). **How it works вҖ” substrate:** a WGSL **compute** shader integrates the discretized 2D wave equation over a 512Г—512 grid of f32 amplitudes, ping-ponging three GPU storage buffers (u_prev, u_curr вҶ’ u_next); the Laplacian is a 5-point stencil, light damping (Г—0.9985) bleeds energy so the field settles to a calm equilibrium instead of running away, and **reflective (Neumann) edges** via clamped neighbour indexing fold every ripple back вҖ” that interference is what makes the standing-wave **Chladli figure** form. cВІ=0.24 keeps the Courant number well under the 0.5 stability wall (hardcoded, never derived from a clock); the step runs 2 sub-steps/frame for crisp propagation. **Input:** a smoothed low-band mic RMS envelope becomes the drive amplitude of a slow, wide radial Gaussian excitation injected at a few fixed off-centre sites (a separate FORCE compute pass); louder/steadier breath fills the field toward a shimmering equilibrium, silence lets it decay toward a faint breathing ground вҖ” never fully flat. The mic feeds an `AnalyserNode` ONLY (never `.connect()`-ed onward вҶ’ feedback impossible by construction). **Render:** a render pass maps `|u|` to a dimвҶ’bright violet ramp, antinodes peaking ~0.53 (comfortably under the вүӨ0.7 clamp вҖ” no white-out), nodal lines reading as dark violet filaments, full-viewport and boundless (no frame). **Audio:** a soft pad of detuned + slightly **INHARMONIC** partial voices (ratios just off the harmonic series вҶ’ the sustained chord shimmers/beats instead of locking вҖ” **not** the consonant-JI drone the jury banned) brightens/swells as field-energy fills вҶ’ shared `createVoidReverb` вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` вҶ’ gain 0.15. **Auto-demo:** with NO mic (headless 06:30 box, no display/speakers) a deterministic ~0.08 Hz **ghost breath** over the integer frame counter drives the same field, so the piece is alive + audible unattended; a mic denial surfaces a `text-destructive` note but never stops the piece. **Degrade:** no-WebGPU вҶ’ an on-brand notice + a DOM radial glow breathing on the same field-energy signal, audio still running. **Safety:** brightness hard-clamped вүӨ0.7 in the shader, only a slow ~0.06 Hz luminance drift (well below any photosensitive band), `prefers-reduced-motion` slows the stir + flattens the drift вҖ” **no strobe**. **Named refs (README):** *ДҒkДҒsДҒnaГұcДҒyatana* вҖ” the formless jhДҒna "sphere of boundless/infinite space" (Buddhist Abhidhamma) В· **Ernst Chladni (1787)** вҖ” cymatics / nodal figures on a driven plate, which the reflective-boundary wave equation reproduces literally В· **d'Alembert** вҖ” the 2D wave equation being integrated. **Ambition вҖ” honest 4/5:** **#1** first real-time wave-equation **PDE solver** in the lab (grep-verified; 1740-breath-nebula was curl-noise *advection*, not a PDE grid solve вҖ” a genuinely new algorithm on the WebGPU-compute substrate) + **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (mic-analysis + WebGPU compute PDE + instanced render + inharmonic audio bed = 4) + **#3** the named refs + rare-technique (WebGPU-compute, jury's forced lane, still near-0Г— across ~744 protos); research-cited to the В§789 dive (the anti-realist inversion of the now-mature GPU wave-solver вҶ’ today's research вҶ’ tonight's build). **#5 NOT claimed** вҖ” jury-retired-in-practice (4th jury). **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D OUTPUT(jury 7Г—) В· raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT(В§785 4Г—) В· physical-model-instrument + self-writing-score TECHNIQUE(jury 4Г—+4Г—) В· touch/pointer-drag INPUT(jury 5Г—) В· keyboard-as-instrument INPUT(on-watch 5Г—) В· DMT-intense-only VIBE(on-watch)]`; `picked=[WebGPU-compute OUTPUT (off-Canvas2D & off-raw-WebGL2, the jury's forced lane) В· wave-equation-PDE-solver TECHNIQUE (not instrument/theory, first-in-lab) В· mic-breath-RMS-excite INPUT (not touch/keyboard) В· meditative-boundless/cosmic-ambient VIBE (the thin pole, not DMT-intense)]` вҖ” clears every jury hard-ban on all four axes and fills the thin cosmic-ambient/meditative pole. **Love-signal:** squarely inside Karel's loved gentle-boundless-field cluster (`84-wave-fluid`, `130-tsl-particle-compute`, `243-spectral-cloud`, `267-spectral-drift`, `107-ocean-presence` all вқӨ). **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` WebGPU + Web Audio; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites; determinism grep clean (state path = integer frame counter + fixed-seed mulberry32; only `ctx.currentTime` for scheduling); project-wide `npx tsc --noEmit` = **0 errors** + `npx eslint src/app/dream/1758-boundless-wave --max-warnings 0` = **exit 0**; the plain `npm run build` passes webpack-compile + TypeScript + ESLint then dies at "Collecting page data" on the documented **EMFILE 4096-fd hard cap** (un-raisable; the pristine baseline shares it; Vercel has the headroom вҶ’ deploy unaffected). **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless вҖ” no display/speakers/GPU): live WGSL shader compilation + whether the Chladni interference reads as genuinely boundless-and-breath-coupled wants Karel's Chrome + a real mic; the ghost breath guarantees never-blank/silent and exercises the identical breathвҶ’FORCEвҶ’STEPвҶ’renderвҶ’audio path. Two more substrates explored вҖ” banked вӯҗвӯҗ`1760-boundless-drift` (three.js volumetric raymarch, tilt-steered) + вӯҗ`1762-boundless-plate` (three.js analytic Chladni plate under a log-polar exp-warp) to IDEAS В§789 (resurrect вүҘ1764). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1758-boundless-wave/README.md`

### [1722-breath-nimbus](/dream/1722-breath-nimbus) В· psychedelic / **breathe into your mic and a nimbus of 60,000 luminous motes GATHERS toward you on the inhale and DISPERSES to a boundless veil on the exhale вҖ” the lab's first breath-BIOFEEDBACK field, rewarding slow ~0.1 Hz coherent breathing (COSMIC-AMBIENT/meditative pole; NOT an instrument, NOT a harmony engine, NOT a JI drone, NOT cosmic-starfield, NOT three.js)** В· **MIC-BREATH (RMS вҶ’ adaptive-envelope вҶ’ breath-phase + period + coherence estimator; analyser ONLY, never to output) вҖ” under-rep non-keyboard input with real agency** / **raw WebGL2 additive point-sprite nimbus (60k motes on analytic curl-noise + breath radial force + coherence ring-spring; Canvas2D 4k fallback), inharmonic breath-swelled 4-osc pad** В· cycle 783 В· DEEP-winner (2026-07-15) В· demoable В· `state: meditative Oceanic-Boundlessness / coherence В· pole: cosmic-ambient`
**The screen breathes with your lungs вҖ” and rewards you for slowing down.** Winner of a **DEEP** 3-renderer fire (ONE concept вҖ” *a breath-biofeedback boundless field* вҖ” attacked via WebGL2 radial-bloom mist / 60k-mote nimbus / Canvas2D caustic-mandala), the **COSMIC-AMBIENT counterweight** to the recent INTENSE run (1700 DMT-bloom + 1714 tesseract), cashing the вӯҗвӯҗ top-banked `1712-breath-void` (В§782) вҖ” jury-2026-07-14 provocation **#3** (cash the banked cycle-2) + criterion **#4** (multi-cycle follow-through). **How it works вҖ” input:** `getUserMedia({audio})` вҶ’ `MediaStreamSource.connect(analyser)` and **nothing else** (the analyser is read-only, never `.connect()`-ed onward, so the mic can never reach `ctx.destination` вҖ” feedback is impossible by construction). Each frame reads the analyser's time-domain RMS through a slow smoother + a self-calibrating adaptive envelope (rolling min/max) вҶ’ normalized breath-amplitude; a derivative estimates **phase** (inhale rising / exhale falling), peak-to-peak gives **period/bpm**, and a **coherence** score = Gaussian proximity of the period to ~10 s (0.1 Hz вүҲ 6 breaths/min) Г— breath-to-breath steadiness. **Visual:** 60,000 motes (seeded once by a fixed-seed `mulberry32` вҖ” never `Math.random`) live on an analytic **curl-noise** (divergence-free) flow field; a breath-driven radial force pulls them toward center on inhale (condensation, a self drawing inward) and pushes them out on exhale (dispersal to boundlessness); peak inhale scatters them to a boundary-dissolving veil that fills the frame. High coherence tightens a **ring-spring** into a calm phase-locked cloud; erratic breathing keeps it turbulent and diffuse. Rendered as raw-WebGL2 `gl.POINTS` with additive blending + a soft Gaussian falloff, violetвҶ’gold radial mote color (palette lives inside the point-sprite shader). **Audio:** a sparse, deliberately **INHARMONIC** 4-oscillator pad (non-integer ratios 1.0/1.503/2.017/2.711 вҶ’ gentle beating, **not** the consonant-JI drone the 2026-07-14 jury banned) whose amplitude swells on inhale / recedes on exhale following the **same** breath-phase driving the motes вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` вҶ’ master 0.12 вҶ’ shared `createVoidReverb`. **Auto-demo:** the rAF loop starts on mount driven by a deterministic synthetic breath `0.5+0.5В·sin(frame/60В·2ПҖВ·0.1)` (a perfect ~6/min breath) so the headless 06:30 box **gathers/disperses + sounds on its own** вҖ” never blank/silent; a "Breathe for me (demo)" button runs the ghost with audio; no-WebGL2 degrades to a Canvas2D 4k-mote fallback. **Safety:** meditative by slow luminance drift only вҖ” **never flicker**; honors `prefers-reduced-motion`. **Named refs (README):** **"Breathing Space: Spatial Mapping of Breath & Cardiac Biofeedback for Coherence Training"** (Proc. 1st Intl. Conf. HCI in the Alps, 2026 вҖ” the coherence-via-~0.1 Hz-resonance-breathing + particle-breath finding this directly implements) В· **HeartMath** resonance-frequency-breathing coherence В· **Bridson et al. *Curl-Noise for Procedural Fluid Flow*** (SIGGRAPH 2007) В· **Refik Anadol** point-cloud data-mist. **Ambition вҖ” honest 2вҖ“3/5:** **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (mic-breath input + breath-phase estimator + coherence tracker + curl-noise particle advection/render + inharmonic breath-swelled bed = 5) + **#3** the named refs; research-cited to the В§783 coherence-training dive (path (a) implements this cycle's research hook + (b) cashes the В§782 вӯҗвӯҗ bank). **#1 NOT claimed** вҖ” mic and particle fields are owned; the fresh axis is the **combination** (the lab's first closed breath-**biofeedback** loop вҖ” phase entrainment + coherence reward), per the saturation posture. **#5 NOT claimed** вҖ” 25th straight <14-day dry (retirement re-escalated). **diversity:** `banned=[keyboard-PLAYED INPUT(4Г—) В· zero-input/watch-only В· JI-consonant-drone BED В· orbital-gravity В· cosmic-STARFIELD palette В· (on-watch) three.js OUTPUT + instrument-DSP + harmony-engine TECHNIQUE(3Г—)]`; `picked=[mic-BREATH biofeedback INPUT (under-rep, non-keyboard, real agency) В· breath-phase+coherence+curl-noise-nimbus TECHNIQUE (NOT instrument DSP/harmony/JI drone) В· raw-WebGL2 point-sprite OUTPUT (NOT three.js) В· warm-violet-gold luminous-boundless PALETTE (NOT starfield)]` вҖ” clears every hard ban + both instrument/harmony on-watch flags on all four axes AND re-balances the pole to COSMIC-AMBIENT. **Love-signal:** squarely inside Karel's most-loved boundless-particle-field cluster (`262-aurora-particle`, `321-spectral-flight`, `130-tsl-particle-compute`, `267-spectral-drift`, `1450-supershape-bloom` all вқӨ). **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` WebGL2 + Web Audio; no server/route/secret/network; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites; determinism grep clean (state path = integer frame counter + fixed-seed mulberry32; only `ctx.currentTime` for scheduling); mic verified analyser-only (no `analyser.connect` anywhere); authoritative `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `/dream/1722-breath-nimbus` in BOTH route manifests + `page.js` emitted, no `1720`/`1724` leaked. **NOT eye/mic-verified for feel** (headless container вҖ” no display, no mic): whether the gather/disperse reads as genuinely *breath-coupled* vs a generic particle wash, and whether the coherence reward feels earned, wants Karel's Chrome + a real mic; the ghost guarantees never-blank/silent and exercises the identical breathвҶ’forceвҶ’renderвҶ’audio path. **Honest knocks:** breath-phase from raw mic RMS is heuristic вҖ” it needs a few breaths to self-calibrate and a noisy room / shallow breathing can confuse the inhale/exhale derivative; and this is the **4th consecutive raw-GPU-render piece** (1700/1708/1714/1722) вҖ” three.js (the actual on-watch flag) is dodged but the raw-WebGL2 render lane is now a mild watch, which the вӯҗвӯҗ-banked Canvas2D `1724` is the deliberate correction for. Winner of a psychedelic **DEEP** fire; banked **вӯҗвӯҗ `1724-breath-membrane`** (Canvas2D caustic-mandala breath-biofeedback whose N-fold radial symmetry *rises with coherence* вҖ” the render-diversity resurrect that breaks the raw-GPU streak; de-selected only because the 140ВІ-upscaled Canvas2D caustics read lower-fidelity headless than 60k GPU motes) + **вӯҗ `1720-breath-bloom`** (WebGL2 fbm radial-bloom Ganzfeld mist, the purest/gentlest boundless field + direct `1712` lineage; de-selected as the subtlest visual, hardest to read headless) вҶ’ IDEAS В§783 (both fully built + determinism-clean this session, backed up to scratchpad `banked-783/`, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule; resurrect вүҘ1726). ### [1714-tesseract-melt](/dream/1714-tesseract-melt) В· psychedelic / **tilt your phone to steer a real 4-dimensional tesseract melting through hyperspace вҖ” a DMT "more axes than physical reality allows" breakthrough (INTENSE pole; NOT an instrument, NOT a harmony engine, NOT a JI drone, NOT cosmic-starfield, NOT three.js)** В· **DEVICE-TILT `deviceorientation` (beta/gamma вҶ’ the XW/YW 4D rotation-*hyperplane* rates) + pointer-drag desktop fallback + iOS `requestPermission` + always-on deterministic ghost auto-rotation вҖ” fresh non-keyboard non-pointer non-camera input** / **raw WebGL2 4D-vertex/projection pipeline (16 verts/32 edges, six-plane 4D rotation, 4DвҶ’3DвҶ’2D double perspective divide), additive edge-glow frag with thin-film iridescence + chromatic aberration + N-fold kaleidoscope + Reinhard tone-map; 9-partial inharmonic bank coupled to the 4D rotation angle (no JI drone)** В· cycle 782 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-15) В· demoable В· `state: DMT-breakthrough-hyperdimensional В· pole: intense`
**Tilt into a fourth dimension and watch the cube turn inside-out.** Winner of a **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (three unrelated non-keyboard altered-states pieces spanning mic / tilt / audio-file inputs and both poles), chosen as the most **headless-verifiable** of the three вҖ” its jeweled 4D melt is self-evident on any display via pure deterministic ghost rotation, needing no sensor, no dropped file, no headphones (the В§779/В§780 review-box lesson). The **INTENSE** counterweight to the recent cosmic-ambient run (1708 cathedral + banked voids). **How it works вҖ” visual:** genuine four-dimensional geometry, *not* a spinning 3D cube and *not* three.js. The 16 tesseract vertices `(Вұ1,Вұ1,Вұ1,Вұ1)` (32 edges вҖ” two verts share an edge iff they differ in exactly one coord) are rotated in 4D across six independent planes `xy,xz,xw,yz,yw,zw`; the three **w-planes** (rotations *into* the 4th axis, which have no 3-D counterpart) are the animated + steerable ones, so projected edges **balloon and turn inside-out** ("the melt") instead of rigidly orbiting. Vertices are projected 4DвҶ’3D by a perspective divide `k4=1/(distWвҲ’w)` then 3DвҶ’2D by `k3=1/(distZвҲ’z)`; the rotated `w` also drives each edge's iridescent hue (hyper-depth вҶ’ color) and near/far `z` drives brightness. A fragment shader draws the 32 edges as an additive glow with **thin-film iridescence**, 3Г— **chromatic aberration** sampling, and a 6вҖ“8-fold **kaleidoscope** bloom (jeweled, ultra-saturated вҖ” palette lives inside the shader). **Input:** `deviceorientation` betaвҶ’XW rate, gammaвҶ’YW rate (tilt the *phone* to rotate through the 4th dimension); on desktop, pointer-drag maps to the same; with no input, a slow deterministic ghost auto-rotation always melts. **Audio:** a 9-partial **inharmonic** sine bank (stretched, seed-jittered ratios on a low root) whose per-partial **detune + gain track the summed w-rotation angle** вҖ” rotating through W audibly re-tunes the timbre; it beats/shimmers rather than resolving (deliberately **not** the consonant-JI drone the 2026-07-14 jury banned) вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` вҶ’ master 0.12 вҶ’ shared `createVoidReverb`. **Auto-demo:** with zero input the six angles are a pure function of an integer frame counter, so the headless 06:30 box is **never blank or silent**; no-WebGL2 degrades to a Canvas2D wireframe of the same rotating tesseract. **Safety:** INTENSE by saturation/detail/slow drift вҖ” **never flicker**; the only periodic luminance change is one soft ~0.4 Hz breath (floor 0.78) gated through `_shared/psych/safeFlicker` (вүӨ3 Hz, honors `prefers-reduced-motion`). **Named refs (README):** **H.S.M. Coxeter *Regular Polytopes*** (tesseract/8-cell projection lineage) В· **KlГјver** form constants В· **DMT** "more axes than physical reality allows" hyperdimensional-geometry phenomenology В· **thin-film iridescence**. **Ambition вҖ” honest 2вҖ“3/5:** **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (device-tilt input + 4D rotation/projection math + raw-WebGL2 additive-glow polytope render + iridescence/kaleidoscope shader + 4D-angle-coupled inharmonic audio = 5) + **#3** the named refs; research-cited to the В§782 audio-reactive-pipeline/saturation dive. **#1 NOT claimed** вҖ” 4D/tesseract is owned (1042-hyperspace-bloom / 1051-hand-hyperspace / 1196-fibration); the fresh axis is the **combination** (tilt-steered XW/YW-hyperplane melt + 4D-rotation-angle-coupled inharmonic audio + jeweled kaleidoscope), per the saturation finding. **#5 NOT claimed** вҖ” 24th straight <14-day dry (retirement re-escalated). **diversity:** `banned=[keyboard-PLAYED INPUT(4Г—) В· zero-input/watch-only В· JI-consonant-drone BED В· orbital-gravity В· cosmic-STARFIELD palette В· (on-watch) touch/pointer INPUT(3Г—) + three.js OUTPUT + instrument-DSP + harmony-engine TECHNIQUE(3Г—)]`; `picked=[device-tilt INPUT (fresh, non-keyboard non-pointer non-camera) В· 4D-polytope-projection + 4D-angle-coupled-inharmonic-audio TECHNIQUE В· raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT (NOT three.js) В· jeweled-neon-iridescent PALETTE (NOT starfield)]` вҖ” clears every hard ban AND all four on-watch flags on all four axes AND re-balances the pole toward INTENSE. **Love-signal:** squarely inside Karel's most-loved geometric-psychedelia cluster (`1482-face-mandala`, `1396-apophenia-field`, `1450-supershape-bloom`, `130-tsl-particle-compute` all вқӨ). **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` WebGL2 + Web Audio; no server/route/secret/network; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites; `eslint вҖҰ --max-warnings 0` = **0**; determinism grep clean (state path = integer frame counter + `Math.sin`/`cos`, fixed art randomness via hardcoded-seed mulberry32); authoritative `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `/dream/1714-tesseract-melt` in BOTH route manifests + `page.js` emitted, no `1712`/`1716` leaked. **NOT eye-verified for feel** (headless container вҖ” no display): whether the edges read as genuinely hyperdimensional (ballooning/inside-out) vs a spinning 3D cage wants Karel's Chrome; the ghost rotation guarantees never-blank/silent and exercises the identical 4DвҶ’renderвҶ’audio path. **Honest knocks:** a tesseract (32 edges) is more *legible* but less *overwhelmingly dense* than a 24-cell вҖ” intensity comes from kaleidoscope + saturation, not edge count; tilt integrates a *rate* so hard tilting winds up accumulated w-rotation and "home" isn't recoverable without releasing to ghost drift; **device-tilt only fires on mobile**, so on Karel's laptop the headline "tilt to steer 4D" is the pointer fallback + ghost (the phone is where it fully lands). Winner of a psychedelic **WIDE** fire; banked **вӯҗвӯҗ `1712-breath-void`** (mic-breath biofeedback boundless field вҖ” the field inhales/exhales *with you*, white-out boundary-dissolution at peak inhale; de-selected because the payoff isn't headless-verifiable вҖ” needs a mic-grant + slow breathing вҖ” and the meditative mist is the subtlest visual; verify with a real mic first) + **вӯҗ `1716-tracer-drift`** (LSD color-trails via WebGL2 ping-pong feedback on any dropped track + generative carrier; de-selected because the carrier's headless drive is smooth/less punchy and the real payoff needs a dropped file вҖ” and it's the natural home to finally wire Karel's real Path piano as carrier wave) вҶ’ IDEAS В§782 (both fully built + determinism-clean this session, backed up to scratchpad `banked-782/`, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule; resurrect вүҘ1718). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1714-tesseract-melt/README.md`

### [1708-lattice-cathedral](/dream/1708-lattice-cathedral) В· psychedelic / **fly first-person through an endless dark NDE/ketamine cathedral вҖ” a receding nave of luminous wireframe arches and rails built as REAL 3-D geometry (no three.js), where each landmark structure sings from its true 3-D position via HRTF spatial audio so sight and sound read one geometry** В· **POINTER-drag steers your gaze (yaw/pitch + inertia, auto re-center) over an always-on forward drift вҖ” non-keyboard, real first-person agency (escapes the persistent keyboard-PLAYED over-rep)** / **raw WebGL2 hand-built `perspective`Г—`lookAt` vertex pipeline, additive `gl.LINES` + point-glow bloom; 5 HRTF `PannerNode` beacons вҶ’ shared `createVoidReverb` cavern; sparse slightly-inharmonic pads (no JI drone)** В· cycle 781 В· DEEP-winner (2026-07-15) В· demoable В· `state: ketamine/NDE-void В· pole: cosmic-ambient`
**Fly forward, forever, through a vast dark cathedral of light.** Winner of a **DEEP** 3-approach fire on ONE concept вҖ” *"The Descent": a steerable first-person passage through an NDE/ketamine architectural VOID where every luminous structure pings from its true 3-D position via HRTF spatial audio* вҖ” resurrecting В§780's вӯҗвӯҗ top-banked `1702-void-descent` as the whole cycle's concept, and the **COSMIC-AMBIENT** counterweight to В§780's INTENSE DMT bloom (the mandate: cover the whole spectrum, don't camp on one pole). **How it works вҖ” visual:** genuine 3-D geometry, *not* a raymarched SDF and *not* three.js. Vertices for each structure are generated deterministically as `gl.LINES` pairs; a hand-built **`perspective`** matrix Г— a **`lookAt`** view matrix (camera position + a forward vector from yaw/pitch) multiply on the CPU into a view-projection that transforms every vertex in the vertex shader. An **endless nave** of semicircular portal arches plus continuous **floor / springer / ridge rails** is drawn at integer multiples of the bay spacing around the camera, so the corridor never ends and the rails converge on a vanishing point (the dominant depth cue). Five larger **landmark structures** are interspersed вҖ” a great double-arch, a ring-portal, a saddle-vault, a girder pylon, and a rose-gate. Additive blending blooms overlapping girders; a second `gl.POINTS` pass adds a soft joint glow (cheap fake bloom); edge color drifts violetвҶ’cool-neutral with depth into `exp(-depthВ·density)` black fog. **Audio (the research hook):** each of the 5 landmarks owns exactly one `PannerNode` (`panningModel="HRTF"`, `distanceModel="inverse"`) placed at its **true world coordinate every frame**, and the `AudioListener` position + orientation are set from the **same camera** the visuals use (feature-detecting `positionX`/`forwardX` AudioParams vs legacy `setPosition`/`setOrientation`). Because both the view matrix and the listener derive "right" from `cross(forward, up)`, **sight and sound read the identical geometry** вҖ” the arch you see on your right is heard on your right and a fly-through sweeps frontвҶ’back. Beacons are soft, slightly-**inharmonic** sustained pads (fundamentals 58.3/77.8/92.5/116.5/138.6 Hz, each with a slow breathing LFO) вҖ” a resonant void, deliberately **not** a consonant JI drone (the reflex the 2026-07-14 jury banned) вҶ’ long `createVoidReverb` cavern tail вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` вҶ’ master 0.12. **Auto-demo:** an immediate frame-counter ghost flight (forward drift + deterministic `Math.sin`-of-frame yaw/pitch sweep) means the headless 06:30 box is **never blank or silent**; WebGL2-absent degrades to an on-brand `text-destructive` notice while audio still runs. **Safety:** no strobe вҖ” the only luminance modulation is an opt-in вүӨ2.4 Hz drift gated through `_shared/psych/safeFlicker.ts` (honors `prefers-reduced-motion`). **Named refs (README):** van Lommel **NDE tunnel** phenomenology В· **ketamine k-hole** / "the void" В· **KlГјver** tunnel/spiral form-constant В· gothic-nave / **Sol-LeWitt**-lattice architecture В· **Web Audio `PannerNode` HRTF** (KEMAR) В· the 2026 spatial-audio surge (arXiv **2605.30940** streaming synchronized spatial audio; **HRTFformer** arXiv 2510.01891). **Ambition вҖ” honest 2вҖ“3/5:** **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (hand-built 3-D geometry + `perspective`/`lookAt` camera matrices + pointer-gaze steering + per-structure HRTF spatial audio + convolution-void reverb = 5) + **#3** the named refs above; research-cited to the В§780/В§781 spatial-audio dives. **#1 NOT claimed** вҖ” wireframe-3D / HRTF / raymarching are individually owned or stock; the fresh axis is the **combination** (a raw-WebGL2 3-D wireframe cathedral spatialized so sight+sound share one geometry вҖ” real 3-D *without* three.js), per the saturation finding. **#5 NOT claimed** вҖ” 23rd straight <14-day dry (freshest = HRTFformer ~9 mo; foundational-technique exception; #5 retirement re-escalated). **diversity:** `banned=[keyboard-PLAYED INPUT(4Г—) В· zero-input/watch-only В· JI-consonant-drone BED В· orbital-gravity В· cosmic-STARFIELD palette В· (on-watch) three.js OUTPUT + instrument-DSP + harmony-engine TECHNIQUE(3Г—)]`; `picked=[pointer-drag-STEER INPUT (non-keyboard, real agency) В· real-3D-wireframe-geometry + per-structure HRTF-spatial-audio TECHNIQUE В· raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT (NOT three.js) В· cold violet-neutral ARCHITECTURAL-VOID PALETTE (NOT cosmic-starfield)]` вҖ” clears every hard ban AND all three on-watch flags on all four axes AND re-balances the psychedelic pole. **Love-signal:** `1326-voice-cathedral` вқӨ (literally a cathedral) + the loved immersive-void cluster. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` WebGL2 + Web Audio; no server/route/secret/network; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites; `eslint вҖҰ --max-warnings 0` = **0**; determinism grep clean (state path = integer frame counter + fixed-seed mulberry32); authoritative `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `/dream/1708-lattice-cathedral` in BOTH route manifests + `page.js` emitted, no `1706`/`1710` leaked. **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless container вҖ” no display/speakers/headphones): whether the nave reads as a boundless NDE cathedral vs a generic wireframe corridor, and whether the HRTF spatialization lands on Karel's headphones, want his Chrome; the deterministic ghost flight guarantees never-blank/silent and exercises the identical cameraвҶ’geometryвҶ’renderвҶ’HRTF path. **Honest knock:** GL line width is ~1px so girder "heft" comes from additive overlap + the point-glow pass, not thick beams; beacon z-recycling can produce a faint audible swoop on the closest passes; generic KEMAR HRTF gives weak elevation cues (saddle-vault/rose-gate above you) so it leans on azimuth + distance + the visual (which keeps it legible on laptop stereo speakers). Winner of a psychedelic **DEEP** fire; banked **вӯҗвӯҗ `1706-void-descent`** (the raymarched-SDF approach вҖ” the original В§780 top-bank, 6 beacons + descending Shepard; de-selected because the SDF glow-field reads more uniform/abstract + is more owned by the lab than a raw 3-D vertex pipeline; verify on headphones first) + **вӯҗ `1710-tunnel-warp`** (the log-polar form-constant approach вҖ” exercises the mandate's "single biggest lever," cleanest one-source-of-truth eye+ear; de-selected for lowest surprise (closest to the owned 1344/1524 tunnels) + a sightвҶ”sound steering mismatch to fix first) вҶ’ IDEAS В§781 (both fully built + verified this session, backed up to scratchpad `banked-781/`, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule; resurrect вүҘ1712). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1708-lattice-cathedral/README.md`

### [1700-bloom-field](/dream/1700-bloom-field) В· psychedelic / **your bodily presence in front of the webcam opens a DMT-threshold *chrysanthemum* вҖ” a real on-GPU Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion field warped through the shared log-polar form-constant engine into an N-fold kaleidoscopic bloom; re-injects the psychedelic PRIMARY DIRECTION after the 770s instrument-lab drift (NOT an instrument, NOT a harmony engine, NOT a JI drone, NOT cosmic-starfield, NOT three.js)** В· **CAMERA presence = the exciter (downsampled 64Г—48 luminance frame-difference = motion energy = REBUS cortical-entropy; stillness lets the flower unfold slowly, movement blooms/reorganizes it faster) вҖ” real agency, non-keyboard (escapes the persistent keyboard-PLAYED over-rep)** / **raw WebGL2 ping-pong FBO вҖ” Gray-Scott RD вҶ’ inverse log-polar warp вҶ’ kaleidoscope, neon-jeweled palette + chromatic aberration; inharmonic additive audio (no JI drone)** В· cycle 780 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-15) В· demoable В· `state: DMT-threshold chrysanthemum В· pole: intense`
**Move in front of your webcam and a fractal flower blooms and reorganizes with you вҖ” hold still and it settles into a slow unfold, the way a DMT threshold opens.** Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer fire that deliberately turned the lab back toward its stated **psychedelic PRIMARY DIRECTION** (2026-06-28) after a long instrument-lab run (pluck/bow/blow + harmony engines) left altered-states under-represented. **How it works:** a genuine **Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion** simulation runs entirely on the GPU вҖ” two half-float textures (8-bit fallback) ping-ponged through a fragment shader (Du 0.16, Dv 0.08, feed/kill pushed toward the coral/mitosis regime), deterministically seeded (a centered blob + fixed spots, **no `Math.random`**) вҖ” the "breathing fractal." A display shader samples that field, applies the shared **`LOGPOLAR_GLSL` inverse log-polar warp** (`screenToCortex`) so the pattern reads as a radial chrysanthemum, then an **N-fold kaleidoscope** (fold count animates 6вҶ’12 as it "blooms"), colored through a jeweled violetвҶ’magentaвҶ’cyanвҶ’gold ramp with radial **chromatic aberration** + thin-film iridescence вҖ” the KlГјver/Bressloff-Cowan form-constant recipe (cortical stripes/hex under an `exp()` warp) applied to a living RD field. **The input is your body:** `getUserMedia({video})` вҶ’ a small offscreen canvas вҶ’ per-frame mean absolute luminance **frame-difference** = `motionEnergy` (no MediaPipe, no face model вҖ” just presence), which raises the RD feed/kill toward pattern-formation + injects noise + speeds the fold animation вҖ” the **entropic-brain / REBUS** mapping (more input вҶ’ higher cortical entropy вҶ’ faster reorganization). **Audio:** 7 stretched/inharmonic partials whose detune and spread **grow with motion** so the sound grits up as the bloom reorganizes вҖ” deliberately **not** a consonant just-intonation drone (the reflex the 2026-07-14 jury banned) вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor вҶ’ master 0.12. **Auto-demo:** with no camera, a deterministic frame-counter `Math.sin` breathing swell drives `motionEnergy` so the headless 06:30 box is **never blank or silent**; camera-denied degrades to an on-brand `text-destructive` notice while the ghost bloom keeps running. **Safety:** no strobe вҖ” slow luminance drift only; an **opt-in** "shimmer flicker" gates through `_shared/psych/safeFlicker.ts` (вүӨ3 Hz). **Named refs (README):** **Heinrich KlГјver** form constants В· **BressloffвҖ“Cowan (2001)** cortical pattern-formation / geometric hallucinations В· **Gray & Scott** reaction-diffusion В· **Carhart-Harris entropic-brain / REBUS**. **Ambition вҖ” honest 2вҖ“3/5:** **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (camera capture + luminance frame-diff + Gray-Scott RD sim + inverse-log-polar warp + N-fold kaleidoscope + inharmonic additive audio = 6) + **#3** the named refs above. **#1 NOT claimed** вҖ” RD + log-polar + kaleidoscope are all owned by the lab (the saturation finding); the fresh axis is the **combination** (camera-presence-as-REBUS-entropy driving RDвҶ’form-constant), not a new substrate. **#5 NOT claimed** вҖ” 22nd straight <14-day dry (this cycle's ~2-mo spatial-audio dive, arXiv 2605.30940, was wired into the *banked* `1702` instead; foundational-technique exception; #5 retirement re-escalated). **diversity:** `banned=[keyboard-PLAYED INPUT(4Г—) В· zero-input/watch-only В· JI-consonant-drone BED В· orbital-gravity В· cosmic-STARFIELD palette В· (on-watch) three.js OUTPUT + music-theory-engine TECHNIQUE(3Г—)]`; `picked=[camera-presence INPUT (non-keyboard, real agency) В· Gray-Scott-RD + inverse-log-polar-form-constant + kaleidoscope TECHNIQUE В· raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT (NOT three.js) В· neon-jeweled PALETTE (NOT cosmic-starfield)]` вҖ” clears every hard ban AND corrects the instrument-lab drift back to the psychedelic mandate. **Love-signal:** picked partly because Karel's loved cluster is overwhelmingly geometric-bloom/mandala/spectral psychedelia (1482-face-mandala, 1450-supershape-bloom, 1396-apophenia-field, 262-aurora-particle, 267/321-spectral, 1354-glyph-canon, 1326-voice-cathedral) вҖ” 1700 is squarely inside it. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` WebGL2 + Web Audio + Canvas; no server/route/secret/network; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites; `eslint вҖҰ --max-warnings 0` = **0**; determinism grep clean in the audio path; authoritative `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `/dream/1700-bloom-field` in BOTH route manifests + `page.js` (35.4 kB) emitted, no `1702`/`1704` leaked. **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless container вҖ” no display/speakers/webcam): whether the bloom reads as a genuine DMT-threshold chrysanthemum vs. a generic RD-kaleidoscope, whether the jeweled palette lands, and whether motionвҶ’reorganization feels causal want Karel's Chrome + webcam; the deterministic ghost breathing swell guarantees never-blank/silent and exercises the identical motionвҶ’RDвҶ’warpвҶ’renderвҶ’audio path. **Honest knock:** the audio "bloom intensity" is derived from motion + the breathing envelope rather than a true GPU readback of RD field energy, so sound tracks *presence* more than the exact on-screen pattern (a GPU-readback loudness bus is the obvious cycle-2); palette/aberration constants are hand-tuned by reasoning, not visual iteration. Winner of a psychedelic **WIDE** fire; banked **вӯҗвӯҗ `1702-void-descent`** (pointer-steered ketamine/NDE architectural void with **per-structure `PannerNode` HRTF spatial audio** вҖ” carries this cycle's spatial-audio research hook; de-selected only because its payoff needs headphones + is least headless-verifiable) + **вӯҗ `1704-drift-lattice`** (hypnagogic drift that gets **deeper the quieter/stiller your room is** вҖ” mic room-RMS drives depth *inversely*; the freshest interaction concept; de-selected as least visually ambitious) вҶ’ IDEAS В§780 (both fully built + verified this session, backed up to scratchpad `banked-780/`, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule; resurrect вүҘ1706). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1700-bloom-field/README.md`

### [1694-reed-column](/dream/1694-reed-column) В· adult / **breath-blown single-reed CLARINET physical model вҖ” a real self-oscillating 1-D digital-waveguide woodwind (McIntyre-Schumacher-Woodhouse 1983 reed law), completing the lab's physical-model triad pluckвҶ’bow[1692]вҶ’BLOW; NOT a JI-drone bed, NOT a harmony engine, NOT gravity, NOT cosmic** В· **mic BREATH = the exciter (RMS envelope = blowing pressure, NOT the pitch вҖ” the bore loop self-oscillates; SILENT below threshold, no drone) + pointer-x = bore length; deterministic ghost-breath auto-demo вҖ” real agency, under-rep MIC input (NOT keyboard-played the banned over-rep, NOT pointer-drag, NOT camera)** / **Canvas2D live standing-pressure-wave in the bore + breath-pressure meter + register readout вҖ” Blob-URL AudioWorklet reed DSP, NO three.js/WebGL, off-GPU** В· cycle 779 В· DEEP-winner (2026-07-15) В· demoable В· `state: breath-blown clarinet you play with your lungs В· pole: wind physical-model / live-performance (anti-JI-drone, silent-at-rest, off-GPU)`
**Blow into your laptop mic and it becomes a real clarinet вҖ” your actual breath is the exciter of a self-oscillating single-reed woodwind physical model, and it overblows to a *twelfth*, not an octave.** Winner of a DEEP 3-approach fire (single-reed clarinet В· air-jet flute В· lip-reed brass) completing the physical-model instrument triad: **pluck вҶ’ bow (`1692-friction-loom`) вҶ’ BLOW (this)**. **How it works:** a genuine **1-D digital waveguide** running per-sample in a Blob-URL `AudioWorklet` вҖ” the bore is a delay line terminated by a **sign-inverting lossy one-pole bell reflection** (a cylinder closed at the reed вҮ’ **odd harmonics** вҮ’ the hollow clarinet timbre + the signature overblow to the **3rd harmonic, a twelfth**) and by the **reed nonlinearity** at the mouthpiece: each sample forms the pressure difference across the reed `О”p = pBore вҲ’ pMouth`, looks it up in the STK/MSW **reed table** `r = clamp(offset + slopeВ·О”p, вҲ’1, 1)` (the reed *closes* as blowing pressure rises), and re-injects `pMouth + О”pВ·r` вҖ” the **pressure-controlled nonlinearity** that turns steady breath into a self-sustaining limit cycle. Pitch is the bore delay length, **not** the breath; below a pressure threshold the column is **silent** (no drone вҖ” jury #2 real agency); the overblow-to-a-twelfth is a hysteretic register-vent retune to 1/3 length. Bounded by construction (bell loss <1, clamped reed table, tanh-saturated output вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor вҶ’ master 0.12). **Numerically verified** in a Node harness before baking constants: silent below control-pressure ~0.35, self-oscillates ~202 Hz, overblows to ~604 Hz вҖ” a measured ratio **2.99, a true twelfth**. **Controller (non-keyboard):** PRIMARY = mic breath (`getUserMedia`вҶ’`AnalyserNode`вҶ’per-frame RMS envelope = `pMouth`; mic connects **only to the analyser, never to destination** вҖ” no howl); SECONDARY = pointer-x slides the bore length (quantized to a chalumeau pentatonic). **Auto-demo:** a deterministic **ghost breath** from a frame counter (`Math.sin`, never `Math.random`/`Date.now`/`performance.now` in the audio path) plays a tongued phrase вҖ” some notes pushed past the overblow threshold to sound the twelfth вҖ” so the headless 06:30 box is never blank/silent; live blow takes over, idle returns to the ghost; **mic-denied** degrades to an on-brand `text-destructive` notice while the ghost keeps playing. **The see=hear weld:** Canvas2D **live standing pressure wave in the bore** (antinode at reed, node at bell вҖ” the node count visibly *triples* on overblow, the real worklet buffer snapshot overlaid faintly), a breath-pressure meter with speak/blow thresholds marked, and a register readout (Chalumeau / ClarionВ·12th) вҖ” warm amber-reed palette inside the canvas only, violet the sole chrome accent. **Named refs (README):** McIntyre-Schumacher-Woodhouse *"On the oscillations of musical instruments"* JASA 1983 В· Perry R. Cook STK `Clarinet` В· Julius O. Smith III digital waveguides (CCRMA) В· **arXiv 2604.12878 *Four Decades of Digital Waveguides*** (Smith/VГӨlimГӨki/Reiss, 2026-04-14 вҖ” this cycle's research hook). **Ambition вҖ” honest 2вҖ“3/5:** **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (mic capture + breath-envelope + reed nonlinearity + cylindrical-bore waveguide + standing-wave viz = 5) + **#3** named refs above + **plausible #1** (a breath-mic-driven self-oscillating reed waveguide is grep-thin вҖ” the lab's flutes are envelope toys, 827 is a 2-D mesh). **#5 NOT claimed** вҖ” 21st straight <14-day dry (freshest = the April-2026 Smith retrospective at ~3 mo; digital waveguides are a 40-year foundation; #5 retirement re-escalated). **diversity:** `banned=[keyboard-PLAYED INPUT(5Г—, still) В· JI-consonant-drone BED В· zero-input/watch-only В· orbital-gravity В· cosmic palette В· (on-watch) three.js OUTPUT + music-theory-engine TECHNIQUE(3Г—)]`; `picked=[mic-BREATH INPUT (UNDER-rep, non-keyboard, real agency вҖ” you blow it) В· breath-driven self-oscillating wind-waveguide TECHNIQUE (NOT harmony engine, NOT JI drone, silent at rest) В· Canvas2D standing-wave OUTPUT (NOT three.js) В· amber-reed PALETTE (NOT cosmic)]` вҖ” clears every hard ban on all four axes; escapes the persistent keyboard over-rep via the under-rep mic. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + Canvas2D; no server/route/secret/network; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites (already on-brand); `eslint вҖҰ --max-warnings 0` = **0**; determinism grep clean in the audio path; authoritative `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `/dream/1694-reed-column` in BOTH route manifests + `page.js` emitted, no `1696`/`1698` leaked (grep=0). **NOT ear-verified for feel** (headless container вҖ” no speakers): whether the reed genuinely *sings* a stable clarinet tone vs. squeaks, and whether the overblow reads as musical, want Karel's Chrome; the deterministic ghost + verified numerics guarantee it's never blank/silent and exercise the identical breathвҶ’reedвҶ’boreвҶ’render path. **Honest knock:** the register vent is a *switched* retune approximation (the audible twelfth is faithful but doesn't emerge purely from bore acoustics), and the bore is integer-length (both registers ~1% sharp, intervals consistent). Winner of an adult **DEEP** fire; banked **вӯҗвӯҗ `1698-lip-buzz`** (lip-reed brass вҖ” the freshest interaction: breath=energy, pointer-y=lip-tension "lips up" harmonics 2вҖ“8 like a bugle; de-selected only as the least-verified) + **вӯҗ `1696-jet-flute`** (air-jet flute вҖ” most sophisticated worklet, breathy seeded-LCG chiff, octave overblow; de-selected as less surprising than the twelfth) вҶ’ IDEAS В§779 (both fully built + verified this session, backed up to scratchpad `banked-779/`, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1694-reed-column/README.md`

### [1692-friction-loom](/dream/1692-friction-loom) В· adult / **gestural bowed-string physical model вҖ” a real stick-slip friction (McIntyre-Schumacher-Woodhouse 1983) digital-waveguide bowed string, the scratchвҶ’singвҶ’over-pressure continuum a plucked/Karplus model can't give; grep-thin for the lab (NOT a JI-drone bed, NOT gravity, NOT cosmic)** В· **pointer-drag GESTURE = the bow (speed/force = bow velocity/pressure; sound exists only while dragging, silent at rest) + deterministic ghost-bow auto-demo вҖ” real agency, NOT keyboard-played (the banned over-rep), NOT tap-trigger, NOT mic** / **Canvas2D six-string loom with live Helmholtz-corner vibration + bow-force/speed readout вҖ” Blob-URL AudioWorklet friction DSP, NO three.js/WebGL, off-GPU** В· cycle 778 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-14) В· demoable В· `state: friction bowed-string you play with a gesture В· pole: gestural/live-performance, real stick-slip (not a pluck, not a drone)`

### [1676-tabla-loom](/dream/1676-tabla-loom) В· adult / **physically-modeled tabla + konnakol tala вҖ” the lab's FIRST non-Western rhythmic-cycle instrument (synthesized drum, NOT a sample; NOT a JI-consonant drone, NOT a pad, NOT gravity, NOT cosmic)** В· **keyboard/pad-PLAYED bols (home row AвҖ“K + вүҘ64px pads) over a live tala cycle you can jam over or solo В· deterministic ghost theka auto-demo вҖ” real agency, NOT zero-input/watch-only, NOT touch-drag, NOT mic** / **Canvas2D circular "tala wheel" rhythmic-necklace + synced konnakol theka strip (warm ochre/clay/ink, off-violet, off-cosmic) вҖ” NO three.js/WebGL/GPU** В· cycle 776 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-14) В· demoable В· `state: physical-model tabla / konnakol tala cycle В· pole: rhythm/percussion you play (anti-JI-drone, off-GPU, non-Western)`
**Play a synthesized Indian *tabla* through a spoken-rhythm *konnakol tala* cycle вҖ” the tala's structure (matras, sam, khali) visible as a turning necklace, the drum voices modeled not sampled.** Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer rhythm/tension fire (tabla В· ET-functional-harmony В· beatbox-groovebox), the **direct cash of the fresh 2026-07-14 jury's #1 note** вҖ” *"break the just-intonation consonance reflex (13 of 15 resolve to a pretty JI drone); force rhythm, grit, groove вҖ” a percussion/beat-driven piece."* Tabla is that piece, and it's **grep-0Г— across ~730 prototypes** (the lab's first tabla/first tala engine, first non-Western rhythmic structure). **How it works:** every *bol* is **modal/banded-waveguide percussion synthesis, no samples** вҖ” `modalStroke()` sums a bandpassed white-noise excitation burst (the membrane slap) with a bank of tuned decaying sine partials at per-bol inharmonic ratios (the resonant ring + pitch); roster `na`/`ta` (bright rim), `tin`/`tun` (open ringing), `ke` (dead slap), `ge` (the baya bass with the signature downward pitch-glide, `bendRatio 0.6`), and composites `dha = ge+na`, `dhin = ge+tin`. Master chain adds `tanh` soft-clip grit + high-shelf + compressor; a Sur slider retunes; the noise buffer is a seeded `mulberry32` (deterministic). **The tala engine** is a **lookahead scheduler** (25 ms `setInterval` pump placing bols on exact `AudioContext.currentTime` stamps вҖ” sample-accurate, not setInterval-timed audio) advancing a repeating cycle: ships **Teental (16, 4+4+4+4)**, **Keherwa (8)**, **Jhaptal (10)**, **Rupak (7)** with sam (emphatic beat 1) + khali (waved "empty") + vibhag accents. **PLAYED (jury #2 "no watch-only"):** home row A S D F G H J K + on-screen вүҘ64px pads fire bols instantly on gesture; an **auto-theka toggle** lets you jam over the machine's groove or turn it off and drum solo; Lay (tempo) + Sur (tuning) + tala picker are all live. **The see=hear weld:** a Canvas2D **circular tala wheel** (Toussaint's rhythmic-necklace framing) with matra nodes labelled by theka syllable, sam ringed, khali hollow, a sweeping radial playhead, per-strike resonant ripples, warm ochre/clay/ink palette; a synced theka strip below highlights the current matra. **Auto-demo:** the transport runs from mount on `performance.now()` (deterministic theka, no RNG) so the wheel is never blank at a cold 06:30 glance; on the first allowed `resume()` it hands the clock to audio and becomes audible; a clear **Play** CTA guarantees sound on the first user gesture; graceful `AudioContext`-unavailable notice. **Named refs (README):** Perry R. Cook's *PhISM/PhOLIES* + Essl & Cook banded-waveguide percussion synthesis В· the Hindustani/Carnatic **konnakol** vocal-percussion tradition + the **tala** system (Teental, Keherwa) В· Godfried Toussaint's rhythmic-necklace geometry (the wheel). **Ambition вҖ” honest 3/5:** **#1** first tabla physical-model + first tala engine (grep-0Г—, the sole never-used-technique hit this cycle) + **#3** named refs above + **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (modal-membrane synth + lookahead tala scheduler + konnakol theka/wheel render = 3). **#5 NOT claimed** вҖ” 18th straight <14-day dry (physical-modeling percussion + Euclidean/necklace rhythm are decades-foundational; the widened net this cycle confirms the freshest on-brief work вҖ” Factor8 *Constellations* Euclidean sequencer, ~8 wks вҖ” is still not <14d; re-escalating the recommendation to amend/retire #5's <14-day bar). **diversity:** `banned=[JI-consonant-drone AUDIO-BED(jury,7Г—) В· zero-input/watch-only(4Г—) В· orbital/n-body ENGINE В· cosmic palette]`; `picked=[keyboard/pad-PLAYED INPUT (agency; NOT zero-input, NOT touch-drag, NOT mic, NOT cosmic) В· Canvas2D tala-wheel OUTPUT (NOT three.js) В· modal-tabla + tala ENGINE (rhythm/percussion вҖ” NOT JI-consonant, NOT gravity) В· warm-ochre PALETTE В· pole rhythmic/played/non-Western]` вҖ” clears every hard ban and directly answers jury #1+#2. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + Canvas2D; no server/route/secret/network; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites (already on-brand вҖ” semantic-token chrome, violet the only accent; the ochre/clay lives only inside the canvas art); `eslint src/app/dream/1676-tabla-loom --max-warnings 0` = **0**; full `npm run build` compiled + type-checked + linted cleanly (all warnings pre-existing in unrelated `src/lib/*`) then hit the standing container **EMFILE** fd-ceiling at page-data collection (4096-fd cap, absent on Vercel вҖ” same wall as cycles 762/767/768/771вҖ“775); authoritative `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `/dream/1676-tabla-loom` present in BOTH route manifests + `page.js` emitted, no `1678`/`1680` leaked (grep=0). **NOT ear-verified for feel** (headless container вҖ” no speakers): whether the modal bols sound like genuinely resonant membrane percussion vs. thin blips, and whether the baya bend + `dha`/`dhin` composites land musically, want Karel's Chrome; the deterministic ghost + wheel guarantee it's never blank/silent and exercise the identical synthвҶ’render path. Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **вӯҗвӯҗ `1678-tension-cell`** (TOP ship-next вҖ” a 12-TET functional-harmony instrument that *modulates and BITES*: play roman numerals + tension chords V7/viiВ°7/V/V/N6/It+6 + cadence/modulation gestures, voiced in four-part voice-leading, a Lerdahl-inspired tension scalar driving a circle-of-fifths "tension web" + scrolling curve + timbre; numerically verified to bite вҖ” tonic 0.12вҶ’It+6 1.00, V7вҶ’I drops ~0.39; = the jury's "equal-tempered one that modulates and bites" verbatim, de-selected only vs tabla's higher ambition/surprise/palette-diversity) + **вӯҗ `1680-beat-forge`** (mic-beatbox groovebox вҖ” spectral-flux onset + centroid timbre-classify вҶ’ kick/snare/hat вҶ’ quantize to 16-step grid вҶ’ gritty synth-drum loop you layer/Euclid-fill; max agency but lowest ambition + mic-dependent payoff won't self-evidence headless) вҶ’ IDEAS В§776 (both fully built + verified this session, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1676-tabla-loom/README.md`

### [1664-bytemill](/dream/1664-bytemill) В· adult / **bytebeat вҖ” the lab's FIRST algorithmic-glitch instrument (music synthesized from a single bitwise formula; NOT a consonant JI drone, NOT a scale-index, NOT psychedelic)** В· **keyboard-PLAYED вҖ” you switch formulas, bend the t-rate, and mutate a live constant (real agency вҖ” NOT watch-only, NOT touch/pointer, NOT mic, NOT self-playing)** / **Canvas2D CRT oscilloscope + scrolling 8-bit bitfield (glowing green-on-black, off-violet) вҖ” NO three.js/WebGL/GPU** В· cycle 774 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-14) В· demoable В· `state: raw algorithmic grit В· pole: rhythm/dissonance you play (anti-JI, off-GPU)`
**Play raw 8-bit "bytebeat" вҖ” music computed directly from one bitwise formula of a running sample counter `t` вҖ” switching formulas and bending the math live while a CRT scope shows the waveform and a scrolling bitfield shows the actual bits that make the rhythm.** Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer fire (rhythm/grit night: bytebeat-glitch В· acid-303 В· real-piano beat-rack), and the **direct cash of the fresh 2026-07-14 jury's #1 note** вҖ” *"13 of 15 pieces resolve to a pretty consonant just-intonation drone; ban the JI bed for a week and force rhythm, grit, groove, or real dissonance вҖ” a noise/glitch instrument."* Bytebeat is that instrument: **grep-0Г— across 729 prototypes** (first in the lab), and the literal opposite of a clean tone вҖ” harsh, aliased, glitchy, inherently rhythmic. **How it works:** an **AudioWorkletProcessor authored as an inline string and loaded via a Blob URL** (fully self-contained, nothing served from `/public`) evaluates an integer expression like `t*((t>>12|t>>8)&k&t>>4)` or `(t*(t>>5|t>>8))>>(t>>16&31)` per tick, masks to a byte (`&255`), and maps to `-1..1`. The worklet steps `t` at an **authentic lo-fi 2вҖ“16 kHz t-rate independent of the AudioContext sample rate** вҖ” a fractional accumulator holds the last byte between ticks, and that sample-and-hold aliasing IS the bytebeat character. **The visitor PLAYS it (real agency вҖ” the jury's #2 note: "don't relapse into watch-only"):** keys **1вҖ“8** switch among 8 curated named formulas (sierpinski, hard glitch, вҖҰ); **arrows / `[` `]`** bend the t-rate (tempo+pitch); **`вҶ‘вҶ“` / `вҲ’=`** live-substitute a single numeric constant `k` inside the current formula (the visitor *mutates the sound* вҖ” each formula ships a `kDefault`/`kMin`/`kMax` + an on-screen hint like "bit-mask density"); **space** play/pause; every control mirrored as a touch button. **Safety by construction:** formulas come from a **fixed curated library** and `k` is coerced to an integer вҖ” `new Function` compiles only library expressions, the visitor can never inject code. **Auto-demo:** a deterministic ghost performance (driven off `audioContext.currentTime`, no RNG) cycles formulas + bends params on load so a cold 06:30 glance is never silent; any real keypress instantly takes over. **The see=hear weld:** Canvas2D **CRT oscilloscope** of the live waveform over a **scrolling bitfield** (each column = the 8 bits of a sample, LSB at bottom) with scanlines + persistence fade вҖ” you literally see the bit patterns that make the rhythm. **Audio safety chain:** worklet вҶ’ soft-clip `WaveShaper` вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` вҶ’ low master gain **0.11** вҶ’ destination (bytebeat can be brutally loud; grit is tamed before the speakers); no >3 Hz full-screen luminance flash; `prefers-reduced-motion` degrades the animation; full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel, node disconnect, context close, **Blob URL revoked**, keydown listener removed). **Named refs:** bytebeat discovered & named by **Viznut (Ville-Matias HeikkilГӨ), 2011** (*"Discovering the beauty of new-school algorithmic music"*) В· modern browser composers **bytebeat.cloud** / **dadabots ByteBeats.art**; research-chained to this cycle's В§774 dive (bytebeat + browser-acid, both anti-consonance). **Ambition вҖ” honest 3/5:** **#1** first bytebeat in the lab (grep-0Г— вҖ” the only candidate this cycle hitting a never-used technique) + **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (Blob-URL AudioWorklet bytebeat synth + live formula/constant/t-rate steering state + deterministic ghost performer + Canvas2D scope+bitfield render = 4) + **#3** named refs above. **#5 NOT claimed** вҖ” 17th straight <14-day dry (bytebeat is 2011-foundational; the *widened net* this cycle, done per the jury's own #5 instruction, confirms the freshest on-brief work is foundational technique being re-webified now вҖ” re-escalating the recommendation to formally amend/retire #5's <14-day bar). **diversity:** `banned=[JI-consonant-drone AUDIO-SPINE(13Г—) В· touch/pointer INPUT(6Г—) В· zero-input/watch-only(4Г—) В· orbital-gravity ENGINE В· cosmic palette В· three.js OUTPUT(on-watch)]`; `picked=[keyboard-PLAYED INPUT (agency; NOT touch/pointer, NOT zero-input, NOT mic, NOT cosmic) В· Canvas2D CRT scope/bitfield OUTPUT (NOT three.js) В· bytebeat-bitwise ENGINE (rhythm/grit/dissonance вҖ” NOT JI-consonant, NOT gravity) В· CRT-green off-violet PALETTE В· pole rhythmic/gritty/played]` вҖ” clears every hard ban and directly answers jury #1+#2. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + Canvas2D; no server/route/secret/network; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites (already on-brand вҖ” semantic tokens, violet the only chrome accent; green is inside the canvas art only); `eslint src/app/dream/1664-bytemill --max-warnings 0` = **0**; determinism grep clean in executable code; full `npm run build` compiled + linted cleanly (all warnings pre-existing in unrelated `src/lib/*`) then hit the standing container **EMFILE** fd-ceiling at page-data collection (4096-fd cap, absent on Vercel вҖ” same wall as many recent cycles); authoritative `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `/dream/1664-bytemill` present in BOTH route manifests, no `1666`/`1668` leaked (grep=0). **NOT ear-verified for feel** (headless container вҖ” no speakers): whether the 8 formulas + `k`-bending give a genuinely *musical* range rather than uniform harshness, and whether the CRT scope/bitfield reads well, want Karel's Chrome; the deterministic ghost + scope guarantee it's never blank/silent and exercise the identical synthвҶ’render path. Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **вӯҗвӯҗ `1666-acid-cell`** (TOP ship-next вҖ” a keyboard-played TB-303 acid groove sequencer: sawвҶ’resonant-lowpass squelch + accent/slide + soft-clip, driven by a generatively-mutating 16-step **12-TET** pattern that modulates its root key every 3rd mutation = the jury's "equal-tempered one that modulates and bites" verbatim; grooviest of the three, de-selected only vs bytebeat's higher surprise + sole #1-hit) + **вӯҗ `1668-breakrack`** (Karel's real Path piano onset-sliced into a played MPC beat-rack + 16-step sequencer + stutter-roll, with an OfflineAudioContext synthetic fallback; cashes the "use his music" directive + beat-cut/loop-station loves вҖ” de-selected because headless the real decode likely CORS-fails so the auto-demo shows the fallback not his piano, and MPC-chopping is the most-expected concept) вҶ’ IDEAS В§774 (both fully built + verified, backed up to scratchpad). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1664-bytemill/README.md`

### [1660-fugue-loom](/dream/1660-fugue-loom) В· adult / **counterpoint вҖ” the lab's FIRST real music-theory engine (a machine that composes a fugue; NOT a scale-drone, NOT a Markov melody, NOT psychedelic)** В· **autonomous self-composition (~90 s, self-plays on load; "New subject" re-seeds) вҖ” NOT mic/voice, NOT touch/pointer-drag, NOT keyboard-steer** / **self-writing SVG scrolling piano-roll score (three warm per-voice hues on dark, off-violet) вҖ” NO Canvas2D, NO three.js/WebGL, NO GPU render** В· cycle 773 В· DEEP-winner (2026-07-14) В· demoable В· `state: a three-voice fugue composing itself В· pole: architecture-you-can-see-and-hear (off-violet, off-GPU)`
**Watch a three-voice fugue compose ITSELF вҖ” the subject enters voice by voice, is answered a fifth up, returns inverted and in new keys, tightens into a stretto, and resolves over a pedal point вҖ” and hear the whole architecture unfold.** Winner of a DEEP 3-approach fire (ONE concept вҖ” *a machine that composes real counterpoint* вҖ” via strict species В· fugal architecture В· strict canon), and the lab's **first genuine music-theory engine** across ~725 prototypes: counterpoint/fugue/species-counterpoint were **header-core 0Г—** вҖ” the single most composerly idea for a pianist's lab had never been built, and it is the direct cash of the standing jury demand *"give the input a real musical idea; stop manufacturing the score."* **How it works:** from one integer seed, `composeFugue` builds a complete fugue in D minor as an **11-section form state machine** вҖ” Exposition (Voice I states the SUBJECT alone вҶ’ Voice II enters with a genuine **tonal ANSWER** at the fifth, its rising-fifth head *contracted to a fourth*, while Voice I plays the recurring **countersubject** вҶ’ Voice III enters with the subject in the bass) вҶ’ Episodes IвҖ“IV (modulating **sequences** built only from the subject's head fragment) вҶ’ Counter-exposition (bass-first re-voicing) вҶ’ Middle entries (subject in **relative major**, then **melodic INVERSION** mirrored about the tonic, then the **dominant** region) вҶ’ two rounds of **Stretto** (a voice re-enters with the subject *before* the previous statement finishes, gap tightening) вҶ’ **Pedal-point close** (bass sustains dominantвҶ’tonic under a final subject statement, resolving to a held D-minor triad). Work happens in **scale-degree space** so every transposition/answer/inversion stays in key by construction; `makeSubject`/`makeCountersubject` run once per seed and are **frozen**, so every later entry is literally that same shape transformed вҖ” the piece's **memory**, and why minute-3 is a development of minute-0 rather than a loop (the starved long-form-generative-with-state lane). A final voice-leading pass scans every voice pair for **parallel perfect fifths/octaves** and nudges the offending *free* note by a diatonic step (subject statements never altered). **The see=hear weld:** a self-writing **SVG scrolling piano-roll** вҖ” three warm per-voice hues, note blocks appearing exactly as they sound and scrolling under a "NOW" playhead, with **every SUBJECT entry outlined/labelled** so you watch the subject enter voice by voice, see the answer sit a fifth above, and see the stretto overlap; a live section label + timeline bar show where you are in the form. **Audio** (Web Audio, output-only, no mic): three independent detuned-oscillator voices with per-note ADSR + lowpass, look-ahead scheduling against `audioContext.currentTime`, master gain вүӨ **0.14** вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` вҶ’ destination + subtle delay; **autonomous self-play on load** (resume-on-gesture fallback for autoplay policy) so a cold 06:30 glance is never blank/silent; "New subject" advances the seed for a fresh fugue. **Deterministic:** seeded `mulberry32`; **no** `Math.random`/`Date.now`/`new Date` in executable code (grep-clean; engine tests confirm identical output per seed, 19 subject statements across 11 sections, 6/6 stretto overlap, 6/6 distinct subjects across the seed chain). **Named refs:** J.S. Bach *Die Kunst der Fuge* (BWV 1080) & *Das Wohltemperierte Klavier* В· J.J. Fux *Gradus ad Parnassum* (1725) В· G. Mazzola et al. three-voice counterpoint (arXiv 2606.01102, 2026); research-chained to this cycle's В§773 dive (Mazzola/Fux first-species + FuxCP). **Ambition вҖ” honest 3/5:** **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (fugal-form state machine + subject/answer/countersubject/inversion memory model + parallel-perfects voice-leading pass + polyphonic per-voice synth + self-writing SVG score = 5, coupled every frame) + **#3** named refs above + **#4** long-form stateful with real memory (a whole fugal arc, different at 0:30 vs 3:00) вҖ” **declared cycle-1 of a multi-cycle counterpoint line** (cycle-2: fold in the banked вӯҗвӯҗ`fux-machine`'s independently-verified species-counterpoint rule engine so the voices become genuinely species-lawful, not just parallel-perfects-nudged; cycle-3: seed the subject from Karel's real Path piano). **#1 NOT claimed** вҖ” the fresh weld is the *engine* (real fugal architecture), while individual pieces (canon, generative melody) have prior lab presence; still, counterpoint-as-core is grep-0Г—. **#5 NOT claimed** вҖ” 15th straight <14-day dry (this cycle's Mazzola find is June 2026 ~1 month, the freshest on-concept find in many cycles but not <14d). **diversity:** `banned=[three.js/WebGL GPU-render OUTPUT(7Г—) В· touch/pointer INPUT(4Г—) В· mic/voice INPUT В· Canvas2D-render В· voiceвҶ’JIвҶ’form-constant ENGINE В· cosmic-gravity ENGINE В· iridescent-violet+KlГјver PALETTE]`; `picked=[autonomous self-composition + "new subject" trigger INPUT (NOT touch-drag, NOT mic, NOT keyboard-steer) В· self-writing SVG piano-roll OUTPUT (off-GPU, off-Canvas2D) В· fugal-architecture counterpoint ENGINE (NOT gravity, NOT voiceвҶ’form-constant, NOT Markov) В· ink/sepia per-voice off-violet PALETTE В· pole contemplative/composerly]` вҖ” clears every hard ban AND breaks both the 7Г— GPU-render and 4Г— touch runs. **SAFETY:** no strobe вҖ” the only motion is the slow score scroll + a ~0.13 Hz glow pulse, well under 3 Hz; `prefers-reduced-motion` honored; full teardown (scheduler stop + rAF cancel + `audioContext.close()`) on unmount. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + SVG/DOM; no server/route/secret/network; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites (already on-brand вҖ” semantic tokens, violet the only accent); `eslint src/app/dream/1660-fugue-loom --max-warnings 0` = **0**; full `npm run build` compiled + linted cleanly (all warnings pre-existing in unrelated `src/lib/*`) then hit the standing container **EMFILE** fd-ceiling at page-data collection (4096-fd cap, absent on Vercel вҖ” same wall cycles 756/762/767/768/771/772); authoritative `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `/dream/1660-fugue-loom` present in BOTH route manifests, no `1658`/`1662` leaked (grep=0). **NOT ear/eye-verified for feel** (headless container вҖ” no display/speakers): whether the answer-at-the-fifth and the stretto overlap read as legibly *fugal* by ear, and whether the harmony (register-separation + parallel-perfects-nudge rather than full species verification вҖ” the builder's honest knock) sounds convincing vs merely correct-looking, want Karel's Chrome; autonomous playback + the highlighted score guarantee it's never blank/silent. Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-approach fire; banked **вӯҗвӯҗ `fux-machine`** (the strict species-counterpoint machine вҖ” a Fux D-dorian cantus firmus with an added voice through 1st & 2nd species, every interval labelled and **illegal parallels vetoed in red on screen**, independently verified **0 violations / 264 verticals**; the rigor/legibility win + the ideal cycle-2 to fold into this fugue) + **вӯҗ `canon-weaver`** (a strict imitative canon engine вҖ” one line constrained to stay consonant against its own delayed transposed echo, verified, rendered as an SVG thread-weave = the tightest see=hear weld; de-selected for smaller musical scope вҖ” a 16-beat perpetual loop) вҶ’ IDEAS В§773. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1660-fugue-loom/README.md`

### [1638-reel](/dream/1638-reel) В· adult / **cinematic narrative вҖ” an ALTERNATE journey-engine arc (NOT psychedelic, NOT cosmic-gravity, NOT embodied, NOT voice)** В· **autonomous long-form (~5.7 min self-playing film; Restart + per-act jump chips) вҖ” NOT mic, NOT camera, NOT keyboard-steer** / **three.js WebGL fragment-shader cinematic atmosphere (letterboxed slate/teal-shadow + gold-highlight, off-violet) вҖ” NO Canvas2D render** В· cycle 770 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-14) В· demoable В· `state: dramatic beat-sheet вҶ’ tension curve вҶ’ generative film score + graded image В· pole: cinematic (off-violet, off-cosmic, off-embodied)`
**Press Play and Resonance's journey engine tells a wordless CINEMATIC STORY instead of a psychedelic arc вҖ” a ~5.7-minute self-playing short film whose music and image both obey a classic dramatic beat sheet.** Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer fire (markets В· cinematic-arc В· physics-collision), and the first real answer to the design director's standing **directive #4** вҖ” "EDM build-and-drop, ritual, jazz-responsive, **cinematic narrative** as alternate arcs" to the product's fixed 6-phase psychedelic engine (a lane essentially unbuilt for months). **How it works:** a **beat-sheet state machine** (Freytag's Pyramid / Snyder's *Save the Cat*) walks seven acts вҖ” Setup вҶ’ Inciting Incident вҶ’ Rising Action вҶ’ Midpoint вҶ’ Climax вҶ’ Falling Action вҶ’ Resolution вҖ” each with a target tension, key/mode, tempo/density, and color grade; a smooth curve eases the tension between acts and `stateAt(t)` interpolates one **shared tension signal** that drives BOTH sound and image so they never disagree. **The score** (4 detuned pads + sub drone + look-ahead-scheduled recurring **motif**) travels A lydian вҶ’ C phrygian climax вҶ’ home to **A major**; tension drives detune/dissonance (a semitone cluster appears above 0.72), filter brightness, register, and motif density. **The image** is a three.js WebGL fragment-shader widescreen atmosphere (fbm fog, horizon glow, particulate light, slow filmic push, non-strobing grain) whose glow/turbulence/warp/grade bend off the same curve. **Memory / state (the anti-loop):** the motif (scale degrees `0 4 3 5 7 4 2`) is the piece's memory вҖ” stated plainly in Setup, returns **inverted an octave up** at the Climax, and finally **resolves on the tonic** in the Resolution, returning to the opening's home key; minute five is genuinely a different place than minute one. **Self-demonstrating unattended:** on the Play gesture it rolls start-to-finish autonomously (the best 06:30 self-demo вҖ” no camera, no live feed, no input needed); Web Audio built only on gesture, mastered through a `DynamicsCompressor` at gain `Math.min(0.14, peak)`, full teardown (rAF cancel + audio disconnect + three.js dispose + `ctx.close()`) on unmount; `prefers-reduced-motion` calms the camera to a slow drift; no-WebGL shows an on-brand notice while the score still walks the whole arc. **Deterministic:** seeded `mulberry32` (`SEED=0x1638`) for every generative choice, all timing from `audioContext.currentTime` deltas + a frame counter вҖ” **no** `Math.random`/`Date.now`/`new Date`, **no** Canvas2D (verified). **Named refs:** Gustav Freytag *Die Technik des Dramas* (1863) В· Blake Snyder *Save the Cat!* (2005); research-chained to this cycle's В§770 dive (AffectMachine-Pop arxiv 2506.08200 + the 2026 "long-form narrative coherence remains unsolved" finding). **Ambition вҖ” honest 3/5:** **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (beat-sheet state machine + shared tension-curve interpolator + generative score with returning/transformed motif + WebGL cinematic grade = 4, coupled every frame) + **#3** named refs above + **#4** cashes the design director's alternate-journey-arc directive (long-form stateful piece with real memory вҖ” the thinnest categorical lane). **#1 NOT claimed** вҖ” narrative/beat-sheet and generative film-score each have some prior lab mention; the fresh weld is the whole-arc one-curve audio+image cinematic engine, absent from the recent window. **#5 NOT claimed** вҖ” 19th straight <14-day dry; re-affirms retiring #5. **diversity:** `banned=[mic/voice-INPUT В· Canvas2D-OUTPUT В· voiceвҶ’JI-toneвҶ’form-constant ENGINE В· iridescent-violet+KlГјver PALETTE В· keyboard-steer WATCH В· cosmic-gravity/orbital ENGINE (recent 3Г—) В· embodied/pose INPUT (recent 2Г—)]`; `picked=[autonomous long-form INPUT В· three.js WebGL cinematic-shader OUTPUT В· dramatic-beat-sheetвҶ’tension-curve ENGINE (NOT gravity, NOT voiceвҶ’form-constant) В· cinematic slate/gold off-violet PALETTE В· pole cinematic (off-cosmic, off-embodied)]` вҖ” clears every hard ban AND both recent runs (cosmic-gravity, embodied). **SAFETY:** no strobe вҖ” slow filmic camera + non-strobing grain, all luminance drift well under 3 Hz; reduced-motion honored. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` three.js + Web Audio; no server/route/secret; zero new npm deps вҖ” `three` already a dependency). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites; `eslint src/app/dream/1638-reel --max-warnings 0` = **0**; authoritative full `npm run build` = **EXIT 0** (clean production build this cycle вҖ” EMFILE ceiling did not bite), `/dream/1638-reel` present as a static route (9.19 kB); no `1636`/`1640` leaked (grep=0). **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless container вҖ” no display/speakers): whether the act-to-act grade + motif transformation reads cinematically and whether the shader-as-atmosphere carries the "story" want Karel's Chrome; autonomous playback guarantees it's never blank/silent. Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **вӯҗвӯҗ `1636-ledger-organ`** (real-world-data вҖ” live Coinbase `matches` WebSocket вҶ’ a self-playing "market organ", DOM/CSS ticker, deterministic replay-sim headless; now **4Г— banked** вҖ” de-selected AGAIN on brand-fit [a crypto terminal is furthest from Resonance's contemplative soul] but the data-sonification lane the jury flagged as 0Г—-shipped is now a standing "ship-it-or-retire" gap) + **вӯҗ `1640-marble-organ`** (physics вҖ” a 2D rigid-body collision organ Г  la Wintergatan's *Marble Machine*: marbles fall through ~50 tuned pegs, each strike flashes the peg + rings its exact JI pitch = the tightest see=hear weld; SVG, seeded auto-drip; de-selected as the least conceptually novel [a known trope] + the discrete-event axis the lab has shipped many times recently) вҶ’ IDEAS В§770. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1638-reel/README.md`

### [1630-string-loom](/dream/1630-string-loom) В· adult / **embodied вҖ” the WHOLE body as a string instrument, off the violet AND off the cosmic-gravity run (NOT psychedelic, NOT gravity, NOT voice)** В· **camera / MediaPipe PoseLandmarker full-body tracking (nose В· wrists В· elbows В· knees В· ankles cross the strings) + seeded ghost-skeleton auto-demo вҖ” NOT mic, NOT voice, NOT touch, NOT keyboard** / **three.js WebGL 3D string field with standing-wave vertex shiver (warm bronze/amber/bone on warm charcoal) вҖ” NO Canvas2D render, NO WebGPU** В· cycle 769 В· DEEP-winner (2026-07-14) В· demoable В· `state: embodied full-body Karplus-Strong string instrument В· pole: embodied / warm-daylight (off-violet, off-cosmic)`
**Stand in front of your webcam and your whole body becomes the bridge of a giant harp вҖ” sweep a wrist, elbow, knee or ankle across a hanging string and it plucks a real physically-modeled note you watch shiver and hear decay.** Winner of a 3-approach embodied DEEP fire, and the head-on answer to the **2026-07-13 jury's #1 / oldest / still-unmet provocation** вҖ” "get a *body* in the room" (in that window: exactly 1 camera, 1 tilt, 0 pose/body-tracking). Chosen over two siblings вҖ” a precise two-hand вӯҗвӯҗ`1632-hand-lyre` + an ML-free optical-flow вӯҗ`1634-flow-choir` (both banked В§769) вҖ” because it puts the *whole body* in the room (not just hands) and keeps the lab's **proven discrete-causal see=hear weld** (a limb crossing a named string plucks + shivers that exact pitch) rather than an aggregate drone. **How it works:** CDN-loaded **MediaPipe PoseLandmarker** (33 landmarks, VIDEO mode, no npm dep) tracks ~8 joints into a field of **15 vertically-hanging strings** tuned to a **just-intonation pentatonic over 3 octaves** (spatial pitch вҖ” the column you cross is the note, never a centroidвҶ’pitch reflex); a column-crossing with sufficient velocity plucks that string. Audio is **genuine Karplus-Strong** вҖ” per-string delay line of length `sampleRate/freq`, seeded noise-burst excitation, two-tap averaging lowpass feedback, one buffer pre-rendered per string and re-triggered through a brightness lowpass into a compressor + feedback-delay ring at master **0.13**. The **see=hear weld:** a single string index drives BOTH the 3D standing-wave vertex shiver (`sin(ПҖu)В·exp(вҲ’t/П„)`, higher strings shimmering faster) and the KS pluck of that same fixed frequency вҖ” the string you watch wobble is exactly the pitch you hear. **Never blank/silent, self-demonstrating unattended:** with no camera / permission denied / MediaPipe load failure it shows a `text-rose-300` notice AND auto-runs a **deterministic (`mulberry32`) ghost skeleton** вҖ” five joints sweeping the field on Lissajous paths through the *identical* crossingвҶ’pluck code path, so it plays itself at a 06:30 glance with no webcam. Warm bronzeвҶ’amberвҶ’bone strings on warm charcoal; full teardown (stream/AudioContext/RAF/three.js dispose); `prefers-reduced-motion` damps the shiver + demo. **Named refs:** Karplus & Strong (1983) plucked-string algorithm В· Michel Waisvisz *The Hands* (1984) В· the 2026 *Fluid Body* embodied-sonification research (Springer). **Ambition вҖ” honest 3/5:** **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (MediaPipe pose-tracking + spatial crossing/velocity pluck-detection + Karplus-Strong string DSP + three.js 3D standing-wave render = 4, coupled each frame) + **#3** named refs above + **#4** declared cycle-1 of a multi-cycle embodied-instrument line (README declares a cycle-2: two-hand fingertip precision from 1632 + damping/harmonics; a cycle-3 spatial venue/pose-duet mode). **#1 NOT claimed** вҖ” MediaPipe body-tracking (1590-body-mirror) and Karplus-Strong both appear in lab history; the fresh weld is the full-body-joints-as-bridge spatial string instrument, absent from the recent window. **#5 NOT claimed** вҖ” 18th straight <14-day dry; re-affirms retiring #5. **diversity:** `banned=[mic/voice-INPUT В· Canvas2D-OUTPUT В· voiceвҶ’JI-toneвҶ’form-constant ENGINE В· iridescent-violet+KlГјver PALETTE В· keyboard-steer WATCH В· cosmic-gravity/orbital-resonance ENGINE (recent 3Г—)]`; `picked=[camera / full-body pose-tracking INPUT (only 1 camera in last window) В· three.js/WebGL 3D-render OUTPUT В· Karplus-Strong embodied-string ENGINE (NOT gravity, NOT voiceвҶ’form-constant) В· warm bronze/amber/bone off-violet PALETTE В· pole embodied (off-cosmic)]` вҖ” clears every hard ban AND breaks the cosmic-gravity run. **SAFETY:** no strobe вҖ” motion is smooth joint drift + string shiver (well under 3 Hz); `prefers-reduced-motion` honored. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` three.js + Web Audio + a runtime CDN import of MediaPipe; no server/route/secret; zero new npm deps вҖ” `three` already a dependency; MediaPipe is a runtime browser CDN load, not a build dep). **Validation:** `eslint src/app/dream/1630-string-loom --max-warnings 0` = **0**; authoritative winner-only `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = compiled (warnings only, in unrelated pre-existing `1085-lightning-organ`), past "Collecting page data" + "Finalizing page optimization", `page.js` (37.7 kB) emitted + `"/dream/1630-string-loom"` in BOTH `routes-manifest.json` and `app-path-routes-manifest.json`; plain `npm run build` lints+typechecks clean (0 error references to 1630); no `1632`/`1634` leaked (grep=0). **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless container вҖ” no display/speakers/webcam): whether the joint-crossing threshold/velocity feels right against live PoseLandmarker jitter, and whether the string-shiver reads legibly, want Karel's Chrome; the seeded ghost skeleton guarantees it's never blank/silent and exercises the identical crossingвҶ’pluck path. Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-approach embodied fire (ONE concept вҖ” *the body as a resonant string instrument* вҖ” via full-body-pose / two-hand-fingertip / ML-free-optical-flow); banked **вӯҗвӯҗ `1632-hand-lyre`** (TOP embodied ship-next вҖ” the precise two-hand ten-finger version: pinch-to-pluck at fingertip resolution, hand-height=register, spread=timbre; de-selected only for being hands-only vs the whole body the jury asked for) + **вӯҗ `1634-flow-choir`** (the ML-free **optical-flow вҶ’ modal-resonator-bank** choir вҖ” no CDN/ML dep, most portable + tightest structural weld [one `ring[24]` vector drives both shader glow and band gain]; de-selected on the aggregate "watch-a-field-hear-it-hum" weld the lab consistently banks vs discrete events + proximity to existing camera pieces) вҶ’ IDEAS В§769. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1630-string-loom/README.md`
