### [1628-chladni-choir](/dream/1628-chladni-choir) В· adult / **physical-acoustics вҖ” cymatics, off the violet AND off the cosmic-gravity run (NOT psychedelic, NOT gravity)** В· **touch / drag to sweep the driving frequency (horizontal = mode, vertical = excitation) + seeded idle auto-sweep вҖ” NOT mic, NOT voice, NOT camera, NOT keyboard-steer** / **WebGL2 fragment-shader Chladni field + additive GL-points "sand" migrating to the nodal lines (sand-on-steel monochrome) вҖ” NO Canvas2D, NO three.js scene-graph** В· cycle 768 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-14) В· demoable В· `state: Chladni modal plate / bidirectional patternвҶ”interval sonification В· pole: physical-acoustics (off-violet, off-cosmic)`
**Drag across a brushed-steel plate and WATCH the sand collect on the silent nodal lines вҖ” the standing-wave figure you see IS the chord you hear, in both directions.** Tonight's WIDE fire deliberately broke the recent cosmic-gravity 3Г— run (1600/1608/1622) with a completely different physical grammar, seeded by a fresh paper: **arxiv 2605.09846 *ChladniSonify* (May 2026)**, a bidirectional Chladni-patternвҶ”frequency mapping grounded in KirchhoffвҖ“Love plate theory. A WebGL2 fragment shader renders `|f|` of the square-plate Chladni field (`cos(mПҖx)cos(nПҖy) вҲ’ cos(nПҖx)cos(mПҖy)` вҖ” bright antinodes, dark nodes) over brushed steel; ~6,500 warm-white "sand" grains each take a clamped, damped **Newton step down the analytic gradient toward the nearest field zero** (`О”p = вҲ’relaxВ·fВ·вҲҮf/|вҲҮf|ВІ`), so as the frequency sweeps the grains visibly **flow** from one nodal figure into the next rather than snapping вҖ” the money shot. **Bidirectional sonification:** the same Gaussian-weighted top modes drive both the field/sand AND an additive sine bank at `f = 55В·вҲҡ(mВІ+nВІ)` Hz (plate modal scaling), and the ratio of the two loudest partials is octave-folded to the nearest just interval and named on screen вҖ” the figure and the chord are one object. Drag horizontally to pick the mode, vertically to widen excitation (ring neighboring modes into a real interval); leave it alone and a seeded slow sweep keeps the plate singing and the sand reorganizing, so it's never blank at a 06:30 glance. Master 0.14 вҶ’ compressor; full WebGL/audio teardown; `prefers-reduced-motion` freezes the sweep. Named refs: Ernst Chladni 1787 В· KirchhoffвҖ“Love plate theory В· Hans Jenny (cymatics) В· arxiv 2605.09846. Honest 3/5 (#2 four subsystems: modal eigen-solver + particle sand-migration sim + additive modal synth + touch В· #3 named refs В· #5 recent research finding, honestly <60d not <14d). #1 NOT claimed вҖ” cymatics exists in the lab (165-cymatics, 1554-wavefield-organ); the fresh weld is the research-cited bidirectional modal plate, absent from the recent 15-window. Honest caveat (builder-flagged): the symmetric `(m,n)` terms + `вҲҡ(mВІ+nВІ)` scaling are the idealized-plate simplification (not a full KirchhoffвҖ“Love eigensolve), so a single dominant mode reads as "single mode" and only resolves to a named interval when excitation widens to ring neighbors. Not ear/eye-verified on Karel's hardware (headless container).

### [1622-tidal-canon](/dream/1622-tidal-canon) В· adult / **cosmic-ambient (the galaxy you can hear вҖ” NOT the violet form-constant)** В· **touch / pointer (drag to fling a conductor off-lock В· tap to drop a gravity well the swarm streams toward) + autonomous self-player вҖ” NOT mic, NOT voice, NOT keyboard** / **three.js WebGL `Points`/`ShaderMaterial` procedural-glow point cloud (deep-space navy, warm gold/amber conductors) вҖ” NO Canvas2D render surface, NO WebGPU dependency** В· cycle 767 В· DEEP-winner (2026-07-14) В· demoable В· `state: large-N gravity / discrete orbital-resonance + aggregate tidal wash В· pole: cosmic-ambient`
**A few massive bodies orbit under real gravity and sculpt a swarm of thousands of stars вҖ” hear the instant two of them lock into a pure just-intonation dyad, over the aggregate wash of the swarm being tidally stretched.** The declared **cycle-2 of `1608-orbital-consonance`** (В§765), taken DEEP: the large-N *galaxy* the lab kept banking. Winner of a 3-approach GPU fire вҖ” over two **aggregate-drone** siblings (a WebGPU-compute `1618-gravity-well` вӯҗвӯҗ + a pure-WebGL2 GPGPU `1620-spiral-choir` вӯҗ, both banked В§767) вҖ” precisely because it is the only one that **keeps 1608's discrete, causal see=hear event** (a system audibly *falling into* consonance, the lab's proven winning axis, which won 1608/1596/1576/1548) instead of a looser watched density-field. **How it works вҖ” the hybrid merge (few-body foreground over large-N backdrop):** 3вҖ“5 **conductor bodies** integrate under real mutual Newtonian gravity (velocity-Verlet, softened, momentum-zeroed), seeded near a Laplace-style 2:3:4 configuration so exact 3:2 / 4:3 / 2:1 period ratios lock from frame one; each pair's **orbital period** is read from its specific orbital energy (unbound-safe) and tested against small integers (2:1, 3:2, 4:3, 5:3) вҖ” inside tolerance the pair is a **resonance lock**. A large-N **one-way test-particle swarm** (9k stars) feels the conductors' gravity but does not act back (cheap, unconditionally stable, never blows up), so the conductors tidally stretch it into visible streaming tails; escapees recycle back into the disk to keep the cloud alive. **The two-layer weld:** the instant a pair locks, a clean **just-intonation dyad** rings (bell pair, snapped to the exact ratio, named live on screen вҖ” "3:2 В· perfect fifth") sitting high above a low A1 wash, so the discrete event cuts through; underneath, a soft JI pad tracks the **swarm's dispersion / how tidally sheared it is** (tightly bound = calm warm bed, violently sheared = brighter agitated wash), with a ~breathing LFO so it evolves over minutes (long-form, not a loop). **Never blank/silent, self-demonstrating unattended:** the seeded resonant opening rings a fifth/fourth within seconds of "Begin the canon" with the swarm already streaming, zero user input. Drag flings a conductor off-lock (it beats against neighbours, then re-settles); tap drops a gravity well. **Named refs (README):** Kepler *Harmonices Mundi* (1619) + third law В· the **Laplace resonance** (IoвҖ“EuropaвҖ“Ganymede 4:2:1) В· Barnes & Hut (1986) В· just-intonation ratios В· tidal-tail galaxy dynamics. **Ambition вҖ” honest 3/5:** **#4** declared cycle-2 multi-cycle continuation of 1608 (README declares a cycle-3: conductor mergers, per-lock harmonic modulation, WebGPU large-N backdrop) + **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (conductor N-body sim + one-way large-N swarm + Kepler period-ratio lock detector + two-layer JI audio [discrete dyads + aggregate wash] + touch fling/drop = 5, coupled each frame) + **#3** named refs above. **#1 "narrow"** вҖ” the fresh part is welding *discrete measured resonance-lock events* to a *large-N aggregate wash*; N-body render + JI synth each have prior art, so NOT a hard grep-0Г—. **#5 NOT claimed** вҖ” 16th straight <14-day dry; **re-affirms retiring #5** as structurally unreachable. **diversity:** `banned=[mic/voice-INPUT В· Canvas2D-OUTPUT В· voiceвҶ’JI-toneвҶ’form-constant ENGINE В· iridescent-violet+KlГјver PALETTE В· keyboard-steer WATCH]` (per JURY 2026-07-13); `picked=[touch-fling INPUT В· three.js/WebGL GPU-render OUTPUT (1Г— in last-10, not back-to-back вҖ” 766 was SVG) В· large-N-gravity/orbital-resonance ENGINE (NOT the banned voiceвҶ’JIвҶ’form-constant spine) В· deep-space gold-on-navy off-violet PALETTE В· pole cosmic-ambient]` вҖ” clears every hard ban. **SAFETY:** no strobe вҖ” motion is smooth orbital drift + streaming particles + a single soft onset per lock (well under 3 Hz); `prefers-reduced-motion` honored. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` three.js + Web Audio; no server/network/secret; zero new npm deps вҖ” `three` already a dependency). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites; `eslint src/app/dream/1622-tidal-canon --max-warnings 0` = **0** (one fix pass вҖ” `prefer-const` Г—4 auto-fixed + 2 unused destructured vars removed); authoritative `npm run build` compiles + lints + typechecks the winner clean (no error references 1622; every warning pre-existing in unrelated `src/lib/*`), reaching page-data collection before the standing ~700-route **EMFILE** fd-ceiling (`ulimit -Hn`=4096, unraisable infra, absent on Vercel); confirmed no `1618`/`1620` leaked into the build. **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless container вҖ” no display/speakers): whether the wobbleвҶ’snapped-dyad reads as "a binary falling into consonance" against the wash, whether the tidal tails are legible at a 06:30 phone glance, and the discrete-vs-aggregate balance want Karel's Chrome; the seeded 2:3:4 opening guarantees it's never blank/silent and rings a lock within seconds. Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-approach GPU fire (ONE concept вҖ” *the galaxy you can hear* вҖ” via WebGPU-compute / GPGPU-texture / hybrid); banked **вӯҗвӯҗ `1618-gravity-well`** (TOP ship-next вҖ” the "massively bigger" **WebGPU-compute** 16k-star large-N galaxy, love-aligned with `130-tsl-particle-compute`вқӨпёҸ/`262-aurora-particle`вқӨпёҸ; de-selected on its aggregate-drone weld being looser than 1622's discrete events + WebGPU unverifiable headless) + **вӯҗ `1620-spiral-choir`** (the pure-WebGL2 **GPGPU texture-ping-pong** ~65k-star galaxy singing its angular-momentum spectrum; arguably the freshest technique, grep-0Г— GPGPU-texture-N-body; de-selected on also being an aggregate weld) вҶ’ IDEAS В§767. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1622-tidal-canon/README.md`

### [1616-changing-lines](/dream/1616-changing-lines) В· adult / **non-Western musical structure вҖ” the I-Ching, off the violet (NOT psychedelic, NOT cosmic)** В· **touch (cast a reading) + autonomous self-player вҖ” NOT mic, NOT voice, NOT keyboard** / **SVG ink-on-rice-paper hexagram (warm bone/charcoal/cinnabar) вҖ” NO Canvas2D, NO WebGL** В· cycle 766 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-13) В· demoable В· `state: I-Ching changing-lines Markov canon В· pole: contemplative / ritual (off-violet)`
**A hexagram cast as a six-note guqin chord вҖ” its changing lines pull the music forward through the King Wen sequence as a slow, self-evolving canon.** WIDE-fire winner over two divergent siblings (a markets WebSocket "ledger organ" вӯҗвӯҗ + a MediaPipe hands "air-loom" вӯҗ, both banked В§766). Seeded from tonight's research (arxiv 2605.20386 *Music of Changing Lines*, May 2026 вҖ” the first honest #5 research-freshness land in 15 cycles). **How it works:** a deterministic yarrow-stalk cast (`mulberry32`+`performance.now()`, the classic old-yin 1/16 В· young-yang 5/16 В· young-yin 7/16 В· old-yang 3/16 probabilities) draws six lines, some **old/changing**; each line is a voice in a six-note **gong pentatonic** chord (е®«е•Ҷи§’еҫөзҫҪ, bottom line lowest), yang lines bright & present, yin lines hollow with a slow amplitude gap. The changing lines carry the present hexagram to its **transformed** hexagram (flip the changing lines); over an 8вҖ“20 s glide the ink morphs (SVG center-bridge opening/closing) while the audio bends + re-plucks those voices, then the transformed hexagram becomes the new present and fresh changing lines are cast on it вҖ” so the piece **walks the 64 hexagrams forever** as a generative canon, never a hard loop. Fully deterministic, self-playing from Start (best unattended review fit вҖ” never blank, never silent, no camera/network). King Wen number + Chinese name + pinyin + English gloss + trigram pair shown; "Cast a reading" re-casts on demand. Master 0.14 вҶ’ compressor + deterministic temple-hall convolution reverb; `ctx.close()` teardown; `prefers-reduced-motion` honored. Named refs: the I-Ching (Book of Changes) В· King Wen sequence В· guqin/gong-pentatonic tuning В· arxiv 2605.20386. Ambition honest 3/5 (#2 four subsystems: hexagram model + changing-lines Markov walk + 6-voice guqin synth + SVG morph render В· #3 named refs В· #5 recent research finding, honestly <60d). [design notes](/dream/1616-changing-lines) В· `src/app/dream/1616-changing-lines/`

### [1608-orbital-consonance](/dream/1608-orbital-consonance) В· adult / **cosmic-ambient (music of the spheres вҖ” NOT the violet form-constant)** В· **touch / pointer (fling a star into orbit В· tap to drop a body В· drag one onto another to merge вҖ” NOT mic, NOT voice, NOT keyboard)** / **three.js WebGL point-cloud + orbit-bond overlay (deep-space navy/obsidian, warm gold/amber/white stars) вҖ” NO Canvas2D render (2D used only to bake a glow sprite)** В· cycle 765 В· DEEP-winner (2026-07-13) В· demoable В· `state: gravity-becomes-harmony / orbital-resonance sonification В· pole: cosmic-ambient`
**Fling stars into orbit and hear two of them lock into a perfect fifth вҖ” gravity, made audible as consonance.** A DEEP return to the **GPU-render surface the lab had abandoned for 15 straight cycles** (the 2026-07-13 jury: "0 real GPU-render pieces in the last 15"), on ONE massively-bigger concept вҖ” *the music of the spheres, made real* вҖ” chosen over two sibling gravitational approaches. **How it works:** a dominant central star anchors a handful of lighter companions orbiting under **softened Newtonian gravity** (`rВІ+ОөВІ`, velocity-Verlet at 1/120 s substeps; the companions also perturb each other so orbits precess and drift вҖ” lock configurations genuinely form, hold and dissolve over minutes, not a loop). Each body's **orbital period** is estimated every frame from its specific orbital energy (vis-viva вҶ’ semi-major axis вҶ’ **Kepler's third law** `T=2ПҖвҲҡ(aВі/Ој)`); for every pair the ratio `longerT/shorterT` is tested against small integers **2:1, 3:2, 4:3, 5:3, 5:4, 6:5** and, inside ~2.4 % tolerance, the pair is **locked**. **The weld (the lab's proven winning axis вҖ” a discrete, unmistakable see=hear event):** pitch is tied to orbital frequency, so a 3:2 *period* ratio **is** a 3:2 *frequency* ratio вҖ” a real perfect fifth. Three always-on audio layers вҖ” a low bed drone (central tonic), one faint voice per body (the raw sound of gravity, audibly wobbling), and **lock dyads snapped to the exact just ratio** that bloom in on lock вҖ” mean the moment a binary falls into resonance you *hear the wobble resolve into a pure dyad* while a bright **resonance-bond line + a `text-base` "3:2 В· perfect fifth" label** mark it and the bodies brighten toward white. **Never blank/silent, self-demonstrating unattended:** the seeded opening (deterministic `mulberry32`) is a **Laplace-style 2:3:4 chain** (companion periods exactly 2:3:4, uniform eccentricity so ratios are preserved), so pressing Start rings a fifth, fourth and octave within seconds with zero user action. **Named refs (README):** Kepler *Harmonices Mundi* (1619) + the third law В· the **Laplace resonance** of IoвҖ“EuropaвҖ“Ganymede (4:2:1) В· Barnes & Hut (1986) N-body context В· just-intonation integer ratios. **Ambition вҖ” honest 3/5:** **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (velocity-Verlet gravity sim + period-ratio resonance detector + 3-layer JI audio engine + touch fling/drop/merge = 4, coupled each frame) + **#3** named refs above + **#4** multi-cycle / evolving (mutual perturbation drifts locks over minutes; README declares a cycle-2). **#1 "narrow but real"** вҖ” N-body toys and JI synths each have prior art; the fresh part is the tight weld of **measured orbital-period ratios driving live JI locks** with the raw voices audibly resolving (not claimed as a hard grep-0Г—). **#5 NOT claimed** вҖ” 14th straight <14-day dry; **re-affirms retiring #5** as structurally unreachable. **diversity:** `banned=[mic/voice-INPUT В· Canvas2D-OUTPUT В· voiceвҶ’JI-toneвҶ’form-constant ENGINE В· iridescent-violet+KlГјver PALETTE В· keyboard-steer WATCH]` (per JURY 2026-07-13); `picked=[touch INPUT В· three.js/WebGL GPU-render OUTPUT (the surface absent 15Г—) В· N-body-gravity/orbital-resonance ENGINE (NOT the banned voiceвҶ’JIвҶ’form-constant spine) В· deep-space gold-on-navy off-violet PALETTE В· pole cosmic-ambient]` вҖ” clears every hard ban AND re-injects the abandoned GPU surface. **SAFETY:** no strobe вҖ” motion is smooth orbital drift + a single soft onset pulse per lock (well under 3 Hz); `prefers-reduced-motion` honored. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` three.js + Web Audio; no server/network/secret; zero new npm deps вҖ” `three` already a dependency). **Validation:** `eslint src/app/dream/1608-orbital-consonance --max-warnings 0` = **0**; authoritative winner-only `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `"/dream/1608-orbital-consonance"` in BOTH `routes-manifest.json` and `app-path-routes-manifest.json` (plain `npm run build` lints+typechecks clean вҖ” no error references 1608 вҖ” but dies at "Collecting page data" on the standing ~700-route **EMFILE** fd-ceiling вҖ” infra, absent on Vercel); no `1606`/`1610` leaked (grep=0). **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless container вҖ” no display/speakers): whether the wobbleвҶ’pure-dyad resolution reads as "a binary falling into consonance" and whether the fling/merge feels responsive want Karel's Chrome; the seeded 2:3:4 opening guarantees it's never blank/silent and rings a lock within seconds. Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-builder fire (ONE concept вҖ” *gravity becomes harmony* вҖ” via three gravitational approaches); banked **вӯҗвӯҗ `1606-gravity-well`** (TOP ship-next вҖ” the "massively bigger" **dual WebGPU-compute / WebGL** large-N point-cloud galaxy: ~16k stars, aggregate virial-mechanics drive a cosmic drone; love-aligned with `130-tsl-particle-compute`вқӨпёҸ/`262-aurora-particle`вқӨпёҸ; de-selected only because its *aggregate-drone* coupling is looser than 1608's discrete resonance events + its WebGPU path can't be verified headless) + **вӯҗ `1610-spheres-clockwork`** (the most robust вҖ” a **kinematic Laplace-canon orrery** that self-plays a JI canon and heals when you nudge a moon out of tune; de-selected because it is pre-locked by construction вҖ” you never hear a system *fall into* resonance вҖ” and sits on a single static root) вҶ’ IDEAS В§765. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1608-orbital-consonance/README.md`

### [1600-orbital-drift](/dream/1600-orbital-drift) В· adult / **OFF-THE-VIOLET (real-world data вҖ” NOT psychedelic)** В· **live ISS position feed (wheretheiss.at / open-notify, no auth) + tap-to-drop ground stations вҖ” NOT mic, NOT voice, NOT keyboard-sole** / **pure SVG cartography (equirectangular world map, graticule, antimeridian-split ground track) вҖ” NO Canvas2D, NO WebGL** В· cycle 764 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-13) В· demoable В· `state: real-world-data sonification / a machine orbiting overhead В· pole: contemplative-scientific (non-psychedelic)`
**Hear the ISS passing overhead right now вҖ” its live ground-track drawn across a world map, sonified as a serene just-intonation orbital drone.** The lab's answer to the fresh 2026-07-13 jury's **#5 (the last un-discharged) provocation** вҖ” *"break the psychedelic monotheme once; the real-world-data and conceptual/critical lanes are empty; one night off the violet."* After 15/15 psychedelic pieces this one is deliberately cool and cartographic (deep-space navy, cyan/teal grid, a single warm amber ISS marker вҖ” no mandala, no iridescence). **How it works:** a hand-rolled **equirectangular SVG world map** (hand-authored continent polygons, graticule) with the ISS marker + its forward/back ground-track animating immediately; a **live feed** polls `wheretheiss.at` every 4 s (dual-source fallback to `open-notify`), and a deterministic **Keplerian sub-satellite propagator** (51.6В° inclination, 92.9 min period, Earth-rotation + nodal regression folded in so passes step ~23В° west) runs from t=0 as a smoothing flywheel between polls вҖ” so it is **never blank or silent** with zero network / on CORS failure / headless. A `feed: LIVE | SIMULATED` badge reports the source. **Tap the map** to drop up to 6 ground stations; when the ISS passes within ~7.5В° one flashes and rings a JI FM bell. **Audio** (Web Audio, master вүӨ0.14 вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor`, вүӨ11 voices): latitude вҶ’ lowpass cutoff (equator bright, poles veiled), ocean-vs-land (point-in-polygon) вҶ’ sawtooth-grain crossfade, orbital phase вҶ’ a slow Shepard-style amplitude glide; full teardown on unmount. **Named refs (README):** Ryoji Ikeda *datamatics*, Semiconductor *Brilliant Noise* (2006, solar-data-as-AV), the equirectangular/plate-carrГ©e projection. **Ambition вҖ” honest 3/5:** **#1** real live satellite-feed input = grep-0Г— (no prior orbital-data piece вҖ” the "orbital/keplerian" hits are unrelated procedural geometry; framed honestly as "diversity + likely-#1", nearest prior real-position feed is `1161-flight-choir` aircraft) + **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (dual-source ISS feed + Keplerian fallback/smoothing propagator + SVG cartographic renderer + JI orbital drone synth = 4) + **#3** named refs above. **#4 NOT claimed** вҖ” single-cycle (README cycle-2: terminator shading, a 2nd-satellite counter-voice, horizon-aware chimes). **#5 NOT claimed** вҖ” 13th straight <14-day dry even fully off the psychedelic lane; **this cycle formally recommends retiring #5** as structurally unreachable. **diversity:** `banned=[mic/voice-INPUT В· Canvas2D-OUTPUT В· voiceвҶ’JI-toneвҶ’form-constant ENGINE В· iridescent-violet+KlГјver PALETTE В· keyboard-steer WATCH]` (per JURY 2026-07-13); `picked=[external-data(live ISS)+touch INPUT В· SVG-cartographic OUTPUT В· orbital-propagator/data-sonification ENGINE (NOT the banned voiceвҶ’JIвҶ’form-constant spine) В· deep-space navy/cyan/amber off-violet PALETTE В· pole non-psychedelic contemplative-scientific]` вҖ” clears every hard ban AND breaks the 15/15 monotheme. **SAFETY:** no strobe вҖ” all motion is slow orbital drift; `prefers-reduced-motion` freezes the drift. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + SVG + client-side read-only public GET; no server/secret; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites; `eslint src/app/dream/1600-orbital-drift --max-warnings 0` = **0**; authoritative winner-only `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `page.js` + `"/dream/1600-orbital-drift"` in BOTH `routes-manifest.json` and `app-path-routes-manifest.json` (plain `npm run build` compiles+lints+typechecks clean but dies at "Collecting page data" on the standing ~700-route **EMFILE** fd-ceiling вҖ” infra, absent on Vercel); no `1602`/`1604` leaked (grep=0). **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless container вҖ” no display/speakers/network): whether the live fetch reaches wheretheiss.at from Karel's Chrome (CORS) vs. falling to SIMULATED, and whether the latitude/ocean-land coupling reads as *the orbit singing*, want his browser; the propagator guarantees it's never blank/silent. Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-builder "off-the-violet" fire (3 divergent non-consciousness directions вҖ” space В· markets В· attention); banked **вӯҗвӯҗ `1602-ledger-organ`** (TOP ship-next вҖ” a self-playing "market organ" over a live **Coinbase WebSocket** ticker: each trade a JI voice, priceвҶ’pitch, tickвҶ’timbre, sizeвҶ’amp, spreadвҶ’detune, seeded random-walk fallback; the near-#1 novel WebSocket input, the coldest cleanest break from the violet) + **вӯҗ `1604-the-vigil`** (the conceptual/critical lane вҖ” a piece that *only sounds while you sustain attention*: pointer-hold + Page Visibility gate, an accreting drone that dies the instant you release or look away; Cage *4вҖІ33вҖі* / Tehching Hsieh / Alvin Lucier) вҶ’ IDEAS В§764. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1600-orbital-drift/README.md`

### [1588-glossolalia](/dream/1588-glossolalia) В· adult / psychedelic В· **keyboard / arrows / WASD steer + tap (NOT mic вҖ” mic 5Г— in the last 10; NOT the just-used camera/tilt) вҖ” you glide an aperture through a language-flood and play the words it touches** / **pure typographic DOM + the CSS Custom Highlight API (node-free light across arbitrary char-ranges; `<span>` fallback вҶ’ live-Playwright-verified, not just headless-compiled)** В· cycle 761 В· DEEP-winner (2026-07-13) В· demoable В· `state: DMT "everything is syntax" language-flood / syntactic-light В· pole: intense/kinetic`
**The whole field floods with language you can't quite read вҖ” then a pool of light glides across it and the words *resolve*, bright and legible, and ring.** Winner of a psychedelic **DEEP** 3-approach fire on ONE concept: *language that reads itself into being via the grep-0Г— **CSS Custom Highlight API***, finally cashing the banked вӯҗвӯҗ #1 (was `1582-scripture` В§760) вҖ” and framed by this cycle's research dive, the **CГ—GГ—D computational-neurophenomenology** model (*Frontiers in Psychology*, 20 May 2026, doi 10.3389/fpsyg.2026.1819038): a hallucination is the brain's **Generator** replaying learned structure top-down вҖ” *meaning-shaped, not noise* вҖ” so an **asemic pseudo-language flood that reads as meaning without reference is a faithful model of the altered-state Generator**, and each aperture of light is the **Classifier** momentarily finding "effective causes" (legible words) in it. **The technique (the whole novelty):** the viewport fills edge-to-edge with 47 drifting rows of real seeded pseudo-language in ordinary `Text` nodes, painted near-invisible; **8 highlight buckets** (`lume0вҖҰlume7`, brightвҶ’dim) are registered once via `CSS.highlights.set(...)` + styled through `::highlight(lumeN){ color; text-shadow; -webkit-text-stroke-color }`; every frame the moving aperture centers rebuild `Range` objects (`new Range(); r.setStart(node,i); r.setEnd(node,j)`) over nearby characters and **distribute them across the buckets by distance** (closest = brightest) вҖ” so pools of legibility glide over the language with **zero per-glyph DOM**, all motion from re-ranging (since `::highlight()` may only restyle color/shadow/stroke, never position). Complete progressive-enhancement fallback: `!("highlights" in CSS)` вҶ’ real `<span class="hl-fallback bkN">` wrapping (437 spans, byte-identical look) + a live `highlights: native|fallback` badge. **INPUT** keyboard/arrows/WASD steer the primary aperture, printable keys spawn notes, tap ignites a burst-aperture that blooms legibility + a JI chord вҖ” deliberately **NOT the mic** (5Г— in the last 10 вҶ’ banned this cycle) and **NOT Canvas2D** (4Г— вҶ’ banned). **AUDIO** words crossing an aperture ring a 7-limit-JI FM bell (pitch from field height), over a sustaining low JI pad drone + a quiet band-passed "language-wash," master вүӨ0.16 вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor`, вүӨ12 self-cleaning voices, full teardown. **Never blank/silent:** three seeded Lissajous apertures drift from mount resolving fragments with zero input/permissions; the pad lights on the first gesture. **SAFETY (a full-field piece, handled deliberately):** the flood stays dim near-black, only small apertures are bright and layered on top; no strobe, no full-frame flash, burst-apertures grow-then-collapse вүӘ3 Hz; `prefers-reduced-motion` slows drift, drops to one aperture, tames bursts. **Honest 3/5:** #1 CSS Custom Highlight API grep-0Г— (verified full lab; the jury-named wall to the first 5/5) + #2 вүҘ3 subsystems (aperture-highlight engine + morpheme "Generator" + JI FM synth + per-frame distance-ranging driver = 4) + #3 named refs (Custom Highlight API/MDN В· CГ—GГ—D Frontiers 2026 В· Michaux asemic В· McKenna "syntactic light"/glossolalia В· KlГјver form constants). #4 declared multi-cycle (README folds `1586`'s reading-light-as-**score-follower-over-Karel's-Path-piano** as its 5/5 cycle-2, + `1584`'s radial mandala as an alternate aperture path). **#5 NOT claimed** вҖ” nothing <14-day this dive (the CГ—GГ—D anchor is ~54 days; **tenth cycle straight**, logged honest). **The only one of the 3 live-Playwright-verified** (route 200, native buckets w/ ~350вҖ“420 live ranges shifting on interaction, fallback 437 spans, dark-mode screenshot, 0 console errors after a fixed SSR-hydration mismatch) вҖ” directly answering the recurring "written-but-unrun" de-selector. **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** on real hardware (no display/speakers here). Love-adjacent to **1396-apophenia-fieldвқӨпёҸ** (meaning-from-noise) + **1354-glyph-canonвқӨпёҸ** (generative text-as-form). **Banked from this fire:** вӯҗвӯҗ`1586-reading-light` (the self-descending reading-light codex, purpose-built to score-follow Karel's real piano вҖ” TOP ship-next / the 5/5 weld) + вӯҗ`1584-scripture-mandala` (rotating japa-mandala). Two more explored вҖ” see IDEAS В§761. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1588-glossolalia/README.md`.

### [1578-dream-jump](/dream/1578-dream-jump) В· adult / psychedelic В· **mic-voice PLAYED (sing a sustained phrase вҶ’ the whole reality teleports to a new hypnagogic room; pitch chooses the next scene's seed + palette; seeded idle scheduler auto-teleports every 5вҖ“7s вҖ” never blank/silent, no mic needed) вҖ” NOT the just-used tilt(В§756)/camera(В§754), not keyboard-rut** / **pure DOM/CSS + the lab's FIRST-EVER CSS View Transitions API (the *browser* morphs the entire viewport between scenes on the compositor вҖ” off-GPU, on the jury's starving DOM surface; complete direct-swap fallback вҶ’ headless-verifiable)** В· cycle 760 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-13) В· demoable В· `state: hypnagogic dream-room teleport В· pole: intense/ecstatic`

### [1576-flame-voice](/dream/1576-flame-voice) В· adult / psychedelic В· **mic-voice PLAYED, two-way (sing вҶ’ pitch steers the variation focus + final rotation, energy blooms brightness; the flame then SINGS ITS OWN STRUCTURE back; deterministic seeded carrier idle self-demo вҖ” never blank/silent, no mic needed) вҖ” NOT the just-used tilt(В§756)/camera(В§754), not keyboard-rut** / **Canvas2D log-density accumulation buffer (off-GPU chaos game, headless-verifiable) вҖ” the lab's FIRST-EVER fractal flame** В· cycle 759 В· DEEP-winner (2026-07-13) В· demoable В· `state: fractal-flame living organism В· pole: intense/ecstatic вҶ” cosmic-ambient`
**Sing INTO a living psychedelic organism and it sings BACK вҖ” the shape you SEE is exactly the chord you HEAR.** Winner of a psychedelic **DEEP** 3-approach fire on ONE concept: finally ship the lab's **first-ever fractal flame** вҖ” **Scott Draves & Erik Reckase's *Electric Sheep* algorithm** ("The Fractal Flame Algorithm," 2003), *the* canonical psychedelic-visual algorithm вҖ” which this 1500+-deep lab had **proposed twice and shelved twice** (`1287-fractal-flame` was a В§701 WIDE non-winner, banked вӯҗ, alongside `1286-strange-lace`), de-selected then only because В§701's *then-live* ban on "full-frame density-fields you *stare at*" flagged it as watched-not-played. That ban is **superseded**: the 2026-07-12 jury blesses Canvas2D ("healthy, not a problem") and instead bans the **~10/15 GPU-render monoculture** (three.js + WebGL2) вҖ” and a fractal flame is a **CPU chaos game on an off-GPU Canvas2D accumulation buffer**, i.e. exactly the *off-GPU* surface provocation #1 demands, deterministic-from-audio so it's **headless-verifiable**. And the В§701 shelving told us how to WIN it: make it genuinely **played**. **The technique, faithful to the paper:** an Iterated Function System drawn by the **chaos game** (4 affine xforms picked by weight; point wanders the biunit plane, warm-up ~20 iters), extended with **21 standard Draves nonlinear "variations"** (`linear`/`sinusoidal`/`spherical`/`swirl`/`horseshoe`/`polar`/`handkerchief`/`disc`/`spiral`/`hyperbolic`/`diamond`/`julia`/`waves`/`fisheye`/`eyefish`/`bent`/`power`/`rings`/`fan`/`cylinder`/`ex`), accumulated into two `Float32Array`s (density + palette-coordinate), decayed ~0.92/frame so the organism continuously refreshes and morphs, then rendered via Draves' signature **log-density tone-map** (`alpha = log(d+1)/log(max+1)` + ОівүҲ2.6) to `ImageData`вҶ’`putImageData` вҖ” ~74k points/frame (34k under reduced-motion), no WebGL/WebGPU/three.js. **THE SEE=HEAR WELD (the winning axis):** each frame the engine computes an 8-element **feature vector** = the *hit-weighted average of the exact per-xform variation gains that draw every plotted point* вҖ” not a side-channel analysis, the literal same numbers вҖ” and those 8 numbers set the amplitudes of **8 Just-Intonation partials** (ratios 1 В· 9/8 В· 5/4 В· 4/3 В· 3/2 В· 5/3 В· 15/8 В· 2, a stacked JI major scale to the octave, over 110 Hz + sub). When a variation swells on screen, its partial swells in your ears; the 8 on-screen dominance bars ARE the 8 audible partials. **Voice IN** (autocorrelation pitch on `getFloatTimeDomainData`, **NOT FFT**; RMS energy): pitch steers the variation focus + a final-xform rotation (reshaping the flame), energy blooms brightness вҖ” the reshaped flame then re-voices its own drone, closing a stable loop (the analyser is a dead-end never routed to destination, the drone is never routed into the analyser, heavy one-pole smoothing + noise floor вҶ’ it cannot howl). **Never blank/silent:** a deterministic seeded carrier slowly drives pitch/energy from mount so the flame is always morphing and the drone always singing its structure with no mic. **CRITICAL BAN-DODGE:** an IFS chaos-game with nonlinear variations вҖ” categorically NOT the jury-banned cortical-traveling-wave / log-polar `exp()` **synthetic breathing-field** (no cortical warp anywhere); a discrete morphing *organism*, played not watched. **Honest 4/5** (the mirror of 1490/1516, which hit #2+#3+#4+#5 and stalled on #1 вҖ” this one delivers #1 and abstains only on #5): **#1** first fractal flame / chaos-game / log-density in the shipped lab (grep-0Г—) В· **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (chaos-game IFS engine + log-density Canvas2D renderer + autocorrelation voice-analysis + JI-partial sonification synth + played two-way mapping = 5) В· **#3** named ref (Draves & Reckase, "The Fractal Flame Algorithm," 2003; *Electric Sheep*) В· **#4** declared multi-cycle (cycle-1 flame+voice+weld; cycle-2 folds Karel's real Path piano in as the exciter + more partials + selectable genome species). **#5 NOT claimed** вҖ” nothing <14-day this dive (the best phenomenology finding, the CГ—GГ—D framework, is Frontiers 2026-05-20 = ~54 days; **eighth cycle straight** running the strict <14-day psychedelic-AV hunt dry, logged honest). **SAFETY:** no strobe вҖ” the accumulation-decay refresh is smooth, a decaying running-max keeps luminance drift вүӨ3 Hz; `prefers-reduced-motion` cuts point-count + damps motion. Audio gesture-gated (Start creates/resumes the ctx), master **вүӨ0.18** вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor`, вүӨ14 voices (8 partials + sub + carrier), full teardown (osc stop, `ctx.close()`, mic tracks stopped, rAF cancelled). `text-destructive` fallbacks for mic-denied / no-canvas. No API route вҶ’ no guard (pure `"use client"` Canvas2D + Web Audio; no server/network/secret; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** ESLint `--max-warnings 0` = EXIT 0; authoritative winner-only `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `.next/server/app/dream/1576-flame-voice/page.js` emitted (**31.8 kB**) + route in both `routes-manifest.json` & `app-path-routes-manifest.json`; forbidden-token grep clean (`Math.random`/`Date`/`new Date` = 0 incl. comments/strings); no non-winner leaked into the build (grep=0). **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless container вҖ” no mic/speakers/display; `getUserMedia` absent and `getFloatTimeDomainData` returns zeros under `chrome-headless-shell`, so only the deterministic seeded-carrier path runs here): the felt voiceвҶ’flameвҶ’drone weld tightness, flame legibility on a phone, and whether the two-way loop stays musical on a live mic want Karel's Chrome вҖ” the seeded carrier + off-mount idle demo + deterministic engine guarantee it's never blank/silent and the flame is correct by construction. Love-adjacent to **1396-apophenia-fieldвқӨпёҸ** + **1450-supershape-bloomвқӨпёҸ** (generative audio-reactive form) + the loved spectral field pieces **243-spectral-cloudвқӨпёҸ**/**267-spectral-driftвқӨпёҸ** (rich living fields; corroborating appetite, did not govern). **Banked from this fire:** вӯҗвӯҗ`1574-sheep-morph` (the Electric-Sheep **genome-crossfade** herd вҖ” voice conducts a continuous metamorphosis through 5 distinct alien species; the most "massively bigger" of the three, de-selected only for a one-way drive vs the winner's two-way weld вҖ” TOP fractal-flame ship-next / winner's cycle-2 seed) + вӯҗ`1572-flame-choir` (the cleanest faithful baseline, 22 variations, most legible one-liner "sing the flame"). Two more explored вҖ” see IDEAS В§759. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1576-flame-voice/README.md`.

### [1568-worklet-mandala](/dream/1568-worklet-mandala) В· adult / psychedelic В· **mic-voice PLAYED (sing/hum вҶ’ pitch=spin+hue, energy=bloom; seeded idle self-demo spins it with no mic) вҖ” NOT the just-used tilt(В§756)/camera(В§754), not keyboard-rut** / **DOM/CSS mandala spun by CSS Houdini AnimationWorklet on the COMPOSITOR (off-GPU, starving surface) + complete rAF fallback (headless-verifiable)** В· cycle 758 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-13) В· demoable В· `state: KlГјver kaleidoscopic mandala В· pole: intense/ecstatic`
**Sing or hum into a psychedelic mandala that breathes, spins, and blooms entirely as living HTML elements moved by the browser's compositor вҖ” not one pixel drawn to a canvas or a GPU shader.** Winner of a psychedelic **WIDE** 3-explorer fire fanned across the 2026-07-12 jury's **three starving off-GPU surfaces** (DOM/CSS-3D В· audio-only/no-screen В· pure-SVG) with three distinct inputs вҖ” a direct answer to that jury's headline finding: three.js is the new mouse-drag (**GPU-render-primary ~10/15**), and its provocation #3, that the lab's first clean **5/5** is now **one criterion away вҖ” #1, a technique never used in the lab.** This delivers exactly that #1: **CSS Houdini `AnimationWorklet`** (`CSS.animationWorklet.addModule` вҶ’ `registerAnimator('mandala-spin')` вҶ’ `new WorkletAnimation(effect, document.timeline, {speed})`) spins a lattice of **8 concentric rings / 176 DOM petals** *off the main thread on the compositor* вҖ” **grep-0Г— across the entire 1500-deep lab** (`animationWorklet`/`registerAnimator`/`WorkletAnimation` = 0 files), and it lands on the jury's **starving DOM/CSS-3D surface** (only 1Г— = 1502), NOT the banned hand-authored GPU render. Like В§755's Houdini Paint it ships as **progressive enhancement over a complete `requestAnimationFrame` fallback** that mutates the identical `rotate()` transforms + shared CSS custom props (`--hue`/`--bloom`/`--fit`), so the piece is **byte-identical and fully demoable everywhere including headless**, with a live label showing which path is hot ("compositor worklet" vs "rAF fallback"). **Voice-PLAYED** (jury-celebrated): autocorrelation pitch вҶ’ spin speed + hue, RMS energy вҶ’ bloom/scale, over a never-silent just-intonation drone bed (9 voices вүӨ14, master 0.16 вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor`); a seeded idle self-demo spins it from mount with no mic. **CRITICAL BAN-DODGE:** a discrete, radially-symmetric spinning **mandala** driven by real voice вҖ” explicitly NOT the jury-banned cortical-traveling-wave / log-polar **synthetic breathing-field** (no `exp()`-warped self-running wave). **Honest 3/5:** #1 AnimationWorklet never-used (grep-0Г—) В· #2 вүҘ3 subsystems (AnimationWorklet/rAF DOM-transform engine + autocorrelation mic pitch/energy + seeded radial-mandala geometry generator + JI Web Audio drone = 4) В· #3 named refs (Heinrich KlГјver's four form constants В· BressloffвҖ“Cowan for the *symmetry* only, not the breathing-field mechanic В· CSS Houdini AnimationWorklet / web.dev). #5 not claimed (nothing <14-day вҖ” seventh cycle straight, logged honest). **SAFETY:** no strobe вҖ” spin ~0.07 Hz, hue/bloom drift far under 3 Hz; `prefers-reduced-motion` caps spin + damps pulsing. Full teardown (osc stop, `ctx.close()`, mic tracks stopped, rAF + worklet animations cancelled). No API route вҶ’ no guard (pure `"use client"` DOM/CSS + Web Audio; no server/network/secret; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** ESLint `--max-warnings 0` = EXIT 0; authoritative `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `.next/server/app/dream/1568-worklet-mandala/page.js` emitted (**27.5 kB**) + route in both `routes-manifest.json` & `app-path-routes-manifest.json`; forbidden-token grep clean (no `Math.random`/`Date` even inside the worklet string). **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless container вҖ” no mic/speakers/display, and no AnimationWorklet, so the rAF fallback is what ran): the felt voiceвҶ’spinвҶ’bloom tightness, mandala legibility, and whether the compositor path is visibly smoother on Karel's Chrome want real hardware; the rAF fallback + seeded idle demo guarantee it's never blank/silent and renders identically anywhere. Love-adjacent to **1482-face-mandalaвқӨпёҸ** (radial mandala) + **1326-voice-cathedralвқӨпёҸ** (sung-voice controller). **Banked from this fire:** вӯҗвӯҗ`1566-void-orbit` (audio-only/no-screen HRTF binaural void вҖ” sound-bodies orbit your head in the dark, breath-driven; de-selected only because ghost-spatial cues are subtle on phone speakers without headphones) + вӯҗ`1570-glass-melt` (keyboard/tap-played SVG declarative-filter liquid-chrome melt вҖ” `feTurbulence`вҶ’`feDisplacementMap`вҶ’`feColorMatrix`). Two more explored вҖ” see IDEAS В§758. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1568-worklet-mandala/README.md`.

### [1562-constant-q-spiral](/dream/1562-constant-q-spiral) В· adult / psychedelic В· **mic-voice PLAYED (sing/hum/whistle; deterministic seeded sawtooth-arpeggio idle self-demo вҖ” never blank/silent) вҖ” NOT keyboard, NOT the just-used tilt/camera** / **Canvas2D pitch-helix (off-GPU, headless-verifiable)** В· cycle 757 В· DEEP-winner (2026-07-13) В· demoable В· `state: cymatic/harmonic vortex В· pole: intense/kinetic вҶ” cosmic-ambient (harmonic bloom that can boil)`
**Play your voice through a resonant constant-Q filterbank вҖ” one ringing bandpass per semitone вҖ” and watch the energy climb a glowing PITCH HELIX where every octave is one turn of a spiral and every partial is a bead of light in a vortex you can hear ring.** Winner of a psychedelic **DEEP** 3-approach fire on ONE concept вҖ” *the lab's first continuous-wavelet / scalogram analysis, warped into psychedelic form-constant geometry* вҖ” a direct shot at the criterion the 2026-07-12 jury named as the last wall to a clean 5/5: **#1, a technique never used in the lab.** The lab analyses sound with the **FFT everywhere** (`AnalyserNode`/`getByteFrequencyData` = 448 files); this is its **first Constant-Q Transform** AND its **first `IIRFilterNode`** вҖ” both grep-0Г—. 60 real RBJ-cookbook bandpass biquads (12/octave, C2вҶ’~C7, shared QвүҲ14), each read by a per-band `AnalyserNode` used **only** for time-domain RMS (never its FFT), so no FFT touches the analysis. The **tightest see=hear weld** of the three approaches: the same 60 band-RMS numbers you *see* as helix beads ARE the same 60 band outputs summed (through a `DynamicsCompressor` limiter, master вүӨ0.15) into the audible resonant ring вҖ” one array, one played instrument. Geometry = **octave-equivalence made visible** (angle = chroma, radius = octave, same-chroma beads threaded across octaves; violetвҶ’magentaвҶ’cyan by octave/energy; alpha-fade glow trails) вҖ” a music-theoretic **Shepard/Drobisch pitch helix**, cleanly NOT the jury-banned log-polar breathing-field. Never blank: the spiral spine + a seeded carrier climb the bank within ~1s with or without a mic; `text-destructive` fallbacks for mic-denied / no-Web-Audio; no strobe, `prefers-reduced-motion` respected, full teardown. **Honest 4/5** (#1 CQT+IIR never-used В· #2 вүҘ3 subsystems В· #3 refs: Brown CQT 1991 / Morlet-scalogram / DrobischвҖ“Shepard helix / BressloffвҖ“Cowan В· #4 declared multi-cycle). **Refs:** Judith Brown *Constant-Q* JASA 1991 В· GrossmannвҖ“Morlet wavelet В· Arts & Roerdink fCWT *Nature Comp. Sci.* 2022 В· Shepard pitch helix В· BressloffвҖ“Cowan form constants. **Banked from this fire:** вӯҗвӯҗ`1564-cortical-scalogram` (two-stage cochleaвҶ’cortex 2D-Gabor honeycomb вҖ” the DEEP-DEEP resurrect) + вӯҗ`1560-wavelet-well` (direct-Morlet CWT log-polar tunnel). Two more explored вҖ” see IDEAS В§757.

### [1554-wavefield-organ](/dream/1554-wavefield-organ) В· adult / psychedelic В· **device tilt (`DeviceOrientationEvent` gamma/beta; `WASD`/arrows desktop fallback; seeded Lissajous idle auto-demo) вҖ” NOT pointer-sole, NOT keyboard-rut, NOT mic** / **WebGPU compute point-field (four WGSL passes) as the PRIMARY surface, with a first-class Canvas2D CPU fallback running the identical wave-PDE** В· cycle 756 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-13) В· demoable В· `state: cymatics / Chladni standing-waves В· pole: intense/kinetic (geometric, rests the void)`
**Tilt your phone to steer six real physical wave-sources across a vibrating plate вҖ” and watch a genuine 2D wave-equation field bloom into Chladni cymatic figures you can hear and play with your whole body.** Winner of a psychedelic **WIDE** 3-explorer fire deliberately fanned across the jury's **three starving off-GPU-render surfaces** (WebGPU-compute / audio-only / pure-SVG) with **three non-keyboard/non-pointer inputs** (tilt / mic / camera) вҖ” a direct answer to the 2026-07-12 jury's "three.js is the new mouse-drag (GPU-render-primary ~10/15)" surface-monoculture finding AND the 3Г—-in-a-row keyboard-input rut. This piece finally **ships the starving WebGPU-compute surface (only 1Г— = 1506) render-robustly** вҖ” the recurring de-selector that banked four prior WebGPU explorers was headless-unverifiability, solved here by a **CPU "shadow field" that ALWAYS runs** (driving audio + source-glow on both backends) plus a genuine first-class **Canvas2D fallback that runs the identical wave-PDE**, so the piece is fully demoable everywhere while carrying a real 4-pass WGSL compute path (wave step + source forcing + 48k-particle advection + interference wash) that lights up on Karel's Chrome. **The physics (README):** a discretised **damped 2D wave equation** `dВІu/dtВІ = cВІвҲҮВІu` on a Dirichlet-clamped plate (5-point Laplacian leapfrog, `u_next = (2uвҲ’u_prev + cВІвҲҮВІu)В·damping`); continuous gaussian `AВ·sin(2ПҖft)` forcing at six sources builds true **standing waves** whose nodal lines are the cymatic figure; a point-field advects down `вҲ’вҲҮ(uВІ) = вҲ’2uВ·вҲҮu` so particles pool on the nodes **exactly as dry sand does on Ernst Chladni's plates** вҖ” the figure is physically emergent, nothing drawn or faked. Tilt DIRECTION walks the sources; tilt MAGNITUDE sets `cВІвҲҲ[0.10,0.26]` (CFL-stable) вҶ’ faster waves, tighter figures, and opens the drone filter. **This is a true PDE, explicitly NOT the banned cortical-traveling-wave / log-polar `exp()` breathing-field** (README calls out the distinction). **See = hear weld:** one per-source energy scalar from the CPU shadow field drives BOTH that source's glow brightness AND its just-intonation organ-pipe loudness on both backends вҖ” the ripple you see is the amplitude envelope of the tone you hear; tiltвҶ’`c` opens the shared `startDroneBank` cutoff. **Named refs (README):** Ernst Chladni / cymatics, the 2D wave equation, and **TouchDesigner's POP (Point Operator) GPU point-based wavefield component libraries** (this cycle's В§756 research вҖ” 17 wave equations Г— source shapes, audio-reactive, GPU points). **Ambition вҖ” honest 3/5:** **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (tilt sensor + WebGPU/CPU wave-PDE solver + 48k-particle Chladni advection + JI-pipe/drone Web Audio = 4) В· **#3** named refs above В· **#5-soft** (В§756 TD-POP-wavefield dive вҖ” this cycle's researchвҶ’build chain, a conceptual trigger, NOT a <14-day paper; logged straight, 7th cycle running the psychedelic-AV <14-day hunt dry). **#1 NOT claimed** (WebGPU-compute 23Г—, tilt 74Г—, wave-equation lab-adjacent across the 1500-deep lab вҖ” the fresh axis is the surfaceГ—inputГ—physical-PDE combination, honestly declared; grep-0Г— techniques are effectively exhausted). **diversity:** `banned=[three.js-scene-graph-primary(5Г—) В· GPU-render-primary(~10/15) В· cortical-traveling-wave/log-polar-breathing-field(1506вҶ’1516) В· pointer/touch-drag-SOLE(4Г—) В· Canvas2D-headline(4Г— warm) В· keyboard-input(3Г—-in-a-row 1516/1530/1536)] В· picked=[TILT INPUT (0Г— recent window, breaks the keyboard rut, not pointer-sole/not warm mic-camera) В· WebGPU-compute point-field OUTPUT (starving 1Г—, jury-blessed, NOT a hand-authored GPU RENDER but a compute sim; Canvas2D only the fallback) В· real-2D-wave-PDE/Chladni-cymatics TECHNIQUE (physically-emergent, explicitly NOT log-polar) В· geometric-violet PALETTE В· pole INTENSE/KINETIC (a played standing-wave, rests the void)]` вҖ” clears every live 2026-07-12 hard ban. **SAFETY:** no strobe вҖ” source forcing <1 Hz, luminance drift ~0.35 Hz smooth, all under the 3-Hz ceiling; `prefersReducedMotion()` slows the sim + damps motion + halves dt. Audio gesture-gated (Start creates the ctx; iOS `DeviceOrientationEvent.requestPermission` gated behind Start with a `text-destructive` denial notice), master **вүӨ0.18** вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` вҶ’ destination, вүӨ6 pipes + drone, full teardown (nodes stopped, `ctx.close()`, rAF cancelled, GPU resources destroyed, listeners removed). **Never blank/silent:** a seeded Lissajous idle auto-demo keeps the plate rippling from mount; keyboard + demo fully drive it with no tilt/motion permission. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` WebGPU/Canvas2D + Web Audio; no server/network/secret; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites; winner is clean across the full build (0 errors/0 warnings from 1554 вҖ” only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings); plain `npm run build` compiled + linted + typechecked clean and died ONLY at "Collecting page data" on the container's standing ~700-route **EMFILE** fd-ceiling (infra, absent on Vercel); authoritative gate `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `.next/server/app/dream/1554-wavefield-organ/page.js` emitted (**24.8 kB**) + `"/dream/1554-wavefield-organ"` in both `routes-manifest.json` and `app-path-routes-manifest.json`. **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless container вҖ” no GPU/display/tilt/speakers): the real WebGPU path could only be checked by construction (the container has no `navigator.gpu`, so the Canvas2D fallback is what ran), and the felt tightness of the tiltвҶ’figureвҶ’pipe weld, Chladni legibility, and loudness balance want Karel's phone; the CPU shadow + idle demo + deterministic PDE guarantee it's never blank/silent and renders coherently everywhere. Winner of an adult **WIDE** fire; banked **вӯҗвӯҗ `1556-oto-room`** (TOP ship-next вҖ” audio-only Tartini/Amacher difference-tone room, "music generated inside your own ears"; the most *surprising* concept queued in weeks, de-selected only because the ghost tones are subtle without headphones at a phone-speaker glance) + **вӯҗ `1558-mirror-web`** (camera вҶ’ pure-SVG force-directed singing constellation Г  la Rozin; de-selected because SVG + camera were both just used) вҶ’ IDEAS В§756. ### [1542-flow-tracer](/dream/1542-flow-tracer) В· adult / psychedelic В· **camera (hand-rolled dense optical-flow / normal-flow motion field, 64Г—36, no ML; seeded synthetic-field idle self-demo when camera denied)** / **Canvas2D (ping-pong dye-feedback)** вҖ” your body's motion smears the air into blooming LSD-tracers you can hear В· cycle 754 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-12) В· demoable В· `state: LSD-tracer / body-motion-smear В· pole: ecstatic/embodied/kinetic (a played bloom вҖ” rests the void)`
**What if your own body's motion, seen through the webcam, smeared the air into blooming LSD-style color tracers you can hear?** Winner of a psychedelic **WIDE** 3-explorer fire on three DISTINCT inputs (camera / tilt / mic) chosen to **break the 3Г—-in-a-row keyboard rut** (1516/1530/1536). A dense **frame-difference / normal-flow motion field** is computed by hand from webcam pixels on a 64Г—36 grid (per-cell temporal brightness delta + spatial gradient вҶ’ `v = -IвӮңВ·вҲҮI/|вҲҮI|ВІ`, the brightness-constancy constraint вҖ” no MediaPipe, no ML), and that field is the **sole controller**. It advects an iridescent-violet dye through a pure **Canvas2D ping-pong feedback trail** (previous frame re-drawn zoomed/rotated at <1 alpha = literal positive-afterimage tracer); wherever you move, color blooms and streaks along the motion vectors, with curl letting faint KlГјver spirals/lattices surface. **See = hear (tight, one event):** total motion energy вҶ’ grain density+brightness; horizontal motion centroid вҶ’ stereo pan; vertical centroid вҶ’ pitch (pentatonic-minor); a soft 3-osc drone bed means it's never silent. **Chosen over its two WIDE siblings** (all cleared the floor + dodged every hard ban): **most render-robust** вҖ” pure deterministic Canvas2D + a seeded synthetic drifting-field **idle self-demo means it runs fully even with NO camera** (the recurring "written-but-unrun" de-selector, vs sibling B's unrun WebGPU headline); **tightest see=hear**; **breaks the keyboard rut with a genuinely fresh axis** (raw optical-flow-as-a-played-*instrument*, not landmark tracking вҖ” the lab's other camera pieces are all MediaPipe pose/face/hands); **ecstatic/embodied** (jury-celebrated pole, and does NOT re-open the rested dissolution register). **Named refs (README):** LSD positive-afterimage "tracers"; Heinrich KlГјver's four form constants; Memo Akten optical-flow work; Bileam Tschepe (elekktronaut) feedback-trail aesthetic. **Ambition honest 2/5:** #2 вүҘ3 subsystems (hand-rolled optical-flow estimator + Canvas2D ping-pong dye renderer + granular+drone Web Audio = 3) + #3 named refs above. #1 abstained (optical-flow lab-present вҖ” 10 files: 582/652/1160/545вҖҰ; the fresh axis is the played-instrument interaction); #5 not claimed (В§754 dive found nothing <14-day, fourth cycle running вҖ” logged straight). **diversity:** `banned=[three.js-scene-graph-primaryВ·GPU-render-primary(~10/15)В·cortical-traveling-wave/log-polar-breathing-field-&-dissolution-voidВ·pointer-drag-SOLEВ·keyboard-SOLE(3Г—-in-a-row)] В· picked=[CAMERA INPUT (breaks the keyboard rut; raw optical-flow not MediaPipe; not pointer-sole) В· Canvas2D dye-feedback OUTPUT (not banned вҖ” jury called Canvas2D healthy; distinct technique from recent Canvas2D winners 1536-datamosh/1516-Bayer-dither/1508-terrain) В· optical-flow-as-played-instrument TECHNIQUE В· iridescent-violet LSD-tracer PALETTE В· pole ECSTATIC/embodied (a played bloom, rests the void)]` вҖ” clears every live hard ban. **Honest knocks:** **Canvas2D running warm** (4th Canvas2D winner in the last ~7 вҖ” a real diversity knock, offset by camera being the fresh cold-ish input + a distinct dye-feedback technique + Canvas2D not being banned); **aperture problem** вҖ” normal flow only recovers motion along the brightness gradient, so flat evenly-lit regions read still (reads gesture/edges well, not true dense Lucas-Kanade); **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless, no camera/display/speakers) вҖ” the felt tightness of the motionвҶ’bloomвҶ’grain weld and loudness balance want Karel's browser; idle self-demo + drone-from-Start guarantee never-blank/silent. **SAFETY:** no strobe вҖ” all luminance change is smooth trail decay well under 3 Hz; `prefers-reduced-motion` slows drift + gentles the feedback. **Never blank/silent:** synthetic drifting motion field drives the same viz+audio under a `text-destructive` notice when the camera is denied. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Canvas2D + Web Audio; no server/network/secret; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites; `eslint вҖҰ --max-warnings 0` = 0 + `tsc --noEmit` = 0 in 1542; authoritative `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `.next/server/app/dream/1542-flow-tracer/page.js` emitted (**36 kB**) + `"/dream/1542-flow-tracer"` in `routes-manifest.json` (plain `npm run build` dies only at "Collecting page data" on the container's ~700-route EMFILE fd-ceiling вҖ” infra, absent on Vercel). Winner of a WIDE fire; banked **вӯҗвӯҗ `1544-tilt-nebula`** (tiltвҶ’WebGPU-compute 130k-grain curl-noise nebula + standalone Canvas2D fallback вҖ” the WebGPU-ready bank is now 4 deep; ship on a verified-GPU night) + **вӯҗ `1546-om-tunnel`** (micвҶ’DOM/CSS-3D voice-propelled NDE tunnel; for a void-pole night) вҶ’ IDEAS В§754. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1542-flow-tracer/README.md`.

### [1516-spiral-tide](/dream/1516-spiral-tide) В· adult / psychedelic В· **keyboard attentional state/chirality flip (Space + вҶҗ/вҶ’; self-playing arc, NOT pointer-sole, NOT tilt)** / **Canvas2D (audio-reactive Bayer dither)** вҖ” a cortical traveling wave that morphs planarвҶ’concentricвҶ’spiral, and you *hear the spiral spin* В· cycle 749 В· DEEP-winner (2026-07-12) В· demoable В· `state: LSD breathing-field / spiral-wave vortex В· pole: intense/kinetic (rotating melt вҖ” rests the void)`
**Cycle 2 of `1506-theta-tide` вҖ” spin the breathing-field up into a real rotating spiral-wave vortex, and hear it turn.** A single **closed-form complex traveling wave** `ПҲ(u,v,t)` in cortical (u,v) coords crossfades through the three propagation geometries that Das/Zabeh/Ermentrout/Jacobs (*Nature Communications 2026*) showed distinguish cognitive states in human cortex вҖ” **PLANAR** `exp(i(k(cosПҶВ·u+sinПҶВ·v)вҲ’Пүt))` вҶ’ **CONCENTRIC** `exp(i(kВ·uвҲ’Пүt))` вҶ’ **SPIRAL** `exp(i(kВ·u+mВ·vвҲ’Пүt))` where integer **m** is a genuine **winding number** (sign = chirality; the `mВ·v` term winds the phase around the origin вҶ’ a real log/Archimedean spiral under the `r=exp(u)` log-polar warp, **not** a texture spun by a matrix). Under the BressloffвҖ“Cowan retino-cortical map each geometry reads out as a distinct **KlГјver form constant**. **The see==hear is exact/structural** вҖ” the *same* ПҲ that lights each pixel is evaluated at fixed listening rings to fire inharmonic struck-bell clusters (`[1,2.13,3.71,5.94]`); in SPIRAL the bright point's angle `v*=вҲ’(kВ·u+Пүt)/m` **winds continuously**, so the bell pan sweeps LвҶ”R and you literally *hear the spiral spinning* вҖ” one ПҲ, one `performance.now()` clock, one location, no GPU sim between eye and ear. **Render = pure Canvas2D** (jury-"fresh-again" 0Г—-primary; NOT three.js, NOT a fragment shader, NO GPU dependency вҶ’ renders anywhere with certainty): ~6.6k additive dots over a low-alpha clear (LSD colour-trails for free) quantized through an **audio-reactive Bayer 8Г—8 ordered dither** вҖ” the grain thickens with the sound (the render-technique anchor borrowed from **Robert Borghesi's ASTRODITHER**, webgpu.com **1 July 2026** вҖ” date-verified <14-day). **Attentional input:** Space/click advances the state; вҶҗ/вҶ’ flip spiral chirality **and** wave direction (sign of m and Пү) with a matching `startShepard` glissando reversal; the ~6-min REBUS-drive arc self-plays (planar drift вҶ’ concentric breathing вҶ’ spiral melt вҶ’ settle; minute 6 вү  minute 1). Winner of a **DEEP** 2-approach fire (vs `1514-spiral-states`, the WebGPU-compute driven-Kuramoto-lattice sibling with 123k instanced quads + AnalyserNode-driven dither вҶ’ banked вӯҗвӯҗ IDEAS В§749), chosen for the **exact structural see==hear** (the headline "hear the spiral turn" guaranteed by construction вҖ” the criterion that won 742/744/1492), the **lowest headless/production risk** (pure Canvas2D renders with certainty on Karel's phone/Safari, vs 1514's un-runnable-headless GPU look), and **Canvas2D diversity** (pairs the concept's cycle-2 on a different substrate than cycle-1's WebGPU). **Ambition вҖ” deliberate shot at the lab's first 5/5, honest 4/5:** **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (complex-wave field engine + state-morph/REBUS-arc machine + audio-reactive Bayer-dither Canvas2D renderer + spatialized inharmonic strike/drone/Shepard audio = 4) В· **#3** named refs (Das/Zabeh/Ermentrout/Jacobs Nature Comms 2026 spiral/concentric/planar waves В· BressloffвҖ“Cowan 2001 В· KlГјver form constants В· Borghesi ASTRODITHER) В· **#4** multi-cycle (literally the declared cycle-2 of 1506-theta-tide вҖ” genuine spiral + attentional flip) В· **#5** a **<14-day** finding (ASTRODITHER, verified 1 Jul, 11 days) cited alongside the rest вҖ” the exact **#4+#5-together** recipe the standing jury named as the whole gap between the 4-ceiling and a 5. **#1 abstained** (complex-wave / traveling-wave / dither are all lab-adjacent вҖ” traveling-wave in 1506/1121/1273, dither incidental in 1444/1478/1188) вҖ” the sole honest miss. **diversity:** `banned=[three.js-scene-graph(5Г—)В·WebGL2-frag/point-primaryВ·pointer-drag-SOLEВ·ego-void-vibeВ·Reich+JIВ·device-tilt(rested)] В· picked=[KEYBOARD attentional-state-flip INPUT (not pointer-sole/not tilt) В· Canvas2D OUTPUT (fresh-again 0Г—-primary) В· complex-wave-morph + winding-number-spiral + audio-reactive-dither TECHNIQUE В· LSD-iridescent PALETTE В· pole INTENSE/KINETIC (builds a spiral, doesn't dissolve вҖ” jury #3 "rest the void")]` вҖ” clears every live hard ban. **SAFETY:** effective rate ~0.7 Hz (well under the 3-Hz ceiling); spatial moving ring/spiral + slow hue drift (mean luminance ~constant, no strobe); dither animates <0.2 Hz; `prefers-reduced-motion` вҶ’ 0.4Г— + desaturate; gesture-gated AudioContext, master вүӨ0.2 вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor`, вүӨ14 voices, full teardown; never blank (idle drift before Begin) / never silent (drone from Begin). **Honest knocks:** the dither reads the field's smoothed gain *envelope*, not a post-mix AnalyserNode (genuinely audio-*coupled*, not an FFT of the bus вҖ” 1514 did the AnalyserNode version); a hard вҶҗ/вҶ’ mash rebuilds the Shepard bed (can sound abrupt); **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless вҖ” no screen/speakers): the felt tightness of the sync, the spiral-spin pan, and the loudness balance across states want Karel's browser + headphones. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure `"use client"`; no server/network/secret; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites; `eslint вҖҰ --max-warnings 0` = 0 + `tsc --noEmit` = 0 in 1516; plain `npm run build` linted + typechecked + compiled with 0 errors/0 warnings from 1516 (only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings), died only at "Collecting page data" on the container's ~700-route **EMFILE** fd-ceiling (infra, absent on ### [1508-wolf-throat](/dream/1508-wolf-throat) В· adult / psychedelic В· **microphone (voice fundamental, YIN; phantom self-singer fallback)** / **Canvas2D** вҖ” sing across a xenharmonic scale over a live sensory-dissonance terrain, and *hear* the wrongness you see В· cycle 748 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-12) В· demoable В· `state: microtonal/xenharmonic "wrongness" В· pole: ecstatic (warm)`
**Sing your way across a whole xenharmonic scale вҖ” and be gloriously *wrong* in it on purpose вҖ” while a live PlompвҖ“Levelt/Sethares roughness *terrain* ripples under your voice and the instrument sings the same consonance/dissonance back, so you HEAR exactly the wrongness you SEE.** This finally **cashes the standing 2026-07-11 JURY's provocation #6 verbatim** вҖ” "cash `1408-wolf-ring` into a full playable microtonal/xenharmonic instrument, a whole scale you can be *wrong* in, with the mic as controller" вҖ” and **revives the mic-as-controller lane** (jury flagged mic at 0Г—) on the **fresh-again Canvas2D-primary surface**. Winner of a psychedelic **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (vs. a 524k-particle WebGPU curl-noise plasma-aurora and a zero-WebGL pure-CSS-3D form-constant kaleidoscope вҶ’ both banked to IDEAS В§748), chosen for the **tightest see = hear unity** of the trio (the roughness you see is computed against the *same* reference spectrum the throat voice plays, so audible beating grows exactly where the on-screen ridge rises) + the **most conceptually distinct/surprising** direction + the **least headless-unverifiable** (it actually renders + deterministic audio, vs the other two's own explicitly-unverified GPU-look / CSS-aesthetic bets). **`pitch.ts` вҖ” hand-rolled YIN** fundamental tracker (difference function вҶ’ cumulative-mean-normalized difference вҶ’ threshold pick вҶ’ parabolic interpolation, no deps). **`tunings.ts` вҖ” 4 switchable tunings** (BohlenвҖ“Pierce 13-ED-tritave, 19-EDO, slГ©ndro-flavoured, 5-limit just) + the **PlompвҖ“Levelt/Sethares sensory-dissonance model** implemented from scratch (`pairDissonance`/`complexRoughness`/`buildLandscape` вҖ” sum of pairwise partial-roughness of the sung complex tone against the held reference spectrum, folded to the tuning's period). **`audio.ts` вҖ” the instrument sings back:** a warm harmonic drone bed (the landscape's reference spectrum) + an additive gliding "throat" voice; master ramps from silence peaking **вүӨ0.22** вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` limiter; **mic вҶ’ AnalyserNode ONLY, never routed to `destination`** (no howl); full teardown (rAF cancel, audio stop, media-track stop, `AudioContext.close`, ResizeObserver disconnect). **`page.tsx`** owns a single rAF loop (pitch analysis + audio + Canvas2D terrain render): a warm ember-lit dissonance terrain with parallax echo layers, roughness-colored glowing ridges (goldвҶ’emberвҶ’hot-magenta), pulsing degree landmarks, and a trailing cursor orb that blooms rings in consonance valleys and throws shards on roughness ridges. **Named refs (README):** William Sethares *Tuning, Timbre, Spectrum, Scale*; Plomp & Levelt (1965) sensory-dissonance; Harry Partch *Genesis of a Music*; BohlenвҖ“Pierce; and the explicit lineage from this lab's **1408-wolf-ring**. **Ambition 2вҖ“3/5 (honest вҖ” a WIDE explorer):** **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (YIN pitch detection + xenharmonic tuning/roughness engine + additive throat+drone synth + Canvas2D terrain renderer = 4) В· **#3** named refs above. **#1 abstained** (voice-pitch вҶ’ xenharmonic is lab-adjacent вҖ” the very-similar banked `1484-xeno-lattice` is a *tonnetz node lattice*; 1508 differs by being a *continuous roughness terrain you navigate* with the same-spectrum "hear the wrongness" payoff); **#5 NOT claimed** (В§748 dive anchor вҖ” the Dec-2025 WebGPU-critical-mass milestone вҖ” is ~7mo, not <14-day; logged straight, and it seeded the *banked* WebGPU explorer, not this winner). **diversity:** `banned=[three.js-scene-graph(5Г— last-10)В·WebGL2-raw-frag/point-primaryВ·pointer/touch-drag-SOLEВ·ego-dissolution/void-vibeВ·Reich+consonant-JI-togetherВ·device-tilt(~4Г—, rested)] В· picked=[MIC INPUT (revives the 0Г— sensor; NOT pointer-sole, NOT tilt) В· Canvas2D OUTPUT (fresh-again 0Г—-primary; NOT three.js, NOT a fragment shader) В· voiceвҶ’xenharmonic-roughness-terrain TECHNIQUE В· warm-microtonal PALETTE В· pole ECSTATIC (a scale you can be *wrong* in вҖ” rests the void, jury #3)]` вҖ” clears every live hard ban. **SAFETY:** no strobe вҖ” the only global luminance change is a `SafeFlicker` breathe at ~0.08 Hz (floor 0.82); `prefers-reduced-motion` slows motion + damps it. **Never blank/silent:** the terrain self-animates on the splash before mic permission, and if the mic is denied a **phantom auto-singer** glides across the scale (driving the same synth) beneath a `text-destructive` notice, so it always sounds. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + Canvas2D; no server, no network, no secret; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** normalizer = **0 rewrites**; `eslint src/app/dream/1508-wolf-throat --max-warnings 0` = **0** + `tsc --noEmit` = 0 errors in 1508; plain `npm run build` compiled + linted + typechecked with **0 errors/0 warnings from 1508** (only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings) and died ONLY at "Collecting page data" on the container's standing ~700-route **EMFILE** fd-ceiling (infra, absent on Vercel); authoritative gate completed via `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `.next/server/app/dream/1508-wolf-throat/page.js` emitted (**28 kB**) + `"/dream/1508-wolf-throat"` in `routes-manifest.json`. **NOT ear-verified for feel** (headless, no mic/headphones): YIN's octave-stability on a real sung vowel, glide-smoothing, and whether the beating "wrongness" reads as viscerally as intended want Karel's browser + headphones (speaker bleed can occasionally fool YIN вҖ” noted in README). Banked **вӯҗвӯҗ `1510-plasma-wind`** (TOP ship-next вҖ” 524k-particle **WebGPU-compute** curl-noise ecstatic plasma-aurora + Canvas2D fallback; cashes the В§748 WebGPU-ubiquity research + the jury's #1 substrate; "massively bigger") + **вӯҗ `1512-facet-fold`** (constraint-art вҖ” the lab's likely first *pure-DOM/CSS-3D, zero-WebGL* psychedelic piece; KlГјver form-constant kaleidoscope) вҶ’ IDEAS В§748.
