### [1506-theta-tide](/dream/1506-theta-tide) В· adult / psychedelic В· **self-playing ~7-min REBUS arc (pointer/keys nudge in cycle-2; NOT pointer-sole, NOT tilt)** / **WebGPU-compute oscillator lattice (+ CPU/Canvas2D fallback)** вҖ” psychedelic "breathing surfaces" rebuilt from their cortical mechanism В· cycle 747 В· DEEP-winner (2026-07-12) В· demoable В· `state: LSD breathing-surfaces / traveling-wave В· pole: intense (breathing-melt, rests the void)`
**The LSD hallucination of *breathing surfaces*, rebuilt from its likely cortical mechanism instead of faked as a texture.** A ~5-Hz cortical **traveling wave** sweeps a lattice of **coupled phase oscillators** (a driven Kuramoto model) living in *cortical* (u,v) coordinates; the inverse **log-polar warp** (r = exp(u)) turns the cortical plane-wave into the classic expanding/contracting concentric "breathing tunnel" вҖ” and every wavefront that crosses a listening ring **rings an inharmonic struck-bell tone panned to its screen angle**, so *the visible wavefront IS the audible sweep*. A ~7-minute **REBUS / entropic-brain arc** raises coupling, noise and the number of interfering sources вҖ” one calm wave at the cosmic onset вҶ’ interfering wavefronts + spirals at the melt вҶ’ a gentle settle; minute 6 вү  minute 1 (seeded, non-looping). **`sim.ts` вҖ” the driven-Kuramoto engine** (single source of truth for BOTH renderer and audio: `dОё/dt = KВ·ОЈsin(Оё_neighborвҲ’Оё) + FВ·ОЈ_s ampВ·sin(Оҳ_sвҲ’Оё) + noise`, front-crossing `collectStrikes`). **Primary render = WebGPU compute** вҖ” a WGSL `@compute` ping-pong lattice drawn as ~123k instanced additive quads through the warp (jury provocation #1's wanted under-used substrate). **Mandatory fallback** runs the *same* lattice on CPU (92Г—62 вүҲ 5.7k cells) via Canvas2D вҖ” never a full-screen fragment shader (banned this cycle), never blank, and audio is renderer-independent so it's never silent. **SAFETY:** 5 Hz is above the 3-Hz flicker ceiling, so the wave is a *spatial* moving ring + smooth local hue drift (mean luminance ~constant, no strobe), honestly slowed into the theta band (~1вҖ“1.8 Hz); `prefers-reduced-motion` slows + de-saturates. Winner of a **DEEP** 2-approach fire (vs `1508-breathing-field`, a Canvas2D analytic-wavefield sibling вҶ’ banked), chosen for the more faithful mechanism (a real oscillator-lattice integration vs an analytic approximation) + cashing the WebGPU-compute substrate + being the bigger build. **Ambition honest 4/5:** #2 вүҘ3 subsystems (driven-Kuramoto sim + WebGPU-compute lattice/Canvas2D fallback + REBUS arc state + wavefrontвҶ’audio engine) + #3 named refs (Comm.Biology 2026 5-Hz cortical-traveling-wave paper / BressloffвҖ“Cowan 2001 / KlГјver form constants / Carhart-Harris REBUS / Kuramoto) + #4 multi-cycle commitment (declared cycles 1/2/3). #1 abstained (phase-oscillator/traveling-wave has lab adjacency вҖ” 1121, 1273); #5 NOT claimed (anchor ~6mo, not <14-day вҖ” logged straight). Honest knocks: see=hear tightest at onset, deliberately loosens into the melt (REBUS decoherence); NOT eye/ear-verified for feel (headless вҖ” no GPU/speakers); 5-Hz slowed to theta for safety. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1506-theta-tide/README.md`.
### [1502-sing-lattice](/dream/1502-sing-lattice) В· adult / psychedelic В· **microphone (voice fundamental; click/keys fallback)** / **DOM/CSS-3D lattice** вҖ” sing into a BohlenвҖ“Pierce xenharmonic scale that has no octave В· cycle 746 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-12) В· demoable В· `state: microtonal/xenharmonic disorientation В· pole: intense (warm)`
**Sing INTO a xenharmonic tuning lattice вҖ” instead of a piano's 12 tones, your voice wanders a strange, beautiful, deliberately-"wrong" scale where every node you land on lights up and rings the room sympathetically.** The lab's **first voiceвҶ’xenharmonic-snap instrument** and the return of **mic input (0Г— for weeks вҖ” the jury's most-wanted under-used sensor)**. Winner of a psychedelic **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (vs. a hand-tracking three.js aurora and a tilt/WebGPU particle torrent), chosen for **cashing the 2026-07-11 jury's named provocation #6 to the letter** вҖ” "cash 1408-wolf-ring into a full playable microtonal/xenharmonic instrument, a whole scale you can be *wrong* in, with the mic as controller" вҖ” on the most under-used INPUT (mic) and a jury-blessed under-used OUTPUT (DOM/CSS-3D), warm/intense (resting the 8Г— cosmic-void cluster). **`tuning.ts` вҖ” the xenharmonic engine:** the 13 just **"Lambda" BohlenвҖ“Pierce** degrees (period = the **tritave 3:1 = 1901.955Вў**, NOT the octave; consonance is an *odd-harmonic* phenomenon, signature chord **3:5:7**, ratios factoring into powers of **3В·5В·7 only, no factor of 2**), each factored into primes and placed on a 2-D **Erv-Wilson harmonic lattice** (axis 5 horizontal, axis 7 depth) вҖ” verified numerically (all 13 ratios factor exactly to their `(a,b)` coords, cents ascending, 16 harmonic bonds), with tritave reduction + nearest-node snap (signed cents deviation) + register-matched play frequencies. **`audio.ts` вҖ” pitch detection + instrument:** real-time **autocorrelation via the McLeod NSDF** (`2В·ОЈx[i]x[i+П„]/ОЈ(x[i]ВІ+x[i+П„]ВІ)` on `getFloatTimeDomainData`, first-strong-peak + parabolic interpolation + RMS/clarity gate вҖ” deliberately NOT an FFT-bin peak, which octave-errors on a sung vowel); a glided **odd-harmonic** "snapped" voice (partials 1,3,5,7,9 вҖ” the native BP timbre); real **KarplusвҖ“Strong** sympathetic strings (noise burst вҶ’ tuned delay loop w/ feedback lowpass) that also softly excite each struck node's **harmonic lattice neighbours** (the tarab strings answering вҖ” hold a few tones and the room blooms into a 3:5:7 chord); a generated **convolution-reverb room** вҶ’ limiter, master вүӨ 0.18; raw-mic `getUserMedia` (EC/NS/AGC off). **`page.tsx` вҖ” the DOM/CSS-3D lattice:** real `<button>`/`<div>` nodes in a `preserve-3d` perspective-tilted (50В°) plane, popping in `translateZ` with an **amberвҶ’violet** decaying per-node energy glow, transformed-div harmonic **bonds**, a live Hz/node-name/ratio/cents/clarity readout, and a small secondary canvas tracing your pitch against the lattice's cent-lines. **Named refs (README):** **BohlenвҖ“Pierce** (Heinz Bohlen 1972 / John R. Pierce); **Erv Wilson's** tuning lattices; **Sevish's Scale Workshop** (browser xenharmonic tooling, active 2026); this lab's own **1408-wolf-ring** вҖ” extended from a single playable "wrong" fifth to an entire scale you sing *inside*. **Ambition 3/5 (honest вҖ” a WIDE explorer):** **#1** technique never used in the lab (voiceвҶ’xenharmonic-snap onto a non-octave lattice; `bohlen`/`xenharmonic`/`tuning-lattice` grep-thin вҖ” prior tritave piece 276 was kids-tap, not voice-driven) В· **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (NSDF pitch-detection + BP xenharmonic tuning engine + KarplusвҖ“Strong sympathetic synth + DOM/CSS-3D render = 4) В· **#3** named refs above. **diversity:** `banned=[WebGL2-raw-frag/point-primary(9Г—)В·pointer/touch-drag-sole(10Г—)В·ego-dissolution/void-tunnel-vibe(4Г—)В·Reich-phasing+consonant-JI-together] В· picked=[MIC INPUT (0Г— for weeks вҖ” the rarest sensor; NOT pointer, NOT camera) В· DOM/CSS-3D OUTPUT (jury-blessed, under-used, NOT a fragment shader) В· voiceвҶ’xenharmonic-snap TECHNIQUE (grep-fresh) В· warm amberвҶ’violet PALETTE В· pole INTENSE/warm (a scale you can be *wrong* in, NOT dissolving-void)]` вҖ” clears every live hard ban. **SAFETY:** all node/room motion is smooth exponential decay (no strobe); `prefers-reduced-motion` shortens the energy tails; nothing flickers near the photosensitive band. **Never blank/silent:** if the mic is denied/unavailable a `text-destructive` notice shows AND click + keyboard (`1-9 0 q w e` вҶ’ steps 0вҖ“12) trigger the same lattice so it always sounds. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + React/CSS; no server, no network, no secret; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** plain `npm run build` compiled + linted + typechecked with **0 errors** from 1502 (only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings) and died ONLY at "Collecting page data" on the container's standing ~700-route **EMFILE** fd-ceiling (hard limit 4096, unraisable вҖ” infra, absent on Vercel); authoritative gate completed via `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = route built, `.next/server/app/dream/1502-sing-lattice/page.js` emitted (**34 kB**) + `"/dream/1502-sing-lattice"` in `routes-manifest.json`; `eslint src/app/dream/1502-sing-lattice --max-warnings 0` = **0** (removed one unused disable-directive); normalizer = 1 rewrite; `"use client"` line 1; no `route.ts`. **NOT ear-verified for feel** (headless, no mic/headphones): the NSDF's octave-stability on a real sung vowel and whether the sympathetic 3:5:7 bloom is audibly gorgeous want Karel's browser + headphones (reverb leaks into the mic without them, by design). Banked **вӯҗвӯҗ `1500-aurora-hands`** (TOP ship-next camera-slot вҖ” conduct a two-voice aurora with MediaPipe hand-tracking вҶ’ three.js ribbons + additive/FM; MiMu-gloves spirit) + **вӯҗ `1504-solar-wind`** (tilt-steered **WebGPU-compute** 200k-particle curl-noise torrent that sonifies its own flow; Bridson SIGGRAPH 2007) вҶ’ IDEAS В§746. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1502-sing-lattice/README.md`

### [1492-pulsar-clock](/dream/1492-pulsar-clock) В· adult / psychedelic В· **key+tilt flight (arrow/WASD + device-orientation; self-drifting, NOT pointer-sole)** / **three.js scene-graph** вҖ” real neutron-star sky + HRTF-spatialised polyrhythm (readable WebGL notice fallback) В· cycle 745 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-12) В· demoable В· `state: cosmic vastness / deep-space listening В· pole: cosmic-ambient (building)`
**The night sky as a clock you can HEAR вҖ” fifteen real neutron stars, each ticking at its true measured rotation period, spatialised where it actually hangs, forming a vast slowly-phasing polyrhythm.** The lab's **first pulsar sonification** (`pulsar` grep-**0Г—** as a dedicated prototype) and a piece in the under-used **external-real-data** lane. Winner of a psychedelic **WIDE** 3-explorer fire, chosen for the biggest/most-surprising concept + the tightest **see = hear** unity (every visible beam sweep *is* its audible tick) + cashing the jury's #1 wanted surface (**three.js scene-graph**, off the banned fragment shader). **`catalog.ts`** embeds a real pulsar catalog whose sky positions are **decoded straight from each pulsar's designation** (PSR B1919+21 вҶ’ RA 19h19m / Dec +21В°; the Crab B0531+21; Vela B0833вҲ’45 low in the south) + a `mulberry32`-seeded set of deterministic fill-ins (~15 total), and a `classify()` **period вҶ’ audio-behaviour** mapper. **`audio.ts` вҖ” sonified by the real period:** millisecond pulsars (B1937+21 1.558 ms вҶ’ ~642 Hz, B1957+20 вҶ’ ~622 Hz beating ~20 Hz against it, J0437вҲ’4715 вҶ’ ~174 Hz, Crab 33.5 ms вҶ’ ~30 Hz) fuse into a continuous **PITCHED beating chord**; second-scale pulsars (Vela ~11/s, Geminga, B0329+54, **Bell Burnell's B1919+21** at its real 1.337 s) fire discrete **woodblock clicks**; **J0901вҲ’4046 (75.9 s)** tolls once like a cathedral **bell** вҖ” each on its own **HRTF `PannerNode`** fixed at its sky position, over a JI perfect-fifth **drone bed** (shared `droneBank`) whose `drive` rises as more pulsars fall into earshot, blooming into the shared `convolutionVoid` reverb; a **lookahead scheduler** keeps the real periods phase-accurate; `AudioContext` born on the Start gesture, master **ramped 0вҶ’вүӨ0.22** through a `DynamicsCompressor`, concurrent voices capped вүӨ14 (4 pitched + 4 drone + вүӨ6 ticks). **`scene.ts` вҖ” genuine three.js scene-graph** (NOT a fragment shader): Milky-Way-biased starfield + per-pulsar core/halo/double **sweeping lighthouse beam** with clamped visual spin + smooth per-tick glow envelopes; deep indigoвҶ’violetвҶ’cold-white X-ray/radio-telescope palette. **`flight.ts`:** arrow/WASD + device-tilt camera with a self-drift baseline, clamped inside the sphere вҖ” **fully self-plays** (flying only changes what is near and loud). **Named refs (README):** **Jocelyn Bell Burnell's 1967 discovery** (the "scruff"/LGM-1 signal, PSR B1919+21) В· **NASA/Chandra "A Universe of Sound"** pulsar sonifications (Crab, Vela cross-mapping) В· **Ryoji Ikeda _supersymmetry_** (X-ray/data-scan aesthetic). **Ambition 2/5 (honest вҖ” a WIDE explorer, not a 5/5 shot):** **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (embedded real-data catalog + period-mapper В· lookahead polyrhythmic Web-Audio scheduler w/ per-pulsar HRTF + JI drone В· three.js scene-graph sky w/ sweeping beams В· key/tilt flight camera) В· **#3** named refs above. **#5 abstained honestly** вҖ” the В§745 dive's strict <14-day hunt came up short (see RESEARCH В§745), so no <14-day citation is claimed. **diversity:** `banned=[WebGL2-raw-frag/point-primary(6Г— last-10)В·pointer-drag-sole(вүҘ4Г—)] В· picked=[key+tilt-flight INPUT (breaks the pointer-drag rut; NOT sole-pointer) В· three.js scene-graph OUTPUT (the jury's wanted anti-fragment surface) В· real-pulsar-period polyrhythmic-sonification TECHNIQUE (grep-0Г—) В· X-ray indigoвҶ’violet PALETTE В· pole cosmic-ambient BUILDING (structured/accreting, not dissolving-void)]` вҖ” clears every live hard ban. **SAFETY:** no strobe вҖ” the fastest pulsars' visual spin is clamped (evocative, not literal 642 rev/s), beam brightness is a smooth glow envelope on small local objects, `prefers-reduced-motion` softens drift + pulses. **Never blank/silent:** the sky drifts + beams sweep on load before any audio; Start begins the self-ticking cosmos; `text-destructive` WebGL notice if unavailable. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` three.js + Web Audio; no server, no secret, no network вҖ” catalog embedded, not fetched; `three` already a dep вҖ” zero new npm deps). **Validation:** plain `npm run build` **compiled + linted + typechecked with 0 errors** (only pre-existing `src/lib/**` + `1085-lightning-organ` warnings, none in 1492) and died ONLY at "Collecting page data" on the container's standing ~700-route **EMFILE** fd-ceiling (infra, absent on Vercel); authoritative gate completed via `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = route built, `.next/server/app/dream/1492-pulsar-clock/page.js` emitted (**35.5 kB**) + `"/dream/1492-pulsar-clock"` in `routes-manifest.json`; `eslint src/app/dream/1492-pulsar-clock --max-warnings 0` = **0**; `tsc --noEmit` = 0 errors in 1492; normalizer = 0 rewrites; `"use client"` line 1; no `route.ts`; no `Math.random`/`Date` in logic. **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless, no GPU/display/headphones): HRTF spatialisation convincingness + whether the emergent phase-**alignment** moments are audibly striking want Karel's browser; the self-drifting sweeping sky guarantees never-blank/silent. Banked **вӯҗ `1496-escher-fall`** (TOP ship-next for an **INTENSE** night вҖ” fall forever into a real PoincarГ©-disk **{6,4} hyperbolic tessellation** navigated by MГ¶bius translation, married to a descending ShepardвҖ“Risset glissando + ring-crossing Phrygian-dominant arpeggio, all **Canvas2D** vector; the jury-wanted non-void intensity on the fresh-again Canvas2D-primary surface) + **вӯҗ `1494-tarab-room`** (**mic** returns to the lab вҖ” find a room's hidden JI chord with your voice, waking **sympathetic strings** through their 2f/3f harmonics on a **DOM/CSS-3D** rack; Lucier/tarab/Helmholtz; ghost-singer self-play fallback) вҶ’ IDEAS В§745. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1492-pulsar-clock/README.md`

### [1490-slow-cathedral](/dream/1490-slow-cathedral) В· adult / psychedelic В· **device-orientation / tilt (+ pointer / arrow-keys; full self-play)** / **three.js scene-graph** вҖ” incremental LineSegments/Points/Sprite growth (readable WebGL/tilt notices) В· cycle 744 В· DEEP-winner (2026-07-11) В· demoable В· `state: meditative time-dilation / the eternal present В· pole: cosmic-ambient (ascending/building, not dissolving)`
**A cathedral of light that builds itself, strut by strut, over ten minutes вҖ” a sparse sapling at minute one, a towering vault of thousands of struts by minute ten, and a topologically different structure at every moment in between.** The DEEP fire's concept was **"THE LONG NOW" вҖ” meditative time-dilation as a genuinely long-form, self-evolving cosmos that is measurably different at minute 10 than minute 1**, attacked via two generative mechanisms (this **space-colonization GROWTH** vs. an **ACCRETION** shell-cosmos); this won for the tightest **see = hear** unity + the most legible/photogenic min-1-vs-min-10 arc. **`growth.ts`** is a **space-colonization state machine with accumulating memory** (seeded `mulberry32`, uniform spatial-hash grid, wall-clock-paced `catchUp(progress)`, per-frame iteration cap): 9 roots climb toward a ~1,950-point gothic attractor cloud (flared base В· 8 ribbed pillars w/ angular-quantised mandala symmetry В· arched vault В· tapering spire), each reached attractor *consumed* and firing a growth event; the node list only ever **grows** вҖ” genuine memory, not a loop. **`scene.ts`** is a real **three.js scene-graph** (NOT a fragment shader, NOT Canvas2D): struts as one incremental `THREE.LineSegments` with additive vertex colours, junctions as `THREE.Points` glow, fresh tips blooming via pooled additive `THREE.Sprite` flares, appended into pre-allocated dynamic buffers as nodes accrete; palette **ascends with height** (deep-indigo foundations вҶ’ violet nave вҶ’ gold/white cathedral-glass spire) under a slowly orbiting/rising/dollying camera. **`audio.ts` вҖ” what you SEE growing is what you HEAR:** every growth event rings a soft **inharmonic bell** (fundamental + metallic partials) **pitched by the event's height** on a JI pentatonic ladder and **panned by its x** (low struts low, spire like high glass), beneath a JI **drone bed** (shared `droneBank`) whose lowpass opens as the structure fills; `AudioContext` born on the Start gesture, master **ramped 0вҶ’вүӨ0.2** through a `DynamicsCompressor`, вүӨ14 bell voices, full teardown. **Idle preview vs real:** on load the cathedral is already growing at a 32Г— compressed timescale (regrows on a silent loop) so a 20-s glance sees it rise; **Begin** resets to the sapling and runs the full 600-s build with audio. **Input:** device-tilt steers the gaze (iOS `requestPermission` from Start, silent pointer fallback); pointer-move + arrow-keys on desktop; **fully self-plays** вҖ” tilt is only parallax. **Named refs (README):** **Runions, Lane & Prusinkiewicz, _"Modeling and visualization of leaf venation patterns"_ (2005)** space-colonization + **Lindenmayer L-systems (1968)** В· **Terry Riley _In C_** (slow structural accretion) В· **Гүliane Radigue** (hour-long ARP drones) В· **La Monte Young _Dream House_** В· the **Buddhist _kalpa_**. **Research anchor (В§744, <14-day):** **arXiv 2606.29427** *"Entropic Time, Psychophysics, and Deformed Neural Dynamics"* (2026-06-28) вҖ” subjective time tracks **entropy-production rate** (dП„/dt), a thermodynamic basis for psychedelic time-dilation (REBUS); the piece implements this as a **design law** вҖ” its branch/voice cadence *accelerates* over the arc so the later minutes should feel *longer/timeless*. **Ambition 4/5 (the lab's first attempt assembling #4 AND #5 вҖ” the jury's named path to a first 5/5):** **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (space-colonization growth w/ memory + incremental three.js scene-graph + event-driven bell/drone; + tilt/pointer/keys) В· **#3** named refs above В· **#4** declared **multi-cycle commitment** (cycle 2 = subtree-weighted tapered tubes + closed gothic vaults + voice-leading + bloom pass; cycle 3 = post-build "consecration" settle + bidirectional seeвҶ”hear coupling) В· **#5** today's В§744 dive (arXiv 2606.29427, <14-day, implemented as the accelerating-cadence design law). **#1 abstained** (growth/branching has lab adjacency вҖ” `1050-mycelial-grow`/`408`/`146`/`872`). **diversity:** `banned=[WebGL2-raw-frag/point-primary(6Г— last-10)В·pointer-drag-sole(вүҘ4Г—)] В· picked=[device-tilt INPUT (breaks pointer-drag rut) В· three.js scene-graph OUTPUT (off the banned fragment shader) В· space-colonization generative-growth + long-form-stateful TECHNIQUE В· indigoвҶ’gold cathedral-glass PALETTE В· pole cosmic-ambient ASCENDING/BUILDING (rests the jury-flagged void вҖ” only 2Г— / not a hard ban this window вҖ” by accreting, the opposite of dissolving)]` вҖ” clears every live hard ban. **Honest knocks:** leans a **JI/consonant pitch spine** (bells + drone) вҖ” the lab's long-fought monoculture, though NOT paired with Reich phasing so it dodges the *hard* ban (cycle-2 should add the "sound wrong" dimension, jury #6); visuals are still a glowing graph, not yet load-bearing gothic stone (declared next-cycle). **SAFETY:** no strobe вҖ” the only global luminance change is a вүҲ0.045 Hz swell; `prefers-reduced-motion` slows all motion + damps it. **Never blank/silent:** the idle regrowing preview + full self-play + `text-rose-300` WebGL/tilt notices. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` three.js + Web Audio; `three` already a dep вҖ” zero new npm deps). **Validation:** authoritative whole-tree `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `.next/server/app/dream/1490-slow-cathedral/page.js` emitted (**24.9 kB**) + `"/dream/1490-slow-cathedral"` in `routes-manifest.json`; `eslint src/app/dream/1490-slow-cathedral --max-warnings 0` = **0**; `tsc --noEmit` = **0 errors in 1490**; `"use client"` line 1; no `route.ts`; no banned `text-white/30|40|50`; no `Math.random`/`Date` in logic. (Plain `npm run build` still `EMFILE`s at "Collecting page data" on the container's 4096-fd ceiling across ~700 routes вҖ” infra not code, absent on Vercel; the builder additionally ran a headless growth sim: deterministic to full height, 99.6% attractors consumed, no stalls.) **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless, no GPU/display/speakers): the felt pacing of the real 1Г— 10-min arc vs the 32Г— preview, bell-mix warmth, and cathedral legibility want Karel's browser. Winner of a psychedelic **DEEP** 2-approach fire; banked **вӯҗ `1488-the-long-now`** (the same time-dilation concept as an **ACCRETION cosmos** вҖ” richer arc state-machine w/ non-repeating JI modulation + 72-shell memory; **its cycle-2 plan wires Karel's real _Path_ piano as an onset-seeding carrier** вҖ” the cleanest resurrect for a night wanting his real music) вҶ’ IDEAS В§744. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1490-slow-cathedral/README.md`

### [1482-face-mandala](/dream/1482-face-mandala) В· adult / psychedelic В· **front camera + MediaPipe FaceLandmarker v2 blendshapes** / **three.js scene-graph** вҖ” 5 nested InstancedMesh petal tiers (LFO self-demo fallback) В· cycle 743 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-11) В· demoable В· `state: psilocybin affect-coupling В· pole: intense`
**Your own face conducts a living psychedelic mandala вҖ” open your jaw and it blooms, smile and it turns gold, raise your brows for another tier, tilt your head to spin it in 3D.** The lab's **first face-blendshape input** (grep-**0Г—**) вҖ” cashes the 2026-07-11 JURY's single most-emphasized *standing* provocation (**#2** вҖ” MediaPipe FaceLandmarker, "sat three days, nothing built it," the exact embodied ML sensor to break the **pointer-drag rut** (10/15)) and this cycle's research chain (В§704/В§743, <14-day). The front camera feeds **MediaPipe FaceLandmarker v2** (`face.ts`, loaded at runtime from a CDN via a non-static `import(/* webpackIgnore: true */ вҖҰ)` вҖ” **not** an npm dep, typed `any`), which returns 52 ARKit-style **blendshape** coefficients + a `facialTransformationMatrixes` head-pose matrix every frame, entirely in the browser. Those coefficients bend **both geometry and an affect-coupled synth**: `jawOpen` вҶ’ mandala blooms outward + opens the drone lowpass/level В· `mouthSmile` вҶ’ warm gold saturation + upper partials В· `browInnerUp` вҶ’ an upper petal tier + a lifted partial В· `browDown` (frown) вҶ’ contracts + darkens В· `eyeBlink` вҶ’ throttled pulse + a **bell strike** В· `mouthPucker` вҶ’ tightens the kaleidoscope (fewer, sharper petals) В· head yaw/pitch/roll вҶ’ rotates/tilts the whole mandala in 3D. **OUTPUT = genuine three.js scene-graph** (`mandala.ts`, the jury's wanted anti-fragment surface вҖ” **not** a full-screen shader): five tiers of `InstancedMesh` diamond petals with **N-fold rotational symmetry**, additive glow over a violet void + a pulsing gold core; the N-fold petal rings are **KlГјver form-constant / BressloffвҖ“Cowan cortical (log-polar) symmetry** made an instrument. **AUDIO** (`audio.ts`): an affect-coupled overtone drone (lowpass opened by jawOpen, partials lifted by smile/brow) + pooled FM bell strikes; master **0вҶ’0.2** into a `DynamicsCompressor`, вүӨ14 voices (6 drone osc + вүӨ12 pooled bells, stolen oldest-first), click-free envelopes, full teardown (osc stop + AudioContext close + `cancelAnimationFrame` + three.js `dispose()` + media-track stop). **When the face is neutral or absent, a slow autonomous breathing keeps the mandala alive and singing.** **Named refs (README):** MediaPipe FaceLandmarker v2 (Google, 2024вҖ“2025) В· KlГјver's four form constants + BressloffвҖ“Cowan retino-cortical map В· psilocybin **affect-coupling** (Carhart-Harris entropic-brain / REBUS вҖ” imagery shifts with emotional state, here delivered literally by coupling live facial affect to the form). **Ambition 3/5:** **#1** face-blendshape input (grep-0Г—) driving a three.js instanced mandala В· **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (front camera + ML face-landmark inference + three.js `InstancedMesh` scene-graph + affect-coupled Web Audio) В· **#5** browser-native MediaPipe FaceLandmarker blendshapes as affect input (В§704 2026-07-08 / В§743 <14-day). **diversity:** `banned=[WebGL2-raw-frag/point-primary(jury 9Г—)В·pointer-drag-sole(jury 10Г—)В·ego-dissolution/void-vibe(jury 4Г—)В·Reich+JI-together] В· picked=[camera+FaceLandmarker INPUT (breaks the 10/15 pointer-drag rut with real ML tracking, not pixels) В· three.js scene-graph OUTPUT (off the banned 9Г— fragment shader) В· face-affectвҶ’form-constant-mandala TECHNIQUE В· neon-jeweled PALETTE В· pole INTENSE (rests the banned void)]` вҖ” clears every live hard ban. **SAFETY:** no strobe вҖ” the only luminance modulation is a soft opt-in `SafeFlicker` breathing drift вүӨ3 Hz; `prefers-reduced-motion` disables it + gentles every swing. **Never blank/silent:** every stage (`getUserMedia` / CDN import / landmarker create / detect / audio) is `try/catch`-wrapped вҶ’ any failure drops to a **`text-rose-300` notice + LFO self-demo** that drives the same blendshape values so the mandala always blooms + sings (this is what renders if the CDN/camera is blocked at review). **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` three.js + Web Audio + camera; `three` already a dep вҖ” zero new npm deps). **Validation:** authoritative whole-tree `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `.next/server/app/dream/1482-face-mandala/page.js` emitted (**32.9 kB**) + `"/dream/1482-face-mandala"` in `routes-manifest.json`; `tsc --noEmit` = **0 errors**; `eslint src/app/dream/1482-face-mandala --max-warnings 0` = **0**; `"use client"` line 1; no `route.ts`; no banned `text-white/30|40|50`. (Plain `npm run build` still `EMFILE`s at "Collecting page data" on the container's 4096-fd ceiling across 700 routes вҖ” infra not code, absent on Vercel; compile-mode runs the identical TS+ESLint+compile gates Vercel enforces.) **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless, no camera/GPU/display/speakers): the live MediaPipe blendshape path (CDN model load, head-pose decomposition, tracking quality) + the mandala bloom/warmth + bell mix want Karel's browser+camera; the LFO self-demo + drone-from-Start guarantee never-blank/silent. Winner of a psychedelic **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (camera-face mandala vs mic-voice BohlenвҖ“Pierce lattice vs NOAA-data aurora); banked **вӯҗвӯҗ `1484-xeno-lattice`** (TOP ship-next вҖ” sing through a **BohlenвҖ“Pierce** non-octave harmonic lattice on Canvas2D, mic voice-pitch, unit-tested `pitch.ts`; cashes JURY #6 + returns the mic-0Г— input) + **вӯҗ `1486-solar-choir`** (live **NOAA space-weather** sonification вҶ’ three.js aurora choir; the lab's likely first real external-API sonification) вҶ’ IDEAS В§743. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1482-face-mandala/README.md`

### [1478-sema-ascent](/dream/1478-sema-ascent) В· adult / psychedelic В· **device-orientation / tilt (+ tap-surge; pointer+Space desktop fallback)** / **three.js scene-graph** вҖ” 9 nested InstancedMesh shells (readable WebGL notice fallback) В· cycle 742 В· DEEP-winner (2026-07-11) В· demoable В· `state: ecstatic whirling trance / Sufi sema В· pole: intense (ascent, not dissolution)`
**Enter a drug-free whirling trance built as a six-minute climb вҖ” nested rings of light spin at locked polyrhythmic ratios, accelerate, phase-lock into a white-hot Fana peak, then set you gently down.** The DEEP fire's concept was **"SEMA / THE ASCENT" вҖ” ecstatic Sufi-whirling trance as a long-form, self-evolving polyrhythmic climb**, attacked via two approaches (this nested-ring *mechanism* vs. an emergent particle-vortex); this won for cashing the research most literally + a fresher visual form + tighter AV unity. **One shared `Conductor` (`arc.ts`) drives both the render and the audio** вҖ” 9 concentric shells rotate at a **2:3:4:5:6:7:8:9:11 polyrhythm**, and every gliding **inharmonic bell** (1:2.76 partials, panned per shell) is *fired by a shell's rotation crossing a phase gate* on that same conductor, so what you see spinning IS what you hear pulsing вҖ” the **rhythmic-entrainment** thesis made playable. **`evalArc` is a genuinely stateful ~6-min, non-repeating five-movement arc** (Invocation вҶ’ Gathering вҶ’ Acceleration вҶ’ Fana/the-lock вҶ’ Descent/embers) with a decaying **trance-energy memory** term (so each run diverges and minute 6 = sparse amber embers is unmistakably unlike minute 1 = one slow ring); on completion it loops gently back to Invocation (cycle counter in the HUD), never a dead screen. **three.js scene-graph** (`scene.ts`): 9 nested InstancedMesh shells of flame-shard petals + additive halos stacked/tilted like a gyroscope of light, a camera-facing white-hot core `Sprite`, **additive emissive glow (no post-processing)** for the bloom-like peak; tilt leans the whole whirl group. **Continuous inharmonic** drone + shimmer + gate-fired bells (`audio.ts`), master chain sources вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` limiter вҶ’ gain **ramped from silence** (peak 0.2) вҶ’ out, вүӨ14 voices, full teardown. **Input:** `DeviceOrientationEvent` tilt (iOS `requestPermission()` from the Begin gesture) leans the whirl axis; tap/click/Space = a trance surge; desktop falls back to pointer-lean + Space, and the arc **fully self-plays** with no input. **Named refs (README):** the **Mevlevi Order / whirling dervishes** and the *sema* ceremony (rotation toward *fana*) В· **Gilbert Rouget, _Music and Trance_ (1985)** В· **Aparicio-TerrГ©s et al., _Annals NYAS_ (2025)** on rhythmic-sound-induced altered states В· current-activity anchor **ASTRODITHER (R. Borghesi, three.js WebGPU/TSL audio-reactive, 2026-07-01)**. **Ambition 4/5:** **#2** вүҘ5 subsystems (tilt input + polyrhythmic phase-gate conductor + nested-shell three.js scene + long-form state machine w/ memory + inharmonic percussion/drone synthesis) В· **#3** named refs above В· **#4** declared **multi-cycle commitment** (cycle 1 = whirl + arc; next = literal petal-grid phase-lock snap + spatialised ambisonic bells + the Fana bloom pass) В· **#5** today's В§742 research dive (rhythmic-trance/entrainment neuroscience + the ASTRODITHER three.js-scene-graph momentum) вҶ’ this build. **diversity:** `banned=[WebGL2-raw-frag/point-primary(jury 9Г—)В·pointer-drag-sole(jury 10Г—)В·ego-dissolution/void-vibe(jury 4Г—)В·Reich+JI-together] В· picked=[device-tilt INPUT (breaks the pointer-drag rut) В· three.js scene-graph OUTPUT (the jury's wanted anti-fragment surface, not the 9Г— fragment shader) В· nested-polyrhythmic-whirl + long-form-stateful TECHNIQUE В· continuous inharmonic pitch (no JI scale-index, no Reich) В· devotional-goldвҶ’white-hot PALETTE В· pole INTENSE/ecstatic-ASCENT (rests the banned void)]` вҖ” clears every live hard ban. **SAFETY:** the white-hot Fana peak is a smooth gaussian swell-and-fade (not a strobe); `prefers-reduced-motion` damps rotation speeds + suppresses the flare. **Never blank/silent:** idle dim auto-preview whirl before Begin; self-playing arc after. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; `three` already a dep вҖ” zero new npm deps). **Validation:** authoritative whole-tree `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `.next/server/app/dream/1478-sema-ascent/page.js` emitted (**35.3 kB**) + `"/dream/1478-sema-ascent"` in `routes-manifest.json`; `eslint src/app/dream/1478-sema-ascent --max-warnings 0` = **0**; `"use client"` line 1; no `route.ts`; no banned `text-white/30|40|50`; no `Math.random`/`Date` in logic. **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless, no GPU/speakers): the peak's visual polish + the phase-lock legibility want Karel's browser (README flags this вҖ” the lock currently reads via shared velocity + color flare, not yet a literal petal-grid snap). Winner of a psychedelic **DEEP** 2-approach fire; banked **вӯҗ `1480-vortex-sama`** (the same sema-ascent concept as an emergent **26k-instance GPU particle vortex** вҖ” curl/swirl velocity field pulling additive shards into a rising white-hot column that sings from its own collective spin/lift/compactness; love-adjacent to the loved particle cluster; **resurrect knob:** move the per-frame CPU matrix/colour writes to a GPU velocity field / compute path, then ship on a night wanting particle spectacle) вҶ’ IDEAS В§742. ### [1476-dark-choir](/dream/1476-dark-choir) В· adult / psychedelic В· **microphone (voice / hum / breath)** / **audio-first В· near-black breathing halo** (synthetic self-play fallback) В· cycle 741 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-11) В· demoable В· `state: meditative-boundless / ecstatic ascent (jhДҒna + Shepard endless-rise) В· pole: cosmic-ambient (ascending, not dissolving)`
**Sing or hum into the dark and the dark sings back вҖ” an endlessly, ecstatically rising choir of your own voice that never stops climbing.** The lab's deliberate **"test the screen bias"** piece вҖ” the jury's explicitly-flagged *best* unspent surface (audio-only / no-screen, grep-**0Г—** as a primary stance) crossed with the named **mic-0Г— input** (mic-as-controller had evaporated to 0Г— in the recent window). **Audio is the primary medium; the screen is intentionally near-black** вҖ” a single soft violet-warm halo (`halo.ts`) that breathes with your voice (size/brightness track the choir glow, вүӨ0.08 Hz drift, no flicker, never fully dark), meant for headphones + eyes closed. **Voice = the controller** (`mic.ts`, a pure measurement tap вҖ” never routed to output, nothing recorded/sent): per frame it extracts **loudness** (auto-ranged RMS) + **fundamental pitch** (autocorrelation + parabolic interpolation, held across unvoiced gaps). **Core technique вҖ” a Shepard/Risset endless-glissando choir** (`audio.ts`): the shared `startShepard` bed (5 octave-spaced sine partials under a fixed Gaussian window) is always gliding upward with your loudness as its `drive`; each sung note **spawns an orbiting choir voice** pitched to your fundamental (folded into ~110вҖ“440 Hz) that glides up **~2.6 octaves** over an ~11 s life under a Gaussian amplitude window вҖ” the Shepard illusion applied *per voice*, so new voices bloom in below as old ones fade out above and the choir climbs **forever**, each spatialised on a slow **HRTF `PannerNode` orbit** circling the head; a shared `startDroneBank` (root + fifth) is the **firm ground** and everything sings into the shared `createVoidReverb` cathedral/cistern tail (~5.5 s). **Ascent, not dissolution** вҖ” the JI drone stays firm ground and voices keep *lifting* rather than thinning into a void, the deliberate opposite of the jury-banned ego-dissolution/void-tunnel vibe. **Named refs (README):** Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening* В· La Monte Young *Dream House* В· Roger Shepard (1964) / Jean-Claude Risset endless glissando В· jhДҒna "oceanic boundlessness." **Ambition 3/5:** **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (mic loudness+pitch analysis + Shepard endless-rise bed + orbiting HRTF choir + JI drone ground + convolution void + breathing halo) В· **#3** named refs above В· **#5** today's В§741 research dive (three.js/audio-reactive 2026 activity + the screen-bias "best surface" jury call) вҶ’ this build. **diversity:** `banned=[WebGL2-raw-frag/point-primary(jury 9Г—)В·pointer-drag-sole(jury 10Г—)В·void/dissolution-vibe(jury 4Г—)В·Reich+JI-togetherВ·Canvas2DВ·SVGВ·three.jsВ·DOM/CSS-3DВ·JI-scale-indexВ·camera] В· picked=[microphone/voice INPUT (mic was 0Г— in the recent window вҖ” the jury's named fresh sensor) В· audio-first/near-black-halo OUTPUT (the jury's explicitly-"best" 0Г— surface вҖ” "test the screen bias") В· Shepard/Risset endless-glissando-choir TECHNIQUE В· continuous voice-tracked pitch (no melodic scale-index; JI only as a static drone ground) В· dark-luminous ascent PALETTE В· pole COSMIC-AMBIENT but engineered as buoyant ascent, NOT the banned void]` вҖ” clears every live surface/input/vibe ban (honest knock: cosmic-ambient pole is 8Г— over-represented, mitigated by the ascent framing + the audio-first stance making "pole look" moot). **SAFETY:** inherently low-stimulation вҖ” near-black field, вүӨ3 Hz luminance drift, no flicker/strobe; `prefers-reduced-motion` disables positional drift (brightness breath remains). **Never blank/silent:** no mic вҶ’ readable `text-rose-300` line **+ synthetic self-play** (a slow pentatonic hum sings the choir to itself); the halo always breathes. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; zero new npm deps вҖ” Web Audio + shared psych infra only). **Validation:** authoritative whole-tree `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `.next/server/app/dream/1476-dark-choir/page.js` emitted (**39.9 kB**) + `"/dream/1476-dark-choir"` in `routes-manifest.json`; `eslint src/app/dream/1476-dark-choir --max-warnings 0` = **0**; `tsc --noEmit` = 0 winner errors; `"use client"` line 1; no `route.ts`; no banned `text-white/30|40|50`; no `Math.random`/`Date` in logic; imports only from `../_shared/`. **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless, no mic/speakers) вҖ” the HRTF orbit convincingness + pitch-tracking robustness on real voices want Karel's browser (README flags both); synthetic self-play + always-breathing halo guarantee never-blank/silent. Winner of a psychedelic **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (audio-first mic-choir vs three.js tilt-mandala vs DOM/CSS-3D MIDI build-and-drop); banked **вӯҗ `1472-whirl-mandala`** (Sufi-whirl kinetic mandala вҖ” nested polyrhythmic phase-locked rotation on a **three.js scene-graph**, tilt+tap, INTENSE; TOP ship-next for an ecstatic/three.js night вҖ” strip its JI partials вҶ’ continuous inharmonic to clear the scale-index mark) + **вӯҗ `1474-rapture-organ`** (a rave/gospel **build-and-drop** cathedral on **DOM/CSS-3D**, MIDI/keyboard, INTENSE, equal-tempered вҖ” cleanest on the pitch bans; ship once a build-and-drop is diverse-again, i.e. not right after `1470`) вҶ’ IDEAS В§741. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1476-dark-choir/README.md`

### [1470-the-drop](/dream/1470-the-drop) В· adult / psychedelic В· **pointer-pour + seismic-shock (Space) + device-tilt** / **three.js instanced-column terrain** (rose-notice fallback) В· cycle 740 В· DEEP-winner (2026-07-11) В· demoable В· `state: self-organized criticality / EDM build-and-drop В· pole: intense`
**Play self-organized criticality as an instrument: grains rain onto a molten landscape, slopes steepen invisibly to the critical angle, then TOPPLE in scale-free avalanches вҖ” and the avalanches ARE the music (mostly tiny ticks, the rare "big one" a full-spectrum DROP).** The lab's **first ecstatic build-and-drop piece** and first adult self-organized-criticality instrument (`sandpile`/`self-organized criticality` grep-**0Г—** for adults вҖ” only a paused-lane kids cascade `377` before). A real **abelian sandpile** (`sandpile.ts`, 80Г—80 integers, **BakвҖ“TangвҖ“Wiesenfeld**, *Self-Organized Criticality*, PRL 59, 1987; Per Bak, *How Nature Works*, 1996): the canonical **slow-drive** protocol (a grain rains only while the pile is quiescent, so cascades don't smear and the **power law survives**), cells with `hвүҘ4` topple `вҲ’4`/`+1`-to-4-neighbours, open boundary; relaxation is **budgeted (вүӨ3500 topples/frame) and carried forward** so a huge cascade unfolds over several frames as a visible **wave of light**. Builder **verified the physics headless** (~9000-frame sims: mean height pinned ~2.11, clean power-law avalanches П„вүҲ1.2, ~9вҖ“10 events/s mostly ticks, a punchy drop ~every 2 s, a mega-drop ~every 14 s). **Render = three.js scene-graph** (the jury's explicitly-wanted anti-fragment-shader surface): one `THREE.InstancedMesh` of 80Г—80 unit columns, **height = grain count** (`instanceMatrix`), **colour = ember ramp + a white-hot per-cell "heat" highlight** that spikes on topple and decays smoothly (`instanceColor`); unlit `MeshBasicMaterial` (nothing renders black from lighting), grazing camera drift, big-drop ember bloom. WebGL guarded 3 ways вҶ’ `text-rose-300` notice with audio still playing. **Audio (build-and-drop, Web Audio):** the riser is driven by a **"reload" sawtooth** вҖ” grains-since-last-big-release вҖ” because pure SOC pins mean height at the critical point, so a criticality *measure* is flat and can't build; the reload cycle can, and stays honestly coupled to the real power-law drop timing (a genuine physical insight). Tension opens the shared `startDroneBank` filter + accelerates a pulse (~0.5вҶ’~6 Hz) + a live rumble tracks the topple rate; each settled avalanche's **size** picks the release вҖ” tick (`<40`) / airy swell (`<500`) / clean punchy drop (`<2600`) / the rare **full-spectrum DROP** (`вүҘ2600`: sub-bass thud + **inharmonic chord bloom** of stretched drum-membrane partials `[1,1.593,2.135,2.295,2.917,3.5]` + noise sweep + terrain flash). **Pitch continuous + inharmonic** (centroid/extent вҶ’ glide, **no JI/pentatonic/scale-index/12-TET**). Master вүӨ0.2 вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor`, вүӨ14 voices, full teardown. **Input:** pointer-pour (raycast to ground) + **Space = seismic shock** (nudges ~55% of the pile toward toppling вҖ” forces a big cascade) + device-tilt leans gravity (arrow-key desktop fallback); **self-plays with no input** (grains auto-rain, avalanches fire on their own вҖ” idle-demos on a phone). **Ambition 4/5:** **#2** вүҘ5 subsystems (sandpile CA + budgeted/carried avalanche tracker + reload-tension riser + 4-tier avalancheвҶ’drop engine + three.js terrain render + pour/shock/tilt input) В· **#3** named refs (Bak-Tang-Wiesenfeld 1987 / Per Bak 1996 / Dhar & Ramaswamy directed-sandpile 1989) В· **#4** multi-cycle commitment (cycle 1 = core SOC + build-and-drop; cycle 2 = richer musical arc + a forced "big one" build + tighter drop mix; cycle 3 = polish) В· **#5** today's В§740 criticality research dive вҶ’ this build. (#1 abstained honestly вҖ” SOC has a thin paused-kids prior `377`.) **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D-primaryВ·SVG-primaryВ·JI-scale-indexВ·dissonance-themeВ·WebGL2-raw-fragment/point-shader-primary(jury 9Г—)В·pointer-drag-sole(jury 10Г—)В·void/dissolution-vibe(jury 4Г—)В·DOM/CSS-3DВ·ReichВ·mic-soleВ·kbd-soleВ·camera] В· picked=[pointer-pour+seismic-shock+tilt INPUT (not pointer-sole) В· three.js scene-graph OUTPUT (the jury's wanted anti-fragment surface) В· self-organized-criticality/sandpile TECHNIQUE (adult-0Г—) В· continuous inharmonic drop pitch В· molten-ember build-and-drop PALETTE В· pole INTENSE/ecstatic (BUILDS, doesn't dissolve вҖ” rests the jury-banned void)]` вҖ” clears every live ban. **SAFETY:** no strobe вҖ” topple "flash" is emissive/luminance drift (heat decays over many frames, big-drop bloom вүӨ3 Hz); `prefers-reduced-motion` freezes camera + slows decay. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; zero new npm deps вҖ” `three` was already a dependency + Web Audio). **Validation:** authoritative whole-tree `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `.next/server/app/dream/1470-the-drop/page.js` emitted (**30.2 kB**) + `"/dream/1470-the-drop"` in `routes-manifest.json`; `eslint src/app/dream/1470-the-drop --max-warnings 0` = **0**; `"use client"` line 1; no `route.ts`; no banned `text-white/30|40|50`; no `Math.random`/`Date` in logic; imports only from `../_shared/`. **Physics verified headless; NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (no GPU/display/speakers) вҖ” camera framing/column-relief legibility + drop-mix loudness balance want Karel's browser; the idle auto-rain self-demo guarantees never-blank/silent. Winner of a psychedelic **DEEP** 2-approach fire (SOC via three.js-terrain vs WebGL2-GPGPU-points); banked **вӯҗ `1472-criticality`** (the same SOC concept as a larger-grid **WebGL2 GPGPU** 256ВІ point-field вҖ” proves the substrate at scale; resurrect after swapping its mean-height riser for a reload-cycle + throttling the per-frame `readPixels`) вҶ’ IDEAS В§740. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1470-the-drop/README.md`

### [1464-crystal-cortex](/dream/1464-crystal-cortex) В· adult / psychedelic В· **multi-touch / multi-pointer (drag the cells)** / **WebGL2 GPU-Voronoi (Jump Flooding)** + log-polar warp (readable notice fallback) В· cycle 739 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-11) В· demoable В· `state: DMT jewelled-honeycomb form-constant В· pole: intense`
**Reach into the DMT "jewelled honeycomb" and play it вҖ” a living Voronoi lattice of stained-glass cells, warped into an infinite tunnel, each cell a continuous voice.** The lab's **first GPU Voronoi / Jump-Flooding-Algorithm piece** (`voronoi`/`jump flood`/`JFA` grep-**0Г—** across the whole lab before this вҖ” only a stray `271` README mention). Per frame in `gl.ts`: a **seed pass** splats ~12 moving seeds into a 512ВІ float (or 16-bit-packed RGBA8 fallback) target; **9 ping-pong JFA passes** (`k=256вҖҰ1`, toroidal distance) flood each texel to its nearest seed вҶ’ the Voronoi cell ID + distance field (Rong & Tan, *Jump Flooding in GPUвҖҰ*, I3D 2006); a **display pass** samples the field through an **inverse log-polar warp** so the honeycomb reads as a receding tunnel (the first of **Heinrich KlГјver's four form constants**; Bressloff & Cowan's cortical retino-V1 complex-log map), with `fwidth` cell-border "leading" for the stained-glass look and jewelled/iridescent per-seed hues. **Input = multi-touch:** each finger grabs and drags the nearest seed via a `pointerId` map (mouse-drag on desktop); when idle, seeds drift on deterministic Lissajous paths so it self-demos and is never static. **Audio (genuinely played):** each seed = one **continuous, inharmonic voice** (sawtoothвҶ’per-voice band-pass), pitch mapped **continuously** from tunnel-depth вҶ’ log-frequency 80вҖ“900 Hz (**never scale-snapped** вҖ” off the jury-banned ~10Г— JI/pentatonic scale-index crutch), cell **area вҶ’ amplitude**, **neighbour count вҶ’ brightness/timbre**, over a 2-osc drone (14 voices total = the cap). Gesture-gated ctx ("Enter the lattice"), master ramps 0вҶ’0.85 through a **DynamicsCompressor** limiter, full teardown. **Named refs (README):** KlГјver form constants; Bressloff & Cowan cortical map; Rong & Tan JFA 2006. **Ambition 4/5:** **#1** first GPU-Voronoi/JFA (grep-0Г—) В· **#2** вүҘ5 subsystems (multi-pointer input + JFA Voronoi compute + log-polar warp + Voronoi-cell continuous voices + drone) В· **#3** named refs above В· **#5** today's В§739 research dive (JFA/GPU-Voronoi: arXiv 2509.07175 + Jan-2026 impls) вҶ’ this build. **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D-primaryВ·SVG-primaryВ·JI-scale-indexВ·dissonance-themeВ·three.jsВ·DOM/CSS-3DВ·ReichВ·mic-soleВ·kbd-soleВ·camera] В· picked=[multi-touch INPUT (fresh vs the recent pointer-family/camera/flythrough run) В· WebGL2 JFA-Voronoi OUTPUT (0Г—) В· Voronoi/JFA TECHNIQUE (0Г—) В· continuous inharmonic cell-voices В· jewelled/stained-glass PALETTE В· pole INTENSE (off the recent cosmic-ambient run)]` вҖ” clears every live ban. **SAFETY:** no strobe вҖ” only вүӨ~0.15 Hz luminance drift; `prefersReducedMotion` calms motion/saturation. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; zero new npm deps вҖ” WebGL2 + Web Audio only). **Validation:** authoritative whole-tree `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `.next/server/app/dream/1464-crystal-cortex/page.js` emitted (**32.8 kB**) + `"/dream/1464-crystal-cortex"` in `routes-manifest.json`; `eslint` on all 3 candidate folders = **0**; `tsc --noEmit` = 0 dream errors; `text-white/30|40|50` grep = empty; `"use client"` line 1; no `Math.random`/`Date` in logic. **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless, no GPU/display/speakers) вҖ” the cell-voice mix, JFA leading, and warp feel want Karel's browser; the idle seed-drift self-demo guarantees never-blank/silent. Winner of a psychedelic **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **вӯҗвӯҗ `1468-the-return`** (the NDE arc as one 7-min unrepeating WebGPU-compute point-cloud journey вҖ” long-form-stateful + 2nd WebGPU-compute, both jury-wanted; TOP ship-next) + **вӯҗ `1466-boltzmann-bloom`** (breathe into a real D2Q9 **Lattice-Boltzmann** fluid as LSD "breathing surfaces + tracers"; LBM grep-0Г—) вҶ’ IDEAS В§739. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1464-crystal-cortex/README.md`

### [1450-supershape-bloom](/dream/1450-supershape-bloom) В· adult / psychedelic В· **pointer-drag morph** / WebGL2 **3D supershape mesh** (live-recomputed) В· cycle 736 В· DEEP-winner (2026-07-11) В· demoable В· `state: alien-organic morphogenesis В· pole: intense (blooming biology)` вҖ” Play the morphospace of the **Superformula** (Gielis 2003 / Bourke 3D supershape): drag to morph one 3D organism between starfish/urchin/diatom/chrysanthemum while its symmetry number `m` re-tunes an inharmonic drone (prime/fractional m beats "wrong" on purpose). Haeckel *Kunstformen der Natur* made playable. Lab's first superformula piece (grep-0Г—). Banked sibling вӯҗ`1452-radiolaria-field` (cosmic-ambient 2D field) вҶ’ IDEAS В§736.

## вӯҗ Newest (Cycle 735 вҖ” **psychedelic** **WIDE** вҖ” "The mind hallucinates the rest": 3 orthogonal drug-free perceptual-illusion explorers, ship the strongest. The lab has done *flicker* form-constants and apophenia but never staged the perceptual system's own quirks as interactive altered-states induction. **Winner = `1444-troxler-void`** вҖ” hold still and the screen dissolves into a uniform void (Troxler fading + the Ganzfeld effect: under steady fixation the low-contrast periphery adapts away вҖ” a real sensory-boundary dissolution, grep-**0Г—**); move and it re-forms, and the drone thins/re-blooms with the fade. Core technique = a **per-region adaptation buffer** (a 40Г—40 grid whose adaptation rises with stillness вҖ” faster in periphery than the fixated centre вҖ” resetting on pointer movement), driving a WebGL2 Ganzfeld fragment-shader (Canvas2D fallback) + a drone that loses partials as the void deepens. **The WIDE call:** most on-theme for the standing PRIMARY direction (drug-free ego/sensory dissolution via the visual system's *own* adaptation вҖ” the truest "psychedelic state without the drug" of the three); **self-demos on desktop** with no headphones/file/special hardware (idle drifting-gaze auto melt-and-reform) вҖ” the best fit for a 06:30 phone review, where `1446-ghost-choir` needs stereo headphones for its illusions to exist at all and `1448-resonant-hall` wants a dropped piano file + speakers; and the highest surprise ("hold still and the screen disappears"). Dodges every live ban (WebGL2 OFF Canvas2D+SVG; a drone not a JI/pentatonic scale-index; pointer-stillness not mic/kbd/camera-sole; not dissonance-theme, not three.js, not DOM/CSS-3D). **Ambition 2/5:** #1 never-used technique (Troxler/Ganzfeld per-region adaptation, grep-0Г—) + #3 named refs (**IgnГЎc Troxler 1804** / **Wolfgang Metzger вҖ” Ganzfeld 1930**). **ResearchвҶ’build chain (RESEARCH В§735):** dive on drug-free perceptual-illusion induction вҶ’ this fan-out. Banked вӯҗвӯҗ`1446-ghost-choir` (a melody & bass your brain invents from tones split between the ears вҖ” Diana Deutsch's octave/scale illusion 1974 + the missing fundamental; the whole illusion cluster, grep-0Г—; resurrect when a headphones-required piece fits) + вӯҗ`1448-resonant-hall` (play Karel's real piano into impossible halls you sculpt вҖ” an 8-line **Feedback Delay Network** [Jot & Chaigne 1991] as a *played* resonator body, real-piano file-drop + felt-synth fallback) to IDEAS В§735, folders `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule. вң… **Validate:** authoritative `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` (whole tree, only winner present) = **exit 0**, `.next/server/app/dream/1444-troxler-void/page.js` (25.7 kB) emitted, `tsc --noEmit` (whole tree) = **0** errors, `eslint src/app/dream/1444-troxler-void --max-warnings 0` = **0** вҖ” full Vercel gate set green. Pure `"use client"` WebGL2 + Web Audio (no server, no route, no secret). **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless, no display/speakers) вҖ” the fade-rate + palette + drone-thinning mix want Karel's browser; the idle self-demo + drone-from-Begin guarantee never-blank/silent. `state: sensory/ego-boundary dissolution В· pole: cosmic-ambient meditative.` Details in STATE В§735.)

## `/dream/1444-troxler-void` вҖ” *hold still and the screen dissolves. A soft central fixation glyph anchors your gaze; the low-contrast **Ganzfeld** field around it slowly adapts away under steady fixation (**Troxler fading**) until the periphery melts into a uniform void вҖ” a drug-free staging of sensory- and ego-boundary dissolution. Move the pointer and the field (and the drone) re-bloom where you disturbed it. The lab's first Troxler/Ganzfeld piece (grep-0Г—).* **How it works:** **Begin вҖ” sound on** gesture-gates the AudioContext. A **per-region adaptation buffer** (40Г—40 grid) raises each cell's adaptation the longer it goes without change вҖ” faster in the periphery than at the fixated centre вҖ” collapsing its contrast/saturation toward the mean field colour (`pow(1-adapt,1.6)`); pointer movement near a cell resets it, so motion re-forms the world. **Output = WebGL2** fragment-shader Ganzfeld (fbm colour-drift, adaptation uploaded as an `R8` texture, vignette + dither) with a Canvas2D per-pixel fallback. **Audio** (Web Audio): a detuned-oscillator **drone** вҶ’ lowpass вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` limiter вҶ’ master ramp 0вҶ’0.18; as the void deepens the drone **thins** (partials drop, reverb send opens via shared `convolutionVoid`), and it re-blooms on movement вҖ” so sound and image dissolve together. **Idle self-demo:** with no pointer for a few seconds a drifting virtual gaze + a slow ~13 s global "breath" run the melt/re-form cycle on their own (never a dead screen). `prefersReducedMotion()` slows/freezes motion. **SAFETY:** the opposite of flicker вҖ” only sub-Hz luminance/contrast drift, no strobe, no full-screen flash. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; zero new npm deps). **Ambition 2/5:** #1 never-used technique (Troxler/Ganzfeld per-region adaptation buffer, grep-0Г—) В· #3 named refs **IgnГЎc Troxler (1804)** / **Wolfgang Metzger вҖ” Ganzfeld (1930)**. **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D-primary В· SVG-primary В· JI/pentatonic-scale-index В· dissonance-theme(Г—4) В· three.js(Г—3) В· DOM/CSS-3D(Г—2) В· mic-sole В· kbd-sole В· camera] В· picked=[Troxler/Ganzfeld perceptual-dissolution TECHNIQUE(0Г—) В· pointer-stillness INPUT В· WebGL2 Ganzfeld field OUTPUT В· thinning drone (not a scale-index) В· cosmic-ambient meditative VIBE]` вҖ” clears every live ban. Winner of a psychedelic **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; honest knocks (own README): the subjective fade only fully lands on a real display at rest (the on-screen sim approximates the retinal effect); palette/fade-rate want a hardware tuning pass. `state: sensory/ego-boundary dissolution В· pole: cosmic-ambient meditative`. `status: demoable`. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1444-troxler-void/README.md`*

## Cycle 734 вҖ” **psychedelic** **DEEP** вҖ” "THE ONE THREAD": ONE massively-bigger concept вҖ” *the space-filling curve as the ego-dissolution **UNITY** phenomenon*, the drug-free staging of the DMN-dissolution "the field stops being separate objects and becomes ONE continuous thing" (Carhart-Harris entropic-brain / REBUS). A Hilbert curve is a single unbroken line that visits every cell of a plane while **preserving locality** вҖ” so it literally weaves a 2-D field into one 1-D thread. Grep-**0Г—** (`hilbert`/`space filling`/`peano`/`moore curve` = 0), a genuinely fresh technique + the lab's first **continuous-no-scale** pitch. Attacked via **2 approaches**: **`1440-thread-scan`** (**WebGL2** вҖ” paint a field, a Hilbert reading-head sonifies your marks into one locality-coherent gesture; pointer-paint+scrub) and `1442-unweave` (**WebGL2** вҖ” the recursion DEPTH is the played axis: deepen вҶ’ the line folds to fill the plane / boundaries dissolve; drag-depth). Alternation вҖҰ730 D вҶ’ 731 W вҶ’ 732 D вҶ’ 733 W вҶ’ **734 D** (DEEP due). **Mis-fire caught & logged:** the STATE cycle-headers had drifted (last full entry was 726/`1396`) вҖ” `git log` shows 727вҖ“733 already shipped `1398`вҖҰ`1430` and **already cashed the entire 2026-07-10 jury** (dissonance Г—4 = 728/730/732/733, camera-revive 729, Anadol/real-data 731, "2nd WebGPU-compute" 730). My first WIDE fan-out (`1434`/`1436`/`1438`) chased that spent jury into now-saturated lanes, so I **pivoted to a proper DEEP on a grep-0Г— lane**. **Research-first (RESEARCH В§734):** dive = the 2026 dissonance frontier (XenRoll 2026-06 / DDSP timbre-remap) вҶ’ grep showed the lab already saturated it вҶ’ pivot to the space-filling / unity lane (hyperbolic/PoincarГ© also rejected pre-brief as `1044-hyperbolic-bloom` dup). **Curated WINNER = `1440-thread-scan`** вҖ” both cleared the ambition floor (4/5) + dodged every live ban (OFF Canvas2D+SVG; CONTINUOUS-pitch, not JI/pentatonic; not dissonance-theme; not DOM/CSS-3D; not camera/mic/tilt/keyboard-sole; PLAYED). The DEEP call: (1) **genuinely PLAYED, not watched** вҖ” you paint marks and the curve weaves *your* shape into one coherent gesture, so the visitor **co-creates** the unity; `1442` is closer to a single depth-dial + a default self-running "breathe" (the repeatedly-banned watched pattern); (2) **core mechanic is sound** вҖ” a real Hilbert `d2xy` curve + real instrument, where `1442`'s central morph is (its own README) "an interpolation artifact, not itself a Hilbert curve"; (3) locality-preservation is directly demonstrable by the visitor's own action. Banked вӯҗ`1442-unweave` (the depth-as-dissolution axis вҖ” beautiful; resurrect with a true continuous-order construction + a real played layer) + the 3 WIDE explorers вӯҗ`1436-tilt-nova` (WebGPU-compute tilt swarm), `1434-roughness-body` (camera roughness вҖ” dup of shipped `1418`), `1438-bohlen-lattice` (BohlenвҖ“Pierce DOM/CSS-3D) to IDEAS В§734, folders `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule. вң… **Validate:** authoritative `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` (whole tree, only winner present) = **exit 0**, `.next/server/app/dream/1440-thread-scan/page.js` (30.7 kB) emitted, `tsc --noEmit` (whole tree) = 0 winner errors, `eslint src/app/dream/1440-thread-scan --max-warnings 0` = **0** вҖ” the full Vercel gate set green. Pure `"use client"` WebGL2 + Web Audio (no server, no route, no secret, no GPU-compute). **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless, no display/speakers) вҖ” the woven-thread legibility + continuous-glissando mix want Karel's browser; the pre-painted idle glyph + head-from-Begin guarantee never-blank/silent. `state: unity / ego-dissolution В· pole: cosmic-ambient вҶ” intense.` Details in STATE В§734.)

## `/dream/1440-thread-scan` вҖ” *one unbroken thread weaves a whole painted field into a single continuous line of light and pitch. You paint luminous marks into a dark field; a **Hilbert space-filling curve** threads every cell, and a bright reading-head travels the thread and **sounds whatever it passes** вҖ” so the field is heard as ONE connected line rather than separate notes. Because the Hilbert curve preserves locality, a shape you paint becomes a **coherent gesture in time**: the drug-free staging of the ego-dissolution UNITY phenomenon (DMN-dissolution вҖ” "the field becomes one continuous thing"). The lab's first space-filling-curve instrument and first continuous-no-scale pitch (grep-0Г—).* **How it works:** **Begin вҖ” sound on** gesture-gates the AudioContext (a pre-painted glyph is already weaving before you touch it, so never blank/silent). **Drag on the field** to paint glowing marks (colour follows the vertical axis, violetвҶ’amber, the same axis pitch maps to). **order (3вҖ“6)** zooms the weave (coarse calm вҶ’ fine dense); **speed** sets head travel; **let go** on = the head drifts itself, off = a **scrub** slider steers it by hand; **clear field** wipes. **Output = WebGL2:** the painted field is an RGBA texture drawn as a quad, the whole Hilbert curve is a faint additive `LINE_STRIP`, and the head + comet trail are additive glow sprites; WebGL2-absent вҶ’ a reduced Canvas2D fallback draws the same three layers and still plays. **Audio** (Web Audio): pitch is a **continuous glissando** from the head's vertical field position вҖ” *not* a scale, *not* pentatonic, *not* a JI index (deliberately stepping off the lab's ~10Г—/15 always-consonant crutch вҖ” the thread is a *continuum* of pitch, which is what makes the field read as one line); brightnessвҶ’loudness, hueвҶ’timbre, local densityвҶ’shimmer + longer grains. A single sustained thread voice is always the line; crossing into a bright mark plucks a soft panned grain (polyphonic, 12-voice cap). Master ramps 0вҶ’0.2 into a `DynamicsCompressor` limiter; full teardown (rAF, AudioContext, GL) on unmount. **SAFETY:** no strobe вҖ” the only luminance pulse is a ~0.12 Hz breathing drift; `prefers-reduced-motion` slows head travel + shrinks the breath. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; zero new npm deps). **Ambition 4/5:** #1 first space-filling-curve instrument + first continuous-no-scale pitch (grep-0Г—; honestly declared вҖ” Hilbert *rendering* is common in generative art, the fresh axis is the space-filling curve as a PLAYED unity instrument) В· #2 вүҘ3 subsystems (Hilbert curve generator + paint-field engine + localityвҶ’continuous-pitch mapper + WebGL2 renderer + voice pool = 5) В· #3 named refs **David Hilbert (1891)** / Giuseppe Peano (1890) / **Carhart-Harris вҖ” entropic brain / REBUS** В· #5 today's В§734 dive. **diversity:** `banned=[dissonance/inharmonic-tuning-theme(Г—4) В· DOM/CSS-3D(Г—2) В· three.js(Г—3) В· Canvas2D-primary В· SVG-primary В· pentatonic/JI-scale-index В· camera(729)] В· picked=[space-filling-curve UNITY TECHNIQUE(0Г—) В· pointer-paint/scrub INPUT В· WebGL2 field+thread OUTPUT В· CONTINUOUS-pitch glissando (steps off the JI crutch entirely) В· unity/ego-dissolution VIBE В· PLAYED]` вҖ” clears every live ban. Winner of a psychedelic **DEEP** 2-approach fire (pivot off a spent jury onto a grep-0Г— lane); honest knocks (own README): comet trail is glow sprites not a true bloom (fine weave can alias at order 6); audio reads only the cell under the head each frame (ultra-thin marks can be skipped at high speed); continuous pitch reads eerie/microtonal by design, not "tonal." `state: unity / ego-dissolution В· pole: cosmic-ambient вҶ” intense`. `status: demoable`. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1440-thread-scan/README.md`*

## (Cycle 732 вҖ” **psychedelic** **DEEP** вҖ” "THE DISSOLVE": ONE massively-bigger concept вҖ” a **long-form (~5 min), irreversible ego-dissolution / NDE-tunnel** where a single monotonic clock carries you one-way from a solid bounded room вҶ’ loosening lattice вҶ’ a tunnel opening toward a blooming light, and the tuning drifts *monotonically OUT of consonance* as it dissolves. The lab-thin **long-form / accumulating-state** category, and the direct cash of the 2026-07-10 jury's headline provocation **#2** (*"break the always-consonant spell вҖ” ship ONE piece where the wrong note is the point"*). The DEEP call: (1) **render-robust вҖ” zero GPU dependency** (pure CSS-3D transforms on real DOM), safest for an unattended push to live production + a phone 06:30 review; (2) **surface-contrasts with last night's three.js winner `1426`** вҖ” shipping `1432` (three.js) would be back-to-back three.js winners, the exact "too similar" pattern Karel flags; (3) it's the **вӯҗвӯҗ flagged TOP ship-next** (highest-ambition non-winner of В§731, 4/5) and the В§731 resurrection condition is met (this slot is NOT DOM/CSS-3D- or dissonance-*adjacent* вҖ” last night was three.js/cosmic-data; the `1408` overlap is 4 nights back and the *concept* is genuinely distinct: a one-way long-form journey, not `1408`'s play-the-tension instrument). Banked вӯҗ`1432-egress` (the three.js volumetric twin вҖ” additive-bloom tunnel-to-light; resurrect for a slot with distance from three.js) to IDEAS В§732, folder `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule; its best ideas folded into the winner's README as next-cycle deepening. вң… **Validate:** plain `npm run build` compiled + linted (`eslint --max-warnings 0` = 0) + typechecked (`tsc --noEmit` whole tree = 0) with ZERO dream-code errors and emitted `.next/server/app/dream/1428-dissolve-room/page.js` (30 kB), dying only at "Collecting page data" on the standing **EMFILE** fd-ceiling (absent on Vercel); the authoritative `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` (whole tree, only winner present) = **exit 0** with `"/dream/1428-dissolve-room"` in `routes-manifest.json` + `page.js` emitted вҖ” the full Vercel gate set (TS + ESLint + compile) green. Winner is pure `"use client"` DOM/CSS + Web Audio (no server, no route, no secret, no GPU). **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless, no display/speakers) вҖ” the ~5-min irreversible dissolve + the audibly-souring Railsback drift want Karel's browser; the live silent preview + drone-from-Begin + idle self-advance guarantee never-blank/silent. `state: ego-dissolution / a-room-that-dissolves-toward-light-over-minutes В· pole: cosmic-ambient dissociative/NDE.` Details in STATE В§732.)

## `/dream/1428-dissolve-room` вҖ” *a room you cannot leave. A solid glowing **7Г—7Г—7 lattice** of 343 real `<div>` cells loosens over ~5 minutes, cells push radially out to open a central **tunnel**, detaching panels tumble and dim, and the whole room drifts toward a far **light** вҖ” tuned so it was never quite in tune, and **grinding further out of consonance** as it comes apart. It is not a loop: one monotonic clock only ever rises, so minute 5 (a near-empty tunnel-into-light) is genuinely unlike minute 1 (a solid lattice). You don't play notes; you play the arc вҖ” you resist the dissolve, you never reverse it. The lab-thin long-form/accumulating-state category, and the direct cash of jury #2 "break the always-consonant spell."* **How it works:** hit **Begin the descent** (gesture-gates the AudioContext, ramps audio from silence; before Begin a still, gently-alive silent "formed lattice" preview shows). On a phone, **tilt** to steer + lean in and **press-and-hold** anywhere to pull back toward a more-formed lattice; on desktop it falls back to **mouse-drag to steer + press-and-hold to resist** (the UI says so in readable `text-rose-300`). Resisting recovers only the *look and tuning* toward "more formed" вҖ” the underlying clock keeps marching. A **drift-speed slider (0.40Г—вҖ“2.20Г—)** fast-forwards/slows the arc for a morning review; a **forming В· loosening В· dissolving В· light** phase + mm:ss readout tracks it. Idle = the dissolution proceeds on its own, so it's never static. **Output = pure DOM/CSS 3-D:** a `transform-style: preserve-3d` stage under CSS `perspective`, 343 cell refs whose `translate3d`/opacity/colour are written straight to the DOM each frame in a single RAF (no per-frame React render), plus a far radial-gradient **light** and a screen-space **bloom** that grow as the tunnel opens вҖ” **no canvas, no WebGL, no SVG, zero GPU dependency** (phone-perfect, no black-frame risk). **Audio** (Web Audio, THE POINT): **Risset-style inharmonic bell partials** `[0.5, 1.0, 1.19, 1.56, 2.02, 2.55, 3.06] Г— 55 Hz` (none a small-integer ratio вҶ’ they beat faintly even at rest), raised to a **Railsback octave-stretch exponent that grows 1.00 вҶ’ ~1.06** as the room dissolves (dragging every partial progressively sharp of consonance), a **chorus detune widening ~3 вҶ’ 34 cents**, and a high inharmonic **light cluster** that shimmers in during the light phase вҖ” over an inharmonic drone bed (the shared `_shared/psych/droneBank` with its default consonant chord *overridden*), through the shared `_shared/psych/convolutionVoid` reverb, master ramped silence вҶ’ вүӨ0.18 behind a `DynamicsCompressor` limiter; deterministic (no `Math.random` in the audio path). Full teardown cancels the RAF, stops every oscillator, removes the tilt/pointer listeners, and `close()`s the context. **Never blank/silent:** the visual arc runs even if the AudioContext fails; **SAFETY** вҖ” all motion sub-Hz/slow, no strobe, and `prefers-reduced-motion` freezes the arc to a formed-but-gently-alive lattice (no accumulating dissolve, no brightness pulsing). **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; zero new npm deps). **Ambition 4/5:** long-form irreversible accumulating-state (menu category the jury names lab-thin, ~0Г—) В· inharmonic Railsback-stretched tuning that BREAKS always-consonant (jury #2) В· вүҘ3 subsystems (irreversible clock/state engine + DOM/CSS-3D dissolution renderer + inharmonic stretched-bell audio engine + tilt/pointer-hold input = 4) В· named refs **Susan Blackmore *Dying to Live* (1993)** / **Jean-Claude Risset** (inharmonic bells) / the **DMT-models-NDE** universal-scaffold study. **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D-primary В· SVG-primary В· JI/pentatonic-always-consonant В· Reich-phasing-as-TIME В· mic-sole В· home-row-keyboard-as-SOLE] В· picked=[long-form-irreversible-accumulating-state + inharmonic-Railsback-stretch TECHNIQUE (the antidote to always-consonant) В· DOM/CSS-3D OUTPUT (thin, off Canvas2D+SVG) В· tilt+pointer-hold INPUT В· one-way-clock TIME (a fourth route off the drum grid, not phasing) В· cosmic-ambient dissociative/NDE VIBE В· PLAYED]` вҖ” clears every 2026-07-10 ban. Winner of a psychedelic **DEEP** 2-approach fire (cashed jury #2 head-on; render-robust + surface-contrasts last night's three.js winner); honest knock (own README): the ~5-min irreversible feel + the audibly-souring Railsback drift want Karel's browser + headphones вҖ” headless-unverifiable, but the silent live preview + drone-from-Begin + idle self-advance guarantee never-blank/silent. `state: ego-dissolution / a-room-that-dissolves-toward-light-over-minutes В· pole: cosmic-ambient dissociative/NDE`. `status: demoable`. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1428-dissolve-room/README.md`*

## `/dream/1426-biome-field` вҖ” *a real, live planetary dataset as the composer: the last ~24 hours of global earthquakes, **fetched live from the USGS in your browser**, grown into a breathing shell of light around a dark slowly-turning Earth and sounded as a slow inharmonic drone. A **living field**, not a chart вҖ” the shell breathes, every point drifts, fresh quakes twinkle, and it re-fetches every ~2.5 min so it keeps changing with the planet; it is literally different at your 06:30 review than it was an hour before. The browser-scale echo of Refik Anadol's DATALAND (opened 2026-06-20), and the lab's first real-world live-data sonification since `1374-sky-strata`.* **How it works:** hit **Begin В· enter the field** (gesture-gates the AudioContext) вҖ” the field appears instantly on a **bundled ~30-quake snapshot**, then swaps in the live USGS `all_day.geojson` (client-side GET, no key, no side effects, no API route; 6 s timeout, re-fetch every ~150 s; amber "bundled snapshot" badge if the network fails). **Drag** orbits the planet; **hover** raycasts onto the globe to "listen in" on a region (a halo lights where you point, nearby points brighten, the granular shimmer is drawn toward the quakes there). **The mapping:** magnitude вҶ’ point size + brightness (and lower/larger drone voice); depth вҶ’ colour (shallow warm-gold вҶ’ mid teal вҶ’ deep violet) + radial height (a 3-D data-terrain floating off the surface) + a **stretched inharmonic upper partial** of that voice; recency вҶ’ shimmer rate + grain weighting. **Output = a genuine three.js living field** (custom-shader point shell + globe + orbit/hover-focus raycast). **Audio** (Web Audio): the pitch material is derived **entirely from the data** вҖ” a spectral inharmonic drone cluster + a continuous-pitch granular texture, **never a pentatonic / just-intonation scale-index** (the over-used lab crutch the jury bans) вҖ” through the shared `_shared/psych/convolutionVoid` reverb, master ramped silenceвҶ’0.18 behind a `DynamicsCompressor` limiter; full teardown disposes three.js geometries/materials/renderer, stops grains, cancels RAF, closes the context after the tail. **Never blank/silent:** field + drone from Begin (on snapshot), slow auto-orbit after ~5 s idle; WebGL/three.js absent вҶ’ amber notice + a minimal audio-only fallback. **SAFETY:** no strobe вҖ” per-point shimmer вүӨ~0.75 Hz + slow drift; `prefers-reduced-motion` honored. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client fetch; zero new npm deps; `three@0.182`). **Ambition 4/5:** real-world live-data sonification (menu category, 2nd since `1374`) В· вүҘ3 subsystems (live USGS fetch + dataвҶ’field mapping + three.js point-shell render + data-derived inharmonic drone/granular audio) В· named ref **Refik Anadol вҖ” DATALAND / "Machine Dreams: Rainforest"** (opened 2026-06-20, LA) + the seismic-sonification lineage В· #5 research-in-last-14-days (today's В§731 dive). **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D-primary В· SVG-primary В· JI/pentatonic-always-consonant В· Reich-phasing-as-TIME В· mic-sole В· home-row-keyboard-as-SOLE] В· picked=[real-world-live-data-sonification TECHNIQUE (data-derived inharmonic вҖ” antidote to always-consonant) В· three.js point-field OUTPUT (off Canvas2D+SVG) В· live external-data + pointer INPUT В· data-driven evolving TIME В· cosmic-ambient/planetary VIBE В· PLAYED]` вҖ” clears every 2026-07-10 ban. Winner of a psychedelic **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (cashed jury prov #5 head-on вҖ” the Anadol Dataland finding built on by nothing); honest knock (own README): the live-fetch swap, the hover-raycast "listen-in" mix, and the 3-D data-terrain legibility want Karel's browser + headphones вҖ” headless-unverifiable, but the bundled snapshot + drone-from-Begin + idle auto-orbit guarantee never-blank/silent. `state: living-data-field / a-planet's-seismic-day-as-a-breathing-instrument В· pole: cosmic-ambient`. `status: demoable`.
