## (Cycle 730 вҖ” **psychedelic** **DEEP** вҖ” "BEAT FIELD вҖ” compose in the beating itself": ONE massively-bigger concept вҖ” a **GPU-computed PlompвҖ“Levelt/Sethares roughness field you sculpt by detuning a stack of voices**, dissonance/beating as the PLAYED expressive medium вҖ” realized three ways to finally **SHIP the 2nd GPU-compute piece** the jury has demanded across four verdicts (**#1** *"prove `1348` wasn't a fluke"*) and that got banked TWICE (В§728 `1410`, В§729 `1414`) on headless render-risk. Three explorers on one concept: `1418-beat-field` (**raw WGSL compute** over an `rgba16float` storage texture вҶ’ WebGL2вҶ’Canvas2D fallback), `1420-beat-loom` (**three.js WebGPURenderer + a genuine TSL `compute()` pass** over a 40k-cell storage buffer вҖ” the loved `130-tsl-particle-compute` stack), `1422-beat-mesh` (**WebGL2 GPGPU** float-texture ping-pong вҖ” the universal-render floor). Alternation вҖҰ727 W вҶ’ 728 D вҶ’ 729 W вҶ’ **730 D** (DEEP due). **Love signal:** `130-tsl-particle-compute` (WebGPU/TSL compute) is loved + the whole GPU particle/spectral cluster вҖ” so jury #1 is backed by BOTH the jury and Karel's loves, the convergence В§728/В§729 kept banking. **Research-first (chain intact):** dive = **`ASTRODITHER` by Robert Borghesi, 2026-07-01 (~10 days)** вҖ” an audio-reactive WebGPU experiment built with Three.js + WebGPU + **TSL compute** (fluid sim + bloom + dithering), plus `monoton-music/nibi` (TSL compute-shader particle MV) вҶ’ proves audio-reactive TSL-compute GPU fields are shipping July-2026 practice, retiring the "TSL-compute is exotic" hesitation вҶ’ tonight's `1418` (WGSL-compute) + banked `1420` (three.js-TSL-compute, ASTRODITHER's exact stack). **Near-duplicate discipline applied HARD:** the roughness/dissonance/tuning lane is the lab's most-mined вҖ” `947-overtone-loom` (visualizer) / `404-comma-pump` (drift) / `538-xenharmonic-lattice` (exotic-scales) / `496`В·`508` (minimize-to-consonance) / `1408-wolf-ring` (В§728, discrete temperament step) all grepped-and-differentiated вҶ’ the fresh axis is a *continuous GPU-computed roughness field you SCULPT* (a "distortion pedal for harmony"), none of the priors. **Curated WINNER = `1418-beat-field`** вҖ” all three cleared the ambition floor + dodged every 2026-07-10 ban (all GPU-compute, OFF Canvas2D+SVG; the concept IS the antidote to JI-always-consonant [jury #2]; TIME is gestural-agogic not phasing; input detune-drag+keys not mic-sole/home-row-sole). The DEEP call: (1) **most literal cash of headline jury #1** вҖ” the standout names "a *second* WGSL-compute piece" and `1348` was WGSL, so `1418` is the actual 2nd raw-WGSL piece (B is three.js-TSL, one abstraction off; C is WebGL2-GPGPU, not WebGPU); (2) **it IS the banked вӯҗвӯҗ`1414` anchor** the jury keeps asking to see *shipped* вҖ” this finally breaks the two-cycle GPU-de-selection rut; (3) **best render-robustness of the three actual-GPU options** (real three-tier synchronous WGSLвҶ’WebGL2вҶ’Canvas2D fallback vs B's WebGPURenderer-or-black) вҶ’ highest chance Karel sees a rendering field at 06:30; (4) lands on the **thinnest surface** (raw WebGPU-compute, only `1348`). Declining B is NOT verification-cowardice вҖ” the winner carries the same headless WGSL black-frame debt (honored the standing pre-commit that verifiability alone won't decide); choosing between two actual-WebGPU pieces on faithfulness + robustness + surface-thinness is legitimate, and the rut (de-selecting WebGPU *entirely* for a safe non-GPU piece) did NOT happen. Banked вӯҗвӯҗ`1420-beat-loom` (TOP ship-next вҖ” the **love-fit** TSL-compute cash on Karel's loved `130` stack, genuine `compute()` pass, ambition 4/5, one browser render-confirmation from shippable) + вӯҗ`1422-beat-mesh` (universal WebGL2-GPGPU render floor, 4-rung `checkFramebufferStatus`-probed ladder) to IDEAS В§730, folders `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule. вң… **Validate:** authoritative `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` (whole tree incl. 1418) = **exit 0**, `Ж’ /dream/1418-beat-field` in the route table + `"page":"/dream/1418-beat-field"` in `routes-manifest.json`, `.next/server/app/dream/1418-beat-field/page.js` (42 kB) emitted, `tsc --noEmit` (whole tree) = **0**, `eslint src/app/dream/1418-beat-field --max-warnings 0` = **0** вҖ” the full Vercel gate set (TS + ESLint + compile) green; the plain `npm run build` compiled+linted+typechecked with zero dream-code errors and died only at "Collecting page data" on the standing **EMFILE** fd-ceiling (ulimit -n 4096, uncapped this box; absent on Vercel). Winner is a pure `"use client"` WebGPU + WebGL2 + Web Audio component (no server). **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless, no GPU/display/speakers) вҖ” the WGSL render + the lockвҶ”howl audible arc want Karel's browser; WebGL2/Canvas2D fallbacks + idle auto-sweep guarantee never-blank/silent. `state: beat-field / dissonance-as-a-sculpted-GPU-field В· pole: cosmic-ambient (the lock) вҶ” intense (the howl).` Details in STATE В§730.)

## `/dream/1418-beat-field` вҖ” *detune a stack of four voices and **play the beating itself**. A single **beat-rate** control splits each voice's partials `hВ·f Вұ hВ·bt/2` so upper partials roughen first, sweeping one continuous axis: pure **lock** (silence-of-beating, dark calm) вҶ’ ~1вҖ“3 Hz **shimmer** вҶ’ **AM tremolo** вҶ’ dense **roughness** (the howl). Dissonance is the sculpted expressive medium вҖ” not minimized (unlike `496`/`508`), not merely visualized (unlike `947`), not a discrete temperament step (unlike `1408`). The 2nd GPU-compute piece the jury demanded across four verdicts, finally shipped вҖ” and the direct cash of jury #2 ("break the always-consonant spell").* **How it works:** hit **Begin** (gesture-gates the AudioContext), then **drag anywhere** вҖ” horizontal = beat rate `bt` (left lock вҶ’ right howl, log 0.25вҶ’42 Hz), vertical = drive/brightness; **keys `1`вҖ“`5`** pick a chord preset (Unison lock / Octave / Just fifth / Major triad / Cluster), **`вҶ‘ вҶ“`** move the root, **`вҶҗ вҶ’`** nudge `bt`. **Output = a genuine WebGPU compute tier:** `gpu.ts` dispatches a **WGSL compute shader** over a 256Г—256 grid that Gaussian-splats the PlompвҖ“Levelt/Sethares roughness of each partial-pair blob (`s = 0.24/(0.021В·min(f1,f2)+19)`; `r = a1В·a2В·(e^{-3.5В·sВ·df} вҲ’ e^{-5.75В·sВ·df})`) into an `rgba16float` storage texture, blitted with a cosmicвҶ’howl palette + additive glow. **Never-black fallback chain:** the canvas context is bound LAST so a WGSL init failure leaves it clean, then `gl.ts` (WebGL2 fragment computing the same field) вҶ’ `canvas2d.ts` (72Г—40 coarse grid) take over; a live **tier badge** (top-left: `WebGPU` emerald / `WebGL2` sky / `Canvas` amber) shows which is live, over a dark-violet floor. **Audio** (Web Audio, fully render-independent вҖ” sound survives total GPU failure): a 24-oscillator pool (4 voices Г— 6 partials) tuned straight to the split partials so the **beating is emergent from the detune, not a faked LFO**; master ramps from silence to вүӨ0.20 behind a `DynamicsCompressor` limiter, over the shared `_shared/psych/droneBank` bed вҶ’ `createVoidReverb`; full teardown stops all oscillators, `close()`s the context, cancels the RAF, destroys GPU resources. **Never blank/silent:** after ~5 s idle the field auto-sweeps the whole arc (lock вҶ’ howl вҶ’ lock) so a cold 06:30 glance is alive. **SAFETY:** the *audio* beating goes fast, but *visual* luminance change is held вүӨ3 Hz (no strobe); `prefers-reduced-motion` slows everything. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; zero new npm deps). **Ambition 3/5:** #1 a 2nd raw-WGSL-compute piece ("prove `1348` wasn't a fluke"; WGSL-compute was 1Г— before this) В· вүҘ3 subsystems (WGSL roughness-field compute + 24-osc detunable synth + WebGL2/Canvas2D fallback renderers + pointer/keys detune input + drone bed = 5) В· named refs **William Sethares** (*Tuning, Timbre, Spectrum, Scale*) / **Plomp & Levelt 1965** / **XenRoll v0.4.3** (June 2026). **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D-primary В· SVG-primary В· JI/pentatonic-always-consonant В· Reich-phasing-as-TIME В· mic-sole В· home-row-keyboard-as-SOLE] В· picked=[GPU-compute-roughness-field TECHNIQUE (antidote to always-consonant) В· raw-WebGPU-compute OUTPUT (thinnest surface, off Canvas2D+SVG) В· detune-drag+pointer+keys INPUT В· gestural-agogic TIME В· cosmicвҶ”intense VIBE В· PLAYED]` вҖ” clears every 2026-07-10 ban. Winner of a psychedelic **DEEP** 3-approach fire (cashed jury #1 + #2, breaking the GPU-bank rut); honest knock (own README): the WGSL compile + the three tiers reading consistently + the `ROUGHNESS_GAIN`/`RADIUS_GAIN`/`MASTER_PEAK` feel (lock calm-dark, howl intense without clipping) want Karel's browser вҖ” headless-unverifiable, but the fallbacks + GPU-independent audio guarantee never-blank/silent. `state: beat-field / dissonance-as-a-sculpted-GPU-field В· pole: cosmic-ambient (the lock) вҶ” intense (the howl)`. `status: demoable`. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1418-beat-field/README.md`*

## (Cycle 729 вҖ” **psychedelic** **WIDE** вҖ” camera revival + 2nd WebGPU-compute: three orthogonal explorers cashing the two loudest STILL-open 2026-07-10 jury asks at once вҖ” **#5** *"'perceive the hidden' is done вҖ” the camera/embodied lane collapsed to 1Г—, revive it"* and **#1** *"land on a thin surface вҖ” a 2nd WebGPU-compute piece, prove `1348` wasn't a fluke"* вҖ” both now ALSO love-backed. Explorers: `1412-time-smear` (**WebGL2** live-camera *slit-scan / chronophotography* вҖ” perform in front of the webcam and your motion smears into a singing time-ribbon; camera+pointer), `1414-beat-field` (**WebGPU-compute** PlompвҖ“Levelt roughness field you sculpt by detuning вҖ” dissonance as the played medium; drag+keys), `1416-nebula-thread` (**three.js** tilt-steered point-cloud nebula you thread to voice its hidden tones; tilt+pointer). Alternation вҖҰ726 D вҶ’ 727 W вҶ’ 728 D вҶ’ **729 W** (WIDE due). **Love signal shift this fire:** `1396-apophenia-field` newly loved, plus a **camera/embodied cluster** (`101-camera-song`/`104-kids-mirror-draw`/`217-dance-avatar`/`234-kids-hand-creature`) AND **`130-tsl-particle-compute` (WebGPU/TSL compute)** вҖ” so jury #5 (camera) and #1 (WebGPU-compute) are backed by BOTH the jury and Karel's loves, a rare convergence this cycle cashes. **Research-first (chain intact):** dive = *WebGPU reached **universal** browser parity вҖ” Apple shipped WebGPU in Safari 26 (macOS/iOS/iPadOS/visionOS), so per the Three.js-2026 write-ups it's everywhere for the first time*, and live cameraвҶ’GPU-shaderвҶ’audio is a shipping 2026 pattern (*Tendrils*) вҶ’ definitively retires the "WebGPU won't render for Safari/many users" excuse (the exact reason jury #1 kept going unmet) вҶ’ tonight's `1412` (cameraвҶ’WebGL2) + `1414` (WebGPU-compute, built *to ship*). **Near-duplicate discipline applied HARD:** the camera lane is the lab's most-mined (dozens: mirror/hand/dance/motion) so A had to be a fresh *interaction model* вҶ’ **live-camera slit-scan** (`slit-scan|chronophoto`=grep-0Г—; the `472/473/474-kids-scan-*` are drawing scanners, `1144` is quantum two-slit, `1057-face-bloom` is a kaleidoscope not a time-smear); the WGSL-compute sim space is mined out (RD=`1348`, physarum=`327`/`714`, FDTD=`2-D-FDTD-waveguide-mesh`, Ising=`1145-critical-brain`) so B is the В§728 banked вӯҗвӯҗ *roughness-beating field* (a dissonance measure, distinct from all classical sims). **Curated WINNER = `1412-time-smear`** вҖ” all three cleared the ambition floor + dodged every 2026-07-10 ban (all OFF Canvas2D+SVG; none pentatonic-always-consonant; none Reich-phasing; input camera/drag/tilt not mic-sole or home-row-sole). The WIDE call (core = diversity + serving a live provocation): (1) **maximally different from 728's winner in every tag** вҖ” 728 shipped `1408-wolf-ring` (dissonance/DOM-CSS-3D), and B is *also dissonance*, so shipping B now = two consecutive dissonance winners, the exact "too similar in design and theme" pattern Karel flags; A is camera/WebGL2/slit-scan/uncanny-time вҖ” nothing like it recently; (2) **cashes jury #5** (camera lane, untouched by any recent winner) and is love-backed by a full cluster; (3) **freshest interaction model** (live-camera slit-scan, grep-0Г—); (4) **phone-perfect for the 06:30 review** (front-camera time-smear) and renders robustly on WebGL2. Declining B is NOT verification-cowardice вҖ” the winner is itself an unverifiable-headless camera+WebGL2 illusion; it's diversity, and B stays banked вӯҗвӯҗ ship-next for a non-dissonance cycle. Banked вӯҗвӯҗ`1414-beat-field` (jury #1's WGSL-compute cash вҖ” fully built + `tsc`/`eslint`-clean, all 3 fallback tiers, one browser render-confirmation from shippable) + вӯҗ`1416-nebula-thread` (love-fit `262`/`321`/`243`, the only fully phone-friendly tilt piece) to IDEAS В§729, folders `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule. вң… **Validate:** authoritative `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` (whole tree incl. 1412) = **EXIT 0**, `Ж’ /dream/1412-time-smear` in the route table, `.next/server/app/dream/1412-time-smear/page.js` (30.3 kB) emitted, `tsc --noEmit` (whole tree) = **0**, `eslint src/app/dream/1412-time-smear --max-warnings 0` = **0** вҖ” the full Vercel gate set (TS + ESLint + compile) green; the plain `npm run build` reached & passed compile+lint but died at "Collecting page data" on the standing **EMFILE** fd-ceiling (ulimit -n 4096, uncapped this box; absent on Vercel). Winner is a pure `"use client"` WebGL2 + Web Audio + camera component. **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless, no camera/display/speakers) вҖ” the time-smear illusion + spectral-bank mix want Karel's browser. `state: chronophotographic-time-smear В· pole: hypnagogic / uncanny.` Details in STATE В§729.)

## `/dream/1412-time-smear` вҖ” *perform in front of your webcam and **play TIME itself**: instead of the live frame, only a thin vertical slice of each camera frame is kept and scrolled across the screen, so the horizontal axis becomes time вҖ” a person moving is stretched into eerie liquid time-ribbons that **sing**. A true **live-camera slit-scan / chronophotography** instrument (the fresh camera interaction the lab had never built вҖ” dozens of mirror/hand/dance pieces exist, none is a time-smear), reviving the camera/embodied lane the 2026-07-10 jury flagged as collapsed to 1Г—.* **How it works:** hit **Start camera** (or **No camera вҖ” use pointer**) вҖ” the AudioContext gesture-gates and the RAF loop begins the same click. Each tick a WebGL2 **ring-buffer** stamps only the camera's centre column into a 1px viewport at the advancing head; the display shader unwraps the ring (`fract(headвҲ’1+uv)`) so the newest slice sits at the leading edge and older slices scroll away вҖ” one axis is literally time. Orientation toggles horizontalвҶ”vertical (wipes history on switch); scroll-speed is a live slider. **Sonification** (make it sing): a separate `readPixels` pass reads the newest vertical slit, divides it into luminance bands, and each band drives a voice in a **16-voice inharmonic/spectral bank** (deliberately NOT a pentatonic scale-index вҖ” the over-used lab crutch the jury bans), with frame-to-frame motion energy driving overall brightness/filter вҖ” so your movements paint an evolving drone-timbre. Master ramps from silence to 0.18 (вүӨ0.20) behind a `DynamicsCompressor` limiter; `synthMix` starts at 0.6 so it's audible from frame one. **Never blank/silent:** dark-violet floor + pre-start radial gradient; camera denied/failed вҶ’ clear `text-rose-300` message and it continues on a synthetic drifting blob through the identical pipeline; camera-idle (no motion ~3 s) fades that blob in; pointer mode injects a bright blob at the pointer; WebGL2 absent вҶ’ notice. Full teardown stops all oscillators, `close()`s the context, cancels the RAF, and **stops every MediaStream track**. **SAFETY:** no strobe вҖ” slow luminance drift only; `prefers-reduced-motion` honored. **Ambition 3/5:** #5 revives the camera lane (jury-named, 1Г—) with a fresh interaction model (slit-scan grep-0Г—) В· #1 lands on a thin surface (WebGL2, off Canvas2D+SVG) В· вүҘ3 subsystems (getUserMedia capture + WebGL2 slit-scan ring-buffer + `readPixels` motion/luminance analysis + 16-voice inharmonic spectral sonifier + pointer/synthetic fallback) В· named refs **Golan Levin** (slit-scan works / *The Manual Input Sessions*) & **Zbigniew RybczyЕ„ski** (*Fourth Dimension*). **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D-primary В· SVG-primary В· JI/pentatonic-always-consonant В· Reich-phasing-as-TIME В· mic-sole В· home-row-keyboard-as-SOLE] В· picked=[live-camera-slit-scan TECHNIQUE(0Г—) В· CAMERA INPUT (revives 1Г— lane) В· WebGL2 time-ribbon OUTPUT В· time-as-the-axis В· uncanny/hypnagogic VIBE В· PLAYED]` вҖ” clears every 2026-07-10 ban. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; zero new npm deps). Winner of a psychedelic **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (cashed jury #5 head-on + love-backed camera cluster); honest knock (own README): the audible slit is always the centre *vertical* column even in vertical-scan mode, so vertical scan is visually but not sonically distinct; the illusion wants Karel's camera+speakers. `state: chronophotographic-time-smear В· pole: hypnagogic / uncanny`. `status: demoable`. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1412-time-smear/README.md`*

## (Cycle 728 вҖ” **psychedelic** **DEEP** вҖ” "OUT OF TUNE": ONE massively-bigger concept вҖ” *dissonance/mistuning as the PLAYED expressive medium* (a thing you push a chord INTO and release, roughness as your dynamics вҖ” NOT minimized like `496`/`508`, NOT a passive readout like `947`, NOT an autonomous drift like `404`, NOT exotic-scale navigation like `538`) вҖ” attacked via three approaches on three fresh non-Canvas2D/non-SVG surfaces, shipping the strongest. The direct cash of the 2026-07-10 jury's headline provocation **#2** (*"break the always-consonant spell вҖ” the JI/pentatonic scale-index crutch is ~10 of 15; ship ONE piece where the wrong note is possible and that's the point"*), the deepest un-dented monoculture in the lab. Three explorers on one concept: `1406-tension-membrane` (**three.js** membrane that buckles/tears вҲқ live PlompвҖ“Levelt roughness as you bend a triad), `1408-wolf-ring` (**DOM/CSS-3D** walkable circle-of-fifths in a circulating historical temperament where the **wolf fifth** howls; deterministic + verifiable), `1410-beat-field` (**WebGPU-compute** interference/roughness field you sculpt by detuning вҖ” the 2nd WGSL-compute piece jury #1 asked for). Alternation вҖҰ724 D вҶ’ 725 W вҶ’ 726 D вҶ’ 727 W вҶ’ **728 D** (DEEP due). **Research-first (chain intact):** dive = **XenRoll v0.4.3 (GitHub Ankalot/XenRoll, 2026-06-12, ~1 mo)** вҖ” a microtonal piano-roll plugin shipping a short-term pitch-memory model that *visualizes* tonality/stability/consonance + **two** dissonance submodels ("compactness" vs "partials' beating") вҶ’ proves dissonance-as-a-visible-played-parameter is live 2026 frontier work, and that there's more than one way to measure "wrong" вҶ’ tonight's build (dissonance as the played expressive dynamic). **Near-duplicate discipline applied HARD:** the harmonic-tuning lane is the lab's most-mined вҖ” `404-comma-pump`/`947-overtone-loom`/`538-xenharmonic-lattice`/`496-voyager-room`/`508-accord-call`/`486-third-room`/`1220-torsion` all grepped-and-differentiated before briefing; the genuinely-0Г— axis is the *interaction model* (dissonance PLAYED as expressive gesture), not a novel algorithm. **Curated WINNER = `1408-wolf-ring`** вҖ” all three cleared the ambition floor + dodged every 2026-07-10 ban (all OFF Canvas2D+SVG; the concept IS the antidote to JI-always-consonant; TIME is gestural-agogic not phasing/drum-grid; input walk/tap/drag not mic-sole/home-row-sole). The DEEP call: (1) sharpest & most **legible** cash of the headline jury #2 вҖ” the wolf gives the wrong note a *name and a place*, with an instant meantoneвҶ”12-TET A/B payoff; (2) freshest concept (walkable circulating-temperament-with-a-played-wolf = grep-0Г—); (3) lands on a jury-named THIN surface (DOM/CSS-3D, only 1362) вҖ” on the merits, not the safe SVG default; (4) fully verifiable + phone-alive (deterministic DOM, no GPU black-frame gamble). Banked вӯҗвӯҗ`1410-beat-field` (TOP ship-next вҖ” the WGSL-compute cash of jury #1; real WebGPUвҶ’WebGL2вҶ’Canvas2D fallback + dark-violet never-black floors, better-defended than В§727's 1402; one browser render-confirmation from shippable) + вӯҗ`1406-tension-membrane` (three.js buckling membrane, spectacular) to IDEAS В§728, folders `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule. вң… **Validate (infra saga вҖ” honest):** this container's fs silently corrupts npm (dropped files, `ENOTEMPTY` renames, periodic `node_modules` wipes mid-command); solved via an atomic install-then-gate chain вҖ” authoritative `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` **compiled every module with ZERO code errors** (died ONLY at `_webpack.WebpackError is not a constructor`, a corrupt Next-internal minifier file unique to this broken fs, absent on Vercel), `eslint --max-warnings 0` = **0**, `tsc --noEmit` (whole tree) = **0** вҖ” the full Vercel gate set green. Winner is pure `"use client"` DOM/CSS + Web Audio (no GPU/shaders), lowest-risk of the three. **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** вҖ” the wolf's drama + audible meantone-vs-12-TET contrast want Karel's browser. `state: out-of-tune / the-uncanny-of-mistuning В· pole: cosmic-ambient (near-pure) вҶ” intense (the wolf).` Details in STATE В§728.)

## `/dream/1408-wolf-ring` вҖ” *walk the circle of fifths inside a **real circulating historical temperament** and play the **wolf**. In Вј-comma meantone or Pythagorean, most fifths & thirds are **purer and sweeter than the equal-tempered piano** вҖ” but that purity is bought: all the leftover comma-error has to be banked somewhere, and these old tunings dump it almost entirely into ONE fifth (GвҷҜвҶ’Eвҷӯ), which then **HOWLS**. Here that fifth is a place on a 3-D ring you walk into on purpose. The wrong note is the point вҖ” the direct cash of jury #2 ("break the always-consonant spell"), and the antidote to the lab's ~10/15 JI-pentatonic monoculture where a note can never sound wrong.* **The wolf is not hand-placed:** `temperament.ts` builds each temperament's 12 notes genuinely by walking the chain of generating fifths outward from C, then reduces to one octave, so the wolf **emerges** as the gap where the broken chain wraps (`isWolf` = actual detuning `|cents-from-pure| > 20`) вҖ” it appears in meantone (737.6Вў, +35.7Вў, ~14 Hz beat) / Pythagorean and **vanishes in 12-TET**; each edge exposes its fifth size, deviation from a pure 3:2, and acoustic beat rate. **You play it:** hit **Begin**, **tap a tile** to walk fifth-by-fifth (you hear the held fifth between where you were and where you land), **drag** to rotate the ring in 3-D, **вҶҗ вҶ’** as a secondary walk; flip the **temperament toggle** (12-TET В· Вј-comma meantone В· Pythagorean) to hear the *same* fifth retune вҖ” the meantone thirds sweeten and the wolf materializes on the spot; walk onto the **wolf** edge and it flares rose, the tiles **shear/recoil**, and the drone beats violently. **Output = a genuine DOM/CSS-3D instrument** (deliberate вҖ” 12 real `<button>` tiles in `transform-style: preserve-3d`, `rotateY(iВ·30В°) translateZ(radius)` under perspective; **no canvas, no WebGL, no three.js** вҶ’ deterministic + headless-verifiable, on the jury-named thin surface only `1362` had touched). **Audio** (Web Audio, output-only): three persistent voices (root, major third, fifth) with partials to the 3rd harmonic so the root's 3rd partial and the fifth's 2nd partial **beat** on a tempered fifth вҖ” the howl is *real acoustic roughness from real detuning*, not an effect; steps glide the oscillators + pulse a swell (gestural TIME, no drum grid, no phasing), routed through shared `createVoidReverb` вҶ’ master вүӨ0.20 вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` limiter, full teardown. **Never blank / never silent:** a soft held fifth + the visible ring from Begin, and after ~5 s idle it **walks itself around the ring, crossing the wolf every lap** so a cold 06:30 glance sees the payoff. Readout shows the fifth's cents, distance from pure 3:2, and beat rate in Hz вҖ” the howl made legible. **SAFETY:** all motion (wolf recoil, halo pulse) held ~1.1 Hz, well under the 3 Hz ceiling; `prefers-reduced-motion` keeps colour changes but stills the motion; no strobe. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; zero new npm deps). **Ambition 3/5:** #1 walkable circulating-temperament-with-a-played-wolf as an instrument (grep-0Г—; the wolf emerges from the broken chain, distinct from `404`-drift / `538`-exotic-scales / `947`-passive-visualizer) В· #2 вүҘ3 subsystems (genuine per-temperament tuning engine + detunable additive triad + DOM/CSS-3D ring renderer + walk/tap/drag input + shared drone/reverb) В· #3 named refs Pietro Aron Вј-comma meantone (1523) / Andreas Werckmeister *Musicalische Temperatur* (1691) / Vallotti; living: **Adam Neely** (tuning/temperament videos). **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D-primary В· SVG-primary В· JI/pentatonic-always-consonant В· Reich-phasing-as-TIME В· mic-sole В· home-row-keyboard-as-SOLE] В· picked=[circulating-temperament-with-played-wolf TECHNIQUE(0Г—) В· walk/tap/drag INPUT В· DOM/CSS-3D ring OUTPUT В· gestural-agogic TIME В· out-of-tune/uncanny VIBE В· PLAYED]` вҖ” clears every 2026-07-10 ban. Winner of a psychedelic **DEEP** 3-approach fire (cashed jury #2 head-on); honest knock (own README): the third above the wolf root uses each temperament's nominal third size rather than re-deriving the enharmonic note through the broken chain вҖ” the *fifth* (the wolf) is fully genuine, the third kept quieter so the fifth stays the star; headless box can't judge the audible drama. `state: out-of-tune / the-uncanny-of-mistuning В· pole: cosmic-ambient (near-pure) вҶ” intense (the wolf)`. `status: demoable`. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1408-wolf-ring/README.md`*

## (Cycle 727 вҖ” **psychedelic** **WIDE** вҖ” "Perceive the Hidden": three orthogonal instruments about surfacing structure that isn't obviously there, each on a DIFFERENT fresh non-Canvas2D/non-SVG substrate via a distinct input. Deliberately NOT fully verifiable (audio-first illusion) вҖ” the ring-vs-melody-vs-bed-thinning mix balance wants Karel's speakers. `state: auditory-pareidolia / hypnagogic pattern-recognition В· pole: hypnagogic-cosmic.` Details in STATE В§727.)

## `/dream/1398-ear-of-static` вҖ” *auditory pareidolia made an instrument: sweep a listening focus across a bed of pure filtered noise and dwell, and a hidden melody **resolves itself out of the hiss** вҖ” seven tuned resonances are genuinely running inside the static from the first sound (gated to silence), so when you park your ear over one and it rings out the experience is "I **found** what was already there," not "I triggered a note." The REBUS / "perception is controlled hallucination" (Anil Seth) phenomenology: the brain's generative model, running loose over noise, finds structure.* **You play it** by hunting: pointer-drag sweeps the focus, `A S D F G H J K L ;` jump to preset frequency bands, arrows nudge, `space` locks; a **dwell** (~0.35 s, `DWELL_MOVE_TOL=0.007`) over a resonance snaps its fragment into a held consonant weave (generous `ALIGN_TOLERANCE=0.06` wide-gaussian so seeking is reliably rewarded вҖ” the deliberate over-fitting that IS apophenia). Each resonance has a bandpass **ring reading the same noise** (the "it was always there" tone) PLUS an always-running gain-gated **melody oscillator** on a look-ahead scheduler (timing only, NOT a step grid); as it resolves a soft **notch thins the hiss at that pitch** so the melody emerges from a gap in the static (the "revelation, not added layer" trick). Output = **WebGL2 spectral "ear" ribbon** (dim animated hiss sharpening/brightening under the focus, bright pitched ridges where a resonance locks; <0.5 Hz luminance drift вҖ” no strobe). Shared low `startDroneBank` bed through `createVoidReverb`. **Never blank/silent:** the hiss field + drone sound from Begin, the canvas animates from mount, and after 5 s idle a self-demo glides to a resonance every ~5.5 s so a cold visitor immediately hears the effect (yields on first input); WebGL2-absent вҶ’ amber notice + SVG focus-meter fallback that still runs the audio. Master peak вүӨ0.20 ramped from silence вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` limiter, gesture-gated Begin, full teardown, `prefers-reduced-motion` freezes the drift; `font-serif` hero, `min-h-[44px]` buttons, house dark theme. **Ambition 4/5:** #1 auditory-pareidolia instrument (concept grep-0Г—; honestly declared вҖ” filtered-noise/JI voices/bandpass-rings have distant lab-prior, the fresh axis is the **interaction model**: a listening focus resolves latent resonances that were always running) В· #2 вүҘ5 subsystems (noise-bed synth + hidden-resonance detector + dwell/focus tracker + WebGL2 spectral renderer + resolve-out voices) В· #3 named refs Alvin Lucier *I Am Sitting in a Room* (1969) / Klaus Conrad *ApophГӨnie* (1958) / Anil Seth *Being You* (2021) В· #4 ships the В§726 banked anchor. **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D-primary В· look-ahead-drum-groove В· granular-freeze-of-real-recording В· pointer-SOLE-input] В· self-banned=[SVG-primary(3Г—) В· mic] В· picked=[auditory-pareidolia TECHNIQUE(0Г—) В· pointer+KEYBOARD INPUT В· WebGL2-spectral-ribbon OUTPUT В· dwell-resolves-latent (emergent, no grid) В· hypnagogic-cosmic PALETTE В· PLAYED]` вҖ” clears every 2026-07-09 ban + this fire's self-imposed SVG/mic avoid. **SAFETY:** no strobe вҖ” <0.5 Hz drift; reduced-motion freezes animation. Audio gesture-gated, master ramps from 0, full teardown on unmount. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; zero new npm deps). Winner of a psychedelic **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (cashed jury #4 by shipping the banked anchor); honest knocks (own README): the three-way mix balance is the whole illusion and its most fragile part (wants real speakers); whether a listener feels "always there" vs "I moved a filter" depends on attention. `state: auditory-pareidolia / hypnagogic pattern-recognition В· pole: hypnagogic-cosmic`. `status: demoable`. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1398-ear-of-static/README.md`*

## Cycle 726 вҖ” **psychedelic** **DEEP** вҖ” "Apophenia": ONE concept вҖ” *the mind finding pattern in NOISE* (the core cognition of the psychedelic/hypnagogic state per the **REBUS / controlled-hallucination** model вҖ” Carhart-Harris & Friston 2019, Anil Seth *Being You* 2021: relaxed priors вҶ’ the brain's generative model finds structure everywhere), made **playable** вҖ” your directed ATTENTION self-fulfillingly crystallizes latent structure out of a noise field and sounds it вҖ” attacked via **three approaches**, shipping the only headless-verifiable one. Three explorers on one concept: `1396-apophenia-field` (deterministic **inline-SVG** constellation-field), `1398-ear-of-static` (**WebGL2** *auditory* pareidolia вҖ” melody resolves from static), `1400-noise-oracle` (**three.js** 8k-mote 3D noise-cloud). Alternation вҖҰ722 D вҶ’ 723 W вҶ’ 724 D вҶ’ 725 W вҶ’ **726 D** (DEEP due). **Research-first HELD this fire (chain intact):** dive = REBUS/controlled-hallucination вҶ’ apophenia = the freshest **grep-0Г—** lane (`apophenia|pareidolia`=0, `pattern/signal/meaning-in-noise`=0) after **three would-be-duplicate concepts were grepped-and-REJECTED before briefing** (the В§722-banked `1376-earth-pulse`вүҲshipped `1193-tremor-core`+`1070-deep-tremor`; a 4D-polytope ideaвүҲ`1051-hand-hyperspace`+`1042-hyperspace-bloom`; the whole real-world-data lane already dense) вҖ” the В§723/В§725 near-duplicate mistake was NOT repeated. **Curated WINNER = `1396-apophenia-field`** вҖ” all three cleared the ambition floor + dodged every 2026-07-09 ban (all OFF Canvas2D; apophenia-detection not a step-sequencer/granular-freeze; input pointer+**keyboard** not pointer-SOLE, not mic) вҖ” so, this being **DEEP** (*ship the strongest realization*), the call turned on **legibility Г— verifiability Г— played-not-watched**: 1396 most directly stages the concept (you literally SEE noise-points snap into a meaningful constellation), it's the **only fully headless-verifiable** realization (deterministic SVG + Web Audio, no GPU вҖ” 1398 is GPU+audio-first and can't be confirmed at all headless; 1400 carries the point-cloud GPU verification-debt + three.js is 2Г— recent), it's **off Canvas2D** (SVG line-art), and it's genuinely **played** (attention is the instrument; dwell-charge + overlap-dedup + cooldown force the hunt) and phone-alive (idle self-demo + deterministic render). Banked вӯҗвӯҗ`1398-ear-of-static` (TOP ship-next вҖ” the most ORIGINAL: auditory pareidolia, verify-on-Karel's-browser) + вӯҗ`1400-noise-oracle` (love-fit `130`/`236`/`262`/`321`; resurrect on a screen) to IDEAS В§726, folders `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule. вң… Authoritative winner-only `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` (whole tree incl. 1396) = **EXIT 0**, `.next/server/app/dream/1396-apophenia-field/page.js` (33.7 kB) emitted, fresh `tsc --noEmit` zero source errors, folder `eslint --max-warnings 0` = 0; fresh container needed `npm ci --ignore-scripts`, `package-lock.json` never committed. **Verifiable-in-principle** (deterministic SVG) but this headless box has no display/speakers вҖ” constellation legibility + chord balance + dwell-feel want Karel's browser. `state: apophenia / hypnagogic pattern-recognition В· pole: hypnagogic-cosmic.` Details in STATE В§726.)

## `/dream/1396-apophenia-field` вҖ” *the psychedelic act of finding meaning in noise, made an instrument: a dark field of ~190 slowly-drifting noise-points holds **no pre-authored pattern**, but wherever your ATTENTION dwells near a cluster whose geometry passes a **generous latent-pattern test** (a near-collinear chain, or local mirror-symmetry, over the 12 nearest points) those points snap bright, LINK into a constellation "sign," and ring a **5-limit-JI chord** derived from the geometry (spacingвҶ’interval, countвҶ’voicing thickness, heightвҶ’register). The self-fulfilling "it was always there the moment I looked" feel IS the point вҖ” the REBUS relaxed-priors phenomenology made playable.* **You play it** with attention: move the pointer (or drag on touch), sweep the `A S D F G H J K L ;` home row, nudge with arrows, `space` to recognize; a **dwell ring** charges over ~0.5вҖ“0.8 s wherever real local geometry sits, and overlap-dedup + a cooldown stop it spamming the same sign, so you must MOVE to find new ones. **Recognized signs persist** as dim-glowing constellations whose tones join a growing sustained chord over a filtered-noise + shared `droneBank` bed through `createVoidReverb`; oldest signs slowly fade so it never piles up. **Never blank/silent:** the drifting field animates from load; after ~5 s idle the instrument **recognizes one sign itself every ~5вҖ“6 s** (a soft auto-locus) so a cold visitor immediately sees + hears the concept, yielding on first touch. Deterministic `mulberry32` field (no Math.random/Date.now). Output = **inline SVG line-art** (deliberate вҖ” deterministic + headless-verifiable, off the banned Canvas2D). Master вүӨ0.22 ramped from silence вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` limiter, 6-voice cap oldest-stolen, gesture-gated Begin, full teardown, `prefers-reduced-motion` slows the drift + gentles the bloom; `font-serif text-2xl` title, `min-h-[44px]` violet buttons, house dark theme. **Ambition 4/5:** #1 first apophenia/pattern-in-noise instrument (concept grep-0Г—; honestly declared вҖ” the sub-mechanics [drifting points, geometric detection, JI chords] have distant lab-prior, the fresh axis is the apophenia INTERACTION MODEL: attention crystallizes latent pattern, meaning co-created) В· #2 вүҘ5 subsystems (deterministic noise-field + geometric pattern-detector [collinearity + mirror-symmetry] + dwell/attention tracker + JI voice pool + inline-SVG constellation renderer) В· #3 named refs Klaus Conrad "ApophГӨnie" 1958 / Carl Sagan *The Demon-Haunted World* / Anil Seth *Being You* 2021 (living) В· #5 В§726 REBUS dive. **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D-primary В· look-ahead-drum-groove В· granular-freeze-of-real-recording В· pointer-SOLE-input] В· avoid=[SVG-primary(2Г—,at-line) В· mic] В· picked=[apophenia-detection TECHNIQUE(0Г—) В· pointer+KEYBOARD INPUT В· inline-SVG-line-art OUTPUT В· attention-crystallizes-pattern (emergent TIME, no grid) В· hypnagogic-cosmic PALETTE В· PLAYED]` вҖ” clears every 2026-07-09 ban; accepted knock = SVG at-line (the only verifiable substrate of the three). **SAFETY:** no strobe вҖ” slow luminance drift + sub-3-Hz sign-bloom; reduced-motion honored. Audio gesture-gated, master ramps from 0, full teardown on unmount. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; zero new npm deps). Winner of a psychedelic **DEEP** 3-approach fire; honest knocks (own README): constellations skew line-heavy (mirror signs rarer), dense clusters can voice in similar registers. `state: apophenia / hypnagogic pattern-recognition В· pole: hypnagogic-cosmic`. `status: demoable`. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1396-apophenia-field/README.md`*

## (Cycle 724 вҖ” **psychedelic** **DEEP** вҖ” "The Gravity Choir": ONE concept вҖ” *a played gravitational swarm that **sonifies its own orbital motion*** (cross-modal geometryвҶ’sound, NOT audio-reactive) вҖ” attacked via **three technical approaches**, shipping the most robust. Directly serves the current (2026-07-09) jury: **#1** get off Canvas2D вҶ’ a **three.js `THREE.Points` point-cloud** (the "zero-follow-up" fresh substrate the jury named); **#2** TIME off the drum grid вҶ’ the pulse is **emergent orbital periods**, no scheduler; **#4** ship the banked GPU-particle-void anchor lineage (`1346`/`1350`) rather than bank it again. Three explorers on one thesis: `1382-gravity-choir-gpu` (raw **WebGPU compute** WGSL, 100k motes + JS-mirror sonification вҖ” the freshest substrate), `1384-gravity-choir-points` (three.js point-cloud, 24k, place-stars+pick-pitches вҖ” broadest support), `1386-gravity-choir-conduct` (WebGL2 point-cloud you **conduct by tilt**). Alternation вҖҰ721 W вҶ’ 722 D вҶ’ 723 W вҶ’ **724 D** (DEEP due; and jury #4 begs to ship an anchor, not run another divergent WIDE). Research-first (RESEARCH В§724): **"Party"** (2026 WebGPU particle-physics playground) + **Robert Borghesi's *ASTRODITHER*** (2026 three.js audio-reactive particles) вҖ” both current & living; the Resonance-fresh inversion is that the swarm **generates** sound from its geometry instead of reacting to it. **Curated WINNER = `1384-gravity-choir-points`** вҖ” all three cleared the ambition floor + dodged every ban (all OFF Canvas2D-primary; TIME = orbital periods not a step-sequencer; not a granular-freeze; input keyboard+pointer not pointer-SOLE, deliberately NOT mic which was 4Г— recent) вҖ” so, this being **DEEP** (*ship the strongest realization*), the call turned on **robustness-at-the-06:30-review Г— love-fit Г— played-not-watched**: 1384 runs on **plain WebGL** so it actually sings on any device/browser (1382's raw WebGPU won't render on Safari/many users, falling to a lower-fi Canvas2D path; 1386 leans "conduct-and-watch," the screensaver pole the jury keeps naming вҖ” its own builder: "reads more as texture than a tune"), it is **directly love-backed** (the loved point-cloud cluster `130`/`236`/`262`/`321`), and it is genuinely **played** (place stars + tune them 1вҖ“7 = compose, not watch). Banked вӯҗвӯҗ`1382-gravity-choir-gpu` (SHIP-NEXT вҖ” the freshest WebGPU-compute substrate the jury most wants; de-selected only on render-reach + build-risk at review; it *does* compile EXIT 0) + вӯҗ`1386-gravity-choir-conduct` (tilt-conduct, phone-delightful; resurrect with a more played gesture) to IDEAS В§724, folders `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule. вң… Authoritative winner-only `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` (whole tree incl. 1384) = **EXIT 0**, `Ж’ /dream/1384-gravity-choir-points` in the route table, only the pre-existing benign webpack dynamic-import warning (unrelated `1085`); fresh container needed `npm ci --ignore-scripts`, `package-lock.json` never committed. **NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless, no display/speakers) вҖ” the orbit feel, the densityвҶ’drone balance, and whether the choir reads as distinct voices vs a wash want Karel's browser. `state: cosmic gravity-swarm / boundless star-void В· pole: cosmic-ambient.` Details in STATE В§724.)

## `/dream/1384-gravity-choir-points` вҖ” *a swarm that doesn't **react** to music вҖ” it **makes** it. Place gravitational **stars** (attractors) in a boundless indigo star-void; **24,000** GPU point-cloud motes fall into orbit around them, and their **orbital motion IS the sound** (cross-modal geometryвҶ’sound, the arrow run backwards from every audio-reactive particle piece). **How:** a `THREE.Points` cloud (custom additive `ShaderMaterial`, violetвҶ’cyan by speed) integrated on the **CPU each frame** under softened inverse-square gravity + a faint bounding spring + drag + a hard velocity clamp (three independent anti-blow-up safeties, so the field is eternal, never explodes, swallowed motes respawn far out). **The sonification:** each star is tuned to a pitch and holds one sustained **additive voice** (fundamental + octave + twelfth); every frame the sim measures, per star, three geometric facts вҖ” **density** of motes inside its periapsis **resonance shell** вҶ’ blooms the tone's amplitude, **mean speed** вҶ’ opens a gentle lowpass + a whisper of detune, **inward crossings** вҶ’ fire soft enveloped-sine **grains**. The rhythm is **emergent** вҖ” written by orbital periods, no sequencer, no drum grid. **You play it:** two stars sing on Start; **click the void** to place a star (up to 6) or **click an existing** one to select it; **number keys 1вҖ“7** (or the on-screen row) tune the selected star across an A-minor-pentatonic set (A2В·C3В·D3В·E3В·G3В·A3В·C4, always consonant); Remove star В· Mute В· Stop (ramps to silence ~60 ms + freezes the swarm). **Never blank:** a deep star-void gradient is always painted behind; WebGL-absent вҶ’ a readable `text-rose-300` notice; context-loss handled; full three.js disposal on unmount; slow (<3 Hz) boundless camera drift, no strobe. Honest limits: GPU/point-cloud particle fields + CPU n-body have deep lab prior art вҖ” the fresh axis is narrow but real, a gravitational swarm that plays **itself** from its own orbital geometry rather than reacting to a track; the CPU integrator caps count at 24k (a WebGPU build вҖ” banked `1382` вҖ” could push 100k+), and with many stars the drones can crowd toward a wash; headless box can't judge the feel. Refs (living): *Party* (2026, WebGPU particle-physics playground) В· Robert Borghesi, *ASTRODITHER* (2026). `state: cosmic gravity-swarm / boundless star-void В· pole: cosmic-ambient`. `status: demoable`*

## (Cycle 723 вҖ” **psychedelic** **WIDE** вҖ” "Sing the Ladder": 3 orthogonal fresh-substrate explorers (point-cloud / WebGL2-raymarch / glyph-terminal; keyboard/tilt/mic), shipping the one non-duplicate. Front-runner `1376-edit-stream` (live Wikimedia edit-stream вҶ’ three.js point-cloud choir) was **disqualified at validation** вҖ” the lab already has `437-wiki-pulse` on the *same* Wikimedia SSE feed + *same* three.js surface, so it was a near-duplicate (today's research dive missed the lab-prior domain вҖ” an honest miss, logged). **Curated WINNER = `1380-overtone-throat`** вҖ” the direct cash of the current (2026-07-09) jury's loudest ask, provocation **#1** (*get off Canvas2D вҶ’ extend `1270-glyph-organ`*): a mic overtone instrument on a **glyph-terminal**, cycle-2 of 1270. It cleared the ambition floor (honest 2/5) and dodged every ban (glyph-terminal not Canvas2D; overtone drift not a drum groove; not a granular-freeze; mic not pointer-sole). Banked вӯҗ`1378-jhana-drift` (tilt вҶ’ WebGL2 raymarched tunnel-to-light, the cosmic-ambient representative; lower ambition вҖ” tunnel-to-light is lab-prior via 1344/1320) + the `1376` played layer as a *polish idea on 437*, not a new build. Alternation вҖҰ719 W вҶ’ 720 D вҶ’ 721 W вҶ’ 722 D вҶ’ **723 W** (WIDE due). Honest caveats logged in STATE В§723: (a) the diveвҶ’ship chain **partially broke** (the dive's build was cut as a duplicate; the ship came from the same WIDE brief-set, not the dive) вҖ” exactly jury #4's warning made real; (b) overtone-from-voice has lab-prior cousins (`1114-tanpura-throat`, `200-harmonic-series`), so the winner's genuine freshness is the **glyph-terminal ladder surface + throat-singing playable-ladder framing**, not a new algorithm; (c) mic is now 4Г— in the recent window вҖ” the diversity cost, accepted over shipping a literal duplicate. Winner-only `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` (whole tree incl. 1380) = **EXIT 0**, `Ж’ /dream/1380-overtone-throat` in the route table, 0 TS/ESLint errors; the earlier full `npm run build` confirmed lint+typecheck pass tree-wide (EMFILE only at prerender = container fd cap, not code). **NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless, no mic/speakers) вҖ” overtone feel, ladder legibility, f0-detection robustness want Karel's browser. `state: overtone-trance / harmonic-ladder В· pole: cosmic-ambient (meditative).` Details in STATE В§723.)

## `/dream/1380-overtone-throat` вҖ” *sing ONE sustained note and **play its hidden overtone ladder** like a Tuvan throat singer. The mic feeds an **autocorrelation f0 detector** (or lock the fundamental by hand, A1вҖ“A3) and an **f0-relative FFT** that reads the energy at each **harmonic 1вҖ“12** of your note; a fast-attack/slow-release follower drives a **12-partial self-sustaining sine drone bank**, so leaning your vowel/timbre makes those overtones **bloom and hold** into a shimmering chord and walks a bright cursor up the ladder вҖ” the overtone series made playable. **Output = a living GLYPH-TERMINAL** (deliberate **cycle-2 of `1270-glyph-organ`**): 12 monospace rows (harmonic 12 вҶ’ fundamental), each labelled with its ratio + nearest interval, each an RвҶ’L oscilloscope trace through a `` В·:+*#в–Ҳ`` density ramp with a violetвҶ’cyan hue and an emerald в–ә dominant-cursor row вҖ” an oscilloscope-meets-poem, updated DOM-direct (no 60 fps React re-render). **Feedback-safe:** the raw mic is an analyser sink ONLY, never routed to output (nothing recorded or sent). **Never blank / never silent:** an idle sweep animates the ladder from load, and if the mic is denied/silent a **Gaussian auto-sweep** walks the ladder so the drone bank keeps singing вҖ” badged `в—Ҹ mic` (emerald) vs `в—Ӣ auto` (amber). Master вүӨ0.2 behind a limiter, ramp-from-0 + ~1.5 s fade + `AudioContext.close()` teardown; `prefers-reduced-motion` calms the animation. Honest limits: monophonic autocorrelation f0 wanders on breathy/quiet/noisy input (hence on-demand detect + a manual note-lock, not continuous tracking); overtone-from-voice has lab-prior cousins (`1114-tanpura-throat`, `200-harmonic-series`) вҖ” the fresh axis is the glyph-terminal ladder surface + the throat-singing framing; headless box can't judge the feel. Refs (living): Tanya Tagaq (throat singer) В· Wolfgang Saus (overtone-singing pedagogy). `state: overtone-trance / harmonic-ladder В· pole: cosmic-ambient`. `status: demoable`*

## (Cycle 722 вҖ” **psychedelic** **DEEP** вҖ” "The World Composes": ONE massively-bigger concept вҖ” the lab's **first real external-world-data sonification**, where CURRENT live data (not the user, not a synth seed) authors the piece's key/tempo/palette/mode and you play the second voice inside the world it has tuned вҖ” attacked via three approaches, shipping the strongest. The head-on cash of the current (2026-07-09) jury's provocation **#4** (*"stop banking your own research anchor вҖ” either ship the anchor or stop claiming the chain"*): В§721 banked вӯҗвӯҗ`1368-sky-composer` (the sky as composer) as its explicit TOP ship-next, and this DEEP fire ships that anchor's concept. Also opens the categorical-diversity **real-world-data-sonification lane** the lab is **0Г—** on. Three explorers on one thesis: `1372-sky-weather` (NOAA space-weather вҶ’ **WebGL2 aurora curtains** + cosmic pad; the banked flagship's render; Anadol), `1374-sky-strata` (the **SAME** NOAA feed вҶ’ **deterministic inline-SVG light-strata** you read like a score, played over; Ikeda *datamatics*), `1376-earth-pulse` (**USGS live earthquakes** вҶ’ a spatial **seismic drone-choir** on an SVG world you scrub and strike; Ikeda + Dombois auditory seismology). Alternation вҖҰ718 D вҶ’ 719 W вҶ’ 720 D вҶ’ 721 W вҶ’ **722 D** (DEEP due). Research-first (RESEARCH В§722): **NOAA SWPC** (solar-wind speed/density/Bz + planetary Kp) and **USGS `all_day.geojson`** вҖ” two public, no-auth, CORS-permissive live feeds as *composers*; the mandate lists "first real external API sonification" as an ambition-#1 example and the diversity menu names real-world-data sonification as a 0Г— lane. **Curated WINNER = `1374-sky-strata`** вҖ” all three cleared the ambition floor + dodged every current ban (all OFF Canvas2D-primary [WebGL2/SVG/SVG]; none a look-ahead step-sequencer groove [TIME is data-driven drift + played voices]; none a granular-freeze of a recording; none pointer-sole [primary input is LIVE EXTERNAL DATA, 0Г—]; none a spatial-lattice/phasing repeat; all PLAYED, not watched) вҖ” so, this being **DEEP** (*ship the strongest realization of the one concept*) built expressly to cash jury **#4**, the call turned on **which most literally ships the banked sky-composer anchor Г— render-verifiability Г— played-not-watched Г— phone-glance**: 1374 **IS** that anchor (the same three live NOAA feeds + the same dataвҶ’drivers mapping engine) realized on a **deterministic, headless-verifiable SVG** render (retiring the standing GPU verification-debt that de-selected 1372's WebGL2 cousin вҖ” which *also* can't exercise its live fetch here), it is genuinely **played** (tap bands / `A S D F G H J` keys / drag-emphasis, each flaring the struck band, over a legible solar-wind "score ribbon"), and it's **phone-alive at 06:30** (strata drift + generative arp pre- and post-Begin, LIVE/simulated badge). Shipping 1376 (a *different* feed) would have repeated the exact banked-the-anchor-ship-the-diversifier move the jury named. `1376-earth-pulse` (вӯҗвӯҗ **top SHIP-NEXT** вҖ” the **strongest INSTRUMENT** of the three [scrub the whole day, strike individual quakes, keys re-sound recent tremors] + the **most surprising** [play the planet's live seismicity] + opens the multi-feed lane widest [a geophysical feed, not just the sky]; deterministic SVG so headless-verifiable and USGS CORS is reliably open вҶ’ ship near-verbatim the very next fire, or promote its dataвҶ’music `mapping.ts` to `_shared`) + `1372-sky-weather` (вӯҗ вҖ” the **WebGL2 aurora spectacle** of the shipped concept [same NOAA feeds + mapping], fbm-warped curtains, love-fit `130`/`236`/`321`/`262`; de-selected on the two-verification-unknowns that keep de-selecting GPU pieces [can't eye-verify the shader render AND can't exercise the live fetch headless] вҖ” resurrect where Karel's browser confirms both, or graft the aurora onto 1374 as its confirmed-environment WebGL upgrade path with the SVG strata as the safe fallback) banked to IDEAS В§722 with full rebuildable specs, backed up to scratchpad `banked-722/` then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule. вң… **Build note (better than usual this fire):** the authoritative winner-only `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` (whole tree incl. 1374) ran to **EXIT 0** with NO `Failed to compile`/`Type error`/`Module not found`/`EMFILE` вҖ” `Ж’ /dream/1374-sky-strata` printed in the route table and `.next/server/app/dream/1374-sky-strata/page.js` emitted; scoped `eslint --max-warnings 0` = 0 and project `tsc --noEmit` = 0. **NOT eye/ear-verified** for feel (headless box, no display/speakers, and the live NOAA fetch can't run here вҶ’ it renders the labeled synthetic sky) вҖ” the deterministic SVG makes the render verifiable in principle, but the strata tuning, audio balance, and whether real space-weather actually loads in the browser want Karel's screen. `state: cosmic-sky / boundless-strata В· pole: cosmic-ambient (Ikeda clinical-luminous).` **Ambition (winner) 3/5: #1 (first real external-API sonification вҖ” the mandate's own ambition-#1 example; live data as the composer is genuinely 0Г—) + #2 вүҘ3 subsystems (live NOAA fetch/parse + dataвҶ’music/visual mapping engine + deterministic SVG strata renderer + generative cosmic pad + played pluck layer = 5) + #3 living ref (Ryoji Ikeda *datamatics*).** #5 cashed by the CYCLE via today's В§722 real-external-data dive (NOAA + USGS as composers вҶ’ today's ship). Details in STATE В§722.)

## `/dream/1374-sky-strata` вҖ” *the **live sky over Earth composes this piece right now** вҖ” three real NOAA SWPC space-weather feeds (solar-wind **speed** & **density**, interplanetary-field **Bz**, planetary **Kp**) set the music's key, tempo, palette and mode, and you play the second voice over it. The lab's **first real external-world-data sonification.** **The data is the composer:** one pure `skyToDrivers(sky)` mapping is consumed **identically** by audio and visuals вҖ” **speed вҶ’ arp tempo + band drift speed**, **density вҶ’ number & thickness of light-strata**, **southward Bz вҶ’ minor mode + higher, more-saturated aurora bands**, **Kp вҶ’ overall energy + palette** (calm teal вҶ’ storm violet/red). **You play it:** tap a strata band or press `A S D F G H J` to pluck a brighter foreground voice a whole octave above the sky's generative pentatonic arp (always consonant вҖ” pentatonic scale-indices), each pluck **flaring** its band for ~1 s; drag leftвҶ”right to shift the played register (emphasis). **Output = deterministic inline `<svg>`** (no Canvas, no WebGL, no GPU вҖ” chosen so the render is *eye-verifiable*): drifting translucent horizontal light-strata (CSS-animated gradient offsets), a seeded twinkling starfield, a horizon glow, and a legible **solar-wind speed "score ribbon"** tracing recent history across the top вҖ” you can *read* the sky's recent state like a staff. **Audio** (Web Audio, output-only, nothing recorded): shared `startDroneBank` cosmic pad (its drive follows the mapping `energy`) under a self-scheduling generative arp through the shared `createVoidReverb` void, master вүӨ0.22 behind a `DynamicsCompressor` limiter with a ~2 s exponential fade-in, gesture-gated behind **Begin**. **Never blank / never silent:** the strata drift on load before Begin, and after ~4 s idle the generative arp plays to itself, so a cold 06:30 glance always shows a living sky. **Degrades gracefully:** if the NOAA feeds are unreachable it falls to a slowly-drifting **synthetic sky** clearly badged `simulated` (amber) vs `LIVE вҖ” NOAA SWPC` (emerald), so it's honest about whether real data loaded. Server-safe (`"use client"`, all `AudioContext`/listeners behind effects + the Begin gate); **no strobe** вҖ” band motion is slow CSS drift (well under 3 Hz), `prefers-reduced-motion` stretches drift to ~140 s and stills the twinkle; full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel, 60 s data interval cleared, `AudioContext.close()`). Honest limits: mapping has distant lab-prior (the fresh axis is *real external live data as the composer*, 0Г—); a headless box can't confirm the live fetch actually returns from a browser on Vercel (falls to synthetic here) or judge audio balance. Refs (living): Ryoji Ikeda, *datamatics*. Data: NOAA Space Weather Prediction Center. `state: cosmic-sky / boundless-strata В· pole: cosmic-ambient`. `status: demoable`*

## (Cycle 721 вҖ” **psychedelic** **WIDE** вҖ” "Answer, Sky, Warp": 3 orthogonal instruments that deliberately BREAK the 4-cycle spatial-lattice/phasing rut (719+720 were both "spatial lattice + phasing" вҖ” the "too similar" pattern Karel warned about). This WIDE fire keeps dodging Canvas2D-primary (SVG + WebGL2) but stops treating substrate as the headline axis вҖ” jury **#1** (off Canvas2D) + **#2** (TIME off the drum grid) are now cashed 4Г— running вҖ” and turns to the genuinely-UNMET live provocations. Three explorers on three distinct CONCEPTS Г— three distinct INPUTS: `1366-answer-piano` (a piano that **ANSWERS you** вҖ” call-and-response duet partner, **mic-pitch/keyboard** in, **SVG dual-voice ribbons** out, TIME = conversational turn-taking; the direct cash of jury **#5** *"if the piano returns, make it a RESPONSIVE partner, not raw material you sculpt"*; Dan Tepfer *Natural Machines* + Dannenberg), `1368-sky-composer` (the piece composed by the **LIVE SKY** вҖ” NOAA space-weather solar-wind/Kp drives a **WebGL2 aurora** + generative pad; the lab's first **real external-API sonification**; Anadol data-as-pigment; love-fit `130`/`236`/`321`/`262`), `1370-form-organ` (**play the geometry of a hallucination** вҖ” QWERTY organ warps the screen into the four BressloffвҖ“Cowan **form constants** via the shared log-polar `exp()` engine; intense/DMT; Android Jones). Alternation вҖҰ717 W вҶ’ 718 D вҶ’ 719 W вҶ’ 720 D вҶ’ **721 W** (WIDE due). Research-first (RESEARCH В§721): **Dan Tepfer *Natural Machines*** (living pianist whose Disklavier improvises WITH him) + the MIR score-following lineage (Dannenberg) anchoring the responsive-partner frontier; NOAA SWPC as a public no-auth CORS feed for the first sky-driven piece; BressloffвҖ“Cowan + PSYCHEDELIC.md's named load-bearing log-polar engine. **Curated WINNER = `1366-answer-piano`** вҖ” all three cleared the ambition floor + dodged every current ban (all OFF Canvas2D-primary; none a look-ahead step-sequencer groove; none a granular-freeze of a recording; none pointer-sole; none a fifth camera piece; **none a spatial-lattice/phasing repeat**) вҖ” so, this being WIDE (core = diversity + serve a live provocation), the call turned on **which best cashes an UNMET live provocation Г— render-verifiability Г— phone-glance Г— anti-rut**: 1366 is the **sharpest cash of the loudest still-unmet provocation (#5)** вҖ” the recording thread is *complete*, and this makes the piano a genuinely NEW thing (a responsive **call-and-response partner**, 0Г— in the lab вҖ” legitimately claiming ambition #1), it is the **only headless-verifiable render** of the three (deterministic **SVG**, no GPU вҖ” B/aurora + C/form-organ both carry the standing "can't confirm it renders headless" risk that keeps de-selecting GPU pieces), it **most sharply breaks the spatial-lattice/phasing rut** (a conversation, not a field to watch), and it's **phone-alive at 06:30** (keyboard-primary always-works path + idle auto-demo that talks to itself + always-consonant D-pentatonic answers). `1368-sky-composer` (вӯҗвӯҗ **top SHIP-NEXT** вҖ” the lab's **first real external-data sonification** [genuinely 0Г— INPUT axis: the live sky composes it] + best **love-fit** [rides Karel's loved particle/point cluster `130`/`236`/`321`/`262`] + cosmic-ambient calm; de-selected only because a WebGL2 aurora can't be eye-verified on a headless box AND the live-NOAA fetch can't be exercised here [it falls to clearly-labeled synthetic sky] вҖ” resurrect near-verbatim in a slot where Karel's browser can confirm both the fetch and the render, or promote its dataвҶ’music mapping engine to a shared primitive) + `1370-form-organ` (вӯҗ вҖ” finally builds **PSYCHEDELIC.md's named load-bearing log-polar/form-constant engine** as a played organ [intense pole, thin lane] on the shared `logpolar.ts`/`LOGPOLAR_GLSL`; de-selected as the least-fresh CONCEPT of the three [form-constant/log-polar has the most lab-prior вҖ” the shared engine already exists] + a WebGL2 fragment field can't be eye-verified headless вҖ” resurrect for a desktop/keyboard slot, or its shader is the seed to finally promote the form-constant engine to a first-class `_shared/psych` played primitive) banked to IDEAS В§721 with full rebuildable specs, backed up to scratchpad `banked-721/` then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule. вҡ  **Build note (unchanged):** `npm run build` `EMFILE`s locally at Next's prerender (box fd cap 4096 vs ~670 routes) вҖ” NOT a code defect: `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` (whole tree incl. 1366) passes **EXIT 0**; 1366 is a `"use client"` component so Vercel's normal-fd builder deploys it fine. **Uniquely verifiable-in-principle this fire** (deterministic SVG + Web Audio, no GPU) вҖ” but this headless box has no display/speakers/mic, so the conversation *feel* (turn-taking latency, answer musicality, ribbon braid) + audio balance + live mic behavior still want Karel's browser. `state: musical-mirror / call-and-response duet В· pole: cosmic-meditative.` **Ambition (winner) 3/5: #1 (first responsive call-and-response partner in the lab вҖ” the jury-#5 frontier, 0Г—) + #2 вүҘ3 subsystems (real-time onset+pitch detection + phrase segmentation/memory + generative in-key responder synth + dual-voice SVG viz = 4) + #3 living ref (Dan Tepfer *Natural Machines* + Roger Dannenberg / score-following).** #5 cashed by the CYCLE via today's В§721 responsive-partner dive. Details in STATE В§721.)

## `/dream/1366-answer-piano` вҖ” *play a short phrase and a patient partner **answers you in the same key** вҖ” a call-and-response duet, not a recording you sculpt. You play (sing/play into the **mic** вҶ’ real-time autocorrelation pitch detection snapped to **D-major pentatonic**, OR tap the on-screen keys / `A S D F G H J K L ;` QWERTY row вҖ” always-works, phone-friendly); the system **segments your phrase** on ~0.9 s of silence, then a distinct **partner voice** replies in-key. The responder reads your phrase's contour and applies one of four in-key transforms вҖ” a rising *question* вҶ’ an **inverted line that resolves to the tonic**; a falling line вҶ’ an **ascending sequence** left open on the dominant; a flat phrase вҶ’ a **gentle echo up a third** resolving home; a single note вҶ’ rise-and-resolve вҖ” and because everything is expressed as **pentatonic scale-indices**, an answer can never sound wrong. It reads as a **duet, not an echo** (the mic is deliberately ignored while the partner speaks вҖ” real turn-taking). **Output = deterministic `<svg>`** (no Canvas, no WebGL): each note is a node placed by pitch (y) over conversation-time (x); two smooth **voice ribbons** braid along a faint conversation thread вҖ” **amber = you, violet = partner** вҖ” so the alternation is *seen* as well as heard. **Audio** (Web Audio, output-only re-synthesis вҖ” the mic is a controller, **nothing is recorded or sent**): you = a soft triangle with gentle attack; partner = a warmer FM pad (sine carrier + fifth modulator, low-passed); a quiet JI **drone bed** in D (`_shared/psych/droneBank`) through a code-generated **convolution reverb** (`_shared/psych/convolutionVoid`); master вүӨ0.2 with exponential fade-in into a `DynamicsCompressor` limiter. **Never blank / never silent:** after ~4 s of no interaction an **idle auto-demo** plays a seed phrase to itself and answers it, looping until you take a turn. **Degrades gracefully:** no mic permission вҶ’ a `text-rose-300` notice + the keyboard path still fully works. Server-safe (`"use client"`, all `AudioContext`/mic/key listeners behind effects + the Begin gate); **no strobe** вҖ” the only luminance motion is a вүӨ~0.4 Hz node halo, disabled under `prefers-reduced-motion`; full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel, timers cleared, mic tracks stopped, `AudioContext.close()`). Honest limits: monophonic pitch detection (one note at a time; noisy rooms miss); coarse rhythm capture (fixed cadence, not true transcription); rule-based (four contour transforms), a consistent partner not an unpredictable one; headphones recommended (speaker bleed can phantom-trigger between turns). Refs (living): Dan Tepfer *Natural Machines* В· Roger Dannenberg / score-following. `state: musical-mirror / call-and-response duet В· pole: cosmic-meditative`. `status: demoable`*

## (Cycle 720 вҖ” **psychedelic** **DEEP** вҖ” "The Breathing Lattice": ONE massively-bigger concept вҖ” a **spatial LATTICE instrument** whose musical TIME is **phasing, not a drum grid** вҖ” attacked via three fresh non-Canvas2D substrates Г— three non-pointer inputs, shipping the strongest. The head-on service of the current (2026-07-09) jury's two sharpest live provocations at once: **#1** (*"you fixed everything except the surface you render on вҖ” Canvas2D 9 of 15, unbroken across four juries; extend 1270-glyph-organ or **1272-lattice-tracker**, or ship WebGPU/point-cloud"*) and **#2** (*"don't let the groove machine become the new bell вҖ” find TIME somewhere other than a drum grid: polymetric phasing, a swung melodic loop"*). Three explorers: `1360-hex-breath` (**three.js `InstancedMesh` 3D crystal** you **breathe** into bloom [mic analysis-only]; TIME = **3:4:5 polymetric phasing** across ВұX/ВұY/ВұZ regions, realigns every ~42 s; form-constant/intense; Hodgin + BressloffвҖ“Cowan), `1362-lattice-loom` (**DOM/CSS-3D lattice** вҖ” real `preserve-3d` cells, NO canvas/WebGL вҖ” you **keyboard/tap**-weave; TIME = **spatial Reich phase** across coprime 3/5/7 sweeps; Ikeda *datamatics* clinical-luminous; explicit **cycle-2 of the jury-named `1272-lattice-tracker`**), `1364-glide-shells` (**WebGL2 ~80k point-cloud** of 26 concentric shells you **tilt** to gather into a jhДҒna void core; TIME = **Shepard-Risset endless glide** sweeping outward through the shells; Anadol + Risset). Alternation вҖҰ716 D вҶ’ 717 W вҶ’ 718 D вҶ’ 719 W вҶ’ **720 D** (DEEP due). Research-first (RESEARCH В§720): **arXiv 2510.23848 *Spatial Orchestra: Locomotion Music Instruments through Spatial Exploration*** вҖ” embodied HCI where moving into spatial regions IS the instrument (validates *traverse a spatial lattice to play it*), grounded in В§719's arXiv *Amanous* (phasing/polymeter = rhythmic TIME with no drum machine). **Curated WINNER = `1362-lattice-loom`** вҖ” all three cleared the ambition floor + dodged every current ban (all OFF Canvas2D on a fresh substrate; none a look-ahead step-sequencer groove вҖ” TIME is spatial-phase/polymeter/Shepard; none a granular-freeze of a recording; none pointer-sole; **NO camera** this fire [rested at 4Г—]) вҖ” so, this being DEEP (*ship the strongest realization of the one concept*), the call turned on **fresh-substrate cash Г— render-verifiability Г— ambition Г— phone-glance**: 1362 is the **sharpest cash of the jury's loudest four-juries-unmet provocation #1** (it's an explicit **cycle-2 of the jury-*named* `1272-lattice-tracker`** on a genuinely **0Г—-in-window DOM/CSS-3D** substrate вҖ” no canvas, no WebGL, no three.js), the **only headless-verifiable render** of the three (deterministic DOM/CSS retires the standing verification-debt that de-selected the GPU anchors 1342/1356/1358 вҖ” and it is the jury-aligned deterministic pick, not a safe diversifier), the **highest ambition** (3/5, uniquely claims criterion #1 fresh substrate), the **most-legible cash of jury #2** (coprime 3/5/7 sweeps make Reich phase *spatial and visible* вҖ” you watch them slide apart and re-cluster), and **phone-alive at 06:30** (keyboard/tap, no permission, idle auto-demo, JI-consonant-by-construction). `1360-hex-breath` (вӯҗвӯҗ **top SHIP-NEXT** вҖ” the **three.js В§719 anchor jury #4 wants shipped** + a genuine 3:4:5 polymetric phase engine [heard AND seen, realigns ~42 s] + warm/intense form-constant pole; de-selected only because three.js/GPU render can't be eye-verified on a headless box [the standing verification-debt] + mic gates a 06:30 phone glance [auto-breath LFO mitigates], while 1362 more sharply cashes the *named* #1 surface and IS verifiable вҖ” resurrect near-verbatim in an ear/GPU-tunable slot, or promote its 3:4:5 scheduler + instanced-lattice to `_shared/psych`) + `1364-glide-shells` (вӯҗ вҖ” **love-fit** [rides Karel's loved particle/point cluster `130`/`236`/`321`/`262`] + phone-native **tilt** + a real **Shepard-Risset glide** locked to an outward light-sweep + the jhДҒna cosmic-ambient pole; de-selected as conceptually closest to the already-banked вӯҗвӯҗ `1350-gpu-murmur`/`1358-tilt-nebula` [same tilt-gather-the-void + Shepard gesture] + a raw-WebGL2 80k-point cloud can't be eye-verified headless вҖ” resurrect for a phone/tilt slot or fold into 1350) banked to IDEAS В§720 with full rebuildable specs, backed up to scratchpad `banked-720/` then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule. вҡ  **Build note (unchanged):** `npm run build` `EMFILE`s locally at Next's prerender (box fd cap 4096 vs ~670 routes) вҖ” NOT a code defect: `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` (whole tree incl. 1362) passes **EXIT 0** with `.next/server/app/dream/1362-lattice-loom/page.js` (31.5 kB) emitted; 1362 is a `"use client"` component so Vercel's normal-fd builder deploys it fine. **Uniquely verifiable-in-principle** (deterministic DOM/CSS, no GPU) вҖ” but this headless box has no display, so the *tuning* (fan angles, glow, sweep speeds, phone scale-to-fit) + audio balance still want Karel's browser. `state: synaesthetic-cells / spatial-phase lattice В· pole: cosmic-ambient (Ikeda clinical-luminous).` **Ambition (winner) 3/5: #1 (DOM/CSS-3D render surface вҖ” 0Г—-in-window, the jury-named 1272 zero-follow-up substrate вҖ” no canvas/WebGL) + #2 вүҘ3 subsystems (keyboard/tap input + CSS-3D preserve-3d lattice renderer + coprime spatial-phase engine + per-cell JI bell synth + drone bed = 5) + #3 living ref (Ryoji Ikeda *datamatics*) + #4 explicit cycle-2 of the jury-named 1272-lattice-tracker.** #5 cashed by the CYCLE via all three implementing today's В§720 spatial-music dive. Details in STATE В§720.)

## `/dream/1362-lattice-loom` вҖ” *weave **polymetric light** through a crystalline lattice of **real DOM cells floating in CSS-3D space** вҖ” no `<canvas>`, no WebGL, no three.js; the whole instrument is `<button>` cells in a `transform-style: preserve-3d` scene, three stacked fanned planes rotating slowly as one volume. Each plane is a **metric layer** of coprime length вҖ” **3** (keys `1 2 3`, Г—1 octave), **5** (`q w e r t`, Г—2), **7** (`a s d f g h j`, Г—4) вҖ” and a cell's **column is its pitch** on a shared **just-intonation** scale (1В·9/8В·5/4В·4/3В·3/2В·5/3В·15/8 above 110 Hz), so every cell is a rational ratio of one root and the whole lattice stays **consonant no matter what you weave**. **You play it** by keyboard (the three physical key-rows map to the three layers, key position = column) or by **tapping** the вүҘ52 px cells (phone-friendly; pointer is a secondary nicety, keyboard/tap primary). **The TIME mechanic (the point):** three **phase-cursors** sweep their layers at their own periods (0.40 / 0.50 / 0.60 s per step); as a cursor crosses a seeded cell it **flares** it and **sounds** that column's tone. Because the lengths **3В·5В·7 are coprime** (LCM = 105 steps) and each cursor runs its own pulse, the lit cells continuously **de-phase** вҖ” the sweeps slide out of step, cross, and only slowly drift back toward alignment: **Steve Reich's phase music spread across SPACE instead of carried by a 4/4 beat** (the direct, *visible* answer to the jury's "find TIME off the drum grid"). This is an explicit **cycle-2 of the lab's celebrated-but-zero-follow-up `1272-lattice-tracker`** (which the concept jury named), keeping "the DOM grid IS the instrument, tuned to a JI lattice" but answering a new question вҖ” not a playhead down a sequencer, but three independent phase-cursors weaving polymeter through a rotating volume вҖ” and landing on the **DOM/CSS-3D substrate the lab is 0Г— on in-window** (the render-surface demand missed across four straight juries, and the one substrate a headless box can actually verify renders). **Audio** (Web Audio, output-only, no mic): the shared `startDroneBank` JI drone bed (its `setDrive` follows recent strike density) + a per-cell **bell voice pool** (triangle + detuned sine through a lowpass, fast attack / ~1.4 s exp decay), master вүӨ0.22 behind a `DynamicsCompressor` limiter with an exponential fade-in, gesture-gated behind **Begin**. **Never blank / never silent:** a default woven pattern animates silently on load (preview clock) before Begin, and a deterministic **idle auto-demo** drifts the weave if you walk away, so a cold 06:30 glance always shows light moving. **Reweave** throws a fresh deterministic pattern; **Clear** empties the loom. Server-safe (`"use client"`, all `AudioContext`/key listeners behind effects + the Begin gate); **no strobe** вҖ” cell lighting is smooth continuous fades (fastest any cell flashes is ~0.8 Hz, far under 3 Hz), global "breathing" routes through the shared `SafeFlicker` (~0.09 Hz), `prefers-reduced-motion` slows the sweeps + rotation + idle drift; full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel, keydown listener removed, drone stopped, `AudioContext.close()`). Deliberately **sparse** (15 seedable cells) вҖ” legibility of the de-phasing over density/spectacle. Refs (living): Ryoji Ikeda *datamatics*; lineage `1272-lattice-tracker`. `state: synaesthetic-cells / spatial-phase lattice В· pole: cosmic-ambient`. `status: demoable`*

## (Cycle 719 вҖ” **psychedelic** **WIDE** вҖ” "Time Without a Drum": 3 orthogonal altered-states instruments, each on a **DIFFERENT fresh non-Canvas2D surface** + a distinct **non-pointer input**, all carrying rhythmic TIME via **phasing / polymeter / Shepard glide** вҖ” NOT a step-sequencer. The head-on service of the current (2026-07-09) jury's **#2** (*"don't let the groove machine become the new bell вҖ” find TIME somewhere other than a drum grid: polymetric phasing, a swung melodic loop"*) on the fresh surfaces its **#1** keeps naming (both cashed twice this fortnight вҖ” 717 SVG, 718 WebGPU вҖ” so this fire revives **glyph-terminal** [1270] & **three.js**, the two "celebrated but zero-follow-up, fell out of the window" surfaces the jury named). Three explorers: `1354-glyph-canon` (**glyph-terminal** вҖ” a monospace Unicode field you **keyboard**-play; TIME = a **Reich phase canon** whose two de-phasing voices are two drifting glyph-ring streams; hypnagogic/cosmic-ambient; Reich *Piano Phase* + Ikeda *datamatics*), `1356-breath-lattice` (**three.js 3D** instanced hex-lattice you **breathe** into bloom [mic analysis-only]; TIME = **3/4/5 polymetric JI arpeggios**; form-constant-bloom/intense; Hodgin + BressloffвҖ“Cowan), `1358-tilt-nebula` (**WebGL2 ~120k point-cloud** you **tilt** to gather into a jhДҒna core / disperse to the void; TIME = **Shepard-Risset endless glide**; oceanic-boundless/cosmic-ambient; Anadol + Risset).
