+ **SIGGRAPH 2026 Technical Papers** (awards May 2026) + **Anadol DATALAND** (opened Jun 20 2026). **Curated WINNER = `1354-glyph-canon`** вҖ” all three cleared the ambition floor + dodged every current ban (all off Canvas2D-primary; none a look-ahead step-sequencer groove вҖ” TIME is phasing/polymeter/Shepard; none a granular-freeze of a recording; none pointer-sole; **NO camera** this fire [rested at 4Г—]) вҖ” so, this being WIDE (core target = diversity), the call turned on **fresh-substrate legibility Г— ambition Г— ship-confidence Г— phone-glance**: 1354 is the **sharpest fresh-substrate cash** (glyph-terminal is the jury-named "celebrated but zero-follow-up" surface, **0Г—-in-window**, and an explicit **cycle-2 of 1270-glyph-organ**), the **highest ambition of the three (4/5)** [the only one claiming a fresh technique/surface #1 + the multi-cycle #4], the **lowest ship-risk on a box that can't eye/GPU-verify** (pure **canvas-TEXT + Web Audio** вҖ” the CHARACTERS are the medium, *not* a Canvas2D pixel-field; deterministic, no GPU pipeline / mic / camera / tilt-sensor / CDN to blank the screen), the **most phone-playable** (on-screen tap-keys, no permission, idle auto-demo), and it makes jury #2 **visible** вҖ” the "TIME without a drum grid" is not just heard but *seen* as two differently-tinted glyph-ring streams drifting apart (Reich phase made visual). `1356-breath-lattice` (вӯҗвӯҗ **top SHIP-NEXT** вҖ” the **freshest 3D substrate** [three.js, the under-used 1Г— surface] + the intense/warm psilocybin pole [lane thin on warm] + a genuinely clean **polymetric 3/4/5 phase engine**; de-selected only because three.js/GPU render + mic permission can't be eye/ear-verified on a headless box + mic gates a 06:30 phone glance [auto-breath LFO + slider mitigate] вҖ” resurrect near-verbatim in a GPU/ear-tunable slot, or promote its polymetric-phasing scheduler + torus hex-lattice to `_shared/psych`) + `1358-tilt-nebula` (вӯҗ вҖ” **love-fit** [rides Karel's loved particle/point cluster `130`/`236`/`321`/`262`] + phone-native **tilt** + a real **Shepard-Risset glide** + the jhДҒna cosmic-ambient pole; de-selected as (a) conceptually closest to the already-banked вӯҗвӯҗ `1350-gpu-murmur` [same tilt-gather-the-void gesture, different substrate] and (b) a raw-WebGL2 120k-point cloud can't be eye-verified headless вҖ” resurrect for a phone/tilt slot or fold into 1350 as its WebGL2 fallback) banked to IDEAS В§719 with full rebuildable specs, backed up to scratchpad `banked-719/` then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule. вҡ  **Build note (unchanged):** `npm run build` `EMFILE`s locally at Next's prerender (box fd cap 4096 vs ~670 routes) вҖ” NOT a code defect: `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` (whole tree incl. 1354) passes **EXIT 0**; 1354 is a `"use client"` component so Vercel's normal-fd builder deploys it fine. **NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless box, no display/speakers) вҖ” the visual tuning (ring speed, luminance-ramp thresholds, field density) + audio balance + the phase-drift feel want Karel's browser; deterministic canvas-text + Web Audio make it the lowest-risk of the three to render. `state: hypnagogic / synaesthetic-text В· pole: cosmic-ambient (drifts intense when played densely).` **Ambition (winner) 4/5: #1 (glyph-terminal render surface вҖ” 0Г— in-window, jury-named zero-follow-up вҖ” + phase-canon-as-visible-TIME) + #2 вүҘ3 subsystems (keyboard/tap input + glyph-field renderer + JI phase-canon synth + drone/delay = 4) + #3 living ref (Steve Reich *Piano Phase* + Ryoji Ikeda *datamatics*) + #4 explicit cycle-2 of the jury-named 1270-glyph-organ.** #5 cashed by the CYCLE via all three implementing today's В§719 phase-music/substrate dive. Details in STATE В§719.)

## `/dream/1354-glyph-canon` вҖ” *play a psychedelic instrument that lives **entirely inside a monospace TEXT field** вҖ” its sense of TIME comes not from a beat but from a **Steve-Reich phase canon**. A full-screen grid of Unicode characters is rendered to a `<canvas>` with `fillText` on a fixed cell grid вҖ” the **characters are the art**, not pixel blobs (the glyph-terminal surface, a cycle-2 of `1270-glyph-organ`, deliberately NOT a Canvas2D pixel-field). A slow **log-polar spiral** of glyphs scrolls inward as a hypnagogic ambient field so the screen is never blank. **You play it:** three QWERTY rows (`z x c v b n m` / `a s d f g h j k l` / `q w e r t y u i`) are three octaves of a **just-intonation** scale (A2вүҲ110 Hz, ratios 1В·9/8В·5/4В·4/3В·3/2В·5/3В·15/8), mirrored by **on-screen tappable key rows** (phone-playable, no hardware); each keypress fires a soft **FM voice** AND injects a bright expanding **glyph-ring** that ages down a luminance ramp `В·.:-=+*#%@` (brightвҶ’dim). **The TIME mechanic (the point):** every note is captured into a short looping phrase, and **two players** replay it вҖ” **Player A** (violet stream, "you") at the base step interval, **Player B** (teal stream, the twin) at **base Г— 1.012**, a hair slower вҖ” so they start in unison and slowly **de-phase**, exactly like Reich's *Piano Phase*. There is **no BPM step-sequencer**: each player is scheduled directly against `audioContext.currentTime` with a ~120 ms look-ahead, so rhythmic TIME emerges purely from the drift between the two voices вҖ” and you **see** it (two stereo-split, differently-tinted ring-families separating and, over minutes, re-aligning) as well as **hear** it. **Idle auto-demo:** a gentle consonant motif re-seeds after ~4 s of silence so the canon always plays itself. **Audio** (`glyph-engine.ts`, Web Audio, output-only, no mic): FM voices (sine carrier + decaying-index modulator), soft attack / medium release, pitch- and stream-panned, voice cap 12 oldest-steal; a root+fifth+sub **drone bed** with a ~0.07 Hz amplitude drift + a light feedback-delay space; master ramps from 0, caps 0.22, into a `DynamicsCompressor` limiter; self-contained (no shared audio helpers = lower risk). In the lineage of **Steve Reich** (*Piano Phase*), **Ryoji Ikeda** (*datamatics* вҖ” clinical phosphor-on-near-black data field), and the **teletype/ASCII-art** tradition. **Degrades gracefully:** no Web Audio вҶ’ a `text-rose-300` notice + the glyph field keeps animating (idle demo drives visual-only pulses). Server-safe (`"use client"`, all `AudioContext`/key listeners behind effects + the Begin gate); **no strobe** вҖ” glyph pulses are *local per-cell* brightenings that fade smoothly, global luminance stays near-constant (spiral drifts вүӘ3 Hz), `prefersReducedMotion()` slows the field; instant **Stop** ramps master to 0 in вүӨ80 ms, clears pulses, closes the context; full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel, listeners removed, `AudioContext.close()`). Refs (living): Steve Reich В· Ryoji Ikeda. `state: hypnagogic / synaesthetic-text В· pole: cosmic-ambient`. `status: demoable`*

This fire **cashes the WebGPU anchor `1342` that cycle 717 banked** вҖ” the head-on service of the current (2026-07-09) jury's two sharpest provocations at once: **#4** *"stop banking your own research anchor вҖ” ship it or stop claiming the chain"* (717 banked the WebGPU-compute piece and shipped the SVG diversifier; this fire ships the anchor) and **#1** *"get off Canvas2D вҖ” ship the still-0Г— WebGPU compute field."* Three GPU-compute explorers: `1348-prism-cortex` (**WGSL Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion compute** in ping-pong `rgba16float` storage textures вҶ’ inverse log-polar form-constant warp, **MIDI/QWERTY**-played [the jury's 0Г— input], idle auto-demo so it's phone-alive, DMT-breakthrough/intense; Marpi + Android Jones), `1350-gpu-murmur` (**WGSL N-body/curl-noise particle compute** вҖ” 180k motes in storage buffers, additive point-cloud, **device-tilt** gather/disperse, jhДҒna-boundless/cosmic-ambient; Robert Hodgin + Refik Anadol), `1352-hex-bloom` (**WGSL cyclic-CA / BZ-reaction compute** вҶ’ spiral+honeycomb form-constants via hex-kaleidoscope fold, **QWERTY organ**-excited, psilocybin-organic; Jason Rampe + Memo Akten). 1348 also **#4** cashing 717's multi-cycle commitment) + dodged every current ban (all off Canvas2D on the 0Г— WebGPU-compute substrate; none a look-ahead step-sequencer groove; none a granular-freeze of a recording; de-selected only because 1348 is the anchor the jury demanded be shipped вҖ” resurrect near-verbatim in a phone/tilt slot, or promote its gather/disperse GPU point-field to a shared primitive) + `1352-hex-bloom` (вӯҗвӯҗ вҖ” a **distinct GPU-compute technique** [cyclic-CA spirals, mirroring the proven `1053-ripple-loom` pipeline = lowest shader-compile risk] + the **best graceful degrade** [no WebGPU вҶ’ the QWERTY organ still makes sound, audio-only]; 1348 is a `"use client"` component so Vercel's normal-fd builder deploys it fine. **NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless box, no GPU/display/speakers) вҖ” whether the WGSL compute pipeline actually renders the RD chemistry + log-polar tunnels/lattices, and whether the drone reads, want Karel's WebGPU browser. `state: DMT-breakthrough В· pole: intense.` **Ambition (winner) 3/5: #2 вүҘ3 subsystems (Web MIDI engine + WGSL Gray-Scott RD-compute field + inverse-log-polar warp render + additive pad-drone/void audio = 4) + #3 living ref (Marpi + Android Jones) + #4 multi-cycle (cashes 717's banked вӯҗвӯҗ1342 commitment).** #1 claimed cautiously вҖ” *WGSL compute on GPU storage textures is 0Г— in-window and the jury's named gap*, though RD has distant lab-prior, so #1 anchors on the compute-substrate move, not the algorithm. #5 cashed by the CYCLE via all three implementing today's В§718 WebGPU-compute dive вҖ” and this fire literally ships the previously-banked research anchor. ## `/dream/1348-prism-cortex` вҖ” *play a **DMT-breakthrough chemistry** on a keyboard вҖ” a living **Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion** reaction runs as a **WebGPU compute shader** (the lab's first) and every note you play sows fresh chemistry into it. This is a genuine WGSL `@compute` cellular chemistry: two chemicals A/B live in a pair of **`rgba16float` storage textures**, ping-ponged, stepped 3вҖ“8 iterations per frame via `dispatchWorkgroups` in the worm/maze regime, with a slow ~0.05 Hz LFO on feed/kill for "breathing." A render pass then samples the field through an **inverse log-polar warp** (`log r`, Оё вҖ” the BressloffвҖ“Cowan retino-cortical projection behind KlГјver's form constants) so the RD maze becomes **tunnels, spirals and honeycomb lattices**, finished with thin-film iridescence, chromatic aberration and additive glow вҖ” a neon jewel. **Input = Web MIDI** (`navigator.requestMIDIAccess`, feature-detected) primary + an always-live **QWERTY** fallback (`aвҖ“l` white keys, `w e t y u o` black): each note injects a Gaussian seed of chemical B at an angle set by pitch class (velocity вҶ’ bloom size), held keys sustain both the chemistry source and a detuned drone partial. **Idle auto-demo:** after ~4 s with no input the field auto-seeds a gentle C-minor-pentatonic loop, so it lives and evolves on a phone with no keyboard. **Real TIME in the audio** (`audio.ts`): an additive **pad-drone** вҖ” a JI drone bed (`_shared/psych/droneBank`), a detuned 3-partial voice per held note (soft attack / long release вҖ” not a bell, not a drum), a slow **Shepard** shimmer (`_shared/psych/shepard`), summed into a **void-reverb** bus (`_shared/psych/convolutionVoid`) and hard-limited by a `DynamicsCompressor` at master вүӨ0.22 with an exponential fade-in. In the iridescent GPU-field lineage of **Marpi** (marpi.studio) and **Android Jones**, both living. **Degrades gracefully:** no WebGPU adapter/device вҶ’ a readable **amber** "needs a WebGPU browser (Chrome 113+/Edge/Safari 18+)" notice instead of a blank screen (the substrate IS the piece, so no 2D fallback); no MIDI вҶ’ QWERTY; no input вҶ’ auto-demo. Server-safe (`"use client"`, all `navigator`/`AudioContext`/GPU behind effects + the Begin gate); **no strobe** вҖ” any global luminance oscillation вүӨ3 Hz (the breath LFO is ~0.05 Hz), `prefers-reduced-motion` cuts chemistry substeps + softens contrast/chroma; full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel, MIDI handlers cleared, `AudioContext.close()`, `device.destroy()` + textures/buffers). Refs (living): Marpi В· Android Jones; BressloffвҖ“Cowan / KlГјver for the form-constant map. `state: DMT-breakthrough В· pole: intense`. `status: demoable`*

## `/dream/1344-light-tunnel` вҖ” *tilt your phone to fall down a **near-death tunnel toward the light**, rendered entirely as living **vector line-art** вҖ” no canvas, no WebGL, every mark a real **SVG DOM element**. A dark void opens onto ~90 concentric `<circle>` rings + ~30 `<line>` spokes receding into a `<radialGradient>` **being-of-light** at the vanishing point, while a second gradient **hypoxic vignette** constricts toward the luminous core (the literal tunnel-vision of ischemia). Ring depth follows a **log-polar** curve (`r = R_MINВ·e^(zВ·ln(R_MAX/R_MIN))`) so travel feels like constant velocity down an endless tube; the elements are **created once and mutated in place** each frame (`r`/`cx`/`cy`/`stroke`/`opacity`) so ~120 animated SVG nodes stay smooth on a phone. **Input = device tilt** (`DeviceOrientationEvent`; iOS `requestPermission()` fired inside the Begin tap): `gamma`/`beta` steer the vanishing point and the tunnel **bends** toward your lean (far rings center on the vanishing point, near rings on the frame, blended `(1вҲ’z)^1.6`), and lean magnitude sets **approach speed** toward the light. **Real TIME in the audio** (`audio.ts`, all Web Audio, no files): a slow **Shepard-Risset ascent** (octave-spaced sine partials under a fixed Gaussian window вҖ” the auditory barber-pole, via `_shared/psych/shepard.ts`) over a warm **JI drone bed** (`droneBank.ts`, E1 sub floor) poured into a synthetic **convolution void** (`convolutionVoid.ts`); approach speed is the single drive вҖ” it speeds the glide, opens a master lowpass, and lifts the wet tail toward the being-of-light moment вҖ” under a **~0.1 Hz breath swell**. Not a beat, not a sequencer, not a struck bell вҖ” one continuous weightless rise. In the lineage of **Ryoji Ikeda** (data/line minimalism) and **Zach Lieberman** (generative vector poetry), both living. **Degrades gracefully:** no tilt sensor / permission denied вҶ’ **pointer-drag** steers (position steers, distance-from-center = speed) with an amber note; a slow Lissajous **auto-drift** runs on load so it's alive before you tilt. Server-safe (`"use client"`, all `window`/`AudioContext`/`DeviceOrientationEvent` behind effects + the Begin gate, iOS `requestPermission` feature-detected); **no strobe** вҖ” the center light is a slow bloom, all luminance changes smoothed вүӨ3 Hz, `prefers-reduced-motion` slows the approach + softens contrast/vignette; master вүӨ0.2 вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` limiter, exponential fade-in, full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel, listeners removed, `AudioContext.close()`). Refs (living): Ryoji Ikeda В· Zach Lieberman. `state: NDE tunnel-to-light В· pole: cosmic-ambient`. `status: demoable`*

## (Cycle 716 вҖ” **psychedelic** **DEEP** вҖ” one massively-bigger concept, three embodied technical attacks, ship the strongest: **"The Groove Engine"** вҖ” the lab's **first real generative-groove instrument** and the direct answer to the last three juries' most-repeated unmet ask (*"not one rhythm, groove, beat, or deliberate dissonance in the entire window"*; the JI-strikeвҶ’consonant-chord spine is *"this era's pentatonic crutch"*). Your **body's motion** conducts a living, swung, evolving **drum groove** вҖ” not a bell, not a drone. Three attacks share one spine (camera-motion input via frame-diff вҶ’ a look-ahead Web-Audio groove engine with real **swing** + per-step **probability** + a time-based **buildвҶ’drop**, a **living** AV/music reference, PLAYED not watched): `1336-flow-drummer` (optical-flow motion energy вҶ’ a **polymetric Euclidean** groove whose 16/12/7/5 voice lengths phase against one another; Max Cooper + BeatState), `1338-shadow-808` (**dance a pattern INTO an 808** вҖ” your silhouette occupies an 8Г—5 step-grid to arm each voice; reactable + Patatap + BeatState), `1340-dub-conductor` (**two hands conduct dub-techno** вҖ” one rides a minor-9 **b9 dissonance that resolves** as you lift it, the other throws dub delays; Monolake). Alternation вҖҰ713 W вҶ’ 714 D вҶ’ **715 W вҶ’ 716 D** (DEEP due). Research-first (RESEARCH В§716): **BeatState** (beatstate.net) + **WebSynths Grooves** вҖ” browser-native generative groove-boxes shipping the exact **polymetric per-voice-length + per-step-probability + swing** engine the lab has never had (every prior lab sequencer is fixed-grid) вҶ’ seeds all three attacks. **Curated WINNER = `1338-shadow-808`** вҖ” all three cleared the ambition floor + dodged every 2026-07-08-jury ban (embodied camera-motion, not pointer/keyboard-sole; a real groove with TIME, not a JI-strike-bell; living refs, not a dead scientist; PLAYED, not watched) вҖ” so the call turned on **playability Г— phone-glance Г— ship-confidence** on a headless box Karel reviews at 06:30 on a phone: 1338 is the **most unambiguous instrument** (a drum machine you stand inside), it has the **best degradation** (tap Begin вҶ’ a real 808 groove plays instantly via auto-demo; no camera вҶ’ a plain **touch** step-sequencer anyone plays), it carries **persistent accreting MEMORY** (denser/different after a minute вҖ” the menu-thin long-form-with-state property), and it is **lowest ship-risk** (pure deterministic 808 synthesis вҖ” no delay-feedback loop / GPU / CDN to ear-verify). `1340-dub-conductor` (вӯҗвӯҗ **top SHIP-NEXT** вҖ” the more *ambitious* concept and the **only piece that cashes the jury's uniquely-unmet dissonance-that-resolves ask** [a real minor-9 + b9 tension voice whose detune/level fall as the left hand opens the filter cutoff] + best living ref [Monolake] + a full dub delay/reverb space; de-selected **only** on phone-glance [two-hand air-conducting is subtle] + the one thing a headless box can't verify [a dub delay-feedback chain's actual audio] вҖ” exactly the piece to ship in a cycle it can be ear-tuned) + `1336-flow-drummer` (вӯҗвӯҗ вҖ” the **freshest engine**: a **polymetric Euclidean phasing** groove [independent 16/12/7/5 voice lengths], 0Г— in-lab; de-selected on the loosest *am-I-playing-it-deliberately* feel [continuous optical-flow reads ambient motion] + a lone unused-import lint warning) banked to IDEAS В§716 with full specs, backed up to scratchpad `banked-716/` then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule. вҡ  **Build note (unchanged):** `npm run build` `EMFILE`s locally at Next's prerender (box fd cap 4096 vs ~660 routes) вҖ” NOT a code defect: `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` (whole tree incl. 1338) passes **EXIT 0** with `.next/server/app/dream/1338-shadow-808/page.js` (41 kB) emitted; 1338 is a `"use client"` component so Vercel's normal-fd builder deploys it fine. **NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless box, no display/speakers/camera) вҖ” whether the pattern audibly grooves + the silhouette reliably writes cells want Karel's phone. `state: embodied-groove / danced-in beat В· pole: intense.` **Ambition (winner) 2/5: #2 вүҘ3 subsystems (camera frame-diff + background-subtraction silhouette + look-ahead 808 scheduler with swing + per-step probability + build/drop state machine + retro-808 renderer = 5) + #3 living ref (Sergi JordГ 's *reactable* + Jono Brandel's *Patatap*).** #1 not claimed (step-sequencers have lab-prior `1272`/`161`; the freshness is the *camera-danced* writing + real swing/probability/drop + accreting memory + that it is the lab's **first real groove content at all**). #5 cashed by the CYCLE via all three implementing today's В§716 BeatState dive. Details in STATE В§716.)

## `/dream/1338-shadow-808` вҖ” *dance a drum pattern into an 808 вҖ” your silhouette steps through a grid in camera-space and the groove is choreographed by your body. The screen is a **TR-808 step sequencer** (8 steps Г— 5 voices вҖ” kick / snare / hat / clap / tom) with a bright **playhead column** sweeping in time. Your webcam (`getUserMedia`, mirrored, shrunk to 64Г—40) becomes a **presence field** (frame-difference motion вҲӘ background-subtraction, with a decaying memory so a still body keeps glowing) folded into the 8Г—5 cells; when the playhead crosses a step you **occupy**, that voice is **armed** вҖ” so you wave/dance through the grid to *write* the pattern and it loops straight back at you. The armed pattern is **persistent state that accretes** (denser and different after a minute вҖ” an instrument you build up, not a momentary reaction; **Clear** resets). Engine: a look-ahead **"Tale of Two Clocks"** scheduler (25 ms tick, ~120 ms lookahead vs `AudioContext.currentTime`), 100вҖ“132 BPM, real **swing** (off-beat 16ths delayed), per-step **probability** so armed hits ghost/drop (BeatState-style), and all-Web-Audio **808 synthesis** (kick = 160вҶ’45 Hz sine drop + 50 Hz sub; snare = HP-noise + 185 Hz body; hat = HP-noise; clap = 4-tap noise; tom = pitched sine; + an emergent resonant **acid stab** once patterns get dense, so busy grooves bite instead of turning sterile). **Build вҶ’ drop:** high sustained motion (or a tap) sweeps a filtered-noise **riser** over two bars, **strips to silence for a beat**, then **slams back at full density** (probabilityвҶ’1, four-on-the-floor + off-beat claps) вҖ” time-based drama, not just a filter sweep. **The lab's first real groove/swing/probability content** вҖ” a direct answer to the jury's "put TIME in the room." **Degrades gracefully:** on Begin an auto-demo groove (kick + backbeat + ghosted hats + clap) plays immediately so it's never dead on a 06:30 glance; no camera вҶ’ a `text-rose-300` notice + the grid becomes a plain **touch** step-sequencer (tap cells to toggle). Server-safe (`"use client"`, all `window`/`navigator`/`AudioContext`/canvas behind effects + the Begin gate, `getUserMedia` feature-detected); **no strobe** вҖ” armed-step beat pulses are smooth exp-decay luminance bumps (вүӨ3 Hz), `prefers-reduced-motion` honoured; master вүӨ0.28 вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` limiter + fade-in; full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel, scheduler timer cleared, camera MediaStream tracks stopped, `AudioContext.close()`). Nothing is recorded or sent вҖ” the camera only senses motion locally. Refs (living): Sergi JordГ  / **reactable** В· Jono Brandel / **Patatap** В· **BeatState** (beatstate.net). `state: embodied-groove / danced-in beat В· pole: intense`. `status: demoable`*

## (Cycle 715 вҖ” **psychedelic** **WIDE** вҖ” 3 orthogonal altered-states explorers, each PLAYED via a **distinct non-pointer/non-recent input** and citing a **living** reference, deliberately re-spreading input away from the recent window's ruts (mic 4Г— / camera 3Г— / real-piano-file 3Г— in the last 10): `1330-dream-machine` (**MIDI/QWERTY**-played safe Dreamachine вҖ” each note ignites a вүӨ3 Hz photosensitive-SAFE luminance pulse blooming KlГјver form-constants along an entropy axis), `1332-liquid-light` (**device-tilt**-poured 1960s oil-wheel liquid light show вҖ” tilt is the heat+gravity that makes molten color flow and bloom), `1334-comet-choir` (**pointer-conducted** curl-noise + boids murmuration whose density/coherence play a polyrhythmic choir). Alternation вҖҰ712 D вҶ’ 713 W вҶ’ 714 D вҶ’ **715 W** (WIDE due). Research-first (RESEARCH В§715): a **2026-06-22 Houdini-vs-TouchDesigner real-time-generative survey** + the recent **Stam-lineage GPU dye-advection** browser corpus (Dobryakov et al.) вҖ” the surprising hook was that the *psychedelic-liquid-light-show medium itself* (immiscible oil + heat + gravity), never built in the lab, is a clean browser dye-advection target seeding `1332`. **Curated WINNER = `1332-liquid-light`** вҖ” all three cleared the ambition floor + dodged every banned tag (none pointer-as-sole-input; MIDI/tilt fill 0Г—/under-used embodied lanes) вҖ” so the call turned on the WIDE mandate's core target (diversity), ship-risk, and phone-glance legibility: 1332 is the **boldest diversity move** (a **Canvas2D + tilt** piece вҖ” breaks the recent WebGL2-shader lean, and an **analog liquid-light-show is a concept the lab has never built**), it is **lowest ship-risk on a headless box** (Canvas2D, no GPU/flicker/particle-upload/model/CDN to eye-verify), it is the **most phone-glance-legible** at Karel's 06:30 review (tilt the phone вҶ’ color pours instantly, no keyboard/mic/permission friction), it puts real **TIME** in the audio (a felt ~0.3 Hz throb + tilt-tracked filter/pitch bend, not a JI-strike-bell), and it fills the **under-used tilt lane** with an intense-pole contrast to recent cosmic-ambient winners (1326/1320). `1330-dream-machine` (вӯҗвӯҗ SHIP-NEXT вҖ” **highest ambition** [MIDI-input engine + SafeFlicker photic pulse + log-polar form-constant field + asymmetric entropy walk + warm pad-drone audio = 5 subsystems], Karel-the-pianist's native input, resurrects the В§713 banked concept; de-selected only because MIDI gates a 06:30 *phone* reviewer [demo/QWERTY read watch-ish] + its вүӨ3 Hz flicker is the one safety element a headless box can't eye-verify + it's a 4th recent WebGL2 shader вҖ” ship in a MIDI/keyboard slot, or promote its asymmetric entropy walk to `_shared/psych/entropyController.ts`, the last unbuilt PSYCHEDELIC shared primitive) + `1334-comet-choir` (вӯҗвӯҗ вҖ” the **best love-fit** [rides Karel's loved particle-flow cluster `321`/`236`/`262`/`243`/`267`] + **strongest audio TIME** [three concurrent 3/4/5-per-bar polyrhythm streams] + cosmic-ambient; de-selected because it uses **pointer** вҖ” the exact over-rep input the jury keeps flagging, whereas 1330/1332 both fill 0Г—/under-used embodied lanes вҖ” plus moderate 7k-particle GPU ship-risk; strongest resurrect once re-homed on a non-pointer input, or ship near-verbatim in a pointer-allowed slot for its love-fit) banked to IDEAS В§715 with full specs, backed up to scratchpad `banked-715/` then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule. вҡ  **Build note (unchanged):** `npm run build` `EMFILE`s locally at Next's prerender (box fd cap 4096 vs ~660 routes) вҖ” NOT a code defect: `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` (whole tree incl. 1332) passes **EXIT 0** with `.next/server/app/dream/1332-liquid-light/page.js` (31.9 kB) emitted; 1332 is a `"use client"` component so Vercel's normal-fd builder deploys it fine. **NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless box, no display/speakers/accelerometer) вҖ” whether the oil visibly pours with tilt + the dye-advection reads like molten color want Karel's phone. `state: liquid-light-show ego-melt В· pole: intense.` **Ambition (winner) 2/5: #2 вүҘ3 subsystems (device-tilt/pointer input + Canvas2D dye-advection ping-pong buffers + additive oil-glow emitters with thin-film rims + tilt-tracked filtered/detuned drone audio = 4) + #3 living ref (the Joshua Light Show + Mark Boyle & Joan Hills' "Sensual Laboratory").** #1 not claimed (Canvas2D fluid/dye-advection has distant lab-prior; the freshness is the *analog-liquid-light-show-as-played-instrument* framing + the deliberate move onto the under-used tilt lane). Details in STATE В§715.)

## `/dream/1332-liquid-light` вҖ” *tilt your phone to **pour a 1960s psychedelic liquid light show** вҖ” molten pools of colored oil that a projectionist once pushed across a hot plate by heat and gravity, here flowing and blooming as you **lean the plate**. You don't strike a note and wait; you **tilt** and the oil runs the way you tilt it, gathering, blooming, and separating. **Input = device tilt** (`DeviceOrientationEvent`; iOS `requestPermission()` fired inside the Begin tap): tilt **direction** (`gamma`/`beta`) sets the gravity vector the dye advects along + the audio stereo pan; tilt **magnitude** sets the "heat" вҖ” bigger/hotter blooms, a longer smear, the drone's lowpass opening 300вҶ’2100 Hz and the chord bending up ~22 cents. **Output = Canvas2D** (deliberately no WebGL вҖ” dependency-light + ship-safe): a coarse **dye-advection** on a small offscreen ping-pong buffer (`fluid.ts`) вҖ” each frame the previous buffer is redrawn translated slightly along the pour vector and multiplied by a decay < 1 (so pools *smear* downhill and churn), then a handful of magenta/cyan/amber/violet/green emitters drift with the flow and stamp translucent radial gradients under `globalCompositeOperation = 'lighter'` (additive glow вҶ’ pools bloom, merge, separate; a complementary outer stop gives the thin-film iridescent rim). **Real TIME in the audio** (`audio.ts`): a warm swirling just-chord drone (root A1, stacked pure ratios, detuned pairs for chorus) over a felt **~0.3 Hz LFO throb** вҖ” a breathing bed that lives in time, NOT a struck bell. A homage to the **Joshua Light Show** (Joshua White, Fillmore East, 1960sвҖ“, still reforming) and **Mark Boyle & Joan Hills' "Sensual Laboratory"** liquid projections вҖ” a real, nameable art form whose chemistry (heat + gravity + immiscible color) maps cleanly onto tilt. **Degrades gracefully:** no tilt sensor / permission denied вҶ’ **pointer-drag** pours (drag vector = pour vector) with a `text-rose-300` notice; a slow lissajous **auto-drift** always adds faint living churn so the plate is never dead before Begin, on release, or when held still. Server-safe (`"use client"`, all `window`/`AudioContext`/canvas/`DeviceOrientationEvent` behind effects + the Begin gate, iOS `requestPermission` feature-detected); **no strobe** вҖ” the bloom is smooth continuous luminance drift, peak brightness capped three ways (per-frame multiplicative decay bounds additive glow + a vignette darkens corners against a full-white blowout + the only global luminance oscillation is a shallow вүӨ0.3 Hz "breath"), `prefers-reduced-motion` slows churn/throb + softens contrast; master вүӨ0.26 вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` limiter, 3 s fade-in, full teardown on unmount. Refs (living lineage): Joshua Light Show (Joshua White) В· Mark Boyle & Joan Hills / Sensual Laboratory. `state: liquid-light-show ego-melt В· pole: intense`. `status: demoable`*

## (Cycle 714 вҖ” **psychedelic** **DEEP** вҖ” one massively-bigger concept, two embodied technical attacks, ship the strongest: **"Earn the Drop"** вҖ” an EDM build-and-drop where the tension scalar **T вҲҲ [0,1] is the player's body, not a self-running clock.** The lab already has a *watched* EDM arc (`387-drop-engine`, tension auto-ramps on a timer вҖ” the exact "screensaver not instrument" liability three juries have named); this fire puts the drop in your hands. A real **126-BPM look-ahead step-sequencer** gates its layers (kick вҶ’ hats вҶ’ riser + Shepard drive-up вҶ’ snare fill вҶ’ **THE DROP** = hard impact + full four-on-the-floor) on T, and T densifies a **log-polar KlГјver form-constant** WebGL2 field that **blooms** (luminance/saturation/scale, **never a strobe** вҖ” SafeFlicker вүӨ3 Hz) on the drop. Direct answer to the 2026-07-08 jury's two loudest still-live notes: **#2** "*not one rhythm, groove, beat or drop in the entire window вҖ” put TIME in it*" and **#4** "*stop shipping watched pieces, make instruments*." Two attacks differing on embodied input: `1327-tilt-drop` (**device-tilt** charges T, a **shake** fires the drop вҖ” phone-native) and `1329-breath-drop` (**mic-as-real-input** вҖ” a sustained rising **hum** charges T, a sharp **exhale** onset fires the drop). Alternation вҖҰ711 W вҶ’ 712 D вҶ’ 713 W вҶ’ **714 D** (DEEP due). Research-first (RESEARCH В§714): **arXiv 2604.27957 (2026) "Real-Time Control of a Virtual Orchestra by Recognition of Conducting Gestures"** (recognized body-gesture вҶ’ live orchestral intensity) + the **Motion-to-Emotion** accelerometer finding that felt musical **tension = fast, large movements** вҖ” which is *why* a shake (a fast, large gesture) is what spends the charge and fires the drop вҶ’ seeds both attacks. **Curated WINNER = `1329-breath-drop`** вҖ” both cleared the ambition floor + dodged every banned tag (tilt/mic not pointer 11Г—; WebGL2 not Canvas2D 7Г— / three.js 5Г—) + put a real beat and a real DROP in the room; the call turned on **diversity-lane + surprise + reach + love-fit**: 1329 fills the jury's **most-emphatically-named empty lane вҖ” mic-as-real-input** (flagged "~1Г—, passive-gain only"; tilt is *not* 0Г—: `83-kids-tilt-rain` + last cycle's banked `1325`), it's the more **surprising** concept (you *breathe the drop into being*), it **works on any device** (mic is universal; motion sensors are absent on desktop, so tilt needs a phone), and it **rides Karel's clearest loved cluster** (hum/voice: `158-kids-hum-paint`, `172-loop-station`, `969-kids-hum-choir`, `101-camera-song`). `1327-tilt-drop` (вӯҗвӯҗ SHIP-NEXT вҖ” the **phone-delight** pick, the most immediately graspable on a 06:30 phone glance [tilt-to-charge, shake-to-drop]; de-selected only because tilt isn't a jury-0Г— lane and it needs a phone to play; ship in a tilt slot or fold its grip-agnostic baseline-relative tilt mapping into a phone build) banked to IDEAS В§714 with full spec, backed up to scratchpad `banked-714/` then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule. вҡ  **Build note (unchanged):** `npm run build` `EMFILE`s locally at Next's prerender (box fd cap 4096 vs ~660 routes) вҖ” NOT a code defect: `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` (whole tree incl. 1329) passes **EXIT 0** with `.next/server/app/dream/1329-breath-drop/page.js` (46.7 kB) emitted; 1329 is a `"use client"` component so Vercel's normal-fd builder deploys it fine. **NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless box, no display/speakers/mic) вҖ” whether the hum audibly builds the riser + the drop lands + the mic-feedback guards hold want Karel's browser + a hum. `state: breath-trance club-peak В· pole: intense.` **Ambition (winner) 2/5: #2 вүҘ3 subsystems (mic RMS+spectral-centroid+spectral-flux-onset analysis + 126-BPM look-ahead step-sequencer beat engine + Shepard/drone audio bed + WebGL2 log-polar form-constant shader = 4) + #5 recent research (arXiv 2604.27957, 2026 embodied-gestureвҶ’intensity).** #1 not claimed (step-sequencers/EDM-arcs/log-polar all have lab-prior, esp. `387-drop-engine`); the freshness is making the drop **embodied-played** вҖ” T is your breath, not a clock вҖ” the direct jury #2+#4 answer, argued honestly. Details in STATE В§714.)

## Cycle 713 вҖ” **psychedelic** **WIDE** вҖ” 3 orthogonal altered-states explorers, a deliberate **input-diversity re-injection** that spreads the played input away from the pointer/camera/real-piano ruts of the recent window (pointer 5Г— / MediaPipe-camera 3Г— / real-piano-file 3Г— in the last 10). Each PLAYED via a **distinct non-pointer input**, each with real **TIME/motion** in the audio, each citing a **living** artist, none a physics-sim / JI-strike-bell / real-piano melt / camera / gasket: `1324-dream-machine` (**MIDI/keyboard**-played safe Dreamachine вҖ” each note ignites a вүӨ3 Hz photosensitive-SAFE luminance pulse that blooms KlГјver form-constants along an entropy axis), `1325-chrysanthemum` (**device-tilt**-steered DMT kaleidoscope chrysanthemum-bloom + thin-film iridescence), `1326-voice-cathedral` (**mic-as-real-input** вҖ” hum a sustained tone and it is granularly captured/frozen into a boundless cathedral of light). Per the WIDE model (711 precedent: ship the diversity pick, bank the research explorer) the researchвҶ’build chain stays visible in RESEARCH/STATE. `1324-dream-machine` (вӯҗвӯҗ SHIP-NEXT вҖ” the research explorer + **highest ambition 3/5**; the played Dreamachine along the 6D-VHQ entropy axis, MIDI-native for Karel-the-pianist; de-selected only because MIDI gates a 06:30 *phone* reviewer + the flicker is the one safety element a headless box can't verify вҖ” ship in a MIDI/keyboard slot or promote its `field.ts` entropy-axis controller to `_shared/psych`) + `1325-chrysanthemum` (вӯҗвӯҗ вҖ” the best phone-native glance [tilt] + the intense-pole contrast; de-selected as the least-novel technique [kaleidoscope] + a 3rd straight shader) banked to IDEAS В§713 with full specs, backed up to scratchpad `banked-713/` then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule. вҡ  **Build note (unchanged):** `npm run build` `EMFILE`s locally at Next's prerender (box fd cap 4096 vs ~660 routes) вҖ” NOT a code defect: `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` (whole tree incl. 1326) passes **EXIT 0** with `.next/server/app/dream/1326-voice-cathedral/page.js` (41 kB) emitted; 1326 is a `"use client"` component so Vercel's normal-fd builder deploys it fine. **NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless box, no display/speakers/mic) вҖ” whether the voice audibly builds a boundless space + the grain/reverb balance want Karel's browser + a hum. `state: meditative oceanic-boundlessness / voice-built cathedral В· pole: cosmic-ambient.` **Ambition (winner) 2/5: #2 вүҘ3 subsystems (mic YIN-pitch/loudness analysis + granular capture engine + frozen-layer choir accumulator + convolution-reverb cathedral space + particle-dissolution Canvas2D cloud = 5) + #3 living ref (Julianna Barwick + Pauline Oliveros / Deep Listening).** #1 not claimed (granular-voice + convolution-void have distant lab-prior; the freshness is the voice-builds-boundless-light framing + the deliberate move OFF the pointer/camera/real-piano ruts). ## `/dream/1329-breath-drop` вҖ” *hum a rising tone into your mic to **charge an EDM build**, then **exhale sharply to drop it** вҖ” you have to breathe the drop into being. The tension scalar **T вҲҲ [0,1] is your breath, not a timer** (the played, embodied counterpart to the lab's self-running `387-drop-engine`). **Your mic is a real controller, not a loudness bar** (`breath.ts`): a high-passed detection band feeds RMS **level**, a spectral-**centroid** pitch estimate, and a **spectral-flux onset** detector with an adaptive `mean+2.5Пғ` threshold + refractory вҖ” a sustained, steady tone charges T upward (louder/steadier = faster), silence lets it decay, rising pitch opens the filter and lifts the hue. A genuine **126-BPM look-ahead step-sequencer** (`audio.ts`, `setInterval` polling `ctx.currentTime`, scheduling ~16th-note events ahead) **gates its layers on T**: `T>0.05` kick вҶ’ `T>0.35` closed hats вҶ’ `T>0.55` **noise riser + filter open + ShepardвҖ“Risset drive-up** вҶ’ `TвҶ’1` snare fill. **THE DROP** вҖ” a sharp loud exhale onset while T вүҘ ~0.7 вҖ” fires a hard downbeat impact (kick + sub + noise burst), the riser is sucked out, the **full four-on-the-floor groove** ignites, and the visual **SLAMS**: a saturation/scale/brightness bloom of a **log-polar KlГјver form-constant** field (WebGL2 fragment shader splicing `_shared/psych/LOGPOLAR_GLSL`) that has been densifying with T. Afterward T decays = the **breakdown**; breathe again to rebuild вҖ” it loops, player-shaped, never identical. **Real TIME/rhythm** (the lab's thinnest axis вҖ” the direct answer to the jury's "not one beat in the window" note), a **real DROP**, an **instrument you play** not a watched arc. **Feedback-safe:** the detection band is high-passed, browser DSP disabled, the analyser is a **sink only** (never routed to `destination`), the onset threshold is adaptive, and a headphones prompt is shown. **Degrades gracefully:** no mic / denied вҶ’ keyboard fallback (**hold SPACE** to charge, **ENTER** to drop) + a `text-rose-300` notice; no signal within ~2.5 s вҶ’ an **auto-demo** runs the full chargeвҶ’dropвҶ’breakdown arc so it's alive/legible hands-free on a 06:30 glance, halting the instant real input arrives. **SAFETY:** the drop is a **bloom, not a strobe**; any repetitive luminance flicker routes through `_shared/psych/SafeFlicker` (opt-in, вүӨ3 Hz soft sine, instant kill) and honors `prefersReducedMotion()` (pulls saturation/contrast/flow-speed down, never flickers). Server-safe (`"use client"`, all `window`/`navigator`/`AudioContext` behind the Begin gate + effects, `navigator.mediaDevices` SSR-guarded); master gain вүӨ0.24 вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` limiter вҶ’ destination, bounded polyphony, full teardown on Stop + unmount (nodes stopped, mic MediaStream tracks stopped, context suspended/closed, listeners removed, rAF cancelled). Refs (living): **Imogen Heap** (*Mi.Mu* gloves / voice-driven live performance) В· **Holly Herndon** (voice-as-instrument AV) В· **Max Cooper** (club-AV). `state: breath-trance club-peak В· pole: intense`. `status: demoable`*

## `/dream/1326-voice-cathedral` вҖ” *hum or sing a sustained tone and your own held voice **builds a vast luminous meditative space** вҖ” the "oceanic boundlessness" of deep meditation, drug-free. Your **microphone is the instrument** (a real controller, never a loudness bar): a dependency-free **YIN-lite autocorrelation** detector (`pitch.ts`) estimates the sung fundamental (snapped to a **C-major pentatonic** so the seeded drone is always consonant) + RMS loudness. A rolling ~3 s buffer of your captured voice is **granulated** вҖ” short Hann-windowed grains scheduled continuously, read from the **live** buffer while you sing AND from **frozen snapshot layers** that keep ringing after you stop (a slowly-decaying granular freeze); holding a steady tone **commits a new frozen layer**, so successive held tones **accumulate into a choir** (up to 6 layers, each decaying over ~15вҖ“20 s). Grains are pitch-spread into octaves/fifths and fed through a long code-built **convolution reverb** (`_shared/psych/convolutionVoid`) over a low fixed **drone bed** (`_shared/psych/droneBank`, C2) + a pitch-following seed drone вҖ” a cathedral space that blooms wetter as it grows. **The boundlessness arc IS the payload:** the longer you sustain, a `boundless` value climbs and the luminous voice-cloud (Canvas2D, pale golds вҶ’ warm white) dissolves **edge вҶ’ centre вҶ’ white**, the dark ground lightening toward a boundless field of light (figure/ground / ego dissolution); **silence** lets it settle back into a dark spacious void. A breath-paced ~0.1 Hz macro swell underneath. **Feedback-safe:** the raw mic is an `AnalyserNode` **sink only** вҖ” never routed to `destination`, nothing is recorded or sent, so there is no howl and no privacy leak. Deliberately breaks the recent monoculture: **mic-as-real-input** (spreading input off the pointer/camera/real-piano ruts), a **granular voice-freeze** technique (not a mic-loudness FFT-bar visualizer, not a real-piano melt, not a JI-strike-bell), **PLAYED not watched** (a sustained hum is the whole gesture), cosmic-ambient meditative pole. **Degrades gracefully:** no mic / denied вҶ’ an audible synthesized **demo voice** (a sustained hum) drives the whole piece so it's alive without permission, plus a `text-rose-300` notice inviting mic access; before Begin a gentle bloom already drifts so a cold 06:30 glance is never dead. Server-safe (`"use client"`, all `window`/`navigator`/`AudioContext` behind effects + the Begin gate, `navigator.mediaDevices` SSR-guarded); **no strobe** вҖ” slow smooth luminance drift only, the dissolve to white **eased in** (smoothstep, capped alpha) so it's never a harsh blowout, `prefersReducedMotion()` slows all motion; master вүӨ0.24 + 1.5 s fade-in + `DynamicsCompressor` limiter + hard caps (40 grains / 6 layers / 320 motes); full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel, all grain sources / oscillators / drone stopped, **mic MediaStream tracks stopped**, `AudioContext.close()`, listeners removed). A single-performer echo of **Julianna Barwick**'s looped-voice cathedral and the **Pauline Oliveros / Deep Listening** lineage. Refs (living): Julianna Barwick В· Pauline Oliveros / Deep Listening В· Гүliane Radigue. `status: demoable`*

## `/dream/1320-khole-tunnel` вҖ” *a drug-free ketamine k-hole / near-death tunnel-to-light, where **the beat you hear comes loose from the flash you see** and the world un-binds the deeper you go. A **WebGL2 raymarched** dark void (single full-screen fragment shader вҖ” a distant warm being of light, a faint tunnel of soft rings, sparse volumetric wisps, a hypoxic vignette) that is **alive on a cold glance** (idle auto-drift renders before Begin; audio gesture-gated). **The signature вҖ” audio-visual DESYNC** (`desync.ts`, a self-contained ring buffer): a steady **~2.7 Hz "dissociation pulse"** drives a shallow (~14%) luminance breath you SEE; every frame that drive is pushed into the buffer, but the audio never reads it live вҖ” it reads **`readLagged()`**, the value from `lagSeconds` ago, where `lagSeconds` wanders on a slow ~0.05 Hz sine between **0.3 s and 1.2 s**, so the throb you HEAR trails the breath you see by a continuously **drifting** offset (a literal enactment of the sensory-uncoupling in Bera et al. 2026). **Played, not watched:** **hold anywhere** = you are drawn toward the light вҖ” the *scene* clock dilates toward **0.35Г—** (time distension), the vignette constricts, bloom warms, and a `dissociation` amount rises that **widens the lag range + speeds its drift** (the world un-binds MORE the deeper you go); **move** = steer the disembodied float; sustained arrival triggers a smooth **gamma clarity-swell** (`1вҲ’exp(вҲ’x)` ceiling, вүӨ180 ms вҖ” NO strobe). **Real ~3 Hz TIME (kills the JI-drone spine):** the pulse rides its **own steady, undilated clock** so even as the scene dilates the beat never stops вҖ” the audio identity is the **desynced rhythmic throb** (warm sub + filtered mid tone whose amplitude/cutoff pulse on the *lagged* drive), with a thin JI drone bed + a downward **Shepard** undertow (`_shared/psych/shepard`) + a code-generated cavern reverb only as depth, never the subject. Deliberately breaks the recent monoculture: cosmic-ambient dissociation (NOT last cycle's intense op-art, NOT a physics-sim, NOT a real-piano melt, NOT a MediaPipe groove, NOT a JI-strike-bell). **Degrades gracefully:** no WebGL2 вҶ’ a readable `text-rose-300` notice. Server-safe (`"use client"`, all `window`/GL/AudioContext behind effects + the Begin gate); **no strobe** вҖ” full-field luminance change stays вүӨ3 Hz + smooth + shallow, `prefersReducedMotion()` halves the pulse to 1.35 Hz + cuts contrast; full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel, oscillators + Shepard stop, `AudioContext.close()`, GL program/buffer deleted + `WEBGL_lose_context`, listeners removed). A single-performer echo of **James Turrell**'s Ganzfeld (light as an object you inhabit), grounded in **Bera et al. 2026**. Refs (living): James Turrell В· Bera, Looger, Proekt & Cichon, *Cortical Mechanisms Contributing to Ketamine-Induced Dissociation* (2026) В· Vesuna/Deisseroth retrosplenial ~3 Hz rhythm (2020). `status: demoable`*

## `/dream/1316-moire-drift` вҖ” *tune a psychedelic trance by hand: two (really three) fine op-art gratings are summed in a WebGL2 fragment shader in **cortical (log r, Оё) space**; where two near-equal spatial frequencies add they **beat** out a slow low-frequency envelope вҖ” and that envelope IS a KlГјver form constant (concentric ringsвҶ’**tunnels/funnels**, radial raysвҶ’**spokes/cobwebs**, cortical diagonalsвҶ’**spirals**, a hex term waking near the peakвҶ’**honeycomb**). **The core surprise вҖ” one number, seen and heard:** the **detune** you set with vertical drag fixes a single `beatHz` that (1) advances the movable grating's temporal phase so the whole **visual moirГ© envelope drifts at that rate**, and (2) sets the frequency gap of a **detuned oscillator pair** (138 Hz + beat) so the **audio amplitude-beats at the same rate** вҖ” tune the moirГ© tighter and you watch the fringes settle AND hear the acoustic beats slow toward alignment; a live HUD prints the Hz. **Drag anywhere:** horizontal (вҶҗвҶ’) = **rotation offset О”Оё** between layers (blooms spokes/spirals), vertical (вҶ•) = **spatial-frequency detune О”k** (top=aligned/slow, bottom=detuned/fast), **drag speed / hold** = entropy energy pushing the arc forward (more grating octaves, faster drift, looser symmetry вҖ” REBUS "priors relax"); release and it drifts on its own. **Entropy arc** (~3 min, onsetвҶ’come-upвҶ’peakвҶ’settle) grows octaves/drift/symmetry-looseness and shifts the palette from stark near-black + bone-white with an electric-cyan accent toward **saturated neon/iridescent** at the peak вҖ” genuinely different at minute 3 than 0:20. **Audio has TIME:** the detuned-beat pair (+ a quiet octave pair for body) is the star, a soft **low pulse/transport** at 0.7вҖ“2 Hz tightens toward the peak (rhythm, not a flat pad), and a faint downward **Shepard** undertow (`_shared/psych/shepard`) sits underneath; master вүӨ0.28 + 1.2 s exp fade-in + `DynamicsCompressor` limiter, fixed small voice count. Deliberately breaks the lab's recent monoculture: a pointer-**PLAYED** interference instrument (NOT a sensor rerun, NOT a physics-sim, NOT a real-piano melt, NOT a JI-strike-bell), and it drives the form-constant engine by moirГ© interference rather than the log-polar warp of `1300`. Technique: raw WebGL2, a single full-screen triangle (positions from `gl_VertexID`, no vertex buffer), one fragment shader summing the gratings with `smoothstep`+`fwidth()` op-art ink. **Degrades gracefully:** WebGL2 unavailable вҶ’ a `text-rose-300` notice; before Begin the field is already alive on a slow idle auto-drift so a cold 06:30 glance is never dead. Server-safe (`"use client"`, capability check + all GL/AudioContext behind the Begin gate); **no strobe** вҖ” moirГ© luminance beating is spatially incoherent (different radii at different phase вҶ’ never a full-field synchronized flash), contrast moderate, beat capped ~5.5 Hz smooth drift (below the 15вҖ“20 Hz risk band), `prefersReducedMotion()` halves the rate + greys the contrast; full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel, oscillators + Shepard stop, nodes disconnect, `ctx.close()`, GL program/VAO deleted, listeners removed). A single-performer echo of **Bridget Riley**'s Op-art, made audible. Refs (living): Bridget Riley (b. 1931) В· BressloffвҖ“Cowan *Geometric visual hallucinations* (2001) В· KlГјver form constants В· ShepardвҖ“Risset. `status: demoable`*

1314 is a `"use client"` component so Vercel's normal-fd builder deploys it fine. `state: hypnagogic dream / long-form musical memory В· pole: cosmic-ambient вҶ’ intense.` **Ambition (winner) 4/5: #2 вүҘ4 subsystems (melody-capture + never-cleared motif-library + recall/transform engine [canon/reverse/harmonize/stretch] + beat-clock arc + woven-thread viz + generative synth-with-echo = 6) + #3 living ref (teamLab *Irreversible Change* 2026) + #4 multi-cycle memory-journey commitment + #5 current-2026 research** вҖ” details in STATE В§710.)

## `/dream/1314-motif-weave` вҖ” *a dream that REMEMBERS you вҖ” the memory made musical. A single-performer echo of **teamLab's *The World of Irreversible Change*** (2026): every phrase you play is permanently absorbed into the material the piece is made of. **Drag** anywhere (vertical position = pitch) to perform a phrase вҖ” you hear each note instantly; on release, if it's вүҘ2 notes it's captured as a **motif** `{pitch, onset-in-beats, duration, velocity}` and pushed into a library that is **never cleared** during a run. A rAF-driven **beat clock** walks a generative score and on each beat may **recall an earlier motif, transformed** вҖ” `gentle` (diatonic pentatonic transpose), `harmonize` (a parallel third above), `canon` (a staggered transposed answer one beat later), `reverse` (contour backwards), or `stretch` (time-stretched long, as the dream dissolves). Recall is weighted toward rarely-recalled motifs so the whole library keeps circulating, and in the *deepens* / *lucid-bloom* phases it sometimes **forces the OLDEST phrase you played** to return; the library cap (72) sheds auto-seeds first so it **never drops your first performance** вҖ” so the phrase from minute one audibly comes back, changed, minutes later (the min-1вҶ’min-6 promise). Each stored motif is also a **persistent luminous thread** in a Canvas2D woven light-field (dusk-violet вҶ’ indigo вҶ’ dawn-gold), blooming while it sounds вҖ” the visual is the record too. **Long-form arc** (genuinely different at minute 5 than minute 1 because the library has grown, NOT a loop): *drifting-off* 52 bpm (sparse, sows idle seed phrases) вҶ’ *the dream deepens* 63 bpm (recall rises, harmonies appear) вҶ’ *lucid bloom* 82 bpm (dense canon/reverse/harmony, brightest вҖ” the intense pole) вҶ’ *dissolution* 57 bpm (time-stretched, thinning) вҶ’ *waking* 50 bpm (settles; the grown weave persists). **Audio has TIME:** a soft sub root on alternate beats + off-beat pulses in busier phases (tempo + rhythmic movement that changes across the arc), each note a triangle + detuned sine through a per-note lowpass that opens with phase brightness, a **feedback delay** carrying the tails of recalls/canons (memory literally echoing), and a faint shared **Shepard** undertow (`_shared/psych/shepard`) whose drive rises with brightness + breath. **Mic breath** (optional) brightens the dream, lifts the undertow, and summons more remembered threads вҖ” the raw mic is an AnalyserNode **sink only** (never routed to destination вҶ’ no feedback howl). Deliberately **NOT** the recent monoculture: memory-as-instrument (not a physics-sim-poke, not a real-piano melt, not a MediaPipe groove, not a strikeвҶ’JI-chord bell), PLAYED not watched. **Degrades gracefully:** no mic вҶ’ pointer-only (breath stays 0, `text-rose-300` notice), and idle seed phrases self-drive the piece so it's alive/recall-demonstrable on a cold 06:30 glance within seconds of the single **Begin** tap. Server-safe (`"use client"`, all behind the Begin gate); **no strobe** вҖ” Canvas2D smooth luminance drift only, optional flicker via `_shared/psych/safeFlicker` (вүӨ3 Hz, opt-in, instant kill), `prefersReducedMotion()` honoured; master вүӨ0.28 + 1.2 s fade-in + `DynamicsCompressor` limiter + hard 16-voice cap; full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel, Shepard stop, mic tracks stopped, `AudioContext.close()`). **Begin again** starts a fresh, empty run. Ref (living): teamLab *The World of Irreversible Change / Everything Exists in Infinite Continuity* (2026). `status: demoable`*

## `/dream/1308-piano-freeze` вҖ” *reach into Karel's recorded piano with your bare **hand** and FREEZE a moment into an infinite shimmer. His real *Welcome Home* solo piano (fetched from `/api/audio/549fc519вҖҰ`, with an OfflineAudioContext synthesized solo-piano fallback so it's alive headless) is fed to a **granular resynthesis engine** whose READ position (where grains are sampled from) moves **independently of grain playback** вҖ” so scrub and freeze fall straight out. A webcam **MediaPipe HandLandmarker** (client-side, GPUвҶ’CPU, loaded at runtime from the `@mediapipe/tasks-vision@0.10.14` CDN via a `/* webpackIgnore: true */` dynamic import so no npm dep is added): **hand-X scrubs the pitch-independent playhead** through the whole recording; **raise the hand UP вҶ’ FREEZE** вҖ” the read-position chase scales by `(1 вҲ’ freeze)`, so at full freeze the overlapping ~135 ms Hann grains (~60% overlap, ~20 ms lookahead, 48-grain cap) re-read a single slice forever = a **Paulstretch-style infinite shimmering drone**; tiny per-grain read-jitter + detune keep it glistening not buzzing, and a **parallel DRY grain path** fades in with freeze so the frozen moment stays legible while it holds (the Sampleson *Aeronaut* 2026 freeze-against-a-parallel-looper idea, done granularly so it never clicks). **Pinch вҶ” spread** (thumb-tip to index-tip) drives a low-shelf / high-shelf **spectral tilt** (spread=brighter, pinch=darker). **Viz (Canvas2D):** a scrolling violet/indigo **spectral curtain** (AnalyserNode FFT) that **crystallizes** on freeze вҖ” the scroll halts, a slow (<3 Hz) cyan-white core bloom breathes as a pure luminance drift (never a strobe), an amber **playhead timeline** shows scrub position, and a small mirrored webcam thumbnail with amber landmark dots proves the tracking works. Deliberately breaks the lab's recent monoculture: a **real recording** as source (NOT a synth JI-drone/void-reverb/strike-chord bell), driven by the **camera-hand embodied lane** (the specifically-jury-named 0Г—-until-recently sensor), a freeze-drone *texture* distinct from the recent groove/cross-synth window. **Degrades gracefully:** no camera / getUserMedia denied / CDN fails вҶ’ a **mouse driver** (X scrubs, near-top = freeze, wheel = tilt) + a gentle **auto-drift** so a cold 06:30 glance is never dead or silent; audio fetch fails вҶ’ the synth carrier. Server-safe (`"use client"`, all behind the Start gate); `prefers-reduced-motion` gentles the shimmer; full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel, engine stop, `HandLandmarker.close()`, camera tracks stopped, ctx close, listeners removed); instant **Stop** ramps master to 0 in ~60 ms then closes the context. A single-performer echo of **Robert Henke / Monolake**'s granular time-stretching, **Paulstretch** (Nasca Octavian Paul), and **Sampleson *Aeronaut*** (2026). Refs: Sampleson *Aeronaut* (2026) В· Robert Henke / Monolake В· Paulstretch. `status: demoable`*

## `/dream/1310-piano-duet` вҖ” *sing **into** Karel's recorded piano вҖ” a duet with a recording. His real *Welcome Home* solo piano (fetched from `/api/audio/549fc519вҖҰ`, with a synthesized looping solo-piano fallback so it's alive headless) **loops continuously as the harmonic carrier**; your **live microphone is the sculptor, not a gain meter.** The mic is FFT-analysed into a smoothed **20-band spectral envelope** (~130 HzвҖ“6 kHz, log-spaced, normalized to a *shape* so a vowel's formant peaks stand out regardless of volume). A **channel-vocoder cross-synthesis**: a bank of **20 parallel bandpass BiquadFilters** splits his piano across those same 20 bands, and each band's gain is driven every frame by the matching band of your voice вҖ” so humming "ahh" vs "ooo" audibly **morphs his chord toward that vowel** (`bandGain_i вҶҗ mix Г— loudness Г— voiceEnv_i`, steered by `setTargetAtTime` ~50 ms so it's click-free, no zipper noise). A **dry path** keeps his piano clearly audible so it stays a **duet, not a gate**; an on-screen **intensity slider** (also mapped to mic loudness вҖ” sing louder, sculpt harder) rides the wet/dry. **Feedback-safe:** the raw mic is an `AnalyserNode` **sink only** вҖ” never routed to `destination`, so there is no micвҶ’speaker howl; only its *analysis* moves the filter gains. **Viz (Canvas):** three overlaid spectra on a shared log-frequency axis вҖ” **violet/indigo** his piano carrier, **amber/rose** your live voice envelope + the sculpt being applied, and a **bright ridge** for the resulting cross-synthesized output вҖ” plus a VU bar and a "singing detected" indicator, so the *your-voice-shapes-his-sound* story reads at a glance. Deliberately breaks the lab's recent monoculture: **mic-as-real-controller** (the jury-named 0Г— input, NOT passive gain), a **real recording** as carrier (NOT a synth JI-drone/void-reverb bell), PLAYED not watched. **Degrades gracefully:** no recording вҶ’ synth carrier; **no mic** вҶ’ a `text-rose-300` notice + the same filter bank driven by a synthetic voice envelope (slow auto-morph) **plus an XY pad** (drag to move the vowel formant across his spectrum) вҖ” the cross-synthesis still plays and Karel still hears his sound being sculpted; piano + auto-morph begin immediately on Start (never dead/silent). A single-performer browser echo of **Trevor Wishart** (cross-synthesis / *Vox* / spectral morphing) and **Robert Henke (Monolake)** live-spectral practice. Server-safe (`"use client"`, all behind the Start gate); **no strobe** вҖ” canvas trails + gentle ramps hold luminance change well under 3 Hz, honors `prefers-reduced-motion`; instant **Stop** ramps master to 0 in ~60 ms then stops the source, disconnects the graph, stops mic tracks, and suspends/closes the `AudioContext`. Refs: Trevor Wishart *Vox* / cross-synthesis В· Robert Henke / Monolake. `status: demoable`*

## `/dream/1305-face-desk` вҖ” *your **face** is the mixing desk. A webcam **MediaPipe FaceLandmarker v2** (52 ARKit-style blendshapes + a head-pose matrix, entirely client-side, GPU-delegated) turns your expressions into the controller for a steady **124 BPM dub-techno groove** on a 16-step look-ahead transport (four-on-the-floor kick + rolling filtered dub bass + closed hats + a minor-9th chord stab into a feedback ping-pong delay, under a global low-pass вҖ” pure Web Audio through a limiter). The mapping teaches itself: **`jawOpen`** blooms the global low-pass open AND throws a dub echo off into the distance as your mouth opens; **brow-raise** (`browInnerUp`+`browOuterUp*`) **builds** the arrangement up and down (hats вҶ’ chord stab вҶ’ strip back to kick+bass вҖ” like conducting); **head-yaw** (from the transform matrix) **pans** the stab and raises the ping-pong feedback; a debounced **two-eye blink** fires a **grid-quantised beat-stutter**; **smile** opens a high shelf and the ninth. Every continuous control is one-pole smoothed; blink is edge-detected with a ~0.42 s cooldown so a natural blink doesn't machine-gun. A dark Canvas2D **mixing-console** viz shows a face-driven fader channel strip, VU meters pulsing with the groove, a pan needle for head-yaw, a step strip with a sweep head, and a small mirrored webcam thumbnail with landmark dots so you see the tracking works. Deliberately **NOT** the lab's recent monoculture: a real **pulse/groove** (not a strikeвҶ’JI-chord bell вҖ” no synth drone/void-reverb spine), driven by the **camera face lane** (grep-0Г—, the specifically-jury-named untouched sensor), palette a warm club-dark. MediaPipe loads at runtime from the `@mediapipe/tasks-vision@0.10.14` CDN via a `/* webpackIgnore: true */` dynamic import so no npm dep is added and the build stays clean. **Degrades gracefully:** if getUserMedia is denied or the CDN fails, a `text-rose-300` notice appears and the groove keeps playing with the **mouse** standing in (Y=jaw/cutoff+throws, X=build, click=stutter) вҖ” never a dead page. A browser-native echo of **Zach Lieberman & Kyle McDonald's FaceOSC / ofxFaceTracker** and Lieberman's *MГЎs Que la Cara*. Server-safe ("use client", all behind the Start gate); **no strobe** вҖ” the blink flash is a soft wash honoring `prefers-reduced-motion` (imports the shared `_shared/psych/safeFlicker`); full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel, AudioContext close, MediaStream tracks stopped, `FaceLandmarker.close()`). Ref: Lieberman/McDonald FaceOSC В· *MГЎs Que la Cara*. `status: demoable`*

## `/dream/1300-carrier-bloom` вҖ” *Karel's own recorded piano is the **carrier wave** for a drug-free psychedelic melt you push your hands into. ## `/dream/1297-hand-loom` вҖ” *play a groove **in the air**. A webcam **MediaPipe HandLandmarker** tracks up to two hands (21 landmarks each, entirely client-side) and turns them into the controller for a 16-step **look-ahead-scheduled** rhythm engine (110 BPM вҖ” kick four-on-the-floor + backbeat clap + offbeat hats + a rolling interlocked bass, pure Web Audio through a limiter, master вүӨ0.3): hand **height** opens the filter (raise a hand вҶ’ brighter), hand **X** picks the lane, a **pinch** (thumb-to-index) quantises to the nearest step and latches a hit **ON the beat**, finger **spread** swings it, and the **gap between your two hands** adds ghost-hat density. Fingertip trails + a sweep line crossing the step-lane let you SEE the groove. Deliberately **NOT** the lab's recent monoculture: it has a real **pulse/groove** (not a strikeвҶ’JI-chord bell), it's driven by a **camera** (the specifically-jury-named 0Г— sensor lane вҖ” first MediaPipe in the lab), and its palette is a **UV black-light rave** (electric magenta/cyan/lime on near-black вҖ” not cosmic-glow, not warm-paper). MediaPipe is loaded at runtime from the `@mediapipe/tasks-vision@0.10.14` CDN via a `/* webpackIgnore: true */` dynamic import so no npm dep is added and the build stays clean. **Degrades gracefully:** an autonomous demo groove + visuals run on mount before (and without) any camera вҖ” a separate "Enable camera" step requests the webcam, and denial/absence shows a `text-rose-300` notice while the demo keeps playing (never blank). A glove-free cousin of **Imogen Heap's MiMU gloves** (gestural music control via a camera instead of sensors). Server-safe ("use client", no top-level browser globals, all behind the Begin/Enable gates); no strobe (trails + sweep are smooth continuous motion; step-flash is a gradient bloom); `prefers-reduced-motion` cuts trail counts; full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel, osc stop, ctx close, `HandLandmarker.close()`, camera tracks stopped). Ref: Imogen Heap / MiMU gloves. `status: demoable`*

## `/dream/1294-indra-descent` вҖ” *fall through an infinite chord you can see: a coupled Apollonian circle-packing you play. The cycle-2 deepening of `1285-apollonian-gasket` + `1288-gasket-cathedral` вҖ” where those are packings you look at/walk, this one **rings itself back at you**. Circles are a signed curvature (bend b=Вұ1/r) + a complex centre; each child is placed by the **Descartes Circle Theorem** (bвӮ„=bвӮҒ+bвӮӮ+bвӮғВұ2вҲҡ(bвӮҒbвӮӮ+bвӮӮbвӮғ+bвӮғbвӮҒ)) + its complex companion, inscribed into a curvilinear-triangular gap so it is tangent to **exactly** the three circles that bounded the gap вҖ” the **tangency graph is therefore built exactly and incrementally**, no geometric search (a headless self-check confirms every child is tangent to its recorded neighbours to ~machine precision and the adjacency is symmetric). **Two never-before-in-the-lab subsystems:** (1) **tangency-graph resonance** вҖ” tap a circle and `bfsCascade` walks the graph breadth-first (hopвҶ’delay ~115 ms, amplitude Г—0.62/hop, capped 5 hops + a branch cap so it stays musical), so one tap unfolds a self-similar just-intonation arpeggio cascading down the packing while a **vermilion `#e0402f` wave races the tangent edges** ahead of the sound; (2) **MГ¶bius "dive" transport** вҖ” hold to fall toward a boundary tangent cusp via a circle-preserving MГ¶bius dilation `w=aВ·z`; `packForView` streams fresh nesting into the gap you approach + `pruneOffscreen` recycles ballooned ancestors, so the descent never bottoms out (newborn circles glitter sonically as they pass). **Curvature вҶ’ pitch:** logвӮӮ(bend) quantised to a 5-limit JI scale [1,9/8,5/4,4/3,3/2,5/3,15/8] over a ~123 Hz root, so tangent neighbours are consonant and a cascade is a chord. Palette: **sumi-e ink-wash** вҖ” near-black graphite, circles as fine luminous ink strokes (`lighter` compositing on discrete arcs, never filled discs or a density field), exactly one accent (the vermilion resonance) вҖ” deliberately NOT 1285's nacre, NOT cosmic-glow. Audio: 24-voice JI pool + drone bed вҶ’ void reverb вҶ’ limiter (master вүӨ0.3, fade-in). Server-safe ("use client", no top-level browser globals, all behind the Begin gate); no strobe (newborns ease in ~0.7 s, the ripple is a smooth travelling highlight); `prefers-reduced-motion` coarsens the packing + slows the dive; full teardown on unmount. Refs: Descartes 1643 / Soddy "The Kiss Precise" (Nature 1936) / MumfordвҖ“SeriesвҖ“Wright *Indra's Pearls* (2002) / KlГјver form-constants. `status: demoable`*
