## `/dream/1291-rijke-flame` вҖ” *play a **singing flame**. A **Rijke tube** is a real thermoacoustic instrument: a vertical open-ended pipe with a heat source inside; when the heat sits in the lower half вҖ” where **Rayleigh's criterion** is met (heat added where acoustic pressure is rising drives the standing wave) вҖ” the pipe spontaneously breaks into a loud fundamental, and moving the heat to the upper half silences it. Modeled as a genuine limit-cycle: a signed Rayleigh gain curve `sin(2ПҖh)` (fundamental) + `sin(4ПҖh)` (second mode) drives an onset-swell/decay integrator, so amplitude depends smoothly on heat position and the player finds the sweet spot (peak at hвүҲВј, a pure-octave pocket near hвүҲ0.62) by ear and hand. **Played:** drag the glowing gauze up/down for timbre + onset, drag the tube's top cap for pitch (just-intonation lengthвҶ’pitch); a live HUD shows Hz / drive / zone; idle 3s and the flame drifts to the sweet spot and slowly sweeps length so it plays itself. Audio is pure Web Audio: fundamental + 2f/3f/4f harmonic stack + a breath-noise band (loud at onset, fades to pure) + sub/ember rumble through a drive-opening body lowpass. Visuals (Canvas2D): brushed-copper rails + open-end rings on charcoal, a pressure standing-wave glow whose lobes track the live amplitude, flame tongues flickering harder with drive, rising heat-shimmer вҖ” deliberately copper/ember, NOT cosmic-glow, NOT parchment. Server-renders cleanly (no top-level `window`/`AudioContext`), honours `prefers-reduced-motion`, all luminance modulation gated through `_shared/psych/safeFlicker` at вүӨ3 Hz (no strobe). Refs: P.L. Rijke, "singing tube" (1859); Lord Rayleigh's criterion (1878). `status: demoable`*

## (Cycle 702 вҖ” **psychedelic** **DEEP** вҖ” one massively-bigger concept, the top-rung deepening of last cycle's just-shipped winner: take `1285-apollonian-gasket`'s flat 2D Descartes circle-packing and escalate it into a **first-person NAVIGABLE 3D Soddy sphere-packing "cathedral"** you walk *inside*, spatialised in HRTF. Alternation 697 W вҶ’ 698 D вҶ’ 699 W вҶ’ 700 D вҶ’ 701 W вҶ’ **702 D** (DEEP due). This one move cashes THREE standing JURY 2026-07-07 notes at once вҖ” **#3** (*"reach a top rung вҖҰ deliberately deepen ONE winner across a full second cycle"*), **#1** (*"force a third surface вҖ” a room you're inside, a spatial-audio field, a genuine 3D-navigable space that isn't a single object"*), **#4** (*"make the next altered-states piece hand-PLAYED, palette that isn't cosmic-glow"*). Three folder-isolated builders on the SAME 3D-packing concept via different technical approaches: `1288-gasket-cathedral` (three.js instanced real spheres, first-person WASD+pointer-lock+gyro walk-through, HRTF per strike), `1289-kleinian-descent` (WebGL2 raymarched sphere-inversion KIFS *descent*), `1290-soddy-conductor` (three.js orbit + `Raycaster` pick вҖ” conduct the packing). **Curated WINNER = `1288-gasket-cathedral`** вҖ” all three cleared the floor (#1+#3+#2) and share the concept, so the call turned on which best answers this DEEP cycle's thesis (jury #1's "a room you're inside, a spatial-audio field вҖҰ not a single object"): **1288 IS literally that** вҖ” a first-person navigable cathedral whose HRTF `AudioListener` is tied to your moving head вҖ” and it's **0Г— in the last-10** (a navigable spatial-audio room, not a shader-field, not a single object). `1290` is superb but is a 3D object-you-orbit-and-strike (closer to the lab's existing 1226/1280 orbit-and-ring groove); `1289` self-flagged that it risks reading as the still-live-banned "full-screen shader-field you stare at." Non-winners banked to IDEAS В§702 with full specs: **вӯҗвӯҗ `1290-soddy-conductor`** (the phone-first reliable sibling вҖ” 460 bells, ray-pick + auto-arpeggio; resurrect as the mobile-review default or graft its `Raycaster` tap-to-ring into 1288) + **вӯҗ `1289-kleinian-descent`** (the true infinite-regress descent; resurrect when the shader-field window clears). Both backed up to scratchpad then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule. Winner's packing verified numerically: **479 bells, worst tangency residual ~1.8e-15, SoddyвҖ“Gosset seed residual ~1.8e-15, 5 levels deep.** вҡ  **Build note:** `npm run build` fails locally on `EMFILE: too many open files` during Next's prerender step вҖ” an environmental fd-ceiling artifact (box cap 4096 vs ~650 routes), NOT a code defect: `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` (full lint + typecheck + compile) passes **EXIT 0**, and 1288 is a guarded `"use client"` component, so Vercel's normal-limit builder deploys it fine (see STATE В§702 / MORNING open questions). `state: fractal-regress / infinite-nesting cathedral В· pole: cosmic-ambient (walking the nave).` **Ambition (winner) 4/5: #1 grep-0Г— 3D-Soddy-sphere-packing + navigable-room + #3 named refs (Soddy 1936 *The Kiss Precise* / SoddyвҖ“Gosset / LagariasвҖ“MallowsвҖ“Wilks 2002 / MumfordвҖ“SeriesвҖ“Wright *Indra's Pearls*) + #2-of-floor вүҘ3 subsystems + #4 multi-cycle Gasket-Cathedral thread** вҖ” details in STATE В§702.)

### `/dream/1288-gasket-cathedral` вҖ” *walk **inside** the Apollonian gasket. The top-rung 3D deepening of `1285` вҖ” where 1285 is a flat tap-to-densify gasket you look at, this is a first-person room you move through. A **3D Soddy / Apollonian sphere packing** (seed = four unit spheres at a regular-tetrahedron's vertices, mutually tangent inside their bounding shell, satisfying the **SoddyвҖ“Gosset theorem** `(ОЈbбөў)ВІ=3В·ОЈbбөўВІ` to ~1e-15) recurses by **reflection** (LagariasвҖ“MallowsвҖ“Wilks: the second tangent sphere is the conjugate of the omitted one; `b'=ОЈbвҲ’b_omit`, `c'=(ОЈbcвҲ’b_omitВ·c_omit)/b'`), filling every curvilinear-tetrahedron gap with an ever-smaller inscribed bell вҖ” ~480 bells, 5 levels, worst tangency residual ~1.8e-15 (console + HUD self-check). Rendered as real three.js instanced spheres. **Curvature вҶ’ pitch:** big nave-spanning shells (small bend) sound low, tiny deep bells (large bend) high, quantised to a 5-limit **just-intonation pentatonic** `[1,9/8,5/4,3/2,5/3]` so every strike harmonises; a low root+fifth `_shared/psych` drone bed keeps it resting on a chord. **Spatialised (the point):** each struck bell is a Web Audio **`PannerNode` (HRTF)** at its 3D world position, and the **`AudioListener`** is driven every frame by the first-person camera, so a bell above-left is heard above-left. **Played:** pointer-lock + WASD (+ Q/E/Space up/down, Shift sprint) to walk and click bells under the reticle; drag-to-look + tap fallback with no pointer-lock; **gyro** tilts your head + glides you forward on phones; passing *through* a bell rings it; idle ~2s and the camera auto-tours a Lissajous path through the nave, ringing bells by proximity so it plays itself. Palette: nacre / mother-of-pearl (thin-film `MeshPhysicalMaterial.iridescence` + clearcoat, pale near-white speculars) on deep slate вҖ” deliberately NOT jewel-glow-on-black; the enclosing Soddy sphere is a dark inward-facing shell = the cathedral walls. WebGL-unavailable notice; full teardown on unmount. Refs: Soddy *The Kiss Precise* (Nature 1936) / SoddyвҖ“Gosset / LagariasвҖ“MallowsвҖ“Wilks *Beyond the Descartes Circle Theorem* (2002) / MumfordвҖ“SeriesвҖ“Wright *Indra's Pearls* (2002). `status: demoable`*

## (Cycle 701 вҖ” **psychedelic** **WIDE** вҖ” three orthogonal grep-0Г— **psychedelic-mathematics** instruments, deliberately moved OFF the just-shipped quantum/earth-modal/faraday physics cluster into pure generative geometry (the antidote to the jury's perennial "the recent output is too similar"). Alternation 697 W вҶ’ 698 D вҶ’ 699 W вҶ’ 700 D вҶ’ **701 W** (WIDE due). Criterion #1 (never-used technique) had been cashed three fires running (697 swarmalator, 698 Faraday, 700 TDSE) so that axis is *paid* вҖ” yet all three of this fire's briefs STILL reach #1 (each grep-verified 0Г— in a 1284-deep lab), so the top-rung climb continues even on a diversity spread. Three folder-isolated builders on three unrelated canonical infinite-self-similarity generators (the KlГјver fractal/tunnel/lattice form-constants): `1285-apollonian-gasket` (a PLAYED **Apollonian circle-packing** via the Descartes Circle Theorem вҖ” tap a circle to sound it + grow tangent children into the gap), `1286-strange-lace` (a **Clifford/de Jong strange-attractor** lace you steer with 4 parameters), `1287-fractal-flame` (Scott Draves's **fractal-flame / IFS chaos game** you play by dragging variation weights). **Curated WINNER = `1285-apollonian-gasket`** вҖ” all three cleared the floor (#1+#3+#2) and share the theme, so the call turned on the still-live shader-field ban + the jury's gold standards (one-phone-glance legibility, surprise, REDUCING verification debt). Both `1286` and `1287` render a full-canvas `putImageData` accumulation/DENSITY field вҖ” the exact still-live-banned "shader-field you stare at" form (confirmed by grep: both call `createImageData`/`putImageData` over the whole frame). `1285` alone is a genuine **stroked line/structure drawing** (nacre rings via `lighter` compositing on discrete arcs вҖ” no full-frame fill) that cleanly escapes the ban, AND it self-evidences its payoff ON SCREEN (a packed gasket + resting JI chord on mount; tap visibly grows tangent children), cutting the jury's standing build-green-but-*unfelt* liability more than the two density fields (whose psychedelic read is the hardest to eye-verify headless). Its tangency is verified to machine epsilon (Descartes self-check, max pairwise error ~5e-16). Non-winners banked to IDEAS В§701 with full specs: **вӯҗвӯҗ `1286-strange-lace`** (steer a strange attractor's lace вҖ” resurrect when a filament-field slot is clear, or re-render as discrete stroked polylines to escape the accumulation-field form) + **вӯҗ `1287-fractal-flame`** (the canonical psychedelic algorithm вҖ” resurrect when the shader-field window clears, its restrained copper/steel LUT is a genuine attempt off the glow); both backed up to scratchpad then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule. `state: fractal-regress / infinite-nesting В· pole: intenseвҶ’hypnotic.` **Ambition (winner) 3/5: #1 grep-0Г— Apollonian/Descartes-circle-packing + #3 named refs (Descartes 1643 / Apollonius / Soddy 1936 / MumfordвҖ“SeriesвҖ“Wright *Indra's Pearls* 2002) + #2-of-floor вүҘ3 subsystems** вҖ” details in STATE В§701.)

### `/dream/1285-apollonian-gasket` вҖ” *the Apollonian gasket as a just-intonation instrument you compose by ear. Circles are stored as a signed curvature (bend b = Вұ1/r) + a complex centre; every child tangent circle is placed by the **Descartes Circle Theorem** (bвӮ„ = bвӮҒ+bвӮӮ+bвӮғ Вұ 2вҲҡ(bвӮҒbвӮӮ+bвӮӮbвӮғ+bвӮғbвӮҒ)) and its complex companion for the centre вҖ” the larger-bend solution inscribes into each curvilinear triangular gap, splitting it into three, and the packing recurses toward the infinite-nesting limit (capped by a min radius + a ~3200 count ceiling; a console self-check confirms mutual tangency to ~1e-15 and termination). On mount a handful of levels are already packed so the image + a resting root chord read at a glance. **PLAYED:** tap anywhere вҖ” the circle under your finger sounds (curvature вҶ’ pitch, quantised to a 5-limit JI pentatonic so taps harmonise; bigger rings ring lower), and its neighbouring gaps grow their next generation of tangent children, each chiming higher/quieter (a tap = a small arpeggiated chord). Drag to pan, pinch/scroll to dive toward the self-similar limit. Rendered as luminous mother-of-pearl rings (iridescent hue drifting with depth, `lighter` compositing, slow luminance breath вҖ” NO fill, NO strobe) on deep ink `#05060a`; 16-voice JI pool (soft attack / size-scaled long release) + a root+fifth `_shared/psych` drone bed вҶ’ void reverb вҶ’ limiter (вүӨ0.3, fade-in). Canvas2D-unavailable notice; `prefersReducedMotion()` coarsens the packing + steadies the drift. Refs: Descartes 1643 / Apollonius of Perga *Tangencies* / Soddy "The Kiss Precise" (Nature 1936) / MumfordвҖ“SeriesвҖ“Wright *Indra's Pearls* 2002 / KlГјver form-constants. `status: demoable`*

## (Cycle 700 вҖ” **psychedelic** **DEEP** вҖ” one massive concept, a PLAYED **time-dependent-SchrГ¶dinger quantum ripple tank** (the fresh-to-lab criterion-#1 reach banked from cycle 699), attacked via 3 different render/interaction surfaces so the curator could escape the still-live shader-field ban. Cashes **JURY 2026-07-07**'s single loudest STANDING complaint вҖ” *"criterion #1 (never-used technique) is again openly DECLINED вҖҰ reach a top rung"* вҖ” by finally SHIPPING the grep-0Г— TDSE reach that was built-but-banked last fire (697 cashed #1 with the swarmalator, 698 with Faraday, 699 built-but-banked the #1 quantum reach; 700 lands it). 696 D вҶ’ 697 W вҶ’ 698 D вҶ’ 699 W вҶ’ **700 D** (DEEP due; the top-rung move). Three folder-isolated builders on the SAME split-step-Fourier TDSE engine (128ВІ grid, hand-written zero-dep radix-2 FFT, raised-cosine absorbing border, unitary norm conservation) via three render surfaces: `1282-quantum-ripple` (a Canvas2D |ПҲ|ВІ brightness+phase-hue FIELD вҖ” the physics-reference sibling, closest to the shader-field ban), `1283-quantum-cloud` (a three.js orbitable 3D **probability point-cloud** whose height+size+phase-colour = |ПҲ|ВІ), `1284-quantum-etch` (a Canvas2D marching-squares iso-**contour line-etching** + Re(ПҲ)=0 nodal curves). **Curated WINNER = `1284-quantum-etch`** вҖ” of the two candidates that CLEAR the still-live shader-field ban (1282 IS that banned filled-field form, kept only as the physics reference), 1284 wins on (a) it is the **cleanest escape from BOTH live bans** вҖ” a copper-on-ink topographic *line-drawing*, neither a filled shader-field nor cosmic-glow-on-dark; (b) **one-glance legibility that self-evidences the payoff** вҖ” the double-slit fires on load and its interference fringes read as a clean fan of nodal contour lines ON SCREEN (a numerical probe found 9 far-side lobes), cutting the jury's standing build-green-but-*unfelt* liability more than 1283's glow-cloud (whose additive blend edges toward the cosmic-glow ban and whose 3D height-map of a 2D field is a less-legible abstraction, hardest to eye-verify headless); (c) a genuinely fresh OUTPUT form for the lab (iso-contour line-etching = 0Г— in the last-10). Non-winners banked to IDEAS В§700 with full specs: **вӯҗвӯҗ `1283-quantum-cloud`** (the orbitable 3D probability object вҖ” resurrect when the point-cloud slot is clear / push the palette off additive-glow) + **вӯҗ `1282-quantum-ripple`** (the reference |ПҲ|ВІ field with the best-verified norm, 0.00006% drift вҖ” resurrect when the shader-field window clears, or promote its split-step solver into `_shared/psych/schrodinger.ts`); both `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule. `state: geometric-hallucination / interference-lattice / quantum-scar В· pole: intense (softens toward cosmic-ambient at low drive).` **Ambition (winner) 3/5: #1 grep-0Г— TDSE split-step-Fourier + #3 named refs + #2-of-floor вүҘ3 subsystems** вҖ” details in STATE В§700.)

### `/dream/1284-quantum-etch` вҖ” *quantum probability drawn as a living copper ETCHING. The 2D time-dependent SchrГ¶dinger equation (iД§вҲӮПҲ/вҲӮt = вҲ’ВҪвҲҮВІПҲ + VПҲ, Д§=m=1) is integrated by the split-step Fourier method (FeitвҖ“FleckвҖ“Steiger 1982): half potential phase-kick вҶ’ forward FFT вҶ’ kinetic drift e^{вҲ’ikВІdt/2} in Fourier space вҶ’ inverse FFT вҶ’ half kick вҖ” every factor a pure phase, so the scheme is UNITARY and conserves вҲ‘|ПҲ|ВІ (console self-check: ~0.005% drift over 300 steps, k=0 packet). Zero-dependency hand-written radix-2 CooleyвҖ“Tukey FFT (rows-then-columns 2D); a raised-cosine mask on an ~8-cell border ring absorbs whatever reaches the edge. Each frame, hand-written marching-squares extracts ~9 log-spaced iso-levels of |ПҲ|ВІ and STROKES them as nested copperвҶ’bone topographic rings on near-black ink (no fill, no bloom, no strobe); the nodal set Re(ПҲ)=0 is stroked as a finer bright curve вҖ” those moving zero-crossing lines ARE the interference pattern, so the double-slit fringes read as a clean fan a glow-fill would smear. PLAYED: Inject/Wall/Well tools вҖ” tap to fire a momentum-aimed Gaussian packet, drag to paint the potential; 4 presets (double-slit, Bunimovich stadium вҶ’ Heller scars, well lattice, harmonic trap) + Clear. Audio: the wave's radial |k|-spectrum drives a вүӨ5-voice just-intonation partial bank (a locked scar = a stable chord, a spreading packet = a wider cluster), a pooled mallet pings on wall strikes, over the shared drone bed + void reverb вҶ’ limiter (вүӨ0.3, 2 s fade). Canvas2D fallback notice if no context. Refs: SchrГ¶dinger 1926 / Feit-Fleck-Steiger 1982 / Heller PRL 1984 (stadium scars). `status: demoable`*

## (Cycle 699 вҖ” **psychedelic** **WIDE** вҖ” three orthogonal PLAYED instruments, all cashing **JURY 2026-07-07 #4** (*"make the next altered-states piece hand-PLAYED, palette that isn't cosmic-glow"*). Criterion #1 (never-used technique) was already cashed two fires running (697 swarmalator, 698 Faraday), so this fire spreads for diversity while still reaching #1 on one brief. 695 W вҶ’ 696 D вҶ’ 697 W вҶ’ 698 D вҶ’ **699 W** (WIDE due). Three folder-isolated builders on three unrelated directions: `1279-quantum-ripple` (a Canvas2D time-dependent-SchrГ¶dinger "quantum ripple tank" вҖ” split-step Fourier, the fresh-to-lab #1 reach), `1280-earth-bell` (a three.js globe you STRIKE like a bell вҖ” the Earth's real free-oscillation normal modes), `1281-eternal-rise` (a Risset-rhythm + Shepard glissando eternal-ascent on a rotating log-spiral). **Curated WINNER = `1280-earth-bell`** вҖ” it cashes the specifically-named uncashed **jury #5** (*"the live-planet suite is sitting right there вҖҰ but the next one must be an instrument you can PERTURB, not another readout"*), it is the most one-glance-legible (a globe that visibly rings in distinct spherical-harmonic mode shapes when struck вҶ’ self-evidences its payoff ON SCREEN, cutting the jury's build-green-but-unfelt liability), and it is the cleanest diversity escape (a three.js globe-*object*, 0Г— in the last-10 вҖ” not a shader-field, not a navigable room, not a relief). The two non-winners are banked (IDEAS В§699): `1279` was the *highest-ambition* candidate (#1 fresh technique, norm-conservation numerically verified) but its Canvas2D |ПҲ|ВІ field sits closest to the still-live shader-field ban and its psychedelic read is hardest to eye-verify headless; `1281` is the freshest *register* but has the weakest floor and an entirely ear-dependent payoff unverifiable on this box. `state: cosmic-boundless / planetary-awe В· pole: cosmic-ambient.` **Ambition (winner) 3/5: #3 + #2-of-floor + jury-#5 cash** вҖ” details in STATE В§699.)

### `/dream/1280-earth-bell` вҖ” *the whole planet as a struck bell. Tap anywhere on a dark basalt globe (a "virtual great earthquake") and it rings in the Earth's real free-oscillation normal modes вҖ” 8 PREM spheroidal eigenfrequencies (вӮҖSвӮӮ the "football" вүҲ 0.309 mHz, вӮҖSвӮҖ radial "breathing", вӮҖSвӮғвҖ“вӮҖSвӮҶ, вӮҒSвӮӮ, вӮҒSвӮғ) scaled up ~6 octaves into an audible chord whose intervals ARE the true mode spectrum. The globe visibly deforms in each mode's spherical-harmonic YвӮ—бөҗ shape (icosphere, ~10k verts, normals recomputed per frame), speed set by the real ratios; strike near a mode's node and it barely rings, near an antinode it sings. Orbit-drag to look, solo/mute modes, a "swell" bed. Modal synthesis (one detuned sine per mode + sub-impact) over a planetary drone bed + a 7.5 s void reverb, through a limiter. Canvas2D meridian-cross-section fallback if WebGL fails. Distinct from `463-terra-gamelan` (a passive earthquake-data readout) вҖ” this is a PLAYED physical model of the eigenmodes you PERTURB. Refs: free oscillations of the Earth / Benioff-Press-Smith 1961 / the 1960 Valdivia M9.5. `status: demoable`*

## (Cycle 698 вҖ” **psychedelic** **DEEP** вҖ” one grep-0Г— concept, a PLAYED parametric **Faraday-wave** instrument, attacked via 3 render surfaces so the curator could escape the still-live shader-field ban. Cashes **JURY 2026-07-07**'s single loudest STANDING complaint вҖ” *"criterion #1 (never-used technique) is again openly DECLINED вҖҰ reach a top rung"* вҖ” by cashing #1 a SECOND fire running (697 cashed it with the swarmalator; this cashes it with the sibling grep-0Г— Faraday/quasicrystal engine, the banked вӯҗвӯҗ `1274-faraday` idea) вҖ” AND jury **#4** (make the next altered-states piece hand-**PLAYED**, palette that isn't cosmic-glow). 695 W вҶ’ 696 D вҶ’ 697 W вҶ’ **698 D** (DEEP due; the top-rung move). Three folder-isolated builders on the SAME parametric-Faraday amplitude-equation engine (six competing Mathieu modes, subharmonic f/2, symmetry-selection вҶ’ stripe/square/hex/12-fold quasicrystal = KlГјver form-constants): `1276-faraday-pool` (a WebGL oil-on-water fluid surface вҖ” the physics-reference sibling, with the most principled angle-dependent mode coupling), `1277-faraday-sand` (a Canvas2D **cymatic sand plate** вҖ” thousands of grains migrate to the nodal lines and DRAW the figure), `1278-faraday-relief` (a **three.js displaced-relief metallic membrane** at a raking angle). **Curated WINNER = `1278-faraday-relief`** вҖ” 1276 IS the still-live-banned full-screen fragment-shader field (kept only as the physics reference); between the two clean escapes, 1278 wins on (a) **correctness of the payoff**: it guarantees the four symmetries stay visually distinct by integrating amplitudes on the symmetric manifold, where 1277's uniform cross-coupling c=1.3 lets a *held* hexagon/quasicrystal slowly rot toward stripes (a real, un-eye-verifiable-on-headless risk that breaks its own "four figures" thesis), and (b) **surprise + diversity**: a tactile liquid-metal RELIEF (real displaced geometry, speculars sliding along the ridges) dodges the shader-field ban via genuine 3D and is a fresher one-glance surface than a 3rd Canvas2D particle piece. Non-winners banked to IDEAS В§698 with full specs: **вӯҗвӯҗ `1276-faraday-pool`** (the best physics engine вҖ” angle-dependent coupling; resurrect when the shader-field window clears, or promote its coupling model) + **вӯҗ `1277-faraday-sand`** (the most legible "cymatics photograph" read; resurrect with the co-selected-coupling fix so hex/quasi don't drift); both `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule. **ambition 3/5** (#1 grep-0Г— parametric-Faraday technique [prior cymatics 19/165/970/1095 drive eigenmodes directly at the audio frequency; none is parametric/subharmonic with quasicrystal symmetry selection] В· #3 named refs Faraday 1831 / Chladni 1787 / Edwards & Fauve 1994 / Christiansen-AlstrГёm-Levinsen 1992 12-fold quasipattern / KlГјverвҖ“Bressloff-Cowan form-constants В· #2-of-floor вүҘ3 subsystems: parametric mode-competition ODE + three.js displaced-mesh renderer + drive-freqвҶ’chord mapper + subharmonic f/2 voice + `_shared/psych` bed; #5 weak вҖ” В§698 Faraday dive, physics foundational-stable not <30-day). Validated via the isolation-build path (`вң“ Compiled successfully 44s В· вң“ 66/66 static В· /dream/1278-faraday-relief в—Ӣ prerender В· 192 kB / 298 kB`), all 651 held folders restored, zero tracked deletions. Ships `1278-faraday-relief` вҖ” **a vibrating fluid membrane you play as tactile 3D liquid-metal relief: drag to drive it and watch real displaced geometry rise into stripes вҶ’ squares вҶ’ hexagons вҶ’ a 12-fold quasicrystal (the same geometry your visual cortex hallucinates), each symmetry answering at the subharmonic f/2 with its own chord.** state: geometric-hallucination / form-constant В· pole: intense (locks into shimmering lattices), softens toward cosmic-ambient at low drive В· **[`/dream/1278-faraday-relief`](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1278-faraday-relief)** В· status: demoable В· [design notes](../../src/app/dream/1278-faraday-relief/README.md))

### `/dream/1278-faraday-relief` вҖ” *a played parametric-Faraday instrument rendered as real 3D relief. A slow-envelope amplitude model evolves six competing standing-wave modes (Mathieu oscillators sharing one wavenumber at 0/30/60/90/120/150В°, cubic self- and cross-saturation, dA_j/dt = A_j(Пғ_j вҲ’ A_jВІ вҲ’ cВ·ОЈ A_mВІ)); the drive amplitude Оө gates growth (below Оө_c the surface goes flat and near-silent), the drive frequency f sets both the wavenumber and вҖ” via the mode weights вҖ” the selected symmetry: 1 mode вҶ’ stripes, 2 orthogonal вҶ’ squares, 3 at 60В° вҶ’ hexagons, all 6 вҶ’ a 12-fold quasicrystal. The height field h(x,y)=ОЈ A_jВ·cos(k(xВ·cosОё_j+yВ·sinОё_j)+ПҶ_j) is displaced into a 160Г—160 subdivided three.js mesh with normals recomputed each frame, lit by a dark mercury/petrol environment and two drifting warm-copper/cold-cyan lights at a 30В° raking angle so specular glints slide along the ridges as they lock. You PLAY it: drag horizontally = drive frequency (symmetry + ripple scale), vertically = drive amplitude, tap = drop a ripple that collapses and re-forms the relief, or jump with the four preset buttons. The surface answers at the subharmonic f/2 вҖ” the real Faraday signature вҖ” and the active symmetry picks the chord (bare fifth / minor / major-add9 / detuned quartal shimmer); surface energy opens a lowpass so the sound brightens as the pattern locks.* `demoable` В· **psychedelic В· state: geometric-hallucination / form-constant В· pole: intense (softens toward cosmic-ambient at low drive)** В· INPUT **pointer drag-to-drive (XвҶ’f, YвҶ’Оө) + tap-to-ripple + preset buttons** (a PLAYED instrument вҖ” NOT a passive 1:1 readout [banned], NOT real-piano-sole [banned]) В· OUTPUT **three.js displaced-relief metallic membrane at a raking angle** вҖ” real 3D geometry with recomputed normals + sliding speculars; deliberately NOT a full-screen WebGL2 fragment-shader FIELD [the still-live-banned "shader you stare at" вҖ” its sibling 1276 IS that form, which is why 1276 was banked not shipped], NOT flat-Canvas2D-readout [banned], NOT a single orbited jewel-object [jury-banned], NOT a navigable-interior (last-2 form) В· TECHNIQUE **parametric-Faraday instability (subharmonic f/2, Mathieu-tongue growth, cubic mode-competition symmetry selection) вҖ” grep-0Г— in the lab** (prior cymatics/plate pieces drive eigenmodes directly at the audio frequency; this is the first parametric/subharmonic one, and its emergent stripeвҶ’squareвҶ’hexвҶ’12-fold-quasicrystal symmetries ARE the KlГјver visual-cortex form-constants, so one physics engine is simultaneously a fluid instrument AND a psychedelic-geometry engine) В· PALETTE **liquid-metal / mercury / petrol / copper on near-black `#05070a`** вҖ” a physical tactile relief catching a moving highlight; deliberately NOT cosmic-glow-on-dark jewel [still-live-banned], NOT warm-paper [banned] В· **named refs** Michael Faraday 1831, *On the forms and states assumed by fluids in contact with vibrating elastic surfaces* + Ernst Chladni 1787 + P. B. Edwards & S. Fauve 1994, *Patterns and quasi-patterns in the Faraday experiment* + Christiansen, AlstrГёm & Levinsen 1992 (12-fold quasipattern) + KlГјver / BressloffвҖ“Cowan form-constants В· **ambition 3/5** (#1 grep-0Г— parametric-Faraday technique В· #3 five named refs В· #2-of-floor вүҘ3 subsystems вҖ” #5 weak В§698 dive) В· **diversity:** `banned=[full-screen WebGL2 shader-field OUTPUT (4Г— вҶ’ hard off, also still-live JURY ban) В· three.js navigable-interior OUTPUT (2Г—) В· DOM/ASCII surface (2Г—) В· Canvas2D-particle OUTPUT (2Г—) В· warm-paper PALETTE В· jewel/cosmic-glow-on-dark PALETTE В· real-piano-sole INPUT В· passive-sonification TECHNIQUE]` В· `picked=[drag-drive + tap-perturb PLAYED INPUT В· three.js displaced-relief-membrane OUTPUT (real geometry, dodges the shader-field ban вҖ” a relief-surface-instrument, not a navigable room, not a shader field) В· parametric-Faraday + quasicrystal-symmetry-selection TECHNIQUE (grep-0Г—) В· liquid-metal/petrol PALETTE (neither cosmic-glow nor warm-paper)]` вҖ” clears every banned tag. **SAFETY (photosensitive epilepsy):** no strobe вҖ” all luminance change is slow/continuous (highlights slide, they don't flash); `prefersReducedMotion()` coarsens the mesh (96Г—96) + gentles the motion. Audio gesture-gated ("Begin"), master вүӨ0.32 + 2 s ramp + DynamicsCompressor limiter, full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel, osc stop, ctx close, three.js geometry/material/renderer dispose). WebGL-unavailable shows a `text-rose-300` notice + a shaded Canvas2D heightmap fallback of the same sim (never blank); visuals start on mount before Begin. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (fully client вҖ” pointer + three.js + Web Audio; no mic, no network, no writes, zero new npm deps). **Validation:** subagent folder `eslint` clean + `tsc --noEmit` = 0. Authoritative full `npm run build` = whole-app TS + full ESLint + production compile PASS (zero from the dream zone) to "Collecting page data", then the standing container **EMFILE** fd-4096 ceiling at the font-manifest (infra, downstream of every code check; Vercel uncapped). **Isolation build** (winner-only among prototypes, 66 routes) вҶ’ **`вң“ Compiled successfully in 44s вҶ’ вң“ Generating static pages (66/66) вҶ’ /dream/1278-faraday-relief в—Ӣ static prerender, 192 kB / 298 kB First Load`**; all 651 held folders restored, `git status` = only `1278-faraday-relief/` untracked + `docs/dreams/**`, zero tracked deletions. **Compile + lint + type + static-generation + code-read verified; NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless box, no GPU/display/speakers) вҖ” whether the relief *reads* as tactile liquid metal, whether the four symmetries are clearly distinct on a real GPU, and whether the f/2 chords land want Karel's browser. The curated WINNER of cycle 698's DEEP fire. Honest gaps + cycle-2 (banked): replace the on-the-symmetric-manifold integration with true physics-driven pattern selection (adopt 1276's angle-dependent coupling so the symmetry emerges from the dynamics, not from forced weights); add two-frequency forcing for super-lattice / oscillon patterns; drive it with mic onset so an acoustic instrument re-forms the relief. ## (Cycle 697 вҖ” **psychedelic** **WIDE** вҖ” three orthogonal PLAYED instruments, each cashing a different UNCASHED **JURY 2026-07-07** note; the fire finally cashes the jury's single most-repeated complaint вҖ” *"criterion #1 (never-used technique) is again openly DECLINED вҖҰ reach a top rung."* Two of the three briefs are grep-verified **0Г—** techniques (swarmalator, Faraday-wave); the third cashes **#2** (playable real piano). 695 W вҶ’ 696 D вҶ’ **697 W** (WIDE due; directly attacks "too similar"). Non-winners banked to IDEAS В§697 with full specs: **вӯҗвӯҗ `1274-faraday`** (near-ready to ship as the "psychedelic-geometry" sibling вҖ” its README + Faraday-1831/Edwards-Fauve/Chen-ViГұals refs are written) + **вӯҗ `1275-duet`** (resurrect once the real-audio path is verified in Karel's browser); both `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule. **ambition 3/5** (#1 grep-0Г— swarmalator technique В· #5 В§697 research <14 days [Physics Reports 2026 review + arXiv 2605.11713 May-2026] В· #2-of-floor вүҘ3 subsystems: swarmalator ODE integrator + Canvas2D spectral-phase-wheel renderer + 12-voice binned choir mapper + DynamicsCompressor bus вҖ” also cashes jury #6). Validated via the isolation-build path (`вң“ Compiled successfully 13.2s В· вң“ 66/66 static В· /dream/1273-swarm-choir в—Ӣ prerender В· 6.24 kB / 112 kB`), all 651 held folders restored, zero tracked deletions. Ships `1273-swarm-choir` вҖ” **a swarm of particles that are each also an oscillator phase: drag to stir the field and steer the two coupling knobs (J phaseвҶ”space, K sync) into the five swarmalator states вҖ” static sync, static async, static/splintered/active phase wave вҖ” while color = phase = pitch, so the swarm tuning itself into unison is the same event as hearing it lock into a held chord.** state: mystical-unity / emergent-order-from-chaos В· pole: cosmic-ambient (spikes at active-phase-wave) В· **[`/dream/1273-swarm-choir`](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1273-swarm-choir)** В· status: demoable В· [design notes](../../src/app/dream/1273-swarm-choir/README.md))

### `/dream/1273-swarm-choir` вҖ” *a real swarmalator instrument (not a decorative particle field). Every one of NвүҲ420 agents carries a 2D position AND an oscillator phase Оё, both evolving under the coupled O'KeeffeвҖ“HongвҖ“Strogatz ODEs (forward Euler, O(NВІ), a few substeps/frame) вҖ” so space and phase steer each other. Dots are drawn as a spectral phase-wheel (hue = Оё) on deep-slate, so synchrony is visible as color-order and space-order at once; a corner ring shows the mean-phase vector (length = coherence R). You PLAY it: drag across the field to inject an attractor (Shift/right = repulsor) and stir the swarm while mapping pointer-xвҶ’K and pointer-yвҶ’J, drag the K/J sliders directly, or tap a preset to jump near each of the five canonical states; double-tap spawns a burst. Sound: no 400-oscillator forest вҖ” the phase circle is split into 12 bins, one voice per bin, each bin's mean phase quantised to a just-intonation pentatonic (always consonant), spatial angleвҶ’stereo pan, phase-coherence RвҶ’master brightness + drone swell, spatial-coherenceвҶ’detune shimmer. Synced вҶ’ a few bins dominate вҶ’ unison/stacked chord; active phase wave вҶ’ bins cycle the circle вҶ’ a shimmering moving arpeggio. Master вүӨ0.32 through a DynamicsCompressor limiter.* `demoable` В· **psychedelic В· state: mystical-unity / emergent-order-from-chaos В· pole: cosmic-ambient (spikes at active-phase-wave)** В· INPUT **pointer-drag-to-stir + J/K coupling knobs + preset buttons + double-tap burst** (a PLAYED dynamical instrument вҖ” NOT a passive 1:1 readout [banned], NOT real-piano-sole [banned]) В· OUTPUT **Canvas2D spectral-phase-wheel particle-swarm** вҖ” a swarm of hue-coded agents on deep-slate; NOT a flat-Canvas2D-signal-readout [banned], NOT a full-screen WebGL2 shader-field [still-live-banned], NOT a navigable-room (last-2 form), NOT a DOM-grid (last-2 form) В· TECHNIQUE **swarmalator model (grep-0Г— in the lab) + binned phase-choir** вҖ” the FIRST lab piece where each particle is simultaneously a position AND a musical phase, so spatial coherence and phase synchrony are the SAME order parameter you steer В· PALETTE **spectral-phase-wheel on deep-slate `#0d1017`** вҖ” hue = phase; deliberately NOT cosmic-glow-on-dark jewel [still-live-banned], NOT warm-paper [banned] В· **named refs** K. P. O'Keeffe, H. Hong & S. H. Strogatz, "Oscillators that sync and swarm," *Nature Communications* 8, 1504 (2017) + "Interplay of sync and swarm," *Physics Reports* review (2026) + arXiv 2510.05663 / 2605.11713 В· **ambition 3/5** (#1 grep-0Г— swarmalator technique В· #5 В§697 research <14 days В· #2-of-floor вүҘ3 subsystems вҖ” also cashes the named banked-0Г— jury #6) В· **diversity:** `banned=[flat-Canvas2D-readout OUTPUT В· warm-paper PALETTE В· real-piano-sole INPUT В· passive-sonification TECHNIQUE В· still-live jewel/cosmic-glow-on-dark PALETTE В· still-live full-screen-shader-field OUTPUT]` В· `picked=[pointer-drag-stir + J/K-knob PLAYED INPUT В· Canvas2D spectral-phase-wheel particle-swarm OUTPUT (grep-0Г— swarmalator, distinct from the last-10 field/room/DOM surfaces) В· swarmalator-ODE + binned-phase-choir TECHNIQUE В· phase-wheel-on-deep-slate PALETTE]` вҖ” clears every banned tag. **SAFETY (photosensitive epilepsy):** no strobe вҖ” all luminance change is slow drift; `prefers-reduced-motion` damps the integration step + substeps. Audio gesture-gated ("Begin"), master вүӨ0.32 + 2 s ramp + DynamicsCompressor limiter, full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel, osc stop, ctx close). WebAudio-absent shows a `text-rose-300` notice, the swarm still animates (never blank). **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (fully client вҖ” pointer + Canvas2D + Web Audio; no mic, no network, no writes, zero new npm deps). **Validation:** subagent folder `tsc --noEmit` = 0 + `eslint` clean + standalone numerical sim confirmed the five states are distinct & steerable (static sync RвүҲ1.0/SвүҲ0.03; static async RвүҲ0.003; static phase wave SвүҲ0.99 no-spin; active phase wave spinвүҲ0.08вҖ“0.13 rotating). Authoritative **isolation build** (winner-only among prototypes, 66 routes) вҶ’ **`вң“ Compiled successfully in 13.2s вҶ’ вң“ Generating static pages (66/66) вҶ’ /dream/1273-swarm-choir в—Ӣ static prerender, 6.24 kB / 112 kB First Load`**; all 651 held folders restored, `git status` = only `1273-swarm-choir/` untracked + `docs/dreams/**`, zero tracked deletions. **Compile + lint + type + static-generation + code-read + sim-numerics verified; NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless box, no GPU/display/speakers) вҖ” whether the swarm *reads* as a felt choir and the five states are audibly distinct on real hardware want Karel's browser. ## (Cycle 696 вҖ” **psychedelic** **DEEP** вҖ” chasing the jury's most-repeated UNMET demand, **JURY 2026-07-07 #3** (*"Reach a top rung, for real this time вҖ” 14/15 still sit at 2вҖ“3"*) + **#2/#4** (*"make it PLAYABLE вҖ” hand/touch-played, not a passive readout"*). The one surface on STATE В§695's endorsed "still-free" list that grep-verified **0Г—** is the **spreadsheet / data-table / DOM-cell grid** вҖ” glyph-organ (695) WON on exactly this "grep-0Г— *new surface*" logic; this cycle takes the next surface on that list AND reaches higher than 3/5. **Concept: the DOM itself as a psychedelic surface вҖ” a live grid of HTML cells warped in CSS `matrix3d` into an infinite receding lattice-tunnel you PLAY.** All 3D in the lab is three.js/WebGL/raymarch; **CSS-transform-DOM-as-3D-surface is grep-0Г—.** Two DEEP builders on the SAME grep-0Г— surface via orthogonal MUSICAL models: `1271-cell-cathedral` (an autonomous GreenbergвҖ“Hastings excitable-CA organism you seed/perturb) and `1272-lattice-tracker` (a PLAYED step-sequencer tracker вҖ” columns are voices, rows are steps, a playhead sweeps and the rows fly toward it down a tunnel corridor). **Curated WINNER = `1272-lattice-tracker`** вҖ” both share the grep-0Г— surface, so **played-ness + technique-novelty decided it**: 1272 is the unambiguous *instrument* (you COMPOSE by typing into cells) that cashes the jury's most-repeated unmet demand (#2 "make it PLAYABLE" + #4 "played, not a screensaver"), its tracker-in-a-tunnel interaction is genuinely novel-to-lab, and the literal spreadsheet framing (columns=voices/rows=steps) makes the fresh surface land harder вҖ” whereas 1271's excitable-CA engine is lab-prior (reaction-diffusion 6Г—; excitable media was the banked-not-shipped 1269) and its pacemaker-driven autonomy flirts with the exact "screensaver you poke" liability the jury polices. Non-winner `1271-cell-cathedral` banked to IDEAS В§696 as the **вӯҗ TOP resurrect** (the stronger pure-transport / cosmic-ambient piece вҖ” a breathing machine-organism on the same DOM-tunnel engine; resurrect as an alternate "mode" or a particle-slot ship), `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule. **ambition 4/5** (#1 grep-0Г— Г—2: spreadsheet/DOM-grid as a primary AV OUTPUT surface + CSS `matrix3d` warp of live DOM cells as the 3D render method [lab 3D is all three.js/WebGL] В· #2 вүҘ5 subsystems: DOM-grid renderer + CSS-3D tunnel camera + playhead step-sequencer + 16-voice JI synth pool + drone bed + procedural convolution reverb В· #3 named refs KlГјver form-constants (lattice/tunnel) / ProTrackerвҖ“Renoise tracker lineage / "DOOM in CSS 3D Transforms" 2026 / Smol Sequencer 2026 / Partch harmonic lattice В· #4 explicit multi-cycle commitment [cycle-2 = lattice transposition + effect columns; cycle-3 polish] вҖ” #5 В§696 dive). Validated: winner-only `npm run build` вҶ’ **Compiled вң“ + Linting/types вң“** (zero warnings/errors from the 1272 folder; all warnings pre-existing in `src/lib/**`), `page.js` artifact вң“ (38 KB), `tsc --noEmit | grep 1272` = 0; the exit=1 is the standing container **EMFILE** at "Collecting page data" (~4096-fd ceiling on ~650 pages вҖ” infra, not code; Vercel uncapped). ### `/dream/1272-lattice-tracker` вҖ” *a played step-sequencer that is also a tunnel corridor. The instrument is a real DOM grid вҖ” 8 voice-columns Г— 16 step-rows of live `<div>` cells, not pixels on a canvas вҖ” transformed with CSS `perspective` + `rotateX(52В°)` so the rows fall away toward a vanishing point. You compose by clicking a cell to cycle its just-intonation degree (1вҶ’7вҶ’rest) or focusing it and typing a digit 0вҖ“7 (tracker-keyboard flow: arrows to move, Backspace to clear); it seeds a gentle consonant arpeggio so it plays the instant you press Play, and everything is editable live. A playhead sweeps the steps from the AudioContext clock; each row is transformed every frame by its signed-wrapped distance from the playhead, so future rows recede up the tilt, the struck row lands at the camera and glows, and past rows recycle invisibly at a fog boundary вҖ” an infinite corridor from only 16 DOM rows. Static glowing rails (column boundaries) are the lattice walls; the flying rows are the rungs; fired cells pop with translateZ + scale + bloom. Audio: each column is pinned to a pure harmonic of a 55 Hz root (Г—1, 3/2, 2, 3, 4, 6, 8, 12), each cell degree multiplies a JI ratio, so every pitch is a rational ratio of one root вҖ” the whole grid is one consonant harmonic lattice through a 16-voice reused pool, a 3-oscillator drone bed, a procedural ConvolverNode and a master DynamicsCompressor. Cosmic-ambient by default (40вҖ“132 bpm live tempo, soft attacks, long releases); push the tempo and it drives.* `demoable` В· **psychedelic В· state: geometric form-constant (lattice вҶ’ tunnel) В· `#b7ff4a` readouts) вҖ” deliberately NOT cosmic-glow-on-dark [still-live-banned], NOT warm-paper [banned], and steered OFF glyph-organ's just-shipped phosphor-cyan-on-indigo В· **named refs** KlГјver ### `/dream/1267-dream-growth` вҖ” *a first-person navigable dream-architecture that GROWS around your playing (the cycle-2 morphogenetic deepening of 1264-dream-cathedral). You start on near-empty bone-tiled ground with a sparse ring of orientation pillars and WALK it (WASD/arrows + pointer-lock mouselook, weightless dream pace with inertia + head-bob; drag-to-look fallback). Aim the crosshair and click (or Space) to STRIKE the ground or a grown surface: it rings a physical-model modal tone placed in 3D by its own HRTF PannerNode at that world point, tuned to just-intonation A-Dorian (a real mode, not a no-wrong-notes pentatonic) вҖ” AND it ACCRETES new geometry: a pillar rises, an arch spans to its nearest neighbour, a chime hangs, each easing in (never a pop) as a real playable resonator. The growth is shaped by HOW you play вҖ” pitch/degree maps to element type + height, tempo/density maps to clustered-vs-spread placement, and a decaying histogram of your degrees biases the tuning of new elements toward your emerging mode вҖ” so play sparse low notes вҶ’ a cavernous colonnade; play dense high notes вҶ’ a thicket of chimes. Old growth persists (capped InstancedMesh pools, farthest-first eviction) so you can walk back through earlier structure and replay your own history. Minute 1 is near-empty ground; minute 5 is a cathedral of your making.* `demoable` В· **psychedelic В· state: hypnagogia / dream-architecture-with-memory В· pole: cosmic-ambient (spikes gently when struck)** В· INPUT **first-person keyboard (WASD/arrows) + pointer-lock mouselook + click/Space-to-strike** (drag-to-look fallback) вҖ” a genuine navigable-interior INPUT (adult-work 1Г— = only 1264); NOT flat-Canvas2D-readout [banned], NOT pointer/orbit-an-object [jury-banned], NOT real-audio-file [banned] В· OUTPUT **three.js REAL-GEOMETRY first-person navigable interior that GROWS** вҖ” actual meshes (starter pillars + accreting InstancedMesh pillars/arches/chimes, capped 150/90/160), crawling shadow-mapped sun, flat `NoToneMapping` painterly render; deliberately NOT a full-screen fragment-shader FIELD [the still-live-banned "shader you stare at"], NOT Canvas2D [banned], NOT a single orbited object [jury-banned] В· TECHNIQUE **morphogenetic architectural accretion as MEMORY + first-person nav + HRTF spatial audio + physical-model struck resonators** вҖ” an instrument you PLAY by moving+striking whose every strike leaves a permanent, playable, tuned trace in the architecture (memory-as-geometry, minute-5 вү  minute-1); each strike synthesises a small modal bank (partials вүҲ1, 2.01, 3, 4.18, 5.43, 6.79, own exponential decays, filtered-noise mallet), routed through its own `PannerNode` (`panningModel:'HRTF'`) at the struck world coords, listener driven each frame from the walking camera В· VOICE **shared just-intonation drone bed** (`_shared/psych/droneBank`, drive spikes gently on strikes) вҶ’ **convolution reverb** (`_shared/psych/convolutionVoid` pure-wet send) вҶ’ master вүӨ0.5 вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` вҶ’ destination; gesture-gated (AudioContext on "Enter and start building") В· PALETTE **liminal-architectural** вҖ” bone/plaster white, cold fluorescent-teal ambient, long raking de Chirico shadows; neither cosmic-glow-on-dark [still-live-banned] NOR warm-paper/parchment [banned] В· **named refs** Giorgio de Chirico's metaphysical architecture + hypnagogic "impossible rooms" + morphogenesis / L-systems architectural accretion (an instrument that BUILDS itself as you play) + (research) the adaptive/differentiable Feedback-Delay-Network room-acoustics frontier (arXiv 2510.00238, 2509.15946) В· **ambition 3/5** (#4 multi-cycle deepening of 1264 В· #2 fiveвҖ“six subsystems В· #3 de Chirico + morphogenesis + FDN refs В· #5 weak В§694 researchвҶ’build chain вҖ” #1 not leaned on) В· **diversity:** `banned=[flat-Canvas2D-readout OUTPUT В· warm-paper PALETTE В· real-piano-sole INPUT В· passive-sonification TECHNIQUE В· jewel/cosmic-glow-on-dark PALETTE В· full-screen-shader-field OUTPUT (all per JURY 2026-07-07 + still-live)]` В· `picked=[first-person-nav + click-strike INPUT В· three.js real-geometry navigable-interior-that-grows OUTPUT В· HRTF-spatial + physical-model-resonator + morphogenetic-memory TECHNIQUE В· liminal-architectural (bone/teal/de-Chirico) PALETTE]` вҖ” clean escape from every banned tag; the growing real-geometry OUTPUT specifically dodges the still-live shader-field ban. Note: navigable-interior is now deliberately 2Г— (1264 + this) across 2 consecutive fires вҖ” the jury's explicitly-requested cycle-2 deepening of ONE winner, not a monoculture. **SAFETY (photosensitive epilepsy):** no strobe вҖ” no fast luminance flicker; all change is slow drift вүӘ3 Hz (crawling sun, gentle strike blooms, smooth growth ease-in); `prefersReducedMotion()` damps motion. Audio gesture-gated; WebGL-unavailable + pointer-lock-denied show readable `text-rose-300` notices (never blank); full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel, `exitPointerLock`, `audio.stop`вҶ’ctx close, `scene.dispose`вҶ’`renderer.dispose` + growth pools disposed). Perf: all-InstancedMesh, ~400 total instance cap, single modest shadow map. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (fully client вҖ” pointer-lock + WASD + Web Audio + three.js; no mic, no network, no writes, zero new npm deps). **Validation:** subagent folder `tsc --noEmit` = 0 + `eslint` clean. Authoritative **isolation build** (winner-only among prototypes, ~52 routes) вҶ’ **`вң“ Compiled successfully in 29.3s вҶ’ вң“ Generating static pages (52/52) вҶ’ /dream/1267-dream-growth в—Ӣ static prerender, 196 kB / 302 kB First Load`**; all 648 held folders restored, `git status` = only `1267-dream-growth/` untracked + `docs/dreams/**`, zero tracked deletions, nothing outside the dream zone. **Compile + lint + type + static-generation + code-read verified** (full teardown, capped InstancedMesh pools, correct typography [text-3xl title, text-base body, min-h-[44px] buttons, text-rose-300 errors], only-`_shared` cross-imports, no `route.ts`); **NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless box, no GPU/display/speakers) вҖ” whether the growth *reads* as a felt built space + performs on a real GPU + whether the tuning-bias is audible want Karel's browser. The curated WINNER of cycle 694's DEEP fire. Honest gaps + cycle-3: fold in `1265-dream-atrium`'s FDN + sympathetic-ghost bank so the grown cathedral also *rings* sympathetically, and/or `1266-dream-echo`'s from-original-position transposed replay so each grown element replays the phrase that grew it. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1267-dream-growth/README.md`

## (Cycle 693 вҖ” **psychedelic** **DEEP** вҖ” "a first-person, navigable, *PLAYED* hypnagogic dream-architecture SPACE you are INSIDE," cashing the LOUDEST 2026-07-07 jury provocation: **#1 "force a third surface you haven't touched вҖ” a *room* you're inside, a genuine 3D-navigable space that isn't a single object"** + **#2/#4 "make it PLAYED вҖ” an instrument you perturb, not a passive readout."** Grep-confirmed **first-person navigable interiors are 0Г— in adult work** (`requestPointerLock`/`movementX` hit only 1 kids file, `866-rainstick-sky`) вҶ’ a genuine lab-first technique. One concentrated concept attacked via **3 parallel builders on 3 engines** вҖ” `1264-dream-cathedral` (three.js REAL-GEOMETRY nave you walk with pointer-lock + WASD, click-to-strike), `1265-dream-corridor` (raymarched SDF interior you drift down, drag-steer + tap-strike with CPU/GPU SDF-parity hit-testing), `1266-dream-recursion` (FBO-feedback Droste mise-en-abyme, gaze-dwell-played, memory/evolution). **Curated WINNER = `1264-dream-cathedral`** вҖ” the most unambiguous, one-glance-legible cash of the jury's exact directive: a TRUE first-person walk (the grep-0Г— technique) through real geometry you actively STRIKE, each strike HRTF-spatialized to where it happened; and it dodges the *still-live* full-screen-shader-field ban by using real 3D geometry (1265 IS that banned form; 1266's gaze-dwell reads subtlest + "navigable" weakest). All three cleared the ambition floor, so diversity + legibility + deploy-risk decided it. Non-winners `1265-dream-corridor` (**вӯҗ** the cleverest trick вҖ” CPU-mirrored GLSL SDF for exact played hit-points; lost on re-camping the still-banned full-screen shader-field) + `1266-dream-recursion` (**вӯҗ** freshest concept вҖ” recursion-as-instrument + real memory/evolution + gaze-dwell; lost on weakest "navigable" read) banked to IDEAS В§693, `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule. **ambition 3/5** (#1 never-used technique [first-person pointer-lock + WASD navigable INTERIOR, grep-0Г— in adult work] В· #2 fiveвҖ“six subsystems [first-person nav controller + three.js real-geometry renderer w/ shadow-mapped crawling sun + HRTF `PannerNode`-per-strike + physical-model modal resonator bank + `_shared/psych` droneBank bed + convolutionVoid reverb] В· #3 named ref Giorgio de Chirico's metaphysical-architecture + hypnagogic "impossible rooms/endless corridors"; also #5 the В§693 acoustic-scene-field researchвҶ’build chain вҖ” #4 not claimed this fire, banked as the cycle-2 deepening). Validated via the isolation-build path (`вң“ Compiled successfully 32.5s В· вң“ 66/66 static В· /dream/1264-dream-cathedral в—Ӣ prerender В· 193 kB / 300 kB`), all 646 held folders restored, zero tracked deletions. Ships `1264-dream-cathedral` вҖ” **a de Chirico cathedral you WALK through and PLAY, striking pillars and arches that ring from exactly where you struck.** state: hypnagogia / dream-architecture В· pole: cosmic-ambient (spikes gently when struck) В· **[`/dream/1264-dream-cathedral`](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1264-dream-cathedral)** В· status: demoable В· [design notes](../../src/app/dream/1264-dream-cathedral/README.md))

### `/dream/1264-dream-cathedral` вҖ” *a first-person, navigable, PLAYED hypnagogic dream-cathedral: a real three.js scene-graph interior вҖ” a nave of plaster pillars, arches, hanging chime-slabs and inlaid floor tiles вҖ” that you WALK through in the first person (pointer-lock mouselook + WASD, slow weightless dream pace with inertia and head-bob) and play like an instrument. You are not orbiting an object; you are INSIDE it, and it never ends (bays recycle around you as an endless treadmill; a low de Chirico sun's azimuth crawls so the long shadows slowly swing вҖ” minute 3 вү  minute 1). Aim the crosshair at a pillar/arch/chime/tile and click (or Space) to STRIKE it вҖ” it blooms with teal light, throws an expanding ripple, and rings with a physical-model modal tone placed in 3D by its own HRTF PannerNode at that surface's world position, so the sound arrives from exactly where you struck. Resonators are tuned to just-intonation A-Dorian (a real mode, not a no-wrong-notes pentatonic), so walking the nave and striking several surfaces builds genuine modal harmony over a slow drone.* `demoable` В· **psychedelic В· state: hypnagogia / dream-architecture В· pole: cosmic-ambient (spikes gently when struck)** В· INPUT **first-person keyboard (WASD/arrows) + pointer-lock mouselook + click/Space-to-strike** (drag-to-look fallback if pointer-lock is blocked) вҖ” a genuine navigable-interior INPUT, grep-0Г— in adult work; NOT flat-Canvas2D-readout [banned], NOT pointer/orbit-an-object [jury-banned], NOT real-audio-file [banned] В· OUTPUT **three.js REAL-GEOMETRY first-person navigable interior** вҖ” actual meshes (pillars, capitals, arches, chime-slabs, floor tiles), shadow-mapped directional sun, flat no-tone-mapping painterly render; deliberately NOT a full-screen fragment-shader FIELD [the still-live-banned "shader you stare at"], NOT Canvas2D [banned], NOT a single 3D object you orbit [jury-banned] В· TECHNIQUE **first-person navigation + HRTF spatial audio + physical-model struck resonators** вҖ” an instrument you PLAY by moving+striking (not a passive readout [banned]); each strike synthesises a small modal bank (mildly-inharmonic partials вүҲ1, 2.01, 3, 4.18, 5.43, 6.79, each own exponential decay, filtered-noise mallet transient), routed through its own `PannerNode` (`panningModel:'HRTF'`) at the struck surface's world coords, with the Web Audio `AudioListener` driven each frame from the walking camera вҖ” the sound is *placed*, not merely panned; a browser echo of the acoustic-scene-field frontier (В§693) В· VOICE **shared just-intonation drone bed** (`_shared/psych/droneBank` вҖ” A-minor/Dorian chord whose drive spikes gently on strikes and eases back, the cosmic-ambient pole) вҶ’ **cathedral convolution reverb** (`_shared/psych/convolutionVoid` as a pure-wet send so strikes bloom into a long stone tail) вҶ’ master вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` вҶ’ destination; gesture-gated (AudioContext on "Enter the cathedral") В· PALETTE **liminal-architectural** вҖ” bone/plaster white, cold fluorescent-teal ambient, long raking de Chirico shadows; deliberately neither cosmic-glow-on-dark [still-live-banned] NOR warm-paper/parchment [banned] В· **named refs** Giorgio de Chirico's metaphysical-architecture paintings (empty arcaded plazas, cold flat light, long shadows) + the hypnagogic "impossible rooms / endless corridors" of sleep-onset + (research) the acoustic-scene-field frontier (arXiv:2601.19712, В§693) В· **ambition 3/5** (#1 never-used first-person-navigable-interior technique В· #2 fiveвҖ“six subsystems В· #3 de Chirico + hypnagogic refs В· #5 В§693 researchвҶ’build chain вҖ” #4 banked as cycle-2) В· **diversity:** `banned=[flat-Canvas2D-readout OUTPUT В· warm-paper PALETTE В· real-piano-sole INPUT В· passive-sonification TECHNIQUE В· jewel/cosmic-glow-on-dark PALETTE В· full-screen-shader-field OUTPUT (all per JURY 2026-07-07 + still-live)]` В· `picked=[first-person-nav + click-strike INPUT В· three.js real-geometry navigable-interior OUTPUT В· HRTF-spatial + physical-model-resonator + first-person-nav TECHNIQUE В· liminal-architectural (bone/teal/de-Chirico) PALETTE]` вҖ” clean escape from every banned tag; the OUTPUT specifically dodges the still-live shader-field ban by using real geometry. **SAFETY (photosensitive epilepsy):** no strobe вҖ” there is no fast luminance flicker at all; all change is slow drift well under 3 Hz (crawling sun, gentle strike blooms); `prefersReducedMotion()` (via `_shared/psych/safeFlicker`) damps head-bob, sway and chime-swing. Audio gesture-gated; WebGL-unavailable + pointer-lock-denied both show readable `text-rose-300` notices (never a blank page); full teardown on unmount (rAF, listeners, `audio.stop`, `scene.dispose`). **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (fully client вҖ” pointer-lock + WASD + Web Audio + three.js; no mic, no network, no writes, zero new npm deps). **Validation:** subagent folder `tsc --noEmit` = 0 errors + `eslint` clean + dev-server route served **200**. Authoritative **isolation build** (winner-only among prototypes, ~66 routes) вҶ’ **`вң“ Compiled successfully in 32.5s вҶ’ вң“ Generating static pages (66/66) вҶ’ /dream/1264-dream-cathedral в—Ӣ static prerender, 193 kB / 300 kB First Load`**; all 646 held folders restored, `git status` = only `1264-dream-cathedral/` untracked + `docs/dreams/**`, zero tracked deletions, nothing outside the dream zone. **Compile + lint + type + static-generation verified; NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless box, no GPU/display/speakers) вҖ” whether the walk *reads* as a felt hypnagogic space, whether HRTF placement + the treadmill colonnade perform on a real GPU, want Karel's browser. The curated WINNER of cycle 693's DEEP fire. Honest gaps (documented + banked as the cycle-2 deepening): the architecture has no *memory* yet вҖ” cycle-2 gives each struck resonator a sympathetic ringing "ghost" the reverb keeps alive and lets the room slowly re-tune around your most-played notes so the endless corridors reconfigure into a space that answers you. ## (Cycle 692 вҖ” **psychedelic** **DEEP** вҖ” "a drug-free psychedelic *JOURNEY* вҖ” one >5-minute *stateful* arc from stillness, through ego-dissolution, and softly back," cashing the loudest uncashed **JURY 2026-07-06 #2** (reach the abandoned top rungs вҖ” *"the lab has shipped ZERO >5-min stateful long-form pieces"*; stop scraping the 2вҖ“3 floor). Triple-aligned: it's also **Karel's care #4 (journey-engine alternatives)** AND the **PSYCHEDELIC clinical 5-phase arc** (onset вҶ’ come-up вҶ’ breakthrough вҶ’ plateau вҶ’ return). One massive concept attacked via **3 parallel builders on 3 different WebGL rendering approaches** вҖ” `1261-voyage` (a raymarched volumetric tunnel you fly *through*), `1262-bloom` (a log-polar KlГјver form-constant field that reorganizes across phases), `1263-emerge` (a GPU particle/point-cloud that condenses вҶ’ dissolves вҶ’ re-condenses). **Curated WINNER = `1263-emerge`**: the only candidate whose OUTPUT FORM escapes BOTH over-represented camps at once вҖ” the **Canvas2D 7Г— monoculture** (1259/1246/1244/1242/1238/1236/1234) that formed under 691 AND the **forming flat-WebGL2-shader-field 3Г—** camp (1251/1254/1257) that 691 refused to push to 4Г— (1261 raymarch IS that camp; 1262 log-polar is a flat field + log-polar is 8Г—-used) вҖ” because a volumetric ~90k-point cloud is neither; it is also the biggest **FORM-break** (a condensingвҶ’dissolving *body* = ego-dissolution, not another field/tunnel/object), the biggest surprise, and the best-engineered (Ashima curl-noise vertex advection, additive premultiplied blending, full GL teardown). All three cleared the ambition floor (вүҘ4 subsystems + genuine >5-min stateful), so diversity + surprise decided it. Non-winners `1261-voyage` (**вӯҗ** the most legible one-glance hook вҖ” flying into a tunnel of light; lost on re-camping the flat-WebGL-field the jury polices) + `1262-bloom` (**вӯҗ** the rigorous form-constant explainer; lost as the Nth log-polar field) banked to IDEAS В§692 with fold-in-to-emerge deepenings, `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule. **ambition 4/5** (#2 four subsystems [5-phase stateful arc controller w/ memory + WebGL2 point-cloud renderer + `_shared/psych` Shepard/drone/void audio bed slaved to the arc + optional `use-mic-analyser` neural-gain] В· #3 named refs Refik Anadol *DATALAND вҖ” Machine Dreams* / Memo Akten point-cloud / non-dual boundary-dissolution В· #4 explicitly multi-cycle [cycle-2 folds in the losers + alt arcs: EDM/ritual/jazz] В· #5 the today's-researchвҶ’today's-build chain [Anadol DATALAND opened 2026-06-20, <30 days вҶ’ this build] вҖ” #1 NOT claimed per the jury [grep-0Г— novelty unreachable at 1259 protos deep]). Validated via the isolation-build path (`вң“ Compiled successfully 12.6s В· вң“ 66/66 static В· /dream/1263-emerge в—Ӣ prerender В· 10.3 kB / 117 kB`), all 645 held folders restored, zero tracked deletions. Ships `1263-emerge` вҖ” **a cloud of light condenses into a self, dissolves into boundlessness, and softly re-forms.** state: full serotonergic/NDE journey (onsetвҶ’breakthroughвҶ’return) В· pole: intense-at-peak вҶ’ cosmic-ambient-return В· **[`/dream/1263-emerge`](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1263-emerge)** В· status: demoable В· [design notes](../../src/app/dream/1263-emerge/README.md))

### `/dream/1263-emerge` вҖ” *a drug-free psychedelic JOURNEY вҖ” one ~6-minute STATEFUL arc rendered as a vast cloud of ~90,000 GPU particles: sparse teal motes in a void (onset) gather and CONDENSE into a bounded luminous "body" (come-up), then the boundary DISSOLVES вҖ” the cloud expands, curl-noise turbulence rises, a center-out radial bloom fills the frame and figure/ground merge into white-gold light (peak = ego-dissolution) вҖ” drifts as a warm luminous haze (plateau), then softly RE-CONDENSES to a calm centered glow (return). One global `journey` scalar over 360s drives eased keyframe tracks for BOTH the particles and the rising Shepard audio, so minute 5 genuinely differs from minute 1 вҖ” it evolves, it does not loop. Press Begin and surrender; a phase scrubber + "Jump to the peak" let the morning reviewer leap straight to the dissolution.* `demoable` В· **psychedelic В· state: full serotonergic/NDE journey (onsetвҶ’breakthroughвҶ’return) В· pole: intense-at-peak вҶ’ cosmic-ambient-return** В· INPUT **self-running long-form** (press Begin and surrender вҖ” it runs itself for 6 min) + **optional mic "neural-gain"** (a louder room/voice deepens the dissolution вҖ” more turbulence/expansion/glow вҖ” once the boundary is soft; graceful self-running fallback if denied/absent) вҖ” NOT real-audio-file [4Г— banned], NOT pointer/orbit-an-object [jury-banned]; mic is a starved input (1Г—/10) В· OUTPUT **full-screen WebGL2 GPU particle system / point-cloud** вҖ” a volumetric drifting cloud of ~90k additive points in a single `gl.POINTS` draw + a full-screen radial-glow triangle; deliberately NOT a flat Canvas2D pattern [the 7Г— camp], NOT a flat WebGL2 fragment-shader FIELD [the forming 3Г— camp: 1251/1254/1257], NOT a 3D-single-object-you-pluck [jury-banned] В· TECHNIQUE **curl-noise flow-field particle advection with a boundary that condenses then dissolves** (self-boundary dissolution = ego-dissolution), driven by a **5-phase stateful journey arc** over >5 min вҖ” each point carries two deterministically-seeded homes (a tight "body" orb + a wide cloud), the vertex shader blends them by `u_condense`, advects with analytic 3D curl-noise (Ashima simplex, no ping-pong textures вҖ” robust/dependency-free), pushes outward on `u_expansion`, gates by `u_population`, and evolves color В· VOICE **arc-slaved generative bed** вҖ” shared `startShepard` (endless-rising ascent, intensifying to the peak вҖ” the "ascending, intensifying sound" of the breakthrough) + `startDroneBank` (filter opens with intensity) вҶ’ `createVoidReverb` (wet mix opens as the boundary dissolves) вҶ’ master 0.35 вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` limiter вҶ’ destination; gesture-gated (AudioContext on Begin); the music is the carrier вҖ” its peak placed on the visual breakthrough В· PALETTE **an evolving luminous spectrum** вҖ” deep teal/indigo motes вҶ’ warm saturated neon вҶ’ luminous white-gold at dissolution вҶ’ soft return; additive glow; neither pale-print [4Г— banned] NOR jewel-on-dark [jury-banned] В· **named refs** Refik Anadol, *DATALAND вҖ” Machine Dreams* (opened **2026-06-20**, The Grand LA вҖ” a real-time, continuously-evolving, NEVER-LOOPING point-cloud immersive field; the reference for both the point-cloud FORM and the long-form-stateful quality; only the formal quality borrowed вҖ” the field here is pure seeded curl-noise, no external/paid AI model) + Memo Akten point-cloud/latent-flow dissolution + non-dual boundary-dissolution phenomenology В· **ambition 4/5** (#2 four subsystems В· #3 named refs above В· #4 explicitly multi-cycle [cycle-2 folds in 1261/1262 + alt journey arcs] В· #5 Anadol DATALAND <30-day researchвҶ’build chain вҖ” #1 not claimed) В· **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D OUTPUT (~7Г—) В· real-audio-file INPUT (~4Г—) В· pale-print PALETTE (~4Г—) В· forming flat-WebGL2-shader-field OUTPUT (3Г—, 1251/1254/1257) В· 3D-jewel-object OUTPUT + jewel-on-dark PALETTE + physical-resonator TECHNIQUE + pointer/orbit-only INPUT (jury)]` В· `picked=[self-running-long-form INPUT (+ optional mic neural-gain) В· WebGL2 volumetric point-cloud OUTPUT (dodges BOTH the Canvas2D 7Г— AND the flat-field 3Г— camps) В· 5-phase stateful-journey-arc + curl-noise particle TECHNIQUE В· evolving-luminous-spectrum PALETTE]` вҖ” the one candidate that escapes every camp. **SAFETY (photosensitive epilepsy):** no strobe вҖ” all luminance changes smooth + slow (вүӘ3 Hz); the optional "breath" toggle routes through the shared `SafeFlicker` (default OFF, hard-capped вүӨ0.6 Hz, soft sine with a 0.78 floor), `prefers-reduced-motion` slows all motion + the flow field. Audio gesture-gated (Begin), master 0.35 behind a `DynamicsCompressor` limiter, mute + instant stop always available; a forming luminous body previews on load (never blank). Full teardown on unmount (`cancelAnimationFrame`, audio stop + context close, `WEBGL_lose_context`, all buffers/VAOs/programs deleted). DPRвүӨ1.6; 90k points hold ~60fps. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (fully client-side вҖ” self-running + optional mic + Web Audio + WebGL2; no network, no writes, zero new npm deps). **Validation:** subagent folder `tsc --noEmit | grep 1263-emerge` = empty + `next lint` folder clean. Authoritative **isolation build** (winner-only among prototypes, ~66 routes) вҶ’ **`вң“ Compiled successfully in 12.6s вҶ’ вң“ Generating static pages (66/66) вҶ’ /dream/1263-emerge в—Ӣ static prerender, 10.3 kB / 117 kB First Load`**; all 645 held folders restored, `git status` = only `1263-emerge/` untracked + `docs/dreams/**`, zero tracked deletions, nothing outside the dream zone. **Compile + lint + type + static-generation + code-read verified** (renderer reviewed: Ashima simplex + analytic curl-noise, additive premultiplied `ONE,ONE` blending, mulberry32 seeds [`Math.random` only in a comment], cached uniforms, full GL teardown; page SSR-safe [`"use client"`, all GL/audio/window in effects/handlers not module scope], correct typography [text-3xl title, text-base body, min-h-[44px] buttons, text-rose-300 GL error], DPRвүӨ1.6); **NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless box, no GPU/display/speakers) вҖ” whether the condenseвҶ’dissolveвҶ’re-condense *reads* as a felt journey + performs on a real GPU want Karel's browser (the curl-noise/arc/fallbacks are reasoned through, not GPU-run). The curated WINNER of cycle 692's DEEP fire. Honest gaps (documented + banked as deepenings): the arc is a single fixed 6-min timeline вҖ” cycle-2 could fold in `1261-voyage`'s forward-transport so the cloud also *travels*, or `1262-bloom`'s form-constant morph as the body's internal structure, and add alternate journey arcs (EDM build/drop, ritual, jazz) per Karel's care #4. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1263-emerge/README.md`

## (Cycle 691 вҖ” **psychedelic** **WIDE** вҖ” "three endogenous/cosmic altered states via three *starved* inputs," cashing **JURY 2026-07-06 #2** (reach the abandoned rungs вҖ” real-world-data sonification "about the world," the pattern of the two builds that *soared*: 1193-tremor-core), #1 (break the FORM вҖ” here a live **map** of Earth, not a field/object) and #3 (one-phone-glance legibility). Continues the PRIMARY DIRECTION (PSYCHEDELIC) on the **cosmic-ambient / endogenous** pole (INTENSE just shipped 690-lattice), and deliberately escapes the **forming full-screen-WebGL-field monoculture** (last 3 ships 1251/1254/1257 all shader fields) plus the audio-file-input (4Г—) and pale-print (~5Г—) camps. **3 parallel builders on 3 distinct states Г— 3 starved inputs:** `1258-stillness` (meditative clear-light, **camera** frame-diff, WebGL2 luminous field), `1259-auroral` (live-aurora cosmic void, **external NOAA data**, Canvas2D curtains), `1260-threshold` (hypnagogia, **touch/draw**, Canvas2D feedback buffer). **Curated WINNER = `1259-auroral`**: it's the aurora sibling of the jury-beloved `1193-tremor-core` вҖ” live real-world data, *about the world not about music*, reads in one phone glance; it breaks the FORM to a live global **map**; it escapes the WebGL-field re-camp (Canvas2D curtains) with the freshest palette (auroral greenвҶ’violet, neither jewel-on-dark nor pale-print); and it carries the lowest deploy risk on a straight-to-prod push (no shader compile, robust fetch + deterministic offline fallback, no API route). Non-winners `1258-stillness` (**вӯҗ TOP** вҖ” the inverted stillness-reward *interaction* the jury wants; lost as the 4th WebGL-field in a row + a slower hook) + `1260-threshold` (**вӯҗ** hypnagogic draw-and-teleport; lost on a lab-ancestored feedback technique + dim-until-drawn) banked to IDEAS В§691 with full specs, `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule. **ambition 3/5** (#2 four subsystems [two live NOAA fetches + geo-data fold + Canvas2D curtain render + shepard/drone/void audio bed + sparse aurora chimes] В· #3 named refs NOAA SWPC OVATION + planetary Kp / the lab's 1193-tremor-core sibling / NDE boundless-void phenomenology В· #5 the today's-researchвҶ’today's-build chain [this cycle's NOAA-OVATION live-data dive вҶ’ this build] вҖ” honest note: OVATION is a standing service, so the *freshness* is the current-minute live data, not a <30-day *ship*; leaning on #2+#3 for the floor). Validated via the isolation-build path (`вң“ Compiled successfully В· вң“ static В· /dream/1259-auroral в—Ӣ prerender В· 8.82 kB / 115 kB`), all 644 held folders restored, zero tracked deletions. ### `/dream/1259-auroral` вҖ” *Earth's LIVE auroral oval, sung back as a cosmic-ambient curtain-field. Two CORS-open NOAA SWPC feeds вҖ” the OVATION Aurora global grid (~65k cells of live aurora probability) + the planetary Kp index вҖ” are fetched client-side and folded into one live state; the northern oval becomes drifting luminous curtains whose brightness, count, violet-shift and speed scale with the real aurora happening this minute, and the brightest cells ring as sparse chimes. More active planet = more overwhelming piece. the live-real-world-data lineage of 1193-tremor-core) В· VOICE **generative cosmic-ambient bed** вҖ” shared `startDroneBank` + `startShepard(dir:+1)` вҶ’ `createVoidReverb` вҶ’ master 0.4 вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` limiter вҶ’ destination, drive tracks live aurora intensity/Kp; sparse just-intonation bell "pings" ring the brightest OVATION cells (aurora chiming); gesture-gated (AudioContext on Begin) В· PALETTE **auroral green вҶ’ teal вҶ’ violet/magenta over near-black** вҖ” a specific desaturated-luminous register, neither jewel-on-dark NOR pale-print В· **named refs** NOAA SWPC OVATION Aurora model + planetary Kp index (the live sources) + the lab's own `1193-tremor-core` (its live-real-world-data sibling) + NDE/cosmic boundless-luminous-void phenomenology В· **ambition 3/5** (#2 five subsystems В· #3 named refs above В· #5 today's-live-dataвҶ’today's-build; #1/#4 not claimed) В· **diversity:** `banned=[audio-file INPUT (4Г—) В· flat-Canvas2D-pale-print OUTPUT+PALETTE (~5Г—) В· forming full-screen-WebGL-field OUTPUT (3Г—, 1251/1254/1257) В· 3D-jewel-object OUTPUT + jewel-on-dark PALETTE + pointer/orbit-only INPUT (jury)]` В· `picked=[live-external-data INPUT (starved) В· Canvas2D auroral-curtain OUTPUT В· real-API space-weather TECHNIQUE В· auroral green-violet PALETTE]` вҖ” clean escape from every camp incl. the one this WIDE was built to break. **SAFETY (photosensitive epilepsy):** no strobe вҖ” curtains shimmer via smooth slow motion, all luminance changes вүӘ3 Hz; `prefers-reduced-motion` slows the drift; field draws on mount before audio (never blank); full teardown (`cancelAnimationFrame`, in-flight fetch aborted, audio stopped, AudioContext closed). **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (NOAA feeds are CORS-open, fetched directly client-side; no writes, no secrets, zero new npm deps). **Validation:** authoritative **isolation build** (winner-only among prototypes, ~66 routes) вҶ’ **`вң“ Compiled successfully вҶ’ вң“ Generating static pages вҶ’ /dream/1259-auroral в—Ӣ static prerender, 8.82 kB / 115 kB First Load`**; `feeds.ts` fetch uses AbortController+5s+catchвҶ’fallback, `reduceKp` handles both live shapes; page SSR-safe [`"use client"`, all fetch/audio/canvas in effects/handlers]; correct typography [text-2xl/3xl title, text-base body, min-h-[44px] buttons, text-rose-300 offline notice]; `Math.random` used only for runtime chime-timing jitter, not build determinism); **NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless box, no GPU/display/speakers) вҖ” whether the curtains *read* as the aurora + whether a quiet real Kp (~0.67 now) renders too faint (the offline KpвүҲ3 sample + real storms demo harder) want Karel's browser.
