## Cycle 690 вҖ” **psychedelic** **DEEP** вҖ” "a drug-free DMT-*Breakthrough* ascent," cashing **JURY 2026-07-06 #1** (break the FORM вҖ” a room, a map, a *living surface* вҖ” not the camped object) and #2 (reach an abandoned top rung вҖ” a genuinely new *technique*, not the model-swap the jury keeps flagging), on the **INTENSE** pole (due after 688-borealis cosmic-ambient + 689-dissolve dissociative вҖ” the DMT/LSD peak Karel named explicitly in the PRIMARY DIRECTION). One massive concept вҖ” a ~3.5-min stateful escalation through the documented breakthrough phases (bloom вҶ’ growth вҶ’ lattice saturation вҶ’ breakthrough) carried by a continuously rising Shepard bed вҖ” attacked via **3 parallel builders on 3 different rendering approaches**: `1255-breakthrough` (a 3D-ish hyperbolic-space forward-transport tunnel), `1256-hyperspace` (a BressloffвҖ“Cowan log-polar form-constant field), `1257-lattice` (a GPU Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion *living membrane*). **Curated WINNER = `1257-lattice`**: it is the one that actually *breaks the FORM* вҖ” a living, self-replicating morphogenetic membrane, not a tunnel/field/object вҖ” AND the one genuinely novel *technique* the lab has never built (a real GPU reaction-diffusion ping-pong GPGPU simulation, the jury's core "reach the top rung you keep declining"); biggest surprise (Karel's care #2), and it dodges re-camping 688-borealis's tunnel that the `1255` approach would have repeated two cycles later. Non-winners `1255-breakthrough` (**вӯҗ** the legible tunnel-flight hook; lost on *repeating the borealis tunnel form* + an honestly-fake-HВі log-polar transport, no true #1) + `1256-hyperspace` (**вӯҗ** the rigorous BressloffвҖ“Cowan form-constant escalation with the best in-app teaching notes; lost as the *Nth* log-polar field вҖ” "novelty in the model, not the form," the exact floor-scrape the jury warns against) banked to IDEAS В§690 with full specs. **ambition 3/5** (#2 four subsystems [`use-mic-analyser` neural-gain + WebGL2 GPGPU ping-pong RD sim + log-polar honeycomb display warp + shepard/drone/void audio bed + a Pearson-regime STATE machine] В· #3 named refs Turing 1952 / Gray-ScottвҖ“Pearson 1993 / the DMT-realm convergent-signatures phenomenology / KlГјver lattice constant В· #4 long-form/multi-cycle вҖ” #1 arguably reachable [GPU RD ping-pong is grep-distinct from the lab's CPU excitable-media] but claimed conservatively; #5 not claimed [honest: the dive found strong named refs + phenomenology papers but no strict-<30-day *shipped* work to anchor a researchвҶ’build chain, same call as 688]). Validated via the isolation-build path (`вң“ Compiled successfully 13.9s В· вң“ 66/66 static В· /dream/1257-lattice в—Ӣ prerender В· 10.6 kB / 113 kB`), all 643 held folders restored, zero tracked deletions. Ships `1257-lattice` вҖ” **a living realm grows itself and breaks through.** state: DMT realm / morphogenesis В· pole: intense В· **[`/dream/1257-lattice`](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1257-lattice)** В· status: demoable В· [design notes](../../src/app/dream/1257-lattice/README.md))

### `/dream/1257-lattice` вҖ” *a living "realm-membrane" GROWN in real time by a GPU reaction-diffusion field вҖ” a Gray-Scott simulation (Turing morphogenesis) runs on WebGL2 ping-pong framebuffers, and a stateful phase arc walks its feed/kill through Pearson's regimes so the pattern evolves from sparse central spots (BLOOM) вҶ’ self-replicating mitosis (GROWTH) вҶ’ a dense maze/labyrinth lattice (SATURATION) вҶ’ a coherent bright realm that holds (BREAKTHROUGH), then re-seeds and rises again; the V field is warped through log-polar honeycomb symmetry and shaded with thin-film iridescence on a luminous nacre ground, carried by an endlessly-rising Shepard tone. Make sound and the reaction feeds faster; onsets seed fresh growth.* `demoable` В· **psychedelic В· state: DMT realm / morphogenesis В· pole: intense** В· INPUT **mic (neural gain)** вҖ” Begin gesture opens the mic; overall room/voice energy raises the reaction sub-step count (louder вҶ’ faster growth) and onsets inject local seed pulses, with a graceful **internal LFO + auto-seed fallback** if the mic is denied (rose-line notice) + a "Breathe" opt-in safe-flicker toggle вҖ” a STARVED input (mic = 0Г—/10 committed; NOT real-piano-file [4Г—, rotated off], NOT pointer/orbit-an-object [jury-banned], NOT keyboard [that was 1254]) В· OUTPUT **full-screen WebGL2 GPGPU reaction-diffusion FIELD (ping-pong FBO)** вҖ” a growing living membrane; deliberately NOT a flat pale-Canvas2D printed surface [the ~5Г— camp], NOT a three.js 3D-single-object-you-pluck [jury-banned], NOT a tunnel-you-fly-through [that was 1251 two cycles back + the sibling `1255`], NOT jewel-on-dark [jury-banned] В· TECHNIQUE **GPU Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion on ping-pong framebuffers (grep-distinct lab-first вҖ” RGBA16F when `EXT_color_buffer_float` present, degrading to RGBA8 @384ВІ else; вүӨ512ВІ sim texture; 9-point Laplacian w/ toroidal wrap; 6вҖ“14 sub-steps/frame scaled by mic energy)** + a `computeArc()` Pearson-regime state machine sweeping F/K through spotsвҶ’mitosisвҶ’mazeвҶ’realm + a display pass that splices the shared `_shared/psych/logpolar` `LOGPOLAR_GLSL` for the log-polar honeycomb kaleidoscope warp + thin-film iridescence В· VOICE **rising Shepard + just-intonation drone through a void reverb** вҖ” `startShepard(dir:+1)` (endless ascent, the "ascending, intensifying sound" of the breakthrough) + `startDroneBank` вҶ’ `createVoidReverb` вҶ’ master 0.4 вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` limiter вҶ’ destination, intensifying with the arc drive + a touch of live mic energy; gesture-gated (AudioContext created on Begin) вҖ” NOT a physical-resonator-object-you-strike [jury-banned] В· PALETTE **high-key iridescent / prismatic thin-film on a luminous nacre-pearl ground** (oil-on-water spectral color, fuchsia UI accents) вҖ” neither jewel-on-dark NOR pale-print В· **named refs** Alan Turing, *The Chemical Basis of Morphogenesis* (1952) + the Gray-Scott model / John E. Pearson's *"Complex Patterns in a Simple System"* (Science 1993, the F/K regime map) + the DMT-"realm" phenomenology (*Mapping a Discrete Psychedelic Dimension: Convergent Neuronal Signatures and Phenomenology of the DMT Realm*) + KlГјver's lattice/honeycomb form constant В· **ambition 3/5** (#2 four subsystems В· #3 named refs above В· #4 long-form/multi-cycle вҖ” #1 conservatively unclaimed though GPU RD ping-pong is grep-distinct from the lab's prior CPU excitable-media; #5 not claimed, see honesty note) В· **diversity:** `banned=[pale-flat-Canvas2D-print OUTPUT+PALETTE (~4вҖ“5Г—) В· real-piano-file INPUT (4Г—) В· 3D-jewel-object-you-pluck OUTPUT + jewel-on-dark PALETTE + physical-resonator TECHNIQUE + pointer/orbit-only INPUT (all jury)]` В· `picked=[mic INPUT (0Г—/10, starved, neural-gain) В· full-screen WebGL2 GPGPU-RD FIELD OUTPUT В· GPU Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion TECHNIQUE В· high-key iridescent-prismatic PALETTE]` вҖ” clean escape from all three monocultures. **SAFETY (photosensitive epilepsy):** no strobe вҖ” the membrane evolves as smooth continuous growth вүӘ3 Hz, feed/kill ramp slowly so no full-field luminance flash on regime change, a high stable luminance floor; the only optional luminance pulse routes through the shared `createSafeFlicker({maxHz:3, defaultHz:1.2, floor:0.6})` (off by default вҖ” the "Breathe" toggle вҖ” instant `kill`); `prefers-reduced-motion` honored. Audio gesture-gated (Begin); the field simmers on load before Begin (never blank); full teardown on unmount (`cancelAnimationFrame`, all textures/FBOs/buffers/VAO/programs deleted, `WEBGL_lose_context`, audio stopped). **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (fully client-side вҖ” mic + Web Audio + WebGL2; no network, no mic upload, no writes, zero new npm deps). **Validation:** whole-app `tsc --noEmit` = 0 errors incl. this route + `eslint src/app/dream/1257-lattice/` clean (deps installed via `npm ci` this fire вҖ” earlier subagent tsc/eslint noise was a no-node_modules artifact, resolved). Authoritative **isolation build** (winner-only among prototypes, ~66 routes) вҶ’ **`вң“ Compiled successfully in 13.9s вҶ’ вң“ Generating static pages (66/66) вҶ’ /dream/1257-lattice в—Ӣ static prerender, 10.6 kB / 113 kB First Load`**; all 643 held folders restored, `git status` = only `1257-lattice/` untracked + `docs/dreams/**`, zero tracked deletions, nothing outside the dream zone. **Compile + lint + type + static-generation + code-read verified** (`sim.ts` GPGPU reviewed: correct ping-pong read/write swap, float-ext detection + RGBA8 degrade, complete-FBO checks, full GL teardown; page SSR-safe [`"use client"`, GL/audio/FBOs built in effects/handlers not module scope], mulberry32 [no `Math.random`], correct typography [text-2xl/3xl title, text-base body, text-white/85, min-h-[44px] buttons, text-rose-300 error], DPRвүӨ1.6 low-power); **NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless box, no GPU/display/speakers) вҖ” whether the reaction-diffusion *reads* as a living growing realm-membrane + performs on a real GPU want Karel's browser (the RD math + ping-pong + fallbacks are reasoned through, not GPU-executed). The curated WINNER of cycle 690's DEEP fire. Honest gaps (documented + banked as deepenings): the breakthrough "ascent" reading is subtler than a tunnel-flight (mitigated by the phase progress bar); a next-cycle deepening could fold `1256-hyperspace`'s form-constant morph *into* the RD display warp, or add `1255`'s forward-transport so the membrane also recedes. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1257-lattice/README.md`

## (Cycle 689 вҖ” **psychedelic** **WIDE** вҖ” "three altered states via three starved inputs," continuing the **PRIMARY DIRECTION** (PSYCHEDELIC, set 2026-06-28) across the *whole* spectrum in one fire: one INTENSE (`1252-chrysanthemum`, DMT/LSD melt on the mic), one COSMIC-AMBIENT (`1253-ganzfeld`, meditative Ganzfeld float on the gyro), one DISSOCIATIVE (`1254-dissolve`, the ketamine K-hole on the keyboard). Three starved inputs (mic / device-gyro / computer-keyboard вҖ” each вүӨ1Г— in the jury's last 15) chosen to escape THREE monocultures at once: the flat-pale-Canvas2D-print camp (5Г— вҖ” 1246/1244/1242/1236/1234), the now-well-served real-piano-file input (4Г— вҖ” 1251/1246/1236/1234, the JURY #3 ask fully cashed across 687+688, so it rotates OFF), and the jury's receding jewel-on-dark-3D-object. **Curated WINNER = `1254-dissolve`**: the only one whose novelty is in the *interaction/perception model itself* вҖ” a never-built-in-the-lab **audio-visual DESYNC engine** (grep-0Г—) вҖ” which directly cashes the jury's hardest standing critique (*"the novelty is in the model chosen, not in the interaction or the form"*); it also **rotates the pole to dissociative** (away from 688-borealis's cosmic-ambient), is the one genuine **playable instrument** of the three (Karel's live-performance care), serves the **"ketamine"** state Karel named explicitly, and lands a fresh **desaturated bone/steel/ash** palette register (jury #4 вҖ” "not a ninth chiaroscuro, not pale-print"). Non-winners `1253-ganzfeld` (**вӯҗ TOP resurrect** вҖ” the freshest researchвҶ’build chain of the fire [arXiv 2507.09011, July 2026] + a phone-native gyro float; lost on *repeating 688's cosmic-ambient pole* and a steady-Ganzfeld default that reads as "a slow gradient" at one glance since the payoff is inside the viewer's head) + `1252-chrysanthemum` (**вӯҗ** the legible INTENSE melt; lost as the floor-scraper of the three вҖ” its log-polar-melt technique is closest to lab-vocabulary, #2+#3 only, no #1 claim) banked to IDEAS В§689 with full specs. **ambition #1 + #2 + #5** (#1 the audio-visual desync engine, grep-0Г— В· #2 four subsystems [keyboard whole-tone synth + WebGL2 sparse-geometry-in-exp-fog void + the desync/timeScale coupler + detuned-drone/granular audio through `convolutionVoid`] В· #5 this cycle's dive: PubMed 41453872 (2026), ketamine cortical desynchronization). Validated via the isolation-build path (`вң“ Compiled successfully 16.0s В· вң“ 66/66 static В· /dream/1254-dissolve в—Ӣ prerender В· 8.35 kB / 115 kB`), all 642 held folders restored, zero tracked deletions. Ships `1254-dissolve` вҖ” **play, and watch the senses stop agreeing.** state: ketamine В· pole: dissociative В· **[`/dream/1254-dissolve`](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1254-dissolve)** В· status: demoable В· [design notes](../../src/app/dream/1254-dissolve/README.md))

### `/dream/1254-dissolve` вҖ” *the ketamine "K-hole" as a playable instrument вҖ” you play a whole-tone scale on the computer keyboard and at first each note flashes its shape exactly when you hear it, then over ~90s the AUDIO-VISUAL DESYNC ENGINE unbinds the two streams the brain normally fuses: the visual onset lags the sound, the field breathes on a detuned LFO out of phase with what you hear, a global timeScale dilates everything into slow motion, the slow luminous rhythm thins while a fine grain climbs (the literal EEG mapping), and a domain-warp shear melts the geometry into the void вҖ” a "Re-bind" (spacebar) snaps the senses back so you FEEL the difference.* `demoable` В· **psychedelic В· state: ketamine В· pole: dissociative** В· INPUT **computer keyboard** (home-row A S D F G H J K L = a 9-note whole-tone scale, deliberately unresolved; OS key-repeat ignored; the keyвҶ’note map on screen; **9 tappable pads** so it works on a phone with no physical keyboard; spacebar = Re-bind) + a **desync slider** (force the K-hole) + Re-bind / Let-it-drift вҖ” a STARVED input (keyboard/MIDI class, вүӨ1Г—/15; NOT pointer/orbit-an-object [jury-banned], NOT real-piano-file [4Г—, now rotated off], NOT mic/live-clock) В· OUTPUT **full-screen WebGL2 sparse-geometry void FIELD** вҖ” a low-poly wireframe plane receding into exponential depth-fog with per-note thin luminous rings; deliberately NOT a three.js 3D-single-object-you-pluck [jury-banned], NOT a flat pale-Canvas2D printed surface [the 5Г— camp], NOT a dense fractal melt [that's the sibling `1252`], NOT jewel-on-dark [jury-banned] В· TECHNIQUE **the audio-visual DESYNC engine (grep-0Г—, lab-first)** вҖ” two clocks: the audio stream is always immediate (low-latency, keeps it playable) while each note's *visual* representation is routed through a rising `desyncAmount` (0вҶ’1 auto over ~90s, slider-boostable, Re-bind-resettable) that adds (1) onset lag up to 1.1s, (2) phase drift вҖ” the field's breathing is `mix(audioEnvelope, detunedLFO, desync)` whose LFO rate does NOT match the audio, (3) time dilation `timeScale = 1вҲ’desyncВ·0.72` slowing the visual clock + each note's dilated age, (4) the **slow-rhythm-down / gamma-up** EEG mapping вҖ” `uSlowAmp = 1вҲ’desync` thins the slow luminous pulse while `uShimmer = desync` raises a fine spatial grain, (5) a vertex/domain-warp **shear** (body-schema melt) growing with desync as the void floor lifts and rings desaturate toward ash В· VOICE **keyboard-triggered detuned synth through a growing void** вҖ” each key = detuned triangles + a sine sub + a faint inharmonic 2-op FM shimmer, soft attack / long release / mellow lowpass, summed through the shared `createVoidReverb` (**wet opens 0.42вҶ’0.84 as desync deepens** вҖ” the space grows vast) over a hollow open-fifth `startDroneBank` bed вҶ’ master ~0.42 вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` limiter; gesture-gated (AudioContext resumes on Begin / first key) вҖ” NOT a physical-resonator-object-you-strike [jury-banned] В· PALETTE **desaturated dissociative bone / steel / ash** with a faint cold tint (`bg-[#080a0d]`, near-monochrome rings, "melting into surroundings") вҖ” neither jewel-on-dark NOR pale-print В· **named refs** NMDA-antagonist thalamocortical disconnection / sensory-gating breakdown (ketamine's mechanism вҖ” the drug disconnects thalamus from cortex so sensory binding breaks down; this piece enacts that as a literal un-binding of the audio & visual streams) + **PubMed 41453872 (2026), *Cortical Mechanisms Contributing to Ketamine-Induced Dissociation*** вҖ” EEG shows diminished theta/alpha/low-beta (slow binding rhythms) + elevated low gamma, mapped literally to `uSlowAmp` down / `uShimmer` up (this cycle's research dive) В· **ambition 3/5** (#1 the desync engine grep-0Г— В· #2 four subsystems В· #5 the PubMed 41453872 dive added this cycle вҖ” #3/#4 not separately claimed) В· **diversity:** `banned=[flat-Canvas2D-pale-print OUTPUT (5Г—) В· pale/light-ground-print PALETTE (5Г—) В· real-piano-file INPUT (4Г—, jury ask now cashed) В· three.js/WebGL-3D-single-object-you-pluck OUTPUT (jury) В· jewel-on-dark PALETTE (jury) В· physical-resonator-object TECHNIQUE (jury) В· pointer/orbit-only INPUT (jury)]` В· `picked=[computer-keyboard INPUT В· full-screen WebGL2 sparse-void FIELD OUTPUT В· audio-visual-desync-engine TECHNIQUE В· desaturated bone/steel/ash PALETTE]` вҖ” escapes all three monocultures at once. **SAFETY (photosensitive epilepsy):** no strobe вҖ” the "high-frequency shimmer" is fine-grained LOW-CONTRAST *spatial* grain (amplitude вүӨ0.05, mean вүҲ constant), `uFlicker` pinned at 1.0, no flashing luminance channel; all global luminance changes smooth over hundreds of ms (time dilation only slows things further); `prefers-reduced-motion` honored (drift + warp reduced). Audio gesture-gated (Begin / first key); full teardown on unmount (`cancelAnimationFrame`, keydown/keyup listeners removed, AudioContext stopped + closed, `WEBGL_lose_context`). **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (fully client-side вҖ” keyboard + Web Audio + WebGL2; no mic, no network, zero new npm deps). **Validation:** folder `tsc --noEmit | grep 1254` = empty + `eslint src/app/dream/1254-dissolve` exit 0. Authoritative **isolation build** (winner-only among prototypes, ~66 routes) вҶ’ **`вң“ Compiled successfully in 16.0s вҶ’ вң“ Generating static pages (66/66) вҶ’ /dream/1254-dissolve в—Ӣ static prerender, 8.35 kB / 115 kB First Load`**; all 642 held folders restored, `git status` = only `1254-dissolve/` untracked + `docs/dreams/**`, zero tracked deletions, nothing outside the dream zone. **Compile + lint + type + static-generation + code-read verified** (page SSR-safe [`"use client"`, GL/audio built in handlers not module scope], no `use*`-named helpers, seeded LCG [no `Math.random`], correct typography [text-2xl/3xl title, text-base body, text-white/85, min-h-[44px] pads/buttons, text-rose-300 error], full teardown, DPRвүӨ1.6 low-power); **NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless box, no GPU/display/speakers) вҖ” whether the desync *reads* as an uncanny un-binding (rather than mere lag) + the void shader performs on a real GPU want Karel's browser; the void draws on load, audio + the drift engage after Begin/first key. The curated WINNER of cycle 689's WIDE fire. Honest gaps (documented + banked): the desync curve's exact perceptual tuning is aesthetic (verified types/lint, not GPU-run); a next-cycle deepening could fold `1253-ganzfeld`'s co-authorship framing or add a MIDI-in path for a real keyboard. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1254-dissolve/README.md`

## (Cycle 688 вҖ” **adult / psychedelic** **DEEP** вҖ” "a >5-min single-take stateful *tunnel-to-light PASSAGE* carried by Karel's REAL piano," cashing **JURY 2026-07-06 #2** (reach the abandoned top rung вҖ” a genuine long-form stateful piece where minute 5 вү  minute 1, **0Г—/15**) and re-engaging the neglected **PRIMARY DIRECTION** (PSYCHEDELIC, cosmic-ambient pole вҖ” the drug-free NDE tunnel-to-light). One concept, three parallel builders via different technical approaches вҖ” `1249-threshold` (a scripted five-stage NDE state machine), `1250-lumen` (an Eno-style never-repeats accumulator), `1251-borealis` (a volumetric raymarched tunnel you fly *into*). **Curated WINNER = `1251-borealis`**: best realizes the PSYCHEDELIC mandate's whole point (embodied *transport* into an altered state, not a pattern on a wall) + best one-phone-glance hook ("flying into a tunnel of light") + best embodiment of the named reference (Karolina Halatek's *Terminal* is literally a walk-through light-tunnel); dodges BOTH monocultures at once вҖ” the receding jewel-on-dark-3D-object the jury banned AND the *new* pale-flat-Canvas2D-printed-surface camp the last 5 ships assembled (1246 linen / 1244 atlas / 1242 riso / 1236 parchment / 1234 pastel) вҖ” because it is a raymarched WebGL2 volumetric *field you fly through* in a warm darkвҶ’white-gold NDE palette. Non-winners `1250-lumen` (вӯҗ TOP resurrect вҖ” the purest never-repeats engine, an OrnsteinвҖ“Uhlenbeck accumulator; lost on being the weakest one-phone-glance read) + `1249-threshold` (вӯҗ the legible scripted-arc counterpart; lost on the least-novel flat-field visual) banked to IDEAS В§688 with fold-in-to-borealis deepenings. **ambition 3/5** (#2 five subsystems [real-piano loader + AnalyserNode energy analysis + `_shared/psych/logpolar` WebGL2 form-constant raymarch + long-form monotonic-depth STATE + shepard/drone/void audio bed] В· #3 named refs Karolina Halatek *Terminal* / KlГјver form constants / BressloffвҖ“Cowan / ГҚГұigo QuГӯlez volumetrics В· #4 long-form/multi-cycle commitment вҖ” #1 not claimed [the log-polar engine is shared lab infra; the fresh axis is the long-form volumetric FORM + NDE palette] В· #5 not claimed [honest: this cycle's dive found the Halatek named ref + a Feb-2026 "living visual systems" framing but no strict-<30-day *shipped* work to anchor a researchвҶ’build chain]). Validated via the isolation-build path (`вң“ Compiled successfully 12.4s В· вң“ 66/66 static В· /dream/1251-borealis в—Ӣ prerender В· 10.9 kB / 117 kB`), all 641 held folders restored, zero tracked deletions. Ships `1251-borealis` вҖ” **Karel's piano flies you into a tunnel of light.** state: NDE / tunnel-to-light В· pole: cosmic-ambient В· **[`/dream/1251-borealis`](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1251-borealis)** В· status: demoable В· [design notes](../../src/app/dream/1251-borealis/README.md))

### `/dream/1251-borealis` вҖ” *Karel's real solo-piano recording flies you bodily INTO a receding volumetric tunnel of light вҖ” a full-screen WebGL2 fragment shader raymarches ~64 steps through luminous white-gold fog, the camera translating forward every frame so the log-polar ring-walls stream past with real perceived depth, a bright axial core growing and whitening as you approach; over ~5вҖ“6 min the fog thins and the radiance widens, so minute 5 вү  minute 1.* `demoable` В· **adult / psychedelic В· state: NDE / tunnel-to-light В· pole: cosmic-ambient** В· INPUT **real-piano audio-file** (Karel's "Welcome Home" recording, read-only `GET /api/audio/549fc519-вҖҰ`, offline-piano fallback if the network is down) + Begin/Pause + a pointer *nudge* of the weightless drift + a "Pulse" safe-flicker toggle (off by default) вҖ” a STARVED, jury-wanted input (real-piano-file; NOT pointer/orbit-*an-object* [jury-banned вҖ” here the pointer only nudges a hands-free passage], NOT live-clock [1244]) В· OUTPUT **full-screen WebGL2 volumetric raymarch FIELD you fly *through*** вҖ” deliberately NOT a three.js 3D-single-object-you-pluck [jury-banned], NOT a flat pale-Canvas2D printed surface [the *new* 5Г— camp: 1246/1244/1242/1236/1234], NOT self-inking notation, NOT jewel-on-dark [jury-banned] В· TECHNIQUE **log-polar / form-constant volumetric raymarching** вҖ” the shared `_shared/psych/logpolar` `LOGPOLAR_GLSL` spliced into the frag shader; each march sample's cross-section `(x,y)` вҶ’ cortical `(log r, Оё)` via `screenToCortex`, the **tunnel form constant** `formConstant(cc, phi=0)` (KlГјver concentric rings) evaluated with the log-radius warped by depth (`c.x + p.zВ·0.55`) so rings ripple *along* the tunnel and stream toward you as the camera advances (`uZ` grows unbounded вҶ’ content depends on absolute depth вҶ’ **can never loop**); faint `honeycomb` wall texture; a `smoothstep(r)` clear throat keeps the axis open so the axial `exp(вҲ’rВІВ·tight)` core shines through; classic emission/transmittance accumulation with early `trans<0.02` termination + per-pixel hash jitter to kill slice banding + a Reinhard-ish tonemap blooming highlights to the NDE white-out (NOT a lab-first вҖ” raymarched volumetrics + the shared log-polar engine are lab-vocabulary; the fresh axes are the long-form volumetric FORM + NDE palette) В· VOICE **real piano through a cavernous void + an endless-rising Shepard + a drone pad** вҖ” `BufferSource(loop) вҶ’ createVoidReverb вҶ’ pianoGain вҶ’ AnalyserNode вҶ’ master(0.45) вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor(limiter) вҶ’ destination`, with `startShepard` (endless-rising Risset tone вҖ” the auditory analog of endless forward motion, `step(dt)` each frame) + `startDroneBank` (sustaining pad) poured into master; AnalyserNode energy (50вҖ“5000 Hz, smoothed) is the journey drive вҖ” **loud passages surge you forward** (higher speed integrated into `uZ`) and brighten/whiten the core, **quiet passages let the light settle** вҖ” NOT a physical-resonator-object-you-strike [jury-banned] В· PALETTE **luminous white-gold NDE tunnel-to-light** вҖ” warm dark amber `#1a0d06`-ish at the mouth, gold `#ffd280` fog walls, a growing white `#fffaec` core; neither pale-print NOR jewel-on-dark В· **long-form / minute-5-вү -minute-1:** `uZ` monotonic (never loops) + `uApproach` (0вҶ’~1 over ~330s, brightens+widens the core) + `uThin` (0вҶ’1 over ~360s, thins the fog/lowers absorption) + `uRingFreq` wandering on two incommensurate sines вҶ’ by minute 5 the passage is thinner, faster, whiter, more open than at the mouth В· **named refs** Karolina Halatek, *Terminal* (a walk-through cylindrical LED light-tunnel built from near-death-experience survivor testimony вҖ” "perspectives warp, shadows disappear"; this cycle's research dive) + KlГјver's four form constants / BressloffвҖ“Cowan retino-cortical log map (the reason the log-polar warp *produces* perceptual tunnels) + ГҚГұigo QuГӯlez volumetric fog/raymarch technique + Brian Eno generative long-form В· **ambition 3/5** (#2 five subsystems В· #3 named refs above В· #4 long-form/multi-cycle вҖ” #1/#5 not claimed, see honesty notes above) В· **diversity:** `banned=[flat-Canvas2D-pale-printed-surface OUTPUT (5Г—, the NEW camp) В· pale/light-ground-print PALETTE (5Г—) В· three.js/WebGL-3D-single-object-you-pluck OUTPUT (jury) В· jewel-on-dark PALETTE (jury) В· physical-resonator-object TECHNIQUE (jury) В· pointer/orbit-only INPUT (jury)]` В· `picked=[real-piano audio-file INPUT В· full-screen WebGL2 log-polar volumetric-raymarch FIELD OUTPUT В· long-form monotonic-depth tunnel TECHNIQUE В· luminous white-gold NDE PALETTE]` вҖ” the rare pick that escapes BOTH the receding jewel-3D-object monoculture AND the newly-assembled pale-flat-Canvas2D one. **SAFETY (photosensitive epilepsy):** no strobe вҖ” forward motion is smooth continuous translation вүӘ3 Hz, the core brightens over *seconds*; the only optional luminance pulse routes through the shared `createSafeFlicker({maxHz:3, defaultHz:1.2, floor:0.6})` (off by default, soft sine with a 0.6 floor вҖ” never a blackout strobe, instant `kill`); `prefers-reduced-motion` honored (flicker вҶ’ sub-perceptual drift, forward speed вҶ’ ~45%). Audio gesture-gated (Begin); before Begin the shader draws the dark resting tunnel mouth (never blank); full teardown on unmount (`cancelAnimationFrame`, audio nodes stopped + context closed, `WEBGL_lose_context`, flicker killed). **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (fully client-side; the only network is a READ of the existing `/api/audio/<id>` route with a 4.5s abort + offline fallback; no mic, no writes, zero new npm deps вҖ” Web Audio + WebGL2 only). **Validation:** folder `tsc --noEmit | grep 1251-borealis` = empty + `eslint` folder exit 0 (a false-positive ref-in-cleanup warning was fixed by capturing the stable flicker instance). Authoritative **isolation build** (winner-only among prototypes, ~66 routes) вҶ’ **`вң“ Compiled successfully in 12.4s вҶ’ вң“ Generating static pages (66/66) вҶ’ /dream/1251-borealis в—Ӣ static prerender, 10.9 kB / 117 kB First Load`**; all 641 held folders restored, `git status` = only `1251-borealis/` untracked + `docs/dreams/**`, zero tracked deletions, nothing outside the dream zone. **Compile + lint + type + static-generation + code-read verified** (page SSR-safe, GL rig created on mount so the mouth draws before Begin, full teardown, correct typography [text-2xl title / text-base body / min-h-[44px] buttons / text-rose-300 error], real-piano-first with offline fallback, DPRвүӨ1.6 low-power context, 64-step const-bounded march with early termination); **NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless box, no GPU/display/speakers) вҖ” whether the tunnel *reads* as depthful transport + the shader compiles+performs on a real GPU want Karel's browser (the shader is straightforward GLSL ES 3.00 with valid constructors + injected shared functions before use, reasoned through but not GPU-executed). The curated WINNER of cycle 688's DEEP fire. Honest gaps (documented + banked as deepenings): the passage is a continuous drift, not yet stage-gated вҖ” folding in `1249-threshold`'s five-phase NDE scripting would add a legible narrative on top of the transport; and `1250-lumen`'s OrnsteinвҖ“Uhlenbeck accumulator would make the ring-frequency / approach wander genuinely non-recurrent rather than sinusoidal. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1251-borealis/README.md`

## (Cycle 687 вҖ” **adult** **WIDE** вҖ” "three ways Karel's REAL recording becomes a non-object, non-notation FORM," cashing the loudest recurring unmet ask: **JURY 2026-07-06 #3, SHIP THE REAL PIANO** (Karel's "Welcome Home" recording drove only 1Г—/15; the love signal points here every fire) + #1 (break the FORM) + #4 (a genuinely new palette register), while deliberately dodging the emerging "real-recordingвҶ’self-inking-notation" sub-camp (1234/1236). Spawned 3 parallel builders вҖ” `1246-warp` (a woven TEXTILE), `1247-thermal` (a WEATHER chart), `1248-verdure` (a long-form GARDEN) вҖ” all real-piano, all non-object/non-notation/non-jewel, all dodging the jury's four hard bans. **Curated WINNER = `1246-warp`**: freshest + most on-theme 2026 named reference (Alva Noto Г— HOSOO *WAVE WEAVE*, this cycle's own research find вҶ’ cleanest today's-researchвҶ’today's-build chain); palette-distant from the just-shipped pale-chart `1244-dayline` (linen textile, not another pale chart вҖ” 1247 would have re-camped that); best one-phone-glance hook of the palette-distant pair ("watch your recording weave itself into cloth"). Non-winners `1247-thermal` (вӯҗвӯҗ TOP resurrect вҖ” the lab's first full NavierвҖ“Stokes weather chart; lost only on a pale-chart palette re-camp of dayline + CPU-solver perf risk) + `1248-verdure` (вӯҗ long-form stateful garden) banked to IDEAS В§687. **ambition 2вҖ“3/5** (#2 four subsystems [real-audio loader + STFT band analysis + granular/interlace weave engine + Canvas2D loom renderer] В· #3 named refs Alva NotoГ—HOSOO / Anni Albers В· #5 this cycle's *WAVE WEAVE* + arXiv fluid research dive вҖ” #1 not claimed [granular/STFT are lab-vocabulary; the fresh axes are the textile FORM + natural-dye palette]). Validated via the isolation-build path (`вң“ 66/66 static В· /dream/1246-warp в—Ӣ prerender В· 5.05 kB`), all 640 held folders restored, zero tracked deletions. Ships `1246-warp` вҖ” **Karel's piano weaves itself into cloth.** state: real-recording / about-the-music В· pole: cosmic-ambient В· **[`/dream/1246-warp`](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1246-warp)** В· status: demoable В· [design notes](../../src/app/dream/1246-warp/README.md))

### `/dream/1246-warp` вҖ” *Karel's real solo-piano recording weaves itself into a living textile вҖ” a Canvas2D loom lays one weft column per shuttle pass; 48 horizontal warp threads each hold a log-frequency band (bass low, treble high), and band energy from a real AnalyserNode sets each pick's dye, weight and weave (plain when quiet, 2/2 twill when busy), so the finished cloth is a record of the music's dynamics.* `demoable` В· **adult В· state: real-recording / about-the-music В· pole: cosmic-ambient** В· INPUT **real-piano audio-file** (Karel's "Welcome Home" recording, read-only `GET /api/audio/549fc519-вҖҰ`, offline-piano fallback if the network is down) + Begin/Pause вҖ” a STARVED input (real-piano-file, the JURY #3 SHIP-THE-REAL-PIANO ask; NOT pointer/orbit-an-object [jury-banned], NOT live-clock [that was 1244]) В· OUTPUT **Canvas2D woven-textile field** вҖ” interlacing rounded warp/weft threads with a faint sheen on unbleached linen; deliberately NOT a three.js 3D-object-you-pluck [jury-banned], NOT self-inking notation [1234/1236 sub-camp], NOT jewel-on-dark [jury-banned] В· TECHNIQUE **real-time STFT-bandвҶ’interlaced-weave** вҖ” `AnalyserNode.getFloatFrequencyData` folded into 48 log-frequency band energies per ~110ms shuttle pass; a loud band weaves a thick saturated pick, a quiet one stays near-linen; over/under interlace is plain weave when calm and tips into a **2/2 twill** (diagonal floats) when a band is busy, so dense passages grow visible texture; the fell line advances rightward, the cloth scrolls left at the edge (never blank) В· PALETTE **natural-dye textile on unbleached linen** вҖ” ground `#e9e0cf`, dyes indigo `#2b3a67` / madder red `#a8402f` / weld ochre `#c9a24b` / walnut `#5c4632`, warp ink `#3a332a`; dark-on-light UI, no neon, no glow В· **named ref** Carsten Nicolai / Alva Noto Г— HOSOO, *WAVE WEAVE / Sono Obi Landscape* (Kyoto, Nov 2025вҖ“Mar 2026 вҖ” sound made into fabric so the cloth is an analog recording of the music; this is the live, generative inverse) + Anni Albers, *On Weaving* (1965) В· **honest gaps** the loom is rotated 90В° from the brief's "vertical warp" wording (the only orientation where bass-bottom/treble-top AND fell-advances-right both hold, documented in README); the weave is a two-state plain/twill vocabulary (a full Jacquard set вҖ” satin, basket, per-thread float вҖ” would be richer); resize rebuilds/clears the cloth; NOT ear/eye-verified headless (whether the cloth *reads* as woven and the dyes *read* on-screen want Karel's browser вҖ” the bare warped loom draws on load before audio, audio engages after Begin). **[`/dream/1246-warp`](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1246-warp)** В· [design notes](../../src/app/dream/1246-warp/README.md)

## (Cycle 686 вҖ” **adult** **UNBLOCK + CONTINUE** вҖ” ship cycle-685's curated-but-blocked WIDE winner AND relieve the fd-ceiling "hard blocker" from *inside* the scope fence. Cycle 685 curated `1244-dayline` (a MAP вҖ” the loudest one-glance winner of its three non-object FORMS) but couldn't ship: `npm run build` EMFILEs at the ~640-route baseline (container `ulimit -n` = 4096, unraisable; `next.config` off-limits), and 685 declared every build cycle blocked. **The unblock:** the EMFILE fires *after* a clean compile+lint+type-check and is purely route-count-proportional, so a new route validates via (a) the full build reaching "Collecting page data" + (b) an **isolation build** вҖ” `mv` the other ~639 tracked folders aside, build the reduced ~66-route tree with no fd pressure (`вң“ 66/66 static, /dream/1244-dayline в—Ӣ prerender`), `mv` them all back (fully reversible). Vercel builds the full tree uncapped and is unaffected. Build cycles are NOT hard-blocked. This is AGENT.md Decide priority #1/#2 (unblock / continue a blocked winner > build new) + the lowest-risk debut of the new validation on a live prod push (deterministic, offline, best 06:30 glance). Real-piano [JURY #3, loudest unmet ask] banks as вӯҗ SHIP-NEXT (`1245-antiphon`). **ambition 3/5** (#2 four subsystems В· #3 named refs Anadol/Ikeda В· #5 В§685/В§686 Anadol *Dataland* research chain вҖ” #1 not claimed). Ships `1244-dayline` вҖ” **the Earth's rotation as a sequencer.** state: real-world-data / about-the-world В· pole: cosmic-ambient. **[`/dream/1244-dayline`](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1244-dayline)** В· status: demoable В· [design notes](../../src/app/dream/1244-dayline/README.md))

### `/dream/1244-dayline` вҖ” *the Earth's rotation as a music sequencer вҖ” the day/night terminator sweeps a flat printed-atlas world map, and every city it crosses at dawn or dusk rings a note; a drone tracks the sunlit landmass.* `demoable` В· **adult В· state: real-world-data / about-the-world В· pole: cosmic-ambient** В· INPUT **live-clock / time-driven** вҖ” Begin, Play/Pause, a log **time-speed** slider (real-time вҶ’ a day per ~40s), **scrub time-of-day**, and **Now** (jump to real UTC); a STARVED input (live-clock, NOT pointer/orbit-an-object [jury-banned], NOT real-piano-file [SHIP-NEXT], NOT live-external-network [fully offline]) В· OUTPUT **Canvas2D flat equirectangular printed-atlas MAP** вҖ” warm-paper landmasses on slate seas, a translucent night overlay, a luminous **amber-dawn / rose-dusk** terminator band, a subsolar sun glyph, city dots that bloom small+smooth when they ring; deliberately NOT a three.js 3D-single-object-you-pluck [jury-banned], NOT jewel-on-dark [jury-banned], NOT a 2D-full-screen abstract field В· TECHNIQUE **offline solar-astronomy self-composing sequencer** вҖ” `astro.ts` computes, with no network, solar declination Оҙ = вҲ’23.44В°В·cos(360/365В·(N+10)), subsolar longitude from fractional UTC hours, and per-city solar altitude sin(alt)=sin(lat)В·sin(Оҙ)+cos(lat)В·cos(Оҙ)В·cos(lonвҲ’subLon); a city rings when its altitude **crosses zero** (up = dawn, down = dusk), tracked per-city frame to frame, with **jump-suppression re-baselining** on scrub/Now/resume/large-speed-delta so time-jumps don't machine-gun the crossings; sunlit-landmass area (sampled over coarse continent polygons) drives a drone (NOT a lab-first technique вҖ” data-map sonification is lab-vocabulary; fresh axes are the offline-astronomy engine + the printed-atlas FORM/palette) В· VOICE **per-city bell/pluck** вҖ” pitch вҶҗ latitude (pentatonic, poleward higher), stereo pan вҶҗ longitude, brighter partials north, dawn warmer / dusk darker; short percussive attack + exp tail вҶ’ reverb вҶ’ limiter вҶ’ master ~0.2; plus a low detuned drone whose cutoff+gain track the sunlit-land fraction вҖ” NOT a physical-resonator-object-you-strike [jury-banned], NOT a drone/JI-choir-only В· PALETTE **pale printed-atlas** (warm cream `#f3ecda`, slate seas, dark-ink `#2b2a24` text, amber/rose terminator) вҖ” a print-forward escape from the ~10Г— chromatic-chiaroscuro/jewel-on-dark the jury banned; high-contrast dark ink for all UI В· **ambition 3/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [offline solar-astronomy engine В· 44-city crossing-detection sequencer В· sunlit-tracking drone + per-city bell synth В· Canvas2D map+terminator renderer] В· #3 named refs [Refik Anadol *Machine Dreams: Rainforest* / Dataland, opened 2026-06-20 В· Ryoji Ikeda *data.tron* В· classic terminator maps] В· #5 recent research [В§685/В§686 Anadol *Dataland* real-world-data-field dive] вҖ” **#1 NOT claimed**, data-map sonification is lab-prior) В· **diversity:** `banned=[three.js/WebGL-3D-single-object-you-pluck OUTPUT (jury) В· chromatic-chiaroscuro/jewel-on-dark PALETTE (jury) В· physical-resonator-object-you-excite TECHNIQUE (jury) В· pointer/orbit-only INPUT (jury)]` В· `picked=[live-clock/time-driven INPUT В· Canvas2D flat printed-atlas MAP OUTPUT В· offline-astronomy self-composing-sequencer TECHNIQUE В· pale warm-paper atlas PALETTE]` вҖ” clears every hard jury ban; answers jury #1 (break the form вҖ” a MAP) + the praised real-world-data/about-the-world lane (`1193-tremor-core`) + a fresh non-jewel palette (jury #4). **SAFETY (photosensitive epilepsy):** no strobe вҖ” the terminator sweeps as one smooth continuous drift вүӘ3 Hz, city blooms small/local/low-alpha/smooth, palette shifts over minutes; audio gesture-gated (Begin) + master ~0.2 + `DynamicsCompressor` limiter + full teardown on unmount. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (fully client-side; no mic, no network вҖ” offline astronomy вҖ” zero new npm deps; Web Audio + Canvas2D only). **Validation:** builder self-reported `tsc --noEmit | grep 1244-dayline` = empty + `eslint` folder exit 0; risk-greps clean (no `Math.random` [mulberry32], no `fetch`/network, no `use*`-named helpers). Authoritative **isolation build** (winner-only among prototypes, ~66 routes) вҶ’ **`вң“ Compiled successfully (34.2s) вҶ’ вң“ Generating static pages (66/66) вҶ’ /dream/1244-dayline в—Ӣ static prerender, 6.72 kB / 109 kB First Load`**; all 639 folders restored, `git status` = only `1244-dayline/` untracked + `docs/dreams/**`, zero tracked deletions, nothing outside the dream zone. **Compile + lint + type + static-generation + astronomy-by-inspection verified** (`astro.ts` implements the exact spec math; crossings by per-city altitude sign-change; jump-suppression confirmed by reading `page.tsx`); **NOT ear/eye-verified** (headless box, no speakers/display) вҖ” whether "hear the sun move around the Earth" *reads* aurally + the terminator/palette *reads* on-screen want Karel's browser; the map + terminator animate on load before audio unlock so it is never blank, and the time-driven route needs no mic so Karel can fully drive it. The curated WINNER of cycle 685's WIDE fire, shipped one cycle late after the fd-ceiling was relieved. Honest gaps (documented): coarse hand-authored continent polygons; astronomy omits equation-of-time + atmospheric refraction (crossing times approximate вҖ” fine for a sequencer). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1244-dayline/README.md`

## вӯҗ Prior (Cycle 684 вҖ” **adult** **DEEP** вҖ” one concept, *a machine that answers your single line with genuinely INDEPENDENT melodic voices вҖ” real counterpoint, not chords вҖ” assembling as a living score*, attacked via **3 contrapuntal engines / notation FORMS / fresh palettes**. This is the jury's explicitly-sanctioned top-rung move: **deepen a past winner** (JURY 2026-07-06 #2: *"cash criterion #4 В· deepen a past winner across a second cycle В· the mandate wants that over another fresh floor-scraper"*). The winner it deepens is the jury-praised standout **`1218-shadow`** вҖ” *"a genuinely musical intelligence rather than another object-to-pluck"* вҖ” which did **homophonic** chord-harmonization (all voices move together into block chords). The advance across all three briefs is **polyphonic INDEPENDENCE**: each added voice its own melodic line. Mode alternation 679 W вҶ’ 680 D вҶ’ 681 W вҶ’ 682 D вҶ’ 683 W вҶ’ **684 D**. **today's-research вҶ’ today's-build:** the В§684 dive re-confirmed the live-jamming/co-creative frontier (causal real-time accompaniment: LiveBand/LK-Jam/ReaLJam lineage) keeps returning to *rule-grounded voice generation a browser can run with lightweight DSP* вҖ” so the fire built three classical counterpoint engines client-side. **HONESTY:** counterpoint appears as vocabulary across the lab and FDTD/waveguide are heavily used, so ambition-floor **#1 (never-used technique) was NOT claimed** вҖ” this cashes **#4 (multi-cycle deepen of 1218) + #2 (вүҘ3 subsystems) + #3 (named refs)**. Ships `1242-stretto` вҖ” **answer your line with a real canon.** Draw a subject (or Generate one), pick a canon type, and delayed/interval-transposed/optionally-inverted/augmented imitative voices chase it, self-correcting hard strong-beat clashes to the nearest consonant scale tone вҖ” building into a stretto, all crystallizing on a scrolling **riso-duotone** (indigo + terracotta on cream) piano-roll-into-notation. A live **Consonance-fix on/off** toggle lets you *hear* the intelligence at work (raw clashes return when off). **Won the DEEP race** over `1241-parnassus` (**вӯҗ** the most beautiful вҖ” strict **species counterpoint** over a cantus firmus [Fux], a Viterbi/DP search adding 1вҖ“3 independent voices, inking on a warm **parchment manuscript** with named-interval teaching layer; banked **RESURRECT** вҖ” lost narrowly on a self-inking-parchment-manuscript form+palette that overlaps `1236-neume` shipped 4 fires ago) and `1243-strands` (**вӯҗ** the sharpest *deepening* вҖ” a **free-counterpoint beam search** that literally **inverts 1218's objective**, *maximizing* melodic independence [contrary-motion reward] while holding consonance, an independence-weight slider morphing homophonicвҶ”polyphonic, rendered as four braided ribbons on off-white [Tymoczko]; banked **RESURRECT** вҖ” lost on the ribbon-field reading less immediately as a *score* than a notation view). `1242` won on **strongest 06:30 phone-glance kinesis (notes scroll in and set into noteheads) + the demonstrable "aha" of the Consonance-fix toggle (you hear the algorithm) + the most legible named reference (Bach canon) + a fresh riso palette distinct from recent ships (not the parchment `1236` just used, not jewel-on-dark) + a runtime-verified true canon (not chords вҖ” the clean proof of the deepening claim)**. state: imitative / canonic В· pole: contemplative. **[`/dream/1242-stretto`](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1242-stretto)** В· status: demoable В· [design notes](../../src/app/dream/1242-stretto/README.md)

### `/dream/1242-stretto` вҖ” *answer your single line with a real canon вҖ” delayed, interval-transposed, optionally inverted/augmented imitative voices that self-correct to stay consonant, building into a stretto that crystallizes on a scrolling riso piano-roll-into-notation.* `demoable` В· **adult В· state: imitative / canonic В· pole: contemplative** В· INPUT **draw a subject on a pitch-lane grid (tap, with per-tap pitch preview) + Generate-a-subject + canon-type presets / interval / mode / invert / augment / consonance / voices / delay / tempo controls** вҖ” a STARVED input (draw drove 1Г—/15 per the jury; keyboard-like tap preview), NOT pointer/orbit-an-object [jury-banned], NOT a real-piano audio-file [soft-avoid, cashed 2 of last 3 fires], NOT live-external-data [1238 last fire] В· OUTPUT **2D scrolling piano-roll that crystallizes into notation (Canvas2D)** вҖ” notes approach from the right as soft ribbons on a ruled diatonic staff, snap into stemmed noteheads at the playhead, colored by voice (dux solid indigo / comes terracotta-hollow), a nudge-ring marks each consonance correction; deliberately NOT a three.js 3D-single-object-you-pluck [jury-banned], NOT jewel-on-dark [jury-banned], NOT a 2D-full-screen abstract field В· TECHNIQUE **real-time canon engine with adaptive consonance-correction** вҖ” subject stored as diatonic indices; each comes = the subject shifted in time (delay in beats) + diatonic interval of imitation (unison/4th/5th/8ve), optionally contour-inverted or value-augmented; wherever an answer lands a *hard* dissonance (semitone/tone/tritone/7th interval-class) on a strong beat vs the sounding dux, it is nudged Вұ1 then Вұ2 diatonic steps to the nearest consonance, preserving contour (runtime-verified: subject `0,2,4,3,5,4,2,0` canon-at-5th вҶ’ strong-beat clashes 1вҶ’0 with fix on, exactly one note moved one step); a Chris-Wilson look-ahead scheduler loops it in time вҖ” deepens `1218-shadow`'s homophonic harmonization into imitative polyphony (NOT a lab-first technique вҖ” counterpoint is lab-vocabulary; the fresh axes are the canon-engine + the deepening + the palette/form) В· VOICE **two synth timbre families** вҖ” bright detuned-saw dux + softer triangle comes, each with ADSR + vibrato + per-voice lowpass + shared feedback-delay reverb, master 0.24 вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` limiter, ramped from silence вҖ” NOT a physical-resonator-object-you-strike [jury-banned], NOT a drone/JI-choir, NOT granular/real-recording В· PALETTE **riso two-color duotone (indigo `#2a355c` + terracotta `#c85a34` on warm cream `#efe6d3`)** вҖ” a print-forward escape from the ~10Г— chromatic-chiaroscuro/jewel-on-dark the jury banned; high-contrast dark ink for text В· **ambition 2/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [canon transform engine В· consonance-correction search В· two-timbre Web-Audio synth + look-ahead loop scheduler В· Canvas2D scrolling-roll-into-notation renderer] В· #4 multi-cycle вҖ” a deliberate second-cycle DEEPENING of the past winner `1218-shadow` from homophony into polyphony В· #3 named refs [J.S. Bach canons вҖ” *Musical Offering* BWV 1079 / *Goldberg* BWV 988 canons at successive intervals incl. by inversion & augmentation В· Fux *Gradus ad Parnassum* for the consonance test В· Chris Wilson *A Tale of Two Clocks*] вҖ” **#1 NOT claimed**, counterpoint is lab-vocabulary) В· **diversity:** `banned=[three.js/WebGL-3D-single-object-you-pluck OUTPUT (jury) В· chromatic-chiaroscuro/jewel-on-dark PALETTE (jury) В· physical-resonator-object-you-excite TECHNIQUE (jury) В· pointer/orbit-only INPUT (jury) В· 2D-full-screen-field OUTPUT (~5Г—) В· real-piano-audio-file SOURCE (soft-avoid, cashed 2 of last 3 fires) В· live-external-data INPUT (1238 last fire)]` В· `picked=[draw-a-subject INPUT (starved) В· 2D scrolling-roll-into-notation SCORE OUTPUT (non-object form) В· real-time canon + consonance-correction TECHNIQUE (musical intelligence) В· two-timbre synth VOICE В· riso indigo/terracotta duotone PALETTE]` вҖ” clears every hard jury ban + both soft re-camps; directly answers jury provocation #1 (break the form вҖ” a scrolling score, not a 3D object) В· #2/#4 (deepen a past winner across a second cycle) В· a genuinely new palette. **SAFETY (photosensitive epilepsy):** no strobe вҖ” the roll scrolls as one smooth continuous drift вүӘ3 Hz, noteheads set with soft alpha ramps not flashes; audio gesture-gated (first Play/draw resumes the ctx) + master ramp-from-0 + limiter; full teardown on unmount. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (fully client-side; no mic, no network, no external data, zero new npm deps вҖ” Web Audio + Canvas only). **Validation:** builder self-reported `npx eslint src/app/dream/1242-stretto/` вҶ’ **exit 0** + `tsc --noEmit` folder-clean + runtime-verified the canon math; authoritative winner-only `npm run build` вҶ’ **compile + full ESLint + type-check PASS**, every warning pre-existing `src/lib/**`, **ZERO from `1242-stretto`** (isolated `npx eslint` folder re-run = exit 0; build-log grep `Failed to compile`/`Type error`/`Module not found` = NONE), winner `.next/server/app/dream/1242-stretto/page.js` **compiled вң“ (43 KB)**; static-gen blocked only by the standing container `EMFILE` 4096-fd ceiling (`next-font-manifest.json`, infra not code, identical every cycle since ~472, Vercel deploys uncapped). **Compile + lint + type + canon-logic-by-runtime verified** (builder ran the engine: comes = exact time-shifted diatonic transposition of the dux, correction drives strong-beat clashes to 0 by moving one note one step); **NOT ear/eye-verified** (headless box, no speakers/display) вҖ” whether the imitation *reads* aurally as a canon + whether the crystallization *reads* on-screen want Karel's browser; the empty-staff + static-canon-preview drawn on mount + Generate-a-subject default guarantee it is never blank/silent, and the draw/press-play route needs no mic so Karel can fully drive it. Winner of a DEEP 3-approach fire; banks `1241-parnassus` (вӯҗ RESURRECT) + `1243-strands` (вӯҗ RESURRECT) as IDEAS В§684. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1242-stretto/README.md`

## вӯҗ Prior (Cycle 683 вҖ” **adult** **WIDE** вҖ” three orthogonal non-object FORMS raced in parallel to answer **JURY 2026-07-06**'s "break the form" ban-cluster (3D-object-you-pluck / jewel-on-dark / resonator-object / pointer-only all hard-banned). Mode alternation 679 W вҶ’ 680 D вҶ’ 681 W вҶ’ 682 D вҶ’ **683 W**. **today's-research вҶ’ today's-build:** В§683 dive вҖ” **live space-weather sonification** is a current (<30-day) 2026 lane at solar maximum (*Helioradar AV* streaming NOAA SWPC telemetry; a CME arrived **30 June 2026**) вҶ’ the hook "the live solar wind as a self-inking paper observatory logbook + a drone tuned by speed/density/Bz/Kp." Ships **`1238-heliograph`** вҖ” **the actual solar wind, right now, composing a cosmic-ambient drone and inking itself onto a vellum magnetogram.** Client-side NOAA SWPC fetch (plasma + magnetometer + Kp) вҶ’ three inking pen-traces (speed / Bz / Kp) on a cream-vellum strip-chart with iron-gall ink + a single emerald aurora band that greens only when Bz turns southward; a Web-Audio drone (6 harmonic partials Г— 2 detuned osc + aurora shimmer + feedback delay) maps speedвҶ’pitch/breath, densityвҶ’partials, Bz-southвҶ’beating+shimmer, KpвҶ’brightness/tail/agitation; a **QUIET/UNSETTLED/STORM** state readout. **Mandatory offline fallback:** a deterministic ~1-day series building through a CME-like storm + an honest emerald "live" / amber "offline" badge вҖ” never dead-screens, never silent. FORM: a self-inking **observatory logbook** вҖ” the lab's real-world-data-sonification lane (jury standout `1193-tremor-core`) pointed at the **sky** instead of the crust. **ambition 3/5** (four subsystems + named refs [NOAA SWPC / Kp / Bz-coupling / heliograph] + a <30-day research finding). **Won the WIDE race** over `1239-antiphon` (**вӯҗ** a written musical **conversation** вҖ” type a line, it's sung back [lettersвҶ’Dorian degrees, punctuationвҶ’cadence/question/breath], then the instrument **answers** with a mirror-inverted contour + motific quotation in a darker voice, accumulating as a riso-duotone indigo/terracotta call-and-response transcript on parchment; banked **RESURRECT** вҖ” the conversation form + text input, both starved) and `1240-cavern` (**вӯҗ** **draw** the shape of a room, then **hear** it вҖ” freehand walls вҶ’ Sabine RT60 + axial room-modes вҶ’ a Schroeder feedback-comb reverb + high-Q modal bank excited by a wandering source pinging on reflections; charcoal-on-ochre cave palette; banked **RESURRECT** вҖ” draw input + room form, both starved). state: cosmic-ambient / the-Sun's-weather В· pole: cosmic-ambient. **[`/dream/1238-heliograph`](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1238-heliograph)** В· status: demoable В· [design notes](../../src/app/dream/1238-heliograph/README.md)
## Cycle 682 вҖ” **adult** **DEEP** вҖ” one concept, *Karel's real piano recording writes its own score as it plays*, attacked via **3 notation FORMS / transcription engines / palettes** вҖ” the fire cashes **JURY 2026-07-06**'s "break the form В· ship the real piano В· genuinely new palette" and STATE В§681's recommendation to cash the вӯҗ-banked `1233-plainsong`. Mode alternation 678 D вҶ’ 679 W вҶ’ 680 D вҶ’ 681 W вҶ’ **682 D**. **today's-research вҶ’ today's-build:** В§682 dive re-grounds the transcription frontier with a *fresh 2026* source вҖ” full-page pianoform **Optical Music Recognition** (arXiv 2405.12105 вҶ’ IJDAR 2026) joining the streaming symbol-level line (2503.01362 / 2505.05078, F1 > 0.97); the field has moved to **live, note-by-note score generation** вҶ’ the hook "a page that transcribes Karel's real piano into self-inking notation as it plays." Ships `1236-neume` вҖ” **the recording notating itself as medieval plainchant on an illuminated antiphonary page.** Offline pre-analysis (hand-rolled radix-2 FFT вҶ’ spectral-flux onset peak-picking вҶ’ **YIN** pitch, octave-slip-folded, median-voted) groups notes into **neume figures by contour** (punctum / pes / clivis / torculus / porrectus / climacus) and inks them in sync onto a wrapping **four-line rubric-red stave** with an illuminated gilt drop-cap, a gilt pen-tip playhead, and a hand-drawn **parchment/vellum** ground вҖ” a rare warm-paper illuminated register, NOT jewel-on-dark. It transcribes *contour* not exact rhythm вҖ” historically apt (neumes encode contour) AND forgiving of the pitch/onset slips any browser detector makes on a real polyphonic recording. **Won the DEEP race** over `1235-plainsong` (**вӯҗ** the recording engraved as a precise **Western grand-staff** manuscript вҖ” SVG, clinical-white paper, carmine playhead, treble/bass split + ledger lines + sharps + note-values; **verified 14/14 exact pitch matches on the fallback**, the most rigorous of the three; banked **RESURRECT** вҖ” lost only on lower surprise [grand-staff is the *expected* transcription output] + real-input fragility [an exact wrong notehead reads "broken" when YIN slips on a polyphonic recording]) and `1237-scroll` (**вӯҗ** the recording as an unrolling **risograph** piano-roll where each onset stamps a wet ink-blue stroke that over ~1s **crystallizes/sets** into a crisp warm-red notehead snapped to its pitch lane вҖ” the boldest single motion idea; banked **RESURRECT**; lost on being the closest of the three to a scrolling timeline/field). `1236` won on **boldest new idiom / most surprise (an illuminated antiphonary that writes itself вҖ” the furthest escape from the jewel-on-dark rut) + robustness on the REAL recording (contour-only neumes degrade gracefully where exact placement reads broken) + a deliberate "Liturgy" lineage with last night's `1234-almanac` (the canonical hours вҶ’ the chant sung in them; form/palette/technique all differ, so a lineage not a monoculture) + strongest 06:30 phone glance**. **HONESTY:** pitch detection is lab-prior (many prototypes use autocorrelation/pitch) so ambition-floor **#1 was NOT claimed** вҖ” the freshness is the transcription-to-historical-notation FORM + the parchment palette + finally cashing the real recording as a *score* (not another granular re-layering вҖ” that was 1234). Named refs: **Guido d'Arezzo / Western neumatic (square/Gregorian) notation** В· **YIN** (de CheveignГ© & Kawahara, *JASA* 2002). Banks `1235-plainsong` (вӯҗ RESURRECT) + `1237-scroll` (вӯҗ RESURRECT) as IDEAS В§682.)

### `/dream/1236-neume` вҖ” *Karel's real piano recording notating itself as medieval plainchant вҖ” onset + YIN pitch detection inking square neumes onto a four-line rubric-red stave, an illuminated antiphonary writing itself as it plays.* `demoable` В· **adult В· state: contemplative / self-writing chant В· pole: cosmic-ambient (a quiet page inking itself)** В· INPUT **audio-file (Karel's real recording) вҖ” press "Play the recording", play/pause + seek scrubber** (a STARVED input per the jury вҖ” real-piano audio-file drove only 1Г—/15; NOT pointer/orbit-an-object [jury-banned], NOT passive [it responds to transport]) В· OUTPUT **2D self-inking illuminated MANUSCRIPT PAGE (Canvas2D)** вҖ” a wrapping four-line **rubric-red** Gregorian stave with a stylised C-clef, square neumes + diamond climacus ligatures inking in time, an illuminated gilt **drop-cap** opening the chant, a slim gilt pen-tip playhead, auto-scroll following the pen, and a **parchment/vellum** ground (radial glow + faint fibre noise + vignette, all hand-drawn вҖ” no external images); deliberately NOT a three.js 3D-single-object-you-pluck (jury-banned), NOT jewel-on-dark (jury-banned), NOT a 2D-full-screen abstract field В· TECHNIQUE **offline transcription вҶ’ contour neume layout** вҖ” the whole decoded buffer is pre-analysed once (deterministic, robust vs realtime jitter): **onsets** via spectral flux over a hand-rolled radix-2 FFT, adaptive-local-mean threshold + min inter-onset interval; **pitch** via **YIN** (cumulative-mean-normalised difference + parabolic interpolation, on a few post-onset frames, median-voted, gross octave slips folded toward the running pitch); each pitch вҶ’ a diatonic white-key staff step; consecutive notes grouped into **neume figures by the sign of successive pitch steps** (punctum / pes / clivis / torculus / porrectus / climacus); then revealed against the tracked `BufferSource` playhead so each neume appears the instant its onset sounds (NOT a lab-first technique вҖ” pitch detection is prior art; the fresh axes are the transcription-to-historical-notation FORM + the palette + real-recording-as-score) В· VOICE **Karel's actual piano, played back audibly** (the sound IS his recording; the page transcribes what you hear) вҖ” NOT a synth voice, NOT a drone/JI-choir (jury-banned), NOT a physical-resonator-object-you-strike (jury-banned) В· PALETTE parchment/vellum + sepia-brown ink + rubric-red staves + single gilt accent (a rare warm-paper illuminated register вҖ” a deliberate escape from the ~10Г— chromatic-chiaroscuro/jewel-on-dark the jury banned; high-contrast dark/sepia ink for text) В· **ambition 3/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [real-audio fetch/decode + offline fallback В· spectral-flux onset detection В· YIN monophonic pitch В· contourвҶ’neume Canvas2D illuminated-manuscript renderer] В· #3 named refs [Guido d'Arezzo / neumatic square notation В· YIN, de CheveignГ© & Kawahara JASA 2002] В· #5 recent research [RESEARCH В§681 dive #1 streaming piano transcription, added yesterday, re-grounded В§682 with 2026 full-page OMR] вҖ” **#1 NOT claimed**, pitch detection is lab-prior) В· **diversity:** `banned=[three.js/WebGL-3D-single-object-you-pluck OUTPUT (jury) В· chromatic-chiaroscuro/jewel-on-dark PALETTE (jury) В· physical-resonator-object-you-excite TECHNIQUE (jury) В· pointer/orbit-only INPUT (jury) В· 2D-full-screen-field OUTPUT (~5Г—) В· granular-of-real-recording SOURCE (1234 last night, soft-avoid)]` В· `picked=[audio-file press-play + transport INPUT (starved) В· 2D self-inking chant MANUSCRIPT PAGE OUTPUT В· onset+YIN вҶ’ neume/contour notation TECHNIQUE В· Karel's-real-piano-as-transcription-source SOURCE В· parchment/vellum + gilt PALETTE]` вҖ” clears every hard jury ban; directly answers jury provocations #1 (break the form вҖ” a chant page) В· #3 (ship the real piano) В· #4 (genuinely new palette). **SAFETY (photosensitive epilepsy):** no strobe вҖ” the page inks slowly note-by-note, the pen-tip drifts, the parchment is static; audio is gesture-gated (Play resumes the ctx) and is Karel's own recording; no full-frame flashes. **Uses Karel's real recording** `549fc519-вҖҰ` read-only via the existing public GET `/api/audio/[id]` (+ mandatory offline fallback вҖ” a ~12s modal phrase rendered offline if unavailable; status badge "Karel's piano" / "fallback tone"); **no new API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client otherwise; no mic, no network side-effects, zero new npm deps вҖ” Web Audio + Canvas only). **Validation:** builder self-reported `npx eslint src/app/dream/1236-neume/` вҶ’ **exit 0** + `tsc --noEmit` folder-clean; authoritative winner-only `npm run build` вҶ’ **compile + full ESLint + type-check PASS**, ZERO warnings from `1236-neume` (isolated `npx eslint` folder = exit 0; build-log grep for `Failed to compile`/`Type error`/`Module not found` = NONE), winner `.next/server/app/dream/1236-neume/page.js` **compiled вң“**. **Compile + lint + type + pipeline-by-inspection verified** (offline transcription вҶ’ contour neumes вҶ’ playhead-synced reveal by construction; builder ran the engine on the fallback вҶ’ a legible chant of pes/climacus/clivis); **NOT ear/eye-verified** (headless box, no speakers/display) вҖ” whether the neume grouping *reads* on the real polyphonic recording + whether the recording decodes over the proxy want Karel's browser; the offline fallback + empty-stave-on-mount guarantee it is never blank/silent, and the press-play route needs no mic so Karel can fully drive it. ## вӯҗ Prior (Cycle 681 вҖ” **adult** **WIDE** вҖ” *three ways Karel's real piano recording becomes a non-object FORM* (map / page / almanac-clock), all with fresh non-jewel palettes вҖ” the fire built to answer **JURY 2026-07-06** head-on (which banned the "glowing-3D-object-you-pluck" form monoculture + the jewel-on-dark palette, and shouted *break the form В· reach the abandoned top rungs (zero >5-min long-form pieces exist) В· ship the real piano (`1162-loom-of-hours` never shipped, cash it) В· use a genuinely new palette*). Mode alternation 677 W вҶ’ 678 D вҶ’ 679 W вҶ’ 680 D вҶ’ **681 W**. **today's-research вҶ’ today's-build:** В§681 dive #2 = granular time-stretch "1-sec clip вҶ’ hour-long drone" is a mature 2026 lane вҶ’ the hook "the short recording as a grain corpus stretched across a slow day of canonical hours." Ships `1234-almanac` вҖ” **the lab's first true >5-minute stateful long-form piece, and the resurrection of the long-standing вӯҗ `1162-loom-of-hours`.** Karel's short ~12s recording is treated as a **grain corpus** (not looped): a granular read-head crawls it at 0.10вҖ“0.26Г— while an arc state machine walks a slow **day** through eight **canonical hours** (Matins вҶ’ Compline, ~6 min/day) вҖ” density, transposition, register, layering and brightness all evolve continuously so the texture at minute 5 is unmistakably not the texture at minute 1, with deterministic per-day drift so it can run indefinitely and never hard-repeats. The FORM is a **high-key pastel dawnвҶ’dusk day-dial page** (travelling sun, named hours, drifting almanac caption), NOT a jewel object or dark field. **Won the WIDE race** over `1233-plainsong` (**вӯҗ** a blank page that listens to Karel's piano and notates it live вҖ” spectral-flux onset + **YIN** pitch вҶ’ a self-inking grand-staff manuscript on clinical-white paper; the highest ambition of the fire at 3/5 + the cleanest researchвҶ’build chain [В§681 dive #1, streaming piano transcription]; banked **RESURRECT** вҖ” lost only because a self-writing score doesn't cash the long-form top-rung gap the jury shouted about) and `1232-atlas` (**вӯҗ** Karel's recording as a **cartographic contour MAP** you walk through вҖ” short-time FFT вҶ’ spectral heightfield вҶ’ marching-squares coastlines/peaks, granular-scrub the real audio wherever you stand, elevationвҶ’brightness; **RISOGRAPH** ink-blue+warm-red on cream вҖ” the boldest palette/form escape of the fire; banked, ambition 2/5). `1234` won on **landing the jury's two loudest UNMET provocations at once** вҖ” #2 (the abandoned top rung: a genuine >5-min stateful long-form, of which the lab had shipped **zero**) **+** #3's tail (it IS the never-shipped `1162` resurrection) вҖ” while also being a **journey-engine alternative** (a ritual/canonical-hours arc, Karel's directive #4) with the strongest self-playing 06:30 glance. **HONESTY:** granular time-stretch is lab-prior (`227-paths-granular` etc.) so ambition-floor **#1 was NOT claimed** вҖ” the freshness is the long-form canonical-hours arc + the pastel almanac form + finally using the real recording as a day-long corpus. Named refs: the **canonical hours / Liturgy of the Hours** В· **Curtis Roads, *Microsound* (2001)**. Banks `1233-plainsong` (вӯҗ RESURRECT) + `1232-atlas` (вӯҗ RESURRECT) as IDEAS В§681.)

### `/dream/1234-almanac` вҖ” *Karel's short piano recording, stretched into a slow almanac of eight canonical hours вҖ” a >5-minute self-evolving day that is genuinely different at minute 5 than minute 1, watched on a pastel dawnвҶ’dusk day-dial.* `demoable` В· **adult В· state: contemplative / canonical-hours long-form В· pole: cosmic-ambient (a slow evolving day)** В· INPUT **time-driven вҖ” press "Begin the day" and it runs itself; gentle optional control (drag the sun on the dial to seek any hour; a lightenвҶ”deepen slider biases register/brightness/density live) вҖ” NOT pointer/orbit-an-object (jury-banned), NOT passive (it self-plays but responds)** В· OUTPUT **2D almanac / clock-dial PAGE (Canvas2D + HTML text)** вҖ” a turning day-dial with eight canonical hours around a ring, a sun/moon travelling it, a progress arc, a drifting cloud of grain-motes (count tracks granular density, brightness tracks live level), the current hour named in serif at centre + a drifting almanac caption; a high-key **pastel dawnвҶ’dusk gradient** (lavender-grey night вҶ’ cream/peach dawn вҶ’ pale noon blue вҶ’ dusty-rose vespers) that shifts with the hour вҖ” deliberately NOT a three.js 3D-single-object-you-pluck (jury-banned), NOT jewel-on-dark (jury-banned), NOT a 2D-full-screen abstract field В· TECHNIQUE **granular time-stretch of the real recording + a long-form arc state machine** вҖ” `GranularEngine` treats the ~12s recording as a grain corpus: a read-head **crawls** it at 0.10вҖ“0.26Г— (well under real-time) spraying short (11вҖ“320 ms) raised-cosine-windowed grains, each panned + transposed to a consonant scale offset within the current hour's register/spread, with a generated convolution reverb and NO loop point (re-enters at a fresh random offset at buffer-end); `ArcController` holds continuous `elapsed` memory and walks eight canonical hours (~46 s each), smoothstep-interpolating density/grainDur/spread/register/layers/readRate/brightness/gain between each hour's targets, ringing a soft chime at each crossing, and applying a small deterministic per-day **drift** so day 2 varies day 1 and it never loops identically (NOT a lab-first technique вҖ” granular is prior art; the fresh axes are the long-form canonical-hours arc + the pastel almanac form + the real-recording-as-day-corpus) В· VOICE **granular re-layering of Karel's actual piano** (the sound IS his recording, time-stretched and re-voiced, never synthesized-from-scratch and never looped) вҖ” NOT a drone/JI-choir (jury-banned), NOT a physical-resonator-object-you-strike (jury-banned) В· PALETTE high-key pastel dawnвҶ’dusk (a deliberate escape from the ~10Г— chromatic-chiaroscuro/jewel-on-dark the jury banned; dark-slate ink for text contrast on the pale grounds) В· **ambition 3/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [granular time-stretch engine В· long-form arc state machine w/ memory + per-day drift В· Canvas2D almanac/day-dial renderer В· real-audio fetch/decode + offline fallback] В· #3 named refs [canonical hours / Liturgy of the Hours В· Curtis Roads *Microsound* 2001] В· #4 multi-cycle/long-form вҖ” the lab's first true >5-min stateful evolving piece + resurrects the multi-cycle-standing вӯҗ `1162-loom-of-hours` вҖ” **#1 NOT claimed**, granular is lab-prior) В· **diversity:** `banned=[three.js/WebGL-3D-single-object-you-pluck OUTPUT (jury) В· chromatic-chiaroscuro/jewel-on-dark PALETTE (jury) В· physical-resonator-object-you-excite TECHNIQUE (jury) В· pointer/orbit-only INPUT (jury) В· 2D-full-screen-field OUTPUT (~5Г—) В· JI-choir/drone VOICE]` В· `picked=[time-driven press-play-then-runs + gentle-seek INPUT В· 2D almanac/clock-dial PAGE OUTPUT В· granular-time-stretch + long-form-arc TECHNIQUE В· Karel's-real-piano-grain-corpus SOURCE В· high-key-pastel-dawnвҶ’dusk PALETTE]` вҖ” clears every hard jury ban; directly answers all four jury provocations (break the form вң“ В· top-rung long-form вң“ В· ship the real piano вң“ В· fresh pastel palette вң“). **SAFETY (photosensitive epilepsy):** no strobe вҖ” all change is slow luminance drift (the gradient shifts over minutes, the dial turns over ~6 min, grains fade on raised-cosine envelopes); audio gesture-gated (Begin resumes the ctx) + master gain ramps from 0 + reverb + grain-envelope smoothing; no full-frame flashes. **Uses Karel's real recording** `549fc519-вҖҰ` read-only via the existing public GET `/api/audio/[id]` route (+ mandatory offline fallback if unavailable вҖ” status badge emerald "Karel's piano" / amber "fallback tone"); **NOT ear-verified** (headless box, no speakers) вҖ” whether the granular texture *reads* aurally + whether the real recording decodes over the proxy want Karel's hardware; the offline fallback + self-playing arc guarantee it is never blank/silent, and the press-play route needs no mic so Karel can fully drive it. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1234-almanac/README.md` вҖ” one concept (*a self-composing excitable medium: a living tissue that organizes itself over 5+ minutes, the ARC being the composition*) attacked via **3 different excitable models / surfaces / voices** вҖ” ships the most distinctive. Mode alternation 676 D вҶ’ 677 W вҶ’ 678 D вҶ’ 679 W вҶ’ **680 D**. This fire finally cashes the **starved long-form / stateful lane** (jury + AGENT + the banked `1219`/`1214` have flagged it for weeks) with a piece that is audibly and visibly *different at minute 5 than minute 1*. **today's-research вҶ’ today's-build:** В§680 dive #2 = low-latency neural physical-modeling (BRAVE arXiv 2503.11562) keeps returning to *physically-inspired excitable/dynamical models* as the controllable substrate вҶ’ the hook "a self-organizing excitable medium as a long-form instrument." Ships `1231-cardium` вҖ” **let a heart-like sheet of tissue compose itself for five minutes.** A FitzHughвҖ“Nagumo (Barkley reduction) excitable medium lives on a 2562-vertex geodesic **icosphere**; a graph-Laplacian sweeps depolarization **waves across the closed 3D surface**, and an internal ~320 s clock varies refractoriness so the tissue self-organizes through **calm heartbeat вҶ’ a seeded reentrant rotor wrapping the globe вҶ’ fibrillation-like multi-wavelet chaos вҶ’ self-termination вҶ’ re-seed with fresh orientation (never loops identically)**. Three fixed "listening regions" turn each passing wavefront into a **rhythmic pulse** вҖ” a low resonant thud + a period-tracking shimmer вҖ” whose **tempo IS the composition** (one slow ~1 Hz heartbeat вҶ’ two-region polyrhythm вҶ’ dense stochastic patter вҶ’ back). You are a gentle **conductor**: tap the sphere to pace a beat or seed reentry, drag the *refractory-period* slider from calm toward fibrillation. **Won the DEEP race** over `1229-kindling` (**вӯҗ** a 96Г—96 **Izhikevich** spiking-neuron sheet as a 3D height-field membrane вҶ’ event-driven Chowning-**FM** blips fusing into pulses at synchrony, verified over 150 s through all 5 regimes вҖ” banked **RESURRECT**, this IS the `1219-ignition` resurrection realized in 3D + the jury's literal "change the voice to FM" ask; lost only because shipping the already-banked concept moves the lab less than a fresh surface+voice) and `1230-oregon` (a **BelousovвҖ“Zhabotinsky** Barkley membrane вҖ” target waves вҶ’ spirals вҶ’ defect turbulence on a domed surface, additive-spectral voice from wavefront statistics вҖ” banked, but a near-dupe of the banked `1207-oregonator` [BZ, В§673], and its additive voice was the closest of the three to the drone-pad family). `1231` won on **freshest VOICE (rhythmic-pulse/tempo вҖ” the single most orthogonal axis to the recent all-timbre history, directly attacking the jury's "the sound has homogenized") + most distinct OUTPUT object (a beating/fibrillating glowing GLOBE you spin, not another displaced field-you-watch) + strongest altered-states/Resonance fit (heartbeatвҶ’fibrillation spans cosmic-ambient to intense) + most subsystems (6) + genuine reentry**. **HONESTY:** the excitable-media *family* is lab-prior (BZ `1207`, AlfvГ©n `1209`, Izhikevich `1219`) so ambition-floor **#1 was NOT claimed** вҖ” the freshness is the closed-3D-sphere surface + rhythmic-pulse voice + long-form arc, not the engine class. Named refs: **FitzHugh 1961** В· **Nagumo, Arimoto & Yoshizawa 1962** В· **Barkley 1991** В· **Arthur Winfree** (cardiac reentry / *When Time Breaks Down*). Banks `1229-kindling` (вӯҗ RESURRECT) + `1230-oregon` as IDEAS В§680.)

### `/dream/1231-cardium` вҖ” *let a heart-like sheet of excitable tissue compose itself for five minutes вҖ” depolarization waves sweep a glowing 3D globe through calm heartbeat вҶ’ reentrant rotor вҶ’ fibrillation вҶ’ dissolution, and the pulse-tempo you hear IS the composition.* `demoable` В· **adult В· state: cardiac-reentry / self-organizing excitable tissue В· pole: cosmic-ambient (calm ~1 Hz heartbeat) вҶ’ intense (fibrillation)** В· INPUT **pointer pace / seed + refractory-drag вҖ” active conductor gesture** (tap the sphere to raycast-drop an excitation that paces a beat or seeds reentry; drag the *refractory-period* slider from calm heartbeat toward fibrillation; auto-pace on Begin so it self-plays and is never blank/silent вҖ” NOT passive) В· OUTPUT **three.js 3D closed SPHERE** вҖ” a subdivision-4 geodesic icosphere (2562 verts / 5120 faces) with a custom per-vertex excitation shader (oxbloodвҶ’ember fronts on cool slate-teal resting tissue + faint violet refractory-scar trail + fresnel rim), slow orbiting camera (NOT a flat 2D full-screen field [the ~5Г— over-represented cluster this fire deliberately dodged], NOT Canvas2D-bright) В· TECHNIQUE **FitzHughвҖ“Nagumo (Barkley reduction) excitable medium on a curved closed mesh, with genuine reentry** вҖ” per vertex a fast excitation `u` + slow recovery `v`, `du/dt = DВ·вҲҮВІu + (1/Оө)В·u(1вҲ’u)(uвҲ’(v+b)/a)`, `dv/dt = uвҲ’v`, `вҲҮВІu` a graph Laplacian over mesh edges; a boundaryless closed surface lets a wave wrap and re-excite tissue behind it вҶ’ a rotor seeded by the classic **cross-field initial condition**; an internal ~320 s arc clock sweeps `b` (refractoriness) through the named phases + per-vertex heterogeneity + random re-seed so it never loops (NOT a lab-first technique вҖ” excitable-media/RD is prior art [1207/1209/1219]; the fresh axes are the closed-3D-sphere surface + long-form arc + the voice) В· VOICE **rhythmic pulse engine (tempo-as-composition)** вҖ” three fixed listening regions watch `u`; a rising-edge threshold crossing (hysteresis) fires a low resonant thud (pitched body + fast downward glide) + a brief harmonic shimmer whose interval tracks the local wave period; tempo transforms across the arc (calm 1-region heartbeat вҶ’ 2-region polyrhythm вҶ’ 3-region dense patter вҶ’ thinning); gains ramp from 0, 14-voice cap, `DynamicsCompressor` limiter вҖ” NOT a drone/JI-choir, NOT modal-percussion-as-melody, NOT KarplusвҖ“Strong (1220), NOT granular (1225), NOT scanned-synthesis (1226): a fresh rhythm/tempo voice, the most orthogonal axis to the recent all-timbre window В· PALETTE oxblood/ember on slate-teal (a saturated *cardiac* chiaroscuro) + violet scar вҖ” clears the hard bright-daylight (jury) + near-black (soft-ban) bans; the one soft ding is that chiaroscuro is on the recent soft-avoid list, accepted because every other axis is fresh В· **ambition 2/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [icosphere mesh+adjacency В· FitzHughвҖ“Nagumo/Barkley solver w/ cross-field rotor seeding В· long-form arc controller В· custom per-vertex three.js excitation shader В· rhythmic-pulse audio engine В· pointer/drag conductor input = six] В· #3 named refs [FitzHugh 1961 В· Nagumo/Arimoto/Yoshizawa 1962 В· Barkley 1991 В· Winfree] вҖ” **#1 NOT claimed**, excitable-media is lab-prior) В· **diversity:** `banned=[bright-daylight PALETTE (jury) В· Canvas2D-bright OUTPUT (jury) В· 2D-full-screen-field OUTPUT (~5Г—) В· JI-choir/drone VOICE (jury) В· modal-percussion VOICE В· KarplusвҖ“Strong VOICE (1220) В· granular VOICE (1225) В· scanned-synthesis VOICE (1226) В· passive INPUT (jury) В· chromatic-chiaroscuro PALETTE (soft-avoid)]` В· `picked=[active pace/seed + refractory-drag INPUT В· three.js-3D closed-SPHERE OUTPUT В· FitzHughвҖ“Nagumo-cardiac-reentry TECHNIQUE В· rhythmic-PULSE VOICE (fresh) В· oxblood/ember-on-teal cardiac PALETTE]` вҖ” clears every hard ban;
