## вӯҗ Prior (Cycle 679 вҖ” **adult** **WIDE** вҖ” 3 orthogonal **fresh-VOICE physical/synthesis instruments** (the jury's literal #2 "change the voice" ask made the whole fire), none sharing a tag. Mode alternation 675 W вҶ’ 676 D вҶ’ 677 W вҶ’ 678 D вҶ’ **679 W**. **today's-research вҶ’ today's-build:** В§679 dive #1 = the live cs.SD frontier is *differentiable physical-modeling of strings* вҖ” the through-line being "**the vibrating object and its sound are one state; read the timbre off the moving geometry**" (arXiv 2407.05516 + differentiable-FDN/all-pole line). Ships `1226-loom` вҖ” **pluck a glowing ring and hear its shape.** A 128-mass **circular mass-spring string** simulated at slow *haptic* rate; its instantaneous 128-displacement shape **IS a single-cycle wavetable** an `AudioWorkletProcessor` scans at pitch вҶ’ genuine **scanned synthesis** (Verplank, Mathews & Shaw, ICMC 2000). A pointer **pluck** (or `a s d f g h j k` in D Dorian) injects a gaussian bump so one gesture morphs both the visible **tealвҶ’magenta 3D ring** and the timbre; gold scan-cursor orbits the read head; breathing-on-mount + idle auto-pluck so it plays itself; 16-harmonic-DFT additive fallback if no AudioWorklet. **Won the WIDE race** over `1227-operators` (**FM operator-galaxy** you sculpt in 3D вҖ” real Chowning/DX FM, drag a modulator sphere toward a carrier вҶ’ modulation index rises вҶ’ sidebands bloom; indigoвҶ’amber; the jury's literal "change the voice to FM" cash вҖ” **banked В§679**) and `1228-reed` (**nonlinear self-oscillating wind waveguide** вҖ” McIntyreвҖ“SchumacherвҖ“Woodhouse 1983 reed + digital-waveguide bore, breathe [mic/slider] to self-oscillate and *overblow*; brass/oxblood 3D bore with a teal traveling wave вҖ” **banked В§679**, boldest voice but its overblow is a disclosed *assisted* register-vent + mic path unverifiable headless). `1226` won on **ambition ceiling (3/5 вҖ” the only one adding #5, it literally implements today's research) + most honest end-to-end mechanism (the shape genuinely IS the table) + full determinism (demos with no mic on a cold glance) + the most tactile/Resonance-magical hook for a pianist**. Named refs: **Verplank/Mathews/Shaw** *Scanned Synthesis* (ICMC 2000) В· **Max Mathews**. Banks `1227-operators` + `1228-reed` as IDEAS В§679.)

## вӯҗ Prior (Cycle 677 вҖ” **adult** **WIDE** вҖ” 3 orthogonal **grep-0Г— engines**, each clearing the ambition floor on a DIFFERENT never-built technique, none sharing a tag (input Г— output Г— technique Г— voice Г— palette). Mode alternation 671 W вҶ’ 672 D вҶ’ 673 W вҶ’ 674 D вҶ’ 675 W вҶ’ 676 D вҶ’ **677 W**. This fire's whole reason to exist is the ambition/diversity mandate вҖ” "break too similar" вҖ” so it fielded three unrelated engines and shipped the one that best dodges the over-cooked output cluster. **today's-research вҶ’ today's-build:** the В§669/В§673 dives named the *excitable-media / coupled-oscillator* frontier and torus-knot sonification as live-and-lab-0Г—; the В§677 dive re-confirmed neuromorphic/spiking-neuron audio is a live 2025вҖ“26 domain (Spiking Music arXiv 2402.01571 В· Neuromorphic Audio survey 2502.15056 Feb 2025). Ships `1220-torsion` вҖ” **the winding numbers ARE the tuning.** A glowing **(p,q) torus knot** вҖ” one string wound *p*Г— around a torus and *q*Г— through it вҖ” rendered as a `THREE.TubeGeometry` in **three.js 3D** that you turn by dragging empty space and **pluck** by clicking the tube; each pluck is a **KarplusвҖ“Strong** plucked string and a **displacement wave travels outward along the tube from the touch point**, so the thing you see and the thing you hear are the *same waveguide*. Four **(p,q) presets** вҖ” (2,3) trefoil В· (3,2) В· (2,5) cinquefoil В· (3,4) вҖ” **retune** the whole instrument (folding the two interlocking harmonic series {p,2p,вҖҰ} and {q,2q,вҖҰ} into a just-intoned ladder). **Won the WIDE race** over `1219-ignition` (**вӯҗ** the HIGHER-ambition build, 4/5 вҖ” an **Izhikevich spiking-neuron sheet** you *ignite*: a tap nucleates a travelling spike wave that strikes inharmonic **modal-metal** tones, the sheet never resets so it evolves over minutes [starved long-form lane]; banked **RESURRECT-FIRST** вҖ” lost ONLY because its full-screen 2D excitable-field output is the exact cluster the В§673/В§675 jury flagged as over-represented [~5Г—], not any quality gap) and `1221-foldsong` (**вӯҗ** the freshest *voice* вҖ” the lab's FIRST **wavefolder + vactrol lowpass-gate** [Buchla/Serge West-Coast], a pure sine blooming into a rich harmonic voice you watch fold on a warm phosphor vector-scope; banked, held because its scope is a 2D form + a more conventional playable-synth concept than 1220's 3D object). `1220` won on **diversity-mandate fit + surprise + Resonance-fit**: it is the only brief that lands on the *starved* three.js-3D output surface (the deliberate counter to the over-cooked 2D-field cluster), brings a fresh **non-modal** KarplusвҖ“Strong voice, has the "**sight and sound are one waveguide**" rigor the jury praised in tremor-core/alfvГ©n, and offers a gorgeous single-gesture jewel-object for the 06:30 glance. Named refs: **(p,q) torus knot** (knot theory) В· **Karplus & Strong 1983** *Digital Synthesis of Plucked-StringвҖҰ* В· **Julius O. Smith** digital waveguide synthesis. Banks `1219-ignition` (вӯҗ RESURRECT-FIRST) + `1221-foldsong` (вӯҗ) as IDEAS В§677.)

### `/dream/1220-torsion` вҖ” *the winding numbers ARE the tuning вҖ” turn a glowing (p,q) torus knot in 3D and pluck the string; a displacement wave travels the tube exactly as the KarplusвҖ“Strong string rings, and swapping (p,q) presets retunes the whole instrument.* `demoable` В· **adult В· state: geometric contemplation В· pole: cosmic-ambient (jewel)** В· INPUT **pointer orbit + pluck вҖ” active gesture** (drag empty space to rotate the knot in 3D; click/drag the tube to raycast-pick the nearest arc parameter and pluck it, slide to strum across pitches; an opening pluck on Start so it's never silent) В· OUTPUT **three.js 3D** вҖ” a `TubeGeometry` swept along a custom parametric torus-knot `THREE.Curve`, a `ShaderMaterial` garnetвҶ’amberвҶ’gold gradient + fresnel rim + a travelling Gaussian displacement wave injected per pluck; manual orbit, DPR-clamped, full dispose on unmount (NOT a 2D full-screen excitable/shader-field [the ~5Г— over-represented cluster this fire deliberately dodged], NOT Canvas2D) В· TECHNIQUE **parametric (p,q) torus-knot geometry + winding-number tuning + travelling-wave visual** (grep-0Г— вҖ” no torus-knot instrument exists in the lab; `1196`/`1197` were Hopf-fibration + this idea's own В§669 bank, never built) В· VOICE **KarplusвҖ“Strong / digital-waveguide plucked string** вҖ” noise-burst вҶ’ `DelayNode` (delay = 1/f) вҶ’ one-pole lowpass loop-damping вҶ’ feedback gain < 1; master `masterGain`(ramp-from-0)вҶ’`DynamicsCompressor` limiter; 16-voice cap + oldest-voice steal + timed cleanup; AudioContext created only on the Start gesture вҖ” NOT modal (1213/1219-bank), NOT a JI choir/drone (jury), NOT FM, NOT granular В· PALETTE jewel-chromatic вҖ” garnet/amber/gold string glow on a deep indigo/violet ground (`#160a2a`) вҖ” NOT bright-daylight (jury), NOT near-black cosmic-glow (soft-ban), NOT chromatic-chiaroscuro (recently 4Г—): a saturated gemstone lane cashing the jury's palette-range provocation #1 В· **ambition 3/5** (#1 novel-to-lab [(p,q) torus-knot instrument вҖ” grep-0Г—] В· #2 вүҘ3 subsystems [torus-knot geometry + shader travelling-wave + raycast picking + KarplusвҖ“Strong waveguide synth + manual orbit] В· #3 named refs [(p,q) torus knots В· Karplus & Strong 1983 В· Julius O. ## вӯҗ Prior (Cycle 676 вҖ” **adult** **DEEP** вҖ” one massive concept (*a responsive jazz duet partner that answers you in time*) attacked via **3 different musical intelligences** вҖ” perception (mic-listen) В· memory (motif-transformation) В· harmony (voice-leading) вҖ” ships the deepest. Mode alternation 670 D вҶ’ 671 W вҶ’ 672 D вҶ’ 673 W вҶ’ 674 D вҶ’ 675 W вҶ’ **676 D**. This fire cashes **Karel's own directive #4** ("jazz responsive" journey-engine alternative) вҖ” a live-performance lane 0Г— in the recent window вҖ” while clearing the 2026-07-05 jury's palette+voice-range demand: three fresh non-JI voices + three distinct non-chiaroscuro duotones. **today's-research вҶ’ today's-build:** the frontier races heavyweight neural models toward *causal real-time* jamming (**LiveBand** arXiv 2606.03803 9 Jun 2026 В· **LK Jam** arXiv 2606.21018 Jun 2026 В· **ReaLJam** arXiv 2502.21267), but their shared *lookahead-commit* protocol is exactly what a browser runs with lightweight DSP + rule-based generation вҖ” so all three briefs proved it client-side. Ships `1218-shadow` вҖ” **play one finger, hear a four-part choir.** Play a single-note melody (on-screen keys / QWERTY / Web-MIDI) and a "shadow" partner **harmonizes you in real time**, a beat behind, blooming your note into full **four-part SATB chorale / close-harmony** вҖ” and for *every* note it chooses the chord by **functional voice-leading** (root motion weighted toward the circle of fifths + cadences + harmonic-minor V; the voicing found by a bounded search that **minimizes total voice motion** with parallel-5th/8ve + doubled-leading-tone penalties), so it's real arranging, not a lookup (builder runtime-verified A-minor вҶ’ `i7вҶ’iv7вҶ’V7вҶ’iiГё7вҶ’VII7вҶ’i7` with GвҷҜ landing exactly in the dominant). **Won the DEEP race** over `1216-consort` (**вӯҗ** the *mic* version вҖ” sing/hum/play вҶ’ real-time YIN pitch + spectral-flux onset + Krumhansl key-finding вҶ’ a warm FM-Rhodes+walking-bass consort answers in time; amber/teal duotone lead-sheet ribbon, full mic-free fallback вҖ” banked, Karel's literal "sing and a band answers" ask; ship when mic can be tested on his hardware) and `1217-tradefours` (**вӯҗ** the *trade-fours* version вҖ” play a phrase вҶ’ the machine captures it as an abstract motif and answers at the turnaround with a *developed variation* [diatonic transpose to the changes В· inversion В· fragmentation+sequence В· cadential tail] over a swinging FM-piano+bass comp; indigo/coral two-lane trading timeline вҖ” banked, the motif-transformation call-and-response engine). `1218` won on **ambition ceiling + verifiability + surprise + morning-reviewability + Resonance-fit**: the deepest engine (a genuine minimal-motion SATB voice-leading search, runtime-verified functional harmony вҖ” a bigger algorithmic nut than 1217's motif shuffle), **fully deterministic** so it demos with no mic on a cold 06:30 glance (where 1216's mic path is unverifiable headless), the freshest visualization (four gliding jade/rose voice-lines forming visible chords, vs two beaded scrolls), and the most Resonance-magical hook for a pianist ("one finger вҶ’ a real four-part choir"). Named refs: **Bach** chorale voice-leading В· **Fux** *Gradus ad Parnassum* В· **Dmitri Tymoczko** *A Geometry of Music* В· **Chris Wilson** "A Tale of Two Clocks" В· **John Chowning** FM. Banks `1216-consort` (вӯҗ) + `1217-tradefours` (вӯҗ) as IDEAS В§676.)

### `/dream/1218-shadow` вҖ” *play one finger, hear a four-part choir вҖ” a shadow partner harmonizes your single-note melody into full SATB a beat behind, choosing every chord by real minimal-motion voice-leading.* `demoable` В· **adult В· state: responsive-duet В· pole: warm/contemplative** В· INPUT **keyboard / QWERTY / Web-MIDI melody вҖ” active perform** (play a single-note line on the on-screen ~2-octave keyboard, the computer keyboard, or a plugged-in MIDI controller; a no-interaction **Demo** button plays a scripted melody so it's never silent/blank вҖ” NOT passive, NOT mic [the banked `1216` is the mic one], fully deterministic so it demos with no hardware) В· OUTPUT **Canvas2D voice-leading ribbon** вҖ” four gliding horizontal lines whose heights are the live S/A/T/B pitches (jade soprano on top, rose inner voices below), a moving playhead, per-voice note-name labels, the shadow arriving to the *right* of the playhead before it sounds; a ~2-octave keyboard lights jade under your finger + tints the current chord's tones rose (NOT a fragment-shader-field-you-watch [the avoided ~4Г— cluster], NOT three.js, NOT a beaded scroll like 1216/1217) В· TECHNIQUE **real-time functional voice-leading harmonization** вҖ” per melody note: (1) build the 7 diatonic triads (chorale) or sevenths (close/jazz) for the key, borrow the harmonic-minor **V/V7** so real leading-tone cadences exist, keep every chord containing your note as a chord tone, score them by **functional root motion** (descending-fifths strongest вҶ’ cadences/step вҶ’ retrogression/static penalised) + tonal gravity toward I/V/IV; (2) voice it in 4 parts by a bounded exhaustive search over SATB range-legal notes that **minimizes total motion** from the previous chord subject to correct ordering/spacing + bass-on-root + no doubled leading tone + a **parallel perfect 5th/8ve penalty** вҖ” combined score = functional weight вҲ’ motion cost, so harmony choice and smoothness trade off like a human arranger В· VOICE **4 independent struck-FM voices (SATB)** вҖ” Chowning sine-carrier + decaying-index modulator for a bright attack, per-voice low-pass + slight ratio/index/brightness differences so the four voices stay legible (rounder bass, more-present soprano), player's note sounds immediately + the harmonized A/T/B bloom a musical **shadow delay** (в…ӣ or Вј note) behind on a **Wilson "A Tale of Two Clocks" look-ahead scheduler** (~25 ms interval, ~120 ms horizon); bounded polyphony w/ oldest-voice steal вҖ” NOT a JI choir/drone (this is *moving functional harmony*, not a static pad), NOT modal, NOT granular, NOT the additive of 1209 В· PALETTE jade (soprano/your melody) + rose (shadow inner voices) on deep slate вҖ” a restrained two-hue duotone (NOT chromatic-chiaroscuro [recently 4-5Г—, avoided], NOT bright-daylight [jury], NOT near-black cosmic-glow [soft-ban]) В· **ambition 3/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [functional-harmony chord-chooser В· minimal-motion SATB voice-leading search w/ parallel-avoidance В· 4-voice struck-FM synth w/ shadow-delay look-ahead scheduler В· Canvas2D voice-leading-ribbon renderer В· keyboard/QWERTY/MIDI input] В· #3 named refs [Bach chorale voice-leading В· Fux species counterpoint В· Tymoczko *A Geometry of Music* В· Wilson two-clocks В· Chowning FM] В· #5 recent research [LiveBand Jun 2026 + LK Jam Jun 2026 + ReaLJam вҖ” the lookahead-commit protocol the shadow-scheduler implements client-side, RESEARCH В§676, this cycle]) В· **diversity:** `banned=[JI-choir/drone VOICE (jury) В· bright-daylight PALETTE (jury) В· passive/no-gesture INPUT (jury) В· WebGL2/three.js-field-you-watch OUTPUT (~4Г—, avoid) В· chromatic-chiaroscuro PALETTE (recently 4-5Г—, avoid) В· near-black cosmic-glow (soft-ban)]` В· `picked=[keyboard/MIDI-perform INPUT В· Canvas2D-voice-leading-ribbon OUTPUT В· real-time functional-voice-leading TECHNIQUE В· 4-voice struck-FM SATB VOICE В· jade/rose-on-slate duotone PALETTE]` вҖ” clears every ban. **SAFETY (photosensitive epilepsy):** no strobe вҖ” the ribbon is one slow continuous scroll (вүӘ3 Hz), every key/note-flash a smooth exponential ramp, `prefers-reduced-motion` respected for decorative drift; audio gesture-gated (Begin/Demo resumes the ctx) + `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter + master ramp-from-0 + bounded polyphony; full teardown on unmount. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (fully client-side; keyboard/MIDI only, no network, no mic). **Validation:** `next lint --dir src/app/dream/1218-shadow` вҶ’ **вң” 0 warnings/0 errors** (all 3 folders linted 0/0 pre-curation); authoritative winner-only `npm run build` вҶ’ **compiled + linted вң“** (every warning a *pre-existing* `src/lib/**` file вҖ” `ALL_SHADERS`/`isPathCulminationUnlocked`/`useCallback`/`lsHasData` unused + eslint-disable directives + one `use-journey` exhaustive-deps; **ZERO from the 1218 folder**), winner `.next/server/app/dream/1218-shadow/page.js` **compiled вң“ (45 KB)**, then the standing container **`EMFILE`** at `Collecting page data` (`next-font-manifest.json` вҖ” ~4096-fd ceiling, infra not code, identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys uncapped); no `Failed to compile`/`Type error`/`Module not found` anywhere. **Compile + lint + type + voice-leading-graph-by-inspection AND builder-runtime verified** (the builder bundled `harmony.ts` and confirmed real functional voice-leading output, not a lookup); **NOT ear-verified** (headless box, no speakers) вҖ” whether the SATB choir *reads* as a satisfying harmonization + the shadow-delay *reads* as a bloom wants Karel's speakers; the scripted Demo + gliding idle ribbon guarantee it is never blank/silent, and the keyboard/Demo route needs no mic so Karel can fully drive it. Winner of a DEEP 3-intelligence fire; banks `1216-consort` (вӯҗ) + `1217-tradefours` (вӯҗ) as IDEAS В§676. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1218-shadow/README.md`

## вӯҗ Prior (Cycle 675 вҖ” **adult** **WIDE** вҖ” 3 orthogonal *massively-bigger* concepts on 3 fresh output surfaces / voices / palettes / inputs (none sharing a tag), directly attacking the ambition mandate after 5 chromatic-chiaroscuro ships in the last 10 + three straight fire-cycles of field/particle-sim-as-instrument. Mode alternation 669 W вҶ’ 670 D вҶ’ 671 W вҶ’ 672 D вҶ’ 673 W вҶ’ 674 D вҶ’ **675 W**. Ships `1213-splatsong` вҖ” **strike a cloud of light and hear its material.** A procedural "resonant cairn" of ~4,500 anisotropic 3D Gaussians rendered with **true 3D-Gaussian-splat covariance rasterization** (grep-0Г— вҖ” the lab's many "splat" pieces are all loose additive particle *blooms*; this is genuine EWA projected-conic splatting) floats in a neutral studio light-box; you ORBIT it by dragging and STRIKE a cluster by tapping вҖ” each cluster's **material is *inferred* from its splat statistics** (tight+bright+cool = glass В· large+dark = stone В· elongated+metallic = metal bar В· warm+mid = wood, Г  la **SonicGauss** reading a material off a Gaussian field) and rings a physically-modelled **modal impact** (5вҖ“8 decaying-sine resonators + a filtered-noise mallet; material sets the partial ratios + decays, cluster size sets the pitch, strike velocity sets loudness+brightness). **Won the WIDE race** over `1214-reef` (grow a coral over minutes via space-colonization вҶ’ a Karplus-Strong resonator network so a slow tide makes the piece *audibly evolve* sparse-high-early вҶ’ thick-low-late; two-color prussian-blue+vermilion riso вҖ” banked, the starved long-form/stateful lane) and `1215-consort` (**вӯҗ RESURRECT-FIRST** вҖ” sing/tap into the mic вҶ’ real-time onset+YIN pitch + Krumhansl key-finding вҶ’ a warm FM-Rhodes+bass consort answers *in time* on a look-ahead beat clock, amber/teal duotone lead-sheet ribbon, full mic-free fallback вҖ” banked, directly cashes Karel's own directive #4 "jazz responsive"; ship the next live-performance slot). `1213` won on **ambition ceiling + surprise + research-chain + Resonance-fit**: it is the only brief bringing a genuinely new rendering medium (true 3DGS, 4/5 floor, the only #1-clearing brief), the only one that directly implements this cycle's freshest research (WebSplatter arXiv 2602.03207 Feb 2026 + SonicGauss), the strongest nameable hook, and a fresh vitrine-neutral palette lane the jury's palette-range provocation asks for. Named refs: **Kerbl et al.** *3D Gaussian Splatting* (SIGGRAPH 2023); **WebSplatter** (arXiv 2602.03207, Feb 2026); **SonicGauss** (arXiv 2507.19835). Banks `1215-consort` (вӯҗ) + `1214-reef` as IDEAS В§675.)

### `/dream/1213-splatsong` вҖ” *strike a cloud of light and hear its material вҖ” orbit a resonant cairn of thousands of anisotropic 3D Gaussians and tap a cluster to ring its inferred material.* `demoable` В· **adult В· state: lucid / object-permanence trance В· pole: cosmic-ambientвҶ’intense (volumetric, material)** В· INPUT **pointer orbit + strike вҖ” active gesture** (drag orbits the camera; tap strikes the nearest cluster [screen distance weighted by depth], quicker taps hit harder; "shimmer all" arpeggiates every cluster; slow auto-orbit + faint idle shimmer keep it alive on a cold glance) В· OUTPUT **WebGL2 3D-Gaussian-splat rasterization** вҖ” ~4,500 anisotropic Gaussians, per-splat 3Г—3 covariance ОЈ=RВ·SВ·SбөҖВ·RбөҖ projected to a 2D screen conic via the perspective Jacobian (EWA), camera-facing instanced quads, CPU depth-sort back-to-front (~12 Hz throttle) + premultiplied `ONE,ONE_MINUS_SRC_ALPHA` "over" blend, opaque studio-gray backdrop pass; Canvas2D depth-sorted-blob fallback + `webglcontextlost` (NOT a fragment-shader-field-you-watch [the avoided ~3Г— cluster], NOT three.js, NOT Canvas2D-primary) В· TECHNIQUE **true 3DGS anisotropic-covariance splatting + SonicGauss-style material inference + modal-impact synthesis** (grep-0Г— for real covariance splatting вҖ” the lab's `246`/`557`/`564`/`178` "splat" pieces are all loose additive particle blooms) В· VOICE **modal impact resonators** вҖ” 5вҖ“8 parallel exponentially-decaying sinusoids `ОЈ aбөў sin(2ПҖfбөўt)e^(вҲ’t/П„бөў)` + a short filtered-noise mallet transient; material presets set partial ratios + decays (glass bright-near-harmonic ~3 s В· stone low-inharmonic ~0.5 s В· metal free-bar 1:2.756:5.404:8.933 ~4 s В· wood woody ~0.4 s); sizeвҶ’fundamental, velocityвҶ’loudness+brightness; 10-voice steal, `DynamicsCompressor` limiter, master ramp-from-0 вҖ” NOT a JI choir/drone, NOT granular, NOT FM-bell, NOT the additive-AlfvГ©n of 1209 В· PALETTE vitrine-neutral studio light-box (soft gray sweep + faint hotspot) with real saturated *material* color in the splats (glass aqua/clear В· stone slate В· metal brass/steel В· wood umber) вҖ” NOT chromatic-chiaroscuro (the new 4Г— ban), NOT bright-daylight (jury), NOT near-black cosmic-glow (soft-ban): a product-photography vitrine В· **ambition 4/5** (#1 novel-to-lab [true 3DGS covariance rasterization вҖ” grep-0Г—] В· #2 вүҘ3 subsystems [EWA splat renderer w/ depth-sort + material inference + modal-impact synth + pointer orbit/pick] В· #3 named refs [Kerbl 3DGS 2023 В· WebSplatter 2602.03207 Feb 2026 В· SonicGauss 2507.19835] В· #5 recent research [WebSplatter Feb 2026, RESEARCH В§675, this cycle вҖ” the winner *directly implements* the dive's hook, the cleanest chain of the three]) В· **diversity:** `banned=[chromatic-chiaroscuro PALETTE (4Г— in last 10) В· bright-daylight PALETTE (jury) В· JI-choir/drone VOICE (jury) В· passive/no-gesture INPUT (jury) В· WebGL2-shader-field-you-watch OUTPUT (~3Г—, avoid) В· near-black cosmic-glow (soft-ban)]` В· `picked=[orbit+strike INPUT В· WebGL2-3DGS-splat-raster OUTPUT В· 3DGS+material-inference TECHNIQUE В· modal-impact VOICE В· vitrine-neutral PALETTE]` вҖ” clears every ban on a fresh surface. **SAFETY (photosensitive epilepsy):** no strobe вҖ” auto-orbit / idle-shimmer / backdrop-drift are slow continuous motion (вүӘ3 Hz), every strike-flash a smooth exp ramp (never a full-screen flash), `prefers-reduced-motion` respected; ## вӯҗ Prior (Cycle 674 вҖ” **adult** **DEEP** вҖ” one concept (*a playable strict-MONOCHROME Ryoji-Ikeda data-instrument, voiced in the clinical sine/noise/click register*) attacked via **3 technical routes** to "how does visible monochrome data become sound"; ships the strongest. Mode alternation 669 W вҶ’ 670 D вҶ’ 671 W вҶ’ 672 D вҶ’ 673 W вҶ’ **674 D**. This fire cashes a provocation the lab has **never shipped** (the 2026-07-05 jury's #1 example, "a two-color Ikeda/riso constraint" вҖ” proposed at В§669 `1197` and В§671 `1202`, banked both times) AND breaks the **new emerging monoculture** вҖ” the last 5 ships (1209/1206/1203/1200/1196) all went chromatic-chiaroscuro вҶ’ **5Г— in the last 10**, the exact "we banned one monoculture and manufactured its opposite" trap. A strict-monochrome Ikeda idiom clears BOTH the jury's bright-daylight ban AND the new chiaroscuro 5Г—, and brings a genuinely fresh **clinical VOICE** register (pure sine + noise + click вҖ” not JI-choir/modal/granular/FM/additive-warm/GENDYN). Ships `1210-datamatics` вҖ” **draw a sound as a picture.** Paint bright marks onto a scrolling monochrome spectrogram; a thin cyan playhead reads each column as a bank of **64 pure sine partials** (row вҶ’ log-frequency 55 HzвҖ“7.5 kHz, brightness вҶ’ amplitude), so the image you draw *is* the additive spectrum you hear вҖ” hard edges fire a band-passed-noise onset tick. This is the ANS-synthesiser / Xenakis-*UPIC* / *Phosphor*(Feb 2026) / Tembrica(Mar 2026) imageвҶ’additive-resynthesis lineage made playable, in Ryoji Ikeda's stark black-and-white. **Won the DEEP race** over `1211-test-pattern` (the most literally-Ikeda вҖ” scrub a playhead across 4 near-coprime [61/43/26/17] barcode lanes вҶ’ an analytic look-ahead audio-clock scheduler fires 4 registers [sine pip В· gated sine В· noise tick В· sub pulse] in polyrhythm; banked **вӯҗ RESURRECT-FIRST** вҖ” the directest cash of the two-color-Ikeda provocation, held only because 1210 directly implements *this cycle's* research + is the more original instrument) and `1212-data-matrix` (a 32Г—24 datamatrix step-grid you toggle вҶ’ column-scan rings each lit cell as a pentatonic sine pip, with optional Conway's-Life self-evolution + binary rain; banked вҖ” the strongest "plays itself" morning property but conceptually closest to a conventional grid sequencer). `1210` won on **research-chain strength + originality + Resonance-fit**: it is the only one that directly implements this cycle's Phosphor/Tembrica/ANS/UPIC imageвҶ’additive research (uniquely landing ambition #5), and "draw a picture, hear it as a pure-sine spectrum" is the most original cross-modal drawвҶ’sound coupling and the most Resonance-fit ("compose by drawing" for a pianist/composer). Named refs: **Ryoji Ikeda** *datamatics / test pattern / data-verse* (2026 *data.gram [nВә11]*); the **ANS synthesiser**; **Iannis Xenakis** *UPIC*; ***Phosphor*** (Synthtopia Feb 2026); Tembrica Image-to-Sound (Mar 2026). Banks `1211-test-pattern` (вӯҗ) + `1212-data-matrix` as IDEAS В§674.)

### `/dream/1210-datamatics` вҖ” *draw a sound as a picture вҖ” paint a monochrome spectrogram and hear each column resynthesised in real time as a bank of pure sine partials, in Ryoji Ikeda's stark black-and-white.* `demoable` В· **adult В· state: clinical / precise-data-trance В· pole: intense (hard-edged, high-contrast)** В· INPUT **pointer/touch DRAW вҖ” active gesture** (drag paints energy into the spectrogram; brighter = louder partial; shift-drag or the erase tool clears; preset buttons sweep/chord/dots load a score in one tap; a seeded dot-field is the idle state so the screen is never a dead black rectangle) В· OUTPUT **crisp Canvas2D monochrome spectrogram-score** (white/near-white marks on TRUE BLACK + exactly one thin cyan playhead as the sole accent; nearest-neighbour hard-edged raster + a faint drifting grid + static octave guide-lines вҖ” NOT a full-screen fragment-shader field you passively watch [the avoided ~4Г— cluster], NOT three.js, NOT chiaroscuro, NOT a soft cosmic glow) В· TECHNIQUE **image-as-score additive/spectral resynthesis** вҖ” 64 frequency rows on a clean log grid (55 Hz вҶ’ 7.5 kHz); every frame the column under the playhead is read and each partial's gain is glided toward that row's brightness so the timbre morphs continuously to match the drawing; dense columns are energy-normalised; hard column-energy edges fire a band-passed-noise onset tick В· VOICE **pure additive sine partials + filtered-noise clicks** вҖ” 64 `OscillatorNode`s (`type:"sine"`) + a band-passed white-noise tick; clinical Ikeda test-tone register, sub-bass to bright highs вҖ” NOT a JI choir/drone, NOT modal, NOT granular, NOT FM, NOT the warm additive-AlfvГ©n of 1209 В· PALETTE strict monochrome вҖ” white on true black + one thin cyan scan-line (clears the jury's bright-daylight ban AND the new chromatic-chiaroscuro 5Г— monoculture AND the near-black-glow soft-ban: this is hard-edged high-contrast DATA, not soft glow) В· **ambition 3/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [64-osc additive bank w/ per-partial glide + energy-normalise + limiter В· noise-tick onset engine В· Canvas2D spectrogram-score renderer w/ paint/erase В· pointer draw-input] В· #3 named refs [Ikeda 2026 data.gram; ANS synthesiser; Xenakis UPIC] В· #5 recent research [Phosphor Feb 2026 + Tembrica Mar 2026, RESEARCH В§674, this cycle вҖ” the winner *directly implements* the dive's hook, the cleanest today's-researchвҶ’today's-build chain of the three]) В· **diversity:** `banned=[chromatic-chiaroscuro PALETTE (new, 5Г— in last 10) В· bright-daylight PALETTE (jury) В· JI-choir/drone VOICE (jury) В· passive/no-gesture INPUT (jury) В· WebGL2-shader-field OUTPUT (~4Г—, avoid) В· near-black cosmic-glow (soft-ban)]` В· `picked=[active DRAW INPUT В· crisp Canvas2D monochrome raster OUTPUT В· imageвҶ’additive-resynthesis TECHNIQUE В· pure-sine+noise+click VOICE (fresh clinical register) В· strict-MONOCHROME PALETTE]` вҖ” clears every ban including the new chiaroscuro one. **SAFETY (photosensitive epilepsy):** no strobe вҖ” the bars never flash; the only periodic motion is a single ~0.09 Hz playhead sweep + slow grid drift (вүӘ3 Hz); `prefers-reduced-motion` slows both; audio gesture-gated ("Begin" resumes the ctx) + `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter + master gain ramped from 0 + per-column energy-normalisation so a fully-painted column can never spike; full teardown on unmount (cancel RAF + stop/disconnect every osc/gain/filter + `ctx.close()`). **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (fully client-side; no network, no mic). **Validation:** `next lint --dir src/app/dream/1210-datamatics` вҶ’ **вң” 0 warnings/0 errors**; `tsc --noEmit` project-wide вҶ’ **0 errors**; authoritative winner-only `npx next build` вҶ’ **вҡ  Compiled with warnings in 2.3min** (every warning a *pre-existing* `src/lib/**` / prior `src/app/dream/**` file вҖ” RotateCcw / demoBands / `_` vars / eslint-disable directives / `<img>`; **ZERO from the 1210 folder**), winner `.next/server/app/dream/1210-datamatics/page.js` **compiled вң“ (38 KB)**; no `Failed to compile`/`Type error`/`Module not found` anywhere. **Compile + lint + type + DSP/render-graph-by-inspection verified; NOT ear/eye-verified** (headless box, no speakers/display) вҖ” whether the drawn spectrogram *reads* as a musical additive morph and the monochrome score *reads* as Ikeda-crisp wants Karel's hardware; the seeded dot-field idle + drifting grid + one-tap presets guarantee it is never blank or silent. Winner of a DEEP 3-approach fire; banks `1211-test-pattern` (вӯҗ) + `1212-data-matrix` as IDEAS В§674. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1210-datamatics/README.md`

## вӯҗ Prior (Cycle 673 вҖ” **adult** **WIDE** вҖ” 3 orthogonal **grep-0Г— excitable-medium / coupled-oscillator engines**, each clearing the ambition floor on a DIFFERENT never-built technique with a DIFFERENT fresh non-JI voice + a DIFFERENT non-bright chromatic-chiaroscuro palette + active-gesture input вҖ” directly attacking the 2026-07-05 jury's monoculture headline (bright-daylight palette 10Г— В· JI-choir voice 6Г—) with *range*, not inversion. Mode alternation 669 W вҶ’ 670 D вҶ’ 671 W вҶ’ 672 D вҶ’ **673 W**. Ships `1209-alfven` вҖ” **pluck a magnetic field line like a string, and hear the plasma sing.** Magnetized plasma carries **AlfvГ©n waves**: transverse vibrations that travel *along* magnetic field lines and ring in standing modes exactly like a string under tension вҖ” but the "tension" is the magnetic field and the "mass" is the plasma density. A 3D rack of glowing coronal-loop field-lines floats over a deep-indigo sky; grab one, pull it sideways, release вҖ” it **whips and rings**, its displacement the actual wave solution, and you hear a sum of its standing **AlfvГ©n-wave harmonics**. Longer loops sing lower (`fвӮҒ = v_A/2L`, `v_A = B/вҲҡ(ОјвӮҖПҒ)`); a **Field-B** control turns up the whole magnetosphere at once, lifting every pitch and quickening every visible shimmer live. **The one honest move:** the *same* modal coefficients + per-mode decay rates drive BOTH the visible tube-whip AND the additive audio partials, so sight and sound are one physical object (the true partials sit at hundreds of Hz вҖ” invisible вҖ” so only the *visual* is time-dilated to a few Hz, preserving the exact spectrum/decays/ratios; audio rings at real `fвӮҷ`). **Won the WIDE race** over `1207-oregonator` (BelousovвҖ“Zhabotinsky **excitable medium** as a *mallet instrument* вҖ” tap to nucleate spiral chemical waves, wavefront collisions strike inharmonic modal-metal; the **most rigorous build** [verified-excitable regime + a 96Г—54 CPU shadow-model for cheap real-time event detection] вҖ” banked **вӯҗ TOP RESURRECT**, held only because its output genre is a full-screen WebGL2 shader-field, the over-represented last-10 output cluster ~5Г—) and `1208-swarmalator` (Strogatz **swarmalators** вҖ” particles that sync AND swarm, colour=phase, dragged through their 5 states with FM-bell voices вҖ” banked, held only because `1206-murmuration` shipped a particle-swarm the *immediately prior* cycle). `1209` won on **four axes at once**: a **starved output surface** (three.js 3D pluckable вҖ” 0Г— in the last 10), the most **surprising/nameable hook**, **sight+sound share one honest model** (the tremor-core rigor the jury praised), and the strongest **one-gesture 06:30 payoff** + Resonance-fit ("an instrument you *play*"). **ResearchвҶ’build:** В§673 dive (WebGPU physarum/BZ/Turing compute libs shipping mid-June 2026) confirmed the *excitable-medium / coupled-oscillator* family is the live frontier; a grep sweep found its three lab-untouched members (Oregonator 0Г— В· swarmalators 0Г— В· magnetohydrodynamic/AlfvГ©n 0Г—) вҶ’ one per builder. Named refs: **Hannes AlfvГ©n** (predicted MHD/AlfvГ©n waves 1942, Nobel 1970); **coronal-loop seismology** (transverse loop oscillations, Nakariakov et al.); **Chladni/Helmholtz** plucked-string lineage. Banks `1207-oregonator` (вӯҗ) + `1208-swarmalator` as IDEAS В§673.)

### `/dream/1209-alfven` вҖ” *pluck a magnetic field line like a string and hear the plasma sing вҖ” a 3D rack of glowing coronal loops whose standing AlfvГ©n-wave modes drive both the visible whip and an additive-resynthesis voice.* `demoable` В· **adult В· state: cosmic / boundless-plasma В· pole: cosmic-ambient (aurora, saturated)** В· INPUT **pointer/touch pluck вҖ” active gesture** (raycast-grab a 3D field-line, pull it transversely, release вҶ’ seeds a triangular-pluck modal spectrum that rings; drag the **Field-B** control to scale `v_A` and retune the whole rack live, already-ringing voices included; gentle idle micro-perturbations keep it faintly alive on load) В· OUTPUT **three.js 3D scene** вҖ” a rack of ~7 emissive coronal-loop tubes over a deep-indigoвҶ’near-black radial gradient with a slow auto-orbit; the plucked loop's tube vertices deform by `ОЈ aвӮҷ(t)В·sin(nПҖs/L)` bent out of plane (the real modal solution), a smooth hot-magenta pluck-flash (NOT a passive shader-field, NOT 2D Canvas вҖ” the starved output surface, three.js-3D 0Г— in last 10) В· TECHNIQUE **magnetohydrodynamic / AlfvГ©n-wave string** (grep-0Г— вҖ” magnetohydrodynamic/alfven/alfvГ©n all 0Г— as name AND technique) вҖ” `v_A = B/вҲҡ(ОјвӮҖПҒ)`, standing modes `fвӮҷ = nВ·v_A/2L`, plucked-string modal coefficients `bвӮҷ = 2h/(ПҖВІnВІuвӮҖ(1вҲ’uвӮҖ))В·sin(nПҖuвӮҖ)` (~1/nВІ spectrum), per-mode decay rising with n; loop lengths *tuned* so the 7 fundamentals land on a C-minor-pentatonic set (pitch honestly set by L & B, not an arbitrary scale) В· VOICE **additive / spectral resynthesis** вҖ” one `OscillatorNode` per standing harmonic at `nВ·fвӮҒ`, per-partial exponential-decay envelopes (fundamental ~2.5 s, top partials ~0.4 s), a slight inharmonic "coronal" stretch for shimmer, a band-passed noise pluck-transient attack; master compressor + gain ramped from 0, 72-partial budget вҖ” NOT a JI choir/drone/pad, NOT granular, NOT a sampled pluck В· PALETTE aurora greenвҶ”violet on deep indigoвҶ’near-black chiaroscuro, hot-magenta pluck-flash (clears both the bright-daylight ban and the near-black-glow soft-ban) В· **ambition 3/5** (#1 novel-to-lab [MHD/AlfvГ©n-wave sonification вҖ” grep-0Г—] В· #2 вүҘ3 subsystems [AlfvГ©n/MHD string engine + three.js raycast-pluck renderer with live tube deformation + additive-resynthesis voice with live B-retune] В· #3 named refs [AlfvГ©n 1942/Nobel 1970; coronal-loop seismology / Nakariakov et al.; Chladni/Helmholtz]) В· **diversity:** `banned=[bright-daylight PALETTE (jury 10Г—) В· Canvas2D-bright OUTPUT (jury) В· JI-choir/drone VOICE (jury 6Г—) В· passive/no-gesture INPUT (jury 5Г—) В· WebGL2-shader-you-watch OUTPUT (last-10 ~5Г—) В· flat near-black cosmic-glow (soft-ban, lifts ~07-11)]` В· `picked=[pluck-a-3D-structure INPUT (active) В· three.js-3D-pluckable-rack OUTPUT (starved surface) В· AlfvГ©n-wave-string TECHNIQUE (grep-0Г—) В· additive-spectral VOICE (fresh, non-JI) В· aurora-on-indigo chromatic-chiaroscuro PALETTE В· cosmic-ambient/boundless VIBE]` вҖ” clears every ban. **SAFETY (photosensitive epilepsy):** no strobe вҖ” tube motion is smooth, the pluck-flash is a pure envelope ramp (documented in `mhd-core.ts`: "no strobe вҖ” pure ramp"), all periodic brightness вүӘ3 Hz; audio gesture-gated ("Energize the field" resumes the ctx) + compressor/limiter + master ramp-from-0; three.js resources disposed on unmount, graceful WebGL-unavailable `text-rose-300` notice. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (fully client-side; no network, no mic). **Validation:** `next lint --dir src/app/dream/1209-alfven` вҶ’ **вң” 0 warnings/0 errors**; `tsc --noEmit` project-wide вҶ’ **0 errors**; winner compiled fully in `npm run build` (reached post-compile "Collecting page data"), the full ~700-page static-gen only **FD-blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` 4096 ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json` вҖ” infra not code, hard ulimit unraiseable, identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys uncapped). **Compile + lint + type + model-by-inspection verified; NOT ear/GPU-verified** (headless box, no speakers/display) вҖ” whether the pluck *reads* as playable and the additive spectrum *reads* as musical wants Karel's hardware; the idle shimmer + auto-orbit guarantee it is never blank/silent. Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer fire; banks `1207-oregonator` (вӯҗ) + `1208-swarmalator` as IDEAS В§673. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1209-alfven/README.md`

## вӯҗ Prior (Cycle 672 вҖ” **adult** **DEEP** вҖ” one massive concept (a many-hand **collaborative ensemble** вҖ” the jury's un-cashed provocation #5, *"a conducted shared ensemble is the single largest un-built category in the entire menu"*) attacked via **3 different topologies**, all sharing a research-backed distributed clock; ships the **least-derivative** one. Mode alternation 669 W вҶ’ 670 D вҶ’ 671 W вҶ’ **672 D**. Ships `1206-murmuration` вҖ” **a flock of 180 voice-birds that sings when it clusters, and every hand in the room is an attractor pulling the swarm.** Each participant (a browser tab / device on the same origin) is a glowing **attractor**; ~180 boids (**Craig Reynolds, *Flocks, Herds, and Schools*, 1987** вҖ” separation/alignment/cohesion) bend toward the **union of all attractors**, integrated *locally* from a fixed seed on every client so all tabs converge to the same shape without streaming 180 birds (only the handful of attractor positions cross the wire). When a grid-cell **knots** (вүҘ9 birds) it rings a **granular / bowed-glass ping** вҖ” pitch from the knot's vertical position on a minor-pentatonic set, brightness from flock speed вҖ” **quantised to a shared beat grid and committed one beat ahead** so every tab rings the same note *in phase*. Two drifting **ghost-attractors** keep it alive & breathing SOLO; real peers replace them as hands. **The distributed-timing spine is this cycle's research:** the **lookahead-commit** protocol вҖ” schedule events a fixed lookahead ahead of a shared clock, broadcast *planned intents* (not audio), play cached future events while waiting вҖ” from **StreamMUSE (arXiv 2606.11886, submitted 10 Jun 2026, 25 days old)** + **ReaLJam (arXiv 2502.21267, 2025)**. **Won the DEEP race** over `1204-baton-ensemble` (a *conductor* with a baton + FM-gamelan chairs вҖ” banked because it concept-shadows the existing `754-conducted-table`, the "same instrument twice" trap the jury flagged) and `1205-loom-in-c` (a *leaderless* multiplayer Terry-Riley *In C* braid + struck-bar marimba вҖ” banked because it concept-shadows the existing `1183-in-c-loom`) on being the single **least-derivative** candidate: its only overlap with prior art is the *visual* (boids exist in `1059`/`537`), while its **concept вҖ” a many-hand collaborative flock-instrument with a distributed lookahead-commit voice-clock вҖ” is genuinely un-built**; also the most spectacular on a cold solo glance and the freshest-feeling voice. **Honest fact-check:** the jury (and prior MORNING) called multi-user "0Г—" вҖ” a grep proved that wrong (`508`/`729`/`1077` are WebRTC/BroadcastChannel **duets**), so this does **NOT** claim "first multi-user"; the fresh contribution is *collaborative (>2 hands, symmetric) instrument + distributed clock*. Banks `1204-baton-ensemble` + `1205-loom-in-c` as IDEAS В§672.)

### `/dream/1206-murmuration` вҖ” *a flock of 180 voice-birds that sings when it clusters вҖ” you are a glowing attractor pulling the swarm, and every tab is another hand sculpting one emergent piece together.* `demoable` В· **adult В· state: collective / hypnagogic-flow В· pole: cosmic-ambientвҶ’intense (emergent, chromatic)** В· INPUT **pointer/touch attractor вҖ” active & COLLABORATIVE** (each same-origin tab/device is a live attractor whose position crosses a `BroadcastChannel`; N hands steer one shared flock; two drifting ghost-attractors keep it alive solo) В· OUTPUT **Canvas2D additive (`lighter`) luminous streaks + trails** on a deep-indigo motion-blur field (not bright-daylight, not flat near-black вҖ” the ban was *bright* Canvas2D; this is deep-chroma chiaroscuro), attractor radial glows, expanding cluster-bloom rings on each sung knot В· TECHNIQUE **collaborative flocking-swarm-as-instrument + lookahead-commit distributed clock** вҖ” 180-boid Reynolds sim steered by the union of all attractors + grid cluster-detection (вүҘ9 birds = a singing knot) + a 40 ms scheduler that quantises knots to the NEXT beat in a 1-beat lookahead window, schedules the grain at `audioCtx.currentTime + (beatTime-now)/1000`, and broadcasts `{col,row,beat,midi,brightness}` **intents** so all clients ring in phase (earliest-`t0`-wins shared origin); NOT a JI choir/drone В· VOICE **granular / bowed-glass pings** (triangle fundamental + detuned shimmering upper partials through a pitch-tracking band-pass + a high-passed noise pluck transient, fast bowed attack вҶ’ exp decay; bounded polyphony voice-steal cap 10; generated-IR reverb) вҖ” pitch вҶҗ knot vertical position (minor-pentatonic), brightness вҶҗ flock speed В· PALETTE deep-indigo/charcoal base, tealвҶ’magentaвҶ’amber chromatic-chiaroscuro by speed (clears the bright-daylight ban and the near-black-glow soft-ban) В· **ambition 3/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [BroadcastChannel presence/transport + 180-boid Reynolds flock + granular/bowed synth + lookahead-commit shared-clock scheduler + Canvas2D additive renderer = 5] В· #3 named refs [Reynolds 1987; ReaLJam 2502.21267; StreamMUSE 2606.11886] В· #5 research вүӨ14 days [StreamMUSE, 2026-06-10]) вҖ” **NOT claiming #1** (flocking + multi-peer transport both lab-prior; the *collaborative-instrument combination* is the fresh part) В· **diversity:** `banned=[bright-daylight/high-key PALETTE (jury 10Г—) В· Canvas2D-*bright* OUTPUT (jury 4Г—) В· JI-choir/drone VOICE (jury 6Г—) В· passive/no-gesture INPUT (jury 5Г—)]` В· `picked=[multi-hand-attractor INPUT (active + collaborative) В· Canvas2D-additive-on-deep-indigo OUTPUT (chromatic chiaroscuro) В· collaborative-flock-instrument + lookahead-commit-clock TECHNIQUE В· granular/bowed-glass VOICE (non-JI) В· tealвҶ’magentaвҶ’amber chromatic PALETTE В· emergent/collaborative VIBE]` вҖ” clears every ban. **SAFETY (photosensitive epilepsy):** no strobe вҖ” flock motion is continuous, the background is a translucent motion-blur fill (smooth luminance drift), blooms are soft expanding rings, all periodic change вүӘ3 Hz; audio gesture-gated ("Enter the flock" resumes the ctx) with bounded polyphony + limiter/reverb so a dense flock never spikes; graceful `BroadcastChannel`/`AudioContext` try-catch вҶ’ solo. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (fully client-side; no server, no mic; only same-origin BroadcastChannel). **Validation:** `next lint --dir src/app/dream/1206-murmuration` вҶ’ **вң” 0 warnings/0 errors**; `tsc --noEmit` project-wide вҶ’ **0 errors**; authoritative winner-only `npm run build` вҶ’ **вҡ  Compiled with warnings in 2.2min** (every warning a *pre-existing* `src/app/dream/**` file вҖ” eslint-disable directives / `_` vars / `<img>` / `demoBands`; **ZERO from the 1206 folder**), `.next/server/app/dream/1206-murmuration/page.js` **compiled вң“ (28.7 KB)**, then advanced into type-checking; the full ~700-page static-gen still carries the **standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (4096-fd cap, same since ~cycle 472 вҖ” infra not code; Vercel deploys uncapped); no `Failed to compile`/`Type error`/`Module not found` anywhere. **Compile + lint + type + graph-by-inspection verified; NOT ear/GPU-verified nor two-tab-runtime-verified** (headless box: no speakers/display, can't open two live tabs) вҖ” whether the murmuration *reads* as gorgeous and whether two tabs truly stay phase-locked wants Karel's hardware; the ghost-attractor solo path guarantees it is never blank/silent/crashing alone. Winner of a DEEP 3-topology fire; banks `1204-baton-ensemble` + `1205-loom-in-c` as IDEAS В§672. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1206-murmuration/README.md`

## вӯҗ Prior (Cycle 671 вҖ” **adult** **WIDE** вҖ” 3 orthogonal **fresh-VOICE** explorers, each a DIFFERENT non-JI synthesis engine, directly cashing the 2026-07-05 jury's two headline provocations (#1 kill the bright-daylight monoculture вҶ’ chromatic range; #2 ban the JI-choir/drone voice вҶ’ build on a fundamentally different synthesis). Ships `1203-gendy` вҖ” **hold a living waveform and tune it from a pure tone to a stochastic roar.** A hands-on realisation of **Iannis Xenakis's Dynamic Stochastic Synthesis (GENDYN)** вҖ” a synthesis voice this lab has NEVER built (Xenakis was only ever *referenced* re: cellular automata `622` / UPIC `704` / granular `1140`; true stochastic-waveform synthesis is grep-0Г—). The tone is not sampled or oscillated вҖ” it is **drawn**: one waveform cycle is 12 **breakpoints** (each a duration + amplitude), linearly interpolated; after every cycle each breakpoint's amp AND duration is nudged by a **Gaussian random walk** (a *second-order* stochastic process вҖ” the breakpoints walk, not the samples) and **reflects off elastic mirror barriers** so it stays bounded yet never settles. **A single drag = orderвҶ”chaos:** up/right вҶ’ tight barriers + small steps вҶ’ a nearly periodic pitched tone; down/left вҶ’ loose barriers + big steps + pitch wobble вҶ’ a gritty living roar. Three voices (Г—0.5/Г—1/Г—2). Rendered as a **WebGL2 oscilloscope of the actual current waveform** вҖ” a glowing ribbon filament redrawn each frame as its corners drift, over a ping-pong feedback afterimage field so you *see* the random walk, in **electric-violet (calm) вҶ’ hot-amber (chaotic) chromatic chiaroscuro on deep-teal/near-charcoal** (neither the banned bright-daylight nor a flat near-black glow). **Won the WIDE race** over `1201-ignition` (Izhikevich spiking-neuron sheet you ignite with a touch вҶ’ inharmonic **modal percussion**; вӯҗ banked **RESURRECT-FIRST**, strongest 4/5 floor) and `1202-torsion` ((p,q) torus-knot you drag to re-tie вҶ’ **KarplusвҖ“Strong waveguide**, strict two-colour ink-blue+vermilion Ikeda вҖ” **now with a TRUE projected-crossing detector**, the exact fix the В§669-banked `1197-torsion` lacked, so it supersedes that bank) on being the single **freshest VOICE** вҖ” a whole synthesis category the lab has never had, the most direct answer to the jury's headline that *the ear is bored* (six of fifteen a JI choir). **ResearchвҶ’build:** В§671 grep audit killed spectral-resynthesis / scanned-synthesis / waveshaping / WebRTC as non-fresh (all lab-prior), confirmed Izhikevich + GENDYN grep-0Г—, and **GendyJS** (github.com/abbernie/gendy) proved GENDYN is `AudioWorklet`-buildable today. Named refs: **Iannis Xenakis** *GENDY3* (1991) / *Formalized Music*; **Peter Hoffmann** (GENDYN analysis); **Nick Collins** / **Andrew Brown** (realtime stochastic synthesis); GendyJS. Banks `1201-ignition` (вӯҗ) + `1202-torsion` as IDEAS В§671.)

### `/dream/1203-gendy` вҖ” *hold a living waveform вҖ” a jagged polygon whose corners random-walk each cycle, dragged from a pure tone into a stochastic roar and back, sung by Xenakis's GENDYN.* `demoable` В· **adult В· state: hypnagogic / orderвҶ”chaos threshold В· pole: intense (gritty-organic)** В· INPUT **drag orderвҶ”chaos (active gesture)** вҖ” one pointer axis sets step size + barrier width + per-cycle pitch jitter together and the pitch region live; releasing lets the field breathe on a slow sine so it never goes dead В· OUTPUT **raw-WebGL2 living-waveform oscilloscope** (the actual current breakpoint polygon drawn as a glowing ribbon filament, redrawn every frame as corners drift, over a ping-pong feedback afterimage field so the random walk is *visible*; dark chromatic Canvas2D fallback with shadow-blur glow + veil trails; `webglcontextlost` handling) В· TECHNIQUE **GENDYN dynamic stochastic synthesis** (grep-0Г— for the lab) вҖ” 12-breakpoint drawn waveform, per-cycle Gaussian random-walk of every breakpoint's amp + duration with elastic-mirror reflection, durations renormalised to the target period so the fundamental tracks pitch while jitter warps the shape; 3 voices at Г—0.5/Г—1/Г—2; `AudioWorklet` (Blob-URL string, self-contained) with a `ScriptProcessorNode` fallback running the identical DSP so it always sounds; `DynamicsCompressor` limiter + master gain ramped from 0 + per-sample `tanh` soft-clip + hard amplitude clamp вҖ” NOT a JI choir/drone, NOT modal, NOT FM В· PALETTE electric-violetвҶ’hot-amber chromatic-chiaroscuro on deep-teal/near-charcoal (clears BOTH the bright-daylight ban and the near-black-glow soft-ban) В· **ambition 3/5** (#1 novel-to-lab [GENDYN stochastic-waveform synthesis вҖ” grep-0Г—] В· #2 вүҘ3 subsystems [stochastic-breakpoint DSP engine (worklet + fallback) + orderвҶ”chaos control mapping + WebGL2 feedback oscilloscope renderer + Canvas2D fallback = 4] В· #3 named refs [Xenakis 1991; Hoffmann; Collins/Brown; GendyJS]) В· **diversity:** `banned=[bright-daylight/high-key PALETTE (jury 10Г—) В· Canvas2D-bright OUTPUT (jury 4Г—) В· JI-choir/drone VOICE (jury 6Г—) В· passive/no-gesture INPUT (jury 5Г—)]` В· `picked=[drag orderвҶ”chaos INPUT (active) В· WebGL2-feedback-oscilloscope OUTPUT В· GENDYN-stochastic-synthesis TECHNIQUE (grep-0Г—, novel VOICE) В· violetвҶ’amber chromatic-chiaroscuro PALETTE В· gritty/organic intense VIBE]` вҖ” clears every ban; the fresh non-JI VOICE is the point. **SAFETY (photosensitive epilepsy):** no strobe вҖ” the waveform motion is continuous, all brightness is slow luminance drift; audio gesture-gated (Begin) + limiter + ramped-from-0 master + `tanh` soft-clip + hard clamp; `prefers-reduced-motion` lowers the chaos ceiling + slows motion; full teardown (RAF cancel + worklet/script node + all nodes disconnected + `ctx.close()` + GL program/buffers/textures deleted + `webglcontextlost` + resize listener removed + object URL revoked). **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (fully client-side; no network, no mic). **Validation:** authoritative winner-only `npm run build` вҶ’ **Compiled вң“ вҶ’ Linting and checking validity of types вң“** (every warning pre-existing `src/lib/**`: rate-limit / logger / journeys / shader-preferences вҖ” **ZERO from the 1203 folder**), then the standing container **`EMFILE`** at `Collecting page data` (`next-font-manifest.json` вҖ” ~4096-fd ceiling on ~700 pages, `ulimit -Hn`=4096 not raiseable, infra not code, identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys uncapped). `.next/server/app/dream/1203-gendy/page.js` **compiled вң“ (51 KB)**; `tsc --noEmit` project-wide = 0 errors, 0 referencing 1203; `next lint --dir src/app/dream/1203-gendy` = вң” no warnings/errors. **Compile + lint + type + DSP-graph-by-inspection verified (the elastic-barrier reflection + Gaussian-walk in `gendy-core.ts`/`worklet-source.ts` are correct by construction); NOT GPU/ear-verified** вҖ” no display/speakers in the headless box, so whether the grit *reads* as a musical orderвҶ”chaos gradient and the oscilloscope *reads* as a living waveform wants Karel's hardware; the Canvas2D fallback + slow-breath idle guarantee it is never blank or silent. Honest edges (builder-disclosed): pitch is renormalised per cycle (grit reads stronger than pitch-instability vs Xenakis's fully-free durations вҖ” a deliberate trade for a *holdable* instrument); the scope shows only the lead mid-register voice; the ScriptProcessor fallback is deprecated and can glitch under load (exists only so it never goes silent). Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer fire; banks `1201-ignition` (вӯҗ) + `1202-torsion` as IDEAS В§671. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1203-gendy/README.md`

## вӯҗ Prior (Cycle 669 вҖ” **adult** **WIDE** вҖ” 3 orthogonal **grep-0Г— engine** explorers, each clearing the ambition floor on a DIFFERENT never-built technique, chosen to break BOTH monocultures the 2026-07-05 jury named (bright-daylight palette В· JI-choir/drone voice). Ships `1196-fibration` вҖ” **float, drug-free, INSIDE the Hopf fibration.** The 3-sphere fibres into interlocked great circles: sample the base 2-sphere, lift each point to its fibre (quaternion parametrisation, `|q|=1`), stereographically project SВівҶ’RВі so the fibres become nested, mutually-LINKED Villarceau/Clifford tori, then spin the whole bundle through 4D by a slow unit-quaternion rotation `qLВ·qВ·qR` (GPU-side, in the vertex shader) вҖ” the rings breathe and turn inside-out, a cosmic-ambient NDE/boundless space you float through (tilt вҶ’ drag вҶ’ auto-journey). **The geometry SINGS the topology:** a bank of 2-operator **FM bells** (NOT a JI choir/drone вҖ” cashes jury provocation #2) whose pitch tracks each lead fibre's base-latitude and whose FM index tracks its projected radius, breath-paced. Palette is **chromatic-chiaroscuro jewel-on-graphite** with a luminous violet tunnel-centre (neither the banned bright-daylight nor a flat near-black glow вҖ” cashes provocation #1) and fills the **cosmic-ambient pole** the jury's bright-monoculture audit shows is starved. **Won the WIDE race** over `1195-ignition` (HodgkinвҖ“Huxley/Izhikevich spiking-neuron sheet вҶ’ modal percussion вҖ” вӯҗ banked top resurrect) and `1197-torsion` ((p,q) torus-knot вҶ’ KarplusвҖ“Strong waveguide вҖ” banked) on being the most genuinely novel STRUCTURE (true fibre bundle вҖ” grep-0Г—; the lab's `1042` was a 4D *polytope* wireframe, categorically different), the freshest VOICE vs recent ships (FM, where 1193's modal gong + 1195's modal percussion both use modal synthesis), and bulletproof for the 06:30 glance (auto-journey plays itself). **ResearchвҶ’build:** В§669 dive found the *Parker Solar Probe вҶ’ Hopf fibration* audio-visual rendering (Zenodo 14796817, Feb 2025 вҖ” granular sonification over a stereographic Hopf projection) вҖ” confirms Hopf-fibration sonification is a live 2025 domain, still lab-0Г—; 1196 takes the **pure-topology + FM** route (data-free вҖ” honours jury provocation #3, "stop sonifying feeds"). Named refs: **Heinz Hopf (1931)**; **Niles Johnson**'s Hopf visualisation; Villarceau circles / the Clifford torus; La Monte Young / Гүliane Radigue drone lineage (realised in FM timbre). Banks `1195-ignition` (вӯҗ) + `1197-torsion` as IDEAS В§669.)

## Prior (Cycle 668 вҖ” **adult** **DEEP** вҖ” ONE concept, *hear the living Earth: the planet's real, live earthquakes each strike a resonant inharmonic bell-gong, tuned by magnitude + depth, played as a slow global bell-choir over a BRIGHT, NON-MAP rendering of the Earth's depth structure* вҖ” raced via two non-Canvas2D surfaces. Ships `1193-tremor-core` вҖ” **press "Listen to the Earth" and the planet's real, live seismicity rings a cut-open, glowing Earth.** USGS's public **past-24h earthquake feed** (keyless GeoJSON, verified live this cycle вҖ” 230 quakes/24h) drives an inharmonic **modal bell-gong**: bigger quake = **lower, longer** bell (magnitude вҶ’ a fundamental snapped to a just-intonation pentatonic grid so overlapping strikes stay consonant); **depth shapes the timbre** (deep = darker/muffled + more inharmonic detune, shallow = bright); and вҖ” the В§668 research refinement вҖ” each strike opens with a short **stick-slip friction onset** (a bandpass-swept noise burst, from *"Echoes of the Land"* arXiv 2507.14947, which models quakes as stick-slip friction) so the gong feels *seismic*, not a clean mallet. The 24h are **time-compressed into a ~150 s chronological loop** (250 ms min inter-onset вҶ’ a slow bell-choir, not a machine-gun). The visual is a **WebGL2 fragment-shader Earth CROSS-SECTION** вҖ” a bright cream/bronze cutaway of inner-core вҶ’ outer-core вҶ’ mantle вҶ’ crust вҖ” where **each quake rings at its TRUE DEPTH** (radius from center = `surfaceВ·(1 вҲ’ depth/700)`, azimuth from longitude), so the depthвҶ’timbre mapping is made *visible*: a bright additive flash + expanding concentric depth-rings, slow luminance decay (no strobe). **This is the вӯҗ В§667 top-resurrect `1191-tremor-gongs` shipped** вҖ” but deliberately rendered as depth-*structure*, NOT the bright-2D-world-map form it was banked on (which repeats `1173`/`1161`), cashing the still-open jury provocation #5 (real-world data, was 0Г—). **Won the DEEP race over `1194-tremor-strata`** (the same gong engine on a bright SVG depth-strata *column* вҖ” the legible/diagrammatic sibling) on being the more physically *transporting* rendering + WebGL2 being fresher in the last-10 window than SVG. It's a full-screen shader you **watch** (not a draggable 3D field вҶ’ clears the jury ban), bright (never near-black вҶ’ clears the glow ban), Canvas2D-primary is banned (6Г— in last 10) and WebGL2 dodges it. **ResearchвҶ’build:** В§668 dive вҖ” *"Echoes of the Land"* (arXiv 2507.14947, 2025, stick-slip granular seismic installation) + Alexandre Estrela *"RedSkyFalls"* (Venice Biennale 2026, live global seismic вҶ’ sound/image) вҶ’ sharpened the вӯҗ seismic seed with a stick-slip attack + a fresh 2026 named ref. Named refs: **"Echoes of the Land"** (2025); **Estrela "RedSkyFalls"** (2026); **Florian Dombois** *Auditory Seismology*; **USGS/Zhigang Peng** "Listening to Earthquakes"; **Andrea Polli**. Banks `1194-tremor-strata` as IDEAS В§668.)

### `/dream/1193-tremor-core` вҖ” *hear the living Earth right now вҖ” the planet's real, live earthquakes each strike a resonant bell-gong, ringing at their true depth inside a cut-open, glowing Earth.* `demoable` В· **adult В· technique: live-USGS-seismic вҶ’ inharmonic modal bell-gong sonification (a lab first вҖ” grep-0Г—) В· pole: n/a (bright rice-paper/bronze, about-the-world)** В· INPUT **live real-world data** (USGS `all_day.geojson`, keyless CORS GET, past 24h, guarded per-field parse + NaN clamps + mandatory embedded ~12-quake fallback + `в—Ҹ liveВ·N` / `в—Ӣ sample data` badge + 60s re-poll; no user gesture beyond Begin вҖ” NOT touch/drag) В· OUTPUT **raw-WebGL2 fragment-shader Earth cross-section** (full-screen-triangle shader you WATCH: layered inner-core/outer-core/mantle/crust bands on rice-paper + ink graticule; up to 24 live quake blooms passed as `uniform vec4[24]` placed by azimuth(lon) + radius(depth), each a flash + expanding concentric rings; Canvas2D fallback, `webglcontextlost` handling, DPR-cap 1.75, reduced-motion вҖ” NOT Canvas2D-primary, NOT a three.js-3D-field-you-drag, NOT dark) В· TECHNIQUE **inharmonic modal bell-gong synthesis driven by live seismic data + stick-slip onset + time-compressed scheduler** вҖ” 7 inharmonic partials [0.5В·1В·1.19В·1.71В·2В·2.74В·3] with independent exponential decays вҶ’ per-voice lowpass вҶ’ shared procedural convolution reverb вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` limiter вҶ’ ~0.2 ramped master; magвҶ’LOWER JI-pentatonic-snapped fundamental (660вҶ’55 Hz) + amp + ring length; depthвҶ’lowpass cutoff + inharmonic detune; a 40вҖ“90 ms bandpass-swept friction noise burst per strike; 16-voice oldest-steal; 24hвҶ’~150 s chronological loop, 250 ms min inter-onset В· PALETTE bright rice-paper/bronze/amber/ink (clears the near-black-glow ban) В· **ambition 4/5** (#1 novel-to-lab [live seismic sonification вҖ” grep-0Г—] В· #2 вүҘ3 subsystems [live fetch/parse/fallback + inharmonic modal gong synth w/ stick-slip + WebGL2 cross-section renderer + time-compressed scheduler = 4] В· #3 named refs [Echoes of the Land 2025; Estrela 2026; Dombois; Peng; Polli] В· #5 recent research [RESEARCH В§668, today]) В· **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D-primary OUTPUT (last-10 6Г—) В· three.js/WebGL-3D-field-you-drag OUTPUT (jury) В· physics-sim-as-drag-instrument TECHNIQUE (jury) В· touch/drag INPUT В· near-dark cosmic-ambient VIBE (jury, glow-ban) В· audio-first (1165/1183/1190, 3Г— in window) В· live-dataвҶ’bright-2D-MAP FORM (1173/1161)]` В· `picked=[live-real-world-data INPUT (fresh вҖ” no data ship since 1173, 5 back) В· WebGL2-shader-cross-section OUTPUT (non-Canvas2D, non-map, non-draggable) В· inharmonic-modal-gong-from-live-seismic TECHNIQUE (grep-0Г—) В· bright rice-paper/bronze PALETTE В· contemplative/about-the-world VIBE]` вҖ” clears every ban; live-data is starved and the depth-cross-section dodges both the Canvas2D-surface ban and the bright-2D-map form. **SAFETY (photosensitive epilepsy):** no strobe вҖ” all brightness is slow luminance decay, the 250 ms min inter-onset caps flash frequency; audio gesture-gated ("Listen to the Earth") + `DynamicsCompressor` limiter + ~0.2 ramped-from-0 master + full teardown (RAF cancel + all voices stopped/disconnected + `ctx.close()` + GL program/buffers deleted + `WEBGL_lose_context` + `webglcontextlost` handler). **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (fully client-side; the USGS GeoJSON is fetched directly in the browser from a public keyless endpoint вҖ” no server route, no mic, no upload). **Validation:** authoritative winner-only `npm run build` вҶ’ **Compiled вң“ вҶ’ Linting and checking validity of types вң“** (every warning pre-existing `src/lib/**`; ZERO from the 1193 folder), then the standing container **`EMFILE`** at `Collecting page data` (`next-font-manifest.json` вҖ” ~4096-fd ceiling on ~600 pages, infra not code, identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys uncapped). `.next/server/app/dream/1193-tremor-core/page.js` **compiled вң“ (42 KB)**; `tsc --noEmit | grep 1193` = 0; `eslint src/app/dream/1193-tremor-core/` = exit 0. **Compile + lint + type + shader/gong-graph-by-inspection verified; NOT ear/eye-verified** вҖ” no speakers/display in the headless box, so whether the bell-choir *reads* as musical (vs. a machine-gun or too-sparse) and the cross-section *reads* as a ringing planet wants Karel's hardware; the live USGS feed IS reachable from the container (verified 230 quakes), and it degrades to identical-sounding sample data + a Canvas2D cross-section on any failure, so it never blank-screens or falls silent. ## Cycle 667 вҖ” **adult** **WIDE** вҖ” 3 orthogonal explorers, each clearing the ambition floor on a DIFFERENT fresh tag, none in the jury's banned combos (touch/drag В· three.js/WebGL 3D-field В· physics-sim-as-drag-instrument В· near-dark cosmic glow). Ships `1190-quietude` вҖ” **what if SILENCE were the instrument?** An inversion of every mic prototype: a just-intonation drone-choir (root 110 Hz В· partials 1В·9/8В·5/4В·3/2В·5/3В·15/8В·2) is *always* synthesizing, held at zero вҖ” the room's **quiet OPENS it** (slow attack) and any sound **DUCKS it** (fast release). An **adaptive noise floor** (running-min that falls fast / rises slow) self-calibrates to any room and rejects steady fan/speaker bleed, so there's no fixed threshold. Sustained stillness is rewarded: a **stillness timer** unlocks one more overtone voice every ~4 quiet seconds (up to all 7) so deep silence is audibly *richer*; a disturbance shatters a bright gold/ivory **SVG mandala** into drifting motes that reconverge as quiet returns. No mic? A **still-mode** fallback rewards leaving pointer + keyboard idle вҖ” the same instrument, a different silence-sensor. **Won the WIDE fire on being the diversity-correct AND furthest-from-the-fortnight pick:** its **SVG output dodges the Canvas2D-output saturation** (вүҘ5 of the last 10; both losers were Canvas2D), it's the вӯҗ flagged top resurrect for the next audio-first/meditative slot (audio-first now stale вҖ” last at 1183, two ships back), and it cashes the still-open jury provocation #4 (screen bias вҖ” "one audio-first in fifteen"). Beat `1191-tremor-gongs` (live USGS earthquakeвҶ’modal-bell sonification вҖ” a genuinely fresh *domain* but repeats the exact live-data-map FORM of `1173-solar-wind-choir` from 4 cycles back, the "bright data-map local minimum" the В§661/В§662 notes warned of) and `1192-strange-song` (RK4 strange-attractor composer вҖ” beautiful but the most passive + Canvas2D). Named refs: **John Cage** *4вҖІ33вҖі* (1952); **Гүliane Radigue** sustained-drone practice. Banks both losers as IDEAS В§667.)

### `/dream/1190-quietude` вҖ” *what if silence were the instrument? вҖ” be quiet and a just-intonation drone-choir blooms; make any sound and it ducks; stay still and it grows richer.* `demoable` В· **adult В· technique: silence-as-instrument вҖ” adaptive-noise-floor gating of a JI drone-choir (a lab first вҖ” grep-0Г—) В· pole: cosmic-ambient (bright/meditative, NOT dark)** В· INPUT **mic-as-silence-sensor (inverted gate)** вҖ” RMS вҶ’ adaptive noise floor (fast-fall / slow-rise running minimum) вҶ’ `openness = 1 вҲ’ smoothstep(floor, floor+margin, rms)`, asymmetric slow-attack/fast-release; **still-mode** pointer/keyboard-idle fallback when mic denied (NOT touch-as-instrument, NOT drag) В· OUTPUT **inline SVG mandala** (concentric `<circle>` rings + radial `<line>` rays whose count grows with unlocked voices + a 70-mote `<circle>` pool, all attribute-animated via refs in one RAF loop, no per-frame React re-render; radial-gradient glow + Gaussian-blur softening вҖ” NOT Canvas2D, NOT three.js/WebGL-3D-field, NOT dark) В· TECHNIQUE **JI drone-choir + adaptive-floor gating + stillness-timer voice-unlock** вҖ” 7 detuned-osc-pair voices with вүӨ0.3 Hz shimmer LFO вҶ’ peaking formant + lowpass вҶ’ shared procedural convolution reverb вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` limiter вҶ’ master peak ~0.18; a fractional unlocked-voice count rises in quiet and relaxes slowly (never yanks) on disturbance В· PALETTE bright gold/ivory on warm off-white `#faf6ec`, dark stone ink text (clears the near-black-glow ban) В· **ambition 3/5** (#1 novel-to-lab [silence-as-gate / adaptive-noise-floor inversion вҖ” grep-0Г—] В· #2 вүҘ3 subsystems [adaptive floor + JI choir synth + stillness-state machine + SVG mandala = 4] В· #3 named refs [Cage; Radigue] В· #5 recent research [IDEAS В§665 bank, research-derived]) В· **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D OUTPUT (last-10 вүҘ5Г—) В· three.js/WebGL-3D-field OUTPUT В· physics-sim-as-instrument TECHNIQUE В· touch/drag INPUT В· near-dark cosmic-ambient VIBE (jury) В· live-data-feedвҶ’bright-2D-map FORM (1173, 4 cycles back)]` В· `picked=[mic-as-silence INPUT (inverted вҖ” grep-0Г—) В· SVG mandala OUTPUT (fresh surface, dodges Canvas2D saturation) В· adaptive-floor-gated JI-choir TECHNIQUE В· bright gold/ivory PALETTE В· audio-first/meditative/conceptual VIBE]` вҖ” clears every ban; SVG + audio-first are both starved in the window. **SAFETY (photosensitive epilepsy):** no strobe вҖ” all motion is slow luminance/position drift (`prefers-reduced-motion` flattens the mote scatter, keeps a gentle breath); audio gesture-gated ("Enter the quiet") + limiter + ~0.18 ramped-from-0 master + full teardown (RAF cancel + mic tracks stopped + `ctx.close()` + choir stop + idle-listener removal). **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (fully client-side; mic is analysed for level only вҖ” the analyser is never connected to any destination, nothing recorded or uploaded; no new route). **Validation:** authoritative winner-only `npm run build` вҶ’ **Compiled вң“ вҶ’ Linting and checking validity of types вң“** (every warning pre-existing `src/lib/**`; ZERO from the 1190 folder), then the standing container **`EMFILE`** at `Collecting page data` (`next-font-manifest.json` вҖ” ~4096-fd ceiling on ~600 pages, infra not code, identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys uncapped). `.next/server/app/dream/1190-quietude/page.js` **compiled вң“ (35 KB)**; `tsc --noEmit | grep 1190` = 0; `eslint src/app/dream/1190-quietude/` = exit 0. **Compile + lint + type + gate/choir-logic-by-inspection verified; NOT ear/room-verified** вҖ” no mic/speakers/display in the headless box, so whether the choir *blooms* legibly in a real quiet room, the 0.55/0.35 unlock thresholds, and the noise-floor margins want Karel's hardware; the mandala animates + the choir is ready on Begin (never blank/silent), and still-mode makes it fully reviewer-exercisable even in a noisy room. ## Cycle 666 вҖ” **adult** **DEEP** вҖ” ONE concept, *Karel's real "Welcome Home" piano gives itself a **time of day**, painting a bright daylit sky that evolves dawn вҶ’ midday вҶ’ golden dusk across the whole piece*, raced via two renderers of the same day-clock engine. Ships `1188-welcome-sky` вҖ” **press Begin and your own recording paints the sky it belongs under.** A bright, high-key **volumetric raymarched cloudscape** on raw WebGL2: a single day-clock `progress = currentTime/duration` sweeps the sun on a `sin(ПҖp)` elevation arc with azimuth drift while the whole palette lerps **dawn-rose (low sun) вҶ’ midday-blue (high, white) вҶ’ dusk-amber (low, gold)** вҖ” so the sky at minute 5 is a genuinely different world than at minute 1 (**long-form stateful** вҖ” the categorical menu gap the jury keeps flagging). Live features bend the weather: **energy (RMS)** вҶ’ cloud coverage + thickness + sun bloom (loud = thick dramatic sun-lit clouds; quiet = clear open sky), **centroid** вҶ’ warmвҶ”cool light + wispy-high vs heavy-low clouds, **flux (onsets)** вҶ’ a soft light-shaft brightening near the sun (smoothed, never a strobe). Real audio in 3 tiers (Karel's Welcome Home recording via the existing read-only `/api/audio/<id>` вҶ’ file-drop вҶ’ offline-rendered piano-arpeggio fallback; emerald/violet/amber source chip). **This cashes two overdue mandates at once:** the 2026-07-04 jury's provocation #1 (*"ban the near-black glow вҖ” ship a bright, daylit, high-key palette"*) AND the long-standing real-piano mandate (jury praised `1155-crucible` for it; last fed cycle 656). A **skyscape driven by a real recording is grep-0Г—** across the whole lab (only `243-spectral-cloud`/`246-spectral-splat` mention "cloud", both spectral point-clouds вҖ” no sky/weather/dawn). Chosen over its DEEP sibling `1189-turner-sky` (a *painterly* Turner/Constable oil-sky вҖ” layered translucent brush-stroke cloud sprites + glazed light on three.js) on **being the more physically transporting bright sky** + a clean strict-null build (1189 had an outstanding `'g' is possibly null` fix in its Canvas2D fallback at curation). **ResearchвҶ’build:** В§666 dive вҖ” real-time chromagramвҶ’chord accompaniment (arXiv 2503.06348) + Z-Tonnetz harmonic-space viz were the surprises, but a grep audit killed both as lab-prior (`28-chord-canvas`, `1019-echo-halls-tonnetz`) and redirected to the 0Г— daylit-sky register. Named refs: **J.M.W. Turner** & **John Constable** cloud studies; **Brian Eno** *77 Million Paintings* (2006); **Refik Anadol**. Banks `1189-turner-sky` as IDEAS В§666.)

a bright idle sky renders on mount regardless, and the full arc is best felt with the multi-minute recording (a short/looping source settles at dusk вҖ” noted). ## Cycle 665 вҖ” **adult** **WIDE** вҖ” 3 orthogonal sensor/embodied explorers, each clearing the ambition floor via a DIFFERENT input the recent window has starved, all bright/high-key; directly cashing the 2026-07-04 jury's **#1 headline gap** вҖ” *"zero embodied prototypes in fifteen cycles; camera/body-tracking/MIDI/tilt all 0Г—, touch 8Г—"*. Ships `1185-face-organ` вҖ” **sing a shimmering choir with your face вҖ” no hands, no keys.** MediaPipe **FaceLandmarker** (CDN-loaded, GPUвҶ’CPU) reads your **52 facial blendshapes** live: open your mouth and the choir sings (jawOpen вҶ’ loudness + vowel openness), shape your lips to move through the vowels /u/вҶ’/o/вҶ’/a/вҶ’/e/вҶ’/i/ (puckerвҶ”smile morphs the formant targets), raise your brows to climb the pentatonic scale, tilt your head to pan + bend, blink for a soft accent. The sound is a **real 3-formant vocal synth** (a sawtooth glottal source + breath through parallel F1/F2/F3 bandpass filters swept between the **Peterson & Barney (1952)** vowel table) so it reads as sung "aah/ooo/eee", not a buzzer вҖ” a small detuned unison stack gives the choral shimmer, pitch is pentatonic-quantised so it's always consonant. Rendered as a **bright ivory/gold/rose luminous face-mask** over the mirrored webcam that blooms with the voice (high-key вҖ” honors the still-active near-black-glow ban). **This is the direct cash of the jury's #1 embodied gap** вҖ” unlike `1160-body-choir`'s frame-differencing, this is genuine facial-**landmark** tracking, a true fresh input in the window вҖ” and it's **triple love-aligned** (Karel loves `101-camera-song` / `217-dance-avatar` / `234-kids-hand-creature`, all embodied camera pieces). No camera / MediaPipe fail вҶ’ an on-screen **vowel-pad + pitch-slider** fallback plays the identical engine. Chosen over two strong siblings on **the jury gap + 06:30 phone-reviewability + surprise**: `1187-quietude` (вӯҗ banked вҖ” a conceptual **inversion** where SILENCE is the instrument: an adaptive-noise-floor gates a just-intonation drone-choir that blooms only when the room goes quiet вҖ” the freshest *vibe*, but it needs a silent room + headphones + patience, a harder morning sell) and `1186-tilt-field` (a Tonnetz tilt-navigated organ вҖ” banked lower because tilt just shipped at `1170-tilt-pool`). **ResearchвҶ’build:** В§665 dive вҖ” MediaPipe FaceLandmarker's LIVE_STREAM 52-blendshape pipeline (Google AI Edge, current) as a real-time facial *instrument* is an under-explored use (docs cover avatars/filters, not music). Named refs: **Peterson & Barney (1952)** vowel formants; **Zach Lieberman** / **Daito Manabe** facial-performance work.)

## Cycle 664 вҖ” **adult** **DEEP** вҖ” ONE concept, *an audio-first generative minimalist ensemble that performs forever and is genuinely different at minute 6 than minute 1*, raced via two process-music philosophies (discrete cell-advancement vs. continuous-tempo phasing); ships the вӯҗ TOP RESURRECT the last two cycles queued. Ships `1183-in-c-loom` вҖ” **a faithful Terry Riley *In C* that performs endlessly.** Twelve virtual players each move forward-only through **53 authored melodic cells** (C-major rise вҶ’ a Bвҷӯ-shaded mixolydian middle вҶ’ a bright resolution back to a C octave), each repeating a cell a probabilistic number of times before advancing, all loosely held by a steady high-C eighth-note **pulse** and a warm low-C drone. A вүӨ3-cell **herding rule** keeps the ensemble from scattering, so the players phase apart and re-converge into ever-shifting interlocking patterns; when a player finishes cell 53 it wraps to a new pass, so it never stops. **This directly cashes the jury's #4 gap** вҖ” "the screen bias is near-total: one audio-first piece in fifteen" вҖ” with a genuinely *audio-first, long-form-stateful* piece (a spare 53-tick ring with 12 gliding dots is the only visual). It stays **bright** (warm parchment/ivory-amber, dark stone ink вҖ” honors the still-active near-black-glow ban) and needs zero setup: press Begin and it plays. Chosen over its DEEP sibling `1184-phase-mill` (a rigorous **Steve Reich** continuous-tempo *phasing* engine вҖ” the same idea via players looping one cell at a hair-different tempi that drift out of unison and slowly re-gather) on **06:30 phone-reviewability**: In C delivers the interlocking-ensemble payoff within ~15 seconds and is anchored by its recognizable pulse, where the phasing engine's signature driftвҶ’re-convergence unfolds subtly over minutes. **ResearchвҶ’build:** В§664 dive вҖ” *Smol Sequencer* (Synthtopia, 2026-06-26) confirms browser generative-minimalism is a live 2026 lane; build consumes the banked В§663 IDEAS entry. Named refs: **Terry Riley *In C*** (1964); **Steve Reich *Piano Phase*** (1967). Banks вӯҗ `1184-phase-mill` (the continuous-phasing deepening вҖ” a "cell-advance вҶ” tempo-drift" mode toggle, and the fix for 1181's grid-quantized honest gap).)

tempo + density sliders + seed re-roll вҖ” no drag-as-instrument) В· OUTPUT **audio-first** (a spare secondary Canvas2D 53-tick ring with 12 gliding player dots; the SOUND is the piece) В· TECHNIQUE **Terry Riley *In C* generative ensemble** (grep-0Г—): 12 independent player state-machines (cell / cursor / pass / probabilistic repeat) advancing forward-only through 53 authored cells under a вүӨ3-cell herding rule + a steady eighth-note pulse;
