## Cycle 663 вҖ” **adult** **WIDE** вҖ” 3 orthogonal explorers, each clearing the ambition floor via a DIFFERENT **grep-verified novel-to-lab technique** on a DIFFERENT output surface (directly attacking this fire's diversity finding: in the last 10 ships BOTH Canvas2D **and** three.js outputs, and BOTH bright **and** dark palettes, are saturated вҖ” so the real gap is a *new output modality*). Ships `1180-illuminated-word` вҖ” **type a word and hear it become an illuminated hymn.** Type (or paste) any name / line / poem and a bright, self-illuminating **SVG vellum page** writes and gilds itself letter-by-letter, locked in time with a cross-modal **TEXTвҶ’MUSIC** engine: an oversized gold-leaf **drop-cap** opens, calligraphic words brighten as each is sung, vine/knotwork marginalia grow from the letters currently sounding. Letters вҶ’ **D-Dorian** scale degrees (arbitrary text stays consonant over a D drone); **vowels** вҶ’ sustained sung choir tones, **consonants** вҶ’ short plucked articulations; word-length вҶ’ phrase length; **punctuation** вҶ’ rests + a resolving cadence chord; each phrase traces a gentle sine harmonic arc. **All three of its headline tags are fresh-to-lab:** keyboard-**text** INPUT (0Г— recent), **SVG-typographic** OUTPUT (0Г— in the last 10), and **text-sonification** TECHNIQUE (grep-verified 0Г— across the whole lab) вҖ” the strongest possible answer to the 2026-07-04 jury's "does it look, sound, feel like anything else we've shipped this fortnight?", and it honors the still-active near-black-glow ban with a bright illuminated-manuscript palette. Chosen over two strong novel-technique siblings on **surprise + phone-reviewability**: it's the most personal ("watch your own name become a hymn") and the only one of the three that demos instantly on Karel's 06:30 phone (type a word вҶ’ song, zero setup). Banks `1181-in-c-loom` (a faithful **Terry Riley *In C*** generative ensemble вҖ” 12 virtual players phase through 53 cells, genuinely different at minute 6 than minute 1; the audio-first / long-form-stateful lane) + `1182-strange-song` (a bright **strange-attractor** instrument вҖ” RK4 Lorenz/RГ¶ssler/Aizawa drawn as sumi-e ink diffusing on warm paper while it sings its own path). **ResearchвҶ’build:** В§663 dive вҖ” WebGPU reached candidate-recommendation March 2026 (~85% support) and the current wave is audio-reactive compute art; that pushed me to hunt for a genuinely fresh output surface, and the diversity audit + grep landed on text-sonification/SVG-typography as the truly 0Г— lane. Named refs: the *Book of Kells* / *Lindisfarne Gospels* drop-cap + marginalia tradition; Apollinaire *Calligrammes* (concrete poetry); Kandinsky letter-colour synesthesia.)

## Cycle 662 вҖ” **adult** **DEEP** вҖ” ONE concept (*hear the sun's live weather as a choir* вҖ” the вӯҗ banked resurrect cycle 661 explicitly teed up) raced via 2 rendering philosophies (bright daylit readout vs. immersive dark magnetosphere field). Ships `1173-solar-wind-choir` вҖ” **hear the sun's weather hitting Earth right now.** Three live, keyless **NOAA Space Weather Prediction Center** feeds вҖ” solar-wind plasma (speed/density), interplanetary magnetic field (Bz/Bt), and the planetary K index вҖ” are fetched *client-side* every ~60s and sung by an **8-voice just-intonation choir** over a **bright, daylit** sunвҶ’Earth Canvas2D scene: wind **speed** lifts the register + streak speed, **density** fills the chord + particle flow, **Bz** (southward = geomagnetic storm) cross-fades harmony consonantвҶ’tense and tints the sky violet, **Bt** raises the shimmer, **Kp** lights an aurora ribbon + sparkle voices. An embedded snapshot keeps it singing if the feeds are unreachable (badge: emerald `в—Ҹ live В· <UTC>` / amber `в—Ӣ using sample data`). **The direct cash of the 2026-07-04 jury's provocation #5** ("build about the real world, not a Hamiltonian вҖ” sonify external data") on a data source the lab has **never** touched вҖ” it owns USGS-seismic + ADS-B air-traffic but never **space weather** вҖ” and it clears the jury's #1 FORM ban (bright/daylit, NOT the near-black cosmic glow). The form-sequencing block that banked this at 661 (its live-feedвҶ’sonify shape echoed `1161-flight-choir`) has cleared: two non-data ships (1165 audio-first, 1170 tilt) have since broken the run. Chosen over the immersive sibling `1174-magnetosphere-song` **on the jury's decisive gate:** 1174 is the more *transporting* build but renders a violet field over a near-dark base (`bgLвүҲ12вҖ“17%`) вҖ” the exact "near-black glow" under the fortnight ban вҖ” so it's banked (IDEAS В§662, вӯҗ resurrect when the glow-ban lifts / a "readoutвҶ”field" toggle on 1173). **ResearchвҶ’build:** В§661 dive (Helioradar AV 2026) вҶ’ В§662 re-anchor (NASA **IMAP I-ALiRT** real-time solar-wind pipeline begins 2026, replacing ACE/DSCOVR; arXiv 2206.04279 ULF-audibility method). Named refs: Helioradar AV (2026); Andrea Polli *Atmospherics / Weather Works*.)

### `/dream/1173-solar-wind-choir` вҖ” *hear the sun's weather hitting Earth right now вҖ” three live NOAA space-weather feeds sung as a just-intonation choir over a bright daylit sunвҶ’Earth scene.* `demoable` В· **adult В· state: real-world-data sonification (live space weather вҖ” a lab first) В· pole: n/a (bright/high-key daylight)** В· INPUT **live-external-data (3 keyless NOAA SWPC JSON products: plasma-5-minute, mag-5-minute, planetary-k-index; client-side fetch, ~60s poll, embedded fallback snapshot)** В· OUTPUT **bright daylit Canvas2D scene** (daytime sky gradient + warm sun disc + bright-blue Earth w/ bow-shock + sunвҶ’Earth wind streaks + Kp aurora ribbon; NOT three.js/WebGL, NOT a dark glow) В· TECHNIQUE **multi-feed space-weather вҶ’ 8-voice just-intonation choir sonification** (speedвҶ’register/vibrato + streak speed, densityвҶ’active-voice-count/chord richness [3вҶ’8 voices], BzвҶ’consonantвҶ”7-limit-tense JI crossfade + violet palette, BtвҶ’high-shelf shimmer, KpвҶ’aurora/shimmer voices; sine+triangle per voice вҶ’ peaking formant filter вҶ’ shared vibrato LFO вҶ’ shimmer shelf вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor limiter вҶ’ 0.2 master; all `setTargetAtTime`-ramped) В· PALETTE bright daylight вҖ” warm sun (#fffef4вҶ’#ffb545) / pale-blue Earth (#eaf6ffвҶ’#5aa9e6) / daytime sky (breaks the banned near-black glow) В· **ambition 3/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [live 3-feed keyless fetch+parse+per-feed-fallback + `computeTargets` mapping engine + 8-voice JI choir synth + bright Canvas2D sunвҶ’Earth renderer = 4] В· #3 named refs [Helioradar AV 2026; Andrea Polli *Weather Works*] В· #5 RESEARCH В§661 Helioradar + В§662 IMAP/ULF re-anchor). **diversity:** `banned=[touch/drag INPUT В· three.js/WebGL-3D-field OUTPUT В· physics-sim-as-instrument TECHNIQUE В· near-dark cosmic-ambient VIBE вҖ” all JURY 2026-07-04; + (this fire) bias-check vs 1161's bright-data-map form (cleared: 2 non-data ships since)]` В· `picked=[live-external-data (space-weather) INPUT В· bright daylit Canvas2D sunвҶ’Earth OUTPUT В· multi-feedвҶ’JI-choir sonification TECHNIQUE В· bright daylight PALETTE]` вҖ” clears every ban; the direct cash of the jury's "sonify the real world" lane on a lab-first data source (space weather). **SAFETY (photosensitive epilepsy):** no strobe вҖ” brightness only *drifts* on a smooth ~0.35 Hz sub-audio oscillation; `prefers-reduced-motion` slows particles + freezes the drift; audio gesture-gated (Begin) + limiter + 0.2 master + full teardown (RAF cancel + oscillators/LFO stopped + poll interval cleared + `ctx.close()`). **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (fully client-side; NOAA feeds are keyless public GETs fetched directly). **Validation:** authoritative winner-only `npm run build` вҶ’ **Compiled вң“ + Linting/type-check вң“** (only pre-existing `src/lib/**` + other-prototype warnings; ZERO from the 1173 folder). `.next/server/app/dream/1173-solar-wind-choir/page.js` **compiled вң“ (32 KB)**; `tsc --noEmit | grep 1173` = 0; folder eslint exit 0. **Compile + lint + type + feeds-parse/audio-graph/mapping-by-inspection verified; NOT ear/eye-verified, and the LIVE feed not exercised headless** (the honest gap вҖ” NOAA solar-wind product URLs 404 through this sandbox's curl proxy, so both builders demoed on the embedded fallback; the paths are standard SWPC products that resolve from a real browser, and the fallback is built to sound/render identically. Whether the space weather *reads* as a bright choir wants Karel's speakers + a live browser). Winner of a DEEP 2-approach race; banked вӯҗ `1174-magnetosphere-song` as IDEAS В§662. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1173-solar-wind-choir/README.md`

## Cycle 661 вҖ” **adult** **WIDE** вҖ” 3 orthogonal explorers (tilt-balance instrument / live-space-weather choir / Web-MIDI fresco), each clearing the ambition floor via a DIFFERENT jury-named 0Г— input and all dodging every 2026-07-04 jury ban. Ships `1170-tilt-pool` вҖ” **play chords by balancing.** Tilt your phone (or move the pointer, on desktop) and sound pools like water to the lowest corner: hold near *level* and several just-intonation pools coexist as a full chord; tilt *steeply* and everything drains into one deep low pool. **DeviceOrientation tilt is a jury-named 0Г— input**, and the fluid-pooling interaction/palette feel like nothing the lab shipped this fortnight вҖ” the direct answer to the jury's #1 gate (*form monotony*: "does it look, sound, feel like anything else this fortnight?"). Chosen over two strong siblings **specifically for diversity + phone-native review:** the runner-up `1171-solar-wind-choir` (freshest research вҖ” today's Helioradar-2026 dive) structurally *repeats* `1161-flight-choir`'s "live keyless feed вҶ’ sonify вҶ’ bright 2D readout" form from just two ships ago, so shipping it risked starting a NEW "bright data-map sonification" local minimum; and `1170` is the only one of the three whose headline gesture (physical tilt) works on the phone Karel reviews from at 06:30. Banks вӯҗ `1171-solar-wind-choir` (hear the sun's weather hitting Earth *right now* вҖ” three live NOAA SWPC feeds as a JI choir; the вӯҗ TOP resurrect for the next real-world/cosmos-data lane once it won't stack on 1161's form) + `1172-midi-fresco` (the lab's **first Web MIDI** вҖ” every note paints a living buon-fresco; resurrect for a MIDI/live-performance cycle Karel can plug a controller into). **ResearchвҶ’build:** В§661 dive вҖ” the tilt/orientation-audio prong (spatial-audio + camera head-tracking is a live 2026 area) anchors the shipped tilt instrument; the space-weather prong (Helioradar AV, av.helioradar.com, 2026) anchors the banked 1171. Named ref: Toshio Iwai *Electroplankton* / physical balance-instrument lineage.)

### `/dream/1170-tilt-pool` вҖ” *play chords by balancing вҖ” tilt your device and sound pools like water to the lowest corner.* `demoable` В· **adult В· state: embodied tilt-balance liquid-harmony instrument (bright, playful вҖ” not psychedelic) В· pole: n/a (bright/high-key aqueous)** В· INPUT **DeviceOrientation tilt** (beta/gamma; iOS `requestPermission()` gated on an "Enable tilt" gesture) with a **pointer-over-canvas desktop fallback** that runs immediately on Begin (jury-named 0Г— input) В· OUTPUT **bright daylit Canvas2D fluid** (translucent slumping blobs + foam + ripples + spirit-level bubble; NOT three.js/WebGL, NOT a dark glow) В· TECHNIQUE **shallow-water pooling model** (six pools project their basin position onto the smoothed gravity vector вҶ’ downhill pools deepen/loud, uphill drain to silence) driving a **6-voice just-intonation drone bank** (sine + soft detuned triangle per pool over a JI major scale on F3, each gain driven by pool depth via throttled `setTargetAtTime`; shared-lowpass LFO + feedback tail = liquid shimmer) В· PALETTE bright aqueous dawn-blue/aqua/white-foam (breaks the banned near-black glow AND the nascent bright-data-map form) В· **ambition 3/5** (#1 novel-to-lab **DeviceOrientation tilt input** [jury-named 0Г—; the lab's prior tilt work `1151-tilt-descent` was banked, never shipped] В· #2 вүҘ3 subsystems [tilt/pointer gravity-vector input + shallow-water pooling model + 6-voice JI drone bank + Canvas2D fluid render = 4] В· #3 named ref [Toshio Iwai *Electroplankton*; physical balance/liquid-instrument lineage]). **diversity:** `banned=[touch/drag INPUT В· three.js/WebGL-3D-field OUTPUT В· physics-sim-as-instrument TECHNIQUE В· near-dark cosmic-ambient VIBE вҖ” all JURY 2026-07-04; + (this fire) the "bright live-data-feed sonification map" form that 1161 established]` В· `picked=[DeviceOrientation-tilt / pointer INPUT (jury 0Г—) В· bright aqueous Canvas2D-fluid OUTPUT В· shallow-water-pooling + JI-drone TECHNIQUE В· bright daylit aqueous PALETTE]` вҖ” clears every ban; the direct cash of the jury's primary FORM-monotony gate on the review-phone-native input. **SAFETY (photosensitive epilepsy):** no strobe вҖ” brightness changes smooth and < 3 Hz; `prefers-reduced-motion` calms smoothing + drops wobble/ripple. ## Cycle 660 вҖ” **adult** **DEEP** вҖ” ONE fresh audio-first concept, *the instrument is inside your own ear*, raced via 2 approaches (active phantom-**melody** vs immersive phantom-**field**). Ships `1165-third-ear` вҖ” **a melody you hear that no speaker plays.** Two loud, close pure tones (the "primaries", ~1.2вҖ“2.7 kHz) sound together and the nonlinear mechanics of your cochlea generate an audible **difference tone** at their gap `О” = fвӮӮ вҲ’ fвӮҒ` вҖ” a *third* tone ("Tartini tone", Maryanne Amacher's "ear tone") that is NOT in the signal. The composition lives entirely in О”: a seeded just-intonation pentatonic melody develops (statementвҶ’variationвҶ’restвҶ’return, drifting over minutes) while the two real primaries ride high and nearly still. A **carrier-height** sweep moves both primaries together so the played pitch climbs but the phantom melody holds вҖ” the proof it's in your head вҖ” and an **A/B toggle** mutes one primary so the phantom vanishes (proof it was never played). Eyes-closed, headphones, deliberately minimal instructional visual. **The direct answer to the 2026-07-04 jury's provocation #4** ("the screen bias is near-total вҖ” one audio-first piece in fifteen"), on a grep-0Г— technique (`otoacoustic`/`Tartini` = 0Г—; the lab's isochronic/binaural-beat entrainment is a *different* psychoacoustic family) вҖ” and NOT another entrainment/meditation piece (1138-theta-ear already owns that). Banks вӯҗ `1166-ear-tone-field` (the SAME otoacoustic phenomenon as a sustained immersive Amacher *field* вҖ” 9 just-tuned pairs whose О”'s stack into a harmonic phantom chord, a 14-stage ~10-min seeded evolution + binaural bed; the вӯҗ TOP resurrect for the next immersive/cosmic-ambient-audio lane, once the near-black-glow ban lifts). **ResearchвҶ’build:** В§660 dive вҖ” Sonorities 2026 (Belfast) symposium session on Amacher's "ear tones" confirms the technique is live current-year, not archival. Named refs: Maryanne Amacher *Sound Characters (Making the Third Ear)* 1999; Giuseppe Tartini *il terzo suono* 1714; Alvin Lucier.)

### `/dream/1165-third-ear` вҖ” *the instrument is inside your own ear вҖ” two high tones sound, and the melody you hear in the gap between them is one your cochlea makes, not the speakers.* `demoable` В· **adult В· state: psychoacoustic difference-tone ("ear tone") instrument вҖ” audio-first, eyes-closed В· pole: intense-perceptual (alert wonder, NOT cosmic-ambient)** В· INPUT **audio-first / minimal-gesture** (Begin + a carrier-height sweep + an A/B proof toggle; 0Г— in lab) В· OUTPUT **audio-primary** with a deliberately-minimal instructional Canvas2D diagram (NOT a three.js/WebGL 3D-field, NOT a cosmic-ambient glow) В· TECHNIQUE **combination/difference-tone ("Tartini/Amacher ear tone") synthesis** вҖ” symmetric mapping `fвӮҒ = carrier вҲ’ О”/2`, `fвӮӮ = carrier + О”/2` so `fвӮӮ вҲ’ fвӮҒ = О”` carries ALL melodic content; a seeded (`mulberry32`) just-intonation-pentatonic state machine develops О” over minutes; a shared carrier LFO summed identically into both primaries keeps the effect vivid while preserving О” (grep-0Г—: `otoacoustic`=0, `Tartini`=0, `difference tone`=1 mention never as an engine) В· PALETTE near-black instructional (anti-visual by design вҖ” the piece is for the ear; NOT the banned cosmic-ambient art-field) вҖ” sky-cyan primaries, violet phantom marker В· **ambition 4/5** (#1 novel-to-lab: combination/difference-tone synthesis as a compositional engine, grep-0Г— В· #2 вүҘ3 subsystems [difference-tone primary-pair synth + seeded phantom-melody state machine + carrier-sweep proof mechanic + A/B phantom-mute + DynamicsCompressor safety chain + instructional diagram = 6] В· #3 named refs [Amacher 1999; Tartini 1714; Lucier] В· #5 RESEARCH В§660 [Sonorities-2026 "ear tones" session, added this cycle]). **diversity:** `banned=[touch/drag INPUT В· three.js/WebGL-3D-field OUTPUT В· physics-sim-as-instrument TECHNIQUE В· near-dark cosmic-ambient VIBE вҖ” all JURY 2026-07-04]` В· `picked=[audio-first / minimal-gesture INPUT (0Г—) В· audio-primary OUTPUT w/ minimal instructional visual (jury #4, 1Г— in 15) В· combination/difference-tone otoacoustic TECHNIQUE (grep-0Г—) В· alert-perceptual (NOT cosmic-ambient) VIBE]` вҖ” clears every ban; the direct cash of the jury's loudest still-open lane (audio-first) on a fresh psychoacoustic technique. **AUDIO SAFETY (the governing constraint here вҖ” sustained tones):** master path ends in a `DynamicsCompressor` limiter вҶ’ conservative master gain (0.22, only ever ramped via `setTargetAtTime`); no hard onsets; primaries capped well under 4 kHz; visible "headphones + start low, raise gently" caption; instant Stop ramps down then full teardown. Photosensitivity N/A (minimal static visual). **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (fully client-side). **Validation:** authoritative winner-only `npm run build` вҶ’ **Compiled вң“ + Linting/type-check вң“** (only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings; ZERO from the 1165 folder), then the standing container **`EMFILE`** at `Collecting page data` (~4096-fd ceiling on ~600 pages вҖ” infra not code; Vercel deploys uncapped). `.next/server/app/dream/1165-third-ear/page.js` **compiled вң“ (36 KB)**; `tsc --noEmit | grep 1165` = 0; folder eslint exit 0. **Compile + lint + type + difference-tone-math-by-inspection verified** (the symmetric mapping is correct вҖ” melody is provably in О” only); **NOT ear-verified** вҖ” built headless with no headphones, so whether the ear-tone actually *rings* at these levels, and the ideal О” range / loudness, are designed-not-heard (which is exactly why the carrier sweep exists вҖ” the listener finds their own sweet spot). Winner of a DEEP 2-approach race; banked вӯҗ `1166-ear-tone-field` as IDEAS В§660. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1165-third-ear/README.md`

## Cycle 659 вҖ” **adult** **WIDE** вҖ” 3 orthogonal explorers answering the loud 2026-07-04 jury (bright / real-world / non-physics), none using a banned tag. Ships `1161-flight-choir` вҖ” **the whole sky above the planet, right now, as a bright choir.** Live global air-traffic (ADS-B) sonified over a **daylight cartographic world-map**: every airliner in flight becomes one sustained voice (altitudeвҶ’pitch on a just-intonation lydian lattice, ground-speedвҶ’brightness, longitudeвҶ’stereo pan, vertical-rateвҶ’vibrato, traffic-densityвҶ’a sub-drone bed) with a real fade-in/sustain/fade-out lifecycle. A wave of hobbyist ADS-B *visual* radars shipped in MayвҖ“June 2026 (Adafruit's DeskRadar64; the viral Skylight ceiling projector) and **nobody sonified the feed** вҖ” this fills that exact gap. **The direct answer to the jury's provocation #5** ("build about the real world, not a Hamiltonian вҖ” sonify external data", a 0Г— lane in the 15-cycle window) on a **fresh** data source (aircraft/ADS-B = grep-0Г—; NOT the exhausted 7Г— seismic). Live keyless client-side fetch (airplanes.live / OpenSky) with a **deterministic 64-aircraft simulated-sky fallback** that runs the identical sonification, so it demos with zero network. Banks вӯҗ `1162-loom-of-hours` (Karel's REAL Welcome-Home piano woven into a bright generative textile вҖ” the real-piano mandate the jury praised in 1155; IDEAS В§659 TOP resurrect) + `1163-answer-song` (sing a phrase, a bright choir sings an *answer* back вҖ” NSDF pitch-detection + Continuator-style reply; the live-duet lane). **ResearchвҶ’build:** В§659 dive вҖ” the MayвҖ“June 2026 ADS-B-visual-radar wave that no one sonified. Named refs: Skylight / DeskRadar64; Andrea Polli airspace/atmospheric sonification.)

## Cycle 658 вҖ” **adult** **WIDE** вҖ” 3 orthogonal embodied/world explorers, all **bright/high-key Canvas2D** (deliberately NOT three.js/WebGL) answering the 2026-07-04 jury's demand to break the "dark cosmic physics-sim you drag" monoculture. Ships `1160-body-choir` вҖ” **conduct a luminous choir with your whole body, no controller.** A webcam + a self-contained *frame-differencing optical flow* (no MediaPipe, no CDN) turns your motion into a warm just-intonation choir over a sunlit ivoryвҶ’peach Canvas2D composite: how much you move вҶ’ loudness, how high your hands rise вҶ’ which voice sings, left/right вҶ’ stereo shimmer, stillness вҶ’ a calm drone. **The jury's #1 gap was "zero embodied prototypes in fifteen cycles" вҖ” this is the direct cash**, and it's the one fire where the loves converge (Karel loves `101-camera-song`/`217-dance-avatar`/`234-kids-hand-creature`, all embodied). Camera analysed for motion only вҖ” never uploaded. No-camera вҶ’ a mouse fallback drives the identical mapping. ## Cycle 657 вҖ” **adult** psychedelic **DEEP** вҖ” ONE concept: *fly forever through an infinite gyroid "impossible cathedral"*, raced via 2 parallel RENDERING approaches (from-scratch marching-cubes MESH vs raymarched gyroid SDF); ship the more legible/ambitious + diversity-clean, bank the other. ### `/dream/1152-anechoic-veil` вҖ” *what if the instrument were your STILLNESS? A mandala that blooms only in silence вҖ” any sound you make scatters it.* `demoable` В· **adult В· state: reward-for-quiet meditative attention вҖ” the veil reveals only through restraint В· pole: cosmic-ambient (meditative).** The **inverted microphone**: every other mic piece rewards loudness; this one rewards its absence. ### `/dream/1148-light-accretion` вҖ” *your real piano builds a cathedral of light you drift down, and it remembers.* `demoable` В· **adult В· state: NDE tunnel toward a being of light вҖ” a real recording accreting a long-form volumetric field with memory В· pole: cosmic-ambient.** Press Begin (audio is gesture-gated); the volume already animates on load from a gentle deterministic procedural drive вҖ” the never-blank path. **Three-tier real-audio loader:** a Path-recording id text field prefilled with Karel's Welcome-Home piano (`549fc519-вҖҰ`, read-only `GET /api/audio/:id`) В· drop/choose your own file В· a deterministic offline-rendered synth demo so it's **never blank/silent** (amber note when it's the fallback). **The engine (3 files):** **(1)** `field.ts` вҖ” `AccretionField`, a **48Ві `Float32Array` density grid**. Each audio onset `deposit()`s a soft 3D **gaussian blob**; spectral **centroid вҶ’ height (y)**, a slowly-rotating **helix** places successive notes so the column spirals as it grows; louder/higher-flux onsets deposit brighter blobs; deposits **accumulate**. `decay()` multiplies the whole grid by `exp(вҲ’dtВ·ln2/75)` = a **~75-second half-life** вҖ” old light fades but persists, so the structure at minute 5 вү  minute 1 and **never loops** (genuine long-form memory, a categorical-menu gap). `quantize()` вҶ’ auto-exposed R8. Deterministic (mulberry32; no `Math.random`/`Date` in hot paths). **(2)** `gl.ts` вҖ” `AccretionRenderer`, a **raw WebGL2 `sampler3D` volumetric raymarch**: the quantized grid uploads each frame via `texSubImage3D`; a full-screen fragment shader box-intersects and marches **front-to-back with emission/absorption** (96 steps, dithered), density вҶ’ **molten-gold `#ffb347` вҶ’ pearl `#fff4d6`** emissive ramp + a **core beacon** (exp-falloff pearl glow = the being of light) + distance fog + Reinhard tone-map + vignette. The **camera drifts perpetually inward** toward the brightening core (`camZ = 0.18 + 1.72В·exp(вҲ’elapsed/П„)`, asymptotic вҖ” the NDE tunnel, never arriving). `dispose()` deletes GL objects + `loseContext()`. Plus `AccretionFallback2D` вҖ” a rotating additive orthographic projection of the same field for no-WebGL2. **(3)** `audio.ts` вҖ” `AudioEngine`: decoded buffer вҶ’ synthesized convolution reverb вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` limiter вҶ’ destination, with a parallel `AnalyserNode` yielding per-frame **RMS energy / spectral flux / spectral centroid** that drive the deposits; gesture-gated; full teardown. **(4)** `page.tsx` вҖ” `"use client"`: serif `text-4xl/5xl` hero, `text-base` description, 3-tier loader UI, procedural field on mount, "N.N min of light remembered" readout, WebGL2-fallback + decode-fail notices in `text-rose-300`, design-notes disclosure, `prefers-reduced-motion` (slower camera/rotation), full RAF+renderer+audio teardown on unmount. **Palette:** warm molten-gold + pearl on near-black `#04060a` вҖ” a deliberate warm-gold that breaks the recent cool/electric run (1136 indigo В· 1142 Balmer-electric В· 1145 magenta-teal) and is NOT the banned warm-paper/daylight (it's saturated warm-on-dark). **Pole: cosmic-ambient** вҖ” serves Karel's PRIMARY immersion driver; breaks the 1142/1145 intense run. **Ambition 3/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [3-tier real-audio analysis + persistent 48Ві accretion field + WebGL2 raymarch renderer + convolution tail + Canvas2D fallback = 5] В· #3 named refs [Refik Anadol вҖ” data as luminous pigment; gesture-started, full oscillator-stop + `ctx.close()` teardown. **(4)** `page.tsx` вҖ” `"use client"`: serif hero + one-line description, gesture-gated Begin, drag(вҶ‘вҶ“ excite/relax n В· вҶҗвҶ’ step l,m) + tap(reorient m) pump controls, live HUD, idle auto-play (a first transition ~0.5 s after Begin + a wandering-the-spectrum idle so it's never blank/silent), `text-rose-300` no-WebGL2 notice + Canvas2D+sliders fallback that still drives the audio, Design-notes disclosure, full unmount cleanup. **Palette:** the **actual hydrogen Balmer emission wavelengths** on near-black вҖ” HОұ 656 nm red В· HОІ 486 nm cyan В· HОі 434 nm blue В· HОҙ 410 nm violet + magenta accents (the palette IS the physics; NOT ear/eye-verified вҖ” no speakers/display in this headless box, so how the cloud *reads* (point size, nucleus saturation) and whether the spectrum *sounds* musical are code/math-verified only; the cloud animates + auto-plays after Begin вҖ” the never-blank path.**) В· Cycle 651 (adult, **DEEP** вҖ” winner of 3 parallel physics approaches to ONE "genuine QM as a psychedelic instrument" concept: this **3D hydrogen-orbital cloud** vs `1143-wave-collapse` (a real-time 2-D **SchrГ¶dinger** solver вҖ” split-step Fourier + hand-written FFT вҖ” you **tap to Born-collapse**, ringing the well's eigenspectrum; ## Cycle 649 вҖ” **adult** psychedelic **DEEP** вҖ” ONE concept, *a psychedelic piece organised by the brain's own **TEMPORAL** rhythm (thetaвҖ“gamma cross-frequency coupling), not by spatial geometry* вҖ” the whole lab's psychedelic corpus was spatial (form-constants / warps) until now. Attacked via 3 parallel **pole-spanning** approaches; ship the freshest + most pole-diverse + most robustly demoable. Ships `1136-theta-engine` (intense, 2D raw-WebGL2); banks вӯҗ `1137-theta-cathedral` (immersive 3D three.js nebula) + `1138-theta-ear` (audio-first eyes-closed). **ResearchвҶ’build:** today's dive found the 2026 5-HT2A / 5-Hz-visual-cortex study.)

You HEAR the real nested rhythm and SEE it re-bloom the field each cycle; drag to steer coupling depth Г— theta rate.** **Active pointer-drag INPUT вҶ’ raw-WebGL2 fragment-shader field OUTPUT.** Three files: **(1)** `audio.ts` вҖ” `makeThetaAudio`: the REAL coupling lives here (5/40 Hz is a *visual*-flicker hazard, not an auditory one). A 55 Hz sub + detuned partials for body; a ~5 Hz theta sine amplitude-modulates a ~139 Hz mid carrier (the audible theta pulse); a 40 Hz gamma oscillator runs through a VCA whose gain is a `WaveShaper`-**sharpened function of the theta phase** (`max(0,sinОё)^p`) вҶ’ gamma fires in **bursts concentrated at each theta peak** = genuine phase-amplitude coupling. `coupling` scales both AM depth + burst depth; "deep" sharpens the gate. Sum вҶ’ master gain вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` limiter; click-free `setTargetAtTime` onset + full `close()` teardown; an `AnalyserNode` taps the master to draw a small on-screen **envelope meter you can literally watch the nested theta/gamma rhythm in**. **(2)** `field.ts` вҖ” `makeFieldRig`: a raw WebGL2 fullscreen fragment shader that imports the shared `LOGPOLAR_GLSL` form-constant warp (spiral + tunnel) as a *secondary* spatial layer which **reorganises each visual-theta cycle**, with a fine sparse **"gamma sparkle"** hash whose *amplitude* rides the theta-phase envelope Г— coupling вҖ” the coupling rendered visible. Palette: deep indigo вҶ’ electric violet вҶ’ cyan on near-black, filmic knee. **(3)** `page.tsx` вҖ” `"use client"`: `text-2xl` title, one-line description, Start gate, full-screen drag surface (XвҶ’coupling, YвҶ’theta 3вҖ“6.5 Hz) with live `font-mono` readouts, the envelope meter, a **deep-coupling opt-in** with an amber one-line warning, an always-on **Stop** (kills flicker same frame + tears down audio), `text-rose-300` no-WebGL2 / no-Web-Audio notices (degrades **both** ways вҖ” audio-fail keeps the field breathing, webgl-fail keeps the audio playing), idle ~4 s вҶ’ gentle auto-modulation (never blank/silent), Design-notes disclosure. **Palette:** cool / electric on near-black (breaks the warm-paper ban). **Pole: intense-hypnotic** вҖ” but SAFE (see below); ## Cycle 648 вҖ” **adult** psychedelic **DEEP** вҖ” ONE concept, *a piece of music with MEMORY that never loops*, attacked via 2 parallel **aesthetic** approaches (a cold Ikeda readout vs an immersive neural-field) to resolve the concept's known weakness вҖ” the В§647-banked `slow-machine` read *cerebral/data-viz* rather than transporting. [/dream/1135-deep-memory](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1135-deep-memory) вҖ” **"Deep Memory": watch a mind dream. A piece of music that learns from every note it plays вҖ” its memory drifting, reinforcing, and re-firing вҖ” rendered as a slowly-breathing neural constellation you float inside and steer. Minute five is never minute one.** **Active seed+steer INPUT вҶ’ Canvas2D additive-glow neural-field OUTPUT.** Three files: **(1)** `engine.ts` вҖ” `SlowMachine`: a mulberry32-seeded **live Markov transition matrix** `M[i][j]` over 5вҖ“7 scale degrees (Dorian/Pentatonic/Phrygian). `step()` = tension-weighted sample of the next degree вҶ’ **Hebbian reinforcement** (bump the path taken = memory) вҶ’ **decay toward baseline + steered mutation** (forgetting + drift). Because reinforcement, forgetting, drift and live steering all feed back into the sampling distribution, the exact matrix state provably never recurs вҖ” a drifting attractor, not a loop. `snapshot()` exposes matrix + normalized Shannon entropy + running consonance + currentDegree + step + midi + `firedEdge`. **(2)** `audio.ts` вҖ” `MemoryAudio`: a lush sine/triangle **pad bed** (registerвҶ’pitch, tensionвҶ’lowpass) + a soft **2-op FM bell** per note event + a feedback `DelayNode` tail for air вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` limiter; **25 ms look-ahead / ~120 ms schedule-ahead scheduler** (Chris Wilson) whose callback pulls the next note from the engine; gesture-gated; full `dispose()`. **(3)** `page.tsx` вҖ” `"use client"`: seed stage (scale pick + tap-a-motif вҶ’ deterministic seed + Begin) and live stage вҖ” the hero is a **Canvas2D neural mind-space** (`globalCompositeOperation='lighter'` additive glow): degrees are luminous cells in an organically-jittered constellation (tonic tinted violet), reinforced transitions **ignite only once their weight climbs above the neutral baseline** so well-walked routes visibly brighten + thicken into permanent memory, the firing transition sends a smooth **light-pulse gliding along its thread**, and a **comet** eases toward the current note leaving a fading trail; the whole field **breathes + slowly rotates** (no strobe). Four steering dials (Density / Tension / Register / Mutation) + PERTURB + entropy/consonance meters + a design-notes panel; `text-rose-300` audio-fallback keeps a silent visual driver running. **Palette:** deep-ocean cool вҖ” indigo вҶ’ deep teal вҶ’ electric cyan on near-black `#03040c`, violet tonic (a jury-mandated cool palette; NOT warm-paper). **Pole: cosmic/cerebral made immersive** вҖ” "watch a mind dream," a long-form generative piece with **state + memory + evolution** (the categorical-menu's thin slot), explicitly NOT a perceptual illusion. `demoable` (build-checked: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` reached `Collecting page data` after **`Compiled`** + **`Linting and checking validity of types`** вң“ вҖ” every warning pre-existing in `src/lib/**`; Vercel deploys normally) stopped a full green; `.next/server/app/dream/1135-deep-memory/page.js` **compiled вң“** (42 KB); scoped `npx tsc --noEmit | grep 1135-deep-memory` = 0, `eslint src/app/dream/1135-deep-memory/` = **exit 0**. **Verification: compile + lint + type verified; NOT ear/eye-verified вҖ” no speakers/display in this headless box, so how the mind-field *reads* (additive-glow legibility of memory) and how the pad/bell *sounds* are code-verified/reasoned only; the field animates on load before Begin вҖ” the never-blank path.**) В· Cycle 648 (adult, **DEEP** вҖ” winner of 2 parallel aesthetic approaches to ONE "music with memory" concept: this **immersive neural-field** vs `1134-slow-machine` (the same Markov+Hebbian engine rendered as a cold Ryoji-Ikeda SVG memory-lattice + Canvas2D note-stream + sparklines; ## Cycle 647 вҖ” **adult** psychedelic **WIDE** вҖ” 3 orthogonal explorers, each clearing all four 2026-07-03 jury bans on a different axis-set; ship the one that best serves Karel's PRIMARY psychedelic-immersion driver while balancing the jury-flagged intense-heavy lane. [/dream/1133-resonant-bowl](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1133-resonant-bowl) вҖ” **"Resonant Bowl": strike and rub a Tibetan singing bowl until the space around you rings into slow, breathing shells of light вҖ” a cosmic-ambient sound-bath you sink into.** **Active strike (tap) + rim-rub (drag) INPUT вҶ’ true-3D three.js standing-wave shells OUTPUT.** Three files: **(1)** `bowl-audio.ts` вҖ” additive **inharmonic overtone synthesis**: 7 sine partials at singing-bowl ratios `1, 2.76, 5.4, 8.93, 13.34, 18.64, 24.7` (Г— a ~196 Hz fundamental вҖ” they climb faster than the harmonic series; that inharmonicity is the metal), each with its own exponential decay (lows ring ~9 s, highs die ~2 s so the timbre evolves as it rings); the fundamental is split into two detuned oscillators so it slowly **beats** вҖ” the characteristic bowl wobble. Rim-rub swells a driven "sung" gain + opens a tone filter. A synthetic `ConvolverNode` impulse (decaying one-pole-filtered noise, ~4.5 s) вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` limiter. Idle > ~5.5 s вҶ’ soft self-strike (never silent). **(2)** `bowl-scene.ts` вҖ” true **three.js / WebGL**: a central lathe-form bowl + **7 nested icosphere point-shells**, shell _i_ driven by partial _i_'s amplitude; each point displaced along its radius by a **Chladni-like spherical-harmonic scalar** (rising nodal degree on inner shells) Г— a slow shimmer LFO; additive transparent blending + a central bloom sprite for cheap volumetric glow; camera drifts on its own slow multi-second orbit. Palette: near-black indigo space вҶ’ **electric teal вҶ’ soft violet** shells. **(3)** `page.tsx` вҖ” `"use client"`: serif `text-2xl` title, one-line description, "Begin the sound-bath" gate, strike/rim-rub pointer handlers, `text-rose-300` WebGL-unavailable notice (audio still plays), Design-notes disclosure, full teardown (cancel rAF + `scene.dispose()` + `audio.dispose()`). The per-partial amplitude envelope is computed in plain JS and mirrored onto BOTH the WebAudio gains and the shell displacement вҖ” **the light literally is the sound.** `demoable` (build-checked: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` reached `Collecting page data` after **`Compiled`** + **`Linting and checking validity of types`** вң“ вҖ” every warning pre-existing in `src/lib/**`; fresh-log grep `Failed to compile|Type error` = **NONE** вҶ’ only the standing container **`EMFILE`** at `Collecting page data` (`next-font-manifest.json`; ~4096-fd ceiling on ~450 pages, infra-not-code вҖ” **proven this cycle: the pristine cycle-646 baseline with my work removed EMFILEs at the identical line 472 on the identical file**; Vercel deploys normally) stopped a full green; scoped `npx tsc --noEmit | grep 1133-resonant-bowl` = 0, `eslint src/app/dream/1133-resonant-bowl/` = **exit 0**. **Verification: compile + lint + type verified; active seed+steer) [banked IDEAS В§647] vs `1131-liquid-room` (peak-LSD WebGL2 stable-fluids field you stir, audio-driven vorticity; indigoвҶ’cyanвҶ’magenta) [banked IDEAS В§647]). **Won on:** (1) it best serves Karel's **PRIMARY psychedelic-immersion driver** вҖ” a literal, transporting altered-state (meditative boundlessness) rather than a spectacle or a data-viz; ## Cycle 646 вҖ” **adult** psychedelic **WIDE** вҖ” 3 orthogonal explorers, each clearing every one of the 2026-07-03 jury's four bans (non-warm-paper palette Г— non-Canvas2D-primary output Г— active input Г— non-perceptual-illusion concept); ship the one that cashes the jury's #1 overdue mandate вҖ” **put Karel's REAL Welcome Home piano through the pipeline** (the entire 15-build window ignored it) вҖ” bank the other two. Ships `1130-spectral-scrub`.

[/dream/1130-spectral-scrub](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1130-spectral-scrub) вҖ” **"Spectral Scrub": you don't press play вҖ” you reach into Karel's real recorded piano and drag it through time. Drag left/right to scrub and time-stretch (slow it to a crawl, FREEZE it into a held shimmering chord, or run it backwards, pitch intact); drag up/down to sculpt the timbre. The whole screen is a live spectral field you paint in.** **Active drag-scrub + real-audio INPUT вҶ’ WebGL2 fragment-shader spectral-field OUTPUT.** Three files: **(1)** `audio.ts` вҖ” `makeGranularEngine`: decodes the recording to an `AudioBuffer`, then a **look-ahead grain scheduler** fires ~110 ms Hann-windowed grains every ~28 ms from a moving read head `posSec`. Because each grain plays at its natural rate, the *speed the read head advances* вҖ” not grain pitch вҖ” controls time: **Play** 1Г— В· **Slow** ~0.28Г— (piano stretches, pitch unchanged) В· **Freeze** holds `posSec` (with ms-jitter to kill the metallic loop) вҶ’ a sustained shimmer В· **Reverse** walks it backward. This is the granular / overlap-add approximation of **phase-vocoder time-scale modification** (Flanagan & Golden 1966), time-domain for robustness + zero deps; a biquad low-pass on vertical drag wipes brightness in/out; plus an `<audio>`+`MediaElementSource` fallback engine for cross-origin tier-1 sources (scrub works via `currentTime`; freeze unavailable, UI says so). **(2)** `shader.ts` вҖ” a ring-buffer `R8` spectrogram texture (`bins Г— HISTORY`); each frame writes the newest `AnalyserNode` byte-spectrum into one row via `texSubImage2D`; the fragment shader samples it with `fract(uScroll - age)` for smooth time-scroll, warps coords with fbm value-noise, and blooms across bins вҖ” magnitude drives a **deep-ocean вҶ’ teal вҶ’ electric-cyan вҶ’ violet вҶ’ white-hot** ramp on near-black ("data as pigment," after **Refik Anadol**); + `hasWebGL2()` probe + a Canvas2D scrolling-spectrogram fallback. **(3)** `page.tsx` вҖ” `"use client"`: serif `text-2xl` title, one-line description, **three audio tiers** (paste a Path recording id вҶ’ `GET /api/audio/:id` вҶ’ `{url}` вҶ’ `decodeAudioData` = Karel's real Welcome Home piano В· drop/choose your own audio file В· a short offline-rendered synth-piano demo so the field is never blank/silent, clearly labelled placeholder), Freeze/Slow/Play/Reverse transport, a precise waveform scrub strip, full-screen drag surface, `text-rose-300` no-WebGL2 / no-Web-Audio notices, full teardown (cancel rAF, stop grains, disconnect graph, remove fallback `<audio>`, close `AudioContext`, `loseContext()`). **Palette:** deep-ocean cool вҶ’ electric cyan/violet on near-black (deliberately NOT warm-paper вҖ” cashes the jury's palette mandate). **Pole: immersive / oceanic вҖ” not an illusion** (cashes the jury's "rest the perceptual-illusion move" + "answer a question that is not *what does your own cortex invent*"). `demoable` (build-checked: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` reached `Collecting page data` after **`Compiled`** + **`Linting and checking validity of types`** вң“ (every warning pre-existing in `src/lib/**` + `1085`; fresh-log grep `Failed to compile|Type error` = **NONE**) вҶ’ only the standing container **`EMFILE`** at `Collecting page data` (`next-font-manifest.json`; ~4096-fd ceiling, infra-not-code, identical every cycle since ~472; ## Cycle 645 вҖ” **adult** psychedelic **DEEP** вҖ” ONE concept, *a solid your brain builds from flat moving dots, then flips*, attacked via 2 parallel technical approaches (a Johansson point-light **human figure** vs an abstract rotating **solid**); ship the stronger, bank the other. This resurrects + deepens В§644's вӯҗ TOP banked `1127-kinetic-depth` into the **true Johansson point-light dancer** the queued note named, and consumes today's fresh 2026 research (biological-motion + the noise-expectation finding). [/dream/1129-kinetic-dancer](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1129-kinetic-dancer) вҖ” **"Kinetic Dancer": fourteen flat, identical, un-shaded ivory dots вҖ” no shading, no perspective, no depth cue at all вҖ” yet your brain assembles a living person turning in place, and decides for itself which way she spins. Drag to tip the illusion; let go and watch her flip. The rotation is genuinely ambiguous вҖ” the Spinning Dancer, built from Johansson point-light joints.** **Drag-to-bias + audio-only-bias INPUT вҶ’ three.js orthographic point-cloud OUTPUT.** Four files: **(1)** `figure.ts` вҖ” `mulberry32` PRNG + a **14-joint point-light skeleton** (head/shoulders/elbows/hands/hips/knees/feet) in 3D local coords with a deterministic `applyPose(t, alive, out)` that breathes + sways the limbs over a slow turn; no `Math.random`/`Date.now`. **(2)** `scene.ts` вҖ” `KineticDancer`: three.js **`OrthographicCamera`** (throws away every perspective/size depth cue) + a single flat `THREE.Points` cloud (`PointsMaterial`, `sizeAttenuation:false`, equal-size round ivory discs from a generated circle sprite); nested tilt/spin groups so a signed `bias` adds a **real X-tilt** over the always-same Y-spin (the one cue that can break the tie); seeded autonomous drift so the bias wanders back across zero and she flips hands-off; an optional **decoy noise field**; `hasWebGL()` probe; full `dispose()` + `forceContextLoss()`. **(3)** `audio.ts` вҖ” `DancerAudio`: two **rivalrous stereo drones** вҖ” a *bright* voice panned RIGHT for clockwise vs a *dark/low* voice panned LEFT for counter-clockwise вҖ” crossfading over a centred just-intonation pad through a `DynamicsCompressor` limiter; slow 0.16 Hz shimmer LFO; gesture-gated resume, clean teardown. **(4)** `page.tsx` вҖ” `"use client"`: serif `text-2xl` title, one-line description, **Begin** (44px, resumes `AudioContext`), drag-anywhere-to-bias on the canvas, a live **committed-reading + bias** readout, speed/bias/noise sliders + an **audio-only-bias** toggle (visual tilt off вҖ” only the stereo drone tips you, the queued deepening), collapsible design notes, a `text-rose-300` no-WebGL notice with a **static SVG point-light silhouette** fallback, `prefers-reduced-motion` handling, full teardown on unmount. **Deepening from today's research:** the noise slider buries the walker among randomly-moving decoy dots вҖ” at high noise she only "pops out" once your brain locks on, embodying the 2026 finding that **expectation drives detection of biological motion in noise** (PMC 2026). **Palette:** ivory dots on **deep slate-blue** (`#111a26`) вҖ” gallery-clean, deliberately NOT the lab's black-void-plus-glow. **Pole: uncanny / contemplative** вҖ” a figure that shouldn't be there but is. `demoable` (build-checked: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` reached `Collecting page data` after **`Compiled`** + **`Linting and checking validity of types`** вң“ (every warning pre-existing in `src/lib/**`; fresh-log grep `1129-kinetic-dancer|Type error|Failed to compile` = **NONE**) вҶ’ only the standing container **`EMFILE`** at `Collecting page data` (`next-font-manifest.json`; ~4096-fd ceiling, infra-not-code, identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally) stopped a full green; `.next/server/app/dream/1129-kinetic-dancer/page.js` **compiled вң“** (38 KB) + client-reference-manifest emitted; scoped `npx tsc --noEmit | grep 1129-kinetic-dancer` = 0, `eslint src/app/dream/1129-kinetic-dancer/` = **exit 0**. **Verification: compile + lint + type verified; NOT eye-verified вҖ” no display in this headless box, so whether the 14 dots convincingly *read as a body* and how strongly the bistable flip lands (the joint coords + 0.34-rad tilt are hand-tuned guesses a real eye should validate) are code-verified/reasoned only. The figure animates on load with no audio/hardware вҖ” the never-blank path; the illusion strength is per-viewer regardless.**) В· Cycle 645 (adult, **DEEP** вҖ” winner of 2 parallel approaches to ONE kinetic-depth concept: this **Johansson point-light figure** vs `1130-kinetic-solid` (abstract rotating solid вҖ” a Fibonacci-sphere / hourglass volume-of-revolution / double-helix point cloud, same orthographic SFM bistable flip, a richer form menu) [banked вӯҗ IDEAS В§645]). **Won on:** (1) it IS the explicitly-queued deepening вҖ” В§644 named "deepen: **true Johansson point-light dancer**; audio-only bias" as the resurrect direction; (2) **bigger surprise** вҖ” a *person* assembled from 14 dots that spontaneously flips is the iconic, visceral "huh" (the Kayahara Spinning Dancer), vs the more cerebral abstract solid; (3) **cleanest today's-research chain** вҖ” it directly implements today's fresh 2026 noise-expectation finding as the noise slider. **Honest trade-off:** 1130 is the more *reliably* legible headless-unverified (an abstract solid doesn't depend on 14 dots reading as a body) and carries a richer 3-form menu вҶ’ banked вӯҗ resurrect-next; ## Cycle 643 вҖ” **adult** psychedelic **DEEP** вҖ” ONE concept, *the word rewritten in you* (Warren's Verbal Transformation Effect), attacked via 2 parallel technical approaches; ship the stronger, graft the other. DEEP and JURY **agree** here: the alternation put DEEP due, and the jury's core ask is "break the ossified output вҖ” audio-first is the genuinely under-served one" вҶ’ this fire attacks that under-served OUTPUT. The cycle-641 grep-lesson was applied **pre-spawn** to BOTH today's research finding (NCA/particle-automata вҖ” real + recent but a *banned* GPU-field family вҶ’ rejected) AND three build instincts (form-constants=6Г— crowded / tilt=~10Г— not-fresh / modal=used вҶ’ all rejected), leaving the one clean fresh lane (audio-first VTE). Ships `1125-verbal-oracle`.)

[/dream/1125-verbal-oracle](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1125-verbal-oracle) вҖ” **"The Verbal Oracle": loop one identical spoken word until your own brain rewrites it вҖ” put on headphones, press Begin, and a single synthesized word ("rest"/"life"/"say"/"flow") repeats byte-for-byte identical ~1.2вҖ“3Г—/s; after ~15вҖ“40 s most listeners begin to hear it morph into other words that were never spoken. A purely AUDITORY percept manufactured inside you.** **Zero-input passive headphone-listen INPUT вҶ’ audio-first OUTPUT (a sparse Canvas2D companion, not the artwork).** Three files: **(1)** `voice.ts` вҖ” `renderWord` builds the word **offline**: a sawtooth glottal buzz at f0вүҲ110вҖ“125 Hz through **three parallel band-pass "formant" filters** (F1/F2/F3) automated along a short **vowel script** (canonical Peterson & Barney 1952 values; diphthongs as glides) + band-passed **noise bursts** for fricatives, then **peak-normalized** and **cosine-faded to exact silence at both edges** so the loop seam is click-free; plus `VerbalOracleEngine`, a 25 ms **look-ahead scheduler** staying ~0.2 s ahead of `ctx.currentTime` that fires a *fresh* `AudioBufferSourceNode` playing the **same** buffer at `nextTime += period` (1.2вҖ“3 Hz) вҶ’ master gain вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` soft-limiter вҶ’ destination. **Every repetition is sample-identical вҖ” that invariance IS the illusion** (VTE's strict precondition; a seam click weakens or kills it). No `Math.random`/`Date.now` (a `mulberry32(seed)` PRNG only). **(2)** `words.ts` вҖ” four one-syllable recipes: **rest** (Warren's canonical stimulus), **life**, **say**, **flow**, each with formant scripts, consonant specs, and a curated `alternates` list of the illusory words listeners commonly report (used only as gentle placard hints). **(3)** `page.tsx` вҖ” a paper-white (ink-on-cream) client component: gesture-gated **Begin** (resumes `AudioContext`) / Stop, the 4-word picker, a 1.2вҖ“3 Hz rate slider, a **perception log** (drop a timestamped mark the moment your percept slips, read against the shaded ~15вҖ“40 s onset band on an SVG timeline), a deterministic **seeded ghost-listener** dropping illustrative marks so a cold glance reads populated, and a **restrained Canvas2D companion** (the word breathing + a loop-pulse ring flashing each repetition + a thin waveform of the actual buffer with a playhead) вҖ” the restraint is the point; a busy canvas would pull attention out of the very listening the piece depends on. Full teardown on unmount; `text-rose-600` no-Web-Audio notice. **Palette:** warm cream/ink (paper-white вҖ” deliberately NOT a dark theme). `demoable` (build-checked: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` reached `Collecting page data` after **`Compiled`** + **`Linting and checking validity of types`** вң“ (every warning pre-existing in `src/lib/**`; fresh-log grep `1125|verbal-oracle|Type error|Failed to compile` = **NONE**) вҶ’ only the standing container **`EMFILE`** at `Collecting page data` (`next-font-manifest.json`; ~4096-fd ceiling, infra-not-code, identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally) stopped a full green; `.next/server/app/dream/1125-verbal-oracle/page.js` **compiled вң“** (32 KB); scoped `npx tsc --noEmit | grep 1125-verbal-oracle` = 0, `eslint src/app/dream/1125-verbal-oracle/` = **exit 0**. **Verification: compile + lint + type verified; NOT ear-verified вҖ” no headphones/speakers in this headless box, so formant *intelligibility* of each word and whether the transformation actually *lands* (+ felt onset timing) are code-verified/reasoned only. But the loop is *provably* identical (one buffer, sample-accurate scheduling) and click-faded (offline render + peak-normalize + cosine edges) вҖ” the VTE precondition is structurally guaranteed even though the percept is per-listener; the seeded ghost + the ready-before-Begin word are the never-blank/silent path. ## Cycle 642 вҖ” **adult** psychedelic **WIDE** вҖ” 3 orthogonal explorers, each a DIFFERENT fresh INPUT Г— **NON-Canvas2D** OUTPUT Г— technique Г— palette; ship the research-anchored one, bank the rest. This fire caught a **diversity FLIP**: the last five ships all dodged the old GPU-shader monoculture by going Canvas2D, so Canvas2D was now itself over-represented ~5Г— in the last-10 вҶ’ banned, and all three explorers were built non-Canvas2D (three.js-volumetric / audio-first / raw-WebGL2). The cycle-641 grep lesson was applied **pre-spawn** вҖ” grepped `1043-dreamachine`/`1041-nde-tunnel`/`1038-form-constant` out of the brief set before spawning. Ships `1124-noise-veil`.

[/dream/1124-noise-veil](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1124-noise-veil) вҖ” **"Noise Veil": a drug-free Ganzfeld chamber the SOUND composes вҖ” rest your gaze in a soft uniform field and morph a spatialized noise bath whiteвҶ”pinkвҶ”brown; toward brown the bath deepens to a sub-heavy "water" rumble and the fog drifts to a slow deep-teal oceanic current, steering what imagery your own brain manufactures.** **Passive-gaze + noise-spectrum-morph INPUT вҶ’ three.js volumetric fog + spatialized Web Audio OUTPUT.** Five files: **(1)** `noise.ts` вҖ” a `mulberry32(seed)` PRNG builds three base buffers **once** (white; pink via Paul Kellet's economy filter; brown via a leaky integrator) + an **equal-power crossfade** that morphs the 1/f slope continuously (`0`=white flat / `0.5`=pink вҲ’3 dB-oct / `1`=brown вҲ’6 dB-oct, sub-heavy). No `Math.random` on any per-frame path. **(2)** `audio.ts` вҖ” the mixed noise is decorrelated by short per-voice delays and spread across **five HRTF `PannerNode`s** that slowly orbit the listener вҶ’ soft-cut master; the noise **is** the instrument (no oscillators, no tonal drone). **(3)** `field.ts` вҖ” a bank of glacial seeded LFOs (0.02вҖ“0.09 Hz) produces the study's "**wave after wave**" swells as a **pure function of time + controls**, read by BOTH audio and visuals, so the image animates instantly on load (before any audio) and stays locked to the sound once it starts. **(4)** `scene.ts` вҖ” **three.js volumetric** fog: ~260 large very-soft billboard puffs scattered through a 3D box the camera sits *inside* (real parallax + `FogExp2` depth wash вҖ” **not** a flat 2D fragment field), heavy overlap вҶ’ a near-uniform luminous Ganzfeld; the slope drives palette + current (whiteвҶ’bright even / pinkвҶ’warm amber / brownвҶ’**deep teal slow oceanic drift**); mean luminance stays gentle and high (never a dark void); WebGL probe + CSS-gradient fallback. **(5)** `page.tsx` вҖ” the client component: serif `text-2xl` title, one-line description, a gesture-gated **Begin** (resumes `AudioContext`), spectrum + intensity sliders + вҶҗвҶ’/вҶ‘вҶ“ keys, a live swell/slope readout, `text-rose-300` WebGL/audio degradation notices, a design-notes panel, full rAF/audio/three.js teardown on unmount. **No flicker at all** вҖ” only slow luminance/hue drift; `prefers-reduced-motion` slows everything further. **Palette:** warmвҶ’oceanic, shifts with the noise color. `demoable` (build-checked: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` reached `Collecting page data` after **`Compiled`** + **`Linting and checking validity of types`** вң“ (every warning pre-existing in `src/lib/**`; fresh-log grep `1124|noise-veil|Type error|Failed to compile` = **NONE**) вҶ’ only the standing container **`EMFILE`** at `Collecting page data` (`next-font-manifest.json`; ~4096-fd ceiling, infra-not-code, identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally) stopped a full green; `.next/server/app/dream/1124-noise-veil/page.js` **compiled вң“** (35 KB) + client-reference-manifest emitted; scoped `npx tsc --noEmit | grep 1124-noise-veil` = 0, `eslint src/app/dream/1124-noise-veil/` = **exit 0**. **Verification: compile + lint + type verified; NOT ear/eye-verified вҖ” no headphones/speakers or a real display in this headless box, so the audible whiteвҶ”brown spectral morph, the HRTF spatialization, whether the fog reads as a *uniform* field (vs visible puffs) on a real panel, and whether imagery actually arises are code-verified/reasoned only; the seeded macro-swell + on-load fog animation is the fully-exercisable never-blank path. Wants Karel's headphones + a dim room: does moving the slope toward brown deepen the bath toward "water" and drift the fog oceanic вҖ” and, after a minute or two of resting gaze, does any imagery come?**) В· Cycle 642 (adult, **WIDE** вҖ” winner of 3 parallel explorers: this **audio-led Ganzfeld** vs `1125-verbal-oracle` (**loop one identical word until your brain rewrites it** вҖ” the Verbal Transformation Effect; formant-synth word looped click-free; audio-first; paper-white; eerie-liminal) [banked вӯҗ IDEAS В§642] vs `1126-pulse-cave` (**your heartbeat is the metronome** вҖ” camera photoplethysmography reads your fingertip pulse вҶ’ a warm WebGL2 womb/cave breathes on the beat; not a flat fragment field; not a GPU field-sim) В· **spectrally-shaped 1/f noise вҶ’ HRTF panner field вҶ’ macro-swell вҶ’ volumetric fog TECHNIQUE** В· warmвҶ’oceanic VIBE. **NAMED REFERENCES:** Pistolas, Smets & Wagemans, "Wave after waveвҖҰ," *i-Perception* 2025 (brown noise вҶ’ water-themed multisensory hallucination) вҖ” RESEARCH В§642; ## Cycle 641 вҖ” **adult** psychedelic **DEEP** вҖ” a DEEP fire on *the percept-made-in-you* (a Deutsch dichotic-illusion trio) was **scrapped mid-fire**: curation grepped and found `1109-inner-ear` already ships the whole Deutsch suite, so all three clean builders were `rm -rf`'d and none committed (the ambition-floor grep-rule caught a redundant concept вҖ” logged as a planning-gate lesson in STATE В§641). **Pivoted to the explicitly-queued вӯҗ TOP resurrect** and shipped `1123-conductor-veil`.

[/dream/1123-conductor-veil](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1123-conductor-veil) вҖ” **"Conductor Veil": conduct an unseen ensemble with a baton вҖ” move your hand and a warm just-intonation string-and-pad ensemble answers your tempo, register, and dynamics, aurora ribbons streaming from the baton.** **Conduct-gesture (pointer/touch baton) INPUT вҶ’ Canvas2D aurora-ribbon OUTPUT.** Four files: **(1)** `conductor.ts` вҖ” tracks baton position/velocity/curvature every frame from pointer/touch; detects the **downbeat as a vertical-velocity reversal** (the bottom of a downward stroke) вҶ’ **EMA-smoothed BPM** (clamped ~40вҖ“160, implausible intervals rejected); baton **height** вҶ’ register shift (up to ~+1.2 oct) + lowpass brightness; recent **speed/energy** вҶ’ level + vibrato/tremolo depth; a deterministic **`mulberry32` ghost conductor** (fixed seed `0x1120c04f`) traces a gentle down-up beat **through the same detector**, so it sounds AND animates on a cold glance and real pointer input takes over the instant you move (never-blank/never-silent). No `Math.random` in per-frame paths. **(2)** `audio.ts` вҖ” 4 lightly-detuned saw+triangle "sections" over a sustaining pad drone (root + sub), a slowly-cycling IвҖ“IVвҖ“viвҖ“V of **just-intonation chords** drawn from ONE just major scale `{1, 9/8, 5/4, 4/3, 3/2, 5/3, 15/8, 2}` over ~A2 (**no wrong notes**), each downbeat advancing/re-voicing the sections; an **OfflineAudioContext-synthesized hall `ConvolverNode`** (decaying filtered noise IR вҖ” no file fetch) вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` limiter вҶ’ master (~0.13 peak); register glide + brightness lowpass + energy-driven vibrato/tremolo. **(3)** `render.ts` вҖ” Canvas2D **aurora ribbons** streaming from the baton, billowing wider/brighter with dynamics (peach/rose/gold/violet/amber over a **deep-plumвҶ’warm-ember** vertical gradient вҖ” a warm sunset, NOT a black void), a luminous fading baton trail + one soft **~1 s slowly-decaying radial bloom per downbeat** (no strobe); own seeded PRNG; `prefers-reduced-motion` calms motion. **(4)** `page.tsx` вҖ” the client component: serif `text-2xl` title, one-line instruction, a "Take the baton" gesture-gated Start (resumes `AudioContext`), a live **BPM / register / dynamics / source (в—Ҹ you conducting В· в—Ҹ ghost conductor)** readout, a `text-rose-300` no-audio notice that keeps the visual, pointer+resize+rAF cleanup on unmount, a design-notes panel. **Palette:** warm plumвҶ’ember sunset. `demoable` (build-checked: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` вҶ’ **`вҡ  Compiled with warnings in 46s`** (every warning pre-existing in `src/lib/**`; grep `1123|conductor-veil|Type error|Failed to compile` = **NONE**) вҶ’ **`Linting and checking validity of types`** вң“ вҶ’ only the standing container **`EMFILE`** at `Collecting page data` (`next-font-manifest.json`; ~4096-fd ceiling, infra-not-code, identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally) stopped a full green; `.next/server/app/dream/1123-conductor-veil/page.js` **compiled вң“** (35 KB); scoped `npx tsc --noEmit | grep 1123` = 0, `eslint src/app/dream/1123-conductor-veil/` = **exit 0**. **Verification: compile + lint + type verified; NOT pointer/ear-verified вҖ” no pointer device or speakers in this headless box, so the downbeat heuristic (assumes roughly vertical strokes; erratic scribbling reads arrhythmic), tempo tracking, register glide, and the ensemble/reverb balance are code-verified/reasoned only; the seeded ghost conductor is the fully-exercisable never-blank/silent path. Wants Karel's pointer/touch + speakers: does an up-down stroke set a tempo the ensemble locks to, and does height lift the register?**) В· Cycle 641 (adult, **DEEP** вҖ” the resurrect of В§640's вӯҗ TOP-banked `1120-conductor-veil`, rebuilt faithfully after the planned Deutsch-dichotic trio was scrapped as redundant with `1109-inner-ear`). **For**: adult / **cosmic-ambient (warm)** pole / `state: flow / embodied conducting-trance` В· **conduct-gesture pointer-baton INPUT** (downbeat-from-vertical-velocity-reversal вҶ’ EMA-tempo; non-camera, non-tap) В· **Canvas2D aurora-ribbon OUTPUT** (not GPU-shader/field-sim) В· **downbeat-from-gestureвҶ’JI-ensemble TECHNIQUE** В· warm plumвҶ’ember sunset VIBE. **NAMED REFERENCES:** Max Mathews, *Radio Baton* / *Conductor Program*; ## Cycle 640 вҖ” **adult** psychedelic **WIDE** (3 orthogonal explorers, each a DIFFERENT fresh INPUT Г— OUTPUT Г— technique Г— palette; ship the most jury-aligned, bank the rest) вҖ” ships `1121-pulse-lock`, a **two-person instrument for one device**: hold a phone between two people, the left half is you and the right half is them, and each of you taps your own **pulse** вҖ” an embodied metronome. The two pulses are modeled as **coupled Kuramoto phase oscillators** (`dОёбөў/dt = Пүбөў + KВ·sin(ОёвұјвҲ’Оёбөў)`), so as your tempos get close the coupling *pulls them into phase-lock* вҖ” and you hear it: two just-intoned lobes beat apart when you drift and, at lock, fuse into one bloom while a third "union" voice swells and its detune collapses from beating to a fused unison. Curated over `1120-conductor-veil` (вӯҗ, conduct-gesture вҶ’ aurora-ribbon ensemble) and `1122-mantra-melt` (typed word вҶ’ semantic-satiation melt) on **jury-alignment**: 1121 hits three standing provocations at once вҖ” the "two people" fresh input verb (0Г— in the lab as a real two-body mechanic), "extend a 4вҖ“5 standout" (it deepens the lab's only 5/5, `1082`'s solo Kuramoto "feel it lock," into a genuine two-body coupling), and the still-COLD multi-user lane (two-person-one-device is the buildable, in-container-demoable cousin of WebRTC, with a seeded ghost-partner never-blank path). A *real* named mechanism (order parameter `r=|cos(О”/2)|`), not a metaphor вҖ” grounded in today's interpersonal-synchrony research (RESEARCH В§640); no neural/biometric/health claim (it couples two tapped tempos, not heartbeats). Dodges every 2026-07-02 standing ban on all four axes: two-touch INPUT (not tap-to-seed), Canvas2D two-lobe mandala OUTPUT (not GPU-shader, not a field-sim), Kuramoto-coupling TECHNIQUE (not Physarum/graph), warm rose/amber co-regulation PALETTE/pole (not black-void, not intense-hypnotic). `demoable` (build-checked + scoped tsc/eslint clean; NOT touch/ear-verified вҖ” no multi-touch/speakers in container; the deterministic mulberry32 ghost partner is the exercised never-blank path). Named refs: Kuramoto (1984); Strogatz *Sync*; interpersonal-entrainment (Sebanz/Bekkering/Knoblich; Richardson). 2 more explored (`1120-conductor-veil` вӯҗ conduct-gesture ensemble вҖ” implements today's 2026 virtual-orchestra-conducting anchor; `1122-mantra-melt` semantic-satiation typed-mantra) вҖ” see IDEAS В§640.)

## Cycle 639 вҖ” **adult** psychedelic **DEEP** (ONE concept вҖ” *play a living garden with your breath alone, via a genuine breath-vs-voice discriminator* вҖ” built via 2 parallel technical approaches; ship the stronger, bank the other) вҖ” ships `1119-breath-bloom`, a **long-form breath-grown garden**: each slow **exhale** unfurls one more segment of a procedurally-growing vector plant *and* rings one more note of an inharmonic just-intonation chime, so a calm multi-minute session builds a whole blooming form and a whole accumulating chord out of nothing but your breathing вҖ” and because state accumulates and the register/palette drift, the garden and the chord are genuinely *different* at minute 5 than at minute 1 (long-form, memory, evolution вҖ” not a loop). The instrument answers **breath, not voice**: a **spectral-flatness discriminator** (geometric/arithmetic-mean of the power spectrum over ~200 HzвҖ“8 kHz) passes a broadband exhale but heavily attenuates a hum/whistle/sung note at equal loudness. Curated over its sibling `1118-exhale-reeds` (the same breath discriminator driving a 9-voice band-pass "wind reed" choir on a sumi-e rice-paper field) on the **ambition axis**: 1119 lands the categorical-diversity menu's *thin* "long-form generative вҖ” state, memory, evolution, not loops" lane and is the bigger/more-surprising concept, where 1118 is the more atmospheric (if lovelier) wind-choir. Dodges every 2026-07-02 standing ban on all four axes: breath INPUT (not tap вҖ” 0Г— in the last 10), Canvas2D vector-botany OUTPUT (not GPU-shader, not a field-sim), breath-grown additive-chime + procedural-growth TECHNIQUE (not Physarum/graph), warm dawn/botanical PALETTE/cosmic-ambient pole (not black-void, not intense-hypnotic). 1 more explored (`1118-exhale-reeds` вӯҗ breath вҶ’ sumi-e reed choir) вҖ” see IDEAS В§639.)

[/dream/1119-breath-bloom](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1119-breath-bloom) вҖ” **"Breath Bloom": your breath grows a garden вҖ” each exhale unfurls a plant segment and rings a chime, accumulating a whole blooming form + a whole chord over a calm session.** **Breath INPUT вҶ’ Canvas2D procedural-botany OUTPUT.** Five files: **(1)** `breath.ts` вҖ” the spectral-flatness breath-vs-voice discriminator (geo/arith-mean power over ~200 HzвҖ“8 kHz from an `AnalyserNode`, `fftSize 2048`; energyвҶ’dBвҶ’norm; `drive = energyNorm В· smoothstep(FLATNESS_FLOOR_LOW, FLATNESS_FLOOR_HIGH, flatness)`, EMA-smoothed) + a rising/falling-edge **exhale-event** detector (one completed exhale = one growth event) + `mulberry32` PRNG + a deterministic seeded **breeze** (raised-cosine pseudo-exhales) that feeds the *same* edge detector so growth fires through one code path with or without a mic. **(2)** `growth.ts` вҖ” the garden as persistent **state**: branches as chains of *relative* turns (so the whole plant bends coherently under sway) + blooms; each exhale extends the youngest branch (length вҲқ exhale strength, gravitropic bias), seeded forks, a flower every few segments, and every 12 breaths bumps a **register** (transposes the octave, rotates the flower palette) вҖ” the long-form evolution. **(3)** `audio.ts` вҖ” `BellEngine`: each growth event rings one **additive inharmonic bell** (partials 1/2.01/2.99/4.21/5.43, 6 ms attack, long exponential decays вҖ” a fЕ«rin timbre) climbing an ascending **just-intonation pentatonic** (1, 9/8, 5/4, 3/2, 5/3) so overlapping decays accumulate into an evolving chord; soft breath-modulated drone + filtered-noise wind bed; all вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` limiter вҶ’ destination. **The mic is analysis-only вҖ” never routed to the audio graph.** **(4)** `render.ts` вҖ” Canvas2D warm-dawn botanical: cream/sky gradient, breathing low sun wash, tapering bezier stems, almond leaves, soft glowing petal blooms; sway added at draw-time via the relative-angle walk (tip moves most); reduced-motion aware. **(5)** `page.tsx` вҖ” the client component: serif `text-2xl` title, Start (mic + AudioContext-resume gesture) / Simulate breath / Stop / Reset garden, a live drive / flatness / breaths / segments / source (в—Ҹ mic listening В· в—Ҹ simulated breeze) readout in dark pills over the bright canvas, `text-rose-300` mic error with auto-fallback to the breeze, a design-notes panel. **Never blank/silent:** with no mic the seeded breeze grows the garden on its own (the fully-exercisable path); ## Cycle 637 вҖ” **adult** psychedelic **DEEP** (ONE concept вҖ” *sing вҶ’ a temple of sympathetic resonance sings back the harmonics your voice awakens* вҖ” built via 2 parallel technical approaches; ship the stronger, bank the other) вҖ” ships `1114-tanpura-throat`, a **voice-driven physical-modeling drone**: sing a sustained tone and a bank of **12 Karplus-Strong sympathetic strings**, tuned to a just-intonation drone over ~110 Hz, **physically re-pluck themselves** in answer to the partials your voice emphasizes вҖ” over a self-plucking tanpura drone bed вҖ” while a warm Canvas2D "string mandala" shows each string bulging into a decaying standing wave as it's struck. This **cashes cycle 636's explicitly-queued cycle-637 resurrect** (the banked вӯҗ voice-overtone temple, the fresher voice INPUT). Dodges every 2026-07-02 standing ban on all four axes: voice INPUT (not tap), Canvas2D OUTPUT (not the вүҘ4Г— GPU-shader run, not a field-sim), sympathetic-resonance TECHNIQUE (not Physarum/graph), warm ritual-meditative PALETTE/pole (not black-void, not intense-hypnotic). 1 more explored (`1113-throat-of-light` вҖ” luminous WebGL2 rose window, alive-on-load) вҖ” see IDEAS В§637.)

[/dream/1114-tanpura-throat](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1114-tanpura-throat) вҖ” **"Tanpura Throat": sing into it and a bank of just-intonation sympathetic strings physically rings back вҖ” a drone that answers the harmonics of your voice.** **Voice INPUT вҶ’ physical-modeling synthesis**, analysis-only (the mic is measured, never played back or recorded, nothing leaves the device). Four files: **(1)** `pitch.ts` вҖ” time-domain **autocorrelation** pitch detection with parabolic interpolation + RMS/clarity gating, an FFT band-energy readout per partial, and a **mulberry32** seeded PRNG (no `Math.random` in the per-frame paths). **(2)** `strings.ts` вҖ” a **Karplus-Strong** waveguide string factory (`DelayNode` + feedback `GainNode` + an in-loop one-pole lowpass with a jvari-ish brightness, excited by a seeded noise burst) plus the just-intonation ratio set over the ~110 Hz drone root. **(3)** `audio.ts` вҖ” master вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` limiter вҶ’ destination; a **shared `AnalyserNode` fed by BOTH the mic AND the seeded vowel "cantor"**, the 12-string sympathetic bank, a 55 Hz sub-pad, and a **self-plucking tanpura drone bed** re-plucking a root/fifth/octave on a slow cycle. **(4)** `page.tsx` вҖ” the per-frame analyseвҶ’pluckвҶ’render loop: a voice partial's rising energy (`e>0.4 && rising>0.1`, 150 ms refractory) **re-plucks the matching string**; the detected fundamental directly rings its nearest JI string; the Canvas2D mandala draws each string as a ring bulging into a **decaying standing wave** (nodes = 2+i, higher strings tighter), warm **brassвҶ’goldвҶ’indigo on umber-plum**, a breathing drone-root core, an orbiting pitch marker, `prefers-reduced-motion` freezing all motion. **Never blank/silent:** the seeded cantor drives the same analyser so with **no mic and no interaction** the strings still answer hands-free (badge в—Ҹ listening / в—Ҹ auto (sing to join)); on mic-deny it degrades to a readable rose notice, never a thrown error; audio + motion start within ~1s of the Start click. **Palette:** warm brass/amber/gold-on-plum ritual вҖ” non-black-void. `demoable` (build-checked: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` вҶ’ **`вң“ Compiled`** вҶ’ **`Linting and checking validity of types`** вң“ (every warning pre-existing in `src/lib/**`/`src/components/**`; grep `1114|tanpura|Type error|Failed to compile` = **NONE**) вҶ’ only the standing container **`EMFILE`** at `Collecting page data` (`next-font-manifest.json`; ~4096-fd ceiling, infra-not-code, identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally) stopped a full green; `.next/server/app/dream/1114-tanpura-throat/page.js` **compiled вң“** (36 KB) + client-reference-manifest emitted; scoped `npx tsc --noEmit | grep 1114-tanpura` = 0, `eslint src/app/dream/1114-tanpura-throat/` = **exit 0**. **Verification: compile + lint + type verified; NOT ear-verified вҖ” no mic/speakers in this headless box, so the KS string tuning (the delay-line pitch sits slightly flat, per the builder's honest README note), loudness balance, real-voice robustness (octave-slip on breathy input), and whether the mandala visibly rings are code-verified/reasoned only; the seeded autonomous cantor is the fully-exercisable never-blank/silent path. Wants Karel's voice on a mic: does a sung vowel light the matching strings and do they ring back?**) В· Cycle 637 (adult, **DEEP** вҖ” winner of 2 parallel approaches to one concept: this **Karplus-Strong physical-string** temple vs `1113-throat-of-light` (**sing a cathedral of light into being** вҖ” 12 additive **sine** sympathetic JI resonators + a **raw-WebGL2 12-fold rose-window** cathedral, gold/amber/indigo on plum with ACES tone-map clamp + Canvas2D fallback, and **phantom blooms while the AudioContext is suspended so it's alive on cold load before any gesture**; ## Cycle 636 вҖ” **adult** psychedelic **WIDE** (3 orthogonal explorers, each a DIFFERENT fresh INPUT Г— OUTPUT Г— technique Г— palette вҖ” the direct discharge of the 2026-07-02 jury's *remaining* asks after 634/635 fixed input+palette+void: **"real-world data sonification is the category the lab is thinnest on вҖ” do more"** and **"a cycle-2 of 1084: a second real-world data source with a warm palette deepens a standout"**) вҖ” ships `1110-earth-hum`, a **live planetary drone**: tune into Earth's own electromagnetic heartbeat вҖ” the **real Schumann Resonance** (the ELF standing wave in the EarthвҖ“ionosphere cavity, excited by ~44 lightning strikes/sec, harmonics SR1вҖ“SR5 at 7.83/14.3/20.8/27.3/33.8 Hz) вҖ” sung as a warm cosmic drone and **driven by live NOAA space-weather data** so geomagnetic storms audibly/visibly change the sound. This is the jury's explicitly-named **"second real-world data source"** extension of the standout `1084-magnetostorm` (that used NOAA solar wind вҶ’ aurora; this uses NOAA Kp + solar wind вҶ’ the planet's EM cavity, a *different* phenomenon on a *warm amber/gold* palette, not aurora-green). Real-world-data sonification was the lab's thinnest category (only 1084) вҖ” this doubles it. Dodges every over-represented tag from the last 10 (**tap-to-seed INPUT 4Г—**, **raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT 5Г—**) and every 2026-07-02 standing ban: external-data INPUT (not tap), **three.js OUTPUT** (0Г— in the recent window вҖ” genuinely fresh), warm-palette (non-black-void), cosmic-ambient (not intense-hypnotic). 2 more explored (`1111-throat-of-light` voice-overtone cathedral вӯҗ, `1112-after-motion` motion-aftereffect) вҖ” see IDEAS В§636.)

[/dream/1110-earth-hum](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1110-earth-hum) вҖ” **"Earth Hum": tune into the planet's own electromagnetic heartbeat вҖ” the real Schumann Resonance, sung as a warm cosmic drone driven by live NOAA space weather.** **Real-world-data sonification** вҖ” music about something other than music. Five files: **(1)** `data.ts` вҖ” fetches NOAA SWPC's public, no-key, **CORS-open** products **client-side** (`noaa-planetary-k-index.json` + `solar-wind/plasma-1-day.json`, the exact pattern `1084-magnetostorm` already ships in production), each with a 4 s `AbortController` timeout; on any failure / headless / no-network it drops to a **deterministic** sinusoidal model (Kp walk 1вҶ”6, wind ~330вҖ“620 km/s; no `Math.random` in per-frame paths) and the HUD badge flips **в—Ҹ LIVE В· NOAA SWPC** вҶ’ **в—Ҹ simulated** вҖ” never blank, never silent. **(2)** `audio.ts` вҖ” physically-accurate **Schumann synthesis**: the five true SR harmonics transposed **up 4 octaves (Г—16)** into a warm audible bed (~125/229/333/437/541 Hz), each a soft sine/triangle with a detuned beating partner, amplitudes tapered SR1>вҖҰ>SR5; the **true 7.83 Hz kept as *felt* elements** вҖ” an amplitude tremolo breathing across the whole bed + a gated 7.83 Hz sub-oscillator; Kp brightens the lowpass + tremolo, wind speeds the shimmer; all through a `DynamicsCompressor` limiter вҶ’ destination. **(3)** `scene.ts` вҖ” **three.js** warm globe: deep-indigoвҶ’amber sky, an amber sphere lit from within, an additive **ionospheric shell that breathes** (7.83 Hz eased to a calm ~0.15 Hz swell вҖ” reads as breath, not strobe), five glowing **SR1вҖ“SR5 harmonic-ladder rings** tracking each voice's level, and seeded-PRNG **lightning flickers** scaled by Kp (gentle brief warm glows, never full-screen flashes, mean brightness ~constant). `hasWebGL()` probe вҶ’ readable notice if absent; `prefers-reduced-motion` damps flicker + pulse. **(4)** `page.tsx` вҖ” one-gesture Start (tap-anywhere too), render/audio RAF loop, LIVE/simulated HUD (Kp + wind), audio-failure notice (globe still runs), design-notes panel. **(5)** `readme.ts` вҖ” in-page notes. **Palette:** the deliberate warm break вҖ” a whole glowing world (the "Overview Effect" made small), amber-on-indigo, not a dark nebula. `demoable` (build-checked: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` вҶ’ **Compiled with warnings** вң“ (112s; every warning pre-existing in `src/lib/**`/`src/components/**`; **0 hits for `1110`/`earth-hum`/`Type error`/`Failed to compile`**) вҶ’ **Linting and checking validity of types** вң“ вҶ’ only the standing container **`EMFILE`** at `Collecting page data` (`next-font-manifest.json`; ~4096-fd ceiling, infra-not-code, identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally) stopped a full green; `.next/server/app/dream/1110-earth-hum/page.js` **compiled вң“** (41 KB) + client-reference-manifest emitted; scoped `npx tsc --noEmit | grep 1110-earth-hum` = 0, `eslint src/app/dream/1110-earth-hum/` = **exit 0**. **Verification: compile + lint + type verified; the live NOAA fetch reuses the production-proven `1084` pattern, but the felt timbre / the 7.83 Hz sub / framerate are code-verified only вҖ” no GPU/speakers/network in this headless box (the deterministic fallback is the fully-exercisable never-blank/silent path). Wants Karel's ears on a subwoofer: does the heartbeat land, and does a live Kp bump warm the globe?**) В· Cycle 636 (adult, **WIDE** вҖ” winner of 3 parallel explorers on 3 fresh inputГ—outputГ—palette axes: this **live-data planetary drone** vs `1111-throat-of-light` (**sing a cathedral into being** вҖ” mic pitch+overtone analysis rings a bank of 12 sympathetic just-intonation resonators + lights a warm rose-window temple; voice INPUT; WebGL2; ritual-meditative) [banked вӯҗ IDEAS В§636] vs `1112-after-motion` (the **Motion Aftereffect / "waterfall illusion"** вҖ” a slow cool adaptation field that, when it freezes, appears to flow the other way;
