## Cycle 635 вҖ” **adult** psychedelic **DEEP** (ONE concept вҖ” *the music that exists only in your head*, Diana Deutsch's dichotic illusions вҖ” built via 2 parallel approaches; ship the stronger, bank the other) вҖ” ships `1109-inner-ear`, a **cabinet of auditory illusions**: put on headphones and each exhibit plays an objectively simple signal (two tones, a scale, a burst of noise) while what you *hear* is manufactured inside your own auditory system. This is the jury's (2026-07-02) explicitly-named **#1 remaining move** вҖ” *"cash the banked dichotic piece, an audio-first / headphones / zero-GPU ship that breaks the output and palette monotony at once"* вҖ” shipped as a fuller **five-exhibit suite** that goes past the banked spec: the three Deutsch dichotic illusions (**octave** 400/800 Hz swapping ears, **scale** ascending+descending split note-by-note, **tritone paradox** listener-dependent so it refuses to label direction) PLUS the **Zwicker tone** (a phantom pitch you hear in *silence* after notched pink noise вҖ” implementing THIS cycle's fresh RESEARCH В§635 dive, the 2025 *Imaging Neuroscience* phantom-perception study) PLUS a **personal tritone calibration** (judge 12 pairs вҶ’ your own pitch-class circle fills in, turning the paradox into a measurement of *you*). Audio-first, **warm paper-white gallery placard** (no black background, no GPU field), strict per-ear `ChannelMerger(2)` routing. Dodges every 2026-07-02 standing ban (tap-to-seed В· raw-WebGL2/WebGPU field-sim В· Physarum/graph-sonification В· dissolve-the-void В· black-void-plus-glow В· intense-hypnotic pole) вҖ” it is the anti-monoculture ship on all four axes at once. 1 more explored (`1108-two-ears`, the tight single-screen 3-illusion variant) вҖ” see IDEAS В§635.)

[/dream/1109-inner-ear](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1109-inner-ear) вҖ” **"Inner Ear": a small museum of the sounds your brain invents вҖ” Deutsch's dichotic illusions, the Zwicker phantom-in-silence, and a calibration that measures your own tritone template.** **Audio-first** (headphones required), the sound is the exhibit and the paper-white diagram is the placard. Four files: **(1)** `audio.ts` вҖ” `InnerEarEngine`: one **`ChannelMerger(2)`** (leftBusвҶ’input 0, rightBusвҶ’input 1) вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` limiter вҶ’ master вҶ’ destination; dichotic tones (octave/scale) route to exactly one ear bus, diotic tones (tritone/Zwicker/calibration) to both; raised-cosine (cosВІ) clickless envelopes; a deterministic ~0.2s-lookahead scheduler off `ctx.currentTime` (no `Math.random()` in the audio path вҖ” the Zwicker noise uses a seeded PRNG); a persistent notch-filtered pink-noise chain for Zwicker (cascaded biquad notches ~700вҖ“1150 Hz, gated on/off clicklessly). **(2)** `illusions.ts` вҖ” pure data + `shepardPartials` (octave-complex Gaussian log-frequency spectrum) + seeded pink noise. **(3)** `renderer.ts` вҖ” Canvas2D gallery placards: a three-lane scrolling score (blue left-ear / red right-ear / violet right-hander percept), a tritone pitch-class dial with a big "?", a Zwicker spectrum-strip + noiseвҶ’silence timeline, and the calibration pitch-class circle filling in green(up)/orange(down). **(4)** `page.tsx` вҖ” gallery nav (5 exhibits), Start/Stop, Reveal Both/Left/Right + Swap ears (dichotic only, "Left only" ramps the right channel to 0 in ~150 ms вҶ’ the phantom collapses = the built-in *aha*), calibration Higher/Lower/Replay, ~14 s idle auto-advance so a phone glance always has sound+motion, amber headphones advisory, AudioContext graceful-degradation, design-notes panel. `demoable` (build-checked: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` вҶ’ compile вң“ + **Linting and checking validity of types** вң“ вҖ” **0 warnings from `1109`**, all warnings pre-existing in `src/lib/**`; the ONLY failure is the standing container **`EMFILE`** at `Collecting page data` (~4096-fd ceiling, infra not code, identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally); scoped grep = no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper. **Verification: compile + lint + type verified; the per-ear routing correctness and whether each phantom actually forms are code-verified only вҖ” no headphones/ears in-box, which the README + on-screen caveat both state. Wants Karel's ears on real headphones.**) В· Cycle 635 (adult, **DEEP** вҖ” winner of 2 parallel approaches to the Deutsch-dichotic concept: this fuller five-exhibit suite vs `1108-two-ears`, the tight single-screen 3-illusion always-visible-score variant [banked IDEAS В§635]). **Won on:** (1) higher **ambition** (4/5 vs 3/5 вҖ” вүҘ4 subsystems, and the Zwicker exhibit is the visible **researchвҶ’build chain** from THIS cycle's В§635 dive); (2) it covers a genuinely new illusion *type* (phantom-in-silence) and a new interaction (personal calibration = "measurement of you"), the mandate's "massively bigger" over an incremental variant. **For**: adult / **audio-first, headphones, eyes-open-diagram** / `state: auditory illusion вҖ” the music only in the mind В· pole: eerie-liminal/uncanny` В· **listen-only + tap-to-judge (calibration) INPUT** (no mic, no camera, no pointer-drag) В· **audio-first + Canvas2D paper-white placard OUTPUT** (the genuinely under-served output axis, only 3Г— in the last 15) В· **strict per-ear dichotic routing + Shepard tones + Zwicker notched-noise TECHNIQUE** (dichotic + Zwicker both grep-0Г— in the lab) В· **warm paper-white museum VIBE** (the mandated non-black palette). **NAMED REFERENCES:** Diana Deutsch вҖ” octave illusion (1974), scale illusion (1975), tritone paradox (1986), *Musical Illusions and Phantom Words* (Oxford 2019); ## Cycle 634 вҖ” **adult** psychedelic **WIDE** (3 orthogonal explorers, each cashing a named provocation of the fresh 2026-07-02 jury вҖ” *"break the input, the palette, and the void"* вҖ” on a DIFFERENT fresh INPUT Г— OUTPUT Г— palette Г— pole; ship the most Karel-serving, bank the rest) вҖ” ships `1107-chromatic-organ`, the **pianist's chromesthesia color-organ**: you *play* it (Web MIDI or computer keys `AвҖ“K`/`WвҖ“U`, `Z`/`X` octave) and each pitch bursts into its **Scriabin *clavier Г  lumiГЁres* colour** while **polyphony interferes into shimmering moirГ©** вҖ” all on a **warm paper-white daylight ground** (pigment on a page, not glow on black), one note event driving BOTH a 2-op FM voice AND the shader plane-wave so sight and sound can't diverge. [/dream/1107-chromatic-organ](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1107-chromatic-organ) вҖ” **"Chromatic Organ": a live chromesthesia color-organ a pianist plays вҖ” every pitch its own Scriabin colour, polyphony shimmering into moirГ©, all in daylight.** A **played instrument** (not a tap-to-seed toy). Four subsystems: **(1) input** (`page.tsx`) вҖ” **Web MIDI** (`requestMIDIAccess`, note-on/off with velocity) OR an always-on **computer keyboard** (`A S D F G H J K` = CвҖ“C white, `W E T Y U` = the black keys, `Z`/`X` octave, key-repeat guarded so held notes sustain), plus a deterministic **idle arpeggio** after ~4s (seeded by step index, no runtime RNG) so a phone glance is never blank/silent; **(2) chromesthesia mapping** (`chromesthesia.ts`) вҖ” a hard-coded 12-entry **Scriabin *Prometheus* / clavier Г  lumiГЁres** circle-of-fifths pitchвҶ’hue table (C=red, G=orange, D=yellow, A=green, E=sky-blue, вҖҰ F=crimson), octaveвҶ’brightness, velocityвҶ’saturation; **(3) raw-WebGL2 render** (`renderer.ts`) вҖ” each sounding note contributes an aspect-corrected **plane wave** in its Scriabin hue; the shader **superimposes** every active note's wave so two-plus notes beat into **shimmering moirГ© fringes** where pigment deposits; sustained notes leave a ping-pong feedback afterglow that **decays toward warm paper `#f4efe6`** (not black), so mean brightness stays high вҖ” **no strobe, by construction**; **(4) audio** (`audio.ts`) вҖ” the *same* note event drives a **2-operator FM voice** (carrier + 2:1 modulator + mod-index ADSR вҶ’ master вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` вҲ’6/12 limiter вҶ’ destination, 8-voice oldest-steal), so sight and sound can never diverge. **Palette:** the deliberate anti-void вҖ” Scriabin colours bloom like watercolour pigment on a bright paper ground (Anadol/Ikeda saturated-flat lineage, not a dark nebula), UI in dark translucent chips for contrast. `demoable` (build-checked: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` вҶ’ compile вң“ + **Linting and checking validity of types** вң“ (all warnings pre-existing in `src/lib/**`/other app files; **0 hits for `1107`/`chromatic`/`Type error`/`Failed to compile`**); `.next/server/app/dream/1107-chromatic-organ/page.js` **compiled вң“** (39 KB); scoped `npx tsc --noEmit | grep 1107` = 0, `eslint src/app/dream/1107-chromatic-organ/` = **exit 0**. **Verification: compile + lint + type verified; the live-MIDI + felt synesthetic experience is code-verified only (no MIDI device / GPU / speakers in-box) вҖ” the FM voicing, moirГ© spatial-frequency, and afterglow constants are hand-tuned, not perceptually validated; the always-on computer-keyboard + idle arpeggio is the fully-exercisable never-blank/silent path. Wants Karel's hands: does it feel playable, and does polyphony shimmer?**) В· Cycle 634 (adult, **WIDE** вҖ” winner of 3 parallel explorers, each cashing a jury provocation on a different fresh input Г— output Г— palette: this **MIDI/keyboard chromesthesia color-organ** vs `1108-two-ears` (Diana Deutsch **dichotic illusions** вҖ” octave/scale/tritone via strict per-ear `ChannelMergerNode` routing; audio-first, headphones, paper-white diagram; the jury's explicitly-named next ship) [banked вӯҗ IDEAS В§634] vs `1109-oceanic-breath` (breath-rate вҶ’ "oceanic boundlessness" escalation; warm-dawn Canvas2D bloom + shared drone; ## Cycle 633 вҖ” **adult** psychedelic **DEEP** (ONE concept вҖ” *binocular depth manufactured from pure noise* вҖ” built via 2 parallel technical approaches; ship the stronger, bank the other) вҖ” ships `1105-hidden-eye`, a **real-time animated autostereogram (SIRDS)**: a field that looks like random static hides a living 3-D psychedelic surface вҖ” a breathing dome / receding tunnel / radial ripples / bumpy mandala вҖ” that has **zero monocular cues** and is manufactured entirely by binocular fusion in your own visual cortex, i.e. the depth exists *nowhere in the image, only in you*. This is the one classic instance of the lab's beloved "the percept is generated in YOU, not the signal" thread (stochastic resonance 1096, combination tones, Deutsch dichotic 1104, Caputo strange-face 1103) that it had **never built** вҖ” Julesz proved 3-D structure can be seen from random-dot noise with no monocular cue at all. Grep-0Г— technique (`stereogram|magic-eye|SIRDS|random-dot|autostereo` = 0 hits); a **default hands-free "reveal/wiggle" mode** (a lit, gently-swaying shaded heightfield вҶ’ motion parallax) makes the hidden surface legible at a phone glance even without free-fusing; and it dodges every 2026-07-01 standing ban (three.js В· Canvas2D-primary В· pointer-drag В· real-data В· Kuramoto В· cosmic-ambient-only) while resting WebGPU-compute (3Г— recent) and camera-input (just used by 1103). 1 more explored вҖ” see IDEAS В§633.)

[/dream/1105-hidden-eye](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1105-hidden-eye) вҖ” **"Hidden Eye": a field of noise that hides a living 3-D surface visible only inside your own visual cortex.** A real-time animated **autostereogram (SIRDS вҖ” Single Image Random-Dot Stereogram)**. Four subsystems: **(1) a morphing hidden-depth field** (`sirds.ts` В· `computeDepth`) вҖ” `depth(x,y,t)` cross-fading over ~48s through a breathing **dome вҶ’ receding tunnel вҶ’ radial ripples вҶ’ mandala** of bumps; **(2) the SIRDS encoder** вҖ” per scanline, two dots that must share a colour sit `sep = round(EВ·(1вҲ’ОјВ·depth))` apart (nearer surface вҮ’ shorter period вҮ’ pops toward you); colours are hashed by the *root* of each equality-chain rather than a running PRNG, so the dot field is **stable frame-to-frame** (only the links shift as depth changes вҖ” this is what stops it strobing), encoded on a downscaled 512Г—320 buffer at ~18fps; **(3) raw-WebGL2 render** (`gl.ts`) вҖ” uploads the RGBA dot buffer + an R8 depth texture; the fragment shader does mode 0 (stereogram blit + vignette + mean-preserving grain + violet tint) and mode 1 (Lambert-shaded heightfield + horizontal parallax sway); **(4) audio** (`audio.ts`) вҖ” per-frame **relief** (mean horizontal depth gradient) drives a just-intonation drone (filter brightness вҲқ relief), a chord that **retunes per form-state**, and a soft **FM bell "pop"** when a new form locks in, through a `DynamicsCompressor` limiter (starts on gesture, always sounds whether or not you can fuse). **The reveal mode** (default) shades the hidden heightfield directly with a small parallax sway so the surface is unmistakable **hands-free**; a button/`R` switches to the pure random-dot **Stereogram** with two convergence-guide dots ("make the two dots become three"). `demoable` (build-checked: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` вҶ’ compile вң“ + **Linting and checking validity of types** вң“ (all warnings pre-existing in `src/lib/**`; **0 hits for `1105`/`hidden-eye`/`Type error`/`Failed to compile`**) вҶ’ reached **Collecting page data**, where only the standing container static-gen `EMFILE` (~4096-fd ceiling, infra-not-code, Vercel-safe) stopped a full green; `.next/server/app/dream/1105-hidden-eye/page.js` **compiled вң“**; scoped `eslint src/app/dream/1105-hidden-eye/` = **exit 0**. **Verification: compile + lint + type verified; the SIRDS math was confirmed by a node harness (flat depth вҶ’ strictly periodic at period E; a raised region shrinks the local period), but the *felt* fusion + comfort/morph timing constants are hand-tuned, not perceptually validated headless вҖ” the default reveal/wiggle mode is the fully-exercisable, never-blank/silent path. ## Cycle 632 вҖ” **adult** psychedelic **WIDE** (3 orthogonal explorers, each a DIFFERENT fresh INPUT Г— pole; ship the highest-ambition, most on-mandate one) вҖ” ships `1103-strange-face`, a **webcam mirror that dissolves your own face** via the **Caputo strange-face-in-the-mirror illusion**: hold still and gaze softly at your reflection and, over ~1 minute, the edges fade (Troxler fading), the image folds into kaleidoscopic symmetry and drifts into a stranger вҖ” *derealization/depersonalization on purpose, no drug*. The genuinely grep-0Г— move is the **Caputo/Troxler self-face-dissolution mechanism** (MIDI and face-tracking both already exist in the lab вҖ” neither is claimed as a first). Swings to a fresh **eerie-liminal/dissociative** pole (PSYCHEDELIC Cluster 2), is an **embodied camera-input piece that ships** (the jury's standing want), inverts the industry's face-tech-syncs-a-mask reflex into *un-binding*, and dodges every 2026-07-01 standing ban (three.js В· Canvas2D-primary В· pointer-drag В· real-data В· Kuramoto В· cosmic-ambient-only). 2 more explored вҖ” see IDEAS В§632.)

[/dream/1103-strange-face](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1103-strange-face) вҖ” **"Strange Face": a dark mirror that dissolves your own reflection into a stranger the longer you hold still.** Your webcam feed is rendered through a WebGL2 **kaleidoscope with decaying optical feedback**. One scalar, `dissolve` (0=clear вҶ’ 1=gone), rises the longer your **facial motion** (measured by MediaPipe **FaceLandmarker**) stays low, and snaps back fast on any real movement. As it climbs the mirror does three things at once: **(1) Troxler fading** вҖ” the periphery is progressively blurred + desaturated while the centre stays sharp (a fixated visual field fades at its edges); **(2) radial mirror folding** вҖ” the image folds into N-fold symmetry (1вҶ’6-fold) so the face tiles into itself; **(3) optical feedback** вҖ” a slowly zooming/warping/hue-drifting ping-pong buffer smears each frame into the next until "someone else" congeals out of your own reflection. A soft inharmonic **shiver** fires at the strange-face threshold; a drone thins + detunes and a low slow beat deepens as the face dissolves (reuses `_shared/psych/droneBank`), through a `DynamicsCompressor` limiter. The pipeline is energy-preserving (feedback weights sum to 1 вҶ’ mean brightness ~constant, **no strobe**; reduced-motion damps spin/warp). If the camera is denied/unavailable or the CDN model fails, an **autonomous pseudo-face** fallback (a procedurally-drawn slowly-morphing face) runs the identical dissolution so it's never blank/silent. `demoable` (build-checked: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` вҶ’ **Creating an optimized production build** вң“ вҶ’ **Linting and checking validity of types** вң“ (every warning pre-existing in `src/lib/**`, **0 hits for `1103`/`strange-face`/`Type error`/`Failed to compile`**) вҶ’ reached **Collecting page data**, where only the standing container static-gen `EMFILE` (~4096-fd ceiling, infra-not-code, Vercel-safe) stopped a full green; scoped `eslint src/app/dream/1103-strange-face/` = **exit 0**. **Verification: compile + lint + type verified; the live-camera + FaceLandmarker path is code-verified only (no camera/GPU in this headless box вҖ” the CDN loader is mirrored from the working `1068-entity-lattice/pose.ts`), while the autonomous pseudo-face fallback is the fully-exercisable path; the *felt* dissolution + the stillnessвҶ’dissolve timing constants are hand-tuned, not perceptually validated вҖ” wants Karel dimming the room + gazing for ~1 min.**) В· Cycle 632 (adult, **WIDE** вҖ” winner of 3 parallel builders across 3 fresh inputs: this **face-tracking** mirror vs `1102-chromatic-organ` (a **MIDI/keyboard-played chromesthesia color-organ** вҖ” each note drives a KlГјver form-constant through the log-polar cortical warp, polyphony interfering into moirГ©; Scriabin *clavier Г  lumiГЁres*; raw-WebGL2; intense-hypnotic) [banked IDEAS В§632] vs `1104-two-ears` (**Diana Deutsch's dichotic musical illusions** вҖ” octave/scale/tritone via strict per-ear `ChannelMergerNode` routing so the music is manufactured in the listener; audio-first + live diagram) [banked IDEAS В§632]). **Won on:** (1) **ambition** вҖ” 4/5, the highest of the three; (2) **surprise + mandate fidelity** вҖ” self-face dissolution is the most viscerally "huh" and sits squarely in PSYCHEDELIC Cluster 2 (ketamine/NDE derealization) reachable with only a webcam + stillness; `1104-two-ears` is a lovely grep-0Г— audio-first idea but audio-first is 3Г— in the recent window and it's the lowest ambition (3/5). **For**: adult / **eerie-liminal/dissociative** pole / `state: mirror-gaze ego-dissolution / derealization` В· **webcam face-tracking INPUT** (+ autonomous pseudo-face fallback; ## Cycle 631 вҖ” **adult** psychedelic **DEEP** (one concept вҖ” a dissociative audio-first "void" that dissolves your felt sense of *when* вҖ” built via 2 parallel technical approaches; ship the stronger, bank the other) вҖ” ships `1101-time-dissolve`, an **audio-first** temporal-dissolution instrument whose novel core is a deliberate **audio-visual desync + "Re-bind" A/B engine** (grep-0Г— in the lab): a ShepardвҖ“Risset endless *descent* + just-intoned drone + a generative granular time-stretch smear poured into a swelling convolution void until onset and echo merge, one global `timeScale` dilating everything, across a stateful ~4-min arc with a hyper-lucid **clarity snap** (the gamma-surge translation) before a soft return. Inverts the live 2026 spatial-A/V-*sync* research frontier (SpatialV2A / ViSAudio) into deliberate *desync* to evoke derealization; fills the lab's thin **long-form-generative-with-state** category; swings the pole back to **cosmic-ambient** after an intense-heavy run; and dodges every 2026-07-01 standing ban (three.js В· Canvas2D-primary В· pointer-drag В· real-data В· Kuramoto В· cosmic-ambient-only) while resting WebGPU-compute (3Г— in the prior window).)

[/dream/1101-time-dissolve](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1101-time-dissolve) вҖ” **"Time, Dissolving": an audio-first descent that dissolves your sense of *when* вҖ” and a light that quietly refuses to keep time with the sound.** A ShepardвҖ“Risset endless **descent** (`startShepard`, `dir:-1`) over a just-intoned drone bed (`startDroneBank`) is smeared by a self-scheduled granular time-stretch (deterministic harmonic source resampled into overlapping Hann-windowed grains by a look-ahead scheduler) and poured into a swelling 7.5s convolution **void** (`createVoidReverb`) whose wet mix climbs until each onset and its own echo become indistinguishable вҖ” time collapses. A single global **`timeScale`** stretches the glide rate and the grain playhead together (time-dilation). The piece runs a stateful ~4-min arc: descent+deepening (0вҖ“2:30) вҶ’ deep plateau (~3:00) вҶ’ a brief hyper-lucid **clarity snap** (~3:15: low-pass blooms open, wet drops, grains sharpen, `timeScale` snaps to 1, visual re-aligns вҖ” the Borjigin gamma-surge translation) вҶ’ soft return (3:30вҖ“4:00), so minute 4 вү  minute 1. **The desync is the instrument:** the true audio envelope is pushed into a 60Hz ring buffer; when *not* re-bound the visual bloom reads a **warping, deepening lag** (0.6вҶ’~5s, slowly oscillating) into the past, so eyes and ears quietly disagree вҖ” a stand-in for the sensory-binding breakdown underlying dissociation. The prominent **"Re-bind (sync)"** toggle collapses the lag to zero so you can A/B *feel* it snap on/off (the clarity snap always re-aligns briefly, bound or not). Tap the void / "Sink deeper" adds a decaying depth boost. Visual: a dark near-black void, one soft violet bloom + breathing ring + crisp core that resolves only at the snap, exponential fog/vignette, a whisper-faint arc-position indicator. `demoable` (build-checked: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` вҶ’ compile + ESLint + full-project type-check all PASS вҖ” every ESLint warning is pre-existing in `src/lib/**`, **0 from `1101-time-dissolve/`**; ## Cycle 629 вҖ” **adult** psychedelic **DEEP** (ONE concept вҖ” *stochastic resonance* вҖ” 2 parallel builders attack it via 2 modalities, ship the truer one) вҖ” ships `1096-noise-bloom`, the lab's **FIRST stochastic-resonance instrument**: a melody rendered *below the threshold of hearing* that you bring into being by dialing in the RIGHT amount of noise. Too little noise вҶ’ silence; too much вҶ’ it drowns; at the resonance sweet-spot the phantom melody blooms out of the static. Inverts everyone's intuition that noise destroys signal вҖ” for a musician, "noise is the thing that lets you hear the music." Swings to an **eerie-liminal / hypnagogic** pole off the recent cosmic-ambient runs, keeps the fresh **audio-first** output in play, and is zero-permission + auto-sweeping so it sounds + cohere-glances hands-free.)

[/dream/1096-noise-bloom](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1096-noise-bloom) вҖ” **"Noise Bloom": a melody hidden below hearing вҖ” add noise to bring it into being.** A quiet D-Dorian phrase (`baseSignal 0.11`, soft triangle+octave voices, a look-ahead scheduler with per-cycle variation so minute 3 вү  minute 0) sits at or below comfortable audibility. A band-shaped white-noise loop (bandpass ~720 Hz, around the melody's spectral region) is added on top, and you control its level with a big vertical dial. The heart is a genuine **stochastic-resonance curve**: `resonanceClarity(noise, center)` is a Gaussian inverted-U Г— a hard sub-threshold floor (`noise/0.1` вҖ” below ~0.1 noise the signal is genuinely inaudible), centred on a slowly-drifting sweet-spot so the threshold "breathes"; clarity gently boosts the melody's gain (0.16вҶ’1.36Г—) so the emergence is unmistakable while the real noise does the perceptual unmasking. A Canvas2D grain field lerps from brownian static вҶ’ luminous filaments + a central pulse-bloom as clarity rises, and dissolves back to chaos past the sweet-spot вҖ” so you SEE how close to resonance you are. Dial is drag- AND arrow/PageUp-Down-key controllable (`role="slider"`, вүҘ44px), with a live clarity meter + a drifting sweet-spot marker; a **22s idle auto-sweep** eases the noise up through the sweet-spot and back so a hands-free phone glance HEARS the bloom and SEES the field cohere twice per cycle. `demoable` (build-checked: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` вҶ’ compile + ESLint + full-project type-check all PASS вҖ” reached `Collecting page data`/`Generating static pages`, 0 output from the 1096 folder; full-project `tsc --noEmit` = exit 0; scoped `eslint src/app/dream/1096-noise-bloom/` = exit 0; folder grep-clean; only the standing container static-gen `EMFILE` (~4096-fd ceiling, infra-not-code, Vercel-safe) prevented a full green. **Verification: compile+lint+type verified; the SR inverted-U is demonstrable by construction (clarity boosts the melody at the sweet-spot), but the *felt* psychoacoustic unmasking is ear-dependent вҖ” NOT ear-verified in this headless box.**) В· Cycle 629 (adult, **DEEP** вҖ” winner of 2 parallel builders: this **auditory** SR instrument vs `1097-veil-listen` (a **visual/Ganzfeld** twin вҖ” a faint mandala resolving out of animated noise at the SR sweet-spot, flicker-safe by mean-pinning) [banked вӯҗRESURRECT-FIRST as the cycle-2 graft, IDEAS В§629]). **Won on:** (1) **research fidelity** вҖ” SR is literally *the model of auditory perception* (Krauss et al.), so the auditory version IS the cited mechanism, where the visual twin is a cross-modal step removed; (2) **surprise for a musician** вҖ” "noise is the only thing that lets you hear the melody"; (3) **output diversity** вҖ” audio-first is fresher than the visual twin's Canvas2D-primary; (4) **replay life** вҖ” real melodic content with per-cycle variation. **For**: adult / **eerie-liminal** pole / `state: hypnagogia / sensory-deprivation threshold` В· **noise-dial INPUT** (drag OR arrow-key вҖ” not free-canvas pointer-drag) / **audio-first + Canvas2D-meter OUTPUT** / **stochastic-resonance TECHNIQUE** (sub-threshold signal + tunable band-shaped noise + inverted-U clarity curve w/ drifting sweet-spot) / dark liminal, violet accents. **Audio (Web Audio):** buried melody synth (triangle+octave voices, look-ahead scheduler) + band-passed white-noise loop + clarity-gated gain, through a `DynamicsCompressor` limiter. **NAMED REFERENCE:** the **Stochastic Resonance model of auditory perception** (Krauss et al., bioRxiv 2020 вҖ” unifies tinnitus, the Zwicker tone illusion, residual inhibition); predictive-coding+SR (arXiv:2204.03354); the Ganzfeld / sensory-deprivation lineage. **Ambition (honest 3/5, 4/5 arguable):** #1 (a stochastic-resonance perceptual engine is grep-0Г— вҖ” the one `zwicker` hit in the lab is EWA *splatting*; `1043-dreamachine` is Ganz*flicker*, a different mechanism) В· #2 вүҘ3 subsystems (buried-melody synth + noise engine + SR curve + Canvas2D coherence field = 4) В· #3 named ref (Krauss et al.) В· #5 soft (RESEARCH В§629, foundational-dated). **diversity:** `banned=[three.js-primary В· Canvas2D-primary В· pointer-drag В· real-data-sonification В· Kuramoto В· cosmic-ambient-only (JURY 2026-07-01)]` В· `picked=[noise-dial INPUT В· audio-first+Canvas2D-meter OUTPUT В· stochastic-resonance TECHNIQUE В· hypnagogic-liminal VIBE]` вҖ” clears every ban. **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** no strobe вҖ” the grain field is high-spatial-frequency with slow luminance drift; no full-screen flashing. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; no network; zero new npm deps). Design notes (in-page slide-in panel + `src/app/dream/1096-noise-bloom/README.md`)

## Cycle 628 вҖ” **adult** psychedelic **WIDE** (3 orthogonal explorers across 3 different altered-states Г— techniques, orchestrated; ship the highest-integrity one) вҖ” ships `1095-plate-modes`, a **physically-honest Chladni plate you play by touch**: a real 2D wave equation solved on the GPU (WebGL2 FDTD ping-pong float textures), where the glowing standing-wave nodal lines you SEE and the modal chord you HEAR are two readouts of the *same* vibrating field вҖ” not an FFT-of-a-song visualizer. Tap to strike; a slowly-swept driver rings up mode after mode so it lives with no input. Applies the jury's most-praised virtue вҖ” the **honest instrument** (it named `1065-skin-membrane` "the most honest instrument in the lab") вҖ” to a 2D plate, diversifies to an **intense-hypnotic** pole off the recent cosmic-ambient runs, and keeps the actively-wanted **raw-WebGL2** output in play.)

[/dream/1095-plate-modes](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1095-plate-modes) вҖ” **"Plate Modes": tap a vibrating plate and watch the exact Chladni standing-wave nodal patterns you are HEARING form in real time. A 2D wave equation is integrated on the GPU as a WebGL2 ping-pong between float textures (`u_next = 2В·u вҲ’ u_prev + cВІВ·вҲҮВІu`, damped, reflective fixed edges so genuine square-plate modes `sin(mПҖx)В·sin(nПҖy)` form; `cВІ=0.24` < the 2D CFL limit of 0.5, plus a non-finite guard so it never blows up to NaN). A per-texel envelope channel tracks the standing-wave amplitude вҖ” exactly what sand measures on a real Chladni plate вҖ” and the render pass lights the NODES (near-zero amplitude) incandescent cyanвҶ’white as luminous sand-lines, antinodes a faint amber. A slowly-swept off-centre sinusoidal driver rings up one mode after another so the figure continuously reorganizes with zero input; each tap injects a gaussian impulse at the touch point. The honest part: every frame the GPU field is read back and PROJECTED onto the plate's own spatial eigenmodes `sin(mПҖx)В·sin(nПҖy)`, and those per-mode amplitudes set the loudness of one resonant sine voice per mode (each fixed at the modal frequency `f = FвӮҖВ·вҲҡ(mВІ+nВІ)`) вҖ” so you literally hear the modes whose nodal lines you see, and the chord shifts as the driver rings up new modes; a tap adds a bright band-passed noise strike that rings and decays with the plate's damping, everything summed through a `tanh` soft-clip bus. Sound + geometry are two read-outs of one vibrating system.** `demoable` (build-checked: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` вҶ’ compile + ESLint + full-project type-check all PASS вҖ” reached `Collecting page data`; build-log grep of `1095`/`plate-modes` in errors/`Type error`/`Failed to compile` = **0 hits**; scoped `eslint src/app/dream/1095-plate-modes/` = **exit 0**; folder grep-clean (no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route/paren-folder); only the standing container static-gen infra failure (`EMFILE` on `next-font-manifest.json`, the ~4096-fd ceiling blocking static-gen every cycle since ~472, infra-not-code, Vercel-safe) prevented a full green. **Verification: compile+lint+type verified; the FDTD scheme is numerically stable by construction (CFL + NaN guard, builder-reasoned); the headline GPU float-texture sim + audio read-back are GPU-device-only вҖ” code-verified, not run in the box (no GPU / `EXT_color_buffer_float`), with a driver-derived audio fallback if a device refuses float read-back so it never goes silent.**) В· Cycle 628 (adult, **WIDE** вҖ” winner of 3 parallel builders: this **GPU-FDTD Chladni plate** vs `1093-resonant-drift` (raw-WebGL2 raymarched corridor whose geometry drives a dynamic-convolution reverb вҖ” the space IS the instrument; Sonic4D-grounded) [banked вӯҗ IDEAS В§628] vs `1094-dither-veil` (raw-WebGL2 animated Bayer ordered-dither over domain-warped fbm вҖ” closed-eye hypnagogic grain) [banked IDEAS В§628]). **Won on:** (1) **physical honesty** вҖ” sound and image are two readouts of ONE wave-equation solve, the jury's most-praised virtue (it called `1065-skin-membrane` "the most honest instrument in the lab"; this is that virtue on a 2D plate); (2) **ambition** вҖ” a real GPU PDE solver + eigenmode-projection read-back + modal audio bank + tap input = вүҘ3 genuine subsystems, and a 2D-FDTD-wave-equation-driving-audio technique that is fresh vs the FFT-driven cymatics `19`/`165`; (3) **pole diversity** вҖ” intense-hypnotic cymatic trance breaks the recent cosmic-ambient run. Dodges every 2026-07-01 diversity ban: **NOT three.js-primary** (raw-WebGL2), **NOT Canvas2D-primary**, **NOT pointer-drag** (discrete tap-to-strike), **NOT real-world-data-sonification** (self-contained physics), **NOT Kuramoto**, **NOT cosmic-ambient-only** (intense-hypnotic pole). Love-bias: soft вҖ” the loved cluster leans GPU-field + cosmic + spatial (`130-tsl-particle-compute`вқӨпёҸ, `262-aurora-particle`вқӨпёҸ, `148-spatial-palette`вқӨпёҸ); none matched the plate directly (the banked `1093-resonant-drift` was the closest to the spatial loves), so the pick came from ambition + honesty + pole-diversity, not love. **For**: adult / **intense-hypnotic** pole / `state: geometric form-constant / cymatic trance` В· **discrete tap-to-strike INPUT** (no pointer-drag) / **raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT** (ping-pong float-texture FDTD + Chladni render pass) / **2D wave-equation FDTD + spatial-eigenmode projection + modal-resonator audio TECHNIQUE** / electric monochrome (black plate, incandescent cyan/white nodes, amber antinodes). **Audio (Web Audio):** modal resonator bank (one sine voice per `(m,n)` mode at `FвӮҖВ·вҲҡ(mВІ+nВІ)`) driven by the field-onto-eigenbasis projection + a band-passed noise strike transient, through a `tanh` soft-clip bus. **NAMED REFERENCE / framing:** the real Chladni plate (Ernst Chladni, 1787 вҖ” sand settles on the nodal lines of a vibrating plate); physical-honesty framing shared with `1065-skin-membrane`. **Ambition (honest 4/5):** #1 (2D-FDTD-wave-equation-on-GPU-driving-audio is grep-0Г—; the FFT-driven cymatics `19`/`165` are a different substrate вҖ” grep-before-you-claim, jury #2) В· #2 вүҘ3 subsystems (GPU FDTD sim + eigenmode-projection read-back + modal audio bank + tap input = 4) В· #5 cites RESEARCH В§628 (the ordered-dither/Sonic4D dive that seeded this WIDE slate). **diversity:** `banned=[three.js-primary В· Canvas2D-primary В· pointer-drag В· real-data-sonification В· Kuramoto В· cosmic-ambient-only (JURY 2026-07-01)]` В· `picked=[tap-to-strike INPUT В· raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT В· FDTD-wave-equation + eigenmode-projection + modal-audio TECHNIQUE В· cymatic-trance intense-hypnotic VIBE]` вҖ” clears every ban. **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** no strobe вҖ” mode transitions and all brightness changes are slow drifts; a tap is a single soft impulse, not repeating flicker. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; no network; zero new npm deps). Design notes (in-page): `src/app/dream/1095-plate-modes/README.md`

## Cycle 627 вҖ” **adult** psychedelic **DEEP** cycle-3 of the cosmic-web thread `1066`вҶ’`1089`вҶ’**1092** (2 parallel builders attacking ONE graph-MERGE via 2 DIFFERENT render targets вҖ” raw-WebGL2 vs WebGPU-compute вҖ” ship the fresher output). Where `1089` counted HOW MANY filaments touch each node (degreeвҶ’chord), this hears WHICH nodes connect вҖ” the graph's actual **edges** as interval dyads вҖ” and how tightly-woven each neighbourhood is (the **local clustering coefficient**) as chord density, with the whole living slime-mold web running in **raw WebGL2** fragment shaders. Cashes the 2026-07-01 jury's provocation #5 ("do a cycle-3 вҖ” make the return a habit"; two returns in ~6 cycles now: 1082, 1089, and this) AND #1 (raw-WebGL2 is the actively-wanted output вҖ” dodges the WebGPU-compute monoculture 1089+1086 built back-to-back).

[/dream/1092-filament-lattice](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1092-filament-lattice) вҖ” **"Filament Lattice": a living two-species Physarum slime-mold cosmic web, rendered in raw WebGL2, where the graph itself is the instrument. Tap to seed cosmic nodes; luminous filaments grow between them (cyan species A / violet species B, panned L/R). Each node's DEGREE вҖ” how many filaments radiate from it (вҲј30 radial rays) вҖ” picks a just-intonation chord (root / +fifth / +third / +ninth / full stack), exactly as 1089 did. NEW this cycle-3: when a sustained filament BRIDGES two nodes (segment coverage вүҘ60% above a ridge threshold) it becomes a graph EDGE вҖ” drawn as a glowing line (new ones flash ~1s) and voiced as the INTERVAL DYAD between its two endpoints' pitches, with a bright FM "connection formed" chime the instant it first links (rising-edge memory + hysteresis so a one-frame flicker can't spam it). And each node's LOCAL CLUSTERING COEFFICIENT вҖ” the fraction of its neighbours that are themselves connected (triangle density) вҖ” sets its chord's density/brightness: a node in a tightly-woven neighbourhood opens more partials + shimmer, an isolated bridge node stays a thin, lonely fundamental. Gravity slowly ACCRETES nodes into super-clusters over minutes (a bell per merge); as total connectivity peaks the master brightness, reverb and drone drive open into a swelling cosmic-AWE chord вҖ” minute-5 genuinely differs from minute-0. Pre-seeded + auto-accreting so it lives and sings within ~2s with zero input.** `demoable` (build-checked: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` вҶ’ compile + ESLint + full-project type-check all PASS вҖ” reached `Collecting page data`; build-log grep of `1092`/`filament-lattice` in errors/`Type error`/`Failed to compile` = **0 hits**; scoped `eslint src/app/dream/1092-filament-lattice/` = **exit 0**; folder grep-clean (no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route/paren-folder); only the standing container static-gen infra failure (`EMFILE` on `next-font-manifest.json`, the ~4096-fd ceiling blocking static-gen every cycle since ~472, infra-not-code, Vercel-safe) prevented a full green; **verification: compile+lint+type verified; and вҖ” unusually strong for this lab вҖ” the builder ran a real headless `tsx` harness against the live `physarum.ts`+`graph.ts` confirming the graph math numerically (a 3-node cluster вҶ’ 3 active edges, coverage 1.0, clustering 1.0). The CPU/Canvas2D fallback runs the identical model + identical graph extraction + identical audio, so the edge dyads, clustering sonification and edge overlay are all demoable headless; the headline 0.5M-agent raw-WebGL2 field is the GPU-device-only part** вҖ” the builder had no GPU/`EXT_color_buffer_float` in the box, so the WebGL2 field is code-verified, the CPU fallback carries the headless demo). В· Cycle 627 (adult, **DEEP** вҖ” winner of 2 parallel builders attacking ONE merge via 2 render targets: this **raw-WebGL2** take vs `1091-filament-bridge` the **WebGPU-compute** sibling [de-selected, banked вӯҗ IDEAS В§627]). **Won on:** (1) **output diversity вҖ” the whole point of the two-output DEEP fire** вҖ” raw-WebGL2 is jury #1's actively-wanted output and only 1Г— in the window (1085); shipping the WebGPU-compute sibling would be the 3rd WebGPU-compute in the last 4 fires (after 1086+1089), the exact monoculture the jury warns of; (2) **stronger headless verification** вҖ” the `tsx` harness numerically confirmed the edge/clustering math, where 1091 could only reason its thresholds. Dodges every 2026-07-01 diversity ban: **NOT three.js-primary** (raw-WebGL2), **NOT Canvas2D-primary** (Canvas2D is only the fallback + the graph overlay), **NOT pointer-drag** (discrete tap-to-seed), **NOT real-world-data-sonification** (self-contained sim), **NOT Kuramoto** (Physarum + graph theory), **NOT cosmic-ambient-only** (accretion drives cosmic-ambient вҶ’ cosmic-awe with a real rising arc). Love-bias: soft вҖ” the loved cluster leans GPU-particle/field + cosmic (`236-particle-life-song`вқӨпёҸ emergent-life field, `262-aurora-particle`вқӨпёҸ, `130-tsl-particle-compute`вқӨпёҸ, `321-spectral-flight`вқӨпёҸ), a tailwind for a living slime-mold web; the pick itself came from the jury's cycle-3 want + today's research. **For**: adult / **cosmic-ambient вҶ’ cosmic-awe** pole / `state: cosmic-web accretion` В· **discrete tap-to-seed + autonomous accretion INPUT** (no pointer-drag) / **raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT** (fragment-shader Physarum + 2D graph overlay; CPU/Canvas2D fallback) / **agent-based Physarum + adjacency-edge-graph extraction + clustering-coefficient sonification + gravitational accretion TECHNIQUE** / deep-space cyan/violet вҶ’ gold awe swell. **Audio (Web Audio):** shared `_shared/psych/droneBank` + `convolutionVoid` bed; degreeвҶ’chord + clusteringвҶ’density per-node voices; edge interval dyads; FM connection chimes; coalescence bells; accretion awe crescendo. **NAMED REFERENCES:** **Jones 2010** (Physarum transport-network model, used verbatim in GLSL + CPU); **Sage Jenson / Maximilian Klein** (raw-WebGL2 browser-Physarum technique lineage); **Codis, Pogosyan & Pichon 2018** (arXiv:1803.11477, cosmic-web connectivity вҖ” degree/clustering/path-length as graph statistics); **arXiv:2510.10286** (Oct 2025, cultured-neuronal-nets вҶ” cosmic-web graph parallels вҖ” "the same web in the skull and the sky"); **Euclid Q1 DR XXXV** (A&A 2026, arXiv:2503.15332, connectivity = filaments-per-node). **Ambition (honest 4/5):** #2 вүҘ3 subsystems (raw-WebGL2 agent Physarum + adjacency-edge extraction + clustering-coefficient extraction + JI graph-voicing + accretion = 5) В· #3 named refs (above) В· #4 **multi-cycle commitment вҖ” the honored cycle-3 of the 1066вҶ’1089 thread** В· #5 cites RESEARCH В§627; (#1 honest: the *edge-dyad + clustering-coefficient sonification* is grep-0Г—, but the Physarum/cosmic-web *substrate* ships at 1066/1089, so billed a cycle-3 merge, not a false clean lab-first вҖ” the grep-before-you-claim discipline, jury #2). **diversity:** `banned=[three.js-primary В· Canvas2D-primary В· pointer-drag В· real-data-sonification В· Kuramoto В· cosmic-ambient-only (JURY 2026-07-01)]` В· `picked=[tap-seed + autonomous-accretion INPUT В· raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT В· Physarum + adjacency-edge-graph + clustering-coefficient TECHNIQUE В· cosmic-web вҶ’ awe VIBE]` вҖ” clears every ban (cycle-3 exemption + the awe swell add pole range over cosmic-ambient) and puts the actively-wanted raw-WebGL2 output back to work. **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** no strobe вҖ” filaments grow/fade by slow luminance drift; new-edge flashes are single soft 1s fades, not repeating flicker. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; no network; zero new npm deps). ## Cycle 626 вҖ” **adult** psychedelic **WIDE** (3 orthogonal explorers across 3 DIFFERENT non-banned OUTPUT targets вҖ” audio-first/SVG В· raw-WebGL2 В· WebGPU-compute вҖ” the directest attack on the jury's #1 output-monoculture complaint; ships the one whose OUTPUT is the lab's least-repeated) вҖ” the lab's **second-ever audio-first / no-screen piece** (after 1073) and the biggest felt break from the GPU-visual sameness of the recent window: an eyes-closed, headphone NDE "tunnel-to-light" where you **descend by slowing your own tapped pulse** and a luminous **difference-tone** blooms only when you go still. Cashes the 2026-07-01 jury's long-standing "audio-first/SVG вҖ” actively wanted since 1073" want; its provocation #2 (*grep the substrate before claiming a lab-first*) is what disqualified the two flashier GPU siblings this fire.)

[/dream/1090-threshold-descent](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1090-threshold-descent) вҖ” **"Threshold / Descent": an audio-first near-death dissolution you can do with your eyes closed. Press Begin and a dark spatial void opens вҖ” eight just-intonation voices ring around your head on HRTF PannerNodes over a Risset/Shepard endless-fall glissando and a cavernous void reverb. The only visual is austere: six concentric SVG rings that contract toward a central dot, no strobe, deliberately minimal so the sound carries everything. You control depth not by touching anything but by the PACE of a pulse you tap (spacebar / full-screen tap / a big button): fast agitated taps hold you near the surface; as you slow, and finally go still, `depth` glides toward 1.0 and you sink. The reward for letting go is the "light" вҖ” a warm missing-fundamental / difference-tone partial (a 550+660 Hz pair beating a 110 Hz phantom tone) that blooms ONLY above depth вүҲ 0.8, so stillness is what turns it on. The HRTF ring contracts inward as you descend, the void gets wetter, the descent commits faster. If you never tap, a scripted auto-descent glides to stillness and holds at the light within ~2s, so it plays itself.** `demoable` (build-checked: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` вҶ’ compile + ESLint + full-project type-check all PASS вҖ” reached `Collecting page data`; build-log grep of `1090`/`threshold-descent` in errors/`Type error`/`Failed to compile` = **0 hits**; scoped `eslint src/app/dream/1090-threshold-descent/` = **exit 0**; folder grep-clean (no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route/paren-folder); only the standing container static-gen infra failure (`EMFILE` on `next-font-manifest.json`, the ~4096-fd ceiling blocking static-gen every cycle since ~472, infra-not-code, Vercel-safe) prevented a full green; **verification: compile+lint+type verified; the scripted auto-descent + always-on audio + non-strobing SVG are the headless-demoable paths; the actual spatial-audio *feel* (HRTF ring, difference-tone light) is audio-device-only** вҖ” the builder could not hear audio in the box, so the sound design is code-verified, not ear-verified; audio-first is the hardest category to verify headless, a tradeoff the jury explicitly accepts to finally get this category shipped). В· Cycle 626 (adult, **WIDE** вҖ” winner of 3 orthogonal explorers, each a DIFFERENT non-banned OUTPUT: this **audio-first/SVG** take vs `1091-fourth-turn` the **raw-WebGL2** six-plane 4D polytope you *hear* rotate [de-selected, banked вӯҗ IDEAS В§626] vs `1092-liquid-melt` the **WebGPU-compute** Stam NavierвҖ“Stokes voice-melts-the-world fluid [de-selected, banked вӯҗ IDEAS В§626]). **Won on OUTPUT diversity, not raw ambition:** audio-first/SVG is the lab's single least-repeated output (1Г— prior, 1073) вҶ’ the most direct answer to Karel's "too similar in design and theme" and jury #1 ("prove the render target can CHANGE, not slide sideways"). The two GPU siblings were both stronger on paper but **grep (jury #2) killed their headline lab-first claims** вҖ” a true 4D polytope already ships twice (1042 raymarch, 1051 Canvas2D), a WebGPU fluid already ships (15, 3); and shipping 1092 would have been the 4th WebGPU-compute in the window / 3rd in a row (1086+1089), the exact monoculture the jury warns of. Dodges every 2026-07-01 diversity ban: **NOT three.js-primary** (SVG/Web-Audio only), **NOT Canvas2D-primary** (no canvas), **NOT pointer-drag** (tap-pace + stillness), **NOT real-world-data-sonification** (self-contained synth), **NOT Kuramoto** (rested), **NOT cosmic-ambient-only** (descends cosmic-void вҶ’ luminous-intense as the light blooms). Cashes the jury's actively-wanted **audio-first/SVG output**. Love-bias: soft вҖ” no direct audio-first love; the pick was diversity + jury-want driven. **For**: adult / **cosmic-ambient вҶ’ luminous-intense** pole / `state: NDE tunnel-to-light / ketamine dissolution` В· **tap-pace + stillness INPUT** (tap a pulse; slowing and going still = descending; no pointer-drag, no mic) / **audio-first + minimal-SVG OUTPUT** (HRTF ring, no canvas/WebGL/GPU) / **HRTF spatial ring + Risset/Shepard endless-descent + reward-gated difference-tone** TECHNIQUE / dark spatial void вҶ’ single warm luminous tone. **Audio (Web Audio):** hand-rolled 8-voice HRTF PannerNode ring (contracts toward the head with depth) + shared `startShepard({dir:-1})` endless fall + `createVoidReverb` + `startDroneBank` bed + synthesized missing-fundamental "light" gated above depthвүҲ0.8; AudioContext gesture-gated, full teardown on unmount. **NAMED REFERENCES:** **Jean-Claude Risset** (the endless-glissando / Risset rhythm auditory illusion of perpetual descent); **Roger Shepard** (Shepard tones); **Susan Blackmore, *Dying to Live*** (the tunnel-to-light NDE phenomenology). **Ambition (honest 3/5):** #2 вүҘ3 subsystems (tap-paceвҶ’depth state machine + HRTF spatial ring + Shepard endless-descent + difference-tone light synthesis = 4) В· #3 named refs (above) В· (#1 borderline: the descend-by-slowing tap-pace mechanic + reward-gated difference-tone light is 0Г—, but the NDE/audio-first *substrate* is trodden вҖ” 1067/1073/1088 вҖ” so not billed as a clean lab-first). **diversity:** `banned=[three.js-primary В· Canvas2D-primary В· pointer-drag В· real-data-sonification В· Kuramoto В· cosmic-ambient-only (JURY 2026-07-01)]` В· `picked=[tap-pace + stillness INPUT В· audio-first + minimal-SVG OUTPUT В· HRTF spatial + Risset/Shepard + difference-tone TECHNIQUE В· NDE void вҶ’ luminous VIBE]` вҖ” clears every ban and is the single most output-diversifying ship available this fire. **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** no strobe/flicker anywhere вҖ” slow luminance drift only; the light blooms as a smooth brightness ramp. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; no network at all; zero new npm deps). ## Cycle 625 вҖ” **adult** psychedelic **DEEP** (2 parallel graph-extraction approaches to ONE concept, orchestrated) вҖ” the lab's **first honored cycle-2 of `1066-cosmic-web`** and its **third WebGPU-compute instrument**: a living two-species slime-mold filament web where each node's **connectivity** вҖ” the number of filaments radiating from it вҖ” picks its chord, and gravity **accretes** nodes into super-clusters over minutes so the web thickens into a fuller chord and blooms; cashes the 2026-07-01 jury's provocation #5 ("do a cycle-3 вҖ” make the return a habit") + #1 (put the under-used WebGPU-compute path back to work), resting Kuramoto and three.js at once)

[/dream/1089-cosmic-connectome](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1089-cosmic-connectome) вҖ” **"Cosmic Connectome": the cycle-2 of `1066-cosmic-web`, where the *connectivity* вҖ” not the brightness вҖ” is the instrument. Tap the void to seed cosmic nodes; a real two-species Physarum (slime-mold) simulation grows luminous filaments between them, cyan/teal (tight sense-angle) vs violet/magenta (wide sense-angle), panned L/R. The new part: each node's connectivity is measured live вҖ” cast ~30 radial rays outward on the trail field, count how many *distinct* filament ridges they cross (adjacent hitting rays collapse to one filament) вҶ’ an integer **degree** вҖ” exactly the "number of filaments linked to a cosmic node" statistic a July-2026 Euclid paper measures. Degree selects a just-intonation chord: 0вҖ“1 вҶ’ root drone; 2 вҶ’ +just fifth (3:2); 3 вҶ’ pentatonic triad; 4 вҶ’ +ninth (9:8); 5+ вҶ’ a full luminous stack. So a lonely well hums one tone and a richly-linked super-cluster rings a chord. Then **gravitational accretion**: nodes carry persistent mass, drift under a softened inverse-square pull, and merge on contact into mass-weighted super-clusters (a bell at each coalescence) вҖ” so connectivity climbs and minute-5 sounds unlike minute-1, and as total connectivity peaks the master brightness + reverb open into an **awe swell**. It runs as WGSL compute on a 512ВІ GPU field (atomic i32 ping-pong trail buffers, two species, diffuse+decay per channel, a render pass, a GPU reduce вҶ’ async 96ВІ readback the connectivity is read from) and falls all the way back to the IDENTICAL model on a 256ВІ grid in plain JS drawn to a 2D canvas вҖ” with an emerald `в—Ҹ WebGPU compute` / amber `в—Ҹ CPU fallback` badge and a live HUD reading node count + ОЈ connectivity + peak degree so the concept is legible even headless. Loads playing itself: pre-seeded wells + autonomous drift/merge/re-seed keep the web alive and sounding within ~2s with zero input.** `demoable` (build-checked: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` вҶ’ compile + ESLint + full-project type-check all PASS вҖ” reached `Collecting page data`; build-log grep of `1089`/`cosmic-connectome` in errors/`Type error`/`Failed to compile` = **0 hits**; project-wide `tsc --noEmit` clean of 1089; scoped `eslint src/app/dream/1089-cosmic-connectome/` = **exit 0**; folder grep-clean (`any` only in the local WebGPU type shim behind an eslint-disable; no `@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route/paren-folder); only the standing container static-gen infra failure (`Failed to collect page data` on unrelated pre-existing pages 402/404/39 вҖ” the same fd-ceiling class blocking static-gen every cycle since ~472, infra-not-code, Vercel-safe) prevented a full green; **verification: compile+lint+type verified; the CPU/Canvas2D fallback + pre-seeded autonomous accretion + always-on audio are the headless-demoable paths; the WGSL-compute 512ВІ two-species path + the true filament look + the audio feel are GPU/audio-device-only** вҖ” the builder could not run WebGPU/audio in the box, so the GPU path is code-verified, not pixel-verified; the CPU fallback runs the identical model + identical connectivity extraction, so the piece is a complete instrument regardless of GPU). В· Cycle 625 (adult, **DEEP** вҖ” winner of 2 parallel graph-extraction approaches to ONE concept, *the cosmic web's connectivity as the instrument*: this **radial ray-count degree** take вҖ” measuring actual filaments radiating from each node, the truer Euclid statistic вҖ” vs `1090-web-weaver` the **adjacency-graph + edge-event** take (builds a real node-edge graph of which wells a filament bridges, draws the extracted edges over the slime so you SEE the graph, and rings a "connection formed" chime the instant a filament first links two nodes) [de-selected, banked вӯҗ IDEAS В§625 вҖ” the more *legible* graph visualization + a discrete musical link-event; it is literally this winner's own README next-step #2 "true edge graph", a natural cycle-3 merge; banked over shipped because its edge-threshold firing is un-tunable headless while the winner's continuous degree voicing always sings]). **Cashes the 2026-07-01 jury's provocation #5 ("Now do a cycle-3 вҖ” one return was a milestone; a second makes it a habit") вҖ” the jury named THIS piece: "`1066-cosmic-web`'s filament-graph connectivity sonification is its own README's named next-step вҖ” which would also put the under-used WebGPU path back to work."** Proves the return is becoming a discipline (after 1082's honored cycle-2 of 1063). **Implements THIS cycle's RESEARCH В§625 dive** (the July-2026 Euclid Q1 DR XXXV cosmic-connectivity paper that makes "filaments-per-node" a live 2026 observable, grep-0Г— as a sonification). Dodges every 2026-07-01 diversity ban: **NOT three.js-primary** (WGSL compute + WebGL render), **NOT Canvas2D-primary** (Canvas2D only as fallback), **NOT pointer-drag** (discrete tap-to-seed + autonomous), **NOT real-world-data-sonification** (a self-contained sim, not a live feed), **NOT Kuramoto** (rested), **NOT cosmic-ambient-only** (the accretion awe swell adds an intense-adjacent peak). Cashes the jury's actively-wanted **WebGPU-compute output** (3rd in the lab, after 1066 + 1086). Love-bias: sits in Karel's loved GPU-particle/field + cosmic cluster (`236-particle-life-song`вқӨпёҸ emergent-life field, `130-tsl-particle-compute`вқӨпёҸ, `262-aurora-particle`вқӨпёҸ). **For**: adult / **cosmic-ambient вҶ’ cosmic-awe** pole / `state: cosmic-web accretion` В· **discrete tap-to-seed + autonomous-accretion INPUT** (tap to place a nutrient well; gravity drifts+merges nodes; a new well condenses ~every 9s; no pointer-drag) / **WebGPU-compute OUTPUT** (two-species WGSL Physarum, atomic i32 ping-pong, GPU reduce+readback; true 256ВІ JS/Canvas2D fallback; `в—Ҹ WebGPU`/`в—Ҹ CPU` badge) / Physarum-transport + **graph-degree connectivity extraction** + gravitational-accretion TECHNIQUE / deep-indigo void вҶ’ teal/violet filaments вҶ’ gold degree-heated node cores. **Audio (Web Audio):** self-contained JI drone bed + per-node degreeвҶ’chord voices (root/fifth/third/ninth/stack by connectivity) + coalescence bells + a connectivity-driven awe swell (master brightness + reverb open as ОЈ-degree peaks) вҶ’ limiter; AudioContext gesture-gated, full teardown on unmount. **NAMED REFERENCES:** **Jeff Jones, "Characteristics of pattern formation and evolution in approximations of Physarum transport networks" (2010)** (the agent model, GPU + CPU); **Euclid Quick Data Release (Q1) DR XXXV, "The role of cosmic connectivity in shaping galaxy clusters," _A&A_ 2026/07** (connectivity = filaments-per-node, the sonified statistic); **Elek / Burchett et al., "Monte Carlo Physarum Machine / Revealing the Dark Threads of the Cosmic Web" (UCSC, 2020)** (the slime-mold-reconstructs-the-cosmic-web conceptual core). **Ambition (honest 4/5):** #1 lab-first technique (graph-degree connectivity extraction from a Physarum field, grep-0Г—) В· #2 вүҘ3 subsystems (two-species WGSL Physarum solver + radial-ray connectivity extraction + gravitational accretion/merge + JI degreeвҶ’chord voicing = 4) В· #3 named refs (above) В· #4 **multi-cycle commitment вҖ” the honored cycle-2 of 1066** В· #5 cites RESEARCH В§625 added this cycle. **diversity:** `banned=[three.js-primary В· Canvas2D-primary В· pointer-drag В· real-data-sonification В· Kuramoto В· cosmic-ambient-only (JURY 2026-07-01)]` В· `picked=[discrete-tap-seed + autonomous-accretion INPUT В· WebGPU-compute OUTPUT В· Physarum + graph-degree-connectivity + accretion TECHNIQUE В· cosmic-web вҶ’ awe VIBE]` вҖ” clears every ban (cycle-2 exemption covers the cosmic pole, and the awe swell adds range anyway) and cashes the jury's #1 WebGPU-compute demand + #5 cycle-2 demand at once. **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** stable dark void, only filaments/cores bright, the awe swell is a slow luminance/reverb drift, no full-frame strobe; instant mute. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; no network at all; zero new npm deps; WebGPU via `navigator.gpu` with locally-declared minimal types). Design notes (in-page modal): `src/app/dream/1089-cosmic-connectome/README.md`

## Cycle 624 вҖ” **adult** psychedelic **WIDE** (3 orthogonal explorers, each a DIFFERENT non-banned OUTPUT target, orchestrated) вҖ” the lab's **FIRST continuous-cellular-automaton piece** and its **second-ever WebGPU-compute instrument**: tap to seed a blob of living matter and a real self-organizing artificial-life field (**Lenia**) grows alien "organisms" that *sing* as they live; the directest attack on the jury's #1 complaint вҖ” the render-target monoculture вҖ” with WebGPU-compute output the jury explicitly named as "the template the rest should have reached for")

[/dream/1086-lenia-organisms](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1086-lenia-organisms) вҖ” **"Lenia Organisms": tap the dark field and a blob of living matter takes root вҖ” then a real *continuous cellular automaton* grows it into an alien, gliding creature that you HEAR as it lives. Not a particle effect: a genuine Lenia CA (Bert Wang-Chak Chan, 2019) вҖ” a smooth ring-shaped convolution kernel `K` and a Gaussian growth function `G(u)=2В·exp(вҲ’(uвҲ’Ој)ВІ/2ПғВІ)вҲ’1`, iterated as `A вҶҗ clamp(A + dtВ·G(KвҲ—A), 0, 1)` вҖ” the continuous generalization of Conway's Life that spontaneously produces self-propelling organisms (Orbium / Rotor / Colony regimes, switchable). It runs as WGSL compute on a 256ВІ GPU field (ping-pong f32 buffers, seed/step/reduce/render passes, async ~15 Hz field-stats readback) and falls all the way back to the IDENTICAL model at 128ВІ in plain JS drawn to a 2D canvas вҖ” with an emerald `в—Ҹ GPU` / amber `в—Ҹ CPU fallback` badge so you know which path you're on. The living field drives a just-intonation choir: total mass вҶ’ drone fullness, births/growth events вҶ’ plucked JI bells (pitched by the creature's centroid height), field motion вҶ’ shimmer вҖ” so a screen of artificial life becomes an instrument. Loads playing itself: an auto-demo seeds 2вҖ“3 creatures so the field is alive, drifting, and sounding within ~2s with zero input.** `demoable` (build-checked: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` вҶ’ compile + ESLint + full-project type-check all PASS вҖ” reached `Collecting page data`; build-log grep of `1086`/`lenia-organisms` in errors/`Type error`/`Failed to compile` = **0 hits**; project-wide `tsc --noEmit` = exit 0; scoped `eslint` = exit 0; folder grep-clean (no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route/paren-folder); only the standing container **EMFILE** fd-ceiling blocked static-gen, infra-not-code, Vercel-safe; **verification: compile+lint+type verified; the CPU/Canvas2D fallback + auto-demo + always-on audio are the headless-demoable paths; the WGSL-compute 256ВІ path + the true creature look + the audio feel are GPU/audio-device-only** вҖ” the builder could not run WebGPU/audio in the box, so the GPU path is code+Node-sim-verified (the exact update mirrored in Node: all 3 regimes settle to living churn, meanвүҲ0.20вҖ“0.30 / maxвүҲ1.0 / near-1 fraction<0.3 / ongoing motion вҖ” neither dies to 0 nor saturates, robust across seed radii 0.06вҖ“0.10 вҖ” genuinely alive, not a stub), not pixel-verified). В· Cycle 624 (adult, **WIDE** вҖ” winner of 3 orthogonal explorers, each a DIFFERENT non-banned OUTPUT target: this **WebGPU-compute** Lenia vs `1087-fourth-turn` the **raw-WebGL2** 4D-polytope-you-hear-rotate vs `1088-threshold` the **audio-first/minimal-SVG** NDE tunnel [both de-selected, banked вӯҗ IDEAS В§624]). **The directest attack on the 2026-07-01 jury's #1 structural complaint вҖ” the render-target monoculture** (three.js 6Г— + Canvas2D 5Г— = 11/15; WebGPU-compute appeared exactly 1Г—, and the jury named 1066-cosmic-web "the template the rest should have reached for"). 1086 IS that template's DNA: an alien scientific algorithm turned into a playable WebGPU-compute instrument. **Implements THIS cycle's RESEARCH В§624 dive** (Lenia + the mass-conservative Flow-Lenia extension reaching the ALIFE/MIT Press journal in 2025 + live WebGPU particle-Lenia implementations вҶ’ a GPU-native 2025-26 frontier, grep-0Г—). Dodges every 2026-07-01 diversity ban: **NOT three.js-primary** (WGSL compute + WebGL render), **NOT Canvas2D-primary** (Canvas2D only as the fallback path), **NOT pointer-drag** (discrete tap-to-seed), **NOT real-world-data-sonification**, **NOT Kuramoto**, **NOT cosmic-ambient-only** (intense DMT-entity pole). Love-bias: closest to `236-particle-life-song`вқӨпёҸ (emergent-life particle field). **For**: adult / **intense** pole / `state: DMT entity-encounter / self-organizing alien life` В· **discrete tap-to-seed INPUT** (tap the field to drop a gaussian blob of living matter; Orbium/Rotor/Colony regime buttons; no pointer-drag; Reseed/Sound controls) / **WebGPU-compute OUTPUT** (WGSL Lenia solver, ping-pong f32 buffers, reduction readback; true 128ВІ JS/Canvas2D fallback; `в—Ҹ GPU`/`в—Ҹ CPU` badge) / continuous-CA (**Lenia**) TECHNIQUE / luminous indigo-void with tealвҶ’gold organisms. **Audio (Web Audio):** self-contained JI additive/FM choir (massвҶ’drone, growth-eventsвҶ’plucked bells pitched by centroid height, motionвҶ’shimmer), 8-voice cap with voice-stealing вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor`; tap rings a bell immediately for responsiveness. **NAMED REFERENCES:** **Bert Wang-Chak Chan, _Lenia вҖ” Biology of Artificial Life_ (2019)** (the CA); **Plantec/Chan et al., _Flow-Lenia_, arXiv:2212.07906 (ALIFE/MIT Press journal 2025)** (mass-conservative multi-species extension); QRI / AndrГ©s GГіmez Emilsson, DMT entity-encounter phenomenology. **Ambition (honest 4/5):** #1 lab-first technique (continuous CA / Lenia, grep-0Г—) В· #2 вүҘ3 subsystems (WGSL-compute Lenia solver + tap-seeding + field-stats reduction readback + JI additive/FM choir + drone = 5) В· #3 named refs (above) В· #5 cites RESEARCH В§624 added this cycle. **diversity:** `banned=[three.js-primary В· Canvas2D-primary В· pointer-drag В· real-data-sonification В· Kuramoto В· cosmic-ambient-only (JURY 2026-07-01)]` В· `picked=[discrete-tap-seed INPUT В· WebGPU-compute OUTPUT В· Lenia continuous-CA TECHNIQUE В· DMT-entity-encounter intense VIBE]` вҖ” clears every ban and cashes the jury's #1 actively-wanted "WebGPU-compute output"; the whole WIDE slate used three distinct non-banned outputs (WebGPU-compute / raw-WebGL2 / audio-first-SVG), answering the render-monoculture complaint three ways. **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** stable dark background, only organisms bright, no full-frame strobe; instant mute. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; no network at all; zero new npm deps; WebGPU via `navigator.gpu` with locally-declared minimal types). ## Cycle 623 вҖ” **adult** psychedelic **DEEP** (2 parallel technical approaches to ONE concept, orchestrated) вҖ” the lab **finally SHIPS an embodied hand-tracked piece** вҖ” the jury's begged-for #3, un-cashed for four windows: your two hands are electrodes and a real **Dielectric-Breakdown / Laplacian-growth** discharge forks between them, every branch ringing a note; raw-WebGL2 output, electric-intense pole; a DEEP fire *committed* to shipping it, with a self-sufficient autonomous storm that dissolves the "zero-permission sibling always wins the glance" pattern)

[/dream/1085-lightning-organ](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1085-lightning-organ) вҖ” **"Lightning Organ": your two hands are electrodes, and every branch of lightning that cracks between them rings a note вҖ” but the discharge is not drawn, it is *simulated*. On a 128Г—72 potential grid the two terminals are held at ПҶ=1 (Dirichlet sources) and the growing discharge at ПҶ=0; each frame a handful of GaussвҖ“Seidel sweeps relax вҲҮВІПҶ=0, then a frontier cell is chosen with probability вҲқ |ПҶ|^О· (roulette) and joins the cluster вҖ” real Laplacian growth, the same model used to predict the fractal dimension of dielectric breakdown. An О· slider (1вҶ’6) is the signature control: О·вүҲ1 gives bushy DLA-like growth, О·вүҲ3вҖ“6 gives sharp forked lightning. When a discharge bridges the terminals it flashes, fires a sub-boom, and re-seeds, so the storm is continuous. Each new branch rings an FM pluck (pitch вҲқ height вҶ’ a downward strike sweeps a descending pentatonic arpeggio) with band-passed crackle. Grant the camera and your two palms BECOME the electrodes (MediaPipe HandLandmarker, 21 keypoints/hand via CDN ESM): palm centroids set the terminals, hand separation + finger openness set the field voltage. With NO camera it plays itself вҖ” two terminals orbit on Lissajous paths, the voltage breathes, lightning cracks continuously вҖ” a finished performance with zero permissions.** `demoable` (build-checked: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` вҶ’ compile + ESLint + full-project type-check all PASS вҖ” reached `Collecting page data`; build-log grep of `1085`/`lightning-organ` in errors = **0 hits**; scoped `tsc --noEmit` = 0 errors referencing 1085, folder grep-clean (no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route/paren-folder); only the standing container **EMFILE** fd-ceiling blocked static-gen, infra-not-code, Vercel-safe; **verification: compile+lint+type verified; the autonomous storm IS the headless demo (zero permissions вҖ” it forks, rings, flashes + reseeds on its own), robust for a 06:30 desktop glance; the DBM look + arc audio feel + the CDN/webcam hand path are the device-only part** вҖ” the builder could not run MediaPipe/GL live in the box, so the hand upgrade is code+fallback verified, not pixel-verified). В· Cycle 623 (adult, **DEEP** вҖ” winner of 2 parallel approaches to ONE concept, *the embodied electric lightning-organ*: this **physical Dielectric-Breakdown / Laplacian-growth** take vs `1086-tesla-hands` the **procedural recursive-midpoint-displacement fractal-bolt** take (forked bolts leap the gap; hand separation вҶ’ root pitch so you voice a chord by spreading your palms вҖ” Reed & Wyvill, SIGGRAPH 1994) [de-selected, banked вӯҗ IDEAS В§623 вҖ” the distinct gapвҶ’root harmonic-sculpting mechanic + physical-vs-procedural contrast are worth a resurrection]). **Cashes the 2026-06-30/07-01 jury's loudest un-discharged provocation (#3): "SHIP the embodied piece вҖ” stop banking it."** Hand-tracking/optical-flow had been explored-and-banked four times (1075/1079/1080/1083); the fix was a DEEP fire *committed* to shipping, engineered so the autonomous fallback is itself finished вҖ” which removes the very tiebreaker that banked it every WIDE fire. **Implements THIS cycle's RESEARCH В§623 dive** (the June-2026 MediaPipe-handвҶ’GPU-VFX sub-35 ms/28вҖ“30 fps latency finding that removed the input-budget excuse). Dodges every 2026-07-01 diversity ban: **NOT three.js-primary** (raw WebGL2), **NOT Canvas2D-primary** (WebGL2, Canvas2D only as fallback), **NOT pointer-drag** (hand-tracking + О· slider + autonomous), **NOT real-world-data-sonification**, **NOT Kuramoto**, **NOT cosmic-ambient** (electric-terror intense pole). Hits the *electric* pole the lab had never shipped. Extends Karel's loved camera/body cluster (`217-dance-avatar`вқӨпёҸ, `101-camera-song`вқӨпёҸ, `234-kids-hand-creature`вқӨпёҸ). **For**: adult / **intense вҶ’ electric-terror** pole / `state: dielectric-storm / electric-terror` В· **hand-tracking INPUT** (MediaPipe HandLandmarker via CDN ESM `webpackIgnore`, 2 palmsвҶ’2 terminals, separation+opennessвҶ’voltage; **full autonomous two-terminal orbit fallback**; amber `в—Ҹ autonomous` / emerald `в—Ҹ hands tracked` badge; `text-rose-300` cam-fail + no-render notices) / **raw WebGL2 OUTPUT** (hand-written `#version 300 es`; ping-pong RGBA16FвҶ’RGBA8 accumulation FBO afterglow, additive hot-core arc quads, 5-tap bloom + tone-map + vignette present; Canvas2D fallback of same sim; GL resources disposed on unmount) / violetвҶ’white-hot arcs on near-black. **Audio (Web Audio):** shared `_shared/psych/droneBank` bed (driven by branch density) + `createVoidReverb` tail; per-branch FM pluck (pitch вҲқ height, minor-pentatonic) + band-passed crackle; bridging strike = sub-boom + shimmer; 14-voice self-cleaning pool вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor`; AudioContext gesture-gated, full teardown on unmount. **NAMED REFERENCES:** **Niemeyer, Pietronero & Wiesmann, "Fractal Dimension of Dielectric Breakdown," _Phys. Rev. Lett._ 52, 1033 (1984)** вҖ” the DBM/Laplacian-growth model (the engine); Google **MediaPipe HandLandmarker** (Tasks-Vision, 21 3D keypoints/hand). **Ambition (honest 4/5):** #1 lab-first technique (real WebGL DBM/Laplacian-growth, grep-0Г—) В· #2 вүҘ3 subsystems (hand-tracking + DBM grid solver + WebGL2 accumulation renderer + FM/crackle synth + drone = 5) В· #3 named refs (above) В· #5 cites RESEARCH В§623 added this cycle. **diversity:** `banned=[three.js-primary OUTPUT В· Canvas2D-primary OUTPUT В· pointer-drag INPUT В· real-world-data-sonification В· Kuramoto/order-parameter В· cosmic-ambient-only pole (JURY 2026-07-01)]` В· `picked=[hand-tracking INPUT В· raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT В· Dielectric-Breakdown/Laplacian-growth TECHNIQUE В· electric-terror intense VIBE]` вҖ” clears every ban and cashes the "embodied/hand-tracked input that actually **ships**" the jury actively wanted. **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** near-black stable background, only thin arcs bright, accumulation-FBO afterglow means it can never full-frame strobe; the optional luminance pulse is gated through `createSafeFlicker` (вүӨ3 Hz, respects `prefers-reduced-motion`) and is OFF by default. Full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel + ResizeObserver + GL dispose + audio nodes + camera stream). **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; no network beyond the public MediaPipe CDN model fetch, no secrets/AI-cost/side-effects; zero new npm deps вҖ” MediaPipe loads at runtime via CDN ESM, never bundled). ## Cycle 622 вҖ” **adult** psychedelic **WIDE** (3 orthogonal explorers, orchestrated) вҖ” the lab's **FIRST live space-weather instrument**: the actual solar wind hitting Earth *right now* (NOAA SWPC real-time-solar-wind JSON, DSCOVR/ACE + NASA's 2026 IMAP I-ALiRT) drives a folding three.js auroral-curtain particle sheet + matched sonification; real-world-data lane, storm-awe pole, live-fetch-verified with a bundled offline modeled-storm fallback; directly cashes THIS cycle's RESEARCH В§622 dive

[/dream/1084-magnetostorm](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1084-magnetostorm) вҖ” **"Magnetostorm": what does the solar wind actually hitting Earth right now sound and look like? The piece fetches NOAA SWPC's real-time-solar-wind feeds (plasma density/speed/temperature + the interplanetary magnetic field bx/by/bz + planetary Kp) вҖ” the live L1 stream from DSCOVR/ACE and, as of 2026, NASA's new IMAP I-ALiRT sentinel вҖ” and turns the same five physical drivers into BOTH a vast folding aurora and a matched sound. A field of ~42k additive GPU particles forms seven vertical auroral CURTAINS advected through a data-driven flow: solar-wind SPEED (~300вҖ“800 km/s) вҶ’ energy/advection velocity, DENSITY вҶ’ curtain thickness/particle count, |B| turbulence вҶ’ shimmer, planetary Kp вҶ’ global intensity, and вҖ” the dramatic variable, real physics вҖ” SOUTHWARD Bz (negative = the orientation that actually couples the wind into the magnetosphere) вҶ’ the storm ERUPTS: the curtains brighten and redden from quiet auroral green/teal to storm magenta/red, and the audio opens. A discrete substorm onset (Bz crossing strongly south) fires a sub-boom + shimmer. You orbit the camera and lightly perturb the sheet, but the DATA drives it. A live readout panel shows the current speed / density / Bz / Kp + timestamp and a live/offline badge, so you see the real space weather behind the piece; it re-polls every 60 s. When the fetch is blocked it swaps to a bundled ~60-sample modeled G2 substorm arc (speed 400вҶ’650, Bz turning strongly south, Kp 2вҶ’6) so the whole storm still builds offline.** `demoable` (build-checked: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` вҶ’ `вң“ Compiled successfully` + ESLint + full-project `tsc --noEmit` all PASS вҖ” reached `Collecting page data`; scoped `next lint src/app/dream/1084-magnetostorm` = вң” 0/0, build-log grep of `1084`/`magnetostorm` in errors = **0 hits**; only the standing container **EMFILE** fd-ceiling blocked static-gen, infra-not-code, Vercel-safe; **verification: compile+lint+type verified AND the live NOAA fetch was confirmed returning HTTP-200 well-formed data from the build environment this cycle** (mag `bz_gsm`, speed, Kp parsed correctly), with the bundled modeled-storm fallback running regardless вҖ” among the more verifiable ships in the lab: three.js + Web Audio, NO mic/camera/permissions, only a public GET to an open CORS endpoint; the GPU aurora look + storm-swell audio feel are the device-only part). ## Cycle 621 вҖ” **adult** psychedelic **DEEP** (ONE concept вҖ” *making the re-binding of the un-glued senses the star* вҖ” 2 parallel builders attack it via different models, orchestrated) вҖ” the lab's **FIRST honored cycle-2 in the psych lane**: the real deepening of `1063-dissolve-void` the jury spelled out ("phase-locked re-coupling on the clarity snap"); Canvas2D-verifiable, breaks the back-to-back GPU-cosmic sameness

## Cycle 619 вҖ” **adult** psychedelic **DEEP** (ONE massively-bigger concept вҖ” *an instrument with MEMORY that dreams your own playing back* вҖ” 3 parallel substrates, orchestrated) вҖ” the lab's **FIRST piece that records the user's own input and re-expresses it as the vision**; overturns the lab's founding bottom-up/entropy framing with the fresh **2026 eLife "oneirogen" generative-replay model**; forced off three.js-primary by the last-10 diversity audit (three.js 3Г—, at the ban line)

[/dream/1078-dream-replay](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1078-dream-replay) вҖ” **"Dream Replay": play a dark field and it records you вҖ” then at the peak it stops listening and DREAMS YOUR OWN PLAYING BACK, recombined and drifting, less and less faithful. WAKE (Оұ low): tap/drag anywhere; every onset plays a warm just-intonation bell (pitch = height) AND is written into a ring-buffer "engram," leaving a persistent hue-coded glyph, so the field fills with a constellation of your own notes вҖ” gesture makes sound + light directly. DREAM (Оұ high): live input fades and a top-down read-head autonomously walks the stored engrams in a RECOMBINED order вҖ” a stochastic walk over your recorded sequence-transitions whose sampling temperature IS Оұ (low-mid Оұ retraces your real phrases; high Оұ jumps freely and stitches fragments into sequences you never played), re-firing each note and re-blooming each glyph while positions drift, timing loosens, and glyphs smear into afterimage trails. You watch and hear your recent playing dreamed back, dissolving. A single Оұ: 0вҶ’1 arc (auto over ~50 s, or drive it with Close-your-eyes в–ё / в—Ӯ Wake / Let-it-drift) is Bredenberg et al.'s oneirogen parameter вҖ” 0 = awake/bottom-up (basal), 1 = fully dreaming/top-down generative replay (apical). Close-eyes/Wake/Let-it-drift Оұ controls; 2.5 s silent auto-demo; `text-rose-300` fallbacks for no-canvas / audio-blocked) / **Canvas2D engram-field OUTPUT** (persistent hue-coded glyphs + a travelling read-head + filament arcs + Оұ-deepening afterimage smear) / coolвҶ’warm-on-near-black palette that warms as it dreams. **The audio composes the shared `_shared/psych/` engines** вҖ” a 10-voice self-cleaning JI pluck/bell synth (triangleвҶ’sine as Оұ rises) over a `startDroneBank` bed + through `createVoidReverb` (both driven up by Оұ) вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor`; AudioContext gesture-gated, full teardown on unmount. **NAMED REFERENCES:** **Bredenberg et al., "Modeling the hallucinatory effects of classical psychedelics in terms of replay-dependent plasticity mechanisms," eLife 2026;14:RP105968** (the oneirogen Оұ: 0вҶ’1 top-down-generative-replay model вҖ” apical/top-down replay overtaking basal/bottom-up sensory); **Carhart-Harris & Friston, "REBUS and the Anarchic Brain"** (2019 вҖ” the contrasted relaxation account); Friston active-inference / predictive processing. **Ambition (honest 4/5):** #1 **never-used technique** (record the user's own onsets and re-express them as the hallucination via a temperature-walk over their recorded sequence-transitions вҖ” grep-0Г— in the lab) В· #2 вүҘ3 subsystems (engram ring-buffer recorder + Markov temperature-walk replay engine + Оұ-arc state machine + JI pluck synth + drone/void bed + Canvas2D engram renderer = 6) В· #3 named refs (above) В· #5 cites RESEARCH В§619 added this cycle. **diversity:** `banned=[three.js-primary OUTPUT (3Г—/10, ban line) В· passive-mic + pointer-drag-to-SCULPT INPUT В· log-polar/form-constant warp В· center-out "bloom" look В· back-to-back social/collective (self, 618)]` В· `picked=[discrete tapped-gesture-recorded-to-MEMORY INPUT В· Canvas2D engram-field OUTPUT В· record-and-recombine-your-own-input (oneirogen temperature-walk) TECHNIQUE В· hypnagogic dream-replay VIBE]` вҖ” clears every ban. **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** no strobe вҖ” all blooms/afterimage eased, luminance drifts slowly, well under 3 Hz; the "dream" deepens by lengthening trails, never by flashing. Full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel + oscillator stop + AudioContext close after tails). **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; no network, no AI/cost surface; zero new npm deps).
