## (Cycle 618 вҖ” **adult** psychedelic **DEEP** (ONE concept вҖ” *the shared / collective psychedelic state* вҖ” 2 parallel metaphors) вҖ” the lab's **FIRST social / collective-consciousness psychedelic piece**; every prior psych piece in the lane is a *solo* trip; discharges the twice-named JURY 2026-06-30 #2 gap ("a multi-user shared psychedelic room вҖ” the lab has never built one"); grounded in the fresh **Frontiers 2026 hyperscanning review** of interbrain synchrony; forced off three.js by the last-10 diversity audit (three.js-primary 4Г—))

[/dream/1077-two-minds](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1077-two-minds) вҖ” **"Two Minds": two people, apart, whose separately-tapped rhythms slowly ENTRAIN вҖ” the piece renders the invisible inter-brain synchrony between them as something you can both see and hear. Tap a pulse (Spacebar / tap anywhere); the piece estimates your tempo (median inter-onset interval) and phase, and couples it (Kuramoto phase-coupling) to a partner. Open a SECOND browser tab to BE the partner вҖ” the two tabs couple instantly over a `BroadcastChannel`, no server. With no partner, a synthetic "guide" starts at an OFF tempo and autonomously entrains toward yours over ~35 s, so the whole apartвҶ’approachingвҶ’mergedвҶ’held arc plays on a single tab. Two distinct luminous presences (warm rose / cool violet) on opposite sides of a near-black field DRIFT toward each other as the synchrony index climbs; a woven Lissajous interference figure sharpens between them; at sustained lock they meet in a gold-white collective bloom and a held just-intonation added-sixth chord rings out. In audio: two shared-engine drones detuned apart AUDIBLY BEAT when you're out of sync and ramp toward unison as you lock вҖ” you hear the two minds stop beating against each other.** `demoable` (build-checked: full `npm run build` вҶ’ `вң“ Compiled successfully in 49s` + ESLint + project `tsc --noEmit` all clean, **0 issues from the 1077 folder** вҖ” a fresh build-log grep of `1077`/`two-minds` = 0 hits; only the standing container EMFILE fd-ceiling blocked static-gen, infra-not-code, Vercel-safe; **among the MOST hand-verifiable ships in the lab** вҖ” the synthetic-guide path runs the entire entrainment arc with zero permissions/mic/camera/network on a single tab, AND two tabs couple over BroadcastChannel with no server, so the synchrony story fully demonstrates on a 06:30 phone glance; only the fine ear-feel of the beatingвҶ’unison + whether the lock reads as *ecstatic* are device-only). В· Cycle 618 (adult, **DEEP** вҖ” winner of 2 orthogonal metaphors for ONE concept, the shared/collective state: this **RELATIONAL two-beings-that-drift-together** vs `1078-shared-veil` the **EMERGENT-FIELD** metaphor where both pour into ONE shared coupled-oscillator lattice that self-orders turbulentвҶ’coherent via the literal **Kuramoto order parameter `r`** [de-selected, banked вӯҗ IDEAS В§618 вҖ” the MORE surprising sibling (order-from-medium), one fire away; resurrect with an ear pass]). **Implements THIS cycle's RESEARCH В§618 dive** (Frontiers 2026 interbrain-synchrony hyperscanning review + Kuramoto/Strogatz order parameter вҶ’ a *shared* psychedelic room). **Answers the 2026-06-30 jury + Karel's central notes:** discharges **JURY #2** (a multi-user shared psychedelic room вҖ” named a categorical gap TWICE, 0Г— the whole window); *reduces* the **#1 verification-debt liability** (fully hand-verifiable via single-tab guide + two-tab BroadcastChannel, no hardware) after a run of device-only-GPU ships; breaks the "too similar" complaint by opening the lane's first **social/collective** vibe (all 592вҶ’617 were solo trips) and deliberately NOT shipping a 3rd consecutive attractor piece; dodges the diversity-banned **three.js-primary** (4Г— in the last 10 вҶ’ Canvas2D), the banned **passive-mic** + **pointer-drag-to-sculpt** (input is discrete tapped onsets), the banned **log-polar warp**, and the **center-out "bloom"** monopole (the "bloom" here is the *meeting of two* at lock, not a lean-back radial field). **For**: adult / **cosmic-ambient вҶ’ collective-ecstatic** pole / `state: collective trance / dyadic entrainment` В· **multi-presence tapped-rhythm INPUT** (Spacebar/tap onsets вҶ’ tempo/phase; BroadcastChannel partner OR synthetic guide; emerald `в—Ҹ partner connected` / amber `в—Ҹ guide (no partner yet)` badge) / **Canvas2D two-presence entrainment OUTPUT** (two luminous orbs drifting to center + a sharpening Lissajous weave + gold-white lock bloom; graceful `text-rose-300` fallbacks for no-canvas / audio-blocked) / warm-rose + cool-violet вҶ’ gold-white palette on near-black. **The audio composes the shared `_shared/psych/` engines** вҖ” two `startDroneBank` voices (panned L/R) + a detuned pair that **beats вҶ’ unison** as synchrony rises + panned 2-op FM tap-bells + a held collective added-sixth chord at lock вҶ’ shared `createVoidReverb` вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` (poly-cap вүӨ10, self-cleaning nodes). **NAMED REFERENCES:** Y. Kuramoto, "Self-entrainment of a population of coupled non-linear oscillators" (1975) вҖ” the coupled-phase-oscillator model + order parameter; Steven Strogatz, *Sync* (2003); the Frontiers in Cognition (2026) narrative review of interbrain synchrony in mindfulness/meditation hyperscanning (theta-band frontotemporal inter-brain synchrony as the signature of shared trance). **Ambition (honest 3/5):** #1 **categorical lab-first** (the first SOCIAL / collective-consciousness psychedelic piece вҖ” every prior is solitary; WebRTC/BroadcastChannel/Kuramoto are each *primitive*-prior at 508/729/954, so the honest first is the *category*) В· #2 вүҘ3 subsystems (multi-presence transport + Kuramoto synchrony estimator + coupled dual-drone/FM audio + entrainment renderer = 4) В· #3 named refs (above) В· #5 cites RESEARCH В§618 added this cycle. **diversity:** `banned=[three.js-primary OUTPUT (4Г—/10) В· passive-mic + pointer-drag-to-sculpt INPUT В· log-polar/form-constant warp В· center-out "bloom" look В· cosmic-ambient-as-only-pole В· (self) back-to-back attractor]` В· `picked=[multi-presence tapped-rhythm INPUT В· Canvas2D two-presence entrainment OUTPUT В· Kuramoto interbrain-synchrony TECHNIQUE В· collective-trance social VIBE]` вҖ” clears every ban. **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** no strobe вҖ” all pulses/blooms eased (fast rise, slow luminous decay), luminance smooth and well under 3 Hz. Full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel + BroadcastChannel close + bye + oscillator stop + AudioContext close after tails). **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; no network beyond same-origin BroadcastChannel; no AI/cost surface; zero new npm deps). ## (Cycle 617 вҖ” **adult** psychedelic **DEEP** (ONE concept, 2 parallel approaches) вҖ” a chaotic strange attractor as the COMPOSER; cashes the banked вӯҗ RESURRECT (IDEAS В§616); lands the JURY-owed **intense / non-membrane / non-bloom** pole; forced onto raw WebGL2 because the last-10 diversity audit banned three.js-primary (4Г—))

[/dream/1076-strange-canon](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1076-strange-canon) вҖ” **"Strange Canon": a chaotic dynamical system is the composer. RenГ© Thomas' cyclically-symmetric attractor traces one deterministic line that never exactly repeats вҖ” and that single trajectory is BOTH the score and the light. THE SIGNATURE: four voices read the same trajectory history buffer at staggered delays (0 / 1.5 / 3.0 / 4.5 s), each transposed to a just interval вҖ” a strict canon over an aperiodic melody. Per voice xвҶ’JI pitch, zвҶ’cutoff, yвҶ’pan; notes fire on a zero-crossing of x (musically spaced, not per-frame). It plays and moves entirely on its own; tilt (or the pointer) nudges the chaos constant `b` within its safe band вҖ” a bifurcation nudge, never drag-to-sculpt вҖ” and you hear the canon tighten toward periodicity. Rendered as a raw-WebGL2 additive auto-rotating 3D ribbon of the orbit, colored by instantaneous speed (cyan/violetвҶ’gold), with a soft read-head marker at each voice's position on the line.** `demoable` (build-checked: full `npm run build` вҶ’ `вң“ Compiled successfully in 49s` + ESLint + project `tsc --noEmit` all clean, **0 issues from the 1076 folder**; only the standing container EMFILE fd-ceiling blocked static-gen, infra-not-code, Vercel-safe; **fully headless-demonstrable** вҖ” the attractor steps on a `setInterval` sim clock independent of rAF, so the canon composes + the drone/reverb swell + the ribbon draws with **zero input**; only the *musicality* of the canon and the WebGL2 ribbon on real hardware are ear/GPU-only). В· Cycle 617 (adult, **DEEP** вҖ” winner of 2 parallel approaches to attractor-as-composer: this **visible-orbit ribbon canon** vs `1077-hidden-canon` the SYTHM deepening where an **Aizawa attractor is a HIDDEN conductor** whose never-drawn baton births a neon particle swarm + a 3-shadow canon, so you infer its shape from where light is born [de-selected, banked вӯҗ IDEAS В§617 вҖ” the MORE surprising sibling, one fire away; resurrect with a GPU/ear pass]). **Implements THIS cycle's RESEARCH В§617 dive** (SYTHM's "attractor is the hidden conductor," Jun 2026 + the newly-cited Bidlack "Musical Attractors" CMJ) AND cashes the banked В§616 seed вҖ” a visible researchвҶ’build chain + an *actual return to a named/banked gap*. **Answers the 2026-06-30 jury:** discharges **#3** (owe an INTENSE piece that is NOT a membrane and kills the "bloom" look вҖ” this is intense/kinetic-geometric, a 3D orbiting ribbon, no center-out bloom); *reduces* the **#1 verification-debt liability** (fully autonomous headless sim); and it is the "**actually return and ship the named gap**" discipline the jury says the lab lacks (attractor-as-generative-engine is mentioned all over the idea lists, never shipped until now). Dodges the diversity-banned **three.js-primary** (4Г— in the last 10 вҶ’ raw WebGL2), the banned **pointer-drag-to-sculpt** (input only perturbs a constant; runs autonomously), and the **cosmic-ambient/warm** poles (this is intense). **For**: adult / **intense** pole / `state: deterministic-chaos / geometric-organism` В· **tilt-or-pointer-as-bifurcation-perturbation INPUT** (optional вҖ” nudges `bвҲҲ[0.12,0.21]`; fully autonomous with none) / **raw-WebGL2 additive `LINE_STRIP` OUTPUT** (auto-rotating perspective camera, speedвҶ’color ramp, comet-head sprites + per-voice read-head markers, `SRC_ALPHAвҶ’ONE`; Canvas2D ribbon + audio-only fallbacks) / neon cyan/violetвҶ’gold on near-black. **The audio composes the shared `_shared/psych/` engines** вҖ” 4 canon voices (2-op FM plucks, poly cap 8 + cleanup) вҶ’ shared `createVoidReverb` вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor`, over a trajectory-speed-driven `startDroneBank` bed. **NAMED REFERENCES:** RenГ© Thomas, "Deterministic chaos seen in terms of feedback circuits" (1999); E.N. Lorenz, "Deterministic Nonperiodic Flow" (1963); R. Bidlack, "Musical Attractors: A New Method for Audio Synthesis" (Computer Music Journal); SYTHM / "Sound, Given a Body" (Symphoenix, Medium, Jun 2026 вҖ” the attractor as hidden conductor). **Ambition (honest 3/5):** #1 never-used (attractor-as-generative-engine, grep-0Г— as a shipped piece; the delayed-reader canon over an aperiodic line is a fresh musical structure) В· #3 named refs В· #5 cites RESEARCH В§617 added this cycle. **diversity:** `banned=[three.js-primary OUTPUT (4Г—/10) В· Canvas2D-primary OUTPUT (3Г—, near) В· passive-mic + pointer-drag INPUT В· cosmic-ambient/warm POLE В· membrane / center-out-bloom LOOK]` В· `picked=[tilt/pointer-perturbation (autonomous) INPUT В· raw-WebGL2 LINE_STRIP OUTPUT В· strange-attractor-sonification + delayed-reader-canon TECHNIQUE В· intense neon kinetic-geometric VIBE]` вҖ” clears every ban. **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** additive glow drifts slowly, no strobe, luminance changes smooth. Full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel + `setInterval` clear + oscillator stop + `gl` buffer/program deletes + AudioContext closed after tails). **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; no network, no AI/cost surface; zero new npm deps). [/dream/1074-pulse-mirror](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1074-pulse-mirror) вҖ” **"Pulse Mirror": play a rhythm вҖ” clap, tap, sing, or knock вҖ” and a duet partner tracks your tempo and answers ON the beat, *anticipating* it. It listens (spectral-flux onset detection), finds your pulse (median-IOI tempo/beat tracker), and commits a warm just-intonation call-and-response to your *predicted* next beat on the Web Audio clock, so the answer lands in time rather than late. Runs live on the mic, or entirely headless via a self-clocking demo performer that shares the identical interface. Raw WebGL2 additive sprites: an amber caller (your side, left) blooms on each onset, a violet/rose answer (the instrument, right) blooms вҖ” with a faint anticipation pre-glow вҖ” on each scheduled note, over an expanding beat ring and a sub-3 Hz breath.** `demoable` (build-checked: full `npm run build` вҶ’ `вң“ Compiled successfully in 48s` + ESLint + project `tsc --noEmit` (exit 0) all clean, **0 issues from the 1074 folder** вҖ” build-log grep of `1074`/`pulse-mirror` = 0 hits; only the standing container EMFILE fd-ceiling blocked static-gen, infra-not-code, Vercel-safe; **among the MOST hand-verifiable ships in weeks** вҖ” the demo-performer path runs the entire onsetвҶ’tempoвҶ’anticipationвҶ’answer loop with zero permissions/mic/camera/network, so the tracking + anticipatory-reply arc fully demonstrates on a 06:30 phone glance; only real-mic onset sensitivity + the ear-feel of the duet are device-only). В· Cycle 616 (adult, **WIDE** вҖ” winner of 3 orthogonal explorers: this warm score-duet vs `1076-strange-canon` an attractor-AS-composer piece вҖ” RenГ© Thomas' chaotic ODE is the score and 4 delayed voices read the same aperiodic line as a strict canon [de-selected, banked вӯҗ IDEAS В§616 вҖ” the MOST surprising, anchored on the Jun-2026 SYTHM find, owed intense/kinetic pole; one fire away] vs `1075-flux-veil` the lab's first **optical-flow** piece вҖ” webcam dense motion advects a WebGL2 dye field [de-selected a 2nd consecutive fire, banked вӯҗ IDEAS В§616 вҖ” highest ambition 4/5 + the TD-port, but device-only-GPU verifiability; resurrect with a GPU pass]). **Implements THIS cycle's RESEARCH В§616 dive** (the score-following delayed-decision/anticipation lineage confirmed current; the SYTHM "attractor-as-conductor" find seeded the banked `1076`). **Answers the 2026-06-30 jury + Karel's central notes:** discharges **JURY #5** (score-following / reactive accompaniment вҖ” named actively-wanted + 0Г— shipped, banked-and-deferred THREE times: В§613, В§615, now shipped вҖ” the "actually return and ship the named gap" discipline the jury says the lab lacks); lands **Karel's review priority #3** (live-performance fitness вҖ” low-latency mic instrument you play on stage); *reduces* the **#1 verification-debt liability** (fully-headless demo-performer path after a run of device-only-GPU ships); dodges the diversity-banned **Canvas2D-primary** AND **three.js-primary** (both 4Г— in the last 10 вҶ’ raw WebGL2), the banned **pointer-drag** (input is active mic / demo onsets), and the banned **cosmic-ambient** pole (this is warm jazz call-and-response). **For**: adult / **warm** pole / `state: jazz / call-and-response` В· **active-mic INPUT** (you play INTO it вҖ” clap/tap/sing/knock; emerald `в—Ҹ listening (mic)` / amber `в—Ҹ demo performer` badge; a self-clocking demo performer runs the whole loop with no mic) / **raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT** (additive point sprites, `#version 300 es`, `ONE,ONE` blending, soft radial falloff; Canvas2D + audio-only graceful fallbacks) / warm amber-caller/violet-answer palette on near-black. **The audio is composed, not reimplemented** вҖ” shared `_shared/psych/` engines under a live-scheduled duet: spectral-flux onset (1024-FFT, 120 Hz highpass, adaptive mean+1.6Пғ, ~90 ms refractory) вҶ’ median-IOI tempo tracker (octave-fold to ~60вҖ“200 BPM, confidence from IOI spread, `nextBeatAfter()`) вҶ’ anticipatory lookahead scheduler (~25 ms poll, ~120 ms ahead) commits JI-ladder notes (1В·9/8В·5/4В·4/3В·3/2В·5/3В·15/8В·2 over ~220 Hz, triangle + sine sub through a soft lowpass) to the predicted beat; soft JI pad (`startDroneBank`) + code-generated `createVoidReverb` вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor`. **NAMED REFERENCES:** Roger B. Dannenberg, "An On-Line Algorithm for Real-Time Accompaniment" (ICMC 1984) вҖ” match + predict ahead so accompaniment doesn't lag; Daniel P.W. Ellis, "Beat Tracking by Dynamic Programming" (2007) вҖ” beat = period + phase from an onset-strength signal. **Ambition (honest 2/5):** #1 never-used (the lab's FIRST shipped score-follower / reactive accompaniment вҖ” grep-0Г— as a shipped category) В· #3 named refs (Dannenberg 1984 / Ellis 2007). The value here is *discharging a concretely-named, thrice-deferred jury liability* + live-performance fitness, not criteria-count. **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D-as-primary-output (4Г—/10) В· three.js-as-primary-output (4Г—/10) В· pointer-drag-as-primary-input В· cosmic-ambient pole В· log-polar warp В· center-out bloom]` В· `picked=[active-mic INPUT В· raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT В· score-following (spectral-flux + median-IOI + anticipatory scheduler) TECHNIQUE В· warm jazz call-and-response VIBE]` вҖ” clears every ban. **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** all blooms eased (fast rise, slow luminous decay), nothing strobes faster than ~3 Hz. Full teardown on unmount (rAF cancel + scheduler stop + audio faded then AudioContext closed after tails). **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; no network, no AI/cost surface; zero new npm deps). ## (Cycle 615 вҖ” **adult** psychedelic **WIDE** (3 orthogonal explorers) вҖ” the lab's FIRST **conceptual/critical** piece + FIRST **audio-first/non-screen** output; forced onto fresh modalities because the last-10 diversity audit banned BOTH Canvas2D-primary (4Г—) AND three.js-primary (4Г—))

[/dream/1073-last-breath](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1073-last-breath) вҖ” **"Last Breath": a sound that lives only while you HOLD it вҖ” and erodes a little every second you listen, never heard the same way twice. A finite pool of just-intonation partials with private "integrity" that crumbles *irreversibly* with held listening: the brightest partials disintegrate first, the chord detunes out of true, the void tail opens wetter as brightness leaves, and the whole material trends toward silence over a couple of minutes. Release and it vanishes; the only way back is a deliberate, destructive reset that erases the version you made. An instrument about impermanence and surrender вҖ” the psychedelic ego-dissolution "letting go," done as concept, not spectacle.** `demoable` (build-checked: full `npm run build` вҶ’ exit 0, Compiled + ESLint + project `tsc --noEmit` (exit 0) all clean, **0 issues from the 1073 folder** вҖ” build-log grep of `1073`/`last-breath` = 0 hits; only the standing container EMFILE fd-ceiling blocked static-gen, infra-not-code, Vercel-safe; **among the MOST hand-verifiable ships in the lab** вҖ” pure Web Audio + SVG/DOM + a self-holding "witness" path, zero permissions/GPU/sensor/network, so the livingвҶ’erodingвҶ’vanishing arc fully demonstrates on a 06:30 phone glance; only the *ear-feel* of the erosion is device-only). В· Cycle 615 (adult, **WIDE** вҖ” winner of 3 orthogonal explorers: this conceptual-vanishing piece vs `1071-pulse-mirror` a live-mic ACTIVE **score-follower** that answers your rhythm on the predicted beat [de-selected, banked вӯҗ IDEAS В§615 вҖ” JURY #5, 0Г—, fully demo-verifiable; resurrect for the warm live-performance pole] vs `1072-flux-veil` the lab's first **optical-flow** piece вҖ” webcam dense motion advects a WebGL2 dye field [de-selected, banked вӯҗ IDEAS В§615 вҖ” the TD-port research mandate, highest ambition 4/5, but device-only-GPU verifiability; resurrect with a GPU pass]). **Directly implements THIS cycle's RESEARCH В§615 dive** (the conceptual/critical menu slot the lab has 0Г—, anchored on Basinski's *Disintegration Loops*; the dive's optical-flow + score-following threads seeded the two banked siblings). **Answers the 2026-06-30 jury + Karel's central note:** the **"too similar" complaint** head-on (this is the most orthogonal output the lab has shipped вҖ” audio-first, non-screen, a category named-but-never-built); the **#1 verification-debt liability** (it *reduces* it вҖ” fully perceivable without hardware, after a run of device-only GPU ships); dodges the diversity-banned **Canvas2D-primary** AND **three.js-primary** (both 4Г— in the last 10), the banned **pointer-drag** (input is a sustained hold), and the **real-data-sonification** streak (1069/1070 back-to-back). **For**: adult / **cosmic-ambient-dark / meditative-surrender** pole / `state: ego-dissolution / impermanence / NDE letting-go` В· **sustained-hold INPUT** (press-and-hold pointer/touch OR Space/Enter; a ~4.5 s **witness** self-hold demonstrates the arc with zero input) / **audio-first + minimal SVG/DOM OUTPUT** (a thinning ring + per-partial integrity bars + a % "material" readout + dimming violet luminance вҖ” deliberately NOT a GPU spectacle, testing the lab's screen bias) / austere dark palette. **The audio is composed, not reimplemented** вҖ” shared `_shared/psych/` engines on a finite eroding material: 9 JI partials (root 110 Hz, ratios 1В·3/2В·2В·5/2В·3В·4В·9/2В·5В·6) вҶ’ shared `createVoidReverb` (~6 s, wet opens as brightness leaves) over a quiet sub `startDroneBank` вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor`; integrity erodes `ERODE_PER_SEC Г— crumbleWeight(i)` per held second (top partials ~3.2Г— faster), detune drifts as integrity falls, re-engaging costs `ERODE_PER_HOLD` вҖ” so you can never listen "for free," and the only restoration is a destructive `reset()`. **NAMED REFERENCES:** William Basinski, *The Disintegration Loops* (2002) вҖ” tape that crumbled as it played, the music documenting its own decay; the Buddhist *anicca* (impermanence) / ego-dissolution "letting go" phenomenology (not a medical claim). **Ambition (honest 2/5):** #1 never-used (the lab's FIRST conceptual/critical piece AND first audio-first/non-screen output AND first irreversible-stateful-memory instrument вҖ” grep-0Г— as a category) В· #3 named ref (Basinski / *anicca*). The ambition here is *categorical/conceptual* вҖ” a "massively bigger CONCEPT," not a bigger render вҖ” and the WIDE fire banked the higher-criteria explorers (1072 = 4/5) as seeds. **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D-as-primary-output (4Г—/10) В· three.js-as-primary-output (4Г—/10) В· pointer-drag-as-primary-input В· real-data-sonification (2Г— back-to-back) В· cosmic-ambient-as-the-only-pole]` В· `picked=[sustained-hold INPUT В· audio-first + minimal SVG/DOM OUTPUT (0Г—) В· irreversible-stateful-erosion TECHNIQUE В· meditative-impermanence VIBE]` вҖ” clears every ban; the most orthogonal output the lab has shipped. **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** trivially safe вҖ” only slow fades, no strobe, no GPU flicker. ## Cycle 609 вҖ” **adult** psychedelic build В· WIDE, 3 orthogonal cosmic-ambient interactive instruments В· the lab's FIRST Physarum slime-mold WebGPU-compute agent simulation В· cosmic-web / meditative-boundless, **cosmic-ambient** pole вҖ” brings WebGPU compute back as the resonating body [JURY #4]

[/dream/1066-cosmic-web](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1066-cosmic-web) вҖ” **"The Cosmic Web": seed luminous nutrients into the void with your hand and a living network of dark-thread filaments grows between them вҖ” the same slime-mold algorithm astronomers use to map the universe's dark-matter cosmic web, turned into a playable cosmic-ambient instrument whose connectivity SINGS. The GPU agent field isn't decorated by the audio; the field IS the resonating body вҖ” a 24Г—24 readback of the live trail drives the drone's brightness, the bell density, and the stereo pan.** `demoable` (compile + ESLint + type-check all green, **0 issues from the 1066 folder** вҖ” scoped `eslint` exit 0, project `tsc --noEmit` 0 errors, build-log grep of `1066-cosmic-web` = 0 hits; full `npm run build` reached `вң“ Compiled successfully in 57s` + lint + types then blocked only by the standing container EMFILE fd-ceiling, infra-not-code, Vercel-safe; **the CPU-Physarum fallback + autonomous nutrient drift ARE the headless paths вҖ” a living, re-routing web renders with zero input/hardware** вҖ” only the WGSL compute pipeline + the readbackвҶ’audio coupling *feel* are device-only) В· Cycle 609 (adult, **WIDE** fire вҖ” winner of 3 orthogonal cosmic-ambient instruments: this Physarum cosmic-web vs `1067-boundless-breath` a **three.js** 120k-star field you BREATHE in/out driving a ShepardвҖ“Risset endless ascent [banked вӯҗRESURRECT-FIRST, IDEAS В§609] vs `1068-attractor-temple` a WebGPU strange-attractor whose secret constants you bend through bifurcations [banked, IDEAS В§609]). **Directly implements THIS cycle's RESEARCH В§609 dive** (the slime-mold/Physarum cosmic-web model вҖ” Elek-Burchett 2020 вҖ” freshly back via May-2026's JWST sharpest-ever filament image + April-2026's ShaderVine WebGPU-Physarum tooling). **Brings WebGPU compute back as the resonating body (JURY 2026-06-29 #4, down to 2Г—)** while staying a genuinely *played* instrument (JURY #1 вҖ” you seed and grow the web, not watch it), and dodges the diversity-audit-banned **Canvas2D-as-primary output** (5Г— in the last 10: 1065/1064/1063/1060/1050) + the standing jury-banned full-screen-WebGL2-stare-shader + passive-mic. **For**: adult / **cosmic-ambient** pole / `state: cosmic-web / meditative boundlessness` В· **pointer/touch nutrient-SEED INPUT** (active, played, non-mic вҖ” click/drag plants nutrient wells; nearby clicks reinforce) / **WebGPU-compute-Physarum OUTPUT** (300kвҖ“1M agents, atomic i32 trail deposits, diffuse/decay, full-canvas cosmic tone-map: deep-indigo void вҶ’ violet вҶ’ cyan-white filaments вҶ’ gold nutrient cores) **with a genuine CPU-Physarum fallback** (256ВІ, 45k agents, same Jones model + same `FieldStats`, ImageData render) so it runs on any device, path-badged emerald/amber / luminous cosmic-web palette. **The technique:** Jeff Jones's 2010 agent model verbatim вҖ” each agent `{x,y,heading}` senses 3 points ahead (fwd / fwd-left / fwd-right at a sense angle+distance), rotates toward the strongest reading, steps at constant speed, wraps, and `atomicAdd`s a fixed deposit into an `i32` fixed-point trail buffer; a diffuse (3Г—3 box-blur) + decay pass re-routes the network; nutrient wells add an attractive Gaussian halo to the sensed value so filaments form between seeds. **The field IS the body:** every 4th frame a GPU-reduce compute shader downsamples the trail to 24Г—24 into a mappable buffer, read with `mapAsync` (one in flight, never blocking) вҶ’ CPU `FieldStats` (identical on both paths): **energy** (mean brightness) вҶ’ drone gain + lowpass cutoff + shimmer; **variance** (branchiness) вҶ’ sparse FM-bell density; **brightest-region-x** вҶ’ slow stereo pan. Audio: a 7-limit-JI detuned drone bank (65.4 Hz + 3:2 + octave + 9:2 shimmer, beating pairs) вҶ’ lowpass вҶ’ panner вҶ’ **code-generated 4.2 s convolution reverb** (decaying-noise IR, no files) вҶ’ compressor вҶ’ master, with just/pentatonic FM bell pings. Pre-seeded wells + an autonomous seeder (adds/relocates/fades wells ~every 7 s) keep it alive + sounding + re-routing over minutes (minute-5 вү  minute-1). **NAMED REFERENCES:** Jeff Jones, *Characteristics of pattern formation and evolution in approximations of Physarum transport networks* (2010 вҖ” the agent model); Sage Jenson's *"mold"* Physarum artworks (the trail-field-as-artwork aesthetic); Oskar Elek / Joseph Burchett et al., *Monte Carlo Physarum Machine* / *"Revealing the Dark Threads of the Cosmic Web"* (UC Santa Cruz, 2020 вҖ” slime-mold reconstructs dark-matter filaments; the conceptual core). **Ambition (honest 3/5):** #1 never-used (the lab's FIRST Physarum agent-transport sim + first WebGPU-compute Physarum вҖ” grep-0Г—; distinct from `1050-mycelial-grow`, which was Canvas2D space-colonization, a different algorithm) В· #2 вүҘ3 subsystems (compute agent pass + atomic trail + diffuse/decay + GPU-reduce readbackвҶ’audio + JI drone/bell engine + render = 6) В· #3 named refs (Jones / Jenson / Elek-Burchett) В· #5 cites RESEARCH В§609 added THIS cycle (<14 days вҖ” the May-2026 JWST filament image + April-2026 ShaderVine WebGPU-Physarum). **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D-as-primary-OUTPUT (5Г— last-10) В· full-screen-WebGL2-fragment-shader-you-stare-at (standing JURY) В· passive-mic-as-primary-input (standing JURY) В· lean-back-screensaver relationship]` В· `picked=[pointer-nutrient-SEED INPUT В· WebGPU-compute-Physarum (+CPU fallback) OUTPUT В· slime-mold-transportвҶ’GPU-readbackвҶ’audio TECHNIQUE В· cosmic-web meditative-boundless VIBE]` вҖ” clears every ban. **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** no strobe вҖ” continuous slow agent advection + additive luminous tone-map only; Stop/unmount tears down rAF + audio + AudioContext + GPU buffers/device. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; zero new npm deps; no AI/cost/network surface). **NOT GPU/ear-verified** (no WebGPU/audio in the box вҖ” the CPU-Physarum fallback + autonomous drift ARE the headless paths and render a living web; unverified: the WGSL pipeline + readbackвҶ’audio *feel* on real hardware). **Winner of an adult WIDE 3-explorer fire**; banked **`1067-boundless-breath`** вӯҗRESURRECT-FIRST (the scarce **three.js** + **active-breath** + lab-first **ShepardвҖ“Risset** meditative starfield) + **`1068-attractor-temple`** (the WebGPU strange-attractor played body вҖ” bend the secret constants through bifurcations). ## (Cycle 608 вҖ” **adult** psychedelic build В· DEEP, 2 Canvas2D membrane substrates of one concept В· the psych lane's FIRST played physical-material instrument [a mass-spring drumhead you press/pull/TEAR] В· salvia/DMT membrane-reality, **intense** pole вҖ” the owed swing)

[/dream/1065-skin-membrane](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1065-skin-membrane) вҖ” **"Skin Membrane": press, pull and TEAR a living skin of sound with your hands вҖ” and its physical tension IS the pitch. Bend the membrane and the tone glides; overstretch it and the springs snap into hot rupture rims that you can hear. A mass-spring drumhead is the instrument, not a synth decorated by it.** `demoable` (compile + ESLint + type-check all green, **0 issues from the 1065 folder** вҖ” scoped `next lint` вң” 0 warnings/0 errors, project `tsc --noEmit` 0 errors; full `npm run build` reached `Compiled successfully` + lint + types then blocked only by the standing container EMFILE fd-ceiling, infra-not-code, Vercel-safe; **this is among the most-verifiable ships in the lab вҖ” Canvas2D + the mass-spring solver + the modal synth are exactly what runs headlessly, runtime-stable by construction, zero permissions/hardware/network needed** вҖ” only the *ear-feel* of the tear transients is device-only) В· Cycle 608 (adult, **DEEP** fire вҖ” winner of 2 Canvas2D substrates attacking ONE concept "press, pull and TEAR a living skin whose tension IS the pitch": this mass-spring drumhead vs `1066-membrane-veil` a 2D digital-waveguide-mesh / FDTD wave field you strike [de-selected, banked вӯҗRESURRECT, IDEAS В§608 вҖ” its "audio IS the literal surface" novelty collapsed when it fell back to a modal bank; resurrect with a true AudioWorklet path]). **Cashes the 4-cycle-deferred вӯҗRESURRECT-FIRST** (queued since IDEAS В§602/603/604/606/607) and **swings the pole back to intense** (last several ships were cosmic-ambient). Discharges **JURY 2026-06-29 #1** (an instrument you PLAY into the state, not a field you watch) and dodges the jury-banned **full-screen WebGL2 fragment-shader output** (Canvas2D only) + passive-mic input. **For**: adult / **intense** pole / `state: salvia / DMT membrane-reality` В· **pointer/touch press-pull-flick INPUT** (active, played, non-mic вҖ” a soft radial brush with flick momentum) / **Canvas2D mass-spring-mesh OUTPUT** (deliberately NOT a fragment shader, NOT WebGPU, NOT log-polar вҖ” an additive `lighter` wire-lattice shaded by local areal strain: indigo slack вҶ’ iridescent magentaвҶ’gold taut, glowing tension lines, hot rupture rims, pinned boundary frame, breathing non-black trails) / intense salvia palette. **The technique:** a 52Г—52 grid of point masses with structural (4-neighbour) + shear (diagonal) + bend (2-away) springs and a pinned drumhead boundary, integrated with symplectic Euler Г— 2 substeps + velocity damping; per-spring strain tracking snaps overstretched springs past `TEAR_STRAIN` (capped so it can't fully disintegrate) into visible+audible ruptures; a faint autonomous breathing field keeps the skin alive-when-idle; flick on release sends a traveling wave. The solver's per-frame aggregate stats drive **physical modal synthesis**: **8 bandpass resonators on a circular drumhead's Bessel-zero modal ratios** (1.000, 1.593, 2.136, 2.296, 2.653, 2.918, 3.156, 3.501); **mean spring stretch (tension) вҶ’ fundamental via `setTargetAtTime` portamento** (pentatonic-quantized, ~70вҖ“520 Hz) so bending the skin audibly glides the pitch вҖ” the core coupling; brightness proxy вҶ’ a master lowpass that opens; pluck/tear energy injects noise-burst excitation; **a quiet continuous excitation keeps the modes singing so steady tension is audible in the sustained tone, not just on strikes**; feedback-delay reverb for body; `DynamicsCompressor` limiter so it never clips. Numerically hard-clamped (dt/velocity/position) + NaN-scrubbed вҶ’ bounded under 600+ frames of abuse. **NAMED REFERENCES:** Thomas Jakobsen, *Advanced Character Physics* (verlet / position-based dynamics, GDC 2001); circular-membrane Bessel-zero modal synthesis (physical modeling of a drumhead). **Ambition (honest 3/5):** #2 вүҘ3 subsystems (mass-spring solver + strain/tear tracking + Bessel modal resonator bank + continuous-excitation engine + brightness lowpass + feedback reverb/limiter = ~6) В· #3 named refs (Jakobsen / Bessel-mode modal synthesis) В· #5 cites RESEARCH В§608 added THIS cycle (<14 days вҖ” the Mar-2026 `nlm` non-linear-modal paper + the 2026 *Atoms* visible-mass-spring synth). #1 NOT cleanly claimed (mass-spring cloth exists in the lab's kids star-cloth pieces, modal synthesis in the anvil pieces) вҖ” the honest fresh axis is *a played physical membrane whose continuous tension IS the pitch, with audible tearing*, grep-0Г— in the psych lane. **diversity:** `banned=[full-screen-WebGL2-fragment-shader OUTPUT (standing JURY), passive-mic-as-primary-input (standing JURY), CataRT-granular-of-real-piano (3Г— in window: 1052/1059/1060), cosmic-ambient pole (over-run вҖ” intense owed)]` В· `picked=[pointer press-pull-tear INPUT, Canvas2D-mass-spring-mesh OUTPUT, mass-spring-membraneвҶ’Bessel-modal-synthesis TECHNIQUE, intense-salvia VIBE]` вҖ” clears every ban + delivers the owed intense swing. **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** no strobe вҖ” continuous strain shading + additive glow only; Stop/unmount tears down rAF + audio + AudioContext. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; reads no Resonance prod API; zero new npm deps, no AI/cost surface). **NOT ear-verified** (no audio device in the box вҖ” the Canvas2D mesh + the mass-spring solver + the modal engine ARE the headless paths and are runtime-stable by construction; unverified: the tear/pluck transients + the tensionвҶ’pitch glide *by ear* on a device, and whether the continuous-excitation steady tone sits at a pleasant level). **Winner of an adult DEEP 2-substrate fire**; banked **`1066-membrane-veil`** вӯҗRESURRECT (the FDTD digital-waveguide-mesh sibling вҖ” strike a wave field whose ripples you SEE cross and interfere; resurrect with a true AudioWorklet streaming path so the audio is the literal per-sample surface = a real lab-first). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1065-skin-membrane/README.md`

The drone is detuned sustained sines вҶ’ a slowly-opening lowpass вҶ’ a synthetic-impulse convolution reverb; the motes drift and sound autonomously so a zero-input glance is alive. **NAMED REFERENCES:** Bera, Looger, Proekt & Cichon, *Cortical Mechanisms Contributing to Ketamine-Induced Dissociation* (The Neuroscientist / SAGE, **2026**) вҖ” "the uncoupling of sensory input from conscious awarenessвҖҰ altered sensory-motor coupling" is exactly what the desync engine enacts; ## (Cycle 595 вҖ” **adult** psychedelic build В· WIDE, 3 orthogonal altered-states explorers В· the lab's FIRST gated safe-flicker / Ganzfeld engine В· cosmic-ambient pole)

[/dream/1043-dreamachine](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1043-dreamachine) вҖ” **"Dreamachine": dim your lights, soft-focus the center, and let your OWN visual cortex bloom the spirals, tunnels, and honeycombs вҖ” the screen never draws the hallucination; it only supplies the uniform field + a safe slow pulse, the way Brion Gysin's 1959 Dreamachine and modern Ganzflicker do.** `demoable` (compile-mode `next build` = full TS + ESLint + production bundle, **fully green, 0 warnings/errors from the 1043 folder**; not GPU/ear-verified) В· Cycle 595 (adult, **WIDE** fire вҖ” winner of 3 altered-states explorers: this jhДҒna/hypnagogia Ganzfeld+safe-flicker vs `1044-hyperbolic-bloom` the DMT PoincarГ©-disk hyperbolic tiling [intense] vs `1045-k-hole` the ketamine dissociative parallax-void [cosmic-ambient]). **The lab's FIRST gated safe-photic / Ganzfeld engine** вҖ” the core shared infra PSYCHEDELIC.md В§Cluster-3 names but no prior cycle built (grep-0Г—: `dreamachine`/`gysin`/`jhДҒna`). **For**: adult / **cosmic-ambient** pole / **self-clocked INPUT** (no pointer вҖ” the jury-banned reflex avoided; the field plays itself on a ~5.5-min arc) / **WebGL2 Ganzfeld fragment-shader OUTPUT** (uniform warm field, imperceptibly-slow value-noise color drift, soft vignette, blue-noise visual-snow, faint breathing form-constant scaffold) / soft-white-boundless meditative palette. **The technique (lab-first):** a uniform unstructured field (*Ganzfeld* вҖ” the brain amplifies its own neural noise into imagery) + a whole-field luminance **pulse** (*Ganzflicker*) that lets the viewer's visual cortex manufacture the KlГјver form constants on its own. **THE HEADLINE = the safety engine (`flicker.ts`):** flicker in 3вҖ“30 Hz can trigger photosensitive-epilepsy seizures (peak risk 15вҖ“20 Hz), so the engine is gated in code вҖ” `clampRate()` is a single hard gate at **`MAX_HZ=3.0`** that the UI slider's `max` reads from (the danger band is literally unreachable), modulation is a continuous **soft sine** (never a square strobe) with depth capped at **`MAX_DEPTH=0.45`** (eases ~55%вҶ”100% brightness, never full blackвҶ”white), the **default mode is non-flicker `drift`** (~0.18 Hz luminance sine), a **photosensitive-epilepsy warning + explicit opt-in gate** runs before anything, and an **always-visible instant Stop** eases to a calm steady field + hushes the drone. One shared clock (the `AudioContext` sample clock when audio's up, `performance.now()` fallback) phase-locks light and sound. **The ~5.5-min arc (`arc.ts`):** Onset (still, faint) вҶ’ Come-up (drift begins, pulse fades in) вҶ’ Plateau (gentle вүӨ3 Hz pulse + drone swell) вҶ’ Return (pulse slows, settles to calm) вҖ” smoothstep-eased, never abrupt. **Always audio-visual:** a meditative **drone bank (`audio.ts`)** вҖ” detuned sustained sine partials (root/fifth/octave/twelfth + a faint filtered saw) with slow per-voice detune LFOs, a low-pass that **breathes** at ~0.092 Hz (вүҲ5.5/min breath pace), a feedback-delay "void" tail, and a master amplitude **phase-locked to the exact per-frame luminance** the shader uses, so light and sound rise and fall together. **NAMED REFERENCES:** Brion Gysin & Ian Sommerville's **Dreamachine** (1959); Collective Act's **Dreamachine** (London 2022); the **2026 Oxford *Neuroscience of Consciousness* Ganzflicker study** (`niag016`; RESEARCH В§595); **Heinrich KlГјver** (the four form constants); **Bressloff & Cowan** (retinaвҶ’V1 complex-log map); **W. Grey Walter** (flicker/EEG). README evokes phenomenology only вҖ” no medical/entrainment claims, and notes we deliberately stay far below the 8вҖ“12 Hz alpha band for safety. **Ambition (honest 3/5):** #1 **never-used technique** (gated safe-flicker + Ganzfeld engine вҖ” grep-0Г—) В· #2 вүҘ3 subsystems (Ganzfeld shader + safe-flicker engine + phase-locked drone bank + form-constant scaffold = 4) В· #3 named references (Gysin/KlГјver/BressloffвҖ“Cowan) В· #5 **RESEARCH В§595** (the 2026 Oxford Ganzflicker dive вҶ’ this build, dated this cycle). **diversity:** `banned=[pointer/touch-as-primary-input (JURY 2026-06-28 7Г—), raymarch (lane 2Г—: 1041/1042)]` В· `picked=[self-clocked INPUT (non-pointer), WebGL2-Ganzfeld OUTPUT, safe-flicker+Ganzfeld TECHNIQUE (lab-first), soft-white cosmic-ambient VIBE]` вҖ” clears every ban and rebalances the lane's 2Г— intense toward the cosmic-ambient pole. **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** this IS the safety build вҖ” see the engine above; вүӨ3 Hz hard cap, soft sine, warning gate, instant kill. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; zero new npm deps; no AI/cost/network surface). **Validation:** `npm ci --ignore-scripts` (sharp's libvips binary is blocked by the egress proxy; not needed to compile), then `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` вҶ’ **fully green** (TS + ESLint + production bundle), zero issues from the 1043 folder. Full `npm run build` is blocked by the **standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (4096 hard cap, unraiseable via ulimit/prlimit even as uid 0; the lab now has 1000+ routes) вҖ” **proven infra-not-code:** clean HEAD (cycle 594, currently live) fails with the identical EMFILE at the same `next-font-manifest.json` open; Vercel's high-fd environment deploys fine (every cycle since ~472). **NOT seen/heard on a real GPU** (no WebGL2/audio in the box вҖ” unverified: whether the field *subjectively* evokes form constants on a real display in a dim room, the felt entrainment of the phase-locked drone, real-device framerate). **Winner of an adult WIDE 3-explorer fire**; banked **`1044-hyperbolic-bloom`** вӯҗ (the intense PoincarГ©-disk hyperbolic {7,3} tiling вҖ” MГ¶bius nav + fundamental-domain folding in a fragment shader + ping-pong feedback trails + jeweled iridescence; QRI "Hyperbolic Geometry of DMT" / Escher Circle Limit вҖ” resurrect on an intense-pole cycle, fix the exact Schwarz-triangle circle first) + **`1045-k-hole`** (the ketamine dissociative void вҖ” sparse luminous parallax point-field + exp fog + global `timeScale` time-dilation + convolution-reverb void + body-melt vertex warp + gyro untethered float; Frontiers 2017 ego-dissolution вҖ” resurrect when the lane is light on void pieces, or fold `timeScale`/convolution-void into shared infra). ## (Cycle 593 вҖ” **adult** psychedelic build В· ships the COSMIC-AMBIENT pole to balance 592's intense 1038)

[/dream/1041-nde-tunnel](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1041-nde-tunnel) вҖ” **"NDE Tunnel": drift, drug-free, down a wormhole toward a growing being of light вҖ” the near-death / ketamine void, with the audio deliberately lagging the visuals so the two senses come gently apart.** `demoable` (compile + ESLint + type-check clean; **1041 folder eslint 0/0**; not seen/heard on real GPU) В· Cycle 593 (adult, psychedelic). **The COSMIC-AMBIENT counterweight** to cycle 592's intense `1038-form-constant` вҖ” so the new altered-states direction now ships **both poles** the same morning (PSYCHEDELIC.md: "cover the whole spectrum, don't camp on one pole"). It is the documented вӯҗ resurrect-first the 592 fire banked as `1039-light-tunnel` ("the natural next ship to balance 1038's intensity"), built this fire and shipped at a fresh number. **For**: adult / **cosmic-ambient** pole / **non-pointer auto-drift INPUT** (the ~2-min descent plays itself; optional subtle gyro/pointer camera nudge вҖ” zero permission friction) / **WebGL2 raymarched-wormhole-SDF OUTPUT** (a 3D bore you fall through, deliberately distinct from 1038's flat warp-plane) / dark-void-luminous palette (deep indigo/black вҶ’ gold/white light). **NAMED REFERENCE:** **Raymond Moody** *Life After Life* (the NDE tunnel / being-of-light arc); **Borjigin et al.** (PNAS 2013 rat / 2023 human, the end-of-life **gamma surge** вҶ’ the "hyper-lucid clarity snap"); the **hypoxic tunnel-vision** mechanism; **ketamine NMDA-antagonist** thalamocortical disconnection вҶ’ the **audio-visual desync**; **Pauline Oliveros** *Deep Listening* (convolution-void vastness). **The mechanic:** a WebGL2 fragment shader **raymarches a curving cylindrical wormhole** вҖ” the ray's world position is bent by a sin/cos spine before a `length(p.xy)-radius` tunnel SDF (~72 steps, exponential depth fog, sparse drifting luminous structures for parallax) вҖ” flying endlessly toward a **center-out being-of-light bloom** (additive glow that swells on approach). Layered: an animated **hypoxic vignette** constricting the field toward the bright center at the peak; a one-time **gamma clarity-snap** (~2вҖ“3s of impossibly sharp high-contrast coherence before the return вҖ” a smooth ramp, **not** a strobe); iridescent wall sheen + slow chromatic aberration. A single **time-dilated clock** drives a ~120s arc: onset вҶ’ leaving-the-body вҶ’ the tunnel вҶ’ the light/clarity-snap вҶ’ return (never abrupt). Audio: a 4-voice detuned **drone bank** вҶ’ low-pass that **opens toward the light** + a synthetic `ConvolverNode` IR (~4.5s decaying filtered noise) for the void; the audio envelope is deliberately **lagged behind** the visual motion (the ketamine NMDA-antagonist **dissociation desync** вҖ” gently decoupling the two streams the brain normally binds); master вүҲ0.15, smooth fades, full teardown. **Honesty (in README):** endogenous-tryptamine/DMT theories of NDE are speculative вҖ” this evokes the *phenomenology*, it claims no mechanism. **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** non-strobing вҖ” slow cosmic motion + a smoothly-ramped light bloom only, no full-screen flash; Stop instantly freezes motion + silences audio. **Ambition (honest 2вҖ“3/5):** #2 вүҘ3 subsystems (raymarch wormhole + convolution-void drone + hypoxic-vignette/bloom + dissociation-desync engine = 4) В· #3 named references (Moody; Borjigin PNAS; ketamine NMDA desync; Oliveros) В· #5 RESEARCH В§593. **diversity:** `picked=[non-pointer auto-drift INPUT, raymarched-wormhole-SDF OUTPUT (3D bore, not a flat warp-plane), tunnel-to-light + audio-visual-desync TECHNIQUE, dark-void-luminous cosmic-ambient VIBE]` вҖ” the deliberate orthogonal complement to 1038 (intense/mic/WebGL2-warp/neon); clears every jury ban (no pointer-as-instrument, no read-back physics sim, no Gray-Scott, no cathedral-walk). **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; zero new npm deps; no AI/cost/network surface). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вң“ Compiled successfully in 41s`**; **1041 folder `npx eslint` exit 0**; static-gen blocked only by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling вҖ” infra not code, every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys). **NOT seen/heard on a real device** (no GPU/audio in the box вҖ” unverified: whether the wormhole *subjectively* reads as a tunnel-toward-light on a real GPU, the desync's felt dissociation, the convolution-void depth). No headless unit test (a continuous shader/synth, not a discretizable pure core). **Context вҖ” a parallel-run collision resolved into a both-poles win:** this fire independently ran the same WIDE 3-explorer psychedelic plan as the 592 fire and reached the same form-constant winner; the 592 fire won the push, so rather than ship a duplicate intense engine, I deferred to it and shipped the banked cosmic-ambient counterweight (see STATE В§593). Remaining banked from 592: **`1040-ganzfeld-bloom`** вӯҗ (the meditative pole + the safe-flicker engine). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1041-nde-tunnel/README.md`

## (Cycle 592 вҖ” **adult** build В· WIDE, 3 altered-states explorers across the whole spectrum, shipped 1)

[/dream/1038-form-constant](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1038-form-constant) вҖ” **"Form Constant": play your music (or just speak) into the mic and watch your visual cortex's own hallucinated geometry bloom вҖ” tunnels, spirals, funnels, honeycomb вҖ” generated the way the brain actually makes them.** `demoable` (compile + ESLint + type-check clean; not GPU/ear-verified) В· Cycle 592 (adult, **WIDE** fire вҖ” winner of 3 altered-states explorers spanning the spectrum: this intense DMT/LSD form-constant engine vs `1039-light-tunnel` the NDE wormhole-to-light vs `1040-ganzfeld-bloom` the meditative Ganzfeld+safe-flicker). **The lab's FIRST psychedelic / altered-states build** вҖ” the opening move of Karel's 2026-06-28 steer (`PSYCHEDELIC.md`), and it deliberately ships **the single most load-bearing finding** of that whole direction: the **log-polar / form-constant engine**. **For**: adult / **intense** pole / **mic INPUT** (non-pointer вҖ” FFT bands drive the geometry: bassвҶ’flow/warp, midsвҶ’form-constant morph & kaleidoscope fold, highsвҶ’fine detail/grain, loudnessвҶ’saturation/neural-gain) / **WebGL2 fullscreen fragment-shader OUTPUT** / neon-iridescent jeweled DMT palette. **The technique (grep-verified lab-first, 0Г— prior):** all psychedelic geometry is ONE periodic pattern seen through a **log-polar warp**, because the retinaвҶ’V1 cortical map is a complex logarithm (**Bressloff & Cowan**, building on **KlГјver's four form constants**). The shader takes screen UV, computes cortical coords `(lr=log r, Оё=atan)`, synthesizes plane-wave stripes + a 3-wave hex lattice *in cortical space*, and the **orientation** of those waves selects the form constant: stripes along Оё вҶ’ concentric rings/**tunnel**, diagonal вҶ’ **spiral**, stripes along lr вҶ’ radial spokes/**funnel**, hex вҶ’ **honeycomb** вҖ” with a `formMix` uniform sweeping continuously through all four, N-fold kaleidoscope folding to bloom a chrysanthemum, an IQ cosine palette, chromatic aberration, and blue-noise visual-snow grain. **The journey arc (minute-5 вү  minute-1):** a JS `arc.ts` entropy controller runs a ~5-min OnsetвҶ’Come-upвҶ’Peak/breakthroughвҶ’PlateauвҶ’Return, smoothstep-blended, ramping noise octaves / flow / saturation and loosening symmetry at peak вҖ” the Carhart-Harris **entropic-brain / REBUS** parameterization made visible; everything lerped so transitions are never abrupt. **Always audio-visual:** mic is primary, but if denied it falls back to a self-playing **ShepardвҖ“Risset drone** (octave-spaced detuned sines under a Gaussian window) routed through the same analyser, so the piece always sounds and reacts. **NAMED REFERENCES:** KlГјver's form constants; **Bressloff & Cowan** cortical model ("Uncoiling the spiral", plus.maths); **ENTHEA** (github.com/elder-plinius, 2026 вҖ” a recent open-source real-time GPU form-constant synthesizer using the same retinaвҶ’V1 transform, found in this cycle's RESEARCH В§592 dive); Carhart-Harris entropic-brain/REBUS. **Ambition (honest 4/5):** #1 never-used-here technique (log-polar/form-constant warp вҖ” grep-0Г—) В· #2 вүҘ3 subsystems (mic FFT analyser + log-polar form-constant shader + entropy/journey-arc controller + Shepard-Risset fallback synth = 4) В· #3 named references (above) В· #5 RESEARCH В§592 (the ENTHEA find вҶ’ this build, dated this cycle). **diversity:** `banned=[pointer/touch-as-primary-adult-input (JURY 2026-06-28 7Г—), the "a-sim-IS-the-instrument-body" default adult move (JURY 7Г—), Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion (JURY 2Г—-running), pentatonic-no-wrong-notes harmony]` В· `picked=[mic/audio-reactive INPUT (non-pointer), WebGL2-fragment-shader OUTPUT, log-polar form-constant warp TECHNIQUE, neon-iridescent intense-psychedelic VIBE]` вҖ” clears every ban (no pointer, no read-back physics sim, no Gray-Scott). **SAFETY:** intense visuals but **no strobe** вҖ” the motion is continuous warp + slow luminance drift, not flicker; the gated photic-pulse engine lives in the banked `1040` sibling, not here. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; zero new npm deps; no AI/cost/network surface). **One fix during validation:** a `createMediaStreamAudioSource`вҶ’`createMediaStreamSource` typo in `audio.ts` (the single allowed fix; build then `вң“ Compiled successfully`). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вң“ Compiled successfully in 87s`** вҶ’ lint/type passed; static-gen blocked only by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling вҖ” infra not code, every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys). **NOT GPU/ear-verified** (no WebGL2/audio device in container вҖ” unverified: whether the four form constants read as convincingly *psychedelic* on a real GPU, the perceptual strength of the audioвҶ’geometry coupling, real-device framerate). [/dream/1035-living-album](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1035-living-album) вҖ” **"Living Album": you are not a player but a *gardener* вҖ” drop a few seeds into a self-evolving piece of music that REMEMBERS, and the motifs alive at minute 6 are literal descendants of the ones you planted at minute 1.** `demoable` (compile + ESLint + type-check clean; Because reproduction always blends *currently-living* genomes, the pool drifts continuously and minute-6 motifs are gen>0 descendants of minute-1 founders вҖ” **that lineage is the audible memory** (drawn on screen as childвҶ’parent threads). **Long-form / minute-5вү minute-1** by construction: the population never resets, no fixed loop. Always-sounding (auto-demo population on load; gesture-gated AudioContext; per-note filtered voices; full teardown). **Ambition (honest 3/5):** #2 вүҘ3 subsystems (heredity engine + functional-harmony model + agent lifecycle + Canvas2D lineage render = 4) В· #3 named reference (Eno *Reflection*; ## Cycle 588 вҖ” **kids** build В· WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1

[/dream/1027-kids-chaos-aurora](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1027-kids-chaos-aurora) вҖ” **"Chaos Aurora": a 4-year-old flicks a glowing double pendulum and it dances a never-the-same-twice aurora ribbon that sings a real chord progression that never exactly repeats.** `demoable` (compile + ESLint + type-check clean; **headless self-test 5/5 PASS вҖ” machine-verified**; not ear-verified) В· Cycle 588 (kids, **WIDE** fire вҖ” winner of 3 orthogonal kids explorers: this double-pendulum-chaos vs `1026-kids-marble-bells` tilt-gravity-marblesГ—modal-bells vs `1028-kids-star-weaver` constellation-graph-traversal-sequencer). **The lab's FIRST use of chaotic double-pendulum dynamics** (grep-0Г— across all 587 prior prototypes' READMEs + INDEX вҖ” the lab already owns Lenia/sandpile/pendulum-harp/orbit/particle-life/RD, so this is the rare genuinely-new engine). **For**: kids (4+) / calm bedtime-aurora / **tap-flick INPUT** (every flick = visible energy + immediate chime <50ms; optional tilt bends gravity; **zero permission friction** вҖ” no mic/camera, ideal for a 06:30 phone glance) / **Canvas2D additive-glow OUTPUT** (two glowing rods + bobs + a long fading tealвҶ’violetвҶ’gold aurora trail; NOT a flat full-screen fragment raster, the jury's 9Г— over-represented output) / hypnotic dark-aurora palette. **NAMED REFERENCE:** the *double pendulum* / *deterministic chaos* вҖ” Lagrangian mechanics + sensitive dependence on initial conditions; a nod to artificial-life "open-ended novelty from simple deterministic rules" (RESEARCH В§588: ALIFE/ALICE 2026). **The mechanic (jury's 1015 recipe, on the kids lane):** `physics.ts` integrates the two-segment double-pendulum **Lagrangian EOM** with a fixed-step **RK4** integrator + light damping (settles, then the auto-demo re-flicks). The chaotic lower-bob path is the generative engine вҖ” **the sim IS the resonating body** (jury-sanctioned for kids). A genuine diatonic **IвҖ“viвҖ“IVвҖ“V** progression in C major advances every ~4s; the bob's height is **snapped to a chord-tone of the LIVE chord** (always consonant, never looping вҖ” explicitly **NOT pentatonic "no-wrong-notes"**: V really contains the leading-tone B, which the test asserts). New notes trigger on the bob's swing **zero-crossings** (clean musical onsets, not per-frame spam). Warm soft-mallet/glass chimes (sine + detuned partials, вүҘ10ms attack) over an always-on drone pad so it is never silent. **Long-form / minute-5вү minute-1** by construction: a chaotic trajectory literally never repeats. **Kids-safe chain (exact):** `masterGain(~0.26) вҶ’ lowpass(~6500Hz) вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor(вҲ’10/20:1) вҶ’ analyser вҶ’ destination` (analyser taps master only; nothing hits destination directly). вүҘ72px Start gesture-gates AudioContext + iOS `DeviceOrientationEvent.requestPermission()` in the same tap; ~2s-idle auto-demo so a hands-free glance both sees + hears within ~1s; full teardown (rAF cancel + listener removal + `audioCtx.close()`). **Ambition (honest 3/5):** #1 **never-used technique** (chaotic double-pendulum Lagrangian RK4 вҖ” grep-0Г—) В· #2 вүҘ3 subsystems (chaotic physics + functional-harmony synth + additive-glow Canvas2D = 3) В· #3 named reference (double pendulum / deterministic chaos). #5 chains to RESEARCH В§588 dated this fire. **diversity:** `banned=[pointer/touch-as-primary-ADULT-input (JURY 7Г— вҖ” kids exempt), "a-sim-IS-the-body" as ADULT default (JURY вҖ” kids exempt, jury told kids to copy 1015's sim-as-body), Gray-Scott RD (JURY 2Г— running вҖ” NOT used here), pentatonic-no-wrong-notes KIDS harmony (JURY BANNED вҖ” used REAL IвҖ“viвҖ“IVвҖ“V instead), full-screen WebGL2-flat-raster (JURY ~9Г— вҖ” used Canvas2D)]` В· `picked=[tap-flick INPUT (zero-permission), Canvas2D-additive-glow OUTPUT, chaotic-double-pendulum TECHNIQUE (lab-first), bedtime-aurora VIBE, real-functional-harmony, long-form-never-repeats]` вҖ” clears every ban. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; zero new npm deps; no AI/cost/network surface). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: `вң“ Compiled successfully in 48s`; lint/type ran with only pre-existing `src/lib/**` + other-prototype warnings вҖ” **1027 folder grep-clean, no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route**; static-gen blocked only by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling вҖ” infra not code, every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys). **HEADLESS-VERIFIED (the rare win):** `chaos.test.ts` 5/5 PASS (ran ad-hoc under vitest w/ a temp root config overriding the `src/lib/**`-scoped include + a postcss override) вҖ” RK4 bounded/finite over 7,200 damped steps, undamped energy conserved <2%, `snapToChord` always in the live chord's tone set across all 4 chords. **NOT ear-verified** (no audio in the box вҖ” unverified: chime balance, the aurora feel, iOS orientation flow; the always-on drone + auto-demo + always-in-key snapping are the always-sounding net). **Winner of a kids WIDE 3-explorer fire**; banked **`1026-kids-marble-bells`** вӯҗ RESURRECT-FIRST (tilt-tray gravity marbles strike a ring of modal bells tuned to a live IвҖ“IVвҖ“VвҖ“vi clock; selfTest passes; lost only on being the *safe* jury-recipe entry vs 1027's genuinely-new technique) + **`1028-kids-star-weaver`** (tap stars + connect them; a comet-spark walks the constellation graph and sings the shape as a melody; 8/8 selfTest). ## Cycle 587 вҖ” **adult** build В· WIDE, 3 orthogonal live-data explorers, shipped 1

[/dream/1024-wiki-bells](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1024-wiki-bells) вҖ” **"Wiki Bells": every Wikipedia edit on Earth, right now, struck as a bell вҖ” the planet's collective thinking-out-loud heard as a slow, drifting carillon.** `demoable` (compile + ESLint + type-check clean; **not** ear-verified) В· Cycle 587 (adult, **WIDE** fire вҖ” winner of 3 orthogonal **live-real-world-data** sonifications: this Wikimedia-edit-streamГ—inharmonic-bells vs `1023-airspace-organ` OpenSky-aircraftГ—additive-glissando-radar vs `1025-isobar-winds` METAR-weatherГ—wind-organ-isobars). **The lab's 2nd genuine data-sonification** (after `1002-sun-organ`/NOAA вҖ” directly answers JURY 2026-06-28 #5: "build a second real-world-data piece"; the data-driven-composition category was wide open). **For**: adult / contemplative-observatory / **live-data INPUT** (Wikimedia **EventStreams** SSE вҖ” keyless, CORS-open, no server route, no pointer) / **Canvas2D bloom OUTPUT** (one expanding ring/glyph per event вҖ” deliberately NOT a full-screen WebGL2 fragment raster, the jury's 9Г— over-represented output) / luminous gold-ivory bells + violet new-article chimes + mint new-user sparkles on near-black. **NAMED REFERENCE:** a Resonance-flavored, harmonically-richer descendant of **Hatnote's *"Listen to Wikipedia"*** (Stephen LaPorte & Mahmoud Hashemi, 2013), credited in README + in-app Design notes. **The mapping (legible):** each `recentchange` event вҶ’ an **inharmonic bell** (detuned partials at metallic ratios, exponential decay); signed **byte-delta вҶ’ pitch/weight** (big edits = low, weighty bells; small copyedits = high tinkles), **edit type вҶ’ timbre + color** (edit / new-article warm chime / new-user rising sparkle / bot = quieter+woodier, mutable), **wiki language вҶ’ stereo pan**. Pitches snap to a **drifting modal lattice** (pentatonic/Dorian family that re-seeds every ~30s) so the carillon is consonant but minute 5 вү  minute 1 вҖ” a long-form, **self-evolving** texture, not a loop. **Varies the humanвҶ”sound relationship (the jury's #1 ask):** a **non-pointer instrument** вҖ” the world's edit stream plays itself; the visitor only *shapes the listening* (language filter, bot mute, density), never aims or strikes. Voice-capped (~12) вҶ’ soft delay tail вҶ’ compressor so a busy day never clips or becomes noise; significant-event selection when flooded. **Degrades to always-sound:** if `EventSource` is missing / errors / sends nothing within 6s, a built-in **Poisson-ish synthetic edit generator** (exponential inter-arrivals, varied deltas, ~6% new-users / ~12% new-articles / ~45% bots) plays an **identical-sounding** stream with a `text-amber-300/95` "simulated edit stream вҖ” live feed unavailable" notice; AudioContext created + resumed on the first click ("Listen to the world edit"). **Ambition (honest 3/5):** #2 вүҘ3 subsystems (SSE ingest/filter/throttle + inharmonic bell synth + drifting-modal-scale state + Canvas2D bloom viz = 4) В· #3 **named reference** (Hatnote) В· #1 varies-relationship via non-pointer world-as-instrument. (#1-never-used NOT claimed вҖ” EventStreams data + bell synth both exist elsewhere; #4 single-cycle; #5 paired to *this* fire's RESEARCH В§587 dive, not a 14-day-old entry.) **diversity:** `banned=[pointer/touch-as-primary-adult-input (JURY 7Г—), "a-simulation-IS-the-instrument-body" as adult default (JURY 7Г—), Gray-Scott RD (JURY, used 2Г— running), full-screen WebGL2-flat-raster (JURY ~9Г—), ritual/cathedral spatial-walk (JURY on-the-clock)]` В· `picked=[**live-data-stream INPUT** (non-pointer; world-as-instrument), **Canvas2D-bloom OUTPUT** (under-represented, jury-collapsed to 1Г—), **inharmonic-bell-carillon TECHNIQUE**, **observatory-of-attention VIBE**, **drifting-modal long-form** (minute-5вү minute-1)]` вҖ” clears every ban. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; EventStreams is keyless + CORS-open; zero new npm deps; zero AI/cost surface). **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: webpack compile + lint [only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings] + type-check PASS; **static-gen blocked only by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** вҖ” `next-font-manifest.json`; infra not code, every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys). **NOT ear-verified** (no audio in the box вҖ” unverified: bell balance, the live SSE feel, flood-throttle on a busy day; the synthetic generator + gesture-resume are the always-sounding net). **Winner of an adult WIDE 3-explorer fire**; banked **`airspace-organ`** (OpenSky aircraft overhead вҶ’ just-intonation additive glissando chord on a phosphor ATC radar; lost on data-source CORS/auth fragility вҶ’ more often synthetic than `1024`'s reliably-live EventStreams) + **`isobar-winds`** (continental METAR weather вҶ’ filtered-noise wind-organ on a Canvas2D isobar field; lost on being the third just-intonation-drone of the set, least surprising). Both built complete, removed un-committed per the non-winner rule; seeds вҶ’ IDEAS В§587. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1024-wiki-bells/README.md`

## (Cycle 585 вҖ” **adult** build В· DEEP, 3 parallel approaches to ONE concept, shipped 1)

[/dream/1019-echo-halls-tonnetz](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1019-echo-halls-tonnetz) вҖ” **"Echo Halls вҖ” Tonnetz": walk your body across the neo-Riemannian lattice of triads вҖ” every threshold you step over is a real P/L/R voice-leading move (CвҶ’EmвҶ’AmвҖҰ) вҖ” while a GPU reaction-diffusion field blooms under the active chord and the whole spatialized ensemble re-pans around you in HRTF.** `demoable` (compile + ESLint + type-check clean; **not** ear/GPU-verified) В· Cycle 585 (adult, **DEEP** fire вҖ” winner of 3 approaches to *Echo Halls*: this TonnetzГ—WebGPU-compute-RD vs `1018-echo-halls-walk` first-person-full-sphere-find-by-ear vs `1017-echo-halls-flock` top-down-WebGPU-compute-flock). **The DEEP extension of the jury's only 5/5, `977-echo-room-gpu`** (JURY 2026-06-27 #2: "extend 977 into a multi-cycle spatial instrument вҖ” a *room* you physically walk between harmonic zones"; #3: "make the sim the resonating body"). **For**: adult / gallery-installation / **body-pose INPUT** (MediaPipe Pose torso-centroid via CDN dynamic `import()`; pointer fallback; ~1.5s PвҖ“LвҖ“R auto-demo, zero permissions) / **WebGPU-compute OUTPUT** (Gray-Scott RD on ping-pong `array<vec2<f32>>` storage buffers, `@workgroup_size(8,8)`; вҶ’WebGL2 RGBA16F float-targetвҶ’CPU fallback) + Canvas2D Tonnetz overlay / luminous lattice. **The harmony model (the headline):** a real **triangular neo-Riemannian Tonnetz** вҖ” right axis +7 (fifths), up axis +4 (major thirds); each triangle a triad (up=major, down=minor); **every shared edge is a genuine P (parallel, flip 3rd), L (leading-tone, rootвҶ“ semitone), or R (relative, 5thвҶ‘ tone) single-voice transform** вҖ” so crossing any threshold is one common-tone-rich voice-leading step, and the HUD prints the move (`L вҶ’ Em`). **Machine-verified** (the jury's #4 verification-debt template, Г  la 983): a standalone pass confirmed all shared edges resolve to a real P/L/R move of the cell's actual triad вҖ” **P:16 / L:24 / R:18 directed edges, zero mismatches**. Live triad = 3 oscillators that **glide** (`setTargetAtTime`) so voice-leading is *audible*, not just labelled вҖ” **real harmony, not the banned pentatonic safety scale**. **The resonating body:** the GPU RD field is seeded (`splat`) by the live marker + every ghost where harmony is happening; ~10Hz it's read back (`copyBufferToBuffer`вҶ’`mapAsync`) to **coverage** (opens a shimmer partial + breathes the master lowpass) + **edge energy** (sweeps a bandpass) вҖ” **the sim IS the instrument's body, not a backdrop**. **HRTF + ghost loops (kept from 977):** listener = performer; live triad + each ghost own an HRTF `PannerNode` at its lattice position, re-panning around you; "Start a loop" records a 7s lattice path вҶ’ a permanent ghost re-walking + re-triggering its transforms forever (cap 6, oldest drops, "Clear all"); bus `~1/вҲҡ(n+1)`вҶ’lowpassвҶ’compressor. **Degrades to always-sound:** no WebGPUвҶ’WebGL2 float RDвҶ’CPU RD (HUD shows `sim webgpu-compute / webgl2 / cpu`); no cameraвҶ’pointer (`text-rose-300` notice); full teardown (rAF + AudioContext + GPU buffers/GL programs + MediaPipe + camera tracks + resize). **Ambition 5/5** вҖ” #1 NEVER-used (lab's first **neo-Riemannian Tonnetz** engine вҖ” grep-clean; + first WebGPU-**compute** RD as a resonating *body*, vs 977's GPU-render-only) В· #2 вүҘ3 subsystems (pose + WebGPU-compute RD + per-source HRTF + Tonnetz harmony state = 4) В· #3 named refs (**Euler/Riemann/Cohn** Tonnetz; **Spatial Orchestra** arXiv:2510.23848; **Cardiff, *Forty Part Motet***) В· #4 multi-cycle (cycle 1 of the Echo Halls thread) В· #5 in-README dated **RESEARCH В§585** (arXiv:2606.24367, 24 Jun 2026, full-sphere human localisation). **diversity:** `banned=[raw-WebGL2-as-primary-output (вүҘ5Г—/10), keyboard/MIDI-adult-input (JURY), Canvas2D+flat-fragment-only (JURY), explainable-inverse move (JURY), ink-on-parchment vibe (JURY)]` В· `picked=[**body-pose INPUT** (scarce 1Г— recent), **WebGPU-compute OUTPUT** (jury-encouraged, 6Г—вҶ’1Г—), **Tonnetz+Gray-Scott-RD-body TECHNIQUE**, **gallery/installation VIBE**, **HRTF walkable harmony**]` вҖ” clears every ban. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; MediaPipe is a runtime CDN `import()`, not a dep; zero new npm deps). **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: webpack compile + lint + type-check PASS, grep-clean of `1019`/`echo-halls`, reached `Collecting page data`); **static-gen blocked only by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; infra not code вҖ” every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys). **NOT ear/GPU-verified** (no audio/WebGPU/camera in the box вҖ” unverified: the compute RD bind-group/ping-pong + `mapAsync` cadence on real GPU, the HRTF re-pan feel, the MediaPipe load; the WebGL2/CPU-RD + pointer + auto-demo paths are the always-sounding net). **Winner of an adult DEEP 3-approach fire**; banked **`1018-echo-halls-walk` вӯҗ RESURRECT-FIRST (adult)** вҖ” first-person, full-sphere, find-the-chord-BY-EAR (rooms at varied azimuth+elevation; listener position AND orientation update so HRTF re-pans as you look; the directest take on В§585's full-sphere localisation), lost ONLY on rendering WebGL2 (over-represented output tag) with no GPU-compute вҶ’ resurrect with a compute body. Plus **`1017-echo-halls-flock`** вҖ” top-down plan; **WebGPU-compute curl-noise flock** (~120k particles) pools in your room, **atomic-reduction `mapAsync` readback** drives filter/shimmer (cleanest "compute *drives* the sound" loop, curl-noise fresher than RD), lost on the top-down form being closest to 977. Both `cp`'d to scratchpad `dream-losers-585/` then `rm -rf`'d before the authoritative build (NOT committed); seeds вҶ’ IDEAS В§585. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1019-echo-halls-tonnetz/README.md`

## (Cycle 584 вҖ” **kids** build В· WIDE, 3 divergent explorers, shipped 1)

[/dream/1015-kids-ink-garden](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1015-kids-ink-garden) вҖ” **"Ink Garden": drop a fingertip of magic ink and watch living Turing-pattern spots GROW and spread across the screen by themselves вҖ” and the more the pattern blooms, the fuller the music gets.** `demoable` (build-checked + lint/type clean + **13 headless `sim.test.ts` tests pass**; not ear/GPU-verified) В· Cycle 584 (kids, **WIDE** fire вҖ” winner of 3 orthogonal explorers: this touchГ—GPU-reaction-diffusion vs `1014-kids-breath-flute` mic-breathГ—waveguide-flute vs `1016-kids-scarf-choir` camera-optical-flowГ—choir). **For**: kids (4+) / bioluminescent inky / **touch** seeding input (tap+drag anywhere; 4 big color-orbs pick hue; ~2s-idle auto-demo seeds itself) / **GPU reaction-diffusion FIELD** output (WebGL2 ping-pong float-texture Gray-Scott fragment shader, 256Г—256, 14 steps/frame; Canvas2D CPU-RD fallback) / glowing cyan/violet/rose/lime ink on dark water. **The directest answer to JURY 2026-06-27 #3** ("WebGPU compute collapsed 6Г—вҶ’1Г— вҖҰ force a real GPU-compute path; make the sim the resonating BODY, not a 2D plot you read a pitch off of") вҖ” the **simulation itself is the instrument**: a real GPU Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion field grows, splits, and blooms, and its shape is the sound (echoing the lab's friction/plate physical-instrument lineage on the kids lane). **How it works:** two invisible "chemicals" update on the GPU each frame by the Gray-Scott rule (`A' = A + (DaвҲҮВІA вҲ’ AВ·BВІ + f(1вҲ’A))В·dt`, `B' = B + (DbвҲҮВІB + AВ·BВІ вҲ’ (k+f)B)В·dt`; 9-point Laplacian; tuning `dA=1.0/dB=0.5/f=0.0367/k=0.0649` in the "coral/mitosis" Pearson zone so seeded spots grow and split). A fingertip is a splat pass painting `BвүҲ0.9`. **Sonification (the field IS the instrument):** `readPixels` stalls the GPU, so ~10Г—/sec a GPU blit downsamples the 256Г—256 field to a tiny **32Г—32** float texture read once; pure `summarizeField()` turns 1024 values into coverage/activity/centroid/per-region-growth вҶ’ coverage drives chord-bed gain + voice-count (sparse=root+fifth, full bloom=4-note voicing), spread-rate brightens a lowpass (700вҖ“3900 Hz), centroid soft-pans, new-spot regions fire soft consonant bells (вүӨ2 at once). **The harmony is real, not pentatonic:** an always-on ambient pad + a moving functional **IвҖ“viвҖ“IVвҖ“V loop in C** (each chord ~7.5s, crossfaded), bells from a C-major scale chosen to stay consonant over the loop. **Kids-safe chain:** `master 0.26 вҶ’ lowpass 6500Hz вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor(вҲ’10/20:1) вҶ’ destination`; soft 20ms attacks; always-on pad so it's never silent; every touch = visible ink + soft blip <50ms. **Degrades to always-sound:** no `EXT_color_buffer_float` вҶ’ amber notice + Canvas2D CPU Gray-Scott on a 96Г—96 grid running the *same* `stepCell` rule (still grows real Turing patterns, still reads back, still sings); WebGL context-loss caught; full unmount teardown (rAF + readback timer + GL programs/textures/FBOs + `loseContext()` + AudioContext close). **Imperative ref-driven render loop** (no per-frame setState вҖ” avoids the 60-re-renders/sec antipattern; React state only for mode/started/error). **Ambition honest 3/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [touch-seeding + GPU RD sim + readback-sonification + audio synth + display shader = 5] В· #3 named refs [**Alan Turing, *The Chemical Basis of Morphogenesis*, 1952**; **John Pearson**, Gray-Scott regime catalogue, 1993; **Karl Sims' Reaction-Diffusion Tutorial** вҖ” the 9-point Laplacian weights + A/B feed-kill formulation are his]; #5 in-README dated RESEARCH В§584). #1 NOT claimed (RD appears 6Г— in the lab вҖ” though never as a sonified GPU-compute kids body); #4 NOT claimed (single-cycle ship). **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D-as-primary-output (audit 6Г—/10), mic-pitch-detection (969/972 redundant per JURY), tilt-ball-physics (974/995), pentatonic-no-wrong-notes (JURY kids-side), MediaPipe-hand-tracking+WebGPU-particle-cloud (1008 just shipped)]` В· `picked=[**touch-seeding INPUT** (common, but the technique+output carry the diversity), **GPU-reaction-diffusion-FIELD OUTPUT** (anti-Canvas2D, the scarce jury-encouraged compute surface), **Gray-Scott-RD-sonified-as-it-grows TECHNIQUE**, **bioluminescent-ink VIBE** (off garden/meadow/cosmic), **real IвҖ“viвҖ“IVвҖ“V harmony** not pentatonic]` вҖ” clears every ban. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; zero network/AI/mic/camera/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + WebGL2/Canvas2D only; no three.js). **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вң“ Compiled successfully in 54s`** вҶ’ Linting + type-check PASS вҶ’ reached `Collecting page data`; grep-clean вҖ” no `1015`/`ink-garden` warning or error); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; infra, not code вҖ” identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **Headless-VERIFIED** (the rare win): 13 `sim.test.ts` tests pass on the pure Gray-Scott + sonification math (`stepCell`, `summarizeField`, coverage/activity/centroid/bell mappings). **NOT ear/GPU-verified** (no audio/WebGL2 device in the box вҖ” unverified: audible bed/bell balance, the live float-texture RD bloom on a real GPU, `readPixels` float-readback on iPad Safari; the Canvas2D CPU-RD fallback + always-on pad + 2s-idle auto-demo are the always-sounding net). **Winner of a kids WIDE 3-explorer fire**; banked **`1014-kids-breath-flute` вӯҗ RESURRECT-FIRST (kids)** вҖ” the lab's FIRST **jet-drive digital-waveguide flute** (Cook/Smith STK; grep вүҲ0Г— wind/jet model): blow/hum into the mic (breath RMS envelope, NOT pitch-detection) to play a glowing aurora air-column, tap big recorder-holes for G-Mixolydian pitch, harder breath = brighter/overblow; shipped with a **passing headless `selfTest()`** (7 notes oscillate, bounded, Вұ57Вў, no octave errors) + AudioWorklet/ScriptProcessor/tap-puff/auto-demo fallbacks вҖ” lost only on mic-permission 06:30 friction. Plus **`1016-kids-scarf-choir`** вҖ” wave a scarf/hands in front of the camera and **optical-flow motion-energy** (Lucas-Kanade-style, NOT silhouette/landmarks) conducts an IвҖ“viвҖ“IVвҖ“V choir on WebGL aurora ribbons (finger-wave pointer fallback + auto-demo; frames processed locally). Both `cp`'d to scratchpad `dream-losers-584/` then `rm -rf`'d before the authoritative winner-only build (NOT committed); seeds вҶ’ IDEAS В§584.
