## Cycle 583 вҖ” **adult** build В· WIDE, 3 divergent pure-timbre explorers, shipped 1

[/dream/1011-fm-aurora](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1011-fm-aurora) вҖ” **"FM Aurora": tilt your phone through a 2-D timbre-space and sculpt a 6-operator FM synthesizer live вҖ” a soft D-Lydian arpeggio plays itself while a luminous chrome spectral ridge sprouts more and more sidebands as you move.** `demoable` (build-checked + lint/type clean + **11 headless `fm.ts` tests pass**; not ear/GPU-verified) В· Cycle 583 (adult, **WIDE** fire вҖ” winner of 3 orthogonal pure-timbre explorers: this FMГ—tilt vs `1012-fold-tide` wavefolderГ—mic vs `1013-mantra-glass` ring-modГ—his-piano). **For**: adult / bright DX7-chrome / **device-orientation TILT** input (gammaвҶ’modulator:carrier ratio {0.5,1,1.5,2,3,3.5,7}, betaвҶ’modulation index 0вҶ’12; pointer-drag + ~2s-idle auto-demo fallbacks) / hand-written **WebGL2** spectral-ridge + orbiting-operator-graph (Canvas2D fallback) / cyan-magenta chrome aurora. **The lab's FIRST FM (frequency-modulation) synthesis engine** вҖ” grep-0Г— as a core technique across 1000+ prototypes (only the ancient `10-strange` ever touched FM; Chowning never credited). The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-27 #1** ("retire the explainable-inverse formula for a week вҖ” do *pure timbre*, noise, rhythm, or spatial presence; the 4вҖ“5/5 builds LEAD WITH A NOVEL TECHNIQUE") and **#4 / verification-debt** (the jury's #1 standing liability вҖ” this is the only candidate of the fire shipped with a passing headless test suite). **The engine:** `fm.ts` is pure, DOM/audio-free, unit-tested math вҖ” the tiltвҶ’timbre mapping, ratio snapping, the **analytic FM spectrum via Bessel functions `J_k(I)`** (sidebands at `fc Вұ kВ·fm`), a spectral-centroid readout, the DX7-style algorithm table, and the arpeggio note set. **Three operator algorithms (DX7-style routings):** `2-OP` (`MвҶ’C`), `3-STACK` (`M2вҶ’M1вҶ’C`, cascaded вҶ’ clangier), `PARALLEL` (three modulated carriers voiced as a chord). **Audio:** Web Audio FM voices (`OscillatorNode` modulator вҶ’ `GainNode(=indexВ·modFreq)` вҶ’ carrier `.frequency`), per-note ADSR, master вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` limiter; the arpeggio auto-plays so it always sounds. **Render:** a hand-written WebGL2 aurora wash + spectral ridge (`AnalyserNode.getFloatFrequencyData`, energy visibly spreads into higher partials as the index rises) + operator graph (carriers glow cyan-white, modulators magenta, links pulse with the index); Canvas2D fallback with a `text-rose-300` notice. **Degrades to always-sound:** no gyroscope / iOS permission denied вҶ’ pointer-drag over the canvas through the same 2-D space; do nothing вҶ’ a ~2s-idle LFO auto-sweep morphs the timbre on its own (a guaranteed sounding+morphing 06:30 phone glance). **Ambition honest 3/5** (#1 never-used technique [first FM-synthesis-as-core in the lab; grep-0Г— / Chowning-0Г—] В· #2 вүҘ3 subsystems [device-orientation input + 6-op FM synth engine + Bessel spectral analysis/centroid + WebGL2 spectrum-and-operator-graph render = 4] В· #3 named refs [**John Chowning, "The Synthesis of Complex Audio Spectra by Means of Frequency Modulation," JAES 21(7), 1973**; the **Yamaha DX7** (1983) 6-operator/32-algorithm UI]; #5 in-README dated RESEARCH В§583). #4 NOT claimed (single-cycle ship). **diversity:** `banned=[physics-simulation-as-resonating-body (audit 5Г—/10: 988/995/1005/1006/1008), pointer/touch-as-primary-input (audit ~4Г—), computer-keyboard/MIDI-as-primary-adult-input (JURY), the "explainable-inverse-of-an-opaque-neural-frontier" conceptual move (JURY), engraved-manuscript/ink-on-parchment + dark-forge adult vibe (JURY/audit)]` В· `picked=[**device-orientation TILT INPUT** (non-pointer, non-keyboard, phone-native), **WebGL2 spectral/operator-graph OUTPUT** (rich geometry, not a flat full-screen noise shader), **FM-synthesis pure-timbre TECHNIQUE** (NOT a physics sim, NOT a harmony/theory explainer), **DX7-chrome cyan-magenta VIBE** (off forge/parchment/cosmic/meadow)]` вҖ” clears every ban. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; zero network/AI/mic/camera/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + WebGL2/Canvas2D only; no three.js). **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вң“ Compiled successfully in 43s`** вҶ’ Linting + type-check PASS вҶ’ reached static-gen; grep-clean вҖ” no `1011`/`fm-aurora` warning or error in the build log, `"use client"` line 1, back-link present); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; infra, not code вҖ” identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **Headless-VERIFIED** (the rare win): 11 tests on `fm.ts` pass вҖ” Bessel `J0(0)=1`/`J1(0)=0` + first zeros (вүҲ2.4048 / 3.8317), spectral bloom + rising centroid with the modulation index, `snapRatio`/`axisToModIndex`/`tiltToTimbre` range mapping, `midiToHz(69)=440`. **NOT ear/GPU-verified** (no audio/WebGL2 device in the box вҖ” unverified: audible voice balance, ADSR feel, that the limiter prevents clipping, the live `DeviceOrientationEvent`/iOS-permission flow, and shader execution on a real GPU; the pointer-drag + Canvas2D + auto-demo fallbacks are the safety net). **Winner of an adult WIDE 3-explorer pure-timbre fire**; banked **`1013-mantra-glass` вӯҗ RESURRECT-FIRST (adult)** вҖ” Karel's **real piano recording ring-modulated Г  la Stockhausen *Mantra* (1970)**: a swept sine carrier turns his piano into shimmering metallic glass, sum/difference sidebands blooming in a WebGL2 crystalline spectrum (carrier-driven `GainNode` multiplication, dual swept carriers, ~70s auto-sweep, bulletproof `OfflineAudioContext` synth-piano fallback + emerald/amber source notice) вҖ” uniquely discharges the standing **"use his actual music"** directive + a pianist-personal "huh" surprise; ship next adult cycle. Plus **`1012-fold-tide`** вҖ” a **West-Coast wavefolder** (Buchla 259/292, Serge wave multipliers; grep-0Г—) driven by your **mic** (sing softвҶ’pure sine, loudвҶ’folded harmonic blooms in a live oscilloscope), AudioWorklet+WaveShaper fallback. Both `cp`'d to scratchpad `dream-losers-583/` then `rm -rf`'d before the authoritative winner-only build (NOT committed); seeds вҶ’ IDEAS В§583. ## Cycle 582 вҖ” **kids** build В· WIDE, 3 divergent explorers, shipped 1

[/dream/1008-kids-hand-cloud](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1008-kids-hand-cloud) вҖ” **"Hand Cloud": wave your bare hands in front of the webcam to conduct a glowing, singing cloud of light вҖ” no touching the screen. Open your hand and the cloud blooms; pinch (thumb + index) and the particles gather into a bright chiming star.** `demoable` (build-checked + lint/type clean; not GPU/camera/CDN-verified) В· Cycle 582 (kids, **WIDE** fire вҖ” winner of 3 orthogonal explorers: this cameraГ—WebGPU-particles vs `1009-kids-balloon-breath` micГ—SVGГ—verlet vs `1010-kids-tide-pool` tiltГ—WebGPU-shallow-water). **For**: kids (4+) / bright aurora cloud / **camera HAND-TRACKING** input (MediaPipe `HandLandmarker`, runtime CDN `import()`, no package.json change вҖ” breaks the lab's touch reflex; 0Г— in the last-10 window) / **WebGPU `@compute` particle field** output (Canvas2D CPU fallback) / luminous violet-cyan. **The directest answer to JURY 2026-06-27 #3** ("WebGPU compute collapsed 6Г—вҶ’1Г— вҖҰ force a real GPU-compute path; make the sim the resonating BODY") rebuilt on the **kids** lane, and the freshest *input* of the window (camera-hands, off the 4Г— pointer/touch reflex). **How it works:** MediaPipe reads up to 2 hands Г— 21 3D landmarks over the webcam вҶ’ per hand we derive attractor points (wrist + 5 fingertips), an **openness** value (fingertip spread / palm width) and a **pinch** value (thumb-tipвҶ”index-tip / palm width). **GPU path (the swing):** a real WGSL `@compute @workgroup_size(64)` kernel advects **120k particles** in a storage buffer вҖ” curl-noise flow + pull/swirl toward the nearest hand attractor (pinch вҶ’ a single strong gather point) вҖ” then an instanced additive render pipeline draws them; open palm raises pull+swirl (bloom), pinch raises swirl hard (gatherвҶ’star). **Fallback (first-class):** no WebGPU вҶ’ a **~3.2k-particle CPU integrator with the same forces** drives an additive (`lighter`) Canvas2D trail; no camera / CDN model / permission вҶ’ **ghost-hand Lissajous auto-demo** (~2s) drifts invisible hands so the cloud always lives and sings; no audio вҶ’ `text-rose-300` notice, visuals still animate. **Audio (no wrong notes):** field features map to a **C-major-pentatonic** voice pool over a soft C2+G2 drone вҖ” cloud centroid height вҶ’ pitch, swirl-energy EMA вҶ’ brightness/density, a pinch rings a bright bell an octave up; kids-safe `masterGain вүӨ0.22 вҶ’ lowpass вүӨ6500Hz вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor(вҲ’10/20)`, ramped, silent at rest. **Imperative ref-driven render loop** (no per-frame setState вҖ” avoids the 60-re-renders/sec antipattern). **Ambition honest 3/5** (#1 never-used technique [first MediaPipe-hand-tracking вҶ’ WebGPU-`@compute` particle field in the lab; prior camera-hand kids pieces 234/258/290 were Canvas2D fingertip-sparkles, never a 120k GPU-compute curl-noise cloud] В· #2 вүҘ3 subsystems [camera + hand-tracking + WebGPU-compute sim + pentatonic synth = 4] В· #3 named refs [**MediaPipe Hands** (Google, on-device 21-landmark real-time); **Bridson curl-noise** (SIGGRAPH 2007); **Memo Akten** particle-flow]; #5 also arguably hit вҖ” RESEARCH В§582 today). **diversity:** `banned=[pointer/touch-as-primary-input (4Г—), computer-keyboard/MIDI (JURY), raw-WebGL2-as-primary-output (6Г—), Canvas2D-AND-flat-fragment-shader-only (JURY)]` В· `picked=[**camera-hand-tracking INPUT** (fresh 0Г—/10, breaks the touch reflex), **WebGPU-compute particle-field OUTPUT** (the scarce jury-encouraged compute surface вҖ” rebuilds the 6Г—вҶ’1Г— collapse, NOT raw-WebGL2), **curl-noise GPU particle-advection TECHNIQUE**, **bright-aurora-cloud kids VIBE**]` вҖ” clears every ban. **Love-aligned:** the loved camera/hand-kids cluster (`234-kids-hand-creature`вқӨпёҸ/`104-kids-mirror-draw`вқӨпёҸ/`101-camera-song`вқӨпёҸ/`217-dance-avatar`вқӨпёҸ) + the loved GPU-particle-cloud cluster (`130-tsl-particle-compute`вқӨпёҸ/`236-particle-life-song`вқӨпёҸ/`262-aurora-particle`вқӨпёҸ). **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; camera + CDN model are the only network surface вҖ” no FAL/cost/AI-image/mic); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + WebGPU/Canvas2D + CDN script only; no three.js). **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вң“ Compiled successfully in 113s`** вҶ’ Linting + type-check PASS [zero warnings in the dream zone] вҶ’ reached `Collecting page data`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; infra, not code вҖ” identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT GPU/camera/CDN-verified** (no WebGPU/camera device + no CDN egress in the box вҖ” unverified: live hand-tracking accuracy, 60fps at 120k particles on real silicon, the CDN model load itself; the ghost-hand Canvas2D auto-demo guarantees a moving/singing glance regardless). ## Cycle 581 вҖ” **adult** build В· DEEP, 2 engine approaches [WebGPU-compute vs deterministic-modal], shipped 1

[/dream/1006-modal-anvil](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1006-modal-anvil) вҖ” **"Modal Anvil": strike a row of glowing metal plates in a dark forge вҖ” the sound you hear is the LITERAL motion of a GPU-simulated vibrating plate, read back at a pickup point; a hard strike blooms sharp then glides DOWN in pitch as it rings, the way real bronze does.** `demoable` (build-checked + lint/type clean; not GPU/ear-verified) В· Cycle 581 (adult, **DEEP** fire вҖ” winner of 2 engine approaches: this genuine WebGPU-`@compute` finite-difference plate w/ GPUвҶ’audio readback vs. `1007-modal-anvil-modal` the deterministic non-linear modal bank + Chladni viz). **For**: adult / dark industrial forge ritual / **pointer/touch STRIKE** input (velocity = strike force; ~2s-idle ghost-hammer auto-demo) / raw **WebGL2** lit-metal heightfield (Canvas2D fallback) / molten-metal charcoalвҶ’white-hot. **The directest answer to JURY 2026-06-27 #3** ("WebGPU compute collapsed 6Г—вҶ’1Г— вҖҰ force a real GPU-compute path; make the sim the instrument's resonating BODY") and the praised **"sound IS physics" lane (960-cristal-friction / 970-tension-gong)** вҖ” and the **deepening В§579's banked `1001-modal-anvil` explicitly promised** ("cycle-2 = close the GPUвҶ’audio readback loop"). Deliberately retires the jury-banned adult formula (NOT a music-theory explainer, NOT keyboard input, NOT ink-on-parchment, NOT flat-Canvas2D-only). **The PDE:** a damped stiff KirchhoffвҖ“Love thin plate `u_tt = -ОәВІВ·вҲҮвҒҙu вҲ’ 2ПғвӮҖВ·u_t + ПғвӮҒВ·вҲҮВІu_t + excitation` (biharmonic вҲҮвҒҙ = discrete Laplacian twice вҶ’ the inharmonic *metal* spectrum; ПғвӮҖ overall ring, ПғвӮҒ frequency-dependent so bright modes decay first). **The non-linear pitch-bloom (genuinely emergent, no scripted envelope):** the stiffness/tension coefficient is scaled by `(1 + ОІВ·E)` where E is the plate's running normalised vibrational energy вҖ” a hard strike вҶ’ high E вҶ’ higher effective ОәВІ вҶ’ sharper pitch at impact, gliding down as energy decays (von KГЎrmГЎn tension modulation); stability via `E`-clamp + a hard in-shader `k2 вүӨ 0.052` clamp. **GPU path (the swing):** a real WGSL `@compute` shader (9 GPU markers grep-verified вҖ” `@compute`/`@workgroup_size`/`createComputePipeline`/`requestAdapter`/`mapAsync`) runs the FD update over a 96Г—96 grid in **ping-ponged prev/curr/next storage buffers**, **800 substeps/frame** (~48k pickup samples/s вүҲ audio rate), the shader appending one real per-substep pickup sample via an atomic slot counter; **the GPUвҶ’audio loop:** each frame async-`mapAsync` reads that block of real simulated pickup samples (one frame behind, non-blocking), sums the 4 plates, and posts it to an **AudioWorklet** ring-buffer that resamples it to the hardware rate вҖ” so the speaker cone literally follows the simulated plate (honest compromise, documented: per-frame-block delivery, not per-sample round-trips). **Fallback (the verification-debt mitigant вҖ” first-class, not degraded):** no WebGPU вҶ’ a **full per-sample CPU finite-difference plate runs inside the AudioWorklet** (34Г—34 grid, same PDE + same non-linear tension term + same k2 clamp), so the audio is STILL real plate physics that self-oscillates + decays, driving the same render вҖ” selected automatically by feature detection; no WebGL2 вҶ’ Canvas2D field; no Web Audio вҶ’ `text-rose-300` notice, visuals still animate. **Audio safety:** readback DC-blocked + soft-clipped in the worklet, `gain 0.28 вҶ’ lowpass ~7kHz вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor(вҲ’12dB/16:1) вҶ’ destination`; silent at rest. **Ambition honest 4/5** (#1 never-used technique [a genuine WebGPU `@compute` FD acoustic plate as the resonating BODY with a GPUвҶ’audio readback loop вҖ” grep-0Г— in the lab; prior compute pieces 988/992 were particle sims, never an FD plate read back to audio] В· #2 вүҘ4 subsystems [pointer-strike input + WebGPU-compute FD plate sim + GPUвҶ’audio worklet readback + WebGL2 lit-metal render] В· #3 named refs [**Stefan Bilbao, _Numerical Sound Synthesis_** (Wiley 2009, FD plate scheme); KirchhoffвҖ“Love / von KГЎrmГЎn non-linear plate; **arXiv:2603.10240** "nlm: Real-Time Non-linear Modal Synthesis" Mar 2026; **arXiv:2505.05940** Diaz & Sandler, "Fast Differentiable Modal Simulation of Non-linear вҖҰ Plates", DAFx 2025] В· #5 in-README dated RESEARCH В§581 citation). #4 NOT claimed (single-cycle ship; multi-cycle deepening seeded). **Source chain (visible in STATE):** RESEARCH В§581 (this week's cs.SD frontier is *entirely* neural вҖ” TTS/codecs/music-gen, zero physical wave-propagation synthesis вҖ” so a transparent GPU-physics plate is the contrarian on-mandate build) + the В§579 nlm anchor вҶ’ JURY 2026-06-27 #3 (GPU-compute scarcity) вҶ’ this adult **DEEP** fire. **diversity:** `banned=[computer-keyboard/MIDI-as-primary-adult-input (JURY), Canvas2D-AND-flat-fragment-shader-ONLY вҶ’ force GPU-compute/3D (JURY), explainable-inverse-of-opaque-neural conceptual move (JURY), engraved-manuscript/ink-on-parchment adult vibe (JURY)]` В· `picked=[**pointer/touch-STRIKE INPUT** (not keyboard), **WebGPU-compute FD plate + GPUвҶ’audio readback OUTPUT** (the scarce jury-encouraged compute surface, rebuilding the 6Г—вҶ’1Г— collapse вҖ” NOT flat-Canvas2D/fragment-only), **non-linear FD-plate physical-modeling TECHNIQUE** (pure timbre/percussion, NOT a music-theory explainer), **dark-industrial molten-forge VIBE** (NOT parchment/cosmic/meadow)]` вҖ” clears every ban. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; no network/AI/mic/camera/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + WebGL2 + WebGPU only; no three.js). **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вң“ Compiled successfully in 2.4min`** вҶ’ Linting + type-check PASS вҶ’ reached **`Collecting page data`**; scoped `next lint --dir src/app/dream/1006-modal-anvil` вҶ’ **"вң” No ESLint warnings or errors"**; grep-clean вҖ” no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`@ts-nocheck`/api-route/three.js/banned `text-white/30вҖ“50`, `"use client"` line 1, back-link present); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; infra, not code вҖ” identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT GPU/ear-verified** (no WebGPU/audio device in the box вҖ” unverified: absolute loudness + pickup/summing gains, the exact *amount* of pitch-bloom + ring/decay times, whether 4 plates Г— 800 substeps Г— 96ВІ holds 60fps on a real GPU [ring underruns gracefully to silence if not], and the resample ratio under non-48kHz hardware; the per-sample CPU-worklet FD fallback guarantees a *real-physics* sounding artifact even with no WebGPU, and the ghost-hammer auto-demo guarantees a moving/sounding glance). **Winner of an adult DEEP 2-approach fire**; its `modes.ts` math is unit-checked with real numbers (inharmonic 220/445/655/821/880 Hz; a force-1.0 centre strike droops the fundamental ~232.5вҶ’225.5 Hz over 3s) вҖ” the directest **verification-debt** payer (jury's #1 liability), ship on a cycle that prioritises a provable engine; ## (Cycle 579 вҖ” **adult** build В· WIDE, 3 explorers [touch / live-data / mic], shipped 1)

[/dream/1002-sun-organ](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1002-sun-organ) вҖ” **"Sun Organ": Resonance plays the Sun вҖ” an endless, non-looping ambient drone + aurora composed in real time from LIVE NOAA space-weather data, so the music is literally different every minute because it tracks the actual solar wind and Earth's magnetic field right now.** `demoable` В· Cycle 579 (adult, WIDE fire вҖ” winner of 3 explorers; chosen on the jury's #1 standing liability, verification debt вҖ” the only build with a core claim verified in-box, and the cleanest 06:30 artifact: it auto-plays with zero permission and no GPU-compile risk). **For**: adult / **live external data** input (NOAA SWPC + synthetic fallback; no kbd / mic / camera / pointer) / **raw WebGL2 aurora curtain** (Canvas2D fallback) / luminous calm, grounded in real data. **Real-world-data sonification + long-form-with-memory вҖ” two thin lab categories at once, and the freshest concept in months (breaks the spatial-rooms + struck-string groove).** On Start (or ~2s idle auto-start) it fetches three CORS-open, key-less NOAA SWPC JSON feeds вҖ” solar-wind **plasma** (speed/density), **mag** (Bz), **planetary K-index** (Kp) вҖ” and polls every 60s (**live fetch verified end-to-end in-environment: 505.2 km/s, Bz +0.35 nT, Kp 2 on 2026-06-28**; defensive parsing handles both the array-of-arrays plasma/mag shape and the array-of-objects Kp shape). **Mapping** (calm, no wrong notes): solar-wind speed вҶ’ texture agitation + aurora brightness; **Bz southward вҶ’ tension** (low drone opens, detuned beating); density вҶ’ number of audible voices; Kp вҶ’ a rising high-shimmer swell + aurora height. **Long-form memory:** a wandering tonal centre that drifts slowly + a slow "breath" LFO mean the harmonic state keeps evolving even when the data is steady вҖ” it never loops, different at minute 5 than minute 1; voices are an open just-intoned Dorian-ish field (`1, 9/8, 5/4, 4/3, 3/2, 5/3, 16/9, 2, 9/4`) over a feedback-delay smear. **Degrades** to a synthetic solar-wind generator (summed sines + bounded random walks) with an `text-amber-300/95` notice if the feed is unreachable вҖ” audio + visual run with zero network. Refs: Helioradar AV (live NOAA вҶ’ infinite ambient, 2026); NASA SVS "Helio Big Year" sonifications; DATASONICA (2026 Data Sonification Award). Research-chained to RESEARCH В§579. Files: `page.tsx` (809 lines), `README.md`. **Two siblings explored + banked (IDEAS В§579):** `1001-modal-anvil` вӯҗ RESURRECT-FIRST adult (strike a GPU-compute non-linear-modal metal plate вҖ” real `@compute` WGSL finite-difference plate sim as the resonating body, partials bend pitch with strike force; the directest answer to jury #3) + `1003-voice-nebula` (sing вҶ’ your voice scattered into a 24k-particle granular nebula + self-harmonized choir).

## (Cycle 578 вҖ” **kids** build В· WIDE, 3 explorers [mic / camera / touch], shipped 1)

[/dream/1000-kids-bubble-harp](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/1000-kids-bubble-harp) вҖ” **"Bubble Harp": a calm underwater aquarium of glowing bubbles, each a REAL plucked string вҖ” tap one and it rings + wobbles + blooms; drag across several to strum a glissando harp.** `demoable` В· Cycle 578 (kids, WIDE fire вҖ” winner of 3 explorers; chosen on verification debt вҖ” the only no-permission, instantly-verifiable one). **For**: kids (4+) / **touch tap + drag** input / **raw WebGL2** (Canvas2D fallback) / calm tealвҶ’amber aquarium. **The "sound is real physics" lane (960/970) ported to a 4-year-old:** every bubble is a genuine **Karplus-Strong** plucked string вҖ” an AudioWorklet (loaded self-contained via Blob URL) runs the real 1983 delay-line + averaging-filter feedback algorithm excited by a soft noise burst (an offline-buffer fallback uses the same loop when the worklet is unavailable), NOT a sampled or oscillator pluck. **Mapping:** 16 bubbles tuned to **D-major pentatonic** across 3 octaves (size вҶ” pitch, big = low/long, no wrong notes); tap вҶ’ pluck + soft-body squash-and-stretch wobble + glow bloom; drag вҶ’ per-bubble glissando strum (re-pluck lockout); light soft-body collisions (squash, never a violent pop), off-top respawn for infinite calm play; always-on drone + filtered-noise water pad so it's never silent. **Kids-safe:** `gain 0.26 вҶ’ lowpass 6500 вҶ’ comp(вҲ’10/20:1)`, вҲҡ-voice normalization so mashing taps stays safe, 72px Start gesture-gates the AudioContext + worklet synchronously (iOS). After ~1.8s idle a ghost-finger auto-demo taps + strums through the identical pipeline. Ref: Karplus & Strong, "Digital Synthesis of Plucked-String and Drum Timbres" (Computer Music Journal, 1983). Files: `page.tsx` (852 lines, inline KS worklet), `README.md`. **Two siblings explored + banked (IDEAS В§578):** `998-kids-firefly-hum` вӯҗ (hum вҶ’ WebGPU-compute firefly flock, the flock's coordination IS the chord вҖ” research-chained to arXiv:2606.24958) + `999-kids-shadow-zoo` (your camera shadow becomes a singing creature, dependency-free frame-diff silhouette).

## (Cycle 576 вҖ” **kids** build В· DEEP, 2 engine approaches, shipped 1)

[/dream/995-kids-moon-trampoline](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/995-kids-moon-trampoline) вҖ” **"Moon Trampoline": tilt a tablet like a tray and roll a glowing moon-ball across a springy TRAMPOLINE OF STARS вҖ” the stretching cloth itself rings like a soft drum, because the sheet's own simulated vibration modes ARE the sound.** `demoable` В· Cycle 576 (kids, DEEP fire вҖ” winner of 2 engine approaches; resurrects the В§574 вӯҗ `989-kids-star-cloth` seed). **For**: kids (4+) / **device-tilt** input / **hand-written TRUE-3D WebGL2** (the lab's FIRST true-3D scene-graph build вҖ” jury 2026-06-27: "true 3D scene-graph work is 0Г—") / calm indigo starry-night bedtime. **The most literal "the physical simulation IS the resonating body"** вҖ” the 960-cristal-friction "timbre is physics" standard ported to a 4-year-old toy. **Physics:** a 24Г—24 Provot mass-spring cloth (structural + shear + bend springs, Verlet + PBD relaxation passes + Provot's over-elongation cap, four corners pinned) on the CPU/main thread вҖ” **no WebGPU dependency, so it runs on any phone or laptop browser** (the verification-safe twin of the banked WebGPU sibling). A moon-ball rolls under tilt and dents the sheet (sphere-vs-cloth push-out). **Render:** own `perspective`/`lookAt` matrices (no three.js), a camera that gently orbits so the sheet visibly stretches toward/away in depth вҖ” reads as a real 3D scene, gold/white star-glints at the nodes over a deep-indigo starfield, a soft additive moon-ball. **Audio (Eb-major lullaby, no wrong notes):** membrane-mode synthesis вҖ” **dent depth bends the low fundamental DOWN** (real tension-modulation physics: partials shift at large membrane amplitude, per Avanzini & Marogna), **ripple energy** opens higher drum-skin modes (partials вүҲ1/1.59/2.14/2.30/2.65), **settle** = a sustained warm chord, **bounce** = a soft bloom; always-on Eb+Bb drone (never silent), kids-safe `gain вүӨ0.26 вҶ’ lowpass 6500 вҶ’ comp(вҲ’10/20:1)`, вүҘ30ms attacks, ~12-min goodnight fade. **Input chain:** `DeviceOrientationEvent` (iOS `requestPermission()` inside the Start tap) вҶ’ pointer-drag вҶ’ arrow keys/space вҶ’ ~2s-idle auto-demo (moon drifts a slow circle so it's always moving + singing). Refs: Provot (1995) mass-spring cloth; Avanzini & Marogna membrane-percussion synthesis; arXiv:2507.11794 (WebGPU cloth feasibility). Files: `page.tsx`, `cloth.ts`, `renderer.ts`, `gl-math.ts`, `audio.ts`, `README.md`.

a flick injects a Gaussian compression pulse that propagates, reflects off both pinned ends, and relaxes into stationary nodes/antinodes. **Audio = the physics:** the displacement field is projected onto the fixedвҖ“fixed mode shapes `sin(nПҖi/N)` (n=1..8) driving an additive harmonic-series oscillator bank that swells when excited and decays as the wave damps вҖ” the fundamental literally IS the spring's resonance; all prior waves transverse/2D-surface] В· #2 вүҘ3 subsystems [touch-flick input + 1-D longitudinal spring sim + mode-projection additive synth + hand-written true-3D WebGL2 render = 4] В· #3 named refs [**Stefan Bilbao, _Numerical Sound Synthesis_** (FDTD physical modeling); the Physics Classroom slinky longitudinal-vs-transverse demonstration; helical-spring longitudinal modes]; #5 NOT claimed вҖ” no physical-modeling paper shipped in the last 7 days, said plainly in RESEARCH В§580). `diversity: banned=[keyboard/MIDI-primary-input (JURY), Canvas2D-AND-flat-fragment-shader-ONLY вҶ’ force GPU-compute/3D (JURY), explainable-inverse-of-opaque-neural (JURY, adult, n/a), engraved-parchment vibe (JURY, adult, n/a), warm-meadow/storybook kids vibe (over-rep 7Г—), AND soft: continuum-SURFACE-physics-sim (cloth 995 / fluid 988, kids 2Г—)] В· picked=[**touch-flick INPUT**, **hand-written TRUE-3D WebGL2 OUTPUT** (the jury-sanctioned 3D escape from the flat-2D monoculture вҖ” true-3D 1Г— recent), **longitudinal-standing-wave TECHNIQUE** (lab-first, 1-D coil NOT a 2D continuum surface, so it dodges the kids surface-sim soft-rut), **bright-rainbow-playground VIBE** (off warm-meadow/parchment/cosmic)]` вҖ” clears every ban. **Research-first path (a):** RESEARCH В§580's dive found this week's cs.SD frontier is entirely neural (TTS/codecs/music-gen) with ZERO physical wave-propagation synthesis вҶ’ a transparent "see-the-wave-that-makes-the-sound" instrument is the contrarian on-mandate build (the praised "sound IS physics" lane: 960/970/995). **Winner of a kids DEEP 2-approach fire**; ## (Cycle 575 вҖ” **adult** build В· DEEP, 3 walk-the-room explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/992-dream-house](/dream/992-dream-house)** вҖ” Dream House: **walk your body through a field of sustained just-intoned sine drones вҖ” move even slightly and some overtones bloom while others fade, so the music is pure standing-wave timbre you sculpt with your position. No notes, no wrong notes.** `demoable` В· Cycle 575 (adult / **body-pose + pointer INPUT** вҖ” MediaPipe Pose torso centroid, pointer/touch fallback / **WebGPU particle field** (WGSL, WebGL2вҶ’Canvas2D fallback) / **just-intonation drone + spatial-well spectral sculpt + HRTF** TECH / **Marian Zazeela magenta/violet light** vibe). **A deliberate browser port of La Monte Young & Marian Zazeela's _Dream House_** (MELA Foundation, TriBeCa вҖ” on view through 2026-06-21) and the **DEEP extension of the lab's only 5/5, `977-echo-room-gpu`**, exactly as JURY 2026-06-27 asked ("extend 977 into a multi-cycle spatial instrument; retire the explainable-inverse formula; do pure timbre / spatial presence, not a music-theory explainer"). **Eight permanently-running sine `OscillatorNode`s** at small-integer just ratios (1/1, 9/8, 5/4, 4/3, 3/2, 7/4, 2/1, 9/4) over a ~72.6 Hz body-felt fundamental вҖ” every interval beatless by construction, so any subset is consonant; the partials never stop (a drone you sculpt, not notes you trigger). **Position sculpts the spectrum:** each partial owns a spatial Gaussian "well"; your position sets per-partial gain by proximity (normalized, with a floor so it's never silent), so a small move re-balances which overtones dominate; faint position-dependent detuned twin oscillators (~0.06вҖ“1.4 Hz) produce the shifting standing-wave beats that are the installation's signature; all changes `setTargetAtTime`-smoothed (zero clicks). **HRTF:** one AudioContext, the performer is the AudioListener, each partial sits at a fixed 3D position via an HRTF `PannerNode` вҖ” as you move, the whole field re-pans around you (you walk *among* the sine sources). Bus вҶ’ 6 kHz lowpass вҶ’ compressor/limiter вҶ’ ~1.6 s fade-in master so the eight-voice cluster never clips. "Leave a resonance" freezes a spectral spot as a glowing marker you can walk back to. Renders as Zazeela-magenta calligraphic glow blooms tracking each partial's amplitude. **Ambition floor 4/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [pose/pointer input + 8-voice just-intonation drone engine + spatial-well spectral sculpt + HRTF spatialization + WebGPU particle render = 5] В· #3 named refs [**La Monte Young & Marian Zazeela, _Dream House_**, MELA, through 2026-06-21; ## (Cycle 574 вҖ” **kids** build В· WIDE, 3 GPU-compute/3D explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/988-kids-jelly-pond](/dream/988-kids-jelly-pond)** вҖ” Sing the Pond: **a 4-year-old drags a finger across a glowing pond of thousands of REAL GPU-simulated water particles вҖ” stirring, pooling, splashing вҖ” and the water's own motion is the instrument.** `demoable` В· Cycle 574 (kids 4+ / **touch/pointer-drag INPUT** / **WebGPU compute Position-Based-Fluids** вҖ” a real GPU fluid solver, NOT a Canvas2D loop and NOT a single flat fragment shader / **fluid-motion вҶ’ synth mapping** / sunlit amber-on-teal pond vibe). **The directest answer to JURY 2026-06-27's loudest structural finding** вҖ” "WebGPU compute collapsed 6Г—вҶ’1Г—, 14 of 15 builds render flat 2D; force a real GPU-compute or 3D path вҖ” a fluid / particle sim that is the instrument's resonating BODY, not a 2D plot you read a pitch off." Here the sim is the body: each frame runs **5 WGSL compute passes over ~4,096 particles** вҖ” `predict` (integrate the finger's radial push) вҶ’ `buildGrid` (atomic spatial-hash neighbour search) вҶ’ `computeDensity` (poly6 density + the PBF constraint scalar О») вҶ’ `solve` (iterative position correction with an s_corr tensile term, several iterations) вҶ’ `finalize` (round-pond boundary, velocity from position-delta, XSPH damping, and **GPU-atomic accumulation of motion stats** вҖ” avg/peak speed, pooled density under the finger, splash flag вҖ” copied back in an 8-word buffer to drive audio). **The water plays the music:** stir-speed/local velocity вҶ’ a soft continuous shimmer voice in **F-Lydian / major-pentatonic** (faster water climbs, always in key вҖ” no wrong notes); a splash (fast drag) вҶ’ a gentle marimba sparkle arpeggio; pooled density under the finger вҶ’ a fuller/lower chord when calm, brighter/sparser when scattered; an always-on water-drone keeps it never-silent. Renders the simulated positions as warm additive metaball glints (sunlit amber on teal-green). **Kids-safe:** вүҘ72px Play gate (gesture-inits AudioContext), instant response, no fail states, `masterGain 0.26 вҶ’ lowpass 6.5kHz вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor(вҲ’10/20:1)`, attacks вүҘ30ms; **~2s-idle ghost-finger auto-demo** stirs the pond so an unattended glance both *sees* the water move and *hears* music within ~1s. **Ambition floor 3/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [touch input + WebGPU PBF compute solver + fluid-motionвҶ’chord/splash synth + GPU additive render = 4] В· #3 named refs [**Macklin & MГјller, "Position Based Fluids," SIGGRAPH 2013**; the 2026 GPU-physical-sim frontier **arXiv:2606.21753**, June 23 2026] В· #5 in-README dated **RESEARCH В§574** вҖ” today's dive; dated-research streak unbroken). `diversity: banned=[Canvas2D-as-PRIMARY-OUTPUT (4Г—/10 last-10 вҖ” AT audit cap), flat-fragment-shader-only output (JURY вҖ” force GPU-compute/3D), WebGL2-as-primary (5Г—/10 вҖ” over soft cap), computer-keyboard/MIDI input (JURY adult-ban + audit), "explainable-inverse-of-opaque-neural-frontier" technique (JURY 4Г—), engraved-manuscript/parchment vibe (JURY вҖ” n/a kids), pentatonic-no-wrong-notes-as-the-whole-idea (JURY kids ban), shake input (just used 984)] В· picked=[**WebGPU-compute PBF fluid OUTPUT** (clears the 2D monoculture, answers JURY #3, rebuilds the scarce GPU-compute capability вҖ” 1Г—/10), **touch-drag INPUT** (0Г— in the last-10 window; the kid-natural sensor), **physical-simulation-as-the-resonating-body TECH** (NOT a harmony explainer, NOT a neural inversion), **sunlit-pond VIBE** (warm, not cosmic)]` вҖ” clears every ban. **Research-first path (a):** today's В§574 dive (the 2026 GPU frontier is heterogeneous physical-sim-as-instrument) drove all three briefs; ## (Cycle 573 вҖ” **adult** build В· WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/986-empty-words](/dream/986-empty-words)** вҖ” Empty Words: **paste any text вҖ” a poem, an email, Thoreau вҖ” and a transparent engine *sets it to music* deterministically: vowels pick scale degrees of a real mode, stress lands downbeats, punctuation breathes and cadences, and every note shows you the letter that caused it.** `demoable` В· Cycle 573 (adult composers / **text-paste INPUT** вҖ” a `<textarea>`, the lab's first text-as-score input, 0Г— ever / **raw-WebGL2 engraved-manuscript glyph field**, Canvas2D fallback / **deterministic rule-based text-setting** вҖ” a pure `compose(text, mode)` function, no model, fully offline / **engraved ink-on-charcoal manuscript** vibe, off cosmic-glow). **The explainable, deterministic INVERSE of the 2026 neural textвҶ’music frontier** (Text2midi / MeloTrans / diffusion captionвҶ’MIDI вҖ” all opaque black boxes): here the same text *always* yields the same piece and the engine names *why* each note sounds. **Six vowels (a e i o u y) map across the seven degrees of a chosen real mode** (D Dorian default В· A Aeolian В· C Ionian В· F Lydian вҖ” selectable), ordered by vowel openness for a singable contour; **stressed/long/capitalized syllables вҶ’ longer downbeat durations**, unstressed вҶ’ short passing tones; **punctuation вҶ’ rhythm & cadence** (comma = breath rest, period = phrase cadence resolving toward the tonic, `!`/`?` = leap/raised tension), newlines = new phrase, capitalization вҶ’ louder dynamics; an always-on diatonic **harmonic bed** keeps the sung melody consonant. A live **"now singing"** readout names the exact vowel/stress/mark cause of every note вҖ” explainability as a first-class feature, so a composer can interrogate the logic. **Determinism is real and tested:** no `Math.random()` touches which notes play or when (only a bounded Вұ4-cent cosmetic timbre detune); a Node dry-run over the default passage + edge cases (empty string, all-punctuation, a 400-word paragraph, unicode/accented text) never threw, always produced вүҘ1 pitched note, and was **byte-identical across two runs in all four modes** вҖ” so the piece is reproducible AND fully **hand-verifiable by typing**, with zero hardware. **Four subsystems:** text tokenizer + syllable/stress heuristic В· the deterministic `textвҶ’NoteEvent[]` composer (with per-note provenance) В· a Web Audio ~25ms look-ahead scheduler with the harmonic bed В· a raw GLSL ES 3.00 WebGL2 manuscript renderer (glyph-atlas texture + procedural parchment/staff-lines/grain + amber glow on the singing token), with a Canvas2D fallback of the same look. **Ambition floor 3/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [4] В· #3 named refs [**John Cage *Empty Words*** 1974 вҖ” his dissolution of Thoreau's *Journal* into graded sound-events; **Guidonian / solmization** rule-based text-setting] В· #5 in-README dated **RESEARCH В§573** вҖ” today's dive; dated-research streak unbroken). `diversity: banned=[pointer/touch-drag-as-PRIMARY (JURY 7Г—), **keyboard/MIDI INPUT (4Г—/10 last-10 вҖ” at audit cap)**, **Canvas2D-as-PRIMARY-OUTPUT (4Г—/10 вҖ” at audit cap)**, cosmic/bioluminescent-glow ADULT vibe (JURY 4Г—), "ship-a-GPU-sim-and-pulse-a-bell" (JURY 4Г—), pentatonic-no-wrong-notes (n/a adult)] В· picked=[**text-paste INPUT** (0Г— ever вҖ” the freshest possible, clears JURY #3 non-pointer, off the at-cap keyboard/MIDI), **raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT** (healthy 3Г—/10, NOT the at-cap Canvas2D), **deterministic text-setting TECH** (sound/composition-as-object вҖ” clears JURY #2; pure music, NOT a GPU-sim-pulse-bell; lab-first technique), **engraved-manuscript VIBE** (off cosmic-glow вҖ” clears JURY #5)]` вҖ” clears every ban. **Research-first path (a):** today's В§573 dive (the 2026 text/prosodyвҶ’music frontier is uniformly opaque neural вҖ” prosodic-dynamics arXiv:2606.25369 Jun 25 / VoiceTTA 2606.26534 Jun 26 / Text2midi / MeloTrans / diffusion-symbolic 2603.00576 вҖ” motivating the explainable, authored text-setting inversion) drove the flagship brief; visible chain *today's research вҶ’ today's build*. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; zero AI/network/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + WebGL2/Canvas2D). **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: `вң“ Compiled successfully in 42s` вҶ’ Linting + type-check PASS вҶ’ reached **`Collecting page data`**; scoped `next lint` on the folder вҶ’ **"No ESLint warnings or errors"**; folder grep-clean вҖ” no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`@ts-nocheck`/`use*`-helper/api-route/three.js); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; `ulimit -n` hard-capped 4096; infra, not code вҖ” identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **Verification: the strongest dent in a while** вҖ” the composition is **headless-proven deterministic** (byte-identical Node dry-run) AND fully **hand-verifiable by typing** with zero hardware (no mic/camera/accelerometer/GPU-required); the WebGL2 paint + live audio timbre + Canvas2D fallback are tsc/lint-clean and reasoned but not browser-run in the box; the syllable/stress logic is a clean heuristic, not a pronunciation dictionary (documented). Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (three orthogonal non-banned inputs вҖ” text / live-data / tilt); banked **`985-quake-choir` вӯҗ RESURRECT-FIRST (adult)** (live USGS earthquake feed вҶ’ generative modal bell-choir over a drone, WebGL2 seismographic map вҖ” the builder fetched the **real feed end-to-end: 202/202 features parsed, HTTP 200, permissive CORS**, with a seeded GR-distributed offline fallback вҖ” IDEAS В§573) + **`987-tilt-spectra`** (device-tilt вҶ’ additive spectral timbre-sculpting, WebGL2 CRT oscilloscope where the scope draws the literal output waveform вҖ” IDEAS В§573). Both returned complete + builder tsc/eslint-clean; `cp`'d to `/tmp/dream-losers-573/` then `rm -rf`'d before the winner-only build (NOT committed). ## Cycle 572 вҖ” **kids** build В· DEEP, 1 concept Г— 2 approaches, shipped 1

- **[/dream/984-kids-shake-bells](/dream/984-kids-shake-bells)** вҖ” Magic Bell Tray: **a 4-year-old SHAKES the tablet like a tray of magic handbells вҖ” and each shake rings real, physically-modeled bells that climb then descend a genuine G-Mixolydian ladder, harder shakes ringing a fuller sparkling arpeggio.** `demoable` В· Cycle 572 (kids 4+ / **off-glass accelerometer SHAKE, the non-pointer input** вҖ” *not* tilt, *not* a finger on glass / **raw-WebGL2 additive point-sprite glow field**, Canvas2D fallback / **real modal bell synthesis (inharmonic partials) walking a G-Mixolydian ladder** / warm gold-on-blue-violet night vibe). **The rare recent build Karel can VERIFY by shaking his review phone at 06:30** вҖ” a direct dent in the jury's #1 standing liability (verification debt, 4+ juries). An always-on soft G2+D3 drone keeps it never-silent; successive shakes walk a ~2-octave **G Mixolydian (G A B C D E Fвҷ®)** ladder UP then turn around and DESCEND (a rising-then-falling shimmer, not a fixed loop); shake intensity (0..1) sets both *how many* bells ring (gentle = 1вҖ“2 soft tones, big = a 3вҖ“5 bell sparkling arpeggio) and strike brightness. **Real modal bell synthesis, not samples and not a single sine** вҖ” each bell is a small bank of inharmonic partials (~1, 2, 2.4, 3, 4.5) with independent exponential decays + slight per-partial detune so the bell *beats* and shimmers; polyphony вҲҡ-normalized so a big arpeggio never clips. **Deliberately NOT a pentatonic no-wrong-notes scale and NOT a IвҖ“IVвҖ“V / VвҶ’I functional cadence** (the jury's hardest KIDS ban #1) вҖ” modal *color* via the lowered-7th Fвҷ®, a different musical idiom from the lab's recent cadence toys (957/974). **Shake-onset detection** (`motion.ts`): `accelerationIncludingGravity` low-passed to estimate gravity вҶ’ subtract вҶ’ linear-accel magnitude вҶ’ downward threshold crossing just past the peak with a ~150ms refractory вҶ’ intensity; iOS 13+ `DeviceMotionEvent.requestPermission()` fired synchronously in the Start tap; thresholds exported as top-level constants (`SHAKE_THRESHOLD`/`SHAKE_SENSITIVITY`/вҖҰ) flagged for real-device tuning. Kids-safe `master gain вүӨ0.3 вҶ’ lowpass ~6500Hz вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor(вҲ’10/20:1) вҶ’ destination`, attacks вүҘ10ms, ~12-min goodnight lull within a ~15-min cap. **Degrades fully:** sensor denied/absent вҶ’ `text-rose-300` notice but the вүҘ176px round SHAKE! button + spacebar + ~3s-idle **ghost auto-shaker** all keep it sounding & blooming with zero hardware; no WebGL2 вҶ’ Canvas2D glow fallback; neither вҶ’ notice, bells still ring; full teardown on unmount. **Ambition floor 3/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [shake-onset detector + modal bell synth + ladder walker + WebGL2 glow field = 4] В· #3 named refs [**Orff Schulwerk** handbell/body-percussion pedagogy В· modal-color-vs-functional-cadence В· the **2026 embodied-children-music** line incl. *Moving Mandala* 2025] В· #5 in-README dated RESEARCH В§572 вҖ” today's dive; dated-research streak unbroken). `diversity: banned=[pointer/touch-drag-as-PRIMARY (JURY 7Г—), cosmic/bioluminescent-glow vibe (JURY 4Г—), **pentatonic-no-wrong-notes KIDS harmony (JURY ban #1)**, "ship-a-GPU-sim-and-pulse-a-bell" (JURY 4Г—), **keyboard/MIDI INPUT (4Г—/10 last-10 вҖ” over audit cap)**, **Canvas2D-as-PRIMARY-OUTPUT (4Г—/10 вҖ” at audit cap)**] В· picked=[**off-glass accelerometer SHAKE INPUT** (0Г— recent вҖ” clears JURY #3; not the at-cap keyboard/MIDI, not camera/mic/tilt/tap), **raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT** (healthy 3Г—/10, NOT the at-cap Canvas2D), **modal-bell-ladder + G-Mixolydian TECH** (real mode вҖ” clears JURY #1; NOT pentatonic, NOT a cadence rhyme; pure synthesis, NOT a GPU-sim-pulse-bell), **warm gold-handbell-night VIBE** (off cosmic-glow)]` вҖ” clears every ban. **Research-first path (a)+(c):** today's В§572 dive (the explainable, body-first, physically-modeled inversion of 2026's opaque neural streaming music generators вҖ” arXiv:2606.24307, June 26 2026) drove both briefs AND resurrects the В§570 вӯҗ banked `kids-shake-bells` seed. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; zero AI/network/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + WebGL2/Canvas2D). **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: `вң“ Compiled successfully in 100s` вҶ’ Linting + type-check PASS вҶ’ reached **`Collecting page data`**; `ulimit -n` hard-capped 4096; infra, not code вҖ” identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT ear/sensor-verified** (no audio or accelerometer device in the build box вҖ” bell timbre, polyphony normalization, and the shake thresholds are reasoned + lint/tsc-clean but unconfirmed; ## (Cycle 571 вҖ” **adult** build В· DEEP, 1 concept Г— 2 approaches, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/983-tension-journey](/dream/983-tension-journey)** вҖ” Tension Journey: **pick an emotional ARC shape (slow arch / build-and-drop / double wave / ritual rise / calm plateau) and a 4вҖ“5 minute piece composes ITSELF to follow that exact tension curve вҖ” every chord placed for a stated numeric reason, the whole composition explainable instead of opaque.** `demoable` В· Cycle 571 (adult composers / **computer-keyboard + preset arc buttons, the non-pointer input** / **Canvas2D scrolling tension-ribbon timeline** вҖ” the legible, score-like renderer / **Elaine Chew Spiral-Array tonal-tension model used as a compositional SEARCH TARGET** / architectural ink-on-parchment vibe). **A journey-engine alternative AND the explainable, deterministic counterpart to 2026's opaque neural full-song generators** (RESEARCH В§571 вҖ” the 2026 long-form-structure frontier, PhraseLDM/Depth-Structured-Recurrence/Live-Music-Diffusion, is all *learned and black-box*; this is the transparent inverse). The engine computes Chew's **three tension measures вҖ” cloud diameter (dissonance) В· cloud momentum (tonal movement) В· tensile strain (distance from home key)** вҖ” on a real 3D Spiral-Array helix `P(k)=(sin kПҖ/2, cos kПҖ/2, kВ·0.4)`, blends them (`0.34В·diameter + 0.18В·momentum + 0.48В·strain`, strain dominant вҖ” distance-from-home is the strongest felt cue), and at each step runs a **beam search (width 3) over a real harmonic vocabulary** (diatonic triads/7ths + Neapolitan-6, German-aug-6, dim7, secondary dominants, tritone-sub, modal mixture) scoring each candidate `|tensionвҲ’target|В·1.0 + voiceLeadingВ·0.22 + repeatPenaltyВ·0.15` вҖ” so it picks the chord whose measured tension best moves the music toward the arc, then **shows the "why" tag near the playhead** (`tensile strain 0.61 В· tension +0.04`). **Long-form WITH memory (the lab's thin menu category):** stateful key/previous-CE/section tracking + seeded **mulberry32** PRNG (`DEFAULT_SEED=0x7e551042` вҶ’ a given arc+key reproduces exactly) + phrase-boundary fifth-pivot/mode-flip modulations, so **minute 5 is in a different key and character than minute 1** вҖ” not a loop. Honestly maps the arc's [0,1] shape into the vocabulary's reachable band `[0.22,0.70]` *before both scoring and drawing the guide*, so "the ribbon hugs the guide" is a like-for-like claim. Look-ahead Web-Audio scheduler (FM-ish ADSR voices + bass root + sparse melody; tension drives brightness/roughness so the arc is *audible*; `gainвҶ’lowpassвҶ’compressorвҶ’destination`, voice cap). Canvas2D: dashed target guide + filled amber achieved-ribbon (turns rose on overshoot) + violet playhead + modulation ticks + three live meters. **Auto-starts ~1.2s with the "Slow Arch"** so a zero-setup 06:30 glance hears + sees the arc develop. **The directest answer to JURY 2026-06-26 #2** ("make the SOUND the primary object вҖ” not a GPU sim you pulse a bell off of": the composition *is* the object) + **#4** (verification debt вҖ” see below) + Karel's standing priority #4 (journey-engine alternatives: EDM build-and-drop, ritual, cinematic arcs). **Ambition floor 3/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [keyboard/preset input + Spiral-Array tension engine + beam-search composer + tension-driven synth + Canvas2D ribbon = 5] В· #3 named refs [**Elaine Chew, _The Spiral Array_ (2014)**; **Herremans & Chew, "Tension ribbons", TENOR 2016**; **Herremans & Chew, _MorpheuS_, IEEE TAC**] В· #5 in-README dated RESEARCH В§571 вҖ” today's dive; dated-research streak unbroken). The *tension model specifically* (cloud diameter/momentum/tensile strain as a generative target) is lab-first вҖ” `370-tonal-map` used only Chew's center-of-effect/tonal-focus for modulation *reading*, never the three tension measures nor as a *compositional* target (#1 plausible, claimed cautiously). `diversity: banned=[pointer/touch-drag-as-PRIMARY (JURY 7Г—), cosmic/bioluminescent-glow ADULT vibe (JURY 4Г—), "ship-a-GPU-sim-and-pulse-a-bell" (JURY 4Г—), pentatonic-no-wrong-notes (n/a adult)] В· picked=[**keyboard + preset-button INPUT** (non-pointer вҖ” clears JURY #3; the instrument is the autonomous engine, not a finger), **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (jury-blessed legitimate, "earns its place"; the legible score-like renderer, NOT the WebGPU pile), **Spiral-Array tension-as-search-target TECH** (sound/composition-as-object вҖ” clears JURY #2; pure music, NOT a GPU-sim-pulse-bell), **architectural ink-on-parchment VIBE** (off cosmic-glow)]` вҖ” clears every ban. **Research-first path (a):** today's В§571 dive (the explainable-tension inversion of the opaque 2026 long-form frontier) drove both briefs. **Dents the jury's #1 standing liability (verification debt, 4+ juries):** uniquely among recent ships, the engine was **headless-VERIFIED** вҖ” run across all 5 arcs at 110 chords, **mean tension-vs-target error вүҲ 0.026вҖ“0.033** (max вүҲ 0.11вҖ“0.15 on the 0вҖ“1 scale) and **5 distinct keys per piece** вҖ” empirical evidence the composer tracks the arc and minute 5 вү  minute 1 (the *audible* brightness/roughness with tension is reasoned from the audio code, not a listening test). **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; zero AI/network/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + Canvas2D). **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: `вң“ Compiled successfully` вҶ’ Linting + type-check PASS вҶ’ reached **`Collecting page data`**; ## (Cycle 570 вҖ” **kids** build В· WIDE, 3 orthogonal non-pointer/real-harmony explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/981-kids-happy-sad-tree](/dream/981-kids-happy-sad-tree)** вҖ” Happy / Sad Tree: **a 4-year-old taps glowing fruit on a singing tree, then flips ONE big вҳҖпёҸ/рҹҢҷ switch вҖ” and the SAME song, SAME taps suddenly feel happy or tender as the whole world flips between real parallel C-major and C-minor.** `demoable` В· Cycle 570 (kids 4+ / **discrete touch-TAP** вүҘ68px fruit вҖ” *not* drag, dodges the JURY 7Г— pointer-drag ban / **raw-WebGL2 sky fragment-shader** goldвҶ”indigo mode crossfade, Canvas2D gradient fallback / **parallel majorвҶ”minor mode-flip with voice-led chord re-voicing** / bright gold/indigo storybook vibe). **The single most literal "feel real harmony" kids toy in the lab вҖ” and the most ROBUST/verifiable one (zero permissions: no mic, no camera, no accelerometer, no GPU-required вҶ’ it plays instantly on any phone/laptop at 06:30).** An always-on warm pad holds a **IвҖ“viвҖ“IVвҖ“V** progression (in minor **iвҖ“VIвҖ“ivвҖ“v** вҖ” same roman functions, same bass roots; only the chord *quality* changes). The giant вҳҖпёҸ/рҹҢҷ toggle flips the world **parallel C-major вҶ” C-natural-minor**: the held pad does NOT restart вҖ” each voice **glides to its nearest chord tone in the new mode over ~400ms** (true voice leading, the core technique) while the WebGL2 sky eases warm-goldвҶ”cool-indigo over ~600ms, so the world *melts* from happy to tender. **Real diatonic tonal harmony, explicitly NOT a pentatonic no-wrong-notes safety scale** (the jury's hardest KIDS ban, #1) вҖ” the seven fruit are scale degrees 1вҖ“7 and **taps quantize to the *current* mode's diatonic scale**, so the lowered 3rd/6th/7th (exactly where the feeling lives) are in play yet there are still no wrong notes. Idle ghost auto-player taps a phrase + breathes between modes every ~8s so a silent glance demos the whole idea; ~15-min gentle fade; kids-safe `gain вүӨ0.3 вҶ’ lowpass ~6500Hz вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor`. **Named ref: Kate Hevner's mode/affect experiments (1935вҖ“37)** (major=bright/happy, minor=tender, *independent of melody*). **Ambition floor 3/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [discrete-tap input + parallel-mode harmony engine w/ voice-led re-voicing + diatonic pluck synth + WebGL2 sky shader = 4] В· #3 named ref [Hevner 1935вҖ“37] В· #5 in-README dated RESEARCH В§570 вҖ” today's dive: MDPI *IJERPH* 2026 child mode-affect review + *Applied Sciences* 2026 key/modeвҶ’emotion-in-piano; in-README dated-research streak unbroken). `diversity: banned=[pointer/touch-drag-as-PRIMARY (JURY 7Г—), cosmic/bioluminescent-glow vibe (JURY 4Г—), **pentatonic-no-wrong-notes KIDS harmony (JURY ban #1)**, "ship-a-GPU-sim-and-pulse-a-bell" (JURY 4Г—), camera/body (kids 1Г— recent вҖ” 978), tilt (kids 2Г— вҖ” 974/964), mic-voice/pitch (kids 2Г— вҖ” 972/969)] В· picked=[**discrete touch-TAP INPUT** (NOT drag вҖ” dodges the 7Г— pointer-drag ban; a distinct discrete idiom), **raw-WebGL2 + Canvas2D-fallback OUTPUT** (not the over-rep adult-cosmic GPU look), **parallel majorвҶ”minor voice-led mode-flip TECH** (real diatonic harmony вҖ” clears JURY #1; NOT pentatonic; pure music, NOT a GPU-sim-pulse-bell), **bright gold/indigo storybook VIBE** (off cosmic-glow)]` вҖ” clears every ban. **Research-first path (c)+(a):** resurrects the вӯҗ В§568-banked recent-research IDEAS seed `kids-happy-sad-tree` (itself from the В§568 dive), reinforced by today's В§570 child-mode-affect papers. **Directly dents the jury's #1 standing liability (verification debt, 3+ juries):** unlike 978 (camera) / 980 (accelerometer) / the breath/shake siblings, this needs **zero hardware/permissions**, so it's the easiest recent kids build for Karel to actually *play and hear* on his morning phone вҖ” the В§568 seed flagged it exactly as "easiest to hand-verify вҶ’ directly dents the jury's #1 liability." **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; zero AI/network/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + WebGL2/Canvas2D). **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: `вң“ Compiled successfully` вҶ’ Linting + type-check PASS вҶ’ reached **`Collecting page data`**; the idle ghost auto-player guarantees a *sounding* glance with zero hardware). ## (Cycle 569 вҖ” **adult** build В· DEEP, 1 concept Г— 2 interaction models, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/979-cantus-engine](/dream/979-cantus-engine)** вҖ” The Cantus Engine: **seed a 3вҖ“6-note subject and watch Resonance compose a 5-minute, self-developing fugue in front of you вҖ” a deterministic, *explainable* counterpoint machine where every note is a named Bach/Fux operation you can see fire on the score.** `demoable` В· Cycle 569 (adult composers / **Web-MIDI + computer-keyboard, the non-pointer input вҖ” revives the 1Г— MIDI sensor** / **raw-WebGL2 scrolling piano-roll/manuscript** with transform labels (Canvas2D fallback) / **deterministic long-form motivic-development counterpoint engine + Fux voice-leading scorer** / engraved-manuscript vibe). **The deliberate human-legible inverse of 2026's black-box neural Bach-imitators** (RESEARCH В§569 / **arXiv:2606.13626**, June 11 2026 вҖ” three deep-net families all *imitating* Bach from data): here there are **no trained weights and no sampling** вҖ” every note is produced by a named contrapuntal operation (diatonic transposition В· real/tonal answer at the fifth В· **inversion** В· **retrograde** В· **augmentation/diminution** В· **stretto** В· **modulation**), and a **Fux voice-leading scorer** (rewards stepwise motion + consonance on strong beats + contrary motion; penalizes parallel 5ths/8ves + voice crossing + large leaps) decides each voice's exact pitch вҖ” pass a seed and it plays the same piece every time. **Long-form with memory (~310s/cycle), the lab's thin menu category:** Exposition вҶ’ Episode вҶ’ Modulation вҶ’ Stretto вҶ’ Coda, then it loops **with a perfect-fifth key drift + a mode flip each cycle** so **minute 5 is a different key and character than minute 1** вҖ” not a short loop; a stateful `EngineState` tracks key, voice queues, fired transforms, section, elapsed beats. 3 independent voices on FM-triangle ADSR tones, **Web-Audio look-ahead scheduler** (~25ms tick / ~100ms lookahead, NOT a pre-rendered buffer); master `gain 0.26 вҶ’ lowpass 9kHz вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor вҶ’ destination`, 14-voice cap with stealing. **The directest answer to JURY 2026-06-26 #2** ("make the SOUND the primary object вҖ” the simulation should be the instrument's resonating body, not a screensaver you pulse a bell off of": a counterpoint engine is **pure music, zero GPU sim**), **#3** ("build the adult MIDI/desk-controller piece вҖ” MIDI is 1Г—, only 947"), and **#5** (engraved-manuscript register, **off the over-used adult cosmic-glow**); squarely on Karel's "personal audio workspace for pianists/composers" line. **Ambition floor 3/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [MIDI/keyboard input + long-form development engine + Fux scorer + WebGL2 piano-roll render = 4] В· #3 named refs [**Fux, _Gradus ad Parnassum_, 1725**; **J.S. Bach, _Art of Fugue_ / _Two-Part Inventions_**; arXiv 2606.13626] В· #5 in-README dated RESEARCH В§569 вҖ” today's dive; dated-research streak unbroken). `diversity: banned=[pointer/touch-drag-as-PRIMARY (JURY 7Г—), cosmic/bioluminescent-glow ADULT vibe (JURY 4Г—), "ship-a-GPU-sim-and-pulse-a-bell" (JURY 4Г—), Canvas2D-as-PRIMARY-OUTPUT (6Г—/10, over audit cap), pentatonic-no-wrong-notes (n/a adult)] В· picked=[**Web-MIDI + computer-keyboard INPUT** (non-pointer вҖ” clears JURY #3; revives the 1Г— MIDI sensor), **raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT** (healthy 3Г—/10, NOT the over-rep Canvas2D), **deterministic motivic-development counterpoint TECH** (sound-as-object вҖ” clears JURY #2; pure music, NOT a GPU-sim-pulse-bell; the counterpoint lane unmined since ~552), **engraved-manuscript VIBE** (off cosmic-glow вҖ” clears JURY #5)]` вҖ” clears every ban. Research-first path **(a)+(c)**: today's В§569 dive drives the build *by inversion* AND resurrects the вӯҗ recent-research IDEAS seed `948-cantus-engine`. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; zero AI/network/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + WebGL2/Canvas2D). **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: `вң“ Compiled successfully` вҶ’ Linting + type-check PASS вҶ’ reached **`Collecting page data`**; scoped `next lint` on the folder вҶ’ **"No ESLint warnings or errors"**; all build warnings are pre-existing `src/lib/**`, zero from the 979 folder; folder grep-clean вҖ” no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`@ts-nocheck`/`use*`-helper/api-route/`Math.random`/three.js); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; `ulimit -n` hard-capped 4096; infra, not code вҖ” identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT ear-verified** (no audio/MIDI device in the build box вҖ” the Fux scorer's voice-leading, the per-cycle key-drift/mode-flip, and the transform timing are reasoned-correct + lint/tsc-clean but unconfirmed by ear; **adds to the jury's #1 standing liability, verification debt** вҖ” see MORNING. **The ~2.2s idle auto-start of the B-A-C-H subject guarantees a *sounding, scrolling* glance with zero hardware** вҖ” the easiest recent build to hand-verify on a laptop: keyboard-only, no mic/camera/MIDI required to hear it develop). ## (Cycle 568 вҖ” **kids** build В· WIDE, 3 orthogonal non-pointer/real-harmony explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/978-kids-cloud-weather](/dream/978-kids-cloud-weather)** вҖ” Conduct the Sky: **a 4-year-old conducts a bright musical SKY with their whole BODY вҖ” and it's the *quality* of the movement (gentle vs. big, sudden vs. smooth, high vs. low) that shapes the music, never a finger on glass.** `demoable` В· Cycle 568 (kids 4+ / **front-camera whole-body motion вҖ” frame-difference, NO ML model, the non-pointer/embodied input**, with a ghost auto-conductor fallback / **Canvas2D painterly daytime sky** / **Laban Effort movement-quality вҶ’ musical-expression mapping** / bright daydream-meadow vibe). **The directest answer to JURY 2026-06-26's loudest standing structural ask (#3): "force a non-pointer input вҖ” drag-on-glass is back to 7Г—; embodied, not a finger"** вҖ” here nothing touches the glass; the child stands back and *moves*. Three **Laban Effort** qualities each drive a distinct musical dimension: **Space/height** (motion-weighted vertical centroid вҶ’ register, reach up = higher), **Weight/energy** (total frame-difference motion вҶ’ dynamics + how many flowers bloom, a big sweep = loud bright bloom), and **Time вҖ” sudden vs. sustained** (the time-derivative of energy вҶ’ articulation, a sudden burst = a staccato sparkle-pluck + shooting star, smooth motion = a legato sung tone). The harmony is a real **C-Lydian** mode (C D E FвҷҜ G A B вҖ” the raised-4th "wonder/magic" color over a Cadd9вҶ”D/C lift pad) вҖ” **explicitly NOT a pentatonic no-wrong-notes safety scale** (the jury's hardest KIDS ban, #1). **Input technique = pure frame-difference, no ML:** each frame drawn to a 64Г—48 offscreen canvas, per-pixel luminance differenced vs. the previous frame, thresholded mask вҶ’ (energy, vertical centroid, suddenness), adaptive baseline self-calibrating to room light вҖ” no MediaPipe/TensorFlow/npm-ML deps. **Output = Canvas2D** (the jury blessed Canvas2D as "fresh-again, earns its place" вҖ” deliberately not the over-rep raw-GPU shader): glowing sun, parallax clouds, rolling meadow, flowers that bloom on notes, birds/sparkles on sudden bursts; warm saturated daylight palette, **deliberately OFF the (adult-side) cosmic/bioluminescent-glow cluster**. **Grounded in THIS cycle's research dive (RESEARCH В§568, researchвҶ’build chain visible):** **BeSound** (embodied music education for children mapping whole-body movement qualities to rhythm/melody/harmony via **Rudolf Laban's Theory of Effort**, surfaced alongside the 2026 Sound Scene embodied-sound program + Antle "embodied metaphors help children learn"). Other named refs: **Rudolf Laban, Effort (1947)** В· **BeSound** В· the film-scoring Lydian-as-wonder convention. **Ambition floor 3/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [camera frame-diff capture + Laban-Effort movement-quality analyzer + Lydian harmony/voice engine + Web Audio synth/pad + Canvas2D sky render = 5] В· #3 named references В· #5 in-README dated RESEARCH В§568 вҖ” today's dive; in-README dated-research streak unbroken). `diversity: banned=[pointer/touch-drag-as-PRIMARY-input (JURY 7Г—), cosmic/bioluminescent-glow vibe (JURY 4Г—), **pentatonic-no-wrong-notes KIDS harmony (JURY ban #1)**, "ship-a-GPU-sim-and-pulse-a-bell" pattern (JURY 4Г—), tilt (kids 2Г— recent вҖ” 974/964), mic-voice (kids 2Г— recent вҖ” 972/969)] В· picked=[**front-camera whole-body INPUT** (non-pointer/embodied вҖ” clears JURY #3; camera/body is 0Г— in the last-10 committed вҶ’ the freshest kids input), **Canvas2D painterly OUTPUT** (jury-blessed fresh-again; not the over-rep raw-GPU shader), **Laban-Effort movement-quality вҶ’ Lydian-harmony TECH** (real modal harmony from movement *quality*, not a trigger вҖ” clears JURY #1; NOT pentatonic; the motion is the instrument, NOT a GPU sim you pulse a bell off), **bright daydream-meadow VIBE** (off cosmic-glow)]` вҖ” clears every ban. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; camera is local-only, never recorded/stored/transmitted вҖ” pixels differenced in place and discarded each frame; zero AI/network/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + Canvas2D). **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` reached **`Collecting page data`** = compile/lint/type all PASS; scoped `next lint` on the folder вҶ’ **"No ESLint warnings or errors"**; all build warnings are pre-existing `src/lib/**`, zero from the 978 folder; folder grep-clean вҖ” no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`@ts-nocheck`/`use*`-helper/api-route); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; `ulimit -n` hard-capped 4096; infra, not code вҖ” identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT camera/ear-verified** (no webcam or audio device in the build box вҖ” the frame-diff Laban analyzer, the staccato/legato articulation switch, and the Lydian pad balance are reasoned-correct + lint/tsc-clean but unconfirmed by eye/ear; **this adds to the jury's #1 standing liability, verification debt** вҖ” see MORNING. The ghost figure-8 auto-conductor on camera-deny/2.5s-idle + always-drifting sky guarantee a *sounding, moving* glance with zero hardware). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire, all three a *non-pointer input into real (non-pentatonic) harmony* (answering JURY #1+#3 three different ways); banked **`979-kids-happy-sad-tree` вӯҗ RESURRECT-FIRST (kids)** вҖ” the most *robust* sibling (zero permissions, plays on any device instantly): tap glowing fruit on a WebGL2 tree, then flip one big вҳҖпёҸ/рҹҢҷ switch to hear the SAME song turn happyвҶ”tender as the world flips **parallel C-majorвҶ”C-minor** (Kate Hevner mode/affect вҖ” the third makes the feeling) вҖ” and **`980-kids-shake-bells`** вҖ” SHAKE the device (accelerometer, off-glass) to ring WebGPU/WGSL handbells tuned to a real **IвҖ“IVвҖ“VвҖ“I** cadence that builds and resolves home (Orff Schulwerk + functional cadence; WebGPUвҶ’WebGL2вҶ’Canvas2D fallback chain). ## Cycle 567 вҖ” **adult** build В· DEEP, 1 concept Г— 3 sensor/render approaches, shipped 1

- **[/dream/977-echo-room-gpu](/dream/977-echo-room-gpu)** вҖ” Echo Room: **build polyphony from your own PAST SELVES in space вҖ” move your body through an invisible C-major harmonic field, your motion is recorded over a 7s bar, and it loops forever as an HRTF-spatialized "ghost body" (a living GPU particle cloud) that re-traces your path and re-sings its chord while you, the listener, walk among up to 6 of your past selves.** `demoable` В· Cycle 567 (adult / **MediaPipe Pose вҖ” full-body torso/hip centroid, the non-pointer/embodied input**, with pointer + auto-demo fallback / **raw WebGPU/WGSL particle field вҶ’ WebGL2 вҶ’ Canvas2D fallback chain** / per-ghost **Web Audio HRTF `PannerNode`** spatialization / warm gallery / candle-lit vibe). **The directest answer to JURY 2026-06-26's loudest standing structural ask (#3): "push the depth-room into a multi-zone spatial instrument you physically walk through вҖ” embodied-spatial, not a finger."** It is a live-looper where each loop is *a body you used to be*: position вҶ’ harmony walks a voice-led diatonic C-major neighbourhood (x = IВ·viВ·IVВ·iiВ·VВ·iii, common-tone heavy so a 6-ghost stack stays consonant; y = voicing/inversion + register) вҖ” **real functional harmony, NOT a pentatonic no-wrong-notes safety net** (the jury's other ban). Arm a loop вҶ’ your path (x,y,freq,hue) samples at ~30Hz over a fixed 7s bar вҶ’ on close it becomes a permanent looping **ghost** that re-triggers its harmony spatialized at its moving position; recording auto-arms the next, caps at 6 (oldest drops), "Clear all" present. The live performer drives both their own current voice AND the `AudioListener`, so the ensemble **re-pans around you** as you move. Each ghost is a GPU-resident particle cloud tinted by its chord's warm hue (amberвҶ’terracottaвҶ’honeyвҶ’rustвҶ’goldвҶ’ember). **Also clears JURY #2** (the *sound* you build IS the object вҖ” you accrete the music from your own motion, not read a pitch off a screensaver) and **#5** (warm gallery/candle-lit register, deliberately OFF the banned adult cosmic/bioluminescent-glow cluster). **Grounded in THIS cycle's research dive (RESEARCH В§567, researchвҶ’build chain visible):** **DanXeReflect** (CHI 2026, Barcelona, honorable mention вҖ” re-materializing your *spatio-temporal past movements* as interactive avatars you perform with). ## Cycle 566 вҖ” **kids** build В· DEEP, 1 concept Г— 2 interaction models, shipped 1

- **[/dream/974-kids-tilt-cadence](/dream/974-kids-tilt-cadence)** вҖ” Tilt Cadence Meadow: **a 4-year-old FEELS a real V7вҶ’I authentic cadence in their hands вҖ” TILT the tablet to roll a glowing marble out of the orange "pull" (Dominant 7th) well and HOME into the gold (Tonic) well, and the leading tone resolves up while the seventh resolves down, sparks burst, flowers bloom.** `demoable` В· Cycle 566 (kids 4+ / **device TILT вҖ” DeviceOrientation `beta`/`gamma` gravity vector, the non-pointer input** / **Canvas2D additive warm-meadow glow** / tilt marble-physics + Riemann T/S/D functional-harmony state machine / warm daytime-meadow vibe). **The directest answer to JURY 2026-06-26's hardest KIDS provocation (#1): "pentatonic-no-wrong-notes is the new kids crutch вҖ” ban it; give them a real mode, a functional progression, or genuine tension/resolution."** Here there is no safety scale at all вҖ” the three wells literally ARE Hugo Riemann's harmonic functions: **gold Home = Tonic (I)**, **green Away = Subdominant (IV)**, **orange Pull = Dominant 7th (V7)** (containing the leading tone E + chordal 7th Bвҷӯ of C7, in F major). A damped point-mass marble rolls under a tilt-driven gravity vector across a height field of three Gaussian attractor basins (`physics.ts`); while it rests in a well that chord sounds softly over an always-on F2+C3 tonic drone, and **rolling V7вҶ’I is detected explicitly** (`audio.ts` `HarmonyEngine`) and fires a real authentic cadence as scheduled frequency glides вҖ” leading tone **EвҶ‘F**, chordal 7th **BвҷӯвҶ“A**, root CвҶ’F, fifth GвҶ’A вҖ” so the resolution is genuinely *heard*, not implied. **This also clears JURY #3 ("force a non-pointer input вҖ” drag-on-glass is back to 7Г—"):** the primary input is device tilt, off the banned finger-on-glass entirely; and it breaks the immediate kids rut вҖ” the last two kids ships (969-hum-choir, 972-sing-garden) are BOTH mic-voiceвҶ’harmony, so tilt is a different body and a different sensor. **Output = Canvas2D** additive warm-meadow glow (sun wash, glowing color-coded basins, marble, sparks, blooming flowers) вҖ” bold saturated color is the kids language (gold/green/orange = I/IV/V7), and the warm daytime register is deliberately OFF the (adult-side) jury-flagged cosmic/bioluminescent-glow cluster. **Grounded in THIS cycle's research dive (RESEARCH В§566, researchвҶ’build chain visible):** **CHI 2026 "From Movement to Sound and Back: A Workshop on Movement-Based and Sonification Design Approaches"** (Extended Abstracts, 2026 CHI; ACM DOI 10.1145/3772363.3778764) вҖ” the dive's reframing ("the movementвҶ’sound mapping should carry a *quality* вҖ” effort, tension, settling вҖ” not just a trigger") is exactly what a tilt cadence does: tilting carries the felt *quality* of harmonic tension into the child's hands. ## Cycle 565 вҖ” **adult** build В· DEEP, 1 concept Г— 2 technical approaches, shipped 1

- **[/dream/973-wave-terrain](/dream/973-wave-terrain)** вҖ” Wave Terrain: **the glowing 3D landscape you SEE is literally the sound you HEAR вҖ” an orbit tracing a closed path over a height-terrain reads out the audio waveform sample-by-sample, so reshaping the land sculpts the timbre and spinning the orbit faster plays a higher note.** `demoable` В· Cycle 565 (adult / **computer-keyboard + Web MIDI velocity (primary, non-pointer)** / **raw WebGL2 perspective heightfield + Canvas2D carved-waveform strip** / topographic bronze-relief vibe). **The lab's FIRST wave-terrain synthesizer** вҖ” grep-verified 0Г— (`wave terrain`/`wave-terrain` never appear in any prior prototype). Wave-terrain (a.k.a. terrain) synthesis defines a height surface `z=f(x,y)`; a **closed orbit** traced across it, sampled at audio rate over one full loop, *is* one period of a waveform вҖ” so the terrain's shape **is the timbre** and the orbit's traversal rate **is the pitch**. Implementation: `terrain.ts` walks the orbit at **1024 points**, reads the height, **DC-blocks** (subtracts the mean, since terrains carry an offset) + peak-normalizes вҶ’ one period; `audio.ts` turns that period into a `PeriodicWave` via a real DFT (`createPeriodicWave`), played by up to **6 `OscillatorNode` voices** sharing the current wave (pitch = note frequency; `1/вҲҡn` normalization; `Gain вҶ’ lowpass 8 kHz вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor` limiter, peak < 0.3); on morph/orbit change the wave is rebuilt + re-applied to live voices. `gl.ts` is **hand-rolled WebGL2 (no three.js)** вҖ” a 96Г—96 perspective heightfield sampling an `R32F` height texture, warm topographic elevation palette, relief shading, contour bands, a luminous orbit ring on the surface + a glowing moving read-point; a carved-waveform strip below shows the exact period being played with a scrub marker, so you can *see* orbit-shape вҶ’ waveform вҶ’ sound. **The directest answer to JURY 2026-06-26 #2** ("make the SOUND the primary object, the resonating body вҖ” not a GPU sim you pulse a bell off of"): here the visible terrain *is the oscillator itself*, not a screensaver read for a pitch. Also clears #3 (non-pointer: computer keyboard `AвҖ“L`/`QвҖ“P` = D-Dorian ~2 octaves primary; `1вҖ“5` presets; `[ ]`/arrows = orbit radius/lobes; `M` = morph; Web MIDI velocity when present, never required) and #5 (register that isn't cosmic: topographic bronze-relief). **Grounded in THIS cycle's research dive (RESEARCH В§565, researchвҶ’build chain visible):** the **2025вҖ“2026 wave-terrain revival** вҖ” **Scaler Music *Carbon Electra 2*** (announced **May 28, 2026**), engine "produces sound via a 2D trajectory that scans over a 3D surface or terrain", + **Conductive Labs *Terrain*** hardware synth (2025) вҖ” a commercial revival with *no* free browser-native counterpart; this is that. Other named refs: Mitsuhashi 1982 (JAES) В· Borgonovo & Haus 1986 (CMJ) В· Curtis Roads, *Microsound* (2001). **Ambition floor 4/5** (#1 never-used technique [wave-terrain synthesis, grep-0Г—] В· #2 вүҘ3 subsystems [keyboard/MIDI input + terrain orbit-sampler/morph engine + DFTвҶ’PeriodicWave synth + WebGL2 heightfield render] В· #3 named references В· #5 in-README dated RESEARCH В§565 вҖ” today's dive; dated-research streak unbroken). `diversity: banned=[pointer/touch-drag-as-PRIMARY-input (JURY 7Г—), cosmic/bioluminescent-glow ADULT vibe (JURY 4Г—), pentatonic-no-wrong-notes KIDS harmony (n/a вҖ” adult), "ship-a-GPU-sim-and-pulse-a-bell" pattern (JURY 4Г—), WebGPU-not-to-7Г— (audit), functional-harmony-voice-leading-engine (hot вҖ” 969/972 just shipped)] В· picked=[**computer-keyboard + Web-MIDI INPUT** (non-pointer вҖ” clears JURY #3; MIDI is the 1Г— sensor), **raw-WebGL2 + Canvas2D OUTPUT** (the terrain IS the oscillator вҖ” clears JURY #2; WebGL2 5Г— healthy, NOT WebGPU-pile), **wave-terrain-synthesis TECH** (lab-first; neither a harmony engine nor a classic single-body physical model вҖ” dodges both hot lanes), **topographic bronze-relief VIBE** (off cosmic-glow)]` вҖ” clears every ban. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; zero AI/network/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + WebGL2 + Canvas2D). **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` reached **`Collecting page data`** = compile/lint/type all PASS; scoped `next lint` on the folder вҶ’ **"No ESLint warnings or errors"**; all build warnings are pre-existing `src/lib/**`, zero from the 973 folder; folder grep-clean вҖ” no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`@ts-nocheck`/`use*`-helper/api-route/pointer-primary); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; `ulimit -n` hard-capped 4096; infra, not code вҖ” identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT ear-verified** (no audio device in the build box вҖ” the DFT/`PeriodicWave` path, DC-block, and per-voice normalization are reasoned-correct + lint/tsc-clean, but the relative brightness of the five presets and the morph speed are unconfirmed by ear; the always-on 3s idle auto-demo plays a slow D-Dorian arpeggio + morphs the terrain so a zero-interaction glance both *sees* the landscape carve a waveform and *hears* a tone). Winner of an adult **DEEP** fire (one concept Г— two technical approaches); banked **`974-wave-terrain-map`** вҖ” the **maximally-legible Canvas2D twin**: a top-down contour/elevation heatmap with the orbit drawn over it AND a side-by-side **scope panel** plotting the heights sampled along the orbit (one period of the tone) + a live spectrum, so the "orbit-over-terrain = waveform = sound" identity is *provable* at a glance; bulletproof-everywhere render (the guaranteed-fallback / installation-context surface). Built complete + builder-reported lint/tsc-clean (README written); `rm -rf`'d before the winner-only build (NOT committed; IDEAS В§565). Design notes: `src/app/dream/973-wave-terrain/README.md`
