## Cycle 564 вҖ” **kids** build В· WIDE, 3 orthogonal non-pointer/real-harmony explorers, shipped 1

- **[/dream/972-kids-sing-garden](/dream/972-kids-sing-garden)** вҖ” Sing Garden: **a child SINGS any note and a real harmonic garden grows a chord that genuinely SUPPORTS it вҖ” no wrong notes, but REAL functional harmony underneath, not a safe pentatonic.** `demoable` В· Cycle 564 (kids 4+ / **microphone вҖ” live voice pitch (YIN/autocorrelation), the non-pointer input** / **Canvas2D watercolor-ink garden** / functional voice-leading accompaniment / ink-and-watercolor vibe). **The directest answer to JURY 2026-06-26's hardest KIDS provocation (#1): "pentatonic-no-wrong-notes is the new kids crutch вҖ” ban it; give them a real mode, a functional progression, or genuine tension/resolution."** Here the child's voice is the melody (snapped to C-major scale degrees so it's always in tune = no wrong notes), but the harmony is genuinely functional: each sung scale-degree drives its real diatonic triad (1вҶ’I, 2вҶ’ii, 3вҶ’iii, 4вҶ’IV, 5вҶ’V, 6вҶ’vi, 7вҶ’viiВ°) and **three inner voices + a bass voice-lead** to the nearest chord tones by smallest-motion assignment (Aldwell & Schachter), so a drawn melody makes real chord changes emerge; landing on 5вҶ’1 or holding the leading-tone 7вҶ’1 fires a true **VвҶ’I cadence** with an audible resolution + a warm gold "home" halo. **Input = mic** вҖ” the live analyser time-domain buffer is run through a YIN-style cumulative-mean-normalized-difference pitch detector with parabolic refinement + an RMS gate + a 90 ms held-degree debounce (clamped to a child-voice 150вҖ“700 Hz); the voice is **never recorded, stored, or transmitted** вҖ” pitch is detected in place and thrown away every frame. This dodges the jury-banned **pointer-drag-as-primary-input** (7Г—) and is NOT the jury-over-represented input (mic is uncommon; the tired "humвҶ’RMS-paint" is explicitly *not* what this is вҖ” it reads real pitch and builds real harmony). **Output = Canvas2D** watercolor/ink garden (the jury blessed Canvas2D as "fresh-again, earns its place" вҖ” deliberately NOT WebGPU/three.js): singing higher grows a tall plant, lower a low spreading one (pitchвҶ’height); each chord blooms a flower whose **color encodes harmonic function** (tonic gold = home, dominant orange = tension, subdominant green, predominant/minor cool blue & violet), louder voice = bolder stroke; the painting accumulates as a calm, building garden. **Vibe = ink-and-watercolor on warm paper** вҖ” explicitly OFF the (adult-side) cosmic/bioluminescent-glow cluster. Kids-safe throughout: `masterGain 0.26 вҶ’ lowpass 6.5 kHz вҶ’ compressor вҲ’10 dB/20:1`; soft triangle/sine voices (вүҘ30 ms attacks); always-on tonic drone pad (never silent); singing louder never makes the synth harsh (accompaniment stays gentle/constant); вүҘ72 px Start gesture-gates AudioContext + getUserMedia; full teardown (rAF cancel, osc stop, mic tracks stop, disconnect, AudioContext close). **Degrades fully (tested path):** no/denied mic вҶ’ visible `text-rose-300` notice + **seven вүҘ64 px color-coded sing-pads** (one per scale degree, color = function) routing through the **identical** voice-leading pipeline, AND a hands-free **auto-demo** that sings a phrase ending `7вҶ’1` within ~1 s of Start so a zero-interaction glance both *sees* the garden grow and *hears* a cadence resolve. **Grounded in THIS cycle's research dive (RESEARCH В§564):** **arXiv:2602.06917 "Automatic Detection and Analysis of Singing Mistakes for Music Pedagogy" (Feb 6 2026)** вҖ” cited as the deliberate **inversion**: that framework flags a child's vocal *errors*; this piece refuses to вҖ” instead of marking a child wrong, the harmony BENDS to support whatever pitch they find (no-wrong-notes pedagogy, but with real functional harmony, not a safety scale). Other named refs: **Aldwell & Schachter, *Harmony and Voice Leading*** (the voice-leading rules) В· **David Li / Google Arts & Culture *Blob Opera* (2020)** (child-singable harmony lineage). **Ambition floor 3/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [mic YIN pitch-detection + functional voice-leading SATB+bass engine + Canvas2D watercolor render = 3] В· #3 named references В· #5 in-README dated RESEARCH В§564 вҖ” today's dive; in-README dated-research streak unbroken). `diversity: banned=[pointer/touch-drag-as-PRIMARY-input (JURY 7Г—), cosmic/bioluminescent-glow vibe (JURY 4Г—), **pentatonic-no-wrong-notes KIDS harmony (JURY ban #1)**, "ship-a-GPU-sim-and-pulse-a-bell" pattern (JURY 4Г—)] В· picked=[**mic / live-voice-pitch INPUT** (non-pointer вҖ” clears JURY #3; not the over-rep input), **Canvas2D watercolor OUTPUT** (jury-blessed fresh-again; not the over-rep raw-GPU shader), **functional-voice-leading-accompaniment TECH** (real harmony from a child's voice вҖ” clears JURY #1; NOT pentatonic), **ink-watercolor VIBE** (off cosmic-glow)]` вҖ” clears every ban. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; mic is local-only; zero AI/network/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + Canvas2D). **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` reached **`Collecting page data`** = compile/lint/type all PASS; `ulimit -n` hard-capped 4096, raise = "Operation not permitted"; infra, not code вҖ” identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT ear/mic-verified** (no audio input device in the build box вҖ” the YIN detector's robustness on a real breathy child voice in a noisy room, octave-error rate, and the harmony balance are reasoned-correct + lint/tsc-clean but unconfirmed by ear; ## Cycle 563 вҖ” **adult** build В· WIDE, 3 orthogonal physical-modeling explorers, shipped 1

- **[/dream/970-tension-gong](/dream/970-tension-gong)** вҖ” Tension Gong: **strike a metal gong on your keyboard and it bends вҖ” a hard hit starts SHARP and glides DOWN in pitch as it rings out, because the synthesis itself is non-linear, the way real bronze blooms.** `demoable` В· Cycle 563 (adult / **computer-keyboard + Web MIDI velocity (primary, non-pointer)** / **AudioWorklet non-linear modal synthesis + Canvas2D Chladni nodal plot**). **The lab's FIRST non-linear modal synthesis** вҖ” every prior modal/Karplus piece (960-friction's modal body, plucked strings, bell banks) used a *linear* fixed-frequency resonator bank; this is the first where the mode frequencies **change with vibration energy in real time**, which is what gives metal its life. Each of four bodies (bell-plate / gong / tam-tam / cymbal-disc) is a bank of 12вҖ“16 two-pole inharmonic resonators with three live non-linearities running per 128-sample control block in the worklet: (1) **tension modulation** вҖ” a running `energy = ОЈ ampВІ` resets every mode's instantaneous frequency `f_i = f0_iВ·(1 + beta_iВ·betaScaleВ·energy)`, so a loud strike rings sharp and **glides back down** to rest pitch as energy bleeds away (the gong "bloom" вҖ” produced by the resonators *changing frequency*, not by pitch automation/LFO); (2) **mode coupling** вҖ” while loud, a fraction of each mode's state transfers to its spectral neighbor (`coupleAmtВ·energy`), so the spectrum shimmers up during the attack then **clarifies and settles** as the coupling term vanishes; (3) **strike-velocity dependence** вҖ” a hard hit (Shift) drives energy into the *high* modes (brighter) with a larger `betaScale` (bends more); a soft hit stays near the linear pitch on the low modes. **Directest answer to BOTH of JURY 2026-06-26's hardest adult provocations at once** вҖ” #2 (*kill the "ship-a-GPU-sim-and-pulse-a-bell" reflex вҖ” make the SOUND the primary object, the resonating body, the way 960-friction and 965-oscilloscope did*) and #3 (*force a non-pointer input вҖ” drag-on-glass is back to 7Г—*). Here the sound IS the object (the non-linearity is the instrument, not a screensaver) and the playing surface is the **computer keyboard** (`A S D F G H J K` strike; **Shift** = hard pitch-bending hit; fast play + hold-duration shape velocity; `1вҖ“4` switch bodies) with **Web MIDI** note-on velocity when a controller is present (silent keyboard fallback otherwise вҖ” MIDI is the rare 1Г— sensor the jury asked to revive). **Grounded in THIS cycle's research dive (RESEARCH В§563, the researchвҶ’build chain made visible):** **arXiv:2603.10240 "nlm: Real-Time Non-linear Modal Synthesis in Max" (March 2026)** вҖ” which models exactly tension modulation, pitch glide, and mode coupling for real-time physical synthesis; this is a faithful simplified browser port. **Visual READS the audio, never drives it** (the inverse of the banned sim-pulse-bell move): Canvas2D **Chladni-style nodal field** вҖ” each live mode draws its `sin(mПҖx)В·sin(nПҖy)` nodal lines, brightening as it rings and fading as it decays, so you *see* which modes are alive and watch the spectrum settle after a strike; a per-mode strip below shows amplitude + a **pitch-glide tick** marking how far above rest frequency each mode currently sits. **Palette = clinical / metallurgical** (brushed-steel greys on near-black, hot-amber/steel-cyan accents) вҖ” deliberately OFF the banned adult cosmic/bioluminescent-glow vibe (4Г—). **Ambition floor 3/5** (#1 never-used technique [**non-linear modal synthesis** вҖ” energy-driven tension-modulation + mode-coupling; grep-0Г— as a lab technique, all prior modal banks are linear] В· #3 named reference [**arXiv:2603.10240 nlm, March 2026** + the modal-synthesis lineage] В· #5 in-README dated **RESEARCH В§563** вҖ” today's dive, 28 straight cycles 535вҖ“563). #2 (вүҘ3 subsystems) borderline-claimable [worklet modal engine + non-linear coupler + keyboard/MIDI input + Chladni render]; #4 NOT claimed (single-cycle ship). `diversity: banned=[pointer/touch-drag-as-PRIMARY-input (JURY 7Г—), cosmic/bioluminescent-glow ADULT vibe (JURY 4Г—), pentatonic-no-wrong-notes KIDS harmony (n/a вҖ” adult), "ship-a-GPU-sim-and-pulse-a-bell" pattern (JURY 4Г—)] В· picked=[**computer-keyboard + Web-MIDI-velocity INPUT** (non-pointer вҖ” clears JURY #3; MIDI revives the 1Г— sensor), **AudioWorklet-DSP + Canvas2D OUTPUT** (sound IS the object вҖ” clears JURY #2; viz reads audio, doesn't drive a bell), **non-linear-modal-synthesis TECH** (lab-first; the resonating body is the instrument, NOT a GPU sim), **clinical-metallurgical VIBE** (off cosmic-glow adult cluster + off kids)]` вҖ” clears every ban, the directest double-provocation hit on the adult side. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; zero AI/network/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + Canvas2D). **Critically, the one recent build with NO hardware dependency** (no mic, no camera, no GPU compute вҖ” just keyboard + Web Audio), so it is the **directest dent in the jury's #1 standing liability, verification debt** вҖ” Karel can actually *hear* this on any laptop keyboard, unlike the camera/mic/GPU builds piling up unrun. **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` reached **`Collecting page data`** = compile/lint/type all PASS; scoped `next lint` on the folder вҶ’ **"No ESLint warnings or errors"**; tsc-strict on both files вҶ’ zero errors; all build warnings are pre-existing `src/lib/**`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; `ulimit -n` hard-capped 4096; infra, not code вҖ” identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT ear-verified** (no audio device in the build box вҖ” the non-linear modal engine, tension glide, and coupling are reasoned-correct + lint/tsc-clean, but the *feel* of the pitch-bloom and the metallic timbre are unconfirmed by ear; an auto-struck idle body could be added next cycle for the silent glance). Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-explorer fire, all three a *non-pointer input into a real physical-modeling instrument body* (answering provocations #2+#3 three different ways); banked **`971-air-column` вӯҗ RESURRECT-FIRST (adult)** вҖ” a contactless **blown digital-waveguide flute** played by **webcam optical-flow** (motion energy = breath pressure, motion centroid = pitch; self-oscillating jet model, overblows the octave; keyboard fallback) вҖ” the lab's first blown air column AND the camera-sensor revival the jury wanted вҖ” and **`972-resonant-bodies`** вҖ” the **microphone as EXCITER** (not pitch-detector): tap/breathe/hiss to ring tuned modal bodies (bell/glass/wood/ceramic), exciterвҶ’resonator modal synthesis, mic-as-exciter is a fresh cross-modal use. Both returned complete + builder-reported lint/tsc-clean (READMEs written); `rm -rf`'d before the winner-only build (NOT committed; IDEAS В§563). Design notes: `src/app/dream/970-tension-gong/README.md`

## Cycle 562 вҖ” **kids** build В· WIDE, 3 orthogonal embodied-harmony explorers, shipped 1

- **[/dream/969-kids-hum-choir](/dream/969-kids-hum-choir)** вҖ” Hum Choir: **hum ONE note and a choir of soft glowing creatures instantly joins you in REAL harmony вҖ” singing the diatonic chord that fits your note, leaning into tension and blooming home when you land on the note that pulls.** `demoable` В· Cycle 562 (kids 4+ / **microphone voice-pitch (primary)** + tap-a-note fallback / **Canvas2D choir creatures**). **The lab's FIRST real-time pitch-detection instrument for kids, and the rarest input in the whole lab (the child's own VOICE).** The child hums; **NSDF (McLeod Pitch Method) autocorrelation** on the mic buffer returns `{hz, clarity, rms}`, clarity/RMS-gated and EMA+octave-smoothed so a wobbly 4-year-old hum reads as a stable note; that note snaps to a **C-major scale degree**, the real **diatonic triad** is built on it (IвҖ“viiВ°), and **three companion choir voices glide in via greedy nearest-tone voice-leading** вҖ” real functional harmony, NOT a can't-be-wrong pentatonic. **Felt tension/resolution:** landing on **V or the leading-tone (ti)** holds tension (brighter formant, the creatures lean/tighten, a homeвҶ”tension meter fills); returning to a **tonic tone (C/E/G)** blooms and resolves вҖ” a genuine VвҶ’I a child *causes with their voice*, no reading. **Directest answer to BOTH JURY 2026-06-26 kids provocations at once** вҖ” #1 (kill the pentatonic crutch; give kids real harmony with tension/resolution) and #3 (force a **non-pointer** input вҖ” drag-on-glass is back to 7Г—; voice is the most embodied, rarest channel). **Grounded in this cycle's research dive (RESEARCH В§562):** the embodied tonal-harmony pedagogy line (**Song Walker**, **AREmbody**, "Learning Tonal Harmony Through Bodily Interactions") + arXiv:2604.07612 real-time human-AI co-performance (Apr 2026) вҖ” children have real harmonic sensitivity and learn tension/release through the body; here the body is the singing voice and the AI co-performer is a local non-ML voice-leading harmonizer. **Extends Karel's loved `158-kids-hum-paint`вқӨпёҸ** (the lab's prior hum-input kids piece) with real harmony. **Kids-safe + feedback-safe:** the mic is **analysis-only, never routed to the speakers** (no howl); choir is a warm source-filter "ahh" synth (detuned-saw вҶ’ formant bandpasses, shared vibrato, portamento, synth reverb), master `gain вүӨ0.24 вҶ’ lowpass ~7kHz вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor`, вҲҡ-voice normalized, no harsh transients. **Mic-free path fully works:** a row of big friendly CвҖ“B note buttons drives the identical harmonizer, so a 06:30 glance with no mic permission still plays real chords; idle breathing + a soft held tonic so the creatures are alive and never fully silent + a "hum to meвҖҰ" hint. AudioContext + `getUserMedia` both gated behind one Start tap. **Ambition floor 4/5** (#1 never-used technique [**real-time NSDF/McLeod-Pitch-Method pitch detection as a kids instrument**; grep-0Г— for kids voice-pitch-as-input] В· #2 вүҘ3 subsystems [NSDF pitch detector + diatonic harmonizer/voice-leading engine + formant choir synth + Canvas2D creature render = 4] В· #3 named refs [**Google *Blob Opera* / David Li** В· **McLeod Pitch Method (NSDF)** В· **Aldwell & Schachter, *Harmony and Voice Leading***] В· #5 in-README dated **RESEARCH В§562** вҖ” 27 straight cycles 535вҖ“562). #4 NOT claimed (single-cycle ship). `diversity: banned=[pointer/touch-drag-as-PRIMARY-input (JURY 7Г—), cosmic/bioluminescent-glow ADULT vibe (JURY 4Г—), pentatonic-no-wrong-notes KIDS harmony (JURY), GPU-sim+pulse-a-bell pattern (JURY 4Г—)] В· picked=[**mic-voice-pitch INPUT** (rarest/most-embodied; non-pointer вҖ” clears JURY #3), **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (bulletproof phone render; healthy/non-banned), **NSDF-pitch-detect + functional-diatonic-voice-leading TECH** (real harmony with felt VвҶ’I вҖ” clears the pentatonic ban; NOT a GPU sim), warm-choir-creatures VIBE (off cosmic-glow adult + off the kids pentatonic crutch)]` вҖ” clears every ban, the directest double-provocation hit. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; mic processed locally, nothing uploaded; zero AI/network/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + Canvas2D). **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` reached **`Collecting page data`** = compile/lint/type all PASS; zero warnings/errors attributable to 969 вҖ” `useCallback` IS used [page.tsx:81/113/125]; the lone unused-`useCallback` lint warning is a pre-existing OTHER-file warning); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; `ulimit -n` hard-capped 4096; infra, not code вҖ” identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT ear/mic-verified** (no microphone or audio device in the build box вҖ” the NSDF detector + harmonizer + voice-leading are reasoned-correct + builder-reported tsc/eslint-clean, but pitch-tracking robustness, the choir timbre, and tension/resolution *feel* are unconfirmed by hand/ear; the tap-a-note fallback + idle tonic cover the silent glance). **This is now the jury's #1 standing liability вҖ” verification debt** (16 straight build-green-but-unrun surfaces). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire, all three an *embodied non-pointer input* into the SAME real-harmony idea; banked **`967-kids-home-hill` вӯҗ RESURRECT-FIRST (kids)** вҖ” tilt a firefly through a **tonal-gravity field** (constant home-pull + a V tension hill = a VвҶ’I you *feel*), Canvas2D вҖ” and **`968-kids-shake-box`** вҖ” **shake** to crank a real **IвҖ“viвҖ“IVвҖ“VвҖ“I cadence** music box, raw-WebGL2. ## Cycle 561 вҖ” **adult** build В· DEEP, 1 concept Г— 2 approaches, shipped 1

- **[/dream/965-phosphor-draw](/dream/965-phosphor-draw)** вҖ” Phosphor Draw: **draw a shape on a glowing oscilloscope and you HEAR that exact shape вҖ” because the green figure on screen and the stereo signal in the speakers are literally the same signal.** `demoable` В· Cycle 561 (adult / **draw + pointer** input / **WebGL2 RGBA16F phosphor-feedback** scope). **The lab's FIRST true oscilloscope vector-synthesizer.** In an XY ("vectorscope") oscilloscope the left audio channel drives the horizontal beam and the right drives the vertical вҖ” so a stereo signal *draws a shape*; this inverts it: any drawn closed loop is resampled to a constant-arc-length pen-path and **emitted AS the stereo signal** (`L[i]=x[i]`, `R[i]=y[i]`), looped at an audible rate, so **the shape you hear IS the shape you see** вҖ” sample-for-sample, one signal feeding both senses. **Geometry becomes timbre** (a circle вүҲ near-sine, a square вүҲ rich odd harmonics, a star вүҲ bright buzz); the loop's **retrace rate is the pitch** (40вҖ“400 Hz slider), set via `playbackRate` so retuning *never rebuilds the buffer* вҖ” which is why the scope renders the played audio *continuously*, not in throttled steps. **Deliberately NON-sim and NON-harmony:** chosen *after* the research dive surfaced a fresh 2026 Neural-Cellular-Automata wave (arXiv 2601.16096 Jan 2026) AND a grep proved the lab has already mined the entire self-organizing-life family (Lenia `264`, physarum `327`, reaction-diffusion `9`, particle-life `8`, differential-growth `964`) вҖ” JURY 2026-06-25 flagged "ship a sim, pulse a bell off it" as the hardening adult move вҖ” so the pick pivoted OFF the sim it surfaced and ONTO its **mirror image**: an instrument where the signal IS the image, with no field/particles and no harmony engine (pitch is a byproduct of draw-speed, the *idea* is contour/timbre). It also breaks the **re-emerged harmony-engine monoculture** (7 of the last 10 committed reasoned about voice-leading: 954/952/950/947/942/941/957). **Phosphor render:** `phosphor-gl.ts` is a hand-written WebGL2 vectorscope вҖ” an `RGBA16F` ping-pong feedback texture fades the previous frame (CRT persistence), the new beam is drawn additively as a `LINE_STRIP` with **dwell-based brightness** (slow beam = brighter, exactly like a real scope), then a bloom + filmic-tonemap pass blooms hot spots to white-green; Canvas2D `shadowBlur`-trail fallback (`phosphor-2d.ts`) if WebGL2/float-render-targets are unavailable. **Controls:** 6 one-tap presets (figure-8, circle, square, star, lissajous, heart) so it sings instantly; draw-your-own (Pointer Events вҶ’ iPad-ready); pitch, spin (slowly rotates the figure вҖ” audible *and* visible), brightness, persistence. **Autoplay:** after the single Start tap (creates+resumes `AudioContext` inside the gesture for iOS), a slowly-spinning figure-8 already draws itself and sings, so a hands-free 06:30 glance immediately sees + hears the idea. **Extends Karel's strongest loved cluster вҖ” drawвҶ’sound** (`223-fourier-paint`вқӨпёҸ, `153-paint-compose`вқӨпёҸ, `100`/`152`/`158`/`160`вқӨпёҸ) with a fresh technique (the drawn line and the sound are one thing). **Ambition floor 4/5** (#1 never-used-as-core [true oscilloscope/vector synth; grep-0Г— shipped core вҖ” `291-harmonograph` has only *decorative* idle Lissajous] В· #2 вүҘ3 subsystems [arc-length path resampler + stereo-buffer synth w/ playbackRate pitch + WebGL2 phosphor-feedback render + draw/preset interaction = 4] В· #3 named refs [**Jerobeam Fenderson вҖ” *Oscilloscope Music*** В· **Hansi Raber вҖ” *OsciStudio* / osci-render** В· **Ryoji Ikeda вҖ” *data-cosm [nВ°1]*, 180 Studios, to 1 Feb 2026** В· **Lissajous 1857**] В· #5 in-README dated **RESEARCH В§561** вҖ” 26 straight cycles 535вҖ“561). `diversity: banned=[three.js (JURY 7Г—), mic-as-primary (JURY 4Г—), granular (JURY 4Г—), "pitch-held-dumb/drone" stance (JURY ~10Г—), harmony/voice-leading-engine TECH (audit вүҘ4Г—/10), GPU-sim+pulse-bell ADULT house style (JURY-flagged), Canvas2D-OUTPUT (recently at cap)] В· picked=[draw/pointer INPUT (non-mic; loved drawвҶ’sound lineage), **WebGL2-RGBA16F-phosphor OUTPUT** (under cap; non-three.js/WebGPU/plain-Canvas2D), **oscilloscope/vector-synthesis TECH** (signal-IS-image; non-harmony, non-sim, grep-0Г— as core), CRT/Ikeda signal-as-light VIBE (off cosmic-nebula adult + off kids)]` вҖ” clears every ban. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; zero AI/network/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + WebGL2/Canvas2D). **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` вҶ’ **`вң“ Compiled successfully in 2.1min`** вҶ’ Linting/type-check PASS; grep-confirmed zero warnings/errors attributable to 965/phosphor вҖ” all lint warnings pre-existing `src/lib/**` + other prototypes); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; infra, not code вҖ” identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT eye/ear-verified** (no WebGL2 device or audio in container вҖ” the resampler + stereo-buffer + phosphor shader are reasoned-correct + self-reported tsc/eslint-clean, but the CRT glow, geometry-as-timbre feel, and draw latency are unconfirmed by hand/eye/ear; autoplay figure-8 + presets cover the silent glance). **A small dent in the jury's verification debt:** because the scope reads the *exact* buffer that plays, "you see what you hear" is structurally provable, not asserted. Winner of an adult **DEEP** 2-approach fire (draw-a-2D-shape vs trace-a-rotating-3D-solid); banked **`966-osci-solids` вӯҗ RESURRECT-FIRST (adult)** вҖ” the "massively bigger" sibling where a rotating 3D wireframe solid (cube/torus/trefoil-knot/вҖҰ) is projected + traced as one pen-path so you *hear it spinning* (hand-written 3D projection, no three.js). Returned complete + self-reported tsc/eslint-clean; `cp`'d to scratchpad then `rm -rf`'d before the winner-only build (NOT committed; IDEAS В§561). Design notes: `src/app/dream/965-phosphor-draw/README.md`

## Cycle 560 вҖ” **kids** build В· DEEP, 1 concept Г— 2 render approaches, shipped 1

- **[/dream/964-kids-coral-garden](/dream/964-kids-coral-garden)** вҖ” Coral Garden: **tilt the tablet and a glowing bioluminescent reef GROWS ITSELF across the screen вҖ” and the coral *sings* the slow, warm melody its growing tip traces. A calm, never-silent, never-wrong bedtime toy.** `demoable` В· Cycle 560 (kids 4+ / **device-tilt (primary)** + tap-to-seed / **pure Canvas2D bioluminescent glow**). **The lab's FIRST differential-growth piece** вҖ” a genuinely never-used (grep-0Г—) named generative-art technique, deliberately chosen *after a grep killed the obvious pick:* a squishy soft-body "jelly" toy would have been the lab's **6th** kids blob/jelly/Verlet piece (286/451/460/603/755) вҖ” the exact "too similar in design and theme" trap the JURY 2026-06-25 named. Instead the coral is a real **differential growth** simulation: each strand is a polyline whose nodes (1) attract toward connected neighbors, (2) **repel all nearby nodes via an O(n) uniform-grid spatial hash** (so the line refuses to self-intersect and wrinkles into organic brain-coral folds), (3) smooth curvature, (4) **insert new nodes as edges lengthen** (so the line *must* fold into the space вҖ” the algorithm's signature), and (5) occasionally **branch** a growing tip; ~2200-node cap вҶ’ slows to a shimmer. A fresh garden looks like a reef after ~30вҖ“60s and is denser/different after 3 min (**genuine long-form state + memory** вҖ” answers the menu's thin "long-form generative" lane), with a ~12-min "goodnight" fade. **Music without a harmony engine:** a calm ~380вҖ“520ms clock maps the most-active growing TIP's vertical position to a warm **C-major pentatonic** note (top = higher) on a soft sine/triangle bell, over an always-on low-C+G drone, with brighter octave-up bells on branch events вҖ” **the coral literally composes the slow melody it traces** (pitch/melodic-CONTOUR IS the idea вҖ” answers JURY #2 вҖ” but melodic, NOT the over-used vertical voice-leading the kids lane hardened into: 941 voice-leading, 950 role-harmony, 957 cadence). **Calm + bedtime** directly answers the jury's "kids builds are too bright/active, calm is under-served." **Input = device-tilt PRIMARY** (`DeviceOrientationEvent`, iOS `requestPermission()` inside the Start tap вҶ’ a gravity/light vector the coral tips lean toward within ~0.5s; **tilt is 1Г—/10 in the kids audit вҖ” deliberately dodges the touch-drag monoculture, 5 of the last ~7 kids builds**); tap-to-seed is a secondary garnish; desktop pointer-drag + idle auto-demo so a hands-free 06:30 glance sees coral blooming + hears the melody within ~1s. **Output = pure Canvas2D** luminous glow (layered `shadowBlur` bloom/mid/core + radial-gradient seed/tip nodes + trailing-alpha persistence over an indigoвҶ’violetвҶ’teal underwater gradient) вҖ” the **bulletproof everywhere-render with zero GPU-context risk on a phone**, and the **fresher/scarcer surface** per the latest jury (three.js BANNED 7Г—; WebGPU + raw-WebGL2 both recently hit the audit cap; Canvas2D collapsed to 3/15 вҶ’ fresh-again). **Kids-safe audio:** `masterGain (вүӨ0.26) вҶ’ lowpass ~6.5kHz вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor(вҲ’10/20:1) вҶ’ destination`, no wrong notes, loudness normalized 1/вҲҡvoices (a busy garden never gets louder), no harsh/high transients. **Ambition floor 4/5** (#1 never-used technique [**differential growth**; grep-0Г— in INDEX/READMEs] В· #2 вүҘ3 subsystems [differential-growth solver w/ spatial-hash repulsion + tilt/gravity input + melody/branch scheduler + Canvas2D glow render = 4] В· #3 named refs [**Anders Hoff / *Inconvergent* "Differential Line"** В· **Entagma** differential-growth tutorials В· **arXiv:2504.18040 "Cabbage" (Apr 2025)**] В· #5 in-README dated **RESEARCH В§560** вҖ” 25 straight cycles 535вҖ“560). #4 NOT claimed (single-cycle ship). `diversity: banned=[three.js (JURY 7Г—), mic-as-primary (JURY 4Г—), granular (JURY 4Г—), "pitch-held-dumb/drone+texture" stance (JURY ~10Г—), WebGPU-OUTPUT (audit cap), raw-WebGL2-OUTPUT (audit cap), touch-drag-pitch INPUT (kids monoculture 5Г—), voice-leading/harmony-engine TECH (kids 941/950/957 + adult 7-of-10), soft-body/blob/Verlet THEME (5 prior kids jelly pieces)] В· picked=[device-tilt INPUT (1Г—/10, non-touch, embodied), **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (fresh-again, bulletproof, non-three.js/WebGPU/WebGL2), **differential-growth TECH** (0Г—; melodic-contour music, NOT a harmony engine, NOT soft-body), calm bioluminescent-underwater bedtime VIBE (off the bright-playful kids cluster + off cosmic-nebula adult cluster)]` вҖ” clears every ban. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; zero AI/network/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + Canvas2D). **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` вҶ’ **`вң“ Compiled successfully in 2.4min`** вҶ’ Linting/type-check PASS; grep-confirmed zero warnings/errors attributable to 964/coral вҖ” all lint warnings are pre-existing `src/lib/**` + other prototypes); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; infra, not code вҖ” identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT device/ear-verified** (no tilt sensor or audio in container; the differential-growth solver + contourвҶ’pentatonic mapping are reasoned-correct + tsc/eslint-clean, but the glow feel, growth pacing, and tilt response are unconfirmed by hand/eye/ear вҖ” the always-on drone + auto-demo guarantee a sounding, blooming glance with zero interaction). Winner of a kids **DEEP** 2-render fire (Canvas2D vs WebGL2 of the same engine); banked **`963-kids-coral-bloom` вӯҗ RESURRECT-FIRST (kids)** вҖ” the IDENTICAL differential-growth coral on **raw WebGL2 additive-glow quads** (the richer-bloom twin; resurrect on a desktop/Tauri context where the GPU lands, or fold its glow into 964). Returned complete + self-reported tsc/eslint-clean; `cp`'d to scratchpad then `rm -rf`'d before the winner-only build (NOT committed; IDEAS В§560). ## Earlier (Cycle 558 вҖ” **kids** build В· WIDE, 3 "real melody/harmony IS the toy" explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/957-kids-come-home](/dream/957-kids-come-home)** вҖ” Come Home: **drag a glowing firefly up a hill and feel it want to fall *home* вҖ” near the top it trembles at the leading tone, pulled toward the tonic, and when you let go it swoops down and lands on a warm chord. A real VвҶ’I cadence a 4-year-old plays with one finger.** `demoable` В· Cycle 558 (kids 4+ / **touch-drag (release = resolve)** / **raw WebGL2 вҶ’ Canvas2D fallback**). **The first KIDS piece in the lab where real tonal tension-and-resolution IS the toy вҖ” the directest answer to JURY 2026-06-25 #2** ("make music from PITCH again; pitch as expressive material, not the thing you apologize for omitting") on the kids axis, where *every* prior kids build held pitch deliberately dumb ("no wrong notes" + drone) вҖ” the exact crystallized formula the same jury flagged as a pruning candidate (935-kids-shake-critters). Here the music is the **felt pull of harmony**: the hill is a C-major diatonic ladder (doвҖ“reвҖ“miвҖ“faвҖ“solвҖ“laвҖ“**ti**); dragging the firefly up raises the pitch and the *tension* (hotter color, faster shimmer, a detune wobble), near the top the **leading tone (ti)** visibly trembles wanting home, and releasing swoops it down to the **tonic** with a warm I-chord "ahh" bloom вҖ” a genuine **VвҶ’I leading-tone cadence**. Under the melody an **auto-harmony crossfades IвҶ”V** by tensionВІ so the child hears the cadence, not a lone note. **Grounded in 1-day-old research:** FranГ§ois Pachet's **arXiv:2606.24911** ("Attractive and Repulsive Pattern Control in Sequence Generation," Jun 2026) frames a target pattern as an *attractor* the sequence is drawn toward вҖ” the **tonic is the attractor**, the firefly is *pulled home*; the literal today's-researchвҶ’today's-build chain. **Hands-off auto-demo within ~0.9s** вҖ” a ghost firefly rises to the leading tone, trembles, releases, resolves home on a ~7.5s loop, so an untouched 06:30 glance is alive and sounding the cadence; real touch overrides, 4s idle resumes. **Renderer = raw WebGL2** (hand-written GLSL ES 3.00: dusk gradient that warms with tension, dark rolling hill, home glow, additive firefly bloom + trail, GPU tremble) вҶ’ **Canvas2D fallback** painting the identical scene (`text-rose-300` "(showing the simple view)" notice) вҶ’ context-loss handling + full teardown; **NOT three.js** (jury-banned 7Г—), **NOT WebGPU** (at the diversity edge ~4Г—/10 across 954/950/947/942 + unvalidated headless вҖ” the robust WebGL2/Canvas2D cascade is the bulletproof kids surface for the unattended glance). **Kids-safe audio** (`gain 0.24 вҶ’ lowpass 7000Hz вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor(-10/20:1) вҶ’ destination`): always-on soft pad, triangle+sine-octave melody voice with a tension detune-wobble LFO, `bloomHome()` warm C-E-G resolution; pitch quantized to 7 rungs so **no wrong note is possible**; AudioContext created/resumed in the Start gesture (iOS); вүҘ64px Start, вүҘ44px controls; dark-bg typography rules. **Single drag gesture, no permission flow, no mic, no granular, no network** вҖ” the most robust straight-to-prod path of the three. **Ambition floor 3/5** (#1 never-used technique [**functional tonal tension вҶ’ VвҶ’I cadence as the interaction itself**; grep-0Г— in INDEX/READMEs вҖ” the lab has scales, chords, JI, voice-leading, but never *the felt pull of resolution* as the toy, and never in the kids lane] В· #3 named refs [**Pachet, arXiv:2606.24911, Jun 2026** В· "Sad syntax? tonal closure in children," arXiv:2008.01810 В· **Bernstein** on the appoggiatura] В· #5 in-README dated **RESEARCH В§558** вҖ” 23 straight cycles 535вҖ“558). #2/#4 NOT claimed (single audio source+canvas = 2 subsystems; single-cycle ship). `diversity: banned=[three.js (JURY 7Г—), mic-as-primary (JURY 4Г—), granular (JURY 4Г—), "pitch-held-dumb/drone+texture" stance (JURY ~10Г—), WebGPU-OUTPUT (audit ~4Г—/10), voice-leading/chord-progression-engine (kids recipe 941/945/950)] В· picked=[touch-drag-release INPUT (non-mic/camera/tilt), **raw-WebGL2вҶ’Canvas2D OUTPUT** (fresh, non-WebGPU/three.js, bulletproof), **functional-tension/VвҶ’I-cadence TECH** (real harmonic *pull* IS the idea вҖ” the opposite of pitch-held-dumb; NOT granular, NOT a voice-leading lookup), warm-dusk tender VIBE (off both the cosmic-nebula adult cluster and the bright-playful kids cluster)]` вҖ” clears every ban and is the directest jury-#2 hit. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; zero AI/network/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + WebGL2/Canvas2D). **Compile + ESLint + full-project type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` reached **`Collecting page data`** = compile/lint/type all PASS; zero warnings/errors attributable to 957 вҖ” every lint warning is pre-existing `src/lib/**`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; `ulimit -n` 4096, cgroup-locked; infra, not code вҖ” identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT GPU/ear-verified** (no WebGL device or audio in container; the cadence mapping + IвҶ”V crossfade are reasoned-correct, static-only). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire, all three making real melody/harmony the toy via a *different* renderer Г— input Г— technique; banked **`959-kids-chord-kites` вӯҗ RESURRECT-FIRST (kids)** вҖ” tilt to fly two kites, the *interval* between them is the harmony (organum), **raw WebGPU compute** particle wind-field вҖ” and **`958-kids-stepping-stones`** вҖ” place lily-pad stones at heights, a frog hops your melody's *contour* (step vs leap), **Canvas2D**. Both returned complete + self-reported clean; `cp`'d to scratchpad then `rm -rf`'d before the winner-only build (NOT committed; IDEAS В§558). Design notes: `src/app/dream/957-kids-come-home/README.md`

## Earlier (Cycle 557 вҖ” **adult** build В· WIDE, 3 harmony explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/954-sync-bloom](/dream/954-sync-bloom)** вҖ” Sync Bloom: **a field of 1024 coupled oscillators on the GPU вҖ” scribble coupling into them and watch sub-populations spontaneously phase-LOCK into glowing colour-bands, each locked cluster snapping to a just-intonation pitch, so the chord you hear is literally the field reaching consensus.** `demoable` В· Cycle 557 (adult / **pointer-brush + autonomous K** / **raw-WebGPU `@compute` вҶ’ WebGL2/CPU fallback**). **The lab's first Kuramoto coupled-oscillator synchronization piece, and the single object that answers BOTH dominant jury provocations at once** вҖ” JURY 2026-06-25 **#1** (WebGPU compute is *still* the scarce 1Г—/15 surface вҖ” push GPU onto **raw WGSL `@compute`**, NOT three.js) **and #2** (kill the "pitch held deliberately dumb" boilerplate; make real **harmony** the idea). **The concept is the surprise:** instead of looking a chord up from a grammar, you *grow* it вҖ” harmony as **emergent synchronization consensus**. The mechanism is real physics: N=1024 oscillators step `dОё_i/dt = Пү_i + K_iВ·rВ·sin(ПҲвҲ’Оё_i)` via the mean-field order parameter `rВ·e^{iПҲ}=(1/N)ОЈe^{iОё_j}` (O(N), not O(NВІ)); when coupling K beats the natural-frequency spread, sub-populations **phase-lock** вҖ” which is *physically what consonance is* (simple ratios phase-lock; dissonance beats). **On the GPU:** a WGSL `@compute` **reduce pass** (tree-reduction вҶ’ order parameter) + **advance pass** (each phase steps toward the mean field) + instanced glowing render (hue=phase, bloom=sync); async `mapAsync` reads phases back, a histogram detects locked **clusters**, each cluster's effective frequency snaps to the nearest **just-intonation partial** (1, 9/8, 5/4, 4/3, 3/2, 5/3, 15/8, 2) of a drifting root вҶ’ the set of locked clusters = the current chord, voiced by warm **additive + FM** tones over a drone (NOT granular, NOT samples). **Interaction:** pointer brush drips coupling K into a soft region (scribble energy in вҶ’ that patch crystallizes into sync and its pitch locks); a global-K slider sweeps scattered/beating вҶ” locked/resolved; **autonomous K-breathing** on a slow sine so an idle glance self-organizes within ~1s. **Ambition floor 4/5** (#1 never-used technique [**Kuramoto coupled-oscillator synchronization вҶ’ emergent JI harmony**; grep-0Г— in INDEX/READMEs] В· #2 вүҘ3 subsystems [WGSL `@compute` solver + GPU phase-readback/cluster-detector + JI-snap harmony synth + instanced render = 4] В· #3 named refs [**Y. Kuramoto 1975** В· **Strogatz, *Sync* 2003** В· **KoPE, arXiv 2604.07904, 2026** вҖ” the days-old DL revival of Kuramoto sync that prompted reading synchronization as a generative primitive] В· #5 in-README dated **RESEARCH В§557** вҖ” 22 straight cycles 535вҖ“557). #4 NOT claimed (single-cycle ship). `diversity: banned=[three.js (JURY 7Г—), mic-as-primary (JURY 4Г—), granular-texture synth (JURY 4Г—), "pitch-held-dumb/drone+texture" stance (JURY ~10Г—)] В· picked=[pointer-couple INPUT (non-mic), **raw-WebGPU `@compute` OUTPUT** (the scarce 1Г— surface вҖ” jury #1; WebGL2/CPU fallback, NOT three.js), **Kuramoto-syncвҶ’emergent-JI-harmony TECH** (real harmony IS the idea per jury #2 вҖ” NOT granular, NOT a drone, NOT a voice-leading lookup), luminous self-organizing sync-field VIBE (off the over-rep cosmic-nebula adult cluster)]` вҖ” clears every ban and is the *only* recent build on raw-WebGPU-compute. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; zero AI/network/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + WebGPU/WebGL2; the repo's existing `webgpu.d.ts`/`@webgpu/types` resolve the WGSL types). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` reached **`Collecting page data`** = compile/lint/type all PASS; zero warnings/errors attributable to 954 вҖ” all lint warnings are pre-existing `src/lib/**`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (infra, not code вҖ” identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT GPU/ear-verified** (no WebGPU device or audio in container; the GPU readback timing + clusterвҶ’JI mapping are reasoned-correct, static-only). Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-explorer fire, all three answering jury #2 via a *different mechanism Г— surface*; banked **`955-cadence-river` вӯҗ RESURRECT-FIRST (adult)** вҖ” an autonomous long-form **functional-harmony chorale** (TвҶ’PDвҶ’D grammar + SATB voice-leading + circle-of-fifths modulation, raw-WebGL2 voice-ribbons) вҖ” and **`956-counterpoint-weave`** вҖ” draw a cantus firmus, a **species-counterpoint** engine (Fux) weaves 1вҖ“3 voices on Canvas2D. Both returned complete + self-reported tsc/eslint-clean; `cp`'d to scratchpad then `rm -rf`'d before the winner-only build (NOT committed; IDEAS В§557). Design notes: `src/app/dream/954-sync-bloom/README.md`

## Earlier (Cycle 556 вҖ” **kids** build В· DEEP, 1 concept Г— 2 render approaches, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/953-kids-iron-garden](/dream/953-kids-iron-garden)** вҖ” Iron Garden: **drag glowing magnet-flowers around a dark field and watch thousands of iron filings snap into the invisible lines of force between them вҖ” then slide two flowers together and their notes bloom into a chord the instant their fields connect** рҹ§ІрҹҢёвңЁ. `demoable` В· Cycle 556 (kids 4+ / **multi-touch drag** / **Canvas2D particle field**). **Invisible-physics-made-visible applied to MAGNETISM, not the over-done cymatics.** This cycle's research dive found the 2026 cymatics-toy resurgence (CymaVis, Cymatica, Chladni Screen вҖ” all 2026), and the lab already did cymatics twice (`19-cymatics`, `165-cymatics`); so I applied the *same* "make the invisible field visible + audible" idea to a physics the lab has **never** touched вҖ” Faraday's magnetic **lines of force**. **The field is real:** each flower is a 2D dipole (a + pole and a вҲ’ pole offset along its axis); ~4,200 iron filings each frame sample the superposed field `B(P)=ОЈ qВ·(PвҲ’pole)/|PвҲ’pole|Ві` (`field.ts`), orient as short streaks **along** the local field direction, slide along it to pile into the visible lines of force, and take their nearest flower's hue вҖ” drawn as additive (`globalCompositeOperation:"lighter"`) hue-bucketed strokes for glowing chains. **Harmony is emergent + physical, not a voice-leading engine:** 6 flowers on a pentatonic scale (C3 E3 G3 A3 C4 E4 вҖ” **no wrong notes**); when two flowers' fields bridge (proximityВІ), a glowing connecting ribbon draws and their two notes ring together as a soft chord (gain вҲқ proximityВІ); grabbing one alone hums its single note scaled to motion. **Kid-safe audio chain:** two detuned triangle oscillators per voice вҶ’ lowpass вҶ’ convolver plate-reverb bloom + `DynamicsCompressor` limiter вҶ’ master; a very quiet in-key pad so a cold load isn't silent. **Self-demo:** untouched ~4s, the flowers drift along smooth incommensurate-sine noise paths, attracting/separating on their own (a "tap to begin" gate satisfies autoplay; `text-rose-300` notice if Canvas2D/Web-Audio is missing). **Distinct from `192-kids-magnet-notes`** (point-attraction between orbs) вҖ” this renders the FIELD ITSELF, thousands of filings tracing the lines of force. **Ambition floor 4/5** (#1 never-used technique [real magnetic-dipole field + iron-filing alignment as the instrument; grep-0Г— вҖ” 192 is point-attraction, the existing cymatics are *acoustic* Chladni] В· #2 вүҘ3 subsystems [multi-touch magnet drag + dipole-superposition field solver + filing alignment/advection sim + pentatonic synth + field-bridge harmony detector + Canvas2D render = 5] В· #3 named refs [**Michael Faraday's "lines of force"**; the classic iron-filings demonstration] В· #5 in-README dated **RESEARCH В§556** вҖ” 21 straight cycles 535вҖ“556). #4 NOT claimed (single-cycle ship; GPU-dense sibling banked). **Renderer choice = the jury read:** the jury flagged a **12-of-15 GPU monoculture**; my audit found WebGPU over the cap (950/947/942/941) and Canvas2D fresh (only 952 in the last-10), so a robust **Canvas2D** kids piece (runs on any iPad, no float-render-target dependency, no per-frame React churn) is the deliberate counter-swing. `diversity: banned=[three.js (JURY 7Г—), mic-as-primary (JURY 4Г—), granular (JURY 4Г—), "pitch-held-dumb" stance (JURY ~10Г—), WebGPU-OUTPUT (audit вүҘ4Г—/10), voice-leading/chord-progression-engine (kids recipe 941/945/950)] В· picked=[multi-touch-drag INPUT (non-mic/camera/tilt), Canvas2D OUTPUT (fresh, non-WebGPU/three.js), magnetic-dipole-field + iron-filing-alignment TECH with field-bridge EMERGENT harmony (non-voice-leading, non-granular), science-wonder/tactile VIBE (off the harmony-garden recipe)]` вҖ” clears every ban. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; zero AI/network/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + Canvas2D only). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вң“ Compiled successfully in 43s`** вҶ’ lint/type PASS, grep-confirmed zero "Failed to compile"/"Type error"; one type error caught + fixed in the one allowed attempt вҖ” TS resets `canvas` null-narrowing inside nested closures, aliased to a declared-non-null binding); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (infra, not code вҖ” identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT ear/touch-verified** (no audio device or multi-touch in container). Winner of a kids **DEEP** 2-approach fire; banked **`954-kids-iron-garden-gl` вӯҗ** (same concept, **raw-WebGL2** GPU-advected ~80k filings вҖ” denser/silkier; IDEAS В§556). Design notes: `src/app/dream/953-kids-iron-garden/README.md`

## Earlier (Cycle 554 вҖ” **kids** build В· DEEP, 1 concept Г— 3 role/render approaches, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/950-kids-sky-conductor](/dream/950-kids-sky-conductor)** вҖ” Sky Conductor: **two 4-year-olds, two iPads, one tiny orchestra вҖ” one child CONDUCTS (sweeps the device to set the tempo and which warm chord the sky is on) and the other PLAYS notes that automatically fit the conductor's current chord, so they make real chords-and-melody together and nobody can play a wrong note** рҹҺјрҹҢҲрҹӨқ. `demoable` В· Cycle 554 (kids 4+ / **device-tilt conductor + tap player + serverless WebRTC multi-user** / **raw WebGPU вҶ’ raw-WebGL2 fallback**). **The deepening of the lab's WebRTC category-opener** (`918-kids-starlight-friend`, where two kids fling *identical* twinkles with no roles/structure) into **"a conducted two-player ensemble with roles"** вҖ” the *literal* phrasing of **JURY 2026-06-25 #4** ("develop the category-openers, don't open a fifth вҖҰ the WebRTC room вҶ’ a conducted two-player ensemble with roles"). Also the directest kids answer to **#1** (push GPU onto **raw WebGPU**, the scarcest 1Г—/10 surface вҖ” NOT three.js) and **#2** (make music from real **pitch/harmony** again вҖ” here a warm **IвҖ“IVвҖ“VвҖ“vi** progression with the melody voiced into the live chord, the idea carried by the *role split* not a voice-leading engine, so it dodges the hardening 550/551/942 voice-leading template). **INPUT** device-tilt/sweep (conductor) + tap (player) + **serverless WebRTC** co-play (`harmony.ts` `voiceTap()` snaps every player tap to a chord tone of the conductor's current chord вҶ’ no wrong note); on-screen **drag fallback** when tilt is unavailable; **NOT mic** (jury-banned 4Г—). **OUTPUT** primary **raw WebGPU/WGSL** fragment sky (chord-colored gradient, tempo-pulsed shimmer, note-blooms) вҶ’ hand-written **raw-WebGL2** fallback painting the identical `SkyState` вҶ’ `text-rose-300` notice if neither; **NOT three.js**. **Networking** reimplements 918's serverless handshake (host `createOffer()` вҶ’ ICE вҶ’ **gzip SDP via `CompressionStream` вҶ’ base64url `#join=` link** вҶ’ guest answer code вҶ’ host paste; data channel `ordered:false/maxRetransmits:0`; tiny `{role:'conductor',chord,bpm}` / `{role:'player',note}` events; both peers synth+render locally) вҖ” **no signaling server, no TURN, zero backend, no api route / no `guard`**. **Ghost-friend** auto-plays whichever role the local child isn't, within ~1s, driving a full chord-progression-with-melody demo on a cold untouched device, and bows out the instant a real data channel opens (networking purely additive) вҖ” guarantees a sounding, color-changing, two-player-looking glance with zero interaction. **Kids-safe chain** `gain(вүӨ0.24) вҶ’ lowpass 6.5kHz вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor(-10/20:1) вҶ’ destination`; always-on warm pad chord-bed that glides on chord changes; bell/triangle melody (вүҘ20ms attacks); вүҘ64px tap targets; no reading; full teardown (rAF + oscillators + `ctx.close()` + deviceorientation/resize listeners + RTCPeerConnection/channel + ghost timer + GPU/GL resources). **Zero new npm deps** (WebGPU/WebGL2 + Web Audio + built-in WebRTC/CompressionStream + the already-present `@webgpu/types`). **Clears ambition floor 3/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [WebRTC role-networking + shared clock/progression engine + dual-role pad+melody synth + WebGPU/WebGL2 render = 4] В· #3 named refs [**The Hub / League of Automatic Music Composers**; **Orff Schulwerk** children's-ensemble pedagogy; the **Frontiers Psychology 2026** group-music-game study where the instrumental-*ensemble* phase itself drove cooperation] В· #4 multi-cycle [this IS cycle-2 of 918's stated commitment вҖ” cycle-1 shared sky, cycle-2 roles/structure, cycle-3 3+ players] В· #5 in-README dated RESEARCH В§554 вҖ” **19 cycles running** 535вҖ“554). #1 NOT claimed (WebRTC + WebGPU both have lab priors; the fresh axis is *role-complementarity as the deepening*, not a lab-first technique). `diversity: banned=[three.js (JURY 7Г—), mic-as-primary (JURY 4Г—), granular (JURY 4Г—), "pitch-held-dumb/drone+texture" stance (JURY ~10Г—)] В· picked=[device-tilt + WebRTC-multiuser INPUT (non-mic; deepens the 1Г— WebRTC opener per jury #4), raw-WebGPUвҶ’WebGL2 OUTPUT (the scarce 1Г— GPU surface вҖ” jury #1; NOT three.js), role-split chord-context-+-voiced-melody harmony TECH (real IвҖ“IVвҖ“VвҖ“vi, pitch IS the idea, NOT granular, NOT a voice-leading engine), warm social kids-ensemble VIBE]` вҖ” clears every ban. **Mode = DEEP** (1 concept Г— 3 role/render approaches вҖ” alternating after two WIDE nights 552/553, and jury #4 explicitly says "go DEEP on one" category-opener). **Love-aligned** вҖ” extends the loved loop/layering + kids-character cluster (`172-loop-station`вқӨпёҸ, `111-kids-shape-loop`вқӨпёҸ, `234-kids-hand-creature`вқӨпёҸ, `317-kids-color-bells`вқӨпёҸ): "you and a friend make a song together" is the social form of that layered-build joy. **Siblings banked (IDEAS В§554):** **`948-kids-duet-grove` вӯҗ RESURRECT-FIRST (kids)** вҖ” groove-keeper + melody-maker on ONE shared 8-step clock, **raw WebGL2** (the most viscerally legible "we made a song" + the bulletproof no-WebGPU twin; banked only because WebGL2 sits at the 4Г—/10 audit ban-edge where the winner lands the scarce WebGPU) + **`949-kids-echo-birds`** вҖ” call-and-response turn-taking bird-conversation, **Canvas2D** (the freshest renderer + most dialogic, but doesn't advance the GPU ask + harmonically thinnest). Both returned complete + self-reported clean; `cp`'d to scratchpad then `rm -rf`'d before the winner-only build (NOT committed). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вң“ Compiled successfully in 54s`** вҶ’ Linting/type-check PASS; grep-confirmed **zero** "950"/"sky-conductor"/"Failed to compile"/"Type error"/"error TS" вҖ” all warnings pre-existing `src/lib/**`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; `ulimit -n` 4096, cgroup-locked; infra, not code вҖ” identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT GPU/device/ear-verified** (no WebGPU/audio/motion-sensor/second-peer in container вҖ” unverified: whether the WGSL compiles + the WebGL2 fallback matches on real hardware [robust cascade + ghost cover every path], whether two iPads connect over the serverless gzip-SDP link [great same-LAN/hotspot = the two-iPads-side-by-side case; symmetric-NAT pairs may not, but that path is purely additive], and whether a 4yo reads "tilt = conduct the sky / tap = sing into it"; the always-on pad + ghost-friend auto-co-play guarantee a sounding, harmonising, two-player glance regardless). Design notes: `src/app/dream/950-kids-sky-conductor/README.md`

## Cycle 553 вҖ” **adult** build В· WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1

- **[/dream/947-overtone-loom](/dream/947-overtone-loom)** вҖ” Overtone Loom: **play a chord and SEE why it sounds sweet or sour.** Each note is a stack of harmonic partials; a **raw WebGPU compute shader** paints the live **sensory-dissonance field** (PlompвҖ“Levelt roughness) between every pair of sounding partials along a log-frequency axis вҖ” octaves & fifths **lock dark and smooth**, tritones & minor-2nds **churn bright** вҖ” and a **timbre knob** moves which intervals read as consonant, making tangible the 2026 finding that *consonance is a property of the spectrum, not abstract ratios* рҹҹҰрҹҺ№рҹ“Ҳ. `demoable` В· Cycle 553 (adult / **note-keyboard + MIDI** / **raw WebGPU compute**). **The lab's first dissonance-curve-as-instrument** and the directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-25 #1** (push GPU onto **raw WebGPU compute** вҖ” the scarcest 1Г—/10 surface, NOT three.js) **and #2** (make music from real PITCH/harmony again вҖ” here the *psychoacoustic substrate of consonance itself* IS the idea, a fresh facet distinct from the 550/551 voice-leading cluster). **note-keyboard + Web-MIDI INPUT** (~1.75-octave on-screen chromatic keyboard, pointer/touch; optional `navigator.requestMIDIAccess` вҖ” **NOT mic**, jury-banned 4Г—). **raw-WebGPU/WGSL compute OUTPUT** вҖ” one compute invocation per frequency bin (512 bins dispatched) sums roughness against every sounding partial, rendered as a clinical cyan/white Ikeda interference field; degrades **WebGPU вҶ’ raw-WebGL2 fragment (same math) вҶ’ Canvas2D CPU** with a visible amber notice. **Additive synthesis** (banks of Web Audio oscillators per voice, 1/n harmonic rolloff вҖ” **NOT granular**, jury-banned 4Г—) + the canonical **Sethares/PlompвҖ“Levelt** model (`dissonance.ts`: `pairRoughness`, `totalDissonance`, `fieldAt` вҖ” the same math mirrored in WGSL + GLSL). A scalar **total-dissonance meter** rises/falls as you stack notes; the timbre/partial-count sliders prove the В§553 paper's point by shifting the consonant intervals. Master chain `gain(вүӨ0.22) вҶ’ lowpass 7kHz вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor вҶ’ destination`; adding notes busies the field, never spikes loudness. **~1.2s-idle auto-demo** cycles unison вҶ’ octave вҶ’ fifth вҶ’ triad вҶ’ tritone вҶ’ minor-2nd вҶ’ cluster so a hands-off glance *hears & sees* the consonance/dissonance contrast within ~1s; full teardown (oscillators + `ctx.close()` + rAF + GPU buffers + MIDI/resize listeners). **No API route / no `guard`** (all client-side, no network). **Zero new npm deps.** README cites **RESEARCH В§553 (2026-06-25)** вҖ” "Elementary spectrum for the dissonance curve" (*Journal of Mathematics and Music* 2026, DOI 10.1080/17459737.2026.2628778), **Helmholtz, *On the Sensations of Tone* (1863)**, **Plomp & Levelt (1965)**, **Sethares, *Tuning, Timbre, Spectrum, Scale* (1998)** вҖ” in-README dated citation (criterion #5) **18 cycles running** (535вҖ“553). **Clears ambition floor 3/5** (#1 never-used technique [dissonance-curve / sensory-roughness field as a playable instrument вҖ” grep-0Г— in the lab] В· #3 named refs [Helmholtz В· PlompвҖ“Levelt В· Sethares В· the 2026 paper] В· #5 dated RESEARCH В§553). `diversity: banned=[three.js (JURY 7Г—), mic-as-primary (JURY 4Г—), granular (JURY 4Г—), "pitch-held-dumb/drone+texture" stance (JURY ~10Г—), cosmic-ambient adult vibe (5Г—)] В· picked=[note-keyboard/MIDI INPUT (off banned mic), raw-WebGPU-compute OUTPUT (the scarcest 1Г— GPU surface вҖ” jury #1; degrades WebGL2вҶ’Canvas2D), additive + Sethares-dissonance TECH (consonance IS the idea, non-granular), clinical Ikeda spectral-lab VIBE (off the cosmic-nebula cluster)]` вҖ” clears every ban. **Mode = WIDE** (3 orthogonal explorers; the 2026-06-25 jury is dominantly a spread/ban signal and its named DEEP targets were just-done [depth, by 551] or rotation-mismatched [AI-chain voice-ban, WebRTC is kids] вҖ” so three fresh-tag bets beat one more harmony concept). **Love-aligned** вҖ” sits exactly at the intersection of Karel's loved **spectral cluster** (`223-fourier-paint`вқӨпёҸ, `243-spectral-cloud`вқӨпёҸ, `267-spectral-drift`вқӨпёҸ, `321-spectral-flight`вқӨпёҸ) and **GPU compute** (`130-tsl-particle-compute`вқӨпёҸ). **Siblings banked (IDEAS В§553):** **`948-cantus-engine` вӯҗ RESURRECT-FIRST (adult)** вҖ” a long-form (5+ min) self-developing **counterpoint** engine (seed a 4-note motif вҶ’ Fux/Bach inversionВ·retrogradeВ·augmentationВ·strettoВ·modulation over a ~330s escalating arc; raw-WebGL2 scrolling score); the lab's long-form-stateful gap, lost only because WebGL2 is less scarce than WebGPU compute + the counterpoint lane was just mined (550/551/552). **`949-maqam-road`** вҖ” a microtonal Arabic **maqam** instrument (4 maqamat by exact cents, true quarter-tone portamento + ornaments, tonic+fifth drone; Canvas2D "road"); the non-Western-pitch surprise. Both returned complete + self-reported clean; `cp`'d to `/tmp/dream-losers-553/` then `rm -rf`'d before the winner-only build (NOT committed). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вң“ Compiled successfully in 110s`** вҶ’ Linting/type-check PASS; one fix attempt landed = corrected a Web-MIDI ambient-type collision [`MIDIAccess` vs DOM `MidiAccess`] by adopting the DOM WebMIDI types like `902-harmonic-mirror`; 947 carries one **non-fatal** `react-hooks/exhaustive-deps` warning [ref-in-cleanup вҖ” same class as the pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings; warnings don't fail `next build`]; all other warnings pre-existing `src/lib/**`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; infra, not code вҖ” identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT GPU/ear-verified** (no WebGPU/audio in container вҖ” unverified: whether the WGSL compute shader compiles + the roughness field reads as intended on real hardware [robust WebGL2 + Canvas2D + auto-demo fallbacks cover every failure], and whether the additive timbre + dissonance contrast are audible on a real speaker; the auto-demo guarantees a sounding, evolving glance with zero interaction).

## Earlier (Cycle 552 вҖ” **kids** build В· WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/946-kids-bird-round](/dream/946-kids-bird-round)** вҖ” Bird Round: a 4-year-old **drags a glowing bird up & down a tree to sing a little tune** (height = pitch, snapped to a friendly pentatonic so it's always musical); let go and the bird **remembers the melody and loops it**, then tap *add-a-bird* and a second bird sings the **same tune offset in time** вҖ” a real **canon / round** ("Row, Row, Row Your Boat") that blooms into layered counterpoint as the flock grows рҹҗҰрҹҺ¶рҹҢ…. `demoable` В· Cycle 552 (kids / **touch-drag** / **raw WebGL2**). **The lab's first KIDS canon/counterpoint piece** (302-mirror-canon was adult-only) and the directest kids answer to **JURY 2026-06-25 #2** (*make music from real PITCH/melody again* вҖ” melody IS the playable idea here, breaking the banned "pitch held deliberately dumb" stance). **touch-DRAG INPUT** вҖ” vertical finger position over time = a melody; live chirp under the finger (throttled), released drag вҶ’ `makeMelodyFromDrag` quantizes the samples to 8 steps over ~4 beats + snaps each to a C-pentatonic scale вҶ’ stored as the shared melody. **raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT** (`gl.ts`, hand-written GLSL вҖ” **NOT three.js**, jury #1) вҖ” a soft dawn-gold treetop with additive glowing birds + light-trails that pulse when they sing; **Canvas2D fallback** renders the same scene if WebGL2 is unavailable. **Shared-clock CANON scheduler** (`audio.ts/makeScheduler`) вҖ” ONE look-ahead clock anchored to a fixed start; each bird is a voice with a constant time offset (1 beat per added voice), all voices read the same melody so adding a bird = a time-shifted copy = a genuine round; loop wraparound handled, `pulses[]` exported so the renderer bobs/glows the exact bird that just sang. **Bright chirp synth** (triangle+sine with a quick upward pitch-glide attack, light 6.5 Hz vibrato, short bell/pluck env вҖ” **NOT granular**, jury ban) + a quiet tonic+fifth **pad** bed. Master chain `gain(вүӨ0.26) вҶ’ lowpass 7kHz вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor вҶ’ destination`; **more birds must NOT mean louder** вҖ” `applyFlockGain = MASTER_CEIL/вҲҡvoices`. **Kids-safe & hands-off:** gesture-gated AudioContext, вүҘ64вҖ“96px emoji controls (в–¶пёҸ start / рҹҗҰвһ• add-bird / рҹ”„ reset), no reading required, instant chirp/loop response; **~2s-idle auto-demo** sings a default tune and adds a 2nd bird so a hands-off glance hears a little round + sees two birds glowing within ~1вҖ“2s; full teardown (scheduler interval + pad + rAF + `ctx.close()`). **No API route / no `guard`** (no network, no AI gen вҖ” all client-side). **Zero new npm deps.** README cites the **round/canon** structure (Reich phasing as adult cousin), the **melodic-contour developmental finding**, and **Toshio Iwai's Electroplankton**. **Clears ambition floor 2/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [drag-to-melody capture/quantizer + shared-clock canon scheduler + chirp synth + WebGL2 renderer = 4] В· #3 named refs [round/canon В· melodic-contour research В· Electroplankton]). `diversity: banned=[three.js (JURY 7Г—), mic-as-primary (JURY 4Г—), granular (JURY 4Г—), "pitch-held-dumb/drone+texture" stance (JURY ~10Г—)] В· picked=[touch-drag INPUT (touch scarce 1Г—), raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT (вҶ’Canvas2D fallback; off banned three.js), melody-capture + CANON/counterpoint TECH (melody IS the idea; non-granular chirp synth), warm dawn-treetop kids VIBE]` вҖ” clears every ban. **Mode = WIDE** (3 orthogonal explorers; deliberate alternation after two DEEP cycles 550/551 + a direct attack on the jury's "house style" critique). **Love-aligned** вҖ” extends the loved loop/layering lineage (`172-loop-station`вқӨпёҸ, `111-kids-shape-loop`вқӨпёҸ, `160-kids-paint-loop`вқӨпёҸ). **Siblings banked (IDEAS В§552):** **944-kids-melody-coaster** (draw a hilly track, a cart rolls + sings the contour as a diatonic melody; WebGL2) + **945-kids-harmony-garden** (tap to plant note-flowers; consonant pairs grow "friend-vines" + the chord nearest-tone voice-leads; Canvas2D вҖ” the directest harmony/voice-leading answer, deferred only because it overlaps 941's harmony territory). Both returned complete + self-reported eslint-0; `rm -rf`'d before the winner-only build (NOT committed). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вң“ Compiled successfully in 2.0min`** вҶ’ Linting/type-check PASS; grep-confirmed zero "946"/"Failed to compile"/"Type error"/"error TS"; all warnings pre-existing `src/lib/**`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (infra, not code вҖ” identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT GPU/ear-verified** (no WebGL2/audio in container вҖ” unverified: whether the canon offsets read as a genuinely harmonious *round* on a real speaker [always-on pad + auto-demo guarantee a sounding, layered glance], and whether drag-to-pitch feels intuitive on a real iPad; robust Canvas2D + pointer fallbacks cover desktop review).

## Earlier (Cycle 551 вҖ” **adult** build В· DEEP, 1 concept Г— 2 render approaches, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/942-depth-harmonic-room](/dream/942-depth-harmonic-room)** вҖ” Depth Harmonic Room: stand in front of the webcam and your **distance + lateral position in the room** place you inside a neo-Riemannian **Tonnetz** of harmony вҖ” walking through space glides you through smooth, **voice-led chord changes** (P / L / R), rendered as a candle-warm WebGPU lattice that blooms as you lean in рҹҺ№рҹ•ҜпёҸрҹҹ . `demoable` В· Cycle 551 (adult / **webcam depth** / **raw WebGPU**). **THE DEEPENING OF 927-depth-room вҖ” and the directest possible multi-provocation answer to JURY 2026-06-25.** It hits **#4** (develop a 0Г— category-opener вҖ” depth-camera вҖ” *don't open a fifth*: this turns 927's "distance вҶ’ texture" into a multi-zone spatial *harmonic instrument you walk through*), **#2** (make music from real PITCH / voice-leading again вҖ” *harmony IS the idea here*, the literal opposite of 927's "pitch held deliberately dumb"), and **#1** (push GPU work onto **raw WebGPU**, the scarcest 1Г—/10 surface вҖ” NOT three.js). **webcam-DEPTH INPUT** вҖ” **Depth Anything V2 (small)** runs in-browser on WebGPU via **Transformers.js** (CDN at runtime, no npm dep), a 256Г—192 frame вҶ’ per-pixel depth (larger = nearer) вҶ’ 16Г—12 grid вҶ’ **nearEnergy** (proximity вҶ’ brightness + chord openness), **centroidX** (lateral вҶ’ Tonnetz column), **depthBand** (lean вҶ’ row), **motion** (вҶ’ shimmer/attack). Depth is the *deepened* category-opener (1Г— in last-10, sanctioned by jury #4). **Raw WebGPU/WGSL OUTPUT** вҖ” a full-screen fragment shader paints a warm volumetric room (amber/rose/deep-teal) with a triangular Tonnetz of glowing pitch-nodes; the **sounding triad-triangle glows brightest and blooms** with proximity, a transient fires on each transform, a focal glow marks where you stand. Degrades **WebGPU вҶ’ raw WebGL2 (`webgl-fallback.ts`, same lattice) вҶ’ DOM chord-view** вҖ” a 3-tier render cascade. **Neo-Riemannian voice-leading ENGINE** (`harmony.ts`) вҖ” every cell is a major/minor triad; adjacent cells differ by a single parsimonious **P** (parallel, third moves ВҪ), **L** (Leittonwechsel, root down ВҪ) or **R** (relative, fifth up a tone), each holding **exactly 2 of 3 common tones** (builder unit-verified across all 24 triads вҖ” involutions + 2-common-tone retention + a real R/L progression CвҶ’AmвҶ’FвҶ’DmвҶ’BвҷӯвҶ’GmвҶ’Eвҷӯ). centroidX walks the R/L third-chain (related keys, one step at a time); lean in/out applies **P** (major-bright вҶ” minor-dark). **SATB nearest-tone voicing** (`voiceTriad`) вҖ” bass=root low; each upper voice takes the octave of a chord tone nearest where it already sits (all 6 assignments tried, min total semitone motion вҖ” Tymoczko's minimal voice-leading), so common tones literally don't move and the one changed tone slides shortest; warm pad voices (detuned sine+triangle вҶ’ soft lowpass + slow vibrato) over a root **drone bed**, each re-voice **glides (portamento ~120вҖ“300ms)** вҖ” smooth, never clicky. Master chain `gain(вүӨ0.28) вҶ’ lowpass 7kHz вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor вҶ’ destination`; additive/subtractive synthesis (**NOT granular** вҖ” jury-banned). **Degrades fully:** no camera / model fails вҶ’ **synthetic Lissajous presence-blob** auto-walks the Tonnetz within ~1s of Start (a hands-off glance *hears evolving harmony + sees the lattice glow*); laptop with no camera вҶ’ **pointer** steers the lattice; on-device only (camera never recorded/uploaded); full teardown (rAF + listeners + webcam tracks + oscillators + `audioCtx.close()` + GPU destroy). **No API route / no `guard`** (no network, no AI image/voice gen вҖ” all client-side). **Zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + WebGPU + the runtime CDN Transformers.js import). README cites **RESEARCH В§551 (2026-06-25)** вҖ” in-README dated citation (criterion #5) **17 cycles running** (535вҖ“551). **Clears ambition floor 3/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [webcam-depth ML pipeline + neo-Riemannian Tonnetz/voice-leading engine + SATB synthesis + WebGPU/WebGL2 lattice render = 4] В· #3 named refs [**Cohn, *Audacious Euphony* 2012**; **Tymoczko, *A Geometry of Music* 2011**; **Aldwell & Schachter, *Harmony and Voice Leading***; **Depth Anything V2 / Transformers.js**] В· #5 dated RESEARCH В§551). #1 NOT claimed (depth-camera has a lab prior вҖ” 927; the Tonnetz appears as a В§533 seed `896-tonnetz-loom`; the lab-fresh axis is *depth-position вҶ’ Tonnetz navigation on WebGPU*, not a brand-new technique). `diversity: banned=[three.js (JURY 7Г—), mic-as-primary (JURY 4Г—), granular (JURY 4Г—), "pitch-held-dumb/drone+texture" stance (JURY ~10Г—), raw-WebGL2-as-primary (audit 4Г—/10 edge), cosmic-ambient adult vibe (5Г—)] В· picked=[webcam-depth INPUT (deepening the 1Г— category-opener per jury #4), raw-WebGPU OUTPUT (scarcest GPU surface 1Г—/10 вҖ” jury #1; ## вӯҗ Earlier (Cycle 550 вҖ” **kids** build В· DEEP, 1 concept Г— 2 render approaches, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/941-kids-choir-bloom](/dream/941-kids-choir-bloom)** вҖ” Choir Bloom: a 4-year-old conducts a choir by dragging singing blob-creatures up and down to PITCHES, and a voice-leading brain turns their little melody into real four-part harmony вҖ” glowing GPU metaballs that bloom brighter as the voices come into a chord рҹҺ¶рҹ«§рҹҢҲ. `demoable` В· Cycle 550 (kids 4+ / **touch pitch-drag** / **WebGPU metaballs**). **For**: kids (4+) / a warm, cozy, sing-together playspace / iPad-or-desktop. **THE LAB'S FIRST CONDUCT-A-CHOIR-BY-PITCH PIECE вҖ” and the deliberate breaking of the "pitch held dumb" template the jury just banned.** This is a piece where **melody and harmony ARE the idea** (the directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-25 provocation #2** вҖ” "make music from real pitch / voice-leading / a harmonic arc again; it must BE the idea, not the thing you apologise for omitting"). **touch pitch-drag INPUT** вҖ” drag the rose **soprano** blob up/down to set its pitch, snapped to a C-major diatonic scale (always in tune, but the child genuinely *chooses each note and hears a melody*); the blob is the вүҘ64px drag handle; inner voices are independently grabbable (gentle chord-tone re-snap on release). Touch is **0Г— in the last-10 audit** вҖ” the freshest input (off the jury-banned mic, off the recent tilt/camera/shake). **WebGPU/WGSL metaball OUTPUT** вҖ” `navigator.gpu` fragment pipeline evaluates a four-source metaball iso-field вҶ’ warm additive glow (soprano=rose, alto=amber, tenor=emerald, bass=violet) that **blooms brighter as the voices become consonant and close** (a `consonance()` measure drives it); WebGPU is **the scarcest GPU surface at 1Г—/10** вҖ” the directest answer to **jury provocation #1** ("ban three.js, push GPU work onto raw WebGPU compute"). **Voice-leading harmony ENGINE** (`voices.ts`) вҖ” the soprano's scale degree implies a diatonic triad (1вҶ’I, 2вҶ’ii, 3вҶ’iii, 4вҶ’IV, 5вҶ’V, 6вҶ’vi) and the bass/tenor/alto each glide (`setTargetAtTime` ~90вҖ“140ms) to the **nearest chord tone within their range** (Aldwell & Schachter's smooth voice-leading), bass nudged toward the root, inner voices kept off unisons вҖ” so **drawing a melody with the lead blob makes real chord changes emerge underneath, a harmonic arc you can hear**. **Formant source-filter "ahh" singing SYNTH** (`audio.ts`, NOT samples / NOT granular / NOT AI) вҖ” each voice is two slightly detuned band-limited sawtooth glottal sources with ~5Hz vibrato вҶ’ a parallel bank of 3вҖ“4 bandpass formant filters (warm /a/ вүҲ F1 700 / F2 1100 / F3 2600 Hz), brighter highs / darker bass per register, so the blobs read as a *singing* choir, not a synth. **Kids-safe chain:** sum вҶ’ `masterGain(0.26)` вҶ’ lowpass 6.5kHz вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor(вҲ’10/20:1)` вҶ’ destination; a harder/faster drag NEVER gets louder or harsher вҖ” only pitch changes; always-on (never silent). **Degrades fully:** no WebGPU вҶ’ hand-written **raw WebGL2** fragment metaball render (`webgl-fallback.ts`, same field/bloom math, NOT three.js) вҶ’ if neither GPU path, a plain-DOM radial-gradient glow + `text-rose-300` notice keeps audio alive; вүҘ72px **Start** gesture-gates the AudioContext + GPU init (iOS); ~2s-idle **auto-demo** drifts the soprano through a calm diatonic tune so a hands-free glance both *sees the metaballs bloom* and *hears the choir + harmony* within ~1s; full teardown (rAF + audio nodes + `device.destroy()` / `WEBGL_lose_context` + `audioCtx.close()`). **No API route, no `guard` needed** (NO mic, NO network, NO AI model вҖ” fully offline + private, exactly right for a kids app); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + WebGPU/WebGL2). README cites **RESEARCH В§550 (2026-06-25)** вҖ” in-README dated citation (criterion #5) **16 cycles running** (535вҖ“550). **Clears ambition floor 3/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [touch pitch-drag conductor + diatonic voice-leading SATB engine + 4-voice formant source-filter synthesis + WebGPU metaball render w/ WebGL2 fallback = 4] В· #3 named refs [**Blob Opera / David Li, Google Arts & Culture 2020**; **Cantor / Chorus Digitalis** formant gesture-singing, IRCAM/LIMSI; **Aldwell & Schachter, *Harmony and Voice Leading***] В· #5 dated RESEARCH В§550). #1 NOT claimed (formant source-filter synthesis has lab priors вҖ” 287-mirror-choir, 413-kids-mouth-mirror, ~61 README hits; ## (Cycle 549 вҖ” **adult** build В· WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/939-aurora-harp](/dream/939-aurora-harp)** вҖ” Aurora Harp: hear space weather *right now* вҖ” the live solar wind streaming past Earth raises a shimmering aurora curtain and plays the magnetosphere's resonances; calm wind = slow ULF drones, a gust or southward Bz = flares, beating and crimson sky рҹҢҢрҹҢ рҹҹўрҹҹЈ. `demoable` В· Cycle 549 (adult / **live external data (NOAA SWPC)** / **raw WebGL2**). **For**: adult / nocturnal-cosmic-contemplative / desktop-or-iPad. **THE LAB'S FIRST LIVE-PLANETARY-INSTRUMENT.** **live-external-data INPUT** вҖ” two NOAA **SWPC** real-time solar-wind products fetched browser-side and polled ~60s: `plasma-5-minute.json` (density, speed, temp) and `mag-5-minute.json` (Bx/By/**Bz_gsm**/Bt) from ACE/DSCOVR at the SunвҖ“Earth **L1** point (0Г— in the last-10 audit вҖ” the freshest possible input). **raw-WebGL2 fragment OUTPUT** (GPU, NOT the banned three.js/Canvas2D/SVG): a full-screen **aurora curtain** вҖ” fbm-folded vertical light sheets, greenвҶ’violetвҶ’crimson by activity, star field over a dark arctic horizon, folding faster with wind speed, reaching higher and shifting crimson-violet on southward Bz. **HARP-style space-weather sonification TECH** вҖ” after NASA **HARP (Heliophysics Audified: Resonances in Plasmas)**: a sustained drone bed on inharmonic resonance **bands**, each a **detuned oscillator pair** producing real *beating* whose rate tracks Bt/turbulence + southward Bz; density gates how many partials sing; gust swells retrigger faster as wind speed rises; a southward-Bz crossing (вүҲ вҲ’7 nT) fires a flare вҖ” sub-rumble + ripple of beating tones synced to an aurora flash. **Pitch held deliberately non-melodic** (drone + resonance bands, NO chord, NO scale вҖ” the *Sun* is the composer; music from data/resonance, the directest JURY 2026-06-24 #3 answer) and it deliberately **drops the consonant-mode safety crutch the jury BANNED** for external-data sonification (it audifies the actual resonances/beating, never an in-tune-by-construction chord). **Master compressor/limiter** for safety; always-on drone (never silent). **Degrades fully:** Start seeds an immediate **synthetic solar wind** so sound + a moving sky appear within ~0.6s before the live feed returns; any fetch failure (offline / CORS / feed gap) вҶ’ the synthetic generator (with periodic southward-Bz "substorm" gusts) takes over behind a calm **amber notice**; no WebGL2 вҶ’ audio-only + amber notice. A live readout (speed km/s, density p/cmВі, Bz nT, Bt nT) + a "what am I hearing" panel explain the mapping; pointer to look around. **No API route, no `guard` needed** (all client-side fetch, zero AI/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (raw WebGL2 + Web Audio).
