- **[/dream/935-kids-shake-critters](/dream/935-kids-shake-critters)** вҖ” Shake the Critters!: a 4-year-old shakes the iPad like a rattle and a little band of glowing jelly-creatures comes alive вҖ” the rhythm you shake is caught into a loop the critters keep grooving рҹ«ЁрҹҹЎрҹ”өрҹҹЈрҹҹў. `demoable` В· Cycle 548 (kids 4+ / **devicemotion-shake** / **three.js GPU**). **For**: kids (4+) / a bright, playful, laugh-first playspace / iPad-or-desktop. **THE LAB'S FIRST SHAKE-DRIVEN STOCHASTIC-SHAKER INSTRUMENT** вҖ” the rattle is **PhISEM (Physically-Informed Stochastic Event Modeling, Perry Cook 1997)**: a shaker is modeled as N virtual beans in a gourd, a per-frame *collision probability rises with shake energy*, and each collision is a short white-noise grain through a resonant bandpass at the shell frequency (~1.7вҖ“6 kHz) with a few-ms exponential decay; summing many grains = the characteristic rattle. **Shake energy вҶ’ grain RATE + resonance BRIGHTNESS, NEVER loudness** (harder shake = more+brighter grains, kids-safe). **devicemotion-SHAKE INPUT** (`acceleration` magnitude + jerk; iOS `DeviceMotionEvent.requestPermission()` gated in the Start tap вҖ” the one fresh 4yo-native channel left: camera was AUDIT-banned 4Г—/10, touch JURY-banned, mic 3Г— / tilt-orientation 2Г— recent; shake is distinct from the tilt-orientation 931/932 just used). **three.js GPU OUTPUT** (the *scarcer* GPU surface after 931+932 both shipped raw-WebGL2; NOT the banned Canvas2D/SVG): five blobby icosphere **critters** with a custom vertex-noise-displacement shader squash/stretch/jiggle on shake energy, collisions puff colored sparkle particles, a rim-glow/tonemap gives a bloom feel вҖ” bold primary critter colors on a warm bright daylight sky (the jury's "active joyful middle", not calm bedtime glow). **PhISEM-shaker + shake-rhythm-loop TECH** вҖ” three voices (soft maraca / woody cabasa / bright shaker) + a low stomp on hard onsets sound like a small band over an always-on warm drone; **pitch held deliberately dumb** (single drone, NO chimes, NO melody, NO notes to miss вҖ” music from **timbre + rhythm**, the directest kids answer to JURY 2026-06-24 #3, and the deliberate inversion of `866-rainstick-sky`'s calm pentatonic). **The groove loop:** a rolling ~3.2s buffer samples the shake-energy envelope; pause вҶ’ the window freezes into a **loop** the critters keep re-triggering, so a warm groove accretes (up to 3 stacked, oldest drops; рҹ§№ clears). **Kids-safe chain:** master-gain ceiling вҶ’ lowpass ~6 kHz вҶ’ soft compressor/limiter; always-on drone (never silent); full teardown (rAF + listeners + three.js dispose + audio nodes). **Degrades fully:** no sensor/desktop/permission-denied вҶ’ pointer/touch **drag** = shake (plays fully by mouse-swipe) + 3s idle auto-demo gently auto-shakes so a hands-free glance sees jiggle+sparkle and hears the rattle within ~0.6s; no WebGL вҶ’ friendly amber notice, audio keeps playing. **No API route, no `guard` needed** (fully client-side, zero AI/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (three@0.182 already present + Web Audio). README cites **RESEARCH В§548 (2026-06-25)** вҖ” in-README dated citation (criterion #5) **14 cycles running** (535вҖ“548). **Clears ambition floor 3/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [devicemotion-shake + three.js GPU critter render + PhISEM stochastic-shaker synth + shake-rhythm groove-loop engine = 4] В· #3 named ref [PhISEM / Perry Cook 1997] В· #5 dated RESEARCH В§548). #1 NOT claimed (PhISM cited once before in `429-kids-texture-paint-tap`; the fresh axis is shake-driven shaker *instrument* + groove-loop). `diversity: banned=[camera (audit 4Г—/10), touch (JURY), Canvas2D/SVG (JURY), interval/JI-harmony (JURY), tilt-orientation (2Г— recent), mic (3Г— recent), raw-WebGL2 (931+932 consecutive)] В· picked=[devicemotion-SHAKE INPUT, three.js GPU OUTPUT (scarcer surface), PhISEM-stochastic-shaker + shake-rhythm-loop TECH (texture+rhythm not pitch), bright-playful daylight-critter-band VIBE]` вҖ” clears every ban. **Mode = DEEP** (kids input palette too narrow for WIDE's distinct-input-per-brief rule вҶ’ 1 concept Г— 2 GPU approaches). **Sibling banked (IDEAS В§548):** **`936-kids-rattle-bloom`** (the same shakeвҶ’PhISEMвҶ’groove concept as a raw-WebGL2 **metaball** fragment shader вҖ” gooey candy-bright blobs that merge with energy; ## Cycle 547 вҖ” **adult** build В· DEEP, 1 concept Г— 2 technical approaches, shipped 1

- **[/dream/932-tilt-orrery](/dream/932-tilt-orrery)** вҖ” Tilt Orrery: tilt your device and a little cosmos tips like a bowl; every body that swings through perihelion rings, and the music is the emergent polyrhythm of orbits рҹӘҗрҹ””. `demoable` В· Cycle 547 (adult / **device-tilt** / **raw WebGPU WGSL compute**). **For**: adult / cosmic-contemplative / iPad-or-desktop. **The whole N-body sim AND the perihelion detection run on the GPU** вҖ” an inline **WGSL compute shader** integrates 3000 bodies in double-buffered (ping-pong A/B) storage buffers (semi-implicit Euler, central inverse-square gravity + a tilt acceleration "tipped bowl"); perihelion is flagged on the GPU as a local max of 1/r and only a tiny per-frame flag buffer is read back **non-blocking** via `mapAsync` (last frame's flags, вүӨ24/readback, 90ms per-body gate) to fire Web Audio bells. **device-tilt INPUT** (`DeviceOrientationEvent`; iOS `requestPermission()` gated in the Start tap; tilt 1Г—/10 вҖ” fresh, off the over-used touch/mic). **raw-WebGPU-compute OUTPUT** (the scarcest GPU surface вҖ” 0Г— in last-10, the directest answer to JURY 2026-06-24 #1 "swing to the scarce GPU surface"; NOT three.js, NOT Canvas2D/SVG). **gravitational perihelion-polyrhythm TECH** вҖ” bell timbre from radius+speed (close+fast = bright bell, far+slow = soft thud), **stereo pan from `cos(angle)`** so you hear the cosmos rotate, tilt-steepness вҶ’ pulse density; **pitch held deliberately dumb** (fixed pentatonic over a sub-bass drone, NO harmony engine вҖ” music from rhythm/space, JURY #3). **The soul / research enrichment:** seven amber bodies are seeded in the **TRAPPIST-1 mean-motion resonance chain** (adjacent period ratios вүҲ 8:5,5:3,3:2,3:2,4:3,3:2) on locked analytic orbits, so a steady hypnotic pulse **self-organizes inside** the chaotic violet field вҖ” Kepler's 1619 *Harmonices Mundi* "harmony of the spheres" made literal, after NASA / SYSTEM Sounds' 2017 TRAPPIST-1 sonification. **Render:** instanced additive glowing quads + a translucent indigo trail veil. **Audio chain:** master gain 0.26 вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressorNode` limiter вҶ’ destination (dense bursts never clip). **Degrades fully:** `navigator.gpu` missing or any WebGPU init throw вҶ’ a 360-body **CPU N-body sim** runs identical physics + perihelion detection and renders additive glow on a 2D `<canvas>`, still sounding (calm amber notice, never a crash); no motion sensor вҶ’ auto-drift Lissajous + pointer-drag + tilt x/y sliders (sounding/moving glance within ~0.6s, zero hardware). **No API route, no `guard` needed** (fully client-side, zero AI/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (raw WebGPU + Web Audio). TRAPPIST-1 / NASA SYSTEM Sounds 2017; Gillon et al. *Nature* 2017] В· #5 dated RESEARCH В§547). #1 NOT claimed (raw WebGPU/WGSL compute has a lab prior вҖ” loved `130-tsl-particle-compute`; the fresh axis is *tilt-driven N-body gravitational-rhythm + resonance-chain-in-chaos*). `diversity: banned=[Canvas2D, SVG, touch-as-primary, interval/JI/consonance-harmony-engine (JURY 2026-06-24); + three.js as the more-represented GPU output in last-10] В· picked=[device-tilt INPUT (fresh, 1Г—), raw-WebGPU-WGSL-compute OUTPUT (scarcest GPU surface, 0Г—), gravitational-perihelion-polyrhythm + TRAPPIST-resonance-in-chaos TECH (rhythm/space, not pitch), cosmic/orrery VIBE]` вҖ” clears every ban. **Mode = DEEP** (the вӯҗ standing adult resurrect-first concept `928-tilt-orrery` Г— 2 approaches). **Sibling banked (IDEAS В§547):** **`933-tilt-orrery`** вӯҗ **RESURRECT-FIRST** (the same concept as a lush three.js `WebGLRenderer` galaxy + a dynamic-`import()` `WebGPURenderer`+TSL compute enhancement вҖ” the proven render path + a reusable build-safe way to use `three/webgpu` here). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вң“ Compiled successfully in 54s`** вҶ’ Linting/type-check PASS, grep-confirmed zero "932"/"tilt-orrery"/"Failed to compile"/"Type error"/"error TS"; ## Cycle 546 вҖ” **kids** build В· DEEP, 1 concept Г— 2 technical approaches, shipped 1

- **[/dream/931-kids-tide-pool](/dream/931-kids-tide-pool)** вҖ” Moonlit Tide Pool: tilt the iPad at bedtime and a glowing sea of light flows downhill, pools in the low corner, and every pool rings a soft bell рҹҢҠрҹ””. `demoable` В· Cycle 546 (kids 4+ / **device-tilt** / **raw WebGL2 all-GPU shallow-water**). **For**: kids (4+) / a calm bedtime playspace / iPad. **THE LAB'S FIRST ALL-GPU SHALLOW-WATER SIM** вҖ” the *entire* physics state (water height + four per-cell pipe fluxes) lives in ping-pong **RGBA32F float textures** (256Г—256) and is advanced every frame by two fragment-shader passes, so a 4-year-old's tilt makes the light-water *genuinely* run downhill and **pool** (real conserved flux, not a faked damped membrane). **device-tilt INPUT** (`DeviceOrientationEvent` beta/gamma вҶ’ gravity uniform; iOS `requestPermission()` gated inside the Start tap; tilt 0вҖ“1Г— in last-10 kids вҖ” the freshest input, off the banned touch). **virtual-pipes shallow-water TECH** (Mei/Decaudin/Hu 2007): flux-update pass (neighbour height-diff + tilt-gravity, damped, outflow-scaled so depth never goes negative, closed no-flux walls) вҶ’ height-update pass (net inflow вҲ’ outflow + slow central trickle so it breathes). **Pooling rings the bells** вҖ” a handful of fixed "lily" probes read back cheaply (1Г—1 `gl.readPixels` from the sim FBO, throttled ~30ms) and on a depth rising-edge (0.22s cooldown) ring one warm pentatonic note {C4 D4 E4 G4 A4 C5 D5 E5} вҖ” **NO harmony/interval engine, pitch held deliberately dumb; the music lives in the RHYTHM of how the child tilts** (gentle rock = sparse drops, fast sway = a flurry). **raw-WebGL2 GPU OUTPUT** (the scarce surface JURY #1 wants вҖ” NOT three.js, NOT the banned Canvas2D/SVG): a shade pass renders the height field as a moonlit sea (deep = cool indigo, pooled = warm gold, additive glow + height-normal specular shimmer), lily nodes brighten the instant they ring so the rhythm reads sound-off. **The directest answer to JURY 2026-06-24 #1** (swing all-in to GPU вҖ” the *whole sim* is GPU) **and #3** (music from rhythm/space, NOT pitch theory). **Kids-safe envelope:** `masterGain(0.24) вҶ’ lowpass 6kHz вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor(вҲ’10/20:1) вҶ’ destination`, a hard tilt makes MORE soft bells never louder; always-on C2+G2 drone (never silent); bells вүҘ40ms attack, gentle decay. iOS gesture-gated AudioContext; full teardown (rAF + listeners + all GL textures/FBOs/programs/buffers/VAOs + `WEBGL_lose_context` + `audioCtx.close()`). **Degrades fully:** no sensor/desktop/permission-denied вҶ’ pointer-drag tips the sea + idle auto-demo rocks the tide so a hands-free glance sees flow+pool and hears bells within ~0.6s; no WebGL2/float-texture вҶ’ `text-rose-300` notice, drone keeps playing. **No API route, no `guard` needed** (fully client-side, zero AI/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (raw WebGL2). README cites **RESEARCH В§546 (2026-06-25)** вҖ” in-README dated citation (criterion #5) **12 cycles running** (535вҖ“546). **Clears ambition floor 3/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [tilt sensor + GPU virtual-pipes solver + bell scheduler + WebGL2 render = 4] В· #3 named ref [virtual-pipes / Mei, Decaudin & Hu 2007; lisyarus/webgpu-shallow-water 2025] В· #5 dated RESEARCH В§546). `diversity: banned=[touch-as-primary, Canvas2D, SVG, interval/JI/consonance-harmony-engine (JURY 2026-06-24); + three.js as the more-represented GPU output in last-10 kids] В· picked=[device-tilt INPUT (freshest, 0вҖ“1Г—), raw-WebGL2 all-GPU-solve OUTPUT (scarcer than three.js), virtual-pipes flowвҶ’pooling-RHYTHM TECH (not pitch theory), serene moonlit tide-pool VIBE]`. **Mode = DEEP** (the вӯҗ standing kids resurrect-first concept Г— 2 approaches; AGENT.md: develop/resurrect the bench). **Sibling banked (IDEAS В§546):** **`930-kids-tilt-tide`** вӯҗ **RESURRECT-FIRST** (the same concept solved on CPU [56Г—56] + rendered with three.js вҖ” the bulletproof no-float-texture render path). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вң“ Compiled successfully in 112s`** вҶ’ Linting/type-check PASS, zero warnings/refs in the 931 folder; all warnings pre-existing `src/lib/**`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; infra, not code вҖ” identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT device/ear/GPU-verified** (no tilt sensor / GPU / audio in container вҖ” unverified: the iOS DeviceOrientation permission flow, the RGBA32F float-texture path + `gl.readPixels` readback timing on a real iPad, whether the pooling tilt-feel reads as "I poured the light," the audio balance on a real speaker; the always-on drone + pointer-drag + idle auto-demo guarantee a sounding/flowing/pooling glance with zero hardware).

## (Cycle 541 вҖ” **adult** build В· DEEP, 1 concept Г— 3 second-model approaches, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/915-resonant-cinema](/dream/915-resonant-cinema)** вҖ” Resonant Cinema: your playing dreams a short FILM of itself вҖ” your music distilled to a still, bloomed into a living video, then kept moving by your own live sound рҹҺ¬вңЁ. `demoable` В· Cycle 541 (adult / **mic + synth bed** / **three.js + AI-image + AI-video**). **For**: anyone with a voice/instrument / immersive listening / a stage projection В· **THE LAB'S FIRST TRUE MULTI-MODEL AI PIPELINE CHAIN** (JURY 2026-06-24 #4, 0Г— after being named every jury; Karel's #1 directive "AI image generation INSIDE audio-visual experiments"). **mic/synth INPUT** (a generative ambient pad bed over ONE fixed A2 drone вҖ” pitch deliberately dumb; optional live mic swaps the analysis source, never routed to destination [anti-feedback]; AnalyserNode FFT-2048 вҶ’ energy/centroid/flux/hue every frame). **2-model FAL chain TECH**: audio mood вҶ’ poetic prompt вҶ’ **`fal-ai/flux/schnell`** (still seed, 16:9, 4 steps) вҶ’ **`fal-ai/ltx-video/image-to-video`** (blooms the still into a 5s clip). **three.js + AI-VIDEO OUTPUT** (0Г— output surface): the returned clip is a `THREE.VideoTexture` on a fullscreen quad, and the **live FFT runs a fragment-shader pass over it every frame** вҖ” ripple/displacementвҲқenergy, bloom/exposureвҲқcentroid (brightness), chromatic-aberration/RGB-splitвҲқflux. **The AI video is the SEED; the live audio is the ongoing ANIMATOR.** **What if you didn't prompt an AI to make a music video вҖ” what if you PLAYED, and the AI only dreamed the canvas your sound then keeps moving?** **Cinematic / Anadol latent-cinema VIBE.** **Cost-safe for public prod**: the paid chain (~$0.003 still + $0.02 video) fires **only on an explicit "Dream the film" click** (disabled in-flight, **zero timers**, never on load/idle); page-load / idle / "dreamingвҖҰ" / error / no-FAL_KEY all run a **synthesized GPU nebula** (domain-warped FBM cloud, audio-driven) so a hands-off glance is **always a living, sounding scene**. `api/route.ts` is **guarded** (`guard(req)` first, FAL_KEYвҶ’501, try/catchвҶ’500). **The directest answer to JURY 2026-06-24 #4** (AI-pipeline-chain, 0Г—) **and #1** ("swing back to GPU, full stop") **and #3** (music from NOT pitch theory вҖ” one drone, the idea lives in image/chain). **Named ref:** **Refik Anadol's latent cinema (*Machine Hallucinations*)** вҖ” the AI-dreamed image as living projection. README cites **RESEARCH В§541 (2026-06-24)** вҖ” in-README dated citation (criterion #5) **7 cycles running** (535вҖ“541). **Clears 3/5 ambition floor** (#1 **never-used technique** вҖ” first true multi-model AI chain / first AI-video output [441 was a single audioвҶ’image model; this adds the video model in series] В· #2 вүҘ4 subsystems [synth+mic audio engine + feature/prompt extractor + 2-model FAL chain + three.js GPU compositor + synthesized fallback] В· #3 named ref В· #5 dated RESEARCH вҖ” honestly 4-of-5). `diversity: banned=[Canvas2D, SVG, touch-as-primary, interval/JI/consonance-harmony-engine, external-dataвҶ’structure-w/-consonant-crutch (all JURY 2026-06-24)] В· picked=[mic/synth (non-touch), three.js + AI-image + AI-VIDEO output (all GPU/0Г—), audioвҶ’imageвҶ’video 2-model chain (pitch held to ONE drone), cinematic/Anadol]`. **Mode = DEEP** (1 massively-bigger concept, 3 second-model approaches; AGENT.md maps "jury calls for massively bigger" вҶ’ DEEP). **2 sibling chains banked (IDEAS В§541):** **`916-latent-loom`** вӯҗ (flux вҶ’ **flux-redux** img2img re-dream loop, GPU crossfade morph, cost-bounded вүӨ6 steps; **resurrect-first** on a desktop morph cycle) + **`917-the-telling`** (**any-llm** writes a prose-poem of the music вҶ’ flux paints it, kinetic typography, **text-not-voice**). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вң“ Compiled successfully in 36.3s`**, lint+type phase ran with **zero warnings/refs in the 915 folder**; all warnings pre-existing `src/lib/**`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (infra, not code вҖ” identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT browser/ear-verified** (no audio/WebGL/FAL in container вҖ” the LTX clip quality, the fluxвҶ”mood prompt fit, VideoTexture CORS from the fal CDN, and per-frame shader cost on a phone are unverified; the always-alive nebula + explicit-click gating guarantee a sounding/moving glance and zero idle cost regardless).

## (Cycle 540 вҖ” **kids** build В· WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/911-kids-shadow-dance](/dream/911-kids-shadow-dance)** вҖ” shadow dance: a 4-year-old DANCES and their whole body becomes a cloud of light + rhythm рҹ•әвңЁ. `demoable` В· Cycle 540 (kids 4+ / **camera whole-body pose** / **three.js GPU particles**). **For**: a 4-year-old on an iPad/phone / immediate cause-and-effect / no-reading / the *moving body*, not notes В· **camera POSE INPUT** (front camera вҶ’ **MediaPipe Pose** 33 whole-body landmarks via runtime CDN import, `webpackIgnore`, never bundled; video analysis-only, never recorded/uploaded; **zero pitch detection** вҖ” per frame we compute the three children's-sonification *movement qualities*: **energy** = mean landmark speed, **impulsivity** = high-passed jerk, **fluidity** = inverse speed-jitter; non-touch, full-body вҖ” fresh for kids vs 862 *hands* / 869 adult; no-camera вҶ’ synthetic ghost-dancer auto-demo) В· **three.js `THREE.Points` GPU OUTPUT** (~5,000 additive-blended particles, custom `ShaderMaterial`, indigoвҶ’violetвҶ’warm-gold; energyвҶ’density/brightness, impulsivityвҶ’outward burst shockwave, fluidityвҶ’swirl-vs-scatter; the JURY-scarce GPU surface, **no Canvas2D/SVG**) В· **movement energy/fluidity/impulsivity вҶ’ granular-percussion TECHNIQUE** В· **luminous shadow-dance VIBE**. **What if a kid makes music by DANCING вҖ” their whole body's movement (not fingers, not voice, not any pitch) scatters a glowing cloud of light and grants rhythm + texture?** Energy вҶ’ warmth/brightness of an always-on granular texture bed; a sudden move (impulsivity) fires a soft *capped* percussive bloom + a particle burst вҖ” **the kid's sharp moves ARE the beat**; smooth motion (fluidity) brightens a shimmer pad and streams the particles. **Pitch is held deliberately dumb** вҖ” one warm always-on drone (C2+G2+C3) + a few fixed safe accent tones; no scale, no chord, no melody the kid "plays." Kids-safe master chain `masterGain(0.26) вҶ’ lowpass(вүӨ6.5 kHz) вҶ’ Compressor(вҲ’10, 20:1)`, attacks вүҘ10ms, full teardown (rAF, mic tracks, `pose.close()`, three.js dispose + `forceContextLoss`, `audioCtx.close()`). **The clean answer to JURY 2026-06-24 #3** ("make music from rhythm, timbre, texture or space вҖ” NOT pitch theory") **and #1** ("swing back to GPU"): the lab's kids canon is almost all pitch toys; this makes music from the *quality of a child's free movement*. **Named refs:** **Myron Krueger *Videoplace*** (full-body interactive, 1970s) В· the children's-movement-sonification model (energy/fluidity/impulsivity granular mapping, **Frontiers in Neuroscience, PMC5104747**) В· **"The Moving Mandala"** (2025 вҖ” rhythmic music + embodied movement вҶ’ child synchrony). README cites **RESEARCH В§540 (2026-06-24)** вҖ” landing the in-README dated citation (criterion #5) **6 cycles running** (535вҖ“540). **Clears 3/5 ambition floor** (#2 вүҘ4 subsystems [pose tracking + energy/fluidity/impulsivity extractor + granular/percussion synth w/ dumb-drone + three.js GPU field + ghost auto-demo] В· #3 named refs В· #5 dated RESEARCH; #1 honestly NOT claimed вҖ” pose/granular/particle all have lab priors). `diversity: banned=[touch-as-primary, Canvas2D, SVG, interval/JI/consonance-harmony-engine, external-dataвҶ’structure-w/-consonant-crutch (last-10-kids + JURY 2026-06-24)] В· picked=[camera whole-body pose (non-touch), three.js GPU particles (scarce), motionвҶ’granular-percussion (pitch held to ONE drone), luminous shadow-dance]`. **Mode = WIDE** (3 orthogonal explorers on one "body-not-pitch" theme; deliberate alternation after 539 DEEP). **2 sibling explorers banked (IDEAS В§540):** **`913-kids-spin-galaxy`** вӯҗ (device **gyroscope** spin В· hand-written **WebGPU `@compute`** 40k-particle galaxy + WebGL2 fallback В· ring-crossing percussion вҖ” the purest JURY-#1 GPU answer; **resurrect-first** on a desktop/Tauri window) + **`912-kids-wind-garden`** (mic-**breath/blow** via spectral flatness В· **three.js** grass field В· wind force + dandelion-seed chimes вҖ” calm dawn-meadow). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вң“ Compiled successfully in 56s`**, lint phase ran with **zero warnings in the 911 folder**; all warnings pre-existing `src/lib/**`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (infra, not code вҖ” identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT browser/ear/hand-verified** (no camera/audio/WebGL in container вҖ” whether MediaPipe Pose tracks a small child across lighting/angle, the motion-scaling constants, and whether the bloom reads as "I am the light" are unverified; the always-on drone + ~1s ghost-dancer auto-demo guarantee a sounding/blooming glance regardless).
