## (Cycle 522 вҖ” **kids** build В· WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/866-kids-rainstick-sky](/dream/866-kids-rainstick-sky)** вҖ” Rainstick Sky рҹҢ§пёҸвңЁ. `demoable` В· Cycle 522 (kids / calm bedtime / WebGPU compute). **For**: kids (4+) В· **accelerometer-SHAKE INPUT** (DeviceMotion *jerk* = high-passed change-in-acceleration вҶ’ shake-energy, explicitly NOT device-orientation tilt вҖ” the coldest input in the window, off the jury's touch+mic 8Г— over-rep, off the recently-used hands/gamepad/tilt) В· **WebGPU compute OUTPUT** (a WGSL `@compute` rain field вҖ” the SCARCEST GPU surface, 1Г—вҶ’2Г— in last 10, the jury's explicit "make next builds GPU-only, WebGPU 0Г—" target; clears the HARD Canvas2D ban AND the WebGL2 4Г— audit-ban threshold) В· **shake-bounded density-only granular rain scheduler (auditable safe-envelope)** technique В· **calm night-blue bedtime vibe**. **What if a 4-year-old could make a calm rainstorm of music by gently SHAKING the tablet like a rainstick вҖ” and stillness settles it into a sleepy drone of glowing stars?** **Answers JURY 2026-06-22 #4** (the regressed ask: "bring back a CALM kids piece вҖ” 7 of 8 kids builds are bright/warm-active, only 805 is calm") + **#1** (Canvas2D HARD-banned вҶ’ a GPU surface, here the scarcest one). Shake-energy drives **only rain density** (`densityToRate` ~1.2вҶ’14 droplets/sec, hard-capped) + drift вҖ” **never loudness, never harshness**: a hard shake just makes *more soft drops*, which IS the "auditable safe envelope" (arXiv 2602.22813, Feb 2026). Warm C-pentatonic marimba/bell droplets (вүҘ40ms attacks, no wrong notes) over an always-on C2+G2+C3 drone, all through the fixed kids-safe chain `masterGain(0.26) вҶ’ BiquadFilter lowpass(6kHz) вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor(вҲ’10,20:1) вҶ’ destination`; analyser tapped off master, never routed to output. Visual = a **WGSL `@compute` pass integrating 60k falling raindrop/star particles** (gravity + gentle curl wind + wrap-around) вҶ’ additive glowing point-quads, indigoвҶ’violetвҶ’warm-gold (stars brighter when calm). iOS gesture-gated: AudioContext + `DeviceMotionEvent.requestPermission()` both inside the вүҘ72px Start-cloud tap. **Degrades fully:** no WebGPU вҶ’ a hand-written ~3k-particle **WebGL2** version on the SAME shakeвҶ’density mapping (audio keeps playing); no WebGL2 вҶ’ `text-rose-300` notice, audio still runs; no motion sensor / desktop вҶ’ pointer drag-to-"shake" + an **auto-demo** that rains + chimes + drifts on its own within ~1s (a hands-free 06:30 glance both SEES and HEARS it). Full teardown (rAF cancel + remove devicemotion listener + stop drones + `GPUDevice.destroy()`/`WEBGL_lose_context` + `audioCtx.close()`). No API route вҶ’ no guard; zero new npm deps (hand-written WGSL + GLSL, NOT three.js, NOT Canvas2D). **Ambition 2/5:** #2 (вүҘ3 subsystems: shake-detection + density chime scheduler + WGSL compute field + WebGL2 fallback = 4) + #3 (named refs: Exploratorium Chilean rainstick В· arXiv 2602.22813 I-E-O auditable safe-envelope В· Brian Eno generative ambient). **WIDE fire вҖ” 2 more explored, banked to IDEAS В§522:** `867-kids-shadow-zoo` вӯҗ (whole-body camera motion-energy вҶ’ three.js creatures, Myron Krueger *Videoplace*) + `868-kids-monster-keys` (MIDI/keys вҶ’ three.js; genuine freedom-to-be-wrong, jury #3).

## Cycle 521 вҖ” **adult** build В· DEEP, 2 GPU-surface approaches, shipped 1

- **[/dream/864-marine-gamelan](/dream/864-marine-gamelan)** вҖ” Marine Gamelan рҹҢҠрҹ””. `demoable` В· Cycle 521 (adult / live-data sonification / WebGL2). **For**: adults В· **live-external-API INPUT** (keyless Open-Meteo Marine wave data, 4 ocean presets вҖ” a starved input, only 842 in the last 10; clears the jury's touch+mic 8Г— over-rep) В· **raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT** (a GPU surface вҖ” clears the jury's HARD Canvas2D ban; 3Г—/10, under the audit-ban threshold) В· **modal physical-modeling bronze gamelan + wave-data sonification with audible consequence** technique В· **oceanic/Ikeda data-sonification vibe**. **What if the real, live state of the world's oceans played a bronze gamelan вҖ” and rough seas audibly DETUNED the metal into a beating clang while calm seas stayed sparse and sweet?** **Resurrects the вӯҗ TOP adult RESURRECT-FIRST `860-marine-gamelan` (IDEAS В§519)** вҖ” answering **JURY 2026-06-22 #5** (the loudest standing adult ask: "stop the banked build from ghosting / develop what you have, don't open a new tab") + **#1** (Canvas2D HARD-banned вҶ’ a GPU surface), and landing the **842-air-veil jury-standout register** (real-world data where rising severity *fouls* the harmony вҖ” here rough seas detune the bronze). A keyless, CORS-enabled **Open-Meteo Marine API** fetch (client-side, **no api route, no guard**) pulls live `wave_height/period/direction/swell` for four contrasting presets вҖ” **Oahu North Shore В· Bay of Biscay В· Drake Passage (big seas) В· Maldives (calm)** вҖ” re-polling every 5 min. One normalized `seaToDrive()` signal feeds BOTH a **modal physical-modeling bronze engine** (each key = a filtered noise exciter вҶ’ a bank of **high-Q BiquadFilter bandpass resonators** at inharmonic partial ratios `[1, 2.76, 5.4, 8.93]`, slendro/pelГ¶g) AND a hand-written **WebGL2 GLSL-ES-3.00 caustic water-light shader** (domain-warped value-noise interference, ridged veins, foam crests, violet strike-bloom) вҖ” so sound and image never disagree. **The consequence is the point and it's audible:** a single `roughness` (clamp `wave_height/6`) simultaneously **(a)** densifies strike rate (~0.8вҶ’~7/s), **(b)** drops register, **(c)** collapses resonator **Q** (~38 *sings* вҶ’ ~6 *clangs*), and **(d)** detunes each bronze partial up to **Вұ35Вў** вҖ” heavy seas beat into a detuned clang, calm seas stay sparse/high/sweet; `period`вҶ’tempo+wave-speed, `direction`вҶ’pan+shader-drift, `swell`вҶ’drone+undulation. **Deepening 1:** a **groove-quantize toggle** snaps strikes to a tempo grid derived from `wave_period` (the swell becomes a GROOVE; off = free Poisson-ish ocean pings). **Deepening 2:** a **dual-sea equal-power crossfade** + its own B-location picker вҖ” hear **Drake Passage's storm beating against the Maldives' calm**, each sea driving its own strike stream + roughness. **Ear-safety:** master compressor вҶ’ brick-wall limiter, 2s fade-in, panic mute, gesture-gated AudioContext in the Start tap (iOS), analyser taps the master for the bloom (never routes to output). **Degrades fully:** fetch fails/blocked вҶ’ a **synthetic evolving sea** per preset (Drake stays stormy, Maldives stay calm) keeps it sounding + animating within ~1s + a `text-rose-300` "(live feed unavailable вҖ” simulated sea)" badge; no WebGL2 вҶ’ notice, audio keeps playing; no Web Audio вҶ’ notice, visuals keep running. Full teardown (rAF cancel + abort both fetches + clear intervals + delete GL program/buffers/VAO + `WEBGL_lose_context` + `ctx.close()`). **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`**; **zero new npm deps** (hand-written WebGL2, NOT three.js, NOT Canvas2D вҖ” the only `getContext` is `webgl2`, so the main viz is genuinely GPU). Ambition honest **2/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [live fetch + preset state-machine + synthetic fallback В· modal bronze synth w/ groove-quantize scheduler В· dual-sea crossfade routing В· WebGL2 caustic shader = 4вҖ“5] В· #3 named refs [**gamelan slendro/pelГ¶g tuning** В· **Ryoji Ikeda *datamatics*** data-as-music stance В· **Bob Sturm вҖ” *Music from the Ocean*** wave-undulationвҶ’music data-mappings]; #4 soft вҖ” cycle-2 of the 860 thread, the two README-queued deepenings). **Source:** В§521 dive (Sturm *Music from the Ocean* / Plymouth wave-tank / WHOI-OOI ocean-sonification lineage) вҶ’ AGENT.md path (c) IDEAS В§519's вӯҗ 860 + path (b) continue the 860 thread вҶ’ adult **DEEP** fire. **Diversity:** `banned (jury 2026-06-22)=[OUTPUT Canvas2D 7Г— (HARD) В· INPUT touch+mic-only 8Г— В· kids vibe (N/A adult)]` В· `picked (winner 864)=[live-external-API INPUT (1Г—/10) В· raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT (3Г—/10, under threshold) В· wave-data sonification w/ consequence TECH В· oceanic/Ikeda vibe]` вҖ” clears every active ban. **DEEP fork (banked, IDEAS В§521):** **`865-tide-gamelan`** вӯҗ (the SAME concept as a **three.js** 3D scene вҖ” a CPU-displaced sum-of-sines ocean mesh with a floating emissive bronze gong-field that bobs/tilts/blooms, additive halos, drag-orbit; **top adult RESURRECT-FIRST** вҖ” de-selected on runtime risk [80Г—80 CPU vertex displacement may want a lower segment count / strike cap on weak mobile] + an approximate strikeвҶ”gong mapping, NOT quality) вҖ” built complete + eslint/tsc-clean, removed before the winner-only build (not committed), full brief in IDEAS В§521. вҡ пёҸ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вң“ Compiled successfully in 111s` вҶ’ Linting + TypeScript type-check PASS вҶ’ reached `Collecting page data`**; 864 folder grep-clean вҖ” zero warnings, no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route, no `getContext("2d")`); **NOT browser/device-verified** вҖ” the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (infra, fails identically on pristine `main` every cycle since 472; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by ear: the mix balance + resonator decay tails + the `lvl > 0.32` bloom threshold, and whether the live Open-Meteo schema is identical across all four presets (Oahu's `current` fields verified against a real response; the rest use the identical query shape); the synthetic-sea fallback + always-on limiter + 2s fade guarantee a sounding + animating glance with zero hardware/network.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/864-marine-gamelan/README.md`

## (Cycle 520 вҖ” **kids** build В· DEEP, 2 rendering approaches, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/862-kids-solfege-signs](/dream/862-kids-solfege-signs)** вҖ” Sing With Your Hand вңӢрҹҺ¶. `demoable` В· Cycle 520 (kids 4+ / camera-hands / three.js / warm-wondrous). **For**: kids (4+) В· **MediaPipe-hands INPUT** (off-glass embodied вҖ” the jury's "do something a touchscreen can't"; 1Г— in the last 10, dodges the touch+mic 8Г— over-rep) В· **three.js OUTPUT** (the SCARCER GPU surface вҖ” 2Г— last 10 vs raw-WebGL2 4Г—; clears the jury's HARD Canvas2D ban) В· **solfГЁge-hand-sign classification вҶ’ scale-degree choir + call-response** technique (never used in the lab) В· **warm-wondrous kids-choir vibe**. **What if a 4-year-old could SING A MELODY with their bare hand вҖ” making the classic Curwen/KodГЎly solfГЁge hand-signs in the air (вңҠ fist = do, вңӢ flat hand = mi, рҹ‘Һ thumb-down = fa, вҳқпёҸ point-up = ti вҖҰ) вҖ” and a choir of glowing creature-orbs sang the matching scale degree back?** Real, named music pedagogy (the hand-signs teachers use with children worldwide), made playable by a toddler. **Resurrects the вӯҗ TOP kids RESURRECT-FIRST `855-kids-solfege-signs` (IDEAS В§518)** вҖ” answering **JURY 2026-06-22 #5** ("stop the banked 4/5 from ghosting / ship a banked sibling") + **#1** (Canvas2D HARD-banned вҶ’ a GPU surface). A front-camera **MediaPipe HandLandmarker** (CDN `webpackIgnore` runtime import, pinned `tasks-vision@0.10.14`, analysis-only, never bundled) вҶ’ a geometric **7-sign classifier** (`classify.ts`: per-finger extended/curled booleans + coarse hand orientation вҶ’ do/re/mi/fa/sol/la/ti) with a **~250 ms dwell** so only a HELD shape rings (flicker never triggers); **hand height** shifts octave + brightness; after **~2 s of stillness** the choir replays the last ~6 signed notes as a gentle tune (the **KodГЎly echo** call-and-response game). **three.js (v0.182)** choir: 7 **additive-halo glow orbs** in a warm rising arc, color-coded by a consistent pitchвҶ’hue palette, the signed orb blooms + lifts with hand height, a faint starfield breathes; a tiny **Canvas2D HUD** draws the live hand skeleton so the child feels "seen" (the ONLY 2D surface). Kids-safe `voices вҶ’ masterGain(0.26) вҶ’ BiquadFilter lowpass(6.5kHz) вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor(вҲ’10,20:1) вҶ’ destination`; always-on soft **open-fifth drone (C+G)** so it's never silent; gentle вүҘ40 ms attacks; analyser taps the master, never routes to output; **NO wrong notes possible**. **iOS:** AudioContext + getUserMedia both inside the вүҘ72px Start tap. **Degrades fully:** no camera / permission denied / MediaPipe load-fail вҶ’ `text-rose-300` notice + a **ghost-hand auto-demo** (cycles a do-re-mi-sol-mi phrase through the IDENTICAL classifierвҶ’choirвҶ’scene pipeline, drawing a believable ghost skeleton in the HUD, so a hands-free 06:30 glance both SEES the orbs bloom and HEARS the tune within ~1 s) + a row of **вүҘ72px press-and-hold tap-sign buttons** (emoji + color, no reading) driving the same pipeline (fully playable, zero camera); no WebGL вҶ’ notice, choir keeps singing. Full teardown (rAF + camera tracks stop + landmarker close + three.js dispose + `forceContextLoss()` + osc stop + `audioCtx.close()`). **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`**; **zero new npm deps** (three present; MediaPipe is a CDN runtime import, NOT Canvas2D). Ambition honest **2/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [MediaPipe hand-tracking + geometric 7-sign Curwen classifier + kids-safe choir synth w/ KodГЎly-echo scheduler + three.js additive-glow choir scene = 4] В· #3 named refs [**John Curwen 1870** Tonic Sol-fa hand-signs В· **ZoltГЎn KodГЎly** method + echo game В· **arXiv 2604.27957, April 2026** "Real-Time Control of a Virtual Orchestra by Recognition of Conducting Gestures" вҖ” conducting as a musical sign-language recognized in real time]; soft lab-first вҖ” solfГЁge-sign *classification* is grep-0Г— though MediaPipe-hands as input exists [853/731/444]). **Source:** В§520 dive (conducting-as-recognized-sign-language, museum-robust) вҶ’ AGENT.md path (c) IDEAS В§518's вӯҗ 855 + path (a) the dive hook вҶ’ kids **DEEP** fire. **Diversity:** `banned (jury 2026-06-22 + audit)=[OUTPUT Canvas2D 7Г—/15 (HARD) В· OUTPUT raw-WebGL2 4Г—/10 (audit-ban threshold) В· INPUT touch+mic-only 8Г— В· kids always-consonant-morph 5Г—]` В· `picked (winner 862)=[MediaPipe-hands INPUT (1Г—/10, off-glass) В· three.js OUTPUT (scarcer GPU, 2Г—/10) В· solfГЁge-sign-classification TECH (never used) В· warm-wondrous kids vibe]` вҖ” clears every ban AND dodges the raw-WebGL2 over-rep that decided the curation. **DEEP fork (banked, IDEAS В§520):** **`863-kids-solfege-choir`** вӯҗ (the SAME concept as a raw-WebGL2 GLSL **"ladder of light"** вҖ” 7 luminous rungs doвҶ’ti bottomвҶ’top that renders **KodГЎly's pitch-height innovation literally**; **top kids RESURRECT-FIRST** вҖ” de-selected purely because raw-WebGL2 is 4Г—/10, the audit-ban threshold, NOT quality) вҖ” built complete + clean, removed before the winner-only build (not committed), full brief in IDEAS В§520. вҡ пёҸ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вң“ Compiled successfully in 118s` вҶ’ Linting + TypeScript type-check PASS вҶ’ reached `Collecting page data`**; 862 folder grep-clean вҖ” zero warnings, no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route, the single `getContext("2d")` is the permitted skeleton HUD); **NOT browser/device-verified** вҖ” the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (infra, fails identically on pristine `main` every cycle since 472; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by hand/eye/ear: whether the 7-sign classifier reliably distinguishes the signs on a real child's hand across lighting/angles (`classify.ts` favours distinct shapes over clinical accuracy), and the choir balance + orb bloom feel; the always-on drone + ghost-hand auto-demo + press-and-hold tap fallback guarantee a sounding, blooming glance with zero hardware.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/862-kids-solfege-signs/README.md`

## (Cycle 519 вҖ” **adult** build В· WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/859-paths-compute-bloom](/dream/859-paths-compute-bloom)** вҖ” Compute Bloom рҹҺ№вңЁ. `demoable` В· Cycle 519 (adult / GPU-compute / live-performance fitness). **For**: adults В· **audio-file INPUT** (drag-drop / file-picker your own piano recording вҖ” Karel's-music directive; built-in generative tape-piano default so it plays with zero interaction) В· **WebGPU compute OUTPUT** (the SCARCEST surface in the lab вҖ” **0Г— in the rolling 15-window**; clears the jury's HARD Canvas2D ban head-on) В· **FFT-band-driven 500k-particle curl-noise GPU-compute sim with memory** technique В· **cosmic/Anadol latent-flow vibe**. **What if a piano performance bloomed a living particle ecosystem computed entirely on the GPU вҖ” half a million points pushed by the music's spectral bands via a WGSL compute shader?** Directly answers **JURY 2026-06-22 #1** вҖ” the loudest standing directive ("Canvas2D back to 7-of-15; **WebGPU 0Г—**, WebGL2 1Г—, three.js 2Г— вҖ” make the next 3-4 builds GPU-only") вҖ” by landing the literal scarcest surface. An `AnalyserNode` 8-band FFT (sub-bassвҶ’air) packs a uniform read each frame by a WGSL **compute pass** that integrates **500,000** particles: sub-bass+bass swell the core outward, low-mid pulls a gentle gravity return (it breathes, not explodes), highs scatter sparkle at the rim, and every onset blooms the whole cloud then settles. **Memory:** velocity damping (`0.965 вҲ’ energyВ·0.02`) keeps the cloud visibly expanded during a loud passage and settled inward during silence вҖ” different at minute 5 than minute 1. A WGSL **render pass** draws each particle as a 6-vertex additive glow quad, coloured deep-indigo вҶ’ violet вҶ’ magenta вҶ’ warm-gold by speed; drag to orbit, scroll to zoom, live 8-band meter. **iOS:** AudioContext created/resumed inside the Start tap. **Degrades:** no WebGPU вҶ’ `text-rose-300` "(WebGPU unavailable)" + a **WebGL2 ~6k-particle fallback** on the SAME bandвҶ’force mapping (audio keeps playing, never a dead screen); no WebGL2 either вҶ’ notice but audio plays. Full teardown (rAF cancel + buffer stop + `audioCtx.close()` + revoke object URL + destroy all GPUBuffers/GPUDevice or GL resources). **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (built-in piece synthesised locally, user files via `decodeAudioData`, no external fetch); **zero new npm deps** (hand-written WGSL + GLSL, NOT three.js, NOT Canvas2D). Ambition honest **2/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [audio decode/playback + drag-drop intake В· OfflineAudioContext tape-piano В· `AnalyserNode` 8-band FFT + onset В· WGSL compute sim В· WGSL additive render = **4вҖ“5**] В· #3 named refs [**Refik Anadol** latent/particle-flow aesthetic *Machine Hallucinations* В· **Robert Bridson, *Curl-Noise for Procedural Fluid Flow*, SIGGRAPH 2007** вҖ” divergence-free curl-of-noise field in WGSL]). **#1 NOT claimed (honest):** WebGPU is not lab-first (60Г— historically) вҖ” its novelty here is being **0Г— in the rolling window** (the diversity axis that matters now). **Source:** В§519 dive (**WebGPU just became iOS-deployable** вҖ” Safari 26 / three.js r171, Sep 2025; compute-particles are the live June-2026 register) вҶ’ jury #1 (WebGPU 0Г— / GPU-only) вҶ’ adult **WIDE** fire. **Diversity:** `banned (jury 2026-06-22, last 15)=[OUTPUT Canvas2D 7Г— (HARD ban) В· INPUT touch+mic-only 8Г— В· kids always-consonant-morph 5Г— (N/A adult)]` В· `picked (winner 859)=[audio-file/his-piano INPUT (dropped) В· WebGPU-compute OUTPUT (scarcest, 0Г—) В· FFTвҶ’curl-noise GPU-particle TECH В· cosmic/Anadol VIBE]` вҖ” clears every active ban. **WIDE fork (banked, IDEAS В§519):** **`860-marine-gamelan`** вӯҗ (live **Open-Meteo wave data** вҶ’ modal bronze-gamelan where rough seas audibly DETUNE the metal Вұ35Вў; WebGL2 caustics; **top adult RESURRECT-FIRST** вҖ” lowest runtime risk, the jury-praised real-world-data-with-consequence register) + **`861-flow-veil`** (**webcam optical-flow** вҶ’ advected dye veil + granular audio; WebGL2; needs a 1-line `OffscreenCanvas`вҶ’`ImageBitmap` texImage2D fix before resurrect) вҖ” both built complete, removed before the winner-only build (not committed), full briefs in IDEAS В§519. вҡ пёҸ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вң“ Compiled successfully` вҶ’ Linting + TypeScript type-check PASS вҶ’ reached `Collecting page data`**; the one type error found вҖ” `webgl-fallback.ts:191` `gl` possibly-null in a closure вҖ” was the single permitted fix, bind to `const gl: WebGL2RenderingContext`); **NOT browser/device-verified** вҖ” the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (infra, fails identically on pristine `main` every cycle since 471; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by eye: whether the WebGPU device actually initialised (the builder verified the WebGL2-fallback path's shape only) and the render's perspective point-size tuning; the fallback guarantees a sounding + living visual on any GPU.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/859-paths-compute-bloom/README.md`

## (Cycle 518 вҖ” **kids** build В· WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/856-kids-rumble-band](/dream/856-kids-rumble-band)** вҖ” Feel the Beat рҹҺ®вңЁ. `demoable` В· Cycle 518 (kids 4+ / embodied off-screen input / cross-modal haptic / playful-calm). **For**: kids (4+) В· **GAMEPAD input** (the starved, off-camera, off-glass embodied input вҖ” `navigator.getGamepads()`, 0Г— in the last 10; a Bluetooth controller pairs with iPads and most homes have one; on-screen virtual-stick + drum-button touch *fallback* + auto-demo) В· **raw WebGL2 output** (the scarce GPU surface вҖ” clears the jury's HARD Canvas2D ban) В· **dual-analog-stick conducting of two pentatonic creature-voices + beat-synced controller RUMBLE (haptic "felt beat")** technique В· **playful-but-calm warm/cool glow vibe**. **What if a 4-year-old could play music with a GAME CONTROLLER they already hold вҖ” push the two thumbsticks to conduct two glowing creature-voices, mash the big colored buttons to drum вҖ” and the controller BUZZES in their hands on the beat, so they FEEL the music as well as hear it?** Directly serves **JURY 2026-06-22 #1** (force a GPU surface вҖ” raw WebGL2) + the standing **#-embodied/sensor** ask ("push embodied/sensor inputsвҖҰ do something a touchscreen can't" вҖ” a controller that rumbles is literally that) and fills the lab's **coldest menu category: cross-modal / embedded-haptic** ("haptic-only experiments вҖ” test the screen bias"). Left stick вҶ’ a warm melody creature (snapped C-major pentatonic, no wrong notes), right stick вҶ’ a cool harmony creature a consonant interval away; **A/B/X/Y** вҶ’ four warm tuned drums; bumpers/triggers вҶ’ a sparkle. **Haptics:** `gamepad.vibrationActuator.playEffect("dual-rumble", вҖҰ)` (feature-detected; minimal typed interface, no `any`) pulses gently on every beat, accents every 4th, and bumps on each drum вҖ” and the whole glow field visibly pulses on the beat so you SEE the felt beat even with no controller. Always-on soft groove + drone (never silent). **Kids-safety chain:** `voices вҶ’ masterGain(0.26) вҶ’ BiquadFilter lowpass(вүӨ6.5kHz) вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor(вҲ’10, 20:1) вҶ’ destination`; soft вүҘ40ms attacks; no harsh transients. **iOS:** AudioContext created/resumed inside the first вүҘ72px Start tap. **Degrades:** no controller вҶ’ вүҘ96px on-screen virtual sticks (drag) + вүҘ76px colored drum buttons + a friendly `text-white/75` hint ("Connect a game controller, or play with the buttons below") + an auto-demo (Lissajous sticks + downbeat drums) that sounds + animates + visibly pulses within ~0.6s; no WebGL2 вҶ’ `text-rose-300` notice, audio keeps playing; no haptics вҶ’ honest "(no rumble on this pad)" label. Full teardown (rAF + gamepad poll cancel + haptic `reset()` + delete WebGL programs/buffers + `WEBGL_lose_context` + `audioCtx.close()`). **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (fully client-side, no network/samples); **zero new npm deps** (hand-written WebGL2, NOT three.js, NOT Canvas2D). Ambition honest **2/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [Gamepad polling/edge-detect + dual-stickвҶ’pentatonic harmony engine + beat-synced haptic scheduler + raw-WebGL2 additive glow render = 4] В· #3 named refs [**Gamepad API + `GamepadHapticActuator.playEffect`** В· **Гүmile Jaques-Dalcroze eurhythmics** вҖ” rhythm learned through the body / the felt beat, here delivered as touch]). **Source:** В§518 dive (embodied music pedagogy вҖ” Dalcroze/Orff/Curwen-KodГЎly solfГЁge-hand-signs, CHI "Music Corner" + the June-2026 WebGPU audio-reactive wave) вҶ’ the jury's GPU-surface + embodied-input mandate + the cold cross-modal/haptic menu вҶ’ kids **WIDE** fire. **Diversity:** `banned (audit, last 10 = 853,849,847,846,842,841,837,834,833,828)=[OUTPUT Canvas2D 4Г— (HARD jury ban) В· INPUT touch+mic-only over-rep + recently-used MediaPipe-hands (853) and tilt (849)]` В· `picked (winner 856)=[GAMEPAD INPUT (starved, 0Г— last 10, off camera) В· raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT (scarce GPU) В· dual-stick-conduct + haptic-felt-beat TECH (cross-modal/haptic cold menu) В· playful-calm glow VIBE]` вҖ” clears every ban and avoids the MediaPipe-hands streak (853 last cycle). **WIDE fork:** banked **`855-kids-solfege-signs`** вӯҗ (make the Curwen/KodГЎly **solfГЁge hand-signs** in the air вҶ’ a choir sings the matching scale degree вҶ’ build a melody by signing; MediaPipe HandLandmarker + three.js; **top kids RESURRECT-FIRST** вҖ” strong pedagogy, de-selected only to avoid a 4th MediaPipe-hands build right after 853) + **`857-kids-color-wand`** (wave any bright **colored toy/scarf** вҶ’ camera color-blob tracking вҶ’ a glowing comet that sings, hue=instrument/height=pitch; **WebGPU** compute particles + WebGL2 fallback вҖ” the freshest GPU surface) вҖ” both built complete + verified clean, removed before the winner-only build (not committed), full briefs in IDEAS В§518. вҡ пёҸ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: compile вҶ’ **Linting + type-check PASS вҶ’ reached `Collecting page data`**; **856 folder grep-clean of the build log** вҖ” zero references, every warning pre-existing `src/lib/**`; `npx eslint src/app/dream/856-kids-rumble-band/` вҶ’ 0; no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route); **NOT browser/device-verified** вҖ” the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (infra, fails identically on pristine `main` every cycle since 472; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by eye/ear/hand: the actual `playEffect` rumble on a physical controller (feature-detected + labeled when absent), the mix balance + glow intensity on real audio/GPU; the auto-demo + touch fallback + visible on-beat pulse guarantee a sounding, animating, pulsing glance with zero hardware.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/856-kids-rumble-band/README.md`

## (Cycle 517 вҖ” **adult** build В· DEEP, 3 parallel approaches to one concept, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/853-motet-room-reach](/dream/853-motet-room-reach)** вҖ” The Motet Room (Reach) рҹҺјрҹ–җпёҸ. `demoable` В· Cycle 517 (adult / spatial-installation / live-performance fitness). **For**: adults В· **two-hand bare-hand-tracking INPUT** (MediaPipe HandLandmarker вҖ” the starved embodied input the jury demanded; NOT touch, NOT mic; pointer + auto-demo fallback) В· **raw WebGL2 OUTPUT** (the SCARCEST GPU surface, 1Г— in the last 15 вҖ” beats the over-represented three.js, clears the jury's HARD Canvas2D ban) В· **HRTF binaural spatialization + two-hand gestural conducting of a FIXED voice field with persistent re-sculpting** technique В· **sacred-ambient installation vibe** (cool violet bed warming to conductor's gold). **What if you stood at the center of a fixed constellation of ~18 HRTF-spatialized choir voices and CONDUCTED it with your bare hands вҖ” reach toward a section to swell it, spread your arms to bloom the whole choir open, bring your hands together to collapse it to a tight resolved cluster, and pinch-and-fling a single voice across the room where it STAYS, permanently re-sculpting the field?** Answers **JURY 2026-06-22 #2** ("build the embodied/spatial prototype the lab keeps deferring вҖ” a pose-driven spatial-audio room"; body 1Г—/depth 0Г—, the coldest category) + **#1** (hard-ban Canvas2D, force a GPU surface). Each of ~18 voices = two detuned saws вҶ’ bandpass **formant** (vowel) вҶ’ lowpass brightness вҶ’ its own `PannerNode` (`panningModel="HRTF"`) on a shell around a listener fixed at origin (looking вҲ’Z); hand "magnets" swell+lean the nearest voices, spread/together opens/collapses the whole field, **pinch** grabs the nearest voice and `setTargetAtTime`-glides it to its new home вҖ” you HEAR it fly around your head. Master: sum вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` limiter вҶ’ master вүӨ0.28. Raw WebGL2 additive billboarded glow point-sprites (hand-rolled perspective) + glowing hand cursors; **auto-demo** (two virtual hands gesture/spread/pinch on their own) + mouse fallback so it's fully demoable with **no webcam**; `text-rose-300` notice on camera/WebGL2 failure; full teardown (rAF + camera tracks + `AudioContext.close()` + GL buffers/programs/textures). **Differs from `677-presence-field`** (which attaches a voice to each body JOINT вҖ” sources follow your limbs): here voices are PINNED and the hands sculpt the fixed field. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`; zero new npm deps** (MediaPipe via CDN `webpackIgnore`, never bundled/in package.json). Ambition honest **2/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [camera hand-tracking + HRTF spatial-audio field + raw-WebGL2 render + gesture-sculpting engine = 4] В· #3 named refs [object-/scene-based spatial audio; **Janet Cardiff & George Bures Miller, *The Forty Part Motet* (2001)** вҖ” 40-channel Tallis *Spem in Alium* you walk among, inverted here to a still listener moving the voices]). **Source:** JURY #2 вҶ’ RESEARCH В§517 (webcam-MediaPipe head/hand-tracked browser binaural вҖ” listener pose drives the WebAudio `AudioListener` over a fixed HRTF field) вҶ’ adult **DEEP** fire. **Diversity:** `banned (audit, last 10 = 849,847,846,842,841,837,834,833,828,827)=[Canvas2D OUTPUT (HARD jury ban) В· touch+mic-only INPUT В· always-consonant-morph kids template]` В· `picked (winner 853)=[bare-hand-tracking INPUT (body, starved) В· raw WebGL2 OUTPUT (scarcest GPU) В· HRTF spatial-sculpting TECH В· adult installation VIBE]` вҖ” clears every ban. **DEEP siblings (banked, IDEAS В§517):** `852-motet-room-walk` вӯҗ (MediaPipe Pose вҖ” physically WALK the listener through the fixed oval; three.js; the literal Cardiff gallery walk; **top adult RESURRECT-FIRST**) + `854-motet-room-lean` (MediaPipe FaceLandmarker head-tracking вҖ” turn your head, the field stays world-anchored; true head-tracked binaural; three.js) вҖ” both built complete + verified clean, removed before the winner-only build (not committed), full briefs in IDEAS В§517. вҡ пёҸ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вң“ Compiled successfully in 98s` вҶ’ Linting + type-check PASS вҶ’ reached `Collecting page data`**; **853 folder grep-clean of the build log** вҖ” zero references, every warning pre-existing `src/lib/**`; no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route); **NOT browser/device-verified** вҖ” the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (infra, fails identically on pristine `main` every cycle since 471; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by eye/ear: the live MediaPipe hand path + CDN model load, the raw-WebGL2 render, and whether HRTF localization reads convincingly on headphones (it collapses to L/R + level on laptop speakers); auto-demo + mouse guarantee a sounding, moving glance regardless.

## Cycle 516 вҖ” **kids** build В· WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1

- **[/dream/849-kids-star-bowl](/dream/849-kids-star-bowl)** вҖ” Star Bowl вңЁрҹҘЈ. `demoable` В· Cycle 516 (kids 4+ / freedom-to-be-wrong / calm bedtime / long-form-ish generative). **For**: kids (4+) В· **device-orientation TILT input** (the starved embodied input the jury asked for вҖ” NOT touch, NOT mic; pointer-drag + auto-drift fallback) В· **three.js GPU output** (the scarce GPU surface вҖ” breaks the jury's HARD Canvas2D ban) В· **tilt-gravity marble physics вҶ’ position-in-bowl вҶ’ consonanceвҶ”dissonance harmony with audible glide-resolution** technique В· **calm night-blue bedtime vibe** (the regressed register вҖ” only 1 of the prior 8 kids builds was calm). **What if a 4-year-old could TILT a tablet like a bowl of glowing stars and discover that wandering out to the "spiky" rim makes a soft, safe dissonance they can then RESOLVE by tilting home вҖ” a real harmonic decision made with the body, not a steered always-consonant vibe?** This is the directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-22 #3** ("give a kid the freedom to be WRONG вҖ” dissonance reachable AND resolvable, a real harmonic decision with a consequence, not a steer through a pre-vetted field") AND **#4** ("bring back a calm kids piece вҖ” 7 of 8 are bright/active"). ~48 glowing star-marbles roll inside a 3D bowl under simulated gravity driven by `DeviceOrientationEvent` (beta/gamma вҶ’ gravity vector). The cluster's mean radius (0 center вҶ’ 1 rim) drives the harmony: **center** = a warm fully-consonant chord over a low A2 drone (root+fifth+octave+tenth), stars round and gentle; **toward the rim** = two "tension voices" glide up toward a soft minor-2nd/tritone cluster with gentle beating partials + a slow shimmer-tremolo, and the star shader grows prickly shivering spikes (reads as "ooh, wobbly," never harsh); **tilt home** = the tension voices glide back to consonance via `setTargetAtTime`, shimmer fades, stars round out, and a soft consonant **bloom** rewards the return. Always-on Eno-style drone means it's never silent; auto-drift keeps an untouched device gently rolling + sounding within ~2s. **Kids-safety chain:** `sources вҶ’ masterGain(0.24) вҶ’ BiquadFilter lowpass(вүӨ6.4kHz) вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor(вҲ’10, 20:1) вҶ’ destination`; soft вүҘ40ms attacks; tension voices peak at gain ~0.16; no analyser wired to output. **iOS:** AudioContext + `DeviceOrientationEvent.requestPermission()` both inside the first вүҘ72px Start tap. **Degrades:** no orientation (desktop / denied) вҶ’ pointer drag-to-tilt + auto-drift + `text-rose-300` notice; no WebGL вҶ’ `text-rose-300` notice, audio keeps running; no Web Audio вҶ’ visuals alive + notice. Full teardown (rAF + listeners + dispose three.js geometries/materials + `renderer.dispose()` + `forceContextLoss()` + `audioCtx.close()`). **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (fully client-side, no network/samples); **zero new npm deps** (`three` v0.182 already present; NOT Canvas2D). Ambition honest **2/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [device-orientation physics/permission + tilt-gravity marble sim + positionвҶ’consonance/dissonance harmony engine with glide-resolution + three.js additive-glow roundвҶ”spiky shader render = 4] В· #3 named refs [the dissonanceвҶ’consonance **"tension and release" pedagogy** вҖ” MasterClass 2026 *"Dissonance in Music"* + the *"Dissonance to Consonance"* family-learning lesson plan (mapflc.com): the resolve builds a child's confidence В· the love-aligned tilt lineage **`83-kids-tilt-rain`**вқӨпёҸ В· **Brian Eno**-style calm bedtime ambient drone]). **Source:** JURY 2026-06-22 #3 + #4 вҶ’ RESEARCH В§516 (tensionвҶ’release is the named musical-growth lever; the toys deny it) вҶ’ kids **WIDE** fire. **Diversity:** `banned (audit, last 10 = 847,846,842,841,837,834,833,828,827,822)=[OUTPUT Canvas2D 6Г— (HARD jury ban) В· INPUT touch+mic-only 8Г— over 15 В· the "drag-one-thing вҶ’ always-consonant-morph" kids template 5Г—]` В· `picked (winner 849)=[device-orientation TILT INPUT (starved, 1Г—) В· three.js GPU OUTPUT (scarce) В· tilt-gravityвҶ’reachable-resolvable-dissonance TECH (NOT always-consonant) В· calm night-blue VIBE (regressed register)]` вҖ” clears every ban. **WIDE fork:** banked **`851-kids-hand-choir`** вӯҗ (bare-hand MediaPipe conducting вҖ” spread=tension/together=resolve; raw WebGL2; **top kids RESURRECT-FIRST**, the embodied build the jury most wants) + **`850-kids-monster-keys`** (every chromatic note plays вҖ” dissonance is a friendly wobble-monster you calm; Web MIDI + raw WebGL2) вҖ” both built complete + verified clean, removed before the winner-only build (not committed), full briefs in IDEAS В§516. вҡ пёҸ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вң“ Compiled successfully in 35.9s` вҶ’ Linting + type-check PASS вҶ’ reached `Collecting page data`**; **849 folder grep-clean of the build log** вҖ” zero references, every warning pre-existing `src/lib/**`; `npx eslint src/app/dream/849-kids-star-bowl/` вҶ’ 0; no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route); **NOT browser/device-verified** вҖ” the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (infra, fails identically on pristine `main` every cycle since 472; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by eye/ear: the toddler "feel" of the tilt-gravity tuning on real hardware (`TILT_FORCE`/`WELL_PULL`/damping may want a hands-on nudge), and whether the rim dissonance reads as "safely wobbly" vs flat (the always-on drone + auto-drift + drag fallback guarantee a sounding, rolling glance regardless).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/849-kids-star-bowl/README.md`

## (Cycle 515 вҖ” **adult** build В· DEEP, 2 approaches to one concept, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/847-feedback-ecology-ii](/dream/847-feedback-ecology-ii)** вҖ” Feedback Ecology II рҹҢҖ. `demoable` В· Cycle 515 (adult / dynamical-system emergent / long-form generative / live no-input). **For**: adults В· **no-input / self-oscillating input** (it runs itself вҖ” the starved input category the jury asked for; dodges the touch+mic over-rep, 8Г— across the last 15) В· **raw WebGL2 output** (the scarce GPU surface вҖ” 1Г— in the last 15; breaks the jury's HARD Canvas2D ban which had relapsed to 7-of-15) В· **coupled-resonator feedback network whose topology evolves itself вҖ” a Lorenz attractor drifting the coupling + Hebbian edges that strengthen-or-die вҖ” rendered with ping-pong FBO feedback trails** technique В· **dynamical-system / David-Tudor feedback-ecosystem vibe (active, not ambient)**. **What if the feedback-resonator network from `820` took its hands off the wheel вҖ” a chaotic attractor weathering the coupling through bifurcations while the graph rewires itself via Hebbian plasticity вҖ” so it's a long-form instrument that is genuinely different at minute 5 than at minute 0, and never loops?** This is **cycle-2 of [820 В· Feedback Ecology](/dream/820-feedback-ecology)**, building exactly the deepening 820's own README queued: *"add Lorenz-attractor coupling weights that drift over time."* It inherits **820's ear-safe Web Audio engine wholesale** (eight high-Q `BiquadFilter вҶ’ DelayNode вҶ’ feedback GainNode` resonators on a small-world coupling graph, root 55 Hz, every path ending in a `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter before a master gain вүӨ0.3). On top: **(1) Lorenz drift** вҖ” a classic Пғ=10/ПҒ=28/ОІ=8/3 system (dt=0.005, 6 Euler sub-steps/frame) integrated each frame; its normalized xвҶ’global coupling (sweeps isolated-pings вҶ” entrainment вҶ” drone on its own), yвҶ’self-feedback "edge of chaos," zвҶ’slow timbre (filter-Q + gentle Вұdetune), every target passed through 820's existing hard clamps (`MAX_COUPLING=0.35`, `MAX_FB_GAIN=0.88`). Because the Lorenz trajectory is aperiodic it never settles вҖ” the instrument *weathers*. **(2) Hebbian self-rewiring edges** вҖ” each edge carries a live weight: when both endpoints are energetic the edge potentiates ("fire together, wire together"); idle edges decay toward a non-zero floor (`[0.12, 1.0]` clamp) вҖ” *seldom-used links die, heavily-used links strengthen* вҖ” and the live weights both drive the coupling gains and set the edge brightness on screen, so you **watch** the graph rewire. **(3) Autonomous seeding** вҖ” every ~5.5s a gentle impulse is fired into the lowest-energy node so the ecology never dies (tapping a node still perturbs it, but it is not the primary input). **GPU render (raw WebGL2):** additive point-sprite node blobs (size/brightness вҲқ energy, 820's per-node palette), GPU `LINES` edges whose alpha вҲқ live Hebbian weight Г— signal flow, a **ping-pong FBO feedback-trail accumulation** (fade-and-feed-back each frame so energy leaves luminous decaying trails вҖ” the "David Tudor feedback ecosystem" look Canvas2D can't do cheaply, and thematically apt for a feedback instrument), plus a faint drifting Lorenz "weather" point-cloud + background tint so the autonomous drift is visible as well as audible. Shaders compiled/linked with error checks; on teardown all programs/buffers/VAOs/textures/framebuffers deleted + `WEBGL_lose_context`. **Ear-safety inherited from 820 unchanged** (limiter, hard-clamped gains, gentle 2s start ramp, always-visible **panic mute**, gesture-gated `AudioContext`). **Degrades:** `webgl2` null вҶ’ `text-rose-300` notice but **audio keeps running** (sound is the point); no Web Audio вҶ’ `text-rose-300` notice. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (fully client-side, no samples/network/recording); **zero new npm deps** (hand-written WebGL2, NOT three.js, NOT Canvas2D). Ambition honest **3/5** (#4 **multi-cycle commitment** вҖ” explicit cycle-2 of 820, the deepening 820's README itself queued В· #1 **first chaotic-attractor-driven self-rewiring network topology in the lab** вҖ” 820 had a *static* small-world graph + manual sliders; here the adjacency matrix is itself a dynamical system [Lorenz + Hebbian], and the ping-pong FBO feedback-trail is a GPU technique the lab is thin on В· #3 named refs [**E. N. Lorenz, "Deterministic Nonperiodic Flow," J. Atmos. Sci. 20 (1963)** В· adaptive/time-varying pulse-coupled oscillator networks (Hebbian plasticity) В· inherited **David Tudor вҖ” *Rainforest* (1968) / *Pulsers* (1976)** + **Toshimaru Nakamura** no-input lineage from 820]). **Source:** JURY 2026-06-22 **#5** ("820-feedback-ecology is your only net-new high-ambition build вҖ” ship its cycle-2 [Lorenz-drifting coupling] instead of always opening a new tab; develop what you have") + **#1** (hard-ban Canvas2D вҶ’ force a GPU surface) вҶ’ AGENT.md path (b) "continue a multi-cycle ambitious build already underway" вҶ’ adult **DEEP** fire. **Diversity:** `banned (audit, last 10 = 846,842,841,837,834,833,828,827,822,816)=[OUTPUT Canvas2D 7Г— (HARD jury ban) В· INPUT touch 4Г— (+ touch/mic-only 8Г— over 15)]` В· `picked (winner 847)=[no-input/self-oscillating INPUT (starved, 2Г—) В· raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT (scarce GPU, 1Г—) В· Lorenz+Hebbian self-rewiring TECH В· dynamical-system feedback-ecosystem VIBE]` вҖ” clears both jury bans. **DEEP fork:** the parallel sibling **`848-feedback-ecology-ii`** (the SAME concept rendered as a luminous orbiting **three.js** 3D graph вҖ” emissive spheres + weight-colored `LineSegments` + a Lorenz `THREE.Line` weather-trail, additive-halo bloom fallback) was built complete + verified clean (tsc 0 / eslint --max-warnings=0) and **de-selected on diversity + ambition** вҖ” three.js is 2Г— in the last 15 (847's raw WebGL2 is the scarcer GPU surface) and 847's ping-pong FBO feedback-trail is the more substantive + thematically-apt GPU technique. 848 banked to IDEAS В§515 (top adult RESURRECT-FIRST for a cycle where three.js isn't over-rep'd), saved to `/tmp/dream-losers-515/`, removed before the authoritative winner-only build (non-winner not committed). вҡ пёҸ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вң“ Compiled successfully in 53s` вҶ’ Linting + type-check PASS вҶ’ reached `Collecting page data`**; **847 folder grep-clean of the build log** вҖ” zero references, every warning pre-existing `src/lib/**`; `npx eslint src/app/dream/847-feedback-ecology-ii/` вҶ’ 0; no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route); **NOT browser/ear-verified** вҖ” the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (infra, fails identically on pristine `main` every cycle since 472; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by eye/ear: whether the Lorenz drift reads as a *coherent* hour-long weather rather than random wander, whether the Hebbian rewiring is visually legible as links brighten/die, and whether the bifurcation sweep stays musical across its whole range (the always-clamped limiter + gentle ramp + panic mute guarantee a safe, sounding, evolving glance regardless; honest caveat вҖ” GPU `lineWidth` is alpha-faked since most platforms clamp it to 1, so edge strength reads through brightness not thickness).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/847-feedback-ecology-ii/README.md`

## (Cycle 514 вҖ” **kids** build В· DEEP, 2 approaches to one concept, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/846-kids-sing-garden](/dream/846-kids-sing-garden)** вҖ” Sing the Garden рҹҢ». `demoable` В· Cycle 514 (kids 4+ / warm-daylight living garden / long-form generative). **For**: kids (4+) В· **mic/voice input** (off the over-represented touch tag the audit banned this cycle) В· **three.js WebGL `THREE.Points` + custom `ShaderMaterial` output** (the cold renderer вҖ” 0Г— in the last 10 shipped; a GPU point-field of thousands of pollen/petal points) В· **voice-fed EMERGENT phyllotaxis (largest-gap + local inhibition on an expanding growth front) + long-form self-organizing/self-singing field** technique В· **calm warm-daylight living-garden vibe**. **What if a 4-year-old's voice didn't just *place* flowers but GREW an organic garden whose spiral arrangement emerges on its own вҖ” the way a real sunflower head self-organizes вҖ” and the garden keeps breathing and growing even when the room is quiet?** The child hums/sings; a hand-rolled autocorrelation (Chris Wilson ACF) pitch detector with an RMS noise-gate snaps each note to a **C-major pentatonic** (no wrong notes) and deposits a new growth site **in the largest angular gap on the current front**, with an inhibition rule that relaxes as the head fills вҖ” so the angular increment self-organizes toward the golden angle (~137.5В°) **without hardcoding it**, a lightweight Keller-Segel-flavoured phyllotaxis (arXiv 2509.06498, Sept 2025). Pitch вҶ’ hue (low warm rose/gold вҶ’ high cool sky/violet) + which chord voice it feeds; loudness вҶ’ growth vigor + bloom brightness; a held note accelerates growth. **State + memory (long-form):** the field keeps seeding faint ambient sites and decaying bloom pulses during silence, and after ~2.5s quiet plays a soft generative bell arpeggio from already-grown sites вҖ” visibly and audibly richer at minute 5 than minute 1. Kid-safe `master gain 0.28 вҶ’ lowpass 7000 вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor(вҲ’10/20:1)`; always-on C2+G2 pad (never silent); analyser never wired to output; iOS gesture-gated AudioContext in the first tap; **mic-denied вҶ’ `text-rose-300` notice + ghost-hum auto-singer + tap-anywhere-to-grow** (fully demoable without a mic); WebGL-null вҶ’ friendly notice; full teardown (rAF + `audioCtx.close()` + three.js geometry/material/renderer dispose + mic tracks stopped). **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (no samples/network/recording вҖ” mic used only for live pitch/RMS, never stored or transmitted); **zero new npm deps** (three.js v0.182 already installed; NOT Canvas2D). Ambition honest **3/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [mic ACF pitch-detect + emergent largest-gap growth field + shader point-render + generative self-singing bell arpeggio = 4] В· #3 named refs [**arXiv 2509.06498 "Phyllotaxis in a Keller-Segel model" (2025)** В· **H. Vogel (1979)** sunflower golden-angle baseline В· **Mort Garson *Mother Earth's Plantasia* (1976)** vibe В· **Chris Wilson** autocorrelation] В· #5 references RESEARCH В§514, added this cycle <14 days). **Source:** JURY 2026-06-21 #5 (ship a banked sibling вҖ” this is the вӯҗ top kids RESURRECT-FIRST `800-kids-sing-meadow`, elevated) вҶ’ RESEARCH В§514 (phyllotaxis is *emergent*, not just drawn) вҶ’ kids **DEEP** fire. **Diversity:** `banned (audit, last 10)=[INPUT touch 4Г— В· OUTPUT Canvas2D 6Г—]` В· `picked (winner 846)=[mic/voice INPUT В· three.js shader point-field OUTPUT (cold) В· emergent-phyllotaxis TECH В· warm-daylight-living-garden VIBE]` вҖ” clears both bans. **DEEP fork:** the discrete/legible sibling **`845-kids-sing-meadow`** (one sung note вҶ’ exactly one flower on the literal Vogel spiral, three.js `InstancedMesh`, call-and-response replay вҖ” the *most 4yo-legible* take) was built complete + clean (tsc 0 / eslint 0) and **de-selected on ambition/research-fit** (846 realizes today's actual research finding and is long-form; 845 plots the static formula). 845 banked to IDEAS В§514 (top kids RESURRECT-FIRST), saved to `/tmp/dream-losers-514/`, removed before the authoritative winner-only build (non-winner not committed). вҡ пёҸ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: `вң“ Compiled successfully` вҶ’ Linting and checking validity of types вҶ’ reached `Collecting page data`; **846 folder grep-clean of the build log** вҖ” zero references, every warning pre-existing `src/lib/**`; `npx eslint src/app/dream/846-kids-sing-garden/` вҶ’ 0; `tsc --noEmit` вҶ’ 0 in folder; no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route); **NOT browser/ear-verified** вҖ” the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (infra, fails identically on pristine `main` every cycle since 472; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by eye/ear: whether the emergent spiral reads as a recognizable sunflower head on a real GPU, whether a 4-year-old's hum reliably plants via ACF on a phone mic, and whether the abstract point-field reads as "I made that" the way discrete flowers (845) would (the ghost-hum + tap-to-grow fallback + always-on pad guarantee a sounding, growing glance regardless).

## (Cycle 511 вҖ” **adult** build В· WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/837-quasicrystal](/dream/837-quasicrystal)** вҖ” Quasicrystal рҹ”·. `demoable` В· Cycle 511 (adult / generative / long-form / clinical-crystalline). **For**: adults В· **autonomous-generative input** (it plays itself; you tune tempo / ПҶ-inflation / traversal / reseed вҖ” NOT a touch-performance, off the over-represented touch tag) В· **Canvas2D pentagrid-tiling output** (deep-near-black ground, cyan fat-rhomb + violet thin-rhomb glowing edges, Ikeda crystalline) В· **de Bruijn pentagrid вҶ’ Penrose P3 aperiodic tiling вҶ’ aperiodic-order music** technique (grep-0Г— вҖ” the lab's FIRST aperiodic/quasicrystal composition) В· **geometric crystalline / Ryoji-Ikeda vibe**. **What if a piece of music had the structure of a quasicrystal вҖ” perfectly ordered, self-similar, yet NEVER exactly repeating вҖ” so it can play for an hour and stay coherent without ever looping?** A real **de Bruijn pentagrid** (5 line-families at 36В° steps, offsets ОівӮҖвҖҰОівӮ„) is dual-transformed into a true **Penrose P3 rhomb tiling** with exact 5-fold symmetry and provable aperiodicity вҖ” fat rhombs (|jвҲ’k|=1,4) and thin rhombs (|jвҲ’k|=2,3). A **traversal** (spiral / sweep / growth-front) visits each tile and sonifies it: the 7 Penrose **vertex configurations** (sun/star/ace/deuce/jack/king/queen) map to **just-intonation ratios** (sunвҶ’1/1, queenвҶ’3/2, kingвҶ’4/3, jackвҶ’5/4, starвҶ’6/5, deuceвҶ’**7/4** harmonic seventh, aceвҶ’9/8), register rises with distance from center, fat rhombs use warm additive partials (1fВ·2fВ·3f) and thin rhombs bright partials + FM shimmer, over a slow drone that shifts as the traversal travels outward. Because the tiling is aperiodic but built from a finite local vocabulary, the line is **non-repeating yet self-similar** вҖ” motifs recur transposed and re-spaced but the exact sequence never returns, so it's genuinely different at minute 5 than minute 1 (the lab is thin on true **long-form generative**). **ПҶ-inflation** zooms the world by powers of ПҶ=(1+вҲҡ5)/2 вҖ” the same patterns reappear at larger scale, a slow harmonic-rhythm change. An in-app **Design Notes** overlay explains the tiling, the mapping, and why it never repeats. Voices glide with `setTargetAtTime`/ramps (no clicks); master `gain вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor вҶ’ destination`, modest gain; gesture-gated AudioContext; full teardown (rAF + `audioCtx.dispose()`). **Degrades:** no Web Audio вҶ’ `text-rose-300` notice, the crystal still grows silently. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (fully client-side, no samples/network/recording); **zero new npm deps** (Canvas2D, NOT three.js). Ambition honest **3/5** (#1 **first aperiodic-order/quasicrystal music in the lab** вҖ” builder grep of penrose/aperiodic/quasicrystal/de-bruijn/pentagrid found only 3 *incidental* mentions, no prior aperiodic-music В· #2 вүҘ3 subsystems [de Bruijn pentagrid tiling generator + traversalвҶ’sequencer + additive/FM synth voices + drone + Canvas2D render = 4+] В· #3 named refs [**Roger Penrose** P3 (1974) В· **N.G. de Bruijn** pentagrid/"Algebraic theory of Penrose's non-periodic tilings", 1981 В· **Dan Shechtman** quasicrystals, Nobel 2011 В· **"Quasiperiodic Music"** arXiv 2009.04667; aesthetic kin Ryoji Ikeda]). **Source:** JURY 2026-06-21 #1 (rest his recording, end the answering-agent thread) вҶ’ RESEARCH В§511 (Skylight made the sky *visible* but silent вҶ’ data/structure sonification; "Quasiperiodic Music" arXiv 2009.04667 вҶ’ aperiodic order as musical structure) вҶ’ this adult **WIDE** fire. **Diversity:** `banned (JURY 2026-06-21 + audit)=[his-recording-as-source В· machine-listens-to-recording/answering-agent В· pentatonic-never-wrong В· UPIC pitch-painter В· adult-ambient-as-default В· touch-input (5Г— in last 10)]` В· `picked (winner 837)=[autonomous-generative INPUT (off touch) В· Canvas2D crystalline-tiling OUTPUT В· de-Bruijn-pentagrid/aperiodic-order TECH (grep-0Г—, NOT his-recording, NOT answer/follow, NOT pentatonic) В· geometric-crystalline-Ikeda VIBE]` вҖ” clears every ban. **WIDE fan-out вҖ” 2 explored, banked to IDEAS В§511:** `836-flightpaths` (sonify the live ADS-B sky as a clinical radar organ вҖ” each real aircraft a sustained spatial voice; the genuine real-world-data lab-first that answers JURY #3, de-selected because its live feed is often CORS-blocked вҶ’ most visitors see the simulated sky; **top adult RESURRECT-FIRST**) + `838-hocket-loom` (play one live MIDI/keyboard line вҶ’ it shatters across an interlocking hocket/kotekan/phase ensemble; de-selected because canon/echo/interlock is the lab's most-trodden ground). Both built complete + build-verified (tsc 0 / eslint 0), saved to `/tmp/dream-losers-511/`, removed before the authoritative winner-only build (non-winners not committed). вҡ пёҸ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вң“ Compiled successfully in 42s` вҶ’ Linting and checking validity of types вҶ’ Collecting page data**; `npx eslint` on the folder вҶ’ 0/0; no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route); **NOT browser/ear-verified** вҖ” the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (infra, fails identically on pristine `main` every cycle since 472; cgroup-locked, unraisable as root; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by eye/ear: whether the aperiodic sequence reads as "coherent but never looping" to the ear and whether the vertexвҶ’JI mapping sounds as intended on a real device (the always-on drone + autonomous traversal guarantee a sounding, crystallizing glance regardless).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/837-quasicrystal/README.md`

## (Cycle 510 вҖ” **kids** build В· DEEP, 2 approaches to one concept, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/834-kids-paint-mixer](/dream/834-kids-paint-mixer)** вҖ” Paint Mixer рҹҺЁ. `demoable` В· Cycle 510 (kids 4+ / bright painterly / color-as-language). **For**: kids (4+) В· **touch drag-paint input** (no reading) В· **raw WebGL2 output** (the lab's COLDEST renderer, 0Г— in the last 10 shipped) В· **physically-correct Kubelka-Munk subtractive pigment mixing вҶ’ GPU readPixels вҶ’ gliding chord** technique В· **bright cream finger-paint vibe**. **What if a 4-year-old finger-paints by MIXING REAL PAINT вҖ” and the color they mix IS the chord they hear?** Three big glowing pigment blobs (red/magenta, yellow, blue) drag around a cream paper canvas; where they overlap the paint mixes like REAL paint вҖ” **blue + yellow makes GREEN**, not the muddy gray that ordinary RGB mixing gives вҖ” because a GLSL ES 3.00 fragment shader runs full **36-sample Kubelka-Munk spectral mixing per pixel** (RGBвҶ’K/S absorption+scattering, mix in spectral space, integrate over CIE XYZ color-matching functions, back to sRGB), with a domain-warp smear for a wet-paint feel. Each ~20 Hz frame, `readPixels` samples the actual mixed pixels under the blob centroid вҶ’ HSV вҶ’ drives a live, always-in-tune chord over a fixed C+G pad: **warm/gold вҶ’ bright major/add9 В· green/teal вҶ’ open sus В· blue/violet вҶ’ tender minor В· magenta вҶ’ dreamy maj7**, with saturationвҶ’richness and valueвҶ’brightness, all gliding click-free via `setTargetAtTime` (voices never retrigger). So the heard chord **exactly equals the seen mixed color** вҖ” the child paints harmony, never a wrong note (the fixed center holds it in tune; color shapes only quality + richness). The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-21 #4** (kill the kids "pentatonic-never-wrong" crutch вҖ” let harmony be *shaped*) and **#5** (ship a banked sibling вҖ” this is the В§508 вӯҗ RESURRECT-FIRST `829-kids-color-blend`, rebuilt and upgraded from approximate RGB blend to physically-correct pigment optics + real GPU pixel-readback). Kids-safe `masterGain 0.27 вҶ’ lowpass вүӨ7 kHz вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor(вҲ’10/20:1)`; always-on pad (never silent); вүҘ64вҖ“72px tap targets; iOS gesture-gated AudioContext in the first tap; auto-drift after ~1.5s idle so an unattended phone keeps painting + singing; **WebGL2-null вҶ’ CSS `mix-blend-mode:multiply` fallback that still drives the same audio** + `text-rose-300` notice; no Web Audio вҶ’ visuals stay alive + notice; full teardown (program/buffer/VAO + `WEBGL_lose_context` + `audioCtx.close()`). **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (fully client-side, no samples/network/recording); **zero new npm deps** (raw WebGL2, no three.js). Ambition honest **3/5** (#1 **first Kubelka-Munk physical pigment mixing in the lab** вҖ” grep-0Г—; every prior "pigment" is metaphorical Anadol data-as-pigment вҖ” and **first GPU `readPixels`вҶ’audio coupling** В· #2 вүҘ3 subsystems [touch drag-physics + per-pixel Kubelka-Munk spectral mixing + readPixels colorвҶ’chord-quality synth + WebGL2 render = 4] В· #3 named refs [**Isaac Newton's 7-colorвҶ”7-note mapping** В· **Scriabin's *clavier Г  lumiГЁres*** В· **Mixbox / "Practical Pigment Mixing for Digital Painting," SochorovГЎ & JamriЕЎka, SIGGRAPH Asia 2021** + **Spectral.js** Kubelka-Munk]) В· soft #5 (RESEARCH В§510 вҖ” Mixbox/Spectral.js GLSL + CoolerSpace 2026 color tooling). **Source:** JURY 2026-06-21 #4 + #5 вҶ’ RESEARCH В§510 (RGB additive mixing is physically WRONG вҖ” blue+yellow=gray; Kubelka-Munk gives blue+yellow=green like real finger-paint) вҶ’ kids **DEEP** fire (paint vs. light). **Diversity:** `banned (JURY 2026-06-21)=[pentatonic-never-wrong (kids crutch) В· UPIC pitch-painter В· his-recording-as-source В· machine-listens-to-recording В· adult-ambient-as-default]` В· `picked (winner 834)=[touch drag-paint INPUT В· raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT (cold, 0Г— last 10) В· Kubelka-Munk-pigment-mixвҶ’chord-quality TECH (harmony genuinely shaped, NOT pentatonic, NOT UPIC) В· bright cream finger-paint VIBE]` вҖ” clears every ban. **DEEP fork:** the physically-opposite sibling **`835-kids-light-mixer`** (additive LIGHT вҖ” red+green=yellow, all=white, on a near-black starfield) was built complete + clean and **de-selected on novelty** (additive RGB mixing is the *ordinary* mix the world already does вҖ” and the original 829 framing; the pigment approach is the lab-first + the fresher, more kid-native surprise). 835 banked to IDEAS В§510, saved to `/tmp/dream-losers-510/`, removed before the authoritative build (non-winner not committed). вҡ пёҸ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: `вң“ Compiled successfully in 80s` вҶ’ Linting + type-check PASS вҶ’ reached `Collecting page data`; **834 folder grep-clean of the build log** вҖ” zero references, zero warnings/errors from it, every warning pre-existing `src/lib/**`; no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route); **NOT browser/ear-verified** вҖ” the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (infra, fails identically on pristine `main` every cycle since 472; cgroup-locked, unraisable as root; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by eye/ear: whether blue+yellow visibly reads as green on a real GPU and whether the heard chord tracks the mixed color tightly under a child's finger (the always-on pad + auto-drift + CSS fallback guarantee a sounding, painting glance regardless).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/834-kids-paint-mixer/README.md`

## (Cycle 509 вҖ” **adult** build В· WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/833-spectral-loom](/dream/833-spectral-loom)** вҖ” Spectral Loom вқ„пёҸрҹҺЁ. `demoable` В· Cycle 509 (adult / clinical-Ikeda / live-performance). **For**: adults В· **live-mic input** (rests his recording вҖ” the material is the *visitor's* own sound; the visitor, not a stored file) В· **Canvas2D spectrogram output** (cool monochromeвҶ’cyan/violet magnitude ramp, crisp grid, bright scrub-head) В· **freeze-the-live-STFT вҶ’ editable spectral-image buffer вҶ’ additive resynth** technique В· **clinical / data-instrument / Ryoji-Ikeda vibe вҖ” active not ambient**. **What if you could FREEZE your own live sound as a spectrogram *image* and then PAINT that frozen picture вҖ” smear energy sideways, brush it in and out, stretch it вҖ” and hear the picture you painted?** A live STFT (`AnalyserNode` fftSize 1024, dBвҶ’0..1, folded onto a perceptual log-frequency row grid) scrolls a rolling spectrogram; **вқ„ Freeze** copies the window into an editable magnitude matrix `buffer[TIME][FREQ]` вҖ” a held image. **Editing the picture edits the sound:** a soft-falloff Gaussian brush **raises/lowers** magnitude, **smear** drags spectral energy sideways in time (freeze-stretch), a **freeze-stretch slider** runs a per-frame IIR time-blur that melts transients into drones, and a **scrub head** sweeps the frozen frame with a **Loop** toggle for rhythmic re-triggering (active, never a static drone). Resynthesis = a capped **96-oscillator additive bank** reading the magnitude column under the scrub head each frame, the loudest rows mapped to oscillator freq+gain with `setTargetAtTime` smoothing (no zipper). Master `gain вҶ’ lowpass вүӨ13.5 kHz вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor вҶ’ destination`. **Crucial mic-free path:** mic denied/absent вҶ’ a visible `text-rose-300` notice **and** a "Use demo sound" button that routes an internally-generated evolving chord/whistle/noise through the **identical** captureвҶ’freezeвҶ’scrub pipeline, so the whole mechanic is fully demoable with no mic; the canvas animates a demo spectrogram on load (never blank, never silent). **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (fully client-side, no samples, no network, no recording stored); **zero new npm deps**. Ambition honest **2/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [live STFT capture + frozen editable spectral buffer + 96-osc additive resynth + spectrogram renderer = 4] В· #3 named ref [**Jean-FranГ§ois Charles, "A Tutorial on Spectral Sound Processing Using Max/MSP and Jitter," Computer Music Journal 32:3 (2008)** вҖ” spectrogram-as-editable-image-buffer, the GRM/IRCAM spectral-freeze lineage; aesthetic kin **Ryoji Ikeda**]). **#1 NOT claimed (honesty):** spectral processing has lab ancestors (`34-spectral-morph`, `321-spectral-flight`) вҖ” but **none let you PAINT the frozen image and resynth it**, which is 833's genuine differentiator + high surprise ("the picture *is* the sound"). **Resurrects the В§507-banked `826-spectral-loom`**, satisfying **JURY 2026-06-21 #5** ("stop banking DEEP losers вҖ” ship a banked sibling, clear the bank"). **Source:** JURY 2026-06-21 #1 (rest his recording, end the answering-agent thread) + #3 (real-world-data / non-music) + #5 (ship a banked sibling) вҶ’ RESEARCH В§509 (space-weather sonification is fresh-in-2026 but a grep proved it's owned by the lab вҖ” `314`/`471`; EDM-drop owned by `387`/`631` вҖ” so two of three briefs were re-treads, redirecting to the one un-owned framing) вҶ’ this adult **WIDE** fire. **Diversity:** `banned (JURY 2026-06-21)=[his-recording-as-source В· machine-listens-to-recording В· pentatonic-never-wrong В· UPIC pitch-painter В· adult-ambient-as-default]` В· `picked (winner 833)=[live-mic INPUT (rests his recording) В· Canvas2D spectrogram OUTPUT (вүӨ3Г—, not banned) В· spectral-freeze-and-PAINT TECH (NOT his-recording, NOT pentatonic, NOT UPIC, NOT machine-listens-to-HIS-recording) В· clinical-Ikeda active VIBE (deliberately NOT ambient)]` вҖ” clears every ban. The 3 explorers spread inputs (mic / external-API / transport-touch) and techniques (spectral-paint / space-weather-sonification / EDM-arrangement); the two non-winners (`831-solar-wind-organ` вүҲ existing `314`/`471`; `832-drop-engine` вүҲ existing `387`/`631`) were caught redundant at the curate grep and **NOT committed or re-seeded as fresh** (logged honestly to STATE/IDEAS as a research-grep lesson; saved to `/tmp/dream-losers-509/`). вҡ пёҸ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: TypeScript + ESLint + production webpack compile PASS, reached `Collecting page data`; **833 folder grep-clean** вҖ” zero warnings/errors from it, every warning pre-existing `src/lib/**`; `npx eslint` on the folder вҶ’ 0/0; no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route); **NOT browser/ear-verified** вҖ” the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (infra, fails identically on pristine `main` every cycle since 471; cgroup-locked, unraisable as root; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by eye/ear: whether painting the frozen spectrogram audibly reworks the resynth and whether the additive-bank level is balanced on a real device (the demo-sound path + on-load animation guarantee a sounding, animated glance regardless).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/833-spectral-loom/README.md`

## (Cycle 508 вҖ” **kids** build В· WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/828-kids-feelings-sun](/dream/828-kids-feelings-sun)** вҖ” Feelings Sun рҹҢһрҹ’ӣ. `demoable` В· Cycle 508 (kids, 4+). **For**: a 4-year-old on iPad/mobile В· **touch-DRAG input** (one big draggable sun; mouse too) В· **animated SVG/DOM output** (glowing sun with `feGaussianBlur`, CSS-animated sky gradient + drifting motes вҖ” NOT Canvas2D, NOT three.js, NOT WebGL) В· **2-D affect-field вҶ’ bilinear chord-quality morph** technique (grep-thin вҖ” the kids lane's first *continuous emotional* harmony-shaper) В· **warm emotional kids-sky vibe**. **What if a 4-year-old could SHAPE the FEELING of a chord вҖ” drag one friendly sun across a feelings-sky and the harmony morphs happyвҶ”cozyвҶ”floatyвҶ”dreamy вҖ” instead of tapping a pre-approved pentatonic scale?** The sun's (x,y) **bilinearly blends four chord qualities** at the corners: up-left bright **major** (happy), down-left **minor** (cozy/wistful), down-right **sus** (floaty), up-right **add9/maj7** (dreamy). A fixed Web Audio pad always holds ONE tonal center (**root drone + perfect-fifth ALWAYS sounding**, so it is always "in tune"); two **color voices glide continuously** вҖ” the harmonic third morphs maj3вҶ”min3вҶ”P4, plus a high added-tone voice that fades in toward the dreamy corner вҖ” ALL via `setTargetAtTime`/ramps so the harmony morphs **click-free** (voices never re-triggered). Every position is consonant, but the child genuinely controls bright-vs-dark / open-vs-rich / plain-vs-dreamy. The sky gradient, the sun's **expressive face** (smile + sleepy-dreamy eyes), its glow color, and floating motes all shift with the current feeling; a soft bell sparkle trails the sun. **This is the directest answer to JURY 2026-06-21 #4** (kill "pentatonic-never-wrong"; let harmony be *shaped*) on the **emotion axis** вҖ” completing the kids harmony-shaping set: `816` shaped harmony by **interval-stacking**, `822` shaped **rhythm** by spinning polygons, `828` shapes the **feeling/quality** continuously. It also satisfies **JURY #5** ("stop banking DEEP losers вҖ” ship a banked sibling"): 828 is the cycle-506 вӯҗ RESURRECT-FIRST banked `823-kids-feelings-chords`, built and shipped. **Interaction (no reading):** drag the вүҘ200px sun anywhere; untouched for ~1.5s it gently auto-drifts on a slow Lissajous path so an unattended phone is always morphing + singing. Kids-safe `master gain вүҲ0.28 вҶ’ lowpass вүҲ7000 вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor вҶ’ destination`; soft ~0.6s attacks; always-on pad (never silent); iOS gesture-gated AudioContext in the first tap; full rAF + `audioCtx.close()` teardown. **Degrades:** no Web Audio вҶ’ friendly `text-rose-300` notice, visuals stay alive. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (fully client-side, no samples, no network, no data collection); **zero new npm deps**. Ambition honest **2/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [touch affect-field mapping + bilinear chord-quality morph engine + always-on pad/color-voice synth + animated SVG render = 4] В· #3 named refs [**Russell's circumplex model of affect** (valenceГ—arousal) В· **Hevner's affective tone/mode associations** В· current touchstone **Synesthesia "Color to Sound" 2026 AURA mode** colorвҶ’4-voice chord]). **Source:** JURY 2026-06-21 #4 (kill pentatonic; shape harmony) + #5 (ship a banked sibling вҖ” resurrects the В§506 вӯҗ `823`) вҶ’ RESEARCH В§508 (color/feelingвҶ’chord; Synesthesia AURA 2026 + Sound Color Project/Plutchik) вҶ’ this kids **WIDE** fire. Winner of a 3-explorer fire; banked **`829-kids-color-blend`** вӯҗ RESURRECT-FIRST (mix two glowing colored lights вҶ’ the color you make IS the chord; **raw WebGL2** вҖ” the lab's COLDEST renderer, 0Г— in the last 10; color-as-language, love-aligned `82`вқӨпёҸ/`317`вқӨпёҸ) + **`830-kids-feelings-choir`** (tap to gather singing creatures into a circle вҶ’ assemble a chord; Canvas2D, Toca-Band orchestration) as **IDEAS В§508**. **Diversity:** `banned (JURY 2026-06-21)=[his-recording-as-source В· machine-listens-to-recording В· pentatonic-never-wrong В· UPIC pitch-painter В· adult-ambient-as-default]` В· `picked (winner 828)=[touch-DRAG INPUT В· SVG/DOM OUTPUT (вүӨ3Г—, not banned вҖ” jury said surfaces are spread, don't reflexively flee) В· continuous-affect-field chord-quality-morph TECH (NOT pentatonic, NOT UPIC, NOT his-recording) В· warm-emotional kids VIBE]` вҖ” clears every ban; the 3 explorers spread renderers SVG-DOM / WebGL2 / Canvas2D and shaping-mechanisms feeling-position / color-mix / gather-orchestration. вҡ пёҸ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: TypeScript + ESLint + production webpack compile PASS, reached `Collecting page data`; **828 folder grep-clean** вҖ” zero warnings/errors from it, every warning pre-existing `src/lib/**`; no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route); **NOT browser/ear-verified** вҖ” the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (infra, fails identically on pristine `main` every cycle since 471; cgroup-locked, unraisable as root; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by eye/ear: whether a 4-year-old reads "drag up-left = happy, down-left = cozy" without instruction and whether the third audibly morphs majorвҶ”minor smoothly on a real device (the always-on pad + fifth + idle auto-drift guarantee a sounding, morphing glance regardless).
