## (Cycle 507 вҖ” **adult** build В· WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/827-waveguide-mesh](/dream/827-waveguide-mesh)** вҖ” Waveguide Mesh рҹӘҳрҹҢҠ. `demoable` В· Cycle 507 (adult / live-performance / installation). **For**: adults / stage В· **Web MIDI + on-screen-pad + direct-membrane + keyboard input** (the most stage-playable in the window; MIDI is **0Г— in the last 10 shipped** вҖ” the starved input) В· **Canvas2D displacement-field output** (coppery-violet heatmap that paints the *exact* field the audio reads) В· **2-D digital-waveguide-mesh / FDTD wave-equation membrane run at AUDIO sample rate in an AudioWorklet** technique В· **percussive, metallic, live-performance vibe вҖ” deliberately NOT ambient**. **What if a chord weren't synthesized but physically *travelled*?** You strike a point on a 2-D vibrating drumhead; a Gaussian energy bump spreads, reflects off the rigid rim, interferes with itself, and rings as a real plate/drum tone via the standard FDTD update `u_next = (2u вҲ’ u_prev + CВІвҲҮВІu)В·damping` (fixed boundaries, C inside the 2-D CFL bound вүӨ1/вҲҡ2). The mesh runs **at the sample rate inside a Blob-URL `AudioWorklet`** (`worklet-source.ts`); the **audio signal IS the displacement read at fixed pickup nodes** (DC-blocked + softly saturated), and the worklet posts a downsampled field ~45Г—/s so **the wavefronts you see are the waveform you hear**. If `AudioWorklet` is unavailable it degrades to a matched **bank of modal resonators** (circular-membrane eigenratios 1.00В·1.59В·2.14В·2.30В·2.65вҖҰ) excited per strike + a control-rate FDTD mesh for the same visual вҖ” audio/visual stay coupled either way. **Play it** via a MIDI keyboard (note-on velocity = strike force, pitch = membrane tension = wave speed = strike position), two rows of on-screen pads (toms/plates вҖ” tap several for a chord), direct taps on the head, or the AвҖ“L computer-keyboard row; status line shows "MIDI connected вң“" or an amber "no MIDI вҖ” use the pads." Pitch is the **full chromatic scale** (NOT pentatonic); higher notes tighten the head (faster waves, shorter ring) for articulation; chords = multiple strikes summed into one membrane. Master `gain вҶ’ lowpass вүӨ12 kHz вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor вҶ’ destination`; audio gesture-gated (iOS unlock); idle auto-strikes so the canvas is never dead. **No samples, no recordings, no network, no API route вҶ’ no `guard`; zero new npm deps.** Ambition honest **2/5** (**#2** вүҘ3 subsystems [FDTD mesh DSP + Web MIDI + AudioWorklet audio-rate engine w/ modal fallback + Canvas2D renderer = 4] В· **#3** named refs [**Van Duyne & Smith, "Physical Modeling with the 2-D Digital Waveguide Mesh," ICMC 1993**; Perry Cook STK modal synthesis for the fallback]). **#1 NOT claimed (honesty):** FDTD-wave-field-as-sound already exists as kids `478-kids-wave-pond` + `489-kids-pond-pair`; 827's genuine differentiators are the **adult MIDI live-performance register** of that family and the **audio-rate-in-AudioWorklet** mesh (vs. their control-rate visual + pickup). **Source:** JURY 2026-06-21 (rest his recording, end the answering-agent thread, stop defaulting to adult-ambient, chase a starved frontier) вҶ’ RESEARCH В§507 (GPU-compute-fieldвҶ’sound is *saturated* in the lab вҖ” `327`/`520`/`579`/`55` + ShaderVine 2026 вҖ” so redirect off it toward the starved live-performance/MIDI physical-model axis) вҶ’ this adult **WIDE** fire. Winner of a 3-explorer fire; banked **`825-gravity-sequencer`** (pointer В· symplectic N-body orbital integration as a *percussion sequencer* вҖ” perihelion crossings strike tuned bells, stable orbits lock a groove, chaos drifts it; Otomata + Kepler) + **`826-spectral-loom`** (live-mic STFT freeze вҶ’ editable spectral-image buffer вҶ’ additive resynth; smear/scrub/brush the frozen spectrum like wet paint, edit-the-picture-edits-the-sound, demoable mic-free; Jean-FranГ§ois Charles CMJ 2008) as **IDEAS В§507**. **Diversity:** `banned (JURY 2026-06-21)=[his-recording-as-source В· machine-listens-to-recording В· pentatonic-never-wrong В· UPIC pitch-painter В· adult-ambient-as-default]` В· `picked (winner 827)=[Web-MIDI/pad INPUT (starved 0Г— in window) В· Canvas2D displacement-field OUTPUT (вүӨ3Г—, not banned) В· 2-D-FDTD-waveguide-mesh-audio TECH (not in last 10) В· percussive live-performance VIBE (NOT ambient)]` вҖ” clears every ban; the 3 explorers spread inputs MIDI/pointer/mic and techniques waveguide-mesh/orbital-sequencer/spectral-paint. вҡ пёҸ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вң“ Compiled successfully in 42s` вҶ’ Linting and checking validity of types вҶ’ Collecting page data**; **827 folder grep-clean** вҖ” zero warnings/errors from it, every warning pre-existing `src/lib/**`; `npx eslint` on the folder вҶ’ 0/0; no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route); **NOT browser/ear-verified** вҖ” the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (fails identically on pristine `main`; ceiling cgroup-locked, unraisable as root; Vercel deploys normally). Unverified by eye/ear: whether the audio-rate worklet mesh stays stable + musical across a real device and whether the visible field reads as tightly synced to the sound (idle auto-strikes guarantee a sounding, rippling glance regardless).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/827-waveguide-mesh/README.md`

## Cycle 506 вҖ” **kids** build В· WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1

- **[/dream/822-kids-shape-drums](/dream/822-kids-shape-drums)** вҖ” Shape Drums рҹ”әрҹҘҒ. `demoable` В· Cycle 506 (kids, 4+). **For**: a 4-year-old on iPad/mobile В· **touch input** (tap to add/cycle shapes, big turtle/rabbit speed buttons) В· **Canvas2D output** (full-bleed `requestAnimationFrame` rotating polygons вҖ” off the recent three.js 799/803/805 streak; jury says Canvas2D no longer banned at 3Г— and the concept reads cleanly in 2D) В· **polyrhythm-as-rotating-polygons / vertex-crossing scheduler** technique (grep-thin вҖ” the kids lane's FIRST shapeable-rhythm piece) В· **playful, bold-saturated-on-near-black, geometric, calm-but-lively vibe**. **What if a 4-year-old could BUILD a polyrhythm by spinning shapes вҖ” choosing how many sides each shape has and how fast it spins вҖ” instead of tapping a pre-approved pentatonic scale?** 1вҖ“5 big rotating polygons sit on a dark canvas, each a bold color with glowing vertex dots; a faint trigger line crosses the top of each shape, and every time a vertex sweeps past it the shape PINGS a warm note + flashes a ripple. A triangle pings **3Г—/rotation**, a hexagon **6Г—** вҖ” so the **number of sides the child chooses IS the rhythmic subdivision**, and the **spin speed IS the tempo**. Two shapes of different side-counts spinning at related speeds (Г—0.5/Г—1/Г—1.5/Г—2 of a base tempo, snapped so they stay clean) drift in and out of phase вҖ” the child has literally *built* a 3-against-2 or 4-against-3 polyrhythm. **This is the directest answer to JURY 2026-06-21 #4** вҖ” which banned the kids lane's "pentatonic-never-wrong" crutch (6Г—) and asked for a piece where **harmony OR rhythm can be *shaped***. Cycle 504 answered the *harmony* half (`816-kids-tone-tower`, JI chord-stacking); 822 answers the **rhythm** half (the grep-thin register), completing the pair. Pitch is NOT the child's variable вҖ” each shape is locked to one tone of a single warm **Dadd9 stack** (D3/A3/D4/F#4/B4) so *every* combination is consonant вҖ” the child shapes the **rhythmic interplay**, never a "wrong note." **Interaction (no reading):** big round **+** (80px) adds a shape (cycles triangleвҶ’squareвҶ’pentagonвҶ’hexagon, cap 5); **tap a shape** cycles its sides 3вҶ’8; **tap its center** removes it (never empty); one **giant 64px speed button per shape** (turtle/rabbit, no words) cycles the musically-related ratios. Pings fire via a per-frame **vertex-crossing edge detector** in the rAF loop; soft marimba/bell synthesis (3 detuned partials, click-free `linearRamp`-attack/`setTargetAtTime`-decay, lowpass tail, light feedback delay) + a quiet sustained pad so it's never silent вҖ” levels low, safe for a sleeping toddler. **Audio gesture-gated** ("tap to start" overlay, iOS unlock), rAF cancelled + AudioContext closed on unmount. **Degrades:** no Web Audio вҶ’ visuals stay alive + a small "sound is off" notice (no throw). **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (fully client-side, no samples, no network, no data collection); **zero new npm deps**. Ambition honest **2вҖ“3/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [touch shape-builder + rotating-geometry vertex-crossing scheduler + chord-voiced marimba synth + Canvas2D render = 4] В· #3 named refs [**"Polyrhythms in shapes"** / thekidshouldseethis В· **Musical Toys "Polyrhythm"** В· **Steve Reich phasing / Harvard pendulum-wave** lineage] В· soft #5 RESEARCH В§506 today). **Source:** JURY 2026-06-21 #4 (kill pentatonic; shape rhythm) + #5 (ship a banked sibling вҖ” this resurrects/de-pentatones the В§504-banked `818-kids-pendulum-choir` as a rotating-polygon variant) вҶ’ RESEARCH В§506 (polyrhythm-as-rotating-polygons) вҶ’ this kids **WIDE** fire. Winner of a 3-explorer fire; banked **`823-kids-feelings-chords`** вӯҗ RESURRECT-FIRST (drag a sun across a feelings-sky вҶ’ SHAPE the chord's emotion majorвҶ”minorвҶ”susвҶ”add9, SVG/DOM вҖ” the renderer-diverse harmony pick) + **`824-kids-clap-loop`** (clap a rhythm вҶ’ a glowing WebGL2 band loops it back, resurrects В§504-banked 817) as **IDEAS В§506**. **Diversity:** `banned (JURY 2026-06-21)=[his-recording-as-source В· machine-listens-to-recording В· pentatonic-never-wrong В· UPIC pitch-painter В· adult-ambient-as-default]` В· `picked (winner 822)=[touch INPUT В· Canvas2D OUTPUT (off the three.js streak) В· polyrhythm-rotating-polygon shapeable-RHYTHM TECH (NOT pentatonic, NOT UPIC) В· playful-geometric kids VIBE]` вҖ” clears every ban; the 3 explorers spread renderers Canvas2D/SVG-DOM/WebGL2 (the "spread, don't flip" answer). вҡ пёҸ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: all code gates PASS вҖ” TypeScript + ESLint + production webpack compile, reached `Collecting page data`; **822 folder grep-clean** вҖ” zero warnings/errors from it, every warning pre-existing `src/lib/**`; no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route); **NOT browser/ear-verified** вҖ” the standing container **~4096-fd `EMFILE`** at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen. *Nuance THIS cycle:* pristine `main` built **fully** (just under the fd ceiling), and adding 822 (one more of ~500 routes) tips static-gen over it вҖ” a **page-count fd-exhaustion at the global font manifest, not 822's code** (it has no fonts/imports beyond React and reached `Collecting page data` clean); the ceiling is **unraisable even as root** (cgroup-locked: `prlimit`/`ulimit` вҶ’ "Operation not permitted"). Vercel's higher fd ceiling builds + deploys it, as every prior cycle. Unverified by eye/ear: whether a 4-year-old reads "more sides = more pings, faster spin = faster" without instruction, and whether the polyrhythm reads as mesmerizing vs. busy on a real device (the seeded shapes + always-on pad guarantee a sounding, spinning glance regardless).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/822-kids-shape-drums/README.md`

## (Cycle 505 вҖ” **adult** build В· DEEP, one concept Г— 3 feedback-synthesis approaches, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/820-feedback-ecology](/dream/820-feedback-ecology)** вҖ” Feedback Ecology рҹҢҖ. `demoable` В· Cycle 505 (adult / live-performance / installation). **For**: adults В· **touch/gesture input** (tap nodes to perturb; sliders for coupling + self-resonance) В· **Canvas2D node-graph / phase-space output** (NOT a plain oscilloscope вҖ” the *system* is drawn) В· **coupled-resonator dynamical-system / self-oscillating feedback technique** (grep-0Г— вҖ” the lab's FIRST feedback instrument) В· **energetic, emergent, organic-but-electric vibe (deliberately NOT ambient)**. **What if an instrument were a *living dynamical system* вҖ” a network of resonators that feed each other, self-organize into emergent drones and rhythmic instabilities, and that you play by *perturbing the ecology* rather than triggering notes?** Eight high-Q `BiquadFilter` resonators each sit inside a tight feedback loop (`filter вҶ’ delay вҶ’ feedbackGain вҶ’ filter`), wired into a **small-world coupling graph** (ring backbone weight 0.7 + cross-link shortcuts 0.4). Above a coupling threshold the network **bifurcates**: low coupling = isolated pings; mid = nodes entrain and beat into polyrhythmic textures; high = a roaring emergent drone with energy visibly circulating the ring. It is genuinely **non-stationary вҖ” minute 2 differs from minute 0** because the coupled resonators exchange energy asymmetrically and drift across operating points over time (the long-form-stateful register the lab is thin on, and the exact thing JURY 2026-06-21 flagged missing from pruning-candidate `805`: "no state that makes minute 5 differ from minute 1"). **Interaction:** Awaken вҶ’ tap a node to inject an excitation impulse (watch energy propagate), tap empty space to seed all nodes, **coupling slider** = the bifurcation control, **self-resonance slider** = the edge-of-chaos control, three tuning presets (overtone JI on A1 55 Hz / subharmonic utonal / tight cluster). **Visualizer** makes the dynamical system legible: node size+glow = live RMS energy, **edge flow-particles** = coupling Г— signal transfer (energy moving around the ring), a **phase-space Lissajous trace inside each node** = its limit cycle/attractor, a bottom energy strip = per-node activity over time. **Ear-safety** (this is a self-oscillating instrument вҖ” it *will* try to get loud): all eight paths converge into one brick-wall `DynamicsCompressorNode` (вҲ’8 dB, ratio 20, 1 ms attack) вҶ’ master gain (default 0.25); per-node self-feedback hard-clamped at 0.88 (above this it diverges to digital noise, not music), cross-coupling clamped at 0.35/edge; **no auto-start** (AudioContext resumes only on the "Awaken the Ecology" tap, iOS unlock), a 2 s gentle ramp-up on start, an always-visible **Panic/Mute** that ramps to silence in 10 ms. **Degrades:** three.js/WebGL not needed (Canvas2D); no Web Audio вҶ’ readable notice. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (fully client-side, no samples, no recordings, no external API вҖ” the sound is *only* feedback); **zero new npm deps**. Ambition honest **3/5** (#1 **lab-first self-oscillating feedback instrument AND first coupled-dynamical-system piece** вҖ” grep-0Г— for no-input/Larsen/feedback-as-sound-source В· #3 named refs [**"Musicking with dynamical systems"** ACM dl.acm.org/10.1145/3678299.3678302 В· **David Tudor** *Rainforest*/*Pulsers* feedback ecosystems В· **Toshimaru Nakamura** no-input mixing board В· **Body Synths Laboratory**, Superbooth 2026, Berlin May 7вҖ“9] В· #5 RESEARCH В§505 today). **Source:** JURY 2026-06-21 (rest his recording + end the answering-agent thread + stop defaulting to adult-ambient) вҶ’ RESEARCH В§505 (no-input/self-oscillation revival; Superbooth 2026) вҶ’ this adult **DEEP** fire. Winner of a 3-approach fire; banked **`819-no-input-mixer`** вӯҗ RESURRECT-FIRST (faithful no-input mixer, XY-pad, WebGL2 oscilloscope вҖ” the more directly *playable* one, on the scarcest renderer) + **`821-larsen-field`** (live acoustic Larsen + virtual fallback, notch/peak carving) as **IDEAS В§505**. **Diversity:** `banned=[his-recording-source В· machine-listens-to-recording В· pentatonic-never-wrong В· UPIC pitch-painter В· adult-ambient-as-default-register]` В· `picked=[touch/gesture INPUT В· Canvas2D node-graph/phase-space OUTPUT (off the cooled three.js 799/803/805 streak; Canvas2D no longer banned at 3Г—, and the concept NEEDS a graph вҖ” jury "pick the renderer the concept needs") В· audio-self-oscillation/coupled-dynamical-system TECH В· energetic-emergent VIBE]` вҖ” clears every ban. вҡ пёҸ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вң“ Compiled successfully in 38.9s` вҶ’ Linting and checking validity of types вҶ’ Collecting page data**; **820 folder grep-clean** of the log вҖ” zero warnings/errors, only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings remain; no `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helper/api-route); **NOT browser/ear-verified** вҖ” the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (**proven infra THIS cycle: moved 820 out, rebuilt pristine `main` вҶ’ identical `вң“ Compiled successfully` then identical EMFILE**; Vercel deploys normally); unverified by ear/eye: whether the network audibly self-organizes/evolves as intended on a real device and whether the energy-flow + phase-space traces read at a glance (the seeded impulses + 2 s ramp guarantee a sounding, evolving glance regardless).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/820-feedback-ecology/README.md`

## (Cycle 504 вҖ” **kids** build В· WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/816-kids-tone-tower](/dream/816-kids-tone-tower)** вҖ” Tone Tower рҹ§ұрҹҺ¶. `demoable` В· Cycle 504 (kids, 4+). **For**: a 4-year-old on iPad/mobile В· **touch input** (tap/drag to stack) В· **animated SVG/DOM output** (glowing blocks, gaussian-glow filters, CSS topple вҖ” NOT Canvas2D, NOT three.js) В· **vertical interval-stacking вҶ’ just-intonation chord construction** technique (grep-0Г—) В· **warm cream nursery, bold saturated, calm-playful vibe**. **What if a 4-year-old could build a CHORD by stacking blocks вҖ” genuinely SHAPING the harmony, not just triggering pre-approved notes?** A glowing tower sits on a cream play area; the bottom block is a soft ~F3 root, and each block the child stacks sits a musical **interval** above the one below. The size of the vertical gap the child drags **chooses the interval** вҖ” normalized to 0..1200 cents and **snapped to the nearest entry in a just-intonation consonance lattice** (`harmony.ts`: unison 1/1 В· maj2 9/8 В· min3 6/5 В· maj3 5/4 В· P4 4/3 В· P5 3/2 В· maj6 5/3 В· octave 2/1). Because every entry is a small-whole-number ratio, **any** stack is consonant and never harsh вҖ” but the child genuinely controls open-vs-close, simple-vs-rich, bright-vs-dark. **This is the directest answer to JURY 2026-06-21's kids verdict** вҖ” which BANNED "pentatonic-never-wrong as the kids harmonic crutch" (6Г—) and the "UPIC pitch-painter" (3Г—) and demanded "a kids piece where harmony or rhythm can be *shaped*, not one where every note is pre-approved." Tone Tower is harmony *shaped* by the child's gesture, off both banned tags. **Interaction:** drag-up to drop a block (a dotted reach-line + ghost block preview the placement live); a plain tap drops a friendly warm third; **в–¶** strums the tower bottomвҶ’top; **рҹ’Ҙ** topples it with a downward gliss + sparkle, then re-seeds вҖ” no fail states, no reading, color is the only language (unison gold вҶ’ octave magenta-rose), voices cap at 8. **Audio** (`audio.ts`): kids-safe chain `gain 0.28 вҶ’ lowpass 7000 вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor`, warm triangle+sine voices with ~50ms attacks, an always-on soft ambient pad, a looping arpeggio so a hands-off glance is sounding on load; AudioContext resumed inside the first tap (iOS), full teardown on unmount. **Degrades:** no Web Audio вҶ’ visible rose-700 notice, visuals stay fully alive. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (fully client-side); **zero new npm deps**. Ambition honest **3/5** (#1 **vertical interval-stacking chord-construction** вҖ” grep-0Г—, harmony-shaping is a thin kids register В· #2 вүҘ3 subsystems [touch-stack interaction + JI lattice gapвҶ’centsвҶ’ratio engine + arpeggiator/strum synth + animated SVG render = 4] В· #3 named refs [**Friedrich Froebel's "Gifts"** вҖ” the original kindergarten building blocks В· **uCue**, Interaction Design and Children 2025/ACM вҖ” a children's musical interface with harmony layers of "common and unusual harmonizations" В· **Harry Partch tonality-diamond just-intonation lattice**]). **Source:** JURY 2026-06-21 kids verdict (ban pentatonic-crutch + UPIC; "let harmony be shaped") вҶ’ RESEARCH В§504 (uCue children's-harmony-shaping anchor) вҶ’ this kids **WIDE** fire. Winner of a 3-explorer fire; banked **`817-kids-clap-back-band`** (mic clap-onset вҶ’ WebGL2; the child's own clapped rhythm becomes the band's groove вҖ” Orff echo-clapping; de-selected for rhyming with the recent `773-parade-caller` rhythm-capture) + **`818-kids-pendulum-choir`** (touch-release pendulum-wave polyrhythm on audio-forward SVG вҖ” Harvard pendulum wave / OSZILOT / Ligeti *PoГЁme Symphonique*; de-selected for leaning on a D-pentatonic chime palette, the jury-banned crutch) as **IDEAS В§504**. вҡ пёҸ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вң“ Compiled successfully in 42s` вҶ’ Linting and checking validity of types вң“ вҶ’ Collecting page data**; **816 folder grep-clean** of the build log вҖ” zero warnings/errors; only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings remain; the builder also verified `tsc --strict --noUnusedLocals --noUnusedParameters` clean on its files); **NOT browser/ear-verified** вҖ” the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (**infra, fails identically on pristine main, NOT the code**; Vercel deploys normally); unverified by eye/ear: whether a 4-year-old reads "drag higher = a wider, brighter chord" without instruction, and whether the JI stacks sound as warm on a real device as intended (the looping arpeggio + seeded triad guarantee a sounding, glowing glance regardless).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/816-kids-tone-tower/README.md`

## (Cycle 503 вҖ” **adult** build В· DEEP, 2 memory-engine approaches, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/814-remembering-room](/dream/814-remembering-room)** вҖ” Remembering Room рҹҺ№рҹ§ . `demoable` В· Cycle 503. **For**: adults / live performance / intimate В· **his-recording-as-soloist input** (JURY 2026-06-20 #2 explicitly licensed this вҖ” the return-and-extend of 770) В· **audio-forward DOM/CSS + small `<canvas>` output** (deliberately off the jury's **Canvas2D 10Г—/15 monoculture** and off a fullscreen shader вҖ” the restraint is the point) В· **symbolic motif memory / Adaptive Phrase Bank** technique (grep-0Г— вҖ” the lab's first agent with long-form symbolic memory) В· **warm / hearth-lit / meditative-duet vibe**. **What if Karel's real recorded "Welcome Home" piano plays as the SOLOIST, a machine live-music agent accompanies it AND answers in his gaps вҖ” but now the agent REMEMBERS: it keeps a growing bank of motifs (its own best answers + salient contours lifted from his playing) and over minutes develops them вҖ” transpose-into-key / augment / diminish / fragment / invert / sequence вҖ” so minute 5 is a reworking of minute 1, not fresh improvisation?** This is the lab's **first true cycle-2 of `770-answering-room`** (whose agent had **zero** long-form memory вҖ” every answer improvised fresh and forgotten), the directest hit on **JURY 2026-06-20 #2** ("the depth ceiling collapsed 4вҶ’1; RETURN AND EXTEND 770 to a real 4/5 вҖ” let the agent accrete a motif over minutes so minute 5 вү  minute 1"). **Listener** (`listener.ts`): FFTвҶ’12-bin chroma вҶ’ 24-template major/minor triad fit + tension, energy/spectral-flux, a phrase-gap state machine; **new for cycle-2** вҖ” it samples his dominant pitch-class ~9Г—/s and freezes a **key-independent degree-step contour** at each phrase end so the agent can *lift his gesture*. **Agent + memory engine** (`agent.ts`): a warm retuning pad under his chord + a sparse FM-bell answer that fires **only in his gaps**, PLUS the **Adaptive Phrase Bank** вҖ” motifs stored **symbolically** as `{degrees, durs}` (scale-degree steps + relative durations, key-independent so replayable in any later key), entering the bank two ways (the agent banks its own good answers; it lifts his contours); a global **memory pressure** rises over minutes (~150s constant, scaled by a slider) so early gaps get short fresh inventions and later gaps increasingly **recall** a banked motif and apply a classical development (transpose/augment/diminish/fragment/invert/sequence); a weighted pick favours under-used motifs; bank caps at 10. **Visual** (`page.tsx`): a restrained warm DOM/CSS hearth (two facing glows вҖ” *him* breathing with his energy, *the answer* lit only while answering вҖ” a faint duet thread, the detected chord name shown large) PLUS a small `<canvas>` **memory shelf** вҖ” each banked motif a glowing contour **sparkline** (amber = his lifted gestures, rose = the agent's own answers) that **flares on recall** with reuse-count dots beneath, so the long-form accretion is *legible*. Two sliders: **company** (shyвҶ”talkative) + **memory** (inventвҶ”recall). **Graceful degradation:** no recording fetch вҶ’ an offline `OfflineAudioContext` ~16s warm lyrical fallback plays with an honest emerald "synthesized fallback" badge вҖ” the room is never silent and runs fully offline. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (read-only GET to the existing `/api/audio/[id]`, nothing recorded/sent); **zero new npm deps**. Ambition honest **4/5** (#1 **first long-form symbolic motif-memory agent** вҖ” grep-0Г—, lab-thin long-form-stateful register В· #4 **multi-cycle** вҖ” explicit cycle-2 of 770 with a cycle-3 plan in the README В· #3 named refs [**CHI 2026 "A Design Space for Live Music Agents"** arXiv 2602.05064 вҖ” its "Adaptation" axis names sustained motif development as an *uncoded gap*; its **Adaptive Phrase Bank** is the seed В· **MusicWeaver** arXiv 2509.21714 вҖ” **Motif Memory Retrieval (MMR)** В· **Yin-Yang** arXiv 2501.17759 вҖ” corruption-refinement motif variation В· **Christopher Raphael, *Music Plus One*** В· 770 lineage] В· #5 RESEARCH В§503 today). The directest answer to the jury's #1 headline (the depth ceiling that collapsed 4вҶ’1) вҖ” the window's first new ceiling build. Winner of an adult **DEEP** 2-approach fire; banked **`815-accreting-room`** (the textural-memory sibling вҖ” every agent phrase leaves a sustained ghost-layer residue that thickens the room into an Eno tapestry over minutes; de-selected for sitting close to last cycle's 808 sustain-accretion) as **IDEAS В§503**. вҡ пёҸ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative `npm run build`: **`вң“ Compiled successfully in 2.1min` вҶ’ Linting and checking validity of types вң“ вҶ’ Collecting page data вҶ’ all code gates passed**; **814 folder grep-clean** of the log вҖ” zero warnings/errors; only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings remain; the 814 builder independently got a **full exit-0 build, 541/541 static pages**); **NOT prerender/ear-verified** вҖ” the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (**infra, fails identically on pristine main, NOT the code**; Vercel deploys normally); unverified by ear: whether the agent's recalls audibly read as "it's quoting and varying its own earlier phrase" vs. generic answering, and whether the memory shelf reads at a glance (the always-on pad + synthesized fallback guarantee a sounding glance regardless).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/814-remembering-room/README.md`

## Cycle 502 вҖ” **kids** build В· WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1

- **[/dream/811-kids-body-ribbons](/dream/811-kids-body-ribbons)** вҖ” Body Ribbons рҹҺҖрҹ•ә. `demoable` В· Cycle 502. **For**: kids (4+) / whole-body play В· **body-tracking input** (MediaPipe Pose вҖ” the JURY's most-starved INPUT register, body/camera went **4Г—вҶ’0Г—**; off the banned touch) В· **SVG/DOM output** (the jury's starved 1Г— surface вҖ” deliberately off **both** the banned Canvas2D **and** the **three.js 3Г—-in-a-row monoculture** 799вҶ’803вҶ’805) В· **full-body UPIC gestureвҶ’pitch-score** technique (rests his recording) В· **calm-playful warm-glow vibe** (not bright-active). **What if a 4-year-old's whole BODY is a continuous musical score вҖ” they wave their arms and dance, and their moving hands draw glowing ribbons across the screen that sing as they move, the way Xenakis's UPIC turned a child's drawing into music?** **MediaPipe Pose** (33 landmarks, lite model, runtime CDN import via `webpackIgnore` вҖ” never bundled) tracks the body; the two **wrists** are the instruments. **Wrist height вҶ’ pitch** (C-major-pentatonic, 2 octaves, snapped so there are **no wrong notes**); **speed of movement вҶ’ loudness + ribbon brightness** (hold still and the note softly sustains, then fades); **horizontal position вҶ’ timbre** (vibrato depth); **nose вҶ’ a soft shimmer voice**; **both arms raised high вҶ’ a gentle gold sparkle chord**. Each wrist continuously emits a **glowing SVG ribbon trail** in its own warm color (left = amber/gold, right = rose/violet) вҖ” Catmull-Rom-smoothed cubic paths, a 2-pass gaussian-glow + bright-core render, age-faded over ~7s so the screen accretes and breathes (never a hard loop). The lab's **first full-body UPIC instrument**; the directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-20 #4** (body input 4Г—вҶ’0Г—, the single most-starved register) and **#5** (the jury named "the full-body version of 781's UPIC idea is sitting unbuilt in your own research log"). **Kid-safe audio:** `master вүӨ0.28 вҶ’ lowpass 7000 вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor(вҲ’10/20:1) вҶ’ destination`; always-on C2+G2 sine drone pad; triangle voices with vibrato LFO, 80ms portamento, soft attacks / 1вҖ“3s releases; pentatonic so nothing is "wrong". **Privacy + safety:** camera frames are analysis-only вҖ” **never recorded, uploaded, or sent**; iOS gesture-gated `AudioContext` + `getUserMedia({video})` both inside the first Start tap (вүҘ72px). **Graceful degradation:** MediaPipe loads in the background while a **ghost-body auto-demo** (`makeGhostBody`) dances + sounds hands-free within ~2s; **camera-denied вҶ’ the ghost keeps playing** + a `text-rose-300` notice вҖ” a sounding, drawing screen with no permissions. Full teardown (rAF + **stop camera tracks** + `landmarker.close()` + node disconnect + `audioCtx.close()`). **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (fully client-side); **zero new npm deps**. Ambition honest **3/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [MediaPipe Pose tracking + UPIC yвҶ’pentatonic mapping + dual-wrist polyphonic synth w/ vibrato/drone/shimmer + speedвҶ’loudness + multi-pass SVG glow-ribbon render] + #3 named refs [**Iannis Xenakis вҖ” UPIC** 1977 В· **ВЎOtro!** IAIA Digital Dome premiere Apr-2026 (Tavarez/Trujillo, real-time movementвҶ’sonification) В· **Frid et al.** *Interactive Sonification of Spontaneous Movement of Children* Frontiers 2016] + soft-#5 RESEARCH В§502 today). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **`812-kids-breath-bubbles`** (raw WebGL2 В· blowвҶ’accreting glow-bubble cloud that pops in pentatonic chimes/chords) + **`813-kids-sky-lullaby`** (SVG/DOM В· live Open-Meteo sky вҶ’ Eno-style moon-aware dusk lullaby, tilt-stirred) as **IDEAS В§502**. вҡ пёҸ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вң“ Compiled successfully in 101s` вҶ’ Collecting page data вҶ’ all code gates passed**; **811 folder grep-clean** after trimming one unused eslint-disable directive; `npx next lint` on the folder вҶ’ "No ESLint warnings or errors"; only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings remain); **NOT camera/ear-verified** вҖ” the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (**infra, NOT the code**; Vercel deploys normally); unverified by eye/ear: whether the ribbon visibly tracks a child's arm height and reads as "I raised my arm and it sang higher" (the always-on pad + ghost-body fallback guarantee a sounding, drawing glance regardless). Builder-flagged: per-frame Pose inference may jank on old iPads (lite model + ghost fallback mitigate).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/811-kids-body-ribbons/README.md`

## Cycle 501 вҖ” **adult** build В· DEEP, 3 resonator engines, shipped 1

- **[/dream/808-sympathetic-strings](/dream/808-sympathetic-strings)** вҖ” Sympathetic Strings рҹҺ»рҹҺ№. `demoable` В· Cycle 501. **For**: adults / live performance / intimate В· **mic / live-audio input** (off the jury-banned touch) В· **SVG/DOM output** (the jury's starved 1Г— surface вҖ” deliberately off the **three.js 3Г—-in-a-row monoculture** 799вҶ’803вҶ’805 AND the banned Canvas2D) В· **Karplus-Strong tuned-delay-line sympathetic resonator bank** technique (rests his recording; distinct from `803`'s modal-bandpass banks) В· **dark / warm / nocturnal vibe** (not bright-active kids). **What if you play or sing into your mic and exactly the right strings ring back вҖ” your sound waking an illusory bank of tuned strings that vibrate sympathetically, the way a grand piano's strings hum when you hold the sustain pedal?** 48 tuned strings, each a **real Karplus-Strong tuned delay line** (`L = sampleRate / freq`, one-pole lowpass loop filter, feedback just under 1) running in an **AudioWorklet loaded from a Blob URL** (no `/public` file). The live mic feeds all 48 delay lines; an `AnalyserNode` FFT scales each string's excitation gain by how much spectral energy sits at its pitch вҖ” so strings tuned to what you play ring, the rest stay quiet (continuous sympathetic excitation, not discrete strikes). A **mode selector** (homage to the **Electronic Audio Experiments *Prismatic Wall*** sympathetic-string pedal) retunes the bank live across **Chromatic / Stacked Fifths / Overtone Series**. **Sustain-pedal physics:** spacebar or on-screen hold drives feedback **0.92 (fast damp) вҶ” 0.997 (near-lossless)**, so with the pedal held the bank **accretes a shimmering bed audibly fuller at minute 3 than second 10** (real delay-line state вҖ” the jury's depth-ceiling ask). **SVG visualization:** 48 vertical strings, each string's glow/stroke-width/wobble driven imperatively in `requestAnimationFrame` from the worklet's ~15 fps per-string RMS level reports (`port.postMessage`), `feGaussianBlur` glow, lowвҶ’high amberвҶ’violetвҶ’blue hue map. The lab's **first mic-excited sympathetic-string instrument** and **first Karplus-Strong-as-shipped** (the banked `802-body-aviary` KS forest never shipped). **Audio safety:** mic source **never** routed to `destination` (no howl), worklet feedback hard-clamped вүӨ0.999, `DynamicsCompressor` (20:1, вҲ’18 dB) as limiter. **Graceful degradation:** mic-deny вҶ’ an autonomous **ghost exciter** plucks quasi-chord groups so it rings + sounds within ~2s + `text-rose-300` notice; click/tap any string to pluck it directly; no-WebAudio вҶ’ friendly rose notice. Full teardown (rAF + worklet + mic tracks + AnalyserNode + intervals + `AudioContext.close()`). **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (fully client-side, mic stays on-device, nothing recorded/sent); **zero new npm deps**. Ambition honest **3/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [mic FFT analysis + KS tuned-delay-line worklet resonator bank + per-string spectral excitation gating + sustain-pedal feedback accretion + SVG string-field render] + #3 named refs [**EAE *Prismatic Wall*** sympathetic string resonator 2026 В· **Karplus-Strong / JaffeвҖ“Smith** CMJ 1983 В· sitar *tarab* / viola d'amore В· Henry Cowell string-piano] + soft-#1 mic-excited KS sympathetic bank is grep-0Г— + soft-#5 RESEARCH В§501). Piano-native + live-performance-fit (Karel priority #3 вҖ” point a mic at his real piano and the strings answer). Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-resonator-engine fire; banked **`809-sympathetic-modes`** (FFT-gated high-Q bandpass bank вҖ” lost for rhyming with `803`'s modal banks) + **`810-sympathetic-comb`** (native feedback-comb bank вҖ” most robust, least KS-faithful; its per-comb AnalyserNode level tap worth folding into 808) as **IDEAS В§501**. вҡ пёҸ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вң“ Compiled successfully in 102s` вҶ’ Collecting page data вҶ’ all code gates passed**; 808 folder fully grep-clean of the log вҖ” **zero warnings/errors** after fixing one TS 5.7 `Uint8Array<ArrayBuffer>` typing + trimming one unused var/dep; only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings remain); **NOT prerender/ear-verified** вҖ” the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (**infra, NOT the code**; Vercel deploys normally); unverified by ear: whether sung/played pitches visibly + audibly wake their matching strings vs. a diffuse wash, and whether the pedal-held bed accretes musically rather than muddying (the always-seeded strings + ghost exciter + compressor guarantee a sounding, glowing glance regardless).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/808-sympathetic-strings/README.md`

## Cycle 500 вҖ” **kids** build В· WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1

- **[/dream/805-kids-snow-piano](/dream/805-kids-snow-piano)** вҖ” Snow Piano / Snow-Globe Music Box вқ„пёҸрҹҺ№. `demoable` В· Cycle 500. **For**: kids (4+) В· **device-tilt / orientation input** (off the banned touch-primary; love-aligned `83-kids-tilt-rain`вқӨпёҸ) В· **three.js WebGL output** (off the 10Г—-banned Canvas2D; the snow globe genuinely needs 3D вҖ” jury "pick the renderer the concept needs") В· **his-REAL-piano-as-physics-triggered-music-box technique** (off the banned conductor/follower/analyzer-of-his-recording; NOT a grain cloud) В· **calm wintery night-blue vibe** (not bright-active, not dark-void). **What if a 4-year-old tilts the tablet like a snow globe вҖ” and Karel's REAL recorded "Welcome Home" piano pours out as glowing snow that chimes when it lands?** A 3D glass globe holds ~220 additive glowing motes (`THREE.Points`); **device-orientation tilt** is gravity (gammaвҶ’x, betaвҶ’downward bias), so the motes slide and fall, and when one settles on one of **5 glowing chime rails** it plays a fresh random **0.25вҖ“0.5s Hann-windowed slice of his real piano** (`AudioBufferSourceNode` + `playbackRate` вҶ’ the rail's C-major-pentatonic tone) before dissolving to sparkles and respawning up top вҖ” infinite calm play, no score/fail/timer. This is the lab's **2nd-ever kids piece on Karel's real recording** (only `743` before it) and the direct answer to **JURY 2026-06-20 #3** ("his recording on the kids side is 1Г— вҖ” use it a genuinely-NEW way, or rest it"): a physics-driven **music box**, not the banned conductor/analyzer, not a continuous grain cloud. Born from this cycle's **RESEARCH В§500** dive вҖ” **LEGO SMART Play (2026)**, the screen-free brick that turns "motion through the air" into sound + light, validating motionвҶ’sound+light as the live very-young-child register. Triple love-aligned (`83`вқӨпёҸ tilt В· `227-paths-granular`вқӨпёҸ/`163-paths-visualizer`вқӨпёҸ his piano В· `166-kids-lantern`вқӨпёҸ/`130`вқӨпёҸ/`262`вқӨпёҸ glow); tied to Karel's published **"Snowflake"** journey. Kid-safe `master gain 0.28 вҶ’ lowpass 6800 вҶ’ comp(вҲ’10/20:1)`, per-chime peak 0.22 / 20ms soft attack / 12ms rate-limit (a flurry can't stack loud), always-on C2+G2 pad, pentatonic (nothing "wrong"), вүҘ64px Start, iOS gesture-gated AudioContext + `DeviceOrientationEvent.requestPermission()` both in the first tap. **Graceful degradation:** `fetchPianoBuffer` null (guaranteed in the no-network sandbox) вҶ’ synthesized celesta/bell buffer so it always sounds + `text-rose-300` notice; no device-orientation вҶ’ drag-to-tilt + always-on auto-drift lands/chimes hands-free within ~2s; no WebGL вҶ’ friendly notice. Full teardown (rAF + listeners + dispose geometries/materials + `renderer.dispose()`/`forceContextLoss()` + `audioCtx.close()`). **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (reads only the public GET `/api/audio/:id`); **zero new npm deps** (`three` already present). Ambition honest **2вҖ“3/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [device-orientation physics + real-recording windowed slice-player + three.js particle-globe render + chime-rail collision scheduler] + #3 named refs [music-box/snow-globe lineage В· Karel's *Snowflake* journey В· loved `227`вқӨпёҸ/`163`вқӨпёҸ his-piano lineage] + soft-#5 RESEARCH В§500 LEGO SMART Play 2026). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **`806-kids-sky-lullaby`** вӯҗ (SVG/DOM В· live Open-Meteo sky вҶ’ Eno-style dusk lullaby, moon-aware, tilt-stirred вҖ” **RESURRECT FIRST**, the renderer-diverse pick) + **`807-kids-breath-bubbles`** (raw WebGL2 В· blowвҶ’accreting glow-bubble cloud that pops in pentatonic chimes) as **IDEAS В§500**. вҡ пёҸ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` вҶ’ all code gates passed, reached "Collecting page data"; 805 folder grep-clean вҖ” zero `any`/`@ts-ignore`/`use*`-helpers/api-route; only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings); **NOT prerender/device-verified** вҖ” the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (**infra, NOT the code: pristine `main` with 805 moved aside fails identically this cycle; Vercel deploys normally**); unverified by ear/eye: whether real-device tilt lands motes at a satisfying chime rate and whether windowed slices of his recording read as warm bell chimes vs ragged fragments (the always-on pad + auto-drift + fallback bell guarantee a sounding, drifting glance regardless).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/805-kids-snow-piano/README.md`

## Cycle 499 вҖ” **adult** build В· DEEP, 3 synthesis methods, shipped 1

- **[/dream/803-body-chimes](/dream/803-body-chimes)** вҖ” Body Chimes / Struck Room рҹ””рҹ•ә. `demoable` В· Cycle 499. **For**: adults / installation В· **body/camera input** (MediaPipe Pose вҖ” the jury's single most-starved input, went **4Г—вҶ’0Г—** last window; off the banned touch) В· **three.js WebGL output** (warm-metallic volumetric room; off the 10Г—-banned Canvas2D-primary) В· **MODAL physical-modeling synthesis** technique (banks of high-Q bandpass resonators = damped-sine modes with inharmonic partials, excited by 3D spatial collision; rests his recording) В· **adult / installation / meditative warm-metallic vibe** (not bright-active kids, not his-recording-conductor). **What if your whole moving body played an invisible, room-sized instrument of STRUCK RESONANT BODIES вҖ” bars, bowls and bells suspended in 3D вҖ” each limb striking the ones it sweeps through, which ring with real modal synthesis and slowly accrete into a shimmering cloud?** The front camera projects five limb "strikers" (wrists, head, ankles) into a dark volumetric room of ~24 glowing metal bodies on a double-ring shell; sweep a limb through one (3D proximity + speed gate + per-body refractory) and it **rings for real** вҖ” each body is a parallel bank of 4вҖ“8 high-Q `BiquadFilter` bandpass resonators at **inharmonic partial ratios** characteristic of its type (bell `1, 2.0, 2.4, 3.0, 4.5, 5.33` В· bar `1, 2.76, 5.40, 8.93, 13.34` В· bowl `1, 2.01, 2.83, 4.22, 5.0`), velocity-scaled, higher modes decaying faster вҖ” genuine modal synthesis. Fundamentals are a **just-intonation** field over ~110 Hz so any combination is consonant; strikes bloom through a synthesised convolution reverb. **Long-form accretion (the ceiling feature):** a sympathetic mode-bed (always-on QвүҲ90 resonators that each strike *charges*, bleeding down over ~25 s) + a `bedMaster` that grows over ~4 min + **struck-body memory** (frequently-struck bodies pull their sympathetic resonator sharper, so the cloud's timbre reflects *how you've been playing*) + a Вұ0.35% root-drift breath вҖ” so **minute 5 is fuller, warmer and subtly detuned vs minute 1** (the directest hit on the jury's depth-ceiling-collapse alarm, 4вҶ’1), and the central light/haze brightens with `cloudLevel()` so accretion is visible. The lab's **first body-EXCITES-a-physical-modeling-instrument** piece: prior MediaPipe-Pose pieces (`788-kids-body-glow` UPIC, `724-presence-drift`, `419-body-band` drums, `287`/`302` harmony-mirrors) all map the body to a *note or grain* вҖ” none strikes a real resonator network. Graceful: camera-deny/MediaPipe-fail вҶ’ a **ghost body** on Lissajous orbits plays it hands-free within ~2s + `text-rose-300` notice; WebGL-fail friendly notice; iOS gesture-gated AudioContext+getUserMedia; full three.js/rAF/mic/AudioContext teardown (`renderer.dispose()` + `forceContextLoss()`). **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (fully client-side); **zero new npm deps** (`three` already present). Ambition honest **3/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [pose tracking + 3D spatial-collision excitation + modal resonator synthesis + multi-minute accreting mode-bed] + #3 named refs [**Vrengt** NIME/arXiv:2010.03779 body-machine instrument В· **modal synthesis / Cadoz-ACROE CORDIS-ANIMA** В· **Bernhard Leitner** sound-sculpture] + #5 RESEARCH В§499 [CHI-2026 movementвҶ”sound + MediaPipe-gesture framework]). Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-synthesis-method fire; banked **`802-body-aviary`** вӯҗ (Karplus-Strong plucked-string forest via real AudioWorklet вҖ” **RESURRECT FIRST adult**) + **`804-body-veil`** (sympathetic high-Q resonator veil) as **IDEAS В§499**. вҡ пёҸ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вң“ Compiled successfully in 95s` вҶ’ Collecting page data**; 803 folder grep-clean of the log [zero `use*` helpers / `any` / api route; only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings]); **NOT prerender/ear-verified** вҖ” the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (**infra, NOT the code**; Vercel deploys normally); unverified by ear: whether limb sweeps read cleanly as strikes and the modal rings sound bell-like on real hardware (single-camera pose `z` is coarse, so collision leans on x/y sweep; the ghost body + always-blooming reverb guarantee a sounding, glowing glance regardless).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/803-body-chimes/README.md`

## Cycle 498 вҖ” **kids** build В· DEEP, 3 growth grammars, shipped 1

- **[/dream/799-kids-sing-garden](/dream/799-kids-sing-garden)** вҖ” Singing Garden рҹҢұрҹҺ¶. `demoable` В· Cycle 498. **For**: kids (4+) В· **mic/voice input** (off the banned touch; serves KIDS.md's vocalization goal) В· **three.js WebGL output** (off the 10Г—-banned Canvas2D-primary monoculture; the renderer the concept needs) В· **voiceвҶ’L-system (Lindenmayer) growth + melody-memory call-response** technique (rests his recording entirely) В· **calm warm daylight garden vibe** (the jury's reintroduced-calm "middle", not bright-active, not dark-glow). **What if a 4-year-old could SING a 3D garden into being вҖ” and the garden then sang their melody back?** The child sings and a branching plant GROWS in real time as a **true L-system grammar** (an `LSystem` class with `iterate()` + 3D turtle-graphics, the grammar generated per phrase from the sung pitch + loudness): **pitch** (octave-collapsed вҶ’ C-major-pentatonic, never wrong) drives branch angle/reach, **loudness (RMS)** drives thickness + growth speed + glow, and a **held note** keeps a branch extending and blooms small glowing flower-spheres at its tips. Go quiet for ~1s and the garden **sings the contour of what you just sang back** on soft inharmonic bell voices while every plant pulses in warm light (Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening* call-and-response). New plants accrete along a **golden-angle spiral** so the garden is **long-form stateful вҖ” fuller at minute 5 than minute 1** (the directest hit on the jury's kids-depth-ceiling-collapse alarm, 4вҶ’1). The lab's **first voiceвҶ’procedural-grammar plant** and **first three.js kids piece**: prior kids voice pieces (`158-kids-hum-paint`вқӨпёҸ brush, `244-kids-sing-creature` loopback, `100`вқӨпёҸ splat) are 2D per-stroke/splat/loopback вҖ” **none grows a persistent 3D structure from the voice via a generative grammar** (grep-0Г— / web-0Г—). It **inverts Mort Garson's *Mother Earth's Plantasia* (1976, "music FOR plants")** вҖ” here the child's voice MAKES the plants. Kid-safe `master вүӨ0.28 вҶ’ lowpass 7000 вҶ’ comp(вҲ’10/20:1)`, always-on C2+G2 pad (never silent), autocorrelation pitch (Chris Wilson ACF, analyser **never** wired to output вҖ” no feedback, never recorded/sent), iOS gesture-gated AudioContext+getUserMedia (AGC/NS/echo off for clean onsets), **ghost-hum hands-free fallback** on mic-deny (auto-grows + answers within ~2s + `text-rose-600` notice), no-WebGL friendly notice, full three.js/rAF/mic/AudioContext teardown (`renderer.forceContextLoss()`), 12-min soft goodnight fade, dark-on-light daylight typography. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (fully client-side, no network); **zero new npm deps** (`three` already present). Ambition honest **3/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [autocorrelation pitch/RMS analysis + L-system grammar/turtle-graphics three.js growth + melody-memory call-response sequencer] + #3 named refs [**L-systems вҖ” Lindenmayer / Prusinkiewicz *The Algorithmic Beauty of Plants*** В· **Mort Garson *Mother Earth's Plantasia*** В· Chris Wilson autocorrelation В· Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening*] + soft-#1 voiceвҶ’procedural-grammar plant is grep-0Г— + soft-#5 В§498 negative-result gap). Winner of a kids **DEEP** 3-growth-grammar fire; banked **`800-kids-sing-meadow`** вӯҗ (phyllotaxis golden-angle bloom-spiral вҖ” clearest one-flower-per-note cause-effect; **RESURRECT FIRST**) + **`801-kids-sing-grove`** (InstancedMesh reed-field with continuous wind-sway вҖ” the "never static" motion idea) as **IDEAS В§498**. вҡ пёҸ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вң“ Compiled successfully in 103s` вҶ’ Collecting page data вҶ’ all code gates passed**; 799 folder grep-clean of the log [self-reported ESLint 0/0]; `npx tsc --noEmit` exit 0 project-wide; only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings); **NOT prerender/ear-verified** вҖ” the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json` blocks static-gen (**infra, NOT the code: pristine `main` with 799 moved aside fails identically this cycle**; Vercel deploys normally); unverified by ear: whether the L-system growth visibly tracks a child's sung pitch and the bell reply reads as "the garden sang MY melody" (the always-on pad + ghost-hum fallback guarantee a sounding, growing glance regardless).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/799-kids-sing-garden/README.md`

## Cycle 497 вҖ” **adult** build В· WIDE, 3 orthogonal explorers, shipped 1

- **[/dream/797-tonnetz-walk](/dream/797-tonnetz-walk)** вҖ” Tonnetz Walk рҹҺјрҹ§ӯ. `demoable` В· Cycle 497. **For**: adults / listening В· **autonomous input** (light click-to-steer; off the banned touch) В· **SVG/DOM output** (the jury's starved 1Г— surface вҖ” the literal #1 "spread, don't flip onto a new monoculture", off the 10Г—-banned Canvas2D) В· **Neo-Riemannian P/L/R harmony-walk** technique (rests his recording вҖ” breaks the answering-room thread) В· **clinical-elegant / meditative vibe**. **What if you could WATCH harmony take a walk вҖ” a chord gliding forever through the Tonnetz lattice by smooth voice-leading, never the same path twice?** A single triad walks the **Neo-Riemannian** lattice on its own, choosing **P** (parallel) / **L** (leading-tone) / **R** (relative) transforms over time; each holds two common tones and steps the one remaining voice, so a warm 3-voice pad (portamento on the moving voice) + sub-bass + feedback-delay reverb **glides** from chord to chord rather than jumping. The luminous **path through the lattice IS the form** вҖ” a weighted, anti-backtracking, home-biased stochastic chooser means **minute 5 never resembles minute 1** (the directest standing answer to the jury's depth-ceiling-collapse alarm). Visual is **pure inline SVG**: 24 triad-triangles (major up, minor down) on the fifth/major-third axes, current node glowing, a fading trail of recent triads, the active P/L/R edge color-lit, lit pitch-class dots, mono chord labels + a live readout (chord В· last transform В· steps В· mm:ss). Controls: **wanderвҶ”home** bias, **step** tempo, **arpeggio** toggle, and **click any triad** to steer there (BFS over the 24-triad graph) then resume wandering. Pure-synthesis вҖ” no network, no sensors, no assets. Distinct from `37-ratio-lab` (a *static* just-intonation Tonnetz you click to hear): this is an **autonomous generative walker**, motion-through-the-lattice not click-to-sound. Refs: **Euler's Tonnetz (1739)** В· **Neo-Riemannian theory вҖ” Riemann / David Lewin / Richard Cohn *Audacious Euphony* 2012**. вҡ пёҸ Compile + lint + type-check verified clean (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` `вң“ Compiled` вҶ’ Linting + types PASS; 797 folder grep-clean of the log); NOT prerender/ear-verified вҖ” the standing container ~4096-fd `EMFILE` blocks static-gen (pristine main fails identically; Vercel deploys normally). 2 more explored this fire (`798-sympathetic-strings` вӯҗ, `796-aeolian-sky`) вҖ” banked to IDEAS В§497.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/797-tonnetz-walk/README.md`

## Cycle 496 вҖ” **kids** build В· WIDE, 3 divergent explorers, shipped 1

- **[/dream/795-kids-sound-hunt](/dream/795-kids-sound-hunt)** вҖ” Sound Hunt рҹ”Ұрҹҗҫ. `demoable` В· Cycle 496. **For**: kids (4+) В· **device-orientation / compass input** (no touch, no mic, no camera) В· **audio-forward / eyes-closed HRTF spatial output** (a minimal calm SVG compass вҖ” the *sound* carries it; NOT a Canvas2D-primary spectacle, off the 10Г—-banned monoculture) В· **spatial 360В° sound-hunt** technique В· **calm bedtime "lantern" vibe** (the reintroduced calm). **What if a 4-year-old closed their eyes, held the tablet like a lantern, and turned their body to HUNT for gentle animal sounds hidden floating around them in 3D space?** Eight gentle voices вҖ” each a **C-major-pentatonic chord tone** so any subset is consonant вҖ” sit at fixed azimuths around a **360В° ring** placed via Web Audio **`PannerNode` (HRTF)**; the child's **device-orientation/compass heading** rotates the `AudioListener` so turning their body sweeps a "listening beam." Angular proximity of the beam to a voice drives its gain via a **cosine lobe** (it swells as you near it), and crossing an inner threshold **latches a soft once-only chime + a dot-glow**; collecting all eight blooms a calm rising chord, then the piece **loops forever** вҖ” no score, no fail, no timer. The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-20 #1** (Canvas2D is **10 of 15** вҖ” rotate onto the scarcest surface; **audio-only is the literal "spread, don't flip"**) + the verdict's structural alarm that **the kids side fled calm entirely** (only `743`/`747` left) вҖ” a deliberately calm, eyes-closed bedtime register. The lab's **first kids spatialized-listening piece**: the kids set is almost entirely **screen-bound** (instrument on-glass or in front of the camera) and the rare audio-first kids pieces (`346`/`417`) are entrainment toys; **none places sound *around* you to find by moving** (spatial sound-hunt grep-0Г—). Off **every** JURY ban at once: **device-orientation INPUT** (not touch) В· **audio-only / HRTF OUTPUT** (not Canvas2D-primary; the scarcest surface) В· **spatial sound-hunt TECH** (rests his recording вҖ” not a conductor/follower/analyzer) В· **calm bedtime VIBE** (off bright-active вҖ” the reintroduced calm). **Ambition honest 2вҖ“3/5**: **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (HRTF spatial-audio graph w/ per-voice proximity-swell + latched once-only reveal В· device-orientation/compass input w/ functional auto-tour + drag fallback В· synchronized SVG compass/ring + chord-completion logic + always-on drone bed) В· **#3** named refs (**PlugSonic** вҖ” web/mobile binaural sonic narratives, Geronazzo et al. В· **Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening*** В· Web Audio **`PannerNode` HRTF**) В· **#5** (RESEARCH В§496 today вҖ” web-binaural / spatial-audio-2026). **#1 not claimed** (PannerNode/HRTF exists in the lab's adult spatial pieces; the *kids* spatial-listening-hunt mapping is the fresh move). **Kid-safe + bulletproof glance:** `master 0.28 вҶ’ lowpass 7000 вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor(вҲ’10/20:1) вҶ’ destination`; always-on gentle sub-drone bed so it never feels broken; soft attacks/long decays; pentatonic so nothing is ever "wrong." **Graceful degradation вҖ” genuinely functional, not a notice:** no motion sensor (e.g. desktop/laptop) вҶ’ a slow **auto-tour** sweeps the beam and reveals every voice hands-free within ~2s, **plus** a **drag-to-turn** control on the ring, **plus** a `text-rose-300` notice вҖ” fully playable + audible with no sensor; `PannerNode`/`AudioListener` position+orientation setters **feature-detected** for both modern (`positionX.value`) and legacy (`setPosition`/`setOrientation`) APIs; iOS `DeviceOrientationEvent.requestPermission()` + `AudioContext` both created inside the Start tap; full teardown (rAF cancel + node stop/disconnect + `audioCtx.close()` + listener removal). **No API route вҶ’ no guard** (fully client-side, no network); **no new npm dep** (pure Web Audio + SVG; package.json/lock untouched); headphones recommended for the 3D effect. вҡ пёҸ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` reached "Collecting page data" вҶ’ all code gates passed; **zero `795`/`sound-hunt` mentions in the log** вҖ” folder grep-clean; only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings remain); **NOT prerender/device/ear-verified** вҖ” container's ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json`, the standing environmental failure (pristine `origin/main` fails identically; Vercel deploys normally); unverified by ear: iOS compass-heading axis feel + HRTF placement on a real iPad (the auto-tour + drag fallback + always-on drone guarantee a sounding, sweeping glance). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **`794-kids-sing-garden`** вӯҗ (three.js В· singвҶ’grow a 3D **L-system** garden w/ melody **call-and-response**, long-form stateful вҖ” the depth pick; **RESURRECT FIRST (kids)**) + **`793-kids-shadow-puppet`** (pure SVG В· bodyвҶ’a singing cut-paper *wayang kulit* moth вҖ” overlaps `788`; resurrect with a swappable bestiary + formant voice) as **IDEAS В§496**. ## (Cycle 495 вҖ” **adult** build В· DEEP, 1 concept Г— 3 memory mechanisms, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/792-answering-swarm](/dream/792-answering-swarm)** вҖ” Answering Swarm рҹҗқрҹҺ№. `demoable` В· Cycle 495. **For**: adults / Karel-the-pianist / **his real recording as input** (no mic, no camera, no touch) В· **audio-forward output** (a small warm canvas dot-field readout вҖ” the *sound* carries it; NOT a Canvas2D-primary spectacle, off the 10Г—-banned monoculture, the register the jury itself tagged `770` in) В· **stigmergic swarm-intelligence motif-memory** technique (lab-first) В· warm-hearth adult-meditative vibe. **Cycle-2 of `770-answering-room`. What if the duet partner were a SWARM of his own motifs that self-organizes вҖ” so minute 5 has settled themes minute 1 didn't?** His "Welcome Home" piano plays **whole** as the soloist (the verbatim 770 loader вҖ” never granulated). The listener folds the FFT into a 12-bin chroma to fit the **triad under his hands** + spectral-flux onsets + a phrase-gap machine, and on each gap **harvests** the run of pitch-events he just played (his PAST only вҖ” no lookahead, per LiveBand's causal constraint) as a **motif fragment**. Each fragment becomes a tiny agent in a **decentralized stigmergic swarm** (cap 12): every frame each agent measures how well its pitch-classes sit on the current chord/scale (`motifFit`) and **deposits pheromone** scaled by his energy if it fits, while a global **evaporation** fades the rest; a fresh fragment replaces the **weakest** agent when full. There is no central composer вҖ” over minutes the colony **consolidates** its pheromone onto a few emergent **"bridging motifs"** (a `consolidation` 0вҖ“100% readout makes minute-5вү minute-1 *audible-in-numbers*), and 770's soft **FM bell** answers in his gaps by sounding the **strongest** agent's motif, snapped onto the current key and resolved on a chord tone; the warm **pad** still voices the chord under him. `company` slider (shyвҶ”talkative) + a **trading-fours** toggle (a longer doubled turn from the consolidated theme during quiet stretches). The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-20 #2** (the depth ceiling collapsed **4вҶ’1** вҖ” "RETURN AND EXTEND a gem to a real 4/5; `770` is the obvious target вҖ” let the agent ACCRETE a motif over minutes") + **#1** (off the 10Г— Canvas2D-primary monoculture вҖ” audio-forward, "spread don't flip") + **#3** (his recording is still the whole soloist but used a *genuinely-new way* вҖ” a self-organizing motif memory, NOT a conductor/follower/analyzer). **Ambition honest 4/5** (the restored ceiling): **#1** first swarm-intelligence / stigmergy audio piece in the lab (grep-checked вҖ” no prior swarm/pheromone prototype) В· **#3** named refs (**Markus J. Buehler, *MusicSwarm*, Advanced Intelligent Systems Apr-2026, arXiv 2509.11973**; **George Lewis *Voyager***) В· **#4** explicit cycle-2 of `770` (multi-cycle thread; next-cycle deepenings banked) В· **#5** RESEARCH В§495 today (**LiveBand**, arXiv 2606.03803, **June 2026, <30d** вҖ” causal past-only accompaniment; + MusicSwarm Apr-2026). **Bulletproof glance:** his recording via the public `/api/audio/[id]` GET, else a ~16s `OfflineAudioContext` synthesized warm phrase (honest emerald fallback badge) so the room **always sounds**; no API route вҶ’ **no guard** (only READS the existing public audio route вҖ” rules #6/#8 clean); **no new npm dep** (pure Web Audio + Canvas; package.json/lock untouched); no WebGL needed; AudioContext resumed inside the Begin tap; full teardown (rAF / source.stop+disconnect / agent.dispose / analyser.disconnect / ctx.close). вҡ пёҸ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` reached "Collecting page data" вҶ’ all code gates passed; **zero `792`/`answering-swarm` mentions in the log** вҖ” folder grep-clean; only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings remain); **NOT prerender/device/ear-verified** вҖ” container's ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json`, the standing environmental failure (pristine `origin/main` fails identically; Vercel deploys normally); unverified by ear: whether the swarm consolidates onto themes that read as coherent and whether the answers land against his pedal-heavy passages (the always-sound synth fallback + consolidation readout guarantee a sounding, self-organizing glance). Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-mechanism fire; banked **`790-answering-memory`** вӯҗ (symbolic motif bank + six classical-development transforms + SVG motif-shelf вҖ” the most *musically legible* quote-and-develop; **RESURRECT FIRST (adult)**) + **`791-answering-markov`** (variable-order Markov style model + live SVG transition-ring вҖ” lower priority, overlaps `778-markov-mirror`) as **IDEAS В§495**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/792-answering-swarm/README.md`

## (Cycle 494 вҖ” **kids** build В· DEEP, 1 concept Г— 3 renderers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/788-kids-body-glow](/dream/788-kids-body-glow)** вҖ” Body Glow рҹ•әвңЁ. `demoable` В· Cycle 494. **For**: kids (4+) В· **body/camera (MediaPipe Pose) input** (no touch, no mic) В· **raw WebGL2 GLSL feedback field** (Canvas2D only as fallback вҖ” off the jury-banned Canvas2D-primary) В· the whole body read as a **continuous UPIC pitch-field** В· warm-daylight painterly "middle" vibe. **What if a 4-year-old's whole moving body PAINTED a glowing UPIC score in the air вҖ” the higher a limb, the higher the note it sings, and the dance leaves luminous trails that keep singing and fill the sky?** The literal full-body version of **Xenakis's UPIC** (1977: "music becomes a game for children вҖ” they draw, they hear"): front camera вҶ’ MediaPipe Pose (33 landmarks, mirrored); each tracked part (wrists/head/ankles/elbows, 7 voices) drives **ONE continuous sung voice** (triangle + vibrato + per-voice lowpass) whose **vertical position = pitch**, glided with `setTargetAtTime` (portamento, never retriggered) across a **C-major-pentatonic** ladder C3вҖ“A5 so **nothing is ever wrong**. Output is a hand-written **raw WebGL2 (GLSL ES 3.00) 3-pass ping-pong feedback field**: fade (Г—0.965 decay вҶ’ trails persist) вҶ’ ~6300 additive `gl_PointSize` glow points/frame seeded at the limbs вҶ’ present over a slow warm **daylightвҶ’dusk** gradient + bloom + tonemap вҖ” **long-form stateful: minute 5 is visibly fuller than minute 1**, then self-limits. The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-20 #4** (body/camera went **4Г—вҶ’0Г—**, the single most-starved input, off every over-represented tag) + **#5** (the full-body UPIC the verdict named "sitting unbuilt in your own research log") + **#1** (off Canvas2D-primary onto a genuinely-demanded scarce shader вҖ” "spread, don't flip"). **NOT 419-kids-body-band** (bodyвҶ’drums) nor the `287`/`302`/`234` harmony-mirror вҖ” a fresh *continuous-sung* mapping of the tracker. Off every JURY ban: **body/camera INPUT** (not touch) В· **raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT** (not Canvas2D-primary; scarce shader the concept demands) В· **continuous-body-UPIC TECH** (rests his recording вҖ” jury #3's clean option) В· **warm-daylight VIBE** (off BOTH bright-active AND dark-glow вҖ” the literal "land one in the middle"). **Ambition honest 3/5**: **#2** вүҘ5 subsystems (camera+Pose В· 7-voice continuous portamento choir В· raw-WebGL2 3-pass feedback field В· always-on pad В· Canvas2D fallback) В· **#3** named refs (Xenakis **UPIC** 1977 В· MediaPipe Pose В· **CHI 2026 "Designing Interactive Movement Sonification for Hip-Hop Dance"** В· Refik Anadol) В· **#5** (RESEARCH В§494 today вҖ” CHI 2026 + ВЎOtro! IAIA Digital Dome Apr-2026). **#1 honestly NOT claimed** (MediaPipe Pose/body-input exist вҖ” `419`/`287`/`302`/`724`; the fresh move is the mapping). **Bulletproof glance:** camera denied OR MediaPipe fails вҶ’ `makeGhostBody(t)` keeps the body painting + the choir singing **hands-free within ~2s** + a `text-rose-300` notice; no WebGL2 вҶ’ inline Canvas2D glow field, same mapping; no 2D either вҶ’ audio-only loop still sings; kid-safe `master вүӨ0.3 вҶ’ lowpass 7500 вҶ’ comp(вҲ’10/20:1)` + always-on C2+G2 pad; iOS AudioContext + getUserMedia inside the tap; full teardown (rAF / camera tracks / `landmarker.close()` / GL programs+buffers+textures+FBO + `loseContext()` / osc stop / `audioCtx.close()`). Camera **analysis-only** вҖ” never recorded/stored/sent; **no API route вҶ’ no guard** (only network is the MediaPipe CDN + model GET); **zero new npm deps** (raw WebGL2, no three.js; package.json/lock untouched). вҡ пёҸ **Compile + lint + type-check verified clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` reached "Collecting page data" вҶ’ all code gates passed; lone `788` warning fixed вҶ’ folder grep-clean of the log); **NOT prerender/device-verified** вҖ” container's ~4096-fd `EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json`, the standing environmental failure (pristine `origin/main` fails identically; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT device-verified** (no camera/WebGL2/audio in sandbox вҖ” unverified by eye/ear: MediaPipe reading a real toddler's whole body across lighting, the feedback-trail look on a real iPad, whether the continuous choir reads as "my body is singing"; the ghost-body + Canvas2D + audio-only fallbacks guarantee a sounding, moving glance). Winner of a kids **DEEP** 3-renderer fire; banked **`789-kids-body-ribbons`** вӯҗ (SVG/DOM В· the scarcest, most iPad-bulletproof renderer вҖ” glowing bounded ribbons + cut-paper daylight; **RESURRECT FIRST (kids)**) + **`787-kids-body-aura`** (three.js В· 3D choir-of-light + skeleton + accumulating chord-cloud вҖ” repalette to daylight off the dark-glow) as **IDEAS В§494**.
