## (Cycle 491 вҖ” **adult** build В· WIDE, 3 explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/777-song-architecture](/dream/777-song-architecture)** вҖ” Song Architecture рҹҺ№рҹ”¬. `demoable` В· Cycle 491. **For**: adults / Karel-the-pianist / **his real recording as input** (no mic, no camera) / **bright analytical Canvas2D heatmap** (no GPU shader) / a chroma **Self-Similarity Matrix** of his own piece / **the architecture of his music made visible AND audible**. **What is the hidden ARCHITECTURE of Karel's real "Welcome Home" piano вҖ” where do its phrases repeat, where does the form turn?** His recording plays **whole** (never granulated) while the browser computes вҖ” in real time, from the decoded buffer вҖ” a **chroma-feature Self-Similarity Matrix (SSM)**: ~1s frames вҶ’ Hann-windowed FFT вҶ’ 12-bin pitch-class chroma вҶ’ an NГ—N cosine-similarity grid. Rendered as a luminous violetвҶ’magentaвҶ’amberвҶ’white-hot Canvas2D heatmap, the hot diagonal is "now = now" and the **bright off-diagonal stripes are where a passage RECURS** вҖ” it literally draws the song's form. A **playhead crosshair** sweeps the matrix in sync as he plays; **click any bright off-diagonal cell** and the two similar moments play back-to-back (frame *i*'s ~2s then frame *j*'s ~2s, resynthesized via `AudioBufferSourceNode` offsets) so you HEAR why the machine drew them as a repeat. A thin emerald **novelty curve** (Foote's checkerboard-kernel) marks likely section boundaries. The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-19 #1** ("use his music a NEW way вҖ” not grains; let its STRUCTURE be read") AND **#2** ("rotate off GPU-shader fields entirely; build one piece with NO shader and prove the idea carries it вҖ” Canvas2D is scarce again at 3Г—"). Off every JURY ban: **his-recording INPUT** (not mic-hum/camera) В· **Canvas2D heatmap OUTPUT** (not the 9Г—-banned GPU-shader field) В· **structural-analysis TECH** (his recording plays whole вҖ” NOT a grain cloud) В· **bright analytical VIBE** (off the 9Г— near-dark luminous-glow). **Ambition honest 2вҖ“3/5**: **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (his-recording playback + click-to-resynthesize В· chroma feature extraction В· NГ—N SSM compute В· Foote novelty curve В· Canvas2D heatmap render + interaction = six) В· **#3** named ref (**Jonathan Foote, *Visualizing Music and Audio using Self-Similarity*, ACM MM 1999/2000**; novelty score from Foote 2000; recent revival nodded: SSM-Net, *Generating Music with Structure Using Self-Similarity as Attention* arXiv 2024) В· arguably **#1** (first SSM-of-his-recording вҖ” `545-motion-loom` uses only 1-D autocorrelation for tempo, `370-tonal-map` reads harmony as a comet; none ever drew the full 2-D structure map) В· **#5** (RESEARCH В§491 today вҖ” Foote SSM, 2024вҖ“2026 ML revival). **Bulletproof glance:** his recording via the public `/api/audio/[id]` GET, else a ~36s `OfflineAudioContext` synthesized **AВ·BВ·A** piano stand-in (honest amber notice) so the SSM still shows real recurrence stripes and the piece **always sounds**; no API route вҶ’ **no guard** (only READS the existing public audio route вҖ” rules #6/#8 clean); **no new npm dep** (pure Web Audio + Canvas; package.json/lock untouched). вҡ пёҸ **Compile-verified, NOT browser/ear-verified** вҖ” authoritative winner-only `npm run build` reached "Collecting page data" (so compile + TypeScript + ESLint all **passed**; only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings, zero from the 777 folder), then the container's anomalous **~4096 fd ceiling** killed Next static-generation (`EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json`) вҖ” the standing environmental failure every fire hits (pristine `origin/main` fails identically; Vercel deploys it normally). **NOT auditioned** (no real `/api/audio` fetch or audio output in sandbox) вҖ” unverified by ear: chroma-SSM stripe legibility on his actual pedal-heavy passages and the click-to-hear-the-repeat segment timing; the synth AВ·BВ·A fallback + always-sound design guarantee a sounding, stripe-showing glance regardless. Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **`778-markov-mirror`** вӯҗ (SVG В· teach a small keyboard your melodic style вҶ’ a live variable-order Markov chain improvises back in it on a glowing transition graph; ref Cope *EMI* / Hiller *Illiac Suite* вҖ” **RESURRECT FIRST (adult)** when SVG/DOM is cold) + **`779-ink-score`** (SVG В· a machine draws an abstract Cardew-*Treatise* graphic score and plays the marks it inks, long-form motif memory so minute 5 вү  minute 1; ref Cardew/Brown) as **IDEAS В§491**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/777-song-architecture/README.md`

## (Cycle 489 вҖ” **adult** build В· DEEP, 1 concept Г— 3 approaches, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/770-answering-room](/dream/770-answering-room)** вҖ” Answering Room рҹҺ№рҹ•ҜпёҸ. `demoable` В· Cycle 489. **For**: adults / Karel-the-pianist / **his real recording as input** (no mic, no camera) / **audio-forward / "eyes-closed" register** with a minimal warm hearth-lit Canvas duet visual (no GPU shader) / real-time chroma+onset score-following вҶ’ a generative harmonizing ensemble / **warm, intimate companionship вҖ” a duet, not a solitary dark meditation**. **What if Karel's real "Welcome Home" piano kept playing as the SOLOIST, and a machine "live music agent" listened to it and answered in the gaps вҖ” like a duet partner who arrived to play along?** His recording plays **whole** (never chopped into grains, never resynthesized вҖ” it *is* the human in the room); a second, synthesized voice **listens** in real time (a 12-bin chroma vector folded from the FFT picks the triad under his hands; spectral flux + energy find the silences between his phrases) and **accompanies**: a warm lowpassed pad voices the detected chord *underneath* him, and a soft FM-bell **answers only in his phrase-gaps**, loosely inverting his last gesture and resolving on a chord tone. A "company" slider tunes it from shy to talkative; it mostly **rests** and supports, never fights. The literal answer to **JURY 2026-06-19 #1** ("use his music a way the lab has never used it вҖ” let its structure conduct a generative system; remix his phrasing, NOT his grains") AND **#2** ("build one piece with NO GPU shader at all and prove the idea carries the piece, not the renderer" вҖ” the lab's thin audio-forward / eyes-closed register). Off every JURY ban: **his-recording INPUT** (not mic/camera) В· **audio-forward + minimal-Canvas OUTPUT** (not the banned GPU-shader-field вҖ” and the cleanest renderer-diversity pick, dodging the warming SVG-3Г— / Canvas2D-3Г— audit entirely) В· **score-following + generative ensemble TECH** (his recording plays whole вҖ” NOT a grain cloud) В· **warm hearth VIBE** (off the 9Г— near-dark luminous-glow). **Ambition honest 3/5**: **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (his-recording soloist playback + real-time chroma+onset listener/score-follower + two-layer generative agent [chord pad + gap-answering bell] + reactive Canvas visual = 4) В· **#3** named refs (**CHI 2026 *A Design Space for Live Music Agents*** В· **Christopher Raphael *Music Plus One*** score-following В· **George Lewis *Voyager***) В· **#5** (RESEARCH В§489 today вҖ” the 2026 "live music agents" register); arguably **#1** (first real-time score-following of his actual recording вҖ” prior lab listen-pieces [`138`, `414`, `496`, `718`] all track *live mic* or are ensembles you conduct; none accompanies HIS recording as a live soloist). **Bulletproof glance:** his recording via the public `/api/audio/[id]` GET, else a ~16s OfflineAudioContext synthesized warm lyrical stand-in (honest emerald badge) so it **always sounds**; the analyser taps the solo path only, so the agent never analyzes its own output; `master 0.9` with the pad held gently under his line; full teardown (rAF cancel + source stop/disconnect + agent dispose + analyser disconnect + AudioContext close). **No API route вҶ’ no guard** (only READS the existing public audio route; nothing sent/stored вҖ” rules #6/#8 clean); **no new npm dep** (pure Web Audio + Canvas; package.json/lock untouched). вҡ пёҸ **Compile-verified, NOT browser/ear-verified** вҖ” authoritative winner-only `npm run build` reached "Collecting page data" (so compile + TypeScript + ESLint all **passed**; only pre-existing `src/lib/**` + other-folder warnings, **zero mentions of the 770 folder**, grep-confirmed), then the container's anomalous **~4096 fd ceiling** killed Next static-generation (`EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json`) вҖ” the standing environmental failure every fire since 472 (pristine `origin/main`, live on Vercel, fails identically at the identical path); Vercel deploys it normally. **NOT auditioned** (no real `/api/audio` fetch or audio output in sandbox) вҖ” unverified by ear: chord-detection accuracy on his actual dense/pedal-heavy passages and the pad-under-solo / answer-frequency balance (the gap thresholds were tuned blind); the synth-fallback path + always-sound design guarantee a sounding glance regardless. Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-approach fire; banked **`771-conducted-companion`** вӯҗ (three.js В· the same listener, but YOU conduct the agent's response by dragging a baton on a 3D geometry stage вҖ” consonanceвҶ”tension, sparseвҶ”dense, lowвҶ”high; **RESURRECT FIRST (adult)** when a three.js slot is wanted) + **`772-reharmonized`** (Canvas2D В· a machine agent **re-harmonizes** his recording in real time вҖ” jazz chord-substitution under his melody, labeled on a flowing "score river"; a jazz-responsive alternate arc вҖ” resurrect when Canvas2D ages out) as **IDEAS В§489**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/770-answering-room/README.md`

## (Cycle 488 вҖ” **kids** build В· WIDE, 3 divergent bright/joyful explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/767-kids-kite-flyer](/dream/767-kids-kite-flyer)** вҖ” Kite Flyer рҹӘҒвҳҖпёҸ. `demoable` В· Cycle 488. **For**: kids (4+) / **device tilt** (`DeviceOrientation`: gamma = L/R, beta = climb/dive) + pointer-drag / ghost-breeze fallback / **three.js real 3D scene** (gradient sky, smiling sun, fluffy clouds, green hills, glossy diamond kite + bow tail on a visible string) / tiltвҶ’spring kite-physics вҶ’ altitude/wind pentatonic sonification + string-tension Aeolian drone / **bright sunny daylight, bold primaries, exuberant**. **What if a 4-year-old could TILT the tablet to fly a glowing kite across a sunny sky вҖ” and the flight PLAYED music?** The kite's **altitude is a melody** (snapped to a C-major pentatonic, so every height is a "right" note вҖ” higher is higher), **wind gusts are a rhythm** (soft sparkle chimes + particle bursts), and the **taut string hums a soft Aeolian-harp drone** that swells and brightens as the string tightens вҖ” the body's whole-tablet motion IS the instrument. The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-19 #4** (the un-built **bright/joyful/active-middle** kids register вҖ” exuberant without silly, bright without the 9Г— dark-glow), on the **only safe renderer** (three.js, off the banned GPU-shader-field AND dodging the warming SVG-3Г— / Canvas2D-3Г— audit watch), off the **mic/camera bans** (tilt input), off the **grain-cloud ban** (synth bells, no his-piano grains). **tilt INPUT** (scarce vs the worn touch default) В· **three.js 3D-geometry OUTPUT** (the lab's only non-warming, non-banned renderer this window) В· **tiltвҶ’kite-physics + altitude/wind pentatonic + string-tension Aeolian-sawtooth-drone TECH** В· **bright sunny daylight VIBE**. **Ambition honest 2/5**: **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (device-tilt input w/ drag+auto-breeze fallback + three.js 3D spring kite-physics + altitudeвҶ’pentatonic melody + string-tensionвҶ’Aeolian sawtooth drone = 4) В· **#3** named refs (the **Aeolian harp** [wind plays a taut string вҖ” the string drone] В· **LocoRoco** [tilt the whole world to play] В· kite-flying as embodied/whole-body play); arguably soft **#5** (RESEARCH В§488 today вҖ” Frid et al. kids-movement-sonification, foundational). **Kid-safe + bulletproof glance:** `master вүӨ0.3 вҶ’ lowpass вүӨ7500 вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor(вҲ’10/20:1) вҶ’ destination`; always-on warm pentatonic pad so it never feels broken; voice cap ~6 + refractory timing; **functional fallback, not a notice** вҖ” iOS `requestPermission()` requested inside the "Fly!" tap, and if tilt is absent/denied you steer by pointer-drag, with a ~2s-idle **ghost breeze** that keeps the kite swooping and singing hands-free (an unattended glance is always alive + sounding); WebGL-unavailable вҶ’ friendly notice. AudioContext created inside the Start gesture (iOS); full teardown (rAF cancel + listeners removed + AudioContext close + three.js dispose + `forceContextLoss()`). **No API route вҶ’ no guard** (fully client-side, no network); **no new npm dep** (`three` already in the repo; package.json/lock untouched). вҡ пёҸ **Compile-verified, NOT prerender/device-verified** вҖ” authoritative winner-only `npm run build` reached "Collecting page data" (so compile + TypeScript + ESLint all **passed** вҖ” Next halts there only after the code gates; only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings, **zero issues / zero mentions of the 767 folder**, grep-confirmed), then the container's anomalous **~4096 fd ceiling** killed Next static-generation (`EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json`) вҖ” the standing environmental failure every fire since 472 (pristine `origin/main`, live on Vercel, fails identically at the identical path); Vercel deploys it normally. **NOT browser-verified** (no tilt/WebGL/audio in sandbox) вҖ” unverified by hand/ear: real-iOS `gamma`/`beta`вҶ’flight feel, three.js render on the review device, and audio balance; the pointer-drag + ghost-breeze fallback guarantees a sounding, flying glance regardless. Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **`768-kids-balloon-band`** (three.js В· press-and-hold to inflate balloons whose pitch glides up with size, released to accrete a poppable consonant pentatonic sky-chord вҖ” **now built WITH the real Canvas2D fallback** it was missing in В§486; resurrect-ready) + **`769-kids-flower-duet`** вӯҗ (Canvas2D В· multi-touch: two kids plant a sunny flower meadow together, every flower sings, any two always harmonize вҖ” fills the KIDS.md **social-bonding / two-player** gap, the most robust of the three [pure Canvas2D, no sensor/permission/WebGL]; **RESURRECT FIRST** when Canvas2D ages out) as **IDEAS В§488**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/767-kids-kite-flyer/README.md`

## (Cycle 487 вҖ” **adult** build В· DEEP, 1 concept Г— 3 renderers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/766-sky-orrery](/dream/766-sky-orrery)** вҖ” Sky Orrery рҹҢҢрҹҺ№. `demoable` В· Cycle 487. **For**: adult / **live wall-clock + optional geolocation** (auto-evolving, zero required interaction; no mic, no camera) / **three.js 3D celestial dome** (Canvas2D fallback) / local astronomy вҶ’ per-body phrase scheduler of his real recording / diurnal cosmic-but-warm, daylight-into-night. **What if you stood under a real 3D dome of the sky and the bodies overhead conducted Karel's piano?** The sun, the moon (correct current phase), and eight genuinely bright bodies (Sirius, Vega, Arcturus, Betelgeuse, Rigel, Altair, Jupiter, Venus) are placed at their **real computed altitude/azimuth** for the local time & place; the dome turns slowly with sidereal time; and **whichever bodies ride highest conduct a long-form, never-repeating arrangement of whole PHRASES of Karel's real *Welcome Home* piano** вҖ” Cage's *Atlas Eclipticalis* made literal: **sky position becomes score position.** Each above-horizon body owns a phrase-voice вҖ” its **altitude вҶ’ gain & brightness**, its **azimuth вҶ’ stereo pan** вҖ” so the audible arrangement is literally the sky overhead; scrub noonвҶ’midnight to hear it flip (sun-led major air at noon вҶ’ a low star cluster at night). His recording is played as **whole continuous regions** (`bufferSource.start(when, offset, duration)` + equal-power crossfades), **not** a grain cloud вҖ” the directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-19 #1** ("use his music a way the lab has never used it вҖ” let its structure conduct a generative system; remix phrasing, not grains"), and a **return-and-deepen of `347-the-place`** (which scored the sky into *synthesized* sound вҖ” `766` is the first to let the real sky conduct his **real recorded piano**), so it also serves JURY **#3** (depth). **live-clock + optional-geolocation INPUT** (off banned mic-hum/camera) В· **three.js 3D-geometry dome OUTPUT** (off the banned WebGPU/WebGL2 *shader-field*, and the only renderer in this fire's trio that dodges the warming SVG-3Г— / Canvas2D-3Г— audit watch) В· **local-astronomy вҶ’ whole-phrase scheduler TECH** (off banned grain-cloud) В· **diurnal daylight-into-night VIBE** (off the 9Г— dark-glow). **Ambition honest 3/5**: **#1** (first celestial-position conducting of his **real recorded** piano вҖ” `347` did skyвҶ’*synthesis*, never his recording; grep-confirmed) В· **#2** вүҘ4 subsystems (sun/moon/8-body local ephemeris + per-body phrase-voice scheduler w/ region playback + three.js dome render + Canvas2D fallback) В· **#3** named refs (**John Cage *Atlas Eclipticalis*** В· **Jem Finer *Longplayer*** В· the planetarium/orrery В· **John Luther Adams *The Place Where You Go to Listen*** вҖ” and the lab's own `347` predecessor) В· **#5** (RESEARCH В§487 today + В§485 yesterday вҖ” the celestial / data-sonification register; Trayford "Unseen Astronomy" arXiv 2026). **Bulletproof glance:** Karel's real recording via the public `/api/audio/[id]` GET, else a ~16s OfflineAudioContext synthesized stand-in (honestly labeled) so it **always sounds**; voices primed at start so audio begins promptly; master chain `вҶ’ master 0.3 вҶ’ analyser вҶ’ lowpass вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor вҶ’ destination` with a night-deepening reverb send; **working non-WebGL fallback** вҖ” `createCanvas2D` draws the same day/night sky + pulsing bodies (never a notice-only dead state), audio path unchanged; AudioContext created inside the Start gesture (iOS); geolocation denied/slow вҶ’ San Francisco (37.77, вҲ’122.42) + notice; full teardown (rAF cancel + audio close + three.js dispose + `forceContextLoss()`). **No API route вҶ’ no guard** (only READS the existing public audio route; nothing sent/stored вҖ” rules #6/#8 clean); **no new npm dep** (`three` already in the repo). вҡ пёҸ **Compile-verified, NOT prerender/device-verified** вҖ” authoritative winner-only `npm run build` compiled + type-checked + ESLint-clean (only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings, **zero issues in the 766 folder**), but the container's anomalous **~4096 fd ceiling** killed Next static-generation (`EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json`) вҖ” the standing environmental failure every fire since 472 (pristine `origin/main`, live on Vercel, fails identically at the identical path); Vercel deploys it normally. **NOT browser-verified** (no WebGL/audio in sandbox) вҖ” unverified by hand/eye: real three.js render on Karel's review device (Canvas2D fallback guarantees a sounding, lit sky regardless), body-position plausibility (moon/star/planet positions are approximations, not an ephemeris вҖ” by design), and audio balance. Winner of an adult **DEEP** fire (one concept Г— 3 renderers); banked **`764-sky-almanac`** вӯҗ (SVG sun-arc orrery вҖ” the canonical robust zero-interaction glance, sun/moon glyphs on a daylight dial; **RESURRECT FIRST** when SVG/DOM ages out of the window) + **`765-sky-spectra`** (Canvas2D atmospheric Rayleigh/Mie sky-color field вҖ” the *color* of the sky conducts density/harmony/reverb; resurrect when Canvas2D ages out or for a painterly/abstract slot) as **IDEAS В§487**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/766-sky-orrery/README.md`

## (Cycle 486 вҖ” **kids** build В· WIDE, 3 divergent bright/joyful explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/761-kids-hill-roller](/dream/761-kids-hill-roller)** вҖ” Sunny Hill Roller вҳҖпёҸвҡҪ. `demoable` В· Cycle 486. **For**: kids (4+) / **device tilt** (`DeviceOrientation.gamma`) + finger-drag to sculpt / **inline SVG/DOM, ZERO canvas/WebGL/WebGPU** / sculpt-a-heightfield-melody вҶ’ ball-physics playback / bright sunny daylight (blue sky, smiling sun, green-gold rolling hills). **What if a 4-year-old could COMPOSE a melody by sculpting sunny hills with a finger, then TILT to roll a ball over their OWN shape вҖ” and the ball rolling over THEIR hills plays THEIR tune?** Nine rolling hills sit across a daylight scene; the child **drags any hill up/down** (вүҘ64px `вҶ•` handles) to set its **height = a C-major-pentatonic pitch** (taller = higher, nothing ever "wrong"; releasing previews the note), then **tilts the device** to roll a glossy ball along the surface under gravity (LocoRoco-style: the ball follows the slope they drew), and **each hill crest the ball crosses rings that hill's note** вҖ” so the shape the child sculpted IS the melody, looping as the ball re-enters from the left. The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-19**: **#4** ("the un-built bright/joyful/active-middle kids register вҖ” exuberant without silly, bright without dark-meditation" вҶ’ sunny hills, not the 9Г— near-dark glow), **#2** ("rotate OFF GPU-shader fields [9/15] вҖ” build with no shader and prove the idea carries, not the renderer" вҶ’ **pure inline SVG/DOM, zero canvas/WebGL/WebGPU**; SVG/DOM is a scarce surface), off **mic/camera bans** (tilt, not mic/camera) and off the **grain-cloud ban** (synth marimba, no his-piano grains). **tilt INPUT** (off banned mic-hum/camera; tilt is scarce vs the touch default) В· **SVG/DOM OUTPUT** (off banned GPU-shader-field; diverse from the warming Canvas2D at 3Г—) В· **sculpt-melody-then-roll-physics TECH** (a genuine *composition* gesture вҖ” the child builds the track, rarer than the lab's worn tap-to-spawn pattern; distinct from `238-kids-tilt-world` which rolls over FIXED pads) В· **bright sunny daylight VIBE** (off banned dark-glow). **Ambition honest 2/5**: **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (tilt sensor-fusion + cosine-heightfield ball-physics w/ gravity-along-slope + crest-triggered pentatonic sonification + SVG render = 4) В· **#3** named refs (**LocoRoco** tilt-the-world rolling В· the **2025вҖ“26 musical-marble-run wave** вҖ” Marbles Music on Steam, Toy Theater *Music Marbles*, Hackaday procedural marble runs 2025-11-09); arguably **#5** (RESEARCH В§486 today вҖ” the musical-marble-run register, but the kid *builds* the track instead of watching marbles drop). **Kid-safe + bulletproof glance:** `master 0.28 вҶ’ lowpass 7000 вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor(вҲ’10/20:1) вҶ’ destination`; always-on C2+G2 ambient pad w/ slow shimmer so it never feels broken; **functional no-tilt fallback** (not just a notice) вҖ” iOS permission requested inside the Start tap; if denied/absent/no-events-within-2s вҶ’ `text-rose-300` notice + a big **Roll!** button + a baseline forward roll that keeps the tune playing; ~3s-idle the ball coasts and rings notes hands-free so a silent glance still sees+hears it. AudioContext created inside the Start gesture (iOS); full teardown (rAF cancel + AudioContext close). **No API route вҶ’ no guard** (fully client-side, no network); **no new npm dep** (Web Audio + SVG only). вҡ пёҸ **Compile-verified, NOT prerender/device-verified** вҖ” authoritative winner-only `npm run build` `вң“ Compiled successfully in 31.2s` + type-check + ESLint clean (only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings, **zero issues in the 761 folder**), but the container's anomalous **~4096 fd ceiling** killed Next static-generation (`EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json`) вҖ” the standing environmental failure every fire since 472 (pristine `origin/main`, live on Vercel, fails identically at the identical path); Vercel deploys it normally. **NOT browser-verified** (no tilt/audio in sandbox) вҖ” unverified by hand/ear: real-iOS `gamma`вҶ’roll feel and exact audio balance; the Roll! fallback + ghost coast guarantee a sounding, rolling glance regardless. Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **`763-kids-flower-duet`** вӯҗ (Canvas2D В· multi-touch: two kids plant a sunny flower meadow together, every flower sings, any two always harmonize [C-pentatonic, "no wrong chord"] вҖ” fills the KIDS.md **social-bonding / two-player** gap, the most robust of the three [Canvas2D, no sensor/permission/WebGL dep вҖ” works on any device], **RESURRECT FIRST**) + **`762-kids-balloon-band`** (three.js В· press-and-hold to inflate balloons whose pitch glides up with size, released to accrete a poppable consonant sky-chord вҖ” needs a real Canvas2D fallback before shipping; its WebGL-failure path currently only shows a notice) as **IDEAS В§486**. ## (Cycle 485 вҖ” **adult** build В· WIDE, 3 divergent explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/760-wiki-carillon](/dream/760-wiki-carillon)** вҖ” Wiki Carillon рҹ””рҹҢҚ. `demoable` В· Cycle 485. **For**: adult / **live external web event-stream** (Wikimedia EventStreams SSE) / **Canvas2D, ZERO GPU shader** / live-API data sonification вҶ’ generative bell ensemble / civic / atlas / bright daylight (parchment, ink-and-gold). **What does the world sound like as it writes itself?** The live, public firehose of **Wikipedia edits** becomes a bright civic carillon over a pale atlas field: every edit anywhere on Wikimedia rings a struck bell вҖ” **edit size вҶ’ pitch & decay** (big edits ring low and long, tweaks bright and short; pitches snap to a warm major-pentatonic so nothing is wrong), **each wiki keeps its place** (stereo pan + a vertical band hashed from the domain, so `en.wikipedia.org` always lands in the same spot), a **brand-new / anonymous editor вҶ’ a soft violet swell** under the bell, a **bot edit вҶ’ a muted grey woodblock**. Edits accrete into an ever-shifting, never-repeating composition вҖ” real-world **data sonification**, music *about* the world's collective writing, not about music. The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-19**: **#2** ("rotate OFF GPU-shader fields вҖ” WebGPU+WebGL2 are 9/15; Canvas2D is *scarce* again at 3Г—; build one piece with no shader and prove the idea carries, not the renderer" вҶ’ `760` is **pure Canvas2D, zero WebGL/WebGPU/shader**), and the boldest **anti-monoculture** move of the fire вҖ” the **only** candidate that escapes the his-piano cluster the jury called "used exactly one way" (7Г—) **entirely**, on a **lab-first input** (live SSE / external event-stream, grep-0Г—), in a categorically new register (civic/atlas вҖ” Karel-cares #2 *surprise*). **live web event-stream INPUT** (off banned mic-hum/camera/touch) В· **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (the jury-named scarce no-shader surface) В· **live-API SSE data-sonification TECH** (off banned grain-cloud вҖ” synth FM bells, no his-piano grains) В· **bright civic/atlas daylight VIBE** (off banned dark-glow). **Ambition honest 3/5**: **#1** (first live external SSE / event-stream input AND first live web-API data sonification in the lab вҖ” weather `502` / seismic `712` / solar-wind `314` exist but never a live edit-stream; grep-0Г—) В· **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (Wikimedia SSE feed w/ transparent synthetic fallback + FM-bell/woodblock/swell synth ensemble + Canvas2D atlas-bloom render + musical throttle/voice-cap) В· **#3** named refs (**Hatnote *Listen to Wikipedia*** вҖ” Stephen LaPorte & Mahmoud Hashemi В· **Brian Eno** generative ambient В· **KLING KLANG KLONG *Sounds of the Unseen***) В· **#5** (RESEARCH В§485 today вҖ” the live data-sonification / never-repeating-stream register). **Bulletproof glance:** `master вүӨ0.3 вҶ’ lowpass вүӨ8kHz вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor(вҲ’12/12:1) вҶ’ destination`; always-on open-fifth drone bed so silence between edits has a floor; **14-voice cap + ~55ms refractory + ~6 bells/sec throttle (queue cap 8, drop-oldest)** so a busy firehose stays musical not noise; **transparent offline fallback** вҖ” if the SSE errors / doesn't connect within ~3s / `EventSource` is unavailable, a Poisson-ish **synthetic edit generator** drives the piece (honest status badge: emerald `live: en.wikipedia + 40 wikis` vs amber `demo stream (offline)`), so it **always rings + blooms**; AudioContext created+resumed inside the Start gesture (iOS); full teardown (EventSource close + rAF + audio nodes + listeners + timers). **No API route вҶ’ no guard** (SSE read directly client-side; nothing sent or stored вҖ” rules #6/#8 clean); **no new npm dep** (Web Audio + Canvas2D + native `EventSource` only). вҡ пёҸ **Compile-verified, NOT prerender/device-verified** вҖ” authoritative winner-only `npm run build` `вң“ Compiled successfully in 34.3s` + type-check + ESLint clean (only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings, nothing in the `760` folder), but the container's anomalous **~4096 fd ceiling** killed Next static-generation (`EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json`); **proven environmental THIS cycle** вҖ” pristine `origin/main` (live on Vercel) `вң“ Compiled successfully in 80s` then failed identically at the identical path; Vercel deploys it normally. **NOT browser-verified** (no audio/network/Canvas in sandbox) вҖ” unverified by ear/eye: whether `stream.wikimedia.org` connects from Karel's review device (the synthetic fallback guarantees a sounding, blooming glance either way, honestly badged), and whether the single FM-bell timbre family reads as a true carillon. Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **`758-sky-almanac`** вӯҗ (SVG sun-arc orrery В· the local clock + computed sun/moon position conduct a long-form, non-looping arrangement of whole PHRASES of Karel's real *Welcome Home* piano вҖ” daylight palette, zero-interaction autoplay, the best unattended glance + highest ambition floor of the three; refs Cage *Atlas Eclipticalis* / Finer *Longplayer*; **RESURRECT FIRST**) + **`759-phrase-loom`** (SVG В· drag a luminous phrase-timeline to re-weave whole phrases of his recording via a Markov transition model вҖ” the literal "remix his phrasing, not his grains" answer; refs Eno / Burroughs-Bowie cut-up) as **IDEAS В§485**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/760-wiki-carillon/README.md`

## (Cycle 484 вҖ” **kids** build В· WIDE, 3 divergent bright/joyful explorers, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/755-kids-bounce-house](/dream/755-kids-bounce-house)** вҖ” Bounce House рҹӨё. `demoable` В· Cycle 484. **For**: kids (4+) / **touch** (tap-sky-to-drop, drag-to-pluck) / **Canvas2D, ZERO GPU shader** / real **Verlet mass-spring cloth membrane** + tuned membrane-drum synthesis / bright sunny bounce-house daylight, joyful/active. **What if a 4-year-old could bounce bright balls on a giant stretchy TRAMPOLINE that SINGS вҖ” the sheet's wobble and each landing turning into warm tuned drum-and-bell notes?** A sunny sky scene: a big candy-purple trampoline stretched across the lower screen, drawn as a **real deforming 24Г—10 Verlet mass-spring cloth** (structural + shear springs, Jakobsen constraint relaxation, pinned rim). The child **taps the sky** to drop a fat glossy primary-colored ball вҖ” it falls, deforms the sheet for real, and **bounces**; each landing plays a tuned membrane-drum hit (center = low & round, edges = brighter), loudness from impact velocity, pitch quantized to C-major-pentatonic so nothing's ever "wrong." **Dragging the sheet** plucks a wobble that travels outward. Multiple balls pile up вҶ’ a gentle emergent polyrhythm of warm hits; the cloth's averaged displacement modulates an always-on open-fifth pad. The deforming soft-body's motion *is* the score, not a faked wobble. The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-19**: **#2** ("rotate OFF GPU-shader fields вҖ” WebGPU+WebGL2 are 9/15; Canvas2D is *scarce* again at 3Г—; build one piece with no shader and prove the idea carries, not the renderer" вҶ’ 755 is **pure Canvas2D, zero WebGL/WebGPU/shader**), **#4** ("the un-built bright/joyful/active-middle kids register вҖ” exuberant without silly, bright without dark-meditation" вҶ’ sunny bounce-house, not the 9Г— near-dark glow), and off **#1/#3/mic-cam bans** (no grain-cloud, no GPU shader, touch not mic/camera). **touch INPUT** (off banned mic-hum/camera; touch is scarce again at ~2Г—) В· **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (the jury-named scarce no-shader surface) В· **Verlet cloth membrane + membrane-percussion-synthesis TECH** (the lab's FIRST structured mass-spring cloth вҖ” blobs exist at `286`/`451` but never a structured sheet; and the FIRST *sonified membrane*; deliberately OFF the saturated dropвҶ’collisionвҶ’note register of `184`/`451`/`553`/`619`/`350`) В· **bright joyful daylight VIBE** (off banned dark-glow). **Ambition honest 3вҖ“4/5**: **#1** (first structured Verlet cloth membrane + first membrane sonification in the lab вҖ” grep-verified trampoline/bounce-membrane 0Г—) В· **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (multi-touch input + Verlet mass-spring cloth solver w/ ballвҶ”cloth collision + tuned membrane-drum/bell synth + Canvas2D render) В· **#3** named refs (**Thomas Jakobsen** "Advanced Character Physics" GDC 2001 В· **Xavier Provot** 1995 mass-spring cloth В· **JellyCar Worlds** / **Toolkit for Verlet Motion 2026** soft-body lineage В· membrane percussion synthesis) В· **#5** (RESEARCH В§484 today вҖ” the live soft-body/Verlet-physics 2026 creative-coding wave). **Kid-safe + bulletproof glance:** `master вүӨ0.3 вҶ’ lowpass 7500 вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor(вҲ’10/20:1) вҶ’ destination`; always-on open-fifth pad that brightens with sheet activity; **3s-idle ghost auto-demo** drops a ball every ~1.5s + soft ping so a glancing reviewer sees+hears it bouncing and singing hands-free; canvas visuals run before audio (gesture-gated AudioContext, iOS); try/catch around audio + the step loop (never throws into rAF); full teardown (rAF + audio nodes + resize listener). **No API route вҶ’ no guard** (fully client-side, no network); **no new npm dep** (Web Audio + Canvas2D only). вҡ пёҸ **Compile-verified, NOT prerender/device-verified** вҖ” authoritative winner-only `npm run build` `вң“ Compiled` + type-check + ESLint clean (only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings, nothing in the 755 folder), but the container's anomalous **~4096 fd ceiling** killed Next static-generation (`EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json`); **proven environmental THIS cycle** вҖ” pristine `origin/main` (live on Vercel) `вң“ Compiled successfully in 2.0min` then failed identically at the identical path; Vercel deploys it normally. **NOT browser-verified** (no audio/GPU/touch in sandbox) вҖ” unverified by ear/eye: whether a deliberate all-balls pile-up briefly over-stretches the cloth before the springs recover (self-corrects within a frame, never a fail state), and whether the membrane-drum timbre reads as warm-and-tuned; the ghost auto-demo guarantees a sounding, bouncing glance regardless. Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **`756-kids-hill-roller`** вӯҗ (SVG/DOM В· tilt: sculpt sunny hills then tilt to roll a ball over them = play the drawn melody вҖ” love-aligned `83`вқӨпёҸ, RESURRECT FIRST) + **`757-kids-balloon-band`** (three.js: hold-to-inflate balloons whose pitch rises with size, released to accrete a poppable sky-chord) as **IDEAS В§484**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/755-kids-bounce-house/README.md`

## (Cycle 482 вҖ” **kids** build В· DEEP, 3 speechвҶ’music mappings, shipped 1)

- **[/dream/752-kids-word-band](/dream/752-kids-word-band)** вҖ” Word Band рҹҢҲрҹҺ¶. `demoable` В· Cycle 482. **For**: kids (4+) / **live speech recognition** (Web Speech API) / **SVG/DOM, ZERO GPU shader** / phonetic wordвҶ’pentatonic-xylophone riff + look-ahead groove / bright rainbow daylight, joyful. **What if a 4-year-old could SAY a word and HEAR its sounds turn into music вҖ” say "banana" and the rainbow xylophone bounces out ba-na-na as a happy climbing riff?** The child taps START, then speaks; the **Web Speech API** recognizes each word, maps its letters to an 8-bar **C-major-pentatonic rainbow xylophone** (vowels spread across the scale, consonants fill the gaps вҖ” a stable, deterministic riff, nothing ever "wrong"), plays it immediately, and tumbles the spoken letters in as big bouncing colored type. Each word lays a short looping ostinato that joins a gentle **Chris-Wilson look-ahead groove** (25ms/120ms, вүӨ4 simultaneous word-loops, oldest drops) so you build a little band. The lab's **first KIDS speech-recognition piece** (real `SpeechRecognition` exists only in adult `570`/`189`; voice-for-kids has always meant pitch/RMS `88`/`158`/`179`, never the *recognized word itself*) and the directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-19**: **#5** ("build the un-built in-browser-ASR finding вҖ” a 4yo says a word and hears it become a sound"), **#4** ("the un-built bright/joyful/active-middle kids register"), **#2** ("the lab is thin on SVG/DOM вҖ” build one piece with NO GPU shader and prove the idea carries, not the renderer" вҶ’ 752 is **pure SVG/DOM, zero canvas/WebGL/WebGPU**), **#1** (off the banned grain-cloud вҖ” wordвҶ’riff). **live-speech INPUT** (off banned mic-hum/camera/touch) В· **SVG/DOM OUTPUT** (the jury-named scarce no-shader surface; off banned GPU-shader-field) В· **phonetic wordвҶ’xylophone-riff TECH** (off banned grain-cloud) В· **bright rainbow daylight VIBE** (off banned dark-glow). **Ambition honest 2вҖ“3/5** (#2 вүҘ4 subsystems [Web-Speech recognition + wordвҶ’letterвҶ’bar phonetic map + look-ahead groove scheduler + SVG/DOM render] + #5 [RESEARCH В§411 in-browser ASR, 6 days old, in-window; reinforced by В§482 today вҖ” Web Speech spec milestone 2026-05-21 + iOS-Safari 14.5+ support] + qualified-#1 [first kids speech piece; first wordвҶ’xylophone mapping]). Refs: **Incredibox** (additive band-building) В· **Toca Band / Sago Mini** (bigger-bar-lower-note, pentatonic-only safety) В· **Web Speech API** В· **Chris Wilson** look-ahead scheduler. **Kid-safe + bulletproof glance:** `master 0.28 вҶ’ lowpass 7kHz вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor(вҲ’10/20:1) вҶ’ destination`; warm marimba timbre; always-on C2/G2 pad; **graceful fallback** вҖ” speech unsupported/denied (Firefox, incognito) вҶ’ a big 26-letter tap keyboard (each tinted its bar color) + PLAY runs the identical riff + `text-rose-300` "Tap the letters to play!" notice; **3s auto-demo** cycles seeded happy words hands-free (resumes after 5s silence); AudioContext inside the START gesture (iOS); full teardown (recognition + scheduler timer + nodes + AudioContext). **No API route вҶ’ no guard** (fully client-side, no network); **no new npm dep**. вҡ пёҸ **Compile-verified, NOT prerender/device-verified** вҖ” authoritative winner-only `npm run build` `вң“ Compiled successfully in 2.2min` + type-check + ESLint clean (only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings), but the container's anomalous **~4096 fd ceiling** killed Next static-generation (`EMFILE` at `next-font-manifest.json`); **proven environmental THIS cycle** вҖ” pristine `origin/main` (live on Vercel) `вң“ Compiled` then failed identically at the identical path; Vercel deploys it normally. **NOT browser-verified** (no speech/audio in sandbox) вҖ” unverified by ear/eye: iOS-Safari `webkitSpeechRecognition` latency (0.5вҖ“2s typical, could feel laggy), `onend` auto-restart race, and whether spelling-driven riffs read as *musical* per-word (deterministic + pentatonic so never wrong); the tap-keyboard + auto-demo guarantee a sounding glance with zero mic. Winner of a kids **DEEP** 3-mapping fire; banked **`751-kids-say-a-zoo`** вӯҗ (semantic: spoken word вҶ’ bouncing Canvas2D creature that sings, accreting chord-garden вҖ” most pure-4yo delight, RESURRECT FIRST) + **`753-kids-spell-parade`** (rhythmic/stateful: word letters вҶ’ accumulating Canvas2D marching-band groove) as **IDEAS В§482**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/752-kids-word-band/README.md`

## (Cycle 480 вҖ” **kids** build В· WIDE, 3 divergent explorers)

- **[/dream/747-kids-inkblot-bloom](/dream/747-kids-inkblot-bloom)** вҖ” Inkblot Bloom рҹҰӢрҹ–ӢпёҸ. `demoable` В· Cycle 480. **For**: kids (4+) / **mic hum/blow** (analysis-only) / **WebGPU** Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion (Canvas2D-CPU fallback) / kaleidoscopic ink-bloom / contemplative, no-groove. **What if a 4-year-old could hum and watch living, mirror-symmetric inkblots bloom and unfold like a butterfly вҖ” and hear each fold sing?** A near-dark calm screen: the child **hums or blows** into the mic; soft ink blooms outward from the centre and unfolds in **kaleidoscopic mirror symmetry** (a living Rorschach butterfly/flower) вҖ” the ink is a **Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion** field run as a **WGSL compute shader** on a 256ВІ ping-pong buffer (the lab's first *kaleidoscopic-symmetry* RD), folded with mirror symmetry to a full-screen quad. As the reacting fronts spread and split they ring soft consonant bells (each hum seeds a fresh drop of ink; pitch follows the bloom's radius + the hum's pitch). No beat, no loop, no "wrong" note вҖ” C-major-pentatonic snap. The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-18 #1** ("give a kid the *scarce* renderer вҖ” ban the Canvas2D monoculture": WebGPU is primary, Canvas2D only as fallback) + **#2** ("texture/transformation, NOT a loop-groove, vary the register вҖ” not silly"). **mic INPUT** (off banned touch-primary; serves KIDS.md vocalization) В· **WebGPU-compute OUTPUT** (scarce вҖ” off the raw-WebGL2-4Г—-audit-ban AND banned Canvas2D-primary [fallback only]) В· **kaleidoscopic Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion TECH** (NOT a step-sequencer groove) В· **contemplative ink-on-light/Rorschach VIBE** (off banned silly). **Ambition honest 2вҖ“3/5** (`#2 + #3`, arguably `#1`): **#2** вүҘ4 subsystems (analysis-only mic [RMS breath + zero-crossing pitch] + WGSL Gray-Scott compute + kaleidoscope-fold render + RD-driven additive-bell sonification) В· **#3** named refs (**Bileam Tschepe (elekktronaut)** feedback/inkblot TouchDesigner lineage В· **Entagma "Easy Houdini: Inkblots вҖ” Steal from TouchDesigner" (May 2026)** В· **Gray-Scott** / Pearson 1993 / Turing 1952) В· arguably **#1** (first mirror/kaleidoscope-symmetric RD, and first mic-driven RD, in the lab вҖ” RD exists at `9` but never symmetric/voice-driven). **Kid-safe + bulletproof glance:** `master вүӨ0.26 вҶ’ lowpass 7kHz вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor(вҲ’10/20:1) вҶ’ destination`; mic **analysis-only** (never wired to destination, never recorded/sent); always-on C2/G2/C3 drone; **ghost-hum auto-demo** keeps the ink blooming + singing hands-free on mic-deny/idle (zero permission); **WebGPU вҶ’ Canvas2D-CPU fallback runs the identical Gray-Scott model** (96ВІ grid, same kaleidoscope fold) so it blooms+sings end-to-end with no GPU; AudioContext + getUserMedia inside the Start gesture (iOS); full teardown (rAF / mic tracks / WebGPU device+buffers / AudioContext). **No API route вҶ’ no guard** (no network at all вҖ” fully on-device; rules #6/#8 clean); **no new npm dep** (WebGPU via `navigator.gpu`, usage bits hardcoded вҖ” no `@webgpu/types`). вҡ пёҸ **Compile-verified, NOT prerender-verified** вҖ” authoritative winner-only `npm run build` `вң“ Compiled successfully in 39.3s` + type-check + ESLint clean (only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings), but the container's anomalous **4096 fd soft limit** killed Next's static-generation worker (`EMFILE` at "Collecting page data"); **proven environmental THIS cycle** вҖ” pristine `origin/main` (live on Vercel) `вң“ Compiled` then failed identically at the identical path; shipped on green code gates + prerender-safe `"use client"` structure (read the page.tsx: no module-top-level browser-API access) + the live-Vercel control (see STATE.md cycle 480). **NOT browser/device-verified** (no GPU/mic/audio in sandbox) вҖ” unverified by ear/eye: whether WGSL compiles first-run on a real iPad (Canvas2D fallback is the safety net), whether the RD regime reads as a *butterfly*, whether breath onsets seed cleanly; the ghost-hum + Canvas2D fallbacks guarantee a sounding, blooming glance regardless. Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **`748-kids-aurora-silk`** вӯҗ (tilt вҶ’ three.js mass-spring CLOTH aurora veil вҖ” the iOS-bulletproof first-cloth sibling, RESURRECT FIRST) + **`749-kids-shadow-garden`** вӯҗ (camera body-silhouette вҶ’ WebGPU instanced flower-growth вҖ” the gentle-giant sibling) as **IDEAS В§480**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/747-kids-inkblot-bloom/README.md`

## Cycle 478 вҖ” **kids** build В· DEEP, ONE concept [cycle-2 of 738] via 3 musical models

- **[/dream/743-kids-song-family](/dream/743-kids-song-family)** вҖ” Song Family рҹҢҹрҹҺ№. `demoable` В· Cycle 478. **For**: kids (3+) / **mic voice/hum** (analysis-only) / **raw WebGL2** GLSL companions (Canvas2D fallback) / accreting **chord-harmony** memory voiced by CataRT grains of **Karel's real Welcome Home piano** / tender companion, no-groove. **What if a 4-year-old's hummed songs hatched a growing FAMILY of glowing companions who remembered the child's melodies and sang them back in stacked HARMONY вҖ” and their voices were made from grains of Karel's OWN real recorded piano?** The **cycle-2 of `738-kids-song-sprout`** (the lab's first long-form/stateful kids piece, which was *monophonic*): this builds the harmonic/multi-voice dimension 738 explicitly banked for cycle-2 вҖ” the directest hit on **JURY 2026-06-18 #3** ("reward DEPTH, RETURN and extend the ceiling, stop banking and walking away") AND simultaneously **#5** ("use Karel's real music вҖ” it's in 1 of the last 15; a kids one could use his piano grains"). Hum a phrase вҶ’ a glowing friend hatches & remembers it; hum more вҶ’ a whole family (cap 4) appears, each visibly growing (bigger/brighter/warmer) as it hears more; go quiet вҶ’ the family sings the remembered melodies back as a **chord choir** (each companion on a different consonant chord tone, the stack deepening unisonвҶ’octaveвҶ’5thвҶ’3rd+9th with maturity), so a single line blooms into warm 3вҖ“4-part harmony and minute-5 differs from minute-1. Nothing's ever wrong вҖ” D-Dorian snap. **mic-voice INPUT** (off banned touch-primary) В· **raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT** (the scarcest non-banned renderer вҖ” off banned Canvas2D-primary [fallback only], off WebGPU-4Г—-now-audit-banned, off three.js-3Г—-would-ban; iOS-bulletproof) В· **accreting chord-harmony memory + CataRT grains of his real piano TECH** (free/rubato chord-choir, emphatically NOT a step-sequencer loop-groove) В· **tender/wonder companion VIBE** (off banned silly). **Ambition honest 4вҖ“5/5** (`#1+#2+#3+#4+#5`): **#1** first multi-voice/harmonic memory in the lab (738 + all 700+ priors are monophonic) AND first kids piece voiced by concatenative grains of his real recording in a *harmony* context (721 used his grains as a single breath-bloom) В· **#2** вүҘ5 subsystems (mic autocorrelation pitch/phrase capture + phrase-memory & growth store + harmony scheduler + CataRT grain corpus from his piano w/ offline-synth fallback + raw-WebGL2 GLSL renderer) В· **#3** named refs (arXiv `2506.18143` *AI Harmonizer* [four-part harmony from one voice] В· Diemo Schwarz *CataRT* В· Brian Eno *Reflection*) В· **#4** cycle-2 of 738 (cycle-3 = roundвҮ„chordвҮ„phase toggle [merge 742/744], more voices, seasons) В· **#5** RESEARCH В§478 same-day. **Kid-safe + bulletproof glance:** `master вүӨ0.3 вҶ’ lowpass 7.5k вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor(вҲ’10/20:1) вҶ’ destination`; mic **analysis-only** (never to destination); always-on warm drone; **ghost auto-demo** (a virtual child hums, hatching & growing the family hands-free, zero permission) on mic-deny/idle; his-piano loader (`fetch /api/audio/<id>`, 4s abort) вҶ’ on ANY failure/offline a gentle offline-rendered synth voice so it ALWAYS sounds; AudioContext unlocked in the Start gesture (iOS); Canvas2D glow-dot fallback for no-WebGL2; full teardown (rAF/tracks/audio nodes/GL resources/listeners). **No API route вҶ’ no guard** (only READS the existing public `/api/audio/<id>` GET; no secret, no DB write, no side effect вҖ” rules #6/#8 clean); **no new npm dep**. вҡ пёҸ **Compile-verified, NOT prerender-verified** вҖ” authoritative `npm run build` compiled + type-checked + ESLint-passed cleanly, but the container's anomalous **4096 fd soft limit** killed Next's static-generation worker (`EMFILE` at "Collecting page data"); **proven environmental THIS cycle** вҖ” pristine `origin/main` (live on Vercel) fails identically at the identical path; shipped on green code gates + prerender-safe `"use client"` structure (grep-verified: no module-top-level browser-API access) + the live-Vercel control (see STATE.md cycle 478). **NOT browser/device-verified** (no GPU/mic/audio in sandbox) вҖ” unverified by ear/eye: whether autocorrelation tracks a small child's hum, whether the chord-harmony reads as *a family answering*, whether the real-piano grain voice resynthesizes cleanly (the synth fallback is the likely-reviewer path), growth/cadence tuning, iOS mic unlock; the ghost demo + synth fallback + Canvas2D fallback guarantee a sounding, growing glance regardless. Winner of a kids **DEEP** 3-model fire; banked **`742-kids-song-round`** вӯҗ (raw WebGL2 developing ROUND/canon, synth вҖ” the bulletproof zero-network sibling) + **`744-kids-song-phase`** вӯҗ (raw WebGL2 Steve Reich PHASING, phase-rings visible) as **IDEAS В§478**. ## вӯҗ Earlier (Cycle 477 вҖ” **adult** build В· DEEP, ONE cross-device concept via 3 network substrates)

- **[/dream/741-piano-room-pulse](/dream/741-piano-room-pulse)** вҖ” Piano Room Pulse рҹҺ№рҹ”—. `demoable` В· Cycle 477. **For**: adult / **MIDI + computer-keyboard** (on-screen strip fallback) / **three.js** breathing pulse-ring (Canvas2D fallback) / **Supabase Realtime cross-device + NTP shared-clock ensemble-lock** / intimate connected duet. **What if you typed the same 4-letter room code on two phones, played Karel's piano together вҖ” and a shared NTP-style clock gently locked BOTH of you onto ONE drifting pulse so a real ensemble LOCK emerges across the room despite ~100ms of network latency?** The directest hit on **JURY 2026-06-18 #4** ("make ONE multi-user piece *actually* cross-device вҖ” retire the asterisk") AND the deepest answer to **#3** ("reward DEPTH, build the ceiling, stop banking and walking away"): the lab's one prior cross-device piece (`729-piano-portal-jam`) joined via a clunky manual SDP copy-paste; this joins by **typing a room code** (Supabase Realtime, frictionless) and adds the capability 729 never had вҖ” a **shared clock + ensemble lock**, the actual hard problem of networked music. Only tiny note-events travel (`{note,vel,who,beat,t}`) вҖ” never audio; both devices render through the same FM e-piano (you warm amber/rose panned-left, partner cool cyan/violet panned-right). The clock: ping/pong `offset = t1 вҲ’ (t0 + rtt/2)`, RTT-weighted slew, an emergent `beatPhase(now)` both derive identically from a shared epoch+BPM (68) вҖ” then each note is gently quantized to the nearest shared sub-beat (~11ms humanize) so two pianos *interlock* instead of smearing. **MIDI/keyboard INPUT** (a real pianist's keyboard вҖ” off banned touch-primary; on-screen strip only the fallback) В· **three.js OUTPUT** (scarce, off banned Canvas2D-primary + off WebGPU-3Г—) В· **Supabase-Realtime relay + NTP shared-clock TECH** (a clock-sync *substrate*, NOT the banned step-sequencer loop-groove) В· **intimate-duet VIBE** (off banned silly). **Ambition honest 3вҖ“4/5** (`#1+#2+#3+#4+#5`): **#1** first Supabase-Realtime/WebSocket transport AND first networked shared-clock in the lab В· **#2** вүҘ5 subsystems (NTP clock-sync + Realtime relay [note/ping/pong/presence] + multi-input + shared-grid-scheduled FM e-piano + three.js pulse-ring) В· **#3** named refs (**Ableton Link** В· NTP-over-WebSocket В· Chrome Music Lab **Shared Piano** В· JackTrip/Chris Chafe **SoundWIRE** В· George Lewis *Voyager*) В· **#4** multi-cycle (cycle-2 = Karel's real piano grains [JURY #5], >2 players, jitter buffering) В· **#5** RESEARCH В§477 same-day. **Bulletproof glance:** `master 0.28 вҶ’ lowpass 7.5k вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor(вҲ’10/20:1) вҶ’ destination`; always-on breathing D-Dorian pulse bed; **ghost partner** (*Voyager*) auto-plays cool-panned phrases locked to the same grid after ~2.5s idle, hands-free, zero permission, steps aside when a real partner joins; lazy/env-guarded Supabase client вҶ’ any failure (missing env/offline/subscribe error) falls to solo + a calm `text-amber-300/95` notice; **no DB write** (Broadcast is ephemeral pub/sub вҖ” side-effect-free) В· **no API route вҶ’ no guard** (browser connects directly; the only key is the `NEXT_PUBLIC_*` anon key, client-public by design вҖ” rules #6/#8 clean) В· **no new npm dep** (`three` + `@supabase/supabase-js` already deps); AudioContext unlocked in the Start gesture (iOS); Canvas2D pulse-ring fallback for no-WebGL; full teardown (rAF/listeners/MIDI/three.js dispose/AudioContext close/channel unsubscribe). вҡ пёҸ **Compile-verified, NOT prerender-verified** вҖ” authoritative `npm run build` compiled + type-checked + ESLint-passed cleanly, but the container's anomalous **4096 fd soft limit** killed Next's static-generation worker (`EMFILE` at "Collecting page data"); **proven environmental** вҖ” pristine `origin/main` (live on Vercel) fails identically at the identical path; shipped on green code gates + prerender-safe `"use client"` structure (only numeric constants + pure `new THREE.Color()` at module top; all browser-API/Supabase access inside handlers/effects) + the live-Vercel control (see STATE.md cycle 477). **NOT browser/device-verified** (no two phones in sandbox) вҖ” unverified by play: whether the offset/RTT lock holds across two real networks, how "locked" the quantized duet feels by ear, MIDI on a real keyboard, iOS audio unlock; the ghost + Canvas2D + solo fallbacks guarantee a sounding, locked-feeling glance regardless. Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-substrate fire; banked **`739-piano-room-relay`** вӯҗ (Supabase Realtime Broadcast direct вҖ” the reliability/frictionless sibling) + **`740-piano-room-portal`** вӯҗ (WebRTC P2P auto-signaled over Supabase вҖ” the low-latency cycle-2 of 729) as **IDEAS В§477**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/741-piano-room-pulse/README.md`

## вӯҗ Earlier (Cycle 476 вҖ” **kids** build В· DEEP, ONE memory concept via 3 scarce-renderer approaches)

- **[/dream/738-kids-song-sprout](/dream/738-kids-song-sprout)** вҖ” Song Sprout рҹҢұ. `demoable` В· Cycle 476. **For**: kids (3+) / **mic voice/hum** (analysis-only) / **three.js** glowing `Points` creature (Canvas2D fallback) / accreting compositional memory + grows-up / tender-companionship, no-groove. **What if a 4-year-old had a single glowing creature that LISTENS, REMEMBERS the little songs they hum, and slowly GROWS UP вҖ” singing their own melodies back, recombined into something new?** The lab's **FIRST long-form / stateful KIDS piece** вҖ” every other kids prototype is instant causeвҶ’effect that *resets*; this one has **memory** and **evolves over minutes** (the sprout at minute 1 вҖ” a tiny baby-blue spark, thin voice вҖ” is genuinely different at minute 5 вҖ” a big warm-gold being with a fuller vibrato'd voice singing developed versions of what it was taught). The child hums short phrases; the creature leans toward the sound, brightens, and REMEMBERS the contours; on the child's silence it SINGS BACK a reply **recombined** from remembered fragments (transpose / reorder / reverse / contour-invert / rhythm-warp + a resolving tail as it matures вҖ” an answer, never a literal echo). As memories accumulate a saturating growth curve (`1вҲ’e^(вҲ’notes/26)`) drives everything: particles 600вҶ’2600, body scale up, colour baby-blueвҶ’violetвҶ’gold, voice gains an octave + FM warmth + vibrato + longer release, drone fills out, replies come more often вҖ” with a legible life-stage label ("a tiny spark" вҶ’ "a grown song-being"). The structural answer to **JURY 2026-06-18 #3** ("reward DEPTH, build the accreting-memory ceiling, stop banking and walking away") вҖ” the adult-only long-form/evolving capability (689/704/734) brought DOWN to a kid as a *relationship*, not a toy. **mic voice/hum INPUT** (off banned touch-primary; camera-free vs the camera-heavy recent kids 727/731/724) В· **three.js OUTPUT** (scarce, 1Г— in window; off banned Canvas2D-primary + off WebGPU which is 3Г—) В· **accreting compositional-memory + call-and-response recombination TECH** (emphatically NOT a shared-clock loop/groove) В· **tender/companionship/wonder VIBE** (off banned silly-comedy). **Ambition honest 2вҖ“3/5** (`#2 + #4`, arguably `#1/#5`): **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (mic autocorrelation pitch/phrase capture + memory store & saturating-growth engine + `composeReply` recombination + growth-aware FM voice synth + three.js growing-creature renderer = 5) В· **#4** multi-cycle commitment (cycle-1 = core memory+growth+reply; cycle-2 = richer life-stages/seasons, harmonic memory, a second sprout) В· arguably **#1** (first kids piece with *compositional* memory + a maturation arc вҖ” prior kids memory [298-kids-echo-friend] is literal call-response, not recombination+growth) В· **#5** RESEARCH В§476 same-day (long-form-evolving generative frontier is adult-only вҶ’ bring it to a kid). **Kid-safe + bulletproof glance:** `master вүӨ0.3 вҶ’ lowpass 7.5k вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor(вҲ’10/20:1) вҶ’ destination`; mic **analysis-only** (never routed to destination); always-on warm drone; **ghost auto-demo** (a virtual child hums scale-shaped phrases, so the sprout listens/grows/sings hands-free on load with zero permission) on mic-deny/no-mic/idle; D-Dorian snap so it's never out of tune; AudioContext unlocked in the Start gesture (iOS); Canvas2D fallback (`fallback.ts`) for no-WebGL; full teardown (rAF/listener/three.js dispose/AudioContext close). **No API route вҶ’ no guard** (mic read in-browser only; no secret, no side effect вҖ” rules #6/#8 clean); **no CDN dependency** (three.js is a project dep). вҡ пёҸ **Compile-verified, NOT prerender-verified** вҖ” the authoritative `npm run build` compiled + type-checked + ESLint-passed cleanly, but the container's anomalous **4096 fd soft limit** killed Next's static-generation worker spawn (`EMFILE` at "Collecting page data"); **proven environmental** вҖ” pristine `origin/main` (the exact commit live on Vercel) fails identically; shipped on green code gates + prerender-safe `"use client"` structure (verified: only numeric constants + pure `new THREE.Color()` at module top, all browser-API access inside handlers/effects) + the live-Vercel control (see STATE.md cycle 476). **NOT browser-verified** (no GPU/mic/audio in sandbox) вҖ” unverified by ear/eye: whether the autocorrelation pitch tracks a small child's hum, whether the recombined replies read as *the sprout developing*, growth/reply-cadence tuning, iOS mic unlock; the ghost demo + Canvas2D fallback guarantee a sounding, growing glance regardless. Winner of a kids **DEEP** 3-renderer fire; banked **`736-kids-echo-grove`** вӯҗ (mic вҶ’ three.js accreting grove that re-sings older trees) + **`737-kids-memory-reef`** (mic вҶ’ raw WebGL2 GLSL reef that grows coral from the voice вҖ” the iOS-bulletproof sibling) as **IDEAS В§476**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/738-kids-song-sprout/README.md`

## вӯҗ Earlier (Cycle 472 вҖ” **kids** build В· WIDE, 3 divergent explorers each on a different SCARCE renderer)

- **[/dream/727-kids-color-hunt](/dream/727-kids-color-hunt)** вҖ” Color Hunt рҹҺЁ. `demoable` В· Cycle 472. **For**: kids (4+) / **camera-as-color-sampler** (analysis-only) / **WebGPU compute-shader** particle bloom (Canvas2D fallback) / cross-modal colorвҶ’harmony / wonder, no-groove. **What if a 4-year-old could point the tablet at the colors in their room and PAINT MUSIC with what they see вҖ” red things sing warm and low, sky-blue shimmers bright and high?** Each frame averages the center-region RGB of the rear camera вҶ’ HSV; **hue** selects a register-climbing consonant pentatonic chord (warm-low вҶ’ bright-high), **saturation** sets particle energy, **brightness** sets loudness + bloom openness вҖ” a slow evolving texture that re-voices on color-shift, never a beat/loop. A 12,288-particle **WebGPU WGSL compute+render bloom** takes on the room's color (first-class Canvas2D fallback with identical physics). The literal answer to **JURY 2026-06-18 #1** ("give a kid the scarce renderer вҖ” port the GPU stack to a kids piece") **and #2** ("texture/cause-effect, not a groove; vary the emotional register off silly"). **camera-color INPUT** (cross-modal вҖ” the world is the instrument; off banned touch-primary, distinct from the lab's camera-body/frame-diff/hand-tracking) В· **WebGPU OUTPUT** (scarcest+best renderer; off banned Canvas2D-primary + warming three.js) В· **cross-modal hueвҶ’consonant-chord TECH** (NOT a shared-clock loop/groove) В· **wonder/discovery VIBE** (off banned silly-comedy). **Ambition honest 2вҖ“3/5** (`#2 + #3`): **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (camera color-sampler + cross-modal hueвҶ’harmony engine + WebGPU compute bloom w/ Canvas2D fallback + ambient bed) В· **#3** named refs (**Scriabin** *clavier Г  lumiГЁres* В· **Kandinsky** color-tone theory В· **Refik Anadol** luminous fields). **#1 NOT claimed** вҖ” `317-kids-color-bells`вқӨпёҸ already pioneered camera region-color sampling; 727 *deepens that loved lineage* (Canvas2D bells вҶ’ WebGPU chord bloom; playful вҶ’ wonder). **Kid-safe + bulletproof glance:** `gain(0.3)вҶ’lowpass(7.5k)вҶ’DynamicsCompressor(вҲ’10/20:1)вҶ’destination`; always-on ambient bed; ghost hue-wheel auto-demo on camera-deny/idle (zero permissions); camera analysis-only (96Г—72 offscreen center average вҖ” nothing recorded/sent); getUserMedia inside the Start tap (iOS); full teardown. **No API route вҶ’ no guard** (camera read in-browser only; no secret, no side effect вҖ” rules #6/#8 clean); **no CDN dependency**. вҡ пёҸ **Compile-verified, NOT prerender-verified** вҖ” the authoritative `npm run build` compiled + type-checked + ESLint-passed cleanly, but the container's anomalous **4096 fd soft limit** killed Next's static-generation worker spawn (`EMFILE`); **proven environmental** вҖ” pristine `origin/main` (live on Vercel) fails identically; shipped on green code gates + prerender-safe `"use client"` structure (all browser-API access inside handlers/effects) + the live-Vercel control (see STATE.md cycle 472). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (3 scarce renderers Г— 3 off-glass inputs Г— 3 non-silly vibes); banked **`726-kids-star-scoop`** вӯҗ (MediaPipe hands вҶ’ three.js 3D star-scoop, awe) + **`725-kids-aurora-sail`** (device-tilt вҶ’ WebGL2 GLSL aurora, dreamy) as **IDEAS В§472**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/727-kids-color-hunt/README.md`

## вӯҗ Earlier (Cycle 470 вҖ” **kids** build В· WIDE, 3 divergent explorers each on a SCARCE renderer)

- **[/dream/721-kids-piano-garden](/dream/721-kids-piano-garden)** вҖ” Papa's Piano Garden рҹҢұ. `demoable` В· Cycle 470. **For**: kids (4+) / **mic-breath/hum** (analysis-only) / **WebGPU compute-shader** particle field (Canvas2D fallback) / concatenative grains of Karel's REAL piano / tender-luminous, no-groove. **What if a 4-year-old could grow a glowing garden of light by humming вҖ” and every petal is made from Karel's OWN recorded "Welcome Home" piano?** A near-dark field of luminous motes; breath ENERGY (RMS off an `AnalyserNode`) scatters more, brighter seeds + widens the bloom radius; voice PITCH (a cheap zero-crossing estimate) lifts blooms bright-and-high or settles them dark-and-low. Each bloom SOUNDS as **Hann-windowed concatenative grains of Karel's real recording**, selected by CataRT-style `selectNearest` over a (time Г— brightness) descriptor space вҖ” never a beat, never a loop, just a breathing texture. The literal fusion of **JURY 2026-06-18 #1** ("ban the 9Г— Canvas2D monoculture вҖ” port the WebGPU-compute stack *to a kids piece*; a kid deserves the scarce renderer too") **and #5** ("use Karel's real music вҖ” it's in only 1 of the last 15, all adult"). **mic-breath INPUT** (off banned touch-primary; serves KIDS.md's vocalization goal) В· **WebGPU compute OUTPUT** (the scarcest renderer, 1Г—; off banned Canvas2D-primary + warming three.js) В· **concatenative-grain-resynthesis TECH** (CataRT вҖ” emphatically NOT a shared-clock loop/groove, the jury's banned "new pentatonic") В· **tender/luminous VIBE** (off banned silly-comedy). **Ambition honest 3/5** (`#1 + #3 + #5`): **#1** first kids piece on Karel's real Paths recordings + first genuinely-iOS-shippable kids WebGPU-compute-primary (the iOS-Safari-26 WebGPU blocker just closed) В· **#3** named refs (Diemo Schwarz *CataRT* В· Refik Anadol В· WebGPU-on-iOS-26, in README) В· **#5** RESEARCH В§470 same-day (iOS-WebGPU-now-shippable IS the enabler). **Kid-safe + bulletproof glance:** real 8192-particle WGSL compute+render (buffer-usage bits hardcoded вҶ’ zero `@webgpu/types` dep) with a first-class Canvas2D fallback reproducing the identical gather-and-bloom physics; ghost-breath auto-demo on mic-deny/idle; `grain bus вҶ’ master вҶ’ lowpass(7.5k) вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor(вҲ’10/20:1) вҶ’ destination`; always-on drone; the proven 720 loader copied verbatim with an offline-tone fallback so the corpus is never empty; AudioContext + getUserMedia inside the Start gesture (iOS); full teardown. **Only network is the public `/api/audio/:id` GET (read-only) вҶ’ no api route, no `guard`** (rules #6/#8 clean); **no CDN dependency** at all. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build`, EXIT 0, **508/508** static pages, `/dream/721-kids-piano-garden` static в—Ӣ 6.97 kB). **NOT browser-verified** (no GPU/mic/audio in sandbox вҖ” unverified: WGSL compute on a real iPad [Canvas2D fallback is the likely-reviewer path], whether grains read as *blooming from his piano* by ear, the ZCR pitch proxy, iOS mic unlock; the ghost demo + Canvas2D + offline-tone fallbacks guarantee a sounding glance). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (each on a scarce renderer); banked **`722-kids-star-scoop`** вӯҗ (MediaPipe hands вҶ’ three.js 3D starfield scoop, awe) + **`723-kids-aurora-sail`** (device-tilt вҶ’ WebGL2 GLSL aurora, dreamy) as **IDEAS В§470**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/721-kids-piano-garden/README.md`

## вӯҗ Newest (Cycle 462 вҖ” **kids** build В· WIDE, 3 divergent laugh-first explorers)

- **[/dream/705-kids-silly-voice](/dream/705-kids-silly-voice)** вҖ” Silly Voice Monster рҹҺӨ. `demoable` В· Cycle 462. **For**: kids (4+) / **mic** (record + RMS, NOT pitch) / Canvas2D googly monster / pure comedy, zero scale. **What if a kid talks into the phone and a googly monster repeats it back in the silliest possible voice?** Press the giant рҹҺӨ to record ~1.8s of your own voice (`MediaRecorder`, auto-stops so kids never get stuck), then five big color-coded icon buttons replay it transformed: рҹҗҝпёҸ **chipmunk** (playbackRate 1.85) В· рҹ‘№ **monster** (0.62) В· рҹ”Ғ **backwards** (reversed Float32 buffer) В· рҹӨ– **robot** (~30Hz square ring-mod via gain modulation) В· рҹҢҠ **wobble** (6.5Hz LFO on a DelayNode). The monster's **mouth lip-syncs** to a real-time RMS envelope tapped off the master `AnalyserNode`; eyes googly-wiggle on every press; instant chipmunk auto-preview right after recording gives immediate payoff. The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-17 #5 "MAKE A KID LAUGH"** + **#1** (comedy, never a harmonic event вҖ” the kids side's banned register): a pure pitch-free **voice-CHANGER**, a genuinely fresh kids register (179/244 sing *back in-key*; this snaps to no scale at all). **mic INPUT** (a wholly different *application* from the last-10's pitch-detection [669] + spectral [704]) В· **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (off banned WebGL2) В· **buffer playback-rate + reverse + ring-mod sample-manipulation TECH** (NOT a harmonic event/voice-leading [banned 8Г—, kids]) В· **silly/googly VIBE** (off banned hushed/tender [6Г—]). **Ambition honest 2вҖ“3/5** (`#2 + #3 + #5`): **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (mic record-pipeline + 5-mode transform DSP engine + RMS analyser-driven lip-sync viz + ambient pad) В· **#3** named refs (**Outfit7 "Talking Tom"**, **Toca Boca**, varispeed/granular nod, in README) В· **#5** RESEARCH В§462 same-day (2026 Toy Fair screen-free sound-toy register + ragdoll velocity-pitch comedy). **#1 NOT claimed** (varispeed buffer manipulation exists at 18-granular/172/227 вҖ” honest). **Kid-safe + bulletproof glance:** master `gain 0.32 вҶ’ lowpass 7500Hz вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor вҶ’ destination`; ambient pad loops so it's never silent; AudioContext created/resumed inside the Start gesture (iOS); mic-denied вҶ’ friendly `text-rose-300` line + **5 pre-baked synth silly sounds** on the same big buttons so the toy still plays; no-canvas `text-rose-300` notice; full teardown (recorder/tracks/oscillators/rAF/AudioContext). **No network, no CDN, no camera, no API route вҶ’ no guard** (rules #6/#8 clean) вҖ” works instantly for any reviewer with a mic. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build`, EXIT 0, 500/500 static pages). **NOT browser-verified** (no mic/audio in sandbox вҖ” unverified by ear: whether the transforms read as laugh-out-loud silly on a real device, lip-sync timing, and iOS mic unlock; the pre-baked fallback guarantees a sounding glance even with no mic). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **`706-kids-tilt-bonk`** (tiltвҶ’bouncy-room bonkers, velocity-pitched SFX вҖ” the bulletproof no-permission sibling, вүҲ already-banked 703-boing-zoo) + **`707-kids-mega-mouth`** вӯҗ (MediaPipe face-puppet that eats falling snacks & burps вҖ” the most ambitious, most CDN-fragile) as **IDEAS В§462**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/705-kids-silly-voice/README.md`

## вӯҗ Earlier (Cycle 459 вҖ” **adult** build В· DEEP, one live-data concept via 3 renderer/metaphor approaches)

- **[/dream/699-world-forge](/dream/699-world-forge)** вҖ” World Forge рҹҢҚвңЁ. `demoable` В· Cycle 459. **For**: adult / **live external data** (the global GitHub public-events firehose) / three.js rotating globe / planetary-awe ambient. **What if you could hear and see the whole planet making things right now вҖ” every code push, star, and merge on Earth as a spark of light and a grain of sound, blooming at its place on a slowly turning globe?** Extends **JURY 2026-06-17 #4** ("683's WebSocket engine could sonify a *non-market* live stream вҖ” transit, seismic, language-usage вҖ” for free") into a fresh, keyless, free stream: the lab had sonified the market (683), wiki (437), sky (618), seismic (613/233) but **never the live worldwide act of *making***. **The instrument:** the browser polls `https://api.github.com/events` вҖ” an unauthenticated, keyless, CORS-open read-only GET (no api route, no guard, no secret) вҖ” at most once per ~78s (60 req/hr limit), then **meters** each batch of recent events (PushEvent / WatchEvent=star / PullRequest / Issue / Fork / Create) out gently across the window. Each event is one grain: its **type** picks a timbre (push = soft mallet/bell, star = bright shimmer, PR = warm swell, issue = muted tom, fork/create = low bloom), a stable **repo-hash** picks a pitch in a drifting **D-Dorian** mode (same repo вҶ’ same note), and a rolling 12s **rate window** swells a generative drone's density/brightness + the planet's glow. A three.js auto-rotating dark Earth (procedural graticule + scattered land-ish dots, **no external textures**) blooms an additive light at each event's deterministic pseudo geo-location (hashed from repo+actor вҖ” texture, not GIS), panned by **longitude** via `StereoPannerNode`. **live-external-data INPUT** (off jury-banned touch-primary [5Г—]) В· **three.js OUTPUT** (renderer-coolest of the 3 candidates: 2Г— in rolling-10; off banned WebGL2 [4Г—] + banned audio-first-SVG [5Г—], off just-used WebGPU [683] + Canvas2D-warming [3Г—вҶ’would-be-4Г—]) В· **live-data sonification вҶ’ generative ambient drone + per-event voices TECH** (a living texture, emphatically NOT a harmonic-event/voice-leading cadence [banned 8Г—]) В· **planetary-awe VIBE** (off banned hushed/tender [6Г—]). **Ambition honest 2/5** (`#2 + #3`): **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (live-feed + synthetic-fallback engine + rolling-aggregate state + generative drone/event synth + three.js globe = 4) + **#3** named refs (**Hatnote "Listen to Wikipedia"** вҖ” LaPorte & Hashemi, the canonical live collaborative-creation firehose sonification; **github.audio**; **Brian Foo** *Data-Driven DJ*; **Refik Anadol** planetary data-as-light вҖ” all in README); **#1 NOT claimed** (live-data sonification exists in the lab at 683/437/618 вҖ” honest). **Research-first chain (RESEARCH В§459, same-day, path a):** the dive selected the GitHub firehose as the unbuilt free stream + confirmed the Hatnote/Foo lineage + verified the keyless-CORS feasibility that makes the fire free + unattended-safe. **Bulletproof glance (critical for unattended 06:30 review):** a **synthetic event generator** (weighted realistic distribution вҖ” pushes common, stars frequent, PRs/issues/forks rarer) starts the instant you press Begin with **zero network**, so the planet sparks and the drone breathes immediately; it upgrades to **live** on the first successful poll (emerald) and falls back to synthetic on **any** error вҖ” 403/rate-limit/CORS/offline вҖ” with a `text-amber-300/95` notice; **no WebGL/three.js вҶ’ a Canvas2D starfield-with-blooms fallback** so the glance is never blank. **Ear-safe:** `event voices + drone вҶ’ masterGain вүӨ0.34 вҶ’ lowpass вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor вҶ’ destination`; iOS AudioContext created/resumed inside the Begin gesture. Full unmount teardown (feed stop, `renderer.dispose()`, audio close). **No API route вҶ’ no guard** (pure client keyless public GET; no secret, no side effect вҖ” rules #6/#8 clean). No new npm deps (`three` already a dep, dynamic-imported). **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build`). **NOT browser-verified** (no GPU/audio/network in sandbox вҖ” unverified by eye/ear: whether WebGL renders the globe + blooms on Karel's device, whether GitHub's CORS behaves as documented at runtime, whether typeвҶ’timbre/repoвҶ’pitch reads as "the planet making things" on real speakers, and iOS audio unlock; the synthetic-first feed + Canvas2D fallback guarantee a live, sounding glance regardless). Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-approach fire on ONE live-firehose concept: banked **`701-living-coral`** вӯҗ (the world's creation **accreting** onto a luminous DLA reef, *fuller at minute 5 than minute 1* вҖ” long-form memory made visible; WebGPU/WGSL + Canvas2D fallback вҖ” the directest "reach for the ceiling," echoes 689) + **`700-commit-rain`** (the **Ikeda** austere take вҖ” events as falling data-rain grains + monospace labels; Canvas2D) as **IDEAS В§459**. Design notes: `src/app/dream/699-world-forge/README.md`

## (Cycle 458 вҖ” **kids** build В· WIDE, 3 divergent silly/groove/off-glass explorers)

- **[/dream/696-kids-mouth-band](/dream/696-kids-mouth-band)** вҖ” Mouth Band рҹҺӨрҹҘҒ. `demoable` В· Cycle 458. **For**: kids (4+) / mic vocal-percussion (analysis-only) / Canvas2D goofy creature / silly-comedy groove. **What if a 4-year-old could build a silly drum beat just by making MOUTH NOISES вҖ” boom, tss, pop, brrr вҖ” and a goofy creature caught each one, looped it, and bopped to it?** The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-17 #5** ("MAKE A KID LAUGH вҖ” the silly/funny pole is now 0Г—, the kids side has gone uniformly solemn") and **#1** ("groove, not a cadence вҖ” the harmonic-event/voice-leading technique is the new pentatonic, banned on the kids side for a week"). **The instrument:** the mic feeds an `AnalyserNode` (analysis only вҖ” never recorded/stored/sent); a per-frame **RMS energy-onset gate** (rise over recent average + noise floor + ~110ms refractory) catches each mouth-noise, then a **spectral-centroid + low/mid/high band-fraction** heuristic classifies it into 4 color-coded silly drum voices вҖ” **KICK/"boom"** (red), **SNARE/"pop"** (yellow, the safe catch-all), **HIHAT/"tss"** (cyan), **BRRR/raspberry** (purple). Each onset fires its punchy synth immediately (sub-35ms target) **and** quantizes into a 16-step loop replayed by a Chris-Wilson look-ahead scheduler at 100 BPM вҖ” so a few mouth noises become a repeating beat. A big cartoon mouth-creature opens wide, bugs its eyes, squashes/bounces and flashes the voice color on every hit; a bottom step-strip shows the loop with a moving playhead. **mic / vocal-percussion INPUT** (off the jury-banned touch-primary [5Г—]; serves KIDS.md's explicit *vocalization* goal) В· **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (jury noted Canvas2D's ban "worked cleanly," 4Г—вҶ’2Г—, now a cold/safe renderer; off banned WebGL2 [4Г—] + banned audio-first-SVG [5Г—]) В· **real-time vocal-percussion onset+spectral-classification вҶ’ looping groove TECH** (a real groove, emphatically NOT a harmonic event / voice-leading [banned 8Г—, 6Г— on kids]) В· **silly/comedy/bright-primary VIBE** (off banned hushed/tender [6Г—]; the *subject is a joke and a beat*, not a cadence). **Ambition honest 2/5** (`#2 + #3`, with a qualified #1): **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (mic onset+centroid classifier + look-ahead loop/groove scheduler + comedy drum synth + Canvas2D creature = 4) + **#3** named refs (**Incredibox**; **Hazan & Stowell**, *Delayed Decision-making in Real-time Beatbox Percussion Classification*, JNMR 2010; the **AVP dataset**, Mehrabi et al., Audio Mostly 2019 вҖ” all in README); **#1 qualified** (first real-time vocal-percussion *classification into drum voices* in the lab вҖ” "spectral centroid" exists only in visualizers [246/285/19], not as a beatbox classifier). **Research-first chain (RESEARCH В§458, same-day, path a):** the dive surfaced Incredibox + the beatbox-onset-classification literature вҶ’ the recipe *is* this prototype's classifier. **Kid-safe chain:** `voices вҶ’ masterGain(0.28) вҶ’ lowpass(7.5kHz) вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor(-10, 20:1, fast attack вҖ” brick-wall limiter) вҶ’ destination`; always-on soft ambient bed so it never feels broken; the analyser is *not* wired to output (no echo of the child's voice). **Robustness (bulletproof 06:30 glance):** **mic denied/unavailable вҶ’ a ghost auto-beatboxes a silly groove** into the loop on its own (still funny + grooving) with a `text-rose-300` notice; mic-on-but-idle >2.5s вҶ’ an auto-demo lick; so a sensorless/silent glance is always alive and sounding. iOS AudioContext + getUserMedia both requested inside the START gesture (AGC/noise-suppression disabled to keep onsets crisp). Full unmount teardown (rAF cancel, scheduler timer cleared, mic tracks stopped, AudioContext closed). **No API route вҶ’ no guard** (pure client Web Audio + Canvas2D; no network call, no secret, no side effect). No new npm deps. **Build-verified** (winner-only authoritative `npm run build` **exit 0, вң“ Compiled successfully in 43s, вң“ Generating static pages (495/495)** [494 from cycle 457 + 696 = 495, confirming non-winners 697/698 absent], `/dream/696-kids-mouth-band 4.65 kB / 111 kB` prerendered static в—Ӣ). **NOT browser-verified** (no mic/audio in sandbox вҖ” unverified by ear: whether the 4-bucket classifier reliably tells a child's "boom" from "brrr" and "pop" from "tss" on real device mics [mitigated: wide thresholds + mid-burst SNARE default so misclassification still sounds musical, never "wrong"], onset-gate sensitivity per device mic gain, and iOS unlock; the ghost auto-beatbox + ambient bed guarantee a live, sounding glance regardless). **Honest limit:** a heuristic spectral classifier on untrained 4-year-old mouth noises *will* misfire at the KICK/BRRR and SNARE/HIHAT boundaries вҖ” by design nothing reads as a failure (every hit is a drum, the beat keeps grooving). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (three off-glass silly/groove machines, different embodied input Г— renderer Г— comedy mechanic): banked **`698-kids-dance-mirror`** вӯҗ (dance in front of the webcam вҶ’ a DOM/CSS character mirrors & exaggerates you + **freeze-dance comedy**; camera analysis-only вҖ” the directest "get off the glass," revives the jury-named abandoned 652 dance register, freshest DOM/CSS renderer) + **`697-kids-shake-circus`** (shake the tablet вҶ’ a three.js jelly clown squashes/boings + confetti POP; Pixar squash-&-stretch) as **IDEAS В§458**.
