## (Cycle 353 вҖ” adult build В· DEEP, one LISTENING-A-LIFE concept via 3 renderers; winner makes the lab's emergent-harmony garden **LISTEN to real piano** вҖ” cycle 3 of the a-life/JI thread, stacking the two *expensive* ambition criteria the jury said are nearly absent)

- **[/dream/414-conchordal-listen](/dream/414-conchordal-listen)** вҖ” Conchordal Listen рҹҺј. `demoable` В· Cycle 353. **The living chord that LISTENS вҖ” play piano and a self-composing pure-intonation harmony grows itself *around what you play*.** Cycle 1 (`410-conchordal-garden`) was the lab's first **artificial-life audio piece** вҖ” sound-organisms forage a continuous PlompвҖ“Levelt consonance landscape and emergent just intonation arises *in a vacuum*, no scale ever specified. This cycle adds the missing third leg: **a "listen" subsystem** so the organisms forage around the pitches of *real audio*. Tap **"в–¶ Self-play demo"** and within ~2 s an internal gentle JI piano phrase begins; amber SVG "sunlight wells" bloom at the heard pitches and 28вҖ“40 microtonal flower-organisms visibly drift toward them, assembling pure intervals (octaves, fifths, just-thirds) around the phrase вҖ” **hands-free, so the 06:30 phone reviewer sees+hears it self-organize untouched.** Or tap **"рҹҺ№ Play piano"** to feed a live mic, or paste a **Welcome Home recording ID** to forage around Karel's real piano (the `163-paths-visualizer` `/api/audio/{id}` pattern; graceful `text-rose-300` error, demo keeps running). **Why it matters:** the JURY 2026-06-07's loudest call (#3) was *"deepen, don't defer вҖ” stack the EXPENSIVE criteria #4 multi-cycle + #5 recent research, extend a thread instead of opening a fresh explorer."* This is exactly that: **cycle 3** of the JI/roughness/a-life thread (404 adaptive-JI вҶ’ 410 emergent-JI вҶ’ **414 listening-JI**), and it honors Karel's standing **real-music directive** (use his actual *Welcome Home* tracks as input). Five subsystems: (1) **`engine.ts вҶ’ plRoughness`** вҖ” the **PlompвҖ“Levelt 1965** critical-band roughness curve `aвӮҒaвӮӮ(e^{-3.5sx}вҲ’e^{-5.75sx})`, summed over all partial-pairs against *both* the heard spectrum and the other organisms; (2) **a-life organism sim** вҖ” each organism is an additive Web-Audio voice at a *continuous* microtonal pitch (no fixed scale, **no D-Dorian**) foraging via **MetropolisвҖ“Hastings** pitch moves (accept-if-better, accept-worse with `exp(вҲ’О”F/T)`, T cooling) toward lower roughness + a harmonicity bonus to the strongest heard partial; consonant organisms thrive, chronically dissonant ones die and **re-seed near heard partials**; (3) **the listen subsystem (the cycle-3 addition)** вҖ” `extractFftPeaks` finds the top ~4 spectral peaks (robust for polyphonic piano вҖ” *no* full in-browser transcription, per musicalboard.com 2026-05-05) and `detectFundamental` adds one monophonic fвӮҖ via **MPM/autocorrelation** (McLeod & Wyvill 2005) with parabolic interpolation; these become the landscape's attractor wells; (4) **Kuramoto phase coupling** (`Оёбөў += dtВ·(Пүбөў + KВ·ОЈвұј sin(ОёвұјвҲ’Оёбөў))`, K=1.5) over mutually-consonant voices so a discovered chord *breathes together* (empirical backing: consonance increases interpersonal phase sync вҖ” **PMC11534602, 2024**); (5) **audio chain** вҖ” additive voices вҶ’ master вҶ’ ConvolverNode reverb + **DynamicsCompressor brick-wall limiter** (вҲ’6 dB, ratio 12) so it can never clip or blast. **Renderer: inline SVG** (dodges the JURY-banned raw-WebGL2/three.js *and* the now-over-represented Canvas2D вүҘ5Г— in the last 10): amber radial-gradient wells at heard pitches, 5вҖ“8-petal blooms that open with health and pulse with Kuramoto phase, swaying BГ©zier stems, consonant-pair connection threads, and a legible HUD (heard-pitch note names + a mean-consonance meter that climbs as harmony settles). **Degrades gracefully:** `AudioContext` created inside the Start tap (autoplay-safe); mic denied/absent вҶ’ readable `text-rose-300` notice + the self-play demo still runs (never blank); failed recording fetch вҶ’ readable error, demo continues. No API route, no `guard` (Web Audio + SVG, all client-side; mic is analysis-only вҖ” never recorded/uploaded; the only network call is a read-only fetch of the existing prod `/api/audio/{id}` route, try/catch-wrapped). Zero new deps. **Ambition 4/5**: вүҘ3-subsystems(#2, input-analysis + PlompвҖ“Levelt landscape + a-life sim + Kuramoto + synth = 5) + named-reference(#3, **Conchordal arXiv:2603.25637** В· **PlompвҖ“Levelt 1965** В· **McLeod MPM 2005** В· **PMC11534602 2024**) + **multi-cycle-commitment(#4 вҖ” the EXPENSIVE criterion, cycle 3 of a deliberate thread)** + **current-quarter-research(#5 borderline вҖ” musicalboard.com 2026-05-05, ~34d, the freshest concrete client-buildable anchor in ~10 dives)**. **Diversity** (vs JURY 2026-06-07 bans + the Canvas2D over-rep): **audio/mic-listen INPUT** (fresh, non-banned) В· **SVG OUTPUT** (NOT WebGL2, NOT three.js, NOT the over-represented Canvas2D) В· **input-conditioned a-life consonance-foraging TECHNIQUE** (cycle-3 extension) В· **emergent no-fixed-scale microtonal VIBE** (NOT D-Dorian). Winner of a **DEEP** 3-renderer fire (one concept вҖ” *a living chord that listens to your piano* вҖ” three renderer/metaphor attacks); siblings `415-conchordal-orbit` (the same listening engine on an **SVG log-spiral pitch space** where one turn = an octave, so emergent pure intervals snap into recurring color-coded geometric constellations вҖ” the "geometry of harmony" take) + `416-conchordal-aura` (the same engine in **pure DOM/CSS** glow-blobs, no canvas/SVG вҖ” the renderer-diversity wildcard) build-reviewed and banked in IDEAS В§353. **Build-verified, NOT browser-verified** (no mic/audio in this sandbox) вҖ” unverified surface: whether the heard-pitch wells *perceptibly* pull the population into "harmony around your playing" vs. a generic settle within the first minute (the attraction/metabolism/Metropolis constants are first-guess), whether real polyphonic piano's FFT peaks give clean enough wells (the central bet), the mic getUserMedia + iOS AudioContext gesture path, whether an actual `/api/audio/{id}` recording loads + decodes through MediaElementSource in prod (the real-music door is unverified here), and per-frame SVG rebuild perf at ~40 organisms on a low-end tablet. Design notes: `src/app/dream/414-conchordal-listen/README.md`

## (Cycle 352 вҖ” kids build В· DEEP, one ARTICULATORY-MIRROR concept via 3 renderers; winner is the lab's first formant-to-tongue **articulatory-inversion** toy + its first use of real **LPC** formant tracking вҖ” a child sings a vowel and *sees inside the mouth*)

- **[/dream/413-kids-mouth-mirror](/dream/413-kids-mouth-mirror)** вҖ” The Magic X-Ray Mouth Mirror рҹ‘„. `demoable` В· Cycle 352. **For kids 4+ вҖ” sing a vowel and SEE INSIDE the mouth: a friendly side-view cartoon head whose tongue, jaw, and lips physically move to the shape your voice implies, then sings the vowel back.** Tap **Start рҹҺӨ**, sing a long `aaah` / `eee` / `ooo` and watch the paper-cream animal head (drawn in cross-section, facing left) glide its articulators in real time вҖ” `aaah` drops the jaw and flattens the tongue low-and-back; `eee` nearly closes the jaw and pushes the tongue high-and-front; `ooo` purses the lips and pulls the tongue back. A little **vowel-quadrilateral inset** plots where your tongue is; after ~1.2 s of quiet the head **sings your vowel back** in a dreamy **whole-tone** voice. **The lab's first articulatory-inversion toy and its first use of real LPC formant tracking.** This answers JURY 2026-06-07 **provocation #6** head-on ("a *kids* listening/analysis toy вҖ” a child sings, the machine shows what it heard вҖ” would break both macro-ruts in one fire") and feeds the standing legible/instructional lane: it's the AURORA formant-to-tongue-inversion idea done **literally** (you see the tongue, not a flat color) and it fixes the exact gap the lab's prior vowel piece `393-kids-vowel-color` flagged вҖ” 393 used crude FFT peak-picking and its own README concedes that is **unreliable precisely for children's high voices** (wide harmonic spacing makes the "formant" peak land on whichever harmonic falls in-band). Three subsystems: (1) **`lpc.ts`** вҖ” real **Linear Predictive Coding**: pre-emphasis (0.97) вҶ’ Hamming window вҶ’ autocorrelation вҶ’ **LevinsonвҖ“Durbin recursion (order 14)** вҶ’ evaluate the all-pole spectral envelope on a frequency grid вҶ’ peak-pick **F1** (~250вҖ“900 Hz) and **F2** (~900вҖ“2800 Hz) with parabolic interpolation вҶ’ **articulatory inversion** to (jaw, tongue-height вҲқ 1/F1, tongue-frontness вҲқ F2, lip-rounding вҲқ low-F2) вҶ’ Оұ=0.15 exponential smoothing вҶ’ PetersonвҖ“Barney nearest-vowel label. LPC models the *vocal-tract filter* independent of pitch, which is exactly why it survives a child's f0 where FFT peak-picking fails; (2) **`page.tsx`** вҖ” an all-**SVG** side-profile head whose tongue-body path, jaw, and lip curves are rebuilt every frame from the *raw smoothed* (F1,F2) so the articulators **glide continuously**, never snapping between 5 fixed poses, plus the vowel-quadrilateral dot, a big readable vowel label, and a live F1/F2 readout; (3) **`synth.ts`** вҖ” a **whole-tone** sing-back (C-D-E-F#-G#) shaped through **two bandpass filters tuned to the heard F1/F2** so the machine actually *sounds* like the vowel, soft attack/release, idle-breath pad, everything вҶ’ master gain вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter so it can never blast small ears. The mic feeds an `AnalyserNode` **only** вҖ” never recorded, routed to speakers, or transmitted. **Degrades gracefully:** mic denied/absent вҶ’ readable `text-rose-300` notice + a hands-free **attract mode** that cycles the head through /a/вҶ’/e/вҶ’/i/вҶ’/o/вҶ’/u/ (moving the tongue + singing each) so a no-mic 06:30 phone reviewer sees+hears the whole call-and-response within a few seconds; with mic, ~4 s of silence drifts to a gentle idle breath; `AudioContext` created inside the Start tap (autoplay-safe). **No WebGL2, no three.js, no Canvas2D** (SVG only вҖ” dodges both the JURY-banned GPU renderers and the now-over-represented Canvas2D). No API route, no `guard` (Web Audio + SVG, all client-side; no camera, no network, no recording, no secrets). Zero new deps. **Ambition 3/5**: never-used-technique(#1, **real LPC / LevinsonвҖ“Durbin formant tracking + articulatory inversion** вҖ” grep-verified lab-first; 393 used FFT peak-picking and explicitly lacked LPC) + вүҘ3-subsystems(#2, LPC formant tracker + articulatory-inversion SVG renderer + formant-shaped whole-tone sing-back) + named-reference(#3, **AURORA formant-to-tongue inversion, arXiv:2603.17543, Mar 2026** В· **Peterson & Barney 1952** В· the **vowel-quadrilateral / IPA articulatory model** В· **LevinsonвҖ“Durbin / Fant 1960 sourceвҖ“filter**). **Diversity** (vs JURY 2026-06-07 bans + the Canvas2D watch): **mic-voice INPUT** (breaks the banned touch/tap reflex) В· **SVG OUTPUT** (NOT raw-WebGL2, NOT three.js, NOT Canvas2D) В· **LPC-articulatory-inversion TECHNIQUE** (lab-first) В· **whole-tone VIBE** (NOT D-Dorian, NOT C-pentatonic). Crosses **JURY #6** вҖ” a kids *listening/analysis* toy (breaks the kids emergence-sim reflex). Winner of a **DEEP** 3-renderer fire (one concept вҖ” *a creature that physically copies your mouth from a sung vowel and sings it back* вҖ” three attacks); siblings `411-kids-copycat-mouth` (front-facing SVG clay creature, **LPC**, just-intonation вҖ” the warmest/most kid-delightful, cleanest modular code) + `412-kids-vowel-puppet` (Canvas2D gooey clay puppet, **cepstral** formant extraction, gamelan slendro вҖ” the distinct-technique A/B) build-reviewed and banked in IDEAS В§352. **Build-verified, NOT browser-verified** (no mic/audio in this sandbox) вҖ” unverified surface: whether real children's voices track cleanly on the F1/F2 bands (LPC order/band edges are first-guess and the central bet of the whole piece), whether the moving tongue reads as *delightful* vs *clinical* at a 06:30 phone glance, the silence-gate timing for sing-back in a noisy room, and iOS Safari AudioContext gesture-unlock. Design notes: `src/app/dream/413-kids-mouth-mirror/README.md`

## (Cycle 351 вҖ” adult build В· DEEP, one EMERGENT-HARMONY concept via 3 renderers; winner is the lab's first ARTIFICIAL-LIFE / a-life audio piece where a chord is alive and discovers just intonation with no scale specified)

- **[/dream/410-conchordal-garden](/dream/410-conchordal-garden)** вҖ” Conchordal Garden. `demoable` В· Cycle 351. **The lab's first ARTIFICIAL-LIFE audio piece вҖ” a chord that's *alive*. A garden of ~24 sound-organisms drifts through continuous pitch space hunting consonance; the ones that find it bloom and grow loud, the ones that clash wilt and die, and a self-composing just-intonation-like harmony *emerges with no scale ever specified* вҖ” genuinely different at minute 5 than minute 0.** Tap **Start Garden** (it plays itself вҖ” no interaction needed) and watch: each organism is a sustained additive voice plotted by pitch on the vertical log axis (130вҖ“780 Hz). A **PlompвҖ“Levelt roughness** model (the standard `aвӮҒaвӮӮ(e^{-3.5x} вҲ’ e^{-5.75x})` critical-band curve summed over 5 partials per voice) plus a **harmonicity bonus** for proximity to small-integer ratios (1/1, 9/8, 6/5, 5/4, 4/3, 3/2, 5/3, 2/1) defines a continuous **consonance fitness landscape**; each organism proposes small Gaussian pitch moves (Вұ15Вў) and accepts them **greedily-or-via-Metropolis** if dissonance drops, with a **crowding penalty** so they don't pile onto one note. **Metabolism**: consonant organisms gain health (bloom: petals open, glow brightens), persistently rough ones lose it and **die** (wilt, red dissonance ring, fade out); healthy ones **reproduce** (a seed sprouts nearby), so the garden self-sustains and re-seeds if it crashes. **Kuramoto phase coupling** synchronizes the amplitude tremolo + visual breathing among consonant clusters, so a discovered chord visibly/audibly **pulses together** вҖ” the "togetherness" payoff. Rendered in **inline animated SVG** (radial-gradient blooms, glow auras, curved vine-threads between consonant pairs that pulse with shared phase, Kuramoto-swayed stems) вҖ” **no Canvas2D, no WebGL/three.js**. Audio = additive sine voices (gain вҲқ health Г— tremolo, frequency **glides** via `setTargetAtTime`) вҶ’ synthetic-IR `ConvolverNode` reverb вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` limiter; calm, ambient, never harsh. Optional **click-to-plant** a seed at a chosen pitch (NOT required вҖ” the piece is fully autonomous). Live stats: elapsed time, population, **mean-consonance** climbing as the garden self-organizes. **Degrades gracefully:** no Web Audio вҶ’ readable `text-rose-300` notice + the visual ecosystem keeps running silently. No API route, no `guard` (Web Audio + SVG, all client-side; no mic/camera/network/recording/secrets). Zero new deps. **Ambition 4/5**: never-used-technique(#1, **artificial-life consonance-foraging / agents that survive on consonance** вҖ” grep-verified lab-first; the lab has *fixed-ratio* JI (397/400) and *adaptive* JI (404) but never an *emergent, scale-free, evolutionary* harmony) + вүҘ3-subsystems(#2, PlompвҖ“Levelt fitness-landscape engine + a-life organism life-sim + Kuramoto coupling + additive Web-Audio synth + SVG garden render = 5) + multi-cycle(#4, **cycle 2 of the JI/roughness thread** that 404вҶ’405 opened вҖ” promotes roughness from a *readout* to the *physics that drives the population*; designed to deepen with Karel's real piano as future organisms) + recent-research(#5, **"Conchordal: Emergent Harmony via Direct Cognitive Coupling in a Psychoacoustic Landscape," arXiv:2603.25637, submitted 2026-03-26** вҖ” current-quarter, directly on-technique; honest caveat: ~74 days, not strictly <30, so claimed as **borderline/current-quarter**, the freshest on-technique anchor in ~9 dives). **Stacks the two *expensive* criteria (#4 + #5) the jury said are nearly absent**, and crosses **jury #6** вҖ” it's an *adult emergence-sim sonified as a generative form*, breaking the adult-analysis-engine reflex. **Diversity** (vs JURY 2026-06-07 bans + the now-over-represented Canvas2D): **autonomous-generative INPUT** (NOT MIDI/keyboard, NOT touch-as-instrument) В· **inline-SVG OUTPUT** (NOT raw-WebGL2, NOT three.js, **NOT Canvas2D** вҖ” which appeared вүҘ4Г— in the last 10 shipped, so it was banned by the diversity audit this cycle) В· **a-life consonance-foraging TECHNIQUE** (lab-first) В· **emergent microtonal, no-fixed-scale VIBE** (NOT D-Dorian, NOT C-pentatonic вҖ” the literal antidote to the jury's #2). Winner of a **DEEP** 3-renderer fire (one concept вҖ” *a chord that is alive, foraging a psychoacoustic landscape* вҖ” three visual attacks); siblings `409-conchordal-field` (the same a-life engine rendered as a **Canvas2D dissonance heatmap** вҖ” agents settle into glowing consonance *valleys*; the most faithful realization of the paper's "psychoacoustic landscape") + `411-conchordal-spiral` (the same engine on a **Canvas2D log-spiral** where one turn = an octave, so emergent pure fifths/thirds snap into recurring color-coded geometric constellations) build-reviewed and banked in IDEAS В§351. **Build-verified, NOT browser-verified** (no audio hardware in this sandbox) вҖ” unverified surface: whether the emergent chord *perceptibly* reads as "settling from chaos into consonance" by ear on phone speakers within the first minute, whether the population finds stable JI intervals or wanders (the metabolism/Metropolis/coupling constants are first-guess), per-frame SVG `innerHTML` rebuild perf at ~36 organisms on a low-end tablet, and the iOS AudioContext gesture-unlock path. Design notes: `src/app/dream/410-conchordal-garden/README.md`

## (Cycle 350 вҖ” kids build В· DEEP, one long-form-STATEFUL concept via 3 renderers; winner is the lab's first BREATH-GROWN LONG-FORM piece that *remembers every breath* + replays its own growth)

- **[/dream/408-kids-breath-grove](/dream/408-kids-breath-grove)** вҖ” Breath Grove. `demoable` В· Cycle 350. **The lab's first LONG-FORM STATEFUL kids piece: breathe slowly and a glowing tree grows branch-by-branch over a few minutes вҖ” and because it *remembers every breath*, you can tap "replay" and watch the whole grove's growth race by in seconds.** Tap the big Begin button (or just wait вҖ” it auto-demos) and breathe out: a mic **RMS breath-envelope** detector (smoothed RMS + an **auto-calibrating noise-floor EMA** so a quiet child still crosses the gate; analysis-only, never recorded/uploaded) fires ONE event per exhale, carrying its duration + strength. Each exhale feeds an **L-system-inspired recursive-branching grove** (`grove.ts`): early breaths sprout saplings, later ones extend tips and **split branches** (split probability + length scale with breath strength), maturing branches accrete leaves вҶ’ flowers вҶ’ embers. Every segment and blossom is stamped with the **breath index that created it**, so the grove carries genuine memory вҖ” and a deterministic xorshift RNG seeded per session means `buildTimelapse()` can faithfully **rebuild the entire growth history from the recorded breaths** for the replay. A 4-stage arc driven by cumulative breath count gates the look: **(1, breaths 1вҖ“4)** bare saplings rise В· **(2, 5вҖ“9)** branches split, first leaves В· **(3, 10вҖ“14)** blossoms open, fireflies drift among the branches В· **(4, 15+)** the night sky deepens to violet, a moon + aurora glow, the grove is full. Audio (`audio.ts`) is a **pelog-like INHARMONIC** drone вҖ” 5 stage-gated sine voices (55 / 82.41 / 110 / 164.81 / 185 Hz, each bent 8вҖ“22Вў off 12-TET with a per-voice vibrato LFO + a soft 2nd-partial) that **thicken voice-by-voice as the grove grows**, plus a per-exhale **inharmonic bell bloom** (partials 1 : 2.756 : 5.404 вҖ” a real metallophone-like spectrum, not a harmonic tone), all through a **`DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter** at low master gain so it can never blast small ears (KIDS-safe: no harsh transients, never silent). Renderer is **Canvas2D** (DPR/resize-aware; background gradient + aurora + moon + stars + glow-pass branches + leaves/flowers/embers + drifting fireflies) вҖ” **no WebGL/three.js** (the jury's standing output ban). **Degrades + auto-demos:** deny/ignore the mic вҶ’ readable `text-rose-300` notice + an **auto-demo** that fires synthetic breaths every ~3.2s (also auto-triggers after 8s of mic silence) so the full arc grows hands-free and reaches **Stage 4 in ~48s** вҖ” a 06:30 phone reviewer sees grassвҶ’groveвҶ’moon and the timelapse replay with zero permission; provenance badge shows emerald "Listening рҹҺӨ" vs amber "Auto-demo (breathing)". No API route, no `guard` (Web Audio mic-analysis + Canvas2D, all client-side; no recording/upload/network/secrets). Zero new deps. **Ambition 3/5**: вүҘ3-subsystems(#2, breath-RMS detector + L-system grove state-machine + Canvas2D renderer + pelog drone/bell synth = 4) + **multi-cycle / long-form-STATEFUL(#4, the *expensive* criterion the jury said is nearly absent вҖ” the grove is genuinely different at minute 3 than minute 0, accretes indefinitely, and the timelapse makes the "remembers every breath" thesis literal)** + named-reference(#3, **L-systems (Aristid Lindenmayer)** recursive branching В· **pelog / Indonesian gamelan inharmonic tuning** В· Brian Eno generative-ambient lineage). Honest #5: no <30-day client-buildable hit this dive (the dive surfaced the live 2026 generative-ambient + guided-breathing wave as supporting context, soundverse 2026 / isotonik generative-worldscape вҖ” but no dated technique anchor), so #5 is **not** claimed. **Diversity** (vs JURY 2026-06-07 bans): **breath-RMS INPUT** (NOT MIDI/keyboard, NOT touch/tap) В· **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (NOT raw-WebGL2, NOT three.js) В· **L-system-grove / breath-accretion TECHNIQUE** (lab-first) В· **pelog long-form-stateful VIBE** (NOT D-Dorian, NOT C-pentatonic) вҖ” and it directly stacks the categorical menu's thin **"long-form generative вҖ” state, memory, evolution, not loops"** shelf. Winner of a **DEEP** 3-renderer fire (one concept вҖ” *your breathing grows a night-garden that remembers every breath* вҖ” three technical attacks); siblings `407-kids-breath-garden` (the canonical **inline-SVG** meadow: grass вҶ’ swaying flowers вҶ’ fireflies вҶ’ crescent-moon violet sky вҖ” the most legible literal-imagery bedtime read) + `409-kids-breath-tidepool` (a **pure DOM/CSS** bioluminescent reef: each breath blooms a glowing anemone/jellyfish/plankton that pulses forever вҖ” extreme renderer diversity) build-reviewed and banked in IDEAS В§350. **Build-verified, NOT browser-verified** (no audio/mic hardware in this sandbox) вҖ” unverified surface: whether the pelog detuning reads as "warm + other" vs merely "out of tune" on phone speakers, whether a quiet child's exhale reliably crosses the auto-calibrated gate on a real phone mic in a bedroom, the iOS AudioContext gesture-unlock path, and per-frame Canvas2D redraw perf as branch/blossom counts grow on a low-end tablet. Design notes: `src/app/dream/408-kids-breath-grove/README.md`

## (Cycle 349 вҖ” adult build В· DEEP, one fresh foreign-tonal concept via 3 approaches; winner is the lab's first ADAPTIVE / DYNAMIC just-intonation piece)

- **[/dream/404-comma-pump](/dream/404-comma-pump)** вҖ” Comma Pump. `demoable` В· Cycle 349. **The lab's first piece in ADAPTIVE (dynamic) just intonation вҖ” and a piece of music that, by mathematical necessity, can never come home.** Press **Start**: an autonomous, slow, soft pad-progression `I вҶ’ IV вҶ’ ii вҶ’ V вҶ’ I` plays, but unlike the lab's earlier *fixed-ratio* JI pieces (394/397/400) every chord is voiced from PURE 5-limit ratios above a root that is itself reached by PURE interval *root motions* (Г—4/3, Г—5/6, Г—4/3, Г—2/3). The product of one full loop is exactly **80/81** вҖ” the **syntonic comma** вҖ” so the tonic sinks вүҲ **вҲ’21.5 Вў per cycle, indefinitely**: a long-form **stateful** drift where minute 5 sits audibly flat of minute 1 (вүҲ a whole tone down after ~15 min). The Canvas2D **"pitch river"** scrolls time leftвҶ’right over a log-frequency axis; a dim blue line marks the original home tonic (A3 = 220 Hz, fixed forever) and a bright violet line marks the current drifting root вҖ” you literally *watch home sink away from the music*, with a live **cents-from-home** counter. The payoff control is **JI вҮ„ 12-TET**: flip to equal temperament and every voice snaps to the nearest tempered pitch вҖ” the drift stops (ET *tempers out* the comma) but you immediately hear the **beating** of impure thirds (400Вў vs the pure 386Вў) and fifths; flip back and the chords lock beat-free. A **tempo** slider scales the harmonic rhythm without touching the tuning math. Synth = additive pad (5 sine/triangle partials per voice) вҶ’ `ConvolverNode` reverb вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter (never blasts). No mic/camera/MIDI/touch-as-instrument, **no WebGL/three.js** (Canvas2D only), no API route, no `guard` (pure client-side Web Audio + Canvas2D; no network/recording/secrets). Zero new deps. **Ambition 3/5**: never-used-technique(#1, **adaptive/dynamic JI + comma-pump drift** вҖ” grep-verified lab-first; prior JI is fixed-ratio, and 37-ratio-lab is a *static* click Tonnetz) + вүҘ3-subsystems(#2, adaptive 5-limit tuner + generative progression scheduler + additive pad/reverb/limiter synth + Canvas2D scrolling river) + named-reference(#3, **syntonic comma / comma pump (81/80)** В· **Pivotuner arXiv:2306.03873** adaptive real-time JI В· **Ben Johnston / Harry Partch** В· **La Monte Young, *The Well-Tuned Piano***). Honest #5: no <30-day client-buildable hit again (the dive widened to the AI-music/hardware changelog space вҖ” soundverse 2026, SONICWARE Ambient Гҳ 1.5 вҖ” but Pivotuner is 2023/foundational), so #5 is **not** claimed. **Diversity** (vs JURY 2026-06-07 bans): **autonomous-generative INPUT** (NOT MIDI/keyboard, NOT touch-as-instrument) В· **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (NOT raw-WebGL2, NOT three.js) В· **adaptive-JI / comma-pump TECHNIQUE** (lab-first) В· **5-limit-JI drift VIBE** (NOT D-Dorian, NOT C-pentatonic) вҖ” answers JURY #1 (non-GPU renderer) + #2 (foreign tonal world) + #6 (generative, not the adult analysis reflex), and stacks the long-form/stateful menu shelf the lab is thin on. Winner of a **DEEP** 3-approach fire; siblings `405-pure-lock` (autonomous chords gliding 12-TETвҶ’JI under a live **PlompвҖ“Levelt roughness meter** that collapses to zero as partials lock вҖ” the lab's most legible/pedagogical JI demo) + `406-drifting-choir` (5вҖ“7 sustained voices that **glissando-retune to pure ratios** as a wandering pivot moves, Pivotuner-style ambient drone) build-reviewed and banked in IDEAS В§349. **Build-verified, NOT browser-verified** (no audio hardware in this sandbox) вҖ” unverified surface: whether the JI-vs-ET beating contrast reads as *striking* on phone speakers, whether the comma drift is *perceptible* as "sinking" by ear over minutes (it's slow by design), reverb/limiter balance, and whether the pitch-river home/root lines read clearly at a 06:30 phone glance. Design notes: `src/app/dream/404-comma-pump/README.md`

## (Cycle 348 вҖ” kids build В· WIDE, 3 listening/analysis toys each on an un-centered analysis dimension, all SVG output + non-D-Dorian; winner is the lab's first pulse-STEADINESS / entrainment toy)

- **[/dream/402-kids-steady-walk](/dream/402-kids-steady-walk)** вҖ” Steady Walk. `demoable` В· Cycle 348. **The lab's first pulse-STEADINESS / entrainment toy: a little creature walks *smoothly* only while you keep a steady beat вҖ” clap or say "bup bup bup" вҖ” and *stumbles* the moment your beat gets wobbly.** Tap **Start** (or **Watch it play** for the no-mic demo) and clap a pulse: a mic **onset detector** (half-wave-rectified **spectral flux Г— high-frequency-content**, adaptive running-mean threshold, ~120 ms refractory per Repp 2005) fires one step per clap/percussive vocal hit; the last 8 **inter-onset intervals** feed a steadiness score = **1 вҲ’ CV** (CV = stddev/mean of the IOIs) and a tempo = 60000/median(IOI). **Steadiness drives the gait** вҖ” high вҶ’ even alternating SVG walk-cycle at your tempo, smiling, clear spots; low вҶ’ lurching uneven legs, body wobble, a worried face. Each step plays a footstep tone cycling a **slendro** pentatonic (Indonesian gamelan, вүҲ[196, 226, 258, 296, 342] Hz + octave вҖ” a non-Western, **non-D-Dorian** world); hold steady for 8 steps and the creature **hops** and a flower blooms ahead on the scrolling path. This is the single-fire **double-rut break** the JURY (2026-06-07) asked for in provocation #6: it takes the lab's *adult analysis-engine reflex* (onset/IOI/tempo tracking вҖ” the 358/365/370/375/380 family) and turns it into a *kids listening toy*, and it scores the child's **internal pulse steadiness** (sensorimotor entrainment), NOT pattern recall вҖ” so it's distinct from the existing clap-*echo* toys (154-clap-back, 371-clap-along). **Renderer is inline SVG** (creature, scrolling path, footprints, steadiness meter, reward flowers) вҖ” the direct answer to jury #1 ("raw-WebGL2 is the new Canvas2D вҖ” ban it"): zero canvas, zero WebGL. **Degrades + auto-demos:** deny/ignore the mic вҶ’ readable `text-rose-300` notice + a **Watch it play** demo that scripts a steadyвҶ’wobblyвҶ’steady onset stream so the whole mechanic (smooth walk вҶ’ stumble вҶ’ recover) is legible hands-free at a 06:30 phone glance; a **Use mic** button promotes the demo to live. No API route, no `guard` (Web Audio mic-analysis + SVG, all client-side; no recording/upload/network/secrets). Zero new deps. **Ambition 3/5**: never-used-technique(#1, IOI-variance **steadiness / entrainment scoring** вҖ” grep-verified lab-first; prior clap toys echo *patterns*, none score *pulse steadiness*) + вүҘ3-subsystems(#2, spectral-flux onset detector + IOI/tempo/steadiness tracker + SVG gait/scene render + slendro footstep synth) + named-reference(#3, **Repp, "Sensorimotor synchronization: A review of the tapping literature," Psychon. Bull. Rev. 2005**). **Diversity** (vs jury bans): **mic-onset INPUT** (NOT MIDI, NOT touch) В· **inline-SVG OUTPUT** (NOT raw-WebGL2/three.js/Canvas2D) В· **onset/IOI-steadiness TECHNIQUE** (lab-first) В· **slendro / entrainment VIBE** (NOT D-Dorian). Winner of a **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; siblings `403-kids-breath-garden` (long-form **stateful** breathвҶ’night-garden that *evolves over minutes & remembers every breath*, pelog-inharmonic drone вҖ” the strongest bank, an explicit multi-cycle thread for the next kids DEEP) + `401-kids-sound-zoo` (voice-**timbre** classifier via spectral-flatness / Wiener entropy вҶ’ wake the matching animal, no pitch/scale) build-reviewed and banked in IDEAS В§348. **Build-verified, NOT browser-verified** (no audio/mic hardware in this sandbox) вҖ” unverified surface: whether a child's claps reliably cross the onset threshold on a real phone mic vs. room noise (the adaptive threshold + 0.05 floor may need tuning), whether the CVвҶ’gait mapping *reads* as "smooth vs stumbling" by eye, and the slendro footstep balance on phone speakers. Design notes: `src/app/dream/402-kids-steady-walk/README.md`

## вӯҗ (Cycle 347 вҖ” adult build В· DEEP, 2 approaches to "walk through + feel the ambisonic room" В· cycle 2 of the spatial-audio thread)

- **[/dream/400-soundwalk-room](/dream/400-soundwalk-room)** вҖ” Soundwalk Room. `demoable` В· Cycle 347. **Cycle 2 of the spatial-audio thread вҖ” and the lab's FIRST HAPTIC OUTPUT. Where 394 let you *rotate* a fixed first-order ambisonic field (turn your head), this lets you *walk through* it (6DoF translation) and *feel* each voice brush past via the Vibration API.** Tap Start (headphones, eyes can be closed) and a wandering auto-pilot walks you on a looping path between **seven just-intonation overtone voices** of A1вүҲ55 Hz (1/1, 3/2, 5/4, 2/1, 5/3, 9/4, 3/1) standing at fixed spots on the floor of a ~9Г—9 m room. Each voice **swells** as you approach, **swings around your head front вҶ’ side вҶ’ behind** as you pass it (the parallax "wow," which falls straight out of recomputing each source's relative azimuth from your live position), and **recedes + dulls** behind you (inverse-distance gain + a distance-driven low-pass = air absorption). Brush within 1.5 m of a voice and your phone fires a short vibrotactile **tap** whose feel encodes *which voice, how close, how loud* вҖ” a lightweight signal-processing **Sound2Hap** (pulse length/gap scale inversely with pitch; density scales with proximity + live per-voice RMS; one tap per genuine pass, throttled). **6DoF math from the Google "Ambisonics soundfield navigation (directional decomposition + path-distance estimation)" recipe** вҖ” we get the directional decomposition free (each synthesized source IS a known direction) and implement the path-distance re-render via one HRTF `PannerNode` per source (robust, never drifts, identical perceptual result; keeps 394's ambisonic vocabulary, lets the panner be the final decode). Master chain through a brick-wall `DynamicsCompressor` limiter + inverse-distance clamp so it can **never blast** your ears. **Degrades + auto-demos:** tap Start and do nothing вҖ” within seconds voices swell/pass/recede, the dot moves on the dim Canvas2D map, and (if supported) you feel taps; no Vibration API вҶ’ readable `text-rose-300` notice + the map **ring-pulses** on each pass as a visual stand-in; no device-orientation вҶ’ heading follows the auto-walk + drag-to-steer; no Canvas2D вҶ’ notice (audio walk keeps running, eyes-closed by design). No WebGL/three.js (dodges the jury's output ban) В· device-orientation + auto-walk + drag INPUT (no MIDI/touch-as-instrument) В· just-intonation overtone VIBE (not D-Dorian/C-pentatonic). No API route, no `guard` (Web Audio + Canvas2D + Vibration API, all client-side; no mic/camera/network/secrets). Zero new deps. **Ambition 5/5**: never-used-technique(#1, 6DoF soundfield translation + haptic output вҖ” both grep-verified lab-first; 394 only rotated) + вүҘ3-subsystems(#2, JI synth + path-distance re-spatialiser + Sound2Hap haptic engine + auto-walk locomotion + Canvas2D map) + named-reference(#3, Google soundfield-navigation В· Sound2Hap В· Janet Cardiff В· Zotter & Frank 2019) + multi-cycle(#4, cycle 2 of the deliberate spatial thread; cycle 3 = Karel's *Welcome Home* tracks as the spatial sources) + recent-research(#5, **Sound2Hap arXiv:2601.12245, CHI 2026** вҖ” the freshest dated anchor, directly on the haptic technique). **The expensive criteria (#4 + #5) the jury said are nearly absent, stacked.** Winner of a **DEEP** 2-approach fire; sibling `401-feel-the-room` (haptic-LED "metal detector for sound" вҖ” a parking-sensor pulse train quickens toward the nearest voice, eyes-closed wayfinding, screen optional) build-reviewed and banked in IDEAS В§347 as the cycle-3 / next-off-screen candidate. **Build-verified, NOT browser-verified** (no audio/sensor/haptics hardware in this sandbox) вҖ” unverified surface: real binaural quality + how convincingly the parallax swing reads through HRTF, whether the air/distance constants feel balanced by ear, real `navigator.vibrate` pattern feel + throttle in the hand, and `DeviceOrientationEvent` axis/sign conventions across iOS/Android. Design notes: `src/app/dream/400-soundwalk-room/README.md`

---

## Cycle 346 вҖ” kids build В· WIDE, 3 explorers each in a different foreign tonal world + non-GPU renderer + non-banned input

- **[/dream/397-kids-crystal-bloom](/dream/397-kids-crystal-bloom)** вҖ” Crystal Bloom. `demoable` В· Cycle 346. **The lab's first kids piece that lives in JUST INTONATION вҖ” blow or hum into the mic and grow a tower of crystal bells tuned to PURE harmonic ratios, whose stacked chord is *beating-free*: a glassy stillness a 12-tone-equal-tempered piano physically cannot make.** Tap to begin, then breathe/hum вҖ” mic *loudness only* (RMS envelope, never pitch) climbs a tower of 9 faceted **animated-SVG** gem-bells, each its own bold color (color = the language for pre-readers), lighting + ringing in sequence as the bloom rises; sustained input keeps the whole stacked chord shimmering. Each bell is a pure integer-ratio over A2вүҲ110 Hz вҖ” 1/1, 9/8, 5/4 (the pure major third the piano sharpens by ~14Вў), 4/3, 3/2, 5/3, 2/1, 9/4, 5/2 вҖ” built from a few sine partials with a fast attack + long shimmer tail, over a sustained f0+3/2 drone, through a soft-clip + compressor limiter so nothing ever spikes (kids-safe: no harsh transients, nothing piercing). **Degrades + auto-demos:** deny/ignore the mic and a synthetic ~7s breath swell blooms and rings the tower hands-free in a calm loop, so a phone reviewer at 06:30 hears it sing with zero permission; press-and-hold the tower is the manual fallback; mic errors show in readable `text-rose-300`. **Foreign tonal world by design** вҖ” pure just intonation, **not** the jury-banned D-Dorian/C-pentatonic вҖ” and a **rare renderer** (animated SVG, used only once before in 393), the deliberate break from the lab's raw-WebGL2 rut. No mic-monitoring (no feedback), no API route, no `guard` (Web Audio + mic analysis, all client-side; no network/recording/upload/secrets). Zero new deps.
  **Why it matters / what's new:** it answers the JURY's (2026-06-07) three sharpest provocations at once вҖ” **#1** force a non-GPU renderer the lab avoids (SVG), **#2** build in a genuinely foreign tonal world (just intonation вҖ” the jury said D-Dorian is the new C-pentatonic), and **#6** turn the adult analysis-reflex into a kids listening toy. It leads with the **expensive** ambition criterion the jury said has failed ~7вҖ“8 dives running: **#5 genuinely-recent research** вҖ” the dive this fire surfaced the 2026 microtonal-browser wave (**purified-synth / "Pure Intonation"** computing exact JI ratios in Web Audio, presented at **RubyKaigi 2026**; plus **Scale Workshop** and **Tune.js**) вҖ” paired with **#3 named reference** (Harry Partch; Scale Workshop; Tune.js) and **#2 вүҘ3 subsystems** (mic-RMS follower + animated-SVG render loop + JI additive-bell synth with limiter chain + drone). Honest note: just intonation is **not** lab-first by grep (136/272/etc. used JI before), so **#1 is not claimed** вҖ” the build stacks #5+#3+#2 instead. **Diversity** (vs jury bans): **mic breath/hum loudness INPUT** (NOT MIDI, NOT touch) В· **animated-SVG OUTPUT** (NOT raw-WebGL2/three.js/Canvas2D) В· **just-intonation additive-bell TECHNIQUE** В· **pure-JI A-overtone VIBE** (NOT D-Dorian). Winner of a **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; siblings `398-kids-rainbow-roll` (tilt вҶ’ **pure DOM/CSS** gong courtyard in Balinese **slendro** with detuned-pair *ombak* shimmer вҖ” the most literal answer to jury #1) + `399-kids-aurora-step` (camera frame-difference motion вҶ’ Canvas2D aurora + **whole-tone** chimes, the floating Debussy sound) build-reviewed and banked in IDEAS В§346. **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вҖ” unverified surface: whether a child's quiet breath/hum reliably crosses the RMS gate on a real phone mic, and whether stacked pure ratios *perceptibly* read as "beating-free / glassy" vs. just "a nice chord" on phone speakers.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/397-kids-crystal-bloom/README.md`

## Cycle 345 вҖ” adult build В· DEEP, 3 spatial-audio approaches to one off-screen concept вҖ” "a room you navigate by turning your head, eyes closed"

- **[/dream/394-soundfield-room](/dream/394-soundfield-room)** вҖ” Soundfield Room. `demoable` В· Cycle 345. **The lab's first true Ambisonic soundfield вҖ” six just-intonation drone voices float around you in 3D, and turning your head rotates the *entire field as one coherent space*, not source-by-source.** Tap "Enter Space" + headphones + eyes closed. Each voice is encoded into first-order **Ambisonic B-format** (W/X/Y/Z first-order spherical harmonics, ACN/SN3D) and summed into a shared 4-channel field bus; device-orientation (head tracking) builds a **3Г—3 SO(3) rotation matrix** (yawВ·pitchВ·roll) that rotates the whole soundfield coherently; it's decoded to binaural through **8 virtual loudspeakers** (6 horizontal + 2 elevated, **max-rE** weights from Zotter & Frank 2019), each a Web-Audio `PannerNode` in **HRTF** mode. This is the genuine technical leap past the lab's *existing* binaural pieces (7-spatial / 29-scene-spatial), which pan each source independently вҖ” here the field is a unified rotatable whole, the way JSAmbisonics / Google Omnitone do it, implemented from scratch in plain Web Audio. **Off-screen-first by design:** the screen is just a dim Canvas2D radar of voice positions + your facing arrow; the piece is *for the ears*. Degrades cleanly вҖ” no sensor / denied / desktop вҶ’ readable `text-rose-300` notice + drag-to-rotate + an **auto-demo** that slowly sweeps the field hands-free ~3s after Start, so a phone reviewer at 06:30 *hears the whole space rotate around them* without touching anything. Tonal world is **just intonation on the A2 overtone series** (110/165/220/275/330/385 Hz, 1/1В·3/2В·2/1В·5/2В·3/1В·7/2), two voices placed at elevation to prove the vertical axis вҖ” **not D-Dorian, not C-pentatonic** (both jury-banned). No mic, no API route, no `guard` needed (synthesis + sensor, all client-side; no network/secrets). Zero new deps.

  **Why it matters / what's new:** this is the most direct answer to the JURY's (2026-06-07) provocation **#5** вҖ” "the lab keeps *researching* the 2026 ambisonics wave and never building itвҖҰ spend a DEEP cycle on the untouched off-screen / spatial-audio / haptic shelf" (only 1 of the prior 15 pieces was off-screen). It is also the cleanest stack of the two **expensive** ambition criteria the jury said are nearly absent: **#5 genuinely-recent research** вҖ” the research dive this fire surfaced two ambisonics-*encoding* papers from **June 4, 2026** (~3 days old: SHB-AE, arXiv:2606.04584; Flow-HOA, arXiv:2606.04570), the freshest dated anchors the lab has cited, directly on this prototype's technique вҖ” and **#4 multi-cycle commitment** (cycle 1 of a spatial-audio thread; the two banked siblings are the designated deepenings). Plus **#1 never-used-technique** (grep-verified: Ambisonic B-format / spherical-harmonic soundfield rotation has never appeared in the lab вҖ” prior "spatial" pieces are per-source PannerNode panning) + **#3 named reference** (JSAmbisonics/polarch; Google Omnitone; Zotter & Frank 2019). **4вҖ“5 of 5.** Three subsystems beyond the synth (SH encoder + SO(3) field rotator + 8-speaker max-rE HRTF decoder). **Diversity** (vs jury bans): **device-orientation/head-tracking INPUT** (NOT MIDI, NOT touch) В· **binaural-spatial-audio OUTPUT + dim Canvas2D radar** (NOT raw-WebGL2, NOT three.js) В· **Ambisonic soundfield-rotation TECHNIQUE** (lab-first) В· **just-intonation A-overtone VIBE** (NOT D-Dorian). Winner of a **DEEP** 3-approach fire (one concept вҖ” *an eyes-closed room you turn your head inside* вҖ” three spatial-audio attacks); siblings `395-listener-orbit` (rotate the *AudioListener*, not the field вҖ” minimal-DSP per-source HRTF) + `396-soundwalk` (locomotion + **Vibration-API haptics** вҖ” you *walk through* the field and *feel* each voice; Janet Cardiff audio-walk lineage) build-reviewed and banked in IDEAS В§345 (copies in `/tmp/dream-losers/`). **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вҖ” unverified surface: whether the coherent-field rotation *perceptually* reads as one rotating space vs. eight moving speakers, the generic Web-Audio HRTF's localisation accuracy (elevation especially), the 20ms `setTargetAtTime` rotation-smoothing feel under fast head turns, the rotation-by-inverse-speaker-direction equivalence vs. a reference ambisonic decoder, and iOS `DeviceOrientationEvent.requestPermission` on real hardware (no audio/sensor/GPU in this sandbox).

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/394-soundfield-room/README.md`

## вӯҗ (Cycle 344 вҖ” kids build В· WIDE, 3 "listening-mirror" toys of "a child sings, the machine joyfully shows what it heard вҖ” no targets, no wrong")

- **[/dream/393-kids-vowel-color](/dream/393-kids-vowel-color)** вҖ” Vowel Mirror. `demoable` В· Cycle 344. The lab's **first formant / vowel-tracking** piece and its **first pure-DOM/CSS color field** as the main visual. A 4-year-old makes a long vowel вҖ” **aaah / eee / iii / ooo / uuu** вҖ” and a real-time formant detector (2048-pt FFT, F1/F2 peak-pick, Bark-scale classification vs PetersonвҖ“Barney centroids) paints the **whole screen** a different bold living color per vowel, then **sings the vowel back** through two bandpass filters tuned to the detected formants over a **just-intonation A3** triad. No reading, no targets, no "wrong" вҖ” your mouth is a color knob. Renderer is animated CSS gradients on real DOM (zero canvas/WebGL вҖ” the deliberate break from the lab's 7/15 raw-WebGL2 rut); graceful attract-mode demo cycles all vowels with no mic. ResearchвҶ’build from the **AURORA formant-biofeedback model (arXiv:2603.17543, Mar 2026)** вҖ” whose lesson "show a friendlier proxy, not the raw formant" becomes *color for a 4yo*. Banked 394-kids-sound-monster (Bouba/Kiki timbreвҶ’morphing-SVG-blob) + 392-kids-voice-mirror (pitchвҶ’SVG-ribbon-choir) вҖ” IDEAS В§344.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/393-kids-vowel-color/README.md`

## вӯҗ Cycle 338 вҖ” kids build В· DEEP, 3 self-organized-criticality cascade-models of "tap a little, watch the whole world tumble вҖ” the avalanche IS the song"

- **[/dream/377-kids-cascade-bloom](/dream/377-kids-cascade-bloom)** вҖ” Cascade Bloom. `demoable` В· Cycle 338. The lab's **first self-organized-criticality** piece, made for 4-year-olds: a bioluminescent garden of glowing seed-pods running the canonical **Abelian sandpile** (BakвҖ“TangвҖ“Wiesenfeld 1987). Tap a pod to add light; at 4 grains it **bursts**, flinging one grain to each neighbour вҖ” which can burst in turn, so a single tap sometimes triggers a screen-spanning **bloom** that rings out as a D-Dorian cascade. Most taps shimmer; rarely one avalanches вҖ” that power-law surprise *is* the toy. Raw WebGL2 (SDF pods + ring bursts), bell synth + drone through a limiter, auto-demo attract mode, every tap maps directly to a cell. ResearchвҶ’build from arXiv:2507.14947 ("Echoes of the Land", 2025). Banked 378-kids-quake-meadow (OFC 3-D heightfield quakes) + 379-kids-domino-forest (toppling dominoes) вҖ” IDEAS В§338.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/377-kids-cascade-bloom/README.md`

## вӯҗ Cycle 335 вҖ” adult build В· DEEP, 3 legibility approaches to "watch your music's tonal center of gravity travel through tonal space"

- **[/dream/370-tonal-map](/dream/370-tonal-map)** вҖ” Tonal Map. `demoable` В· Cycle 335. The deepening of the Spiral-Array thread, made legible: a comet of tonal gravity (Chew's center-of-effect) glides across labeled circle-of-fifths key territories; a modulation is a literal map crossing, and the comet's halo widens as the **tonal-focus** scalar drops (arXiv:2603.27035). three.js top-down map; internal modulating demo (CвҶ’GвҶ’DвҶ’EmвҶ’C) + Web MIDI. Banked 369-tonal-orbit (3-D helix) + 371-tonal-journey (modulation-journey timeline) вҖ” IDEAS В§335.

## вӯҗ Cycle 334 вҖ” kids build В· DEEP, 3 play-models of "Color Hunt: point the camera at real colors, each sings"

- **[/dream/368-kids-rainbow-quest](/dream/368-kids-rainbow-quest)** вҖ” Kids Rainbow Quest. `demoable` В· Cycle 334.

  Open `/dream/368-kids-rainbow-quest`. **For kids (4+).** A friendly unicorn shows a glowing color and *wants* it вҖ” go **point the phone camera at something that color in the real world** (something red, then orange, then yellowвҖҰ). Get close and the creature **glows warmer** (a rising musical shimmer); hold the match ~0.6s and it **celebrates** вҖ” a fanfare, a sparkle burst, and that color fills a **rainbow arc** across the top. Collect all seven вҶ’ the arc lights up in order and plays a **rainbow song**, then loops with a fresh shuffle. No reading, no timer, no score, no fail вҖ” only "found it!" moments, and it gets the child *off the couch and into their room*.

  The lab's **first color-foraging *game*** вҖ” the camera sends the child into the physical world to hunt color, rather than tapping the screen (the most direct answer yet to the JURY's "stop staring at the screen"). ColorвҶ’pitch is the most legible mapping the kids lane can make (KIDS.md: "color is the language"): each rainbow hue maps to a note in **D-Dorian** (D E F G A B C вҖ” **not** C-major-pentatonic), grounded by an always-on D+A perfect-fifth drone so any found note rings consonant. **Camera is analysis-only** вҖ” central-region `getImageData` вҶ’ averaged RGB вҶ’ HSV вҶ’ angular hue-distance warmth score; never recorded, never uploaded, no network. Dodges every gate this fire: **camera INPUT** (fresh in the last-10 window; JURY banned touch/mic, diversity audit banned raw-WebGL2 4Г—; camera dodges all and sits in Karel's loved `101-camera-song`вқӨпёҸ/`86-sound-to-video`вқӨпёҸ cluster), **DOM/CSS OUTPUT** (the lab's cool renderer вҖ” not WebGL2, not SVG), color-extraction TECHNIQUE, kids VIBE.

  Subsystems: (1) **color detection** вҖ” invisible offscreen canvas samples the central ~40Г—40 patch each frame, RGBвҶ’HSV, hue angular-distance вҶ’ warmth (0вҖ“1), match requires hue-within-tolerance AND min saturation (rejects whites/greys) AND min brightness, with a 0.6s dwell-lock so it can't accidentally trigger; (2) **audio** (`audio.ts`) вҖ” D-Dorian fanfare (rootвҶ’fifthвҶ’octave) + warmth shimmer (3 detuned high partials amplitude-mapped to proximity) + 7-note rainbow song + always-on D+A drone, all through a brick-wall `DynamicsCompressor` (sleeping-toddler-safe), AudioContext created inside the tap (iOS-safe); (3) **DOM/CSS visuals** вҖ” `<video>` background, a `radial-gradient` warmth glow, the rainbow arc as flex `<div>`s, CSS-custom-property sparkle bursts, an emoji creature scaled by warmth; (4) **graceful degrade / auto-demo** вҖ” if camera is denied or no frames arrive in ~2s, a `text-rose-300` notice shows and the **identical** matchвҶ’fanfareвҶ’rainbow pipeline plays itself, completing the whole 7-color quest hands-free and looping (so it's fully alive at the 06:30 phone review with no camera).

  References: **Newton's *Opticks* (1704)** spectrumвҶ’scale-degree mapping, **Scriabin's *clavier Г  lumiГЁres* (1911)**, and the **Reggio Emilia** "hundred languages of children" (Malaguzzi, 1993 вҖ” color/sound as pre-literate languages). Born from RESEARCH В§334 (camera-as-controller is commodity вҖ” Google "Jump to Play", 2026-03-24 вҖ” but the lab has no color-foraging game). Winner of a **DEEP** 3-play-model kids fire; siblings `366-kids-color-hunt` (free-forage + the melody you built replays as memory) + `367-kids-color-chord` (the whole room as a morphing 4-note chord) build-reviewed and banked in IDEAS В§334. **Ambition 2/5**: вүҘ3 subsystems (#2) + named references (#3). **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вҖ” unverified surface: real hue-extraction feel under a phone camera's auto-white-balance/mixed lighting (the saturation/tolerance thresholds may need tuning), iOS AudioContext resume, and the auto-demoвҶ’live-camera handoff (no camera in this sandbox).

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/368-kids-rainbow-quest/README.md`

- **[/dream/365-cadence-ladder](/dream/365-cadence-ladder)** вҖ” Cadence Ladder. `demoable` В· Cycle 333.

  Open `/dream/365-cadence-ladder`. A real-time **tonal/functional harmonic analyst**: press **в–¶ Begin** and a known progression plays while the analyzer names the **KEY** you're in (Krumhansl-Schmuckler key-finding), the **Roman-numeral function** of every chord, and renders harmony's pull-and-resolve as a three.js **tension ladder** вҖ” Tonic (rest, bottom) / Subdominant (departure, middle) / Dominant (tension, top). Each chord drops into its functional zone; **cadences flash named resolving arcs** вҖ” VвҶ’I *authentic* (emerald), IVвҶ’I *plagal/"amen"* (violet), VвҶ’vi *deceptive* (amber); when the music **modulates** a ripple sweeps and every Roman numeral re-contextualises (the same chord changes function as the key shifts). Connect a **MIDI keyboard** to play your own chords into the identical pipeline.

  The lab's **first key-estimation + functional/cadence analysis** вҖ” `229-chord-canvas` names chords but does NO key, NO Roman numerals, NO cadence/function. Proves itself 358-style: an internally-authored progression (C major with authentic/deceptive/plagal cadences вҶ’ modulates to G major) is **known ground truth**, so it's watched proving itself on a phone with no hardware. The most faithful answer to the JURY's #1 adult provocation вҖ” *feed the legible/instructional lane* (its named wins were 358/353/345) and *starve the JI-drone monoculture*. **Ambition 4/5** (#1 lab-first technique В· #2 вүҘ3 subsystems В· #3 Krumhansl & Kessler 1982 / Temperley 2001 / Riemann functional harmony / Aldwell & Schachter cadence tradition В· #5 RESEARCH В§333). Input=internal-demo+MIDI В· Output=three.js В· Vibe=instructional. *Two siblings explored this DEEP fire вҖ” `364-tonal-orbit` (Chew Spiral Array, 3D tonal space) + `363-key-compass` (circle-of-fifths wheel) вҖ” banked in IDEAS В§333.* **Build-verified, not browser-verified.** Design notes: `src/app/dream/365-cadence-ladder/README.md`

- **[/dream/360-kids-sand-choir](/dream/360-kids-sand-choir)** вҖ” Kids Sand Choir. `demoable`

  Open `/dream/360-kids-sand-choir`. **For kids (4+).** Press the big amber **в–¶**, then **tilt your phone or iPad** вҖ” a spout pours glowing warm sand that piles into dunes, and tipping the tablet swings gravity so the dunes flow left / right / down and reshape. Seven glowing harp strings cross the lower field; **every grain that comes to rest on a string sings a note**, so the *shape of the dune you build is the song*. No reading, no timer, no fail; it sways and plucks itself hands-free if nobody touches it.

  The lab's **first falling-sand granular cellular automaton** (grep-verified 0 across 350+ prototypes вҖ” the lab had Lenia `264`, Game-of-Life `25`, reaction-diffusion `9`, particle-life `8`/`16`/`236`, Navier-Stokes fluid `3`/`84`, n-body and physarum `327`, but never the most famous CA of all). It's also the kids lane's most **legible** cross-modal mapping yet вҖ” the direct answer to the JURY's standing #1 ("make it legible"): a 4-year-old sees causeвҶ’effect (build sand onto a low string вҶ’ low note; cascade across all seven вҶ’ a rippling arpeggio), where a glowing abstract cloud teaches nothing. Pulls on Karel's kids tilt/pluck love-cluster: `83-kids-tilt-rain`вқӨпёҸ (tilt), `105-pluck-field`вқӨпёҸ (Karplus pluck), `133-kids-ripple-pond`вқӨпёҸ (build-it-вҶ’-it-sings).

  Four subsystems in one pipeline: (1) **falling-sand granular CA** (`sand.ts`) вҖ” a 180Г—120 grid where each cell is empty or one colored grain; each frame, scanning *against* gravity so a grain advances at most one cell, every grain tries to move in the gravity direction, then the two diagonal-down cells in randomized order (which is what makes sand slump into natural slopes); a top spout drips warm grains and emits a settle event when a grain stops on a string row; (2) **tiltвҶ’gravity input** (`page.tsx`) вҖ” `deviceorientation` ОІ/Оі become a smoothed 2D gravity vector quantized to a dominant fall axis + diagonal bias, so tipping the world flows the dunes; (3) **D-Dorian sonification** (`audio.ts`) вҖ” seven strings tuned D E F G A B C (lowвҶ’high by row; **not** C-major-pentatonic), each a pre-rendered **KarplusвҖ“Strong** pluck pitched by row, stereo-panned by grain x, with an 80 ms per-string refractory so an avalanche never machine-guns; a soft always-on D+A triangle pad + a brick-wall `DynamicsCompressor` limiter (safe-sounds rule); (4) **WebGL2 render** (`gl.ts`) вҖ” the CA grid is uploaded to an RGBA8 texture each frame and drawn by hand-written GLSL ES 3.00, warm grains over a deep-indigo field with matte alpha-over glowing goldвҶ’violet strings that flash on pluck (no additive bloom, per the lab's anti-glow house style). Degrades at every step so it's alive at the 06:30 phone review: iOS 13+ `DeviceOrientationEvent.requestPermission()` is called inside the Start tap (denial вҶ’ readable `text-rose-300` note); **pointer-drag** tilts gravity on desktop; and a gentle **auto-sway** runs when no tilt events arrive so the choir plays itself with no hands; no WebGL2 вҶ’ `text-rose-300` notice, audio still runs. `AudioContext` is created inside the Start tap (iOS-safe). No API route, no `guard` needed (Web Audio + WebGL2 are client-side; no mic, no camera, no network, no secrets). Zero new deps.

  References: **Max Bittker's *Sandspiel*** + the **Noita / "powder game" falling-sand cellular-automaton tradition**; **Karplus & Strong, "Digital Synthesis of Plucked-String and Drum Timbres" (Computer Music Journal, 1983)** for the pluck. Born from RESEARCH В§332. Winner of a **WIDE** 3-explorer kids fire; siblings `361-kids-coral-bloom` (shake вҶ’ Diffusion-Limited Aggregation coral growth, WittenвҖ“Sander 1981) + `362-kids-tumble-bells` (tilt вҶ’ Abelian sandpile / SOC avalanche cascade, BakвҖ“TangвҖ“Wiesenfeld 1987) build-reviewed and banked in IDEAS В§332 вҖ” both grep-verified lab-first CAs. **Ambition 3/5**: never-used-technique (#1) + вүҘ3 subsystems (#2) + named-reference (#3). **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вҖ” unverified surface: the `deviceorientation`вҶ’gravity feel and pluck cadence on a real tilting hand, the iOS permission branch, the 180Г—120 CA's 60fps budget on a phone GPU, and exact shader output (no sensor / GPU in this sandbox).

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/360-kids-sand-choir/README.md`

## (Cycle 331 вҖ” adult build В· WIDE, 3 unrelated explorers)

- **[/dream/358-beat-mirror](/dream/358-beat-mirror)** вҖ” Beat Mirror. `demoable`
  **An adult, real-time beat & tempo tracker that makes the machine's *listening* legible вҖ” the lab's FIRST beat-tracking / tempo-induction piece (grep-verified: "beat track" only appears as passing mentions, no prior tracker prototype).** It hears a pulse in live audio, tells you the **BPM** (large and unmistakable), shows how sure it is, and locks a clinical visual pulse to the predicted beat вҖ” with a scrolling scope where you can SEE the alignment between *what was heard* (onset ticks) and *what the tracker predicts* (beat ticks). Instructional, not a glowing nebula вҖ” the direct adult answer to **jury #1 (make it legible)** and to **Karel's stated priority #3 (live-performance fitness)**: a tool a performing pianist would find magic ("it found my tempo"). **It autoplays on one tap with an internal 112 BPM drum loop** (kick/snare/hat, lookahead-scheduled) so the pipeline self-demos against a *known answer* with no mic and no permission prompt вҖ” the most self-verifying demo path the lab has shipped; switch the source to **Mic** to clap/play at it and watch it relock (analysis-only, never recorded/uploaded/routed to speakers вҖ” no feedback). **DSP (`tracker.ts`)**: per frame, window the `AnalyserNode` time-domain block вҶ’ **hand-written radix-2 FFT** вҶ’ **spectral-flux onset strength** (half-wave-rectified positive magnitude change vs previous frame) вҶ’ rolling 6 s onset envelope resampled to 100 Hz, mean-subtracted/smoothed вҶ’ **autocorrelation tempo induction** over the 60вҖ“180 BPM lag range (octave-checked, soft perceptual prior near 120) вҶ’ **OBTAIN-style cumulative-score beat-phase tracker** that nudges a predicted beat grid toward recent onset peaks; **confidence** = autocorrelation peak prominence. **Audio (`audio.ts`)**: internal kick/snare/hat groove synth (lookahead scheduler) + analysis-only mic path, both terminating in one shared `AnalyserNode`. **Render (`scene.ts`)**: an orthographic **three.js** scene вҖ” a pulse (disc + confidence-colored ring) that flashes exactly on each predicted beat + a scrolling scope (onset envelope in violet, detected onsets as white ticks, predicted beats as tall emerald ticks); when the emerald ticks sit on the onset peaks, it's locked. One rAF loop reads PCM вҶ’ tracker вҶ’ scene; React state updates the slow BPM/confidence readout ~8Г—/s; full three.js teardown on unmount. **Ambition 3/5** (need 2): **never-used-technique(#1 вҖ” real-time beat tracking / tempo induction is a lab-first; FFT exists elsewhere but no beat tracker does)** + **вүҘ3-subsystems(#2 вҖ” spectral-flux+autocorrelation+beat-phase DSP В· dual audio sources internal-synth+mic В· three.js pulse/scope = 3)** + **named-reference(#3 вҖ” Masataka Goto & Yoichi Muraoka *"A Real-time Beat Tracking System for Audio Signals"* ICMC 1995 В· *OBTAIN* arXiv:1704.02216)** [+#5 RESEARCH В§331, this fire]. **Diversity** dodges every live ban: **mic + internal-synth-groove INPUT** (NOT touch вҖ” the over-represented 4Г— input; NOT his-recording) В· **three.js OUTPUT** (the freshest renderer, 1Г— recent вҖ” NOT Canvas2D jury-banned, NOT raw-WebGL2 3Г—, NOT HRTF) В· **beat-tracking/tempo-induction TECHNIQUE** (lab-first) В· **clinical/instructional/data-readout VIBE** (NOT kids 5Г—, NOT cosmic, NOT Anadol-cloud). Typography compliant: `text-6xl` tabular-nums BPM hero, confidence amberвҶ’violetвҶ’emerald, вүҘ44px controls, `text-rose-300` mic/WebGL notices, graceful WebGL-absent fallback (audio + tracking keep running). Winner of a **WIDE** 3-explorer adult fire; siblings **`357-euclidean-orrery`** (a self-playing polyrhythmic clockwork of five coprime Euclidean/Bjorklund rings phasing over `lcm=5040` pulses, raw-WebGL2, Toussaint 2005 + Reich вҖ” **strong next-adult, build-clean, banked**) + **`359-tonnetz-walk`** (a self-touring Euler Tonnetz walked by neo-Riemannian P/L/R voice-leading in just intonation, every chord named, DOM/CSS вҖ” **the closest runner-up, the lab's most legible *harmony* piece, banked**) build-clean and banked in IDEAS. Adult В· WIDE В· zero new deps В· zero API route created В· no guard (client-only: mic analysis-only + Web Audio + three.js; no network, no recording, no upload, no secrets) В· 6.44 kB (**294 kB First Load вҖ” includes the three.js bundle**). Born from RESEARCH В§331. **Build-verified (authoritative `npm run build` вң“ exit 0, `в—Ӣ Static`, only the winner present), not browser-verified** вҖ” unverified surface: tempo lock on real *external* audio via the mic path (the internal-groove lock is engineered-reliable, the mic path is best-effort); mic/output **latency** is not measured or compensated, so the absolute phase of the visual pulse vs the room sound on the mic source is approximate; three.js pulse/scope visual fit and iOS AudioContext/getUserMedia unlock on real hardware.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/358-beat-mirror/README.md`

## Previously newest (Cycle 330 вҖ” kids build В· DEEP, 3 play-models for one concept)

- **[/dream/355-kids-glass-armonica](/dream/355-kids-glass-armonica)** вҖ” Glass Armonica. `demoable`
  **For kids (4+) вҖ” a Benjamin Franklin glass armonica you TUNE with water, then PLAY by swiping across the rims. The lab's FIRST fill-to-tune instrument and first rubbed-glass continuous-armonica voice (grep-clean for glass-harp/armonica/water-glass-tuning across 110 kids + 350+ total).** A row of 8 glasses: **drag a glass UP/DOWN to fill it** вҖ” more water = lower pitch вҖ” so the water level you SEE *is* the pitch you hear (the most literal cross-modal mapping the lab can make, the direct kids answer to jury #1 "make it legible"). Then **swipe a finger continuously across the rims** and each glass the finger crosses *sings* вҖ” a sustained, breathy, overlapping wash (the famous "otherworldly" armonica sustain, NOT a struck bell). Sweep back and forth for chord-like washes; hold one rim to sustain a single note. A **ghost-finger auto-demo** sweeps the pre-tuned glasses back and forth for ~12s so the instrument plays itself at the 06:30 open (the rig is built on mount so it SOUNDS wherever autoplay is permitted; iOS stays silent until the first touch resumes the context вҖ” no regression). **Synthesis (`audio.ts`)**: each glass is a continuously-running oscillator bank (fundamental sine + 3rd-harmonic triangle at 7% + 7th-partial shimmer at 1.5%) gated by an **amplitude envelope** (~200ms attack / ~900ms release вҖ” the slow swell is the signature rubbed-glass tone), with a slow ~5Hz LFO for the wet-rim wavering; **water level вҶ’ frequency** retunes the voice live (`freq = baseHz / (1 + waterГ—0.65)`); 8 glasses pre-tuned to **D-Dorian** (D3вҖ“D4, NOT C-pentatonic); quiet always-on D-minor pad so it's never silent; master вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter so a full sweep never blasts. **Interaction (`page.tsx`)**: Pointer Events + `setPointerCapture` + **bounding-rect hit-testing** (required because pointer-capture suppresses child enter/leave events), vertical-dragвҶ’tune vs horizontal-swipeвҶ’play discrimination, an rAF amplitude-envelope tracker that drives **CSS box-shadow/opacity glow** per glass. **Render: DOM/CSS only** вҖ” glasses are styled divs, water is a child div whose height animates, the singing glow is CSS box-shadow driven by live amplitude вҖ” **NOT Canvas2D (jury-banned), NOT SVG, NOT WebGL/WebGPU/three.js** (actively cools the warm raw-WebGL2 renderer). No reading; tap/swipe targets вүҘ44вҖ“64px; no timer/score/fail. Graceful: no Web Audio вҶ’ `text-rose-300` notice, visuals still animate. **Ambition 3/5** (need 2): **never-used-technique(#1 вҖ” first fill-to-tune instrument + first rubbed-glass armonica voice; HONEST caveat: continuous-excitation synthesis itself is NOT a lab-first вҖ” `320-kids-light-loom` did a bowed stick-slip string вҖ” so #1 rests on the water-fill-tuning mechanic + the armonica voice + their combination)** + **вүҘ3-subsystems(#2 вҖ” water-fill tuning model + continuous oscillator-bank armonica voices + swipe pointer-capture/hit-test + amplitude-driven CSS glow = 4)** + **named-reference(#3 вҖ” Benjamin Franklin's *glass armonica* 1761 В· Mozart *Adagio* K.617 В· folk *glass harp* / Jamey Turner)** [+#5 RESEARCH В§330, this fire вҖ” saturation audit]. **Diversity** dodges every live ban: **touch INPUT** (1Г— clean вҖ” drag-to-fill + swipe-across-rims) В· **DOM/CSS OUTPUT** (the coolest renderer вҖ” cools the warm raw-WebGL2 3Г—; NOT Canvas2D, NOT SVG) В· **glass-armonica fill-to-tune + rubbed-glass-sustain TECHNIQUE** (grep-fresh) В· **kids-playful VIBE** (sanctioned). **Deliberately NOT the queued `348-kids-domino-song`/`349-kids-marble-bells`** вҖ” both are chain-reaction pieces and `350-kids-bump-along` (chain-reaction) shipped *last* kids cycle, so a second would be the "too similar" the mandate bans (and with `350` shipped they can no longer claim ambition #1). Winner of a **DEEP** 3-play-model kids fire on ONE concept (a tuned water-glass instrument); siblings **`356-kids-pour-organ`** (pour water between vessels вҖ” conservation puzzle, "fill one, empty another" вҖ” the richest concept; **re-flagged as the strong next-kids build**, simplify the two-vessel pour gesture first) + **`354-kids-water-glasses`** (pure struck glass-harp, tap-to-play; cleanest/simplest; banked) build-clean and banked in IDEAS. Kids В· DEEP В· zero new deps В· zero API route created В· no guard (client-only: touch + Web Audio + DOM/CSS; no mic, no network, no secrets) В· 5.56 kB (**112 kB First Load вҖ” Web Audio + DOM/CSS, light, no three.js bundle**). Born from RESEARCH В§330. **Build-verified (authoritative `npm run build` вң“ 34.7s, `в—Ӣ Static`, only the winner present), not browser-verified** вҖ” unverified surface: the waterвҶ’pitch ratio (Г—1.65 max) is a musical approximation, not calibrated physics; whether the tune-vs-swipe gesture split reads cleanly for a 4yo on a real touch screen (the 10px threshold is adult-tuned); whether 8 overlapping armonica voices sound gorgeous vs muddy on a phone speaker; iOS AudioContext unlock on real hardware.
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/355-kids-glass-armonica/README.md`

## Previously newest (Cycle 329 вҖ” adult build В· WIDE, 3 unrelated explorers)

- **[/dream/353-collapse-score](/dream/353-collapse-score)** вҖ” Collapse Score. `demoable`
  **An adult generative piece that COMPOSES ITSELF in front of you, by Wave Function Collapse вҖ” the lab's FIRST WFC piece (grep-verified: 0 prior). An 8Г—16 lattice (8 voice layers Г— 16 beat columns) starts with every cell in superposition; the solver collapses the lowest-entropy cell to a weighted-random allowed note, then propagates harmonic adjacency constraints to its neighbours вҖ” and you WATCH it happen: dim superposition cells (showing their candidate count) snap to bright note-labelled cells, constrained neighbours flash as the ripple spreads. A playhead sweeps leftвҶ’right and SOUNDS each collapsed note, so the score is heard as it is written. Composition as a visible logical process вҖ” the exact inverse of the "abstract glowing cloud" the jury asked us to kill.** It auto-plays on load (one **Begin** tap only if the browser blocks autoplay; alive at the 06:30 review, never the same twice вҖ” when the grid fills it auto-reseeds and continues, long-form). **WFC solver (`wfc.ts`)**: classic loop вҖ” Shannon-entropy cell selection (weighted by tile frequency, tiny PRNG tie-break) вҶ’ weighted-random collapse вҶ’ BFS arc-consistency propagation, with a contradiction guard that holds the previous mask (graceful recovery, the solve never stalls); seeded **mulberry32** PRNG so any seed deterministically reproduces an exact run (**Replay** a seed; **New Seed** for a fresh piece). **Musical constraints**: 14 tiles = 7 D-Dorian degrees Г— 2 octaves; **horizontal** (time) adjacency forbids tritone leaps (FвҶ”B, the EвҶ”C substitution) so motion stays stepwise/consonant; **vertical** (voice-layer) adjacency requires the two tiles share a unison/third/fourth/fifth so stacked rows always voice consonant harmony; weighted toward the root/4th/5th with lower-octave gravity. **Synthesis (`audio.ts`)**: per note a warm **FM pad** (sine carrier + Г—2.01 modulator, depth fading 90%вҶ’30% over 400 ms, 50 ms attack / 1.5 s release) + a **bell click** (Г—4 + inharmonic Г—7.1 partial, fast decay) for the pluck transient; master вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter (вҲ’6 dB, 20:1). **Render**: a **pure DOM/CSS grid** (CSS-transitioned cell opacity/colour, ref-mutated вҖ” **no per-cell React setState**, dodging the perf trap; **NOT Canvas2D (jury-banned), NOT SVG (warm 4Г—), NOT WebGL/WebGPU/three.js**), which is both the cleanest renderer and reads as a legible board. Controls (вүҘ44px): Begin, Pause/Resume, New Seed, Replay-by-seed, Slow/Normal/Fast solve speed. `prefers-reduced-motion` honoured. **Ambition 3/5** (need 2): **never-used-technique(#1 вҖ” the lab's FIRST Wave Function Collapse / constraint-propagation composition; grep-clean across all 350+ prototypes)** + **вүҘ3-subsystems(#2 вҖ” WFC solver + harmonic adjacency constraint model + FM/bell synth + DOM/CSS legible lattice = 4)** + **named-reference(#3 вҖ” Maxim Gumin *Wave Function Collapse* 2016 В· Paul Merrell *Model Synthesis* 2007 В· Brian Eno generative lineage)** [+#5 RESEARCH В§329, this fire вҖ” field-direction]. **Diversity** dodges every live ban: **seed/none INPUT** (**NOT his-recording** вҖ” the jury-banned adult input) В· **DOM/CSS lattice OUTPUT** (the COOLEST renderer, 1Г— recent вҖ” actively cools the warm SVG 4Г— / raw-WebGL2 3Г—; **NOT Canvas2D, NOT SVG, NOT WebGPU**) В· **WFC/constraint-propagation TECHNIQUE** (fresh) В· **systems/legible VIBE** (**NOT cosmic, NOT Anadol-cloud, NOT kids**). The most faithful adult answer to **jury provocation #1** (make it LEGIBLE вҖ” you can watch a cell *decide* and understand why neighbours light up) and to **Karel's #2 value, SURPRISE** ("music composes itself by visible logic" is a genuine "I didn't know we could do that"). Winner of a **WIDE** 3-explorer adult fire; siblings **`351-erosion`** (a Basinski-style tape that physically WEARS OUT more each morning until it's gone вҖ” lab-FIRST generative-degradation, pure DOM/CSS, **now triple-banked + build-clean вҶ’ escalated to Karel**) + **`352-breath-tide`** (a near-non-screen drone you play with your BREATH, entraining toward 0.1 Hz resonance breathing вҖ” the strong jury-#2 SECOND-non-screen answer; banked for next adult) build-clean and banked in IDEAS. Adult В· WIDE В· zero new deps В· zero API route created В· no guard (client-only: seed + Web Audio + DOM/CSS; no mic, no network, no secrets) В· 5.56 kB (**108 kB First Load вҖ” Web Audio + DOM/CSS, light, no three.js bundle**). Born from RESEARCH В§329. **Build-verified (authoritative `npm run build` вң“ 19.5 s, `в—Ӣ Static`, only the winner present), not browser-verified** вҖ” unverified surface: audio tuning (FM depth, bell balance, limiter feel) and iOS Safari AudioContext unlock on real hardware; whether an 8Г—16 grid of note-names reads as legible-but-not-busy in the hand; whether the WFC output sounds purposeful vs. meandering over a long listen (the contradiction guard is a mask-hold, not true backtracking вҖ” a next-cycle deepening).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/353-collapse-score/README.md`

## Earlier (Cycle 328 вҖ” kids build В· DEEP, 3 physics/interaction approaches to one concept)

- **[/dream/350-kids-bump-along](/dream/350-kids-bump-along)** вҖ” Bump Along. `demoable`
  **For kids (4+) вҖ” the lab's FIRST chain-reaction music machine for kids (110+ kids prototypes, zero chain-reaction pieces before this вҖ” grep-verified): a row of seven sleepy, breathing creatures, each a bold color + a pentatonic note. Tap one and a visible "bump" travels down the line вҖ” each creature wakes, squashes-and-stretches, and SINGS as the wave reaches it вҖ” then the wave reflects off the far end and rolls back for a return melody. One little push вҶ’ a whole melodic wave you can watch travel, bounce, and return.** It is alive on load: an auto-demo fires a bump from the left every ~5.5s while idle, and the creatures breathe perpetually, so it's playing with zero interaction at the 06:30 review (AudioContext is created on the first tap вҖ” visuals run silently until then, iOS-safe). **Impulse-propagation engine (`page.tsx`)**: a `Wave` object holds a floating-point position in *creature-index units* + a direction; each rAF frame it advances at `WAVE_SPEED` (2.6 creatures/s) and, when it crosses a creature it hasn't triggered, fires that creature's bounce + note; at each end it **reflects** with `BOUNCE_DECAY` (0.88) energy loss until it falls below threshold and vanishes (Newton's-cradle there-and-back). Tapping a creature in the *middle* spawns **two** waves (both directions); tapping both ends makes two waves **meet in the middle**. **Drag to reorder** creatures swaps their array positions live, so the wave plays whatever order the child arranges вҖ” composition by rearrangement. **Pitch mapping**: 7 creatures вҶ’ C3 E3 G3 A3 C4 E4 G4 (C-major pentatonic, two octaves), left = lowest/biggest вҶ’ right = highest/smallest (BANDIMAL). **Synthesis (`audio.ts`)**: each note = additive sine (fundamental + octave + 3rd harmonic) + a 4Г— triangle "knock" for marimba warmth, fast attack / 0.9вҖ“1.4s decay; always-on C3+E3+G3 drone (~0.018 gain, slow fade-in); master gain вҶ’ `BiquadFilter` lowpass 9kHz вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` (вҲ’6dB, 20:1) so it can never blast (safe sounds, KIDS.md #7). **Render**: SVG inline JSX only (creatures as circles with faces, eyes that wake, cheek blush, squash-stretch, music-note sparkle) вҖ” **NOT Canvas2D (jury-banned), NOT WebGL/WebGPU/three.js**. No reading; color is the language; tap targets are full creatures (вү«64px). Graceful: `buildRig()` in try/catch + `resume()` catch вҶ’ if Web Audio is unavailable, the rAF loop + auto-demo + all animations still run. Clean teardown (rAF cancel, audio teardown, listeners removed). **Ambition 3/5** (need 2): **never-used-technique(#1 вҖ” the lab's FIRST chain-reaction / Rube-Goldberg / cause-and-effect-cascade piece, and first impulse-propagation/Newton's-cradle physics; grep-verified 0 across all kids READMEs)** + **вүҘ3-subsystems(#2 вҖ” impulse-propagation wave engine + reflection state + additive marimba synthesis + drone/limiter + SVG character render + drag-reorder = 6)** + **named-reference(#3 вҖ” Newton's cradle В· "pass it down the line" physical toy В· Rube Goldberg В· BANDIMAL pitch-size convention)** [+#5 RESEARCH В§328, this fire]. **Diversity** dodges every live ban: **touch INPUT** (cooled to ~1Г— in the last 10 вҖ” recent kids were device-orientation/multi-user; fresh again) В· **SVG OUTPUT** (**NOT Canvas2D (jury-banned), NOT raw-WebGL2 (warm 3Г—), NOT WebGPU (verification-debt)** вҖ” honest soft-flag: SVG is now warm, this fire takes it to 4Г— in the last 10, so the next kids/adult renderer should cool to DOM/CSS or audio-only) В· **collision/impulse-cascade TECHNIQUE** (fresh) В· **kids-playful-construction VIBE** (sanctioned on the kids rotation). The most **legible** of the slate (jury's #1 live priority brought to kids: one tap вҶ’ an ordered, visible, repeatable melodic wave; rearrange вҶ’ recompose) and the lowest-skill-floor (tap a big creature вҖ” no setup, no precision). **Deliberately NOT the queued `348-kids-song-catcher`** (cycle-326 bank) вҖ” that repeats `346-kids-sound-hunt`'s device-orientation+HRTF+DOM/CSS recipe shipped *last* kids cycle, which would be the "too similar in design and theme" the mandate exists to stop. Winner of a **DEEP** 3-approach kids fire on ONE concept (the lab's first chain-reaction music machine, explored via competing physics models); siblings **`348-kids-domino-song`** (drag a domino trail, tap to topple a melody вҖ” highest charm + cleanest render; **banked as the strong next-kids build**, fix the precise tap-to-tip trigger first) + **`349-kids-marble-bells`** (drop a marble through bells you place, each collision a chime вҖ” strongest love-pull via `169-kids-marble-run`вқӨпёҸ + Plinko wow; banked, refactor the per-frame setState first) build-clean and banked in IDEAS. Kids В· DEEP В· zero new deps В· zero API route created В· no guard (client-only: touch + Web Audio + SVG; no mic, no network, no secrets) В· 5.26 kB (**111 kB First Load вҖ” Web Audio + SVG, light, no three.js bundle**). Born from RESEARCH В§328. **Build-verified (full `npm run build` вң“ 29.7 s, `в—Ӣ Static`), not browser-verified** вҖ” unverified surface: live audio playback + the SVG animation feel on a real iPad; whether **drag-to-reorder** feels snappy on iOS Safari (pointer capture on SVG `<g>` can be finicky вҖ” the tap-to-bump core works regardless); whether a real 4-year-old reads the traveling wave as "I did that" (the auto-demo + one-tap payoff are the in-sandbox proxy). Minor polish nit for next cycle: two meta-labels use `text-white/45` (just under the /55 hint floor).
  Design notes: `src/app/dream/350-kids-bump-along/README.md`
