- **[/dream/474-kids-scan-bloom](/dream/474-kids-scan-bloom)** вҖ” Scan Bloom рҹҢё. `demoable` В· Cycle 376. **For**: kids (4+).

  **Squeeze a soft glowing flower and HEAR its outline sing вҖ” the shape you see IS the waveform you hear.** Press **Start**, then tap a petal: it rings a warm note (C-major / Lydian, C3вҖ“C5 вҖ” every petal consonant) AND the bloom's outline wobbles, then slowly relaxes back into a calm round hum. This is the lab's **first SCANNED SYNTHESIS** instrument (Max Mathews, Bill Verplank, Rob Shaw, "Scanned Synthesis," ICMC 2000): instead of a static wavetable, the oscillator reads a **slowly-vibrating physical ring of 128 coupled masses** (closed toroidal topology, the original Mathews form). A phase accumulator scans that ring at audio rate вҖ” `scanFreq` is the pitch вҖ” so the deforming radial outline on screen is literally the live waveform. Poking it injects a Gaussian displacement bump; light damping dissipates the higher harmonics over a few seconds, so a squeeze brightens the timbre and then **resolves on its own** back toward a near-sine. It is **never silent** (a quiet seeded sinusoid hums at rest) and **never clips/hurts ears** (everything through a DynamicsCompressor brick-wall limiter). This is **cycle 1 of the new "Living Wavetable" kids spine** вҖ” the jury's (2026-06-09) #2 ask realized for the kids lane: *restart a multi-cycle commitment* (#4 was dead since 414).

  Subsystems (вүҘ3 вҶ’ 4): (1) **scanned-synthesis AudioWorklet** (`bloom-worklet-src.ts` / `bloom-audio.ts`) вҖ” a `BloomProcessor` owning `r[128]`/`v[128]` in the audio thread, stepping the closed mass-spring ring once per 128-sample render quantum (`Kn=0.25, Kc=0.002, damp=0.04, dt=1`, circular neighbor coupling) and synthesizing each output sample by **linear-interpolated circular scan** at `scanFreq/sampleRate`; inlined as a string вҶ’ Blob URL вҶ’ `addModule`, with a **ScriptProcessorNode fallback** running the identical loop, posting `r[]` snapshots out ~33Г—/sec; all вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor limiter. (2) **multi-touch petal control** вҖ” 6 invisible вүҘ72px tap-targets ringed around the bloom that each poke the ring at their angular index AND set the scan pitch in one gesture; a squeeze/drag anywhere on the canvas rings the *nearest* petal (angle-based hit test). (3) **WebGL2 bloom renderer** (`bloom-renderer.ts`) вҖ” a two-pass glow (triangle-fan radial-gradient fill + additive LINE_STRIP rim) whose outline radius at each angle = `baseRadius + r[i]В·amp`, rebuilt every frame from the exact `r[]` being scanned, warm per-petal color, on a dark `#0a0514` field; ResizeObserver-driven sizing + full GL dispose on unmount. (4) **3s hands-free auto-demo** (taps a gentle 7-note tune, stops on first touch) so it demos with zero interaction. **No API route, no `guard`** (Web Audio + WebGL2 only вҖ” no mic, camera, network, or secrets). No new npm deps.

  References: **Max V. Mathews, Bill Verplank, Rob Shaw вҖ” "Scanned Synthesis," Proceedings of the ICMC 2000, Berlin** (the technique: a slow dynamical wavetable scanned at audio rate; this is the lab's first use, closed-toroidal form). Born from RESEARCH В§376 (the dive surfaced the Continuator/MIROR reflexive-turn-taking lineage, a grep-audit killed it as a "too-similar" target вҖ” `251-live-duet-trader` already does live Markov, and 142/154/213/230/280/298/334 are the echo cluster вҖ” and **steered the search onto scanned synthesis, a grep-verified untouched primitive**). **Ambition 4/5** (the jury's named regression fix вҖ” zero pieces were at 4вҖ“5/5): **#1** never-used technique (scanned synthesis вҖ” grep-verified: "scanned synthesis"/"verplank"/"wavetable" all absent across 470+ folders) + **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (4, above) + **#3** named reference (Mathews/Verplank/Shaw ICMC 2000) + **#4** multi-cycle commitment (cycle 1 of the Living Wavetable spine). **#5 NOT claimed** вҖ” the technique is foundational (2000), not <14 days; honest. **Diversity** (vs jury 2026-06-09 bans Canvas2D-OUTPUT В· drum-machine/percussion-synth-TECH В· refuse-to-resolve/clinical-Ikeda-VIBE В· calm-cosmic-pentatonic-kids-template В· AND the recent kids GPU-physics-sim rut [451/456/460] В· the second-consecutive-SVG [468]): **multi-touch petal INPUT** В· **WebGL2 OUTPUT** (dodges the banned Canvas2D AND the three.js cluster [471/463/451] AND a 2nd SVG) В· **scanned-synthesis TECHNIQUE** (a brand-new audio primitive вҖ” dodges drum-machine AND the kids physics-sim-game rut: the mass-spring here is a tiny audio *wavetable*, not a physics toy you watch) В· **warm self-resolving Lydian VIBE** (the squeeze brightens then relaxes вҖ” the jury's "warm AND structured AND resolves on purpose" middle, neither refuse-to-resolve nor pentatonic-lullaby). Winner of a **DEEP** 3-attack kids fire (one concept вҖ” *poke a glowing object and it sings its own shape* вҖ” three topologies/renderers: open-string/SVG vs. toroidal-ring/three.js vs. radial-bloom/WebGL2). Siblings `472-kids-scan-string` (pluck a giant SVG harp-string of light, pluck-x = pitch вҖ” the most legible "see the wave" read) + `473-kids-scan-ring` (poke a three.js toroidal halo, the dent travels around вҖ” the most reference-pure topology) are complete, build-reviewed real scanned-synthesis implementations banked in IDEAS В§376 as the spine's cycle-2/3 candidates. **Build-verified (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `вң“ Compiled successfully`, `/dream/474-kids-scan-bloom` 6.35 kB prerendered static in the manifest), NOT browser-verified** (no audio / GPU / touch in this sandbox) вҖ” unverified surface: whether the scanned-synthesis timbre reads as warm-and-alive vs. buzzy behind the limiter on phone speakers; whether a 4yo perceives the see-shape/hear-shape correspondence at low pitch (the ~33fps `r[]` snapshot averages sub-period detail below ~150 Hz, though the complexвҶ’smooth *trend* always mirrors); the iOS AudioWorklet Blob-URL + AudioContext-in-gesture path (ScriptProcessor fallback covers it); WebGL2 availability on older tablets (DOM-bloom + audio fallback covers it); whether free-drag "squeeze" lands on the petal the child intended (angle-based nearest-petal, polished this cycle from an always-C4 bug).

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/474-kids-scan-bloom/README.md`

- **[/dream/475-resonant-room](/dream/475-resonant-room)** вҖ” Resonant Room рҹҸӣпёҸ. `demoable` В· Cycle 377. **For**: adults / live performance.

  **Karel's actual recorded piano played into a room that rings back in the SAME KEY вҖ” hold "Swell" and the space fills with a warm in-key halo; release and it rings out to the tonic and decays to silence.** Press **Start** (or wait вҖ” 3s hands-free auto-start), pick a **Key** (C/D/E/F/G/A/Bb), and **hold the Swell control** (or Space): the feedback gain `g` ramps toward 0.95, the room blooms, a golden-amber lattice lights up; **release** and `g` ramps to 0 so the room **resolves to the tonic and fades to silence** вҖ” the defining gesture of this new spine. This is the lab's **first FEEDBACK DELAY NETWORK** (Jot/StautnerвҖ“Puckette reverb): an N=8 lossless **Householder-matrix** feedback network of delay lines whose lengths are **tuned to the harmonic series of the chosen key** (`L = SR/freq` + a mutually-prime nudge), with a **per-line one-pole lowpass** for Jot-style frequency-dependent warmth (highs decay faster, like a real room). Karel's real *Welcome Home* piano is the excitation (read-only `/api/audio/[id]` GET); on any fetch/decode failure it falls back to a **resolving CвҖ“AmвҖ“FвҖ“G7вҖ“Cmaj9** synth progression so it always sounds and always demos. This is **cycle 1 of the new adult "Resonant Room" multi-cycle spine** вҖ” the jury's (2026-06-09) **warm-AND-structured-AND-resolves-on-purpose adult middle**, on his **real piano** (cold 15+ cycles), restarting the multi-cycle commitment (#4) the jury said died at 414.

  Subsystems (вүҘ3 вҶ’ 4): (1) **real-piano source** вҖ” fetch `/api/audio/549fc519вҖҰ` вҶ’ `decodeAudioData` вҶ’ looping `AudioBufferSourceNode`, with a warm synthesized **fallback chord progression** (CвҖ“AmвҖ“FвҖ“G7вҖ“Cmaj9) that itself resolves. (2) **FDN reverb AudioWorklet** (`fdn-worklet-src.ts`) вҖ” `FdnProcessor` owning 8 ring-buffer delay lines, mixing tails through a precomputed **Householder matrix** `H = I вҲ’ (2/N)В·11бөҖ`, scaling by global feedback `g` (k-rate param, вүӨ0.97 for stability), per-line warm LP, injecting the dry source, posting per-line **RMS energy** ~40Г—/sec; inlined вҶ’ Blob URL вҶ’ `addModule`, with a **ScriptProcessorNode fallback** running the identical loop; all вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor brick-wall limiter. (3) **WebGL2 ring-lattice renderer** вҖ” 8 glowing nodes (one per delay line) connected by the mixing-matrix edges; node brightness/size = that line's current RMS, edges pulse as energy flows; golden-amber additive glow on deep indigo `#0a0514`; `ResizeObserver` sizing + full GL dispose on unmount; DOM fallback if WebGL2 absent. (4) **interaction** вҖ” 6-key selector (retunes delays live), Space/pointer **Swell** gesture (the `g` ramp), 3s auto-start. **No API route, no `guard`** (Web Audio + WebGL2 + one read-only same-origin `/api/audio` GET вҖ” no mic, camera, write, or secrets). No new npm deps.

  References: **Jean-Marc Jot & Antoine Chaigne, "Digital Delay Networks for Designing Artificial Reverberators," AES 90th Convention, 1991** + **Stautner & Puckette, "Designing Multichannel Reverberators," Computer Music Journal, 1982** (the original FDN). Born from RESEARCH В§377 (the dive ruled out the freshest concepts вҖ” Live Music Diffusion Models, arXiv 2605.22717, 2026-05-21, and latent-diffusion co-performance вҖ” as server-heavy / not client-buildable, **negatively steering** onto the jury's real-piano + warm-resolving asks realized via a lab-first FDN). **Ambition 4/5** (the jury's named regression fix вҖ” zero pieces were at 4вҖ“5/5): **#1** never-used technique (Feedback Delay Network вҖ” grep-verified: "feedback delay network"/"FDN"/"Jot" all absent across 470+ folders; architecturally distinct from 468's single Schroeder *allpass*, the modal resonators of 202/284/286, and the Karplus combs of 140/184) + **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (4, above) + **#3** named reference (Jot & Chaigne 1991 / Stautner & Puckette 1982) + **#4** multi-cycle commitment (cycle 1 of the Resonant Room spine). **#5 NOT claimed** вҖ” FDN is foundational (1982/1991), not <14 days; honest. **Diversity** (vs jury 2026-06-09 bans Canvas2D-OUTPUT В· drum-machine/percussion-synth-TECH В· refuse-to-resolve/clinical-Ikeda-VIBE В· calm-cosmic-pentatonic-kids-template В· AND the over-used three.js cluster [471/463/451]): **audio-file(real WH piano) INPUT** (first real-piano source in 16 cycles) В· **WebGL2 OUTPUT** (dodges banned Canvas2D AND the three.js cluster AND a repeat-SVG) В· **feedback-delay-network TECHNIQUE** (a brand-new reverb architecture вҖ” dodges drum-machine) В· **warm in-key resolving VIBE** (hold-to-swell вҶ’ release rings out to the tonic вҖ” the jury's "warm AND structured AND resolves on purpose" adult middle, neither refuse-to-resolve nor pentatonic-lullaby). Winner of a **DEEP** 3-approach adult fire (one concept вҖ” *real piano вҶ’ an in-key sympathetic room that resolves* вҖ” three resonance architectures: FDN/WebGL2 vs. biquad-resonator-bank/three.js vs. tuned-comb-waveguide/WebGL2). Siblings `476-tarab-strings` (high-Q biquad sympathetic-resonator bank вҶ’ three.js light-strings вҖ” the most legible per-string energy portrait) + `477-resonant-caustics` (tuned comb/waveguide bank вҶ’ WebGL2 caustic interference field вҖ” the most beautiful render) are complete, build-reviewed implementations banked in IDEAS В§377 as the spine's cycle-2/3 candidates. **Build-verified (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `вң“ Compiled successfully`, `/dream/475-resonant-room` 8.7 kB prerendered static), NOT browser-verified** (no audio / GPU in this sandbox) вҖ” unverified surface: whether the FDN reads as a warm sympathetic *room* vs. metallic/comby behind the limiter on phone speakers; whether the in-key delay tuning produces an audible *resolution to the tonic* on Swell-release vs. a generic reverb tail; whether `/api/audio/549fc519вҖҰ` actually streams + decodes in the deployed prototype (synth fallback covers silence, but the real-piano directive is only *met* if it loads); the iOS AudioWorklet Blob-URL + AudioContext-in-gesture path (ScriptProcessor fallback covers it); WebGL2 on older tablets (DOM fallback + audio-without-GL covers it).

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/475-resonant-room/README.md`

- **[/dream/478-kids-wave-pond](/dream/478-kids-wave-pond)** вҖ” Wave Pond рҹҢҠ. `demoable` В· Cycle 378. **For**: kids (4+).

  **Tap a glowing top-down pond and watch REAL waves spread, bounce off the rim, and cross through each other вҖ” and hear that rippling field as sound.** Press **Touch the Pond**, then tap/drag anywhere on the luminous circle: a Gaussian displacement pulse is injected into a 64Г—64 grid, ripples radiate, **reflect off the fixed boundary**, and **interfere** where they cross (constructive = brighter/cyan, destructive = dimmer/violet). A small amber **pickup** cell reads the local displacement out as audio, and the field's liveliness drives a warm C-pentatonic tone over an always-on Lydian pad вҖ” so the audio and the visual are the *same solved field*, not a sim layered on a separate synth. Multi-touch: several taps = several wave sources crossing. This is **cycle 1 of the new "Wave Field" kids spine**.

  Subsystems (вүҘ3 вҶ’ 4+): (1) **FDTD 2-D wave solver** вҖ” a genuine time-domain finite-difference 2-D digital-waveguide mesh (Van Duyne & Smith, ICMC 1993): every cell steps `u_next = 2u вҲ’ u_prev + cВІВ·(вҲҮВІu)` (c = 0.35 Courant-stable, light damping, Dirichlet "rim" boundaries) вҖ” **no pre-computed modes, no spectral bank, no cosmetic ripple**; propagation/reflection/interference emerge from the coupled cell updates alone. (2) **AudioWorklet** owning the grid, stepping at audio rate and posting the field to the main thread ~30Г—/s (inlined вҶ’ Blob URL, no `public/` file), with an **identical ScriptProcessorNode fallback** if `addModule` throws. (3) **audio chain** вҖ” pickup-cell displacement + a field-energy-driven C4вҖ“A4 pentatonic sine voice + a 5-partial Lydian pad (never silent) вҶ’ 9 kHz lowpass (kids-safe) вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor brick-wall limiter. (4) **three.js renderer** вҖ” top-down `OrthographicCamera` over a `PlaneGeometry` (64Г—64 vertices) whose per-vertex `color` BufferAttribute is rewritten each frame from the field (trough = deep violet, crest = cyanвҶ’white) on a dark indigo field; full geometry/material/renderer dispose on unmount; WebGL-absent вҶ’ readable `text-rose-300` notice + audio still runs. (5) **3 s hands-free auto-demo** drops four gentle ripples, cancelled on first touch; multi-touch independent injection; iOS AudioContext created inside the Start gesture. **No API route, no `guard`** (Web Audio + three.js only вҖ” no mic, camera, network, or secrets). No new npm deps (`three` is an existing repo dep).

  References: **Dana C. Van Duyne & Julius O. Smith III, "Physical Modeling with the 2-D Digital Waveguide Mesh," ICMC 1993** (the technique вҖ” a solved 2-D wave-equation field, not a modal mode-bank). Born from RESEARCH В§378 (the dive's grep-audit killed three would-be re-treads вҖ” bowed-string already exists at `320-kids-light-loom`, kids-weather at `293-kids-sky-band`, modal membrane-drum at `202`/`284` вҖ” and surfaced the genuinely-open FDTD time-domain field). **Ambition 4/5** (the jury's named regression fix вҖ” climb to 4вҖ“5/5): **#1** never-used technique (time-domain FDTD 2-D wave-equation / digital-waveguide-mesh вҖ” grep-verified: the lab's membranes `202`/`284` are *modal* Bessel-mode banks with a cosmetic ripple, never a solved finite-difference field) + **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (4+, above) + **#3** named reference (Van Duyne & Smith 1993) + **#4** multi-cycle commitment (cycle 1 of the Wave Field spine). **#5 NOT claimed** вҖ” the reference is foundational (1993), not <14 days; honest. **Diversity** (vs jury 2026-06-09 bans Canvas2D-OUTPUT В· drum-machine/percussion-synth-TECH В· refuse-to-resolve/clinical-Ikeda-VIBE В· calm-cosmic-pentatonic-kids-template В· AND the count-banned **WebGL2 OUTPUT** [5Г— in last-10: 475/474/460/456/451]): **multi-touch INPUT** В· **three.js vertex-color OUTPUT** (dodges the banned Canvas2D AND the count-banned raw-WebGL2; three.js is 2Г— вҖ” under the count line) В· **FDTD wave-field TECHNIQUE** (a brand-new physical-modeling primitive вҖ” dodges drum-machine AND the recent kids GPU-physics-sim rut: this is a *solved acoustic field you hear*, not a physics toy you watch) В· **warm self-resolving water VIBE** (ripples spread then settle вҖ” neither refuse-to-resolve nor pentatonic-lullaby). Winner of a **WIDE** 3-explorer kids fire fired off three grep-verified-fresh registers: siblings `479-kids-duet-bloom` (first cooperative two-player kids instrument вҖ” the chord only blooms when *both* play together; dual-input synchrony engine, SVG) + `480-kids-sing-bird` (SING and your pitch flies a bird along a melody contour; real-time YIN voice-pitch, SVG) are complete, build-reviewed implementations banked in IDEAS В§378. **Build-verified (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `/dream/478-kids-wave-pond` prerendered in the manifest; `npx eslint --max-warnings=0` on the folder clean), NOT browser-verified** (no GPU / audio / touch in this sandbox) вҖ” unverified surface: whether a 64Г—64 grid stepped at 44.1 kHz in an AudioWorklet holds real-time on a low-end phone (builder flags it ~180 MFLOP/s вҖ” a production version would sub-rate the stepping or shrink the grid; ScriptProcessor fallback is heavier); whether the raw single-cell pickup reads as a pleasing "water-strike" vs. a low rumble behind the limiter (the pentatonic tone-synth layer carries the pitched warmth); whether tap-to-sound lands <50 ms (injection bypasses React state via a ref); the iOS AudioWorklet Blob-URL + AudioContext-in-gesture path.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/478-kids-wave-pond/README.md`

- **[/dream/486-third-room](/dream/486-third-room)** вҖ” Third Room рҹҸӣпёҸ. `demoable` В· Cycle 381. **For**: adults / live performance.

  **Cycle 3 of the Resonant Room spine: a live-MIDI room split into a tritone clash вҖ” but now with a THIRD room a just-fifth above that shares Room A's harmonics, so you can negotiate the tritone into rest by routing it through a consonant intermediary, not just collapsing it.** Every played note feeds three parallel banks of N=8 high-Q biquad bandpass resonators: **Room A** (reference, panned вҲ’20В° L, violet), **Room B** (the tritone interloper, +detune 0вҖ“600 Вў, default 600 Вў, +35В° R, rose), and **Room C** (a **just-fifth, 702 Вў = 3:2** above A, вҲ’35В° L, emerald вҖ” its 2nd/4th/6th partials lock onto A's 3rd/6th/9th, so AвҶ”C is intrinsically consonant). A **Room C blend slider** brings the bridge in from silence; the resolution gesture is *blend C in вҶ’ find the pivot note where all three rooms momentarily agree вҶ’ then collapse the detune*. A real-time **PlompвҖ“Levelt / Sethares roughness** engine (computed over all cross-room partial pairs, C weighted by its blend) drives a Tension bar (Resolved вҶ’ Settling вҶ’ Tense вҶ’ Dissonant вҶ’ Clashing) and a **steepest-descent pivot-note hint layer** that analytically scans MIDI 48вҖ“84 each ~18 frames and glows the 2вҖ“3 notes that most lower total three-room roughness emerald on the keyboard вҖ” a partner that whispers crossroads without forcing one. Rendered as a **WebGPU compute vorticity field** (the lab's starved renderer): ~4,000 particles in a WGSL ping-pong compute shader, three room-attractors, roughness вҶ’ per-room vorticity (Room C calms to laminar emerald as you find consonance while AвҶ”B stays turbulent at full tritone), with a real Canvas2D three-attractor fallback. Live Web MIDI + on-screen + QWERTY input; 3-s hands-free auto-demo (plays at full tritone then blends C in); brick-wall limiter; iOS AudioContext-in-gesture. **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client-side Web Audio + Web MIDI + WebGPU/Canvas2D вҖ” no mic, camera, network, or secrets). No new npm deps.

  References: **Plomp & Levelt 1965** / **Sethares 1993** / **MacCallum & Einbond, "Real-Time Analysis of Sensory Dissonance," CMMR 2008** (the roughness model) В· **Stautner & Puckette 1982** / **Jot & Chaigne 1991** (FDN/tuned-resonator lineage) В· **just intonation 3:2 = 702 Вў** (the Pythagorean fifth вҖ” the consonant bridge). Born from RESEARCH В§381 (the dive confirmed no fresh <14-day sensory-dissonance paper вҖ” the foundational MacCallumвҖ“Einbond real-time roughness model stays the right tool вҖ” and positively bound the renderer: WebGPU compute particle fields with ping-pong buffers [ShaderVine's 16 compute sims, nibi's TSL flow patterns] are the live 2026 register). **Ambition 4/5**: **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (live Web MIDI + **three** coupled resonator rooms + real-time roughness analysis + steepest-descent pivot-note suggestion engine + WebGPU compute vorticity field = 5) + **#3** named refs (above) + **#4** multi-cycle commitment (cycle 3 of the Resonant Room spine вҖ” the truest *extension*: one room [475] вҶ’ two [483] вҶ’ three) + (#5 honestly NOT claimed вҖ” refs foundational, no <14-day binding; #1 NOT claimed вҖ” WebGPU compute exists at `444`, roughness at `483`). **This directly answers the JURY (2026-06-10): #1** bring genuine tension the listener resolves *through action* (blend вҶ’ pivot вҶ’ collapse, never auto-resolved), **#2** *deepen* an existing lab-first into cycle 3 by extension rather than grabbing a 5th DSP primitive, **#3** ban three.js + pick a starved renderer (**WebGPU**, 0Г— in the last 10; dodges the WebGL2 4Г— count-ban). **Diversity** `picked=[**live-MIDI INPUT** (starved, jury's pick, spine continuity) В· **WebGPU compute OUTPUT** (0Г— starved, jury-flagged; dodges banned three.js + WebGL2-4Г— count-ban) В· **three-room tritone-vs-just-fifth negotiation + real-time roughness TECHNIQUE** (a spine *extension*, not a new primitive вҖ” dodges the jury's "first-DSP-primitive" treadmill) В· **cold/ambiguous-tension-you-resolve-through-action VIBE** (the jury's exact #1 ask вҖ” the opposite of the 15Г— warm-consonant monoculture)]`. **Love signal:** `130-tsl-particle-compute`вқӨпёҸ (a loved GPU-compute particle piece) softly backs the WebGPU vorticity field; `105-pluck-field`вқӨпёҸ / `140-kids-string-bridge`вқӨпёҸ back a resonator piece вҖ” additive, the jury + spine governed. Winner of a **DEEP** 3-approach adult fire (one cycle-3 concept вҖ” *deepen 483 with a steepest-descent partner + the starved WebGPU renderer* вҖ” three resolution mechanics): siblings `485-resolving-room` (the whisper-panel note-hint engine + detune gradient arrow) + `487-guided-descent` (a roughness *landscape* with a shared-control "descend toward rest" autopilot) are complete, build-reviewed implementations banked in IDEAS В§381 as cycle-4 fold-ins. **Build-verified (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `/dream/486-third-room/page` in `app-paths-manifest.json`; `npx eslint --max-warnings=0` on the folder clean вҖ” one unused eslint-disable directive removed as the single fix), NOT browser-verified** (no MIDI device / GPU / audio in this sandbox) вҖ” unverified surface: whether the analytically-predicted pivot notes actually *sound* resolved to the ear (the PlompвҖ“Levelt model is an approximation, not ground truth вҖ” players may explore a few candidates); whether 3Г—8 high-Q biquads per held note stays clean polyphonically behind the limiter; whether the just-fifth AвҶ”C consonance reads as a genuine *bridge* vs. just more sound on phone speakers; `requestMIDIAccess` + hotplug on Karel's controller (on-screen/QWERTY fallback covers no-device); whether WebGPU initializes on Karel's review phone (Canvas2D fallback covers no-`navigator.gpu`); the iOS AudioContext-in-gesture path.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/486-third-room/README.md`

### [493-kids-feeling-forest](/dream/493-kids-feeling-forest) В· kids В· cycle 384 В· demoable
  **Cross a glowing "feeling forest" with your BODY вҖ” every place sounds like a different feeling, and you find calm (or stay in the bittersweet middle) by *moving*, not by pressing a "resolve" button.** The lab's first **explorable continuous harmony-tension MAP**: the screen is a top-down world; a glowing spirit sits at the child's position; **6 mood anchors** вҖ” Storm (m2+tritone+m9 cluster, 22Вў beating, sawtooth, fast tremolo, 380 Hz LP), Electric (aug+dom7), Bittersweet sus2 center, Dream whole-tone, Sweet major, Calm (open fifth+octave, 0Вў detune, no tremolo, 2200 Hz) вҖ” are blended at every position by **inverse-distance-weighting (power 2)**. Chord voicing (fractional semitone offsets вҖ” no scale-snapping), detune, oscillator timbre, per-voice filter cutoff, and tremolo rate all morph **continuously**, so dissonanceвҶ”consonance is a smooth **spatial gradient the child drives by walking**. There is no pre-baked cadence вҖ” tension is the subject; you resolve it (or dwell in it) through navigation. **Navigation by BODY/camera (primary, the jury's starved depth-camera input):** MediaPipe PoseLandmarker (loaded from CDN at runtime, no npm dep) maps the child's mirrored body/nose position onto the canvas; **drag/pointer fallback** if camera denied (`text-rose-300` banner) or MediaPipe CDN fails; **always-on auto-demo** wanders pricklyвҶ’electricвҶ’bittersweetвҶ’sweetвҶ’calmвҶ’dreamy (~14 s loop) from page load so the sandbox always makes evolving sound + visuals hands-free; any touch/camera input stops it. **Canvas2D only** (8Г—8 mood-tinted grid вҖ” cold/jittering where dissonant, warm/steady where calm вҖ” + glowing creature that vibrates & sprouts spiky rays in tense zones, trail, tension-keyed particles, tiny live camera-position indicator). DynamicsCompressor limiter (вҲ’6 dBFS) so it can never get harsh-loud; AudioContext created inside the Start gesture (iOS). **No API route, no `guard`** (Web Audio + Canvas2D + on-device camera; the only network is the MediaPipe CDN + model; no mic-audio leaves the browser, no secrets). No new npm deps.

  Reference: **Chu, A., Smith, J. B. & Pardo, B., *FXplorer: A Map-Based Interface for Exploratory Audio Effect Design*, arXiv 2606.08286 (NIME 2026, listed 2026-06-09)** вҖ” replace menus/sliders with a continuous 2-D map you *navigate*; discover sound by *wandering*. This adapts it for pre-readers: the map encodes harmony+tension (not effect params) and the **body** is the cursor. Born from RESEARCH В§384 (the dive *implemented* a <14-day finding вҖ” the missing 5th criterion the jury said kept every recent piece at 4/5). **Ambition 5/5**: **#1** never-used technique (explorable continuous harmony-tension map navigated by movement вҖ” grep-verified lab-first; `148-spatial-palette` is a pan/pitch *arranger*, `410-conchordal-garden` is autonomous a-life, neither is a navigable mood field) + **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (MediaPipe pose camera input + IDW harmony-morph synth + Canvas2D field/creature renderer + auto-demo wanderer = 4) + **#3** named ref (FXplorer) + **#4** multi-cycle (cycle 1 of a new **Sound-Map / explorable-harmony kids spine**) + **#5** binds a <14-day finding (FXplorer, 2026-06-09 вҖ” implemented, not negatively-steered). **Answers the JURY (2026-06-10): #1** brings genuine tension the listener resolves *through action* (a dissonant region you walk out of, never a pre-baked VвҖ“I) вҖ” breaking the 15Г— warm-consonant monoculture; **#3** picks a *starved* input (**depth-camera, 0Г—**) and a fresh renderer (**Canvas2D**, 1Г— in last 10 вҖ” dodges banned three.js + WebGL2-4Г— count-ban) вҖ” and is the **first build to claim #5/hit 5/5** in the window (the jury: "no piece hit 5/5 because the dive never binds"). **Diversity** `banned=[touch INPUT (~5Г—), three.js + WebGL2-4Г— OUTPUT, FAL-latent + real-piano + DSP-physical-modeling-treadmill + physics-sim TECHNIQUE, warm-consonant-resolves VIBE] В· picked=[**body/camera-pose INPUT** (starved depth-camera, jury's pick; love-aligned вҖ” 104вқӨпёҸ/101вқӨпёҸ/234вқӨпёҸ) В· **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (fresh, dodges three.js + WebGL2) В· **explorable-harmony-map / IDW-morph TECHNIQUE** (lab-first, not a DSP-primitive farm) В· **tension-gradient-you-resolve-by-moving VIBE** (the jury's exact #1 ask)]` вҖ” no banned tag. **Love signal:** camera-driven kids pieces are loved (`104-kids-mirror-draw`вқӨпёҸ, `101-camera-song`вқӨпёҸ, `234-kids-hand-creature`вқӨпёҸ) вҖ” additive backing for body-navigation; the jury + ambition/diversity gates governed the pick. Winner of a **DEEP** 3-approach kids fire (one Sound-Map concept, three navigation inputs): siblings `494-kids-weather-walk` (drag baseline вҖ” lost on the banned touch input) + `495-kids-singing-valley` (voiceвҶ’XY via hand-written YIN вҖ” strong, banked) are complete build-reviewed implementations in IDEAS В§384. **Build-verified (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `/dream/493-kids-feeling-forest` 5.91 kB prerendered static), NOT browser-verified** (no camera/audio/GPU in this sandbox) вҖ” unverified surface: whether MediaPipe pose tracks a small child held close (HandLandmarker may track better вҖ” flagged for cycle 2); whether the dissonantвҶ’consonant gradient *reads* on phone speakers behind the limiter; whether a 4yo connects body-motion to the sound; iOS AudioContext-in-gesture + MediaPipe Blob/WASM load. The always-on auto-demo + drag fallback are the safety nets so absent camera never blocks the 06:30 demo.

### [496-voyager-room](/dream/496-voyager-room) В· adults / live performance В· cycle 385 В· demoable
  **You don't play notes вҖ” you CONDUCT a room of five autonomous machine musicians who listen to each other and to you, leaning the collective harmony into deliberate dissonance and releasing it back to consonance.** Press **Start / Conduct the room** and five named agents are already improvising together: **VEGA** (Leader вҖ” states the root motif), **LYRA** (Harmonist вҖ” roughness-*minimizing*), **DRACO** (Provocateur вҖ” roughness-*raising*, tritone/m2-biased, dial-weighted), **ECHO** (Follower вҖ” imitates the loudest peer transposed, drawing the lit answering edge), **NEBULA** (Drifter вҖ” whole-tone pad). You shape them with a **TENSION dial** (consonanceвҮ„dissonance, the primary control), **TEMPO**, and **spotlight** (tap an orb to make it lead). All notes snap to **D dorian** so dissonance is always a *layered choice*, never noise. This is the lab's **first multi-agent autonomous machine-improviser ensemble** (every prior improviser вҖ” 251/256/375/380/391/210/298 вҖ” is a *single* partner that follows YOU; this is a room of agents with their own will that you conduct) and the new **Machine Ensemble / Voyager spine**, cycle 1.

  Subsystems (вүҘ3 вҶ’ 5+): (1) **5 per-agent probabilistic generators** (`agents.ts`) вҖ” each with its own personality bias, timbre (oscillator + partial set), stereo pan, color. (2) **Shared listening buffer** вҖ” every due agent reads the *previous frame's* collective events. (3) **Real-time PlompвҖ“Levelt/Sethares sensory-roughness steering** (`roughness.ts`) вҖ” each candidate note is scored by the predicted roughness *if it joined the currently-sounding partials*, then steered (softmax-sampled) toward the conductor's tension target; Harmonist pulls roughness down, Provocateur pushes it up. (4) **Frame-synchronous beat clock** вҖ” agents emit in lock-step (StreamMUSE's frame-synchronous streaming inference, on-device). (5) **Conducting UI** + (6) **Canvas2D constellation** вҖ” orbs size/brightness = activity, lit edges = imitation, center tension-ring (ResolvedВ·SettlingВ·TenseВ·Clashing) + live roughness, orbs sprout spikes when tense, beat pulse. Always-on **auto-conduct** runs a ~20 s settleвҶ’buildвҶ’release arc so the room is alive hands-free on load. `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter; iOS AudioContext-in-gesture; audio-only graceful degrade if Canvas2D null. **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client synthesis вҖ” no mic, camera, network, or secrets). No new npm deps.

  References: **George Lewis, _Voyager_ (1980sвҖ“present)** вҖ” the canonical autonomous machine-improviser "virtual orchestra" that listens and responds with its own musical will (the machines have agency; the human conducts a collective, not a tool). **StreamMUSE вҖ” "Real-Time Language Model Jamming: A Case Study for Live Music Accompaniment Generation," Bowen Zheng et al., arXiv 2606.11886 (submitted 2026-06-10)** вҖ” *frame-synchronous streaming inference*, implemented on-device as the lock-step generation loop. **Plomp & Levelt 1965 / Sethares 1998** вҖ” the sensory-roughness model. Born from RESEARCH В§385 (the dive *implemented* a <14-day finding and logged two negative results: the JURY-flagged WebRTC-multi-user lane is *occupied* by 319/334/341 BroadcastChannel collab, and the responsive-accompanist lane is *saturated* вҖ” both rejected as "too similar" traps, triangulating onto the genuine gap). **Ambition 5/5:** **#1** never-used technique (multi-agent autonomous machine-improviser ensemble you conduct вҖ” grep-clean) + **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (5+) + **#3** named refs (Voyager / StreamMUSE / PlompвҖ“LeveltвҖ“Sethares) + **#4** multi-cycle (Machine Ensemble spine cycle 1) + **#5** binds a <14-day finding (StreamMUSE 2026-06-10 вҖ” implemented, not cited). The window's 2nd 5/5. **Answers JURY 2026-06-10:** **#1** genuine tension the listener resolves *through action* (conduct the dial вҖ” never a pre-baked cadence; breaks the 15Г— warm-consonant monoculture) В· **#3** bans three.js (Canvas2D) and picks a fresh non-saturated direction. **Diversity** `banned=[three.js / AI-image-FAL / real-piano / DSP-physical-modeling-first + physics-sim / warm-consonant-resolves] В· picked=[**conductor-gesture INPUT** (dial/tap вҖ” fresh) В· **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (dodges three.js + WebGL2-4Г— count) В· **multi-agent-autonomous-improvisation TECH** (not a DSP-primitive farm) В· **tension-you-conduct-and-resolve VIBE** (the JURY's exact #1 ask)]` вҖ” no banned tag. **Love signal:** `236-particle-life-song`вқӨпёҸ (a-life agents) + `130-tsl-particle-compute`вқӨпёҸ softly back an autonomous-agent ensemble; additive, the JURY + gates governed. Winner of a **DEEP** 3-agent-brain adult fire (one concept, three machine-ensemble brains): siblings `497-call-ring` (ring-canon of imitation, SPREAD knob, Canvas2D) + `498-swarm-score` (48-agent circle-of-fifths consensus + tritone dissidents, WebGL2) are complete, build-reviewed implementations banked in IDEAS В§385 as the spine's cycle-2/3 candidates. **Build-verified (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `вң“ Compiled successfully`, `/dream/496-voyager-room` in `app-paths-manifest.json`; `npx eslint --max-warnings=0` on the folder clean), NOT browser-verified** (no audio/GPU in this sandbox) вҖ” unverified surface: whether the tension dial *audibly* swings consonanceвҶ”dissonance at typical chord density (roughness-normalization constants are empirical, may need a numeric tweak); the by-ear balance of the five voices (saw/square brightness, drifter pad level); `setTimeout`-chained clock jitter under load; phone tap-to-spotlight ergonomics; iOS audio-unlock. Auto-conduct + audio-only degrade are the safety nets so the 06:30 demo always makes evolving sound.

### [500-kids-aurora-tilt](/dream/500-kids-aurora-tilt) В· kids (4+) В· cycle 386 В· demoable
  **Tilt a tablet to bend a glowing aurora вҖ” tilt it far and the sky goes tense, shimmery and electric-violet; hold it flat and still and the lights widen, warm, and the music resolves home. The child holds all the tension in their hands and chooses, at any moment, to let it go.** A kids piece whose whole subject is **tension the listener resolves *through action*** (the jury's exact #1 ask) вҖ” embodied as the simplest possible gesture: level the device. No reading, no menus, no "right answer"; just a beautiful sky that calms when you hold steady.

  Subsystems (вүҘ3 вҶ’ 5): (1) **device-tilt / gyro input** вҖ” `deviceorientation` (`beta`/`gamma`), one-pole smoothed (Оұ=0.08), iOS 13+ `DeviceOrientationEvent.requestPermission()` called inside the Start gesture; denied/missing вҶ’ **pointer-drag fallback** (drag sets virtual ОІ/Оі). (2) **WebGL2 domain-warp aurora shader** вҖ” raw GLSL ES 3.00 full-screen fragment shader using IГұigo Quilez's recursive `fbm(p + fbm(p + fbm(p)))` domain-warp; three aurora layers + wisps whose fold sharpness, flow speed, fBm octave count (3вҶ’6), lacunarity and palette (warm-green/teal вҶ’ electric violet/magenta) all scale with tension; deep-indigo sky + deterministic star field; rendered at 65% DPR for perf; WebGL2-absent вҶ’ `text-rose-300` notice + audio continues. (3) **evolving modal pad synth** вҖ” four sine+triangle voice pairs that voice-lead from an open-fifth+octave home voicing (C3 G3 C4 G4) to a sus4/add9 "yearning but never ugly" tense voicing (C3 F3 D4 Bвҷӯ4) via `setTargetAtTime`, with tilt-scaled tremolo depth/rate on the upper voices; DynamicsCompressor brick-wall limiter (вҲ’6 dB, 20:1) + 8.8 kHz lowpass (kids-safe); AudioContext created inside the Start gesture. (4) **tilt-tension engine** вҖ” `tension = clamp(вҲҡ(ОІВІ+ОіВІ)/45В°, 0, 1)` from the smoothed 2-D tilt vector, fed every frame to BOTH the shader uniforms and the audio params so visual and harmonic tension move as one. (5) **always-on auto-demo** вҖ” a hands-free Lissajous wander (`sin(tВ·0.31)В·28В°`, `sin(tВ·0.19+1.2)В·22В°`) drives the aurora + music on load with **zero permissions**, cancelled on the first real tilt/drag вҖ” so a no-touch 06:30 phone glance always shows it singing and moving. **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client-side Web Audio + WebGL2 вҖ” no mic, camera, network, or secrets). No new npm deps.

  Reference: **IГұigo Quilez, "Domain Warping"** (iquilezles.org/articles/warp) вҖ” the recursive `fbm(p + fbm(p + fbm(p)))` technique that yields organic curtain/cloud structure; the visual metaphor echoes real aurora-borealis physics (charged particles folded along magnetic field lines). Born from RESEARCH В§386 (the dive's honest meta-finding: at ~360 prototypes the lab has exhausted easy all-time kids #1-lab-firsts, so the floor is cleared via #2+#3 and the cycle competes on surprise + diversity + execution). **Ambition 2/5**: **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (5, above) + **#3** named reference (iq Domain Warping). (#1 NOT claimed вҖ” domain warping / tilt / aurora all exist in the lab individually; the fresh element is the *tilt-as-tension-dial resolve-by-leveling* interaction, an interaction pattern, not a new primitive вҖ” honest. #5 NOT claimed вҖ” ref is foundational, no <14-day binding.) **Answers JURY 2026-06-10:** **#1** genuine tension the listener resolves *through action* (level the device вҖ” never a pre-baked cadence; opposite of the 15Г— warm-consonant monoculture) В· **#3** bans three.js (raw WebGL2) and dodges the count-banned Canvas2D (4Г— last-10). **Diversity** `banned=[touch INPUT; Canvas2D-4Г— + three.js OUTPUT; AI-image/FAL + real-piano + DSP-physical-modeling-first + physics-sim TECH; warm-consonant-resolves VIBE] В· picked=[**device-tilt/gyro INPUT** (fresh, 0Г— last-10) В· **WebGL2-shader OUTPUT** (2Г— last-10, dodges Canvas2D + three.js) В· **domain-warp-aurora + tilt-tension TECH** В· **tension-by-tilt-resolved-by-leveling VIBE** (the jury's #1)]` вҖ” no banned tag. **Love signal:** `262-aurora-particle`вқӨпёҸ (aurora palette) + `83-kids-tilt-rain`вқӨпёҸ (tilt input) softly back the pick; additive вҖ” the gates governed. **Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer kids fire** (three orthogonal fresh-tag directions): siblings `499-kids-sky-bells` (the **real live sky singing** вҖ” Open-Meteo weather вҶ’ WebGL2 soundscape; highest surprise + the starved real-world-data menu category, but observational tension вҶ’ better as an adult/all-ages piece) + `501-kids-hum-garden` (bloom an SVG flower by humming **steadily**, not on-target вҖ” freshest resolution mechanic, but child-voice YIN unverified) are complete, build-reviewed implementations banked in IDEAS В§386. **Build-verified (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `вң“ Compiled successfully`, `/dream/500-kids-aurora-tilt` prerendered static 6.03 kB; `npx eslint --max-warnings=0` on the folder clean вҖ” one react-hooks/exhaustive-deps ref-cleanup warning fixed via `const live = liveRef.current`), NOT browser-verified** (no GPU/gyro/audio in this sandbox) вҖ” unverified surface: whether the 3-layer domain-warp aurora (~72 noise evals/px, 65% DPR) holds вүҘ30 fps on an older mobile GPU; whether `deviceorientation` + iOS `requestPermission` works on Karel's review phone (pointer-drag + auto-demo cover no-gyro); whether the chord *audibly* swings homeвҶ”tense behind the limiter on phone speakers; the iOS AudioContext-in-gesture unlock. Auto-demo (no permission) + drag fallback + WebGL2-absent audio-only are the safety nets so the 06:30 demo always shows evolving sound + light.

### [502-atmosphere-veil](/dream/502-atmosphere-veil) В· adults / ambient / live data В· cycle 387 В· demoable
  **The entire planet's *live* weather, breathing as one sustained, unresolved chord вҖ” and the dissonance only relaxes when the real sky calms, never on a timer, never on a tap.** A long-form (8+ minute), ever-evolving ADULT ambient instrument. Press **Start** once (AudioContext gesture) and leave it: a sustained spectral drone breathes under a WebGPU compute-driven field of ~60,000 particles riding a global wind field, and **both** the harmonic tension and the visual turbulence track the same scalar вҖ” **global atmospheric instability** read live from the real weather. This is **cycle 3 of the Living Earth spine** (earthquakes вҶ’ space-weather вҶ’ atmosphere; after `463-terra-gamelan` and `471-helios-orbit`).

  Subsystems (вүҘ3 вҶ’ 4): (1) **live real-world-data engine** (`weather.ts`) вҖ” ONE batched Open-Meteo request for 12 globe-spanning cities (London/NY/Tokyo/Sydney/Moscow/Singapore/SГЈo Paulo/Mexico City/Delhi/Nairobi/ReykjavГӯk/Ushuaia), polled every 75 s, fetched directly client-side (no API route, no secret), with previous-poll pressure memory so a **falling barometer** (the classic building-storm tell) adds tension; per-city instability = wind(0.40) + low/falling-pressure(0.35 +0.25 bonus) + cloud(0.25); global tension = 0.6В·mean + 0.4В·peak so one violent storm reads against a calm planet. (2) **sustained-tension drone synth** (`audio.ts`) вҖ” open fifths+octaves (just-intonation ratios) at rest; as tension rises, partials detune into audible **beating** (Вұ14Вў), **tension tones** (m2 16/15, tritone 45/32, b9) fade in on a quadratic curve, and a roughness tremolo deepens; relaxation is **asymmetric** (rises faster than it falls) and the smoother only ever moves toward the data's value вҖ” **no scheduled cadence anywhere**. (3) **WebGPU compute particle field** (`gpu.ts`) вҖ” a compute shader advects ~60k particles through 12 city "vortices" (swirl вҲқ instability) + tension-scaled value-noise turbulence; speed/turbulence/color-temp (cool indigo вҶ’ warm amber/rose) all climb with tension; `navigator.gpu` absent вҶ’ `text-rose-300` notice + a Canvas2D dot-field fallback driven by the same wind model, audio always continues. (4) **long-form memory** вҖ” the tonal center drifts Вұ70Вў on a very slow sinusoid and a voicing-mutation phase slowly re-weights the partials, so **minute 8 differs from minute 1** even at identical tension; it never loops. Plus an **always-on synthetic-weather auto-demo** (per-city sinusoids + a low-pressure system that drifts across and wraps the planet) that drives sound + light from the first frame and on any fetch failure, with an honest `LIVE`вҶ”`DEMO DATA` HUD вҖ” so a hands-free 06:30 phone glance always shows it evolving. `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter (вҲ’6 dB / 12:1) + вүӨ0.5 master gain, 4 s fade-in (intentionally quiet). **No API route, no `guard`** (Open-Meteo fetched directly from the client; no mic, camera, or secrets). No new npm deps (`@webgpu/types` is existing dev-only typings).

  Reference: **Гүliane Radigue** (ARP-2500 works вҖ” *Trilogie de la Mort*, *Adnos* вҖ” where slow sustained tones' beating interference patterns *are* the music; this borrows that beating-as-tension language) + spectral-tradition thinking after **GГ©rard Grisey** (*Partiels* вҖ” consonance/dissonance as a continuous instability-driven axis, not chord changes). **Ambition 2/5**: **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (4, above) + **#4** multi-cycle (Living Earth spine cycle 3). (#1 NOT claimed вҖ” WebGPU, long-form, and external-API sonification all already exist in the lab individually; the fresh element is *atmosphere-as-sustained-tension*, a concept not a new primitive вҖ” honest. #5 NOT claimed вҖ” today's arxiv cs.SD (Jun 11) is server-side ML only, nothing client-implementable; said plainly rather than gamed.) **Answers JURY 2026-06-10:** brings genuine **sustained, unresolved harmonic tension the data resolves** (breaks the 15Г— warm-consonant monoculture вҖ” provocation #1) В· **deepens an existing spine** instead of farming a new DSP primitive (provocation #2) В· picks the **starved real-world-data input** and the **starved WebGPU output** (1Г— in the window), explicitly dodging the banned three.js + the over-represented raw-WebGL2 (4Г—) + Canvas2D (4Г—) (provocation #3). **Diversity** `banned=[touch + real-piano INPUT; three.js + Canvas2D-4Г— + raw-WebGL2-4Г— OUTPUT; AI-image/FAL + physics-sim + DSP-physical-modeling-first TECH; warm-consonant-resolves VIBE] В· picked=[**live-weather-API INPUT** (real-world-data, starved menu category) В· **WebGPU-compute OUTPUT** (starved 1Г—, dodges three.js/WebGL2/Canvas2D) В· **live-data-sonification + spectral-tension TECH** (not a DSP-primitive farm) В· **sustained-unresolved-atmospheric-tension-the-data-resolves VIBE** (the jury's #1)]` вҖ” no banned tag. **Love signal:** `262-aurora-particle`вқӨпёҸ (atmospheric particle palette) + `233-earth-pulse`/`314-solar-wind` lineage softly back a planetary-data particle field; additive вҖ” the jury + ambition/diversity gates governed the pick. **Winner of a DEEP 3-approach adult fire** (one atmosphere concept, three renderers): siblings `503-atmosphere-front` (WebGL2 raymarched **volumetric storm-clouds** + lightning-on-rise вҖ” lost on the diversity audit, WebGL2 over-represented) + `504-atmosphere-isobar` (Canvas2D **isobar/pressure-gradient instrument**, Ikeda data-grid вҖ” the most rigorous dataвҶ’tension math but rendered in banned Canvas2D) are complete, build-reviewed implementations banked in IDEAS В§387. **Build-verified (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `/dream/502-atmosphere-veil` prerendered; folder `tsc`+`eslint` clean per builder), NOT browser-verified** (no WebGPU/audio/network in this sandbox) вҖ” unverified surface: whether the WGSL compute/render pipelines compile + run on a real WebGPU device (binding layouts/vertex strides may need a first-run tweak; Canvas2D fallback covers WebGPU-absent); whether Open-Meteo's live payload shape + CORS resolve from Karel's browser (synthetic auto-demo covers fetch failure); whether the instability thresholds (tuned on m/s) read as a real calmвҶ”storm arc against live values; whether the drone *audibly* swings consonanceвҶ”dissonance behind the limiter; the iOS AudioContext-in-gesture unlock. Synthetic auto-demo + Canvas2D fallback + audio-only degrade are the safety nets so the 06:30 demo always shows evolving sound + light.

### [505-kids-pulse-bridge](/dream/505-kids-pulse-bridge) В· kids (4+) В· cycle 388 В· demoable
  **The music can only resolve home when two children tap *together* вҖ” when their two separate pulses lock into the same shared rhythm, a bridge of light completes between them and the chord blooms warm.** The screen splits into two giant tap-pads (warm **gold** left, cool **teal** right), one child per side. Each taps a steady beat; a glowing ring blooms on every tap. Out of sync, the two voices hold a yearning major-2nd and the bridge between the halves is broken into separate sparks вҖ” *not wrong, just "not yet together."* As the two players lock into the same rhythm, the voices voice-lead home to a warm open fifth, the bridge completes into a continuous glowing arc, and fireflies stream across it. There is **no wrong move and no fail state** вҖ” out of sync is "not yet," in sync is "together вңЁ." This is the lab's **first piece where synchrony *between two humans* gates the harmonic resolution** (every prior two-finger kids piece вҖ” `484-two-suns` spatial blend, `489-pond-pair` energy transfer вҖ” maps the fingers independently; none measures whether the two players are *in time with each other*), and cycle 1 of the new **"Together" spine**.

  Subsystems (вүҘ3 вҶ’ 5): (1) **dual pointer tracking** вҖ” Pointer-Events `pointerId` + pointer-capture so two fingers on two halves register simultaneously; each side's recent inter-tap intervals вҶ’ a mean tempo. (2) **synchrony engine** вҖ” each player is a phase oscillator `ПҶ(t) = 2ПҖВ·((tвҲ’lastTap) mod ITV)/ITV`; the **Kuramoto order parameter** `R = |ОЈ exp(iВ·(ПҶ_LвҲ’ПҶ_R))| / N` over a sliding window measures phase lock, gated by a tempo-similarity factor (penalised above 1.25Г—) and compressed `R^0.65` so partial sync still feels good, then **asymmetrically smoothed** (П„_rise 1.8 s / П„_fall 3.2 s) so a lock must be *sustained* but a single late tap doesn't collapse it. (3) **adaptive voice-leading synth** вҖ” two pluck voices `setTargetAtTime`-glide from a yearning A3/B3 major-2nd toward a warm C4/G4 open fifth **as synchrony rises**, with a CвҖ“EвҖ“G arrival shimmer on the lock-threshold crossing; a C2+G2 ambient pad always underneath so it's never silent. (4) **Canvas2D bridge + firefly renderer** вҖ” a cubic-bezier light bridge broken/dim at low sync вҶ’ continuous glowing arc with particles flowing across + warm radial bloom at lock; expanding tap rings. (5) **26 s auto-demo** вҖ” two simulated tappers walk an apartвҶ’convergingвҶ’lockedвҶ’drifting arc driving all subsystems hands-free on load (cancels on first real tap), so a no-touch 06:30 glance always shows a completing bridge. `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter + вүӨ9 kHz lowpass (kids-safe); AudioContext in the Start gesture (iOS unlock); Canvas2D-null вҶ’ audio continues + `text-rose-300` notice. **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client synthesis вҖ” no mic, camera, network, or secrets). No new npm deps.

  References: **The Moving Mandala** (Carreras et al., *Int. J. of Clinical and Health Psychology*, 2025вҖ“26) вҖ” rhythmic music as a *temporal scaffold* for child interpersonal synchrony and prosocial closeness; the finding that *shared rhythmic entrainment promotes felt closeness between children* is exactly why lock-in (not a score, not a reward) is the resolution here. **"Finding Our Tempo: Exploring Embodied Synchrony Through Full-Body Play in Children"** (TEI 2026) вҖ” synchrony must be *felt, not read*. Born from RESEARCH В§388 (the dive's convergent 2025вҖ“26 finding that two children coming into sync is the highest-value musical interaction for them). **Ambition 4/5**: **#1** never-used technique (interpersonal two-human synchrony / Kuramoto phase-coupling gating resolution вҖ” grep-clean) + **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (5, above) + **#3** named refs (Moving Mandala / Finding Our Tempo) + **#4** multi-cycle ("Together" spine cycle 1). (#5 NOT claimed вҖ” the cited papers are weeksвҖ“months old, not <14 days; said plainly.) **Answers JURY 2026-06-10:** genuine tension the players resolve **through action** (playing in time together вҖ” never a pre-baked cadence; the resolution is withheld until synchrony, breaking the 15Г— warm-consonant monoculture) and dodges the banned three.js. **Diversity** `banned=[three.js OUTPUT В· AI-image/FAL + DSP-physical-modeling-first + physics-sim TECH В· real-piano INPUT В· warm-consonant-resolves VIBE] В· picked=[**two-child-multitouch-tap INPUT** (fresh, 0Г— last-10) В· **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (not in the hard-ban list) В· **interpersonal-synchrony/Kuramoto TECH** (fresh, not a DSP-primitive farm) В· **prosocial-tension-resolved-by-playing-TOGETHER VIBE** (the jury's #1)]` вҖ” no hard-ban tag. **Love signal:** `83-kids-tilt-rain`вқӨпёҸ + `98-kids-drum-circle`вқӨпёҸ (embodied/rhythmic kids play) softly back a two-player rhythmic-synchrony piece; additive вҖ” the gates governed. **Winner of a DEEP 3-approach kids fire** (one "Together" concept, three synchrony inputs): siblings `506-kids-orbit-meet` (continuous **motion**-phase Kuramoto orbits вҶ’ braided mandala) + `507-kids-hum-meet` (**voice**-pitch-lock to a virtual partner via child-tuned YIN, in SVG) are complete, build-reviewed implementations banked in IDEAS В§388. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `вң“ Compiled successfully`, `/dream/505-kids-pulse-bridge` prerendered static 5.44 kB, in `app-paths-manifest`), **NOT browser-verified** (no audio/multitouch in this sandbox) вҖ” unverified surface: whether the 0.82 lock-threshold is reachable by a real 4-year-old's Вұ300 ms timing jitter (the 0.65 compressive curve + 25% tempo tolerance + 3-tap window may need loosening); by-ear balance of major-2nd tension vs open-fifth resolution; two-children-one-phone ergonomics (designed for iPad вҖ” each half вүҲ45 mm on a 6" phone); iOS AudioContext-in-gesture unlock. The 26 s permission-free auto-demo is the safety net so the 06:30 demo always shows a completing bridge + evolving sound.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/505-kids-pulse-bridge/README.md`

### [508-accord-call](/dream/508-accord-call) В· adults / multi-user / live В· cycle 389 В· demoable
  **Two people in different places, each holding one voice вҖ” and the harmony resolves only when *both* move toward agreement, over a real peer-to-peer connection with no server in the middle.** Each browser is one continuous voice (vertical pointer-drag sets pitch in a ~130вҖ“520 Hz just-intonation field); each sends its pitch over an `RTCDataChannel` ~20Г—/s and synthesizes BOTH voices locally. The **PlompвҖ“Levelt / Sethares sensory-roughness** between the two voices drives everything: far from a consonant interval = audible beating + a jagged red "tension cord"; cooperate into unison/fourth/fifth/third/octave = the roughness drops, a shimmer pad blooms, and the cord becomes a smooth golden arc. **Neither player can resolve it alone** вҖ” the resolution is literally inaccessible to one will. This is the lab's **first true WebRTC peer-to-peer piece** (grep-verified: `RTCPeerConnection`/`createOffer`/`setRemoteDescription` appear in zero prior prototypes вҖ” the existing "collab" pieces 319/334/341 are same-origin **BroadcastChannel**, not a real peer connection), and **cycle 2 of the "Together" spine** (388's two-children-in-sync, now crossed from one-device-two-fingers to two-people-two-cities).

  Subsystems (вүҘ3 вҶ’ 4): (1) **WebRTC P2P signaling** (`webrtc.ts`) вҖ” pure `RTCPeerConnection`, no server/relay/WebSocket: "Create room" вҶ’ `createOffer` вҶ’ wait for ICE-gathering-complete (8 s cap) вҶ’ copyable SDP blob; peer `joinRoom(offer)` вҶ’ `createAnswer` вҶ’ copyable answer blob; creator `receiveAnswer` completes the handshake. STUN `stun:stun.l.google.com:19302`; an **unreliable, unordered** `RTCDataChannel` carries `{pitch:0..1}` at ~20 Hz (UDP-like, drops stale frames instead of queueing). (2) **dual-voice Web Audio synth** (`audio.ts`) вҖ” two 5-partial harmonic voices (1/k amplitudes) with stereo pan + slow tremolo; a 4-sine shimmer pad blooms via `shimmerGain` as consonance rises; `setVoicePitch` ramps via `setTargetAtTime`; `DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter (вүҲ вҲ’6 dB) on master; `AudioContext` created inside the Start gesture (iOS unlock). (3) **PlompвҖ“Levelt/Sethares roughness model** (`roughness.ts`) вҖ” pairwise partial roughness `r = aвӮҒaвӮӮ(e^(вҲ’bвӮҒВ·sВ·df) вҲ’ e^(вҲ’bвӮӮВ·sВ·df))`, `s = 0.24/(0.0207В·fMin + 18.96)`, summed over both harmonic series and normalized 0..1; physically grounded, not an aesthetic heuristic. (4) **SVG renderer + rAF loop** (`page.tsx`) вҖ” two glowing orbs (yours warm-gold, theirs cool-teal) positioned by pitch, a tension cord that morphs jagged-redвҶ”smooth-gold, ambient glow filters; attributes updated directly in a requestAnimationFrame loop (no React re-render). **Always-on practice partner:** on load / whenever no peer is connected, a simulated bot voice wanders and drifts toward consonant JI ratios 60% of the time so a SOLO visitor (and the hands-free 06:30 glance) hears + sees the full dissonanceвҶ’consonance arc with zero setup; labeled honestly ("practice partner вҖ” no one's connected yet") and yields the instant a real peer's data channel opens. **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client Web Audio + SVG + P2P data channel вҖ” no mic, camera, server, or secrets; the only network is the STUN handshake + the direct peer link). No new npm deps.

  References: **Plomp, R. & Levelt, W. J. M. (1965)**, "Tonal consonance and critical bandwidth," *JASA* 38(4) В· **Sethares, W. A. (1998)**, *Tuning, Timbre, Spectrum, Scale* (the roughness formulation) В· **Pauline Oliveros, *Deep Listening* (1988/2005)** вҖ” mutual, attentive sonic negotiation between players across space as the conceptual spine. Born from RESEARCH В§389 (the dive's honest cs.SD meta-finding вҖ” this week's audio ML is server-side only, so #5 is unclaimable вҖ” pivoted to the platform read: WebRTC is now native across >85% of browsers, and the JURY 2026-06-10 named WebRTC-multi-user as the 0Г— starved input in both provocations #3 and #5). **Ambition 3/5**: **#1** never-used technique (true WebRTC `RTCPeerConnection` P2P вҖ” grep-verified lab-first; BroadcastChannel вү  peer connection) + **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (4, above) + **#4** multi-cycle ("Together" spine cycle 2). (#3 named refs are foundational not the claim's backbone here; #5 NOT claimed вҖ” no <14-day finding implemented, said plainly.) **Answers JURY 2026-06-10:** genuine **tension the players resolve through action** (cooperate into consonance over the network вҖ” never a pre-baked cadence; breaks the 15Г— warm-consonant monoculture) В· **deepens an existing spine** instead of farming a new DSP primitive (provocation #2) В· picks the **explicitly-named starved input** WebRTC-multi-user (provocations #3 + #5) В· bans three.js (SVG output). **Diversity** `banned=[touch + real-piano INPUT; three.js + Canvas2D-4Г— + raw-WebGL2-4Г— OUTPUT; AI-image/FAL + DSP-physical-modeling-first + physics-sim TECH; warm-consonant-resolves VIBE] В· picked=[**WebRTC-peer INPUT** (0Г— starved, jury-named) В· **SVG OUTPUT** (fresh, dodges three.js/Canvas2D/WebGL2) В· **P2P-negotiated-roughness TECH** (not a DSP-primitive farm) В· **dissonant-until-you-both-agree VIBE** (the jury's #1)]` вҖ” no banned tag. **Love signal:** `236-particle-life-song`вқӨпёҸ (multi-agent interaction) + the embodied/together kids loves (`83`/`98`) softly back a two-human cooperative piece; additive вҖ” the jury + ambition/diversity gates governed. **Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer adult fire** (three orthogonal directions, each hitting a *different* jury-named starved menu category): siblings `509-spectral-loom` (**Web MIDI** keyboard вҶ’ a long-form **WebGPU** "loom" of harmonic threads that sour toward dissonance unless you keep tending them; Grisey *Partiels* вҖ” the long-form-evolving-adult + MIDI menu category) + `510-the-withholding` (a **conceptual/critical, non-screen** piece whose suspension resolves only when you set the phone down and give it sustained **stillness** вҖ” mic-quiet + motion stillness; Cage/Lucier/Radigue) are complete, build-reviewed implementations banked in IDEAS В§389. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `вң“ Compiled successfully`, `/dream/508-accord-call` prerendered static 7.37 kB / 110 kB First Load; two trivial lint fixes applied вҖ” unescaped quotes вҶ’ `&ldquo;`/`&rdquo;`, removed an unused `eslint-disable`), **NOT browser-verified** (no audio / second peer / network in this sandbox) вҖ” unverified surface: whether STUN traversal opens the data channel on Karel's network (strict symmetric NAT would need a TURN server вҖ” the practice-partner bot covers the no-peer case for the demo); whether the dissonanceвҶ’consonance arc *audibly* reads behind the вҲ’6 dB limiter on phone speakers; the fixed shimmer-pad frequencies (262/330/392/523) can mildly beat against non-C settling points; the SVG `preserveAspectRatio="none"` stretch on extreme aspect ratios; iOS AudioContext-in-gesture unlock. The always-on labeled practice partner is the safety net so the 06:30 hands-free glance always shows + hears the full arc with no second device.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/508-accord-call/README.md`

### [537-kids-sky-murmuration](/dream/537-kids-sky-murmuration) В· kids (4+) В· cycle 398 В· demoable
  **Look UP into a deep 3D dusk sky where a real murmuration of thousands of glowing starlings swirls in volumetric depth вҖ” and the murmuration SINGS; a finger gently shepherds it, and when the cloud splits into sub-flocks you HEAR it split into harmony, resolving back to a chord when it re-merges.** A living weather of birds you stand under вҖ” joyful, awe, no score, no wrong move. Winner of a kids **DEEP** 3-approach fire (one singing-murmuration concept on three renderers).

  Subsystems (вүҘ3 вҶ’ 5): (1) **3D boids flock engine** (`flock.ts`) вҖ” Craig Reynolds separation/alignment/cohesion in 3D with spatial-hash neighbour lookups (capped neighbour checks) + boundary avoidance, ~2.5вҖ“4k agents in typed `Float32Array`s. (2) **spatial clustering** (`computeClusters`) вҖ” grid-bucket detection of up to 4 sub-flocks every ~200 ms. (3) **emergent-state вҶ’ harmony sonification** (`audio.ts`) вҖ” cohesion/alignment-order вҶ’ harmonic richness & consonance; centroid height (Y) вҶ’ C-major-pentatonic register; each cluster sustains its OWN pentatonic voice so a **split is audible as a new interval and a merge resolves toward unison/octave**; mean speed/turbulence вҶ’ gentle tremolo + airy wash; always-on C2+G2 pad; master `gain вҶ’ lowpass(8 kHz) вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor(вҲ’6 dB, 18:1) вҶ’ destination`, all `setTargetAtTime`; AudioContext built in the Start gesture (iOS unlock). (4) **three.js volumetric render** вҖ” one `THREE.Points` cloud, additive blending + soft sprite, depth-coded colour (near-warm/far-violet), `ExpFog`, a slowly drifting camera so depth reads; geometry/material disposed on unmount. (5) **ghost-shepherd auto-demo** вҖ” a scripted 3D attractor wanders a Lissajous path and a second attractor phases in/out on a ~12 s cycle so the cloud **divides into harmonising flocks and re-merges from frame one with zero permission**; cancels on first pointer-down, resumes after ~4 s idle. Touch = a soft 3D attractor the murmuration swirls toward (single + multi-touch вҶ’ split). **Degradation:** three.js/WebGL context fail вҶ’ `text-rose-300` notice + a Canvas2D 2D dot-flock (CPU boids ~300) that still flocks + sings; audio always continues. **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client Web Audio + three.js вҖ” no mic, camera, network, or secrets). **No new npm deps** (three@0.182 is an existing installed dependency, imported normally вҖ” not via CDN, not added).

  References: **Craig Reynolds, "Flocks, Herds and Schools: A Distributed Behavioral Model," SIGGRAPH 1987** (the canonical boids rules); **starling-murmuration collective-motion science** (Cavagna et al., *Scale-free correlations in starling flocks*, PNAS 2010). Born from RESEARCH В§398 (cs.SD this window = server-side ML вҶ’ #5 unclaimable; a grep-audit confirmed the easy kids #1s are spent at ~360 prototypes вҖ” TF.js/Hands/FaceLandmarker/Pose/WebGPU/AudioWorklet/GPU-fluid/boids all taken вҖ” so the honest move is a *bigger, more diverse* concept on the *scarcest renderer*). **Ambition 3/5**: **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (5, above) + **#3** named refs (Reynolds 1987 / Cavagna PNAS 2010) + **#4** multi-cycle ("living flock that sings" spine cycle 1). (#1 NOT cleanly claimed вҖ” flocking already exists in the lab; the fresh element is *emergent-collective-flock-state-as-a-harmony-instrument, at scale, for kids* вҖ” an interaction/sonification pattern, not a clean 0Г— primitive, said plainly. #5 NOT claimed вҖ” cs.SD is server-ML.) **Diversity** `banned (rolling-10 вүҘ4Г—)=["solitary-never-resolves" VIBE] В· also-avoid (wouldвҶ’4Г—)=[Canvas2D + SVG OUTPUT] В· picked=[**touch/multi-touch INPUT** В· **three.js OUTPUT** (the scarcest renderer at 0Г— вҶ’ hardest diversification; iPad-safe where WebGPU isn't; dodges the Canvas2D/SVG 4Г— trap) В· **emergent-3D-boids вҶ’ collective-harmony TECH** (not a DSP-primitive farm) В· **joyful/awe/wonder VIBE** вҖ” neither banned pole]` вҖ” no banned tag; deliberately steers OFF yesterday's drawing-ML theme (529) so the kids set isn't two "draw вҶ’ magic ML" pieces back to back. **Love signal:** Karel's loved particle/glowing-swarm lane (`130-tsl-particle-compute`вқӨпёҸ, `236-particle-life-song`вқӨпёҸ, `262-aurora-particle`вқӨпёҸ) вҖ” a singing murmuration of light at scale; additive, the kids/ambition/diversity gates governed. Siblings `535-kids-starling-choir` (raw WebGL2 transform-feedback GPU boids ~2.5k вҖ” the technical-scale resurrect) + `536-kids-lantern-shoal` (Canvas2D friendly-character shoal вҖ” the best 4yo legibility, lost only on the Canvas2D-4Г— diversity gate) banked in IDEAS В§398. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `вң“ Compiled successfully in 83s`, `вң“ Generating static pages (434/434)`, `/dream/537-kids-sky-murmuration 6.21 kB / 297 kB First Load` prerendered static вҖ” the First Load is the three.js bundle, in line with other three.js routes), **NOT browser-verified** (no three.js/WebGL/audio in this sandbox) вҖ” unverified surface: whether 2вҖ“4 simultaneous cluster voices read as an audibly distinct *splitвҶ’merge* on a phone speaker behind the limiter (the cluster threshold may need tuning вҖ” the key thing to check live); ~2.5вҖ“4k `THREE.Points` + per-frame CPU boids holding вүҘ30 fps on an older iPad (Canvas2D ~300-agent fallback covers the worst case); iOS AudioContext-in-gesture unlock; whether the slow camera drift gives enough parallax for 3D depth on a small phone. The ghost-shepherd auto-demo + Canvas2D fallback are the safety nets so the 06:30 hands-free glance always shows a swirling, singing, splitting murmuration.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/537-kids-sky-murmuration/README.md`

### [538-xenharmonic-lattice](/dream/538-xenharmonic-lattice) В· adults / microtonal / cerebral В· cycle 399 В· demoable
  **Wander a tuning system the piano can't play вҖ” a navigable harmonic lattice in 5-limit Just Intonation, BohlenвҖ“Pierce (the non-octave 3:1 tritave), and 19-EDO, where the tension lives in the TUNING itself, not in beating partials.** Drag across an SVG Tonnetz; each node sounds an EXACT rational-ratio pitch (no 12-TET rounding) via a 4-partial luminous synth. JI chords lock in eerily pure; the syntonic-comma "pump" drifts the pitch around a loop; **BohlenвҖ“Pierce refuses Western resolution entirely**; 19-EDO sits in the uncanny valley. Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-explorer fire.

  Subsystems / tech: SVG vector Tonnetz (9Г—7 / 7Г—5 / 9Г—5 node grids, indigo/violet edges, active-node glow, draggable pan) В· exact-ratio Web Audio synthesis (`freq = baseHz Г— uRatio^u Г— vRatio^v`; partials [1,2,3,5]Г—; master `gain вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor(вҲ’6 dB, 16:1) вҶ’ destination`) В· three tuning systems in `tuning.ts` (5-JI on 3/2 Г— 5/4; BP on 7/3 Г— 5/3 over the 3:1 tritave; 19-EDO on 2^(3/19) Г— 2^(5/19)) В· **ghost-finger auto-demo** walks a curated path (the 5-JI path is literally a comma loop) sounding nodes from first load with zero permission, cancels on interaction, resumes after ~4 s idle. **No API route, no guard, no npm deps, no permissions** (pure client SVG + Web Audio вҖ” no mic/camera/network/secrets).

  References: **Heinz Bohlen & John R. Pierce** (the non-octave BohlenвҖ“Pierce scale, 3:1 tritave / odd-harmonic 3:5:7:9); **Erv Wilson** (pitch lattices); **Harry Partch** *Genesis of a Music* (43-tone JI, tonality diamond); **Leonhard Euler** (the original Tonnetz, 1739). Born from **RESEARCH В§399** (the 2026 microtonal-tooling wave вҖ” Microtone Fox May-2026 gallery, Microtonal Fabric, Entonal Studio вҖ” a <30-day dive bound directly into the build). **Ambition 3/5**: **#1** never-used technique (xenharmonic *tuning-space instrument* вҖ” BohlenвҖ“Pierce / Tonnetz-lattice / 19-EDO all grep-verified 0Г— prior; JI *ratios* alone appeared only as a chord detail at 456/397, never as a navigable lattice вҖ” framed honestly) + **#3** named refs (Bohlen/Pierce/Wilson/Partch/Euler) + **#5** binds a <14-day RESEARCH В§399 finding (the 2026 microtonal wave). Directly answers **JURY 2026-06-11 provocation #1 verbatim** ("tension that lives in TUNING, not beating partials вҖ” BohlenвҖ“Pierce, 19-TET"), and also hits jury #2 (BP *refuses* resolution), #3 (SVG, not Canvas2D), #5 (one lattice you explore вҖ” not "two parties negotiating"). **Diversity** `banned/over-rep (rolling-10)=[kids-joyful VIBE вүҘ4 В· Canvas2D & WebGL2 OUTPUT ~3 each В· touch INPUT] В· picked=[**pointer/drag INPUT** В· **SVG OUTPUT** (fresh вҖ” dodges the Canvas2D/WebGL2 crowding) В· **xenharmonic-exact-ratio-tuning TECH** (lab-first, not a roughness-engine reuse) В· **cerebral/microtonal/luminous-restrained VIBE** вҖ” not kids, not warm-resolve, not two-party]` вҖ” no over-represented tag. **Love signal:** none directly applicable (microtonal is a new lane); the ambition/diversity/jury gates governed. Siblings `539-tremor-globe` (live USGS earthquake sonification on a three.js globe вҖ” lost: its "first data-sonification" #1 is false, 4+ priors incl. 337) + `540-slime-cantor` (WebGPU Physarum вҖ” lost: incomplete build + 327-physarum-choir already exists) banked in IDEAS В§399. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `вң“ Compiled successfully in 66s`, `вң“ Generating static pages (435/435)`, `/dream/538-xenharmonic-lattice 5.8 kB / 109 kB First Load` prerendered static), **NOT browser-verified** (no audio in this sandbox) вҖ” unverified surface: whether the ~21.5Вў syntonic-comma drift is audible in a casual 10-s glance (it's genuine but subtle); whether BP's "alien" quality reads on a phone speaker behind the limiter; ghost-finger 1.4 s/step pacing (meditative vs sluggish); unlimited polyphony could click under stress (a max-8 voice cap is the suggested cycle-2 hardening); iOS AudioContext-in-gesture resume. The ghost-finger auto-demo is the safety net so the 06:30 hands-free glance always shows a lattice lighting up and sounding its alien intervals.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/538-xenharmonic-lattice/README.md`

### [545-motion-loom](/dream/545-motion-loom) В· adults / polytempo / cerebral В· cycle 401 В· demoable
  **The MOTION IN A ROOM conducts a Nancarrow polytempo canon вҖ” the left and right halves of the camera each carry their own moving rhythm, extracted with NO machine learning (just optical motion energy), and because two real-world motions never lock to a clean tempo ratio, the canon drifts forever and cannot be made to agree.** Cycle 2 of `514-polytempo-loom` (which was 5 autonomous voices at fixed irrational ratios) вҖ” now the two master tempi are *conducted* by your body / the room, off the glass. Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-approach fire (ONE conducted-canon concept, three input/render attacks).

  Subsystems (вүҘ3 вҶ’ 4): (1) **no-ML motion extraction** вҖ” `getUserMedia` вҶ’ hidden 64Г—48 offscreen canvas вҶ’ per-pixel luma frame-difference, accumulated separately for the LEFT half and RIGHT half of the frame (two "conductors"); one motion-energy scalar per half per frame, zero neural net / MediaPipe / WASM. (2) **tempo by autocorrelation** вҖ” each half's motion-energy signal buffers ~6 s; mean-subtracted autocorrelation finds the dominant lag in the 40вҖ“170 BPM band вҶ’ BPM, smoothed (П„вүҲ1.5 s), **never quantized** so the two halves' tempi form an irrational ratio by default (the classic onset/tempo-induction self-similarity method, applied to optical motion rather than audio). (3) **polytempo canon engine** ("A Tale of Two Clocks," Chris Wilson 2013) вҖ” 5 voices: voices 0вҖ“1 locked to conductor A (Г—1, Г—1/вҲҡ2), voices 2вҖ“4 to conductor B (Г—1, Г—1/ПҶ, Г—ПҶ/2) вҖ” two conducted masters spawn a 5-voice Nancarrow canon; 25 ms `setInterval` + 120 ms lookahead into `AudioContext.currentTime`, sample-accurate `osc.start(t)`; D-pentatonic across 2 octaves (zero harmonic tension вҖ” all drama is metric); sine + 2.756Г— inharmonic partial bell timbre; master `gain вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter (20:1, вҲ’12 dBFS) вҶ’ destination; AudioContext built in the Start gesture (iOS unlock). (4) **three.js loom renderer** вҖ” 5 glowing `THREE.Line` threads whose 201 vertices are sinusoidal waves phase-driven by each voice's running BPM (threads on different conductors visibly drift apart вҖ” the visual drift IS the tempo drift); 160 pooled `THREE.Mesh` node-pulse spheres on beat-onsets (rise 5 ms / decay 1.8 s, no GC churn); slow ~90 s camera orbit; Ikeda-clinical violet/blue/emerald/cyan/purple on near-black (#020208); HTML overlay readouts "Left motion вҶ’ X BPM / Right motion вҶ’ Y BPM / ratio ZвҖҰ вҖ” never rational"; full dispose on unmount. **Ghost-motion auto-demo:** before any camera grant, two synthetic motion-energy signals at incommensurate rates (AвүҲ72, BвүҲ72вҲҡ2вүҲ101.8 BPM) feed the same autocorrelator so the threads weave + drift from frame one with zero permission; audio after Start, pre-Start animates on `performance.now()`; the room takes over when motion is detected; ghost resumes after ~4 s still.

  References: **Conlon Nancarrow**, *Studies for Player Piano* вҖ” tempo canons at irrational ratios; **Study No. 40 "Transcendental"** (the e:ПҖ canon Kyle Gann says "probably never aligns," ganntrax.com). **Ryoji Ikeda** (the near-monochrome data-grid visual register). **Autocorrelation tempo-induction by self-similarity** (the classic onset/feature-function method), here applied to optical motion. Grounded in **spontaneous-motor-tempo science** (biorxiv 2025 "From Individual to Shared Tempo" / "Similarity in Spontaneous Tempo Impacts Flow вҖҰ Joint Performance") вҖ” each body's innate preferred tempo rarely matches another's, so the drift is a human condition, not just a math trick. Born from **RESEARCH В§401**. **Ambition 3/5 solid (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems В· #3 named refs В· #4 multi-cycle вҖ” 514 polytempo spine, cycle 2), with an honest case for 4/5 via #1** вҖ” *first tempo/rhythm EXTRACTION from camera motion* (optical-flow energy вҶ’ autocorrelation вҶ’ BPM): the lab has audio-onset/beat detection from the MIC (106-beat-cut, 147-kids-beat-pulse) and pitch-autocorrelation/YIN (507), but has **never derived a beat-RATE from visual motion** вҖ” a genuine cross-modal first, flagged as application-level (not a brand-new primitive) so it discounts cleanly to 3/5 if the jury disagrees. **#5 NOT claimed** вҖ” the freshest *relevant* findings (the biorxiv SMT papers) are ~9 months old, not <14 days; said plainly even after heeding the jury's "mine beyond cs.SD" and searching the motor-tempo + conducting-perception literature. **Answers JURY 2026-06-12 directly:** provocation #1 (take 514 to cycle 2 вҖ” chase a 4/5 above the floor) + provocation #4 (a conducted tempo-canon where gestures set incommensurable tempi вҖ” the SECOND time-tension piece, now embodied). **Diversity** `banned (jury rolling-15)=[WebGPU-compute + Canvas2D OUTPUT (4Г—) В· GPU-physics-simвҶ’drone TECH (4Г—) В· finger-on-glass INPUT (7Г—) В· calm-sensory-kids VIBE (4Г—)] В· picked=[**camera-motion INPUT** (off-glass, NOT a finger; NOT ML) В· **three.js OUTPUT** (1Г—вҶ’2Г—, the scarcest non-banned renderer вҖ” and crucially NOT SVG, which a sibling would have pushed to 4Г—) В· **motionвҶ’autocorr-tempoвҶ’polytempo-canon TECH** (NOT a simulated-physical-field/GPU-drone) В· **cerebral / Ikeda-clinical / metric-tension VIBE** вҖ” NOT calm-sensory-kids]` вҖ” clean on every jury ban. **Love signal:** none directly (polytempo/time-tension is a cerebral lane); the jury + ambition/diversity gates governed. Siblings `544-conductors-canon` (MediaPipe **Hands** two-hand conducting вҶ’ **SVG** scrolling loom вҖ” the precision/continuity resurrect, complete + clean, lost on the diversity audit because SVG is already 3Г— and a ship would make it 4Г—) + `546-clock-canon` (MediaPipe **Pose** full-body two-arm conducting вҶ’ **SVG orbital phase-clock** idiom, dots that sweep and never realign вҖ” complete, the fresh-visual-idiom resurrect) banked in IDEAS В§401. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `вң“ Compiled successfully in 105s`, `вң“ Generating static pages (437/437)`, `/dream/545-motion-loom 5.71 kB / 294 kB First Load` prerendered static вҖ” the First Load is the three.js bundle, in line with other three.js routes; builder reported `tsc --noEmit` 0 errors + `eslint --max-warnings=0` clean on the folder), **NOT browser-verified** (no camera/WebGL/audio in this sandbox) вҖ” unverified surface: (a) **whether autocorrelation on REAL room motion yields a musically-meaningful tempo** вҖ” the autocorrelator finds *a* BPM even for near-random motion, so moderate noisy scenes may give erratic readings until the 6 s buffer fills (the single most important thing to check live; the core interaction's fidelity); (b) WebGL `linewidth>1` is not honored on most drivers, so the threads render ~1px rather than as glowing ribbons (the node-pulse spheres carry the glow; cycle-3 fix = `Line2`/`LineMaterial`); (c) the O(nВІ) autocorr over ~360 samples runs per video frame вҖ” fine on desktop, may need batching to every 5th frame on low-end mobile; (d) iOS AudioContext-in-gesture unlock; (e) the node-pool wraps at 160 simultaneous pulses (artifacts only at 170 BPM Г— 5 voices). The ghost-motion auto-demo is the safety net so the 06:30 hands-free glance always shows a weaving, drifting, (post-Start) singing canon with zero permission.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/545-motion-loom/README.md`

### [549-kids-song-friend](/dream/549-kids-song-friend) В· kids (4+) / companion / voice В· cycle 402 В· demoable
  **A creature whose body is literally MADE of the songs a 4-year-old sings it вҖ” it remembers the actual melodies (not a vague energy, not a timer) forever, across calendar days, and sings them back, woven and changed, every visit.** Sing or hum; the friend grows a new petal shaped like your melody, keeps every song, and greets you bigger tomorrow. Cycle 2 of the kids **Companion / Presence** spine (`518-kids-living-ember` = cycle 1, which remembered only humming *energy* within one session). Winner of a kids **DEEP** 3-approach fire (one "remembers your songs across days" concept on three renderers).

  Subsystems (вүҘ3 вҶ’ 4): (1) **forgiving voiceвҶ’pitch capture** (`audio.ts`) вҖ” `getUserMedia` вҶ’ `AnalyserNode` вҶ’ autocorrelation pitch detector tuned for a 4-year-old's high/breathy/wandering voice (clarity threshold + **babble-note fallback** so any vocalization still teaches a note), snapped to **C-major pentatonic** ~2 octaves; a melody = note-index array (cap 12; a ~1.2 s pause commits the song). (2) **cross-day melodic-memory engine** (`memory.ts`) вҖ” `localStorage` (`resonance.dream.549`, try/catch): song library + visit count + monotonic `totalNotesEver` + `lastVisit` + simulated `day`; on load the friend GREETS, is visibly bigger, and surfaces a new-calendar-day return.
