(3) **recall re-synthesis** (`audio.ts`) вҖ” never raw playback: transpose + gently slow + **weave two different days' melodies** into soft counterpoint, the active petal pulsing + mouth opening on each recalled note; warm pentatonic voice; kid-safe master `gain вҶ’ lowpass 8 kHz вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor` brick-wall limiter (20:1, вҲ’10 dBFS) вҶ’ destination; AudioContext built in the Start gesture (iOS unlock). (4) **the body IS the songs (SVG)** вҖ” each remembered song is a teardrop/petal path whose vertical shape traces that melody's pitch contour (pentatonic degree вҶ’ hue), radiating around a friendly face (blinking eyes, a mouth that opens when it sings); idle breathing via direct rAF attribute mutation (no per-frame React re-render); `feGaussianBlur` glow. **Two demo affordances** so the 06:30 glance never has to wait a real day: pre-seeded "yesterday's songs" sing hands-free from frame one with zero permission, AND an honestly-labelled **"вңЁ pretend it's tomorrow"** button that bumps the visit, regrows the body, and plays a transposed/slowed/woven recall instantly. **Degradation:** mic denied вҶ’ `text-rose-300` message + the friend keeps singing its remembered songs hands-free (SVG is universal; a cute base body guards the zero-songs case). **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client: mic [local only, never recorded/uploaded/networked] + Web Audio + SVG вҖ” no network, no secrets). **No new npm deps.**

  References: **Tamagotchi** (Aki Maita / Bandai, 1996) вҖ” the original persistent virtual companion that *remembers* and rewards return; **Brian Eno** вҖ” long-form, non-repeating (the recall is never twice the same); and the design thesis that a young child's bond with a voice companion deepens through *memory of content* (it knows your songs), not a clock вҖ” explicitly transcending `322-kids-voice-garden` (a timer-aged plant) by changing because of *what was sung*. Born from **RESEARCH В§402** (cs.SD still server-ML вҶ’ #5 unclaimable, said plainly; the relevant fresh-ish finding is a 2026 AccScience study on children's developmental preference for known, responsive voice agents вҖ” backs the design but isn't verifiably <14 days). **Answers JURY 2026-06-12 provocation #6 directly** вҖ” extend `518-living-ember` into "a creature a child finds genuinely changed tomorrow," not another 90-second glow toy. **Ambition 3/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems В· #3 named refs Tamagotchi/Eno В· #4 multi-cycle Companion/Presence spine cycle 2; honest contestable #1 вҖ” remembering melodic *content* across days recalled as woven counterpoint with the body drawn from contours is an interaction-first, but localStorage persistence itself isn't lab-first [322 aged a creature; 71 persisted a gallery], so it discounts cleanly; #5 NOT claimed). **Diversity** `banned (jury rolling-15)=[WebGPU-compute + Canvas2D OUTPUT (4Г—) В· GPU-physics-simвҶ’drone TECH (4Г—) В· finger-on-glass INPUT (7Г—) В· calm-sensory-kids VIBE (4Г—)] В· picked=[**voice/mic INPUT** (off-glass, NOT a finger вҖ” the 7Г— reflex) В· **SVG OUTPUT** (NOT Canvas2D/WebGPU вҖ” both banned; and NOT three.js, which 545 just shipped) В· **pitchвҶ’persistent-memoryвҶ’recall TECH** (NOT a GPU-physics-sim drone) В· **companion / it-remembers-you VIBE** (NOT calm-sensory-kids вҖ” the bond/memory IS the differentiator, jury #6's point)]` вҖ” clean on every jury ban. **Love signal:** Karel's loved kids voice/mark-making cluster (`158-kids-hum-paint`вқӨпёҸ, `100-kids-paint-song`вқӨпёҸ, `104-kids-mirror-draw`вқӨпёҸ вҖ” a child's voice/mark becoming a visible kept thing) softly backs it; additive вҖ” the jury + ambition/diversity gates governed. Siblings `547-kids-songkeeper` (three.js glowing creature, each song an orbiting contour-strand вҖ” richest idle presence, lost: three.js 2-in-a-row + less legible than petals-with-a-face) + `548-kids-songbloom` (raw WebGL2 GLSL bioluminescent shader grown from memory-seed uniforms вҖ” the freshest generative-shader-from-memory idea, lost: memoryвҶ’uniform-hash is the least legible "see your own songs," no face) banked in IDEAS В§402. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `вң“ Compiled successfully`, `вң“ Generating static pages (438/438)`, `/dream/549-kids-song-friend 5.75 kB / 112 kB First Load` prerendered static; zero build warnings in the folder), **NOT browser-verified** (no mic/audio in this sandbox) вҖ” unverified surface: (a) **pitch accuracy on a REAL 4-year-old's voice** is the core unknown (autocorrelation is octave-error-prone, a child's voice is breathy; clarity threshold + babble fallback + pentatonic snapping hide a lot, but capture timings want field tuning); (b) **SVG perf with a large library** вҖ” unbounded petal count under a blur filter could stress an old iPad after weeks of songs (cycle-3 cap/LOD); (c) the README `<Link>` 404s as a route (cosmetic, a lab-wide pattern); (d) iOS AudioContext-in-gesture unlock; (e) the single shared `rafRef` (idle vs listening) is slightly fragile though only one is ever live. The pre-seeded memory + "pretend it's tomorrow" button are the safety nets so the 06:30 hands-free glance always shows a friend made of songs, greeting + singing + visibly growing, with zero permission and no 24h wait.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/549-kids-song-friend/README.md`

### [553-kids-tilt-fountain](/dream/553-kids-tilt-fountain) В· kids (4+) / tilt / playful-constructive В· cycle 404 В· demoable
  **TIP the whole tablet to pour a stream of glowing orbs down through a 3D vertical garden of chimes, bells, and strings вҖ” composing a singing waterfall by where you AIM the flow.** Tilt left/right/forward steers the gravity that pulls the cascade; each instrument-zone an orb falls through rings a warm pentatonic note (different timbre per zone). Active, constructive play вҖ” you aim and BUILD a tune вҖ” not a calm staring-glow toy. Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (three orthogonal off-glass inputs Г— three non-banned renderers).

  Subsystems (вүҘ3 вҶ’ 4): (1) **tilt input + gravity model** (`page.tsx` + `physics.ts`) вҖ” `deviceorientation` (gamma=L/R, beta=front/back) вҶ’ a smoothed (EMA ОұвүҲ0.08) 2D gravity vector applied to every orb (gravity never reverses); iOS 13+ permission via `DeviceOrientationEvent.requestPermission()` on the Start gesture; desktop fallback pointer X/Y вҶ’ gravity + arrow-key steer; denied/absent вҶ’ `text-rose-300` notice + pointer fallback auto-on. (2) **orb physics + emitter** (`physics.ts`) вҖ” continuous emitter drips one orb / 100 ms; Euler integration under tilt-gravity; per-orb **AABB collision** vs 5 instrument zones; **hard cap 180 orbs**, retire >12 s / below floor, pool recycled each frame, drag 0.985. *Discrete rigid orbs triggering notes on contact вҖ” NOT a simulated fluid/field whose statistics are sonified (the jury-banned GPU-physics-simвҶ’drone move).* (3) **zone-based spatial pentatonic synth** (`audio.ts`) вҖ” 5 zones, distinct timbres (bell sine+partials / Karplus-ish string / triangle chime / marimba / low-bell), pitch by horizontal hit position, all C-major-pentatonic (always consonant), per-zone rate-limiting, master `gain вҶ’ lowpass(8 kHz) вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor(вҲ’10 dBFS, 20:1) вҶ’ destination` brick-wall limiter, `setTargetAtTime` envelopes, AudioContext built in the Start gesture (iOS unlock). (4) **three.js render** вҖ” additive-emissive glowing orbs + 5 luminous zone-panels that flash on hit, dark background, additive glow (no postprocessing dep); full dispose on unmount. **Ghost-tilt auto-demo** вҖ” a figure-8 synthetic tilt pours + sings from frame one with zero permission, cancels on real tilt/pointer, resumes after ~4 s idle (the 06:30 hands-free safety net). **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client Web Audio + three.js вҖ” no mic/camera/network/secrets). **No new npm deps** (three@0.182 is an existing installed dependency, imported normally).

  References: **Toshio Iwai** вҖ” *Electroplankton* / *SimTunes* (the playful music-toy lineage where moving a thing composes); **Pythagoras' monochord** (pitch by position); **Rube Goldberg** (the cascade/chain idea); **Harry Partch**. Born from **RESEARCH В§404** (face/expression music is the kids autopilot the jury warned against вҖ” grep-verified at 258/423 вҖ” so it was dropped; the easy kids lab-firsts are spent at ~360+ prototypes вҶ’ compete on ambition + diversity + execution, the 537/549 precedent). **Answers JURY 2026-06-12 provocation #3** (take the off-glass lane вҖ” TILT, not a finger on glass) **AND #6** (break the calm-sensory-kids autopilot вҖ” active/constructive play, not a 90-second glow toy). **Ambition 3/5**: **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (tilt+gravity + orb-physics/emitter + 5-timbre zone synth + three.js = 4) + **#3** named refs (Iwai / Pythagoras / Rube Goldberg / Partch). (**#1 contestable, discounted** вҖ” "first tilt-poured cascade instrument" is application-level but tilt-marbles exist [169/184], so it discounts cleanly to 3/5. **#5 NOT claimed** вҖ” no <14-day bind for a kids cycle; cs.SD still server-ML, said plainly, the ninth jury running.) **Diversity** `banned (jury rolling-15)=[WebGPU-compute + Canvas2D OUTPUT (4Г—) В· GPU-physics-simвҶ’drone TECH (4Г—) В· finger-on-glass INPUT (7Г—) В· calm-sensory-kids VIBE (4Г—)] В· picked=[**device-TILT INPUT** (off-glass, NOT a finger вҖ” the scarcest off-glass kids input recently used: 549 voice / 537 camera / 541 finger) В· **three.js OUTPUT** (NOT Canvas2D/WebGPU вҖ” both banned) В· **discrete-orb-gravity-physics вҶ’ spatial-chime TECH** (NOT a simulated-physical-field/GPU drone) В· **playful/constructive/joyful-fountain VIBE** (NOT calm-sensory-kids вҖ” the directest break of jury #6)]` вҖ” clean on every jury ban. **Love signal:** the loved kids embodied cluster (`83-kids-tilt-rain`вқӨпёҸ вҖ” tilt; `100-kids-paint-song`вқӨпёҸ / `158-kids-hum-paint`вқӨпёҸ вҖ” a child's action becoming an audible/visible thing) softly backs a tilt-driven constructive instrument; additive вҖ” the jury + ambition/diversity gates governed. Siblings `554-kids-giant-shadow` (camera full-body Pose вҶ’ raw WebGL2 GLSL metaball aura вҶ’ continuous choir; Krueger *Videoplace*/Theremin вҖ” the biggest visual/technical swing, lost: heaviest real-iPad risk [PoseLandmarker-CDN + 33-joint metaball shader loop + camera permission] + Pose is the most-used kids input lane) + `555-kids-echo-canyon` (voice вҶ’ SVG canyon вҶ’ staggered 4-voice canon/round, distinct from 549/142; round-form/Oliveros вҖ” the most musically refined + most reliable, lost: least fresh, 549 last cycle was also voice) banked in IDEAS В§404. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `вң“ Compiled successfully in 41s`, `вң“ Generating static pages (440/440)`, `/dream/553-kids-tilt-fountain 5.08 kB / 296 kB First Load` prerendered static вҖ” the 296 kB is the three.js bundle, in line with other three.js routes; zero warnings in the folder), **NOT browser-verified** (no audio/tilt/WebGL in this sandbox) вҖ” unverified surface: (a) **iOS AudioContext unlock inside the async `onClick` after the `requestPermission()` await** (the builder's flagged risk вҖ” Safari may drop the gesture-association across the await; a tap-to-resume guard is the cycle-2 fix); (b) **180-orb smoothness on an older iPad** (`MAX_ORBS` is the knob; additive-emissive per-orb meshes are the cost); (c) **whether aiming the flow reads as deliberate melody-making vs pretty randomness** вҖ” the core unverified interaction claim (zone layout + pitch-by-position is designed for it; only a real child's hands confirm); (d) extreme tilt could starve top zones (gravity never reverses, so the top always feeds); (e) the README `<Link>` 404s as a route (cosmetic, lab-wide pattern). The ghost-tilt auto-demo + pointer fallback need zero permission, so the 06:30 glance reliably shows a pouring, glowing, singing fountain with no setup.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/553-kids-tilt-fountain/README.md`

### [559-kids-clap-canon](/dream/559-kids-clap-canon) В· kids (4+) / rhythm / time-tension В· cycle 406 В· demoable
  **Steve Reich's phasing, for a 4-year-old: clap a rhythm into the mic, two friendly blobs clap it back, then one drifts ~1.8% faster so the patterns slide unison вҶ’ shimmering interlock вҶ’ unison over ~30вҖ“40 s вҖ” and a big phase-wheel with two chasing dots makes the drift VISIBLE.** Active rhythmic discovery, not a calm glow toy: the child performs a clap, then watches a minimalist *process* unfold. Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (three orthogonal off-glass inputs Г— three renderers).

  Subsystems (вүҘ3 вҶ’ 4): (1) **mic clap/onset detection** вҖ” `getUserMedia({audio})` вҶ’ `AnalyserNode` (fftSize 2048); per-rAF time-domain RMS vs a fast-attack/slow-decay EMA background; onset fires when `rms > max(0.015, emaВ·2.5)` with a 120 ms refractory; 2вҖ“6 claps вҶ’ an inter-onset-interval array (~2 s silence commits; <2 claps вҶ’ a default Reich-style 6-clap pattern so it always works). (2) **phase-canon scheduler** вҖ” two voices share the IOI array; voice B's interval Г— `(1вҲ’0.018)` вүҲ 1.8% shorter loop; a 25 ms `setInterval` schedules sample-accurate `start(t)` 120 ms ahead (look-ahead, no `setTimeout`-per-note); voice A = warm bandpass-noise clap + low sine body, voice B = bright highpass woodblock + triangle. (3) **SVG render via direct rAF attribute mutation** (no per-frame React `setState`) вҖ” phase-wheel dots, character body-scale, glow opacity, hand positions all `setAttribute`'d each frame; React state only for discrete UI. (4) **character animation** вҖ” two cute SVG blob-creatures (ellipses + eyes + hands) flash/scale on each scheduled clap (decay 6Г—/s), `feGaussianBlur` glow pulse. Master `gain(0.75) вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor(вҲ’10 dBFS, 20:1) вҶ’ destination` brick-wall limiter; AudioContext built in the Start gesture (iOS unlock). **Hands-free auto-demo:** phase-wheel + blobs animate from frame one with a built-in pattern at zero clicks (audio waits for the Start gesture), cancels on interaction, resumes after ~4 s idle. **Mic-denied вҶ’ `text-rose-300` notice + tap-anywhere clap fallback** (fully playable). **No API route, no `guard`** (pure client mic [local only, never recorded/uploaded/networked] + Web Audio + SVG вҖ” no network, no secrets). **No new npm deps.**

  References: **Steve Reich** вҖ” *Clapping Music* (1972, two performers clap the same 12-note pattern; one shifts an eighth-note every 12 bars until back in unison) and *It's Gonna Rain* (1965, tape phasing вҖ” two identical loops drift and realign). The gradual phase-shift IS the prototype, not decoration ("music that is about process, that would make the process perceptible"). Born from **RESEARCH В§406** (no kid-appropriate <14-day client-buildable bind surfaced вҖ” WebGPU-baseline-via-Interop-2026 is a platform note not a technique; cs.SD still server-ML, said plainly the 10th jury running; the structural read holds that at ~360+ kids prototypes the easy lab-firsts are spent вҶ’ compete on ambition + diversity + a named concept new TO CHILDREN). **Answers JURY 2026-06-12 provocation #4 literally** вҖ” the jury mourned that the time-tension vocabulary (tempo canons, polymeter, Reich phase, Nancarrow) "had no children"; this is that piece, for children вҖ” **AND #3** (off-glass input вҖ” mic clap, not a finger) **AND #6** (break the calm-sensory-kids autopilot вҖ” active rhythmic discovery). **Ambition 3/5**: **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (mic onset + phase-canon scheduler + SVG rAF render + character animation = 4) + **#3** named ref that drives the piece (Steve Reich). (**#1 contestable, discounted** вҖ” phasing was touched once in an alt-lineage cycle 305 + tempo-canon exists at 514/545, so "first phasing piece" discounts cleanly; the fresh element is *phasing made legible + joyful for a 4-year-old*, an audience-first, framed honestly. **#5 NOT claimed** вҖ” no <14-day kids bind.) **Diversity** `banned (rolling-10 вүҘ4Г—)=[finger-on-glass INPUT (529/537/541/538)] В· picked=[**microphone clap/onset INPUT** (off-glass вҖ” the directest dodge of the finger reflex; the child performs in space) В· **SVG OUTPUT** (rAF attribute mutation; SVG sat at 3Г—, not banned; NOT Canvas2D/WebGPU [jury-flagged], NOT three.js [553/545/537 just used]) В· **onset вҶ’ looping phase-canon TECH** (NOT a GPU-physics-sim drone) В· **rhythmic/playful/active-discovery VIBE** (NOT calm-sensory-kids вҖ” only 1Г— in the last 10)]` вҖ” clean on the live finger-on-glass ban and every standing jury ban. **Love signal:** the loved kids embodied/rhythm cluster (`98-kids-drum-circle`вқӨпёҸ вҖ” rhythm play; `100-kids-paint-song`вқӨпёҸ / `158-kids-hum-paint`вқӨпёҸ вҖ” a child's physical action becoming an audible/visible thing) softly backs a clap-driven rhythm instrument; additive вҖ” the jury + ambition/diversity gates governed. Siblings `560-kids-shadow-band` (camera no-ML frame-diff silhouette вҶ’ three.js ~4k-particle creature вҶ’ 3 zone-gated instruments; Krueger *Videoplace*/Rozin вҖ” the most embodied/"wow", lost: the most-redundant camera-body input lane + most lighting-fragile for the hands-free glance) + `561-kids-rainmaker` (device SHAKE/`devicemotion` magnitude вҶ’ Canvas2D rain/lightning вҶ’ Xenakis stochastic grain-cloud percussion, Poisson О» = shake intensityВІ; *Achorripsis* 1957 вҖ” robust pooling + fresh off-glass shake input, lost: the least conceptually surprising, a sensory weather toy) banked in IDEAS В§406. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `вң“ Compiled successfully in 30.6s`, `вң“ Generating static pages (442/442)`, `/dream/559-kids-clap-canon 6.04 kB / 112 kB First Load` prerendered static; clean first run, no fix attempt needed; zero warnings in the folder), **NOT browser-verified** (no mic/audio in this sandbox) вҖ” unverified surface: (a) **clap detection on a real 4-year-old in a real room** (standard EMA onset detector, claps are sharp transients = the easy case, but a noisy room / quiet claps may mis-fire; the default-pattern + tap-anywhere fallbacks guarantee it always plays); (b) **whether the ~1.8% drift reads as Reich phasing over a real listen** вҖ” the phase-wheel makes it visible immediately (the legibility crutch), but whether a child *hears* the slide as one evolving groove is the core unverified perceptual claim; (c) iOS AudioContext unlock + mic-permission timing (no `await` before `ctx.resume`, lower risk than 553); (d) the README `<Link>` 404s as a route (cosmetic, lab-wide). The zero-permission SVG auto-demo is the safety net so the 06:30 hands-free glance always shows the wheel turning and the two blobs drifting in and out of sync with no setup.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/559-kids-clap-canon/README.md`

### [564-piano-splat-cathedral](/dream/564-piano-splat-cathedral) В· adult / audio-file / architectural-volumetric В· cycle 407 В· demoable
  **Karel's real Welcome Home piano doesn't just make a cloud вҖ” it BUILDS A CATHEDRAL.** A luminous Gothic nave of anisotropic, depth-SORTED Gaussian splats вҖ” floor вҶ’ columns вҶ’ arches вҶ’ transept вҶ’ vault вҶ’ rose window вҖ” raised element-by-element by the music's onsets (in architectural order), lit by pitch, that you fly down the centre of. Stateful, not a loop: a floor + one column pair at second 10; the full vault and a blooming rose window by minute 3. **Cycle 2 of the Gaussian-splat spine** (`557-piano-splat-galaxy` = cycle 1, the lab's first 4/5 вҖ” an isotropic additive *cloud*; 564 is the depth-sorted anisotropic *architecture*). Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-approach fire (one "his real piano sculpts a real anisotropic sorted splat field" concept on three forms/renderers).

  Subsystems (вүҘ3): (1) **audio fetch + FFT + onset/pitch** (`audio.ts`) вҖ” `AudioContext` + `AnalyserNode` (fftSize 2048) on the Begin gesture; fetches **Karel's real piano** `/api/audio/549fc519-f7fc-4c38-a771-adaad2edbc81` (dual-mode JSON `{url}` or raw bytes, 4 s timeout, looped) вҶ’ always-on **synth-piano fallback** so it sounds offline; master ends in a `DynamicsCompressor` limiter; spectral flux vs adaptive EMA вҶ’ onset, spectral peak вҶ’ pitch вҶ’ hue, energy вҶ’ loudness. (2) **procedural cathedral geometry + build sequencer** (`cathedral.ts`) вҖ” the nave pre-generated at startup as typed-array splat positions/axes/radii for an ordered element list (floor В· 5 column pairs В· 5 arches В· 2 transept arms В· 4 vault bays В· rose window В· ambient); onsets raise the next element in build order, permanent once raised, re-lit by later onsets вҶ’ demonstrably different at minute 3 than second 10 (long-form state/memory, not a loop). (3) **anisotropic, depth-SORTED Gaussian-splat rasterizer (the cycle-2 technique leap)** вҖ” each splat an **oriented ellipse** (not 557's isotropic circle), per-splat world axes aligned to its surface (column shaft vertical / arch tangent / vault flat / rose radial); vertex shader projects axis tips to screen (EWA-style tip-projection, Zwicker 2001 вҖ” a two-axis approximation, not full covariance) вҶ’ oriented stretched quad; fragment evaluates an elliptical Gaussian + small additive emissive core. **Every frame the live splats are depth-SORTED back-to-front by view-Z and composited with `SRC_ALPHA, ONE_MINUS_SRC_ALPHA`, depth-test OFF** вҖ” real alpha-over occlusion (a near column hides a far one), the correctness leap 557's additive-no-sort renderer lacked. Camera flies forward down the nave + auto-rotate; orbit-on-drag + wheel zoom. **Pre-Begin auto-demo** builds + lights the cathedral from frame one, zero permission (the 06:30 hands-free safety net); audio waits for the Begin gesture. **No API route, no `guard`** (consumes the existing read-only `/api/audio/[id]` GET вҖ” no side effects, no secrets). **No new npm deps.**

  References: **Kerbl, Kopanas, LeimkГјhler, Drettakis** вҖ” "3D Gaussian Splatting for Real-Time Radiance Field Rendering" (SIGGRAPH 2023); **Zwicker, Pfister, van Baar, Gross** вҖ” "EWA Volume Splatting" (IEEE Vis 2001, the anisotropic-projection algebra); **antimatter15/splat** (the canonical CPU per-frame depth-sort WebGL viewer); **James Turrell** (architectural light вҖ” being *inside* the light, not lit by it); **Refik Anadol** (volumetric data architecture). Born from **RESEARCH В§407** вҖ” the 2026 in-browser splatting wave (SparseStreet arXiv 2606.03909 June 2026; MOBILE-GS ICLR 2026, 116 FPS sorted 3DGS on a phone; WebSplatter arXiv 2602.03207) establishes real-time sorted anisotropic 3DGS as a browser commodity, so cycle 2 leaps from 557's cheap isotropic+additive+unsorted path to the honest sorted-anisotropic renderer. **Answers JURY 2026-06-12 #1** (chase the ceiling вҖ” take the splat lineage that landed В§405's first 4/5 to cycle 2 as a *massively bigger concept* with an added long-form-stateful axis) **AND #5** (mine a non-cs.SD well at current-month freshness). **Ambition 3/5, 4/5 arguable**: **#1** anisotropic + depth-sorted alpha-over splat rendering (a technique the lab has never rendered вҖ” 557 was explicitly isotropic + additive + unsorted; contestable only because the anisotropy is a two-axis approximation, discounted honestly) + **#4** multi-cycle splat spine (cycle 2) + **#3** named refs that drive it (Kerbl / Zwicker / antimatter15 / Turrell / Anadol); plus a real extra signal the sibling clouds lacked вҖ” **long-form STATEFUL build** (the jury's "long-form generative with state/memory" menu). **#5 soft/contestable** (the dive is genuinely current-month and motivates the leap, but the rendering math is foundational вҖ” not hard-claimed; honestly 3/5, not a gamed 4/5). **Diversity** `banned (rolling-10 вүҘ4Г— = SVG OUTPUT [559/552/549/538] + standing jury set: WebGPU-compute / Canvas2D / GPU-physics-simвҶ’drone / finger-on-glass-default / calm-sensory-kids) В· picked=[**audio-file INPUT** (his real piano вҖ” off-glass, the inverse of every banned input) В· **raw WebGL2 splat-rasterization OUTPUT** (NOT SVG [4Г—], NOT Canvas2D/WebGPU [banned], NOT three.js; WebGL2 sat at 2Г—) В· **anisotropic depth-sorted Gaussian-splat TECH** (renders his RECORDED music вҖ” the inverse of the banned "simulate a medium, sonify its statistics" drone) В· **architectural/sacred/Turrell-Anadol VIBE** (a built spectacle you fly through, NOT calm-sensory-kids, NOT the meditative-drone cluster)]` вҖ” clean on the live SVG ban and every standing jury ban. **Love signal:** the loved piano-visualizer cluster (`163-paths-visualizer`вқӨпёҸ, pattern reused by 283/532/557) softly backs feeding his real Welcome Home piano; additive вҖ” the jury + ambition/diversity gates governed. Siblings `563-piano-splat-ewa` (full EWA covariance projection вҖ” quaternionвҶ’ОЈвҶ’JacobianвҶ’conicвҶ’eigenvalue-bounded quad + premultiplied alpha-over; the reconstruction-grade renderer, the cleanest #1-technique вҖ” lost: another orbitable cloud adjacent to 557; **the cycle-3 path is to swap 564's two-axis approx for this full covariance**) + `562-piano-splat-aurora` (anisotropic splats stretched into flowing aurora ribbons via axisвҶ’screen Оё + ПғMajor/ПғMinor; Anadol palette вҖ” lost: also a cloud-you-orbit; the anisotropy-from-flow trick is the keeper) banked in IDEAS В§407. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `вң“ Compiled successfully in 45s`, `вң“ Generating static pages (443/443)`, `/dream/564-piano-splat-cathedral 8.48 kB / 115 kB First Load` prerendered static; clean first run, no fix attempt; zero warnings in the folder), **NOT browser-verified** (no GPU/audio in this sandbox) вҖ” unverified surface: (a) the real-piano fetch JSON-vs-bytes shape / CORS / `decodeAudioData` codec (synth fallback is the guaranteed path); (b) onset thresholds drive the *build sequence* вҖ” dense passages may race the cathedral up or stall (ear-estimated, untuned to the recording); (c) the anisotropy is a **two-axis approximation, not full covariance** вҖ” non-orthogonal axes get slight ellipse shear (563's full-EWA is the cycle-3 fix); (d) ~10k CPU-sorted splats + per-frame `bufferSubData` target 60 fps on a laptop, may dip on weak GPUs / high-DPI phones (JS `Array.sort`, not radix); (e) iOS AudioContext-in-gesture unlock; the README `<Link>` 404s as a route (cosmetic, lab-wide). The pre-Begin auto-build + forward-fly need zero permission, so the 06:30 hands-free glance always shows a living cathedral raising itself with no setup.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/564-piano-splat-cathedral/README.md`

### [576-presence-room](/dream/576-presence-room) В· adults / embodied-spatial / meditative В· cycle 413 В· demoable
  **Your own face is the listener.** A webcam tracks your head pose (MediaPipe FaceLandmarker, CDN runtime load) and feeds it straight into the Web Audio **`AudioListener`** вҖ” lean and turn your head and a warm just-intonation Dream-House chord physically re-spatialises around you; lean toward a voice and it blooms. The lab's **first head-tracked binaural** piece and its first genuinely *embodied*-spatial one вҖ” the directest answer to JURY 2026-06-13 provocation #1 ("zero embodied-spatial prototypes after 570 builds / get off the glass") and #4 (warmth, not a puzzle). Winner of an adult **WIDE** fire (3 explorers).

  Subsystems (вүҘ3): (1) **face tracking** (`face.ts`) вҖ” MediaPipe FaceLandmarker dynamically imported from jsDelivr CDN (no npm dep); one face/frame вҶ’ heavily EMA-smoothed (ОұвүҲ0.15) head pose: planar position from eye centroid, depth from inter-ocular scale, yaw from eye asymmetry, pitch from eye-to-nose span. (2) **spatial audio** (`audio.ts`) вҖ” 6 soft drone voices at JI ratios (1/1, 9/8, 5/4, 3/2, 15/8, 2/1) over a warm A2 (110 Hz) root, each = sine + triangle sub + detuned partial вҶ’ its own **HRTF `PannerNode`** on a ring; every frame the pose drives `audioCtx.listener` position + forward orientation (modern `positionX/forwardX.setTargetAtTime`, `setPosition`/`setOrientation` fallback); multi-second swells; master `gain вҶ’ lowpass вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor (limiter) вҶ’ destination`. (3) **visuals** (`render.ts`) вҖ” hand-written GLSL ES 3.00 fullscreen-triangle fragment shader (NOT three.js): warm amber/rose/violet volumetric haze tracking where you look + one glowing orb per voice that brightens with its bloom. **No API route, no guard, no npm deps** (camera frames analysed in-browser only вҖ” never recorded/sent). Fallbacks for the 06:30 phone glance: camera denied / FaceLandmarker fails / no webcam вҶ’ `text-rose-300` notice + **pointer-drag "look around"** + a **silent Lissajous auto-demo** that orbits the field within seconds (cancels on real input, resumes after ~5s idle); WebGL2 absent вҶ’ audio-only; audio blocked вҶ’ visuals-only.

  References: **Maryanne Amacher** (perceived sound changes as you move your head вҖ” the body is part of the instrument); **La Monte Young & Marian Zazeela** *Dream House* (a sustained-JI environment you physically move through); **Pauline Oliveros** *Deep Listening* (attention/presence over performance). Born from **RESEARCH В§413** (webcam head-tracking вҶ’ Web Audio binaural listener вҖ” open-source Spatial-Head-Tracking-Audio + webcam-auralization research, an actively-developing 2026 browser technique). **Ambition 3/5**: **#1** first head-poseвҶ’`AudioListener` (head-tracked binaural) in the lab вҖ” the lab's many HRTF pieces (`7-spatial`/`29`/`148`/`394`/`400`) all moved the listener by dragging a dot or singing, never by the visitor's own body, so this is a genuine interaction-first + **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (above) + **#3** named refs; **#5 soft/qualified** (the webcam-auralization dive is genuinely 2026-current and motivates the build, but HRTF + landmarkвҶ’Euler math is foundational вҖ” held as a soft bind, not hard-claimed). **Diversity** `banned (JURY 2026-06-13)=[three.js OUTPUT 6Г— В· SVG OUTPUT 5Г— В· mic/voice INPUT 5Г— В· onset/beat/tempo TECH 6Г— В· pentatonic-wash + adult-cerebral-puzzle VIBE] В· picked=[**camera/head-pose INPUT** (off-glass, not mic, not a finger) В· **raw WebGL2 OUTPUT** (not three.js/SVG) В· **head-poseвҶ’AudioListener HRTF-binaural TECH** (not onset extraction) В· **warm meditative Dream-House VIBE** (feel, not solve)]` вҖ” clean on every ban. Winner of the adult WIDE fire; banked `577-still-bloom` (device-motion stillness вҶ’ audio-first Radigue drone) + `578-magnetosphere` (live NOAA space-weather вҶ’ WebGPU geomagnetic choir) as IDEAS В§413. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `вң“ Compiled successfully in 34.1s`, `/dream/576-presence-room 6.48 kB / 113 kB First Load` prerendered static), **NOT browser-verified** (no camera/GPU/audio in sandbox) вҖ” the silent auto-demo + pointer-drag mean the field always moves on a glance with zero permission.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/576-presence-room/README.md`

### [587-kids-button-garden](/dream/587-kids-button-garden) В· kids (4+) / game-controller / off-the-glass В· cycle 418 В· demoable
  **A 4-year-old's first instrument is a GAME CONTROLLER, not a screen вҖ” mash the big buttons and a garden of warm light blooms and sings.** The lab's **first game-controller (Gamepad API) instrument** and its **first haptic-rumble output** вҖ” the directest answer yet to the standing jury #1 ("get off the glass / off the touchscreen / mic over-used"). The child grips a physical pad in two hands and watches the wall bloom; no analog-stick coordination, no reading, just the most toddler-native gesture there is вҖ” button-mashing вҖ” turned into music. Winner of a kids **DEEP** 3-approach fire (one "a controller becomes a 4-year-old's instrument" concept on three interaction models).

  Subsystems (вүҘ3 вҶ’ 5): (1) **Gamepad input** (`page.tsx`) вҖ” `navigator.getGamepads()` polled inside the rAF loop with `gamepadconnected`/`disconnected` listeners; **edge-triggered** button presses (rising-edge detect вҶ’ each press fires once, holds sustain cleanly); W3C "standard gamepad" mapping (face 0вҖ“3, d-pad 12вҖ“15, triggers 6вҖ“7, left-stick axes 0вҖ“1) with deadzone. (2) **warm just-intonation synth** (Web Audio only) вҖ” the four face buttons are voices at ratios **1/1, 5/4, 3/2, 15/8** (root / major third / fifth / major seventh) over a low root+fifth sine drone + band-passed "wind" noise; each voice = triangle + gently-detuned sine, soft attack + ~1.6 s release; **deliberately NOT the C-major-pentatonic "nothing-is-wrong" wash**. The **d-pad shifts the SEASON** вҖ” springвҶ’summerвҶ’autumnвҶ’winter transposes the root (F3/G3/D3/C3) AND swaps the palette, so the whole world changes mood. Kid-safe master chain `gain вҶ’ lowpass(8 kHz) вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor (brick-wall limiter 20:1, вҲ’10 dBFS) вҶ’ destination`; `AudioContext` built in the first gesture (iOS unlock) + `webkitAudioContext` fallback. (3) **Canvas2D render only** вҖ” additive (`lighter`) glowing flowers (radial halo + six rotating petal lobes + white core) bloom and breathe over a dark season sky with motion-blur trails; the whole field parallax-sways with the left stick. No three.js/WebGL/WebGPU/SVG. (4) **triggers** swell the wind/pad drone; (5) **dual-rumble haptics** вҖ” `vibrationActuator.playEffect("dual-rumble", вҖҰ)` thumps on each bloom + a quickening heartbeat as more flowers live, feature-detected + try/catch-wrapped (absent on Safari/many pads вҶ’ the piece works fully without it). **No API route, no guard, no npm deps** (no network I/O). Fallbacks for the 06:30 phone glance: no pad вҶ’ friendly **amber** prompt + **A/S/D/F (or J/K/L/;) keyboard** voices + **arrow-key seasons** + big **on-screen tappable** buttons; **idle auto-demo** blooms flowers + drifts seasons on its own after ~2 s (and on first load) so a muted glance shows a living, singing garden вҖ” any real input takes over instantly.

  References: **Toshio Iwai** вҖ” *Electroplankton* (Nintendo DS, 2005) / *TENORI-ON* (Yamaha, 2007), the playful "anyone can make beautiful music with a controller" lineage; **the May 2026 Steam Controller (2nd gen)** haptic-song demos (a game controller that plays whole songs through its rumble) вҖ” the direct inspiration for routing blooms into sympathetic haptics. Born from **RESEARCH В§418** (a controller is a 2026 music-and-haptics instrument + the browser Gamepad API gives it to us free + grep-verified `gamepad` = 0 hits in the lab вҶ’ a genuine never-used INPUT and never-used haptic OUTPUT). **Ambition 3/5**: **#1** first game-controller input AND first haptic-rumble output in the lab (grep-verified) + **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (5, above) + **#3** named refs (Iwai / Steam Controller); **#5 soft** (the Steam Controller news is ~5вҖ“6 weeks, just past the strict 30-day line, and the Gamepad/haptic primitive is foundational вҖ” held soft, not hard-claimed). **Diversity** `banned (JURY 2026-06-13 + rolling-10 saturation)=[three.js OUTPUT В· SVG OUTPUT В· mic/voice INPUT В· onset/beat/tempo TECH В· pentatonic-wash VIBE В· growing-creature SPINE В· camera INPUT (3Г— last 10) В· WebGL2 OUTPUT (3Г— last 10)] В· picked=[**game-controller/Gamepad INPUT** (lab-first, off-glass вҖ” not camera/mic/touch) В· **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (off three.js/SVG/WebGL2/WebGPU) В· **controllerвҶ’warm-JI-synth + dual-rumble-haptic TECH** (not onset/beat/tempo, not data-sonification 2Г—) В· **kids playful-warm tactile VIBE** (not a creature, not a puzzle, not the pentatonic wash)]` вҖ” clean on every banned tag. Winner of the kids DEEP fire; banked `586-kids-light-painter` (two-stick continuous chord-bend "light painter") + `588-kids-glow-drive` (steer-a-comet / wake-singing-stars spatial field) as IDEAS В§418. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `вң“ Compiled successfully in 110s`, `вң“ Generating static pages (454/454)`, `/dream/587-kids-button-garden 4.67 kB / 111 kB First Load` prerendered static в—Ӣ), **NOT browser-verified** (no physical gamepad/audio/iOS in sandbox) вҖ” the idle auto-demo + keyboard + on-screen-button fallbacks mean the garden always blooms and sings on a glance with zero hardware.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/587-kids-button-garden/README.md`

### [588-tidal-organ](/dream/588-tidal-organ) В· adults / live-ocean-data / oceanic-warm В· cycle 419 В· demoable
  **A warm breathing instrument tuned by the LIVE state of a real ocean right now.** Pick (or geolocate) a coastline and the piece fetches the real current marine swell (Open-Meteo Marine API, no key, CORS-direct) and lets it *play* a slow just-intonation **sea-organ** drone over a luminous WebGPU ocean-energy field (Canvas2D fallback): wave-period = the breath of the whole texture, wave-height = how many stacked JI voices + brightness, swell-period = root pitch, swell-direction = stereo pan. The directest hit on the 2026-06-13 jury's loudest, repeatedly-named, every-jury-starved adult ask вҖ” **real-world-data sonification, "music *about* something other than music," tension in the data not a synth knob** вҖ” and it's warm, not a puzzle. Refs: Zadar Sea Organ / Annea Lockwood / "Pulse of an Ocean" buoy lineage / arXiv 2602.14560 (ENSOвҶ’gamelan, Feb 2026). ~3s auto-start on a drifting demo-swell so a silent 06:30 glance still breathes. Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-explorer fire (banked `589-still-bloom` device-motion-stillnessвҶ’Radigue-drone WebGPU reaction-diffusion + `590-star-atlas` aim-the-phone-at-the-real-sky Cage *Atlas Eclipticalis* вҖ” IDEAS В§419).

### [594-disintegration-loop](/dream/594-disintegration-loop) В· adults / long-form-generative / elegiac В· cycle 421 В· demoable
  **A recording that crumbles as it plays.** A warm just-intonation lullaby fragment is rendered once into a "tape" (a single mutable `Float32Array`), then **re-recorded onto itself pass after pass** through a wear chain вҖ” a downward-creeping one-pole lowpass (highs flake first, ~9 kHz вҶ’ ~420 Hz floor), accumulating **oxide dropouts** (a persistent `dropoutMap` that only ever deepens, punching permanent holes), wow/flutter resampling jitter, and `tanh` tape saturation вҖ” so the erosion is **genuine compounding state, never reset and never an LFO**. The music at minute 5 is materially hollower than at minute 0; it decays into a ghost. The **only** interaction is one vertical lever: top = *hold on* (slows the decay, mixes a whisper of the pristine seed back in вҖ” buys time, never undoes), bottom = *let go* (accelerates the crumble) вҖ” a moral choice about letting a recording disappear, **tension you feel, not a puzzle you solve.** The Canvas2D waveform strip is driven by the *actual* degradation state (live peak envelope + dropout map + lowpass cutoff): bars wear down, holes punch through, warm amber desaturates to ash, a violet playhead sweeps each pass. The lab's **first piece built on audible decay/disintegration as accumulating state** вҖ” distinct from its many spectral (`243`/`267`/`321`) and granular (`227`) treatments, which visualize or scatter sound but never temporally self-degrade. A genuinely different **register** from the four warm reactive screen-toys before it (576/580/583/588): long-form, witnessed, about memory and loss. Refs: **William Basinski вҖ” *The Disintegration Loops* (2002)** + **Music Thing Modular "Degenerator"** self-overwriting looper (Synthtopia, 2026-05-28). ~2.5s idle auto-start so a silent 06:30 glance shows the tape visibly crumbling and (un-muted) hear it hollow. Winner of an adult **DEEP** fire вҖ” one concept attacked by 3 techniques; banked `595-disintegration-spectral` (frequency-domain erosion) + `596-disintegration-dust` (granular WebGPU crumble) as IDEAS В§421.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/594-disintegration-loop/README.md`

### [597-kids-water-bowls](/dream/597-kids-water-bowls) В· kids / friction-resonator-synthesis / serene-watery В· cycle 422 В· demoable
  **Six glowing water bowls a 4-year-old can play with no reading вҖ” TAP to ring them like bells, RUB a finger round the rim to make them SING.** The heart is the lab's **first friction-excited resonator / modal-synthesis primitive** (grep-verified 0Г— across 594 prior prototypes): each bowl is one resonator excited two ways. **Rub = a sustained glass-armonica friction tone** вҖ” looping pink-ish noise through a **high-Q bandpass** (Q 14вҶ’26) tuned to the bowl's pitch + 3 quiet inharmonic shimmer sines, where **drag speed** (smoothed px/ms) drives amplitude + brightness (bandpass opens upward) + Q in real time, so rub faster вҶ’ louder/brighter/more focused, stop вҶ’ it decays over ~0.6s. **Tap = a struck inharmonic bell** (additive sines at 1, 2.01, 3.0, 4.2Г—, ~4ms attack, higher partials decay faster). Tuning is deliberately **not** pentatonic: just-intonation Lydian-ish `1/1, 9/8, 5/4, 11/8, 3/2, 5/3` over ~F3 (the 11/8 raised-4th = a watery floating color). Higher water = lower pitch (real physics, drawn so it teaches itself). Canvas2D glowing vessels with bold per-bowl colors, tap ripples + brightness bloom, rub standing-wave caustic shimmer, finger-glow trail, ambient water bed (never silent). Engineered for kids: вүҘ64px well-spaced bowls, pre-created nodes for <50ms response, multi-touch (two bowls sing at once), no fail states, kid-safe master chain (lowpass 7200 + compressor вҲ’18/6/12, gains capped), and a clever **audio-rate smoothing loop decoupled from the visual rAF** so the rub stays smooth even if the canvas hitches. ~2.5s idle auto-rub demo so a silent 06:30 glance sees + hears a bowl singing. Refs: Indian **Jal Tarang** (struck water bowls) + Benjamin Franklin's **glass armonica** (1761, rubbed glass). Winner of a kids **DEEP** fire вҖ” one instrument, 3 synthesis cores; banked `598-kids-water-bowls` (modal additive) + `599-kids-water-bowls` (bowed-waveguide AudioWorklet) as IDEAS В§422. Resurrects the В§420-banked seed `592`.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/597-kids-water-bowls/README.md`

### [601-feedback-howl](/dream/601-feedback-howl) В· adults / no-input-feedback-synthesis В· cycle 423 В· demoable
  **An instrument that is nothing but its own scream.** No oscillator, no sample, no microphone вҖ” the sound IS a Web Audio graph fed back into itself, self-oscillating on the edge of runaway, and you sculpt the howl OFF the glass: keyboard and (on a phone) device-tilt bend, choke, and spike it without ever touching the screen. The lab's **first no-input self-oscillating feedback synthesis** (grep-verified: many oscillator/sampler/granular synths, but nothing whose sound is its own feedback loop), and the directest answer to JURY 2026-06-14's demand to swing OUT of the cozy attractor (warm-JI bed ~7Г—/15, warm-serene VIBE ~9Г—/15, Canvas2D 6Г—/15) and build something with **edges** вҖ” abrasive, on-the-brink, felt-tension-not-a-puzzle вҖ” that renders **off Canvas2D** and takes input from **something other than a fingertip**. Winner of an adult **WIDE** fire (3 orthogonal abrasive explorers).

  Signal path (no external source): a single ring вҖ” `feedbackGain вҶ’ delay вҶ’ bandpass вҶ’ peaking вҶ’ waveShaper(soft saturation) вҶ’ dcBlock(highpass) вҶ’ feedbackGain` вҖ” kicked into self-oscillation by one short decaying noise seed at start, loop gain sitting just below 1.0 so it howls without running away. A post-shaper tap вҶ’ `masterGain вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor(brick-wall limiter) вҶ’ AnalyserNode вҶ’ destination`. **Safety (non-negotiable for feedback):** hard loop-gain cap `LOOP_GAIN_MAX = 0.985` (never true runaway), master brick-wall limiter (вҲ’8 dB, knee 0, ratio 20, 2 ms attack), a ~90 Hz DC-blocking highpass (kills the sub-pile-up that wrecks feedback loops), an instant **PANIC** that ramps loop gain + master to 0, sane start volume (~0.16 auto-demo / ~0.32 play) + always-visible mute вҖ” abrasive, never literally painful or speaker-destroying.

  Subsystems (вүҘ3 вҶ’ 4): (1) **feedback DSP network** (`audio.ts`) вҖ” the self-oscillating ring + every safety clamp + `applyParams`/`applyStab`/`applyPanic`/`readAnalyser`, all param changes glided via `setTargetAtTime`. (2) **keyboard control mapping** (`page.tsx`) вҖ” вҶ‘/вҶ“ loop gain (tension toward the edge), вҶҗ/вҶ’ delay time (pitch of the howl), `[`/`]` cutoff, `-`/`=` resonance Q, `1`вҖҰ`9` jump cutoff across the band, space = a "stab" gain-spike screech, `P`/Escape = PANIC. (3) **tilt control mapping** вҖ” `deviceorientation` (iOS 13+ `requestPermission()` inside the start gesture) вҶ’ forward/back bends cutoff, left/right bends delay/pitch; falls back silently to keyboard-only. (4) **WGSL reactive spectrum render** (`gpu.ts`) вҖ” a violent full-screen frequency lattice that smears and whites out at resonant peaks, driven by the live `AnalyserNode`, with a real Canvas2D fallback (writhing lattice + tearing scanlines + waveform ghost). **No API route, no guard, no npm deps** (pure client Web Audio + WebGPU; nothing recorded or sent). Fallbacks, each with a visible `text-rose-300` notice: tilt denied/unavailable вҶ’ keyboard-only; WebGPU absent вҶ’ Canvas2D; audio gated вҶ’ the Start button is the gesture; ~2.5 s idle **auto-demo** self-starts a safe low-level feedback so a muted 06:30 glance already shows a living, writhing field, and the demo "wander" resumes after ~5 s idle.

  References: **Toshimaru Nakamura** вҖ” *no-input mixing board* (an instrument that is nothing but its own feedback); **David Tudor** вҖ” live-electronic feedback works (*Rainforest* / *Pulsers* lineage). Born from **RESEARCH В§423** (the abrasive register is 0Г— in the lab; GPU-compute AV spectacle is a current 2026 technique вҖ” nibi/ShaderVine; and a grep caught that the obvious edgy ideas were already shipped вҖ” `387-drop-engine` EDM build-drop, `422-shatter-piano` granular destruction вҖ” so this swung to a genuinely un-built synthesis paradigm instead). **Ambition honest 3/5**: **#1** first no-input self-oscillating feedback synthesis in the lab (grep-verified) + **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (4, above) + **#3** named refs (Nakamura / Tudor). **Diversity** `banned (JURY 2026-06-14)=[Canvas2D OUTPUT 6Г— В· touch INPUT 4Г— В· warm-JI-drone/chord bed ~7Г— В· warm/serene/cozy VIBE ~9Г— В· third real-ocean-data] В· picked=[**keyboard + device-tilt INPUT** (off-glass, not a fingertip, not mic) В· **WebGPU OUTPUT** (off Canvas2D; Canvas2D only as fallback) В· **no-input feedback self-oscillation TECH** (not warm-JI, not onset/beat) В· **abrasive / on-the-brink VIBE** (felt tension, the opposite of cozy)]` вҖ” clean on every banned tag. Winner of the adult WIDE fire; banked `600-data-scream` (voice вҶ’ WebGPU Ikeda test-pattern data-strobe) + `602-motion-thrash` (camera optical-flow вҶ’ violent industrial noise + WebGPU strobe) as IDEAS В§423. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `вң“ Compiled successfully in 44s`, `вң“ Generating static pages (459/459)`, `/dream/601-feedback-howl 6.66 kB / 110 kB First Load` prerendered static в—Ӣ), **NOT browser-verified** (no real GPU/audio/tilt in sandbox) вҖ” the auto-demo + keyboard + Canvas2D/keyboard-only fallbacks mean the field writhes on a glance with zero hardware, and Karel can ride the brink himself at his desk.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/601-feedback-howl/README.md`

### [603-kids-yell-blob](/dream/603-kids-yell-blob) В· kids / comic-vocal-resynthesis / silly-monster В· cycle 424 В· demoable
  **The lab's FIRST funny prototype вҖ” a giant wobbly googly blob you YELL at, and it squashes, inflates, and HONKS your own voice back like a kazoo.** After 600+ pieces not one was comedic (every kids toy warm/gentle/awe вҖ” the exact cozy autopilot JURY 2026-06-14 banned). The kid-safe translation of the jury's demand for "edges" (fast/loud/abrasive/**funny**/unsettling) is the one register a 4-year-old can take loud: **silly.** Roar/sing/shout into the mic вҶ’ a 40-point spring-mass **soft-body blob** (raw WebGL2, hand-written GLSL ES 3.00, big googly eyes) inflates, jiggles, and overshoots with squash-and-stretch (loudness raises the rest-radius + `popBlob` kicks the rim so it bounces back, a per-axis squash spring flattens-then-stretches on a loud onset), tinted cyan (high voice) вҶ’ pink (low voice) by spectral centroid вҖ” and the kid's voice is **honked back, exaggerated**: detuned saw+square вҶ’ **ring modulator** вҶ’ **WaveShaper** (cartoon clip) вҶ’ **swept bandpass**, pitched/bent by their voice with a drooping "HONKвҖҰ honkвҖҰ" envelope (rate-limited so it's comedic, not a buzz), plus a quiet distorted live-voice echo. It's a real **instrument** (the kid's yell IS transformed into the sound вҖ” the paradigm that won `601-feedback-howl`), not a reactive visualizer. Kid-safe master chain `gain вҶ’ lowpass 7kHz вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor (brick-wall, вҲ’10/0/20, 3ms/250ms) вҶ’ destination`, pre-created nodes for <50ms response, no painful transients. Graceful: mic denied вҶ’ visible `text-rose-300` notice + **hold-the-screen / mash-any-key fake-yell** (still bounces + honks); WebGL2 absent вҶ’ notice. ~2.5s idle **auto-demo** yells at itself so a silent 06:30 glance shows it alive; real input preempts instantly, demo resumes after ~5s quiet. **No API route, no guard, no npm deps, no CDN, no three.js** (pure client Web Audio + raw WebGL2; nothing recorded or sent). References: **Disney squash-and-stretch** (Preston Blair, *Cartoon Animation*); **holtsetio (Niklas Niehus) WebGPU `softbodies` / Softbody Tetris (2026-03-13)** for the gooey soft-body feel; classic cartoon foley (**Carl Stalling / Treg Brown** honks). Born from **RESEARCH В§424** (soft-body squish is a current 2026 WebGPU technique; the lab is 0Г— comedic вҖ” "funny" is the kid-native form of the jury's "edges"). **Ambition honest 2/5**: **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (mic RMS+centroid analysis В· spring-mass soft-body В· raw-WebGL2 render В· comic ring-mod/waveshaper honk DSP = 4) + **#3** named refs (Blair / holtsetio / Stalling-Brown). #1 NOT claimed (grep: Verlet [303] / ball-pit physics [460] / "jelly" toys [125/286] pre-exist вҖ” squish isn't a clean lab-first; the genuine novelty is the comedic REGISTER, a diversity win not an ambition criterion); #5 NOT claimed (Softbody Tetris ~3 mo). **Diversity** `banned (JURY 2026-06-14)=[Canvas2D OUTPUT 6Г— В· touch INPUT 4Г— В· warm-JI-drone/chord bed ~7Г— В· warm/serene/cozy VIBE ~9Г— В· camera over-mined В· gamepad just-used В· third-ocean-data] В· picked=[**mic-voice INPUT** (off-glass, not a fingertip, not camera/gamepad) В· **raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT** (off Canvas2D) В· **comic-vocal-resynthesis + soft-body-squish TECH** (not warm-JI, not onset/beat) В· **silly-monster VIBE** (loud + funny, the opposite of cozy)]` вҖ” clean on every banned tag, and the directest fill of the lab's 0Г—-comedic gap. Winner of a kids **WIDE** fire (3 orthogonal silly explorers); banked `604-kids-stomp-band` (shake вҶ’ three.js cartoon-foley junk pile) + `605-kids-blow-parade` (blow вҶ’ WebGPU balloon raspberry parade) as IDEAS В§424. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `вң“ Compiled successfully in 45s`, `вң“ Generating static pages (460/460)`, `/dream/603-kids-yell-blob 5.7 kB / 109 kB First Load` prerendered static в—Ӣ), **NOT browser-verified** (no real mic/audio/GPU in sandbox) вҖ” the auto-demo + tap/keyboard fake-yell mean it wobbles + honks on a glance with zero hardware, and Karel can yell at it himself.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/603-kids-yell-blob/README.md`

### [619-kids-plinko-bells](/dream/619-kids-plinko-bells) В· kids / Galton-quincunx-stochastic-physics / emergent-STEM-wonder В· cycle 430 В· demoable
  **"Marble Bells" вҖ” a 4-year-old drops a glowing marble into a peg field and watches *chance itself* play a chord.** Tap anywhere up top to release a little cluster of marbles; they cascade through a triangular **Galton / quincunx** peg lattice (~12 rows), bouncing left or right at every row with a slight center-pull plus real collision jitter (so the binomial вҶ’ normal distribution emerges and no two runs look alike), and land in one of **9 just-intonation bins**. Each landing rings that bin's warm **struck bell** (additive sines at ~1, 2.0, 3.0, 4.2Г—, ~4ms attack, higher partials decaying faster). Because more marbles end up in the middle (the bell curve), the **center bins fill fastest** вҖ” and the bins are tuned symmetrically so the center IS the root/fifth/octave: the emergent chord is rooted and warm, richest at the middle, gentle color at the edges. The histogram bars ARE the live distribution; counts slowly bleed off so it can play forever. Nine JI bins over F3 вүҲ 174.6 Hz (`1/2, 2/3, 3/4, 5/6, 1/1, 5/4, 3/2, 5/3, 2/1`), each a bold saturated hue вҖ” color is the language, nothing is ever "wrong." The lab's **first Galton-board / quincunx stochastic-physics instrument** (grep-verified 0Г— across 618 prior prototypes), and the directest break from the kids **silly-googly-creature 3-peat** (603/609/617): a mesmerizing STEM-wonder register вҖ” chance, made audible вҖ” not a creature, not mic, not cozy. Renders on **WebGL2** (raw GLSL ES 3.00, instanced glowing marbles/pegs/bins вҖ” the deliberately *under*-used renderer, off both the over-corrected WebGPU and jury-flagged Canvas2D), with a full **Canvas2D fallback** + a live backend badge. Kid-safe master chain (`gain вҶ’ lowpass 7.5kHz вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor вҲ’16/6/12 вҶ’ destination`, gains capped, bells micro-rate-limited), gesture-gated AudioContext, always-on root+fifth+octave pad so it's never silent. ~2.2s idle **auto-rain** so a silent 06:30 glance is already cascading + singing; real taps preempt instantly. Refs: **Sir Francis Galton's quincunx / "bean machine" (1894)** (central-limit-theorem, binomialвҶ’normal); **Wintergatan's Marble Machine** (marbles-as-instrument); **Insook Choi, "Interactive Sonification Exploring Emergent Behavior" (2018)**. Love-aligned to Karel's emergent-music cluster (`236-particle-life-song`вқӨпёҸ, `130-tsl-particle-compute`вқӨпёҸ). Winner of a kids **WIDE** fire (3 orthogonal explorers); banked `620-kids-music-mill` (rotating music-box peg sequencer, self-playing) + `621-kids-duet-bloom` (two-finger cooperative consonance, the social lane) as IDEAS В§430. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `вң“ Compiled successfully in 40s`, `вң“ Generating static pages (467/467)`, `/dream/619-kids-plinko-bells 5.36 kB / 112 kB First Load` prerendered static в—Ӣ), **NOT browser-verified** (no GPU/audio/pointer in sandbox) вҖ” the auto-rain + Canvas2D fallback mean it cascades and chimes on a glance with zero hardware.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/619-kids-plinko-bells/README.md`

### [622-wolfram-rhythm](/dream/622-wolfram-rhythm) В· adults / 1D-elementary-CA-Wolfram-rule / austere-mechanical В· cycle 431 В· demoable
  **"Wolfram Rhythm" вҖ” a single integer composes the music.** A 1D **elementary cellular automaton** unfolds row by row on a musical clock: each cell's next state comes from its left/self/right neighbourhood via an 8-bit **rule number** (0вҖ“255), and every newly-born row's live cells fire short, edged percussion panned by column over a whole-tone set. The **rule number IS the composition** вҖ” `30` chaotic/noisy, `90` a self-similar Sierpinski fractal, `110` complex/Turing-complete (gliders collide), `184` traffic, etc. вҖ” change it (the one lever: a Вұstepper, a 0вҖ“255 slider, and six labeled presets) and the entire character transforms. The lab's **first 1D elementary-CA / Wolfram-rule instrument** (grep-verified 0Г— вҖ” the existing CA pieces are 2D: `25`/`180` Conway Life, `264` Lenia, `360`/`377` sandpile), and a deliberate swing OFF the adult **edges/real-data autopilot** (601 howl В· 606 vivisection В· 613 seismic В· 618 solar) into an austere, rule-driven register вҖ” edged (Rule 30 is literally chaos) but neither loud-abrasive nor cozy.

  Subsystems (вүҘ3 вҶ’ 4): (1) **1D-CA rule engine** (`engine.ts`) вҖ” toroidal `stepRow`, centered/soup seeds, the 256-rule lookup, `PRESETS`. (2) **long-form watchdog** (`StagnationDetector`) вҖ” detects dead / frozen / short-cycle states and `perturb`s (flips cells) or re-seeds so the piece keeps evolving for minutes rather than locking up. (3) **CAвҶ’percussion synth** (`audio.ts`) вҖ” metal-FM / band-passed-noise-click / snappy-pluck voices, columnвҶ’whole-tone pitch + columnвҶ’pan, 24-voice steal-oldest cap, master вҶ’ brick-wall limiter (no warm drone anywhere). (4) **WebGL2 render** вҖ” the iconic scrolling Wolfram diagram via a texture-uploaded grid + fragment shader (newest row flashes at a bright playhead line, old rows fade as they scroll), with a real **Canvas2D fallback** + visible notice. Idle visual auto-start on mount (audio gated behind **Begin** per autoplay), so a silent glance is already a self-drawing diagram. **No API route, no guard, no npm deps** (pure client Web Audio + WebGL2; nothing recorded or sent).

  References: **Stephen Wolfram, _A New Kind of Science_ (2002)** (elementary CA, rules 30/90/110); **Matthew Cook** (Rule-110 Turing-completeness, 2004); **Iannis Xenakis** (cellular automata in composition вҖ” the severe/architectural register). Winner of an adult **DEEP** fire (3 CA paradigms вҖ” 2D Conway Life, 1D Wolfram, continuous Lenia); the **only duplication-clean** candidate (`620-life-engine` duplicated `25`/`180`, `622-quickening` duplicated `264`), banked both as cautionary IDEAS В§431. **Ambition honest 3/5**: #1 first 1D-elementary-CA/Wolfram instrument (grep-0Г—) + #2 вүҘ3 subsystems (4) + #3 named refs (Wolfram / Cook / Xenakis); #5 not claimed (foundational). **Diversity** `banned=[WGSL-WebGPU 5Г— over-corrected В· edges/real-data adult autopilot В· JURY-14 Canvas2D/touch/warm-JI/cozy/ocean] В· picked=[rule-number-stepper + sparse-perturb INPUT В· WebGL2 OUTPUT В· 1D-elementary-CA TECH В· austere-mechanical VIBE]` вҖ” clean on every banned tag. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `вң“ Compiled successfully in 73s`, `вң“ Generating static pages (467/467)`, `/dream/622-wolfram-rhythm 6.15 kB / 109 kB First Load` prerendered static в—Ӣ), **NOT browser-verified** (no GPU/audio in sandbox) вҖ” the on-mount auto-running diagram + Canvas2D fallback mean it draws on a glance with zero hardware; unverified by ear: that rules 30/90/110 are audibly distinct and the metallic voices read as edged-not-harsh.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/622-wolfram-rhythm/README.md`

### [630-piano-refract](/dream/630-piano-refract) В· adults / NMF-spectral-factorization / dissective-prismatic В· cycle 434 В· demoable
  **"Piano Refract" вҖ” the lab's FIRST genuine cycle-2 deepening: Karel's own solo piano refracted like light through a prism into five voices you solo, mute & re-mix.** This is the deepening of the loved standout `606-piano-vivisection` the jury begged for by hand ("606 is the model вҖ” it just needed a cycle 2 to actually reach 4/5") two juries running. Stage 1 keeps 606's bulletproof median-filter **HPSS** split (strings vs. hammers) as the legible *ground*; stage 2 is the new refraction вҖ” the harmonic (strings) layer is re-analyzed and fanned by **NMF** (non-negative matrix factorization, the lab's first вҖ” grep-0Г— across 600+ prototypes) into **four pitched register voices** (Low / Low-mid / High-mid / High). Five independently-mixable looping voices in total (Hammers + the 4 registers): solo isolates one, mute drops it, faders re-balance вҖ” all **instant & click-free** (every buffer plays continuously, sample-aligned; only gain nodes ramp). The technique register the jury praised in 606 ("clinical not cozy, his own music") вҖ” analytical and prismatic, neither doom nor warm.

  **The legibility fix (what makes this a real cycle-2, not a restart):** plain unsupervised NMF returns abstract components that are unstable run-to-run and impossible to name вҖ” the exact weakness that lost the *original* В§425-banked `607-piano-prism` seed to 606. This build **warm-starts** the NMF basis `W`: each of the four columns is seeded as a Gaussian-in-log-frequency bump centered at **~150 / 350 / 800 / 1800 Hz** (with a positive floor so updates still adapt to Karel's real partials), biasing every component to settle into a **stable, musically-meaningful register regardless of the run**. The seeded-basis idea is Smaragdis & Brown (2003) applied for *legibility* rather than transcription.

  Subsystems (вүҘ3 вҶ’ 6): (1) **audio loader** (`audio.ts`, copied verbatim from 606) вҖ” fetches Karel's real solo-piano recording via the read-only `/api/audio/<id>` route, synthesized piano fallback. (2) **median-filter HPSS** (`hpss.ts`, from 606) вҖ” STFT/ISTFT, per-bin/per-frame medians, soft Wiener masks (phase kept). (3) **register-seeded KL-NMF** (`nmf.ts`) вҖ” warm-started multiplicative updates (~70 iters), chunked with `await` yields + progress bar. (4) **per-component Wiener resynthesis** вҖ” `Mk = Vk/ОЈVj` applied to the original complex harmonic STFT вҶ’ ISTFT вҶ’ four register PCM buffers. (5) **5-voice mixer** вҖ” `BufferSource вҶ’ GainNode вҶ’ AnalyserNode вҶ’ master вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor вҶ’ destination`, sample-aligned, instant solo/mute/gain. (6) **WebGL2 "prism" render** (`gl.ts`) вҖ” an incoming white beam splits into five colored bands (steel hammers + violetвҶ’roseвҶ’amberвҶ’emerald registers), each driven by its live level, soloed glows / muted dims, with a real **Canvas2D fallback** + backend badge; idle animation on mount + ~2.5s auto-demo cycles the solo so a silent 06:30 glance is already alive. **No API route, no guard, no npm deps** (READ-only of the existing audio route; nothing recorded or sent).

  Off-glass controls: keyboard `1`вҖ“`5` solo / `0` reset / `m` mute selected / `вҶҗвҶ’` select / `вҶ‘вҶ“` gain / space play-pause; device-tilt "spectral spotlight" (iOS 13+ `requestPermission()` inside the Begin gesture, silent keyboard fallback + `text-rose-300` notice if denied). References: **Lee & Seung, _Nature_ 1999** (NMF + multiplicative updates); **Smaragdis & Brown, WASPAA/ISMIR 2003** (NMF on music spectrograms; seeded basis); **Fitzgerald, DAFx 2010** (the HPSS ground). Born from **RESEARCH В§434** (NMF source-separation is a live 2026 front вҖ” Deep Non-Negative Autoencoders, arXiv 2510.08816; piano is "particularly amenable, beautiful key-hammer extraction" вҖ” Collins, eContact). Winner of an adult **DEEP** fire (one concept, 2 legibility approaches): beat `629-piano-prism` (random-init NMF + post-hoc centroid pitch-SORT) on **reliability + legibility** вҖ” the warm start is deterministic where the sort still rode the random-init lottery; banked 629 as IDEAS В§434. **Ambition honest 4/5** вҖ” the lab's first honest #4 in two juries: **#1** first NMF in the lab (grep-0Г—) + **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (6) + **#3** named refs (Lee&Seung / Smaragdis&Brown / Fitzgerald) + **#4** genuine multi-cycle commitment (cycle 2 of the 606 decomposition spine, claimed honestly for the first time). **Diversity** `banned (JURY 2026-06-15)=[touch INPUT 5Г— В· WebGPU OUTPUT 6Г— В· adult ominous/dark/austere "edges" reflex 5Г— В· 4th real-data sonification on 588/613/618 template] В· picked=[**his-piano-file + keyboard/tilt INPUT** (off-glass, not touch) В· **WebGL2 OUTPUT** (not WebGPU; Canvas2D fallback) В· **NMF spectral-factorization TECH** (grep-0Г—, not real-data) В· **dissective/prismatic VIBE** (analytical, neither doom nor cozy вҖ” the "his own material, clinical" register the jury praised in 606)]` вҖ” clean on every banned tag. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `вң“ Compiled successfully in 37.3s`, `вң“ Generating static pages (470/470)`, `/dream/630-piano-refract 10.1 kB / 113 kB First Load` prerendered static в—Ӣ), **NOT browser-verified** (no real GPU/audio in sandbox) вҖ” the idle prism animation + auto-demo + Canvas2D/keyboard fallbacks mean it reads as alive on a glance with zero hardware; unverified by ear: that the warm-started registers separate cleanly on Karel's actual recording and that solo/mute is as click-free as designed.

  Design notes: `src/app/dream/630-piano-refract/README.md`

### `632-polymeter-loom` вҖ” `demoable` В· adult В· WIDE-winner (cycle 435, 2026-06-15)
[/dream/632-polymeter-loom](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/632-polymeter-loom) вҖ” **"Polymeter Loom": interlocking Euclidean rhythms woven into a hypnotic groove you watch being woven.** Five pitched-percussion voices (kick В· bass В· marimba В· bell В· shaker) each play a **Euclidean rhythm** E(k,n) вҖ” k onsets spread maximally-evenly over n steps via the **Bjorklund** algorithm вҖ” on *different* step-counts (16/8/16/16/12), so the combined groove is **polymetric** and only realigns after the LCM of all step-counts (a long, evolving loop). The marimba+bell share a pattern but one runs **1.2% faster** вҖ” **Steve Reich phasing** вҖ” sliding out of unison and slowly back, so minute 2 sounds unlike minute 0 (long-form state without a loop). A **three.js loom** renders each voice as a concentric bead ring; beads flash (emissive + scale pop) on each onset, and the phasing rings visibly counter-rotate вҖ” the weave tightening and loosening. Off-glass controls: **Weave/Pause**, keys `1`вҖ“`5` toggle voices, `q/a w/s e/d r/f t/g` nudge each voice's onset count k, `space` toggles phasing, tempo slider 70вҖ“150 BPM. Idle auto-demo (loom rotates/breathes + rings drift before any audio); AudioContext created/resumed inside the first gesture (iOS unlock); graceful `text-rose-300` fallbacks for missing WebGL/AudioContext. References: **Steve Reich** (*Music for 18 Musicians*, *Clapping Music* вҖ” phasing); **Godfried Toussaint**, *The Euclidean Algorithm Generates Traditional Musical Rhythms* (2005). Born from **RESEARCH В§435** (groove = microtiming/interlocking-meter science; JURY 2026-06-15 provocation #2 "build the missing middle вҖ” danceable/groove"). Winner of an adult **WIDE** fire (3 missing-middle registers): beat `631-drop-engine` (euphoric EDM build-and-drop + lab-first sidechain pump) and `633-slow-burn` (tender neo-soul microtiming) on honest ambition (two canonical refs that drive it) + output diversity (three.js, 0Г— in last 10) + cleanest vibe-threading (groove that dodges BOTH banned poles вҖ” doom AND cozy/warm); both losers banked as strong **IDEAS В§435** seeds. **Ambition honest 3/5** вҖ” **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (Euclidean generator + phasing clock/lookahead scheduler + multi-voice FM/pluck synth + three.js loom = 4) + **#3** named refs (Reich + Toussaint). #1 not claimed (euclidean/polymeter/Reich all referenced earlier in the corpus вҖ” only `sidechain`, which was 631's, was grep-0Г—). **Diversity** `banned (JURY 2026-06-15)=[touch INPUT 5Г— В· WebGPU OUTPUT 6Г— В· adult ominous/dark/austere "edges" reflex 5Г— В· 4th real-data sonification on 588/613/618 template] + rolling-10 over-rep=[WebGL2 OUTPUT 4Г—] В· picked=[**keyboard + voice-toggle INPUT** (off-glass, not touch) В· **three.js OUTPUT** (0Г— in last 10 вҖ” off banned WebGPU AND over-rep WebGL2) В· **Euclidean-polymeter + Reich-phasing TECH** В· **hypnotic/groove VIBE** (danceable, neither doom nor cozy)]` вҖ” clean on every banned tag. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, 471/471 static pages, `/dream/632-polymeter-loom` prerendered static в—Ӣ, in `app-path-routes-manifest.json`, `.html` emitted), **NOT browser-verified** (no real GPU/audio in sandbox) вҖ” the idle loom rotation + bead pulse + WebGL/audio fallbacks mean it reads as alive on a glance with zero hardware; unverified by ear: that the Reich phasing pair audibly drifts and the polymetric weave grooves on-device.

Design notes: `src/app/dream/632-polymeter-loom/README.md`

### `636-kids-star-pilot` вҖ” `demoable` В· kids В· WIDE-winner (cycle 436, 2026-06-15)
[/dream/636-kids-star-pilot](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/636-kids-star-pilot) вҖ” **"Star Pilot": a 4-year-old flies a glowing comet with a game controller through a field of musical star-gates вҖ” and the gates they pass keep echoing back, so a melody builds itself.** Push the **left stick** (or **arrow keys / WASD** вҖ” automatic fallback, live `gamepadconnected` switch) to fly a momentum-driven ship through six **just-intonation-tuned star-gates** that bloom and ring soft additive bell-tones; face buttons (or **space / 1вҖ“4**) drop sparkly mallet+shimmer percussion. The heart is a **lookahead-scheduled loop-memory sequencer**: the last ~8 gates you visited are remembered and echo back on a slow pulse, so the music *accumulates and evolves* вҖ” minute 2 sounds unlike minute 0 (genuine state, not a loop). **No score, no fail state, no reading** вҖ” the ship softly bounces off the edges, it can't crash. Idle ~5s and a gentle auto-flight resumes so the scene is never silent and a glance always shows it alive. Renders on **Canvas2D** (a glowing additive-trail starfield вҖ” the deliberately under-used renderer, 0Г— in the last 10, off both the jury-banned WebGPU and the over-rep WebGL2). Kid-safe master chain (`gain вҶ’ lowpass 7.5kHz вҶ’ fast-attack DynamicsCompressor вҶ’ destination`, gains capped, triggers rate-limited), Start-gesture AudioContext unlock, `text-violet-300` "connect a controller or use arrow keys" hint / `text-rose-300` canvas-fail notice. References: **Toshio Iwai, _Electroplankton_ (Nintendo DS, 2005)** + **Tetsuya Mizuguchi, _Rez_ / _Child of Eden_** (flying-through-a-synaesthetic-music-space). Born from **RESEARCH В§436** (kid-native NON-touch inputs are under-used вҖ” the kids side keeps reaching for mic + camera-optical-flow; gamepad is 0Г— recently + jury-blessed via 587; and the active-wonder *middle* register is what the kids side lacks per JURY 2026-06-15). Winner of a kids **WIDE** fire (3 orthogonal NON-touch explorers, honoring JURY provocation #4's touch ban): beat `634-kids-tilt-river` (tilt вҶ’ flow-field light river, three.js) and `635-kids-sing-kite` (voice-pitch вҶ’ kite altitude, Canvas2D) on diversity (gamepad is the rarest lab input) + genuine evolving state (loop-memory) + cleanest build; both banked as strong **IDEAS В§436** seeds. **Ambition honest 2/5** (the kids norm): **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (gamepad-poll + keyboard fallback В· flight physics + gate collision В· bell/percussion + loop-memory sequencer w/ lookahead clock В· Canvas2D starfield = 4) + **#3** named refs (Iwai / Mizuguchi). #1 not claimed (gamepad used by 587; sequencer not lab-first). **Diversity** `banned (JURY 2026-06-15)=[touch INPUT В· WebGPU OUTPUT В· adult "edges" reflex В· 4th real-data] + rolling-10=[WebGL2 OUTPUT 4Г—] В· picked=[**gamepad+keyboard INPUT** (off-glass; rarest in lab) В· **Canvas2D OUTPUT** (0Г— in last 10) В· **gamepad-flight + loop-memory-sequencer TECH** В· **playful arcade-wonder VIBE** (the missing middle вҖ” neither warm-cozy nor silly-funny)]` вҖ” clean on every banned tag. **Build-verified** (authoritative `npm run build` exit 0, `вң“ Compiled successfully in 33.9s`, `вң“ Generating static pages (472/472)`, `/dream/636-kids-star-pilot 4.54 kB / 111 kB First Load` prerendered static в—Ӣ), **NOT browser-verified** (no real gamepad/audio in sandbox) вҖ” the auto-demo + keyboard fallback mean it flies + sings on a glance with zero hardware, and Karel can fly it with arrow keys; unverified by ear/hand: that the JI gates read as a melody and the loop-memory echo audibly evolves on-device.

Design notes: `src/app/dream/636-kids-star-pilot/README.md`

### `649-chess-duet` вҖ” `demoable` В· adult В· WIDE-winner (cycle 441, 2026-06-16)
[/dream/649-chess-duet](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/649-chess-duet) вҖ” **"Chess Duet": a famous chess game played as a slow, inevitable TWO-VOICE counterpoint вҖ” White and Black are two instruments, and you hear the whole drama (quiet opening вҶ’ escalating sacrifices вҶ’ the sudden-quiet вҶ’ the inevitable mate) as a piece that composes itself move by move.** The lab's FIRST piece that sonifies a *structured real-world game* as music вҖ” not a physical sensor feed, not an FFT of a sound: the combinatorial structure of a played game **is** the score (the directest hit on JURY 2026-06-15 provocation #5, "music about something other than music вҖ” a live chess game as a duet"). Bundled game: **Anderssen vs Kieseritzky, "The Immortal Game," London 1851** (45 plies, ending `23. Be7#`), parsed by a from-scratch SAN parser (no npm dep, no network). Two alternating voices read as call-and-response counterpoint вҖ” **White** = warm triangle+sine ("left hand", upper staff), **Black** = a darker FM/reedy saw ("right hand", lower staff); file aвҖ“h вҶ’ scale degree in **D harmonic minor** (dramatic mode), rank 1вҖ“8 вҶ’ register, piece type вҶ’ articulation (pawn short В· queen long & rich В· knight grace-note leap В· bishop gliding В· rook firm). Game *events* drive the drama: a **capture** = a dissonant clash that resolves; a **check** = a held low tension pedal tone; **castling** = a settled perfect-fifth cadence; the final **checkmate** = a darkly resolving held chord; a running **material-balance** signal biases the timbre brighter/darker so the arc is *felt*. Renders on **inline SVG** (the scarcest renderer вҖ” last SVG was 637; off the jury-banned WebGPU, off the rolling-hot three.js [3Г—], off the over-rep WebGL2): an 8Г—8 board lights each move's from/to squares (captures glow red, mate glows indigo) beside an unfolding two-staff score with a tracking playhead, plus the legible SAN of the current move. Ear-safe master chain (`gain 0.42 вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor вҶ’ destination`); AudioContext created inside the Play gesture (iOS); **auto-starts the game ~2.5s after load** so a silent 06:30 glance is fully alive (board lighting up move by move + the duet playing, zero interaction/hardware). Tempo slider 1.0вҖ“3.5 s/move. **No API route, no guard, no npm deps** (pure client SVG + Web Audio вҖ” no network/mic/camera/secret). References: **Anderssen vs Kieseritzky, "The Immortal Game," 1851** (the bundled game); the informal lineage of chess-as-music / game-sonification, reframed here as strict two-voice counterpoint over a real master game with *events* (not just squares) driving the harmony. Born from **RESEARCH В§441** (a corpus check killed two "0Г—" jury claims вҖ” MIDI-OUT already exists in `291-harmonograph`, WebRTC in `508-accord-call` вҖ” steering ambition toward the genuinely-0Г— lanes: structured-data-as-counterpoint and AI-pipeline chains; browser generative-composition is a live 2026 front вҖ” Loopstate/Riffer/KOSMOS sequencers, GEDMAS/GESMI algorithmic-EDM lineage, SMDIM arXiv 2603.00576 Feb-2026). Winner of an adult **WIDE** fire (3 orthogonal explorers mapping 3 jury-named open lanes): beat `648-latent-chain` (the lab's first 2-model AI pipeline chain, audioвҶ’imageвҶ’wordsвҶ’image вҖ” bolder #1 but budget-gated + invisible/unverifiable at a silent glance) and `650-endless-lift` (an ecstatic Shepard-fold gospel key-lift вҖ” the bulletproof ecstatic-register fill); both banked as strong **IDEAS В§441** seeds. **Ambition honest 3/5**: **#1** first structured-game / counterpoint sonification in the lab (a genuinely new "machine," not the banned 588/613/618 physical-feed template) + **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (from-scratch SAN parser + board model В· two-voice contrapuntal mapper + Web Audio scheduler В· event-driven harmony/drama state В· SVG board+score renderer = 4) + **#3** the named game. #4 not claimed (single cycle); #5 not hard-claimed (SMDIM ~3.5mo, server-side вҖ” grounding only). **Diversity** `banned (JURY 2026-06-15)=[touch INPUT 5Г— В· WebGPU OUTPUT 6Г— В· adult ominous/dark/austere "edges" reflex 5Г— В· 4th real-data sonification on 588/613/618 template] + renderer-watch=[three.js hot 3Г— (632/643/645)] В· picked=[**structured-game-data INPUT** (off touch, off recent mic/audio-file/physical-feed) В· **inline-SVG OUTPUT** (the scarcest renderer вҖ” off banned WebGPU AND off hot three.js AND off over-rep WebGL2) В· **game-structureвҶ’two-voice-counterpoint sonification TECH** (a new "machine," not the banned physical-feed template) В· **cinematic / narrative-tension VIBE** (off BOTH banned poles вҖ” dramatic, not the ominous-austere autopilot, not cozy)]` вҖ” clean on every binding banned tag. **Build-verified** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build` exit 0, `вң“ Compiled successfully in 91s`, `вң“ Generating static pages (477/477)` [476 from cycle 440 + 649 = 477, confirming 648/650 absent], `/dream/649-chess-duet 6.93 kB / 113 kB First Load` prerendered static в—Ӣ), **NOT browser-verified by ear** (no audio in sandbox) вҖ” but uniquely low-risk: pure SVG + Web Audio with zero GPU/network/key/sensor surface, the 45 plies were verified against the historical game, and the 2.5s auto-start means the board + duet are alive on a glance with zero hardware;
