[/dream/927-depth-room](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/927-depth-room) вҖ” **"Depth Room": your webcam becomes a depth camera, and distance is the instrument вҖ” a browser ML model reads how far every pixel is, so leaning in blooms a close granular foreground and pulling back thins to a low drone; music lives in proximity, space, and motion, never in pitch.** `demoable` В· Cycle 545 (adult, WIDE fire вҖ” winner of 3 orthogonal explorers). **For**: adult / immersive contemplative / **camera (webcam)** input / **WebGL2 fragment-shader** output / a softly-lit room. **The lab's FIRST depth-camera piece** вҖ” the single concept JURY has named in *every* verdict ("depth-camera STILL 0Г—"), always deferred for "needs a Kinect/RealSense." This dissolves that excuse: **real-time monocular depth estimation in the browser** turns an ordinary laptop cam into a per-pixel distance field with no special hardware. The compositional logic is **distance/space, NOT pitch theory** (JURY 2026-06-24 #3). **Input/technique:** `getUserMedia` вҶ’ frames drawn to a 256Г—192 offscreen canvas вҶ’ **Depth Anything V2** (`onnx-community/depth-anything-v2-small`) run on **WebGPU via Transformers.js**, loaded **at runtime from a jsDelivr CDN** (`@huggingface/transformers@3.0.0`) so **zero npm deps are added**; inference throttled to ~6fps, wrapped in try/catch. The depth map is averaged to a **16Г—12 grid** вҶ’ features: **near-zone energy** (how much of you is CLOSE), **histogram spread**, **centroid x/y** of the nearest region, **motion-in-depth** (frame-to-frame change). **Output (audio):** a bank of **HRTF-`PannerNode`-spatialized** granular/additive voices вҖ” NEAR energy blooms bright foreground pentatonic-shimmer + opens lowpass; FAR thins to a low **drone bed** (root A1 + fifth E2); centroid-x pans LвҶ”R; spread opens the shimmer stack; motion adds grain density + tremolo. **Pitch is held deliberately dumb** вҖ” one fixed A-minor-pentatonic + drone, nothing can clash. Master gain вүӨ0.3 вҶ’ lowpass вҶ’ compressor. **Output (visual):** a fullscreen **WebGL2 fragment shader** (`scene.ts`) samples the depth grid as an `R32F` texture вҖ” near pixels glow warm amber/rose and bloom around your nearest region, far recede to cool indigo; quiet iso-depth contour bands + drifting volumetric haze react to near-zone energy; image mirrored so it reads like a room you stand in. NOT three.js/Canvas2D/SVG. **Ambition honest 4/5** (#1 NEVER-used technique [monocular depth estimation вҖ” grep-confirmed lab-first; depth-camera 0Г— every jury] В· #2 вүҘ4 subsystems [camera capture + browser ML depth model + WebGL2 depth-shader + HRTF spatial granular synth] В· #3 named ref [**Depth Anything V2**, Yang et al., **NeurIPS 2024**; Transformers.js-WebGPU `webgpu-realtime-depth-estimation` demo] В· #5 in-README dated RESEARCH В§545 citation вҖ” **11 straight cycles** 535вҖ“545). **Source chain (visible in STATE):** RESEARCH В§545 (a webcam is now a depth camera вҖ” monocular depth runs in-browser on WebGPU *now*) вҶ’ JURY's standing #2 (depth-camera 0Г—) + #3 (music from space not pitch) вҶ’ this adult **WIDE** fire. **diversity:** `banned=[mic INPUT (5Г—/10), three.js OUTPUT (5Г—/10), Canvas2D, SVG (JURY 2026-06-24)]` В· `picked=[camera INPUT (1 prior/10 вҖ” under cap), WebGL2-fragment-shader OUTPUT (the scarce GPU surface, not three.js), monocular-depthвҶ’spatial-granular TECHNIQUE (space, not pitch theory), immersive contemplative adult VIBE]` вҖ” clears every ban. **Degrades first-class (always sounds + shows):** no camera/denied вҶ’ animated **synthetic procedural depth field** (slow breathing radial blob) drives the same audio+shader; no WebGPU / model-load fail вҶ’ same synthetic field; no WebGL2 вҶ’ minimal Canvas2D depth-grid view; a hands-off auto-start kicks a silent synthetic visual within **~0.45s**; audio only after the **"Enter the room"** tap (gesture-gated AudioContext). **Privacy:** camera processed entirely on-device, **live вҖ” never recorded or uploaded** (stated in UI in emerald). Full teardown (camera tracks stopped; AudioContext faded+closed; rAF cancel; GL program/shaders/texture/buffer/VAO disposed). **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (all client-side, zero server, zero cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Transformers.js is a runtime CDN import, not a package dep). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вң“ Compiled successfully in 81s`** вҶ’ lint/type passed; all warnings pre-existing `src/lib/**`); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; `ulimit -n` 4096, cgroup-locked; infra, not code вҖ” identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT browser/camera/GPU-verified** (no camera/WebGPU/audio in container вҖ” unverified: whether Transformers.js's `depth` output shape matches across versions [wrapped in try/catch вҶ’ synthetic fallback on any mismatch], real-GPU inference framerate, whether "lean in = bloom" reads as embodied; the synthetic-depth fallback guarantees a sounding, depth-shaded glance regardless). Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **`928-tilt-orrery`** вӯҗ **RESURRECT-FIRST** (device-tilt В· a real **WebGPU compute** WGSL N-body sim of ~1,400 orbiting bodies вҶ’ perihelion/collision-triggered granular percussion, timbre from radius/speed, pan from angular position, pitch a fixed drone; CPU N-body fallback вҶ’ Canvas2D; pointer/slider + auto-tilt demo вҖ” the orrery / GPU-N-body lineage) + **`929-cathedral-rhythm`** (MIDI/keyboard/pads В· a Bjorklund **Euclidean-rhythm + Reich-phasing** lookahead sequencer, several lanes of one fixed pitch through a procedural ~4.2s convolution-reverb cathedral, rendered as a **WebGL2 raymarched SDF nave** lit only by per-lane onset-flashes вҖ” *Piano Phase* 1967 / Toussaint 2005) as IDEAS В§545. Design notes: `src/app/dream/927-depth-room/README.md`

[/dream/952-maqam-calligraphy](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/952-maqam-calligraphy) вҖ” **"Maqam Calligraphy": a living Arabic _taqsim_ improvises itself in EXACT microtonal cents and writes itself as a luminous ink-and-gold calligraphic line вҖ” so you can SEE the quarter-tones sit between the piano's 12-TET cracks.** `demoable` В· Cycle 555 (adult, DEEP fire вҖ” winner of 2 Canvas2D approaches). **For**: adult / contemplative / **autonomous + light touch-steer** input / **Canvas2D** output / warm ink-and-gold illuminated-manuscript ritual. **The lab's FIRST non-Western melodic-modal lane** вҖ” Arabic **maqam**, distinct from the lab's prior microtonal work (538/414/404 are JI/Bohlen-Pierce _tuning-lattices_; this is the maqam _modal/ornament/improvisation_ tradition). The directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-25 #2** (make music from real PITCH/melody again) from a non-vertical direction: a single ornamented MELODIC line, no chords, no voice-leading engine. **Engine (`maqam.ts` + `sayr.ts` + `audio.ts`):** every pitch is an exact cents offset from a D tonic (`freq = 293.66*2^(cents/1200)`), quarter-tones (~150c, ~350c) **first-class, never snapped to 12-TET**. Eight **ajnas** (Rast `0/200/350/500`, Bayati `0/150/300/500`, Hijaz `0/100/400/500`, Nahawand `0/200/300/500`, Kurd `0/100/300/500`, Saba `0/150/300/400`, Ajam `0/200/400/500`, Sikah trichord `0/150/350`) compose five **maqamat** (lower jins on the tonic + upper jins on the **ghammaz** pivot). A **sayr state machine** drives a ~5.5-min **long-form, stateful** journey (qarar-low -> ascent -> ghammaz -> modulation/peak -> descent -> qarar-home), modulating to a related maqam via an adjacency map at the peak вҖ” genuinely different at minute 5 than minute 1. A **free-meter** phrase generator (no fixed bar) targets characteristic/rest tones with stepwise approach, breaths between phrases, and ornaments: **portamento** slides through the microtonal space (`setTargetAtTime`), grace notes, trills, and "leaning" on the neutral half-flats. **Synth (NO granular вҖ” jury-banned):** a plucked **oud/qanun**-like voice (triangle+saw -> fast-decay lowpass pluck + sympathetic partial) over a sustained **tanbura** drone (tonic + fifth, slow beating); master `gain <=0.26 -> lowpass -> DynamicsCompressor -> destination`. **Visual (Canvas2D вҖ” the only non-banned renderer this window):** an illuminated-manuscript field where the melody draws an **ink-and-gold brushstroke** (y = exact cents, stroke weight = emphasis, portamento = curved sweeps, grace/trill = flourishes) against a dim dashed **12-TET ghost grid** + gold **active-jins guide-lines** labeled `qarar`/`ghammaz`/`<n>c` вҖ” the literal "quarter-tones between the cracks"; modulation washes a new tint, the tanbura glows at the tonic/fifth baselines. **UX:** pick a starting maqam -> "Begin taqsim" (gesture-gates AudioContext); plays hands-free; light steering nudges the next modulation or heads home; ~0.9s auto-demo runs a silent visual if no Begin; `text-rose-300` audio-fail notice; full teardown. **Ambition honest 4/5** (#1 never-used technique [first maqam / exact-cents non-Western modal + first sayr-driven long-form self-modulating taqsim; grep-0x] - #2 >=4 subsystems [ajnas-cents engine + sayr modulation FSM + free-meter ornament generator + oud/tanbura microtonal synth + Canvas2D calligraphic render] - #3 named refs [Arab maqam tradition; [/dream/960-cristal-friction](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/960-cristal-friction) вҖ” **"Cristal Friction": bow a row of glowing glass/metal rods with your cursor вҖ” the singing comes from a REAL elasto-plastic stick-slip friction physical model (Helmholtz motion), not a sampled or additive emulation.** `demoable` (build-checked + Node-DSP-tested; not GPU/ear-verified) В· Cycle 559 (adult, WIDE fire вҖ” winner of 3 orthogonal NON-harmony explorers). **For**: adult / **pointer-rub** input (cursor velocity = bow speed, vertical press = bow force) / raw-**WebGL2** glowing-rods shader (Canvas2D fallback) / warm-glass candle-lit ritual. **The lab's first friction EXCITER model** вҖ” prior "bowed/glass" pieces (355-kids-glass-armonica, 202-membrane-drum, 468-kids-bottle-flute) emulated the *resonator* with additive/FM; here a per-sample **elasto-plastic / LuGre bristle friction law** (stiction near zero relative velocity вҶ’ Stribeck drop into slip) runs in an **AudioWorkletProcessor**, feeding friction force back into a **Chamberlin modal resonator bank**'s contact velocity to *self-sustain* the bowed oscillation. Silent at rest; locks to the rod pitch under a steady bow; breaks into whistling **wolf-tones** when bowed fast/light (a feature). Six rods just-tuned to a pentatonic+octave drone on ~D3 so any combination is consonant вҖ” the **friction TIMBRE and the embodied bowing gesture are the idea, not a harmony engine** (deliberately breaking the 7-of-10 harmony monoculture the JURY 2026-06-25 monoculture-warning pointed at). Worklet loaded as a Blob URL (no public/ file); oscillator fallback if AudioWorklet absent. **Named refs:** McIntyre, Schumacher & Woodhouse, *On the oscillations of musical instruments* (1983); the elasto-plastic bowed-string friction model (2025вҖ“26 physical-modeling revival, Frontiers in Signal Processing 2025); the **Cristal Baschet** + Franklin's **glass armonica** (1761). **RESEARCH В§559** chain (today's friction-synthesis dive вҶ’ today's build). **Ambition 4/5** (#1 first friction stick-slip exciter В· #2 вүҘ3 subsystems В· #3 named refs В· #5 В§559). Honest note: the model self-oscillates to a roughly constant limit-cycle amplitude (as a real Helmholtz-regime string does), so the loudness/brightness *envelope* is a deliberate gestural shaping layer on top of the physics; build-checked + the worklet was Node-tested for stability/self-oscillation/boundedness, but the WebGL2 shader and final sound were not rendered/heard in-container.

[/dream/997-resonant-halls](https://getresonance.vercel.app/dream/997-resonant-halls) вҖ” **"Resonant Halls": walk in FIRST PERSON through a cathedral of five harmonic rooms вҖ” each room a key on the circle of fifths with its OWN acoustics вҖ” and stepping through a doorway is a key modulation you hear in the reverb itself.** `demoable` (build-checked + lint/type clean; not GPU/ear-verified) В· Cycle 577 (adult, **DEEP** fire вҖ” winner of 2 approaches: this first-person 3D vs. `996-dream-rooms` the WebGPU-compute floor-plan twin). **For**: adult / immersive contemplative / **pointer-look + WASD walk** input (co-equal; pointer-drag looks, keys walk; plus a hands-free "Take the tour" auto-walk) / hand-rolled **raymarched WebGL2 3D** output / luminous cathedral with volumetric doorway light. **The DEEP extension of the lab's spatial thread** вҖ” 977-echo-room-gpu (the only 5/5; walk among HRTF recordings of past selves) вҶ’ 992-dream-house (cycle 575; La Monte Young drone field, position blooms partials but acoustics fixed) вҶ’ **this**: now the room itself encodes a *key* and **the acoustics themselves are a navigable field** вҖ” the directest answer to **JURY 2026-06-27 #2** ("extend 977 into a multi-cycle spatial instrument вҖ” make it a *room*: multiple harmonic zones you physically walk between") and **#3** ("force a real GPU-compute OR 3D path" вҖ” taken via the **3D path**, first-person raymarching, not a flat 2D plot). **Engine.** Five rooms keyed **C вҶ’ G вҶ’ D вҶ’ A вҶ’ E**, each a just perfect fifth (Г—3/2) above the last, octave-folded into the warm felt-in-the-body low band (~65вҖ“110 Hz; master lowpass 6 kHz, never shrill). Each room sustains a continuous **just-intoned chord** (1/1, 9/8, 5/4, 3/2, 2/1, 3/1) вҖ” a drone instrument, never triggered notes, no wrong notes. **Per-room acoustics (the headline):** each room owns a **procedurally-synthesized impulse response** вҶ’ its own `ConvolverNode` вҖ” a dense exponential-decay noise tail (1.1 s bright chapel вҶ’ 4.6 s dark apse), a sparse size-scaled early-reflection stamp panned across the field, and a one-pole darkening pass, all from a deterministic per-room LCG (stable, hand-verifiable). So a small chapel rings short/present, a tall nave rings long/distant. **Proximity вҶ’ mix:** `computeRoomWeights(cameraZ)` = normalized Gaussian wells per room centre, ramping each room's wet/dry sends with `setTargetAtTime` (no clicks); overlapping wells cross-fade doorways. **Doorway = pivot-chord modulation (the audible reward):** each key's **3/2 fifth equals the next key's 1/1 root**, so during a crossing both rooms sound and that shared partial is a **held common tone** (classic pivot) while the departing key's other tones fade and the arriving key's bloom вҖ” the change lands continuous, not a jump-cut, and you hear it dissolve from one room's reverb into the next; `computeCrossing(cameraZ)` drives the "вҶ’ modulating C вҶ’ G" HUD. **Render:** hand-rolled 3D, **NO three.js** вҖ” a single full-screen fragment shader **raymarches an SDF corridor of box-rooms** (positive-inside SDF boxes unioned with overlapping z half-extents so shared walls open into doorways; interior sphere-tracing finds walls; clerestory light + volumetric doorway glow + cathedral ribs + colored distance haze in each room's accent), with a **hand-built first-person camera** (the lookAt approach from 995-kids-moon-trampoline: position + yaw/pitch вҶ’ forward вҶ’ `right = normalize(cross(fwd,up))`, `up = cross(right,fwd)` вҶ’ ray origin/dir uniforms). Accent **hue = fifthsIndex/12** so kindred keys are kindred colors вҖ” luminous cathedral, deliberately **NOT** the engraved-manuscript/ink-on-parchment vibe the jury banned. **Ambition honest 4/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [JI drone synth + per-room procedural convolution acoustics + raymarched SDF 3D render + hand-rolled first-person camera nav = 4] В· #3 named refs [La Monte Young & Marian Zazeela *Dream House* (MELA); architectural-acoustics auralization / convolution-reverb-from-IR; the circle of fifths as literal floor-plan] В· #4 multi-cycle commitment [extends the 977вҶ’992 spatial thread; cycle-1 ships the walkable-rooms + per-room-acoustics spine; deepen next: doorways that interact, an operator/Tauri view, more rooms] В· #5 in-README dated **RESEARCH В§577** citation). **#1 NOT claimed** вҖ” both raymarching (176/206-sdf-cave, 909, 915) and `ConvolverNode` (many priors) exist in the lab; the fresh axis is *per-room acoustics that change as you walk between keyed rooms*, not over-claimed as a clean novel technique. **Source chain (visible in STATE):** RESEARCH В§577 (the 2026 frontier of *precomputed/reciprocal sound-propagation fields* вҖ” acoustics-as-a-navigable-field; arXiv:2602.06937 Reciprocal Latent Fields, 2510.20602 Resounding Acoustic Fields) вҶ’ JURY 2026-06-27 #2/#3 вҶ’ this adult **DEEP** fire. **diversity:** `banned=[computer-keyboard/MIDI-as-primary-adult-input, Canvas2D-AND-flat-fragment-shader-ONLY (force GPU-compute or 3D), the "explainable-inverse-of-an-opaque-neural-frontier" conceptual move, engraved-manuscript/ink-on-parchment adult vibe (JURY 2026-06-27)]` В· `picked=[pointer-look+WASD-walk INPUT (pointer co-equal, not keyboard-only), raymarched 3D WebGL2 OUTPUT (the sanctioned 3D escape, not a flat 2D plot), per-room-convolution-acoustics + pivot-chord-spatial-modulation TECHNIQUE (pure spatial presence, NOT a music-theory explainer), luminous-cathedral VIBE]` вҖ” clears every ban. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (all client-side, zero AI/network/cost surface); **zero new npm deps** (Web Audio + WebGL2 only; no three.js). **Compile + ESLint + type-check clean** (authoritative winner-only `npm run build`: **`вң“ Compiled successfully in 45s`** вҶ’ lint/type passed вҶ’ no "997"/"resonant-halls" warning, no "Failed to compile"/"Type error"; all warnings pre-existing `src/lib/**` + other dream pages); **static-gen blocked by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling** (`next-font-manifest.json`; infra not code вҖ” identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT browser/GPU/ear-verified** (no WebGL2/audio device in container вҖ” unverified: whether the SDF raymarch reads as a convincing navigable cathedral, the real-GPU framerate, and the *perceptual* strength of the held-pivot-tone-vs-retune balance across a doorway; reasoned-and-typed, worth a live click-through). Winner of an adult **DEEP** 2-approach fire; banked **`996-dream-rooms`** вӯҗ **RESURRECT-FIRST** (the WebGPU-**compute** twin вҖ” same walk-the-harmonic-chambers concept as a top-down floor-plan, but the resonating body is a real 12k-particle compute shader [WebGPU-compute вҶ’ WebGL2-instanced вҶ’ Canvas2D fallback]; the directest answer to JURY #3's GPU-compute scarcity; builder returned lint 0/0 + tsc clean, IDEAS В§577). Design notes: `src/app/dream/997-resonant-halls/README.md`

### [1029-echo-halls-sphere](/dream/1029-echo-halls-sphere) В· adult / pointer-look + gyro + WASD / WebGPU-compute + WebGL2 first-person В· cycle 589 В· DEEP-winner (2026-06-28) В· demoable
Walk through a **sphere** of six HRTF harmonic rooms вҖ” some above you, some below, some behind вҖ” and **find a chord by ear**: you are the Web Audio `AudioListener`, your orientation rewrites the binaural pan every frame, so closing your eyes and turning toward a chord works. **Cycle 2 of the Echo Halls thread** (extends the lab's only-5/5 `1019-echo-halls-tonnetz` вҖ” JURY 2026-06-28 #2). The C-major neighbourhood (IВ·viВ·IVВ·iiВ·VВ·iii) drones octave-folded into a warm low band; the faced room blooms via a softmax `facingWeights` cross-fade. **The resonating body is a real WebGPU compute particle field** (WGSL curl-noise advection + `atomic<u32>` kinetic-energy reduction + non-blocking `mapAsync` readback) whose measured energy drives the active room's shimmer gain вҖ” *in every tier* (WebGPU-compute вҶ’ CPU-sim-in-WebGL2 вҶ’ Canvas2D), so the sim genuinely sings rather than decorates. Keeps WebGPU compute alive (#3) while making spatial *orientation* the primary mechanic вҖ” varying the humanвҶ”sound relationship away from the flagged "the sim IS the body" groove (#1). Hand-rolled first-person WebGL2 (no three.js, zero new deps); pointer-look + WASD + DeviceOrientation; 2s-idle auto-tour sweeps between a low (ii) and a high (IV) room so a hands-free reviewer hears the elevation. **Verified:** `geometry.test.ts` **89 assertions pass** (6 distinct chords; all room dirs unit vectors; full-sphere spread вҖ” вүҘ1 above y>0.4, вүҘ1 below y<-0.4, вүҘ1 behind z>0.3, none closer than 0.35 rad; facingWeights sumвҶ’1 & peak at faced room; all chords diatonic to C-major; freqs in 60вҖ“240 Hz). Named refs: Janet Cardiff *The Forty Part Motet*; "Spatial Orchestra" (arXiv:2510.23848); full-sphere localization (arXiv:2606.24367, 2026); Sonic4D viewpoint-adaptive binaural (arXiv:2506.15759, 2026); WebGPU baseline 2026. **Ambition 4/5** (#2 вүҘ4 subsystems [per-room HRTF + WebGPU-compute body + facing-weight harmony state + first-person render] В· #3 named refs В· #4 multi-cycle [cycle 2 of the Echo Halls thread] В· #5 RESEARCH В§589). #1 not over-claimed (HRTF + raymarch-adjacent render have priors; the fresh axis is *full-sphere find-by-ear with a compute body*). **No API route вҶ’ no guard** (all client-side, zero AI/network); **zero new npm deps**. Build: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` вҶ’ compile + ESLint + type-check PASS (only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings; 1029 folder grep-clean); static-gen blocked only by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling (`next-font-manifest.json`; infra, not code вҖ” identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT GPU/ear-verified** (no WebGPU/audio device in container вҖ” unverified: whether above-vs-below localizes by ear [HRTF-dependent], real-GPU framerate, the perceptual find-by-ear premise; the 89-assertion geometry test + cross-tier audio coupling cover the math). Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-approach fire; banked **`echo-halls-flock`** вӯҗ RESURRECT-FIRST (100k WGSL compute swarm whose density/energy readback honestly drives the audio; 8156-assertion test) + **`echo-halls-gyro`** (gyro-as-listener, dwell-lock-to-play-a-progression, eyes-closed; 50-assertion test) as IDEAS В§589. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1029-echo-halls-sphere/README.md`

### [1033-kids-hum-blossom](/dream/1033-kids-hum-blossom) В· kids / **mic voice-PITCH** (autocorrelation/YIN-lite) / Canvas2D organic bloom В· cycle 590 В· WIDE-winner (2026-06-28) В· demoable
**Hum a note and a flower blooms *in tune with you*.** A 4-year-old hums into the mic; we detect the sung **pitch** in real time and a glowing flower grows from a bud вҖ” petals sprout by golden-angle phyllotaxis while a tone is sustained, petal/glow color tracks pitch (warm red/orange low вҶ’ violet/white high) вҖ” and a soft **3-voice "ah" choir answers**, snapping the child's hum to the nearest tone of a slowly-cycling **IвҖ“viвҖ“IVвҖ“V** in C major (real functional harmony, *not* a pentatonic "no-wrong-notes" snap). **The lab's first voice-*pitch* input** вҖ” every prior mic piece used voice as *energy* (RMS/onset/breath: 1020, 922, FFT bands); this tracks the actual fundamental and folds it into harmony, directly answering JURY 2026-06-28 #3 ("break the pointer reflex вҖ” deepen a lonely fresh input"). Pitch math lives in a **pure, framework-free `pitch.ts`** (`detectPitchHz`: RMS silence gate вҶ’ normalized autocorrelation over ~70вҖ“1200 Hz вҶ’ first-strong-peak-after-dip to kill octave errors вҶ’ clarity gate вҶ’ parabolic sub-Hz interpolation), **verified by `pitch.test.ts`** (pure TS + `console.assert`, no framework import, no top-level auto-run): detects 196/220/440/880 Hz within ~3% and returns -1 on silence вҖ” **ran live this cycle: ALL PASSED**. **MIC SAFETY:** source вҶ’ `AnalyserNode` only, never to `destination` (no feedback howl); nothing recorded/sent. Always-on soft ambient pad + master limiter + click-free portamento = safe kids sound; graceful no-mic auto-demo (slow synthetic hum still blooms + sings, `text-rose-300` notice). **Implements this cycle's research dive** (RESEARCH В§590: 2026 commodity-ization of fully-client-side browser pitch detection for kids/education) вҖ” the diveвҶ’build chain is visible. **Ambition 3/5** (#1 never-used-here technique [real-time voice-pitchвҶ’harmony, grep-0Г— on kids lane] В· #2 вүҘ3 subsystems [mic + autocorrelation pitch detection + functional-harmony choir engine + organic render] В· #5 RESEARCH В§590). Love-bias: pulled by Karel's love of `158-kids-hum-paint` (hum-based kids). **No API route вҶ’ no guard** (all client-side, zero network/AI); zero new npm deps. Build: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` вҶ’ compile + ESLint + type-check PASS (winner folder grep-clean: 0 tsc errors, 0 eslint errors/warnings; only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings); static-gen blocked only by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling (infra, not code вҖ” identical every cycle; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT audio/mic-verified on a real device** (no mic in container вҖ” unverified: real-voice detection robustness on a child's timbre, latency feel; the passing `pitch.test.ts` covers the detector math on synthetic sines). Winner of a kids **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **`1034-kids-rain-chimes`** вӯҗ RESURRECT-FIRST (tilt вҶ’ WebGPU-compute droplet rain whose band-crossing readback rings a real IвҖ“viвҖ“IVвҖ“V; committed `sim.test.ts`) + **`1032-kids-shadow-choir`** (camera luminance-silhouette вҶ’ centroid-Y picks chord, coverage stacks choir voices) as IDEAS S590. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1033-kids-hum-blossom/README.md`

### [1047-tracer-drift](/dream/1047-tracer-drift) В· adult / psychedelic В· **mic-breath energy** (analysis-only, non-pointer) / WebGL2 **ping-pong feedback buffer** В· cycle 596 В· WIDE-winner (2026-06-29) В· demoable В· `state: LSD В· pole: cosmic-ambient (drifting)`
**The long weightless plateau of an acid drift вҖ” surfaces breathing, motion smearing into lagging color trails вҖ” drug-free.** The lab's **FIRST ping-pong feedback-trail accumulator** (grep-0Г—; the named-but-unbuilt `feedbackBuffer.ts` shared infra). Two RGBA16F FBOs (8-bit fallback) ping-pong each frame: the previous frame is re-sampled with a slight zoom + rotation + fBm warp, multiplied by a gentle decay (0.80вҖ“0.978 вҖ” never a hard buffer-flash), nudged in hue (chromatic lag so trails drift in color as they fade), then fresh content composites over it вҖ” a slow breathing fBm surface, two slightly-detuned dot lattices (moirГ©), and faint animated visual-snow grain. A present pass tone-maps gently (luminous, lifted-black dusk, not a void). **No raymarching, no reaction-diffusion** (both lane-banned this cycle). Input is **mic breath-energy, analysis-only** (`AnalyserNode`, never to `destination` вҖ” no howl): low-band energy вҶ’ trail length (decay/zoom) + warp; loudness вҶ’ saturation. Graceful no-mic fallback (self-driven LFO swell + `text-rose-300` notice) so it drifts + sounds on a 06:30 phone glance with zero permissions. Audio bed: detuned sine/triangle drone with per-voice slow detune LFOs + a shared ~67 s pitch-bend portamento ("melt") + a slowly-swept filtered-noise wash вҖ” weightless, nothing rhythmic. ~4-min looping arc with a deliberately **wide plateau** (0.40вҖ“0.78) вҖ” the *temporal* shape (drift, not peak) the peak-centric psych lane (1038/1041/1042/1043) lacked. **Pastel-drift palette** (lilac/peach/mint/rose/cyan) вҖ” not neon, not dark-void. **Named refs:** Memo Akten (feedback/optical-flow); LSD tracer/positive-afterimage/visual-snow phenomenology; Carhart-Harris entropic-brain / REBUS. **Ambition 3/5** (#1 never-used technique [ping-pong feedback buffer, grep-0Г—] В· #2 вүҘ3 subsystems [feedback accumulator + drone+noise audio + moirГ©/snow layers + arc] В· #3 named reference; + RESEARCH В§596). Full GL teardown (textures/FBOs/programs/VAO/VBO + lose-context) + click-free audio fade + RAF cancel. **No API route вҶ’ no guard**; zero new npm deps. **Safety:** not a flicker piece вҖ” slow luminance drift only, feedback decay gentle, no 3вҖ“30 Hz full-screen flashing. Build: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` вҶ’ compile + ESLint + type-check PASS (zero issues from the 1047 folder; only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings); static-gen blocked only by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling (infra, not code; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT GPU/ear-verified** (no WebGL2/audio device in container вҖ” unverified: real trail-length/decay feel, audio balance, breathвҶ’trail coupling; shader/audio textbook by inspection). Winner of an adult psychedelic **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **`1048-threshold`** вӯҗ RESURRECT-FIRST (hypnagogia dream-logic scene-teleport engine вҖ” five thresholded-noise scenes cross-dissolved + teleport-cut, anti-strobe spacing floor) + **`1046-mycelial-bloom`** (psilocybin warm-organic two-level domain-warp + blooming kaleidoscope) as IDEAS В§596. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1047-tracer-drift/README.md`

### [1044-hyperbolic-bloom](/dream/1044-hyperbolic-bloom) В· adult / psychedelic В· **analysis-only mic** (FFT, non-pointer) + self-sufficient drone / WebGL2 **PoincarГ©-disk {7,3} hyperbolic tiling** fragment shader В· cycle 597 В· WIDE-winner (2026-06-29) В· demoable В· `state: DMT-hyperbolic В· pole: intense`
**Drug-free descent into the DMT "hyperbolic hyperspace" вҖ” space stops being flat and becomes negatively curved: jeweled heptagons stream out toward the rim forever and never run out.** The lab's **FIRST hyperbolic-geometry build** (grep-0Г— on `hyperbolic`/`PoincarГ©`/`{7,3}` across 596 cycles). Per pixel: screen вҶ’ a complex point `z` in the **PoincarГ© unit disk**; an inverse **MГ¶bius transform** drags `z` backward along a hyperbolic **geodesic** (the endless "fall" outward, `z'=(zвҲ’b)/(1вҲ’conj(b)z)` with `b` drifting along the arc) + a slow whole-field rotation; then `z` is **folded into one {7,3} fundamental cell** by ~6вҖ“22 depth-driven iterations alternating a **7-fold dihedral mirror** with a **circle inversion** in a circle orthogonal to the disk (`zвҶ’c+(zвҲ’c)rВІ/|zвҲ’c|ВІ`, orthogonality `|c|ВІвҲ’rВІ=1`). Fold-count + cell coordinate drive a **jeweled cosine palette** with **thin-film iridescence**, per-channel **chromatic aberration**, **dark grout** along domain edges, a breathing fBm domain-warp ("melting surfaces") + a traveling-wave phase, filmic tone-map. **Honest approximation (documented in README + in-app notes):** a fixed inverting circle per sector with the correct orthogonality relation вҖ” reads convincingly as negatively-curved {7,3}, not the proven exact Schwarz-triangle group. **Journey:** a single non-looping ~5-min `progress` clock ramps recursion depth / geodesic fall-speed / warp / saturation / chroma / glow through onset вҶ’ come-up вҶ’ **breakthrough peak (~35вҖ“60%)** вҶ’ plateau вҶ’ soft-landing return (never abrupt). **Always audio-visual:** a self-sufficient generative **drone** (detuned osc stack + sub-bass + opening low-pass + limiter, master 0.15, click-free fades, full teardown) plays with **zero permissions** and self-FFTs to drive the visuals; an **optional analysis-only mic** (`attachMic` вҶ’ `AnalyserNode` ONLY, **never** to `destination` вҖ” no howl) maps bassвҶ’fall-speed, midsвҶ’warp, highsвҶ’iridescence, loudnessвҶ’saturation. Graceful degrade: no WebGL2 вҶ’ `text-rose-300` notice + the drone still plays the full arc; no mic вҶ’ drone drives everything silently with a small note. Full GL teardown (deleteProgram + WEBGL_lose_context) + pause/resume. **Named refs:** QRI *The Hyperbolic Geometry of the DMT Experience* (GГіmez-Emilsson вҖ” world-sheets folding into negatively-curved hyperspace, saddles, sheets); BressloffвҖ“Cowan cortical form-constants; M.C. Escher *Circle Limit IвҖ“IV*. **Ambition 3/5** (#1 never-used technique [hyperbolic tiling, grep-0Г—] В· #2 вүҘ3 subsystems [hyperbolic geometry engine + MГ¶bius/fold fragment renderer + arc envelope + self-FFT drone synth = 4] В· #3 named references; + RESEARCH В§597). **diversity:** `banned=[pointer-primary (JURY 7Г—), cosmic-ambient-pole (lane 3Г—, rebalancing)] В· picked=[analysis-only-mic+drone INPUT (non-pointer), WebGL2 hyperbolic-tiling OUTPUT, MГ¶bius-geodesic + {7,3}-fold TECHNIQUE (lab-first), neon-jeweled intense VIBE]` вҖ” rebalances the lane's pole to intense (was cosmic-ambient 3 vs intense 2) and the *look/technique* is wholly distinct from the prior DMT pieces (1038 2D log-polar warp / 1042 4D raymarch). **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** non-strobing вҖ” slow luminance/saturation drift + smooth motion only, no full-screen flash; Pause instantly freezes + silences. **No API route вҶ’ no guard** (pure client; zero new npm deps; no AI/cost/network surface). Build: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` вҶ’ compile + ESLint + type-check PASS (only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings; `next lint` on the 1044 folder = **вң” 0 warnings/0 errors**, `tsc --noEmit` project-wide 0 errors); static-gen blocked only by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling (infra, not code вҖ” identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT GPU/ear-verified** (no WebGL2/audio device in container вҖ” unverified: whether the fold *subjectively* reads as hyperbolic on a real GPU, framerate at 6вҖ“22 fold iters/pixel, the audioвҶ’curvature coupling feel; the MГ¶bius/fold math + drone are textbook by inspection). Winner of an adult psychedelic **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **`1046-mycelial-bloom`** вӯҗ RESURRECT-FIRST (psilocybin warm-organic вҖ” fills the lane's empty warm pole) + **`1049-salvia-membrane`** (the uncanny salvia "becoming-an-object" 2D-membrane state, grep-0Г—) as IDEAS В§597. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1044-hyperbolic-bloom/README.md`

### [1050-mycelial-grow](/dream/1050-mycelial-grow) В· adult / psychedelic В· **analysis-only mic-breath** (RMS, non-pointer) + autonomous / Canvas2D **space-colonization growing network** В· cycle 598 В· DEEP-winner (2026-06-29) В· demoable В· `state: psilocybin В· pole: intense-warm (organic)`
**The psych lane's FIRST warm piece and FIRST psilocybin state вҖ” gold mycelium that actually GROWS out of the loam-dark, branching filaments colonizing the field forever (minute 5 вү  minute 1), each fork ringing a soft tone.** Real **Space Colonization Algorithm** (Runions/Lane/Prusinkiewicz 2007; Jason Webb's JS port) in a pure framework-free `growth.ts`: a cloud of attractors pulls a network of growth nodes вҖ” each attractor influences only its nearest node within an *attraction radius*, each influenced node steps `segmentLength` along the averaged (jittered) direction to its attractors and spawns a child, attractors within the *kill radius* are consumed, and **branching emerges naturally** when a node is pulled in divergent directions (reported as a *fork* event). **Long-form / evolving (the point):** fresh attractor clouds **reseed in slow ~5.5 s waves** into new regions so the network keeps colonizing NEW territory; a per-frame field fade dims the oldest filaments and a `maxNodes` ring-buffer recycles the oldest non-root slots, so it accumulates and runs **indefinitely** вҖ” genuinely different at minute 5 than minute 1 (a category the lab is thin on). **Look:** dark loam (`#0a0705`), filaments drawn with additive (`"lighter"`) compositing вҖ” growing **tips glow brightest**, older/inner branches thicken with depth and dim toward rust/ochre/brown; **warm-organic palette only** (brownвҶ’rustвҶ’amberвҶ’ochreвҶ’gold), no blue/violet/neon вҖ” the gap the lane completely lacked. **Audio (Web Audio):** a warm sustained **drone bed** (root 55 Hz + just fifth 82.5 Hz + soft partials through a ~20 s LFO lowpass); each **branch/fork** triggers a soft bell from a **fixed A-minor-pentatonic** set (no wrong notes), panned by x, pitched by depth (tips higher, old/deep lower), with **voice-steal (cap 7)** so dense growth shimmers instead of clipping; master `gain вүӨ0.26 вҶ’ lowpass вҶ’ DynamicsCompressor вҶ’ destination`. **Mic (analysis-only):** `getUserMedia вҶ’ MediaStreamSource вҶ’ AnalyserNode` ONLY (**never to `destination`** вҖ” no howl; nothing recorded/uploaded) вҶ’ breath RMS drives **growth rate** (note density) + tip brightness; no-mic вҶ’ autonomous calm growth + `text-rose-300` self-drive notice. Gesture-gated AudioContext; full teardown (RAF cancel, mic tracks stopped, master gain faded + context closed). **Honest prior (NOT lab-first):** `322-kids-voice-garden` already used space colonization вҖ” the fresh axis here is the adult-psychedelic, autonomously long-form, breath-driven, fork-sonified register (growth *is* the instrument, not a garden you tend). **Named refs:** Runions/Lane/Prusinkiewicz *Modeling Trees with a Space Colonization Algorithm* (2007); Jason Webb (Medium); Paul Stamets *Mycelium Running*. **Ambition 3/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [growth engine + branch-triggered synth + drone bed + mic-reactivity = 4] В· #3 named refs В· #5 RESEARCH В§598; #1 NOT claimed вҖ” 322 prior). **diversity:** `banned=[pointer-primary (JURY 7Г—), fragment-shader/kaleidoscope OUTPUT (lab's heaviest groove, 26 files вҖ” incl. the de-selected sibling 1048), cosmic-ambient-pole] В· picked=[analysis-only mic-breath INPUT (non-pointer), Canvas2D growing-network OUTPUT (scarce), space-colonization growth + long-form evolution TECHNIQUE, warm-organic intense VIBE (lane-first)]`. **Verified:** `growth.test.ts` (plain `console.assert`, guarded вҖ” not auto-run at import) passes вҖ” network grows past roots, real branching to depth вүҘ2, attractors consumed by kill radius, node cap respected under heavy reseeding, low-breath вҶ’ fewer events. **No API route вҶ’ no guard** (pure client; zero new npm deps; no AI/cost/network). Build: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` вҶ’ compile + ESLint + type-check PASS (only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings; `next lint` on the 1050 folder = **вң” 0 warnings/0 errors**, `tsc --noEmit` project-wide 0 errors); static-gen blocked only by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling (infra, not code вҖ” identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT GPU/ear-verified** (no display/mic/audio device in container вҖ” unverified: drone-vs-bells loudness balance, visual density/fade pacing, breathвҶ’growth-rate feel, and a documented harmless recycle edge case where an overwritten slot may briefly mis-parent a segment [draw loop guards nulls/negative parents вҶ’ cannot crash; age-fade hides it within a frame or two]; the growth math is test-covered). Winner of an adult psychedelic **DEEP** 2-approach fire; banked **`1048-mycelial-bloom`** вӯҗ RESURRECT-FIRST (the de-selected sibling вҖ” psilocybin warm-organic two-level fBm domain-warp + blooming kaleidoscope *fragment shader*; IQ "warp the warp" + KlГјver + Nature Comms 2025; built complete + tsc/eslint-clean, removed unbuilt) as IDEAS В§598. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1050-mycelial-grow/README.md`

### [1051-hand-hyperspace](/dream/1051-hand-hyperspace) В· adult / psychedelic В· **webcam hand-tracking** (MediaPipe Tasks-Vision via CDN; pointer-drag fallback) / Canvas2D **stereographically-projected 4D polytope** edge-geometry В· cycle 599 В· WIDE-winner (2026-06-29) В· demoable В· `state: DMT-hyperdimensional В· pole: intense`
**Reach into hyperspace and rotate a four-dimensional jewel with your bare hands вҖ” and play the chord those rotations make.** The lab's **FIRST hand-tracking input** and **FIRST you-PLAY-it psychedelic instrument** вҖ” the direct antidote to the JURY-flagged "seven full-screen shaders-you-watch in a row" monoculture (its #1 provocation: make one you can PLAY, not a lean-back screensaver). A 4D polytope (**tesseract / 8-cell** or **24-cell**, built from first principles) is rotated through **all six independent rotation planes** (XY XZ XW YZ YW ZW), **stereographically projected 4DвҶ’3DвҶ’2D** (pole at w=+2.2, then a 3D perspective), and drawn as glowing chromatic edges on Canvas2D with additive (`lighter`) bloom + a trailing fade + depth-cued line weight вҖ” **edge geometry, explicitly NOT a full-screen fragment shader** (the banned output). **Hands as the instrument:** MediaPipe **HandLandmarker** loaded at runtime via CDN dynamic `import()` (`webpackIgnore` + `@ts-expect-error` on the URL module; **zero npm deps added**) in VIDEO mode вҶ’ left-hand height drives the **XW** spin, right-hand sweep drives **YW**, the **spread between the two hands** drives **ZW** and zooms toward "breakthrough" (brightness/saturation up), a **pinch holds** the geometry still. **Audio = the gesture:** six oscillators in **just intonation** (1, 9/8, 5/4, 3/2, 5/3, 15/8 over A2=110 Hz), each plane's smoothed spin sets one partial's loudness + a motion detune-shimmer, through a brightness-driven lowpass + a code-generated **convolver reverb** tail вҖ” so a hand movement is literally a shifting neon chord. **Always alive:** graceful degradation вҖ” CDN-fail / camera-blocked / no-hands all fall back to **pointer drag + wheel-zoom** (synthetic hand-state) with a color-coded `text-rose-300`/violet status line; zero input вҶ’ slow auto-drift keeps it turning + sounding (never a dead screen). Gesture-gated AudioContext; full teardown (RAF cancel, AudioContext close, landmarker close, mic/camera tracks stopped). **Named refs:** the **Pardesco 4D Polytope Viewer** (4d.pardesco.com вҖ” interactive stereographic projection + true 4D rotation revealing hidden symmetries, here turned from watch-only into a hand-played instrument); the DMT "hyperdimensional / more axes than physical reality allows / more-real-than-real" phenomenology (PSYCHEDELIC.md Cluster 1). **Ambition 4/5** (#1 never-used technique [webcam hand-tracking input вҖ” grep-0Г— in lane; you-play-it 4D instrument] В· #2 вүҘ3 subsystems [CDN hand-tracking + 4D-polytope/stereographic-projection renderer + just-intonation synth + reverb = 4] В· #3 named references В· #5 RESEARCH В§599 [Jan-2026 IJFMR browser hand-gesture-instrument paper + Pardesco viewer]). **diversity:** `banned=[passive-mic-analysis-as-primary-input, full-screen-WebGL2-fragment-shader-you-stare-at OUTPUT, auto-playing-screensaver relationship] В· picked=[webcam hand-tracking INPUT (lab-first, active), Canvas2D 4D-edge-geometry OUTPUT, six-plane 4D rotation + stereographic projection TECHNIQUE, DMT-intense VIBE played-not-watched]` вҖ” clears all three banned tags; it is an *instrument*, not a field. **Love-signal aligned:** `217-dance-avatar`вқӨпёҸ / `101-camera-song`вқӨпёҸ (body/camera input). **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** non-strobing вҖ” smooth motion + slow luminance/saturation drift only, no full-screen flash. **No API route вҶ’ no guard** (pure client; zero new npm deps; no AI/cost/network surface). Build: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` вҶ’ compile + ESLint + type-check **PASS** (subagent `next lint` + `tsc --noEmit` on the 1051 folder = 0 warnings/0 errors; full-build phase log confirms вң“Compiled вҶ’ lint вҶ’ typecheck all passed with only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings); static-gen blocked only by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling (infra, not code вҖ” identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT camera/GPU/ear-verified** (no webcam/display/audio device in container вҖ” unverified: real MediaPipe handedness-label stability [README notes a swap-prone edge], the subjective "4D" read on a real GPU, audio chord balance, handвҶ’rotation coupling feel; the 4D math + just-intonation synth are textbook by inspection). Winner of an adult psychedelic **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **`1052-piano-bloom`** вӯҗ RESURRECT-FIRST (touch-conducted WebGPU-compute Gray-Scott bloom over Karel's real Welcome Home piano вҖ” discharges JURY #2 real-piano-carrier + #4 WebGPU-compute-as-body) + **`1053-skin-membrane`** (multi-touch mass-spring membrane + inharmonic drum-modal synth, salvia 2D-surface-melt) as IDEAS В§599. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1051-hand-hyperspace/README.md`

### [1052-piano-bloom](/dream/1052-piano-bloom) В· adult / psychedelic В· **touch (paint + drag reader-probes) + real piano via file-drop** / **WebGPU-compute Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion** (Canvas2D/CPU fallback) В· cycle 600 В· DEEP-winner (2026-06-29) В· demoable В· `state: psilocybin В· pole: cosmic-ambient (warm)`
**Play your own piano into a living reaction-diffusion field: touch grows warm gold blooms, and "reader" probes you drag over the field granulate and re-voice your recording back at you.** The psych lane's **FIRST WebGPU-compute build** (the JURY flagged compute "down to 2Г—, both the dead Echo Halls pieces" вҖ” #4: bring it back as the resonating body) and **FIRST real-piano carrier** (#2: "use Karel's Path piano вҖ” *zero* of the psych builds did it") вҖ” and an **instrument you PLAY**, not a screensaver (#1). The resonating body is a real **Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion** sim (Pearson 1993; `U'=DuвҲҮВІUвҲ’UVВІ+f(1вҲ’U)`, `V'=DvвҲҮВІV+UVВІвҲ’(f+k)V`, 8-neighbour Laplacian stencil, double-buffered, toroidal wrap) in `rd.ts` behind one `RDField` interface with **two real backends**: a **WebGPU compute** path (WGSL `@workgroup_size(8,8)` step, ping-pong storage buffers, async `mapAsync` readback to a CPU mirror for probe-sampling + Canvas2D render, 256ВІ grid) and a **CPU/typed-array fallback** (160ВІ grid вҶ’ `ImageData`) so it never blanks вҖ” feature-detected via `navigator.gpu` вҶ’ adapter вҶ’ device. **You play it (two gestures):** touching the field **injects reagent (paints V)** so blooms grow under your finger; you place/drag up to **four reader probes** вҖ” interaction model borrowed from **Reactive Audio "Growth" (2026)**, where modulation readers on an evolving RD field translate local values into modulation вҖ” each reader samples local **V вҶ’ grain scrub position**, **V-gradient вҶ’ grain pitch + density**, **bloom intensity вҶ’ grain gain**, **x вҶ’ pan**, driving a windowed-`BufferSource` **granular** head over your loaded recording (`granular.ts`). Dense blooms = thick grain clouds; calm field = sparse grains. **So touch вҶ’ field вҶ’ audio is bidirectional and felt.** **Audio tiers (degrade gracefully):** file-drop / picker вҶ’ `decodeAudioData` вҶ’ granulate the real thing (this is how Karel loads his *Welcome Home* tracks at review); **zero file вҶ’ a warm felt-piano bed** (detuned sine/triangle partials, soft attack, long release, low pad) whose filter/detune/amp the readers still modulate, so it makes sound + visuals on a phone glance with no input and **no microphone** (output only вҖ” no howl path). **Warm psilocybin palette only** (deep ember floor вҶ’ rust вҶ’ burnt-orange вҶ’ amber вҶ’ ochre вҶ’ moss вҶ’ luminous gold; never cold) вҖ” extends the warm pole 1050 opened, away from the lane's neon/void/pastel. Full teardown (RAF cancel, GPU buffers `.destroy()`, `AudioContext.close()`, click-free gain ramps). **Named refs:** Pearson "Complex Patterns in a Simple System" (Science 1993) / Gray-Scott; **Reactive Audio *Growth*** (2026, reader-on-a-living-field modulation); IГұigo QuГӯlez / standard RD double-buffer Laplacian implementations. **Ambition 3/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [WebGPU-compute RD body + granular re-voicer + felt-synth fallback + touch/reader instrument layer = 4] В· #3 named reference [Reactive Audio *Growth*; Pearson] В· #5 RESEARCH В§600 [the *Growth* reader-on-RD-field finding + the 2026-02 Gray-Scott-on-WebGPU wave]; #1 NOT over-claimed вҖ” WebGPU compute has lab-wide priors [1019/1029/130], the fresh axis is *psych-lane-first compute body + reader-granulated real piano*). **diversity:** `banned=[passive-mic-analysis-as-primary-input, full-screen-WebGL2-fragment-shader-you-stare-at OUTPUT, auto-playing-screensaver relationship] В· picked=[touch paint+reader-probe INPUT + real-piano file-drop (played, active), WebGPU-compute RD-simulation OUTPUT (not a fragment shader you watch), reaction-diffusion-as-resonating-body + reader-granulation TECHNIQUE, warm psilocybin cosmic-ambient VIBE played-not-watched]` вҖ” clears all three JURY bans. **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** non-strobing вҖ” slow RD evolution + warm luminance only, no full-screen flash. **No API route вҶ’ no guard** (pure client; zero new npm deps; no AI/cost/network surface). Build: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` вҶ’ compile + ESLint + type-check **PASS** (`next lint` on the 1052 folder = **вң” 0 warnings/0 errors**, `tsc --noEmit` project-wide **0 errors**; only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings); static-gen blocked only by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling (`next-font-manifest.json`; infra, not code вҖ” identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT GPU/ear-verified** (no WebGPU/display/audio device in container вҖ” the CPU path is what ran here; unverified: the WGSL compute path on a real GPU end-to-end, grain-vs-felt loudness balance, the touchвҶ’bloomвҶ’grain coupling feel; the RD math is verified correct on both backends by inspection, granular/synth are textbook). Winner of an adult psychedelic **DEEP** 2-approach fire (one concept вҖ” "play your piano into a WebGPU-compute resonating body" вҖ” via two techniques); banked **`1054-piano-flock`** вӯҗ RESURRECT-FIRST (the de-selected sibling вҖ” a 120k-particle WebGPU-compute boids flock you *conduct*, flock-shapeвҶ’granulation, love-aligned with the loved particle cluster 130/236/262/321) as IDEAS В§600. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1052-piano-bloom/README.md`

### [1053-ripple-loom](/dream/1053-ripple-loom) В· adult / psychedelic В· **touch-strike** (tap/drag, played) / **WebGPU-compute damped-wave field** warped through the shared log-polar engine (Canvas2D/CPU fallback) В· cycle 601 В· DEEP-winner (2026-06-29) В· `state: meditative ripple-void В· pole: cosmic-ambient`
**Strike a still pond of light and play the expanding ripples вҖ” warped through your own visual cortex's log-polar map into breathing tunnels, spirals and honeycombs, each ring ringing a consonant bell.** This fire's headline is actually the **`_shared/psych/` infrastructure extraction** the JURY called ~7 fires overdue (#3): two new tested engines вҖ” **`_shared/psych/logpolar.ts`** (the load-bearing form-constant / log-polar warp: `LOGPOLAR_GLSL` GLSL string + JS twins `screenToCortex`/`cortexToScreen`/`formConstant`/`honeycomb`/`FORM_PHI`, round-trip-exact, verified by `logpolar.test.ts`) and **`_shared/psych/safeFlicker.ts`** (the photosensitive-safe flicker gate: OFF by default, hard-clamped вүӨ3 Hz, soft-sine floor never a hard strobe, instant `kill()`, honors `prefers-reduced-motion`) вҖ” so the lane finally **composes** the warp instead of re-deriving it a fourth time (it was re-derived in 1038/1042/1044). 1053 is the first consumer AND brings **WebGPU compute back as the resonating body** (JURY #4 вҖ” compute had collapsed to 2Г—, both dead Echo-Halls pieces). **The instrument:** a real 2D damped wave-equation `u_next=(2В·u_currвҲ’u_prev)+cВІвҲҮВІu_curr` then Г—damping, on a **WebGPU compute** path (WGSL: ping-ponged `prev`/`curr`/`next` storage buffers, a `splat` compute pass injecting gaussian impulses on each strike, a `render` compute pass warping screen pixels through the log-polar map + form constant вҶ’ storage texture вҶ’ blit) with a **mandatory Canvas2D fallback** (the identical model on a smaller CPU grid in `wave.ts`, using the JS twins вҖ” auto-selected when `navigator.gpu` is absent/fails, `text-amber-300/95` notice) so it's a fully playable instrument on any device. **Played, not watched:** the field rests dark (faint indigo glow + quiet sub-drone); **tap to strike one ripple, drag to draw a line of strikes**; Form selector (tunnels/spirals/honeycomb), Decay (ring sustain), Strike strength, Bells (2вҖ“7 listener probes on a golden-angle spiral), and an opt-in Shimmer (the safe-flicker path) + instant Kill. **Audio (Web Audio):** each probe samples local wave energy; a ripple cresting under it rings a short **inharmonic additive bell** in a just-intonation pentatonic set through a generated convolver reverb; a soft sub-octave drone underneath (idle вүҲ near silence). A tiny CPU "mirror" wave drives the probes in both paths, avoiding a per-frame GPU readback stall. **Named refs:** BressloffвҖ“CowanвҖ“GolubitskyвҖ“ThomasвҖ“Wiener (2001) retinaвҶ’V1 complex-log map (the engine in `logpolar.ts`); Heinrich KlГјver's four form constants (the selectable Form modes). **Ambition 3/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [WebGPU-compute wave body + log-polar warp render + JI bell/drone audio + touch-strike instrument = 4] В· #3 named references В· #5 RESEARCH В§601 [WebGPU compute production-ready across browsers incl. Safari 26; the compose-the-infra finding]; #1 NOT claimed вҖ” log-polar is lab-prior [1038/1042/1044], the fresh axis is *consolidation into shared tested infra* + the compose payoff + a played wave-strike relationship). **diversity:** `banned=[passive-mic-analysis-as-primary-input, full-screen-WebGL2-fragment-shader-you-stare-at OUTPUT, auto-playing-screensaver relationship] В· picked=[touch-strike INPUT (played, active), WebGPU-compute wave-field OUTPUT (not a WebGL2 fragment shader you watch вҖ” brings compute back), wave-equation-as-resonating-body Г— log-polar-form-constant-warp TECHNIQUE, cosmic-ambient meditative VIBE played-not-watched]` вҖ” clears all three JURY bans and rebalances the pole to cosmic-ambient. **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** non-strobing by default вҖ” slow luminance drift only; the only flicker path is the вүӨ3 Hz opt-in safe-flicker engine with instant kill. **No API route вҶ’ no guard** (pure client; zero new npm deps; no AI/cost/network surface). Build: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` вҶ’ **compile + ESLint + type-check PASS** (only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings; `next lint` on the `1053-ripple-loom` folder **and** `_shared/psych` = **вң” 0 warnings/0 errors**, `tsc --noEmit` project-wide **0 errors**); static-gen blocked only by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling (`next-font-manifest.json`; infra, not code вҖ” identical every cycle since ~472; Vercel deploys normally). **NOT GPU/ear-verified** (no WebGPU/display/audio device in container вҖ” unverified: the WGSL step/splat/render pipeline + bind-group ping-pong on a real GPU, bell/drone voicing, decay/strength/phase-drift feel; the Canvas2D fallback + CPU wave model are the safer demo path; the log-polar warp math IS test-covered in `logpolar.test.ts`). Winner of an adult psychedelic **DEEP** 2-approach fire (one concept вҖ” "play a form-constant field into being" вҖ” via two substrates); banked **`1054-cortex-paint`** вӯҗ RESURRECT (the de-selected sibling вҖ” paint plane-wave stripes directly in cortical space, WebGL2 stroke-driven field, optional Welcome Home file-carrier; built complete + tsc/eslint-clean, removed unbuilt) as IDEAS В§601. ### [1056-key-bloom](/dream/1056-key-bloom) В· adult / psychedelic В· **keyboard** (AвҖ“L just-intonation scale + Z/X octave; Web MIDI + on-screen/touch keys) / Canvas2D **log-polar form-constant kaleidoscope bloom** composed from the shared `_shared/psych/` engines В· cycle 602 В· WIDE-winner (2026-06-29) В· demoable В· `state: psilocybin В· pole: intense-warm`
**Play a keyboard as a psychedelic organ вҖ” each key sounds a warm just-intonation tone AND blooms a chrysanthemum of form-constant geometry, and chords stack into a living mandala you compose in real time.** The second consumer of the new `_shared/psych/` infra (after 1053) вҖ” it **composes** `logpolar.ts` rather than re-deriving it: each note's petals are laid out in **cortical space** and warped to screen with `cortexToScreen`, the radius modulated by `formConstant(u,v,phi,freq,phase)` / `honeycomb(...)`, so the blooms genuinely **are** the BressloffвҖ“Cowan / KlГјver form constants (concentric-ring tunnels, radial spokes, spirals, honeycomb) вҖ” not arbitrary flowers (`bloom.ts`). Mappings: pitchвҶ’`freq` (denser rings up the scale), note indexвҶ’`phi`/form-constant choice + palette offset, time-since-onsetвҶ’`phase` drift **and** an N-fold kaleidoscope fold count that blooms `2вҶ’~12вҶ’settles ~6` (the "chrysanthemum opening", Г  la IГұigo QuГӯlez domain-folding), velocityвҶ’size+brightness. **Played, not watched** вҖ” directly answers JURY 2026-06-29 #1 ("ban the lean-back screensaver вҖ” make one you can PLAY"): idle = quiet warm dark; the geometry only exists where you play. **Three input paths into one note model:** computer keyboard `A S D F G H J K L` = nine 5-limit JI scale degrees (movable root, Z/X octave), an on-screen clickable keyboard (fully playable by touch on a phone вҖ” the lowest-friction 06:30 demo path, no permission/hardware), and **Web MIDI** (`navigator.requestMIDIAccess()`, note-on/off вҶ’ velocity drives bloom size; emerald "MIDI connected" note only when a device is present). **Audio (`audio.ts`, output only вҖ” no mic):** polyphonic JI organ, each voice an additive partial stack (1В·2В·3) + a 2-op FM shimmer, soft attack / long release, pitch-panned, 12-voice cap with oldest-steal, a root+fifth drone bed tying chords together, through an OfflineAudioContext-synthesized warm convolution reverb + a `DynamicsCompressor` glue limiter. **Warm-organic palette** (deep ember floor вҶ’ rust вҶ’ amber вҶ’ ochre вҶ’ moss вҶ’ luminous gold; never cold/black) вҖ” extends the scarce warm pole 1050/1052 opened. Shimmer = the sole luminance-pulse path, routed through `safeFlicker` (opt-in OFF by default, вүӨ3 Hz soft sine, instant Kill, honors `prefers-reduced-motion`). Full teardown (cancel rAF, dispose audio, null MIDI handlers, remove key listeners). **Ambition 3/5** (#2 вүҘ3 subsystems [keyboard+MIDI+on-screen input + polyphonic JI organ + log-polar kaleidoscope renderer + convolution reverb = 4] В· #3 named references [BressloffвҖ“Cowan 2001; KlГјver form constants; IГұigo QuГӯlez kaleidoscope/domain-fold; psilocybin open-eye fractal phenomenology] В· #5 RESEARCH В§602 [the 2026 "Modality Fusion" active-control turn + composing the new shared infra]; #1 NOT claimed вҖ” MIDI/keyboard have lab priors [718/902/979], the fresh axes are the *played-organ relationship*, the *warm psilocybin palette*, and *composing the shared engine*). **diversity:** `banned=[passive-mic-analysis-as-primary-input (4Г—), full-screen-WebGL2-fragment-shader-you-stare-at OUTPUT (6Г—)] В· picked=[keyboard/MIDI INPUT (active, played, non-mic вҖ” dodges the mic groove the jury hammered), Canvas2D kaleidoscope OUTPUT (not a fragment shader you watch), log-polar-form-constant-bloom TECHNIQUE composed from shared infra, warm psilocybin intense-warm VIBE]` вҖ” clears both banned tags. **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** non-strobing by default; the only flicker path is the вүӨ3 Hz opt-in safe-flicker engine with instant kill. **No API route вҶ’ no guard** (pure client; zero new npm deps; no AI/cost/network surface). Build: authoritative winner-only `npm run build` вҶ’ **compile + ESLint + type-check PASS** (`next lint` on the `1056-key-bloom` folder = **вң” 0 warnings/0 errors**, `tsc --noEmit` project-wide **0 errors**; only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings); static-gen blocked only by the standing container `EMFILE` fd ceiling (`next-font-manifest.json`; infra, not code вҖ” Vercel deploys normally; the 1056 builder also reported a clean full `npm run build` listing the route at 6.38 kB). **NOT ear/MIDI-verified** (no audio/MIDI device in container вҖ” unverified: organ voicing + grain/reverb balance, the noteвҶ’bloom coupling feel, real MIDI note-on/off on hardware, 60fps under very heavy chords on low-end devices; the log-polar bloom math is correct by inspection + composes the test-covered `logpolar.ts`). Winner of an adult psychedelic **WIDE** 3-instrument fire ("play the form constants with your body" вҖ” breath/tilt/keys); banked **`1054-breath-temple`** вӯҗ RESURRECT (breathe a form-constant cathedral into being вҖ” the most literal answer to JURY #1's "breath-as-control, not breath-as-ambient"; Canvas2D, cosmic-ambient) + **`1055-tilt-tunnel`** (tilt-steered DMT log-polar hyperspace flight, WebGL2) as IDEAS В§602. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1056-key-bloom/README.md`

### [1057-face-bloom](/dream/1057-face-bloom) В· adult / psychedelic В· **webcam face-tracking вҖ” facial *expression* (52 MediaPipe blendshapes + head pose), active control** / Canvas2D **log-polar form-constant kaleidoscope** composed from the shared `_shared/psych/` engines В· cycle 603 В· WIDE-winner (2026-06-29) В· demoable В· `state: psilocybin В· pole: intense-warm`
**Your FACE is the psychedelic instrument вҖ” open your jaw to bloom the chrysanthemum, raise your brows to heat and densify it, turn your head to tour tunnelsвҶ’spokesвҶ’spiralsвҶ’honeycombs; idle/neutral = quiet warm dark.** The lab's **FIRST face / facial-expression input** (hand-tracking exists at 1051; face never вҖ” grep-0Г—), and the **3rd consumer of the new `_shared/psych/` infra** (after 1053/1056) вҖ” it **composes** `logpolar.ts` rather than re-deriving it: kaleidoscope petals are laid out in **cortical `(u=log r, v=Оё)`** space and warped to screen via `cortexToScreen`, modulated by `formConstant(u,v,phi,freq,phase)` / `honeycomb(...)`, then folded N-fold with mirrored wedges into a true kaleidoscope (`render.ts`) вҖ” so the blooms genuinely **are** the BressloffвҖ“Cowan / KlГјver form constants, not arbitrary flowers. **The fresh control surface (RESEARCH В§603):** MediaPipe **Face Landmarker** emits **52 ARKit-style blendshape coefficients** вҲҲ[0,1] + a 4Г—4 head-pose matrix every frame вҖ” a *semantic expression* channel, not raw geometry. `mapping.ts` distills them through ONE shared `deriveDrive()` feeding BOTH renderer and organ (a smile *sounds* like it *looks*): `jawOpen`вҶ’fold-count bloom 2вҶ’~12 + master swell + lowpass open В· `browInnerUp`вҶ’form-constant `freq` density + warmth/saturation В· eye-aspect (inverted blink)вҶ’entropy/detail В· `mouthSmile`вҶ’gold push + shimmer voice В· head yaw/rollвҶ’spiral handedness + inward `phase` drift + form-constant tour. **Played, not watched** вҖ” directly answers JURY 2026-06-29 #1 ("ban the lean-back screensaver вҖ” make one you can PLAY"); idle collapses every parameter toward a near-still resting field, it comes alive only as you express. **Output is Canvas2D** (additive `lighter` glowing petals + warm trailing fade), *deliberately not a WebGL fragment shader* (the banned output form). **Audio (`audio.ts`, output only вҖ” no mic):** a just-intonation stacked-fifths organ (1В·3/2В·9/8В·5/4В·15/8В·3 over ~D2) of detuned sine/triangle voices + a soft sub pad + a smile-gated shimmer voice вҶ’ synthesized `OfflineAudioContext` convolution reverb вҶ’ high-shelf вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` limiter; gesture-gated start, full teardown on unmount. **Warm-organic palette** (deep ember вҶ’ rust вҶ’ amber вҶ’ gold; never cold) вҖ” extends the scarce warm pole (1050/1052/1056). **Graceful fallback:** no camera / permission denied / CDN fail вҶ’ `text-rose-300` notice + sliders (`jawOpen`/`brow`/`entropy`/`yaw`) that play the same instrument вҖ” never a dead screen. MediaPipe loaded from jsDelivr CDN at runtime (zero new npm deps), mirroring 1051's working dynamic-import pattern. **Ambition 4/5** (#1 never-used technique [face/blendshape input, grep-0Г—] В· #2 вүҘ3 subsystems [FaceLandmarker + log-polar kaleidoscope renderer + JI organ + convolution reverb + safeFlicker = 5] В· #3 named refs [MediaPipe Face Landmarker blendshapes; BressloffвҖ“Cowan 2001; KlГјver form constants; psilocybin open-eye phenomenology] В· #5 RESEARCH В§603 [the live-blendshape expression-control finding вҶ’ this build, dated this cycle]). **diversity:** `banned=[passive-mic-analysis-as-primary-input (5Г—: 1041/1042/1044/1047/1050), full-screen-WebGL2-fragment-shader-you-stare-at OUTPUT (5Г—: 1041/1042/1043/1044/1047)] В· picked=[face/expression-blendshape INPUT (lab-first, active, NON-mic), Canvas2D log-polar kaleidoscope OUTPUT (not a fragment shader you watch), facial-expressionвҶ’form-constant TECHNIQUE composed from shared infra, warm psilocybin intense-warm VIBE]` вҖ” clears both banned tags. **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** non-strobing by default; the only flicker path is the held-squint opt-in routed through `safeFlicker` (вүӨ3 Hz soft sine, instant kill, honors `prefers-reduced-motion`), with a photosensitivity note shown when the toggle is exposed. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; reads no Resonance prod API; zero cost/network surface). **Validation:** authoritative winner-only `npm run build` вҶ’ **вң“ Compiled successfully (2.1min) вҶ’ Linting and checking validity of types PASS** (only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings, **ZERO from the 1057 folder**) вҶ’ static-gen blocked only by the standing container **`EMFILE`** fd ceiling (`next-font-manifest.json`; infra not code вҖ” Vercel deploys normally, lab is live at 1056); belt-and-suspenders `next lint --dir 1057-face-bloom` = **вң” 0/0**, `tsc --noEmit` project-wide 0 errors referencing 1057. **NOT camera/ear-verified** (no webcam/audio in container вҖ” unverified: the blendshapeвҶ’parameter gains + smoothing [expressive vs twitchy], organ/reverb balance, the squint-shimmer threshold [may fire on normal blinks], and the head-pose Euler sign/range from MediaPipe's column-major matrix; the log-polar bloom math composes the test-covered `logpolar.ts` and is correct by inspection). Winner of an adult psychedelic **WIDE** 3-instrument fire ("active-control surfaces the lab hasn't used"); banked **`1058-tilt-temple`** вӯҗ (phone-tilt-steered cosmic-ambient log-polar void tunnel + Shepard-tone endless descent; Canvas2D) + **`1059-piano-flock`** (conduct a WebGPU-compute boids flock whose shape granulates Karel's real Welcome Home piano вҖ” brings back the jury-wanted WebGPU compute) as IDEAS В§603. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1057-face-bloom/README.md`

### [1200-gait-loom](/dream/1200-gait-loom) В· adult / altered-states В· **camera body-skeleton / gait вҖ” MediaPipe Pose, 33 landmarks (active, embodied, locomotion-based)** / Canvas2D radial gait-loom (rotating step-clock, footfall bursts, woven limb-threads, faint skeleton) В· cycle 670 В· DEEP-winner (2026-07-05) В· demoable В· `state: rhythmic-trance / movement-entrainment В· pole: embodied-kinetic`
**Your GAIT is the sequencer's transport вҖ” step (or step-in-place) and your cadence locks a BPM; each footfall and limb-swing fires a granular percussion hit quantized to that gait clock, weaving a loom that accretes as you move and unravels to silence when you stop.** The lab's answer to the 2026-07-05 jury's un-cashed provocation #4 ("go structural вҖ” the body's actual geometry, joints, limbs, presence in a room, as the instrument; **gaitвҶ’tempo is still 0Г—**"). MediaPipe **PoseLandmarker** (`pose_landmarker_lite`, VIDEO mode, CDN runtime dynamic-import вҖ” zero new npm deps, mirroring the proven 1185/677 pattern) yields 33 landmarks/frame; a per-foot **liftвҶ’plant state machine** (`gait.ts`, ankle-height normalized by torso length = scale-invariant) detects footfalls, and the inter-footfall interval is median+EMA-smoothed into a **BPM** (clamped ~60вҖ“160). Wrist **velocity peaks** fire limb-swings between beats; strong knee-lifts add mid accents. **VOICE = granular synthesis** (`grains.ts`, Curtis Roads *Microsound* 2001): at load it synthesizes two source buffers with **no external assets** (a filtered-noise burst + a decaying resonator ping); every hit granulates them вҖ” footfalls read the low resonator (rateвүҲ0.5) as kick-like thuds, wrists spray bright noise grains (rateвүҲ2вҖ“2.5) вҖ” Hann-windowed, pitched/panned per limb, hard grain cap, behind a compressor + short feedback delay. A 16-step ring spins at the gait BPM via **look-ahead scheduling** against `audioContext.currentTime`; incoming hits **quantize into the ring** and each cycle replays the deposited grains (the *loom weaves*); slot lives + master gain decay when you stop (the *unravel*). **Deliberately NOT a just-intonation choir/pad/drone** (the jury's banned voice, 6Г— in the window) and **NOT bright-daylight** вҖ” Canvas2D radial gait-clock in **chromatic chiaroscuro** (ember/amber footfalls + teal/emerald limb-threads on deep graphite), sweeping playhead locked to the BPM, woven quadratic threads between limb events, faint mirrored skeleton, centre readout of live BPM/cadence/lock. **Ambition 2/5** (honestly: #1 **NOT** claimed вҖ” PoseLandmarker is lab-common [677/582/710/803/811/869вҖҰ], only 0Г— in the recent-15 window; #2 вүҘ3 subsystems [Pose inference + gait state-machine + granular sequencer + Canvas2D loom = 4]; #3 named refs [Curtis Roads *Microsound* 2001; Myron Krueger *Videoplace* 1974вҖ“75; the "Sonified Body" skeletal-movementвҶ’OSC practice]). **diversity:** `banned=[bright-daylight palette В· Canvas2D-bright output В· JI-choir/drone voice В· passive/no-gesture input] В· picked=[body-skeleton/gait INPUT (active, 0Г— in window) В· Canvas2D radial loom on graphite chiaroscuro OUTPUT (not bright) В· granular VOICE (not JI) В· ember+teal chromatic VIBE]` вҖ” clears all four. The freshest angle vs the ~10 existing body pieces: **gaitвҶ’tempo** (0Г— even *within* embodiment) + a **rhythmic-transport form** unlike 803-body-chimes (modal) / 811-body-ribbons (UPIC) / 869-spatial-grove (spatial walk). **Graceful fallback (always sound + visuals):** camera denied / model down / no WebGL вҶ’ reason in `text-rose-300` + **limb pads** (L/R foot thuds, L/R wrist sprays) + a **tap-tempo** button + **spacebar** step, all driving the *same* gait clock + granular engine. **SAFETY:** rhythmic visual bursts but no full-field flash >3 Hz; luminance drift slow; no strobe. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client, no prod API, zero network/cost surface). **Validation:** authoritative winner-only gate вҶ’ `next lint --dir 1200-gait-loom` **вң” 0 warnings/0 errors** + `tsc --noEmit` project-wide **0 errors**; full `npm run build` static-gen blocked only by the standing container **`EMFILE`** fd ceiling (4096 hard cap; infra not code вҖ” Vercel deploys normally). **NOT camera/ear-verified** (headless container вҖ” the gait thresholds, grain balance, and tempo-lock feel want Karel's webcam + speakers; fallback guarantees it's never blank/silent). Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-voice structural-embodiment fire; banked **`1198-limbline`** вӯҗ (per-limb **Karplus-Strong** plucked-string body вҖ” each bone a waveguide, joint velocity plucks, limb extensionвҶ’pitch; glowing filaments with travelling pulses) + **`1199-resonant-room`** (body joints excite a 128Г—128 **FDTD wave-membrane** вҶ’ inharmonic Bessel-mode plate bank; dropped at curate as closest to shipped 803-body-chimes) as IDEAS В§670. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1200-gait-loom/README.md`

### [1226-loom](/dream/1226-loom) В· adult В· **pointer-pluck + keyboard (active, gestural)** / three.js **3D deforming ring** (tealвҶ’magenta jewel, gold scan-cursor + pluck-flares) В· cycle 679 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-06) В· demoable В· `state: playable-physical-instrument В· pole: warm/tactile`
**Pluck a glowing ring and hear its shape вҖ” the vibrating surface IS the waveform you're listening to.** The lab's cleanest cash of **scanned synthesis** (Verplank, Mathews & Shaw, "Scanned Synthesis," ICMC 2000) and the literal implementation of this fire's research dive (В§679 #1: the differentiable-string frontier where *the moving physical object and its sound are one state*). A closed ring of **N=128 masses** is simulated as a 1D **circular mass-spring string** (`ring.ts` вҖ” discrete-Laplacian neighbour springs + weak centering + damping, semi-implicit/symplectic Euler at the SLOW **haptic** rate, so the wave visibly sloshes around the loop over seconds, not at audio rate). The instantaneous array of 128 displacements **is a single-cycle wavetable**: an `AudioWorkletProcessor` (`worklet-src.ts`, Blob-URL `addModule` вҖ” the repo's 475-style idiom) holds that live table and gives each voice a phase accumulator scanning the loop at the note's pitch (interpolated lookup), and the main thread pushes the live shape every frame вҖ” so **the timbre morphs continuously as the ring wobbles**. A **pluck** (pointer press/drag on the ring, or `a s d f g h j k` / on-screen buttons in **D Dorian**) injects a gaussian bump of displacement+velocity and triggers a voice вҖ” one gesture changes both what you see and what you hear. Rendered in **three.js 3D** (`renderer.ts`): a glowing **tealвҶ’magenta** LineLoop + additive halo Points sharing one live geometry, a **gold scan-cursor** orbiting the read position, gold pluck-flares, gentle auto-rotation over a jewel CSS gradient. **Deliberately NOT** the jury-banned combos: not bright-daylight (deep jewel), not Canvas2D-bright (three.js 3D), not a JI choir/drone (a *scanned-wavetable* voice вҖ” grep-fresh vs the recently-shipped modal/KarplusвҖ“Strong[1220]/granular[1225]), not passive input (you pluck it), not a 2D full-screen field (a 3D object), not chromatic-chiaroscuro. **Never blank/silent:** breathing standing-wave on mount + idle **auto-pluck** after Begin, so it plays itself for the cold 06:30 glance. **Graceful fallback:** no WebGL вҶ’ `text-rose-300` notice; no `AudioWorklet` вҶ’ a silent-degrading **16-harmonic-DFT additive** oscillator-bank resynth of the live shape. **Ambition 3/5** (**#2** four subsystems: mass-spring sim + scanned-wavetable worklet [+ additive fallback] + three.js ring/cursor/flare renderer + pluck/keyboard input; **#3** named ref Verplank/Mathews/Shaw ICMC 2000 + Max Mathews; **#5** В§679 dive #1 "object-is-waveform," dated today. #1 NOT claimed вҖ” scan-adjacent 474 exists; the fresh axis is a real 1D-mass-spring scanned voice, not a lab-first technique). **diversity:** `banned=[bright-daylight PALETTE В· Canvas2D-bright OUTPUT В· 2D-full-screen-field OUTPUT В· JI-choir/drone VOICE В· modal/KarplusвҖ“Strong/granular VOICE(recent) В· passive INPUT В· chromatic-chiaroscuro PALETTE] В· picked=[active pointer-pluck+keyboard INPUT В· three.js-3D deforming-ring OUTPUT В· scanned-synthesis-wavetable VOICE В· tealвҶ’magenta jewel PALETTE]` вҖ” clears all bans. **SAFETY:** no strobe вҖ” pluck flares fade smoothly, ring luminance drifts well under 3 Hz. Audio gesture-gated (Begin resumes the ctx); per-voice envelope (in-worklet) вҶ’ master GainNode (ramp from 0) вҶ’ **DynamicsCompressor** limiter; 12-voice cap + voice-steal; full teardown (cancel rAF, disconnect/close audio, dispose three geometries/materials/renderer, revoke Blob URLs). **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; `three` is an existing project dep, zero new npm deps; no prod-API/cost/network surface). **Validation:** authoritative winner-only `npm run build` вҶ’ **Compiled + full ESLint + type-check PASS** (only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings, **ZERO from the 1226 folder**), winner `.next/server/app/dream/1226-loom/page.js` **compiled вң“ (34 KB)**; static-gen blocked only by the standing container **`EMFILE`** 4096-fd ceiling (`next-font-manifest.json`; infra not code вҖ” Vercel deploys normally); belt-and-suspenders `npx eslint src/app/dream/1226-loom/` = **exit 0**, build-log grep for `Failed to compile`/`Type error`/`Module not found` = none. **NOT ear-verified** (headless, no speakers вҖ” the scan-morph timbre + pluck feel + worklet-vs-additive path want Karel's browser; breathing + idle auto-pluck guarantee it's never blank/silent). Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-fresh-voice fire; banked **`1227-operators`** (Chowning/DX FM operator-galaxy you sculpt in 3D) + **`1228-reed`** (McIntyreвҖ“SchumacherвҖ“Woodhouse nonlinear self-oscillating wind waveguide, breathe to overblow) as IDEAS В§679. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1226-loom/README.md`

### [1225-tideglass](/dream/1225-tideglass) В· adult / altered-states В· **camera full-body pose вҖ” MediaPipe PoseLandmarker, hands + torso (active, embodied, spatial)** / three.js **3D point-cloud grain-field in depth** (tealвҶ’violet nebular, amber grain-sparks, two hand-attractors) В· cycle 678 В· DEEP-winner (2026-07-06) В· demoable В· `state: embodied-spatial В· pole: cosmic-ambientвҶ’kinetic`
**Your two hands are grain-heads moving through a cloud of sound вҖ” reach wide to scatter it, lift a hand to raise its pitch, and your body's place in the room pans it in true stereo space.** The lab's **first true stereo-spatialized granular cloud driven by body position** вҖ” the one genuinely un-built axis in the well-mined body-as-instrument lane (803/869/1068/1200 all precede it), and the direct cash of JURY 2026-07-05 provocation #4's specific "**depth-camera spatial audio** still 0Г—". MediaPipe **PoseLandmarker** (`pose_landmarker_lite`, VIDEO mode, jsDelivr CDN runtime dynamic-import via `webpackIgnore` вҖ” zero new npm deps, mirroring the proven 1185/677 pattern, GPUвҶ’CPU delegate retry) tracks the two **wrists** + **torso** (shoulders/hips) into a compact `PoseFrame`. Two granular grain-heads (`audio.ts`, Curtis Roads *Microsound* 2001): every grain is a short (~60вҖ“140 ms) Hann/triangular-windowed slice of an **in-engine synthesized FM wavetable** (no external asset), pitch-shifted click-free. **Mappings:** hand **height** вҶ’ grain playback-rate (~0.47Г—вҖ“2.14Г—) + per-head lowpass cutoff (raise a hand вҶ’ higher & brighter); **reach between the hands** вҶ’ grain density / stereo spread (wide = dense wide scatter, together = focused low-density point-source); **torso horizontal centre** вҶ’ whole-cloud panorama, **lean** вҶ’ a slow global filter sweep. Each head is hard-panned to its side through an equal-power **StereoPanner** вҖ” **spatial audio is the distinguishing voice** (grep-first as a body-driven grain cloud; 1200-gait-loom used granular but as a rhythmic Canvas2D *sequencer*, no spatialization, no 3D field, no continuous scrub). Every grain that fires lights an **amber spark** in a three.js **point-cloud grain-field receding in depth** (teal near вҶ’ violet far); the two hands are **bright amber attractors** moving through it. **Deliberately NOT** the jury-banned combos: not bright-daylight (deep nebular), not Canvas2D-bright (three.js 3D), not a JI choir/drone (granular), not passive input (the whole body is the instrument), not a flat 2D full-screen field (3D depth cloud). **Graceful fallback (always sound + visuals):** camera denied / model down / no WebGL вҶ’ `text-rose-300` notice + **two draggable hand-pucks** (mouse/touch) driving the identical engine, with a gentle **auto-drift** so both hands wander and the cloud plays itself for the cold 06:30 glance вҖ” never a dead screen. **Ambition 2/5** (honestly: **#1 NOT claimed** вҖ” PoseLandmarker is lab-common [677/803/869/1068/1200вҖҰ], only the *spatial-granular voice* is fresh, not the input; **#2 вүҘ3 subsystems** [Pose inference + hand/torso kinematics + granular engine + StereoPanner spatializer + three.js point-cloud renderer + fallback = six]; **#3 named refs** [BlazePose вҖ” Bazarevsky, Grishchenko et al., Google 2020; Curtis Roads *Microsound*, MIT Press 2001]). **diversity:** `banned=[bright-daylight PALETTE В· Canvas2D-bright OUTPUT В· JI-choir/drone VOICE В· passive INPUT В· 2D-full-screen-field OUTPUT В· modal/KarplusвҖ“Strong VOICE(recent)] В· picked=[active full-body camera-pose INPUT В· three.js-3D point-cloud OUTPUT В· granular+true-stereo-spatialization VOICE В· tealвҶ’violet nebular + amber PALETTE]` вҖ” clears all bans. **SAFETY (photosensitive-epilepsy):** no strobe вҖ” grain sparks are local point brightenings with smooth per-frame decay (Г—0.9), hand-attractor glow is low-passed, no full-field flash; luminance change well under 3 Hz. Audio gesture-gated (AudioContext created inside the Start click); master gain **ramps from 0** вҶ’ per-head filterвҶ’StereoPannerвҶ’gain вҶ’ **DynamicsCompressor limiter**; **hard grain-voice cap 64** (real density stays in single digits), each grain frees itself `onended`, scheduler resyncs rather than burst-catching-up after tab throttling.
