Full teardown (cancel rAF, stop+disconnect all audio, ramp master down + close AudioContext, close landmarker, stop MediaStream tracks). **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; reads no Resonance prod API; zero cost/network surface). **Validation:** authoritative winner-only `npm run build` вҶ’ **Compiled successfully + full ESLint + type-check PASS** (only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings, **ZERO from the 1225 folder**); static-gen blocked only by the standing container **`EMFILE`** 4096 fd ceiling (`next-font-manifest.json`; infra not code вҖ” cannot `ulimit -n` up here; Vercel deploys normally); belt-and-suspenders `npx eslint src/app/dream/1225-tideglass/` = **exit 0**, `tsc --noEmit` project-wide 0 errors referencing 1225. **NOT camera/ear-verified** (headless container вҖ” unverified: the poseвҶ’grain mapping feel, grain/reverb balance, the stereo image, live getUserMedia + CDN model fetch + GPU delegate; the fallback pucks + auto-drift exercise the identical downstream engine and are the reliable demo route). Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-approach body-as-instrument fire; the concept-lane honesty note (Pose is not 0Г—; 2 of 3 builders re-derived banked 1198/1199 + shipped 803) is in STATE В§678. Banked **`1223-marrow`** (per-limb KarplusвҖ“Strong string body вүҲ banked 1198-limbline) + **`1224-augur`** (joint-flexion вҶ’ inharmonic modal bells вүҲ shipped 803-body-chimes / banked 1199) as IDEAS В§678. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1225-tideglass/README.md`

### [1392-phase-loom](/dream/1392-phase-loom) В· adult / altered-states В· **Web MIDI + on-screen keyboard (active, played)** / three.js **3D orbiting phase-rings** (violetвҶ’emeraldвҶ’amber, conjunction filaments + slow core swell) В· cycle 725 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-10) В· demoable В· `state: hypnotic-minimalist В· pole: hypnotic`
**Hold notes and each becomes a loop at its OWN period вҖ” the loops drift Reich-style in and out of phase, weaving evolving polymetric music with NO drum grid.** The lab's cash of the 2026-07-09 jury's provocation **#2** вҖ” "don't let the look-ahead groove machine become the new bell; if you want TIME, find it somewhere other than a drum grid (polymetric phasing, a swung loop)." Every note you activate (MIDI note-on, one of 10 on-screen pads, or `A S D F G H J K L ;`) spawns a short **just-intonation pentatonic cell** (3вҖ“6 steps, ratios 1, 9/8, 5/4, 3/2, 5/3 over two octaves transposed to that root). **Each loop has its own period** вҖ” cell **length** varies (3вҖ“6 вҶ’ immediate polymeter) and each pitch gets a tiny **Вұ~2.7% tempo drift** вҖ” so no two loops ever share a grid; over ~10вҖ“60 s any pair slides from unison through the full cycle of offsets and back (Steve Reich *Piano Phase* / Terry Riley *In C*, cited honestly). A 25 ms look-ahead is used **purely for Web Audio timing accuracy** (each voice carries its own `nextTime`/`stepDur`, scheduled independently) вҖ” a clock, **not** a 120-BPM 4/4 step-sequencer, so it cleanly dodges the banned look-ahead-drum-groove. An underlying JI pad comes from the shared `_shared/psych/droneBank.ts`. **Visual (three.js вҖ” the fresh substrate):** each active loop is a tilted orbital **ring** with a glowing mote circling once per loop period; rings at different periods orbit at different rates, so you literally SEE the phasing вҖ” when two motes reach the same angle (a conjunction = loops in phase) a **filament lights** between them and the central **core swells**, fading as they drift apart. The swell tracks the very slow beat frequency (luminance change far below 3 Hz вҖ” no strobe). **Input:** Web MIDI requested on Begin; a `в—Ҹ MIDI` (emerald) / `в—Ӣ on-screen keys` (amber) badge shows the live path; the on-screen pads + keyboard drive the identical `toggleSlot` path when no device is present вҖ” both work. **Never blank/silent:** Begin seeds two contrasting loops so the phasing is instantly audible + visible; "Nudge a loop" re-phases; "Clear" stops all. **Ambition 3/5:** **#2** four subsystems (phasing-loop engine + JI voice pool + shared droneBank pad + three.js orbit-ring renderer + MIDI/keyboard input) В· **#3** named refs Reich *Piano Phase* (1967)/*Music for 18* (1976), Riley *In C* (1964) В· provocation-#2 cash. **#1 NOT claimed** вҖ” phasing/minimalism is well-established; the fresh axis is the *framing+substrate*: MIDI-played autonomous per-note loops finding TIME via phasing instead of the step-sequencer grid, on a three.js surface that makes the interference beat visible. **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D-primary В· look-ahead-drum-groove В· granular-freeze-of-real-recording В· pointer-SOLE-input] В· avoid=[SVG-primary В· mic] В· picked=[Web-MIDI+keyboard INPUT В· three.js-3D-orbit-ring OUTPUT В· polymetric-phasing TECHNIQUE В· violetвҶ’emeraldвҶ’amber hypnotic PALETTE]` вҖ” clears every 2026-07-09 ban, dodges at-line SVG + over-repped mic. **SAFETY:** no strobe вҖ” conjunction bloom is a slow sub-3-Hz core swell; `prefers-reduced-motion` drops auto-rotation + gentles the swell. Audio gesture-gated (ctx on Begin), master ramps from 0, three.js geometries/materials disposed + RAF cancelled + `ctx.close()` on unmount. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; `three` is an existing dep, zero new npm deps). **Validation:** authoritative winner-only `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` вҶ’ **EXIT 0**, `.next/server/app/dream/1392-phase-loom/page.js` compiled вң“; folder tsc/ESLint clean (the standing container `EMFILE` at prerender is the 4096-fd ceiling, infra not code вҖ” Vercel prerenders `"use client"` fine). **NOT ear/eye-verified** (headless, no MIDI device/speakers вҖ” the phasing audibility, conjunction legibility, and live MIDI path want Karel's browser; the on-screen path is the reliable demo route). Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-fresh-substrate fire; **`1388-cortex-diffuse` was DISQUALIFIED at curation** as a near-duplicate of `1348-prism-cortex` (both WebGPU-compute Gray-Scott RD through the cortical form-constant warp, played); banked **вӯҗ `1390-jhana-shells`** (tilt вҶ’ CSS-3D light-shell tunnel-to-light, cosmic-ambient) + the 1388 fallback-polish idea as IDEAS В§725. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1392-phase-loom/README.md`

### [1430-echo-void](/dream/1430-echo-void) В· adult / psychedelic В· **touch-ping + steer (tap/space to emit, drag/arrows to turn вҖ” NOT mic, NOT keyboard-piano)** / **WebGL2 `gl.POINTS` point-cloud** (Canvas2D sonar-sweep fallback) В· cycle 733 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-11) В· demoable В· `state: echolocation / NDE-cathedral-void В· pole: cosmic-ambient-dark`
**You can't see the space вҖ” you PING it, and it answers.** The screen is near-black; tap (or press space) and an expanding spherical wavefront races outward at a fixed speed-of-sound. Wherever it crosses a hidden surface (pillar ring, flagstone floor, barrel vault, curved apse, iron monoliths вҖ” a ~37-surface cathedral seeded deterministically by `mulberry32(0x1430ec0)`), that cluster of points flares as glowing WebGL2 `gl.POINTS` **and** returns an audible echo вҖ” HRTF-panned (`PannerNode({panningModel:"HRTF"})`) to the surface's true 3-D bearing, delayed by `2В·dist/SPEED` so near walls answer first and the far apse last: **TIME emerges from the geometry, not a scheduler.** Drag / arrows steer your heading, re-orienting the listener so the echoes re-pan; over ~30 s of pinging the unseen room reveals itself to ear and eye. The lab's **first active-echolocation interaction model** (`echolocat|sonar` grep-0Г—) вҖ” the fresh *interaction*, not another sim. **PITCH is strictly inharmonic** (each material a struck bell/plate: base + stretched non-integer partials Г—2.76/Г—5.40/Г—8.93, distanceвҶ’brightness) вҖ” deliberately allowed to sound eerie/unresolved, cashing the 2026-07-10 jury's ban on the JI always-consonant scale-index. **Named refs (README):** biosonar (bat/dolphin echolocation); Alvin Lucier *I Am Sitting in a Room* (a space revealed by its acoustic response); James Turrell (perceiving space with no object). **Ambition 3/5:** #1 never-used technique (echolocation/active-emission) + #2 вүҘ5 subsystems (seeded-3D-geometry + wavefront-sim + HRTF-echo engine + point-cloud renderer + ping/steer input) + #3 named refs. **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D/SVG-primary В· JI-always-consonant В· Reich-phasing В· mic-sole В· home-row-kbd-sole] В· picked=[touch-ping+steer INPUT В· WebGL2-points OUTPUT В· echolocation-wavefront TECH В· cosmic-dark NDE PALETTE]` вҖ” clears every ban. **Never blank/silent:** low drone bed + void reverb from Begin; cold-start idle auto-ping every 4вҖ“6 s (drifting heading) until the user first pings; live emerald `WebGL2` / amber `Canvas` tier badge; `prefersReducedMotion` slows+softens the wavefront. Audio gesture-gated, master ramps from ~0 over 2 s, `DynamicsCompressor` limiter, voice cap ~14/ping (вүҘ90 ms spacing), full `close()` teardown. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; no server, no secret, no network). **Validation:** plain `npm run build` passed TypeScript + ESLint + compile with **ZERO errors in the dream folder** (only pre-existing `src/lib/**` warnings), dying only at "Collecting page data" on the standing container **EMFILE** 4096-fd ceiling (infra, not code; absent on Vercel); authoritative winner-only `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` вҶ’ **EXIT 0** with `"/dream/1430-echo-void"` in `routes-manifest.json` + `page.js` (36 kB) emitted; `eslint src/app/dream/1430-echo-void --max-warnings 0` = **0**; `tsc --noEmit` = 0 dream errors. **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless, no GPU/display/speakers): HRTF direction, 1/dist balance, drone/reverb mix, `gl_PointSize`/glow-floor want Karel's browser+headphones вҖ” README documents the knobs; the drone-from-Begin + idle auto-ping + point flares guarantee it's never blank/silent. Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **`1434-orbit-compass`** (aim-the-phone celestial soundfield, device-orientation + three.js) + **`1438-mortal-tape`** (a recording that erodes each play вҖ” destructive playback, WebGL2 ribbon, uses Karel's real piano) as IDEAS В§733. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1430-echo-void/README.md`

### [1462-box-temple](/dream/1462-box-temple) В· adult / psychedelic В· **pointer-drag steer + fold-depth (wheel/pinch/hold вҖ” first-person flythrough, NOT mic/keyboard-piano)** / **WebGL2 raymarched Mandelbox** (readable notice fallback; audio survives no-GL) В· cycle 738 В· DEEP-winner (2026-07-11) В· demoable В· `state: fractal-breakthrough / impossible-architecture В· pole: cosmic-ambient вҶ” intense`
**Fall forward through an endless folded-architecture fractal вҖ” a machine-elf temple of infinite corridors вҖ” and the geometry's own folding structure resonates as sound, so travelling through it plays it.** The lab's **first 3D escape-time fractal** (`mandelbulb`/`mandelbox`/escape-time grep-**0Г—** across every README+INDEX before this) and its **first raymarched-fractal instrument**. A single WebGL2 fragment shader **sphere-traces a Mandelbox distance estimator** (Tom Lowe "Tglad", FractalForums 2010): each iteration box-folds (`v = clamp(v,-1,1)В·2 - v`) + sphere-folds toward a fixed radius, then `v = scaleВ·v + c` with a **negative scale (вҲ’1.6вҖҰвҲ’2.35, 10вҖ“14 iters)** for the rigid temple look; DE-gradient normals, step-count AO, grazing-distance corridor glow, IQ cosine palette (indigo stone вҶ’ amber inner light). The camera **drifts forward through the structure on load** (a live flythrough вҖ” never blank), slows near walls so it glides through corridors, collision-pushes out along the field gradient, and steers back toward the lattice if it drifts toward the void; pointer drag steers heading, wheel/pinch/**Fold deeper** raises fold scale+iterations so the corridors multiply. **The sonification (genuinely PLAYED вҖ” movement IS the instrument):** the SAME fold runs on the CPU at the camera each frame (`mandelbox.ts`); every iteration that folds lights one of 8 high-Q **band-pass "corridor" resonators** pitched **continuously** by that iteration's radius (log-continuous `[0.08,8]вҶ’[95,1500] Hz`, **never scale-snapped** вҖ” inharmonic/alien by construction, deliberately off the jury-banned ~10Г— JI/pentatonic "always-consonant scale-index" crutch); DE at the camera (**wall proximity**) crossfades reverb wetвҶ”dry + band-pass Q (present-and-dry near a wall vs distant-and-reverberant in an open chamber, via the shared `_shared/psych/convolutionVoid` void reverb); **fold depth вҶ’ drive** (more folds вҶ’ more voices + an opening inharmonic drone bed, fractal-derived ratios `[1,1.34,1.78,2.29,2.97]`); fold-boundary crossings fire sparse resonant **pings**. **Named refs (README):** Tom Lowe *Mandelbox* (2010), IГұigo QuГӯlez (distance-estimated fractal raymarching), the impossible-architecture / DMT-temple phenomenology. **Ambition 3/5:** **#1** first 3D escape-time fractal + first raymarched-fractal instrument + first continuous-non-scale-pitch-from-fractal-field (grep-0Г—; raymarching itself is lab-common [15Г—], the fresh axis is the escape-time *fractal* as a *played* instrument вҖ” declared honestly) В· **#2** вүҘ5 subsystems (Mandelbox DE raymarcher + CPU fold sampler + collision/heading nav + continuous foldвҶ’pitch mapper + resonant-voice/reverb/drone engine) В· **#3** named refs above. **diversity:** `banned=[Canvas2D-primary В· SVG-primary В· JI/pentatonic scale-index В· dissonance-as-theme В· three.js В· DOM/CSS-3D В· Reich-phasing В· mic-sole В· kbd-sole В· camera(729/737 just used)] В· picked=[first-person fractal-flythrough INPUT В· WebGL2 raymarched-Mandelbox OUTPUT В· escape-time-fractal-sonification TECHNIQUE В· continuous inharmonic pitch В· impossible-architecture PALETTE В· pole intense (off recent cosmic-ambient run)]` вҖ” clears every live ban. **SAFETY:** no strobe вҖ” all motion is slow luminance drift well under 3 Hz; `prefersReducedMotion` slows the flythrough + damps brightness swings. Audio gesture-gated ("Enter the temple" creates the ctx), master ramps from silence, peaks вүӨ0.2 вҶ’ **DynamicsCompressor** limiter, вүӨ9 voices, full teardown (stop nodes, cancel rAF, `ctx.close()`, dispose GL). **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; no server/secret/network; zero new npm deps вҖ” WebGL2 + Web Audio only). **Validation:** authoritative winner-only `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` вҶ’ **EXIT 0**, `.next/server/app/dream/1462-box-temple/page.js` emitted (**30.8 kB**) + `"/dream/1462-box-temple"` in `routes-manifest.json`; `eslint src/app/dream/1462-box-temple --max-warnings 0` = **0**; `text-white/30|40|50` grep = empty; `"use client"` line 1; no `Math.random`/`Date` in logic (only a comment). **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless, no GPU/display/speakers): the corridor-resonance mix, wall-proximity reverb crossfade, and flythrough feel want Karel's browser вҖ” README documents the knobs; the auto-flythrough-on-load + idle heading drift guarantee it's never blank/silent. Winner of an adult **DEEP** 2-approach "THE FRACTAL PALACE" fire; banked **вӯҗ `1460-bulb-organ`** (the organic-breakthrough sibling вҖ” a raymarched power-8 **Mandelbulb** you orbit-and-dive, orbit-trap вҶ’ continuous additive voice; TOP ship-next to pair the two faces of the fractal) as IDEAS В§738. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1462-box-temple/README.md`

### [1520-click-cathedral](/dream/1520-click-cathedral) В· adult / psychedelic В· **self-generated clicks (Space/tap primary + optional mic tongue-click onset; вҶҗ/вҶ’ or pointer only AIM вҖ” NOT pointer-drag-sole, NOT tilt)** / **audio-only / binaural (minimal secondary "belief-map" chrome)** В· cycle 750 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-12) В· demoable В· `state: drug-free echolocation / sensory-substitution boundless-space В· pole: cosmic-ambient (active, not void)`
**Can you SEE a vast space you cannot see вҖ” by clicking into the dark and listening to it answer?** A drug-free human-**echolocation** instrument on the **audio-only surface** (the one the standing 2026-07-11 jury named as *both* starving at 1Г— *and* a prior highlight вҖ” 1476). The screen is near-black; press **Space** (or tap, or a real mouth/tongue-click via the mic) to emit a short broadband click into an invisible, `mulberry32`-seeded procedural cathedral (~surfaces at azimuth/distance/elevation/material; 3 presets вҖ” small chamber / long corridor / vast vault). Each surface answers with a **binaural HRTF-panned echo** вҖ” delayed by `dist/343 mВ·sвҒ»В№`, timbre-colored by material (soft wall = dull short lowpass; far stone = bright long bandpass), with a `ConvolverNode` tail sizing the room (1.1 s вҶ’ 4.6 s). **The core loop embodies real, recent neuroscience:** Garcia-Lazaro et al., *"Neural and behavioral correlates of evidence accumulation in human click-based echolocation,"* **eNeuro, April 2026** (Smith-Kettlewell + Cardiff) вҖ” expert echolocators build their spatial map by **"summation," accuracy rising ~linearly with each self-generated click.** So here every surface carries a **belief** that rises linearly per aimed click вҶ’ its echo gets louder+brighter and its point blooms on a faint violet belief-map, and an "image forming: N%" readout tracks the mean: a vague space **resolves only through repeated clicking** вҖ” the eNeuro result made playable. It's **active and building, not a dissolving void** (jury #2 вҖ” rest the breathing-field/void). **Named refs (README):** Garcia-Lazaro et al. eNeuro 2026, Daniel Kish (human flash-sonar), Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening*. **Ambition вҖ” honest 2/5:** **#2** four subsystems (procedural room-geometry + binaural HRTF echo renderer + click-summation/evidence-accumulation belief model + own getUserMediaвҶ’highpassвҶ’AnalyserNode mic-onset detector) + **#3** named refs above. **#1 NOT claimed** (convolution reverb/binaural are lab-common at 1500+ deep вҖ” the novelty is the *active click-summation echolocation on the audio-only surface*, not a virgin technique); **#5 NOT claimed** (eNeuro anchor ~3mo, not <14-day вҖ” logged straight; strict <14-day psychedelic-AV hunt came up short again). **diversity:** `banned=[three.js-scene-graph(5Г—) В· WebGL2/GPU-render-primary(~10/15) В· pointer-drag-SOLE В· cortical-traveling-wave/log-polar-breathing-field(1506вҶ’1516) В· Reich+consonant-JI В· device-tilt(rested)] В· picked=[self-generated-CLICKS INPUT (Space/tap + optional mic-onset; вҶҗ/вҶ’ aim only вҖ” not pointer-sole, not tilt) В· AUDIO-ONLY/binaural OUTPUT (jury's starving+highlight surface, 1Г—) В· HRTF-echolocation + click-summation TECHNIQUE В· near-black/faint-violet PALETTE В· pole cosmic-ambient-ACTIVE (builds a space, doesn't melt)]` вҖ” clears every live hard ban. **SAFETY:** dark and calm вҖ” no strobe, luminance changes вүӨ3 Hz; `prefersReducedMotion` drops drift+rings; mic-permission errors shown in `text-destructive` with Space always working. Audio gesture-gated ("Enter the dark" creates the ctx), master ramps 0вҶ’вүӨ0.2 through a **DynamicsCompressor** limiter, вүӨ14-voice pool recycled on `onended`, faint ambient bed so it's never dead-silent, full teardown (close ctx, stop mic tracks, cancel rAF) on unmount. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; no server/secret/network; zero new npm deps вҖ” Web Audio + minimal Canvas2D only). **Validation:** normalizer 0 rewrites; `eslint src/app/dream/1520-click-cathedral --max-warnings 0` = **0**; `tsc --noEmit` = 0 dream errors; authoritative winner-only build green (see STATE В§750). **NOT ear-verified for feel** (headless, no headphones/speakers): the binaural spatial percept, per-material timbre contrast, and mic tongue-click onset thresholds want Karel's browser + headphones вҖ” README documents the knobs; the Space path is the guaranteed demo route. Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-explorer fire on the three under-used off-GPU surfaces; banked **вӯҗвӯҗ `1518-tesseract-organ`** (keyboard вҶ’ pure DOM/CSS-3D playable 4D-hypercube instrument, lowest render-risk) + **вӯҗвӯҗ `1522-fluid-conductor`** (tilt вҶ’ WebGPU-compute Jos Stam stable-fluids, verify GPU stability first) as IDEAS В§750. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1520-click-cathedral/README.md`

### [1530-hyperbolic-organ](/dream/1530-hyperbolic-organ) В· adult / psychedelic В· **keyboard-played (`WASD`/arrows translate + `Q/E` spin вҖ” NOT pointer, NOT mic)** / **pure SVG vector tiles (no canvas/WebGL/three.js)** В· cycle 752 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-12) В· demoable В· `state: DMT-hyperbolic / KlГјver-lattice В· pole: intense/kinetic (geometric, rests the void)`
**Play a negatively-curved universe вҖ” an Escher Circle-Limit {8,3} tiling in the PoincarГ© disk that you translate and spin with the keys, each hyperbolic move ringing one just-intonation interval and shifting the drone.** The lab's cleanest answer to the standing 2026-07-12 jury's provocation #1 (three.js is the new mouse-drag, 5/15; GPU-render-primary ~10/15 вҖ” *"next cycle's primary surface must NOT be a hand-authored GPU render"*): the tiling is real `<path>` elements created with `document.createElementNS`, updated **imperatively** every frame (never via React state) вҖ” **pure SVG vector tiles, the freshest off-GPU-render surface in the lab** (neither three.js, WebGL2, nor canvas). One central regular octagon (`cosh R = cot(ПҖ/p)В·cot(ПҖ/q)` вҶ’ `r = tanh(R/2)`) is grown breadth-first by a **Fuchsian reflection group** вҖ” each geodesic edge an arc of a circle orthogonal to the boundary, reflection across it a circle inversion вҖ” capped at `MAX_TILES=130` and pruned near the rim. The "camera" is a MГ¶bius isometry `V вҲҲ SU(1,1)`; each frame composes `V` with a small translation+rotation from a decaying key-velocity and re-normalises onto SU(1,1), pushing every tile vertex through `V` and drawing each curved edge as a 5-sample geodesic polyline. **See = hear:** each movement key walks a **just-intonation pitch lattice** (running ratio Г—= that key's interval вҖ” 3:2, 4:3, 5:4, 6:5, 9:8, 5:3 вҖ” folded into one octave), retuning a quiet drone bed and striking one inharmonic FM bell вҖ” so **moving through hyperbolic space IS moving through a lattice of pure ratios** (Tonnetz made literal). **Played, not watched:** keyboard is the only instrument (`W/A/S/D`/arrows translate, `Q/E` spin); before you act the disk drifts on a silent idle auto-pan, and Play unlocks the drone + keys (never blank/silent). **Named refs (README):** M.C. Escher *Circle Limit III* (1959), the PoincarГ© disk model, H.S.M. Coxeter, Fuchsian/MГ¶bius groups, KlГјver form-constants; the honest lineage note that `1044-hyperbolic-bloom` renders the SAME tiling but as a *watched WebGL2 fragment shader driven by mic FFT* вҖ” this is its **SVG, keyboard-played, instrument** inversion. **Ambition вҖ” honest 2/5:** **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (SVG PoincarГ©-tiling renderer + MГ¶bius/SU(1,1) play engine + JI interval/pitch-lattice + drone+FM-bell audio = 4) + **#3** named refs above. **#1 NOT claimed** (hyperbolic tiling lab-present вҖ” 1044/1042-hyperspace-bloom/1294-indra-descent; the fresh axis is the SVG-surface keyboard-played-instrument inversion, not a virgin technique); **#5 NOT claimed** (В§752 dive found nothing <14-day; logged straight). **diversity:** `banned=[three.js-scene-graph-primary(5Г—) В· GPU-render-primary(~10/15) В· cortical-traveling-wave/log-polar-breathing-field(1506вҶ’1516) В· pointer/touch-drag-SOLE(4Г—)] В· picked=[keyboard INPUT (not pointer-sole/mic/camera) В· pure-SVG vector-tile OUTPUT (freshest off-GPU-render surface) В· played-hyperbolic-MГ¶bius-tiling TECHNIQUE В· jeweled-iridescent-violet PALETTE В· pole intense/kinetic geometric]` вҖ” clears every live 2026-07-12 ban. **SAFETY:** no strobe вҖ” luminance is slow drift + a soft per-note swell that decays, far under 3 Hz; `prefers-reduced-motion` slows the drift, input accel, and pulse. Audio gesture-gated ("Play" creates the ctx), master **0.18** through a **DynamicsCompressor**, 12-voice bell cap (oldest culled), full teardown (bells+drone stopped, `ctx.close()`, rAF cancelled, listeners + paths removed). **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; no server/secret/network; zero new npm deps вҖ” SVG + Web Audio only). **Validation:** normalizer 0 rewrites; `eslint src/app/dream/1530-hyperbolic-organ --max-warnings 0` = **0**; plain `npm run build` compiled+linted+typechecked with **ZERO 1530 errors/warnings** (only pre-existing `src/lib/**`), dying only at "Collecting page data" on the standing **EMFILE** fd-ceiling (infra, absent on Vercel); authoritative winner-only `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` вҶ’ **EXIT 0**, `page.js` (22 kB) + `"/dream/1530-hyperbolic-organ"` in `routes-manifest.json`; `tsc --noEmit` = 0 dream errors. **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless): the JI-lattice weld tightness, curvature legibility at extreme zoom (edges are 5-sample polylines not exact arcs), loudness balance, and perf under DOM churn on a weak device want Karel's browser вҖ” README documents the levers (`MAX_TILES`/`EDGE_SAMPLES`); the idle auto-pan + drone-from-Play guarantee it's never blank/silent, and deterministic SVG renders identically anywhere (phone-safe at 06:30). Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-explorer fire on three distinct off-GPU-render surfaces; banked **вӯҗвӯҗ `1532-hand-aurora`** (camera/MediaPipe hands вҶ’ Canvas2D ecstatic entity-conjuring aurora, love-adjacent to 234) + **вӯҗвӯҗ `1534-attractor-tide`** (tilt вҶ’ WebGPU-compute 1M-point de Jong/Clifford attractor + standalone-shippable Canvas2D fallback, love-adjacent to 130) as IDEAS В§752. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1530-hyperbolic-organ/README.md`

### [1524-droste-descent](/dream/1524-droste-descent) В· adult / psychedelic В· **pointer-joystick + keyboard (drag/`WASD`/arrows dive-climb-twist + `Space` surge вҖ” NOT pointer-sole, NOT mic/camera)** / **pure DOM + CSS-3D nested frames (no canvas/WebGL/three.js)** В· cycle 751 В· DEEP-winner (2026-07-12) В· demoable В· `state: infinite-regress / Droste-tunnel В· pole: ecstatic-plunge (kinetic, rests the void)`
**Hold infinite regress in your hands and steer it вҖ” plunge, climb, and twist through an endlessly self-nesting Droste tunnel where every level you fall through is felt as one octave of a falling Shepard tone.** The lab's first **discrete Droste / mise-en-abyme instrument** (`droste`/`mise-en-abyme` grep-**0Г—** across the full lab вҖ” distinct from the 12Г— continuous fractal-zoom shaders and 17Г— kaleidoscopes), built entirely from **13 real nested `<div>` frames under a single CSS `perspective`** (the jury's starving 1Г— off-GPU surface вҖ” the browser compositor, deliberately NOT a hand-authored GPU render, after three.js hit 5/15 and GPU-render-primary ~10/15). A continuous `travel` value places each frame at level `((kвҲ’travel) mod N)` in Z; frames that pass the camera wrap to the far plane and fade in, so a finite stack reads as an **endless** self-nesting tunnel (the treadmill trick); per-level `rotateZ` gestures the de Smit/Lenstra Droste spiral. **See = hear:** descent velocity (levels/sec) drives the shared `_shared/psych/shepard.ts` ShepardвҖ“Risset engine's glide rate (octaves/sec), with two engines (`dir вҲ’1` fall / `+1` climb) crossfaded by velocity sign for bidirectional glide, so pitch falls exactly as fast as the eye descends; each integer level crossing rings a just-intonation bell marking the octave. **Played, not watched:** pointer joystick (vertical = dive/climb, horizontal = twist) + `W/S/A/D`/arrows + `Space` surge, with inertia; release вҶ’ a slow idle auto-drift (kinetic at rest, never blank/silent). A JI `startDroneBank` bed opens with intensity; `createVoidReverb` supplies the cavern. **Named refs (README):** M.C. Escher *Print Gallery* (1956), the Droste effect (1904), de Smit & Lenstra *The Mathematical Structure of Escher's Print Gallery* (2003), Shepard (1964) / Risset endless glissando, KlГјver's tunnel/funnel form-constant. **Ambition вҖ” honest 4/5:** **#1-soft** (discrete-Droste-recursion concept grep-0Г—; declared honestly вҖ” DOM/CSS-3D + Shepard are each individually used, the fresh axis is discrete mise-en-abyme recursion as a PLAYED instrument welded 1:1 to the Shepard octave) + **#2** вүҘ5 subsystems (recursive DOM/CSS-3D renderer + played descent/twist drive + dual Shepard engines + droneBank pad + JI bell voice) + **#3** named refs above + **#5-soft** (В§751 Ganzflicker/form-constant dive вҖ” conceptual trigger, NOT <14-day, logged). **diversity:** `banned=[three.js-scene-graph(5Г—) В· GPU-render-primary(~10/15) В· log-polar-breathing-field(1506вҶ’1516) В· pointer-drag-SOLE(4Г—)] В· picked=[DOM/CSS-3D nested-frames OUTPUT (starving 1Г—) В· pointer+keyboard+surge INPUT В· discrete-Droste-recursion TECHNIQUE (0Г—) В· Shepard-welded-1:1 AUDIO В· ecstatic-plunge PALETTE В· PLAYED]` вҖ” clears every live 2026-07-12 ban. **SAFETY:** no strobe вҖ” only smooth transform motion + slow hue drift; `prefers-reduced-motion` slows drift + caps descent rate. Audio gesture-gated ("Begin the descent" creates the ctx), master ramps 0вҶ’вүӨ0.18 through a **DynamicsCompressor** limiter, capped/oldest-stolen bell polyphony, full teardown on unmount. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure client; no server/secret/network; zero new npm deps вҖ” DOM/CSS + Web Audio only). **Validation:** normalizer 0 rewrites; `eslint вҖҰ --max-warnings 0` = **0**; authoritative winner-only `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` вҶ’ build OK, `page.js` (31.5 kB) + `"/dream/1524-droste-descent"` in `routes-manifest.json`; `tsc --noEmit` = 0 dream errors. **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless): frame-count legibility, twist-vs-spin threshold, and the Shepard descent mix want Karel's browser вҖ” README documents the knobs; the idle auto-drift + depth HUD guarantee it's never blank, and 13 deterministic DOM frames render identically anywhere (phone-safe). Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-approach "INFINITE REGRESS" fire; banked **вӯҗвӯҗ `1526-cell-recursion`** (dive INTO a honeycomb eye-cell, its inner copy of the whole lattice becomes your world вҖ” SierpiЕ„ski/Menger DOM carpet; the most distinctive interaction, resurrect after verifying the level-4 ~7k-cell tree in-browser) + **вӯҗ `1528-mirror-well`** (receding-selves mirror corridor) as IDEAS В§751. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1524-droste-descent/README.md`

### [1536-codec-melt](/dream/1536-codec-melt) В· adult / psychedelic В· **keyboard-played (`AвҖ“K` piano row; hammer to melt вҖ” NOT pointer, NOT mic/camera)** / **Canvas2D + WebCodecs (`VideoEncoder`/`VideoDecoder`, VP8) вҖ” the lab's FIRST-EVER WebCodecs piece** В· cycle 753 В· DEEP-winner (2026-07-12) В· demoable В· `state: LSD-tracer / datamosh-melt В· pole: intense/kinetic (a played melt that heals вҖ” rests the void)`
**Play the melt of a dying video codec.** A drifting Canvas2D field of violet blobs is fed frame-by-frame into a **real hardware `VideoEncoder`** (VP8) pinned at a deliberately *starved* 55 kbps, decoded straight back with `VideoDecoder`, and upscaled nearest-neighbour so the codec's own compression artifacts вҖ” blooming DCT macroblocks, colour-banded slabs вҖ” **are the render substrate itself.** Datamosh as an instrument. This is the **lab's first-ever use of the WebCodecs API** вҖ” the genuine grep-0Г— never-used technique (`VideoEncoder`/`VideoDecoder`/`EncodedVideoChunk` appear in **0** other files across the 1500-deep lab; the criterion five juries named as the wall to the first 5/5, honestly cleared at last). Every key is at once a **synth voice** and a **burst of visual motion** вҖ” a bright high-contrast comet flung across the source scene; because motion is exactly what a starved codec cannot encode, that comet detonates the macroblocks around it, and the picture heals as the note decays. **The key engineering insight** (documented in README): WebCodecs has no per-`encode` bitrate parameter and the only runtime bitrate change, `encoder.configure()`, forces a keyframe = an instant full-frame *heal* that fights the melt вҖ” so instead the encoder is **pinned at fixed 55 kbps** and melt depth drives injected **motion** (bigger/faster/brighter comets the low bitrate's P-frames can't track), achieving "starve toward the floor" without the keyframe-heal side effect; keyframes are requested only to heal when calm (melt < 0.08) or a 5 s safety cap. This is the **most render-robust of three codec-manipulation approaches** built in the DEEP fire (no reconfigure churn, standard WebCodecs usage, small 384Г—216 source so 16px macroblocks read as big chunky slabs). **See = hear weld:** attack/hammering вҶ’ melt depth вҶ’ comet size+speed+brightness (how hard the codec blooms) *and* synth filter cutoff + release + drone drive (louder/brighter voice); pitch вҶ’ comet launch angle (golden-angle) + iridescent-violet hue (where the codec smears + what colour). **Audio:** gesture-gated `AudioContext`; detuned saw+tri voices вҶ’ lowpass ADSR + shared `droneBank` just-intonation bed; master `GainNode` **0.18** вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` вҶ’ destination; polyphony вүӨ14 (oldest stolen), gains ramped (no clicks). **Never blank/silent:** idle ~2.5 s вҶ’ seeded sequencer walks a slow phrase (melts + sings on its own at Karel's 06:30 glance); real keys take over instantly. **Fallback (WebCodecs absent / config unsupported / mid-stream throw):** hand-rolled Canvas2D **feedback datamosh** вҖ” the same tracer ping-pong (prev frame zoom+rotate+hue-nudge+decay) with raw source composited over вҖ” still plays, melts, sounds, under a `text-destructive` note. **Named refs (README):** Takeshi Murata *Monster Movie* (2005, canonical datamosh); Rosa Menkman *The Glitch Moment(um)*; Nino Filiu *SuperMosh* (real-time datamosh via WebCodecs вҖ” direct technical lineage); Sven KГ¶nig *aPpRoPiRaTe!*; LSD positive-afterimage "tracer" phenomenology. **Ambition вҖ” honest 3/5 (the lab's genuine crack at the #1 wall):** **#1** WebCodecs = **grep-0Г— never-used-in-the-lab technique** (verified across the full lab; MIDI is 36Г—, hand-tracking 20Г— вҖ” both falsely flagged 0Г— by prior juries; WebCodecs actually survives the grep) В· **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (played-input engine + Canvas2D source-scene renderer + WebCodecs encode/decode datamosh pipeline + Web Audio synth+drone = 4) В· **#3** named refs above. **#5 NOT claimed** (В§753 dive is a technique-novelty finding, not a <14-day paper вҖ” WebCodecs/SuperMosh predate the window; logged straight, consistent with В§750/В§751/В§752). **diversity:** `banned=[three.js-scene-graph-primary(5Г—) В· GPU-render-primary(~10/15) В· cortical-traveling-wave/log-polar-breathing-field(1506вҶ’1516) В· pointer/touch-drag-SOLE(4Г—)] В· picked=[keyboard INPUT (not pointer-sole, not warm mic/camera) В· Canvas2D + WebCodecs OUTPUT (a genuinely new 0Г— render substrate вҖ” NOT a hand-authored GPU render, NOT three.js/WebGL2/SVG) В· codec-datamosh TECHNIQUE (grep-0Г—) В· iridescent-violet LSD-tracer PALETTE В· pole intense/kinetic (a played melt that heals вҖ” rests the void, not a watched breathing-field)]` вҖ” clears every live 2026-07-12 hard ban. **SAFETY:** no strobe вҖ” melt is a smoothly-eased scalar (П„вүҲ0.85 s) modulating comet motion + trail persistence, never a per-frame full-screen luminance flip; all transitions ease well beyond 150 ms, nothing in the 3вҖ“30 Hz danger band; `prefersReducedMotion()` caps comet speed/melt, slows idle tempo, lengthens the heal. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + Canvas2D + WebCodecs; no server/network/secret; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites; `eslint src/app/dream/1536-codec-melt --max-warnings 0` = **0**; `tsc --noEmit` = **0** errors in 1536; authoritative winner-only `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0** (plain `npm run build` compiles+lints+typechecks clean but dies at "Collecting page data" on the standing ~700-route **EMFILE** fd-ceiling вҖ” infra, absent on Vercel). **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless container вҖ” no browser: WebCodecs `VideoEncoder`/`VideoDecoder` globals are absent under `chrome-headless-shell`, so only the software fallback path can run here; the real codec path, the felt melt-controllability, macroblock legibility, and loudness balance want Karel's Chrome вҖ” the idle demo + deterministic scene guarantee it's never blank/silent). Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-approach fire (one concept вҖ” *datamosh as a played psychedelic instrument* вҖ” via three codec mechanics); banked **вӯҗвӯҗ `1538-mosh-bloom`** (TOP ship-next вҖ” the authentic Murata keyframe-drop P-frame smear you hold, `Space` = "I-frame bloom" clarity-snap; de-selected only on its non-standard re-fed-delta amplifier reading "more as melt than block-drag mosh on some engines" per its own knock вҖ” verify true P-frame-drag in real Chromium first) + **вӯҗ `1540-ghost-delay`** (WebCodecs decode-delay ring buffer вҶ’ additive codec-ghost tracer-trails, pitchвҶ’depth+audio-delay, intensityвҶ’bitrate-crush; Bill Viola time-delay lineage; de-selected on leaning into the drift/tracer register the jury asked to REST this cycle + per-intensity encoder-reconfigure churn 1536 avoids) вҶ’ IDEAS В§753. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1536-codec-melt/README.md`

### [1548-ink-bloom](/dream/1548-ink-bloom) В· adult / psychedelic В· **mic-breath-played (voice/breath RMS drives drops+boil; pointer-stir secondary вҖ” NOT keyboard, NOT camera, NOT pointer-sole)** / **CSS Houdini Paint Worklet (`paintWorklet`/`registerProperty`) вҖ” the lab's FIRST-EVER Houdini piece, Canvas2D fallback identical** В· cycle 755 В· DEEP-winner (2026-07-13) В· demoable В· `state: hypnagogic ink-drift / suminagashi В· pole: cosmic-ambient вҶ” intense`
**Breathe onto a black pool and watch drops of ink bloom into interlocking suminagashi rings you can hear вҖ” painted natively by the browser's compositor.** The lab's **first-ever use of the CSS Houdini Paint API** вҖ” the genuine grep-0Г— never-used render substrate (`paintWorklet`/`registerPaint`/`registerProperty` appear in **0** other files across the 1500-deep lab; the #1 "never-used technique" criterion, honestly cleared вҖ” and uniquely, it renders on the **CSS compositor, NOT a hand-authored GPU render**, so it cleanly dodges the standing three.js/WebGL2 GPU-render-primary ban). Ink is dropped onto a still pool and вҖ” as in real **suminagashi** (Japanese floating-ink marbling) вҖ” every new drop pushes all earlier rings radially outward by the exact non-overlap transform `C + (PвҲ’C)В·вҲҡ(1 + dВІ/|PвҲ’C|ВІ)` (a point at distance `r` moves to `вҲҡ(rВІ+dВІ)`), so the field settles into nested, interlocking concentric contours. **The key engineering insight** (documented in README): a Paint Worklet receives only scalar custom properties and has no per-pixel access (`PaintRenderingContext2D` is a vector-only Canvas2D subset вҖ” no `getImageData`), so the whole ink field is **reconstructed deterministically inside the worklet from eight scalars** (`--t/--energy/--drops/--boil/--hue/--px/--py/--stir`) via a per-index `mulberry32` вҖ” an elegant answer to Houdini's scalar-only bridge. The marbling is ONE pure `drawInk(ctx,w,h,state)` `.toString()`-embedded into a Blob-URL worklet (`CSS.paintWorklet.addModule`) AND called directly by a `<canvas>` fallback вҶ’ literally-identical pixels; feature-detected, header labels which path is live ("CSS Houdini Paint" vs "Canvas 2D fallback"), so the novel path genuinely runs in Chromium while the piece renders everywhere (Firefox/Safari/headless). **See = hear weld (tightest of the three DEEP explorers):** each drop you *see* is the exact frame a bell/ink-drop plink fires вҖ” one discrete event; breath loudness вҶ’ drop rate + a "boil" agitating contours into gold-flecked filigree + warmth (calm = slow cosmic drift, loud = boiling intensity). **Audio:** gesture-gated `AudioContext`; a sustaining 3-detuned-osc cosmic drone through a 0.06 Hz-LFO lowpass + drop-synced plinks; master **0.18** вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` вҶ’ destination; вүӨ14 voices; full teardown on Stop/unmount. **Never blank/silent:** if the mic is denied/absent a seeded self-demo envelope keeps ink blooming and droning. **Named refs (README):** suminagashi floating-ink marbling; CSS Houdini Paint API / George Francis (georgedoescode) generative paint-worklets; Memo Akten (breath/energy as continuous controller). **Ambition вҖ” honest 3/5:** **#1** Houdini Paint = **grep-0Г— never-used-in-the-lab technique** (verified across the full lab) В· **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (Paint Worklet render engine + `registerProperty` audioвҶ’typed-CSS-prop bridge + Web Audio mic analysis + suminagashi field generator = 4) В· **#3** named refs above. **#4** abstained at ship (declared multi-cycle in README вҖ” cycle-2 folds in 1550's curl-noise/rake + 1552's thin-film hue + Karel's real Path piano as the drop schedule); **#5 NOT claimed** (В§755 dive is a technique-novelty finding, not a <14-day paper; logged straight, fifth cycle running). **diversity:** `banned=[three.js-scene-graph-primary В· GPU-render-primary(~10/15) В· cortical-traveling-wave/log-polar-breathing-field В· pointer/touch-drag-SOLE В· Canvas2D-as-headline(4Г— warm)] В· picked=[HOUDINI-PAINT-WORKLET OUTPUT (grep-0Г—, CSS-compositor NOT GPU вҖ” Canvas2D is only the fallback) В· mic-breath+pointer-stir INPUT (embodied, not sole/not banned, not the broken 3Г— keyboard rut, not camera-just-did) В· suminagashi ink-marbling TECHNIQUE В· iridescent-inkвҶ’jeweled PALETTE В· pole cosmic-ambientвҶ”intense (fresh named tradition вҖ” NOT the warm liquid-light-blob look, NOT the rested breathing-field/void)]` вҖ” clears every live 2026-07-12 hard ban. **SAFETY:** no strobe вҖ” boil modulates contour *amplitude* not frequency, drone LFO 0.06 Hz, hue drifts on a ~30 s cycle (all luminance change вүӨ3 Hz); `prefers-reduced-motion` halves the virtual clock + lowers drop rate. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + Houdini/Canvas2D; no server/network/secret; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites; `eslint src/app/dream/1548-ink-bloom --max-warnings 0` = **0**; `tsc --noEmit` = 0 winner errors (stale `.next/types` for the removed siblings cleared via `rm -rf .next`); authoritative winner-only `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `page.js` (33.8 kB) + `"/dream/1548-ink-bloom"` in `routes-manifest.json` (plain `npm run build` dies only at "Collecting page data" on the standing ~700-route **EMFILE** fd-ceiling вҖ” infra, absent on Vercel). **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless container вҖ” no browser/mic/speakers): the felt dropвҶ’plink tightness, ring legibility, and whether the Houdini compositor path is smooth full-bleed want Karel's Chrome; the idle self-demo + deterministic reconstruction guarantee it's never blank/silent and render identically anywhere. Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-approach "Houdini-Paint marbling" fire (one concept вҖ” *ink-in-water marbling on the CSS compositor* вҖ” via three vector marbling algorithms); banked **вӯҗвӯҗ `1550-comb-marble`** (TOP ship-next вҖ” ebru gel-git/taraklДұ comb + divergence-free curl-noise flow + pointer-rake; richest technique, de-selected only on a looser aggregate see=hear weld) + **вӯҗ `1552-veil-marble`** (thin-film/oil-on-water iridescent veils; de-selected on least marbling-authentic + leaning into the warm liquid-light-blob register) вҶ’ IDEAS В§755. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1548-ink-bloom/README.md`

### [1590-body-mirror](/dream/1590-body-mirror) В· adult / embodied В· **camera body-tracking (MediaPipe HandLandmarker, 2 hands вҖ” NOT mic, NOT keyboard, NOT pointer)** / **raw WebGL2 fragment shader (warm copperвҶ’amberвҶ’teal, off-violet) + spatial Web Audio (`StereoPannerNode` + HRTF `PannerNode`)** В· cycle 762 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-13) В· demoable В· `state: presence-as-interface / body-instrument В· pole: warm/embodied`
**Your whole body вҖ” not your voice вҖ” is the instrument, and the room hears where your hands are.** The lab's answer to the 2026-07-13 jury's #1 (and most-emphatic) provocation вҖ” *"get a body in the room"* (only 1 camera + 1 tilt + **0** body/pose pieces in the last 15; and camera pieces `217-dance-avatar`вқӨпёҸ / `234-kids-hand-creature`вқӨпёҸ / `101-camera-song`вқӨпёҸ are all loved). A webcam feeds **MediaPipe Tasks-Vision `HandLandmarker`** (loaded at runtime from CDN via a `/* webpackIgnore: true */` dynamic `import()`, the proven pattern from committed `1297-hand-loom` вҖ” nothing added to `package.json`); each hand's palm-centre drives a **continuous spatial voice** вҖ” XвҶ’stereo pan (real `StereoPannerNode`), heightвҶ’pitch вҖ” while **raising both hands swells a warm chord pad** (a filament of light binds them) and a **pinch** (thumb-tipвҶ”index-tip) plucks a bright note **placed in 3-D space** through a real HRTF `PannerNode`. Rendered as a single full-screen **raw WebGL2** fragment shader (no Canvas2D): a breathing warm wash, up to 64 additive fading glow-trails following each hand, hand-cores that flash on pinch. **The four wired subsystems** (ambition #2, exceeded): camera capture + MediaPipe landmark model + spatial Web Audio + WebGL2 render вҖ” each driving the next. **Named ref (ambition #3, README):** Myron Krueger's *Videoplace* (1975) вҖ” *presence itself is the interface, you don't pick up a controller, you ARE the controller* вҖ” fused with **Daniel Rozin's mechanical mirrors** (the reactive "mirror" here is a field of warm light instead of wood/metal). **See=hear weld:** where a hand is = where the sound pans + where the light glows; a pinch you *see* is the note you *hear*, placed at that hand. **Audio:** gesture-gated `AudioContext`; per-hand triangle+sub voices + stacked-saw pad + transient plucks вҶ’ master вүӨ0.26 (1.4 s fade-in) вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` limiter вҶ’ destination; full teardown of audio nodes + camera stream + landmarker on unmount. **Never blank/silent:** on load a **synthetic demo body** already moves two glowing hands driving the same audio+visuals, so the whole idea is visible/audible **with no webcam at all** вҖ” real hands take over the instant the camera is enabled. **Graceful degradation:** camera-denied / MediaPipe-or-WASM-fail / no-WebGL2 each show an on-brand `text-destructive` notice while the demo body keeps the piece alive; `prefers-reduced-motion` shortens/decays trails. **Ambition вҖ” honest 2/5:** **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (4, integrated) + **#3** Videoplace/Rozin named refs. (**#1 NOT claimed** вҖ” MediaPipe hand/pose has prior lab use: `677-presence-field`, `862-kids-solfege-signs`, `258-kids-mirror-pets`, `1297-hand-loom` вҖ” so body-tracking is a *diversity* win, not a grep-0Г— novelty; **#5 NOT claimed** вҖ” 11th cycle the strict <14-day hunt is dry, logged straight.) **Honest blemish:** the pitch scale is minor-pentatonic (the exact map the jury flagged on `1542`) вҖ” but here it's one axis of a spatial instrument (pan/height/pinch/HRTF/swell), not the whole concept. **diversity:** `banned=[mic/voice-INPUT В· Canvas2D-OUTPUT В· voiceвҶ’JI-toneвҶ’form-constant ENGINE В· iridescent-violet+KlГјver ART-PALETTE]` (per JURY 2026-07-13); `picked=[camera-body-tracking INPUT (empty lane, loved) В· raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT (not Canvas2D) В· landmarkвҶ’spatial-audio-panning TECHNIQUE В· warm copper/amber/teal off-violet PALETTE В· pole warm/embodied]` вҖ” clears every hard ban. **SAFETY:** no strobe вҖ” all motion is smoothly-eased position tracking + slow trail decay, nothing in the flicker band; reduced-motion honored. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + WebGL2 + MediaPipe CDN; no server/secret; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites; `eslint src/app/dream/1590-body-mirror` = **0**; `tsc --noEmit` = 0 winner errors; authoritative winner-only `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0** with `"/dream/1590-body-mirror"` in `routes-manifest.json` (plain `npm run build` compiles+lints+typechecks clean but dies at "Collecting page data" on the standing ~700-route **EMFILE** fd-ceiling вҖ” infra, absent on Vercel). **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless container вҖ” no camera/speakers; MediaPipe's `HandLandmarker` needs a real webcam + WebGL/WASM): the felt handвҶ’pan tightness, pinch-pluck placement, and swell balance want Karel's Chrome; the synthetic demo body guarantees it's never blank/silent and the whole mapping is demonstrable with no camera. Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-builder fire (3 divergent directions, each answering a different jury provocation); banked **вӯҗвӯҗ `1594-reading-light`** (TOP ship-next вҖ” the banked reading-light REBUILT clean this cycle; its score-follower wants Karel's real Path piano = the 5/5 weld, held for his "go") + **вӯҗ `1592-sky-traffic`** (the monotheme-break вҖ” live OpenSky aircraft sonified on an SVG radar scope, Ikeda ref, synthetic-sky fallback) вҶ’ IDEAS В§762. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1590-body-mirror/README.md`

### [1596-lectio-verse](/dream/1596-lectio-verse) В· adult / psychedelic-adjacent (scripture / lectio) В· **audio-file (drop/pick a recording вҖ” primary; keyboard step/pause secondary; NOT mic, NOT voice)** / **typographic DOM via CSS Custom Highlight API (8 `read0вҖҰread7` buckets, zero per-glyph DOM; `<span data-read>` fallback + live badge) вҖ” NO Canvas2D, NO WebGL** В· cycle 763 В· DEEP-winner (2026-07-13) В· demoable В· `state: self-reading illuminated scripture / lectio divina В· pole: contemplative`
**Drop in a piano recording and the scripture reads itself вҖ” one word illuminated per struck note.** The lab's answer to the fresh 2026-07-13 jury's **#3 (and most-emphatic) provocation** вҖ” *"stop banking the 5/5 and ship it."* The banked reading-light codex, finally shipped, with its cross-modal **score-follower** as the headline: a tall vertical column of seeded asemic pseudo-scripture painted near-invisible on a near-black page; a bright **reading light** (hot candlelight head вҶ’ dim amber afterglow) illuminates **one word at a time**, and a just-intonation FM "reader" synth speaks each word as it lands. **The weld:** load a real recording (Load-audio button or drag-drop) вҶ’ it plays through `MediaElementSource вҶ’ AnalyserNode` and a **spectral-flux onset detector** (adaptive threshold mean+kВ·std over ~0.7 s + local-peak + refractory) fires on each note attack; **every onset advances the reading light one word** вҖ” a run of fast notes rushes a line, a held chord lets a word glow, the built-in synth ducks so the loaded piano leads. So the performance *literally reads the text aloud*, note by note вҖ” Karel drops his real Path piano in and the light follows his phrasing. **Never blank/silent:** with no file the seeded codex auto-reads on an internal pulse over a sustaining JI under-bed drone (gesture-gated). **Named refs (README):** CSS Custom Highlight API (MDN); spectral-flux onset detection (Bello et al. 2005); **Online Time Warping (Dixon 2005) + Matchmaker (arXiv:2510.10087)** вҖ” the real-time audio-to-score-alignment lineage this follower relates to (this cycle's widened-net research anchor); illuminated manuscript / *lectio divina*; asemic writing (Michaux). **Ambition вҖ” honest 3/5:** **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (Custom-Highlight reading-light renderer + seeded morpheme generator + JI FM synth + audio-file onset score-follower = 4, integrated) + **#3** named refs above + **#4** explicit multi-cycle (cycle-2 of the 1588-glossolalia banked plan; cycle-3 = Karel's real Path recording + the sibling followers). **#1 NOT claimed** вҖ” Custom Highlight API was cashed in 1588 (В§761); the novelty here is the **cross-modal audio-file score-follow weld**, not the API (honest вҖ” the jury blessed shipping it anyway). **#5 NOT claimed** вҖ” 12th straight dry even on the widened net (OLTW/Matchmaker are 2005/2025, not <14-day). **diversity:** `banned=[mic/voice-INPUT В· Canvas2D-OUTPUT В· voiceвҶ’JI-toneвҶ’form-constant ENGINE В· iridescent-violet+KlГјver ART-PALETTE]` (per JURY 2026-07-13); `picked=[audio-file INPUT (fresh modality вҖ” the jury's own named path, dodges the voice ban) В· typographic-DOM Custom-Highlight OUTPUT (dodges Canvas2D) В· onset score-follower ENGINE (audioвҶ’onsetвҶ’reading-position, NOT the banned voiceвҶ’JIвҶ’form-constant spine) В· illuminated-codex verse-column PALETTE (a text codex, NOT a KlГјver mandala) В· pole contemplative]` вҖ” clears every hard ban. **SAFETY:** no strobe вҖ” the reading light is a smoothly-eased per-word illumination, advance rate capped, luminance change вүӨ3 Hz; `prefers-reduced-motion` slows the pulse + caps advance. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + Custom Highlight DOM; no server/network/secret; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites; `eslint src/app/dream/1596-lectio-verse --max-warnings 0` = **0**; authoritative winner-only `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `page.js` (38.6 kB) + `"/dream/1596-lectio-verse"` in BOTH `routes-manifest.json` and `app-path-routes-manifest.json` (plain `npm run build` compiles+lints+typechecks clean but dies at "Collecting page data" on the standing ~700-route **EMFILE** fd-ceiling вҖ” infra, absent on Vercel); no `1594`/`1598` leaked into the build (grep=0). **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless container вҖ” no browser/speakers/audio-file): the felt onsetвҶ’word tightness, whether one-word-per-note reads as "the piano reading the text," and legibility at a 06:30 phone glance want Karel's Chrome; the seeded auto-read + under-bed drone guarantee it's never blank/silent. Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-builder fire (ONE concept вҖ” *the reading-light codex that score-follows real audio* вҖ” via three score-follow mechanisms); banked **вӯҗвӯҗ `1598-cantor-light`** (TOP ship-next / winner's cycle-3 вҖ” the OLTW **tempo-tracker**: a lightweight online-time-warp follower that tracks accelerando/ritardando with a live BPM readout, the most faithful to this cycle's Matchmaker/OLTW research anchor; de-selected only because discrete one-word-per-note is more legible + surprising + robust unattended than continuous tempo-tracking against a generative score) + **вӯҗ `1594-reading-light`** (the RMS-envelope follower вҖ” loudnessвҶ’descent-speed, the robust baseline / a selectable "dynamics" follower mode; de-selected as the coarsest coupling вҖ” dynamics, not phrasing) вҶ’ IDEAS В§763. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1596-lectio-verse/README.md`

### [1648-mitosis](/dream/1648-mitosis) В· adult / **artificial-life вҖ” a self-organizing colony, off the violet AND off the cosmic-gravity/embodied runs (NOT psychedelic, NOT gravity, NOT body, NOT voice)** В· **autonomous long-form generative + keyboard-morph (Space/R/вҶ‘вҶ“/1-2-3 вҖ” NOT touch/pointer, NOT mic/voice)** / **three.js points cloud + UnrealBloom postprocessing (luminous violetвҶ’magentaвҶ’warm-white protoplasm) + self-playing granular JI drone** В· cycle 771 В· DEEP-winner (2026-07-14) В· demoable В· `state: artificial-life / self-organizing cell-colony В· pole: cosmic-ambient (alive, microscopic)`
**A colony of digital cells organizes itself into a living membrane, divides, and the whole self-organization plays itself as a granular choir.** The lab's first-ever **Particle Lenia** (Alexander Mordvintsev, 2023 вҖ” the energy-gradient *particle* variant of Bert Chan's Lenia continuous cellular automata; kin to arXiv **2601.16096** *Neural Particle Automata*, Jan-2026, this cycle's В§771 research anchor). ~340 particles each descend a scalar energy field `E = R(repulsion) вҲ’ G(growth)` (canonical `mu_k=4, sigma_k=1, w_k=0.022, mu_g=0.6, sigma_g=0.15, c_rep=1, dt=0.1`, central-finite-difference gradient, 2 substeps/frame) вҖ” a Gaussian blob collapses then blooms into the canonical hollow-ring cell; nudging the growth centre `mu_g` up buds it into several cells (**mitosis**), down into one big vacuole. **The four wired subsystems** (ambition #2, exceeded): CPU Particle-Lenia sim (`lenia.ts`) вҶ’ three.js additive points render вҶ’ **UnrealBloom** `EffectComposer` glow вҶ’ Web Audio granular drone вҖ” each driving the next. **See=hear weld:** the field's smoothed statistics ARE the score вҖ” **cluster count вҶ’ number of active drone voices** (a split audibly blooms a new voice), field/kinetic energy вҶ’ grain density + lowpass brightness (energy spikes during reorganization, settles as the cell stabilizes), mean cell radius вҶ’ root pitch (bigger = lower, glided), membrane sharpness вҶ’ high-partial shimmer; JI bed at `1 : 3/2 : 2 : 3 : 5/2` under a look-ahead grain scheduler вҶ’ lowpass вҶ’ convolution reverb. **Long-form generative (categorical-menu lane, thin):** it plays itself and is genuinely *different at minute 5 than second 5* вҖ” organize вҶ’ membrane вҶ’ divide вҶ’ merge, an emergent (not scripted) arc, distinct from last cycle's authored cinematic 1638-reel. **Interaction (dodges the cycle's banned touch/pointer input):** autonomous + keyboard вҖ” Space pause/resume, R rebirth, вҶ‘/вҶ“ morph `mu_g`, 1/2/3 regime jumps (single cell В· dividing colony В· hollow vacuole). **Named refs (ambition #3, README):** Mordvintsev's Particle Lenia В· Bert Chan's Lenia В· Neural Particle Automata (2601.16096). **Ambition вҖ” honest 4/5:** **#1** never-used technique (**Particle Lenia вҖ” grep-0Г—**; grid Lenia is 7Г— but the particle formulation, "Mordvintsev", "SmoothLife" are all 0Г— вҖ” the first clean #1 in many cycles) + **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (4, integrated) + **#3** named refs + **#5-soft** В§771 NPA/Particle-Lenia dive (conceptual trigger; NOT <14-day вҖ” NPA is Jan-2026, logged straight). **diversity:** `banned=[touch/pointer INPUT (4Г— in last 9: 1608/1616/1622/1628) В· mic/voice INPUT (JURY 2026-07-13) В· gravity/orbital TECHNIQUE (rest the 1600/1608/1622 3Г— run)]`; `picked=[autonomous long-form + keyboard-morph INPUT В· three.js+UnrealBloom OUTPUT В· Particle-Lenia self-organization TECHNIQUE В· alive/microscopic bioluminescent PALETTE (off the violet form-constant) В· pole cosmic-ambient]` вҖ” clears every ban. **SAFETY:** no strobe вҖ” all motion is smooth particle advection + slow luminance drift, nothing in the flicker band. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + three.js; no server/network/secret; three@0.182 already a dep вҖ” zero new npm deps). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites; `eslint src/app/dream/1648-mitosis` = **0**; `tsc --noEmit` (whole project) = clean; **full `npm run build` with a reduced route set incl. this route = EXIT 0** (`/dream/1648-mitosis` static-generated, 10.6 kB / 298 kB First Load), and the authoritative all-725-route `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0** with `page.js` (42.3 kB) emitted + `"/dream/1648-mitosis"` in BOTH `routes-manifest.json` and `app-path-routes-manifest.json` (plain full-route `npm run build` compiles+lints+typechecks clean but dies at "Collecting page data" on the standing ~725-route **EMFILE** fd-ceiling вҖ” infra, 4096-fd container cap, absent on Vercel; same as cycles 756/762/763). **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless container вҖ” no GPU/display/speakers; three.js UnrealBloom + Web Audio need a real browser): the felt aliveness of the bloom, the exact mitosis legibility, and whether the voices-bloom-on-split reads clearly want Karel's Chrome; the deterministic sim + auto-play guarantee it's never blank/silent. Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-builder fire (ONE Particle-Lenia concept via 3 approaches); banked **вӯҗвӯҗ `1650-protobiont`** (voice-per-particle вҖ” the tightest possible see=hear weld: every cell is its own pooled-oscillator voice on a stacked-fifths scale, TOP ship-next) + **вӯҗ `1646-cell-choir`** (raw-WebGL2 5-sector additive choir, the render-robust no-three.js variant) вҶ’ IDEAS В§771. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1648-mitosis/README.md`

### [1656-the-toll](/dream/1656-the-toll) В· adult / **conceptual-critical вҖ” a piece you can only hear while you pay the toll of attention (NOT psychedelic, NOT a pretty-visualizer; comments on the attention economy)** В· **sustained-attention HOLD (spacebar / press-and-hold the field) + deterministic ghost-hand auto-demo вҖ” NOT mic/voice, NOT touch/pointer-drag, NOT keyboard-steer, NOT camera** / **austere typographic DOM (one large state line + hairline violet meter + mono "what you let go" receipt on a dark field) вҖ” NO Canvas2D, NO three.js/WebGL, NO GPU render** В· cycle 772 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-14) В· demoable В· `state: attention-as-cost long-form generative critique В· pole: conceptual/critical (off-violet, off-GPU)`
**A long-form generative piece that only advances while you hold вҖ” release, and it dissolves; almost no one holds long enough to hear the end.** Winner of a WIDE 3-explorer fire (Karel's-real-piano В· living-earth-data В· conceptual-critical) and the first real entry in the 2026-07-13 jury's **emptiest named menu lane** вҖ” conceptual/critical, "a recording you can't hear without doing something costly." **The pick FLIPPED during curation:** a whole-lab prior-art grep showed the other two explorers were near-duplicates of already-shipped pieces вҖ” `1652-path-codex` (real-piano onset вҶ’ illuminated SVG manuscript) rebuilds the shipped `1596-lectio-verse` reading-light score-follower, and `1654-terraphone` (live-USGS seismic organ) rebuilds `1193-tremor-core` + `233-earth-pulse` вҖ” the "same soul, new substrate" trap the jury warns against; `1656` was the only genuinely-distinct soul, so it shipped. **How it works:** holding a single sustained gesture (spacebar, or press-and-hold anywhere on the field) is "the toll" вҖ” a small, boring, real cost of continuous attention. An attention meter integrates held-time (off `AudioContext.currentTime` deltas, never wall clock) at 1s/s; **releasing erodes it at 0.6s/s** (you slide backward, you don't hard-reset) while a fast "veil" gain snaps the *sound* to silence вҖ” two timescales that make the cost legible. **The music (long-form, real memory):** six named movements (a single held tone вҶ’ the motif enters вҶ’ answered a 5th up вҶ’ an inverted countermelody вҶ’ the climb вҶ’ **tonic home at ~250s**), one just-intonation motif returning transformed across them, voices cross-fading in via smoothstep weights вҶ’ genuinely **different at minute-5 than second-5** (the thin "long-form generative with state+memory" categorical lane). Reaching 250s prints a resolution line **most visitors will never see because they let go**; every release prints a receipt-style "what you let go" line ("you held 47s вҖ” the third movement was 20s away"), accumulating like a till roll. **The visual IS the medium вҖ” austere typography:** one large hero line that *is* the current state (its opacity/tracking/weight ARE the attention meter made typographic вҖ” loose and faint when neglected, tight and present when paid for), a hairline violet meter, the mono receipt on a dark field. No canvas, no WebGL, no particles вҖ” restraint is the point. **Self-demonstrating unattended (the 06:30 fit):** after a 3s no-input grace a deterministic `GHOST_SCRIPT` (hold 18s / release 4s / hold 30sвҖҰ) drives the toll so the piece audibly climbs, decays on each scripted release, and prints receipts with zero input; the instant a real gesture arrives the ghost yields **permanently** (badge: "you have the toll" vs "ghost is holding вҖ” press space to take over"). Master chain: every note вҶ’ veil вҶ’ master `GainNode` (0.14) вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` вҶ’ destination, all ramps (no clicks on hold/release); full teardown (RAF cancel + listeners removed + engine disposed + `ctx.close()`) on unmount; spacebar `preventDefault` so it never scrolls. **Deterministic:** seeded `mulberry32` for micro-detune only; **no** `Math.random`/`Date.now`/`new Date` (verified). **Named refs:** John Cage *4вҖІ33вҖі* В· Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening* В· Jenny Odell *How to Do Nothing*; research-chained to this cycle's В§772 dive (audio-to-score alignment arxiv 2605.20014 seeded the sibling brief; the conceptual lane came from the jury's #5). **Ambition вҖ” honest 3/5:** **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (attention-hold state machine + long-form generative score with a returning/transformed motif + fast-veil/slow-erosion decay engine + typographic-DOM render = 4, coupled each frame) + **#3** named refs above + **#4** long-form stateful with real memory (motif transformed to a tonic homecoming; minute-5 вү  second-5). **#1 NOT claimed** вҖ” conceptual/attention pieces have faint prior lab presence (1190-quietude); the fresh weld is attention-as-toll with erosion + an unreachable resolution. **#5 NOT claimed** вҖ” 14th straight <14-day dry. **diversity:** `banned=[mic/voice-INPUT В· touch/pointer-INPUT(4Г—) В· Canvas2D-render В· three.js/WebGL GPU-render OUTPUT(7Г—) В· voiceвҶ’JIвҶ’form-constant ENGINE В· cosmic-gravity ENGINE В· iridescent-violet+KlГјver PALETTE]`; `picked=[sustained-attention-HOLD INPUT (binary attention-cost, NOT touch/pointer-drag, NOT keyboard-steer) В· typographic-DOM OUTPUT (off-GPU) В· attention-state long-form ENGINE В· ink-monochrome off-violet PALETTE В· pole conceptual/critical]` вҖ” clears every hard ban AND breaks the recent 7Г— GPU-render run. **SAFETY:** no strobe вҖ” only gentle 500ms opacity/tracking transitions, nothing in the flicker band. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + DOM; no server/network/secret; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites; `eslint src/app/dream/1656-the-toll --max-warnings 0` = **0**; authoritative winner-only `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `page.js` (28.4 kB) + `"/dream/1656-the-toll"` in BOTH `routes-manifest.json` and `app-path-routes-manifest.json` (plain `npm run build` compiles+lints+typechecks clean but dies at "Collecting page data" on the standing ~725-route **EMFILE** fd-ceiling вҖ” infra, 4096-fd container cap, absent on Vercel; same as cycles 756/762/767/768/771); no `1652`/`1654` leaked (grep=0). **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless container вҖ” no display/speakers): whether the motif transformation reads as a genuine arc, whether erode-on-release feels legible rather than punitive, and whether the austere anti-spectacle surface holds attention at a 06:30 glance want Karel's Chrome; the deterministic ghost hand guarantees it's never blank/silent. Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **вӯҗвӯҗ `1652-path-codex`** (Karel's real Path piano score-followed into a self-illuminating SVG medieval codex вҖ” a fresh render surface but overlaps the shipped 1596-lectio-verse reading-light; resurrect only from a distinct angle) + **вӯҗ `1654-terraphone`** (live-USGS awe-pole seismic organ, deterministic replay-sim headless вҖ” resolves the ledger-organ brand tension but overlaps the shipped 1193-tremor-core / 233-earth-pulse; the data-lane ship needs a feed the lab hasn't sonified) вҶ’ IDEAS В§772. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1656-the-toll/README.md`

### [1670-species-loom](/dream/1670-species-loom) В· adult / **music-theory engine вҖ” the species-LAWFUL cycle-2 of 1660-fugue-loom (fold the verified fux-machine rule engine in; "the rule is the star" вҖ” NOT a pretty-visualizer, NOT JI-drone bed, NOT gravity, NOT cosmic)** В· **keyboard-PLAYED subject (home row = D-dorian, top row = accidentals) + deterministic ghost auto-demo вҖ” real agency, NOT zero-input/watch-only, NOT touch/pointer, NOT mic/voice** / **self-writing SVG two/three-stave manuscript with red struck-through veto noteheads вҖ” NO Canvas2D, NO WebGL/three.js, off-GPU** В· cycle 775 В· DEEP-winner (2026-07-14) В· demoable В· `state: verified species-counterpoint machine that shows its rules В· pole: lawful/composerly/played`
**You play a subject, and a machine grows it into voices whose every note is chosen to obey real species-counterpoint rules вҖ” the illegal moves flashing red and vetoed on the score in front of you.** The **species-lawful cycle-2** of `1660-fugue-loom` (a convincing but not academically-lawful self-playing fugue), cashing the fresh 2026-07-14 jury's **#3 provocation verbatim** вҖ” *"fold the banked verified `fux-machine` rule engine in to make the voice-leading genuinely species-lawful; stop banking the cycle-2, ship the follow-through (criterion #4 is the weakest-honored floor criterion)"* вҖ” WHILE staying inside the jury's two louder notes: species counterpoint is rule-*governed dissonance treatment* (real second-species passing tones, the anti-wash вҶ’ #1's "real dissonance"), and the subject is **PLAYED**, not zero-input (вҶ’ #2's "demand real agency, no watch-only relapse"). **How the rule engine works (`engine.ts`):** the played subject becomes a cantus firmus; a **backtracking legal-set constraint search** grows two voices note-by-note вҖ” at each bar it enumerates in-scale candidates, keeps only those passing every rule, scores survivors (favouring contrary + stepwise motion + fuller imperfect consonances), tries them in seeded order, and **backtracks** when a bar has no legal continuation. Rules: **consonance on downbeats** (perfect 1/5/8 + imperfect 3/6 only; 2nds, 4th-against-bass, tritone, 7ths rejected) В· **no parallel or hidden perfects** (parallels between every voice pair; hidden/direct perfects policed on the outer pair вҖ” the standard 3-voice relaxation) В· **melody** mostly stepwise, consonant leaps вүӨ octave, no aug/dim leaps, no two big leaps in a row В· **second species (2:1)** in the lower voice with weak-beat dissonance licensed *only* as a passing tone (tagged `pt`) В· a fixed **clausula vera / authentic cadence** (leading-tone C#вҶ’D into the final D octave). **The see=hear weld вҖ” vetoes you can watch:** a rejected parallel/hidden-perfect candidate is drawn on the self-writing SVG manuscript as a **red, struck-through ghost notehead** (`вҲҘ5`, `вҲҘ8`, `вҶ’5`) exactly as the playhead reaches that bar; vertical intervals are labelled (`M6`, `P5`, `m3`, `pt`вҖҰ) as each note sounds. **Independent verification (not decorative):** a *separate* `verify()` pass re-scans every vertical (downbeats + parallel/hidden checks + every second-species weak beat) and counts violations вҖ” the live badge `verticals checked: N В· violations: 0` is that real second check, headless-verified 0 across a dozen subjects incl. accidental-laden ones at the fixed seed. **Play it:** home row `a s d f g h j k l` = D4вҶ’E5 D-dorian, top row adds the C# leading tone; play 4вҖ“10 notes вҶ’ **Compose fugue** (or **Ghost subject**), Play/Stop/Clear; on load a deterministic **ghost** composes+performs the default after a ~3 s no-input grace (badge *ghost is composing* вҶ’ *you have the subject*), yielding the instant a mapped key is pressed. **Deterministic:** every stochastic choice from a seeded **mulberry32** (constant seed) вҖ” no `Math.random`/`Date.now`/`new Date` (verified); the visual manuscript clock is **decoupled from the audio clock** (rAF-driven) so it never freezes even if autoplay gates the sound. Three panned per-voice organ-ish synth lines вҶ’ master gain вүӨ 0.13 вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor`, smoothed ramps, full teardown on unmount. **Named refs (README):** J.J. Fux *Gradus ad Parnassum* (1725) В· G. Mazzola et al. "Three-voice first-species counterpoint" arXiv 2606.01102 (2026) В· FuxCP (constraint-programming counterpoint) В· "Formulating First Species Counterpoint With Integer Programming"; research-chained to this cycle's В§775 dive (Strasheela real-time constraint counterpoint + IP first-species вҶ’ the legal-set-search-with-visible-veto fold). **Ambition вҖ” honest 3/5:** **#4** declared cycle-2 of 1660 (the jury's named weakest-honored criterion, cashed вҖ” cycle-3 = fold this verified engine into 1660's full fugal architecture, previewed by the banked 1674) + **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (verified voice-leading constraint search + independent verifier + played-subject/ghost state machine + polyphonic synth + self-writing SVG manuscript = 5) + **#3** named refs above. **#1 NOT claimed** вҖ” the counterpoint *engine* now exists in the lab as of 1660 (В§773); the fresh weld is the *verified, rule-visible, played* fold, not a never-used technique. **#5 NOT claimed** вҖ” **18th straight** <14-day dry (Mazzola 2606.01102 is June 2026 ~6 wks вҖ” the tightest chain in cycles but not <14d; standing widen-or-retire note holds). **diversity:** `banned=[JI-consonant-drone BED(13Г—) В· orbital-gravity ENGINE В· zero-input/watch-only INPUT(4Г—) В· cosmic palette В· WebGL/three.js OUTPUT(on-watch 5Г—) В· touch/pointer INPUT(on-watch 6Г—)]`; `picked=[keyboard-PLAYED subject INPUT (real agency вҖ” NOT watch-only, NOT touch/pointer, NOT mic, NOT cosmic) В· SVG self-writing-manuscript OUTPUT (off-GPU, off the on-watch three.js creep) В· verified-species-counterpoint ENGINE (rule-governed real DISSONANCE treatment вҖ” NOT the JI-drone BED, NOT gravity) В· ink-on-parchment off-violet PALETTE В· pole lawful/composerly/played]` вҖ” clears every hard ban AND cashes jury #3 while staying inside #1+#2. **SAFETY:** no strobe вҖ” the red veto flash is a small, local, slow notehead element; luminance change well under the flicker band; `prefers-reduced-motion` respected. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + SVG/DOM; no server/network/secret; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites (already on-brand, violet the sole chrome accent; parchment/red live only inside the SVG art); `eslint src/app/dream/1670-species-loom --max-warnings 0` = **0**; authoritative winner-only `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **Compiled (warnings only, all pre-existing in unrelated `src/lib/*`/older prototypes)**, `page.js` emitted + `"/dream/1670-species-loom"` in BOTH `routes-manifest.json` and `app-path-routes-manifest.json` (plain `npm run build` compiles+lints+typechecks clean but dies at "Collecting page data" on the standing ~730-route **EMFILE** fd-ceiling вҖ” infra, 4096-fd container cap, absent on Vercel; same as cycles 756/762/767вҖ“774); no `1672`/`1674` leaked (grep=0). **NOT ear/eye-verified for feel** (headless container вҖ” no display/speakers): whether the played-subject вҶ’ lawful-voices development reads as musically satisfying (vs merely correct) by ear, and whether the red-veto + interval labels read legibly at a 06:30 glance, want Karel's Chrome; the deterministic ghost + decoupled visual clock guarantee it's never blank/silent and exercise the identical playвҶ’composeвҶ’verifyвҶ’render path. Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-approach fire (ONE concept вҖ” *a species-lawful counterpoint machine with real agency* вҖ” via played-subject fugue / live-CF duet / real-piano-seeded fugue); banked **вӯҗвӯҗ `1674-path-fugue`** (the fuller *fugal* version вҖ” real-piano subject extraction via onset+f0, tonal answer at the fifth + frozen-subject memory, 0 violations/400 subjects; the winner's **cycle-3** [fold this engine into fugal form] + cashes the OTHER half of jury #3 [seed from Karel's real music]; TOP ship-next) + **вӯҗ `1672-fux-duet`** (max-agency live **played** counterpoint tutor вҖ” you play a cantus firmus, the solver answers lawfully note-by-note with the legal-candidate set shown + illegal ones vetoed red; the direct answer to jury #2, a "played instrument" night; 2-voice duet w/ neighbour-tone-not-passing-tone dissonance) вҶ’ IDEAS В§775. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1670-species-loom/README.md`

### [1682-cadence-forge](/dream/1682-cadence-forge) В· adult / **music-theory engine вҖ” a PLAYED equal-tempered functional-harmony instrument that modulates and BITES (cashes JURY 2026-07-14 #1's last literal example "an equal-tempered one that actually modulates and bites"; NOT a JI-drone bed, NOT gravity, NOT cosmic)** В· **keyboard-PLAYED roman numerals (home row I ii iii IV V vi viiВ°; Shift = applied secondary dominants; L=viiВ°7; M/Space = pivot-chord modulation; N = deceptive cadence) + deterministic ghost auto-demo вҖ” real agency, NOT zero-input/watch-only, NOT touch/pointer, NOT mic** / **Canvas2D tension ribbon + live TIV component breakdown вҖ” NO three.js/WebGL, off-GPU** В· cycle 777 В· DEEP-winner (2026-07-14) В· demoable В· `state: functional-harmony tension engine that shows its math В· pole: composerly/played, real ET tension (not JI wash)`
**Play scale-degree roman numerals and hear real functional harmony pull and resolve вҖ” while a numerically-grounded tonal-tension curve rises on the dominants and drops home on the tonic.** The lab's first **functional-harmony tension engine** and the DEEP-winner cash of the fresh 2026-07-14 jury's **#1 note** вҖ” "break the just-intonation consonance reflex; 13 of 15 pieces resolve to a pretty JI wash; force an **equal-tempered one that actually modulates and bites**" (the last uncashed of jury #1's four named examples; 774-bytemill cashed *noise/glitch*, 775-species-loom *real dissonance treatment*, 776-tabla-loom *percussion/beat-driven*). Finally ships the banked вӯҗвӯҗ`1678-tension-cell` (В§776 TOP ship-next) concept. **How it works:** home row `A S D F G H J` = the seven diatonic triads (I ii iii IV V vi viiВ°) in the current key; each is realized by a real **4-voice SATB voice-leading search** (common tones held, upper voices minimized, chord coverage preferred вҖ” not stacked root triads); `Shift`+key fires an **applied/secondary dominant** (V7/x, real tritone), `K`=V7, `L`=viiВ°7 (fully-diminished), `M`/Space **modulates** via pivot chord to a related key (updating the on-screen key), `N` = **deceptive cadence** (V7вҶ’vi). **The tension math is real, not hand-waved:** every chord's tension is the published **TIV weighted scalar** (Navarro-CГЎceres & Bernardes, *Entropy* 2020) вҖ” dissonance Г—0.402 + hierarchical-tension Г—0.246 + tonal-distance Г—0.202 + voice-leading-motion Г—0.193, /1.043 вҖ” drawn as a scrolling Canvas2D ribbon with в–Іpeak/в–Ҫdip labels PLUS a live per-component breakdown panel, so you see exactly which of the four terms is biting. Audio is pure Web Audio 12-TET (saw+sine per voice, ADSR) вҶ’ master gain 0.12 вҶ’ lowpass вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor`. **Deterministic ghost self-demo:** a frame-counter clock (no `Math.random`/`Date.now`/`new Date`/wall-clock in executable code вҖ” verified) self-plays `IвҖ“viвҖ“IVвҖ“V7/VвҖ“V7вҖ“I` then modulates and drops a deceptive cadence, decoupled from the audio clock so the ribbon animates even before/without audio; graceful `text-destructive` notice if AudioContext is missing. **Ambition вҖ” honest 3/5:** **#1** first functional-harmony tension engine (grep-0Г— for functional-harmony/roman-numeral/Lerdahl across the lab) + **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (functional-harmony realizer + SATB voice-leader + TIV tension model + Canvas2D ribbon/breakdown render = 4) + **#3** named refs (Fred Lerdahl *Tonal Pitch Space* 2001 В· the TIV tonal-tension model *Entropy* 2020 В· Mapping Tonal Harmony Pro). **#5 NOT claimed** вҖ” 19th straight <14-day dry (freshest on-concept find = Mapping THP 5.1 at ~6 wks; TIV foundational-2020; foundational-technique exception invoked). **diversity:** `banned=[JI-consonant-drone BED(jury #1) В· zero-input/watch-only(jury #2) В· orbital-gravity В· cosmic-space palette В· (on-watch) three.js OUTPUT]`; `picked=[keyboard-PLAYED numerals INPUT (real agency, NOT watch-only, NOT touch/pointer, NOT mic, NOT cosmic) В· equal-tempered FUNCTIONAL-HARMONY tension ENGINE (secondary dominants/tritones/modulation вҖ” the literal anti-JI, NOT a drone bed) В· Canvas2D tension-ribbon OUTPUT (NOT three.js) В· violet-tension PALETTE (NOT cosmic)]` вҖ” clears every hard ban AND cashes jury #1 inside #2. **SAFETY:** no strobe вҖ” the ribbon is a slow scrolling curve, luminance well under the flicker band. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + Canvas2D;
