no server/network/secret; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites (already on-brand, violet the sole chrome accent); `eslint src/app/dream/1682-cadence-forge --max-warnings 0` = **0**; authoritative winner-only `rm -rf .next && npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0** (this cycle even the page-data step passed вҖ” no EMFILE), `page.js` emitted + `"/dream/1682-cadence-forge"` in BOTH `routes-manifest.json` and `app-path-routes-manifest.json`; no `1684`/`1686` leaked (grep=0). **NOT ear/eye-verified for feel** (headless container вҖ” no display/speakers): whether the applied-dominant/deceptive-cadence bite reads as musically satisfying by ear, and whether the TIV ribbon + breakdown read legibly at a 06:30 glance, want Karel's Chrome; the deterministic ghost + decoupled visual clock guarantee it's never blank/silent and exercise the identical playвҶ’voiceвҶ’tensionвҶ’render path. Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-approach fire (ONE concept вҖ” *played ET functional harmony that modulates and bites* вҖ” via play-the-numeral / sculpt-the-roughness / play-the-bassline); banked **вӯҗвӯҗ `1684-roughness-organ`** (the lab's first psychoacoustic sensory-dissonance engine вҖ” Plomp-Levelt/Sethares roughness computed on real partials, the universal-hump viz with a live dot per partial pair; highest surprise, but sculpts a chord's bite without modulating keys вҶ’ TOP ship-next for the perceptual lane) + **вӯҗ `1686-figured-bass`** (a played real-time reharmonizer/continuo вҖ” you play a bass line, the machine harmonizes each beat with functional chords biased by a heat knob, modulating by fifths; cashes both halves but the machine makes the interesting choice вҶ’ a "play a line" night) вҶ’ IDEAS В§777. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1682-cadence-forge/README.md`

### [1726-drum-trance](/dream/1726-drum-trance) В· adult / **shamanic theta auditory-driving вҖ” a drum-trance field where the STEADINESS of your ~4 Hz beat is the reward (direct build of the В§784 research dive: Aparicio-TerrГ©s *Sci.Rep.* 16:10204, 2026-03-26, "neural tracking at theta predicts drumming-induced ASC"); breaks JURY 2026-07-14 #1 (rhythm/grit, NOT a JI-drone bed) + #2 (real agency, NOT watch-only)** В· **MULTI-TOUCH/pointer frame-drum pads (+ Space/F/J/K, + deterministic 4.2 Hz ghost drummer) вҖ” you PLAY the beat, real agency, NOT keyboard-melody, NOT zero-input/watch-only** / **Canvas2D KlГјver form-constant field (imports `_shared/psych/logpolar`) вҖ” NO WebGL/three.js, breaks the 4Г— raw-GPU streak (1700/1708/1714/1722)** В· cycle 784 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-15) В· demoable В· `state: shamanic theta-entrainment trance В· pole: intense`
**Tap the drums steadily near four beats a second and the psychedelic geometry locks in вҖ” hold a wobbly beat and it scatters back to grey; the visual IS a biofeedback readout of how well you're entraining.** The lab's first **closed theta-entrainment reward loop**, and the direct implementation of this cycle's fresh 2026 research: Aparicio-TerrГ©s et al., *Scientific Reports* 16:10204 (2026-03-26) found that the strength of the brain's *phase-lock* (neural tracking) to a steady ~4 beats/sec (theta-band) drum pulse вҖ” not merely the presence of a 4 Hz beat вҖ” predicts the depth of the drumming-induced altered state. So the piece rewards **steadiness**, not noise. **5 subsystems:** (1) **multi-touch/pointer frame-drum pads** вҖ” 4 large tappable zones (center skin + rims), playable by tap/multi-touch/click, plus Space/F/J/K for laptop review вҖ” the user physically plays the rhythm (real agency, jury #2); (2) **modal membrane-drum synthesis** (`audio.ts`) вҖ” each hit = a noise burst through a bandpass into 2вҖ“3 **detuned inharmonic modal resonators** at Bessel-like ratios (1 : 1.59 : 2.14) with fixed per-partial cent detune вҖ” short, punchy, deliberately NOT a consonant sustained chord (breaks jury #1's JI-drone ban; distinct pitch/timbre per pad); (3) **theta-steadiness tracker** вҖ” measures inter-onset intervals, computes closeness to ~4 bps AND low-variance steadiness, maintains a smoothed entrainment scalar EвҲҲ[0,1] that RISES on steady locked beating and DECAYS on erratic/stopped hits; (4) **KlГјver form-constant field** (`field.ts`, Canvas2D) вҖ” a full-screen tunnelвҶ’spiralвҶ’honeycomb form-constant field built on the shared `formConstant`/`honeycomb` log-polar helpers whose intensity/contrast/coherence scale with E (erratic = dim grey scattered tunnel; deep lock = brilliant honeycomb + peripheral white-out boundary-dissolution), pulsing on each hit; (5) **entrainment-reward loop** вҖ” a mono readout of tempo/lock%/form closes the loop, and rising E escalates the form-constant complexity вҖ” trance depth as an *earned* reward. **Deterministic + headless self-demo:** a 4.2 Hz **ghost drummer** auto-plays from mount (integer frame counter; excitation noise from a fixed-seed mulberry32; `ctx.currentTime` only for audio scheduling вҖ” no `Math.random`/`Date.now`/`new Date`/`performance.now` in the state/audio/animation path, verified), driving lock toward ~90% (bright honeycomb) so the piece is never blank/silent on the headless 06:30 box; it yields the moment the user taps and resumes after ~3.5 s of silence. **SAFETY:** no strobe вҖ” beat flashes are gentle local luminance pulses (the ~4 Hz beat is audio-only; the full screen never flashes at 4 Hz); `prefersReducedMotion()` honored. **Ambition вҖ” honest 2вҖ“3/5:** **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (touch-drum input + modal-percussion synth + theta-steadiness tracker + Canvas2D form-constant render + entrainment-reward loop = 5) + **#3** named refs (Aparicio-TerrГ©s *Sci.Rep.* 2026 4-bps theta В· Neher 1961 "auditory driving" В· Maxfield 1990 rhythmic-drumming EEG В· Harner *Way of the Shaman* В· KlГјver form constants) + research-cited to the В§784 theta-tracking dive (path (a): today's research вҶ’ tonight's build). **#1 NOT claimed** вҖ” percussion/drum synthesis + form-constants are owned; the fresh axis is the *combination* (the lab's first closed drumвҶ’theta-steadinessвҶ’form-constant reward loop). **#5 NOT claimed вҖ” 26th straight** <14-day dry (Nature paper 2026-03-26 вүҲ 3.5 mo). **diversity:** `banned=[keyboard-PLAYED INPUT(4Г—) В· zero-input/watch-only(jury#2) В· JI-consonant-drone BED(jury#1) В· orbital-gravity В· cosmic-STARFIELD palette В· (on-watch) raw-WebGL2/three.js OUTPUT(4Г—) + instrument-DSP + harmony-engine TECHNIQUE]`; `picked=[multi-touch drum INPUT (real agency, non-keyboard, non-watch-only) В· modal-percussion + theta-entrainment TECHNIQUE (NOT instrument-DSP-melodic, NOT harmony-engine, NOT JI drone) В· Canvas2D form-constant OUTPUT (NOT raw-WebGL2/three.js вҖ” breaks the 4Г— GPU streak) В· firelit-ember PALETTE (NOT cosmic-starfield)]` вҖ” clears every hard ban on all four axes AND directly executes jury #1 (rhythm/grit) + #2 (agency). **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + Canvas2D; no server/network/secret; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites (on-brand вҖ” violet the sole chrome accent; ember colors live only inside canvas draw strings); `eslint src/app/dream/1726-drum-trance --max-warnings 0` = **0**; `npm run build` compiles+lints+typechecks clean (only pre-existing `src/lib/*`/older-proto warnings) but dies at "Collecting page data" on the standing 4096-fd **EMFILE** (infra, absent on Vercel); authoritative winner-only `rm -rf .next && npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `page.js` + `page_client-reference-manifest.js` emitted + `"/dream/1726-drum-trance"` in BOTH `routes-manifest.json` and `app-path-routes-manifest.json`; no `1728`/`1730` leaked (grep=0). **NOT ear/eye/mic-verified for feel** (headless container вҖ” no display/speakers/touch): whether the drumвҶ’form-constant lock reads as genuinely *entraining* (vs a generic beat-reactive field) and whether the ~4 Hz steadiness reward feels earned wants Karel's Chrome + a real touchscreen; the deterministic ghost drummer guarantees it's never blank/silent and exercises the identical hitвҶ’entrainmentвҶ’fieldвҶ’audio path. NB the frame counter as tempo clock makes real-user Hz slightly display-refresh-dependent (noted in README). Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-piece rhythm/grit/dissonance fire (the anti-JI-drone night); banked **вӯҗвӯҗ `1728-fracture`** (audio-file-drop bitcrush/granular-grit datamosh вҖ” `bitcrush 0Г— in lab`, the purest "put grit in the EAR" answer; ship next to keep the ear un-calcified) + **вӯҗ `1730-groove-lock`** (mic clapвҶ’tempo-lock generative dub-techno groove with modulating tritone/b9 ET stabs вҖ” the textbook "ET that modulates and bites") вҶ’ IDEAS В§784. ### [1732-fracture](/dream/1732-fracture) В· adult / **drop any track and hear it FRACTURE into gritty dissonant lo-fi ruin while the image datamoshes into DMT hyper-detail вҖ” bit-crush QUANTIZATION as the headline instrument; direct build of the В§785 research dive (ArtifactNet arXiv 2604.16254, 2026-04-20: every 2024вҖ“26 AI-music generator runs on Residual-Vector-Quantization вҖ” bitcrush is its audible-artifact ancestor); breaks JURY 2026-07-14 #1 (grit/dissonance, NOT a JI-drone bed) + #2 (real drop-and-shape agency, NOT watch-only)** В· **AUDIO-FILE-DROP (drag/drop + `<input type=file>` вҶ’ `decodeAudioData` вҶ’ looping source; + a built-in deterministic DISSONANT carrier at m2/tritone/M7 so it self-demos headless) вҖ” resurrects audio-file input from 0Г— in the last-10, non-keyboard/mic/touch/camera/tilt** / **Canvas2D feedback-displacement datamosh (`ScriptProcessorNode` bit-depth quantize to 2-bit + sample-rate hold = `bitcrush` 0Г— in the lab; bassвҶ’slice displacement, midвҶ’flow dir, highвҶ’chromatic split; 2Г—2 mirror kaleidoscope + nested half-scale mirror), Ikeda data-monochrome + one hot accent вҖ” NO WebGL/three.js (respects the 4Г— raw-GPU ban 1700/1708/1714/1722)** В· cycle 785 В· DEEP-winner (2026-07-15) В· demoable В· `state: DMT-hyperdetail-fracture В· pole: intense`
**Drop any track вҖ” or let the built-in dissonant carrier play вҖ” and watch/hear it fracture: the audio bit-crushed to as few as 2 bits with sample-rate decimation (a grit slider dials both from shimmer to ruin) while a pure-Canvas2D feedback-displacement datamosh tears the image into mirror-tiled machine-elf hyper-detail.** The lab's **first-ever `bitcrush`** (amplitude quantization greps 0Г— across the 1700-deep lab) вҖ” and the conceptual anchor is fresh: bitcrush is the audible-artifact *ancestor* of the Residual-Vector-Quantization (codebook quantization) every 2024вҖ“26 AI music generator (Suno/Udio/Stable Audio/MusicGen/Riffusion) is built on (ArtifactNet, arXiv 2604.16254, 2026-04-20). The **grit engine** is a self-contained `ScriptProcessorNode` (buffer 2048): each sample rounded to N bits (down to 2) + held for up to ~24 input samples, wired analyserвҶ’`DynamicsCompressor`вҶ’low master (0.12 carrier / 0.2 file)вҶ’destination. **See = hear:** the datamosh feedback buffer taps the *post-crush* signal вҖ” bass drives horizontal slice-displacement magnitude, mid the flow direction, high the chromatic split/detail; a 2Г—2 mirror kaleidoscope + a nested half-scale mirror give "machine-elf" density; luminance-clamped (no strobe). **Never blank/silent:** a deterministic dissonant carrier (detuned beating saws + sub + band-passed noise on minor-2nds/tritones/major-7ths, pattern from an integer frame counter + `Math.sin`) auto-plays so the headless 06:30 box hears+sees it; drop your own file to fracture it (decode fail вҶ’ `text-destructive`, carrier keeps playing). **Named refs (README):** Rosa Menkman *Glitch Studies Manifesto* (2011) В· Ryoji Ikeda *data.matrix* / *test pattern* В· datamosh I-frame displacement В· DMT hyper-detail "machine-elf" phenomenology В· ArtifactNet arXiv 2604.16254 (2026, RVQ codebook quantization). **Ambition вҖ” honest 2вҖ“3/5:** **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (audio-file input + FFT band reader + bitcrush/SR-reduce re-synth + Canvas2D feedback-displacement datamosh + dissonant carrier = 5) + **#3** named refs above; research-cited to the В§785 RVQ-quantization dive (path (a) вҖ” today's research вҶ’ tonight's build; also (c) cashes the В§784 вӯҗвӯҗ bank). **#1 NOT claimed** вҖ” glitch/datamosh is *visually* owned (10Г—/3Г— in INDEX); the fresh axis is the **`bitcrush`-0Г— audio** + the closed FFTвҶ’displacement weld. **#5 NOT claimed вҖ” 27th straight** <14-day dry (ArtifactNet ~3mo). **diversity:** `banned=[keyboard-PLAYED(3Г—,watch) В· zero-input/watch-only(jury#2) В· JI-consonant-drone BED(jury#1) В· orbital-gravity(jury) В· cosmic-STARFIELD(jury) В· raw-WebGL2/three.js OUTPUT(4Г— HARD ban) В· instrument-DSP-synth(3Г—)+harmony-engine(3Г—)] В· picked=[audio-file-drop INPUT (resurrected 0Г—) В· bitcrush-quantization TECHNIQUE (audio-DESTRUCTION not synthesis/harmony/JI-drone; 0Г—) В· Canvas2D datamosh OUTPUT (respects the 4Г— GPU ban) В· Ikeda data-monochrome PALETTE (NOT starfield) В· grit/dissonance + drop-and-shape agency (answers jury #1 + #2)]` вҖ” clears every hard ban on all four axes. **SAFETY:** no strobe (luminance-clamped slice/feedback motion, no full-frame flips in the 3вҖ“30 Hz band); `prefers-reduced-motion` slows motion + reduces flashing; audio gesture-gated (ctx resumes on first tap), master through a compressor + low gain. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + Canvas2D; no server/network/secret; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** normalizer 0 rewrites; `eslint src/app/dream/1732-fracture --max-warnings 0` = **0**; `tsc --noEmit` = 0 errors in 1732; determinism grep = 0 in code. **NOT ear/eye-verified for feel** (headless container вҖ” no display/speakers): whether the crushвҶ’datamosh weld reads as genuinely *fracturing* (vs a generic FFT visualizer) and the grit-slider taste want Karel's Chrome + a real dropped track; the deterministic dissonant carrier + frame-counter visuals guarantee it's never blank/silent and exercise the identical decodeвҶ’crushвҶ’analyseвҶ’render path. Winner of an adult **DEEP** 3-approach "FRACTURE" fire (one concept вҖ” *drop a track, fracture it into grit + datamosh* вҖ” via three grit engines: bitcrush / granular-cloud / foldback-ringmod); banked **вӯҗвӯҗ `1734-fracture-grain`** (TOP resurrect вҖ” a real look-ahead GRANULAR CLOUD, grit sweeps faithfulвҶ’dissonant grain-storm, + Canvas2D block-drag macroblock mosh; granular is love-supported вқӨ`227-paths-granular`; de-selected only because 1732 directly implements *this cycle's* dated RVQ hook) + **вӯҗ `1736-fracture-fold`** (foldback wavefolding + ring-mod inharmonic sidebands = the purest *spectral* bite, + Canvas2D chromatic-aberration scanline tear; de-selected on 2 tsc errors at curation + glitch-visual owned) вҶ’ IDEAS В§785. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1732-fracture/README.md`

### [1740-breath-nebula](/dream/1740-breath-nebula) В· adult / psychedelic В· **mic-breath (low-band RMS envelope вҶ’ breath-phase; mic вҶ’ AnalyserNode only; deterministic ~0.1 Hz ghost breath when no mic) вҖ” NOT touch/pointer, NOT keyboard-played, NOT camera** / **WebGPU compute + render (a persistent ~150kвҖ“500k-particle storage buffer advected by a WGSL curl-noise compute shader, instanced additive render pass) вҖ” NO Canvas2D (jury-banned 7Г—), NO three.js/raw-WebGL2 вҖ” the near-0Г— substrate the jury demanded** В· cycle 786 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-15) В· demoable В· `state: cosmic-ambient nebula-tide В· pole: cosmic-ambient`
**Breathe toward the mic and a living cosmic nebula breathes with you вҖ” inhale blooms a cloud of hundreds of thousands of GPU points outward into warm-white light, exhale collapses it back into cold violet filaments.** The lab's answer to the fresh 2026-07-15 jury's three structural provocations at once: **#3 "break the Canvas2D monoculture вҖ” force a WebGPU-compute piece (still near-0Г—)"** (this is a genuine WGSL `compute` shader stepping a persistent GPU storage buffer, only ~2Г— across 1700+ prototypes), **#2 "return to the PRIMARY DIRECTION on the OTHER pole"** (cosmic-ambient, re-injected), and **#1 "leave the instrument/theory workshop"** (this is neither). **The technique:** each particle (`pos+age`, `vel+seed`) is advected every frame through a 3-D **curl-noise** flow field вҖ” the analytic curl of a value-noise vector potential, so the flow is near-divergence-free and makes filaments/sheets, not sinks вҖ” plus a **signed breath radial force** (outward on the rising in-breath, a cold inward collapse on the falling out-breath), a slow nebular swirl, damping, Euler integration, and seeded respawn on an emitter shell; a second pipeline reads the *same* buffer and expands each point into a camera-facing additive quad, coloured deep-indigoвҶ’violetвҶ’warm-white by local speed, camera auto-orbiting on a deterministic clock. **The breath:** smoothed mic low-band RMS drives the tide; with no mic a deterministic ~0.1 Hz sine keeps it breathing, alive and audible unattended. **The sound (deliberately NOT a static JI drone):** an inharmonic detuned-pair pad with per-partial detune LFOs (beating + shimmer), a filtered-noise wind rising on the in-breath, sparse Risset-ish bells on the out-breath вҶ’ compressor вҶ’ 0.15. **Named refs (README):** Robert Borghesi's *ASTRODITHER* (WebGPU + TSL audio-reactive, 2026-07-01 вҖ” the freshest anchor, a field "all signal until the music pushes it around"); the KAYAC WebGPU curl-noise 1M-particle compute demo; Refik Anadol's data-cloud aesthetic. Graceful degrade: no-WebGPU вҶ’ readable notice + audio keeps running + a DOM radial-glow pulsing with breath; mic-denied вҶ’ `text-destructive` note + ghost breath. Deterministic (integer frame counter + fixed-seed mulberry32 only; no `Math.random`/`Date`/`performance.now` in the update path), no strobe (slow luminance drift only, `prefers-reduced-motion` softens orbit + bloom). Two more altered-states pieces explored this fire (WIDE) and banked to IDEAS В§786: **вӯҗвӯҗ 1742-drift-lattice** (three.js-shader hypnagogic phosphene lattice that deepens as your room goes quiet вҖ” fills the empty DREAM pole) + **вӯҗ 1744-void-bath** (audio-only HRTF-spatialized NDE drone-void, device-tilt).

### [1746-threshold-lattice](/dream/1746-threshold-lattice) В· adult / psychedelic В· **the DREAM/hypnagogic pole the 2026-07-15 jury named EMPTY вҖ” cashes the вӯҗвӯҗ-banked В§786 seed, the direct build of the В§787 research dive (MIT Media Lab *Dormio*/Targeted-Dream-Incubation + Windt "Intrusions of a drowsy mind", Frontiers 2015: the hypnagogic threshold is an addressable interface вҖ” this INVERTS it, making the ROOM the sensor)** В· **mic AMBIENT ROOM-RMS, INVERSE mapping (reward stillness вҖ” the quieter/stiller your space, the deeper you sink; mic вҶ’ AnalyserNode only; deterministic autonomous ghost descent when no mic) вҖ” NOT touch/pointer, NOT keyboard-played, NOT breath-pitch** / **three.js fragment `ShaderMaterial` (honeycomb KlГјver form-constant lattice under an inverse log-polar retinaвҶ’V1 warp, reuses `_shared/psych/logpolar` `LOGPOLAR_GLSL`+`honeycomb`; peripheral fragmentary-image spirals; myoclonic-jerk spring-back shear) вҖ” NO Canvas2D (jury-banned 6вҖ“7Г—), NO raw-WebGL2 (В§785 4Г— ban) вҖ” off both the banned substrates** В· cycle 787 В· DEEP-winner (2026-07-15) В· demoable В· `state: hypnagogic sleep-onset descent В· pole: dream`
**Keep your room quiet and still and you sink, over ~12вҖ“15 s, through a honeycomb phosphene lattice toward the threshold of dream imagery вҖ” any sound throws you back up.** The lab's first real occupant of the DREAM/hypnagogic pole the fresh 2026-07-15 jury named empty (~0), and the direct cash of its provocation #2 ("cosmic-ambient and DREAM states are thin-to-empty вҖ” cash a banked altered-states piece"): this is the В§786-banked вӯҗвӯҗ `1742-drift-lattice` concept, resurrected off the banned Canvas2D onto a three.js `ShaderMaterial`, and it **solves the seed's known weakness** (the "quietвҶ’deeper" link used to take ~15 s to read). **The interface is the room.** Ambient-mic RMS is mapped *inversely* and split into two channels: a **fast `uStill`** channel (sub-second) drives a center-sink glow + an always-visible live stillness meter so the causeвҶ’effect reads in <5 s, and a **slow `depth`** reward with an asymmetric envelope (~13 s rise when quiet, ~0.4 s fall on any sound) drives the lattice density, warp, tint and vignette вҖ” the actual "how deep am I" state. **The technique:** a honeycomb (KlГјver's lattice form-constant) drawn in cortical space and sampled through the inverse log-polar (retinaвҶ’V1) warp, so it streams inward as you sink; peripheral spirals hint at the fragmentary half-images of hypnagogia near the threshold; a golden-angle **myoclonic-jerk (sleep-start) state machine** fires a gentle damped spring-back shear + a soft thud at a depth-modulated cadence (deeper вҶ’ a little more often). **The sound (calm dream pole, not the anti-JI grit mandate):** a seeded warm pad + dark noise wash that darkens/softens as depth rises, sparse frame-scheduled bells, low startle thuds вҶ’ compressor вҶ’ 0.12. Deterministic (integer frame counter + fixed-seed mulberry32; no `Math.random`/`Date`/`performance.now` in any state/audio/visual path), no strobe (slow luminance drift, tint clamped вүӨ0.7, `prefers-reduced-motion` softens the jerk), graceful degrade (WebGL-off вҶ’ notice + audio persists; mic-denied вҶ’ `text-destructive` + autonomous ghost descent). **Named refs (README):** KlГјver form constants (1926) В· Andreas Mavromatis *Hypnagogia* (1987) В· sleep-start/hypnic-jerk myoclonus lit В· MIT Media Lab *Dormio*/TDI (inverted). Two more hypnagogic-descent substrates explored this fire (DEEP) and banked to IDEAS В§787: **вӯҗвӯҗ 1748-threshold-drift** (WebGPU-compute phosphene sparks that coalesce into N1 fragmentary imagery then dissolve вҖ” ship-next to keep the forced-compute lane warm on a second algorithm) + **вӯҗ 1750-threshold-descent** (three.js raymarched KlГјver tunnel-to-light / NDE descent; one trivial tsc fix).

### [1752-dissolve](/dream/1752-dissolve) В· adult / psychedelic В· **the AUDIO-ONLY / embedded lane the 2026-07-15 jury named "empty for months" вҖ” the lab's FIRST audio-only piece across ~744 prototypes; the direct build of the В§788 research dive (2026 browser spatial-audio maturity вҖ” Google Resonance Audio / Omnitone HRTF + ambisonic, "Web Audio API: Immersive Soundscapes for WebXR 2026") INVERTED: the whole field optimizes precise placement, so this UN-places sound until the listener's spatial self dissolves** В· **listen (eyes-closed headphones) + OPTIONAL DeviceOrientation head-steer (yaw), gracefully skipped if unavailable вҖ” NOT touch/pointer (jury-banned 5Г—), NOT keyboard-played, NOT mic** / **AUDIO-ONLY (HRTF binaural spatialization + progressive interaural decorrelation + granular smear + ConvolverNode diffuse-field reverb) вҖ” NO Canvas2D (jury-banned 7Г—), NO GPU render at all; the visual is DELIBERATELY near-absent (one sub-0.3 Hz violet glow + one instruction line + one depth hairline) вҖ” the screen-bias test** В· cycle 788 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-15) В· demoable В· `state: dissociative ego-dissolution (k-hole descent+return) В· pole: cosmic-ambient / dissociative`
**Put on headphones, close your eyes, and a single point of tone in front of you comes loose, orbits, decorrelates between your ears and diffuses into an enveloping field until front, back, self and not-self blur (the k-hole peak) вҖ” then slowly re-coheres. Sound does all the work; the screen is nearly black on purpose.** The lab's answer to the fresh 2026-07-15 jury's provocation #3 вҖ” which named TWO escapes from the Canvas2D monoculture (WebGPU-compute *or* **"audio-only / embedded / haptic вҖ” the menu has named it empty for months"**): this fills the single most-absent lane in the lab. It also completes the В§786-banked вӯҗ`1744-void-bath` audio-only-spatial direction, and is the only В§788 candidate that makes the today's-researchвҶ’today's-build chain visible. **The technique:** a single normalized `depth` 0вҶ’1вҶ’0 envelope over 150 s (descend ~75 s, return ~75 s) drives **five simultaneous dissolution mechanisms** вҖ” (1) four HRTF `PannerNode` voices clustered tight at the front point, then lerped onto wide **Lissajous orbits** at different radii/speeds so the scene envelops; (2) **progressive interaural decorrelation** (each voice crossfades onto twin independent 5вҖ“25 ms delay lines that destroy interaural correlation, so the source stops having a place); (3) seeded **granular smear** re-jittering the per-ear delays; (4) a code-synthesised **`ConvolverNode` diffuse-field reverb** (`_shared/psych/convolutionVoid`) whose direct-to-reverb ratio collapses toward a pure wet field at the peak; (5) an **inharmonic carrier bed** whose detune fans WIDE at the peak so the k-hole is a beating, unplaced smear вҖ” never a pretty JI drone. Master chain: everything вҶ’ reverb вҶ’ `GainNode` (вүӨ0.18) вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` вҶ’ destination; AudioContext gesture-gated on Begin-descent, fully torn down on End+unmount. Optional device-orientation head-steer rotates listener yaw (silently skipped where unavailable). Deterministic (fixed-seed mulberry32 smear), no strobe (glow is a sub-0.3 Hz luminance drift, held under `prefers-reduced-motion`), graceful degrade (audio-engine failure вҶ’ `text-destructive`). **Named refs (README):** Google Resonance Audio / Omnitone ambisonic + binaural HRTF В· "Web Audio API: Immersive Soundscapes for WebXR 2026" В· ketamine/NDE ego-dissolution phenomenology. Two more altered-states pieces explored this fire (WIDE) and banked to IDEAS В§788: **вӯҗвӯҗ 1756-boundless** (WebGPU-compute 2-D wave-equation standing-wave meditative field, MIDI-played вҖ” ship-next, keeps the forced-compute lane warm on a new algorithm) + **вӯҗ 1754-godlight** (three.js volumetric raymarch NDE tunnel-to-light, tilt-gaze).

### [1770-dmt-hyperbolic](/dream/1770-dmt-hyperbolic) В· psychedelic / **the INTENSE pole, re-injected hard after the 7Г— cosmic-ambient/void monoculture of 1740вҶ’1766 (the В§791 note itself flagged the forming void mini-monoculture): the DMT breakthrough's NEGATIVELY-CURVED geometry вҖ” Escher's Circle Limit alive and breathing, drifting toward its infinite boundary, driven by sound. Direct build of the В§792 research dive (QRI/GГіmez Emilsson "The Hyperbolic Geometry of DMT Experiences", 2016 вҖ” breakthrough space is hyperbolic: saddle sheets, exponentially blooming tilings)** В· **AUDIO-CARRIER input (deterministic self-playing generative carrier вҖ” a seeded inharmonic pentatonic piano-like arpeggio over a detuned drone, always alive/audible incl. headless; optional file-drop of your own track ducks the ghost) вҖ” NOT mic-breath (3Г— recent), NOT tilt (3Г— recent), NOT stillness (2Г— recent), NOT touch/keyboard (jury-banned)** / **WebGL2 full-viewport fragment shader (three.js ShaderMaterial on a fullscreen triangle) вҖ” off Canvas2D (jury-banned 7Г—), off raw-WebGL2-as-sole (В§785), off WebGPU-compute (dodging the 3Г— back-to-back 1740/1758/1766 run): every pixel is a complex point in the PoincarГ© disk folded into the fundamental triangle of an EXACT (2,7,q) reflection group (two mirror lines + one geodesic mirror circle derived by law of sines), a MГ¶bius disk-automorphism drifts it toward the boundary (exponential area growth = "more axes than physical reality allows"), saddle-fold "bedsheet" warp, IQ iridescent thin-film palette + edge chromatic aberration + inversion-count tile rings. FFTвҶ’neural-gain map: bassвҶ’drift/fold, midsвҶ’curvature+{7,q} density (q drifts 3вҶ”4), highsвҶ’aberration, loudвҶ’saturation/gain. Journey arc onsetвҶ’come-upвҶ’breakthroughвҶ’return. Graceful WebGL2-absent degrade to a live audio-reactive CSS glow; safety: NO alpha-flicker, palette cycle ~0.09 Hz, prefers-reduced-motion honored** В· cycle 792 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-16) В· demoable В· `state: DMT-breakthrough В· pole: intense`

### [1778-gradient-lotus](/dream/1778-gradient-lotus) В· adult / psychedelic В· **self-playing generative bed + pointer-parallax/click-pulse + optional audio-file drop (NOT mic, NOT keyboard-played, NOT touch-drag-sole, NOT camera/tilt)** / **PURE CSS-COMPOSITOR RENDER вҖ” stacked animated `repeating-conic-gradient` / `radial-gradient` `<div>`s fused with `mix-blend-mode` (screen/overlay/soft-light), feathered by `mask-image`, kaleidoscope-mirrored via `scaleX(-1)`, driven by CSS custom properties from a Web-Audio FFT вҖ” there is NO `<canvas>`, NO WebGL/WebGPU, NO three.js anywhere on the page (grep-confirmed the compositor is a never-used PRIMARY render substrate across the 1500-deep lab; off the jury-banned Canvas2D AND off the over-served GPU-shader monoculture)** В· cycle 793 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-16) В· demoable В· `state: warm psilocybin/LSD mandala В· pole: warm-organic (NOT cosmic-ambient/void/dream вҖ” the fresh psychedelic pole В§793 established)`

A warm, breathing, audio-reactive psilocybin/LSD **mandala rendered with no canvas and no WebGL at all** вҖ” the whole visual is produced by the part of the browser that composites and paints boxes. Eight absolutely-positioned `<div>`s stack inside one breathing/parallax "stage": a warm `radial-gradient` base wash (the `conic-gradient`-unsupported degradation floor) вҶ’ three `repeating-conic-gradient` petal fields whose repeat-period IS the petal count, counter-rotating on `--rot`/`--rot2`/`--rot3` at near-but-unequal speeds so they **beat out genuine moirГ©/kaleidoscope interference** вҶ’ a `scaleX(-1)` mirror of field A for bilateral symmetry вҶ’ a slow full-ramp `conic-gradient` iridescence under `mix-blend-mode: soft-light` nudged by `hue-rotate(--hue)` (held inside a warm Вұ35В° arc so it never leaves the palette) вҶ’ a central `radial-gradient` bloom whose radius+intensity ride `--bloom` (peak lightness pinned at 80%, never pure white = the flash-safety clamp) вҶ’ an aperture vignette. **The engineering thesis** (documented in README): a SINGLE `requestAnimationFrame` loop never touches the DOM tree вҖ” it only calls `el.style.setProperty('--x', вҖҰ)` on the root, and plain custom properties cascade to every layer and re-paint on the compositor for free (no `registerProperty` needed; the deepening idea is to register them as typed `<angle>`/`<number>` so the compositor interpolates on its own thread). **Audio вҶ’ CSS weld:** a self-playing warm lydian pad (detuned triangle/saw partials under a slow lowpass LFO + the shared `_shared/psych/convolutionVoid` reverb) with a generative A-pentatonic bell voice sounds from the first **Begin**; an `AnalyserNode` on the master bus reduces the FFT to six smoothed log-spaced perceptual bands written straight into `--band0..5`, and overall energy drives `--open` (petal intricacy + breathing scale + saturation), `--bloom`, and `--hue`/`--sat` вҖ” louder/brighter audio **opens** the lotus (finer petals, bigger bloom, deeper saturation), quiet lets it **close and dim**. Rotation is continuous and audio-independent so it is never a dead screen; drop your own track (`decodeAudioData` вҶ’ looping source through the same analyser) to drive it instead. Self-runs fully untouched (synthetic idle bands before audio). **Ambition (2/5, honest):** #1 never-used render substrate (CSS compositor as PRIMARY render вҖ” grep-0Г—; the sharpest possible dodge off both the jury-banned Canvas2D and the over-served GPU-shader/WebGPU output pile) + #2 вүҘ3 subsystems (Web-Audio synth+reverb + FFT band-reducer + CSS-custom-property compositor engine). **Safety:** no strobe вҖ” rotation ~60 s/rev, breathing ~0.13 Hz, no luminance change near the photosensitive band, peak layer brightness clamped below white, `prefers-reduced-motion` slows every rotation to ~16% and damps the breathing depth. **2 more explored this cycle** (WIDE fan, banked in IDEAS.md): `1776-spore-gaze` (camera hand-DWELL blooms a psilocybin fractal вҖ” the literal build of the В§793 gaze-fixation research, the highest-ambition 4/5 seed, ship-next) and `1780-dejong-swarm` (260k-point **de Jong strange attractor**, grep-0Г—, with LSD tracer-trails via WebGL2 transform-feedback + a float-texture feedback accumulator).

### [1784-second-sight](/dream/1784-second-sight) В· adult / psychedelic В· **live CAMERA (front-facing, opt-in; deterministic proto-face self-demo scene when denied/headless вҖ” NOT touch/pointer-drag (jury-banned 5Г—), NOT keyboard (on-watch 5Г—), NOT mic (warm 3Г—), NOT tilt (3Г—))** / **three.js GPU ping-pong feedback CONDITIONED BY A REAL tfjs "seer" вҖ” off the jury-banned Canvas2D (7Г—) AND off raw-WebGL2-as-sole (В§785); directly cashes jury 2026-07-15 provocation #3 (force GPU/three.js)** В· cycle 794 В· DEEP-winner (2026-07-16) В· demoable В· `state: predictive-processing reducing-valve / apophenia-over-reality В· pole: hallucination (intense-organic вҖ” the world dissolving into eyes/faces, NOT geometric-flat)`

**The Hallucination Machine, engineered middle path: a real neural net actually SEES your live world, and that machine perception decides WHERE the hallucinated creatures grow.** The lab owns apophenia-*from-noise* (1396) but had **never** turned the live camera into the substrate the priors over-write, nor run **real tfjs generative conditioning** (the only prior tfjs uses are kids classifiers вҖ” generative-conditioning is grep-0Г—). Direct build of the В§794 research dive: Suzuki, Roseboom, Schwartzman & Seth's **"Hallucination Machine"** (*Sci. Reports* 2017 вҖ” DeepDream over VR reproduces the psychedelic visual's object/eye/face apparitions) now formalized by **"Beyond the reducing valve: computational neurophenomenology via deep neural networks"** (*Frontiers in Psychology* 2026), under the REBUS / predictive-processing frame (Carhart-Harris & Friston; Huxley's reducing valve). **The three subsystems:** (1) a **tfjs "seer"** вҖ” dynamic-imported TensorFlow.js on the WebGL backend runs a fixed-seed 3Г—3 conv stack + ReLU + 2 pools each throttled frame, fused with **center-surround contrast, Sobel edges, and warm-skin chroma** into a 64Г—64 RGBA **salience texture** (a shader-only luminance-gradient salience is the live fallback if tfjs fails/slow вҖ” a HUD line reports which path is active); (2) a **three.js ping-pong feedback** render вҖ” `FRAG_GROWTH` advects + decays (<1) the prior frame and **emits procedural eye / paisley form-constant motifs gated by the seer's salience map** (blooms land on faces/contours/warm skin, not raw contrast), reusing `_shared/psych/logpolar` for the KlГјver warp; `FRAG_DISPLAY` mixes veridical-vs-hallucination by the **dose** (the reducing valve, 0вҶ’1 over ~55 s), adds chromatic aberration + cheap bloom + Reinhard tone-map; (3) a **Web-Audio bed** sharing the ONE dose + ONE salience field вҖ” calm near-sine room-tone вҶ’ detuned inharmonic shimmer as the dose opens a lowpass, salience-density drives spectral brightness, and a region "waking up" strikes a wake-tone. **Determinism/headless:** integer-frame dose ramp + mulberry32; no `Math.random`/`Date.now`/`performance.now` in the render/audio path; a deterministic drifting proto-face + warm-blob self-demo scene animates the whole pipeline with **no camera** so it self-demos in review and headless; audio survives even if WebGL is unavailable. **Ambition (honest 4/5):** #1 never-used technique (real tfjs generative-conditioning-of-a-GPU-hallucination-pass, grep-0Г—) + #2 вүҘ3 subsystems (camera + tfjs seer + three.js GPU feedback + audio bed) + #3 named reference (Suzuki/Seth 2017 В· Frontiers 2026) + #5-amended recent-research (the В§794 dive, today's research вҶ’ tonight's build). **Safety:** no strobe вҖ” feedback decay <1, brightness tone-mapped below white, only a вүӨ0.05 Hz luminance drift, `prefers-reduced-motion` softens motion/trails. **Honest limitation:** no pretrained face/body-segmentation package is a dependency (and adding deps is forbidden), so the conv stack is **fixed-seed and untrained** вҖ” the seer follows bottom-up early-vision salience (contrast/edges/warm chroma), not true semantic faces/bodies; the "creatures" are procedural motifs steered by that salience, a real machine-perception LEVER + overlay, not end-to-end learned imagery. **2 more explored this cycle** (DEEP race, banked in IDEAS.md): `1780-reducing-valve` (**real tfjs DeepDream gradient-ascent** вҖ” the literal machine, but renders on the jury-banned Canvas2D; resurrect off-Canvas2D) and `1782-eye-bloom` (pure-GPU WebGL2 feedback-shader apophenia, no ML вҖ” the guaranteed-spectacular baseline).

### [1806-city-breath](/dream/1806-city-breath) В· adult / **real-world data (transit/mobility)** В· **live external bike-share feed (Citybikes/GBFS, CORS-open, no-auth) as the DRIVER вҖ” NOT mic (jury-banned 7Г—), NOT camera, NOT touch-as-sole, NOT keyboard-played; a deterministic seeded synthetic city (mulberry32 0x1806) self-demos with ZERO network** / **SVG-DOM station map (built once, attributes mutated вҖ” NOT Canvas, NOT WebGPU-compute (jury-banned 4Г—), NOT three.js/WebGL2-fragment (jury-banned 4Г—))** В· cycle 798 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-16) В· demoable В· `theme: real-world-data sonification В· subject: a living city В· explicitly NOT altered-states (serves jury 2026-07-16 #1 hard-ban on the 15/15 altered-states monoculture)`

**Hear a whole city breathing вҖ” its live bike-share system emptying and filling in real time as a warm generative instrument.** The jury's 2026-07-16 verdict hard-banned the altered-states theme for one cycle (15/15 were consciousness pieces) and named **real-world data sonification (weather/transit/finance/satellite = 0Г— in 15 cycles)** and **breaking the mic monoculture (7Г—) with an external-API driver** as the explicit provocations. This is the head-on cash: a piece **about a city**, not the inside of a head, driven by an external transit feed, no mic. **Data:** the **Citybikes** aggregator (CORS-open, no-auth) wrapping the **GBFS** open-mobility standard вҖ” `api.citybik.es/v2/networks/citi-bike-nyc` returns `stations[]` with `free_bikes`/`empty_slots`/lat/lon, fetched client-side (no API route), polled ~25s. Successive snapshots are **diffed**: a station whose `free_bikes` dropped = a bike undocked (someone rode off); a rise = a bike returned. **If any fetch fails (offline sandbox / CORS), a fully deterministic synthetic city** вҖ” 120 seeded stations + a seeded tidal "day" simulator that borrows/returns bikes on a 2.2s interval вҖ” runs from mount with **zero network**, so the 06:30 review always shows a breathing city; the live feed swaps in cleanly on success (status line: LIVE network-name vs SIMULATED). **Audio (Web Audio):** the whole city is an **aggregate drone** whose pitch + lowpass brightness track system fullness on a slow tidal LFO (thins at morning rush, warms in the evening); each **undock fires a warm Karplus-Strong plucked string** tuned pentatonic by longitude, panned by latitude; each **return** a softer resonant tone an octave down; busy minutes are ranked by delta magnitude and **rate-limited to 7 audible events/poll** so it never becomes a wall of plucks. `DynamicsCompressor` вҶ’ master gain 0.16. **Visual (SVG-DOM, grep-distinct-from-Canvas):** stations plotted lat/long into a responsive `viewBox`; each a `<circle>` sized by capacity, filled on the **violet ramp** (empty = dim, full = bright), with a **pre-allocated pool of 64 ripple `<circle>`s** reused for undock/return blooms (attributes mutated, tree never rebuilt); a single rAF loop drives pulses, readout shows docked / fullness% / in-motion / events-min. **Ambition (honest 2вҖ“3/5):** #2 вүҘ3 subsystems (live mobility ingestion + snapshot-diff event model + Karplus pluck synth + fullness drone + SVG map = 5) + #3 named reference (GBFS via Citybikes; the near-empty urban-mobility-sonification space my В§798 dive confirmed returns ~nothing) + this cycle's researchвҶ’build chain. **Honest positioning:** data-sonification is NOT new to the lab (earthquakes alone = 11 prototypes; ISS/NOAA/weather/Wikipedia all used) вҖ” but it is 0Г— across the last 15 *cycles* and GBFS-transit is 0Г— *ever*; this is the rested-lane return the jury demanded, not a "lab-first." **Safety:** no strobe вҖ” pulses bloom softly, peak brightness below white (violet вүӨ78% L), `prefers-reduced-motion` slows ripple decay + drone LFO; a failed feed degrades to the sim, an audio-start failure shows a `text-destructive` notice. **2 more explored this cycle** (WIDE fan, banked/eliminated вҖ” see IDEAS В§798): вӯҗвӯҗ `1804-bourse` (live crypto trade-tape вҶ’ Ikeda Canvas2D data-viz + FM bell tones вҖ” the finance lane, 0Г— ever; ship-ready TOP resurrect) and `1808-dawn-line` (**eliminated вҖ” near-duplicate of the existing `1244-dayline`** terminator-sweep piece).

### [1904-current-eden](/dream/1904-current-eden) В· adult В· **conduct a living ecology like a river вҖ” cycle 2 of the flow-eden II multi-cycle DEEP commitment (В§811), directly cashing jury 2026-07-17 criterion #4 (extend/multi-cycle, 0/15 вҖ” "nobody extends anything"). Drag currents of wind through a multi-kernel Flow-Lenia field to herd 3 dye-tagged species into ENCOUNTERS; every cross-species collision is a chord you caused. DEAD without a human by construction: no birth term adds mass, so with no conducting overlap collapses to ~0 and the piece thins to a lone drone** В· **POINTER/DRAG to paint a decaying current field (mouse + touch) вҖ” NOT mic (jury-banned 7Г—), NOT keyboard-played, NOT camera** / **WebGL2 RGBA16F ping-pong multi-kernel Flow-Lenia (mass-conserving reintegration-tracking advection; per-species ring kernels at radii 3/5/7; 32ВІ RGBA32F readback every 4th frame for masses / encounter energy / MSPD-lite 2-scale variance) вҖ” NOT Canvas2D (jury-banned 7Г—), NOT WebGPU** В· cycle 812 В· DEEP-winner (2026-07-18) В· demoable В· `theme: conducted artificial-life ecology В· harmony: modal-that-modulates (Phrygian/Lydian/Dorian, biting Hijaz on strong collisions) вҖ” NOT pentatonic (jury-banned) В· palette: warm daylight textile (madder/saffron/indigo on linen) вҖ” NOT violet-on-black (jury-banned)`
**Drag to pull wind through a field of evolving organisms and force three species to meet вҖ” each collision modulates the harmony. A real GPU Flow-Lenia: three dye-tagged species each convolve their OWN ring kernel so they read as distinct organisms, and mass is conserved structurally (reintegration-tracking overlap weights form a partition of unity вҖ” no growth term invents mass), so an unconducted field genuinely dissipates and the audio thins to a lone drone. You paint a decaying velocity/current texture (~2.5 s half-life) that is added to the CA transport flow (`F_s = kВ·вҲҮg_s вҲ’ pВ·вҲҮM + cВ·current`); a deterministic autopilot only grazes the species into weak occasional encounters, while a real drag's current is ~40Г— stronger вҖ” the music is yours. Encounter energy (cross-species dye overlap) drives a modal drone that pivots mode + shifts tonal centre and rings FM bells, with a Hijaz double-harmonic on strong collisions; single-species dominance eases home and thins the texture. Warm madder/saffron/indigo dye combs along the current on a light linen ground вҖ” the boldest break yet from the lab's violet monoculture. Cycle 2 of the flow-eden II DEEP commitment; the runner-up 1906-tide-eden (persistent painted banks/channels landscaping a global tide; cool tidepool palette; a Flatten-landscape "dead proof" button) is banked вӯҗвӯҗ in IDEAS В§812 and its three best ideas folded into this piece's README as cycle-3 deepenings. Safety: no strobe вҖ” all motion is slow advective drift well under 3 Hz, peak brightness clamped below white, `prefers-reduced-motion` honored. Named refs: Chan *Lenia* В· Plantec et al. *Flow-Lenia* (arXiv:2212.07906 + 2506.08569) В· *Leniabreeder* (arXiv:2406.04235). NOT eye/ear-verified in a browser this cycle (headless) вҖ” tuning constants reasoned, not stopwatch-tuned.**

### [1910-ten-fingers](/dream/1910-ten-fingers) В· adult В· **a chord instrument that speaks REAL functional harmony вҖ” cashes jury 2026-07-17 head-on: #1 (ban the pentatonic вҶ’ force functional harmony that modulates and bites), #2 (break the violet monoculture вҶ’ cold Ikeda graphite), #3 (build something DEAD without a human вҶ’ total silence until a finger lands). The 06:30-reviewability paradox resolved: the touch piece is BOTH the most human-required AND the most reliably phone-demoable вҖ” no camera permission, no CDN model, no lighting/standing-back** В· **MULTITOUCH (Pointer Events, up to 10 fingers, phone-native; mouse = one finger) вҖ” NOT mic (jury-banned 7Г—), NOT camera, NOT self-playing (jury-banned ~11Г—): no autopilot path exists in the code** / **SVG-DOM (real `<rect>`/`<line>`/`<polyline>`/`<circle>`/`<text>` elements, attributes mutated per-frame in one rAF loop вҖ” grows the minority substrate the jury named; NOT Canvas2D (jury-banned 4Г—), NOT WebGL/WebGPU, NOT three.js)** В· cycle 813 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-18) В· demoable В· `theme: playable functional-harmony instrument В· harmony: real diatonic functions + secondary dominants + modulation + voice-leading (NOT pentatonic вҖ” jury-banned) В· palette: cold graphite Ikeda monochrome (NOT violet-on-black вҖ” jury-banned)`

**A glass chord instrument you play with up to ten fingers that speaks real tonal harmony вҖ” press a cell to voice a diatonic function, hold several to conduct a progression, drag to glissando between chords, and it stays a silent, still, cold lattice until a real finger touches it.** The jury's 2026-07-17 verdict named three new invisible monocultures the theme-audit never catches вҖ” **one color** (violet-on-near-black ~12/15), **one scale** (everything de-risks to a pentatonic 6/15), and **one interaction model** (~11/15 play themselves with no human) вҖ” and asked, in three separate provocations, to change the color, the harmony, and make it need a human. This piece is the single most on-target answer to all three at once. **The tonal engine** (`harmony.ts`): a `Key = {tonicPc, mode}` drives a 4-column Г— 3-row matrix of 12 chords laid out by FUNCTION вҖ” Tonic / Predominant / Dominant / Applied columns вҖ” with the full diatonic set (I ii iii IV V V7 vi viiВ° ii7 in major; i iiВ° III iv V7 VI viiВ° iiГё7 in minor, harmonic-minor V) **plus three real secondary dominants** (V/V, V/vi, V/IV) for chromatic bite, and a two-cell **modulation strip** that pivots the whole grid up a fifth (вҶ’ dominant) or to the relative minor/major вҖ” so the labels and pitches transpose live. **Voice-leading is the core:** each new chord is voiced by `voiceLead()`, which snaps each of 4 voices to the *nearest* chord tone of the target, so heldвҶ’new transitions glide and common tones are held rather than leaping вҖ” and the audio simply `setTargetAtTime`-glides voice *i* from its old pitch to its new one (the portamento "bite"). A `<polyline>` "ribbon" over a C3/C4/C5 staff renders those 4 voices as a morphing line you can watch voice-lead. **Audio** (`audio.ts`, Web Audio, equal temperament вҖ” the point here is FUNCTION, not just intonation): each press spawns a 4-voice triangle+sine group through highpassвҶ’lowpassвҶ’compressor + a soft feedback delay; silent until a gesture resumes the context; every held voice releases on pointer-up. **Interaction** (Pointer Events with pointer-capture, `touch-action: none`): one finger or ten, drag across cells to glissando with voice-leading, press a mod cell to change key вҖ” and **with no pointer down there is total silence and a still, labeled graphite grid; there is deliberately no self-playing path.** **Palette:** cold graphite/charcoal ground, near-white ink, a single hairline, active cells invert to near-white вҖ” Ikeda's cold precise data-grid, one of the two color worlds (with 1810's monochrome) the jury explicitly named as unbuilt escapes from violet. **Ambition (honest 3/5):** #2 вүҘ3 subsystems (functional-harmony engine + voice-leading solver + multitouch pointer model + Web-Audio poly-voice glide synth + SVG-DOM render/animation) + #3 named reference (Ryoji Ikeda *data.matrix* for the cold grid; Toshio Iwai *Electroplankton*/*Tenori-on* for touch-as-instrument) + #5 same-day В§813 research dive (MediaPipe/touch input maturity as the lever to break the self-playing monoculture). #1 NOT claimed вҖ” touch + SVG + functional harmony each exist somewhere in the lab; the win is the *combination* aimed precisely at the jury's three live bans, not a lab-first technique. **Safety:** no strobe, no flicker вҖ” the only motion is a gentle ribbon glide and 110ms cell fades. **2 more explored this cycle** (WIDE fan, banked in IDEAS В§813): вӯҗвӯҗ `1908-glasswind` (MediaPipe hands play a just-intonation harmonic-series air-column as Chladni sumi-ink standing waves on warm paper in a WebGL2 shader вҖ” the freshest *visual*, ship-next) and вӯҗ `1912-limbs` (full-body MediaPipe pose вҶ’ an inharmonic spectral cluster as a luminous three.js line-skeleton, high-chroma cyan/amber). **NOT eye/ear-verified in a browser this cycle** (headless вҖ” no display/touch/speakers): whether the voice-leading glides read as musical, whether the chord voicings are well-balanced, and whether ten-finger play stays coherent all want Karel's phone.

### [1916-slime-cantor](/dream/1916-slime-cantor) В· adult В· **a living slime-mold (Physarum) transport network you COMPOSE with by dropping food-nodes with your fingers вҖ” and the emergent network's TOPOLOGY is the harmony. DEEP-mode winner (cycle 814): ONE massively-bigger concept attacked via 3 substrates, shipped the strongest. Physarum is one of the most-loved creative-coding techniques yet was grep-0Г— in this ~769-proto lab, and almost always built as autonomous wallpaper вҖ” this inverts it: the network's connectivity IS the music and the human is the composer. Cashes the diversity audit on every axis (WebGPU-compute 0Г—/10 вҖ” the cleanest substrate dodge; NOT WebGL2 which is banned 6Г—/10; NOT Flow-Lenia which is at 3Г— and would trip a 4th; NOT pentatonic/violet/autonomous/mic). Banked вӯҗвӯҗ 1928-slime-consort (three.js topology-events-as-modulation) + вӯҗ 1922-slime-loom (WebGL2 JI-from-geometry).** В· **INPUT = MULTITOUCH food-node placement (Pointer Events, up to 10 fingers, `touch-action:none`, pointer-capture; mouse = one finger) вҖ” human-load-bearing: with no nodes there is only a formless static wash, no harmonic structure; the music requires your placement. NOT mic (jury 7Г—), NOT camera, NOT pointer-paint (near-banned 4Г—), NOT autonomous (jury ~11Г—)** / **OUTPUT = WebGPU COMPUTE (WGSL): ~260k agents / 1024ВІ field (60k/512ВІ reduced-motion) in a storage buffer вҖ” `move` (sense 3 offsets вҶ’ rotate вҶ’ step вҶ’ atomic deposit, the Jones model), `diffuse` (3Г—3 blur + decay + stationary food chemoattractant, ping-ponged), `edges` (samples freshest trail along each node-pair segment into an 8Г—8 readback), fullscreen `render`; device-lost handled; full Canvas2D Physarum fallback feeding the IDENTICAL harmony pipeline so it's never blank. WebGPU-compute is 0Г—/10 in the diversity window and repeatedly flagged "STILL 0Г—" across ~20 juries вҖ” this finally lands a real WebGPU-compute winner. NOT WebGL2 (banned 6Г—/10), NOT Canvas2D-primary (jury 4Г—)** В· cycle 814 В· DEEP-winner (2026-07-18) В· demoable В· `theme: a Physarum transport network sonified by its own topology В· harmony: graph-Laplacian eigenvalue "connectome harmonics" вҖ” the network's natural modes, freq вҲқ вҲҡО», continuous & NON-pentatonic (jury-banned), morphs as the slime rewires В· palette: dark-field bio microscopy вҖ” amber/chartreuse veins & coral food-seeds on a deep SATURATED teal agar (NON-violet, NON-near-black) В· needs-a-human: harmony gated on finger placement (formless wash otherwise)` В· notes: `README.md` В· ref Physarum polycephalum В· Jeff Jones 2010 (deposit/sense/rotate agent model) В· Tero et al. *Science* 2010 (near-optimal transport / Tokyo-rail) В· Sage Jenson (mxsage) *Physarum* В· spectral graph theory / Atasoy connectome harmonics В· ShaderVine (2026-04-12, В§814 dive)

**Drop food with your fingers and hear the shape of a living network.** DEEP-mode winner of a 3-approach fan at ONE concept вҖ” a **Physarum slime-mold transport network whose emergent topology is the harmony**. **Ambition вҖ” honest 4/5:** **#1** never-used-in-lab technique (agent-based **Physarum**, grep-0Г— across ~769 protos) + **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (WGSL-compute agent sim + human food-placement + GPU edge-sampling + CPU graph-Laplacian eigen-harmony + additive render) + **#3** named refs (Jones/Tero/Jenson/Atasoy/ShaderVine) + **#5** same-day В§814 dive. **The harmony brain** (`graph.ts`): the placed food-nodes + slime-detected edges form a small weighted graph; every ~200вҖ“300 ms its **graph Laplacian L = D вҲ’ W** is diagonalized by cyclic **Jacobi eigen-iteration** (nвүӨ8), and the eigenvalues become oscillator frequencies via **freq вҲқ вҲҡО»** (the direct analogue of a drum head's modes вҖ” spectral graph theory / "connectome harmonics") mapped *continuously* to log-pitch вҖ” no scale quantization anywhere, so the chord morphs as the slime rewires; new edges ring soft bells, broken edges damp. **The sim** (`gpu.ts`): a genuine WGSL-compute Physarum вҖ” agents sense/rotate/step/atomic-deposit onto a trail that ping-pong diffuses & decays, food nodes inject chemoattractant so veins route between them (Tero's optimal transport). **Needs a human by construction:** with no connected nodes there's no graph вҶ’ no harmonic structure, only a quiet formless wash (`audio.ts`, master вүӨ0.18 via DynamicsCompressor, 1 s fade-in, silent until first gesture). **diversity:** `banned=[WebGL2 OUTPUT(6Г—/10) В· Flow-Lenia(3Г—вҶ’no 4th) В· pentatonic(jury 6Г—) В· violet(jury ~12Г—) В· Canvas2D-primary(jury 4Г—) В· autonomous(jury ~11Г—) В· mic(jury 7Г—)]`; `picked=[WebGPU-compute(0Г—/10) В· multitouch food-placement В· Physarum+graph-spectral harmony В· dark-field teal/amber bio palette]` вҖ” clears every live ban. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + WebGPU/Canvas2D; zero new npm deps). **Safety:** no strobe вҖ” slow luminance drift, peak below white, reduced-motion drops 260kвҶ’60k agents. **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites; project-wide `tsc --noEmit` = 0; `eslint --max-warnings 0` on the folder = 0; authoritative `next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = EXIT 0, route in both manifests, `page.js` 51.5 kB. **NOT eye/ear-verified** (headless вҖ” no GPU/display/speakers): the builder honestly flagged it *could not execute a WebGPU frame*, so WGSL bind-group/ping-pong parity is the one first-run risk (`EDGE_THRESHOLD=0.22` + food/decay knobs if veins read as always/never connected) вҖ” mitigated by the Canvas2D fallback feeding the same harmony pipeline; whether 260k-agent perf holds on a phone and whether the eigen-drone reads as musical want Karel's browser. Two more explored this fire вҖ” **вӯҗвӯҗ 1928-slime-consort** (three.js filament graph; union-find components вҶ’ MERGE = a real modulation, SPLIT = a suspension; the most legible musical story, ship-next) + **вӯҗ 1922-slime-loom** (WebGL2 JI-from-geometry intervals; most iOS-robust but WebGL2 banned 6Г—/10 this cycle) вҖ” banked in IDEAS В§814 (built demoable, then `rm -rf`'d per the non-winner rule; rebuild from spec). Design notes: `src/app/dream/1916-slime-cantor/README.md`

### [1966-alpha-reset](/dream/1966-alpha-reset) В· adult / psychedelic В· **audio-file-drop + deterministic generative carrier (audio-as-carrier вҖ” NOT mic, NOT touch/pointer, NOT the recent tilt/camera/MIDI; explicitly NOT a memory piece)** / **three.js full-screen fragment `ShaderMaterial` over the shared log-polar / form-constant engine (`_shared/psych/logpolar.ts` `LOGPOLAR_GLSL`) вҖ” three.js was 1Г— in the last 10 (coldest GPU family), NOT Canvas2D, NOT raw-WebGL2** В· cycle 828 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-19) В· demoable В· `state: cross-modal auditory-reset of KlГјver form-constants В· pole: intense`
**Sound resets your visual cortex: each note in the music snaps a drifting, incoherent hallucinatory form-constant field into momentary crystalline coherence, then it dissolves back into visual snow.** WIDE-mode winner of a 3-explorer fire (cycle 828, 1 of 3 divergent altered-states directions). Returns the lab to its PRIMARY psychedelic direction (INTENSE pole) after a memory-instrument/data drift, and breaks the fresh **compositional-MEMORY monoculture** (5 of the last 10 ships вҖ” 1930/32/34/38/60 вҖ” were "your past gestures shape the present"; this is deliberately NOT one). **The mechanism (grep-0Г— as a weld):** a full-screen three.js `ShaderMaterial` renders four KlГјver form constants вҖ” **tunnels, spokes, spirals + a honeycomb lattice** вҖ” in cortical `(log r, Оё)` space via the shared **BressloffвҖ“Cowan log-polar engine** (`LOGPOLAR_GLSL`). Each layer carries its own **phase offset** (`uOff` vec4) that, left alone, **drifts at a slightly different rate** вҶ’ the layers fall out of registration, the average washes to flat gray, and the mandala smears into desaturated **visual snow** (incoherence). A **spectral-flux onset detector** (adaptive threshold = running mean + kВ·std over ~0.7 s, rising-edge peak, 120 ms refractory) fires on each note attack and **RESETS the phase offsets toward their common centroid** вҶ’ the geometry momentarily LOCKS into a crisp iridescent mandala, then the incoherent drift pulls it apart again. Rhythmic/dense music keeps it coherent; sparse/quiet lets it dissolve. **Grounded in a REAL cross-modal finding** (evoked, not claimed medically): a brief sound phase-resets the ~10 Hz alpha rhythm of visual cortex (Romei et al. 2012) and the audiovisual binding window scales with individual alpha (Cecere et al. 2015). **INPUT:** drag-drop / file-picker any track (`decodeAudioData` вҶ’ looping source вҶ’ gain + Analyser fan-out) OR a built-in **deterministic seeded (`mulberry32`) pentatonic-arpeggio-over-drone carrier** scheduled off `ctx.currentTime`, whose attacks drive the onset detector so the coherence-snap is visible with **zero input, headless**. FFT bands вҶ’ neural-gain map: bassвҶ’log-polar warp depth + zoom, midsвҶ’form-constant freq, highsвҶ’kaleidoscope fold count + honeycomb detail, loudnessвҶ’saturation/iridescence (IQ cosine palette + chromatic aberration). **The four wired subsystems** (ambition #2, exceeded вҖ” 5): audio-file decode/loop + spectral-flux onset detector + phase-reset/coherence controller + log-polar three.js shader + generative carrier. **Ambition вҖ” honest 2/5:** **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (5) + **#3** named refs (BressloffвҖ“Cowan В· Romei et al. 2012 "Sounds reset rhythms of visual cortex" В· Cecere et al. 2015 Current Biology). **#1 NOT claimed** вҖ” log-polar geometry + FFTвҶ’shader both exist in the lab; the fresh move is the cross-modal *phase-reset weld*, grep-0Г— as a mechanism but built on existing primitives. **#5 NOT claimed** вҖ” the on-mechanism refs are foundational (2012/2015), not <14-day; honest, consistent with the saturation streak. **diversity:** `banned=[compositional-MEMORY technique (5Г—) В· touch/pointer (historically 6Г—, keep drained вҖ” 0Г— last 10)]`; `picked=[audio-file/generative-carrier INPUT (audio-as-carrier) В· three.js log-polar SHADER output (three.js coldest GPU family, 1Г—) В· auditory-phase-reset-of-form-constants TECHNIQUE (grep-0Г— weld, NOT a memory piece) В· neon-iridescent DMT PALETTE В· INTENSE psychedelic pole]` вҖ” clears the memory ban and re-centres the primary direction. **SAFETY (photosensitive):** the coherence-SNAP is a **spatial** pattern reorganization, NOT a brightness flash вҖ” onsets modulate only the phase offsets; the global `uGain` brightness envelope is **JS-slew-limited to ~0.25 s** so it cannot modulate in the 3вҖ“30 Hz band; visual snow is low-amplitude per-pixel grain (not synchronized full-screen flicker); `prefers-reduced-motion` reduces fold count, drift, and onset strength. **No API route вҶ’ no `guard`** (pure `"use client"` Web Audio + three.js; audio-file decode is local, no network/secret; three@0.182 already a dep вҖ” zero new npm deps). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites; `next lint --dir 1966-alpha-reset --max-warnings 0` = **0**; project-wide `tsc --noEmit` = **0**; authoritative winner-only `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0** (this cycle completed the full route legend вҖ” no EMFILE), `page.js` + `page_client-reference-manifest.js` emitted + `"/dream/1966-alpha-reset"` in BOTH `routes-manifest.json` and `app-path-routes-manifest.json`; losers 1968/1970 confirmed absent. **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless container вҖ” no display/speakers/audio-file; runtime GLSL compile can't be exercised without a GL context): whether the onsetвҶ’coherence-snap reads as "the music crystallising the geometry," whether the drift-apart is legible vs merely noisy, and whether a dropped track drives it musically want Karel's Chrome; the shader was read line-by-line for GLSL-ES-1.00 legality and the deterministic carrier guarantees it's never blank/silent. Winner of an adult **WIDE** 3-explorer fire; banked **вӯҗвӯҗ `1968-clear-light`** (jhДҒna cosmic-ambient "dissolve into clear light" вҖ” the meditation-gap filler, resurrect on a WebGPU-compute cycle) + **вӯҗ `1970-tracer-loom`** (LSD ping-pong feedback tracers, played JI FM) вҶ’ IDEAS В§828. ### [1972-morphosong](/dream/1972-morphosong) В· psychedelic / WebGPU-compute reaction-diffusion В· **hum a living Turing-pattern organism into being: your pitch breeds a different morphology (mazeвҶ”honeycombвҶ”coralвҶ”spots), warped into psychedelic form-constants, and the field's own spatial statistics re-voice the drone вҖ” what swells on screen swells in your ears** В· **INPUT = mic HUM (autocorrelation pitch + RMS, dead-end analyser вҖ” non-touch, fresh) / seeded carrier** В· **OUTPUT = WebGPU-COMPUTE (jury's most-wanted 1Г— substrate вҖ” NOT WebGL2/three.js/Canvas2D-primary): WGSL 3-stage pipeline (GrayвҖ“Scott update ping-pong / stats-reduction readback / log-polar cortical render), Canvas2D reaction-diffusion fallback** В· cycle 829 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-19) В· demoable В· `state: psilocybin morphing-fractal bloom В· pole: intense`
WIDE-mode winner of a 3-explorer fire (1 of 3 non-touch Г— non-WebGL2 altered-states directions). **Mechanism:** a real **GrayвҖ“Scott reaction-diffusion** morphogenesis field runs in a WGSL **compute** shader (ping-pong storage buffers of [U,V], 5-point Laplacian); sung **pitch** steers feed/kill so different pitches breed different Turing morphologies (stripes/maze вҶ” honeycomb/holes вҶ” coral/worms вҶ” spots/mitosis) and **RMS** drives growth/bloom. A render pass warps V through the **log-polar cortical map** (BressloffвҖ“Cowan) so the pattern reads as psychedelic form-constants, not a flat petri dish (warm psilocybin amberвҶ’magentaвҶ’violet iridescence). **The seeвүҲhear weld:** each frame a GPU **stats reduction** reads the field's spatial statistics (mean V, variance, gradient) back and those set the amplitudes of an **inharmonic partial bank** вҖ” the organism's morphology literally re-voices the drone (the whole field, not a scalar вҶ’ pitch вҖ” the compositional model the jury said "hasn't moved in a month"). **Headless-safe:** the render loop runs from mount driven by a deterministic seeded carrier (pitch/energy = pure functions of an integer frame counter), and degrades to an animated **Canvas2D** RD field if `navigator.gpu` is absent, keeping the audio coupling alive вҖ” never blank/silent. **Ambition вҖ” honest 2/5:** **#2** вүҘ3 subsystems (mic pitch/RMS + WGSL-compute GrayвҖ“Scott + GPU stats-reduction + log-polar render + inharmonic re-voicing = 5) + **#3** named refs (Turing *The Chemical Basis of Morphogenesis* 1952 В· GrayвҖ“Scott В· BressloffвҖ“Cowan). **#1/#5 NOT claimed** вҖ” the fresh axis is the *combination* (hum-bred RD morphology in cortical space, field-statistics re-voicing), grep-0Г— as a weld built on existing primitives. **diversity:** `banned=[pointer/touch(6Г—) В· WebGL2-primary(7Г—) В· autonomous-self-playing(6Г—) В· Flow-Lenia/continuous-CA(3Г—) В· three.js/camera/tilt(recent) В· compositional-MEMORY(5/10)]`; `picked=[mic-HUM INPUT В· WebGPU-COMPUTE output(1Г—, jury's ask) В· hum-bred-GrayвҖ“Scott-in-cortical-space + field-statistics-re-voicing TECHNIQUE(grep-0Г— weld; GrayвҖ“Scott is discrete-species RD, NOT continuous-CA/Lenia) В· warm-psilocybin PALETTE В· INTENSE pole]` вҖ” clears every ban on every axis. **Love-signal:** inside Karel's loved generative-audio-reactive-form cluster (`1450-supershape-bloom`вқӨ `1396-apophenia-field`вқӨ `243-spectral-cloud`вқӨ `267-spectral-drift`вқӨ). **SAFETY:** no strobe вҖ” RD morphs are inherently slow, only <3 Hz luminance drift, `prefers-reduced-motion` slows the clock + thins detail. **No API route вҶ’ no guard** (pure `"use client"` WebGPU + Web Audio; zero new npm deps). **Validation:** normalizer = 0 rewrites; `next lint --dir 1972-morphosong --max-warnings 0` = **0**; `tsc --noEmit` = 0 in 1972; authoritative `npx next build --experimental-build-mode compile` = **EXIT 0**, `page.js` + client-reference-manifest emitted + route in BOTH manifests; losers 1974/1976 absent. **NOT eye/ear-verified for feel** (headless вҖ” no GPU/mic/display/speakers): the live WGSL compute path is unrun here (WGSL written to spec + layouts hand-checked; Canvas2D fallback IS the low-risk headless path); whether the humвҶ’morphologyвҶ’re-voice loop reads as *one organism you sing into* wants Karel's Chrome + a mic. Banked вӯҗвӯҗ `1974-threshold-loom` (Canvas2D keyboard-cadence hypnagogic ganzfeld вҖ” cosmic-ambient pole rebalance) + вӯҗ `1976-k-hole` (SVG gamepad ketamine AV-desync) вҶ’ IDEAS В§829. Design notes: `src/app/dream/1972-morphosong/README.md`
### [1984-stretched-choir](/dream/1984-stretched-choir) В· adult / xenharmonic В· **a playable STRETCHED-SPECTRUM instrument: every voice's partials are pulled progressively sharp (partial n at f0В·n^ОІ, ОІ=log2(stretch)) вҖ” the Railsback piano-tuning stretch generalised вҖ” and the playing scale is derived from the SAME stretch, so per Sethares (matched timbreвҶ”scale minimises dissonance) chords lock into an eerie glassy consonance that is detuned from equal temperament yet in tune with its own timbre. Drag the pseudo-octave stretch (1.98вҶ’2.12) while holding a chord and consonance MELTS and RE-FORMS live (numerically validated: matched triad Sethares roughness 0.339 vs mismatched 0.410 at stretch 2.10). WIDE-winner (cycle 831): 3 divergent explorers, shipped the one that puts the invention IN THE HARMONY вҖ” the jury's central В§831 ask ("a harmonic model that isn't the JI drone"). Directly answers jury provocation #2 (force a non-JI harmonic model); NOT the banned [1,9/8,5/4,4/3,3/2,5/3,15/8,2] partial stack. Banked вӯҗвӯҗ 1982-droplet-cairn (audio-first/haptic impact music, cashes today's SIGGRAPH 2026 finding) + вӯҗ 1980-tritave-loom (BohlenвҖ“Pierce editable weave, SVG-DOM).** В· **INPUT = Web MIDI (`requestMIDIAccess`, live keyboard вҖ” Karel's live-performance lane) with on-screen + computer-keyboard (a w s e d f t g y h u j k) fallback; feature-detected, degrades silently вҖ” NOT mic/tilt/camera/touch** / **OUTPUT = CSS COMPOSITOR: every sounding partial is a real radial-gradient DOM `<div>` with `mix-blend-mode: screen`, opacity-pulsed at its true acoustic beat rate via rAF вҖ” the shimmer IS the browser compositor blending translucent layers; NO canvas, NO WebGL, NO WebGPU (banned 5Г—), NO SVG-primary, NO Canvas2D-primary (4Г—). CSS-compositor was 1Г—/10 вҖ” the cleanest substrate dodge.** В· cycle 831 В· WIDE-winner (2026-07-19) В· demoable В· `theme: stretched/inharmonic spectral choir вҖ” consonance redefined by timbre (Sethares matched timbreвҶ”scale); a live stretch slider melts & re-forms it В· harmony: stretched-partial additive (ОІ=log2(stretch)) over a stretched 12-EDO of the pseudo-octave вҖ” NON-JI, NON-octave, NON-pentatonic В· palette: bone/ash/warm-white luminous voices on charcoal (NON-violet, NON-cosmic) В· needs-a-human: fully playable, no autonomous wallpaper` В· notes: `README.md` В· refs William Sethares *Tuning, Timbre, Spectrum, Scale* (1998) В· the Railsback curve (piano octave stretch) В· Wendy Carlos non-octave tunings (alpha/beta/gamma)
